  172 |     Print("✅ Scenario Profiles cleaned up");
  173 |

  176 |     Print("✅ Advanced Logger cleaned up and report generated");
  177 | 
  178 |     // Cleanup Indicator Manager (releases all handles)
  179 |     DeinitializeIndicatorManager();

  186 |         Print("✅ EA Context cleaned up");
  187 |     }

  190 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  191 | //| EXPERT TICK FUNCTION - UNIFIED SIGNAL GATEWAY                   |
  192 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  193 | void OnTick() {
  194 |     // Performance optimized tick processing with unified signal gateway
  195 |     static int tickCount = 0;
  196 |     static datetime lastSignalTime = 0;
  197 |     tickCount++;
  198 | 
  199 |     // Basic status monitoring
  200 |     if(tickCount % 1000 == 0) {
  201 |         Print("[UNIFIED TICK] #", tickCount, " - Signal Engine: ",
  202 |               (g_signalEngine ? "OK" : "NULL"), " Trade Gate: ", (g_tradeGate ? "OK" : "NULL"));
  203 |     }
  204 | 
  205 |     // Only process signals on new bars or significant price changes
  206 |     datetime currentBarTime = iTime(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0);
  207 |     if(currentBarTime <= lastSignalTime) {
  208 |         return; // Skip this tick
  209 |     }
  210 | 
  211 |     // 🎯 UNIFIED SIGNAL GATEWAY - SINGLE DECISION POINT
  212 |     if(g_signalEngine && g_tradeGate) {
  213 |         // Generate signal through unified gateway
  214 |         TradingSignal signal;
  215 |         signal = g_signalEngine.Generate(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, InpTradingStrategy);
  216 | 
  217 |         if(signal.type != SIGNAL_NONE) {
  218 |             // Log signal generation
  219 |             if(g_advancedLogger) {
  220 |                 g_advancedLogger.Info(StringFormat("Signal Generated: %s Confidence: %.3f Reason: %s",
  221 |                                     SignalTypeToString(signal.type), signal.confidence, signal.reason), "SIGNAL");
  222 |             }
  223 | 
  224 |             Print("[SIGNAL] Generated: ", SignalTypeToString(signal.type),
  225 |                   " Confidence: ", DoubleToString(signal.confidence, 3),
  226 |                   " Reason: ", signal.reason);
  227 | 
  228 |             // Gate check BEFORE execution
  229 |             TradeGateResult gateResult;
  230 |             gateResult = g_tradeGate.CheckAll();
  231 |             if(gateResult.ok) {
  232 |                 // Execute trade
  233 |                 ExecuteSignal(signal);
  234 | 
  235 |                 // Register executed trade with gate
  236 |                 g_tradeGate.RegisterExecutedTrade();
  237 |                 lastSignalTime = currentBarTime;
  238 |             } else {
  239 |                 if(g_advancedLogger) {
  240 |                     g_advancedLogger.Warn("Trade blocked by gate: " + gateResult.reason, "GATE");
  241 |                 }
  242 |                 Print("[GATE BLOCK] ", gateResult.reason);
  243 |             }
  244 |         }
  245 |     }
  246 | }
  247 | 
  248 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  249 | //| Execute Signal with Risk Management                              |
  250 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  251 | void ExecuteSignal(TradingSignal &signal)
  252 | {
  253 |     // Calculate position size based on risk
  254 |     double riskAmount = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_BALANCE) * InpRiskPercent / 100.0;
  255 |     double slDistance = MathAbs(signal.sl - ((signal.side == ORDER_TYPE_BUY) ?
  256 |                                            SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_ASK) :
  257 |                                            SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID)));
  258 | 
  259 |     double tickValue = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_TRADE_TICK_VALUE);
  260 |     double tickSize = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_TRADE_TICK_SIZE);
  261 | 
  262 |     double lotSize = 0.01; // Default minimum
  263 |     if(tickValue > 0 && tickSize > 0 && slDistance > 0) {
  264 |         lotSize = riskAmount / (slDistance * (tickValue / tickSize));
  265 | 
  266 |         // Normalize lot size
  267 |         double minLot = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_VOLUME_MIN);
  268 |         double maxLot = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_VOLUME_MAX);
  269 |         double lotStep = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_VOLUME_STEP);
  270 | 
  271 |         lotSize = MathMax(minLot, MathMin(maxLot, lotSize));
  272 |         if(lotStep > 0) {
  273 |             lotSize = MathRound(lotSize / lotStep) * lotStep;
  274 |         }
  275 | 
  276 |         // Round according to lot step
  277 |         int digitsLot = 2;
  278 |         if(lotStep >= 1.0) {
  279 |             digitsLot = 0;
  280 |         } else if(lotStep > 0.0) {
  281 |             double p = MathLog10(lotStep);
  282 |             if(p < 0) digitsLot = (int)MathRound(-p);
  283 |         }
  284 |         lotSize = NormalizeDouble(lotSize, digitsLot);
  285 |     }
  286 | 
  287 |     // Log trade operation
  288 |     if(g_advancedLogger) {
  289 |         string operation = (signal.side == ORDER_TYPE_BUY) ? "BUY" : "SELL";
  290 |         double currentPrice = (signal.side == ORDER_TYPE_BUY) ?
  291 |                              SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_ASK) :
  292 |                              SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
  293 | 
  294 |         g_advancedLogger.LogTradeOperation(operation, lotSize, currentPrice,
  295 |                                          signal.sl, signal.tp, signal.confidence,
  296 |                                          signal.reason, SignalTypeToString(signal.type));
  297 |     }
  298 | 
  299 |     // Execute trade
  300 |     CTrade trade;
  301 |     bool result = false;
  302 | 
  303 |     if(signal.side == ORDER_TYPE_BUY) {
  304 |         result = trade.Buy(lotSize, _Symbol, 0, signal.sl, signal.tp,
  305 |                           StringFormat("Sonic R %s", signal.reason));
  306 |     } else {
  307 |         result = trade.Sell(lotSize, _Symbol, 0, signal.sl, signal.tp,
  308 |                            StringFormat("Sonic R %s", signal.reason));
  309 |     }
  310 | 
  311 |     if(result) {
  312 |         g_daily_trades++;
  313 | 
  314 |         // Log successful trade
  315 |         if(g_advancedLogger) {
  316 |             g_advancedLogger.Info(StringFormat("Trade executed successfully: %s Lot: %.2f Confidence: %.3f",
  317 |                                 (signal.side == ORDER_TYPE_BUY ? "BUY" : "SELL"),
  318 |                                 lotSize, signal.confidence), "EXECUTION");
  319 |         }
  320 | 
  321 |         Print("✅ Trade executed - ", (signal.side == ORDER_TYPE_BUY ? "BUY" : "SELL"),
  322 |               " Lot: ", DoubleToString(lotSize, 2),
  323 |               " SL: ", DoubleToString(signal.sl, 5),
  324 |               " TP: ", DoubleToString(signal.tp, 5),
  325 |               " Confidence: ", DoubleToString(signal.confidence, 3));
  326 |     } else {
  327 |         // Log failed trade
  328 |         if(g_advancedLogger) {
  329 |             g_advancedLogger.Error(StringFormat("Trade execution failed: Error %d", GetLastError()), "EXECUTION");
  330 |         }
  331 | 
  332 |         Print("❌ Trade execution failed - Error: ", GetLastError());
  333 |     }
  334 | }
  335 | 
  336 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  337 | //| Trade Event Handlers for KPI Tracking                           |
  338 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  339 | void OnTradeTransaction(const MqlTradeTransaction& trans,
  340 |                        const MqlTradeRequest& request,
  341 |                        const MqlTradeResult& result)
  342 | {
  343 |     // Track trade results for KPI calculation
  344 |     if(trans.type == TRADE_TRANSACTION_DEAL_ADD) {
  345 |         // Get deal information
  346 |         if(HistoryDealSelect(trans.deal)) {
  347 |             double profit = HistoryDealGetDouble(trans.deal, DEAL_PROFIT);
  348 |             double volume = HistoryDealGetDouble(trans.deal, DEAL_VOLUME);
  349 |             string symbol = HistoryDealGetString(trans.deal, DEAL_SYMBOL);
  350 |             string comment = HistoryDealGetString(trans.deal, DEAL_COMMENT);
  351 | 
  352 |             // Only track our EA's trades
  353 |             if(StringFind(comment, "Sonic R") >= 0 && symbol == _Symbol) {
  354 |                 bool isWin = (profit > 0);
  355 | 
  356 |                 // Extract confidence from comment if available
  357 |                 double confidence = 0.5; // Default confidence
  358 |                 // TODO: Parse confidence from comment if stored
  359 | 
  360 |                 // Extract signal type from comment
  361 |                 string signalType = "UNKNOWN";
  362 |                 if(StringFind(comment, "BUY") >= 0) signalType = "BUY_SIGNAL";
  363 |                 if(StringFind(comment, "SELL") >= 0) signalType = "SELL_SIGNAL";
  364 | 
  365 |                 // Log trade result for KPI tracking
  366 |                 if(g_advancedLogger) {
  367 |                     g_advancedLogger.LogTradeResult(profit, isWin, confidence, signalType);
  368 |                 }
  369 | 
  370 |                 Print("[TRADE RESULT] P/L: ", DoubleToString(profit, 2),
  371 |                       " Win: ", (isWin ? "YES" : "NO"),
  372 |                       " Volume: ", DoubleToString(volume, 2));
  373 |             }
  374 |         }
  375 |     }
  376 | }
  377 | 
  378 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  379 | //| Timer Event for Periodic KPI Updates                            |
  380 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  381 | void OnTimer()
  382 | {
  383 |     // Generate periodic KPI updates during backtesting
  384 |     static datetime lastKPIUpdate = 0;
  385 |     datetime currentTime = TimeCurrent();
  386 | 
  387 |     // Update KPI every hour during backtesting
  388 |     if(currentTime - lastKPIUpdate >= 3600) {
  389 |         if(g_advancedLogger) {
  390 |             // This will update internal metrics and log current status
  391 |             string status = StringFormat("Periodic KPI Update - Balance: %.2f Equity: %.2f",
  392 |                                        AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_BALANCE),
  393 |                                        AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_EQUITY));
  394 |             g_advancedLogger.Info(status, "KPI_UPDATE");
  395 |         }
  396 |         lastKPIUpdate = currentTime;
  397 |     }
  398 | }
  399 | 
  400 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  401 | //| END OF ENHANCED EA WITH KPI TRACKING                            |
  402 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+

  272 |         g_ema89_handle = iMA(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 89, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
  273 |         g_ema200_handle = iMA(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 200, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
  274 |         Print("⚠️ Using fallback iMA calls - unified manager not available");
  275 |     }
  276 | 
  277 |     // Initialize ATR for SL/TP calculations
  278 |     g_atr_handle = iATR(_Symbol, InpATRTimeframe, InpATRPeriod);
  279 | 
  280 |     // Validate all handles
  281 |     if(g_ema34_handle == INVALID_HANDLE) {
  282 |         Print("❌ [INIT] Failed to create EMA34 indicator");
  283 |         return false;
  284 |     }
  285 |     if(g_ema89_handle == INVALID_HANDLE) {

  367 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  368 | //| TRADING FUNCTIONS                                                |
  369 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  370 | bool CanTrade() {
  371 |     // Check daily trade limit
  372 |     datetime current_date = TimeCurrent();
  373 |     string current_date_str = TimeToString(current_date, TIME_DATE);
  374 |     string last_trade_date_str = TimeToString(g_last_trade_date, TIME_DATE);
  375 | 
  376 |     if(current_date_str != last_trade_date_str) {
  377 |         g_daily_trades = 0;
  378 |         g_last_trade_date = current_date;
  379 |     }
  380 | 
  381 |     if(g_daily_trades >= InpMaxDailyTrades) {
  382 |         return false;
  383 |     }
  384 | 
  385 |     return true;
  386 | }
  387 | 
  388 | // Unified SL/TP via ATR distance and R:R
  389 | void CalculateUnifiedSLTP(bool is_buy, double entryPrice, double &outSL, double &outTP)
  390 | {
  391 |     // Use global ATR handle if available, otherwise create temporary
  392 |     double atrVal = 0.0;
  393 |     if(g_atr_handle != INVALID_HANDLE){
  394 |         double buf[1];
  395 |         if(CopyBuffer(g_atr_handle, 0, 0, 1, buf)>0) atrVal = buf[0];
  396 |     } else {
  397 |         // Fallback: create temporary handle
  398 |         int atrHandle = iATR(_Symbol, InpATRTimeframe, InpATRPeriod);
  399 |         if(atrHandle!=INVALID_HANDLE){
  400 |             double buf[1];
  401 |             if(CopyBuffer(atrHandle, 0, 0, 1, buf)>0) atrVal = buf[0];
  402 |             IndicatorRelease(atrHandle);
  403 |         }
  404 |     }
  405 |     double pipPoints = (_Digits==3 || _Digits==5) ? 10.0 : 1.0;
  406 |     double minSLDistance = InpMinSLPips * _Point * pipPoints;
  407 |     double atrDistance = (InpUseATRBasedSL && atrVal>0.0) ? (atrVal * InpSL_ATR_Multiplier) : 0.0;
  408 |     double slDistance = MathMax(minSLDistance, atrDistance);
  409 |     if(InpUseSpreadPadding){
  410 |         double spreadPrice = (double)SymbolInfoInteger(_Symbol, SYMBOL_SPREAD) * _Point;
  411 |         slDistance += spreadPrice;
  412 |     }
  413 |     if(is_buy){
  414 |         outSL = NormalizeDouble(entryPrice - slDistance, _Digits);
  415 |         outTP = NormalizeDouble(entryPrice + slDistance * InpRiskReward, _Digits);
  416 |     } else {
  417 |         outSL = NormalizeDouble(entryPrice + slDistance, _Digits);
  418 |         outTP = NormalizeDouble(entryPrice - slDistance * InpRiskReward, _Digits);
  419 |     }
  420 | }
  421 | 
  422 | // Position sizing by stop distance and tick value/size with ATR risk scaling clamp
  423 | double CalculatePositionSizeByStop(double entryPrice, double stopLossPrice)
  424 | {
  425 |     double account_balance = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_BALANCE);
  426 |     double baseRiskPercent = InpRiskPercent;
  427 | 
  428 |     // ATR-based position sizing scaling
  429 |     if(InpUseATRPositionSizing) {
  430 |         int bars = iBars(_Symbol, InpATRSizeTimeframe);
  431 |         if(bars > MathMax(InpATRSizeRefPeriod, InpATRSizePeriod) + 5) {
  432 |             int atrHandle = iATR(_Symbol, InpATRSizeTimeframe, InpATRSizePeriod);
  433 |             if(atrHandle != INVALID_HANDLE) {
  434 |                 double atrCur[1];
  435 |                 if(CopyBuffer(atrHandle, 0, 0, 1, atrCur) > 0) {
  436 |                     double atrAvgSum = 0.0; int cnt=0;
  437 |                     double atrBuf[]; ArrayResize(atrBuf, InpATRSizeRefPeriod);
  438 |                     if(CopyBuffer(atrHandle, 0, 1, InpATRSizeRefPeriod, atrBuf) == InpATRSizeRefPeriod) {
  439 |                         for(int i=0;i<InpATRSizeRefPeriod;i++){ atrAvgSum += atrBuf[i]; cnt++; }
  440 |                     }
  441 |                     double atrAvg = (cnt>0 ? atrAvgSum/cnt : 0.0);
  442 |                     if(atrAvg>0.0) {
  443 |                         double ratio = atrCur[0]/atrAvg;
  444 |                         double mult = 1.0;
  445 |                         if(ratio >= InpATRSizeHighVolThreshold) mult = InpATRSizeHighVolCut;
  446 |                         else if(ratio <= InpATRSizeLowVolThreshold) mult = InpATRSizeLowVolBoost;
  447 |                         mult = MathMax(InpATRSizeMinMultiplier, MathMin(InpATRSizeMaxMultiplier, mult));
  448 |                         baseRiskPercent *= mult;
  449 |                     }
  450 |                 }
  451 |                 IndicatorRelease(atrHandle);
  452 |             }
  453 |         }
  454 |     }
  455 | 
  456 |     double risk_amount = account_balance * baseRiskPercent / 100.0;
  457 |     double tick_value = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_TRADE_TICK_VALUE);
  458 |     double tick_size  = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_TRADE_TICK_SIZE);
  459 |     if(tick_value<=0.0 || tick_size<=0.0) return SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_VOLUME_MIN);
  460 | 
  461 |     double stopDistance = MathAbs(entryPrice - stopLossPrice);
  462 |     if(stopDistance<=0.0) return SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_VOLUME_MIN);
  463 | 
  464 |     double lots = risk_amount / (stopDistance * (tick_value / tick_size));
  465 | 
  466 |     // Normalize to broker limits
  467 |     double minLot = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_VOLUME_MIN);
  468 |     double maxLot = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_VOLUME_MAX);
  469 |     double lotStep = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_VOLUME_STEP);
  470 |     lots = MathMax(minLot, MathMin(maxLot, lots));
  471 |     if(lotStep>0) lots = MathRound(lots / lotStep) * lotStep;
  472 | 
  473 |     int digitsLot = 2;
  474 | if(lotStep >= 1.0) {
  475 |     digitsLot = 0;
  476 | } else if(lotStep>0.0){
  477 |     double p = MathLog10(lotStep);
  478 |     if(p<0) digitsLot = (int)MathRound(-p);
  479 | }
  480 | return NormalizeDouble(lots, digitsLot);
  481 | }
  482 | 
  483 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  484 | //| ADVANCED TRADING FUNCTIONS                                       |
  485 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  486 | void ExecuteBuySignalAdvanced(double signal_strength) {
  487 |     // Gate check
  488 |     TradeGateResult gr;
  489 |     TradeGateResult tmp;
  490 |     tmp = g_tradeGate.CheckAll();
  491 |     gr.ok = tmp.ok;
  492 |     gr.reason = tmp.reason;
  493 |     if(!gr.ok){ Print("[GATE BLOCK] ", gr.reason); return; }
  494 | 
  495 |     double entry = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_ASK);
  496 |     double sl=0, tp=0; CalculateUnifiedSLTP(true, entry, sl, tp);
  497 |     double lot_size = CalculatePositionSizeByStop(entry, sl);
  498 | 
  499 |     // Use integrated trade manager if available
  500 |     if(g_tradeManager != NULL) {
  501 |         if(g_tradeManager.OpenBuyTrade(lot_size, sl, tp, "Sonic R Advanced Buy")) {
  502 |             g_daily_trades++; g_tradeGate.RegisterExecutedTrade();
  503 |             if(g_eaContext && g_eaContext.pLogger) {
  504 |                 g_eaContext.pLogger.Info(StringFormat("[ENTRY] BUY %s lots=%.2f SL=%.5f TP=%.5f strategy=%s",
  505 |                     _Symbol, lot_size, sl, tp, EnumToString(InpTradingStrategy)), "TRADE");
  506 |             } else {
  507 |                 Print("✅ Advanced Buy executed - Lot: ", DoubleToString(lot_size, 2));
  508 |             }
  509 |         } else {
  510 |             if(g_eaContext && g_eaContext.pLogger) {
  511 |                 g_eaContext.pLogger.Error(StringFormat("[EXEC] Buy failed code=%d", GetLastError()), "TRADE");
  512 |             } else {
  513 |                 Print("❌ Advanced Buy failed - Error: ", GetLastError());
  514 |             }
  515 |         }
  516 |     } else {
  517 |         // Fallback to basic execution
  518 |         CTrade trade;
  519 |         if(trade.Buy(lot_size, _Symbol, 0, sl, tp, "Sonic R Buy")) {
  520 |             g_daily_trades++;
  521 |             Print("✅ Buy order executed - Lot: ", DoubleToString(lot_size, 2),
  522 |                   " SL: ", DoubleToString(sl, 5), " TP: ", DoubleToString(tp, 5));
  523 |             // Risk audit line
  524 |             double spreadPts = (double)SymbolInfoInteger(_Symbol, SYMBOL_SPREAD);
  525 |             double pipPoints = (_Digits==3 || _Digits==5) ? 10.0 : 1.0;
  526 |             double spreadPips = spreadPts / pipPoints;
  527 |             Print(StringFormat("[AUDIT] risk%%=%.2f lot=%.2f SL=%.5f TP=%.5f spread=%.1fp",
  528 |                   InpRiskPercent, lot_size, sl, tp, spreadPips));
  529 |         } else {
  530 |             Print("❌ Buy order failed - Error: ", GetLastError());
  531 |         }
  532 |     }
  533 | }
  534 | 
  535 | void ExecuteSellSignalAdvanced(double signal_strength) {
  536 |     // Gate check
  537 |     TradeGateResult gr;
  538 |     TradeGateResult tmp;
  539 |     tmp = g_tradeGate.CheckAll();
  540 |     gr.ok = tmp.ok;
  541 |     gr.reason = tmp.reason;
  542 |     if(!gr.ok){ Print("[GATE BLOCK] ", gr.reason); return; }
  543 | 
  544 |     double entry = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
  545 |     double sl=0, tp=0; CalculateUnifiedSLTP(false, entry, sl, tp);
  546 |     double lot_size = CalculatePositionSizeByStop(entry, sl);
  547 | 
  548 |     if(g_tradeManager != NULL) {
  549 |         if(g_tradeManager.OpenSellTrade(lot_size, sl, tp, "Sonic R Advanced Sell")) {
  550 |             g_daily_trades++; g_tradeGate.RegisterExecutedTrade();
  551 |             if(g_eaContext && g_eaContext.pLogger) {
  552 |                 g_eaContext.pLogger.Info(StringFormat("[ENTRY] SELL %s lots=%.2f SL=%.5f TP=%.5f strategy=%s",
  553 |                     _Symbol, lot_size, sl, tp, EnumToString(InpTradingStrategy)), "TRADE");
  554 |             } else {
  555 |                 Print("✅ Advanced Sell executed - Lot: ", DoubleToString(lot_size, 2));
  556 |             }
  557 |         } else {
  558 |             if(g_eaContext && g_eaContext.pLogger) {
  559 |                 g_eaContext.pLogger.Error(StringFormat("[EXEC] Sell failed code=%d", GetLastError()), "TRADE");
  560 |             } else {
  561 |                 Print("❌ Advanced Sell failed - Error: ", GetLastError());
  562 |             }
  563 |         }
  564 |     } else {
  565 |         // Fallback to basic execution
  566 |         CTrade trade;
  567 |         if(trade.Sell(lot_size, _Symbol, 0, sl, tp, "Sonic R Sell")) {
  568 |             g_daily_trades++;
  569 |             Print("✅ Sell order executed - Lot: ", DoubleToString(lot_size, 2),
  570 |                   " SL: ", DoubleToString(sl, 5), " TP: ", DoubleToString(tp, 5));
  571 |             double spreadPts = (double)SymbolInfoInteger(_Symbol, SYMBOL_SPREAD);
  572 |             double pipPoints = (_Digits==3 || _Digits==5) ? 10.0 : 1.0;
  573 |             double spreadPips = spreadPts / pipPoints;
  574 |             Print(StringFormat("[AUDIT] risk%%=%.2f lot=%.2f SL=%.5f TP=%.5f spread=%.1fp",
  575 |                   InpRiskPercent, lot_size, sl, tp, spreadPips));
  576 |         } else {
  577 |             Print("❌ Sell order failed - Error: ", GetLastError());
  578 |         }
  579 |     }
  580 | }
  581 | 
  582 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  583 | //| ENHANCED DRAGON BAND ANALYSIS                                    |
  584 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  585 | bool AnalyzeBuySignal(double current_price, double &ema34[], double &ema89[], double &ema200[]) {
  586 |     // Basic Dragon Band analysis
  587 |     bool trend_aligned = (ema34[0] > ema89[0] && ema89[0] > ema200[0]);
  588 |     bool price_above_ema34 = (current_price > ema34[0]);
  589 |     bool ema34_rising = (ema34[0] > ema34[1]);
  590 | 
  591 |     // Enhanced with SMC concepts
  592 |     bool smc_confirmation = false;
  593 |     if(InpEnableSMC && g_masterOrchestrator != NULL) {
  594 |         // Check for BOS (Break of Structure)
  595 |         smc_confirmation = GlobalIsBOS();
  596 | 
  597 |         // Check for Order Block
  598 |         bool order_block_nearby = IsNearOrderBlock();
  599 | 
  600 |         // Check for Liquidity Sweep
  601 |         bool liquidity_sweep = PVSRA_HasLiquiditySweep();
  602 | 
  603 |         smc_confirmation = smc_confirmation || order_block_nearby || liquidity_sweep;
  604 |     }
  605 | 
  606 |     // PVSRA confirmation
  607 |     bool pvsra_confirmation = false;
  608 |     if(InpEnablePVSRA && g_masterOrchestrator != NULL) {
  609 |         double pvsra_score = GetVPSRAScore();
  610 |         pvsra_confirmation = (pvsra_score > 0.7); // 70% threshold
  611 |     }
  612 | 
  613 |     // Combine all confirmations
  614 |     bool basic_signal = trend_aligned && price_above_ema34 && ema34_rising;
  615 |     bool advanced_confirmation = smc_confirmation || pvsra_confirmation;
  616 | 
  617 |     return basic_signal && (advanced_confirmation || !InpEnableSMC);
  618 | }
  619 | 
  620 | bool AnalyzeSellSignal(double current_price, double &ema34[], double &ema89[], double &ema200[]) {
  621 |     // Basic Dragon Band analysis
  622 |     bool trend_aligned = (ema34[0] < ema89[0] && ema89[0] < ema200[0]);
  623 |     bool price_below_ema34 = (current_price < ema34[0]);
  624 |     bool ema34_falling = (ema34[0] < ema34[1]);
  625 | 
  626 |     // Enhanced with SMC concepts
  627 |     bool smc_confirmation = false;
  628 |     if(InpEnableSMC && g_masterOrchestrator != NULL) {
  629 |         // Check for BOS (Break of Structure)
  630 |         smc_confirmation = GlobalIsBOS();
  631 | 
  632 |         // Check for Order Block
  633 |         bool order_block_nearby = IsNearOrderBlock();
  634 | 
  635 |         // Check for Liquidity Sweep
  636 |         bool liquidity_sweep = PVSRA_HasLiquiditySweep();
  637 | 
  638 |         smc_confirmation = smc_confirmation || order_block_nearby || liquidity_sweep;
  639 |     }
  640 | 
  641 |     // PVSRA confirmation
  642 |     bool pvsra_confirmation = false;
  643 |     if(InpEnablePVSRA && g_masterOrchestrator != NULL) {
  644 |         double pvsra_score = GetVPSRAScore();
  645 |         pvsra_confirmation = (pvsra_score > 0.7); // 70% threshold
  646 |     }
  647 | 
  648 |     // Combine all confirmations
  649 |     bool basic_signal = trend_aligned && price_below_ema34 && ema34_falling;
  650 |     bool advanced_confirmation = smc_confirmation || pvsra_confirmation;
  651 | 
  652 |     return basic_signal && (advanced_confirmation || !InpEnableSMC);
  653 | }
  654 | 
  655 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  656 | //| SMC INTEGRATION FUNCTIONS                                        |
  657 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  658 | /**
  659 |  * @brief Advanced Order Block Detection for Sonic R MC
  660 |  * @return true if current price is near a significant order block
  661 |  * @details Analyzes recent price action for institutional order blocks.
  662 |  *          Order blocks are areas where price was rejected before major moves.
  663 |  */
  664 | bool IsNearOrderBlock() {
  665 |     double currentPrice = iClose(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0);
  666 |     if(currentPrice == EMPTY_VALUE) return false;
  667 | 
  668 |     // Analyze last 30 bars for significant rejection areas
  669 |     bool foundOrderBlock = false;
  670 |     double orderBlockPrice = 0.0;
  671 |     int orderBlockBar = 0;
  672 | 
  673 |     for(int i = 5; i <= 30; i++) {
  674 |         double high_i = iHigh(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  675 |         double low_i = iLow(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  676 |         double close_i = iClose(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  677 |         double open_i = iOpen(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  678 | 
  679 |         if(high_i == EMPTY_VALUE || low_i == EMPTY_VALUE) continue;
  680 | 
  681 |         // Check for rejection patterns (long wicks)
  682 |         double bodySize = MathAbs(close_i - open_i);
  683 |         double rangeSize = high_i - low_i;
  684 |         double upperWick = high_i - MathMax(close_i, open_i);
  685 |         double lowerWick = MathMin(close_i, open_i) - low_i;
  686 | 
  687 |         bool hasSignificantRejection = false;
  688 |         double rejectionPrice = 0.0;
  689 | 
  690 |         if(rangeSize > 0) {
  691 |             // Upper rejection (bearish order block)
  692 |             if(upperWick / rangeSize > 0.6 && bodySize / rangeSize < 0.4) {
  693 |                 hasSignificantRejection = true;
  694 |                 rejectionPrice = high_i;
  695 |             }
  696 |             // Lower rejection (bullish order block)
  697 |             else if(lowerWick / rangeSize > 0.6 && bodySize / rangeSize < 0.4) {
  698 |                 hasSignificantRejection = true;
  699 |                 rejectionPrice = low_i;
  700 |             }
  701 |         }
  702 | 
  703 |         // Confirm with volume (if available)
  704 |         if(hasSignificantRejection) {
  705 |             double volume_i = (double)iVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  706 |             double avgVolume = 0.0;
  707 |             int validVolBars = 0;
  708 | 
  709 |             // Calculate average volume for confirmation
  710 |             for(int j = i+1; j <= i+InpLS_DetectionLookbackBars; j++) {
  711 |                 double vol_j = (double)iVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, j);
  712 |                 if(vol_j > 0) {
  713 |                     avgVolume += vol_j;
  714 |                     validVolBars++;
  715 |                 }
  716 |             }
  717 | 
  718 |             bool volumeConfirm = false;
  719 |             if(validVolBars > 0) {
  720 |                 avgVolume /= validVolBars;
  721 |                 volumeConfirm = (volume_i > avgVolume * 1.3); // 30% above average
  722 |             }
  723 | 
  724 |             // Check if current price is near this order block
  725 |             double distanceInPips = MathAbs(currentPrice - rejectionPrice) / _Point;
  726 | 
  727 |             double pipPoints = (_Digits==3 || _Digits==5) ? 10.0 : 1.0;
  728 |             double maxDistancePips = InpOB_MaxDistancePips;
  729 |             if(distanceInPips <= maxDistancePips && volumeConfirm) { // Within threshold pips
  730 |                 foundOrderBlock = true;
  731 |                 orderBlockPrice = rejectionPrice;
  732 |                 orderBlockBar = i;
  733 | 
  734 |                 Print("🏦 [ORDER BLOCK] Found near current price - Price: ",
  735 |                       DoubleToString(rejectionPrice, 5), " Distance: ",
  736 |                       DoubleToString(distanceInPips, 1), " pips, Bar: ", i);
  737 |                 break;
  738 |             }
  739 |         }
  740 |     }
  741 | 
  742 |     // Additional confirmation: Check if order block is still valid
  743 |     if(foundOrderBlock) {
  744 |         // Order block should not be violated significantly
  745 |         bool orderBlockValid = true;
  746 | 
  747 |         for(int k = 1; k < orderBlockBar; k++) {
  748 |             double close_k = iClose(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, k);
  749 |             if(close_k != EMPTY_VALUE) {
  750 |                 double violation = MathAbs(close_k - orderBlockPrice) / _Point;
  751 |                 if(violation > (InpOB_MaxViolationPips)) { // violation pips
  752 |                     orderBlockValid = false;
  753 |                     break;
  754 |                 }
  755 |             }
  756 |         }
  757 | 
  758 |         if(!orderBlockValid) {
  759 |             Print("⚠️ [ORDER BLOCK] Block invalidated by recent price action");
  760 |             foundOrderBlock = false;
  761 |         }
  762 |     }
  763 | 
  764 |     return foundOrderBlock;
  765 | }
  766 | 
  767 | /**
  768 |  * @brief Advanced Liquidity Sweep Detection for Sonic R MC
  769 |  * @return true if liquidity sweep pattern detected
  770 |  * @details Detects when price sweeps above/below key levels then quickly reverses.
  771 |  *          Uses multi-timeframe analysis and volume confirmation.
  772 |  */
  773 | // Renamed to avoid collision; use PVSRA_HasLiquiditySweep() in PVSRA_Enhanced.mqh
  774 | // Keeping this function commented for reference
  775 | /* bool HasLiquiditySweep() {
  776 |     double currentPrice = iClose(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0);
  777 |     double currentHigh = iHigh(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0);
  778 |     double currentLow = iLow(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0);
  779 | 
  780 |     if(currentPrice == EMPTY_VALUE || currentHigh == EMPTY_VALUE || currentLow == EMPTY_VALUE) {
  781 |         return false;
  782 |     }
  783 | 
  784 |     // Find recent swing highs and lows (last 15 bars for accuracy)
  785 |     double swingHigh = currentHigh;
  786 |     double swingLow = currentLow;
  787 |     int swingHighBar = 0;
  788 |     int swingLowBar = 0;
  789 | 
  790 |     for(int i = 1; i <= 15; i++) {
  791 |         double high_i = iHigh(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  792 |         double low_i = iLow(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  793 | 
  794 |         if(high_i != EMPTY_VALUE && high_i > swingHigh) {
  795 |             swingHigh = high_i;
  796 |             swingHighBar = i;
  797 |         }
  798 |         if(low_i != EMPTY_VALUE && low_i < swingLow) {
  799 |             swingLow = low_i;
  800 |             swingLowBar = i;
  801 |         }
  802 |     }
  803 | 
  804 |     // Calculate significant break threshold (ATR-based)
  805 |     double atr = 0.0;
  806 |     int atrHandle = iATR(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 14);
  807 |     if(atrHandle != INVALID_HANDLE) {
  808 |         double atrValues[1];
  809 |         if(CopyBuffer(atrHandle, 0, 0, 1, atrValues) > 0) {
  810 |             atr = atrValues[0];
  811 |         }
  812 |         IndicatorRelease(atrHandle);
  813 |     }
  814 |     double significantBreak = (atr > 0) ? atr * InpLS_SignificantBreak_ATR_Mult : (InpLS_SignificantBreak_FallbackPips * _Point);
  815 | 
  816 |     // Check for liquidity sweep in recent bars (last 5 bars)
  817 |     bool liquiditySweep = false;
  818 | 
  819 |     for(int i = 1; i <= 5; i++) {
  820 |         double high_i = iHigh(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  821 |         double low_i = iLow(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  822 |         double close_i = iClose(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  823 |         double open_i = iOpen(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  824 | 
  825 |         if(high_i == EMPTY_VALUE || low_i == EMPTY_VALUE || close_i == EMPTY_VALUE) continue;
  826 | 
  827 |         // Bullish liquidity sweep: high broke above swing high but closed significantly below
  828 |         bool bullishSweep = (high_i > swingHigh + significantBreak) &&
  829 |                            (close_i < swingHigh - significantBreak);
  830 | 
  831 |         // Bearish liquidity sweep: low broke below swing low but closed significantly above
  832 |         bool bearishSweep = (low_i < swingLow - significantBreak) &&
  833 |                             (close_i > swingLow + significantBreak);
  834 | 
  835 |         // Volume confirmation - higher than recent average
  836 |         double volume_i = (double)iVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  837 |         double avgVolume = 0.0;
  838 |         int validBars = 0;
  839 | 
  840 |         for(int j = i+1; j <= i+10; j++) {
  841 |             double vol_j = (double)iVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, j);
  842 |             if(vol_j > 0) {
  843 |                 avgVolume += vol_j;
  844 |                 validBars++;
  845 |             }
  846 |         }
  847 |     */
  848 | 
  849 | /**
  850 |  * @brief Advanced PVSRA Score Calculation for Sonic R MC
  851 |  * @return PVSRA score from 0.0 to 1.0
  852 |  * @details Calculates comprehensive Price, Volume, Support, Resistance, and Accumulation score.
  853 |  *          Uses multi-timeframe analysis with weighted components.
  854 |  */
  855 | // Moved: Use global GetVPSRAScore() defined in 03_MarketAnalysis_06_PVSRA_Manager.mqh
  856 | 
  857 | // Legacy implementation kept below for reference (not used)
  858 | /* double GetVPSRAScore_Legacy() {
  859 |     double priceScore = 0.0;
  860 |     double volumeScore = 0.0;
  861 |     double supportScore = 0.0;
  862 |     double resistanceScore = 0.0;
  863 |     double accumulationScore = 0.0;
  864 | 
  865 |     // Get current market data
  866 |     double currentPrice = iClose(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0);
  867 |     double currentVolume = (double)iVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0);
  868 | 
  869 |     if(currentPrice == EMPTY_VALUE || currentVolume <= 0) {
  870 |         return 0.0;
  871 |     }
  872 | 
  873 |     // 1. PRICE COMPONENT (25% weight) - EMA relationship analysis
  874 |     double ema34[2], ema89[2];
  875 |     if(CopyBuffer(g_ema34_handle, 0, 0, 2, ema34) >= 2 && CopyBuffer(g_ema89_handle, 0, 0, 2, ema89) >= 2) {
  876 |         ArraySetAsSeries(ema34, true);
  877 |         ArraySetAsSeries(ema89, true);
  878 | 
  879 |         // Price above EMAs = bullish, below = bearish
  880 |         if(currentPrice > ema34[0] && ema34[0] > ema89[0]) {
  881 |             priceScore = 0.8; // Strong bullish alignment
  882 |         } else if(currentPrice < ema34[0] && ema34[0] < ema89[0]) {
  883 |             priceScore = 0.2; // Strong bearish alignment
  884 |         } else {
  885 |             priceScore = 0.5; // Mixed/neutral
  886 |         }
  887 |     } else {
  888 |         priceScore = 0.5; // Default if data unavailable
  889 |     }
  890 | 
  891 |     // 2. VOLUME COMPONENT (20% weight) - Volume analysis
  892 |     double avgVolume = 0.0;
  893 |     int validVolumeBars = 0;
  894 | 
  895 |     for(int i = 1; i <= 20; i++) {
  896 |         double vol = (double)iVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  897 |         if(vol > 0) {
  898 |             avgVolume += vol;
  899 |             validVolumeBars++;
  900 |         }
  901 |     }
  902 | 
  903 |     if(validVolumeBars > 0) {
  904 |         avgVolume /= validVolumeBars;
  905 |         double volumeRatio = currentVolume / avgVolume;
  906 | 
  907 |         if(volumeRatio >= 2.0) {
  908 |             volumeScore = 1.0; // Extremely high volume
  909 |         } else if(volumeRatio >= 1.5) {
  910 |             volumeScore = 0.8; // High volume
  911 |         } else if(volumeRatio >= 1.2) {
  912 |             volumeScore = 0.6; // Above average volume
  913 |         } else if(volumeRatio >= 0.8) {
  914 |             volumeScore = 0.4; // Normal volume
  915 |         } else {
  916 |             volumeScore = 0.2; // Low volume
  917 |         }
  918 |     } else {
  919 |         volumeScore = 0.5; // Default
  920 |     }
  921 | 
  922 |     // 3. SUPPORT COMPONENT (20% weight) - Distance from recent lows
  923 |     double recentLow = currentPrice;
  924 |     for(int i = 1; i <= 20; i++) {
  925 |         double low_i = iLow(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  926 |         if(low_i != EMPTY_VALUE && low_i < recentLow) {
  927 |             recentLow = low_i;
  928 |         }
  929 |     }
  930 | 
  931 |     double supportDistance = (currentPrice - recentLow) / _Point;
  932 |     if(supportDistance <= 10) {
  933 |         supportScore = 1.0; // Very close to support
  934 |     } else if(supportDistance <= 30) {
  935 |         supportScore = 0.8; // Close to support
  936 |     } else if(supportDistance <= 50) {
  937 |         supportScore = 0.6; // Near support
  938 |     } else if(supportDistance <= 100) {
  939 |         supportScore = 0.4; // Moderate distance
  940 |     } else {
  941 |         supportScore = 0.2; // Far from support
  942 |     }
  943 | 
  944 |     // 4. RESISTANCE COMPONENT (20% weight) - Distance from recent highs
  945 |     double recentHigh = currentPrice;
  946 |     for(int i = 1; i <= 20; i++) {
  947 |         double high_i = iHigh(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  948 |         if(high_i != EMPTY_VALUE && high_i > recentHigh) {
  949 |             recentHigh = high_i;
  950 |         }
  951 |     }
  952 | 
  953 |     double resistanceDistance = (recentHigh - currentPrice) / _Point;
  954 |     if(resistanceDistance <= 10) {
  955 |         resistanceScore = 0.2; // Very close to resistance (bearish)
  956 |     } else if(resistanceDistance <= 30) {
  957 |         resistanceScore = 0.4; // Close to resistance
  958 |     } else if(resistanceDistance <= 50) {
  959 |         resistanceScore = 0.6; // Near resistance
  960 |     } else if(resistanceDistance <= 100) {
  961 |         resistanceScore = 0.8; // Good distance from resistance
  962 |     } else {
  963 |         resistanceScore = 1.0; // Far from resistance (bullish)
  964 |     }
  965 | 
  966 |     // 5. ACCUMULATION COMPONENT (15% weight) - Price-Volume trend
  967 |     double priceChange = 0.0;
  968 |     double volumeChange = 0.0;
  969 | 
  970 |     if(CopyBuffer(g_ema34_handle, 0, 0, 5, ema34) >= 5) {
  971 |         ArraySetAsSeries(ema34, true);
  972 |         priceChange = ema34[0] - ema34[4]; // 5-bar price change
  973 | 
  974 |         double vol0 = (double)iVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0);
  975 |         double vol4 = (double)iVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 4);
  976 |         if(vol4 > 0) {
  977 |             volumeChange = vol0 - vol4;
  978 |         }
  979 | 
  980 |         // Accumulation = rising price + rising volume
  981 |         if(priceChange > 0 && volumeChange > 0) {
  982 |             accumulationScore = 0.9; // Strong accumulation
  983 |         } else if(priceChange > 0 && volumeChange <= 0) {
  984 |             accumulationScore = 0.6; // Weak accumulation
  985 |         } else if(priceChange <= 0 && volumeChange > 0) {
  986 |             accumulationScore = 0.4; // Distribution possible
  987 |         } else {
  988 |             accumulationScore = 0.2; // Weak/distribution
  989 |         }
  990 |     } else {
  991 |         accumulationScore = 0.5; // Default
  992 |     }
  993 | 
  994 |     // Calculate weighted final score
  995 |     double finalScore = (priceScore * 0.25) + (volumeScore * 0.20) +
  996 |                        (supportScore * 0.20) + (resistanceScore * 0.20) +
  997 |                        (accumulationScore * 0.15);
  998 | 
  999 |     // Log detailed breakdown for debugging
 1000 |     Print("📊 [PVSRA] Score breakdown - Price:", DoubleToString(priceScore, 2),
 1001 |           " Volume:", DoubleToString(volumeScore, 2),
 1002 |           " Support:", DoubleToString(supportScore, 2),
 1003 |           " Resistance:", DoubleToString(resistanceScore, 2),
 1004 |           " Accumulation:", DoubleToString(accumulationScore, 2),
 1005 |           " Final:", DoubleToString(finalScore, 3));
 1006 | 
 1007 |     return MathMax(0.0, MathMin(1.0, finalScore));
 1008 | }
 1009 | 
 1010 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1011 | //| MISSING CORE SYSTEM FUNCTIONS - 100% COMPLETION                  |
 1012 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1013 | /**
 1014 |  * @brief Initialize Legacy Systems through CCore Bridge
 1015 |  * @return true if legacy systems initialized successfully
 1016 |  * @details Bridge function to maintain compatibility with existing procedural code
 1017 |  *          while integrating with new OOP CCore architecture.
 1018 |  */
 1019 | bool InitializeLegacySystems() {
 1020 |     Print("🔗 [BRIDGE] Initializing Legacy Systems through CCore...");
 1021 | 
 1022 |     // Validate CCore and Context are available
 1023 |     if(!g_coreEngine || !g_eaContext) {
 1024 |         Print("❌ [BRIDGE] Core Engine or EA Context not available");
 1025 |         return false;
 1026 |     }
 1027 | 
 1028 |     // Initialize legacy global variables through context
 1029 |     g_system_initialized = g_coreEngine.IsInitialized();
 1030 |     g_trading_allowed = g_eaContext.isEnabled;
 1031 |     g_emergency_mode = false;
 1032 |     g_daily_trades = 0;
 1033 |     g_last_trade_date = 0;
 1034 |     g_last_analysis_time = TimeCurrent();
 1035 | 
 1036 |     // Validate trading environment through CCore
 1037 |     if(!IsTradeEnvOk()) {
 1038 |         Print("❌ [BRIDGE] Trading not allowed in this environment");
 1039 |         return false;
 1040 |     }
 1041 | 
 1042 |     // Set EA Context symbol information
 1043 |     g_eaContext.symbol = _Symbol;
 1044 |     g_eaContext.period = _Period;
 1045 |     g_eaContext.point = _Point;
 1046 |     g_eaContext.digits = _Digits;
 1047 | 
 1048 |     // Validate symbol compatibility
 1049 |     if(StringLen(g_eaContext.symbol) < 6) {
 1050 |         Print("❌ [BRIDGE] Invalid symbol: ", g_eaContext.symbol);
 1051 |         return false;
 1052 |     }
 1053 | 
 1054 |     // Initialize symbol-specific parameters
 1055 |     long spread_points = SymbolInfoInteger(g_eaContext.symbol, SYMBOL_SPREAD);
 1056 |     double spread = (double)spread_points * g_eaContext.point;
 1057 |     double minLot = SymbolInfoDouble(g_eaContext.symbol, SYMBOL_VOLUME_MIN);
 1058 |     double maxLot = SymbolInfoDouble(g_eaContext.symbol, SYMBOL_VOLUME_MAX);
 1059 | 
 1060 |     Print("📊 [BRIDGE] Symbol: ", g_eaContext.symbol, " Spread: ", DoubleToString(spread/g_eaContext.point, 1),
 1061 |           " pips, MinLot: ", DoubleToString(minLot, 2), " MaxLot: ", DoubleToString(maxLot, 2));
 1062 | 
 1063 |     // Validate account and trading conditions
 1064 |     double balance = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_BALANCE);
 1065 |     double equity = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_EQUITY);
 1066 |     double freeMargin = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_MARGIN_FREE);
 1067 | 
 1068 |     if(balance <= 0 || equity <= 0) {
 1069 |         Print("❌ [BRIDGE] Invalid account balance or equity");
 1070 |         return false;
 1071 |     }
 1072 | 
 1073 |     Print("💰 [BRIDGE] Balance: ", DoubleToString(balance, 2),
 1074 |           " Equity: ", DoubleToString(equity, 2), " Free Margin: ", DoubleToString(freeMargin, 2));
 1075 | 
 1076 |     // Update EA Context timestamps
 1077 |     g_eaContext.startTime = TimeCurrent();
 1078 |     g_eaContext.lastUpdateTime = TimeCurrent();
 1079 |     g_eaContext.isRunning = true;
 1080 | 
 1081 |     Print("✅ [BRIDGE] Legacy systems integrated with CCore successfully");
 1082 |     return true;
 1083 | }
 1084 | 
 1085 | /**
 1086 |  * @brief LEGACY: Initialize Core Systems for Sonic R MC (DEPRECATED)
 1087 |  * @deprecated Use InitializeLegacySystems() through CCore bridge instead
 1088 |  * @return true if core systems initialized successfully
 1089 |  */
 1090 | bool InitializeCoreSystems() {
 1091 |     Print("⚠️ [DEPRECATED] InitializeCoreSystems() called - Use CCore architecture instead");

  202 | * @return String representation

  204 | #ifndef DISABLE_SCENARIO_ENUM_TO_STRING
  205 | string EnumToString(ENUM_TRADING_SCENARIO value) {
  206 |     switch(value) {
  207 |         case SCENARIO_SONIC_R_BASIC: return "Sonic R Basic";
  208 |         case SCENARIO_SONIC_R_ENHANCED: return "Sonic R Enhanced";
  209 |         case SCENARIO_SONIC_R_ADVANCED: return "Sonic R Advanced";

  216 | /**
  217 | * @brief Convert enum to string
  218 | * @param value The enum value
  219 | * @return String representation
  220 | */
  221 | string EnumToString(ENUM_MARKET_REGIME value) {
  222 |     switch(value) {
  223 |         case REGIME_TRENDING: return "Trending";
  224 |         case REGIME_RANGING: return "Ranging";
  225 |         case REGIME_VOLATILE: return "Volatile";
  226 |         case REGIME_UNKNOWN: return "Unknown";
  227 |         default: return "Unknown";
  228 |     }
  229 | }
  230 | 
  231 | /**
  232 | * @brief Safe string to double conversion
  233 | * @param str The string to convert
  234 | * @param defaultValue Default value if conversion fails
  235 | * @return Double value
  236 | */
  237 | double SafeStringToDouble(string str, double defaultValue = 0.0) {
  238 |     double result = StringToDouble(str);
  239 |     if(result == 0.0 && str != "0" && str != "0.0") {
  240 |         return defaultValue;
  241 |     }
  242 |     return result;
  243 | }
  244 | 
  245 | /**
  246 | * @brief Safe string to integer conversion
  247 | * @param str The string to convert
  248 | * @param defaultValue Default value if conversion fails
  249 | * @return Integer value
  250 | */
  251 | int SafeStringToInteger(string str, int defaultValue = 0) {
  252 |     long temp = StringToInteger(str);
  253 |     int result = (int)MathMin(temp, INT_MAX);
  254 |     if(result == 0 && str != "0") {
  255 |         return defaultValue;
  256 |     }
  257 |     return result;
  258 | }
  259 | 
  260 | /**
  261 | * @brief Format double to string with specified digits
  262 | * @param value The double value
  263 | * @param digits Number of digits
  264 | * @return Formatted string
  265 | */
  266 | string FormatDouble(double value, int digits = 5) {
  267 |     return DoubleToString(value, digits);
  268 | }
  269 | 
  270 | /**
  271 | * @brief Get current time as string
  272 | * @return Current time string
  273 | */
  274 | string GetCurrentTimeString() {
  275 |     return TimeToString(TimeCurrent(), TIME_DATE|TIME_MINUTES|TIME_SECONDS);
  276 | }
  277 | 
  278 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  279 | //| CORE VALIDATION FUNCTIONS                                         |
  280 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  281 | 
  282 | /**
  283 | * @brief Validate signal data
  284 | * @param signal The signal data to validate
  285 | * @return true if valid
  286 | */
  287 | bool ValidateSignalData(SSignalData &signal) {
  288 |     if(!signal.isValid) return false;
  289 |     if(signal.signalStrength < 0 || signal.signalStrength > 100) return false;
  290 |     if(signal.confluenceScore < 0 || signal.confluenceScore > 100) return false;
  291 |     return true;
  292 | }
  293 | 
  294 | /**
  295 | * @brief Validate confluence data
  296 | * @param confluence The confluence data to validate
  297 | * @return true if valid
  298 | */
  299 | bool ValidateConfluenceData(SConfluenceData &confluence) {
  300 |     if(!confluence.isValid) return false;
  301 |     if(confluence.confluenceScore < 0 || confluence.confluenceScore > 100) return false;
  302 |     if(confluence.confluenceFactors < 0) return false;
  303 |     return true;
  304 | }
  305 | 
  306 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  307 | //| CORE LOGGING FUNCTIONS                                            |
  308 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  309 | 
  310 | /**
  311 | * @brief Log info message
  312 | * @param message The message to log
  313 | */
  314 | void LogInfo(string message) {
  315 |     Print("[INFO] ", GetCurrentTimeString(), " - ", message);
  316 | }
  317 | 
  318 | /**
  319 | * @brief Log warning message
  320 | * @param message The message to log
  321 | */
  322 | void LogWarning(string message) {
  323 |     Print("[WARNING] ", GetCurrentTimeString(), " - ", message);
  324 | }
  325 | 
  326 | /**
  327 | * @brief Log error message
  328 | * @param message The message to log
  329 | */
  330 | void LogError(string message) {
  331 |     Print("[ERROR] ", GetCurrentTimeString(), " - ", message);
  332 | }
  333 | 
  334 | /**
  335 | * @brief Log debug message
  336 | * @param message The message to log
  337 | */
  338 | void LogDebug(string message) {
  339 |     Print("[DEBUG] ", GetCurrentTimeString(), " - ", message);
  340 | }
  341 | 
  342 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  343 | //| CORE SYSTEM FUNCTIONS                                             |
  344 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  345 | 
  346 | /**
  347 | * @brief Check if system is ready for trading
  348 | * @return true if ready
  349 | */
  350 | /* removed duplicate IsSystemReady to avoid redefinition; use the top-level one or Engine forward */ bool IsSystemReady() {
  351 |     if(!MQLInfoInteger(MQL_TRADE_ALLOWED)) return false;
  352 |     if(!TerminalInfoInteger(TERMINAL_TRADE_ALLOWED)) return false;
  353 |     if(!AccountInfoInteger(ACCOUNT_TRADE_ALLOWED)) return false;
  354 |     return true;
  355 | }
  356 | 
  357 | // Removed duplicate IsSystemHealthy() definition to avoid redefinition conflict; use the one from ErrorHandler module
  358 | 
  359 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  360 | //| END OF MASTER INCLUDES SYSTEM                                     |
  361 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  362 |

   32 |

   34 |         Print("❌ [MINIMAL MAIN] Insufficient bars: ", iBars(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT));
   35 |         return INIT_FAILED;
   36 |     }
   37 |     Print("✅ [MINIMAL MAIN] Step 1 OK");
   38 |     
   39 |     // Step 2: Test EA Context creation
   40 |     Print("[MINIMAL MAIN] Step 2: Testing EA Context creation...");
   41 |     g_eaContext = new CEaContext();

   43 |         Print("❌ [MINIMAL MAIN] Failed to create EA Context");
   44 |         return INIT_FAILED;
   45 |     }
   46 |     Print("✅ [MINIMAL MAIN] Step 2 OK - EA Context created");
   47 |     
   48 |     // Step 3: Test EA Context initialization
   49 |     Print("[MINIMAL MAIN] Step 3: Testing EA Context initialization...");
   50 |     if(!g_eaContext.Initialize()) {
   51 |         Print("❌ [MINIMAL MAIN] Failed to initialize EA Context");
   52 |         delete g_eaContext;
   53 |         g_eaContext = NULL;
   54 |         return INIT_FAILED;
   55 |     }
   56 |     Print("✅ [MINIMAL MAIN] Step 3 OK - EA Context initialized");
   57 |     
   58 |     // Step 4: Test input parameters
   59 |     Print("[MINIMAL MAIN] Step 4: Testing input parameters...");
   60 |     Print("InpLotSize: ", InpLotSize);
   61 |     Print("InpRiskPercent: ", InpRiskPercent);
   62 |     Print("InpMaxSpread: ", InpMaxSpread);
   63 |     Print("✅ [MINIMAL MAIN] Step 4 OK - Input parameters accessible");
   64 |     
   65 |     // Step 5: Test basic indicators
   66 |     Print("[MINIMAL MAIN] Step 5: Testing basic indicators...");
   67 |     int testEMA = iMA(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 20, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
   68 |     if(testEMA == INVALID_HANDLE) {
   69 |         Print("❌ [MINIMAL MAIN] Failed to create test indicator");
   70 |         delete g_eaContext;
   71 |         g_eaContext = NULL;
   72 |         return INIT_FAILED;
   73 |     }
   74 |     
   75 |     // Test data access
   76 |     double testBuffer[1];
   77 |     int copied = CopyBuffer(testEMA, 0, 0, 1, testBuffer);
   78 |     if(copied <= 0) {
   79 |         Print("❌ [MINIMAL MAIN] Failed to access indicator data, error: ", GetLastError());
   80 |         IndicatorRelease(testEMA);
   81 |         delete g_eaContext;
   82 |         g_eaContext = NULL;
   83 |         return INIT_FAILED;
   84 |     }
   85 |     
   86 |     IndicatorRelease(testEMA);
   87 |     Print("✅ [MINIMAL MAIN] Step 5 OK - Indicator test passed");
   88 |     
   89 |     Print("✅ ALL MINIMAL MAIN STEPS PASSED - MINIMAL MAIN EA INITIALIZED SUCCESSFULLY");
   90 |     return INIT_SUCCEEDED;
   91 | }

   27 |     
   28 |     if(iBars(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT) < 100) {
   29 |         Print("❌ [SIMPLE] Insufficient bars: ", iBars(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT));
   30 |         return INIT_FAILED;
   31 |     }
   32 |     
   33 |     // Step 2: Test input parameters
   34 |     Print("[SIMPLE] Step 2: Testing input parameters...");

   37 |     Print("InpMaxSpread: ", InpMaxSpread);
   38 |     Print("InpATRPeriod: ", InpATRPeriod);

   42 |     int ema20 = iMA(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 20, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
   43 |     int ema50 = iMA(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 50, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
   44 |     int atr = iATR(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 14);
   45 |     
   46 |     if(ema20 == INVALID_HANDLE) {
   47 |         Print("❌ [SIMPLE] Failed to create EMA20");
   48 |         return INIT_FAILED;
   49 |     }
   50 |     if(ema50 == INVALID_HANDLE) {
   51 |         Print("❌ [SIMPLE] Failed to create EMA50");
   52 |         IndicatorRelease(ema20);
   53 |         return INIT_FAILED;
   54 |     }
   55 |     if(atr == INVALID_HANDLE) {
   56 |         Print("❌ [SIMPLE] Failed to create ATR");
   57 |         IndicatorRelease(ema20);
   58 |         IndicatorRelease(ema50);
   59 |         return INIT_FAILED;
   60 |     }
   61 |     
   62 |     // Step 4: Test data access
   63 |     Print("[SIMPLE] Step 4: Testing data access...");
   64 |     double emaBuffer[1];
   65 |     double atrBuffer[1];
   66 |     
   67 |     int copied1 = CopyBuffer(ema20, 0, 0, 1, emaBuffer);
   68 |     int copied2 = CopyBuffer(atr, 0, 0, 1, atrBuffer);
   69 |     
   70 |     if(copied1 <= 0 || copied2 <= 0) {
   71 |         Print("❌ [SIMPLE] Failed to access indicator data");
   72 |         Print("EMA20 copied: ", copied1, " ATR copied: ", copied2);
   73 |         Print("Last error: ", GetLastError());
   74 |         IndicatorRelease(ema20);
   75 |         IndicatorRelease(ema50);
   76 |         IndicatorRelease(atr);
   77 |         return INIT_FAILED;
   78 |     }
   79 |     
   80 |     Print("✅ [SIMPLE] Data access OK - EMA20: ", emaBuffer[0], " ATR: ", atrBuffer[0]);
   81 |     
   82 |     // Step 5: Cleanup test indicators
   83 |     Print("[SIMPLE] Step 5: Cleanup...");
   84 |     IndicatorRelease(ema20);
   85 |     IndicatorRelease(ema50);
   86 |     IndicatorRelease(atr);
   87 |     
   88 |     Print("✅ [SIMPLE] ALL STEPS PASSED - SIMPLE EA INITIALIZED SUCCESSFULLY");
   89 |     return INIT_SUCCEEDED;
   90 | }

   36 |     if(ema == INVALID_HANDLE) {
   37 |         Print("❌ [ULTRA] Failed to create EMA, error: ", GetLastError());
   38 |         return INIT_FAILED;
   39 |     }
   40 |     Print("✅ [ULTRA] Step 2 OK - EMA handle: ", ema);
   41 |     
   42 |     // Step 3: Test data access
   43 |     Print("[ULTRA] Step 3: Testing data access...");
   44 |     double buffer[1];
   45 |     int copied = CopyBuffer(ema, 0, 0, 1, buffer);
   46 |     if(copied <= 0) {
   47 |         Print("❌ [ULTRA] Failed to copy data, error: ", GetLastError());
   48 |         IndicatorRelease(ema);
   49 |         return INIT_FAILED;
   50 |     }
   51 |     Print("✅ [ULTRA] Step 3 OK - EMA value: ", buffer[0]);
   52 |     
   53 |     // Step 4: Cleanup
   54 |     Print("[ULTRA] Step 4: Cleanup...");
   55 |     IndicatorRelease(ema);
   56 |     Print("✅ [ULTRA] Step 4 OK");
   57 |     
   58 |     Print("✅ ULTRA SIMPLE EA INITIALIZED SUCCESSFULLY");
   59 |     return INIT_SUCCEEDED;
   60 | }
   61 | 
   62 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   63 | //| Expert deinitialization function                                 |
   64 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   65 | void OnDeinit(const int reason)
   66 | {
   67 |     Print("=== ULTRA SIMPLE EA - DEINIT ===");
   68 |     Print("Deinit reason: ", reason);
   69 | }
   70 | 
   71 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   72 | //| Expert tick function                                             |
   73 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   74 | void OnTick()
   75 | {
   76 |     // Ultra simple tick
   77 |     static int count = 0;
   78 |     count++;
   79 |     if(count % 1000 == 0) {
   80 |         Print("[ULTRA] Tick #", count);
   81 |     }
   82 | }

   69 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   70 | //| Initialize - Setup core services                                |
   71 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   72 | bool CCore::Initialize(CEaContext* context)
   73 | {
   74 | if (m_initialized) return true;
   75 | if (context == NULL) return false;
   76 | 
   77 | m_pContext = context;
   78 | 
   79 | // TACTICAL FIX: Avoid arrow operator parsing issues
   80 | if (CheckPointer(m_pContext) == POINTER_DYNAMIC)
   81 | {
   82 | CLogger* logger = (*m_pContext).pLogger;  // EMERGENCY REVERT: Use dereference syntax
   83 | if (CheckPointer(logger) == POINTER_DYNAMIC)
   84 | {
   85 | if (!(*logger).Initialize())
   86 | {
   87 | Print("CORE ERROR: Failed to initialize Logger");
   88 | return false;
   89 | }
   90 | (*logger).Info("Core engine initializing...", "CORE");
   91 | }
   92 | }
   93 | 
   94 | // Set initialization flag
   95 | m_initialized = true;
   96 | (*m_pContext).isInitialized = true;
   97 | 
   98 | if (CheckPointer((*m_pContext).pLogger) == POINTER_DYNAMIC)
   99 | {
  100 | (*(*m_pContext).pLogger).Info("Core engine initialized successfully", "CORE");
  101 | }
  102 | 
  103 | return true;
  104 | }
  105 | 
  106 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  107 | //| Deinitialize - Cleanup core services                            |
  108 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  109 | void CCore::Deinitialize()
  110 | {
  111 | if (!m_initialized) return;
  112 | 
  113 | if (CheckPointer(m_pContext) == POINTER_DYNAMIC && CheckPointer((*m_pContext).pLogger) == POINTER_DYNAMIC)
  114 | {
  115 | (*(*m_pContext).pLogger).Info("Core engine shutting down...", "CORE");
  116 | }
  117 | 
  118 | // Reset flags
  119 | m_initialized = false;
  120 | if (CheckPointer(m_pContext) == POINTER_DYNAMIC)
  121 | {
  122 | (*m_pContext).isInitialized = false;
  123 | }
  124 | 
  125 | // Note: Individual service cleanup is handled by main EA
  126 | m_pContext = NULL;
  127 | 
  128 | Print("Core engine deinitialized");
  129 | }
  130 | 
  131 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  132 | //| OnTick - Main tick processing                                   |
  133 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  134 | void CCore::OnTick()
  135 | {
  136 | if (!m_initialized || CheckPointer(m_pContext) != POINTER_DYNAMIC) return;
  137 | 
  138 | // Update last tick time
  139 | (*m_pContext).lastUpdateTime = TimeCurrent();
  140 | 
  141 | // New-bar gating (optional)
  142 | static datetime s_lastBarTime = 0;
  143 | MqlRates rates[]; int copied = CopyRates(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0, 2, rates);
  144 | if(copied>=2){
  145 | datetime curBarTime = rates[0].time;
  146 | bool isNewBar = (curBarTime != s_lastBarTime);
  147 | if(!InpUseNewBarMode || isNewBar){
  148 | s_lastBarTime = curBarTime;
  149 | 
  150 | // Pre-flight: basic readiness
  151 | if(!IsSystemReady()) return;
  152 | 
  153 | // Unified signal decision via ConsolidatedSignals scenario APIs
  154 | // Avoid setting doBuy/doSell here; delegate decision to scenario functions
  155 | 
  156 | // Forward declarations are at global scope via MasterIncludes
  157 | 
  158 | ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE sig = SIGNAL_NONE;
  159 | switch(InpTradingStrategy){
  160 |   case STRATEGY_SONIC_R:
  161 |     { SignalDecision sd; if(GetSignal_SonicR_Basic(sd, _Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT)) { if(sd.buy) sig = SIGNAL_BUY; else if(sd.sell) sig = SIGNAL_SELL; else sig = SIGNAL_NONE; } else { sig = SIGNAL_NONE; } }
  162 |     break;
  163 |   case STRATEGY_SONIC_R_WITH_VPSRA:
  164 |   case STRATEGY_SCALING_WINNERS:
  165 |     { SignalDecision sd2; if(GetSignal_SonicR_VPSRA(sd2, _Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT)) { if(sd2.buy) sig = SIGNAL_BUY; else if(sd2.sell) sig = SIGNAL_SELL; else sig = SIGNAL_NONE; } else { sig = SIGNAL_NONE; } }
  166 |     break;
  167 |   case STRATEGY_SCOUT_RANGE:
  168 |   case STRATEGY_MULTI_ASSET:
  169 |   default:
  170 |     // Default to Sonic + PVSRA confirmation for safer entries
  171 |     { SignalDecision sd3; if(GetSignal_SonicR_VPSRA(sd3, _Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT)) { if(sd3.buy) sig = SIGNAL_BUY; else if(sd3.sell) sig = SIGNAL_SELL; else sig = SIGNAL_NONE; } else { sig = SIGNAL_NONE; } }
  172 |     break;
  173 | }
  174 | 
  175 | // Gate check (full gate also runs inside Execute*Advanced)
  176 | TradeGateResult gr;
  177 | gr = g_tradeGate_CheckAll();
  178 | if(!gr.ok){
  179 |     // Use logger if available, otherwise fallback to Print
  180 |     if(CheckPointer(m_pContext) == POINTER_DYNAMIC && CheckPointer((*m_pContext).pLogger) == POINTER_DYNAMIC) {
  181 |         (*(*m_pContext).pLogger).Warning(StringFormat("[GATE] Blocked: %s", gr.reason), "CORE");
  182 |     } else {
  183 |         Print("[GATE BLOCK] ", gr.reason);
  184 |     }
  185 |     return;
  186 | }
  187 | 
  188 | // Execute based on unified decision
  189 | if(sig == SIGNAL_BUY){ ExecuteBuySignalAdvanced(0.75); }
  190 | if(sig == SIGNAL_SELL){ ExecuteSellSignalAdvanced(0.75); }
  191 | }
  192 | }
  193 | // UI update is handled by main OnTick
  194 | }
  195 | 
  196 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  197 | //| OnTimer - Timer event processing                                |
  198 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  199 | void CCore::OnTimer()
  200 | {
  201 | if (!m_initialized || m_pContext == NULL) return;
  202 | 
  203 | // Timer-based processing
  204 | // - UI updates
  205 | // - Periodic checks
  206 | // - Performance monitoring
  207 | }

   44 | 
   45 | // --- Telegram queue & backoff ---
   46 | string              m_tgQueue[10];
   47 | bool                m_tgImportant[10];
   48 | int                 m_tgHead;
   49 | int                 m_tgTail;
   50 | datetime            m_tgNextAllowed;
   51 | int                 m_tgBackoffSec;
   52 | 
   53 | void                EnqueueTelegram(const string &msg, bool important) {
   54 | 	int next = (m_tgTail + 1) % 10;
   55 | 	if(next == m_tgHead) {
   56 | 		// queue full: drop non-important or oldest
   57 | 		if(!important) return;
   58 | 		m_tgHead = (m_tgHead + 1) % 10;
   59 | 	}
   60 | 	m_tgQueue[m_tgTail] = msg;
   61 | 	m_tgImportant[m_tgTail] = important;
   62 | 	m_tgTail = next;
   63 | }
   64 | 
   65 | void                ProcessTelegramQueue()
   66 | {
   67 | 	if(!m_enable_telegram) return;
   68 | 	if(TimeCurrent() < m_tgNextAllowed) return;
   69 | 	if(m_tgHead == m_tgTail) return; // empty
   70 | 	string msg = m_tgQueue[m_tgHead];
   71 | 	bool important = m_tgImportant[m_tgHead];
   72 | 	bool ok = SendTelegramMessage(msg, important);
   73 | 	if(ok) {
   74 | 		m_tgHead = (m_tgHead + 1) % 10;
   75 | 		m_tgBackoffSec = 1;
   76 | 		m_tgNextAllowed = TimeCurrent();
   77 | 	} else {
   78 | 		m_tgBackoffSec = MathMin(120, MathMax(2, m_tgBackoffSec * 2));
   79 | 		m_tgNextAllowed = TimeCurrent() + m_tgBackoffSec;
   80 | 	}
   81 | }
   82 | 
   83 | public:
   84 | // --- Constructor & Destructor ---
   85 | CLogger();
   86 | ~CLogger();
   87 | 
   88 | // --- Initialization & Cleanup Methods ---
   89 | bool                Initialize();
   90 | void                Deinitialize();
   91 | bool                IsInitialized() const { return m_initialized; }
   92 | void                OnTick() { ProcessTelegramQueue(); }
   93 | 
   94 | // --- Main Logging Methods ---
   95 | void                Log(const ENUM_LOG_LEVEL level, const string message, const string tags = NULL);
   96 | void                Info(const string message, const string tags = NULL) { Log(LOGLEVEL_INFO, message, tags); }
   97 | void                Debug(const string message, const string tags = NULL) { Log(LOGLEVEL_DEBUG, message, tags); }
   98 | void                Warning(const string message, const string tags = NULL) { Log(LOGLEVEL_WARNING, message, tags); }
   99 | void                Error(const string message, const string tags = NULL) { Log(LOGLEVEL_ERROR, message, tags); }
  100 | 
  101 | // --- Alias Methods for Compatibility ---
  102 | void                LogInfo(const string message, const string tags = "") { Info(message, tags); }
  103 | void                LogDebug(const string message, const string tags = "") { Debug(message, tags); }
  104 | void                LogWarning(const string message, const string tags = "") { Warning(message, tags); }
  105 | void                LogError(const string message, const string tags = "") { Error(message, tags); }
  106 | 
  107 | // --- Utility Methods ---
  108 | string              GetLogFileName() const { return m_log_file_name; }
  109 | void                SetLogLevel(const ENUM_LOG_LEVEL level) { m_log_level = level; }
  110 | ENUM_LOG_LEVEL      GetLogLevel() const { return m_log_level; }
  111 | 
  112 | // --- Telegram controls ---
  113 | void                EnableTelegram(bool enable) { m_enable_telegram = enable; }
  114 | void                SetTelegramCredentials(const string bot, const string chat) { m_telegram_bot_token = bot; m_telegram_chat_id = chat; }
  115 | void                QueueTelegram(const string &msg, bool important=false) { EnqueueTelegram(msg, important); }
  116 | };
  117 | 
  118 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  119 | //| Constructor - Initialize safe default state                     |
  120 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  121 | CLogger::CLogger() : 
  122 | m_log_level(LOGLEVEL_INFO),
  123 | m_log_output(2), // Console output
  124 | m_enable_telegram(false),
  125 | m_telegram_important_only(true),
  126 | m_telegram_bot_token(""),
  127 | m_telegram_chat_id(""),
  128 | m_order_comment("SONIC_R_MC_EA"),
  129 | m_symbol_name(""),
  130 | m_log_file_name(""),
  131 | m_log_file_handle(INVALID_HANDLE),
  132 | m_initialized(false)
  133 | {
  134 | 	m_tgHead = 0; m_tgTail = 0; m_tgNextAllowed = 0; m_tgBackoffSec = 1;
  135 | }
  136 | 
  137 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  138 | //| Destructor - Cleanup before object destruction                  |
  139 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  140 | CLogger::~CLogger() 
  141 | {
  142 | Deinitialize();
  143 | }
  144 | 
  145 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  146 | //| Initialize - Setup Logger with default configuration            |
  147 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  148 | bool CLogger::Initialize()
  149 | {
  150 | if (m_initialized) return true;
  151 | 
  152 | // Setup default configuration
  153 | m_log_level = LOGLEVEL_INFO;
  154 | m_log_output = 2; // Console output
  155 | m_enable_telegram = false;
  156 | m_order_comment = "SONIC_R_MC_EA";
  157 | 
  158 | m_symbol_name = Symbol();
  159 | 
  160 | // Setup file logging if needed
  161 | if (m_log_output == 1 || m_log_output == 3) // FILE or BOTH
  162 | {
  163 | string date_str = TimeToString(TimeCurrent(), TIME_DATE);
  164 | StringReplace(date_str, ".", "");
  165 | m_log_file_name = "Logs\\" + m_order_comment + "_" + m_symbol_name + "_" + date_str + ".log";
  166 | 
  167 | m_log_file_handle = FileOpen(m_log_file_name, FILE_WRITE | FILE_TXT | FILE_ANSI | FILE_SHARE_READ);
  168 | 
  169 | if (m_log_file_handle == INVALID_HANDLE)
  170 | {
  171 | PrintFormat("LOGGER WARNING: Cannot open log file '%s', error: %d. File logging disabled.", m_log_file_name, GetLastError());
  172 | }
  173 | else
  174 | {
  175 | FileSeek(m_log_file_handle, 0, SEEK_END);
  176 | }
  177 | }
  178 | 
  179 | m_initialized = true;
  180 | 
  181 | Info("Logger initialized successfully");
  182 | return true;
  183 | }
  184 | 
  185 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  186 | //| Deinitialize logger and cleanup resources                        |
  187 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  188 | void CLogger::Deinitialize()
  189 | {
  190 |     if (!m_initialized) return;
  191 | 
  192 |     Info("Logger deinitializing...");
  193 | 
  194 |     // Close file handle if open
  195 |     if (m_log_file_handle != INVALID_HANDLE)
  196 |     {
  197 |         FileClose(m_log_file_handle);
  198 |         m_log_file_handle = INVALID_HANDLE;
  199 |     }
  200 | 
  201 |     // Clear telegram queue
  202 |     m_tgHead = 0;
  203 |     m_tgTail = 0;
  204 |     for(int i = 0; i < 10; i++) {
  205 |         m_tgQueue[i] = "";
  206 |         m_tgImportant[i] = false;
  207 |     }
  208 | 
  209 |     m_initialized = false;
  210 | 
  211 |     Print("Logger deinitialized successfully");
  212 | }
  213 | 
  214 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  215 | //| Main logging function - handles all log output                   |
  216 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  217 | void CLogger::Log(const ENUM_LOG_LEVEL level, const string message, const string tags = NULL)
  218 | {
  219 |     if (!m_initialized) return;
  220 |     if (level < m_log_level) return; // Skip if below current log level
  221 | 
  222 |     // Format timestamp
  223 |     string timestamp = TimeToString(TimeCurrent(), TIME_DATE | TIME_SECONDS);
  224 | 
  225 |     // Format log level
  226 |     string level_str = GetLogLevelString(level);
  227 | 
  228 |     // Format tags
  229 |     string tag_str = (tags != NULL && tags != "") ? "[" + tags + "] " : "";
  230 | 
  231 |     // Create formatted message
  232 |     string formatted_message = StringFormat("[%s] %s %s%s",
  233 |                                           timestamp,
  234 |                                           level_str,
  235 |                                           tag_str,
  236 |                                           message);
  237 | 
  238 |     // Output to console (always)
  239 |     if (m_log_output == 2 || m_log_output == 3) // CONSOLE or BOTH
  240 |     {
  241 |         Print(formatted_message);
  242 |     }
  243 | 
  244 |     // Output to file
  245 |     if (m_log_output == 1 || m_log_output == 3) // FILE or BOTH
  246 |     {
  247 |         WriteToFile(formatted_message);
  248 |     }
  249 | 
  250 |     // Send to Telegram if enabled and important enough
  251 |     if (m_enable_telegram)
  252 |     {
  253 |         bool is_important = (level >= LOGLEVEL_WARNING) || !m_telegram_important_only;
  254 |         if (is_important)
  255 |         {
  256 |             string telegram_msg = StringFormat("%s %s%s",
  257 |                                              level_str,
  258 |                                              tag_str,
  259 |                                              message);
  260 |             EnqueueTelegram(telegram_msg, level >= LOGLEVEL_ERROR);
  261 |         }
  262 |     }
  263 | }
  264 | 
  265 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  266 | //| Write message to log file                                        |
  267 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  268 | void CLogger::WriteToFile(const string& formatted_message) const
  269 | {
  270 |     if (m_log_file_handle == INVALID_HANDLE) return;
  271 | 
  272 |     FileWriteString(m_log_file_handle, formatted_message + "\n");
  273 |     FileFlush(m_log_file_handle);
  274 | }
  275 | 
  276 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  277 | //| Get string representation of log level                           |
  278 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  279 | string CLogger::GetLogLevelString(const ENUM_LOG_LEVEL level) const
  280 | {
  281 |     switch(level)
  282 |     {
  283 |         case LOGLEVEL_DEBUG:   return "[DEBUG]";
  284 |         case LOGLEVEL_INFO:    return "[INFO] ";
  285 |         case LOGLEVEL_WARNING: return "[WARN] ";
  286 |         case LOGLEVEL_ERROR:   return "[ERROR]";
  287 |         default:               return "[UNKNOWN]";
  288 |     }
  289 | }
  290 | 
  291 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  292 | //| Send message to Telegram (stub implementation)                   |
  293 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  294 | bool CLogger::SendTelegramMessage(const string& formatted_message, const bool important) const
  295 | {
  296 |     // Stub implementation - would need actual Telegram API integration
  297 |     // For now, just return true to avoid queue buildup
  298 |     return true;
  299 | }
  300 | 
  301 | #endif
  302 | 
  303 |
