   23 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   24 | //| Trade Performance Metrics                                        |
   25 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   26 | struct TradeMetrics {
   27 |     int totalTrades;
   28 |     int winningTrades;
   29 |     int losingTrades;
   30 |     double totalProfit;
   31 |     double totalLoss;
   32 |     double grossProfit;
   33 |     double grossLoss;
   34 |     double maxDrawdown;
   35 |     double maxDrawdownPercent;
   36 |     double profitFactor;
   37 |     double winRate;
   38 |     double avgWin;
   39 |     double avgLoss;
   40 |     double sharpeRatio;
   41 |     double sortinoRatio;
   42 |     double calmarRatio;
   43 |     double maxConsecutiveWins;
   44 |     double maxConsecutiveLosses;
   45 |     double largestWin;
   46 |     double largestLoss;
   47 |     datetime firstTradeTime;
   48 |     datetime lastTradeTime;
   49 |     
   50 |     // Scenario-specific metrics
   51 |     string scenarioName;
   52 |     double confluenceThreshold;
   53 |     double avgConfidence;
   54 |     int dragonSignals;
   55 |     int pvsraSignals;
   56 |     int scoutSignals;
   57 |     
   58 |     TradeMetrics() {
   59 |         totalTrades = 0;
   60 |         winningTrades = 0;
   61 |         losingTrades = 0;
   62 |         totalProfit = 0.0;
   63 |         totalLoss = 0.0;
   64 |         grossProfit = 0.0;
   65 |         grossLoss = 0.0;
   66 |         maxDrawdown = 0.0;
   67 |         maxDrawdownPercent = 0.0;
   68 |         profitFactor = 0.0;
   69 |         winRate = 0.0;
   70 |         avgWin = 0.0;
   71 |         avgLoss = 0.0;
   72 |         sharpeRatio = 0.0;
   73 |         sortinoRatio = 0.0;
   74 |         calmarRatio = 0.0;
   75 |         maxConsecutiveWins = 0;
   76 |         maxConsecutiveLosses = 0;
   77 |         largestWin = 0.0;
   78 |         largestLoss = 0.0;
   79 |         firstTradeTime = 0;
   80 |         lastTradeTime = 0;
   81 |         scenarioName = "";
   82 |         confluenceThreshold = 0.0;
   83 |         avgConfidence = 0.0;
   84 |         dragonSignals = 0;
   85 |         pvsraSignals = 0;
   86 |         scoutSignals = 0;
   87 |     }
   88 | };
   89 | 
   90 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   91 | //| Advanced Logger Class                                            |
   92 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   93 | class CAdvancedLogger {
   94 | private:
   95 |     string m_logFileName;
   96 |     string m_kpiFileName;
   97 |     string m_tradeFileName;
   98 |     bool m_initialized;
   99 |     bool m_enableFileLogging;
  100 |     bool m_enableConsoleLogging;
  101 |     
  102 |     // Performance tracking
  103 |     TradeMetrics m_metrics;
  104 |     double m_initialBalance;
  105 |     double m_peakBalance;
  106 |     double m_currentBalance;
  107 |     int m_consecutiveWins;
  108 |     int m_consecutiveLosses;
  109 |     
  110 |     // Session tracking
  111 |     datetime m_sessionStart;
  112 |     string m_currentScenario;
  113 |     
  114 | public:
  115 |     CAdvancedLogger() {
  116 |         m_initialized = false;
  117 |         m_enableFileLogging = true;
  118 |         m_enableConsoleLogging = true;
  119 |         m_initialBalance = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_BALANCE);
  120 |         m_peakBalance = m_initialBalance;
  121 |         m_currentBalance = m_initialBalance;
  122 |         m_consecutiveWins = 0;
  123 |         m_consecutiveLosses = 0;
  124 |         m_sessionStart = TimeCurrent();
  125 |         m_currentScenario = "";
  126 |     }
  127 |     
  128 |     bool Initialize(string scenario = "") {
  129 |         if(m_initialized) return true;
  130 |         
  131 |         m_currentScenario = (scenario == "") ? "UNKNOWN" : scenario;
  132 |         
  133 |         // Create log file names with timestamp and scenario
  134 |         datetime now = TimeCurrent();
  135 |         string timeStr = TimeToString(now, TIME_DATE) + "_" + TimeToString(now, TIME_MINUTES);
  136 |         StringReplace(timeStr, ".", "");
  137 |         StringReplace(timeStr, ":", "");
  138 |         StringReplace(timeStr, " ", "_");
  139 |         
  140 |         m_logFileName = "SonicR_" + m_currentScenario + "_" + timeStr + ".log";
  141 |         m_kpiFileName = "SonicR_KPI_" + m_currentScenario + "_" + timeStr + ".csv";
  142 |         m_tradeFileName = "SonicR_Trades_" + m_currentScenario + "_" + timeStr + ".csv";
  143 |         
  144 |         // Initialize metrics
  145 |         m_metrics.scenarioName = m_currentScenario;
  146 |         m_metrics.firstTradeTime = now;
  147 |         
  148 |         // Write headers
  149 |         if(m_enableFileLogging) {
  150 |             WriteKPIHeader();
  151 |             WriteTradeHeader();
  152 |         }
  153 |         
  154 |         Info("Advanced Logger initialized for scenario: " + m_currentScenario, "LOGGER");
  155 |         
  156 |         m_initialized = true;
  157 |         return true;
  158 |     }
  159 |     
  160 |     void Log(ENUM_LOG_LEVEL level, string message, string tag = "") {
  161 |         if(!m_initialized) return;
  162 |         
  163 |         string levelStr = LogLevelToString(level);
  164 |         string timestamp = TimeToString(TimeCurrent(), TIME_DATE|TIME_SECONDS);
  165 |         string logEntry = StringFormat("[%s] %s [%s] %s: %s", 
  166 |                                      timestamp, levelStr, m_currentScenario, tag, message);
  167 |         
  168 |         if(m_enableConsoleLogging) {
  169 |             Print(logEntry);
  170 |         }
  171 |         
  172 |         if(m_enableFileLogging) {
  173 |             WriteToFile(m_logFileName, logEntry);
  174 |         }
  175 |     }
  176 |     
  177 |     void Debug(string message, string tag = "") { Log(LOG_DEBUG, message, tag); }
  178 |     void Info(string message, string tag = "") { Log(LOG_INFO, message, tag); }
  179 |     void Warn(string message, string tag = "") { Log(LOG_WARN, message, tag); }
  180 |     void Error(string message, string tag = "") { Log(LOG_ERROR, message, tag); }
  181 |     
  182 |     void LogTradeOperation(string operation, double lot, double price, double sl, double tp, 
  183 |                           double confidence, string reason, string signalType) {
  184 |         string tradeLog = StringFormat("TRADE_%s: Lot=%.2f Price=%.5f SL=%.5f TP=%.5f Conf=%.3f Signal=%s Reason=%s",
  185 |                                      operation, lot, price, sl, tp, confidence, signalType, reason);
  186 |         Log(LOG_TRADE, tradeLog, "TRADE");
  187 |         
  188 |         // Write to trade CSV
  189 |         if(m_enableFileLogging) {
  190 |             string csvLine = StringFormat("%s,%s,%.2f,%.5f,%.5f,%.5f,%.3f,%s,%s",
  191 |                                         TimeToString(TimeCurrent(), TIME_DATE|TIME_SECONDS),
  192 |                                         operation, lot, price, sl, tp, confidence, signalType, reason);
  193 |             WriteToFile(m_tradeFileName, csvLine);
  194 |         }
  195 |     }
  196 |     
  197 |     void LogTradeResult(double profit, bool isWin, double confidence, string signalType) {
  198 |         m_metrics.totalTrades++;
  199 |         m_metrics.lastTradeTime = TimeCurrent();
  200 |         
  201 |         if(isWin) {
  202 |             m_metrics.winningTrades++;
  203 |             m_metrics.grossProfit += profit;
  204 |             m_consecutiveWins++;
  205 |             m_consecutiveLosses = 0;
  206 |             if(m_consecutiveWins > m_metrics.maxConsecutiveWins) {
  207 |                 m_metrics.maxConsecutiveWins = m_consecutiveWins;
  208 |             }
  209 |             if(profit > m_metrics.largestWin) {
  210 |                 m_metrics.largestWin = profit;
  211 |             }
  212 |         } else {
  213 |             m_metrics.losingTrades++;
  214 |             m_metrics.grossLoss += MathAbs(profit);
  215 |             m_consecutiveLosses++;
  216 |             m_consecutiveWins = 0;
  217 |             if(m_consecutiveLosses > m_metrics.maxConsecutiveLosses) {
  218 |                 m_metrics.maxConsecutiveLosses = m_consecutiveLosses;
  219 |             }
  220 |             if(MathAbs(profit) > m_metrics.largestLoss) {
  221 |                 m_metrics.largestLoss = MathAbs(profit);
  222 |             }
  223 |         }
  224 |         
  225 |         // Update balance tracking
  226 |         m_currentBalance = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_BALANCE);
  227 |         if(m_currentBalance > m_peakBalance) {
  228 |             m_peakBalance = m_currentBalance;
  229 |         }
  230 |         
  231 |         // Calculate drawdown
  232 |         double currentDrawdown = m_peakBalance - m_currentBalance;
  233 |         double currentDrawdownPercent = (m_peakBalance > 0) ? (currentDrawdown / m_peakBalance) * 100.0 : 0.0;
  234 |         
  235 |         if(currentDrawdown > m_metrics.maxDrawdown) {
  236 |             m_metrics.maxDrawdown = currentDrawdown;
  237 |         }
  238 |         if(currentDrawdownPercent > m_metrics.maxDrawdownPercent) {
  239 |             m_metrics.maxDrawdownPercent = currentDrawdownPercent;
  240 |         }
  241 |         
  242 |         // Update signal counters
  243 |         if(StringFind(signalType, "DRAGON") >= 0) m_metrics.dragonSignals++;
  244 |         if(StringFind(signalType, "PVSRA") >= 0) m_metrics.pvsraSignals++;
  245 |         if(StringFind(signalType, "SCOUT") >= 0) m_metrics.scoutSignals++;
  246 |         
  247 |         // Update confidence tracking
  248 |         m_metrics.avgConfidence = ((m_metrics.avgConfidence * (m_metrics.totalTrades - 1)) + confidence) / m_metrics.totalTrades;
  249 |         
  250 |         CalculateMetrics();
  251 |         
  252 |         string resultLog = StringFormat("TRADE_RESULT: P/L=%.2f Win=%s Confidence=%.3f Signal=%s Total=%d WR=%.1f%% PF=%.2f DD=%.1f%%",
  253 |                                       profit, (isWin ? "YES" : "NO"), confidence, signalType, 
  254 |                                       m_metrics.totalTrades, m_metrics.winRate, m_metrics.profitFactor, m_metrics.maxDrawdownPercent);
  255 |         Log(LOG_KPI, resultLog, "METRICS");
  256 |     }
  257 |     
  258 |     void GenerateBacktestReport() {
  259 |         if(!m_initialized) return;
  260 |         
  261 |         CalculateMetrics();
  262 |         
  263 |         Info("=== BACKTEST REPORT GENERATION ===", "REPORT");
  264 |         Info("Scenario: " + m_metrics.scenarioName, "REPORT");
  265 |         Info("Period: " + TimeToString(m_metrics.firstTradeTime, TIME_DATE) + " to " + TimeToString(m_metrics.lastTradeTime, TIME_DATE), "REPORT");
  266 |         Info("Total Trades: " + IntegerToString(m_metrics.totalTrades), "REPORT");
  267 |         Info("Win Rate: " + DoubleToString(m_metrics.winRate, 2) + "%", "REPORT");
  268 |         Info("Profit Factor: " + DoubleToString(m_metrics.profitFactor, 2), "REPORT");
  269 |         Info("Max Drawdown: " + DoubleToString(m_metrics.maxDrawdownPercent, 2) + "%", "REPORT");
  270 |         Info("Sharpe Ratio: " + DoubleToString(m_metrics.sharpeRatio, 3), "REPORT");
  271 |         Info("Average Confidence: " + DoubleToString(m_metrics.avgConfidence, 3), "REPORT");
  272 |         
  273 |         if(m_enableFileLogging) {
  274 |             WriteKPIReport();
  275 |         }
  276 |     }
  277 |     
  278 | private:
  279 |     void CalculateMetrics() {
  280 |         if(m_metrics.totalTrades == 0) return;
  281 |         
  282 |         m_metrics.winRate = ((double)m_metrics.winningTrades / m_metrics.totalTrades) * 100.0;
  283 |         m_metrics.profitFactor = (m_metrics.grossLoss > 0) ? m_metrics.grossProfit / m_metrics.grossLoss : 0.0;
  284 |         m_metrics.avgWin = (m_metrics.winningTrades > 0) ? m_metrics.grossProfit / m_metrics.winningTrades : 0.0;
  285 |         m_metrics.avgLoss = (m_metrics.losingTrades > 0) ? m_metrics.grossLoss / m_metrics.losingTrades : 0.0;
  286 |         
  287 |         // Simple Sharpe ratio calculation
  288 |         double totalReturn = m_currentBalance - m_initialBalance;
  289 |         double returnPercent = (m_initialBalance > 0) ? (totalReturn / m_initialBalance) * 100.0 : 0.0;
  290 |         m_metrics.sharpeRatio = (m_metrics.maxDrawdownPercent > 0) ? returnPercent / m_metrics.maxDrawdownPercent : 0.0;
  291 |     }
  292 |     
  293 |     string LogLevelToString(ENUM_LOG_LEVEL level) {
  294 |         switch(level) {
  295 |             case LOG_DEBUG: return "DEBUG";
  296 |             case LOG_INFO: return "INFO";
  297 |             case LOG_WARN: return "WARN";
  298 |             case LOG_ERROR: return "ERROR";
  299 |             case LOG_TRADE: return "TRADE";
  300 |             case LOG_KPI: return "KPI";
  301 |             default: return "UNKNOWN";
  302 |         }
  303 |     }
  304 |     
  305 |     void WriteToFile(string fileName, string content) {
  306 |         int handle = FileOpen(fileName, FILE_WRITE|FILE_TXT|FILE_ANSI, '\t');
  307 |         if(handle != INVALID_HANDLE) {
  308 |             FileSeek(handle, 0, SEEK_END);
  309 |             FileWriteString(handle, content + "\n");
  310 |             FileClose(handle);
  311 |         }
  312 |     }
  313 |     
  314 |     void WriteKPIHeader() {
  315 |         string header = "Timestamp,Scenario,TotalTrades,WinRate,ProfitFactor,MaxDD%,Sharpe,AvgConfidence,DragonSignals,PVSRASignals,ScoutSignals";
  316 |         WriteToFile(m_kpiFileName, header);
  317 |     }
  318 |     
  319 |     void WriteTradeHeader() {
  320 |         string header = "Timestamp,Operation,Lot,Price,SL,TP,Confidence,SignalType,Reason";
  321 |         WriteToFile(m_tradeFileName, header);
  322 |     }
  323 |     
  324 |     void WriteKPIReport() {
  325 |         string kpiLine = StringFormat("%s,%s,%d,%.2f,%.2f,%.2f,%.3f,%.3f,%d,%d,%d",
  326 |                                     TimeToString(TimeCurrent(), TIME_DATE|TIME_SECONDS),
  327 |                                     m_metrics.scenarioName,
  328 |                                     m_metrics.totalTrades,
  329 |                                     m_metrics.winRate,
  330 |                                     m_metrics.profitFactor,
  331 |                                     m_metrics.maxDrawdownPercent,
  332 |                                     m_metrics.sharpeRatio,
  333 |                                     m_metrics.avgConfidence,
  334 |                                     m_metrics.dragonSignals,
  335 |                                     m_metrics.pvsraSignals,
  336 |                                     m_metrics.scoutSignals);
  337 |         WriteToFile(m_kpiFileName, kpiLine);
  338 |     }
  339 | };
  340 | 
  341 | // Global logger instance
  342 | CAdvancedLogger* g_advancedLogger = NULL;
  343 | 
  344 | // Helper functions
  345 | bool InitializeAdvancedLogger(string scenario = "") {
  346 |     if(g_advancedLogger == NULL) {
  347 |         g_advancedLogger = new CAdvancedLogger();
  348 |     }
  349 |     return g_advancedLogger.Initialize(scenario);
  350 | }
  351 | 
  352 | void DeinitializeAdvancedLogger() {
  353 |     if(g_advancedLogger != NULL) {
  354 |         g_advancedLogger.GenerateBacktestReport();
  355 |         delete g_advancedLogger;
  356 |         g_advancedLogger = NULL;
  357 |     }
  358 | }
  359 | 
  360 | #endif // ADVANCED_LOGGER_MQH

  230 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  231 | //| COMPLETE ARRAY BOUNDS VALIDATOR                               |
  232 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  233 | /**
  234 | * @brief Complete array bounds validation system
  235 | * 
  236 | * This class fixes ALL array bounds errors identified in system analysis:
  237 | * - SMC_Consolidated.mqh line 541 (FIXED)
  238 | * - Analysis_PatternRecognition.mqh swing point detection
  239 | * - Signal_StrictFiltering.mqh FVG detection loop
  240 | * - All other potential bounds violations
  241 | */
  242 | class CArrayBoundsValidator
  243 | {
  244 | private:
  245 | static int                      m_validationCount;
  246 | static int                      m_violationCount;
  247 | static datetime                 m_lastViolation;
  248 | 
  249 | public:
  250 | /**
  251 | * @brief Validate history availability for indicator access
  252 | * @param symbol Trading symbol
  253 | * @param timeframe Chart timeframe
  254 | * @param requiredBars Number of bars required
  255 | * @param shift Shift for required bars
  256 | * @return true if sufficient history available
  257 | * 
  258 | * @details This fixes the critical SMC_Consolidated.mqh error at line 541
  259 | */
  260 | static bool ValidateHistoryAvailability(string symbol, ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe, int requiredBars, int shift = 0)
  261 | {
  262 | m_validationCount++;
  263 | 
  264 | int availableBars = Bars(symbol, timeframe);
  265 | 
  266 | if(availableBars < requiredBars + shift)
  267 | {
  268 | m_violationCount++;
  269 | m_lastViolation = TimeCurrent();
  270 | 
  271 | Print(StringFormat("[ALERT] [BOUNDS] Insufficient history: Symbol=%s, TF=%d, Required=%d + shift=%d, Available=%d",
  272 | symbol, timeframe, requiredBars, shift, availableBars));
  273 | 
  274 | return false;
  275 | }
  276 | 
  277 | return true;
  278 | }
  279 | 
  280 | /**
  281 | * @brief Validate array index before access
  282 | * @param arraySize Size of the array
  283 | * @param index Index to access
  284 | * @param arrayName Name of array for debugging
  285 | * @return true if index is valid
  286 | */
  287 | static bool ValidateArrayIndex(int arraySize, int index, string arrayName = "Unknown")
  288 | {
  289 | m_validationCount++;
  290 | 
  291 | if(index < 0 || index >= arraySize)
  292 | {
  293 | m_violationCount++;
  294 | m_lastViolation = TimeCurrent();
  295 | 
  296 | Print(StringFormat("[ALERT] [BOUNDS] Array index violation: Array=%s, Size=%d, Index=%d",
  297 | arrayName, arraySize, index));
  298 | 
  299 | return false;
  300 | }
  301 | 
  302 | return true;
  303 | }
  304 | 
  305 | /**
  306 | * @brief Validate bar index for price data access
  307 | * @param symbol Trading symbol
  308 | * @param timeframe Chart timeframe
  309 | * @param barIndex Bar index to access
  310 | * @return true if bar index is valid
  311 | */
  312 | static bool ValidateBarIndex(string symbol, ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe, int barIndex)
  313 | {
  314 | m_validationCount++;
  315 | 
  316 | int totalBars = Bars(symbol, timeframe);
  317 | 
  318 | if(barIndex < 0 || barIndex >= totalBars)
  319 | {
  320 | m_violationCount++;
  321 | m_lastViolation = TimeCurrent();
  322 | 
  323 | Print(StringFormat("[ALERT] [BOUNDS] Bar index violation: Symbol=%s, TF=%d, Total=%d, Index=%d",
  324 | symbol, timeframe, totalBars, barIndex));
  325 | 
  326 | return false;
  327 | }
  328 | 
  329 | return true;
  330 | }
  331 | 
  332 | /**
  333 | * @brief Validate swing point detection range (fixes Analysis_PatternRecognition.mqh)
  334 | * @param currentIndex Current bar index
  335 | * @param lookBack Look back range
  336 | * @param lookForward Look forward range
  337 | * @param totalBars Total available bars
  338 | * @return true if range is valid
  339 | */
  340 | static bool ValidateSwingPointRange(int currentIndex, int lookBack, int lookForward, int totalBars)
  341 | {
  342 | m_validationCount++;
  343 | 
  344 | int minIndex = currentIndex - lookBack;
  345 | int maxIndex = currentIndex + lookForward;
  346 | 
  347 | if(minIndex < 0 || maxIndex >= totalBars)
  348 | {
  349 | m_violationCount++;
  350 | m_lastViolation = TimeCurrent();
  351 | 
  352 | Print(StringFormat("[ALERT] [BOUNDS] Swing point range violation: Current=%d, Range=[%d,%d], Total=%d",
  353 | currentIndex, minIndex, maxIndex, totalBars));
  354 | 
  355 | return false;
  356 | }
  357 | 
  358 | return true;
  359 | }
  360 | 
  361 | /**
  362 | * @brief Get validation statistics
  363 | */
  364 | static string GetValidationStats()
  365 | {
  366 | double violationRate = (m_validationCount > 0) ? 
  367 | (double)m_violationCount / m_validationCount * 100.0 : 0.0;
  368 | 
  369 | return StringFormat(" BOUNDS VALIDATION: Checks=%d, Violations=%d (%.2f%%), Last=%s",
  370 | m_validationCount, 
  371 | m_violationCount,
  372 | violationRate,
  373 | m_lastViolation > 0 ? TimeToString(m_lastViolation) : "None");
  374 | }
  375 | 
  376 | static void ResetStatistics()
  377 | {
  378 | m_validationCount = 0;
  379 | m_violationCount = 0;
  380 | m_lastViolation = 0;
  381 | }
  382 | };

  386 | int CArrayBoundsValidator::m_violationCount = 0;

  503 | {

  505 | }
  506 | }

  545 | 
  546 | Print("✅ COMPLETE ERROR HANDLER: System initialized successfully");
  547 | Print(StringFormat("🆔 Session ID: %s | Auto Recovery: %s", 
  548 | m_sessionID, m_enableAutoRecovery ? "ENABLED" : "DISABLED"));
  549 | 
  550 | LogSystemEvent("System initialization completed", ERROR_SEV_INFO);
  551 | 
  552 | return true;
  553 | }
  554 | 
  555 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  556 | //| 🎯 TICK MONITORING METHODS                                       |
  557 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  558 | /**
  559 | * @brief Begin tick processing error monitoring
  560 | * @details Called at the start of OnTick() to monitor for errors
  561 | */
  562 | void BeginTick()
  563 | {
  564 | if(!m_initialized) return;
  565 | 
  566 | // Start operation timing
  567 | m_lastOperationStart = GetMicrosecondCount();
  568 | 
  569 | // Check for critical system errors (with throttling to prevent spam)
  570 | if(m_criticalSystemError) {
  571 | static datetime lastCriticalErrorLog = 0;
  572 | datetime currentTime = TimeCurrent();
  573 | 
  574 | // Only log critical error message once per minute to avoid spam
  575 | if(currentTime - lastCriticalErrorLog > 60) {
  576 | Print("⚠️ [ERROR] Critical system error detected - tick processing may be affected");
  577 | Print("⚠️ [ERROR] System health: ", DoubleToString(m_systemHealthScore, 1), "% | Consecutive errors: ", m_consecutiveCriticalErrors);
  578 | lastCriticalErrorLog = currentTime;
  579 | }
  580 | }
  581 | 
  582 | // Update system health if needed
  583 | if(TimeCurrent() - m_lastHealthUpdate > 300) { // Every 5 minutes
  584 | UpdateSystemHealthScore();
  585 | m_lastHealthUpdate = TimeCurrent();
  586 | }
  587 | }
  588 | 
  589 | /**
  590 | * @brief End tick processing error monitoring
  591 | * @details Called at the end of OnTick() to complete error tracking
  592 | */
  593 | void EndTick()
  594 | {
  595 | if(!m_initialized) return;
  596 | 
  597 | // Calculate tick processing time
  598 | ulong endTime = GetMicrosecondCount();
  599 | double tickTime = (endTime - m_lastOperationStart) / 1000.0; // Convert to milliseconds
  600 | 
  601 | // Update response time metrics
  602 | UpdateResponseTimeMetrics(tickTime);
  603 | 
  604 | // Check for slow tick processing
  605 | if(tickTime > 50.0) { // More than 50ms
  606 | HandleError(ERROR_SEV_WARNING, ERROR_CTX_PERFORMANCE,
  607 | "Slow tick processing detected",
  608 | StringFormat("Tick time: %.2fms", tickTime),
  609 | "OnTick");
  610 | }
  611 | 
  612 | // Check for MQL5 errors
  613 | int lastError = GetLastError();
  614 | if(lastError != 0) {
  615 | HandleError(ERROR_SEV_ERROR, ERROR_CTX_SYSTEM,
  616 | "MQL5 error detected during tick processing",
  617 | StringFormat("Error code: %d", lastError),
  618 | "OnTick");
  619 | }
  620 | }
  621 | 
  622 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  623 | //| 🎯 MAIN ERROR HANDLING INTERFACE                                 |
  624 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  625 | /**
  626 | * @brief Master error handling method - handles ALL system errors
  627 | * @param severity Error severity level
  628 | * @param context Error context/category
  629 | * @param message Primary error message
  630 | * @param detailedInfo Additional context information
  631 | * @param functionName Function where error occurred
  632 | * @param fileName File where error occurred (optional)
  633 | * @param lineNumber Line number where error occurred (optional)
  634 | * @return true if error handled successfully, false if unrecoverable
  635 | * 
  636 | * @details This is the SINGLE POINT for all error handling in the system
  637 | *          Replaces ALL scattered error handling calls throughout codebase
  638 | */
  639 | bool HandleError(ENUM_ERROR_SEVERITY_COMPLETE severity,
  640 | ENUM_ERROR_CONTEXT_COMPLETE context,
  641 | string message,
  642 | string detailedInfo = "",
  643 | string functionName = "",
  644 | string fileName = "",
  645 | int lineNumber = 0)
  646 | {
  647 | if(!m_initialized) return false;
  648 | 
  649 | // Start performance measurement
  650 | ulong startTime = GetMicrosecondCount();
  651 | 
  652 | // Create error record
  653 | SCompleteErrorRecord errorRecord;
  654 | errorRecord.timestamp = TimeCurrent();
  655 | errorRecord.severity = severity;
  656 | errorRecord.context = context;
  657 | errorRecord.errorCode = GetLastError();
  658 | errorRecord.errorMessage = message;
  659 | errorRecord.detailedInfo = detailedInfo;
  660 | errorRecord.functionName = functionName;
  661 | errorRecord.fileName = fileName;
  662 | errorRecord.lineNumber = lineNumber;
  663 | errorRecord.sessionID = m_sessionID;
  664 | errorRecord.sequenceNumber = ++m_sequenceNumber;
  665 | errorRecord.GenerateUID();
  666 | 
  667 | // Store error record
  668 | StoreErrorRecord(errorRecord);
  669 | 
  670 | // Update statistics
  671 | UpdateErrorStatistics(severity, context);
  672 | 
  673 | // Determine recovery action
  674 | ENUM_ERROR_RECOVERY_COMPLETE recoveryAction = DetermineRecoveryAction(severity, context);
  675 | errorRecord.recoveryAction = recoveryAction;
  676 | 
  677 | // Log error with appropriate detail level
  678 | LogErrorRecord(errorRecord);
  679 | 
  680 | // Attempt recovery if appropriate
  681 | bool recoverySuccessful = false;
  682 | if(m_enableAutoRecovery && recoveryAction != RECOVERY_NONE)
  683 | {
  684 | recoverySuccessful = AttemptErrorRecovery(errorRecord);
  685 | errorRecord.recoveryAttempted = true;
  686 | errorRecord.recoverySuccessful = recoverySuccessful;
  687 | 
  688 | if(recoverySuccessful)
  689 | {
  690 | m_successfulRecoveries++;
  691 | }
  692 | else
  693 | {
  694 | m_failedRecoveries++;
  695 | }
  696 | }
  697 | 
  698 | // Update system health
  699 | UpdateSystemHealth(severity, recoverySuccessful);
  700 | 
  701 | // Check for emergency conditions
  702 | CheckEmergencyConditions(severity, context);
  703 | 
  704 | // User notifications for critical errors
  705 | if(m_enableUserNotifications && severity >= ERROR_SEV_CRITICAL)
  706 | {
  707 | NotifyUser(errorRecord);
  708 | }
  709 | 
  710 | // Update performance metrics
  711 | ulong endTime = GetMicrosecondCount();
  712 | double responseTime = (endTime - startTime) / 1000.0; // Convert to milliseconds
  713 | UpdateResponseTimeMetrics(responseTime);
  714 | 
  715 | // Clear MQL5 error
  716 | ResetLastError();
  717 | 
  718 | return (severity < ERROR_SEV_CRITICAL) || recoverySuccessful;
  719 | }
  720 | 
  721 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  722 | //| 🎯 SPECIALIZED ERROR HANDLERS (CRITICAL FIXES)                  |
  723 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  724 | /**
  725 | * @brief Handle array bounds errors (CRITICAL FIX)
  726 | * @details Fixes the critical SMC_Consolidated.mqh line 541 error
  727 | */
  728 | bool HandleArrayBoundsError(string functionName, int requestedIndex, int maxIndex, string arrayName = "")
  729 | {
  730 | string detailedInfo = StringFormat("Array: %s, Requested: %d, Max: %d", 
  731 | arrayName, requestedIndex, maxIndex);
  732 | 
  733 | return HandleError(ERROR_SEV_CRITICAL,
  734 | ERROR_CTX_ARRAY_BOUNDS,
  735 | "Array bounds violation detected",
  736 | detailedInfo,
  737 | functionName);
  738 | }
  739 | 
  740 | /**
  741 | * @brief Handle indicator calculation errors
  742 | */
  743 | bool HandleIndicatorError(string functionName, string indicatorName, int errorCode)
  744 | {
  745 | string detailedInfo = StringFormat("Indicator: %s, Error: %d (%s)", 
  746 | indicatorName, errorCode, GetErrorDescription(errorCode));
  747 | 
  748 | return HandleError(ERROR_SEV_ERROR,
  749 | ERROR_CTX_INDICATOR,
  750 | "Indicator calculation failed",
  751 | detailedInfo,
  752 | functionName);
  753 | }
  754 | 
  755 | /**
  756 | * @brief Handle trading operation errors
  757 | */
  758 | bool HandleTradingError(string functionName, int errorCode, string operation, string symbol = "")
  759 | {
  760 | ENUM_ERROR_SEVERITY_COMPLETE severity = ERROR_SEV_ERROR;
  761 | 
  762 | // Critical trading errors
  763 | if(errorCode == TRADE_RETCODE_NO_MONEY || 
  764 | errorCode == TRADE_RETCODE_MARGIN || 
  765 | errorCode == TRADE_RETCODE_NO_CONNECTION)
  766 | {
  767 | severity = ERROR_SEV_CRITICAL;
  768 | }
  769 | 
  770 | string detailedInfo = StringFormat("Operation: %s, Symbol: %s, Error: %d (%s)", 
  771 | operation, symbol, errorCode, GetErrorDescription(errorCode));
  772 | 
  773 | return HandleError(severity,
  774 | ERROR_CTX_TRADING,
  775 | "Trading operation failed",
  776 | detailedInfo,
  777 | functionName);
  778 | }
  779 | 
  780 | /**
  781 | * @brief Handle Dragon Band analysis errors
  782 | */
  783 | bool HandleDragonBandError(string functionName, string dragonComponent, string errorDetails)
  784 | {
  785 | return HandleError(ERROR_SEV_WARNING,
  786 | ERROR_CTX_DRAGON_BAND,
  787 | StringFormat("Dragon Band %s error", dragonComponent),
  788 | errorDetails,
  789 | functionName);
  790 | }
  791 | 
  792 | /**
  793 | * @brief Handle SMC analysis errors
  794 | */
  795 | bool HandleSMCAnalysisError(string functionName, string smcComponent, string errorDetails)
  796 | {
  797 | return HandleError(ERROR_SEV_WARNING,
  798 | ERROR_CTX_SMC_ANALYSIS,
  799 | StringFormat("SMC %s error", smcComponent),
  800 | errorDetails,
  801 | functionName);
  802 | }
  803 | 
  804 | /**
  805 | * @brief Handle performance degradation
  806 | */
  807 | bool HandlePerformanceError(string functionName, double actualTime, double expectedTime)
  808 | {
  809 | string detailedInfo = StringFormat("Actual: %.2fms, Expected: %.2fms, Ratio: %.1fx", 
  810 | actualTime, expectedTime, actualTime / expectedTime);
  811 | 
  812 | return HandleError(ERROR_SEV_WARNING,
  813 | ERROR_CTX_PERFORMANCE,
  814 | "Performance degradation detected",
  815 | detailedInfo,
  816 | functionName);
  817 | }
  818 | 
  819 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  820 | //| 🎯 SYSTEM HEALTH & MONITORING                                    |
  821 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  822 | double GetSystemHealthScore() const { return m_systemHealthScore; }
  823 | bool IsEmergencyMode() const { return m_emergencyMode; }
  824 | bool IsSafeMode() const { return m_safeMode; }
  825 | bool IsSystemHealthy() const { return m_systemHealthScore > 80.0 && !m_criticalSystemError; }
  826 | 
  827 | bool IsCriticalErrorDetected() const 
  828 | {
  829 | return m_criticalSystemError || m_consecutiveCriticalErrors > 0;
  830 | }
  831 | 
  832 | string GetSystemHealthReport()
  833 | {
  834 | return StringFormat(
  835 | "ðŸ›¡ï¸ SYSTEM HEALTH REPORT:\n\n" +
  836 | "ðŸ’¯ OVERALL HEALTH: %.1f%% (%s)\n" +
  837 | "ðŸš¨ MODES: Emergency=%s | Safe=%s\n" +
  838 | "ðŸ“Š ERRORS: Total=%d | Critical=%d | Fatal=%d\n" +
  839 | "🔧 RECOVERY: Success=%d | Failed=%d | Rate=%.1f%%\n" +
  840 | "âš¡ PERFORMANCE: Avg Response=%.2fms\n" +
  841 | "ðŸ›¡ï¸ BOUNDS: %s\n" +
  842 | "â±ï¸ SESSION: %s (Running %.1f hours)\n" +
  843 | "ðŸŽ¯ STATUS: %s",
  844 | 
  845 | m_systemHealthScore,
  846 | m_systemHealthScore > 90 ? "EXCELLENT" : m_systemHealthScore > 80 ? "GOOD" : 
  847 | m_systemHealthScore > 60 ? "FAIR" : "POOR",
  848 | 
  849 | m_emergencyMode ? "ACTIVE" : "Normal",
  850 | m_safeMode ? "ACTIVE" : "Normal",
  851 | 
  852 | m_errorCount,
  853 | m_errorsBySeverity[ERROR_SEV_CRITICAL],
  854 | m_errorsBySeverity[ERROR_SEV_FATAL],
  855 | 
  856 | m_successfulRecoveries,
  857 | m_failedRecoveries,
  858 | (m_successfulRecoveries + m_failedRecoveries) > 0 ? 
  859 | (double)m_successfulRecoveries / (m_successfulRecoveries + m_failedRecoveries) * 100.0 : 100.0,
  860 | 
  861 | m_averageResponseTime,
  862 | 
  863 | CArrayBoundsValidator::GetValidationStats(),
  864 | 
  865 | m_sessionID,
  866 | (TimeCurrent() - m_systemStartTime) / 3600.0,
  867 | 
  868 | m_criticalSystemError ? "CRITICAL ERROR ACTIVE" : "OPERATIONAL"
  869 | );
  870 | }
  871 | 
  872 | string GetCriticalErrorReport() const 
  873 | {
  874 | string report = "Critical Errors Report:\n";
  875 | report += StringFormat("Consecutive Critical: %d\n", m_consecutiveCriticalErrors);
  876 | report += StringFormat("Last Error: %s\n", m_lastError);
  877 | return report;
  878 | }
  879 | 
  880 | /**
  881 | * @brief Get error statistics by context
  882 | */
  883 | string GetErrorStatistics()
  884 | {
  885 | string stats = "ðŸ“Š ERROR STATISTICS BY CONTEXT:\n";
  886 | 
  887 | for(int i = 0; i < 18; i++)
  888 | {
  889 | if(m_errorsByContext[i] > 0)
  890 | {
  891 | ENUM_ERROR_CONTEXT_COMPLETE context = (ENUM_ERROR_CONTEXT_COMPLETE)i;
  892 | SCompleteErrorRecord dummy;
  893 | dummy.context = context;
  894 | 
  895 | stats += StringFormat("  %s: %d errors\n", dummy.GetContextString(), m_errorsByContext[i]);
  896 | }
  897 | }
  898 | 
  899 | return stats;
  900 | }
  901 | 
  902 | /**
  903 | * @brief Force emergency mode activation
  904 | */
  905 | void ActivateEmergencyMode(string reason)
  906 | {
  907 | if(!m_emergencyMode)
  908 | {
  909 | m_emergencyMode = true;
  910 | m_lastEmergencyActivation = TimeCurrent();
  911 | 
  912 | Print(StringFormat("ðŸ†˜ EMERGENCY MODE ACTIVATED: %s", reason));
  913 | 
  914 | LogSystemEvent(StringFormat("Emergency mode activated: %s", reason), ERROR_SEV_EMERGENCY);
  915 | 
  916 | if(m_enableUserNotifications)
  917 | {
  918 | Alert(StringFormat("ðŸ†˜ EA EMERGENCY MODE: %s", reason));
  919 | }
  920 | }
  921 | }
  922 | 
  923 | /**
  924 | * @brief Deactivate emergency mode
  925 | */
  926 | void DeactivateEmergencyMode()
  927 | {
  928 | if(m_emergencyMode)
  929 | {
  930 | m_emergencyMode = false;
  931 | m_consecutiveCriticalErrors = 0;
  932 | 
  933 | Print("[SUCCESS] EMERGENCY MODE DEACTIVATED: System restored to normal operation");
  934 | LogSystemEvent("Emergency mode deactivated", ERROR_SEV_INFO);
  935 | }
  936 | }
  937 | 
  938 | /**
  939 | * @brief Enable/disable safe mode
  940 | */
  941 | void SetSafeMode(bool enable)
  942 | {
  943 | if(m_safeMode != enable)
  944 | {
  945 | m_safeMode = enable;
  946 | Print(StringFormat("🔒 SAFE MODE: %s", enable ? "ENABLED" : "DISABLED"));
  947 | }
  948 | }
  949 | 
  950 | ~CCompleteErrorHandler()
  951 | {
  952 | if(m_initialized)
  953 | {
  954 | Print("ðŸ›¡ï¸ COMPLETE ERROR HANDLER: Generating final report...");
  955 | Print(GetSystemHealthReport());
  956 | Print(GetErrorStatistics());
  957 | Print("🧹 Complete Error Handler shutdown");
  958 | }
  959 | }
  960 | 
  961 | private:
  962 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  963 | //| INTERNAL ERROR MANAGEMENT                                        |
  964 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  965 | void StoreErrorRecord(SCompleteErrorRecord& record)
  966 | {
  967 | // Store in circular buffer
  968 | m_errorHistory[m_currentIndex] = record;
  969 | m_currentIndex = (m_currentIndex + 1) % 1000;
  970 | 
  971 | if(m_errorCount < 1000)
  972 | {
  973 | m_errorCount++;
  974 | }
  975 | }
  976 | 
  977 | void UpdateErrorStatistics(ENUM_ERROR_SEVERITY_COMPLETE severity, ENUM_ERROR_CONTEXT_COMPLETE context)
  978 | {
  979 | if((int)severity >= 0 && (int)severity < 7)
  980 | {
  981 | m_errorsBySeverity[(int)severity]++;
  982 | }
  983 | 
  984 | if((int)context >= 0 && (int)context < 18)
  985 | {
  986 | m_errorsByContext[(int)context]++;
  987 | }
  988 | }
  989 | 
  990 | ENUM_ERROR_RECOVERY_COMPLETE DetermineRecoveryAction(ENUM_ERROR_SEVERITY_COMPLETE severity, 
  991 | ENUM_ERROR_CONTEXT_COMPLETE context)
  992 | {
  993 | // Emergency/Fatal errors
  994 | if(severity >= ERROR_SEV_FATAL)
  995 | {
  996 | return RECOVERY_EMERGENCY_STOP;
  997 | }
  998 | 
  999 | // Critical errors by context
 1000 | if(severity == ERROR_SEV_CRITICAL)
 1001 | {
 1002 | switch(context)
 1003 | {
 1004 | case ERROR_CTX_ARRAY_BOUNDS:
 1005 | return RECOVERY_NONE; // Skip current operation
 1006 | case ERROR_CTX_TRADING:
 1007 | return RECOVERY_RETRY_IMMEDIATE; // Retry trading operation
 1008 | case ERROR_CTX_MEMORY:
 1009 | return RECOVERY_RESET_STATE; // Reset component
 1010 | case ERROR_CTX_NETWORK:
 1011 | return RECOVERY_RETRY_IMMEDIATE; // Retry connection
 1012 | default:
 1013 | return RECOVERY_FALLBACK_METHOD;
 1014 | }
 1015 | }
 1016 | 
 1017 | // Regular errors
 1018 | if(severity == ERROR_SEV_ERROR)
 1019 | {
 1020 | switch(context)
 1021 | {
 1022 | case ERROR_CTX_INDICATOR:
 1023 | return RECOVERY_FALLBACK_METHOD;
 1024 | case ERROR_CTX_DATA_VALIDATION:
 1025 | return RECOVERY_NONE;
 1026 | case ERROR_CTX_PERFORMANCE:
 1027 | return RECOVERY_GRACEFUL_DEGRADE;
 1028 | default:
 1029 | return RECOVERY_RETRY_IMMEDIATE;
 1030 | }
 1031 | }
 1032 | 
 1033 | // Warnings and info
 1034 | return RECOVERY_NONE;
 1035 | }
 1036 | 
 1037 | bool AttemptErrorRecovery(SCompleteErrorRecord& record)
 1038 | {
 1039 | ulong recoveryStart = GetMicrosecondCount();
 1040 | bool success = false;
 1041 | 
 1042 | switch(record.recoveryAction)
 1043 | {
 1044 | case RECOVERY_RETRY_IMMEDIATE:
 1045 | success = ExecuteRetryRecovery(record);
 1046 | break;
 1047 | case RECOVERY_NONE:
 1048 | success = ExecuteSkipRecovery(record);
 1049 | break;
 1050 | case RECOVERY_RESET_STATE:
 1051 | success = ExecuteResetRecovery(record);
 1052 | break;
 1053 | case RECOVERY_FALLBACK_METHOD:
 1054 | success = ExecuteFallbackRecovery(record);
 1055 | break;
 1056 | case RECOVERY_GRACEFUL_DEGRADE:
 1057 | success = ExecuteGracefulDegradeRecovery(record);
 1058 | break;
 1059 | case RECOVERY_EMERGENCY_STOP:
 1060 | success = ExecuteEmergencyStopRecovery(record);
 1061 | break;
 1062 | case RECOVERY_SAFE_MODE:
 1063 | success = ExecuteSafeModeRecovery(record);
 1064 | break;
 1065 | default:
 1066 | success = true; // No recovery needed
 1067 | break;
 1068 | }
 1069 | 
 1070 | ulong recoveryEnd = GetMicrosecondCount();
 1071 | double recoveryTime = (recoveryEnd - recoveryStart) / 1000.0;
 1072 | m_totalRecoveryTime += recoveryTime;
 1073 | 
 1074 | return success;
 1075 | }
 1076 | 
 1077 | void UpdateSystemHealth(ENUM_ERROR_SEVERITY_COMPLETE severity, bool recoverySuccessful)
 1078 | {
 1079 | datetime currentTime = TimeCurrent();
 1080 | 
 1081 | // Health score decay based on error severity
 1082 | double healthImpact = 0.0;
 1083 | switch(severity)
 1084 | {
 1085 | case ERROR_SEV_WARNING: healthImpact = 0.5; break;
 1086 | case ERROR_SEV_ERROR: healthImpact = 2.0; break;
 1087 | case ERROR_SEV_CRITICAL: healthImpact = 5.0; break;
 1088 | case ERROR_SEV_FATAL: healthImpact = 15.0; break;
 1089 | case ERROR_SEV_EMERGENCY: healthImpact = 25.0; break;
 1090 | default: healthImpact = 0.0; break;
 1091 | }
 1092 | 
 1093 | // Reduce impact if recovery was successful
 1094 | if(recoverySuccessful)
 1095 | {
 1096 | healthImpact *= 0.3; // 70% reduction for successful recovery
 1097 | }
 1098 | 
 1099 | m_systemHealthScore = MathMax(0.0, m_systemHealthScore - healthImpact);
 1100 | 
 1101 | // Enhanced health score recovery (5% per minute instead of 1% per hour)
 1102 | double timeDiff = (currentTime - m_lastHealthUpdate) / 60.0; // Minutes
 1103 | double recoveryRate = 5.0; // 5% per minute for faster recovery
 1104 | 
 1105 | // Accelerated recovery when no critical errors
 1106 | if(severity < ERROR_SEV_CRITICAL) {
 1107 | recoveryRate = 10.0; // 10% per minute when system is stable
 1108 | }
 1109 | 
 1110 | m_systemHealthScore = MathMin(100.0, m_systemHealthScore + (timeDiff * recoveryRate));
 1111 | m_lastHealthUpdate = currentTime;
 1112 | 
 1113 | // Enhanced critical system error tracking with auto-recovery
 1114 | if(severity >= ERROR_SEV_CRITICAL)
 1115 | {
 1116 | m_consecutiveCriticalErrors++;
 1117 | m_criticalSystemError = true;
 1118 | }
 1119 | else 
 1120 | {
 1121 | // Auto-recovery when no critical errors occur
 1122 | recoverySuccessful = true;
 1123 | m_consecutiveCriticalErrors = 0;
 1124 | 
 1125 | // Reset critical system error with lower threshold for faster recovery
 1126 | if(m_systemHealthScore > 50.0) { // Lowered from 70.0 to 50.0
 1127 | m_criticalSystemError = false;
 1128 | Print("✅ [RECOVERY] Critical system error cleared - health: ", m_systemHealthScore, "%");
 1129 | }
 1130 | }
 1131 | }
 1132 | 
 1133 | void CheckEmergencyConditions(ENUM_ERROR_SEVERITY_COMPLETE severity, ENUM_ERROR_CONTEXT_COMPLETE context)
 1134 | {
 1135 | bool shouldActivateEmergency = false;
 1136 | string reason = "";
 1137 | 
 1138 | // Immediate emergency conditions
 1139 | if(severity >= ERROR_SEV_EMERGENCY)
 1140 | {
 1141 | shouldActivateEmergency = true;
 1142 | reason = "Emergency-level error occurred";
 1143 | }
 1144 | // Multiple consecutive critical errors
 1145 | else if(m_consecutiveCriticalErrors >= m_maxConsecutiveCritical)
 1146 | {
 1147 | shouldActivateEmergency = true;
 1148 | reason = StringFormat("Too many consecutive critical errors: %d", m_consecutiveCriticalErrors);
 1149 | }
 1150 | // System health critically low
 1151 | else if(m_systemHealthScore < 20.0)
 1152 | {
 1153 | shouldActivateEmergency = true;
 1154 | reason = StringFormat("System health critically low: %.1f%%", m_systemHealthScore);
 1155 | }
 1156 | // Too many array bounds violations
 1157 | else if(context == ERROR_CTX_ARRAY_BOUNDS && m_errorsByContext[ERROR_CTX_ARRAY_BOUNDS] > 10)
 1158 | {
 1159 | shouldActivateEmergency = true;
 1160 | reason = "Excessive array bounds violations detected";
 1161 | }
 1162 | 
 1163 | if(shouldActivateEmergency && !m_emergencyMode)
 1164 | {
 1165 | ActivateEmergencyMode(reason);
 1166 | }
 1167 | }
 1168 | 
 1169 | void LogErrorRecord(const SCompleteErrorRecord& record)
 1170 | {
 1171 | if(!m_enableDetailedLogging && record.severity < ERROR_SEV_ERROR) return;
 1172 | 
 1173 | Print(record.GetFormattedRecord());
 1174 | 
 1175 | // Additional detail for critical errors
 1176 | if(record.severity >= ERROR_SEV_CRITICAL)
 1177 | {
 1178 | Print(StringFormat("🔍 DETAILS: %s", record.detailedInfo));
 1179 | if(record.fileName != "")
 1180 | {
 1181 | Print(StringFormat("ðŸ“ LOCATION: %s:%d", record.fileName, record.lineNumber));
 1182 | }
 1183 | }
 1184 | }
 1185 | 
 1186 | void LogSystemEvent(string message, ENUM_ERROR_SEVERITY_COMPLETE severity)
 1187 | {
 1188 | HandleError(severity, ERROR_CTX_GENERAL, message, "", "SystemEvent");
 1189 | }
 1190 | 
 1191 | void NotifyUser(const SCompleteErrorRecord& record)
 1192 | {
 1193 | if(record.severity >= ERROR_SEV_CRITICAL)
 1194 | {
 1195 | string alertMessage = StringFormat("ðŸš¨ EA ERROR: %s - %s", 
 1196 | record.GetContextString(), 
 1197 | record.errorMessage);
 1198 | Alert(alertMessage);
 1199 | }
 1200 | }
 1201 | 
 1202 | void UpdateResponseTimeMetrics(double responseTime)
 1203 | {
 1204 | if(m_responseTimeCount == 0)
 1205 | {
 1206 | m_averageResponseTime = responseTime;
 1207 | }
 1208 | else
 1209 | {
 1210 | m_averageResponseTime = (m_averageResponseTime * 0.9) + (responseTime * 0.1);
 1211 | }
 1212 | m_responseTimeCount++;
 1213 | }

 1217 | return StringFormat("SONIC_%d_%d", 
 1218 | (int)TimeCurrent(), 
 1219 | (int)(MathRand() % 10000));
 1220 | }

 1239 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1240 | //| 🎯 SYSTEM HEALTH MONITORING                                      |
 1241 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1242 | void UpdateSystemHealthScore()
 1243 | {
 1244 | // Calculate system health based on various factors
 1245 | double healthScore = 100.0;
 1246 | 
 1247 | // Deduct points for errors
 1248 | if(m_errorCount > 0) {
 1249 | healthScore -= (m_errorCount * 0.1); // 0.1 point per error
 1250 | }
 1251 | 
 1252 | // Deduct points for critical errors
 1253 | if(m_consecutiveCriticalErrors > 0) {
 1254 | healthScore -= (m_consecutiveCriticalErrors * 5.0); // 5 points per critical error
 1255 | }
 1256 | 
 1257 | // Deduct points for failed recoveries
 1258 | if(m_failedRecoveries > 0) {
 1259 | healthScore -= (m_failedRecoveries * 2.0); // 2 points per failed recovery
 1260 | }
 1261 | 
 1262 | // Deduct points for emergency mode
 1263 | if(m_emergencyMode) {
 1264 | healthScore -= 20.0; // 20 points for emergency mode
 1265 | }
 1266 | 
 1267 | // Ensure health score is within bounds
 1268 | m_systemHealthScore = MathMax(0.0, MathMin(100.0, healthScore));
 1269 | 
 1270 | // Log health update if significant change
 1271 | if(MathAbs(m_systemHealthScore - healthScore) > 5.0) {
 1272 | LogSystemEvent(StringFormat("System health updated: %.1f%%", m_systemHealthScore), 
 1273 | ERROR_SEV_INFO);
 1274 | }
 1275 | }
 1276 | };

  398 | FIB_RETRACEMENT_618 = 3,    // 61.8% retracement
  399 | FIB_RETRACEMENT_786 = 4,    // 78.6% retracement
  400 | FIB_EXTENSION_1272 = 5,     // 127.2% extension
  401 | FIB_EXTENSION_1618 = 6,     // 161.8% extension
  402 | FIB_EXTENSION_2618 = 7,     // 261.8% extension

   45 |         sl = 0.0;
   46 |         tp = 0.0;

  281 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  282 | struct SComponentSignal
  283 | {
  284 | ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE  signal;        // Signal direction (BUY/SELL/NONE)
  285 | double            weight;         // Component weight (0.0-1.0)
  286 | double            confidence;     // Signal confidence (0.0-1.0)
  287 | double            score;          // Component score (0-100)
  288 | string            source;         // Component source name
  289 | datetime          timestamp;     // Signal timestamp
  290 | bool              isValid;       // Signal validity flag
  291 | 
  292 | void Reset()
  293 | {
  294 | signal = SIGNAL_NONE;
  295 | weight = 0.0;
  296 | confidence = 0.0;

  379 | bottomPrice = other.bottomPrice;

   35 | class CEaContext : public CObject
   36 | {
   37 | public:
   38 | // Core Properties
   39 | string                  symbol;
   40 | ENUM_TIMEFRAMES         period;
   41 | double                  point;

   63 | {
   64 | symbol = "";
   65 | period = PERIOD_CURRENT;
   66 | point = 0.0;
   67 | digits = 0;
   68 | isInitialized = false;
   69 | isEnabled = false;
   70 | isRunning = false;
   71 | startTime = 0;
   72 | lastUpdateTime = 0;
   73 | 
   74 | // Initialize all pointers to NULL
   75 | pIndicators = NULL;
   76 | pSessionManager = NULL;
   77 | pSignalEngine = NULL;
   78 | pLogger = NULL;
   79 | pErrorHandler = NULL;
   80 | pTimeManager = NULL;
   81 | pSymbolInfo = NULL;
   82 | pTradeManager = NULL;
   83 | pRiskManager = NULL;
   84 | pPerformanceTracker = NULL;
   85 | }
   86 | 
   87 | // Destructor
   88 | ~CEaContext()
   89 | {
   90 | Deinitialize();
   91 | }
   92 | 
   93 | // Initialize context
   94 | bool Initialize()
   95 | {
   96 | if(isInitialized) return true;
   97 | 
   98 | Print("[🎯 CONTEXT] Initializing EA Context...");
   99 | 
  100 | // Set to NULL for now since classes are not defined yet
  101 | pLogger = NULL;
  102 | pErrorHandler = NULL;
  103 | pTimeManager = NULL;
  104 | pSymbolInfo = NULL;
  105 | pSessionManager = NULL;
  106 | pIndicators = NULL;
  107 | pTradeManager = NULL;
  108 | pRiskManager = NULL;
  109 | pSignalEngine = NULL;
  110 | pPerformanceTracker = NULL;
  111 | 
  112 | // Initialize basic properties
  113 | symbol = _Symbol;
  114 | period = _Period;
  115 | point = _Point;
  116 | digits = _Digits;
  117 | 
  118 | // Set flags
  119 | isInitialized = true;
  120 | isEnabled = true;
  121 | isRunning = true;
  122 | startTime = TimeCurrent();
  123 | lastUpdateTime = TimeCurrent();
  124 | 
  125 | Print("[✅ CONTEXT] EA Context initialized successfully");
  126 | return true;
  127 | }
  128 | 
  129 | // Cleanup all components
  130 | void Deinitialize()
  131 | {
  132 | if(!isInitialized) return;
  133 | 
  134 | Print("[🔄 CONTEXT] Deinitializing EA Context...");
  135 | 
  136 | // Cleanup components
  137 | if(pIndicators != NULL) { delete pIndicators; pIndicators = NULL; }
  138 | if(pSessionManager != NULL) { delete pSessionManager; pSessionManager = NULL; }
  139 | if(pSignalEngine != NULL) { delete pSignalEngine; pSignalEngine = NULL; }
  140 | if(pLogger != NULL) { delete pLogger; pLogger = NULL; }
  141 | if(pErrorHandler != NULL) { delete pErrorHandler; pErrorHandler = NULL; }
  142 | if(pTimeManager != NULL) { delete pTimeManager; pTimeManager = NULL; }
  143 | if(pSymbolInfo != NULL) { delete pSymbolInfo; pSymbolInfo = NULL; }
  144 | if(pTradeManager != NULL) { delete pTradeManager; pTradeManager = NULL; }
  145 | if(pRiskManager != NULL) { delete pRiskManager; pRiskManager = NULL; }
  146 | if(pPerformanceTracker != NULL) { delete pPerformanceTracker; pPerformanceTracker = NULL; }
  147 | 
  148 | isInitialized = false;
  149 | isEnabled = false;
  150 | isRunning = false;
  151 | 
  152 | Print("[✅ CONTEXT] EA Context deinitialized");
  153 | }
  154 | };

  272 | void CalculateConfluence()
  273 | {
  274 | // Weight calculation
  275 | confluenceScore = (dragonScore * 0.25 + 
  276 | waveScore * 0.20 + 
  277 | pvsraScore * 0.20 + 
  278 | smcScore * 0.15 +
  279 | momentumScore * 0.10 +
  280 | srScore * 0.10);
  281 | 
  282 | // Validate signal
  283 | signalValid = (confluenceScore >= 0.75);
  284 | 
  285 | // 🔧 ADDED: Update related fields
  286 | finalScore = confluenceScore;
  287 | confidence = confluenceScore;
  288 | signalType = direction;
  289 | }
  290 | 
  291 | string GetDetailedReasoning()
  292 | {
  293 | return StringFormat("Dragon: %.1f%% | Wave: %.1f%% | PVSRA: %.1f%% | SMC: %.1f%% | Total: %.1f%%",
  294 | dragonScore * 100, waveScore * 100, pvsraScore * 100, 
  295 | smcScore * 100, confluenceScore * 100);
  296 | }
  297 | };

  334 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  335 | //| 🎯 PHASE 3: ARRAY BOUNDS VALIDATION HELPERS (per review.txt)    |
  336 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  337 | 
  338 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  339 | //| PHASE 4: ValidateArrayBounds function per checklist             |
  340 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  341 | // PHASE 4: ValidateArrayBounds function per review.txt checklist
  342 | bool ValidateArrayBounds(ENUM_TIMEFRAMES tf, int requiredBars) {
  343 |     int totalBars = iBars(_Symbol, tf);
  344 |     if(totalBars < requiredBars) {
  345 |         Print(StringFormat("[ARRAY BOUNDS] Not enough bars: %d/%d for %s", 
  346 |                          totalBars, requiredBars, TimeframeToString(tf)));
  347 |         return false;
  348 |     }
  349 |     return true;
  350 | }
  351 | 
  352 | // PHASE 4: Enhanced validation with shift parameter
  353 | bool ValidateArrayBoundsWithShift(ENUM_TIMEFRAMES tf, int shift, int lookback = 1) {
  354 |     int totalBars = iBars(_Symbol, tf);
  355 |     int requiredBars = shift + lookback;
  356 |     if(totalBars < requiredBars) {
  357 |         Print(StringFormat("[ARRAY BOUNDS] Invalid shift: %d+%d=%d > %d bars for %s", 
  358 |                          shift, lookback, requiredBars, totalBars, TimeframeToString(tf)));
  359 |         return false;
  360 |     }
  361 |     return true;
  362 | }
  363 | 
  364 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  365 | //| Safe Array Access - Template for any array type                  |
  366 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  367 | template<typename T>
  368 | bool SafeArrayAccess(T &array[], int index, int arraySize, string context = "")
  369 | {
  370 |     if(index < 0 || index >= arraySize) {
  371 |         Print("⚠️ [PHASE 3] Array bounds violation in ", context, 
  372 |               " - Index: ", index, " | Array size: ", arraySize);
  373 |         return false;
  374 |     }
  375 |     return true;
  376 | }
  377 | 
  378 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  379 | //| Safe Array Set - Template with bounds checking                   |
  380 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  381 | template<typename T>
  382 | bool SafeArraySet(T &array[], int index, int arraySize, T value, string context = "")
  383 | {
  384 |     if(!SafeArrayAccess(array, index, arraySize, context)) {
  385 |         return false;
  386 |     }
  387 |     array[index] = value;
  388 |     return true;
  389 | }
  390 | 
  391 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  392 | //| Safe Array Get - Template with bounds checking                   |
  393 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  394 | template<typename T>
  395 | T SafeArrayGet(T &array[], int index, int arraySize, T defaultValue, string context = "")
  396 | {
  397 |     if(!SafeArrayAccess(array, index, arraySize, context)) {
  398 |         Print("⚠️ [PHASE 3] Returning default value for ", context);
  399 |         return defaultValue;
  400 |     }
  401 |     return array[index];
  402 | }
  403 | 
  404 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  405 | //| Safe Buffer Access - For indicator buffers with copy validation  |
  406 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  407 | bool SafeBufferCopy(double &buffer[], int handle, int bufferIndex, int start, int count, string context = "")
  408 | {
  409 |     // Validate parameters
  410 |     if(handle == INVALID_HANDLE) {
  411 |         Print("❌ [PHASE 3] Invalid indicator handle in ", context);
  412 |         return false;
  413 |     }
  414 |     
  415 |     if(count <= 0) {
  416 |         Print("⚠️ [PHASE 3] Invalid buffer count in ", context, ": ", count);
  417 |         return false;
  418 |     }
  419 |     
  420 |     // Resize buffer if needed
  421 |     if(ArraySize(buffer) < count) {
  422 |         if(ArrayResize(buffer, count) < 0) {
  423 |             Print("❌ [PHASE 3] Failed to resize buffer in ", context);
  424 |             return false;
  425 |         }
  426 |     }
  427 |     
  428 |     // Copy buffer data
  429 |     int copied = CopyBuffer(handle, bufferIndex, start, count, buffer);
  430 |     if(copied <= 0) {
  431 |         Print("❌ [PHASE 3] Failed to copy buffer data in ", context, 
  432 |               " - Expected: ", count, " | Copied: ", copied);
  433 |         return false;
  434 |     }
  435 |     
  436 |     Print("✅ [PHASE 3] Safe buffer copy in ", context, " - Copied: ", copied, " values");
  437 |     return true;
  438 | }
  439 | 
  440 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  441 | //| Validate Array Size - Check if array has minimum required size   |
  442 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  443 | bool ValidateArraySize(int currentSize, int requiredSize, string context = "")
  444 | {
  445 |     if(currentSize < requiredSize) {
  446 |         Print("⚠️ [PHASE 3] Array size validation failed in ", context, 
  447 |               " - Current: ", currentSize, " | Required: ", requiredSize);
  448 |         return false;
  449 |     }
  450 |     return true;
  451 | }
  452 | 
  453 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  454 | //| Safe Array Initialize - Initialize array with bounds checking    |
  455 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  456 | template<typename T>
  457 | bool SafeArrayInit(T &array[], int size, T initValue, string context = "")
  458 | {
  459 |     if(size <= 0) {
  460 |         Print("❌ [PHASE 3] Invalid array size for initialization in ", context, ": ", size);
  461 |         return false;
  462 |     }
  463 |     
  464 |     if(ArrayResize(array, size) < 0) {
  465 |         Print("❌ [PHASE 3] Failed to resize array in ", context);
  466 |         return false;
  467 |     }
  468 |     
  469 |     // Initialize all elements
  470 |     for(int i = 0; i < size; i++) {
  471 |         array[i] = initValue;
  472 |     }
  473 |     
  474 |     Print("✅ [PHASE 3] Array initialized in ", context, " - Size: ", size);
  475 |     return true;
  476 | }
  477 | 
  478 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  479 | //| Performance Metrics Structure for Array Operations               |
  480 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  481 | struct SArrayPerformanceMetrics
  482 | {
  483 |     int     totalAccesses;        // Total array accesses
  484 |     int     boundsViolations;     // Number of bounds violations
  485 |     int     successfulAccesses;   // Successful accesses
  486 |     uint    lastAccessTime;       // Last access timestamp
  487 |     string  mostRecentContext;    // Context of most recent access
  488 |     
  489 |     // Constructor
  490 |     SArrayPerformanceMetrics()
  491 |     {
  492 |         totalAccesses = 0;
  493 |         boundsViolations = 0;
  494 |         successfulAccesses = 0;
  495 |         lastAccessTime = 0;
  496 |         mostRecentContext = "";
  497 |     }
  498 |     
  499 |     // Update metrics
  500 |     void UpdateMetrics(bool success, string context)
  501 |     {
  502 |         totalAccesses++;
  503 |         lastAccessTime = GetTickCount();
  504 |         mostRecentContext = context;
  505 |         
  506 |         if(success) {
  507 |             successfulAccesses++;
  508 |         } else {
  509 |             boundsViolations++;
  510 |         }
  511 |     }
  512 |     
  513 |     // Get success rate
  514 |     double GetSuccessRate()
  515 |     {
  516 |         if(totalAccesses == 0) return 100.0;
  517 |         return (double)successfulAccesses / totalAccesses * 100.0;
  518 |     }
  519 | };
  520 | 
  521 | // Global array performance metrics
  522 | SArrayPerformanceMetrics g_arrayMetrics;
  523 | 
  524 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  525 | //| Array Performance Monitor - Track array access patterns         |
  526 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  527 | void LogArrayPerformance(bool success, string context)
  528 | {
  529 |     g_arrayMetrics.UpdateMetrics(success, context);
  530 |     
  531 |     // Log performance summary every 1000 accesses
  532 |     if(g_arrayMetrics.totalAccesses % 1000 == 0) {
  533 |         Print("📊 [PHASE 3] Array Performance Summary:");
  534 |         Print("   Total accesses: ", g_arrayMetrics.totalAccesses);
  535 |         Print("   Success rate: ", DoubleToString(g_arrayMetrics.GetSuccessRate(), 2), "%");
  536 |         Print("   Bounds violations: ", g_arrayMetrics.boundsViolations);
  537 |         Print("   Recent context: ", g_arrayMetrics.mostRecentContext);
  538 |     }
  539 | }
  540 | 
  541 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  542 | //| Enhanced Safe Array Access with Performance Monitoring          |
  543 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  544 | template<typename T>
  545 | bool SafeArrayAccessMonitored(T &array[], int index, int arraySize, string context = "")
  546 | {
  547 |     bool success = (index >= 0 && index < arraySize);
  548 |     
  549 |     if(!success) {
  550 |         Print("⚠️ [PHASE 3] Array bounds violation in ", context, 
  551 |               " - Index: ", index, " | Array size: ", arraySize);
  552 |     }
  553 |     
  554 |     LogArrayPerformance(success, context);
  555 |     return success;
  556 | }

   17 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   18 | //| Production Hardening Manager Class                              |
   19 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   20 | class CProductionHardeningManager
   21 | {
   22 | private:
   23 | // Data integrity monitoring
   24 | struct DataIntegrityStats
   25 | {
   26 | int totalChecks;
   27 | int failedChecks;
   28 | datetime lastCheck;
   29 | double successRate;
   30 | string lastError;
   31 | };
   32 | 
   33 | // System health metrics
   34 | struct SystemHealthMetrics
   35 | {
   36 | double cpuUsage;
   37 | double memoryUsage;
   38 | int activeHandles;
   39 | int errorCount;
   40 | datetime lastHealthCheck;
   41 | bool isHealthy;
   42 | };
   43 | 
   44 | // Auto-recovery state
   45 | struct AutoRecoveryState
   46 | {
   47 | int recoveryAttempts;
   48 | datetime lastRecovery;
   49 | bool recoveryInProgress;
   50 | string lastRecoveryReason;
   51 | int maxRecoveryAttempts;
   52 | };
   53 | 
   54 | DataIntegrityStats      m_integrityStats;
   55 | SystemHealthMetrics     m_healthMetrics;
   56 | AutoRecoveryState       m_recoveryState;
   57 | 
   58 | // Safety buffers
   59 | double                  m_safetyBuffer;
   60 | double                  m_emergencyBuffer;
   61 | 
   62 | // Thread safety
   63 | bool                    m_lockManager;
   64 | datetime                m_lockTimeout;
   65 | 
   66 | // Resource monitoring
   67 | int                     m_maxActiveHandles;
   68 | int                     m_maxMemoryUsage;
   69 | 
   70 | public:
   71 | CProductionHardeningManager()
   72 | {
   73 | InitializeHardening();
   74 | }
   75 | 
   76 | ~CProductionHardeningManager()
   77 | {
   78 | Cleanup();
   79 | }
   80 | 
   81 | void InitializeHardening()
   82 | {
   83 | // Initialize integrity stats
   84 | m_integrityStats.totalChecks = 0;
   85 | m_integrityStats.failedChecks = 0;
   86 | m_integrityStats.lastCheck = 0;
   87 | m_integrityStats.successRate = 100.0;
   88 | m_integrityStats.lastError = "";
   89 | 
   90 | // Initialize health metrics
   91 | m_healthMetrics.cpuUsage = 0.0;
   92 | m_healthMetrics.memoryUsage = 0.0;
   93 | m_healthMetrics.activeHandles = 0;
   94 | m_healthMetrics.errorCount = 0;
   95 | m_healthMetrics.lastHealthCheck = 0;
   96 | m_healthMetrics.isHealthy = true;
   97 | 
   98 | // Initialize recovery state
   99 | m_recoveryState.recoveryAttempts = 0;
  100 | m_recoveryState.lastRecovery = 0;
  101 | m_recoveryState.recoveryInProgress = false;
  102 | m_recoveryState.lastRecoveryReason = "";
  103 | m_recoveryState.maxRecoveryAttempts = 3;
  104 | 
  105 | // Set safety buffers
  106 | m_safetyBuffer = 0.1;      // 10% safety margin
  107 | m_emergencyBuffer = 0.05;  // 5% emergency margin
  108 | 
  109 | // Thread safety
  110 | m_lockManager = false;
  111 | m_lockTimeout = 0;
  112 | 
  113 | // Resource limits
  114 | m_maxActiveHandles = 100;
  115 | m_maxMemoryUsage = 50; // MB
  116 | }
  117 | 
  118 | bool Initialize()
  119 | {
  120 | Print("[HARDENING] Initializing Production Hardening System...");
  121 | 
  122 | // Perform initial health check
  123 | UpdateHealthMetrics();
  124 | 
  125 | if(!IsSystemHealthy())
  126 | {
  127 | Print("[HARDENING] WARNING: System health issues detected during initialization");
  128 | return false;
  129 | }
  130 | 
  131 | // Perform initial data integrity check
  132 | if(!PerformDataIntegrityCheck())
  133 | {
  134 | Print("[HARDENING] WARNING: Data integrity issues detected");
  135 | return false;
  136 | }
  137 | 
  138 | // Set up safety buffers
  139 | ApplySafetyBuffers();
  140 | 
  141 | Print("[HARDENING] Production Hardening System initialized successfully");
  142 | return true;
  143 | }
  144 | 
  145 | bool PerformDataIntegrityCheck()
  146 | {
  147 | m_integrityStats.totalChecks++;
  148 | m_integrityStats.lastCheck = TimeCurrent();
  149 | 
  150 | bool integrityOK = true;
  151 | 
  152 | // Check basic market data
  153 | double bid = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
  154 | double ask = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_ASK);
  155 | 
  156 | if(!ValidatePrice(bid) || !ValidatePrice(ask))
  157 | {
  158 | m_integrityStats.lastError = "Invalid price data detected";
  159 | integrityOK = false;
  160 | }
  161 | 
  162 | // Check spread sanity
  163 | double spread = ask - bid;
  164 | double point = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_POINT);
  165 | double spreadPips = spread / (10 * point);
  166 | 
  167 | if(spreadPips > 50.0) // Sanity check for extreme spreads
  168 | {
  169 | m_integrityStats.lastError = StringFormat("Extreme spread detected: %.1f pips", spreadPips);
  170 | integrityOK = false;
  171 | }
  172 | 
  173 | // Check symbol information consistency
  174 | double lotSize = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_TRADE_CONTRACT_SIZE);
  175 | if(lotSize <= 0)
  176 | {
  177 | m_integrityStats.lastError = "Invalid lot size data";
  178 | integrityOK = false;
  179 | }
  180 | 
  181 | if(!integrityOK)
  182 | {
  183 | m_integrityStats.failedChecks++;
  184 | Print("[HARDENING] Data integrity check FAILED: " + m_integrityStats.lastError);
  185 | }
  186 | 
  187 | // Update success rate
  188 | m_integrityStats.successRate = (double)(m_integrityStats.totalChecks - m_integrityStats.failedChecks) / 
  189 | m_integrityStats.totalChecks * 100.0;
  190 | 
  191 | return integrityOK;
  192 | }
  193 | 
  194 | bool CheckSystemHealth()
  195 | {
  196 | UpdateHealthMetrics();
  197 | 
  198 | // Check resource usage
  199 | if(!CheckResourceLimits())
  200 | {
  201 | Print("[HARDENING] Resource limits exceeded");
  202 | return false;
  203 | }
  204 | 
  205 | // Check error rate
  206 | if(m_healthMetrics.errorCount > 10) // More than 10 errors
  207 | {
  208 | Print("[HARDENING] High error count detected");
  209 | return false;
  210 | }
  211 | 
  212 | return m_healthMetrics.isHealthy;
  213 | }
  214 | 
  215 | void UpdateHealthMetrics()
  216 | {
  217 | m_healthMetrics.lastHealthCheck = TimeCurrent();
  218 | 
  219 | // Simulate CPU usage check (MT5 doesn't provide direct CPU monitoring)
  220 | static int lastTickCount = 0;
  221 | int currentTicks = (int)GetTickCount();
  222 | m_healthMetrics.cpuUsage = MathMin(100.0, (currentTicks - lastTickCount) / 1000.0);
  223 | lastTickCount = currentTicks;
  224 | 
  225 | // Memory usage estimation (simplified)
  226 | m_healthMetrics.memoryUsage = MathRand() % 30 + 10; // Simulated 10-40%
  227 | 
  228 | // Active handles count (simplified)
  229 | m_healthMetrics.activeHandles = 15; // Estimated active indicators
  230 | 
  231 | // Overall health assessment
  232 | m_healthMetrics.isHealthy = (m_healthMetrics.cpuUsage < 80.0) && 
  233 | (m_healthMetrics.memoryUsage < 70.0) &&
  234 | (m_healthMetrics.activeHandles < m_maxActiveHandles);
  235 | }
  236 | 
  237 | bool ValidatePrice(double price)
  238 | {
  239 | if(price <= 0.0) return false;
  240 | if(price == EMPTY_VALUE) return false;
  241 | if(!MathIsValidNumber(price)) return false;
  242 | 
  243 | // Sanity check for extreme values
  244 | if(price > 1000000.0 || price < 0.00001) return false;
  245 | 
  246 | return true;
  247 | }
  248 | 
  249 | bool ValidateVolume(double volume)
  250 | {
  251 | if(volume < 0.0) return false;
  252 | if(volume == EMPTY_VALUE) return false;
  253 | if(!MathIsValidNumber(volume)) return false;
  254 | 
  255 | double minLot = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_VOLUME_MIN);
  256 | double maxLot = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_VOLUME_MAX);
  257 | 
  258 | if(volume < minLot || volume > maxLot) return false;
  259 | 
  260 | return true;
  261 | }
  262 | 
  263 | bool PerformAutoRecovery(string reason)
  264 | {
  265 | if(m_recoveryState.recoveryInProgress)
  266 | {
  267 | Print("[HARDENING] Recovery already in progress");
  268 | return false;
  269 | }
  270 | 
  271 | if(m_recoveryState.recoveryAttempts >= m_recoveryState.maxRecoveryAttempts)
  272 | {
  273 | Print("[HARDENING] Maximum recovery attempts exceeded");
  274 | return false;
  275 | }
  276 | 
  277 | m_recoveryState.recoveryInProgress = true;
  278 | m_recoveryState.recoveryAttempts++;
  279 | m_recoveryState.lastRecovery = TimeCurrent();
  280 | m_recoveryState.lastRecoveryReason = reason;
  281 | 
  282 | Print(StringFormat("[HARDENING] Starting auto-recovery attempt %d for: %s", 
  283 | m_recoveryState.recoveryAttempts, reason));
  284 | 
  285 | bool recoverySuccess = false;
  286 | 
  287 | // Recovery steps
  288 | if(RecoverFromError())
  289 | {
  290 | if(ValidateRecovery())
  291 | {
  292 | recoverySuccess = true;
  293 | Print("[HARDENING] Auto-recovery completed successfully");
  294 | }
  295 | }
  296 | 
  297 | m_recoveryState.recoveryInProgress = false;
  298 | 
  299 | if(!recoverySuccess)
  300 | {
  301 | Print("[HARDENING] Auto-recovery failed");
  302 | }
  303 | 
  304 | return recoverySuccess;
  305 | }
  306 | 
  307 | bool RecoverFromError()
  308 | {
  309 | // Step 1: Release locks
  310 | if(m_lockManager)
  311 | {
  312 | ReleaseLock();
  313 | Print("[HARDENING] Released stuck locks");
  314 | }
  315 | 
  316 | // Step 2: Optimize resource usage
  317 | OptimizeResourceUsage();
  318 | 
  319 | // Step 3: Clear error states
  320 | m_healthMetrics.errorCount = 0;
  321 | 
  322 | // Step 4: Reinitialize critical components
  323 | Sleep(1000); // Brief pause
  324 | 
  325 | return true;
  326 | }
  327 | 
  328 | // FIXED: Add missing ValidateRecovery method
  329 | bool ValidateRecovery()
  330 | {
  331 | // Basic validation that recovery was successful
  332 | if(m_healthMetrics.errorCount > 0) return false;
  333 | if(m_recoveryState.recoveryInProgress) return false;
  334 | 
  335 | // Check system health
  336 | UpdateSystemHealth();
  337 | return m_healthMetrics.isHealthy;
  338 | }
  339 | 
  340 | // FIXED: Add missing OptimizeResourceUsage method  
  341 | void OptimizeResourceUsage()
  342 | {
  343 | // Basic resource optimization
  344 | UpdateSystemHealth();
  345 | 
  346 | // If memory usage is high, suggest garbage collection
  347 | if(m_healthMetrics.memoryUsage > 80.0) {
  348 | Print("[HARDENING] High memory usage detected: ", m_healthMetrics.memoryUsage, "%");
  349 | }
  350 | 
  351 | // If too many handles, log warning
  352 | if(m_healthMetrics.activeHandles > 100) {
  353 | Print("[HARDENING] High handle count: ", m_healthMetrics.activeHandles);
  354 | }
  355 | }
  356 | 
  357 | // FIXED: Add missing UpdateSystemHealth method
  358 | void UpdateSystemHealth()
  359 | {
  360 | // Update basic system health metrics
  361 | m_healthMetrics.lastHealthCheck = TimeCurrent();
  362 | 
  363 | // Basic health checks
  364 | m_healthMetrics.cpuUsage = 50.0; // Placeholder
  365 | m_healthMetrics.memoryUsage = 60.0; // Placeholder  
  366 | m_healthMetrics.activeHandles = 50; // Placeholder
  367 | 
  368 | // System is healthy if no recent errors and not in recovery
  369 | m_healthMetrics.isHealthy = (m_healthMetrics.errorCount == 0 && !m_recoveryState.recoveryInProgress);
  370 | 
  371 | // Update integrity stats success rate
  372 | if(m_integrityStats.totalChecks > 0) {
  373 | m_integrityStats.successRate = 1.0 - ((double)m_integrityStats.failedChecks / m_integrityStats.totalChecks);
  374 | } else {
  375 | m_integrityStats.successRate = 1.0;
  376 | }
  377 | }
  378 | 
  379 | bool AcquireLock(string operation, int timeoutSeconds = 5)
  380 | {
  381 | if(m_lockManager)
  382 | {
  383 | // Check timeout
  384 | if(TimeCurrent() - m_lockTimeout > timeoutSeconds)
  385 | {
  386 | Print("[HARDENING] Lock timeout exceeded, forcing release");
  387 | ReleaseLock();
  388 | }
  389 | else
  390 | {
  391 | return false; // Lock held by another operation
  392 | }
  393 | }
  394 | 
  395 | m_lockManager = true;
  396 | m_lockTimeout = TimeCurrent();
  397 | 
  398 | return true;
  399 | }
  400 | 
  401 | void ReleaseLock()
  402 | {
  403 | m_lockManager = false;
  404 | m_lockTimeout = 0;
  405 | }
  406 | 
  407 | bool CheckResourceLimits()
  408 | {
  409 | // Check handle count
  410 | if(m_healthMetrics.activeHandles > m_maxActiveHandles)
  411 | {
  412 | Print(StringFormat("[HARDENING] Handle limit exceeded: %d/%d", 
  413 | m_healthMetrics.activeHandles, m_maxActiveHandles));
  414 | return false;
  415 | }
  416 | 
  417 | // Check memory usage
  418 | if(m_healthMetrics.memoryUsage > m_maxMemoryUsage)
  419 | {
  420 | Print(StringFormat("[HARDENING] Memory limit exceeded: %.1f%%", m_healthMetrics.memoryUsage));
  421 | return false;
  422 | }
  423 | 
  424 | return true;
  425 | }
  426 | 
  427 | void ApplySafetyBuffers()
  428 | {
  429 | // Safety buffers are applied by other modules when calculating:
  430 | // - Position sizes (reduced by safety buffer)
  431 | // - Stop losses (widened by safety buffer)
  432 | // - Risk limits (reduced by safety buffer)
  433 | 
  434 | Print(StringFormat("[HARDENING] Safety buffers applied: Safety=%.1f%%, Emergency=%.1f%%", 
  435 | m_safetyBuffer * 100, m_emergencyBuffer * 100));
  436 | }
  437 | 
  438 | string GetHardeningStatus()
  439 | {
  440 | string status = "\n=== PRODUCTION HARDENING STATUS ===\n";
  441 | 
  442 | status += StringFormat("Data Integrity: %.1f%% (%d/%d checks passed)\n", 
  443 | m_integrityStats.successRate,
  444 | m_integrityStats.totalChecks - m_integrityStats.failedChecks,
  445 | m_integrityStats.totalChecks);
  446 | 
  447 | status += StringFormat("System Health: %s\n", m_healthMetrics.isHealthy ? "HEALTHY" : "ISSUES DETECTED");
  448 | status += StringFormat("CPU Usage: %.1f%%\n", m_healthMetrics.cpuUsage);
  449 | status += StringFormat("Memory Usage: %.1f%%\n", m_healthMetrics.memoryUsage);
  450 | status += StringFormat("Active Handles: %d/%d\n", m_healthMetrics.activeHandles, m_maxActiveHandles);
  451 | 
  452 | status += StringFormat("Recovery Attempts: %d/%d\n", 
  453 | m_recoveryState.recoveryAttempts, 
  454 | m_recoveryState.maxRecoveryAttempts);
  455 | 
  456 | status += StringFormat("Thread Lock: %s\n", m_lockManager ? "LOCKED" : "FREE");
  457 | status += "===================================\n";
  458 | 
  459 | return status;
  460 | }
  461 | 
  462 | bool IsProductionReady()
  463 | {
  464 | // All critical systems must be healthy
  465 | if(!m_healthMetrics.isHealthy) return false;
  466 | 
  467 | // Data integrity must be above 95%
  468 | if(m_integrityStats.successRate < 95.0) return false;
  469 | 
  470 | // Recovery system must not be at maximum attempts
  471 | if(m_recoveryState.recoveryAttempts >= m_recoveryState.maxRecoveryAttempts) return false;
  472 | 
  473 | // No active locks (system not stuck)
  474 | if(m_lockManager && (TimeCurrent() - m_lockTimeout > 30)) return false;
  475 | 
  476 | return true;
  477 | }
  478 | 
  479 | void Cleanup()
  480 | {
  481 | if(m_lockManager)
  482 | {
  483 | ReleaseLock();
  484 | }
  485 | 
  486 | Print("[HARDENING] Production Hardening System cleaned up");
  487 | }
  488 | };
  489 | 
  490 |

   19 |  */
   20 | string MarketRegimeToString(ENUM_MARKET_REGIME regime)
   21 | {
   22 |     switch(regime)
   23 |     {
   24 |         case REGIME_TRENDING_BULLISH:   return "BULLISH";
   25 |         case REGIME_TRENDING_BEARISH:   return "BEARISH";
   26 |         case REGIME_RANGING:            return "SIDEWAYS";
   27 |         case REGIME_VOLATILE:           return "VOLATILE";
   28 |         case REGIME_STABLE_RANGING:     return "LOW_VOLATILITY";
   29 |         case REGIME_STABLE_TRENDING:    return "TRENDING";
   30 |         case REGIME_BREAKOUT:           return "BREAKOUT";
   31 |         case REGIME_VOLATILE_TRENDING:  return "CONTINUATION";
   32 |         case REGIME_UNKNOWN:            return "UNDEFINED";
   33 |         default:                            return "UNKNOWN_REGIME";
   34 |     }
   35 | }

  315 |         case PERFORMANCE_AVERAGE:     return "AVERAGE";

  317 |         case PERFORMANCE_POOR:        return "POOR";
  318 |         default:                 return "UNKNOWN_RATING";

📄 File: 01_Core_21_TradeGate.mqh
🔗 Đường dẫn đầy đủ: C:\Users\ADMIN\AppData\Roaming\MetaQuotes\Terminal\D0E8209F77C8CF37AD8BF550E51FF075\MQL5\Experts\Sonic R_MC\01_SONIC R_MC_FINAL\01_Core_21_TradeGate.mqh
