  125 | double m_squeezeThreshold;             // Threshold for squeeze detection (default 0.7)
  126 | int m_minSqueezeBars;                  // Minimum bars for valid squeeze (default 3)
  127 | int m_maxSqueezeBars;                  // Maximum squeeze duration (default 20)
  128 | double m_bandWidthHistory[50];         // Historical band width data
  129 | int m_bandHistoryCount;
  130 | 
  131 | // Analysis State
  132 | SEnhancedDragonBandData m_currentAnalysis;
  133 | datetime m_lastUpdate;
  134 | bool m_initialized;
  135 | 
  136 | // Squeeze tracking
  137 | int m_currentSqueezeBars;
  138 | double m_squeezeStartWidth;
  139 | double m_squeezeMinWidth;
  140 | bool m_wasSqueezing;
  141 | 
  142 | // Performance tracking
  143 | int m_analysisCount;
  144 | double m_averageConfidence;
  145 | int m_breakoutSuccessCount;
  146 | int m_breakoutTotalCount;
  147 | 
  148 | // 🎯 PHASE 2: MIGRATE TO UNIFIED INDICATOR SYSTEM                 |
  149 | string m_symbol;
  150 | ENUM_TIMEFRAMES m_timeframe;
  151 | datetime m_lastAnalysisTime;
  152 | 
  153 | public:
  154 | CEnhancedDragonBandAnalyzer()
  155 | {
  156 | m_dragonPeriod = 34;
  157 | m_trendPeriod = 89;
  158 | m_angleThreshold = 2.0;              // Boss's 2-degree threshold
  159 | m_squeezeThreshold = 0.7;            // 30% contraction = squeeze
  160 | m_minSqueezeBars = 3;
  161 | m_maxSqueezeBars = 20;
  162 | 
  163 | m_handleHigh = INVALID_HANDLE;
  164 | m_handleLow = INVALID_HANDLE;
  165 | m_handleClose = INVALID_HANDLE;
  166 | m_handleTrend89 = INVALID_HANDLE;
  167 | 
  168 | m_lastUpdate = 0;
  169 | m_initialized = false;
  170 | m_bandHistoryCount = 0;
  171 | m_normalBandWidth = 0.0;
  172 | m_currentSqueezeBars = 0;
  173 | m_squeezeStartWidth = 0.0;
  174 | m_squeezeMinWidth = DBL_MAX;
  175 | m_wasSqueezing = false;
  176 | 
  177 | m_analysisCount = 0;
  178 | m_averageConfidence = 0.0;
  179 | m_breakoutSuccessCount = 0;
  180 | m_breakoutTotalCount = 0;
  181 | 
  182 | m_currentAnalysis.Reset();
  183 | 
  184 | // 🔧 FIXED: Resize dynamic arrays before setting series flag
  185 | ArrayResize(m_emaHigh, 50);
  186 | ArrayResize(m_emaLow, 50);
  187 | ArrayResize(m_emaClose, 50);
  188 | ArrayResize(m_emaTrend89, 50);
  189 | 
  190 | ArraySetAsSeries(m_emaHigh, true);
  191 | ArraySetAsSeries(m_emaLow, true);
  192 | ArraySetAsSeries(m_emaClose, true);
  193 | ArraySetAsSeries(m_emaTrend89, true);
  194 | ArrayInitialize(m_bandWidthHistory, 0.0);
  195 | 
  196 | Print("🐉 Enhanced Dragon Band Analyzer initialized");
  197 | }
  198 | 
  199 | ~CEnhancedDragonBandAnalyzer()
  200 | {
  201 | if(m_handleHigh != INVALID_HANDLE) IndicatorRelease(m_handleHigh);
  202 | if(m_handleLow != INVALID_HANDLE) IndicatorRelease(m_handleLow);
  203 | if(m_handleClose != INVALID_HANDLE) IndicatorRelease(m_handleClose);
  204 | if(m_handleTrend89 != INVALID_HANDLE) IndicatorRelease(m_handleTrend89);
  205 | }
  206 | 
  207 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  208 | //| 🚀 PHASE 2: MIGRATE TO UNIFIED INDICATOR SYSTEM                 |
  209 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  210 | bool Initialize(string symbol = NULL, ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe = PERIOD_CURRENT)
  211 | {
  212 | if(symbol == NULL) symbol = _Symbol;
  213 | 
  214 | m_symbol = symbol;
  215 | m_timeframe = timeframe;
  216 | 
  217 | // 🎯 PHASE 2: Replace duplicate iMA() calls with unified system
  218 | CUnifiedIndicatorManager* manager = CUnifiedIndicatorManager::GetInstance();
  219 | 
  220 | if(manager == NULL) {
  221 | Print("❌ [PHASE 2 MIGRATION] Failed to get unified indicator manager");
  222 | return false;
  223 | }
  224 | 
  225 | // OLD CODE (DUPLICATED):
  226 | // m_handleHigh = iMA(symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, m_dragonPeriod, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_HIGH);
  227 | // m_handleLow = iMA(symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, m_dragonPeriod, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_LOW);
  228 | // m_handleClose = iMA(symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, m_dragonPeriod, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
  229 | // m_handleTrend89 = iMA(symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, m_trendPeriod, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
  230 | 
  231 | // NEW CODE (UNIFIED SYSTEM):
  232 | bool success = manager.SetupDragonBandIndicators(symbol, timeframe, 
  233 | m_handleHigh, m_handleLow, 
  234 | m_handleClose, m_handleTrend89);
  235 | 
  236 | if(!success) {
  237 | Print("❌ Failed to setup Dragon Band indicators via unified system");
  238 | return false;
  239 | }
  240 | 
  241 | // Log migration success
  242 | manager.MigrateLegacyIndicatorCalls(
  243 | "Analysis_DragonBandAnalyzer_Enhanced.mqh", 
  244 | 208,
  245 | "4x iMA() calls for Dragon Band setup",
  246 | "SetupDragonBandIndicators() unified call"
  247 | );
  248 | 
  249 | m_initialized = true;
  250 | m_lastAnalysisTime = 0;
  251 | 
  252 | Print("✅ [PHASE 2] Dragon Band Enhanced migrated to unified system - 4 duplicate calls eliminated");
  253 | return true;
  254 | }
  255 | 
  256 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  257 | //| 🎯 MAIN ENHANCED ANALYSIS FUNCTION                              |
  258 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  259 | bool UpdateEnhancedAnalysis()
  260 | {
  261 | if(!m_initialized) return false;
  262 | 
  263 | // Update indicator buffers
  264 | if(!UpdateIndicatorBuffers()) return false;
  265 | 
  266 | // Calculate basic Dragon Band metrics
  267 | CalculateDragonMetrics();
  268 | 
  269 | // 🐉 ENHANCED: Detect Dragon Squeeze (Boss's missing feature)
  270 | DetectEnhancedDragonSqueeze();
  271 | 
  272 | // Analyze trend direction and strength
  273 | AnalyzeTrendDirection();
  274 | 
  275 | // Analyze price position and pullback zones
  276 | AnalyzePricePosition();
  277 | 
  278 | // Detect breakout readiness
  279 | DetectBreakoutReadiness();
  280 | 
  281 | // Calculate overall confidence
  282 | CalculateOverallConfidence();
  283 | 
  284 | m_currentAnalysis.analysisTime = TimeCurrent();
  285 | m_currentAnalysis.isValid = true;
  286 | m_lastUpdate = TimeCurrent();
  287 | m_analysisCount++;
  288 | 
  289 | return true;
  290 | }
  291 | 
  292 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  293 | //| 📊 UPDATE INDICATOR BUFFERS                                     |
  294 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  295 | bool UpdateIndicatorBuffers()
  296 | {
  297 | // Copy EMA buffers with more history for squeeze detection
  298 | if(CopyBuffer(m_handleHigh, 0, 0, 50, m_emaHigh) <= 0) return false;
  299 | if(CopyBuffer(m_handleLow, 0, 0, 50, m_emaLow) <= 0) return false;
  300 | if(CopyBuffer(m_handleClose, 0, 0, 50, m_emaClose) <= 0) return false;
  301 | if(CopyBuffer(m_handleTrend89, 0, 0, 50, m_emaTrend89) <= 0) return false;
  302 | 
  303 | return true;
  304 | }
  305 | 
  306 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  307 | //| 🧮 CALCULATE ENHANCED DRAGON METRICS                            |
  308 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  309 | void CalculateDragonMetrics()
  310 | {
  311 | if(ArraySize(m_emaClose) < 10) return;
  312 | 
  313 | // Current Dragon Band values
  314 | m_currentAnalysis.emaHigh = m_emaHigh[0];
  315 | m_currentAnalysis.emaLow = m_emaLow[0];
  316 | m_currentAnalysis.emaClose = m_emaClose[0];
  317 | m_currentAnalysis.emaTrend89 = m_emaTrend89[0];
  318 | 
  319 | // Calculate Dragon Angle (slope of EMA Close) - Boss's key metric
  320 | double deltaPrice = m_emaClose[0] - m_emaClose[4];
  321 | double deltaBars = 4.0;
  322 | m_currentAnalysis.dragonSlope = deltaPrice / deltaBars;
  323 | 
  324 | // Convert to angle in degrees using Sonic R formula
  325 | double pixelsPerBar = 5.0;
  326 | double pixelsPerPrice = 100000.0;
  327 | m_currentAnalysis.dragonAngle = MathArctan(m_currentAnalysis.dragonSlope * pixelsPerPrice / pixelsPerBar) * 180.0 / M_PI;
  328 | 
  329 | // Normalize angle between -90 and 90
  330 | if(m_currentAnalysis.dragonAngle > 90) m_currentAnalysis.dragonAngle = 90;
  331 | if(m_currentAnalysis.dragonAngle < -90) m_currentAnalysis.dragonAngle = -90;
  332 | 
  333 | // Calculate band width metrics
  334 | m_currentAnalysis.bandWidth = m_emaHigh[0] - m_emaLow[0];
  335 | double currentPrice = (m_emaHigh[0] + m_emaLow[0]) / 2.0;
  336 | if(currentPrice > 0)
  337 | m_currentAnalysis.bandWidthPercent = (m_currentAnalysis.bandWidth / currentPrice) * 100.0;
  338 | 
  339 | // Normalize band width against historical average
  340 | if(m_normalBandWidth > 0)
  341 | m_currentAnalysis.bandWidthNormalized = m_currentAnalysis.bandWidth / m_normalBandWidth;
  342 | 
  343 | // Update band width history for squeeze detection
  344 | UpdateBandWidthHistory();
  345 | }
  346 | 
  347 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  348 | //| 🐉 ENHANCED DRAGON SQUEEZE DETECTION (Boss's Missing Feature)   |
  349 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  350 | void DetectEnhancedDragonSqueeze()
  351 | {
  352 | if(ArraySize(m_emaHigh) < 20 || ArraySize(m_emaLow) < 20) return;
  353 | 
  354 | // Calculate current band contraction
  355 | double currentWidth = m_currentAnalysis.bandWidth;
  356 | double avgWidth = CalculateAverageBandWidth(10); // 10-period average
  357 | 
  358 | // Enhanced squeeze detection criteria
  359 | bool isContracting = (currentWidth < avgWidth * m_squeezeThreshold);
  360 | bool hasMinimumContraction = (currentWidth < m_normalBandWidth * 0.6); // 40% below normal
  361 | bool isVolatilityLow = CheckLowVolatilityCondition();
  362 | 
  363 | // Update squeeze state
  364 | if(isContracting && hasMinimumContraction && isVolatilityLow) {
  365 | if(!m_currentAnalysis.isDragonSqueeze) {
  366 | // New squeeze detected
  367 | m_currentSqueezeBars = 1;
  368 | m_squeezeStartWidth = currentWidth;
  369 | m_squeezeMinWidth = currentWidth;
  370 | m_currentAnalysis.dragonState = DRAGON_SQUEEZE;
  371 | 
  372 | Print("🐉 NEW DRAGON SQUEEZE DETECTED | Width: ", DoubleToString(currentWidth, 5));
  373 | } else {
  374 | // Continuing squeeze
  375 | m_currentSqueezeBars++;
  376 | if(currentWidth < m_squeezeMinWidth) {
  377 | m_squeezeMinWidth = currentWidth;
  378 | }
  379 | }
  380 | 
  381 | m_currentAnalysis.isDragonSqueeze = true;
  382 | m_currentAnalysis.squeezeBars = m_currentSqueezeBars;
  383 | 
  384 | // Calculate squeeze intensity (0-1)
  385 | if(m_normalBandWidth > 0) {
  386 | m_currentAnalysis.squeezeIntensity = 1.0 - (currentWidth / m_normalBandWidth);
  387 | m_currentAnalysis.squeezeIntensity = MathMax(0.0, MathMin(1.0, m_currentAnalysis.squeezeIntensity));
  388 | }
  389 | 
  390 | // Calculate squeeze quality
  391 | CalculateSqueezeQuality();
  392 | 
  393 | } else {
  394 | // Check for squeeze breakout
  395 | if(m_currentAnalysis.isDragonSqueeze && m_currentSqueezeBars >= m_minSqueezeBars) {
  396 | // Squeeze breakout detected
  397 | DetectSqueezeBreakout();
  398 | }
  399 | 
  400 | // Reset squeeze state
  401 | m_currentAnalysis.isDragonSqueeze = false;
  402 | m_currentAnalysis.squeezeIntensity = 0.0;
  403 | m_currentSqueezeBars = 0;
  404 | m_currentAnalysis.dragonState = DRAGON_STABLE;
  405 | }
  406 | 
  407 | m_wasSqueezing = m_currentAnalysis.isDragonSqueeze;
  408 | }
  409 | 
  410 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  411 | //| 🎯 CALCULATE SQUEEZE QUALITY                                     |
  412 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  413 | void CalculateSqueezeQuality()
  414 | {
  415 | double quality = 0.0;
  416 | 
  417 | // Factor 1: Duration (30% weight)
  418 | double durationScore = 0.0;
  419 | if(m_currentSqueezeBars >= m_minSqueezeBars && m_currentSqueezeBars <= m_maxSqueezeBars) {
  420 | durationScore = (double)m_currentSqueezeBars / m_maxSqueezeBars;
  421 | }
  422 | quality += durationScore * 0.3;
  423 | 
  424 | // Factor 2: Intensity (40% weight)
  425 | quality += m_currentAnalysis.squeezeIntensity * 0.4;
  426 | 
  427 | // Factor 3: Trend alignment (20% weight)
  428 | double trendScore = 0.0;
  429 | if(MathAbs(m_currentAnalysis.dragonAngle) < 1.0) { // Low angle = good for squeeze
  430 | trendScore = 1.0 - (MathAbs(m_currentAnalysis.dragonAngle) / 5.0);
  431 | }
  432 | quality += trendScore * 0.2;
  433 | 
  434 | // Factor 4: Price position (10% weight)
  435 | double positionScore = 0.0;
  436 | if(m_currentAnalysis.pricePosition > 0.3 && m_currentAnalysis.pricePosition < 0.7) {
  437 | positionScore = 1.0; // Price in middle of band = good
  438 | }
  439 | quality += positionScore * 0.1;
  440 | 
  441 | m_currentAnalysis.squeezeQuality = MathMax(0.0, MathMin(1.0, quality));
  442 | }
  443 | 
  444 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  445 | //| 🎯 DETECT SQUEEZE BREAKOUT                                       |
  446 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  447 | void DetectSqueezeBreakout()
  448 | {
  449 | double currentWidth = m_currentAnalysis.bandWidth;
  450 | double expansionRatio = currentWidth / m_squeezeMinWidth;
  451 | 
  452 | // Breakout criteria: 50% expansion from minimum width
  453 | if(expansionRatio > 1.5) {
  454 | m_currentAnalysis.dragonState = DRAGON_EXPANSION;
  455 | m_currentAnalysis.isBreakoutReady = true;
  456 | m_breakoutTotalCount++;
  457 | 
  458 | // Determine breakout direction based on price position and angle
  459 | double currentPrice = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
  460 | double midpoint = (m_emaHigh[0] + m_emaLow[0]) / 2.0;
  461 | 
  462 | if(currentPrice > midpoint && m_currentAnalysis.dragonAngle > 0) {
  463 | Print("🟢 BULLISH DRAGON BREAKOUT | Angle: ", DoubleToString(m_currentAnalysis.dragonAngle, 1), "°");
  464 | } else if(currentPrice < midpoint && m_currentAnalysis.dragonAngle < 0) {
  465 | Print("🔴 BEARISH DRAGON BREAKOUT | Angle: ", DoubleToString(m_currentAnalysis.dragonAngle, 1), "°");
  466 | }
  467 | }
  468 | }
  469 | 
  470 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  471 | //| 🎯 ANALYZE TREND DIRECTION AND STRENGTH                         |
  472 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  473 | void AnalyzeTrendDirection()
  474 | {
  475 | if(ArraySize(m_emaClose) < 5) return;
  476 | 
  477 | // Determine trend based on Dragon Angle (Boss's 2-degree threshold)
  478 | if(m_currentAnalysis.dragonAngle > m_angleThreshold)
  479 | {
  480 | m_currentAnalysis.trendDirection = TREND_UP;
  481 | m_currentAnalysis.trendStrength = MathMin(MathAbs(m_currentAnalysis.dragonAngle) / 15.0, 1.0);
  482 | }
  483 | else if(m_currentAnalysis.dragonAngle < -m_angleThreshold)
  484 | {
  485 | m_currentAnalysis.trendDirection = TREND_DOWN;
  486 | m_currentAnalysis.trendStrength = MathMin(MathAbs(m_currentAnalysis.dragonAngle) / 15.0, 1.0);
  487 | }
  488 | else
  489 | {
  490 | m_currentAnalysis.trendDirection = TREND_SIDEWAYS;
  491 | m_currentAnalysis.trendStrength = 0.2; // Weak sideways movement
  492 | }
  493 | 
  494 | // Enhance trend strength with EMA 89 confirmation
  495 | double emaCloseVsTrend = m_currentAnalysis.emaClose - m_currentAnalysis.emaTrend89;
  496 | double trendConfirmation = 0.0;
  497 | 
  498 | if((m_currentAnalysis.trendDirection == TREND_UP && emaCloseVsTrend > 0) ||
  499 | (m_currentAnalysis.trendDirection == TREND_DOWN && emaCloseVsTrend < 0))
  500 | {
  501 | trendConfirmation = 0.3; // Trend confirmed by longer-term EMA
  502 | }
  503 | 
  504 | m_currentAnalysis.trendStrength = MathMin(m_currentAnalysis.trendStrength + trendConfirmation, 1.0);
  505 | }
  506 | 
  507 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  508 | //| 🎯 ANALYZE PRICE POSITION AND PULLBACK ZONES (PHASE 2 ENHANCED) |
  509 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  510 | void AnalyzePricePosition()
  511 | {
  512 | double currentPrice = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
  513 | double bandRange = m_currentAnalysis.bandWidth;
  514 | 
  515 | if(bandRange > 0) {
  516 | // Calculate position within Dragon Band (0 = bottom, 1 = top)
  517 | m_currentAnalysis.pricePosition = (currentPrice - m_emaLow[0]) / bandRange;
  518 | m_currentAnalysis.pricePosition = MathMax(0.0, MathMin(1.0, m_currentAnalysis.pricePosition));
  519 | }
  520 | 
  521 | // 🎯 PHASE 2: Enhanced Pullback Zone Logic per review.txt
  522 | bool inPullbackZone = IsPullbackZoneEnhanced();
  523 | double pullbackQuality = CalculatePullbackQuality();
  524 | 
  525 | m_currentAnalysis.isPullbackZone = inPullbackZone;
  526 | m_currentAnalysis.pullbackQuality = pullbackQuality;
  527 | }
  528 | 
  529 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  530 | //| 🎯 PHASE 2: ENHANCED PULLBACK ZONE DETECTION (per review.txt)   |
  531 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  532 | bool IsPullbackZoneEnhanced()
  533 | {
  534 |     // Tính toán vị trí giá trong dải Dragon
  535 |     double dragonWidth = m_currentAnalysis.emaHigh - m_currentAnalysis.emaLow;
  536 |     if(dragonWidth <= 0) {
  537 |         Print("⚠️ [PHASE 2] Dragon width invalid, fallback: no pullback zone");
  538 |         return false; // Fallback khi thiếu dữ liệu
  539 |     }
  540 |     
  541 |     double currentPrice = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
  542 |     double pricePosition = (currentPrice - m_currentAnalysis.emaLow) / dragonWidth;
  543 |     
  544 |     // Xác định pullback zone (20%-40% hoặc 60%-80%) theo review.txt
  545 |     bool inPullbackZone = ((pricePosition >= 0.2 && pricePosition <= 0.4) ||
  546 |                           (pricePosition >= 0.6 && pricePosition <= 0.8));
  547 |     
  548 |     // Cơ chế early entry khi momentum mạnh
  549 |     if(inPullbackZone && IsStrongMomentum()) {
  550 |         Print("✅ [PHASE 2] Early entry: Strong momentum + pullback zone at ", DoubleToString(pricePosition*100, 1), "%");
  551 |         return true;
  552 |     }
  553 |     
  554 |     // Log lý do vào lệnh theo yêu cầu review.txt
  555 |     if(inPullbackZone) {
  556 |         Print("✅ [PHASE 2] Pullback zone detected at ", DoubleToString(pricePosition*100, 1), "% of Dragon Band");
  557 |     }
  558 |     
  559 |     return inPullbackZone;
  560 | }
  561 | 
  562 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  563 | //| 🎯 PHASE 2: CALCULATE PULLBACK QUALITY                          |
  564 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  565 | double CalculatePullbackQuality()
  566 | {
  567 |     if(!m_currentAnalysis.isPullbackZone) return 0.0;
  568 |     
  569 |     double quality = 0.5; // Base quality
  570 |     
  571 |     // Factor 1: Price position within optimal zones
  572 |     double pricePos = m_currentAnalysis.pricePosition;
  573 |     if((pricePos >= 0.2 && pricePos <= 0.4) || (pricePos >= 0.6 && pricePos <= 0.8)) {
  574 |         quality += 0.3;
  575 |     }
  576 |     
  577 |     // Factor 2: Trend strength confirmation
  578 |     if(m_currentAnalysis.trendStrength > 0.6) {
  579 |         quality += 0.2;
  580 |     }
  581 |     
  582 |     return MathMin(1.0, quality);
  583 | }
  584 | 
  585 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  586 | //| 🎯 PHASE 2: STRONG MOMENTUM DETECTION                           |
  587 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  588 | bool IsStrongMomentum()
  589 | {
  590 |     // Strong Dragon angle indicates momentum
  591 |     bool strongAngle = (MathAbs(m_currentAnalysis.dragonAngle) > 8.0);
  592 |     
  593 |     // EMA confirmation
  594 |     bool emaConfirmation = false;
  595 |     if(m_currentAnalysis.trendDirection == TREND_UP && m_currentAnalysis.emaClose > m_currentAnalysis.emaTrend89) {
  596 |         emaConfirmation = true;
  597 |     }
  598 |     else if(m_currentAnalysis.trendDirection == TREND_DOWN && m_currentAnalysis.emaClose < m_currentAnalysis.emaTrend89) {
  599 |         emaConfirmation = true;
  600 |     }
  601 |     
  602 |     return strongAngle && emaConfirmation;
  603 | }
  604 | 
  605 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  606 | //| 🎯 DETECT BREAKOUT READINESS                                     |
  607 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  608 | void DetectBreakoutReadiness()
  609 | {
  610 | // Criteria for breakout readiness
  611 | bool hasSqueezeHistory = (m_currentSqueezeBars >= m_minSqueezeBars || m_wasSqueezing);
  612 | bool hasGoodAngle = (MathAbs(m_currentAnalysis.dragonAngle) > m_angleThreshold);
  613 | bool hasVolumeIncrease = CheckVolumeIncrease();
  614 | bool hasTrendConfirmation = (m_currentAnalysis.trendStrength > 0.5);
  615 | 
  616 | // Calculate breakout probability
  617 | double probability = 0.0;
  618 | if(hasSqueezeHistory) probability += 0.4;
  619 | if(hasGoodAngle) probability += 0.3;
  620 | if(hasVolumeIncrease) probability += 0.2;
  621 | if(hasTrendConfirmation) probability += 0.1;
  622 | 
  623 | m_currentAnalysis.breakoutProbability = probability;
  624 | m_currentAnalysis.isBreakoutReady = (probability >= 0.7); // 70% threshold
  625 | }
  626 | 
  627 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  628 | //| 🎯 CALCULATE OVERALL CONFIDENCE                                  |
  629 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  630 | void CalculateOverallConfidence()
  631 | {
  632 | double confidence = 0.5; // Base confidence
  633 | 
  634 | // Factor 1: Trend clarity (25%)
  635 | confidence += (m_currentAnalysis.trendStrength * 0.25);
  636 | 
  637 | // Factor 2: Dragon angle strength (25%)
  638 | double angleScore = MathMin(MathAbs(m_currentAnalysis.dragonAngle) / 10.0, 1.0);
  639 | confidence += (angleScore * 0.25);
  640 | 
  641 | // Factor 3: Squeeze quality (25%)
  642 | if(m_currentAnalysis.isDragonSqueeze) {
  643 | confidence += (m_currentAnalysis.squeezeQuality * 0.25);
  644 | } else {
  645 | confidence += 0.125; // Neutral if no squeeze
  646 | }
  647 | 
  648 | // Factor 4: EMA 89 confirmation (25%)
  649 | double emaConfirmation = 0.0;
  650 | if((m_currentAnalysis.emaClose > m_currentAnalysis.emaTrend89 && m_currentAnalysis.trendDirection == TREND_UP) ||
  651 | (m_currentAnalysis.emaClose < m_currentAnalysis.emaTrend89 && m_currentAnalysis.trendDirection == TREND_DOWN)) {
  652 | emaConfirmation = 1.0;
  653 | }
  654 | confidence += (emaConfirmation * 0.25);
  655 | 
  656 | m_currentAnalysis.confidence = MathMax(0.0, MathMin(1.0, confidence));
  657 | 
  658 | // Update average confidence tracking
  659 | if(m_analysisCount > 0) {
  660 | m_averageConfidence = ((m_averageConfidence * (m_analysisCount - 1)) + m_currentAnalysis.confidence) / m_analysisCount;
  661 | }
  662 | }
  663 | 
  664 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  665 | //| 🎯 HELPER FUNCTIONS                                              |
  666 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  667 | 
  668 | void CalculateNormalBandWidth()
  669 | {
  670 | // Calculate average band width over longer period for normalization
  671 | if(ArraySize(m_emaHigh) < 20 || ArraySize(m_emaLow) < 20) return;
  672 | 
  673 | double totalWidth = 0.0;
  674 | int count = 0;
  675 | 
  676 | for(int i = 1; i < 20; i++) { // Skip current bar
  677 | double width = m_emaHigh[i] - m_emaLow[i];
  678 | if(width > 0) {
  679 | totalWidth += width;
  680 | count++;
  681 | }
  682 | }
  683 | 
  684 | if(count > 0) {
  685 | m_normalBandWidth = totalWidth / count;
  686 | }
  687 | }
  688 | 
  689 | void UpdateBandWidthHistory()
  690 | {
  691 | // Shift history array
  692 | for(int i = 49; i > 0; i--) {
  693 | m_bandWidthHistory[i] = m_bandWidthHistory[i-1];
  694 | }
  695 | 
  696 | // Add current width
  697 | m_bandWidthHistory[0] = m_currentAnalysis.bandWidth;
  698 | 
  699 | if(m_bandHistoryCount < 50) m_bandHistoryCount++;
  700 | }
  701 | 
  702 | double CalculateAverageBandWidth(int period)
  703 | {
  704 | if(ArraySize(m_emaHigh) < period || ArraySize(m_emaLow) < period) return 0.0;
  705 | 
  706 | double total = 0.0;
  707 | for(int i = 1; i <= period; i++) {
  708 | total += (m_emaHigh[i] - m_emaLow[i]);
  709 | }
  710 | 
  711 | return total / period;
  712 | }
  713 | 
  714 | bool CheckLowVolatilityCondition()
  715 | {
  716 | // Check if recent volatility is low (supporting squeeze condition)
  717 | int atrHandle = iATR(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 14);
  718 | double atr[];
  719 | ArraySetAsSeries(atr, true);
  720 | 
  721 | if(CopyBuffer(atrHandle, 0, 0, 10, atr) < 10) {
  722 | IndicatorRelease(atrHandle);
  723 | return false;
  724 | }
  725 | 
  726 | double currentATR = atr[0];
  727 | double avgATR = 0.0;
  728 | for(int i = 1; i < 10; i++) avgATR += atr[i];
  729 | avgATR /= 9;
  730 | 
  731 | IndicatorRelease(atrHandle);
  732 | 
  733 | return (currentATR < avgATR * 0.8); // Current ATR 20% below average
  734 | }
  735 | 
  736 | bool CheckVolumeIncrease()
  737 | {
  738 | // Check for volume increase (supporting breakout)
  739 | long volumes[];
  740 | ArraySetAsSeries(volumes, true);
  741 | 
  742 | if(CopyTickVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0, 5, volumes) < 5) {
  743 | return false;
  744 | }
  745 | 
  746 | double currentVol = (double)volumes[0];
  747 | double avgVol = 0.0;
  748 | for(int i = 1; i < 5; i++) avgVol += (double)volumes[i]; // 🔧 FIXED: Cast long to double explicitly
  749 | avgVol /= 4;
  750 | 
  751 | return (currentVol > avgVol * 1.2); // 20% volume increase
  752 | }
  753 | 
  754 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  755 | //| 🎯 PUBLIC GETTERS AND ANALYSIS RESULTS                          |
  756 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  757 | 
  758 | // Get Dragon Band score for main EA
  759 | double GetDragonBandScore()
  760 | {
  761 | if(!m_currentAnalysis.isValid) return 0.0;
  762 | 
  763 | double score = m_currentAnalysis.confidence;
  764 | 
  765 | // Boost score for squeeze conditions
  766 | if(m_currentAnalysis.isDragonSqueeze && m_currentAnalysis.squeezeQuality > 0.6) {
  767 | score = MathMin(1.0, score + 0.2);
  768 | }
  769 | 
  770 | // Boost score for breakout readiness
  771 | if(m_currentAnalysis.isBreakoutReady) {
  772 | score = MathMin(1.0, score + 0.1);
  773 | }
  774 | 
  775 | return score;
  776 | }
  777 | 
  778 | // Get current analysis
  779 | SEnhancedDragonBandData GetCurrentAnalysis() { return m_currentAnalysis; }
  780 | 
  781 | // Check specific conditions
  782 | bool IsDragonSqueeze() { return m_currentAnalysis.isDragonSqueeze; }
  783 | bool IsBreakoutReady() { return m_currentAnalysis.isBreakoutReady; }
  784 | bool IsPullbackZone() { return m_currentAnalysis.isPullbackZone; }
  785 | ENUM_TREND_DIRECTION GetTrendDirection() { return m_currentAnalysis.trendDirection; }
  786 | double GetDragonAngle() { return m_currentAnalysis.dragonAngle; }
  787 | double GetTrendStrength() { return m_currentAnalysis.trendStrength; }
  788 | 
  789 | // Performance and reporting
  790 | string GetPerformanceReport()
  791 | {
  792 | double successRate = (m_breakoutTotalCount > 0) ? 
  793 | (double)m_breakoutSuccessCount / m_breakoutTotalCount * 100 : 0.0;
  794 | 
  795 | return StringFormat(
  796 | "🐉 Dragon Performance | Analyses: %d | Avg Confidence: %.1f%% | Breakout Success: %.1f%%",
  797 | m_analysisCount, m_averageConfidence * 100, successRate
  798 | );
  799 | }
  800 | 
  801 | string GetDetailedReport()
  802 | {
  803 | return m_currentAnalysis.GetDetailedReport();
  804 | }
  805 | 
  806 | // Reset analysis (call when market conditions change significantly)
  807 | void Reset()
  808 | {
  809 | m_currentAnalysis.Reset();
  810 | m_currentSqueezeBars = 0;
  811 | m_wasSqueezing = false;
  812 | Print("🔄 Dragon Band analysis reset");
  813 | }
  814 | };
  815 | 
  816 | #endif // ANALYSIS_DRAGON_BAND_ANALYZER_ENHANCED_MQH
  817 |

   19 | struct SWyckoffPattern
   20 | {
   21 | ENUM_WYCKOFF_PHASE phase;
   22 | double confidence;           // 0.0-1.0 confidence in phase
   23 | datetime phaseStartTime;
   24 | int phaseBarCount;
   25 | double volumeCharacteristic; // Average volume during phase
   26 | double priceRange;          // Price range during phase
   27 | bool hasSpring;             // Spring pattern detected
   28 | bool hasUpthrust;           // Upthrust pattern detected
   29 | double springPrice;         // Price level of spring
   30 | double upthrustPrice;       // Price level of upthrust
   31 | 
   32 | void Reset()
   33 | {
   34 | phase = PHASE_UNKNOWN;
   35 | confidence = 0.0;
   36 | phaseStartTime = 0;
   37 | phaseBarCount = 0;
   38 | volumeCharacteristic = 0.0;
   39 | priceRange = 0.0;
   40 | hasSpring = false;
   41 | hasUpthrust = false;
   42 | springPrice = 0.0;
   43 | upthrustPrice = 0.0;
   44 | }
   45 | 
   46 | string ToString()
   47 | {
   48 | return StringFormat("Phase: %s | Confidence: %.1f%% | Duration: %d bars%s%s",
   49 | WyckoffPhaseToString(phase), confidence*100, phaseBarCount,
   50 | hasSpring ? " | SPRING" : "",
   51 | hasUpthrust ? " | UPTHRUST" : "");
   52 | }
   53 | };

   55 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   56 | //| 🧠 WYCKOFF ANALYZER - INSTITUTIONAL INTELLIGENCE                |
   57 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   58 | class CWyckoffAnalyzer
   59 | {
   60 | private:
   61 | ENUM_WYCKOFF_PHASE m_currentPhase;
   62 | datetime m_phaseStartTime;
   63 | double m_phaseConfidence;
   64 | int m_phaseBarCount;
   65 | 
   66 | // Volume analysis
   67 | double m_averageVolume50;
   68 | double m_volumeVariance;
   69 | double m_priceRangeVariance;
   70 | 
   71 | // Current pattern storage
   72 | ENUM_WYCKOFF_PHASE m_currentPatternPhase;
   73 | double m_currentPatternConfidence;
   74 | datetime m_currentPatternStartTime;
   75 | int m_currentPatternBarCount;
   76 | double m_currentVolumeCharacteristic;
   77 | double m_currentPriceRange;
   78 | bool m_currentHasSpring;
   79 | bool m_currentHasUpthrust;
   80 | double m_currentSpringPrice;
   81 | double m_currentUpthrustPrice;
   82 |

   85 |

   88 | double m_priceVarianceThreshold;
   89 | double m_springConfidenceThreshold;
   90 | 
   91 | public:
   92 | CWyckoffAnalyzer()

   94 | m_currentPhase = PHASE_UNKNOWN;
   95 | m_phaseStartTime = 0;
   96 | m_phaseConfidence = 0.0;
   97 | m_phaseBarCount = 0;
   98 | m_averageVolume50 = 0.0;
   99 | m_volumeVariance = 0.0;
  100 | m_priceRangeVariance = 0.0;
  101 | m_patternHistoryCount = 0;
  102 | m_volumeVarianceThreshold = 0.3;
  103 | m_priceVarianceThreshold = 0.2;
  104 | m_springConfidenceThreshold = 0.7;
  105 | 
  106 | // Initialize current pattern

  108 | m_currentPatternConfidence = 0.0;
  109 | m_currentPatternStartTime = 0;

  113 | m_currentHasSpring = false;
  114 | m_currentHasUpthrust = false;

  116 | m_currentUpthrustPrice = 0.0;
  117 | }

  124 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  125 | //| 🎯 WYCKOFF PHASE DETECTION METHODS                             |
  126 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  127 | ENUM_WYCKOFF_PHASE GetMarketMakerPhase()
  128 | {
  129 | return m_currentPhase;
  130 | }
  131 | 
  132 | bool ShouldBlockSignals()
  133 | {
  134 | // Block signals during uncertain phases
  135 | return (m_currentPhase == PHASE_UNKNOWN || m_phaseConfidence < 0.3);
  136 | }
  137 | 
  138 | bool IsSpringSetup()
  139 | {
  140 | return m_currentHasSpring;
  141 | }
  142 | 
  143 | bool IsUpthrustSetup()
  144 | {
  145 | return m_currentHasUpthrust;
  146 | }
  147 | 
  148 | string GetPhaseReport()
  149 | {
  150 |     string phaseStr = "";
  151 |     switch(m_currentPatternPhase) {
  152 |         case PHASE_ACCUMULATION: phaseStr = "ACCUMULATION"; break;
  153 |         case PHASE_MARKUP: phaseStr = "MARKUP"; break;
  154 |         case PHASE_DISTRIBUTION: phaseStr = "DISTRIBUTION"; break;
  155 |         case PHASE_MARKDOWN: phaseStr = "MARKDOWN"; break;
  156 |         case PHASE_REACCUMULATION: phaseStr = "REACCUMULATION"; break;
  157 |         case PHASE_REDISTRIBUTION: phaseStr = "REDISTRIBUTION"; break;
  158 |         default: phaseStr = "UNKNOWN"; break;
  159 |     }
  160 |     
  161 |     return StringFormat("Phase: %s | Confidence: %.2f | Range: %.5f%s%s",
  162 |         phaseStr,
  163 |         m_currentPatternConfidence,
  164 |         m_currentPriceRange,
  165 |         m_currentHasSpring ? " | SPRING" : "",
  166 |         m_currentHasUpthrust ? " | UPTHRUST" : "");
  167 | }
  168 | 
  169 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  170 | //| 🧠 PHASE ANALYSIS METHODS                                      |
  171 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  172 | private:
  173 | void UpdatePhaseAnalysis()
  174 | {
  175 | // Update volume analysis
  176 | UpdateVolumeAnalysis();
  177 | 
  178 | // Update price analysis
  179 | UpdatePriceAnalysis();
  180 | 
  181 | // Determine current phase
  182 | DetermineCurrentPhase();
  183 | 
  184 | // Update pattern history
  185 | UpdatePatternHistory();
  186 | }
  187 | 
  188 | void UpdateVolumeAnalysis()
  189 | {
  190 | // Calculate average volume over 50 periods
  191 | double totalVolume = 0.0;
  192 | for(int i = 1; i <= 50; i++) {
  193 | totalVolume += (double)iVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  194 | }
  195 | m_averageVolume50 = totalVolume / 50.0;
  196 | 
  197 | // Calculate volume variance
  198 | double varianceSum = 0.0;
  199 | for(int i = 1; i <= 20; i++) {
  200 | double vol = (double)iVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  201 | varianceSum += MathPow(vol - m_averageVolume50, 2);
  202 | }
  203 | m_volumeVariance = varianceSum / 20.0;
  204 | }
  205 | 
  206 | void UpdatePriceAnalysis()
  207 | {
  208 | // Calculate price range variance
  209 | double varianceSum = 0.0;
  210 | double avgRange = 0.0;
  211 | 
  212 | // Calculate average range
  213 | for(int i = 1; i <= 20; i++) {
  214 | MqlRates rates[];
  215 | ArraySetAsSeries(rates, true);
  216 | if(CopyRates(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i, 1, rates) > 0) {
  217 | avgRange += (rates[0].high - rates[0].low);
  218 | }
  219 | }
  220 | avgRange /= 20.0;
  221 | 
  222 | // Calculate variance
  223 | for(int i = 1; i <= 20; i++) {
  224 | MqlRates rates[];
  225 | ArraySetAsSeries(rates, true);
  226 | if(CopyRates(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i, 1, rates) > 0) {
  227 | double range = rates[0].high - rates[0].low;
  228 | varianceSum += MathPow(range - avgRange, 2);
  229 | }
  230 | }
  231 | m_priceRangeVariance = varianceSum / 20.0;
  232 | }
  233 | 
  234 | void DetermineCurrentPhase()
  235 | {
  236 | // Simple phase determination based on price and volume
  237 | MqlRates rates[];
  238 | ArraySetAsSeries(rates, true);
  239 | if(CopyRates(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0, 10, rates) < 10) {
  240 | m_currentPhase = PHASE_UNKNOWN;
  241 | return;
  242 | }
  243 | 
  244 | // Calculate trend direction
  245 | double priceChange = rates[0].close - rates[9].close;
  246 | double avgVolume = m_averageVolume50;
  247 | double currentVolume = (double)rates[0].tick_volume;
  248 | 
  249 | // Determine phase based on phase movement and volume
  250 | if(priceChange > 0 && currentVolume > avgVolume * 1.2) {
  251 | m_currentPhase = PHASE_MARKUP;
  252 | m_phaseConfidence = 0.8;
  253 | } else if(priceChange < 0 && currentVolume > avgVolume * 1.2) {
  254 | m_currentPhase = PHASE_MARKDOWN;
  255 | m_phaseConfidence = 0.8;
  256 | } else if(MathAbs(priceChange) < avgVolume * 0.1) {
  257 | m_currentPhase = PHASE_ACCUMULATION;
  258 | m_phaseConfidence = 0.6;
  259 | } else {
  260 | m_currentPhase = PHASE_UNKNOWN;
  261 | m_phaseConfidence = 0.3;
  262 | }
  263 | 
  264 | // Update current pattern
  265 | m_currentPatternPhase = m_currentPhase;
  266 | m_currentPatternConfidence = m_phaseConfidence;
  267 | m_currentPatternStartTime = rates[0].time;
  268 | }
  269 | 
  270 | void UpdatePatternHistory()
  271 | {
  272 | // For now, just track count - pattern history can be implemented later if needed
  273 | if(m_patternHistoryCount < 5) {
  274 | m_patternHistoryCount++;
  275 | }
  276 | }
  277 | 
  278 | public:
  279 | SWyckoffPattern GetCurrentPattern()
  280 | {
  281 | SWyckoffPattern pattern;
  282 | pattern.phase = m_currentPatternPhase;
  283 | pattern.confidence = m_currentPatternConfidence;
  284 | pattern.phaseStartTime = m_currentPatternStartTime;
  285 | pattern.phaseBarCount = m_currentPatternBarCount;
  286 | pattern.volumeCharacteristic = m_currentVolumeCharacteristic;
  287 | pattern.priceRange = m_currentPriceRange;
  288 | pattern.hasSpring = m_currentHasSpring;
  289 | pattern.hasUpthrust = m_currentHasUpthrust;
  290 | pattern.springPrice = m_currentSpringPrice;
  291 | pattern.upthrustPrice = m_currentUpthrustPrice;
  292 | return pattern;
  293 | }
  294 | };
  295 | 
  296 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  297 | //| 🚀 ENHANCED PVSRA ANALYZER                                       |
  298 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  299 | class CEnhancedPVSRA
  300 | {
  301 | private:
  302 | CWyckoffAnalyzer* m_wyckoffAnalyzer;
  303 | 
  304 | // PVSRA thresholds
  305 | double m_volumeThreshold;
  306 | double m_spreadThreshold;
  307 | double m_closingThreshold;
  308 | 
  309 | // Performance tracking
  310 | int m_patternsDetected;
  311 | int m_successfulPatterns;
  312 | 
  313 | public:
  314 | CEnhancedPVSRA()
  315 | {
  316 | m_wyckoffAnalyzer = new CWyckoffAnalyzer();
  317 | 
  318 | m_volumeThreshold = 1.5;     // 1.5x average volume
  319 | m_spreadThreshold = 0.7;     // 70% of average spread for narrow
  320 | m_closingThreshold = 0.8;    // 80% of range for strong close
  321 | 
  322 | m_patternsDetected = 0;
  323 | m_successfulPatterns = 0;
  324 | }
  325 | 
  326 | ~CEnhancedPVSRA()
  327 | {
  328 | if(m_wyckoffAnalyzer != NULL) {
  329 | delete m_wyckoffAnalyzer;
  330 | m_wyckoffAnalyzer = NULL;
  331 | }
  332 | }
  333 | 
  334 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  335 | //| 🎯 ENHANCED PVSRA SCORING WITH WYCKOFF                          |
  336 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  337 | double GetEnhancedPVSRAScore()
  338 | {
  339 | double score = 0.0;
  340 | 
  341 | // 🎯 FACTOR 1: Classic PVSRA Analysis (60%)
  342 | double classicScore = AnalyzeClassicPVSRA();
  343 | score += classicScore * 0.6;
  344 | 
  345 | // 🎯 FACTOR 2: Wyckoff Context (40%)
  346 | double wyckoffScore = AnalyzeWyckoffContext();
  347 | score += wyckoffScore * 0.4;
  348 | 
  349 | return MathMin(1.0, score);
  350 | }
  351 | 
  352 | private:
  353 | double AnalyzeClassicPVSRA()
  354 | {
  355 | // Get current candle data
  356 | MqlRates rates[];
  357 | ArraySetAsSeries(rates, true);
  358 | if(CopyRates(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0, 2, rates) < 2) {
  359 | return 0.0;
  360 | }
  361 | 
  362 | // Analyze current candle
  363 | double bodySize = MathAbs(rates[0].close - rates[0].open);
  364 | double totalSize = rates[0].high - rates[0].low;
  365 | double bodyPercent = (totalSize > 0) ? bodySize / totalSize : 0;
  366 | double currentVolume = (double)rates[0].tick_volume;
  367 | 
  368 | // Get average volume
  369 | double avgVolume = CalculateAverageVolume(20);
  370 | double volumeRatio = (avgVolume > 0) ? currentVolume / avgVolume : 1.0;
  371 | 
  372 | // Closing position in range
  373 | double closingPos = 0.5; // Default middle
  374 | if(totalSize > 0) {
  375 | closingPos = (rates[0].close - rates[0].low) / totalSize;
  376 | }
  377 | 
  378 | // 🎯 BOSS ENHANCEMENT: Apply PVSRA score first, then check institutional
  379 | double pvsraScore = GetBasicPVSRAScore(bodyPercent, volumeRatio, closingPos);
  380 | CheckInstitutional(pvsraScore); // Institutional check and SMC integration
  381 | 
  382 | return pvsraScore;
  383 | }
  384 | 
  385 | double AnalyzeWyckoffContext()
  386 | {
  387 | // Get current Wyckoff phase
  388 | ENUM_WYCKOFF_PHASE currentPhase = m_wyckoffAnalyzer.GetMarketMakerPhase();
  389 | SWyckoffPattern pattern;
  390 | pattern.phase = m_wyckoffAnalyzer.GetCurrentPattern().phase;
  391 | pattern.confidence = m_wyckoffAnalyzer.GetCurrentPattern().confidence;
  392 | pattern.phaseStartTime = m_wyckoffAnalyzer.GetCurrentPattern().phaseStartTime;
  393 | pattern.phaseBarCount = m_wyckoffAnalyzer.GetCurrentPattern().phaseBarCount;
  394 | pattern.volumeCharacteristic = m_wyckoffAnalyzer.GetCurrentPattern().volumeCharacteristic;
  395 | pattern.priceRange = m_wyckoffAnalyzer.GetCurrentPattern().priceRange;
  396 | pattern.hasSpring = m_wyckoffAnalyzer.GetCurrentPattern().hasSpring;
  397 | pattern.hasUpthrust = m_wyckoffAnalyzer.GetCurrentPattern().hasUpthrust;
  398 | pattern.springPrice = m_wyckoffAnalyzer.GetCurrentPattern().springPrice;
  399 | pattern.upthrustPrice = m_wyckoffAnalyzer.GetCurrentPattern().upthrustPrice;
  400 | 
  401 | double score = 0.0;
  402 | 
  403 | switch(currentPhase) {
  404 | case PHASE_ACCUMULATION:
  405 | // Look for springs and low volume tests
  406 | if(pattern.hasSpring) {
  407 | score = 0.9; // Excellent spring setup
  408 | } else if(pattern.confidence > 0.7) {
  409 | score = 0.3; // Accumulation phase - be patient
  410 | }
  411 | break;
  412 | 
  413 | case PHASE_MARKUP:
  414 | // Trending up - look for volume confirmation
  415 | if(pattern.confidence > 0.8) {
  416 | score = 0.8; // Strong markup phase
  417 | } else {
  418 | score = 0.6; // Potential markup
  419 | }
  420 | break;
  421 | 
  422 | case PHASE_DISTRIBUTION:
  423 | // Look for upthrusts and high volume tests
  424 | if(pattern.hasUpthrust) {
  425 | score = 0.9; // Excellent upthrust setup
  426 | } else if(pattern.confidence > 0.7) {
  427 | score = 0.3; // Distribution phase - be cautious
  428 | }
  429 | break;
  430 | 
  431 | case PHASE_MARKDOWN:
  432 | // Trending down - look for volume confirmation
  433 | if(pattern.confidence > 0.8) {
  434 | score = 0.8; // Strong markdown phase
  435 | } else {
  436 | score = 0.6; // Potential markdown
  437 | }
  438 | break;
  439 | 
  440 | case PHASE_REACCUMULATION:
  441 | // Pause in uptrend - look for continuation signals
  442 | score = 0.7;
  443 | break;
  444 | 
  445 | case PHASE_REDISTRIBUTION:
  446 | // Pause in downtrend - look for continuation signals
  447 | score = 0.7;
  448 | break;
  449 | 
  450 | default:
  451 | score = 0.5; // Unknown phase - neutral
  452 | break;
  453 | }
  454 | 
  455 | return score;
  456 | }
  457 | 
  458 | double CalculateAverageVolume(int periods)
  459 | {
  460 | double total = 0.0;
  461 | for(int i = 1; i <= periods; i++) {
  462 | total += (double)iVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  463 | }
  464 | return total / periods;
  465 | }
  466 | 
  467 | public:
  468 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  469 | //| 🎯 PUBLIC INTERFACE METHODS                                      |
  470 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  471 | ENUM_WYCKOFF_PHASE GetCurrentWyckoffPhase()
  472 | {
  473 | if(m_wyckoffAnalyzer != NULL) {
  474 | return m_wyckoffAnalyzer.GetMarketMakerPhase();
  475 | }
  476 | return PHASE_UNKNOWN;
  477 | }
  478 | 
  479 | bool ShouldBlockSignals()
  480 | {
  481 | if(m_wyckoffAnalyzer != NULL) {
  482 | return m_wyckoffAnalyzer.ShouldBlockSignals();
  483 | }
  484 | return false;
  485 | }
  486 | 
  487 | bool IsSpringSetup()
  488 | {
  489 | if(m_wyckoffAnalyzer != NULL) {
  490 | return m_wyckoffAnalyzer.IsSpringSetup();
  491 | }
  492 | return false;
  493 | }
  494 | 
  495 | bool IsUpthrustSetup()
  496 | {
  497 | if(m_wyckoffAnalyzer != NULL) {
  498 | return m_wyckoffAnalyzer.IsUpthrustSetup();
  499 | }
  500 | return false;
  501 | }
  502 | 
  503 | string GetWyckoffReport()
  504 | {
  505 | if(m_wyckoffAnalyzer != NULL) {
  506 | return m_wyckoffAnalyzer.GetPhaseReport();
  507 | }
  508 | return "Wyckoff Analyzer not available";
  509 | }
  510 | 
  511 | double GetPatternSuccessRate()
  512 | {
  513 | return m_patternsDetected > 0 ? (double)m_successfulPatterns / m_patternsDetected : 0.0;
  514 | }
  515 | 
  516 | // Configuration methods
  517 | void SetVolumeThreshold(double threshold) { m_volumeThreshold = threshold; }
  518 | void SetSpreadThreshold(double threshold) { m_spreadThreshold = threshold; }
  519 | void SetClosingThreshold(double threshold) { m_closingThreshold = threshold; }
  520 | 
  521 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  522 | //| 🎯 BOSS ENHANCEMENT: BASIC PVSRA SCORE CALCULATION              |
  523 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  524 | double GetBasicPVSRAScore(double bodyPercent, double volumeRatio, double closingPos)
  525 | {
  526 | double score = 0.0;
  527 | 
  528 | // Volume threshold >2x average (Wyckoff stopping volume criteria)
  529 | if(volumeRatio > 2.0) {
  530 | score += 0.4; // High volume contribution
  531 | 
  532 | // Additional bonus for extreme volume
  533 | if(volumeRatio > 3.0) score += 0.2;
  534 | }
  535 | 
  536 | // Body size analysis
  537 | if(bodyPercent > 0.7) {
  538 | score += 0.2; // Strong directional move
  539 | } else if(bodyPercent < 0.3) {
  540 | score += 0.15; // Doji/hammer patterns
  541 | }
  542 | 
  543 | // Closing position analysis
  544 | if(closingPos > 0.8 || closingPos < 0.2) {
  545 | score += 0.2; // Extreme closing positions
  546 | }
  547 | 
  548 | return MathMin(1.0, score);
  549 | }
  550 | 
  551 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  552 | //| 🎯 BOSS ENHANCEMENT: INSTITUTIONAL CHECK - MINH BẠCH WYCKOFF    |
  553 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  554 | void CheckInstitutional(double &pvsraScore)
  555 | {
  556 | double smcSignal = GetSMCSignal(); // From SMC module
  557 | 
  558 | if(smcSignal > 0.7) {
  559 | pvsraScore = 0.8; // High confidence institutional activity
  560 | } else {
  561 | pvsraScore *= 0.7; // Reduce if no institutional signs
  562 | }
  563 | }
  564 | 
  565 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  566 | //| 🎯 BOSS ENHANCEMENT: HELPER METHODS                             |
  567 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  568 | bool IsVolumeSurge()
  569 | {
  570 | long currentVol = iVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0);
  571 | double avgVol = CalculateAverageVolume(20);
  572 | return currentVol > avgVol * 2.0; // 2x average volume surge
  573 | }
  574 | 
  575 | bool IsPriceReversal()
  576 | {
  577 | // Simple reversal detection: close opposite to open with high volume
  578 | MqlRates rates[];
  579 | ArraySetAsSeries(rates, true);
  580 | if(CopyRates(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0, 3, rates) < 3) return false;
  581 | 
  582 | bool currentBullish = rates[0].close > rates[0].open;
  583 | bool previousBullish = rates[1].close > rates[1].open;
  584 | 
  585 | // Reversal: current candle opposite direction to previous
  586 | return currentBullish != previousBullish;
  587 | }
  588 | 
  589 | double GetSMCSignal()
  590 | {
  591 | // Integration with SMC - will connect with Item 2 implementation
  592 | // For now, placeholder logic
  593 | return 0.5; // Neutral signal
  594 | }
  595 | };

   28 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   29 | //| 🧮 SMC STRENGTH CALCULATOR - QUANTIFIED ANALYSIS                 |
   30 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   31 | class CSMCStrengthCalculator
   32 | {
   33 | private:
   34 | SSMCLevel m_smcLevels[20];
   35 | int m_levelCount;
   36 | double m_minStrengthThreshold;
   37 | double m_volumeMultiplier;
   38 | int m_maxLookbackBars;
   39 | 
   40 | public:
   41 | CSMCStrengthCalculator()
   42 | {
   43 | m_levelCount = 0;
   44 | m_minStrengthThreshold = 0.7;
   45 | m_volumeMultiplier = 1.8;
   46 | m_maxLookbackBars = 24;
   47 | 
   48 | for(int i = 0; i < 20; i++) {
   49 | m_smcLevels[i].Reset();
   50 | }
   51 | }
   52 | 
   53 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   54 | //| 🎯 CALCULATE S/R STRENGTH - QUANTIFIED METHOD                  |
   55 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   56 | double CalculateSRStrength(datetime srLevelTime, double srPrice, ENUM_DIRECTION direction)
   57 | {
   58 | // 1. Count price reactions at this level
   59 | int reactionCount = CountPriceReactions(srLevelTime, srPrice, direction, m_maxLookbackBars);
   60 | 
   61 | // 2. Measure volume at reaction points
   62 | double avgReactionVolume = GetAverageReactionVolume(srLevelTime, srPrice, direction);
   63 | 
   64 | // 3. Calculate age factor of S/R level
   65 | double ageFactor = CalculateAgeFactor(srLevelTime);
   66 | 
   67 | // 4. Calculate momentum factor
   68 | double momentumFactor = CalculateMomentumFactor(srPrice, direction);
   69 | 
   70 | // 5. Calculate comprehensive strength
   71 | double strength = (reactionCount * 0.35) +
   72 | (NormalizeVolume(avgReactionVolume) * 0.25) +
   73 | (ageFactor * 0.25) +
   74 | (momentumFactor * 0.15);
   75 | 
   76 | return MathMin(1.0, strength);
   77 | }
   78 | 
   79 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   80 | //| 🔍 COUNT PRICE REACTIONS AT S/R LEVEL                          |
   81 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   82 | int CountPriceReactions(datetime srLevelTime, double srPrice, ENUM_DIRECTION direction, int lookbackBars)
   83 | {
   84 | int reactionCount = 0;
   85 | double tolerance = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_POINT) * 10; // 10 pips tolerance
   86 | 
   87 | for(int i = 1; i <= lookbackBars; i++)
   88 | {
   89 | double high = iHigh(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
   90 | double low = iLow(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
   91 | double close = iClose(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
   92 | 
   93 | // Check if price touched the S/R level
   94 | bool touchedLevel = false;
   95 | 
   96 | if(direction == DIRECTION_BUY || direction == DIRECTION_BOTH)
   97 | {
   98 | // Support level - price bounced from below
   99 | if(MathAbs(low - srPrice) <= tolerance && close > srPrice)
  100 | {
  101 | touchedLevel = true;
  102 | }
  103 | }
  104 | 
  105 | if(direction == DIRECTION_SELL || direction == DIRECTION_BOTH)
  106 | {
  107 | // Resistance level - price bounced from above
  108 | if(MathAbs(high - srPrice) <= tolerance && close < srPrice)
  109 | {
  110 | touchedLevel = true;
  111 | }
  112 | }
  113 | 
  114 | if(touchedLevel)
  115 | {
  116 | reactionCount++;
  117 | }
  118 | }
  119 | 
  120 | return reactionCount;
  121 | }
  122 | 
  123 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  124 | //| 📊 GET AVERAGE REACTION VOLUME                                  |
  125 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  126 | double GetAverageReactionVolume(datetime srLevelTime, double srPrice, ENUM_DIRECTION direction)
  127 | {
  128 | double totalVolume = 0.0;
  129 | int volumeCount = 0;
  130 | double tolerance = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_POINT) * 10;
  131 | 
  132 | for(int i = 1; i <= m_maxLookbackBars; i++)
  133 | {
  134 | double high = iHigh(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  135 | double low = iLow(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  136 | double close = iClose(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  137 | double volume = (double)iTickVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  138 | 
  139 | bool touchedLevel = false;
  140 | 
  141 | if(direction == DIRECTION_BUY || direction == DIRECTION_BOTH)
  142 | {
  143 | if(MathAbs(low - srPrice) <= tolerance && close > srPrice)
  144 | {
  145 | touchedLevel = true;
  146 | }
  147 | }
  148 | 
  149 | if(direction == DIRECTION_SELL || direction == DIRECTION_BOTH)
  150 | {
  151 | if(MathAbs(high - srPrice) <= tolerance && close < srPrice)
  152 | {
  153 | touchedLevel = true;
  154 | }
  155 | }
  156 | 
  157 | if(touchedLevel)
  158 | {
  159 | totalVolume += volume;
  160 | volumeCount++;
  161 | }
  162 | }
  163 | 
  164 | return (volumeCount > 0) ? totalVolume / volumeCount : 0.0;
  165 | }
  166 | 
  167 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  168 | //| ⏰ CALCULATE AGE FACTOR                                         |
  169 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  170 | double CalculateAgeFactor(datetime srLevelTime)
  171 | {
  172 | if(srLevelTime == 0) return 0.5; // Default for unknown age
  173 | 
  174 | datetime currentTime = TimeCurrent();
  175 | double ageInHours = (double)(currentTime - srLevelTime) / 3600.0;
  176 | 
  177 | // Age factor: newer levels are stronger (0-24 hours = 1.0, older = 0.3)
  178 | if(ageInHours <= 24.0)
  179 | {
  180 | return 1.0 - (ageInHours / 24.0) * 0.7; // 1.0 to 0.3 over 24 hours
  181 | }
  182 | else
  183 | {
  184 | return 0.3; // Minimum strength for old levels
  185 | }
  186 | }
  187 | 
  188 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  189 | //| 🚀 CALCULATE MOMENTUM FACTOR                                    |
  190 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  191 | double CalculateMomentumFactor(double srPrice, ENUM_DIRECTION direction)
  192 | {
  193 | double currentPrice = iClose(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0);
  194 | double momentum = 0.0;
  195 | 
  196 | if(direction == DIRECTION_BUY || direction == DIRECTION_BOTH)
  197 | {
  198 | // For support levels, check if price is approaching from above
  199 | if(currentPrice > srPrice)
  200 | {
  201 | double distance = (currentPrice - srPrice) / srPrice;
  202 | momentum = MathMax(0.0, 1.0 - distance * 100); // Closer = higher momentum
  203 | }
  204 | }
  205 | 
  206 | if(direction == DIRECTION_SELL || direction == DIRECTION_BOTH)
  207 | {
  208 | // For resistance levels, check if price is approaching from below
  209 | if(currentPrice < srPrice)
  210 | {
  211 | double distance = (srPrice - currentPrice) / srPrice;
  212 | momentum = MathMax(0.0, 1.0 - distance * 100); // Closer = higher momentum
  213 | }
  214 | }
  215 | 
  216 | return MathMin(1.0, momentum);
  217 | }
  218 | 
  219 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  220 | //| 📈 NORMALIZE VOLUME                                             |
  221 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  222 | double NormalizeVolume(double volume)
  223 | {
  224 | if(volume == 0) return 0.0;
  225 | 
  226 | // Get average volume for comparison
  227 | double avgVolume = 0.0;
  228 | for(int i = 1; i <= 20; i++)
  229 | {
  230 | avgVolume += (double)iTickVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  231 | }
  232 | avgVolume /= 20;
  233 | 
  234 | if(avgVolume == 0) return 0.5;
  235 | 
  236 | double volumeRatio = volume / avgVolume;
  237 | 
  238 | // Normalize to 0.0-1.0 range
  239 | if(volumeRatio >= m_volumeMultiplier) return 1.0;
  240 | if(volumeRatio >= 1.5) return 0.8;
  241 | if(volumeRatio >= 1.2) return 0.6;
  242 | if(volumeRatio >= 1.0) return 0.4;
  243 | return 0.2;
  244 | }
  245 | 
  246 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  247 | //| 🎯 VALIDATE S/R LEVEL FOR TRADING                               |
  248 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  249 | bool IsSRLevelValidForTrading(double srPrice, ENUM_DIRECTION direction)
  250 | {
  251 | double strength = CalculateSRStrength(0, srPrice, direction);
  252 | return strength >= m_minStrengthThreshold;
  253 | }
  254 | 
  255 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  256 | //| 📊 GET SMC LEVELS WITH STRENGTH                                 |
  257 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  258 | SSMCLevel GetSMCLevels(int& count)
  259 | {
  260 | count = m_levelCount;
  261 | if(m_levelCount > 0) {
  262 | return m_smcLevels[0]; // Return first level for now
  263 | }
  264 | SSMCLevel emptyLevel;
  265 | ZeroMemory(emptyLevel);
  266 | return emptyLevel;
  267 | }
  268 | 
  269 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  270 | //| 🔧 UPDATE SMC LEVELS                                            |
  271 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  272 | void UpdateSMCLevels()
  273 | {
  274 | // This method would be called to update SMC levels based on current market structure
  275 | // Implementation would include BOS/CHOCH detection and level validation
  276 | Print("🔄 [SMC] Updating SMC levels with quantified strength analysis");
  277 | }
  278 | 
  279 | bool CalculatePVSRA(int shift)  // Added shift parameter
  280 | {
  281 | // 1. Tính toán vị trí an toàn
  282 | int safeShift = MathMin(shift, Bars(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT) - 5);
  283 | 
  284 | // 2. Kiểm tra giới hạn mảng
  285 | if(safeShift < 0) {
  286 | Print("⚠️ [PVSRA] Not enough bars for analysis - using fallback");
  287 | // Chuyển sang chế độ cơ bản thay vì dừng hoàn toàn
  288 | // m_pvsraScore = 0.0;  // Assuming m_pvsraScore is a class member
  289 | // m_pvsraConfidence = 0.0;  // Assuming m_pvsraConfidence is a class member
  290 | return false;
  291 | }
  292 | 
  293 | // 3. Tính toán PVSRA với vị trí an toàn
  294 | int obBarIndex = safeShift + 4;
  295 | double obHigh = iHigh(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, obBarIndex);
  296 | double obLow = iLow(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, obBarIndex);
  297 | 
  298 | // 4. Tiếp tục tính toán PVSRA...
  299 | // Add your PVSRA calculation logic here
  300 | // For example:
  301 | // m_pvsraScore = (obHigh + obLow) / 2.0; // Placeholder
  302 | 
  303 | return true;
  304 | }
  305 | };

  313 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+

  324 | g_SMCStrengthCalculator = new CSMCStrengthCalculator();
  325 | Print("🧮 SMC Strength Calculator initialized with quantified analysis");
  326 | return true;

  328 | return true;

  344 | {

  346 |  return g_SMCStrengthCalculator.IsSRLevelValidForTrading(srPrice, direction);

  348 | 
  349 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  350 | //| 🎯 PHASE 2: VPSRA SCORE CALCULATION (per review.txt)           |
  351 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  352 | // Moved: Use global GetVPSRAScore() in 03_MarketAnalysis_06_PVSRA_Manager.mqh
  353 | 
  354 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  355 | //| 🎯 PHASE 2: SMC SCORE CALCULATION (per review.txt)              |
  356 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  357 | double CalculateSMCScore()
  358 | {
  359 |     // 1. Xác nhận liquidity sweep
  360 |     double liquidityScore = PVSRA_HasLiquiditySweep() ? 1.0 : 0.0;
  361 | 
  362 |     // 2. Xác nhận order block
  363 |     double orderBlockScore = IsAtOrderBlock() ? 1.0 : 0.0;
  364 | 
  365 |     // 3. Xác nhận BOS/CHOCH
  366 |     double structureScore = HasBOSorCHOCH() ? 1.0 : 0.0;
  367 | 
  368 |     // 4. Tổng hợp theo review.txt
  369 |     double smcScore = (liquidityScore * 0.4) +
  370 |                      (orderBlockScore * 0.3) +
  371 |                      (structureScore * 0.3);
  372 | 
  373 |     // Fallback khi không có dữ liệu theo yêu cầu review.txt
  374 |     if(smcScore == 0.0) {
  375 |         Print("⚠️ [PHASE 2] SMC fallback: No liquidity/order block/structure data available");
  376 |         return 0.1; // Minimal score as fallback
  377 |     }
  378 | 
  379 |     return smcScore;
  380 | }
  381 | 
  382 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  383 | //| 🎯 PHASE 2: HELPER FUNCTIONS FOR VPSRA ANALYSIS               |
  384 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  385 | double CalculateVolumeScore()
  386 | {
  387 |     double currentVolume = (double)iVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0);
  388 |     double avgVolume = 0.0;
  389 | 
  390 |     // Calculate average volume for comparison
  391 |     for(int i = 1; i <= 20; i++) {
  392 |         avgVolume += (double)iVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  393 |     }
  394 |     avgVolume /= 20.0;
  395 | 
  396 |     // Score based on volume relative to average
  397 |     if(avgVolume <= 0) return 0.0;
  398 | 
  399 |     double volumeRatio = currentVolume / avgVolume;
  400 |     return MathMin(1.0, volumeRatio / 2.0); // Cap at 1.0, high volume = higher score
  401 | }
  402 | 
  403 | double CalculatePriceReactionScore()
  404 | {
  405 |     // Measure price reaction strength at current level
  406 |     double currentPrice = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
  407 |     double previousPrice = iClose(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 1);
  408 | 
  409 |     if(previousPrice <= 0) return 0.0;
  410 | 
  411 |     double priceChange = MathAbs(currentPrice - previousPrice) / previousPrice;
  412 |     return MathMin(1.0, priceChange * 100.0); // Convert to percentage and cap
  413 | }
  414 | 
  415 | double CalculateSRQualityScore()
  416 | {
  417 |     // Use SMC strength calculator if available
  418 |     if(g_SMCStrengthCalculator != NULL) {
  419 |         double currentPrice = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
  420 |         return g_SMCStrengthCalculator.CalculateSRStrength(0, currentPrice, DIRECTION_BOTH);
  421 |     }
  422 | 
  423 |     // Fallback calculation
  424 |     return 0.5; // Medium quality as fallback
  425 | }
  426 | 
  427 | bool PVSRA_HasLiquiditySweep()
  428 | {
  429 |     // Simplified liquidity sweep detection (scoped to PVSRA_Enhanced)
  430 |     double high = iHigh(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 1);
  431 |     double low = iLow(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 1);
  432 |     double currentPrice = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
  433 | 
  434 |     // Check if price swept above/below recent high/low
  435 |     return (currentPrice > high * 1.0002 || currentPrice < low * 0.9998);
  436 | }
  437 | 
  438 | bool IsAtOrderBlock()
  439 | {
  440 |     // Simplified order block detection
  441 |     // Check for significant volume at price level
  442 |     double currentVolume = (double)iVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0);
  443 |     double avgVolume = 0.0;
  444 | 
  445 |     for(int i = 1; i <= 10; i++) {
  446 |         avgVolume += (double)iVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  447 |     }
  448 |     avgVolume /= 10.0;
  449 | 
  450 |     return (currentVolume > avgVolume * 1.5); // High volume indicates potential order block
  451 | }
  452 | 
  453 | bool HasBOSorCHOCH()
  454 | {
  455 |     // Simplified Break of Structure (BOS) or Change of Character (CHOCH) detection
  456 |     double currentPrice = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
  457 |     double support = currentPrice * 0.995;  // Simplified support level
  458 |     double resistance = currentPrice * 1.005; // Simplified resistance level
  459 | 
  460 |     // Check if price breaks above resistance or below support significantly
  461 |     return (currentPrice > resistance || currentPrice < support);
  462 | }
  463 | 
  464 | #endif // ANALYSIS_PVSRA_ENHANCED_MQH

   55 | /**
   56 | * @brief Initializes the Advanced Wyckoff Institutional Pattern Detector
   57 | * @param symbol Trading symbol (defaults to current chart symbol)
   58 | * @return true if initialization successful
   59 | * @details Sets up volume profiling and pattern detection for institutional patterns
   60 | * @note Implements Boss's requirement for advanced PVSRA Wyckoff detection

   63 | if(symbol == NULL) symbol = _Symbol;
   64 | CalculateVolumeBaseline();
   65 | m_initialized = true;
   66 | return true;
   67 | }

   69 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   70 | //| 🎯 MISSING: SELLING CLIMAX DETECTION                            |
   71 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   72 | bool DetectSellingClimax() {
   73 | if(!m_initialized) return false;
   74 | 
   75 | MqlRates rates[];
   76 | ArraySetAsSeries(rates, true);
   77 | if(CopyRates(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0, 10, rates) < 10) return false;
   78 | 
   79 | long volumes[];
   80 | ArraySetAsSeries(volumes, true);
   81 | if(CopyTickVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0, 10, volumes) < 10) return false;
   82 | 
   83 | // Selling Climax Criteria:
   84 | // 1. High volume (>2x average)
   85 | // 2. Large down bar (>1.5x ATR)
   86 | // 3. Close near low of bar
   87 | // 4. After sustained decline
   88 | 
   89 | double currentVolume = (double)volumes[0];
   90 | double barRange = rates[0].high - rates[0].low;
   91 | double atr = GetATR(14);
   92 | double closePosition = (rates[0].close - rates[0].low) / barRange;
   93 | 
   94 | bool highVolume = (currentVolume > m_avgVolume * 2.0);
   95 | bool largeDownBar = (barRange > atr * 1.5) && (rates[0].close < rates[0].open);
   96 | bool closeLow = (closePosition < 0.3);
   97 | bool afterDecline = IsInDowntrend();
   98 | 
   99 | if(highVolume && largeDownBar && closeLow && afterDecline) {
  100 | m_currentPattern.type = PVSRA_SELLING_CLIMAX;
  101 | m_currentPattern.priceLevel = rates[0].low;
  102 | m_currentPattern.volumeLevel = currentVolume;
  103 | m_currentPattern.detectionTime = TimeCurrent();
  104 | m_currentPattern.confidence = CalculatePatternConfidence();
  105 | m_currentPattern.isActive = true;
  106 | 
  107 | Print(StringFormat("🔴 SELLING CLIMAX DETECTED | Price: %.5f | Volume: %.0f | Confidence: %.1f%%",
  108 | m_currentPattern.priceLevel, m_currentPattern.volumeLevel, m_currentPattern.confidence * 100));
  109 | return true;
  110 | }
  111 | 
  112 | return false;
  113 | }

  115 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  116 | //| 🎯 MISSING: AUTOMATIC RALLY DETECTION                           |

  118 | bool DetectAutomaticRally() {
  119 | if(!m_initialized) return false;
  120 | 
  121 | MqlRates rates[];
  122 | ArraySetAsSeries(rates, true);
  123 | if(CopyRates(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0, 5, rates) < 5) return false;
  124 | 
  125 | long volumes[];
  126 | ArraySetAsSeries(volumes, true);
  127 | if(CopyTickVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0, 5, volumes) < 5) return false;
  128 | 
  129 | // Automatic Rally Criteria:
  130 | // 1. Natural bounce after selling climax
  131 | // 2. Reduced volume on rally
  132 | // 3. Limited upward movement
  133 | // 4. Quick reversal from oversold
  134 | 
  135 | bool afterSellingClimax = (m_currentPattern.type == PVSRA_SELLING_CLIMAX);
  136 | bool reducedVolume = ((double)volumes[0] < m_avgVolume * 0.8);
  137 | bool limitedRally = ((rates[0].high - rates[1].low) < GetATR(14) * 1.2);
  138 | bool upwardMovement = (rates[0].close > rates[1].close);
  139 | 
  140 | if(afterSellingClimax && reducedVolume && limitedRally && upwardMovement) {
  141 | m_currentPattern.type = PVSRA_AUTOMATIC_RALLY;
  142 | m_currentPattern.confidence = 0.8;

  151 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  152 | //| 🎯 MISSING: SPRING ACTION DETECTION                             |
  153 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  154 | bool DetectSpringAction() {
  155 | if(!m_initialized) return false;
  156 | 
  157 | MqlRates rates[];
  158 | ArraySetAsSeries(rates, true);
  159 | if(CopyRates(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0, 10, rates) < 10) return false;
  160 | 
  161 | // Spring Criteria:
  162 | // 1. Break below recent support
  163 | // 2. Quick recovery above support
  164 | // 3. Low volume on break
  165 | // 4. Higher volume on recovery
  166 | 
  167 | double supportLevel = FindRecentSupport();
  168 | bool brokeSupport = (rates[1].low < supportLevel);
  169 | bool quickRecovery = (rates[0].close > supportLevel);
  170 | 
  171 | long volumes[];
  172 | ArraySetAsSeries(volumes, true);
  173 | CopyTickVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0, 3, volumes);
  174 | 
  175 | bool lowVolumeBreak = ((double)volumes[1] < m_avgVolume * 0.7);
  176 | bool higherVolumeRecovery = ((double)volumes[0] > (double)volumes[1] * 1.3);
  177 | 
  178 | if(brokeSupport && quickRecovery && lowVolumeBreak && higherVolumeRecovery) {
  179 | m_currentPattern.type = PVSRA_SPRING;
  180 | m_currentPattern.priceLevel = supportLevel;
  181 | m_currentPattern.confidence = 0.9;
  182 | m_currentPattern.isActive = true;
  183 | 
  184 | Print(StringFormat("🌸 SPRING ACTION DETECTED | Support: %.5f | Recovery: %.5f", 
  185 | supportLevel, rates[0].close));
  186 | return true;
  187 | }
  188 | 
  189 | return false;

  192 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  193 | //| 🎯 MISSING: SIGN OF STRENGTH DETECTION                          |
  194 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  195 | bool DetectSignOfStrength() {
  196 | if(!m_initialized) return false;
  197 | 
  198 | MqlRates rates[];
  199 | ArraySetAsSeries(rates, true);
  200 | if(CopyRates(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0, 5, rates) < 5) return false;
  201 | 
  202 | long volumes[];
  203 | ArraySetAsSeries(volumes, true);
  204 | if(CopyTickVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0, 5, volumes) < 5) return false;
  205 | 
  206 | // Sign of Strength Criteria:
  207 | // 1. Strong upward movement
  208 | // 2. Volume expansion (>1.5x average)
  209 | // 3. Close near high of bar
  210 | // 4. Breaking resistance levels
  211 | 
  212 | double currentVolume = (double)volumes[0];
  213 | double barRange = rates[0].high - rates[0].low;
  214 | double closePosition = (rates[0].close - rates[0].low) / barRange;
  215 | 
  216 | bool strongUpMove = (rates[0].close > rates[0].open) && 
  217 | (barRange > GetATR(14) * 1.2);
  218 | bool volumeExpansion = (currentVolume > m_avgVolume * 1.5);
  219 | bool closeHigh = (closePosition > 0.7);
  220 | bool breakingResistance = IsBreakingResistance();
  221 | 
  222 | if(strongUpMove && volumeExpansion && closeHigh && breakingResistance) {
  223 | m_currentPattern.type = PVSRA_SIGN_OF_STRENGTH;
  224 | m_currentPattern.confidence = 0.85;
  225 | m_currentPattern.isActive = true;
  226 | 
  227 | Print("💪 SIGN OF STRENGTH DETECTED - Volume expansion on rally");
  228 | return true;
  229 | }
  230 | 
  231 | return false;
  232 | }
  233 | 
  234 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  235 | //| 🎯 HELPER FUNCTIONS                                              |
  236 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  237 | void CalculateVolumeBaseline() {
  238 | long volumes[];
  239 | ArrayResize(volumes, 50);
  240 | ArraySetAsSeries(volumes, true);
  241 | if(CopyTickVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0, 50, volumes) >= 50) {
  242 | double sum = 0;
  243 | for(int i = 0; i < 50; i++) {
  244 | sum += (double)volumes[i];
  245 | }
  246 | m_avgVolume = sum / 50.0;
  247 | } else {
  248 | m_avgVolume = 1000; // Fallback
  249 | }
  250 | }
  251 | 
  252 | double GetATR(int period) {
  253 | int atrHandle = iATR(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, period);
  254 | double atrBuffer[];
  255 | ArrayResize(atrBuffer, 1);
  256 | if(CopyBuffer(atrHandle, 0, 0, 1, atrBuffer) > 0) {
  257 | IndicatorRelease(atrHandle);
  258 | return atrBuffer[0];
  259 | }
  260 | IndicatorRelease(atrHandle);
  261 | return 0.0010; // Fallback
  262 | }
  263 | 
  264 | bool IsInDowntrend() {
  265 | // EMA20 removed - use EMA200 for trend detection
  266 | int ema200Handle = iMA(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 200, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
  267 | double ema200Buffer[];
  268 | ArrayResize(ema200Buffer, 2);
  269 | ArraySetAsSeries(ema200Buffer, true);
  270 | bool result = false;
  271 | if(CopyBuffer(ema200Handle, 0, 0, 2, ema200Buffer) >= 2) {
  272 | result = (ema200Buffer[0] < ema200Buffer[1]); // EMA200 declining
  273 | }
  274 | IndicatorRelease(ema200Handle);
  275 | return result;
  276 | }
  277 | 
  278 | double FindRecentSupport() {
  279 | MqlRates rates[];
  280 | ArraySetAsSeries(rates, true);
  281 | if(CopyRates(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0, 20, rates) < 20) return 0;
  282 | 
  283 | double minLow = rates[0].low;
  284 | for(int i = 1; i < 20; i++) {
  285 | if(rates[i].low < minLow) minLow = rates[i].low;
  286 | }
  287 | return minLow;
  288 | }
  289 | 
  290 | bool IsBreakingResistance() {
  291 | MqlRates rates[];
  292 | ArraySetAsSeries(rates, true);
  293 | if(CopyRates(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0, 20, rates) < 20) return false;
  294 | 
  295 | double maxHigh = rates[1].high;
  296 | for(int i = 2; i < 20; i++) {
  297 | if(rates[i].high > maxHigh) maxHigh = rates[i].high;
  298 | }
  299 | return (rates[0].high > maxHigh);
  300 | }
  301 | 
  302 | double CalculatePatternConfidence() {
  303 | // Base confidence calculation
  304 | double confidence = 0.7;
  305 | 
  306 | // Adjust based on volume strength
  307 | if(m_currentPattern.volumeLevel > m_avgVolume * 2.5) confidence += 0.1;
  308 | if(m_currentPattern.volumeLevel > m_avgVolume * 3.0) confidence += 0.1;
  309 | 
  310 | return MathMin(confidence, 1.0);
  311 | }
  312 | 
  313 | // Public getters
  314 | SInstitutionalPattern GetCurrentPattern() { return m_currentPattern; }
  315 | bool HasActivePattern() { return m_currentPattern.isActive; }
  316 | double GetPatternConfidence() { return m_currentPattern.confidence; }
  317 | 
  318 | // Main detection function
  319 | bool DetectInstitutionalPatterns() {
  320 | // Reset current pattern
  321 | m_currentPattern.Reset();
  322 | 
  323 | // Try to detect each pattern type
  324 | if(DetectSellingClimax()) return true;
  325 | if(DetectAutomaticRally()) return true;
  326 | if(DetectSpringAction()) return true;
  327 | if(DetectSignOfStrength()) return true;
  328 | 
  329 | return false;
  330 | }
  331 | };

  333 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  334 | //| 🎯 GLOBAL HELPER FUNCTIONS                                       |
  335 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  336 | double GetAverageVolume(int period, int shift = 0) {
  337 | long volumes[];
  338 | ArraySetAsSeries(volumes, true);
  339 | if(CopyTickVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, shift, period, volumes) < period) {
  340 | return 1000.0; // Default fallback
  341 | }
  342 | 
  343 | double sum = 0.0;
  344 | for(int i = 0; i < period; i++) {
  345 | sum += (double)volumes[i];
  346 | }
  347 | return sum / period;
  348 | }
  349 | 
  350 | bool DetectClimaxVolume(int shift) {
  351 | // Multi-bar climax detection
  352 | long volumes[];
  353 | ArraySetAsSeries(volumes, true);
  354 | if(CopyTickVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, shift, 3, volumes) < 3) return false;
  355 | 
  356 | double vol1 = (double)volumes[0];
  357 | double vol2 = (double)volumes[1];
  358 | double avgVol = GetAverageVolume(20, shift+2);
  359 | return (vol1 > 2 * avgVol && vol2 > 1.5 * avgVol);
  360 | }
  361 |
