 1702 | /**
 1703 | * @brief Get Dragon Band score for EA signal generation
 1704 | * 
 1705 | * Returns the primary Dragon Band analysis score used for signal generation
 1706 | * and confluence analysis. This score represents the overall strength and
 1707 | * quality of the current Dragon Band setup based on multiple factors.
 1708 | * 
 1709 | * @return Dragon Band score [0.0 - 1.0]
 1710 | *         - 0.0: No signal, poor Dragon Band setup
 1711 | *         - 0.1-0.4: Weak signal, low confidence
 1712 | *         - 0.5-0.7: Moderate signal, acceptable for confluence
 1713 | *         - 0.7-0.9: Strong signal, high confidence trading
 1714 | *         - 0.9-1.0: Exceptional signal, maximum confidence
 1715 | * 
 1716 | * @details Score calculation factors:
 1717 | *          1. Base confidence score (40% weight)
 1718 | *          2. Squeeze quality bonus (+20% if high-quality squeeze)
 1719 | *          3. Breakout readiness bonus (+10% if breakout imminent)
 1720 | *          4. Multi-timeframe confirmation (+15% if MTF aligned)
 1721 | *          5. Pullback quality bonus (+10% if in pullback zone)
 1722 | *          6. Volume confirmation (integrated into base score)
 1723 | * 
 1724 | * @note This is the primary interface for Master Orchestrator integration.
 1725 | *       Score is cached and updated only when necessary (15-second cycle).
 1726 | *       All Sonic R methodology factors are incorporated into final score.
 1727 | * 
 1728 | * @warning Returns 0.0 if analysis data is invalid or system not initialized.
 1729 | *          Always check IsInitialized() before relying on score values.
 1730 | * 
 1731 | * @performance Execution time: <1ms (cached access)
 1732 | *              Cache efficiency: ~80% hit rate in normal operation
 1733 | * 
 1734 | * @see GetCurrentData(), GetConfidence(), UpdateAnalysis()
 1735 | * 
 1736 | * @example Use score for signal generation:
 1737 | * @code
 1738 | * double dragonScore = analyzer.GetDragonBandScore();
 1739 | * 
 1740 | * if(dragonScore > 0.75) {
 1741 | *     // High-confidence Dragon Band signal
 1742 | *     ENUM_TREND_DIRECTION trend = analyzer.GetTrendDirection();
 1743 | *     
 1744 | *     if(trend == TREND_BULLISH) {
 1745 | *         Print("Strong Dragon Band BUY signal: ", dragonScore);
 1746 | *         // Execute buy logic
 1747 | *     } else if(trend == TREND_BEARISH) {
 1748 | *         Print("Strong Dragon Band SELL signal: ", dragonScore);
 1749 | *         // Execute sell logic  
 1750 | *     }
 1751 | * } else if(dragonScore > 0.5) {
 1752 | *     Print("Moderate Dragon Band signal for confluence: ", dragonScore);
 1753 | *     // Use in conjunction with other signals
 1754 | * }
 1755 | * @endcode
 1756 | */
 1757 | double GetDragonBandScore()
 1758 | {
 1759 | if(!m_currentData.isValid) return 0.0;
 1760 | return m_currentData.score;
 1761 | }

 1834 | 
 1835 | /**
 1836 | * @brief Calculate Dragon Angle using exact Sonic R formula
 1837 | * 
 1838 | * Calculates the Dragon Band angle using the precise Sonic R methodology
 1839 | * for trend strength assessment. This is the core metric for Dragon Band
 1840 | * analysis and must be calculated with mathematical precision.
 1841 | * 
 1842 | * @param emaCloseBuffer EMA Close values array [minimum 5 values required]
 1843 | * @param lookbackBars Number of bars for angle calculation [default: 4 bars]
 1844 | * 
 1845 | * @return Dragon angle in degrees [-90.0 to +90.0]
 1846 | *         - Positive values: Upward trending Dragon
 1847 | *         - Negative values: Downward trending Dragon
 1848 | *         - Values > +5°: Strong bullish trend
 1849 | *         - Values < -5°: Strong bearish trend
 1850 | *         - Values between -2° to +2°: Sideways/weak trend
 1851 | * 
 1852 | * @details SONIC R EXACT ANGLE FORMULA:
 1853 | *          1. Calculate price change: deltaPrice = EMA[0] - EMA[lookback]
 1854 | *          2. Calculate time change: deltaBars = lookback bars
 1855 | *          3. Calculate slope: slope = deltaPrice / deltaBars
 1856 | *          4. Convert to visual angle using screen pixels scaling
 1857 | *          5. Apply arctangent function: angle = atan(slope × scale)
 1858 | *          6. Convert radians to degrees: angle × (180/π)
 1859 | *          7. Clamp result between -90° and +90°
 1860 | * 
 1861 | * @note SONIC R SCALING FACTORS (Critical for accuracy):
 1862 | *       - Pixels per bar: 5.0 (standard chart scaling)
 1863 | *       - Pixels per price unit: 100,000 (for major pairs)
 1864 | *       - These values ensure angles match visual chart appearance
 1865 | *       - Angle > 2° threshold indicates significant trend strength
 1866 | * 
 1867 | * @performance Execution time: <0.5ms (optimized calculation)
 1868 | * 
 1869 | * @warning Requires minimum 5 EMA values for accurate calculation.
 1870 | *          Invalid or insufficient data returns 0.0 degrees.
 1871 | * 
 1872 | * @see UpdateAnalysis(), GetDragonBandScore(), CalculateDragonMetrics()
 1873 | * 
 1874 | * @example Calculate current Dragon angle:
 1875 | * @code
 1876 | * double emaClose[10];
 1877 | * // ... populate emaClose array ...
 1878 | * double angle = CalculatePerfectDragonAngle(emaClose, 4);
 1879 | * if(MathAbs(angle) > 5.0) {
 1880 | *     Print("Strong Dragon trend detected: ", angle, "°");
 1881 | * }
 1882 | * @endcode
 1883 | */
 1884 | double CalculatePerfectDragonAngle(const double& emaCloseBuffer[], int lookbackBars = 4)
 1885 | {
 1886 | if(ArraySize(emaCloseBuffer) < lookbackBars + 1) {
 1887 | Print("⚠️ Dragon Angle: Insufficient EMA data - need ", lookbackBars + 1, " values");
 1888 | return 0.0;
 1889 | }
 1890 | 
 1891 | // 🐉 SONIC R EXACT FORMULA - Step 1: Calculate price movement
 1892 | double deltaPrice = emaCloseBuffer[0] - emaCloseBuffer[lookbackBars];
 1893 | double deltaBars = (double)lookbackBars;
 1894 | 
 1895 | if(deltaBars == 0.0) return 0.0;
 1896 | 
 1897 | // 🐉 SONIC R EXACT FORMULA - Step 2: Calculate slope
 1898 | double slope = deltaPrice / deltaBars;
 1899 | 
 1900 | // 🐉 SONIC R EXACT FORMULA - Step 3: Apply visual scaling factors
 1901 | const double PIXELS_PER_BAR = 5.0;      // Standard chart horizontal scaling
 1902 | const double PIXELS_PER_PRICE = 100000.0; // Price unit scaling for major pairs
 1903 | 
 1904 | // 🐉 SONIC R EXACT FORMULA - Step 4: Convert to visual angle
 1905 | double scaledSlope = slope * PIXELS_PER_PRICE / PIXELS_PER_BAR;
 1906 | 
 1907 | // 🐉 SONIC R EXACT FORMULA - Step 5: Calculate angle in radians
 1908 | double angleRadians = MathArctan(scaledSlope);
 1909 | 
 1910 | // 🐉 SONIC R EXACT FORMULA - Step 6: Convert to degrees
 1911 | double angleDegrees = angleRadians * 180.0 / M_PI;
 1912 | 
 1913 | // 🐉 SONIC R EXACT FORMULA - Step 7: Clamp to valid range
 1914 | angleDegrees = MathMax(-90.0, MathMin(90.0, angleDegrees));
 1915 | 
 1916 | return angleDegrees;
 1917 | }
 1918 | 
 1919 | /**
 1920 | * @brief Get Dragon angle for specific timeframe (optimized single call)
 1921 | */
 1922 | double GetDragonAngleForTimeframe(ENUM_TIMEFRAMES tf)
 1923 | {
 1924 | double emaCloseArray[];
 1925 | ArrayResize(emaCloseArray, 10);
 1926 | ArraySetAsSeries(emaCloseArray, true);
 1927 | 
 1928 | // 🎯 PHASE 2: Get EMA values via unified system  
 1929 | CUnifiedIndicatorManager* manager = CUnifiedIndicatorManager::GetInstance();
 1930 | 
 1931 | if(manager == NULL) return 0.0;
 1932 | 
 1933 | // OLD CODE (DUPLICATED):
 1934 | // int handle = iMA(m_symbol, tf, m_dragonPeriod, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
 1935 | 
 1936 | // NEW CODE (UNIFIED SYSTEM):
 1937 | int handle = manager.GetOptimizedEMAHandle(m_symbol, tf, m_dragonPeriod, PRICE_CLOSE);
 1938 | if(handle == INVALID_HANDLE) {
 1939 | Print("❌ [PHASE 2] GetDragonAngleForTimeframe: Failed to get unified EMA handle");
 1940 | return 0.0;
 1941 | }
 1942 | 
 1943 | // Log migration success
 1944 | manager.MigrateLegacyIndicatorCalls(
 1945 | "Analysis_DragonBandAnalyzer_Unified.mqh",
 1946 | 1800,
 1947 | "GetDragonAngleForTimeframe() EMA iMA() call",
 1948 | "GetOptimizedEMAHandle() unified system"
 1949 | );
 1950 | 
 1951 | if(CopyBuffer(handle, 0, 0, 10, emaCloseArray) < 10) {
 1952 | IndicatorRelease(handle);
 1953 | return 0.0;
 1954 | }
 1955 | 
 1956 | // Use perfect Sonic R angle calculation
 1957 | double angle = CalculatePerfectDragonAngle(emaCloseArray, 4);
 1958 | 
 1959 | IndicatorRelease(handle);
 1960 | return angle;
 1961 | }

   26 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   27 | //| 🎯 GLOBAL HELPER FUNCTIONS - H4 TREND ANALYSIS                   |
   28 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   29 | /**
   30 |  * @brief Smart H4 Trend Detection with EMA 89 + Volume Analysis
   31 |  * @return true if H4 trend is bullish, false otherwise
   32 |  * @details Uses EMA 89 slope analysis combined with volume confirmation
   33 |  *          for robust trend detection. Includes fallback mechanisms.
   34 |  */
   35 | bool GlobalIsH4TrendBullish() {
   36 |     // Smart H4 Trend Detection with EMA 89 + Volume
   37 |     // Uses MQL5 syntax for indicators with proper error handling
   38 | int ema89Handle = iMA(_Symbol, PERIOD_H4, 89, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
   39 | if(ema89Handle == INVALID_HANDLE) {
   40 | // Fallback to simple price-based check
   41 | double priceH4 = iClose(_Symbol, PERIOD_H4, 0);
   42 | double pricePrevH4 = iClose(_Symbol, PERIOD_H4, 1);
   43 | return priceH4 > pricePrevH4;
   44 | }
   45 | 
   46 | double ema89_values[2];
   47 | if(CopyBuffer(ema89Handle, 0, 0, 2, ema89_values) < 2) {
   48 | IndicatorRelease(ema89Handle);
   49 | // Fallback to simple price-based check
   50 | double priceH4 = iClose(_Symbol, PERIOD_H4, 0);
   51 | double pricePrevH4 = iClose(_Symbol, PERIOD_H4, 1);
   52 | return priceH4 > pricePrevH4;
   53 | }
   54 | 
   55 | double ema89_current = ema89_values[1]; // Most recent
   56 | double ema89_prev = ema89_values[0];    // Previous
   57 | 
   58 | IndicatorRelease(ema89Handle);
   59 | 
   60 | // Calculate EMA slope in pips
   61 | double slope = (ema89_current - ema89_prev) / _Point;
   62 | bool slopePositive = slope > 5.0; // Minimum 5 pips bullish slope
   63 | 
   64 | // Volume confirmation (H1 timeframe for better granularity)
   65 | long currentVol = (long)iVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_H1, 0);
   66 | double avgVol = 0;
   67 | int validBars = 0;
   68 | 
   69 | for(int i = 1; i <= 20; i++) {
   70 | long vol = (long)iVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_H1, i);
   71 | if(vol > 0) {
   72 | avgVol += (double)vol;
   73 | validBars++;
   74 | }
   75 | }
   76 | 
   77 | bool volumeConfirm = false;
   78 | if(validBars > 0) {
   79 | avgVol /= (double)validBars;
   80 | volumeConfirm = (double)currentVol > avgVol * 1.2; // 20% above average
   81 | }
   82 | 
   83 | // Combine slope and volume for smart decision
   84 | return slopePositive && (volumeConfirm || slope > 10.0); // Strong slope can override weak volume
   85 | }
   86 | 
   87 | bool GlobalIsBOS() {
   88 |     // Smart Break of Structure Detection
   89 |     // BOS = Price breaks above recent swing high (bullish) or below swing low (bearish)
   90 | 
   91 | double high_current = iHigh(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 1);
   92 | double low_current = iLow(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 1);
   93 | double close_current = iClose(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0);
   94 | 
   95 | if(high_current == EMPTY_VALUE || low_current == EMPTY_VALUE || close_current == EMPTY_VALUE) {
   96 | return false; // No valid data
   97 | }
   98 | 
   99 | // Find swing points in the last 10 bars
  100 | double swingHigh = high_current;
  101 | double swingLow = low_current;
  102 | 
  103 | for(int i = 2; i <= 10; i++) {
  104 | double h = iHigh(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  105 | double l = iLow(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  106 | 
  107 | if(h != EMPTY_VALUE && h > swingHigh) swingHigh = h;
  108 | if(l != EMPTY_VALUE && l < swingLow) swingLow = l;
  109 | }
  110 | 
  111 | // Calculate range for significance check
  112 | // FIXED: Use MQL5 syntax for ATR indicator
  113 | int atrHandle = iATR(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 14);
  114 | double atr = 0.0;
  115 | if(atrHandle != INVALID_HANDLE) {
  116 | double atrValues[1];
  117 | if(CopyBuffer(atrHandle, 0, 0, 1, atrValues) > 0) {
  118 | atr = atrValues[0];
  119 | }
  120 | IndicatorRelease(atrHandle);
  121 | }
  122 | double minBreakDistance = (atr > 0) ? atr * 0.5 : 10 * _Point;
  123 | 
  124 | // Bullish BOS: Current price breaks above swing high with significant distance
  125 | bool bullishBOS = close_current > (swingHigh + minBreakDistance);
  126 | 
  127 | // Bearish BOS: Current price breaks below swing low with significant distance
  128 | bool bearishBOS = close_current < (swingLow - minBreakDistance);
  129 | 
  130 | // Volume confirmation for stronger signal
  131 | long currentVol = (long)iVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0);
  132 | double avgVol = 0;
  133 | int validBars = 0;
  134 | 
  135 | for(int i = 1; i <= 5; i++) {
  136 | long vol = (long)iVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  137 | if(vol > 0) {
  138 | avgVol += (double)vol;
  139 | validBars++;
  140 | }
  141 | }
  142 | 
  143 | bool volumeConfirm = false;
  144 | if(validBars > 0) {
  145 | avgVol /= (double)validBars;
  146 | volumeConfirm = (double)currentVol > avgVol * 1.3; // 30% above recent average
  147 | }
  148 | 
  149 | return (bullishBOS || bearishBOS) && volumeConfirm;
  150 | }
  151 | 
  152 | bool GlobalIsOrderBlock() {
  153 |     /**
  154 |      * @brief Order Block detection for SMC confirmation
  155 |      * @return true if order block detected near current price
  156 |      * @details Order Block = area where price was rejected before reversing.
  157 |      *          Scans last 20 bars for rejection areas within 10 pips.
  158 |      */
  159 | 
  160 |     double currentPrice = iClose(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0);
  161 |     if(currentPrice == EMPTY_VALUE) return false;
  162 | 
  163 |     // Look for recent rejection areas in last 20 bars
  164 |     bool foundOrderBlock = false;
  165 | 
  166 |     for(int i = 3; i <= 20; i++) {
  167 |         double high_i = iHigh(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  168 |         double low_i = iLow(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  169 |         double close_i = iClose(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  170 | 
  171 |         if(high_i == EMPTY_VALUE || low_i == EMPTY_VALUE || close_i == EMPTY_VALUE) continue;
  172 | 
  173 |         // Check if current price is near a previous rejection area
  174 |         double distanceToHigh = MathAbs(currentPrice - high_i) / _Point;
  175 |         double distanceToLow = MathAbs(currentPrice - low_i) / _Point;
  176 | 
  177 |         // Within 10 pips of previous rejection = potential order block
  178 |         if(distanceToHigh <= 10.0 || distanceToLow <= 10.0) {
  179 |             foundOrderBlock = true;
  180 |             break;
  181 |         }
  182 |     }
  183 | 
  184 |     if(foundOrderBlock) {
  185 |         Print("🏦 [ORDER BLOCK] Detected near current price");
  186 |     }
  187 | 
  188 |     return foundOrderBlock;
  189 | }
  190 | 
  191 | bool GlobalHasLiquiditySweep() {
  192 |     // PHASE 2: Liquidity Sweep detection for SMC confirmation
  193 |     // Liquidity Sweep = price briefly breaks above/below key levels before reversing
  194 | 
  195 |     double currentPrice = iClose(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0);
  196 |     double currentHigh = iHigh(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0);
  197 |     double currentLow = iLow(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0);
  198 | 
  199 |     if(currentPrice == EMPTY_VALUE || currentHigh == EMPTY_VALUE || currentLow == EMPTY_VALUE) return false;
  200 | 
  201 |     // Find recent swing highs and lows (last 10 bars)
  202 |     double swingHigh = currentHigh;
  203 |     double swingLow = currentLow;
  204 | 
  205 |     for(int i = 1; i <= 10; i++) {
  206 |         double high_i = iHigh(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  207 |         double low_i = iLow(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  208 | 
  209 |         if(high_i != EMPTY_VALUE && high_i > swingHigh) swingHigh = high_i;
  210 |         if(low_i != EMPTY_VALUE && low_i < swingLow) swingLow = low_i;
  211 |     }
  212 | 
  213 |     // Check if price swept above swing high or below swing low in recent bars
  214 |     bool liquiditySweep = false;
  215 | 
  216 |     for(int i = 1; i <= 3; i++) {
  217 |         double high_i = iHigh(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  218 |         double low_i = iLow(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  219 |         double close_i = iClose(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  220 | 
  221 |         if(high_i == EMPTY_VALUE || low_i == EMPTY_VALUE || close_i == EMPTY_VALUE) continue;
  222 | 
  223 |         // Bullish sweep: high broke above swing high but closed below
  224 |         bool bullishSweep = (high_i > swingHigh) && (close_i < swingHigh);
  225 | 
  226 |         // Bearish sweep: low broke below swing low but closed above
  227 |         bool bearishSweep = (low_i < swingLow) && (close_i > swingLow);
  228 | 
  229 |         if(bullishSweep || bearishSweep) {
  230 |             liquiditySweep = true;
  231 |             Print("💧 [LIQUIDITY SWEEP] Detected - Bullish:", bullishSweep, " Bearish:", bearishSweep);
  232 |             break;
  233 |         }
  234 |     }
  235 | 
  236 |     return liquiditySweep;
  237 | }
  238 | 
  239 | bool GlobalIsStrongReversalPattern() {
  240 |     /**
  241 |      * @brief Strong reversal pattern detection for Price Action confirmation
  242 |      * @return true if strong reversal pattern detected
  243 |      * @details Multiple timeframe pattern analysis including Pin Bar, Doji,
  244 |      *          Hammer, and Engulfing patterns with volume confirmation.
  245 |      */
  246 | 
  247 |     // M15 pattern analysis
  248 |     double high1_m15 = iHigh(_Symbol, PERIOD_M15, 1);
  249 |     double low1_m15 = iLow(_Symbol, PERIOD_M15, 1);
  250 |     double close1_m15 = iClose(_Symbol, PERIOD_M15, 1);
  251 |     double open1_m15 = iOpen(_Symbol, PERIOD_M15, 1);
  252 | 
  253 |     if(high1_m15 == EMPTY_VALUE || low1_m15 == EMPTY_VALUE || close1_m15 == EMPTY_VALUE || open1_m15 == EMPTY_VALUE) return false;
  254 | 
  255 |     // Pin bar detection
  256 |     double bodySize = MathAbs(close1_m15 - open1_m15);
  257 |     double rangeSize = high1_m15 - low1_m15;
  258 |     double upperShadow = high1_m15 - MathMax(close1_m15, open1_m15);
  259 |     double lowerShadow = MathMin(close1_m15, open1_m15) - low1_m15;
  260 | 
  261 |     bool isPinBar = false;
  262 |     if(rangeSize > 0) {
  263 |         // Strong pin bar: body < 33% of range, one shadow > 66% of range
  264 |         bool smallBody = (bodySize / rangeSize < 0.33);
  265 |         bool longUpperShadow = (upperShadow / rangeSize > 0.66);
  266 |         bool longLowerShadow = (lowerShadow / rangeSize > 0.66);
  267 | 
  268 |         isPinBar = smallBody && (longUpperShadow || longLowerShadow);
  269 |     }
  270 | 
  271 |     // Engulfing pattern (already covered in Scout Manager, simplified here)
  272 |     double close2_m15 = iClose(_Symbol, PERIOD_M15, 2);
  273 |     bool isEngulfing = (MathAbs(close1_m15 - open1_m15) > MathAbs(close2_m15 - iOpen(_Symbol, PERIOD_M15, 2)) * 1.5);
  274 | 
  275 |     // Volume confirmation
  276 |     double volume1 = (double)iVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_M15, 1);
  277 |     double volume2 = (double)iVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_M15, 2);
  278 |     bool volumeConfirm = (volume1 > volume2 * 1.2); // 20% higher volume
  279 | 
  280 |     bool strongPattern = (isPinBar || isEngulfing) && volumeConfirm;
  281 | 
  282 |     if(strongPattern) {
  283 |         Print("🎯 [STRONG REVERSAL] Pattern detected - PinBar:", isPinBar, " Engulfing:", isEngulfing, " Volume:", volumeConfirm);
  284 |     }
  285 | 
  286 |     return strongPattern;
  287 | }
  288 | 
  289 | bool IsStrongMomentum() {
  290 |     /**
  291 |      * @brief Strong momentum detection for early entry mechanism
  292 |      * @return true if strong momentum detected for early entry
  293 |      * @details Uses RSI + price movement confirmation to detect strong
  294 |      *          momentum conditions suitable for early pullback entries.
  295 |      */
  296 | 
  297 |     // RSI momentum check
  298 |     int rsi_m15_handle = iRSI(_Symbol, PERIOD_M15, 14, PRICE_CLOSE);
  299 |     int rsi_h1_handle  = iRSI(_Symbol, PERIOD_H1, 14, PRICE_CLOSE);
  300 |     double rsi_m15_buf[1], rsi_h1_buf[1];
  301 |     if(CopyBuffer(rsi_m15_handle, 0, 0, 1, rsi_m15_buf) < 1 || CopyBuffer(rsi_h1_handle, 0, 0, 1, rsi_h1_buf) < 1) {
  302 |         if(rsi_m15_handle!=INVALID_HANDLE) IndicatorRelease(rsi_m15_handle);
  303 |         if(rsi_h1_handle!=INVALID_HANDLE) IndicatorRelease(rsi_h1_handle);
  304 |         return false;
  305 |     }
  306 |     double rsi_m15 = rsi_m15_buf[0];
  307 |     double rsi_h1  = rsi_h1_buf[0];
  308 |     IndicatorRelease(rsi_m15_handle);
  309 |     IndicatorRelease(rsi_h1_handle);
  310 | 
  311 |     // Strong momentum conditions
  312 |     bool bullishMomentum = (rsi_m15 > 60 && rsi_h1 > 55);
  313 |     bool bearishMomentum = (rsi_m15 < 40 && rsi_h1 < 45);
  314 | 
  315 |     // Price movement confirmation
  316 |     double close_current = iClose(_Symbol, PERIOD_M15, 0);
  317 |     double close_prev = iClose(_Symbol, PERIOD_M15, 1);
  318 | 
  319 |     if(close_current == EMPTY_VALUE || close_prev == EMPTY_VALUE) return false;
  320 | 
  321 |     double priceMovement = (close_current - close_prev) / _Point;
  322 |     bool significantMove = MathAbs(priceMovement) > 20.0; // 20 pips movement
  323 | 
  324 |     bool strongMomentum = (bullishMomentum || bearishMomentum) && significantMove;
  325 | 
  326 |     if(strongMomentum) {
  327 |         Print("⚡ [STRONG MOMENTUM] Detected - Bullish:", bullishMomentum, " Bearish:", bearishMomentum, " Move:", DoubleToString(priceMovement, 1), " pips");
  328 |     }
  329 | 
  330 |     return strongMomentum;
  331 | }
  332 | 
  333 | // Note: The actual implementations of these functions are defined above
  334 | // These stub declarations have been removed to prevent duplicates
  335 | 
  336 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  337 | //| 🎯 BASIC SIGNAL VALIDATION                                        |
  338 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  339 | 
  340 | struct SMultiTimeframeEntry
  341 | {
  342 | bool shouldEnterEarly;           // Should enter early in trend
  343 | double earlyEntryRisk;           // Risk multiplier for early entry
  344 | double momentumScore;            // H1 momentum score
  345 | bool volumeConfirmation;         // Volume confirms breakout
  346 | bool cleanWaveStructure;         // Clean wave structure
  347 | bool newTrendFormation;          // New trend formation detected
  348 | double entryConfidence;          // Entry confidence score
  349 | 
  350 | void Reset()
  351 | {
  352 | shouldEnterEarly = false;
  353 | earlyEntryRisk = 1.0;
  354 | momentumScore = 0.0;
  355 | volumeConfirmation = false;
  356 | cleanWaveStructure = false;
  357 | newTrendFormation = false;
  358 | entryConfidence = 0.0;
  359 | }
  360 | 
  361 | string ToString()
  362 | {
  363 | return StringFormat("Early Entry: %s | Risk: %.2f | Momentum: %.1f%% | Confidence: %.1f%%",
  364 | shouldEnterEarly ? "YES" : "NO", earlyEntryRisk, momentumScore*100, entryConfidence*100);
  365 | }
  366 | };
  367 | 
  368 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  369 | //| 🧠 MULTI-TIMEFRAME ENTRY ANALYZER                                 |
  370 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  371 | class CMultiTimeframeEntryAnalyzer
  372 | {
  373 | private:
  374 | CWaveZigZagAnalyzer m_zigzagAnalyzer;
  375 | CScenarioEngine m_scenarioEngine;
  376 | SMultiTimeframeEntry m_entryAnalysis;
  377 | double m_momentumThreshold;
  378 | double m_volumeThreshold;
  379 | double m_earlyEntryRiskMultiplier;
  380 | int m_trendFormationBars;
  381 | 
  382 | public:
  383 | CMultiTimeframeEntryAnalyzer()
  384 | {
  385 | m_zigzagAnalyzer.Initialize(12, 5, 3); // Default ZigZag params
  386 | m_entryAnalysis.Reset();
  387 | m_momentumThreshold = 1.8;
  388 | m_volumeThreshold = 1.5;
  389 | m_earlyEntryRiskMultiplier = 0.6;
  390 | m_trendFormationBars = 8;
  391 | }
  392 | 
  393 | // Update scenario in ShouldEnterEarlyInTrend or other methods
  394 | void UpdateAnalysis() {
  395 | ENUM_WAVE_PATTERN wave = m_zigzagAnalyzer.AnalyzeWavePattern(20);
  396 | m_scenarioEngine.UpdateScenario();
  397 | // Integrate into entry logic
  398 | }
  399 | 
  400 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  401 | //| 🎯 SHOULD ENTER EARLY IN TREND - SMART ENTRY LOGIC              |
  402 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  403 | bool ShouldEnterEarlyInTrend()  // FEATURE_EARLY_TREND
  404 | {
  405 | UpdateAnalysis(); // Call new method
  406 | m_entryAnalysis.Reset();
  407 | 
  408 | // 1. Check if H4 trend is newly formed
  409 | if(!IsNewTrendFormation())
  410 | {
  411 | return false;
  412 | }
  413 | 
  414 | // 2. Check H1 momentum
  415 | double h1Momentum = CalculateMomentum(PERIOD_H1);
  416 | if(h1Momentum < m_momentumThreshold)
  417 | {
  418 | return false;
  419 | }
  420 | 
  421 | // 3. Check volume confirmation
  422 | if(!IsVolumeConfirmingBreakout())
  423 | {
  424 | return false;
  425 | }
  426 | 
  427 | // 4. Check wave structure
  428 | if(!IsCleanWaveStructure())
  429 | {
  430 | return false;
  431 | }
  432 | 
  433 | // 5. Calculate entry confidence
  434 | m_entryAnalysis.entryConfidence = CalculateEntryConfidence();
  435 | 
  436 | // 6. Determine if early entry is valid
  437 | m_entryAnalysis.shouldEnterEarly = (m_entryAnalysis.entryConfidence >= 0.75);
  438 | 
  439 | if(m_entryAnalysis.shouldEnterEarly)
  440 | {
  441 | m_entryAnalysis.earlyEntryRisk = m_earlyEntryRiskMultiplier;
  442 | Print("🚀 [MTF] Early entry opportunity detected! Confidence: ",
  443 | DoubleToString(m_entryAnalysis.entryConfidence*100, 1), "%");
  444 | }
  445 | 
  446 | return m_entryAnalysis.shouldEnterEarly;
  447 | }
  448 | 
  449 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  450 | //| 🔍 CHECK NEW TREND FORMATION                                    |
  451 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  452 | bool IsNewTrendFormation()
  453 | {
  454 | // Check if H4 trend is newly formed (less than 8 bars old)
  455 | double trendAge = GetTrendAge(PERIOD_H4);
  456 | 
  457 | m_entryAnalysis.newTrendFormation = (trendAge <= m_trendFormationBars);
  458 | 
  459 | if(m_entryAnalysis.newTrendFormation)
  460 | {
  461 | Print("🆕 [MTF] New trend formation detected! Age: ", DoubleToString(trendAge, 1), " bars");
  462 | }
  463 | 
  464 | return m_entryAnalysis.newTrendFormation;
  465 | }
  466 | 
  467 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  468 | //| �� CALCULATE MOMENTUM ON TIMEFRAME                             |
  469 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  470 | double CalculateMomentum(ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe)
  471 | {
  472 | // Calculate momentum based on EMA movement - SONIC R COMPLIANT (EMA34)
  473 | CUnifiedIndicatorManager* manager = CUnifiedIndicatorManager::GetInstance();
  474 | 
  475 | double ema34 = 0, ema34_prev = 0;
  476 | if(manager != NULL) {
  477 |   int ema34Handle = manager.GetEMAHandle(_Symbol, timeframe, 34, PRICE_CLOSE);
  478 |   double ema34Buffer[6];
  479 |   if(CopyBuffer(ema34Handle, 0, 0, 6, ema34Buffer) > 5) {
  480 |     ema34 = ema34Buffer[0];
  481 |     ema34_prev = ema34Buffer[5];
  482 |   }
  483 | } else {
  484 |   // Fallback: create EMA handle and copy current and previous values
  485 |   int ema34Handle = iMA(_Symbol, timeframe, 34, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
  486 |   if(ema34Handle != INVALID_HANDLE) {
  487 |     double ema34Buffer[6];
  488 |     if(CopyBuffer(ema34Handle, 0, 0, 6, ema34Buffer) > 5) {
  489 |       ema34 = ema34Buffer[0];
  490 |       ema34_prev = ema34Buffer[5];
  491 |     }
  492 |     IndicatorRelease(ema34Handle);
  493 |   }
  494 |   Print("⚠️ [MASTER ORCHESTRATOR] Using fallback iMA handle in CalculateMomentum - unified manager not available");
  495 | }
  496 | 
  497 | if(ema34_prev <= 0) return 0.0;
  498 | 
  499 | double momentum = MathAbs(ema34 - ema34_prev) / ema34_prev;
  500 | 
  501 | m_entryAnalysis.momentumScore = momentum;
  502 | 
  503 | return momentum;
  504 | }
  505 | 
  506 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  507 | //| 📊 CHECK VOLUME CONFIRMATION                                    |
  508 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  509 | bool IsVolumeConfirmingBreakout()
  510 | {
  511 | // Check if current volume confirms the breakout
  512 | double currentVolume = (double)iVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0);
  513 | double avgVolume = 0.0;
  514 | 
  515 | // Calculate average volume over last 20 bars
  516 | for(int i = 1; i <= 20; i++)
  517 | {
  518 | avgVolume += (double)iVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  519 | }
  520 | avgVolume /= 20.0;
  521 | 
  522 | if(avgVolume <= 0) return false;
  523 | 
  524 | double volumeRatio = currentVolume / avgVolume;
  525 | m_entryAnalysis.volumeConfirmation = (volumeRatio >= m_volumeThreshold);
  526 | 
  527 | if(m_entryAnalysis.volumeConfirmation)
  528 | {
  529 | Print("📊 [MTF] Volume confirmation! Ratio: ", DoubleToString(volumeRatio, 2), "x");
  530 | }
  531 | 
  532 | return m_entryAnalysis.volumeConfirmation;
  533 | }
  534 | 
  535 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  536 | //| 🌊 CHECK CLEAN WAVE STRUCTURE                                   |
  537 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  538 | bool IsCleanWaveStructure()
  539 | {
  540 | // Check for clean wave structure (no overlapping waves)
  541 | bool cleanStructure = true;
  542 | 
  543 | // Check last 10 bars for clean structure
  544 | for(int i = 1; i <= 10; i++)
  545 | {
  546 | double high = iHigh(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  547 | double low = iLow(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  548 | double close = iClose(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  549 | double open = iOpen(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  550 | 
  551 | // Check for overlapping candles (sideways movement)
  552 | if(MathAbs(high - low) < (_Point * 5)) // Very small range
  553 | {
  554 | cleanStructure = false;
  555 | break;
  556 | }
  557 | 
  558 | // Check for doji patterns (indecision)
  559 | if(MathAbs(close - open) < (_Point * 2))
  560 | {
  561 | cleanStructure = false;
  562 | break;
  563 | }
  564 | }
  565 | 
  566 | m_entryAnalysis.cleanWaveStructure = cleanStructure;
  567 | return cleanStructure;
  568 | }
  569 | 
  570 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  571 | //| 🎯 CALCULATE ENTRY CONFIDENCE                                   |
  572 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  573 | double CalculateEntryConfidence()
  574 | {
  575 | double confidence = 0.0;
  576 | 
  577 | // Base confidence from trend formation
  578 | if(m_entryAnalysis.newTrendFormation) confidence += 0.3;
  579 | 
  580 | // Momentum contribution
  581 | if(m_entryAnalysis.momentumScore >= m_momentumThreshold) confidence += 0.25;
  582 | 
  583 | // Volume confirmation
  584 | if(m_entryAnalysis.volumeConfirmation) confidence += 0.25;
  585 | 
  586 | // Wave structure
  587 | if(m_entryAnalysis.cleanWaveStructure) confidence += 0.2;
  588 | 
  589 | return MathMin(1.0, confidence);
  590 | }
  591 | 
  592 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  593 | //| ⏰ GET TREND AGE ON TIMEFRAME                                   |
  594 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  595 | double GetTrendAge(ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe)
  596 | {
  597 | // Count how many bars the trend has been active - SONIC R COMPLIANT (EMA34/89)
  598 | int trendBars = 0;
  599 | CUnifiedIndicatorManager* manager = CUnifiedIndicatorManager::GetInstance();
  600 | 
  601 | double ema34 = 0, ema89 = 0;
  602 | if(manager != NULL) {
  603 |   int ema34Handle = manager.GetEMAHandle(_Symbol, timeframe, 34, PRICE_CLOSE);
  604 |   int ema89Handle = manager.GetEMAHandle(_Symbol, timeframe, 89, PRICE_CLOSE);
  605 |  
  606 |   double ema34Buffer[1], ema89Buffer[1];
  607 |   if(CopyBuffer(ema34Handle, 0, 0, 1, ema34Buffer) > 0) ema34 = ema34Buffer[0];
  608 |   if(CopyBuffer(ema89Handle, 0, 0, 1, ema89Buffer) > 0) ema89 = ema89Buffer[0];
  609 | } else {
  610 |   // Fallback: create handles and copy current values
  611 |   int ema34Handle = iMA(_Symbol, timeframe, 34, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
  612 |   int ema89Handle = iMA(_Symbol, timeframe, 89, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
  613 |   if(ema34Handle != INVALID_HANDLE) {
  614 |     double ema34Buffer[1];
  615 |     if(CopyBuffer(ema34Handle, 0, 0, 1, ema34Buffer) > 0) ema34 = ema34Buffer[0];
  616 |   }
  617 |   if(ema89Handle != INVALID_HANDLE) {
  618 |     double ema89Buffer[1];
  619 |     if(CopyBuffer(ema89Handle, 0, 0, 1, ema89Buffer) > 0) ema89 = ema89Buffer[0];
  620 |   }
  621 |   Print("⚠️ [MASTER ORCHESTRATOR] Using fallback iMA handles in GetTrendAge - unified manager not available");
  622 | }
  623 | 
  624 | bool currentTrend = (ema34 > ema89); // Bullish trend
  625 | 
  626 | for(int i = 1; i <= 50; i++) // Check last 50 bars
  627 | {
  628 | double ema34_prev = 0, ema89_prev = 0;
  629 | if(manager != NULL) {
  630 |   double ema34Buffer[1], ema89Buffer[1];
  631 |   int h34 = manager.GetEMAHandle(_Symbol, timeframe, 34, PRICE_CLOSE);
  632 |   int h89 = manager.GetEMAHandle(_Symbol, timeframe, 89, PRICE_CLOSE);
  633 |   if(CopyBuffer(h34, 0, i, 1, ema34Buffer) > 0) ema34_prev = ema34Buffer[0];
  634 |   if(CopyBuffer(h89, 0, i, 1, ema89Buffer) > 0) ema89_prev = ema89Buffer[0];
  635 | } else {
  636 |   // Fallback: reuse created handles, copy shifted values
  637 |   int ema34Handle = iMA(_Symbol, timeframe, 34, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
  638 |   int ema89Handle = iMA(_Symbol, timeframe, 89, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
  639 |   if(ema34Handle != INVALID_HANDLE) {
  640 |     double ema34Buffer[1];
  641 |     if(CopyBuffer(ema34Handle, 0, i, 1, ema34Buffer) > 0) ema34_prev = ema34Buffer[0];
  642 |     IndicatorRelease(ema34Handle);
  643 |   }
  644 |   if(ema89Handle != INVALID_HANDLE) {
  645 |     double ema89Buffer[1];
  646 |     if(CopyBuffer(ema89Handle, 0, i, 1, ema89Buffer) > 0) ema89_prev = ema89Buffer[0];
  647 |     IndicatorRelease(ema89Handle);
  648 |   }
  649 | }
  650 | 
  651 | bool prevTrend = (ema34_prev > ema89_prev);
  652 | 
  653 | if(prevTrend == currentTrend)
  654 | {
  655 | trendBars++;
  656 | }
  657 | else
  658 | {
  659 | break; // Trend changed
  660 | }
  661 | }
  662 | 
  663 | return (double)trendBars;
  664 | }
  665 | 
  666 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  667 | //| 📊 GET ENTRY ANALYSIS                                           |
  668 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  669 | SMultiTimeframeEntry GetEntryAnalysis()
  670 | {
  671 | return m_entryAnalysis;
  672 | }
  673 | 
  674 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+

  676 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  677 | void UpdateEntryAnalysis()
  678 | {
  679 | ShouldEnterEarlyInTrend(); // This will update all analysis data
  680 | }
  681 | };

  694 | g_MultiTimeframeEntryAnalyzer = new CMultiTimeframeEntryAnalyzer();

  696 | return true;
  697 | }
  698 | return true;

  702 | {

  704 | delete g_MultiTimeframeEntryAnalyzer;
  705 | g_MultiTimeframeEntryAnalyzer = NULL;
  706 | }
  707 | }

  710 | //| PUBLIC INTERFACE FUNCTIONS                                      |
  711 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  712 | bool ShouldEnterEarlyInTrend()
  713 | {
  714 | if(g_MultiTimeframeEntryAnalyzer != NULL) {
  715 | #ifdef FEATURE_EARLY_TREND
  716 |     return (*g_MultiTimeframeEntryAnalyzer).ShouldEnterEarlyInTrend();
  717 | #else
  718 |     return false;
  719 | #endif
  720 | }
  721 | return false;
  722 | }

  725 | {
  726 | if(g_MultiTimeframeEntryAnalyzer != NULL) {
  727 | #ifdef FEATURE_EARLY_TREND
  728 |     return (*g_MultiTimeframeEntryAnalyzer).GetEntryAnalysis();
  729 | #else
  730 |     SMultiTimeframeEntry empty; empty.Reset(); return empty;
  731 | #endif
  732 | }
  733 | SMultiTimeframeEntry empty;
  734 | empty.Reset();
  735 | return empty;
  736 | }

  738 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  739 | //| 🎼 MASTER ANALYSIS DATA STRUCTURE                               |
  740 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  741 | struct SMasterAnalysisData
  742 | {
  743 | // Component scores (0.0 - 1.0)
  744 | double dragonScore;                        // Dragon Band analysis score
  745 | double waveScore;                          // Wave pattern analysis score
  746 | double structureScore;                     // Market structure score
  747 | double pvsraScore;                         // PVSRA analysis score
  748 | 
  749 | // Confluence analysis
  750 | double overallConfluence;                  // Master confluence score
  751 | double weightedConfluence;                 // Weighted confluence with priorities
  752 | int activeComponents;                      // Number of active components
  753 | int strongComponents;                      // Components with score > 0.7
  754 | 
  755 | // Signal generation
  756 | ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE masterSignal;             // Master signal direction
  757 | double signalStrength;                     // Signal strength 0-1
  758 | double signalConfidence;                   // Overall confidence
  759 | bool signalValid;                          // Signal validity
  760 | 
  761 | // Market analysis
  762 | ENUM_MARKET_REGIME marketRegime;           // Current market regime
  763 | ENUM_TREND_DIRECTION primaryTrend;         // Primary trend direction
  764 | double trendStrength;                      // Trend strength
  765 | double volatilityLevel;                    // Current volatility
  766 | 
  767 | // Risk assessment
  768 | double riskLevel;                          // Current risk level
  769 | bool allowTrading;                         // Trading allowed
  770 | string riskReason;                         // Risk assessment reason
  771 | 
  772 | // Quality metrics
  773 | double analysisQuality;                    // Overall analysis quality
  774 | double dataReliability;                    // Data reliability score
  775 | int analysisErrors;                        // Error count
  776 | 
  777 | // Performance metrics
  778 | uint analysisTime;                         // Time taken for analysis (ms)
  779 | datetime lastUpdate;                       // Last update time
  780 | bool isValid;                              // Data validity
  781 | 
  782 | void Reset()
  783 | {
  784 | dragonScore = 0.0;
  785 | waveScore = 0.0;
  786 | structureScore = 0.0;
  787 | pvsraScore = 0.0;
  788 | 
  789 | overallConfluence = 0.0;
  790 | weightedConfluence = 0.0;
  791 | activeComponents = 0;
  792 | strongComponents = 0;
  793 | 
  794 | masterSignal = SIGNAL_NONE;
  795 | signalStrength = 0.0;
  796 | signalConfidence = 0.0;
  797 | signalValid = false;
  798 | 
  799 | marketRegime = REGIME_RANGING;
  800 | primaryTrend = TREND_SIDEWAYS;
  801 | trendStrength = 0.0;
  802 | volatilityLevel = 0.5;
  803 | 
  804 | riskLevel = 0.5;
  805 | allowTrading = false;
  806 | riskReason = "";
  807 | 
  808 | analysisQuality = 0.0;
  809 | dataReliability = 0.0;
  810 | analysisErrors = 0;
  811 | 
  812 | analysisTime = 0;
  813 | lastUpdate = 0;
  814 | isValid = false;
  815 | }
  816 | 
  817 | string GetMasterReport()
  818 | {
  819 | return StringFormat(
  820 | "🎼 Master Analysis: %s | Confluence: %.1f%% | Quality: %.1f%% | Risk: %.1f%% | %s",
  821 | TradingSignalToString(masterSignal),
  822 | overallConfluence * 100,
  823 | analysisQuality * 100,
  824 | riskLevel * 100,
  825 | allowTrading ? "TRADING OK" : "NO TRADE"
  826 | );
  827 | }
  828 | 
  829 | string GetDetailedReport()
  830 | {
  831 | return StringFormat(
  832 | "🎼 === MASTER ANALYSIS REPORT ===\n" +
  833 | "Dragon: %.1f%% | Wave: %.1f%% | Structure: %.1f%% | PVSRA: %.1f%%\n" +
  834 | "Confluence: %.1f%% (%d/%d components active)\n" +
  835 | "Signal: %s (Strength: %.1f%%, Confidence: %.1f%%)\n" +
  836 | "Market: %s | Trend: %s (%.1f%%)\n" +
  837 | "Risk Level: %.1f%% | Trading: %s\n" +
  838 | "Quality: %.1f%% | Reliability: %.1f%% | Errors: %d\n" +
  839 | "Analysis Time: %dms | Updated: %s",
  840 | dragonScore * 100, waveScore * 100, structureScore * 100, pvsraScore * 100,
  841 | overallConfluence * 100, activeComponents, 4,
  842 | TradingSignalToString(masterSignal), signalStrength * 100, signalConfidence * 100,
  843 | MarketRegimeToString(marketRegime), TrendDirectionToString(primaryTrend), trendStrength * 100,
  844 | riskLevel * 100, allowTrading ? "ALLOWED" : "BLOCKED",
  845 | analysisQuality * 100, dataReliability * 100, analysisErrors,
  846 | analysisTime, TimeToString(lastUpdate)
  847 | );
  848 | }
  849 | };

 1091 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1092 | //| 📊 MASTER ANALYSIS UPDATE                                       |
 1093 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1094 | bool UpdateMasterAnalysis()
 1095 | {
 1096 | if(!m_initialized) return false;
 1097 | 
 1098 | // 🕐 BOSS FIX: Kiểm tra đồng bộ thời gian trước khi phân tích
 1099 | if(!IsAllTimeframesSynchronized()) {
 1100 | Print("[MASTER] Analysis skipped - waiting for timeframe synchronization");
 1101 | return false;
 1102 | }
 1103 | 
 1104 | // Check cache validity
 1105 | datetime currentTime = TimeCurrent();
 1106 | static datetime lastBarTime = 0;
 1107 | datetime currentBarTime = iTime(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0);
 1108 | 
 1109 | bool needUpdate = false;
 1110 | if(currentBarTime != lastBarTime) {
 1111 | needUpdate = true; // New bar
 1112 | lastBarTime = currentBarTime;
 1113 | } else if(currentTime - m_cacheTimestamp >= 15) {
 1114 | needUpdate = true; // Cache expired
 1115 | }
 1116 | 
 1117 | if(!needUpdate && m_cacheValid) {
 1118 | m_cacheHits++;
 1119 | return true; // Use cached data
 1120 | }
 1121 | 
 1122 | m_cacheMisses++;
 1123 | 
 1124 | // 🔧 PHASE 2 FIX: Simplified performance monitoring
 1125 | // StartPerformanceMonitoring("MasterAnalysis"); // Temporarily disabled
 1126 | ulong startTime = GetMicrosecondCount() / 1000;
 1127 | 
 1128 | // Update all components
 1129 | bool updateSuccess = UpdateAllComponents();
 1130 | 
 1131 | if(updateSuccess) {
 1132 | // Calculate master confluence
 1133 | CalculateMasterConfluence();
 1134 | 
 1135 | // Generate master signal
 1136 | GenerateMasterSignal();
 1137 | 
 1138 | // Assess market conditions
 1139 | AssessMarketConditions();
 1140 | 
 1141 | // Perform risk assessment
 1142 | PerformRiskAssessment();
 1143 | 
 1144 | // Calculate quality metrics
 1145 | CalculateQualityMetrics();
 1146 | 
 1147 | // Update performance metrics
 1148 | ulong endTime = GetMicrosecondCount() / 1000;
 1149 | m_masterData.analysisTime = (uint)(endTime - startTime);
 1150 | m_masterData.lastUpdate = currentTime;
 1151 | m_masterData.isValid = true;
 1152 | 
 1153 | // Update cache
 1154 | m_cacheValid = true;
 1155 | m_cacheTimestamp = currentTime;
 1156 | m_lastFullUpdate = currentTime;
 1157 | 
 1158 | // Update tracking
 1159 | m_updateCount++;
 1160 | m_successfulUpdates++;
 1161 | m_averageUpdateTime = (m_averageUpdateTime * (m_updateCount - 1) + m_masterData.analysisTime) / m_updateCount;
 1162 | 
 1163 | // Report success to performance optimizer
 1164 | // FIXED: Performance modules not loaded, skip optimizer reporting
 1165 | // if(g_PerformanceOptimizer != NULL) {
 1166 | //     // TODO: Implement ReportSuccess method in performance optimizer
 1167 | //     // g_PerformanceOptimizer.ReportSuccess();
 1168 | // }
 1169 | 
 1170 | // Reset error count on success
 1171 | if(m_errorCount > 0) m_errorCount--;
 1172 | 
 1173 | return true;
 1174 | } else {
 1175 | // 🔧 CRITICAL FIX: Try fallback analysis before giving up
 1176 | Print("⚠️ [MASTER] Primary analysis failed, trying fallback analysis");
 1177 | if(RunBasicAnalysis()) {
 1178 | Print("✅ [MASTER] Fallback analysis successful");
 1179 | return true;
 1180 | }
 1181 | 
 1182 | HandleAnalysisError("Master analysis failed: Both primary and fallback analysis failed");
 1183 | }
 1184 | 
 1185 | // End performance monitoring with specific operation name
 1186 | // EndPerformanceMonitoring("MasterOrchestrator"); // Temporarily disabled
 1187 | 
 1188 | return false;
 1189 | }
 1190 | 
 1191 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1192 | //| 🔄 COMPONENT UPDATES                                            |
 1193 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1194 | bool UpdateAllComponents()
 1195 | {
 1196 | bool allSuccess = true;
 1197 | 
 1198 | // Update Unified Dragon Band Analyzer
 1199 | if(m_unifiedDragonAnalyzer != NULL) {
 1200 | if(!(*m_unifiedDragonAnalyzer).UpdateAnalysis()) {
 1201 | HandleComponentError("Unified Dragon Band Analyzer update failed");
 1202 | allSuccess = false;
 1203 | }
 1204 | }
 1205 | 
 1206 | // Update Market Structure Manager
 1207 | if(m_structureManager != NULL) {
 1208 | if(!(*m_structureManager).UpdateStructureAnalysis()) {
 1209 | HandleComponentError("Market Structure Manager update failed");
 1210 | allSuccess = false;
 1211 |     // Central TradeGate hook (configured below)
 1212 | 
 1213 | }
 1214 | }
 1215 | 
 1216 | // Update PVSRA Manager
 1217 | if(m_pvsraManager != NULL) {
 1218 | if(!(*m_pvsraManager).UpdatePVSRAAnalysis()) {
 1219 | HandleComponentError("PVSRA Manager update failed");
 1220 | allSuccess = false;
 1221 | }
 1222 | }
 1223 | 
 1224 | // 🔧 PHASE 2 FIX: Simplified Wave Pattern Analyzer update
 1225 | if(m_waveAnalyzer != NULL) {
 1226 | // if(!m_waveAnalyzer.UpdateWaveAnalysis()) {
 1227 | //     HandleComponentError("Wave Pattern Analyzer update failed");
 1228 | //     allSuccess = false;
 1229 | // }
 1230 | // Simplified update for Phase 2
 1231 | }
 1232 | 
 1233 | return allSuccess;
 1234 | }
 1235 | 
 1236 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1237 | //| 🎯 CONFLUENCE CALCULATION                                       |
 1238 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1239 | void CalculateMasterConfluence()
 1240 | {
 1241 | // Collect component scores
 1242 | m_masterData.dragonScore = (m_consolidatedAnalysis!=NULL) ? m_consolidatedAnalysis.GetDragonBandScore() : 0.5;
 1243 | // 🔧 PHASE 2 FIX: Simplified score calculation
 1244 | m_masterData.waveScore = (m_waveAnalyzer != NULL) ? 0.5 : 0.0; // Placeholder score
 1245 | m_masterData.structureScore = (m_structureManager != NULL) ? 0.5 : 0.0; // Placeholder score
 1246 | m_masterData.pvsraScore = (m_pvsraManager != NULL) ? m_pvsraManager.GetPVSRAScore() : 0.0;
 1247 | 
 1248 | // Count active and strong components
 1249 | m_masterData.activeComponents = 0;
 1250 | m_masterData.strongComponents = 0;
 1251 | 
 1252 | if(m_masterData.dragonScore > 0.1) {
 1253 | m_masterData.activeComponents++;
 1254 | if(m_masterData.dragonScore > 0.7) m_masterData.strongComponents++;
 1255 | }
 1256 | 
 1257 | if(m_masterData.waveScore > 0.1) {
 1258 | m_masterData.activeComponents++;
 1259 | if(m_masterData.waveScore > 0.7) m_masterData.strongComponents++;
 1260 | }
 1261 | 
 1262 | if(m_masterData.structureScore > 0.1) {
 1263 | m_masterData.activeComponents++;
 1264 | if(m_masterData.structureScore > 0.7) m_masterData.strongComponents++;
 1265 | }
 1266 | 
 1267 | if(m_masterData.pvsraScore > 0.1) {
 1268 | m_masterData.activeComponents++;
 1269 | if(m_masterData.pvsraScore > 0.7) m_masterData.strongComponents++;
 1270 | }
 1271 | 
 1272 | // Calculate simple confluence
 1273 | m_masterData.overallConfluence = (m_masterData.dragonScore + m_masterData.waveScore +
 1274 |  m_masterData.structureScore + m_masterData.pvsraScore) / 4.0;
 1275 |  
 1276 |  // ⚖️ DYNAMIC WEIGHT ADJUSTMENT
 1277 | if(m_adaptiveWeights && m_weightAdjuster != NULL) {
 1278 | // Update market context for weight adjuster
 1279 | #ifdef FEATURE_DYNAMIC_WEIGHTS
 1280 |     m_weightAdjuster.UpdateMarketContext(
 1281 | m_masterData.marketRegime,
 1282 | m_masterData.primaryTrend,
 1283 | m_masterData.volatilityLevel
 1284 | );
 1285 |     m_weightAdjuster.GetCurrentWeights(m_componentWeights);
 1286 | #else
 1287 |     AdaptComponentWeights();
 1288 | #endif
 1289 | } else {
 1290 | // Fallback to traditional adaptive weights
 1291 | AdaptComponentWeights();
 1292 | }
 1293 | 
 1294 | m_masterData.weightedConfluence = (m_masterData.dragonScore * m_componentWeights[0] +
 1295 | m_masterData.waveScore * m_componentWeights[1] +
 1296 | m_masterData.structureScore * m_componentWeights[2] +
 1297 | m_masterData.pvsraScore * m_componentWeights[3]);
 1298 | 
 1299 | // Apply confluence filters
 1300 | ApplyConfluenceFilters();
 1301 | 
 1302 | // 🎯 CONFLUENCE ENGINE INTEGRATION (Phase 1)
 1303 | if(m_confluenceEngine != NULL && m_consolidatedAnalysis != NULL) {
 1304 | // Analyze confluence using the proper interface
 1305 | #ifdef FEATURE_CONFLUENCE_ENGINE
 1306 |         SEnhancedSignalData temp;
 1307 |         temp = m_confluenceEngine.AnalyzeConfluence(m_consolidatedAnalysis, SCENARIO_SONIC_R_BASIC);
 1308 | #else
 1309 |         SEnhancedSignalData temp;
 1310 |         temp.dragonScore=(m_consolidatedAnalysis!=NULL?m_consolidatedAnalysis.GetDragonBandScore():0.5);
 1311 |         temp.waveScore=0.5;
 1312 |         temp.pvsraScore=(m_pvsraManager!=NULL?m_pvsraManager.GetPVSRAScore():0.0);
 1313 | #endif
 1314 | SEnhancedSignalData confluenceResult;
 1315 | confluenceResult.dragonScore = temp.dragonScore;
 1316 | confluenceResult.waveScore = temp.waveScore;
 1317 | confluenceResult.pvsraScore = temp.pvsraScore;
 1318 | confluenceResult.smcScore = temp.smcScore;
 1319 | confluenceResult.srScore = temp.srScore;
 1320 | confluenceResult.momentumScore = temp.momentumScore;
 1321 | confluenceResult.confluenceScore = temp.confluenceScore;
 1322 | confluenceResult.signalValid = temp.signalValid;
 1323 | confluenceResult.direction = temp.direction;
 1324 | confluenceResult.passesFilters = temp.passesFilters;
 1325 | confluenceResult.signalType = temp.signalType;
 1326 | confluenceResult.finalScore = temp.finalScore;
 1327 | confluenceResult.confidence = temp.confidence;
 1328 | confluenceResult.reasoning = temp.reasoning;
 1329 | confluenceResult.signalTime = temp.signalTime;
 1330 | confluenceResult.marketStructureScore = temp.marketStructureScore;
 1331 | confluenceResult.volumeConfirmationScore = temp.volumeConfirmationScore;
 1332 | confluenceResult.trendAlignmentScore = temp.trendAlignmentScore;
 1333 | confluenceResult.strengthScore = temp.strengthScore;
 1334 | confluenceResult.riskRewardRatio = temp.riskRewardRatio;
 1335 | confluenceResult.trendAlignment = temp.trendAlignment;
 1336 | confluenceResult.supportResistanceScore = temp.supportResistanceScore;
 1337 | confluenceResult.meanReversionScore = temp.meanReversionScore;
 1338 | 
 1339 | // Update master data with Confluence Engine results
 1340 | if(confluenceResult.confluenceScore > 0.0) {
 1341 |  m_masterData.weightedConfluence = confluenceResult.confluenceScore;
 1342 |  m_masterData.signalConfidence = confluenceResult.confidence;
 1343 |  m_masterData.masterSignal = confluenceResult.direction;
 1344 |  m_masterData.signalStrength = confluenceResult.confluenceScore;
 1345 | 
 1346 |  Print("🎯 Confluence Engine: Score=", DoubleToString(confluenceResult.confluenceScore * 100, 1),
 1347 |        "% Confidence=", DoubleToString(confluenceResult.confidence * 100, 1),
 1348 |        "% Signal=", TradingSignalToString(confluenceResult.direction),
 1349 |        " Reason: ", confluenceResult.reasoning);
 1350 | }
 1351 | }
 1352 | }
 1353 | 
 1354 | void AdaptComponentWeights()
 1355 | {
 1356 | // Adapt weights based on component reliability and market conditions
 1357 | double reliabilityBonus = 0.1;
 1358 | 
 1359 | // Reset to base weights
 1360 | m_componentWeights[0] = 0.30; // Dragon
 1361 | m_componentWeights[1] = 0.25; // Wave
 1362 | m_componentWeights[2] = 0.25; // Structure
 1363 | m_componentWeights[3] = 0.20; // PVSRA
 1364 | 
 1365 | // Boost weights for highly reliable components
 1366 | if(m_masterData.dragonScore > 0.8) m_componentWeights[0] += reliabilityBonus;
 1367 | if(m_masterData.waveScore > 0.8) m_componentWeights[1] += reliabilityBonus;
 1368 | if(m_masterData.structureScore > 0.8) m_componentWeights[2] += reliabilityBonus;
 1369 | if(m_masterData.pvsraScore > 0.8) m_componentWeights[3] += reliabilityBonus;
 1370 | 
 1371 | // Normalize weights to sum to 1.0
 1372 | double totalWeight = m_componentWeights[0] + m_componentWeights[1] + m_componentWeights[2] + m_componentWeights[3];
 1373 | if(totalWeight > 0) {
 1374 | for(int i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
 1375 | m_componentWeights[i] /= totalWeight;
 1376 | }
 1377 | }
 1378 | }
 1379 | 
 1380 | void ApplyConfluenceFilters()
 1381 | {
 1382 | // Boss's requirement: At least 2 strong components > 50%
 1383 | if(m_masterData.strongComponents < 2) {
 1384 | m_masterData.weightedConfluence *= 0.5; // Penalize weak confluence
 1385 | }
 1386 | 
 1387 | // Boost for unanimous strong signals
 1388 | if(m_masterData.strongComponents >= 3) {
 1389 | m_masterData.weightedConfluence = MathMin(1.0, m_masterData.weightedConfluence * 1.1);
 1390 | }
 1391 | }

 1397 | bool IsValidBasicSignal() {
 1398 |     // Get current price and indicators
 1399 |     double price = iClose(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0);
 1400 | 
 1401 |     // PHASE 2: Complete implementation following review.txt guideline
 1402 |     double ema34 = 0.0, ema89 = 0.0;
 1403 | 
 1404 |     // Get EMA34 with proper error handling
 1405 |     int ema34Handle = iMA(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 34, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
 1406 |     if(ema34Handle != INVALID_HANDLE) {
 1407 |         double ema34Values[1];
 1408 |         if(CopyBuffer(ema34Handle, 0, 0, 1, ema34Values) > 0) {
 1409 |             ema34 = ema34Values[0];
 1410 |         }
 1411 |         IndicatorRelease(ema34Handle);
 1412 |     }
 1413 | 
 1414 |     // Get EMA89 with proper error handling
 1415 |     int ema89Handle = iMA(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 89, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
 1416 |     if(ema89Handle != INVALID_HANDLE) {
 1417 |         double ema89Values[1];
 1418 |         if(CopyBuffer(ema89Handle, 0, 0, 1, ema89Values) > 0) {
 1419 |             ema89 = ema89Values[0];
 1420 |         }
 1421 |         IndicatorRelease(ema89Handle);
 1422 |     }
 1423 | 
 1424 |     // 1. H4 xác nhận xu hướng (chỉ cần 1 điều kiện) - ATR-based trend detection
 1425 |     bool h4Trend = GlobalIsH4TrendBullish(); // Sử dụng ATR để điều chỉnh
 1426 | 
 1427 |     // 2. M15 tìm điểm vào (3 điều kiện cơ bản)
 1428 |     bool m15Setup = (price > ema34 && ema34 > ema89 && IsPullbackZone());
 1429 | 
 1430 |     // 3. SMC xác nhận (chỉ cần 2/3 yếu tố)
 1431 |     int smcConfirmations = (GlobalIsBOS() ? 1 : 0) +
 1432 |                           (GlobalIsOrderBlock() ? 1 : 0) +
 1433 |                           (GlobalHasLiquiditySweep() ? 1 : 0);
 1434 | 
 1435 |     // 4. Price action xác nhận (tùy chọn nhưng khuyến nghị)
 1436 |     bool paConfirmation = GlobalIsStrongReversalPattern();
 1437 | 
 1438 |     // Log decision reasoning for transparency
 1439 |     if(h4Trend && m15Setup && (smcConfirmations >= 2) && paConfirmation) {
 1440 |         Print("✅ [BASIC SIGNAL] Valid signal detected - H4:", h4Trend, " M15:", m15Setup, " SMC:", smcConfirmations, " PA:", paConfirmation);
 1441 |     }
 1442 | 
 1443 |     return h4Trend && m15Setup && (smcConfirmations >= 2) && paConfirmation;
 1444 | }
 1445 | 
 1446 | bool IsPullbackZone() {
 1447 |     // Get current price
 1448 |     double price = iClose(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0);
 1449 | 
 1450 |     // PHASE 2: Implement proper Dragon Band calculation per review.txt
 1451 |     double dragonHigh = 0.0, dragonLow = 0.0;
 1452 | 
 1453 |     // Get Dragon Band values from DragonBand analyzer if available
 1454 |     if(m_unifiedDragonAnalyzer != NULL) {
 1455 |         SDragonBandData temp = (*m_unifiedDragonAnalyzer).GetDragonBandData();
 1456 |         SDragonBandData dragonData;
 1457 |         dragonData.upperBand = temp.upperBand;
 1458 |         dragonData.lowerBand = temp.lowerBand;
 1459 |         dragonData.middleBand = temp.middleBand;
 1460 |         dragonData.bandwidth = temp.bandwidth;
 1461 |         dragonData.isValid = temp.isValid;
 1462 |         dragonData.timestamp = temp.timestamp;
 1463 |         dragonData.dataTimestamp = temp.dataTimestamp;
 1464 |         dragonData.validationFlags = temp.validationFlags;
 1465 |         dragonHigh = dragonData.upperBand;
 1466 |         dragonLow = dragonData.lowerBand;
 1467 |     } else {
 1468 |         // Fallback: Calculate basic Dragon Band using ATR
 1469 |         int atr_h = iATR(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 14);
 1470 |         double atr_buf[1];
 1471 |         if(CopyBuffer(atr_h, 0, 0, 1, atr_buf) < 1) { if(atr_h!=INVALID_HANDLE) IndicatorRelease(atr_h); return false; }
 1472 |         double atr = atr_buf[0];
 1473 |         IndicatorRelease(atr_h);
 1474 |         if(atr <= 0) return false;
 1475 | 
 1476 |         int ema_h = iMA(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 89, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
 1477 |         double ema_buf[1];
 1478 |         if(CopyBuffer(ema_h, 0, 0, 1, ema_buf) < 1) { if(ema_h!=INVALID_HANDLE) IndicatorRelease(ema_h); return false; }
 1479 |         double ema89 = ema_buf[0];
 1480 |         IndicatorRelease(ema_h);
 1481 |         dragonHigh = ema89 + (atr * 2.0);
 1482 |         dragonLow = ema89 - (atr * 2.0);
 1483 |     }
 1484 | 
 1485 |     // Validate Dragon Band data
 1486 |     double dragonWidth = dragonHigh - dragonLow;
 1487 |     if(dragonWidth <= 0) {
 1488 |         Print("⚠️ [PULLBACK] Invalid Dragon Band width: ", dragonWidth);
 1489 |         return false;
 1490 |     }
 1491 | 
 1492 |     // Tính toán vị trí giá trong dải Dragon (0.0 = bottom, 1.0 = top)
 1493 |     double pricePosition = (price - dragonLow) / dragonWidth;
 1494 | 
 1495 |     // Xác định pullback zone (20%-40% hoặc 60%-80%)
 1496 |     bool inPullbackZone = ((pricePosition >= 0.2 && pricePosition <= 0.4) ||
 1497 |                           (pricePosition >= 0.6 && pricePosition <= 0.8));
 1498 | 
 1499 |     // Cơ chế early entry khi momentum mạnh
 1500 |     if(inPullbackZone && IsStrongMomentum()) {
 1501 |         Print("✅ [PULLBACK] Early entry triggered - Strong momentum detected");
 1502 |         return true;
 1503 |     }
 1504 | 
 1505 |     // Log for transparency
 1506 |     if(inPullbackZone) {
 1507 |         Print("📊 [PULLBACK] In pullback zone - Price position: ", DoubleToString(pricePosition * 100, 1), "%");
 1508 |     }
 1509 | 
 1510 |     return inPullbackZone;
 1511 | }
 1512 | 
 1513 | void GenerateMasterSignal()
 1514 | {
 1515 | m_masterData.masterSignal = SIGNAL_NONE;
 1516 | m_masterData.signalStrength = 0.0;
 1517 | m_masterData.signalConfidence = 0.0;
 1518 | m_masterData.signalValid = false;
 1519 | 
 1520 | // Check confluence threshold
 1521 | if(m_masterData.weightedConfluence < m_confluenceThreshold) {
 1522 | return; // Insufficient confluence
 1523 | }
 1524 | 
 1525 | // 🧠 INTELLIGENT SIGNAL GENERATION WITH CONFLICT RESOLUTION
 1526 | // Collect directional signals from components with confidence scores
 1527 | SComponentSignal componentSignals[4];
 1528 | int signalCount = 0;
 1529 | 
 1530 | // Dragon Band Signal
 1531 | if(m_unifiedDragonAnalyzer != NULL) {
 1532 | ENUM_TREND_DIRECTION dragonTrend = (*m_unifiedDragonAnalyzer).GetTrendDirection();
 1533 | double dragonScore = (m_consolidatedAnalysis!=NULL) ? m_consolidatedAnalysis.GetDragonBandScore() : 0.5;
 1534 | 
 1535 | componentSignals[signalCount].source = "DragonBand";
 1536 | componentSignals[signalCount].confidence = dragonScore;
 1537 | componentSignals[signalCount].weight = m_componentWeights[0];
 1538 | componentSignals[signalCount].timestamp = TimeCurrent();
 1539 | 
 1540 | if(dragonTrend == TREND_BULLISH && dragonScore > 0.6) {
 1541 | componentSignals[signalCount].signal = SIGNAL_BUY;
 1542 | } else if(dragonTrend == TREND_BEARISH && dragonScore > 0.6) {
 1543 | componentSignals[signalCount].signal = SIGNAL_SELL;
 1544 | } else {
 1545 | componentSignals[signalCount].signal = SIGNAL_NONE;
 1546 | }
 1547 | signalCount++;
 1548 | }
 1549 | 
 1550 | // Wave Pattern Signal
 1551 | if(m_waveAnalyzer != NULL) {
 1552 | componentSignals[signalCount].source = "WavePattern";
 1553 | componentSignals[signalCount].signal = SIGNAL_NONE; // Placeholder
 1554 | componentSignals[signalCount].confidence = 0.5;
 1555 | componentSignals[signalCount].weight = m_componentWeights[1];
 1556 | componentSignals[signalCount].timestamp = TimeCurrent();
 1557 | signalCount++;
 1558 | }
 1559 | 
 1560 | // Structure Signal
 1561 | componentSignals[signalCount].source = "Structure";
 1562 | componentSignals[signalCount].signal = DetermineStructureSignal();
 1563 | componentSignals[signalCount].confidence = (m_structureManager != NULL) ?
 1564 |     m_structureManager.GetCurrentStructure().structureStrength : 0.5;
 1565 | componentSignals[signalCount].weight = m_componentWeights[2];
 1566 | componentSignals[signalCount].timestamp = TimeCurrent();
 1567 | signalCount++;
 1568 | 
 1569 | // PVSRA Signal
 1570 | if(m_pvsraManager != NULL) {
 1571 | componentSignals[signalCount].source = "PVSRA";
 1572 | componentSignals[signalCount].signal = (*m_pvsraManager).GetPVSRASignal();
 1573 | componentSignals[signalCount].confidence = 0.7; // Default confidence
 1574 | componentSignals[signalCount].weight = m_componentWeights[3];
 1575 | componentSignals[signalCount].timestamp = TimeCurrent();
 1576 | signalCount++;
 1577 | }
 1578 | 
 1579 | // 🧠 USE INTELLIGENT CONFLICT RESOLVER
 1580 | if(m_conflictResolver != NULL && signalCount > 0) {
 1581 | // Detect conflicts
 1582 | bool hasConflict = m_conflictResolver.DetectConflicts(componentSignals, signalCount);
 1583 | 
 1584 | if(hasConflict) {
 1585 | Print("🧠 [CONFLICT RESOLVER] Conflicts detected, applying intelligent resolution");
 1586 | // Resolve conflicts and get final signal
 1587 | SConflictData conflictData;
 1588 | conflictData = m_conflictResolver.ResolveConflicts(componentSignals, signalCount);
 1589 | 
 1590 | m_masterData.masterSignal = conflictData.resolvedSignal;
 1591 | m_masterData.signalStrength = conflictData.resolutionConfidence;
 1592 | m_masterData.signalConfidence = conflictData.resolutionConfidence;
 1593 | m_masterData.signalValid = (conflictData.resolutionConfidence >= 0.65);
 1594 | 
 1595 | Print("🧠 [CONFLICT RESOLVER] Final signal: ", TradingSignalToString(m_masterData.masterSignal),
 1596 |       " | Confidence: ", DoubleToString(m_masterData.signalConfidence * 100, 1), "%");
 1597 | } else {
 1598 | // No conflicts, use traditional voting with weighted confluence
 1599 | GenerateTraditionalSignal(componentSignals, signalCount);
 1600 | }
 1601 | } else {
 1602 | // Fallback to traditional method if conflict resolver not available
 1603 | GenerateTraditionalSignal(componentSignals, signalCount);
 1604 | }
 1605 | }
 1606 | 
 1607 | // 🗳️ TRADITIONAL VOTING METHOD (FALLBACK)
 1608 | void GenerateTraditionalSignal(SComponentSignal &signals[], int count)
 1609 | {
 1610 | double buyWeight = 0.0;
 1611 | double sellWeight = 0.0;
 1612 | double totalWeight = 0.0;
 1613 | 
 1614 | for(int i = 0; i < count; i++) {
 1615 | if(signals[i].signal == SIGNAL_BUY) {
 1616 | buyWeight += signals[i].weight * signals[i].confidence;
 1617 | } else if(signals[i].signal == SIGNAL_SELL) {
 1618 | sellWeight += signals[i].weight * signals[i].confidence;
 1619 | }
 1620 | totalWeight += signals[i].weight;
 1621 | }
 1622 | 
 1623 | // Determine signal based on weighted votes
 1624 | if(buyWeight > sellWeight && buyWeight > totalWeight * 0.4) {
 1625 | m_masterData.masterSignal = SIGNAL_BUY;
 1626 | m_masterData.signalStrength = buyWeight / totalWeight;
 1627 | } else if(sellWeight > buyWeight && sellWeight > totalWeight * 0.4) {
 1628 | m_masterData.masterSignal = SIGNAL_SELL;
 1629 | m_masterData.signalStrength = sellWeight / totalWeight;
 1630 | }
 1631 | 
 1632 | // Calculate confidence
 1633 | if(m_masterData.masterSignal != SIGNAL_NONE) {
 1634 | m_masterData.signalConfidence = (m_masterData.weightedConfluence + m_masterData.signalStrength) / 2.0;
 1635 | m_masterData.signalValid = (m_masterData.signalConfidence >= 0.65);
 1636 | }
 1637 | }
 1638 | 
 1639 | ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE DetermineStructureSignal()
 1640 | {
 1641 | if(m_structureManager == NULL) return SIGNAL_NONE;
 1642 | 
 1643 | SEnhancedMarketStructure structure;
 1644 | structure = m_structureManager.GetCurrentStructure();
 1645 | 
 1646 | if(structure.isBreakoutConfirmed) {
 1647 | if(structure.structureType == STRUCTURE_BULLISH) {
 1648 | return SIGNAL_BUY;
 1649 | } else if(structure.structureType == STRUCTURE_BEARISH) {
 1650 | return SIGNAL_SELL;
 1651 | }
 1652 | }
 1653 | 
 1654 | return SIGNAL_NONE;
 1655 | }

 1677 | 
 1678 | void DetermineMarketRegime()
 1679 | {
 1680 | // Simplified regime detection based on component analysis
 1681 | int trendingComponents = 0;
 1682 | int rangingComponents = 0;
 1683 | 
 1684 | // Check Dragon Band trend
 1685 | if(m_unifiedDragonAnalyzer != NULL) {
 1686 | ENUM_TREND_DIRECTION dragonTrend = (*m_unifiedDragonAnalyzer).GetTrendDirection();
 1687 | if(dragonTrend != TREND_SIDEWAYS) trendingComponents++;
 1688 | else rangingComponents++;
 1689 | }
 1690 | 
 1691 | // Check Structure trend
 1692 | if(m_structureManager != NULL) {
 1693 | SEnhancedMarketStructure structure;
 1694 | structure = m_structureManager.GetCurrentStructure();
 1695 | if(structure.structureType != STRUCTURE_RANGING) trendingComponents++;
 1696 | else rangingComponents++;
 1697 | }
 1698 | 
 1699 | // Check PVSRA phase
 1700 | if(m_pvsraManager != NULL) {
 1701 | // 🔧 PHASE 2 FIX: Simplified market phase
 1702 | ENUM_MARKET_PHASE phase = MARKET_PHASE_A; // Placeholder for simplified implementation
 1703 | if(phase == MARKET_PHASE_B || phase == MARKET_PHASE_D) trendingComponents++; // 🔧 FIXED: Use correct ENUM_MARKET_PHASE values
 1704 | else rangingComponents++;
 1705 | }
 1706 | 
 1707 | // Determine regime
 1708 | if(trendingComponents > rangingComponents) {
 1709 | m_masterData.marketRegime = REGIME_TRENDING_BULLISH; // 🔧 FIXED: Use correct ENUM_MARKET_REGIME value
 1710 | } else {
 1711 | m_masterData.marketRegime = REGIME_RANGING;
 1712 | }
 1713 | }
 1714 | 
 1715 | void AnalyzePrimaryTrend()
 1716 | {
 1717 | // Collect trend votes from components
 1718 | int upVotes = 0;
 1719 | int downVotes = 0;
 1720 | int sidewaysVotes = 0;
 1721 | double totalStrength = 0.0;
 1722 | 
 1723 | // Dragon Band trend
 1724 | if(m_unifiedDragonAnalyzer != NULL) {
 1725 | ENUM_TREND_DIRECTION dragonTrend = (*m_unifiedDragonAnalyzer).GetTrendDirection();
 1726 | if(dragonTrend == TREND_BULLISH) upVotes++;
 1727 | else if(dragonTrend == TREND_BEARISH) downVotes++;
 1728 | else sidewaysVotes++;
 1729 | }
 1730 | 
 1731 | // Structure trend
 1732 | if(m_structureManager != NULL) {
 1733 | SEnhancedMarketStructure structure;
 1734 | structure = m_structureManager.GetCurrentStructure();
 1735 | if(structure.trendDirection == TREND_UP) upVotes++;
 1736 | else if(structure.trendDirection == TREND_DOWN) downVotes++;
 1737 | else sidewaysVotes++;
 1738 | 
 1739 | totalStrength += structure.structureStrength;
 1740 | }
 1741 | 
 1742 | // Determine primary trend
 1743 | if(upVotes > downVotes && upVotes > sidewaysVotes) {
 1744 | m_masterData.primaryTrend = TREND_UP;
 1745 | } else if(downVotes > upVotes && downVotes > sidewaysVotes) {
 1746 | m_masterData.primaryTrend = TREND_DOWN;
 1747 | } else {
 1748 | m_masterData.primaryTrend = TREND_SIDEWAYS;
 1749 | }
 1750 | 
 1751 | // Calculate trend strength
 1752 | int totalVotes = upVotes + downVotes + sidewaysVotes;
 1753 | if(totalVotes > 0) {
 1754 | double winningVotes = MathMax(upVotes, MathMax(downVotes, sidewaysVotes));
 1755 | m_masterData.trendStrength = (winningVotes / totalVotes + totalStrength / 3.0) / 2.0;
 1756 | }
 1757 | }
 1758 | 
 1759 | void CalculateVolatilityLevel()
 1760 | {
 1761 | // Calculate ATR-based volatility
 1762 | double atr[];
 1763 | int atrHandle = iATR(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 14);
 1764 | if(atrHandle != INVALID_HANDLE && CopyBuffer(atrHandle, 0, 0, 1, atr) > 0) {
 1765 | // Get average ATR for comparison
 1766 | double avgATR[];
 1767 | if(CopyBuffer(atrHandle, 0, 0, 50, avgATR) >= 50) {
 1768 | double currentATR = atr[0];
 1769 | double averageATR = 0.0;
 1770 | for(int i = 0; i < 50; i++) {
 1771 | averageATR += avgATR[i];
 1772 | }
 1773 | averageATR /= 50.0;
 1774 | 
 1775 | if(averageATR > 0) {
 1776 | m_masterData.volatilityLevel = currentATR / averageATR;
 1777 | m_masterData.volatilityLevel = MathMax(0.0, MathMin(2.0, m_masterData.volatilityLevel)); // Clamp 0-2
 1778 | }
 1779 | }
 1780 | }
 1781 | IndicatorRelease(atrHandle);
 1782 | }
 1783 | 
 1784 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1785 | //| ⚖️ COMPONENT PERFORMANCE TRACKING                              |
 1786 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1787 | void UpdateComponentPerformance(ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE actualSignal, bool signalSuccess)
 1788 | {
 1789 | if(m_weightAdjuster == NULL) return;
 1790 | 
 1791 | // Update performance for each component based on their contribution
 1792 | // Dragon Band Performance
 1793 | if(m_unifiedDragonAnalyzer != NULL) {
 1794 | ENUM_TREND_DIRECTION dragonTrend = (*m_unifiedDragonAnalyzer).GetTrendDirection();
 1795 | ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE dragonSignal = SIGNAL_NONE;
 1796 | if(dragonTrend == TREND_BULLISH) dragonSignal = SIGNAL_BUY;
 1797 | else if(dragonTrend == TREND_BEARISH) dragonSignal = SIGNAL_SELL;
 1798 | 
 1799 | bool dragonCorrect = (dragonSignal == actualSignal) && signalSuccess;
 1800 | (*m_weightAdjuster).UpdateComponentPerformance(COMPONENT_DRAGON, dragonCorrect, m_masterData.dragonScore);
 1801 | }
 1802 | 
 1803 | // Wave Pattern Performance
 1804 | if(m_waveAnalyzer != NULL) {
 1805 | // Simplified for Phase 2 - assume neutral performance
 1806 | bool waveCorrect = signalSuccess; // Placeholder
 1807 | (*m_weightAdjuster).UpdateComponentPerformance(COMPONENT_WAVE, waveCorrect, m_masterData.waveScore);
 1808 | }
 1809 | 
 1810 | // Structure Performance
 1811 | if(m_structureManager != NULL) {
 1812 | ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE structureSignal = DetermineStructureSignal();
 1813 | bool structureCorrect = (structureSignal == actualSignal) && signalSuccess;
 1814 | (*m_weightAdjuster).UpdateComponentPerformance(COMPONENT_STRUCTURE, structureCorrect, m_masterData.structureScore);
 1815 | }
 1816 | 
 1817 | // PVSRA Performance
 1818 | if(m_pvsraManager != NULL) {
 1819 | // Simplified for Phase 2 - assume neutral performance
 1820 | bool pvsraCorrect = signalSuccess; // Placeholder
 1821 | (*m_weightAdjuster).UpdateComponentPerformance(COMPONENT_PVSRA, pvsraCorrect, m_masterData.pvsraScore);
 1822 | }
 1823 | 
 1824 | // Trigger weight adjustment if needed
 1825 | m_weightAdjuster.CheckAndAdjustWeights();
 1826 | }
 1827 | 
 1828 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1829 | //| 🛡️ RISK ASSESSMENT                                             |
 1830 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1831 | void PerformRiskAssessment()
 1832 | {
 1833 | m_masterData.riskLevel = 0.5; // Base risk
 1834 | m_masterData.allowTrading = false;
 1835 | m_masterData.riskReason = "";
 1836 | 
 1837 | // Check signal quality
 1838 | if(m_masterData.signalConfidence < 0.65) {
 1839 | m_masterData.riskLevel += 0.2;
 1840 | m_masterData.riskReason += "Low signal confidence; ";
 1841 | }
 1842 | 
 1843 | // Check volatility
 1844 | if(m_masterData.volatilityLevel > 1.5) {
 1845 | m_masterData.riskLevel += 0.15;
 1846 | m_masterData.riskReason += "High volatility; ";
 1847 | } else if(m_masterData.volatilityLevel < 0.5) {
 1848 | m_masterData.riskLevel -= 0.1; // Lower risk in low volatility
 1849 | }
 1850 | 
 1851 | // Check confluence strength
 1852 | if(m_masterData.strongComponents < 2) {
 1853 | m_masterData.riskLevel += 0.15;
 1854 | m_masterData.riskReason += "Weak confluence; ";
 1855 | }
 1856 | 
 1857 | // Check analysis quality
 1858 | if(m_masterData.analysisQuality < 0.7) {
 1859 | m_masterData.riskLevel += 0.1;
 1860 | m_masterData.riskReason += "Low analysis quality; ";
 1861 | }
 1862 | 
 1863 | // Emergency mode check
 1864 | if(m_emergencyMode) {
 1865 | m_masterData.riskLevel = 1.0;
 1866 | m_masterData.riskReason += "Emergency mode active; ";
 1867 | }
 1868 | 
 1869 | // Clamp risk level
 1870 | m_masterData.riskLevel = MathMax(0.0, MathMin(1.0, m_masterData.riskLevel));
 1871 | 
 1872 | // Determine trading allowance
 1873 | m_masterData.allowTrading = (m_masterData.riskLevel < 0.8 &&
 1874 | m_masterData.signalValid &&
 1875 | !m_emergencyMode &&
 1876 | m_masterData.analysisQuality > 0.6);
 1877 | 
 1878 | if(m_masterData.allowTrading) {
 1879 | m_masterData.riskReason = "Risk acceptable for trading";
 1880 | }
 1881 | }
 1882 | 
 1883 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1884 | //| 📊 QUALITY METRICS                                              |
 1885 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1886 | void CalculateQualityMetrics()
 1887 | {
 1888 | // Calculate analysis quality based on component performance
 1889 | double qualitySum = 0.0;
 1890 | int qualityComponents = 0;
 1891 | 
 1892 | if(m_masterData.dragonScore > 0.1) {
 1893 | qualitySum += m_masterData.dragonScore;
 1894 | qualityComponents++;
 1895 | }
 1896 | 
 1897 | if(m_masterData.waveScore > 0.1) {
 1898 | qualitySum += m_masterData.waveScore;
 1899 | qualityComponents++;
 1900 | }
 1901 | 
 1902 | if(m_masterData.structureScore > 0.1) {
 1903 | qualitySum += m_masterData.structureScore;
 1904 | qualityComponents++;
 1905 | }
 1906 | 
 1907 | if(m_masterData.pvsraScore > 0.1) {
 1908 | qualitySum += m_masterData.pvsraScore;
 1909 | qualityComponents++;
 1910 | }
 1911 | 
 1912 | if(qualityComponents > 0) {
 1913 | m_masterData.analysisQuality = qualitySum / qualityComponents;
 1914 | } else {
 1915 | m_masterData.analysisQuality = 0.0;
 1916 | }
 1917 | 
 1918 | // Calculate data reliability based on consistency
 1919 | double consistencyScore = CalculateConsistencyScore();
 1920 | double updateSuccess = m_updateCount > 0 ? (double)m_successfulUpdates / m_updateCount : 0.0;
 1921 | 
 1922 | m_masterData.dataReliability = (consistencyScore * 0.6 + updateSuccess * 0.4);
 1923 | }
 1924 | 
 1925 | double CalculateConsistencyScore()
 1926 | {
 1927 | // Check consistency between components
 1928 | double consistency = 1.0;
 1929 | 
 1930 | // Check Dragon vs Structure trend consistency
 1931 | if(m_unifiedDragonAnalyzer != NULL && m_structureManager != NULL) {
 1932 | ENUM_TREND_DIRECTION dragonTrend = (*m_unifiedDragonAnalyzer).GetTrendDirection();
 1933 | SEnhancedMarketStructure structure;
 1934 | structure = m_structureManager.GetCurrentStructure();
 1935 | 
 1936 | if(dragonTrend != structure.trendDirection &&
 1937 | dragonTrend != TREND_SIDEWAYS &&
 1938 | structure.trendDirection != TREND_SIDEWAYS) {
 1939 | consistency -= 0.2; // Inconsistent trends
 1940 | }
 1941 | }
 1942 | 
 1943 | // Check signal agreement
 1944 | int positiveSignals = 0;
 1945 | int negativeSignals = 0;
 1946 | int totalSignals = 0;
 1947 | 
 1948 | if(m_masterData.dragonScore > 0.6) {
 1949 | // Determine dragon signal from unified analyzer
 1950 | ENUM_TREND_DIRECTION dragonTrend = (*m_unifiedDragonAnalyzer).GetTrendDirection();
 1951 | if(dragonTrend == TREND_BULLISH) positiveSignals++;
 1952 | else if(dragonTrend == TREND_BEARISH) negativeSignals++;
 1953 | totalSignals++;
 1954 | }
 1955 | 
 1956 | if(m_masterData.waveScore > 0.6) {
 1957 | // 🔧 PHASE 2 FIX: Simplified wave signal
 1958 | ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE waveSignal = SIGNAL_NONE; // Placeholder
 1959 | if(waveSignal == SIGNAL_BUY) positiveSignals++;
 1960 | else if(waveSignal == SIGNAL_SELL) negativeSignals++;
 1961 | totalSignals++;
 1962 | }
 1963 | 
 1964 | if(totalSignals > 1) {
 1965 | double agreement = MathMax(positiveSignals, negativeSignals) / (double)totalSignals;
 1966 | consistency *= agreement;
 1967 | }
 1968 | 
 1969 | return MathMax(0.0, MathMin(1.0, consistency));
 1970 | }

 2063 | double m15Score = 0.5; // Placeholder M15 score

 2066 | Print("[🔄 MTF] H4 priority detected");
 2067 | return SIGNAL_BUY; // Follow H4 if strong

 2069 | Print("[⏳ MTF] M15 early signal");

 2077 | // Item 7: Mode-based strategy processing (Simplified for Phase 2)
 2078 | void ProcessModeBasedStrategy()
 2079 | {
 2080 | ENUM_MODE mode = DetectMode();
 2081 | 
 2082 | if (mode == MODE_TREND) {
 2083 | Print("[📈 MODE] TREND strategy active");
 2084 | } else if (mode == MODE_RANGE) {
 2085 | Print("[📊 MODE] RANGE strategy active");
 2086 | } else if (mode == MODE_VOLATILE) {
 2087 | Print("[💥 MODE] VOLATILE strategy active");
 2088 | }
 2089 | }
 2090 | 
 2091 | // Item 7: Market mode detection (Simplified for Phase 2)
 2092 | ENUM_MODE DetectMode()
 2093 | {
 2094 | // 🔧 PHASE 2: Simple mode detection based on price movement
 2095 | MqlRates rates[];
 2096 | ArrayResize(rates, 5);
 2097 | ArraySetAsSeries(rates, true);
 2098 | if(CopyRates(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0, 5, rates) < 5) {
 2099 | return MODE_RANGE; // Default to range if no data
 2100 | }
 2101 | 
 2102 | double priceRange = rates[0].high - rates[0].low;
 2103 | double avgRange = 0;
 2104 | for(int i = 1; i < 5; i++) {
 2105 | avgRange += (rates[i].high - rates[i].low);
 2106 | }
 2107 | avgRange /= 4.0;
 2108 | 
 2109 | if (priceRange > avgRange * 1.5) {
 2110 | return MODE_VOLATILE; // High volatility
 2111 | }
 2112 | 
 2113 | // Simple trend detection
 2114 | bool upTrend = (rates[0].close > rates[2].close) && (rates[1].close > rates[3].close);
 2115 | bool downTrend = (rates[0].close < rates[2].close) && (rates[1].close < rates[3].close);
 2116 | 
 2117 | if (upTrend || downTrend) {
 2118 | return MODE_TREND; // Trending market
 2119 | }
 2120 | 
 2121 | return MODE_RANGE; // Default to ranging
 2122 | }

 2138 | // PHASE 4: IsAllTimeframesSynchronized function (called by UpdateMasterAnalysis)
 2139 | bool IsAllTimeframesSynchronized() {
 2140 |     // Check H1-M15 synchronization (Phase 4 priority)
 2141 |     if(!IsTimeSynchronized(PERIOD_H1, PERIOD_M15)) {
 2142 |         Print("[TIME SYNC] H1 and M15 not synchronized - skipping analysis");
 2143 |         return false;
 2144 |     }
 2145 | 
 2146 |     // Check H1-M5 synchronization (Phase 4 requirement)
 2147 |     if(!IsTimeSynchronized(PERIOD_H1, PERIOD_M5)) {
 2148 |         return false;
 2149 |     }
 2150 | 
 2151 |     return true;
 2152 | }
