 2154 | // LEGACY: CheckTimeframeSynchronization (kept for compatibility)
 2155 | bool CheckTimeframeSynchronization()
 2156 | {
 2157 | ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframes[4] = {PERIOD_M5, PERIOD_M15, PERIOD_H1, PERIOD_H4};
 2158 | bool allSynced = true;
 2159 | 
 2160 | for(int i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
 2161 | datetime currentBarTime = iTime(_Symbol, timeframes[i], 0);
 2162 | if(currentBarTime != m_lastBarTime[i]) {
 2163 | m_lastBarTime[i] = currentBarTime;
 2164 | // New bar detected on this timeframe
 2165 | Print(StringFormat("[SYNC] New bar on %s", TimeframeToString(timeframes[i])));
 2166 | }
 2167 | }
 2168 | 
 2169 | // Check if all timeframes are aligned (within 5 minutes)
 2170 | datetime baseTime = m_lastBarTime[0]; // M5 as base
 2171 | for(int i = 1; i < 4; i++) {
 2172 | if(MathAbs(m_lastBarTime[i] - baseTime) > 300) { // 5 minutes
 2173 | allSynced = false;
 2174 | break;
 2175 | }
 2176 | }
 2177 | 
 2178 | m_timeframeSynced = allSynced;
 2179 | return allSynced;
 2180 | }
 2181 | 
 2182 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2183 | //| 🎯 H4 SUPPORT/RESISTANCE DETECTION                              |
 2184 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2185 | void UpdateH4SupportResistance()
 2186 | {
 2187 | m_h4LevelCount = 0;
 2188 | ArrayInitialize(m_h4SupportResistance, 0.0);
 2189 | 
 2190 | // Get H4 highs and lows for last 50 bars
 2191 | int lookback = 50;
 2192 | double levels[];
 2193 | ArrayResize(levels, lookback * 2);
 2194 | int levelCount = 0;
 2195 | 
 2196 | for(int i = 2; i < lookback - 2; i++) {
 2197 | double high = iHigh(_Symbol, PERIOD_H4, i);
 2198 | double low = iLow(_Symbol, PERIOD_H4, i);
 2199 | 
 2200 | // Check for swing high
 2201 | if(high > iHigh(_Symbol, PERIOD_H4, i-1) && high > iHigh(_Symbol, PERIOD_H4, i+1) &&
 2202 | high > iHigh(_Symbol, PERIOD_H4, i-2) && high > iHigh(_Symbol, PERIOD_H4, i+2)) {
 2203 | levels[levelCount++] = high;
 2204 | }
 2205 | 
 2206 | // Check for swing low
 2207 | if(low < iLow(_Symbol, PERIOD_H4, i-1) && low < iLow(_Symbol, PERIOD_H4, i+1) &&
 2208 | low < iLow(_Symbol, PERIOD_H4, i-2) && low < iLow(_Symbol, PERIOD_H4, i+2)) {
 2209 | levels[levelCount++] = low;
 2210 | }
 2211 | 
 2212 | if(levelCount >= 10) break;
 2213 | }
 2214 | 
 2215 | // Store significant levels
 2216 | double currentPrice = iClose(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0);
 2217 | for(int i = 0; i < levelCount && m_h4LevelCount < 10; i++) {
 2218 | // Only store levels within reasonable distance
 2219 | double distance = MathAbs(levels[i] - currentPrice) / currentPrice;
 2220 | if(distance < 0.05) { // Within 5% of current price
 2221 | m_h4SupportResistance[m_h4LevelCount++] = levels[i];
 2222 | }
 2223 | }
 2224 | 
 2225 | Print(StringFormat("[H4 LEVELS] Found %d significant support/resistance levels", m_h4LevelCount));
 2226 | }
 2227 | 
 2228 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2229 | //| 🎯 M5 REVERSAL PATTERN DETECTION                                |
 2230 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2231 | bool DetectM5ReversalPattern()
 2232 | {
 2233 | // Check for strong reversal patterns on M5
 2234 | MqlRates rates[];
 2235 | ArrayResize(rates, 5);
 2236 | ArraySetAsSeries(rates, true);
 2237 | 
 2238 | if(CopyRates(_Symbol, PERIOD_M5, 0, 5, rates) < 5) return false;
 2239 | 
 2240 | // Pattern 1: Hammer/Doji at support/resistance
 2241 | bool isHammer = IsHammerPattern(rates[0]);
 2242 | bool isDoji = IsDoji(rates[0]);
 2243 | bool atKeyLevel = IsAtKeyLevel(rates[0].close);
 2244 | 
 2245 | // Pattern 2: Engulfing pattern
 2246 | bool isEngulfing = IsEngulfingPattern(rates[0], rates[1]);
 2247 | 
 2248 | // Pattern 3: Three consecutive candles reversal
 2249 | bool isThreeBarReversal = IsThreeBarReversal(rates);
 2250 | 
 2251 | m_m5ReversalDetected = (isHammer && atKeyLevel) || (isDoji && atKeyLevel) ||
 2252 | isEngulfing || isThreeBarReversal;
 2253 | 
 2254 | if(m_m5ReversalDetected) {
 2255 | Print("[M5 REVERSAL] Strong reversal pattern detected");
 2256 | m_advancedScanMode = true;
 2257 | }
 2258 | 
 2259 | 
 2260 | return m_m5ReversalDetected;
 2261 | }
 2262 | 
 2263 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2264 | //| 🎯 PATTERN DETECTION HELPERS                                    |
 2265 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2266 | bool IsHammerPattern(const MqlRates& rate)
 2267 | {
 2268 | double body = MathAbs(rate.close - rate.open);
 2269 | double range = rate.high - rate.low;
 2270 | double lowerShadow = MathMin(rate.open, rate.close) - rate.low;
 2271 | double upperShadow = rate.high - MathMax(rate.open, rate.close);
 2272 | 
 2273 | return (lowerShadow > body * 2) && (upperShadow < body * 0.5) && (range > 0);
 2274 | }
 2275 | 
 2276 | bool IsDoji(const MqlRates& rate)
 2277 | {
 2278 | double body = MathAbs(rate.close - rate.open);
 2279 | double range = rate.high - rate.low;
 2280 | 
 2281 | return (body < range * 0.1) && (range > 0);
 2282 | }
 2283 | 
 2284 | bool IsAtKeyLevel(double price)
 2285 | {
 2286 | double tolerance = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_POINT) * 20;
 2287 | 
 2288 | for(int i = 0; i < m_h4LevelCount; i++) {
 2289 | if(MathAbs(price - m_h4SupportResistance[i]) <= tolerance) {
 2290 | return true;
 2291 | }
 2292 | }
 2293 | return false;
 2294 | }
 2295 | 
 2296 | bool IsEngulfingPattern(const MqlRates& current, const MqlRates& previous)
 2297 | {
 2298 | bool currentBullish = current.close > current.open;
 2299 | bool previousBearish = previous.close < previous.open;
 2300 | 
 2301 | if(currentBullish && previousBearish) {
 2302 | return (current.close > previous.open) && (current.open < previous.close);
 2303 | }
 2304 | 
 2305 | bool currentBearish = current.close < current.open;
 2306 | bool previousBullish = previous.close > previous.open;
 2307 | 
 2308 | if(currentBearish && previousBullish) {
 2309 | return (current.close < previous.open) && (current.open > previous.close);
 2310 | }
 2311 | 
 2312 | return false;
 2313 | }
 2314 | 
 2315 | bool IsThreeBarReversal(const MqlRates& rates[])
 2316 | {
 2317 | // Check for three consecutive bars forming reversal
 2318 | bool upReversal = (rates[2].close < rates[2].open) && // First bar bearish
 2319 | (rates[1].close < rates[1].open) && // Second bar bearish
 2320 | (rates[0].close > rates[0].open) && // Third bar bullish
 2321 | (rates[0].close > rates[1].high);   // Third bar breaks previous high
 2322 | 
 2323 | bool downReversal = (rates[2].close > rates[2].open) && // First bar bullish
 2324 | (rates[1].close > rates[1].open) && // Second bar bullish
 2325 | (rates[0].close < rates[0].open) && // Third bar bearish
 2326 | (rates[0].close < rates[1].low);    // Third bar breaks previous low
 2327 | 
 2328 | return upReversal || downReversal;
 2329 | }

 2334 | void EnhanceSignalWithAdvancedScan()
 2335 | {
 2336 | if(!m_advancedScanMode) return;
 2337 | 
 2338 | // Update H4 levels
 2339 | UpdateH4SupportResistance();
 2340 | 
 2341 | // Check M5 reversal patterns
 2342 | DetectM5ReversalPattern();
 2343 | 
 2344 | // Check timeframe synchronization
 2345 | CheckTimeframeSynchronization();
 2346 | 
 2347 | // Enhance signal confidence if conditions are met
 2348 | if(m_timeframeSynced && m_m5ReversalDetected && m_h4LevelCount > 0) {
 2349 | m_masterData.signalConfidence = MathMin(m_masterData.signalConfidence * 1.25, 1.0);
 2350 | m_masterData.signalStrength = MathMin(m_masterData.signalStrength * 1.15, 1.0);
 2351 | 
 2352 | Print("[ENHANCED] Signal enhanced by advanced scanning mode");
 2353 | }
 2354 | 
 2355 | // Reset advanced scan mode after use
 2356 | static datetime lastReset = 0;
 2357 | if(TimeCurrent() - lastReset > 300) { // Reset every 5 minutes
 2358 | m_advancedScanMode = false;
 2359 | lastReset = TimeCurrent();
 2360 | }
 2361 | }
 2362 | 
 2363 | private:
 2364 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2365 | //| 🕐 TIME SYNCHRONIZATION                                         |
 2366 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2367 | /**
 2368 | * @brief Kiểm tra đồng bộ thời gian giữa các timeframe
 2369 | * @param tf1 Timeframe thứ nhất
 2370 | * @param tf2 Timeframe thứ hai
 2371 | * @return true nếu các timeframe đồng bộ
 2372 | * @note Đảm bảo tín hiệu từ các timeframe khác nhau được phân tích cùng lúc
 2373 | */
 2374 | bool IsTimeSynchronized(ENUM_TIMEFRAMES tf1, ENUM_TIMEFRAMES tf2) {
 2375 | datetime time1 = iTime(_Symbol, tf1, 0);
 2376 | datetime time2 = iTime(_Symbol, tf2, 0);
 2377 | 
 2378 | // Tính toán độ lệch thời gian tối đa cho phép
 2379 | int tf1_seconds = PeriodSeconds(tf1);
 2380 | int tf2_seconds = PeriodSeconds(tf2);
 2381 | int max_deviation = MathMax(tf1_seconds, tf2_seconds) / 2;
 2382 | 
 2383 | // Kiểm tra độ lệch thời gian
 2384 | int time_diff = (int)MathAbs(time1 - time2);
 2385 | bool synchronized = time_diff <= max_deviation;
 2386 | 
 2387 | if(!synchronized) {
 2388 | Print(StringFormat("[TIME SYNC] Timeframes not synchronized: %s vs %s, diff: %d seconds",
 2389 | TimeframeToString(tf1), TimeframeToString(tf2), time_diff));
 2390 | }
 2391 | 
 2392 | return synchronized;
 2393 | }

 2454 | // IMPLEMENTATIONS MOVED TO SEPARATE SECTION TO AVOID DUPLICATES

 2481 | {

 2483 | double buffer[];

 2485 | if(CopyBuffer(atrHandle, 0, 0, 1, buffer) > 0) {
 2486 | IndicatorRelease(atrHandle);
 2487 | return buffer[0];
 2488 | }
 2489 | IndicatorRelease(atrHandle);
 2490 | return 0.0001; // Fallback
 2491 | }

 2493 | double GetAverageVolatility()
 2494 | {
 2495 | int atrHandle = iATR(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 14);
 2496 | double buffer[];
 2497 | ArrayResize(buffer, 20);
 2498 | if(CopyBuffer(atrHandle, 0, 0, 20, buffer) >= 20) {
 2499 | double sum = 0;
 2500 | for(int i = 0; i < 20; i++) {
 2501 | sum += buffer[i];
 2502 | }
 2503 | IndicatorRelease(atrHandle);
 2504 | return sum / 20.0;
 2505 | }
 2506 | IndicatorRelease(atrHandle);
 2507 | return 0.0001; // Fallback
 2508 | }

 2523 | return (double)currentVol > avgVol * 2.0;

 2527 | {
 2528 | double sum = 0;
 2529 | for(int i = 1; i <= period; i++) {
 2530 | sum += (double)iVolume(_Symbol, timeframe, i);
 2531 | }
 2532 | return sum / (double)period;
 2533 | }

 2535 | bool IsEngulfingCandle(ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe)
 2536 | {
 2537 | MqlRates rates[];
 2538 | ArrayResize(rates, 2);
 2539 | ArraySetAsSeries(rates, true);
 2540 | if(CopyRates(_Symbol, timeframe, 0, 2, rates) < 2) return false;
 2541 | 
 2542 | // Simple engulfing pattern
 2543 | bool currentBullish = rates[0].close > rates[0].open;
 2544 | bool previousBearish = rates[1].close < rates[1].open;
 2545 | 
 2546 | return currentBullish && previousBearish &&
 2547 | rates[0].close > rates[1].open && rates[0].open < rates[1].close;
 2548 | }

 2578 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2579 | //| 🔧 CRITICAL FIX: BASIC ANALYSIS FALLBACK METHOD                 |
 2580 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2581 | bool RunBasicAnalysis()
 2582 | {
 2583 | Print("✅ [BASIC ANALYSIS] Activating fallback mode");
 2584 | 
 2585 | // 1. Get basic EMA values with fallback
 2586 | double ema34_current = 0, ema89_current = 0;
 2587 | double ema34_prev = 0, ema89_prev = 0;
 2588 | 
 2589 | CUnifiedIndicatorManager* manager = CUnifiedIndicatorManager::GetInstance();
 2590 | int ema34Handle = INVALID_HANDLE, ema89Handle = INVALID_HANDLE;
 2591 | 
 2592 | if(manager != NULL) {
 2593 | ema34Handle = manager.GetEMAHandle(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 34, PRICE_CLOSE);
 2594 | ema89Handle = manager.GetEMAHandle(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 89, PRICE_CLOSE);
 2595 | } else {
 2596 | ema34Handle = iMA(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 34, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
 2597 | ema89Handle = iMA(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 89, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
 2598 | }
 2599 | 
 2600 | if(ema34Handle == INVALID_HANDLE || ema89Handle == INVALID_HANDLE) {
 2601 | Print("❌ [BASIC ANALYSIS] Cannot create EMA handles - EA cannot function");
 2602 | return false;
 2603 | }
 2604 | 
 2605 | // 2. Get EMA values
 2606 | double ema34Buffer[2], ema89Buffer[2];
 2607 | if(CopyBuffer(ema34Handle, 0, 0, 2, ema34Buffer) <= 0 ||
 2608 | CopyBuffer(ema89Handle, 0, 0, 2, ema89Buffer) <= 0) {
 2609 | Print("❌ [BASIC ANALYSIS] Cannot get EMA values");
 2610 | return false;
 2611 | }
 2612 | 
 2613 | ema34_current = ema34Buffer[0];
 2614 | ema89_current = ema89Buffer[0];
 2615 | ema34_prev = ema34Buffer[1];
 2616 | ema89_prev = ema89Buffer[1];
 2617 | 
 2618 | // 3. Basic trend analysis
 2619 | double price = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
 2620 | bool bullishTrend = (ema34_current > ema89_current);
 2621 | bool trendStrengthening = (ema34_current - ema89_current) > (ema34_prev - ema89_prev);
 2622 | 
 2623 | // 4. Set basic master data
 2624 | m_masterData.primaryTrend = bullishTrend ? TREND_BULLISH : TREND_BEARISH;
 2625 | m_masterData.signalConfidence = trendStrengthening ? 0.6 : 0.3;
 2626 | m_masterData.dragonScore = bullishTrend ? 0.5 : -0.5;
 2627 | m_masterData.structureScore = trendStrengthening ? 0.6 : 0.3;
 2628 | m_masterData.pvsraScore = 0.5; // Neutral PVSRA
 2629 | // Note: analysisMode field doesn't exist in SMasterAnalysisData
 2630 | m_masterData.lastUpdate = TimeCurrent();
 2631 | m_masterData.isValid = true;
 2632 | 
 2633 | // 5. Update cache
 2634 | m_cacheValid = true;
 2635 | m_cacheTimestamp = TimeCurrent();
 2636 | 
 2637 | Print(StringFormat("✅ [BASIC ANALYSIS] Active - Trend: %s | Confidence: %.1f%%",
 2638 | bullishTrend ? "BULLISH" : "BEARISH",
 2639 | m_masterData.signalConfidence * 100));
 2640 | 
 2641 | return true;
 2642 | }

  137 | double atr = iATR(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 14);

  164 | ema89 = iMA(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 89, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_CLOSE);

   98 | 
   99 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  100 | //| Process and enhance signal quality                               |
  101 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  102 | bool ProcessSignal(ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE& signal, double& confidence)
  103 | {
  104 | if(!m_initialized || signal == SIGNAL_NONE) return false;
  105 | 
  106 | // Reset metrics for new signal
  107 | m_currentMetrics.Reset();
  108 | 
  109 | // Step 1: Calculate base signal strength
  110 | m_currentMetrics.strengthScore = CalculateSignalStrength(signal);
  111 | 
  112 | // Step 2: Multi-factor confluence analysis
  113 | m_currentMetrics.confluenceScore = CalculateConfluence(signal);
  114 | 
  115 | // Step 3: Win probability estimation
  116 | m_currentMetrics.probabilityScore = EstimateWinProbability(signal);
  117 | 
  118 | // Step 4: Risk/Reward quality check
  119 | m_currentMetrics.riskRewardScore = EvaluateRiskReward(signal);
  120 | 
  121 | // Step 5: Timing analysis
  122 | m_currentMetrics.timingScore = AnalyzeTiming(signal);
  123 | 
  124 | // Calculate overall signal quality
  125 | double overallQuality = CalculateOverallQuality();
  126 | m_currentMetrics.overallGrade = overallQuality;
  127 | 
  128 | // Apply adaptive filtering
  129 | if(overallQuality < m_adaptiveThreshold)
  130 | {
  131 | signal = SIGNAL_NONE;
  132 | confidence = 0;
  133 | return false;
  134 | }
  135 | 
  136 | // Enhance confidence based on quality
  137 | confidence = EnhanceConfidence(confidence, overallQuality);
  138 | 
  139 | // Track performance
  140 | m_totalSignals++;
  141 | m_avgQualityScore = ((m_avgQualityScore * (m_totalSignals - 1)) + overallQuality) / m_totalSignals;
  142 | 
  143 | return true;
  144 | }
  145 | 
  146 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  147 | //| Calculate signal strength using multiple indicators              |
  148 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  149 | double CalculateSignalStrength(ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE signal)
  150 | {
  151 | double strength = 0.5; // Base strength
  152 | 
  153 | // Momentum confirmation
  154 | double rsi = GetRSI(14);
  155 | if(signal == SIGNAL_BUY && rsi > 30 && rsi < 70)
  156 | strength += 0.1;
  157 | else if(signal == SIGNAL_SELL && rsi > 30 && rsi < 70)
  158 | strength += 0.1;
  159 | 
  160 | // Trend alignment
  161 | double ma50 = GetMA(50);
  162 | double ma200 = GetMA(200);
  163 | double localPrice = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
  164 | 
  165 | if(signal == SIGNAL_BUY && localPrice > ma50 && ma50 > ma200)
  166 | strength += 0.2;
  167 | else if(signal == SIGNAL_SELL && localPrice < ma50 && ma50 < ma200)
  168 | strength += 0.2;
  169 | 
  170 | // Volume confirmation
  171 | if(IsVolumeAboveAverage())
  172 | strength += 0.1;
  173 | 
  174 | // Market structure
  175 | if(IsKeyLevel(localPrice))
  176 | strength += 0.1;
  177 | 
  178 | return MathMin(strength, 1.0);
  179 | }
  180 | 
  181 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  182 | //| Calculate multi-factor confluence                                |
  183 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  184 | double CalculateConfluence(ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE signal)
  185 | {
  186 | int confluenceFactors = 0;
  187 | int totalFactors = 0;
  188 | 
  189 | // Technical confluence
  190 | totalFactors++;
  191 | if(CheckTechnicalConfluence(signal)) confluenceFactors++;
  192 | 
  193 | // Price action confluence
  194 | totalFactors++;
  195 | if(CheckPriceActionConfluence(signal)) confluenceFactors++;
  196 | 
  197 | // Volume confluence
  198 | totalFactors++;
  199 | if(CheckVolumeConfluence(signal)) confluenceFactors++;
  200 | 
  201 | // Time confluence (session overlap)
  202 | totalFactors++;
  203 | if(CheckTimeConfluence()) confluenceFactors++;
  204 | 
  205 | // Market structure confluence
  206 | totalFactors++;
  207 | if(CheckStructureConfluence(signal)) confluenceFactors++;
  208 | 
  209 | return (double)confluenceFactors / totalFactors;
  210 | }
  211 | 
  212 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  213 | //| Estimate win probability using historical performance            |
  214 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  215 | double EstimateWinProbability(ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE signal)
  216 | {
  217 | // Base probability from historical win rate
  218 | double baseProbability = 0.6; // 60% base win rate
  219 | 
  220 | // Adjust based on market conditions
  221 | double marketConditionAdjustment = GetMarketConditionAdjustment();
  222 | 
  223 | // Adjust based on signal quality
  224 | double qualityAdjustment = (m_currentMetrics.strengthScore + m_currentMetrics.confluenceScore) / 2;
  225 | 
  226 | // Calculate final probability
  227 | double probability = baseProbability * marketConditionAdjustment * qualityAdjustment;
  228 | 
  229 | return MathMin(MathMax(probability, 0.3), 0.9); // Cap between 30% and 90%
  230 | }
  231 | 
  232 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  233 | //| Evaluate risk/reward quality                                     |
  234 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  235 | double EvaluateRiskReward(ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE signal)
  236 | {
  237 | double localPrice = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
  238 | double atr = GetATR(14);
  239 | 
  240 | // Find potential stop loss and take profit
  241 | double stopLoss = 0;
  242 | double takeProfit = 0;
  243 | 
  244 | if(signal == SIGNAL_BUY)
  245 | {
  246 | stopLoss = localPrice - (atr * 1.5);
  247 | takeProfit = localPrice + (atr * 3.0);
  248 | }
  249 | else if(signal == SIGNAL_SELL)
  250 | {
  251 | stopLoss = localPrice + (atr * 1.5);
  252 | takeProfit = localPrice - (atr * 3.0);
  253 | }
  254 | 
  255 | // Calculate R:R ratio
  256 | double risk = MathAbs(localPrice - stopLoss);
  257 | double reward = MathAbs(takeProfit - localPrice);
  258 | double rrRatio = (risk > 0) ? reward / risk : 0;
  259 | 
  260 | // Score based on R:R ratio
  261 | if(rrRatio >= 3.0) return 1.0;
  262 | else if(rrRatio >= 2.5) return 0.9;
  263 | else if(rrRatio >= 2.0) return 0.7;
  264 | else if(rrRatio >= 1.5) return 0.5;
  265 | else return 0.3;
  266 | }
  267 | 
  268 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  269 | //| Analyze entry timing quality                                     |
  270 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  271 | double AnalyzeTiming(ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE signal)
  272 | {
  273 | double timingScore = 0.5;
  274 | 
  275 | // Check if we're at session open/close (usually more volatile)
  276 | if(IsNearSessionBoundary())
  277 | timingScore -= 0.2;
  278 | 
  279 | // Check if we're during high-impact news
  280 | if(IsHighImpactNewsTime())
  281 | timingScore -= 0.3;
  282 | 
  283 | // Check if we're in optimal trading hours
  284 | if(IsOptimalTradingHours())
  285 | timingScore += 0.2;
  286 | 
  287 | // Check momentum timing
  288 | if(IsMomentumFavorable(signal))
  289 | timingScore += 0.3;
  290 | 
  291 | return MathMin(MathMax(timingScore, 0.0), 1.0);
  292 | }
  293 | 
  294 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  295 | //| Calculate overall signal quality                                 |
  296 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  297 | double CalculateOverallQuality()
  298 | {
  299 | // Weighted average of all metrics
  300 | double weights[] = {0.25, 0.25, 0.20, 0.20, 0.10}; // Strength, Confluence, Probability, RR, Timing
  301 | 
  302 | double quality = 
  303 | m_currentMetrics.strengthScore * weights[0] +
  304 | m_currentMetrics.confluenceScore * weights[1] +
  305 | m_currentMetrics.probabilityScore * weights[2] +
  306 | m_currentMetrics.riskRewardScore * weights[3] +
  307 | m_currentMetrics.timingScore * weights[4];
  308 | 
  309 | return quality;
  310 | }
  311 | 
  312 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  313 | //| Enhance confidence based on quality metrics                      |
  314 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  315 | double EnhanceConfidence(double baseConfidence, double quality)
  316 | {
  317 | // Apply quality multiplier
  318 | double enhancedConfidence = baseConfidence * (0.5 + quality * 0.5);
  319 | 
  320 | // Apply noise reduction
  321 | if(m_useNoiseFilter && m_marketNoiseLevel > 0.5)
  322 | enhancedConfidence *= (1.0 - m_marketNoiseLevel * 0.3);
  323 | 
  324 | return MathMin(enhancedConfidence, 1.0);
  325 | }
  326 | 
  327 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  328 | //| Update adaptive threshold based on performance                   |
  329 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  330 | void UpdateAdaptiveThreshold()
  331 | {
  332 | if(m_totalSignals < 20) return; // Need minimum signals
  333 | 
  334 | double successRate = (m_totalSignals > 0) ? (double)m_successfulSignals / m_totalSignals : 0;
  335 | 
  336 | // Adjust threshold based on success rate
  337 | if(successRate < 0.5)
  338 | m_adaptiveThreshold = MathMin(m_adaptiveThreshold + 0.05, 0.9);
  339 | else if(successRate > 0.7)
  340 | m_adaptiveThreshold = MathMax(m_adaptiveThreshold - 0.05, 0.6);
  341 | 
  342 | // Adjust for market conditions
  343 | if(m_marketNoiseLevel > 0.6)
  344 | m_adaptiveThreshold = MathMin(m_adaptiveThreshold + 0.1, 0.95);
  345 | }
  346 | 
  347 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  348 | //| Helper methods                                                   |
  349 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  350 | double GetRSI(int period)
  351 | {
  352 | int handle = iRSI(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, period, PRICE_CLOSE);
  353 | double buffer[1];
  354 | if(CopyBuffer(handle, 0, 0, 1, buffer) > 0)
  355 | {
  356 | IndicatorRelease(handle);
  357 | return buffer[0];
  358 | }
  359 | IndicatorRelease(handle);
  360 | return 50; // Default neutral
  361 | }
  362 | 
  363 | double GetMA(int period)
  364 | {
  365 | int handle = iMA(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, period, 0, MODE_SMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
  366 | double buffer[1];
  367 | if(CopyBuffer(handle, 0, 0, 1, buffer) > 0)
  368 | {
  369 | IndicatorRelease(handle);
  370 | return buffer[0];
  371 | }
  372 | IndicatorRelease(handle);
  373 | return 0;
  374 | }
  375 | 
  376 | double GetATR(int period)
  377 | {
  378 | int handle = iATR(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, period);
  379 | double buffer[1];
  380 | if(CopyBuffer(handle, 0, 0, 1, buffer) > 0)
  381 | {
  382 | IndicatorRelease(handle);
  383 | return buffer[0];
  384 | }
  385 | IndicatorRelease(handle);
  386 | return 0;
  387 | }
  388 | 
  389 | bool IsVolumeAboveAverage()
  390 | {
  391 | long volumes[];
  392 | if(CopyTickVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0, 20, volumes) < 20) return false;
  393 | 
  394 | long avgVolume = 0;
  395 | for(int i = 1; i < 20; i++)
  396 | avgVolume += volumes[i];
  397 | avgVolume /= 19;
  398 | 
  399 | return volumes[0] > avgVolume * 1.2;
  400 | }
  401 | 
  402 | bool IsKeyLevel(double price)
  403 | {
  404 | // Check if price is near round numbers or key S/R
  405 | double roundLevel = MathRound(price / 100) * 100;
  406 | return MathAbs(price - roundLevel) < SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_POINT) * 20;
  407 | }
  408 | 
  409 | bool CheckTechnicalConfluence(ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE signal)
  410 | {
  411 | // Check multiple technical indicators alignment
  412 | double rsi = GetRSI(14);
  413 | double ma50 = GetMA(50);
  414 | double localPrice = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
  415 | 
  416 | if(signal == SIGNAL_BUY)
  417 | return (rsi < 70 && localPrice > ma50);
  418 | else
  419 | return (rsi > 30 && localPrice < ma50);
  420 | }
  421 | 
  422 | bool CheckPriceActionConfluence(ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE signal)
  423 | {
  424 | // Simplified price action check
  425 | return true; // Placeholder - implement candlestick patterns
  426 | }
  427 | 
  428 | bool CheckVolumeConfluence(ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE signal)
  429 | {
  430 | return IsVolumeAboveAverage();
  431 | }
  432 | 
  433 | bool CheckTimeConfluence()
  434 | {
  435 | // Check if we're in active session overlap
  436 | MqlDateTime time;
  437 | TimeToStruct(TimeCurrent(), time);
  438 | 
  439 | // London-NY overlap (best liquidity)
  440 | return (time.hour >= 13 && time.hour <= 17);
  441 | }
  442 | 
  443 | bool CheckStructureConfluence(ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE signal)
  444 | {
  445 | // Check market structure alignment
  446 | return true; // Placeholder - integrate with market structure analysis
  447 | }
  448 | 
  449 | double GetMarketConditionAdjustment()
  450 | {
  451 | // Adjust based on current market conditions
  452 | double volatility = GetATR(14) / SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
  453 | 
  454 | if(volatility < 0.001) return 0.8;  // Low volatility
  455 | else if(volatility > 0.003) return 0.7;  // High volatility
  456 | else return 1.0;  // Normal conditions
  457 | }
  458 | 
  459 | bool IsNearSessionBoundary()
  460 | {
  461 | MqlDateTime time;
  462 | TimeToStruct(TimeCurrent(), time);
  463 | return (time.min >= 55 || time.min <= 5);
  464 | }
  465 | 
  466 | bool IsHighImpactNewsTime()
  467 | {
  468 | // Placeholder - integrate with news calendar
  469 | return false;
  470 | }
  471 | 
  472 | bool IsOptimalTradingHours()
  473 | {
  474 | MqlDateTime time;
  475 | TimeToStruct(TimeCurrent(), time);
  476 | return (time.hour >= 8 && time.hour <= 20);
  477 | }
  478 | 
  479 | bool IsMomentumFavorable(ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE signal)
  480 | {
  481 | double rsi = GetRSI(14);
  482 | if(signal == SIGNAL_BUY)
  483 | return (rsi > 40 && rsi < 60);
  484 | else
  485 | return (rsi > 40 && rsi < 60);
  486 | }
  487 | 
  488 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  489 | //| Public getters                                                   |
  490 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  491 | SignalQualityMetrics GetCurrentMetrics() const { return m_currentMetrics; }
  492 | double GetAdaptiveThreshold() const { return m_adaptiveThreshold; }
  493 | double GetAverageQualityScore() const { return m_avgQualityScore; }
  494 | int GetTotalSignals() const { return m_totalSignals; }
  495 | 
  496 | void SignalResult(bool success)
  497 | {
  498 | if(success) m_successfulSignals++;
  499 | UpdateAdaptiveThreshold();
  500 | }
  501 | 
  502 | string GetQualityReport()
  503 | {
  504 | string grade = "F";
  505 | if(m_currentMetrics.overallGrade >= 0.9) grade = "A";
  506 | else if(m_currentMetrics.overallGrade >= 0.8) grade = "B";
  507 | else if(m_currentMetrics.overallGrade >= 0.7) grade = "C";
  508 | else if(m_currentMetrics.overallGrade >= 0.6) grade = "D";
  509 | 
  510 | return StringFormat(
  511 | "Signal Quality: %s (%.2f)\n" +
  512 | "Strength: %.2f | Confluence: %.2f\n" +
  513 | "Probability: %.2f | RR: %.2f | Timing: %.2f\n" +
  514 | "Adaptive Threshold: %.2f | Avg Quality: %.2f",
  515 | grade, m_currentMetrics.overallGrade,
  516 | m_currentMetrics.strengthScore, m_currentMetrics.confluenceScore,
  517 | m_currentMetrics.probabilityScore, m_currentMetrics.riskRewardScore,
  518 | m_currentMetrics.timingScore,
  519 | m_adaptiveThreshold, m_avgQualityScore
  520 | );
  521 | }
  522 | };

   31 | {
   32 | int                     detectedCount;
   33 | int                     successfulCount;
   34 | double                  successRate;
   35 | double                  avgProfitRatio;
   36 | double                  avgTimeToTarget;
   37 | double                  reliability;
   38 | datetime                lastUpdate;

   41 | {
   42 | detectedCount = 0;
   43 | successfulCount = 0;
   44 | successRate = 0.0;
   45 | avgProfitRatio = 0.0;
   46 | avgTimeToTarget = 0.0;
   47 | reliability = 0.0;

   52 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   53 | //| Global Swing Point Detection Function - PRODUCTION FIX          |
   54 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   55 | int GetSwingPoints(SwingPoint& points[], int maxPoints)
   56 | {
   57 | // Global implementation for swing point detection
   58 | int count = 0;
   59 | 
   60 | // 🔧 CRITICAL FIX: Validate history availability before pattern detection
   61 | int availableBars = Bars(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT);
   62 | if(availableBars < 7) { // Need minimum 7 bars for i+2 to i-2 pattern
   63 | ::Print("WARNING [PATTERN] Insufficient history for swing detection: ", availableBars, " bars");
   64 | return 0;
   65 | }
   66 | 
   67 | // 🔧 CRITICAL FIX: Adjust loop to respect bounds
   68 | int maxSafeIndex = MathMin(50, availableBars - 3); // Ensure i+2 is always valid
   69 | 
   70 | // Basic swing point detection using highs/lows
   71 | for(int i = 2; i < maxSafeIndex && count < maxPoints; i++)
   72 | {
   73 | // 🔧 CRITICAL FIX: Validate all indices before access
   74 | if(i + 2 >= availableBars || i - 2 < 0) {
   75 | continue; // Skip this iteration if bounds invalid
   76 | }
   77 | 
   78 | double high2 = iHigh(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i+2);
   79 | double high1 = iHigh(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i+1);
   80 | double high0 = iHigh(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
   81 | double high_1 = iHigh(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i-1);
   82 | double high_2 = iHigh(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i-2);
   83 | 
   84 | // 🔧 ADDED: Validate retrieved data
   85 | if(high2 <= 0 || high1 <= 0 || high0 <= 0 || high_1 <= 0 || high_2 <= 0) {
   86 | ::Print("WARNING [PATTERN] Invalid price data at index ", i, " - Skipping");
   87 | continue;
   88 | }
   89 | 
   90 | // Swing high detection
   91 | if(high0 > high1 && high0 > high_1 && high0 > high2 && high0 > high_2)
   92 | {
   93 | if(count < maxPoints)
   94 | {
   95 | points[count].price = high0;
   96 | points[count].time = iTime(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
   97 | points[count].type = ENUM_SWING_TYPE::SWING_HIGH;
   98 | points[count].isValid = true;
   99 | count++;
  100 | }
  101 | }
  102 | 
  103 | double low2 = iLow(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i+2);
  104 | double low1 = iLow(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i+1);
  105 | double low0 = iLow(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  106 | double low_1 = iLow(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i-1);
  107 | double low_2 = iLow(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i-2);
  108 | 
  109 | // Swing low detection
  110 | if(low0 < low1 && low0 < low_1 && low0 < low2 && low0 < low_2)
  111 | {
  112 | if(count < maxPoints)
  113 | {
  114 | points[count].price = low0;
  115 | points[count].time = iTime(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  116 | points[count].type = ENUM_SWING_TYPE::SWING_LOW;
  117 | points[count].isValid = true;
  118 | count++;
  119 | }
  120 | }
  121 | }
  122 | 
  123 | return count;
  124 | }
  125 | 
  126 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  127 | //| Harmonic Pattern Detector Class                                 |
  128 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  129 | class CHarmonicPatternDetector
  130 | {
  131 | private:
  132 | HarmonicPattern         m_patterns[20];
  133 | PatternStatistics       m_statistics[10];
  134 | int                     m_patternCount;
  135 | 
  136 | // Missing class members - Boss's fix
  137 | SwingPoint              m_swingPoints[100];
  138 | int                     m_swingPointCount;
  139 | 
  140 | // Fibonacci ratios for pattern validation
  141 | double                  m_fibRatios[10];
  142 | double                  m_tolerance;
  143 | 
  144 | public:
  145 | CHarmonicPatternDetector()
  146 | {
  147 | m_patternCount = 0;
  148 | m_swingPointCount = 0;
  149 | m_tolerance = 0.02; // 2% tolerance
  150 | InitializeFibonacciRatios();
  151 | }
  152 | 
  153 | bool DetectHarmonicPatterns()
  154 | {
  155 | // Clear previous patterns
  156 | m_patternCount = 0;
  157 | 
  158 | // Update swing points first
  159 | m_swingPointCount = GetSwingPoints(m_swingPoints, 100);
  160 | 
  161 | // Detect different harmonic patterns
  162 | // DetectGartleyPattern();
  163 | // DetectButterflyPattern();
  164 | // DetectBatPattern();
  165 | // DetectCrabPattern();
  166 | DetectSharkPattern();
  167 | DetectCypherPattern();
  168 | DetectABCDPattern();
  169 | DetectThreeDrivesPattern();
  170 | 
  171 | return (m_patternCount > 0);
  172 | }
  173 | 
  174 | HarmonicPattern GetPattern(int index)
  175 | {
  176 | if(index >= 0 && index < m_patternCount)
  177 | return m_patterns[index];
  178 | 
  179 | HarmonicPattern empty;
  180 | empty.Reset();
  181 | return empty;
  182 | }
  183 | 
  184 | int GetPatternCount() { return m_patternCount; }
  185 | 
  186 | double GetPatternConfidence(ENUM_HARMONIC_PATTERN type)
  187 | {
  188 | for(int i = 0; i < m_patternCount; i++)
  189 | {
  190 | if(m_patterns[i].type == type && m_patterns[i].isActive)
  191 | return m_patterns[i].confidence;
  192 | }
  193 | return 0.0;
  194 | }
  195 | 
  196 | bool IsInPRDZone(double price)
  197 | {
  198 | for(int i = 0; i < m_patternCount; i++)
  199 | {
  200 | if(m_patterns[i].isActive && 
  201 | price >= m_patterns[i].prdZoneLow && 
  202 | price <= m_patterns[i].prdZoneHigh)
  203 | return true;
  204 | }
  205 | return false;
  206 | }
  207 | 
  208 | private:
  209 | void InitializeFibonacciRatios()
  210 | {
  211 | m_fibRatios[0] = 0.236;
  212 | m_fibRatios[1] = 0.382;
  213 | m_fibRatios[2] = 0.500;
  214 | m_fibRatios[3] = 0.618;
  215 | m_fibRatios[4] = 0.786;
  216 | m_fibRatios[5] = 1.000;
  217 | m_fibRatios[6] = 1.272;
  218 | m_fibRatios[7] = 1.414;
  219 | m_fibRatios[8] = 1.618;
  220 | m_fibRatios[9] = 2.618;
  221 | }
  222 | 
  223 | bool DetectGartleyPattern()
  224 | {
  225 | // XABCD Pattern with specific Fibonacci ratios
  226 | // AB = 0.618 of XA
  227 | // BC = 0.382 or 0.886 of AB  
  228 | // CD = 1.272 or 1.618 of BC
  229 | // AD = 0.786 of XA
  230 | 
  231 | SwingPoint points[100];
  232 | int pointCount = GetSwingPoints(points, 100);
  233 | 
  234 | for(int i = 4; i < pointCount && m_patternCount < 20; i++)
  235 | {
  236 | SwingPoint X;
  237 | X.price = points[i-4].price;
  238 | X.time = points[i-4].time;
  239 | X.type = points[i-4].type;
  240 | X.isValid = points[i-4].isValid;
  241 | SwingPoint A;
  242 | A.price = points[i-3].price;
  243 | A.time = points[i-3].time;
  244 | A.type = points[i-3].type;
  245 | A.isValid = points[i-3].isValid;
  246 | SwingPoint B;
  247 | B.price = points[i-2].price;
  248 | B.time = points[i-2].time;
  249 | B.type = points[i-2].type;
  250 | B.isValid = points[i-2].isValid;
  251 | SwingPoint C;
  252 | C.price = points[i-1].price;
  253 | C.time = points[i-1].time;
  254 | C.type = points[i-1].type;
  255 | C.isValid = points[i-1].isValid;
  256 | SwingPoint D;
  257 | D.price = points[i].price;
  258 | D.time = points[i].time;
  259 | D.type = points[i].type;
  260 | D.isValid = points[i].isValid;
  261 | 
  262 | if(ValidateGartleyRatios(X, A, B, C, D))
  263 | {
  264 | HarmonicPattern pattern;
  265 | pattern.type = HARMONIC_GARTLEY;
  266 | pattern.pointX = X.price;
  267 | pattern.pointA = A.price;
  268 | pattern.pointB = B.price;
  269 | pattern.pointC = C.price;
  270 | pattern.pointD = D.price;
  271 | pattern.timeX = X.time;
  272 | pattern.timeA = A.time;
  273 | pattern.timeB = B.time;
  274 | pattern.timeC = C.time;
  275 | pattern.timeD = D.time;
  276 | pattern.isBullish = (D.price < A.price);
  277 | pattern.confidence = CalculatePatternConfidence(X, A, B, C, D, HARMONIC_GARTLEY);
  278 | pattern.validation = ValidatePattern(pattern);
  279 | CalculatePRDZone(pattern);
  280 | pattern.isActive = true;
  281 | 
  282 | m_patterns[m_patternCount++] = pattern;
  283 | return true; // Pattern found
  284 | }
  285 | }
  286 | return false; // No pattern found
  287 | }
  288 | 
  289 | bool DetectButterflyPattern()
  290 | {
  291 | // Similar structure for Butterfly pattern
  292 | // AB = 0.786 of XA
  293 | // BC = 0.382 or 0.886 of AB
  294 | // CD = 1.618 or 2.618 of BC
  295 | // AD = 1.272 or 1.618 of XA
  296 | 
  297 | SwingPoint points[100];
  298 | int pointCount = GetSwingPoints(points, 100);
  299 | 
  300 | for(int i = 4; i < pointCount && m_patternCount < 20; i++)
  301 | {
  302 | SwingPoint X;
  303 | X.price = points[i-4].price;
  304 | X.time = points[i-4].time;
  305 | X.type = points[i-4].type;
  306 | X.isValid = points[i-4].isValid;
  307 | SwingPoint A;
  308 | A.price = points[i-3].price;
  309 | A.time = points[i-3].time;
  310 | A.type = points[i-3].type;
  311 | A.isValid = points[i-3].isValid;
  312 | SwingPoint B;
  313 | B.price = points[i-2].price;
  314 | B.time = points[i-2].time;
  315 | B.type = points[i-2].type;
  316 | B.isValid = points[i-2].isValid;
  317 | SwingPoint C;
  318 | C.price = points[i-1].price;
  319 | C.time = points[i-1].time;
  320 | C.type = points[i-1].type;
  321 | C.isValid = points[i-1].isValid;
  322 | SwingPoint D;
  323 | D.price = points[i].price;
  324 | D.time = points[i].time;
  325 | D.type = points[i].type;
  326 | D.isValid = points[i].isValid;
  327 | 
  328 | if(ValidateButterflyRatios(X, A, B, C, D))
  329 | {
  330 | HarmonicPattern pattern;
  331 | pattern.type = HARMONIC_BUTTERFLY;
  332 | FillPatternData(pattern, X, A, B, C, D, HARMONIC_BUTTERFLY);
  333 | m_patterns[m_patternCount++] = pattern;
  334 | return true; // Pattern found
  335 | }
  336 | }
  337 | return false; // No pattern found
  338 | }

  341 | {

  346 | // AD = 0.886 of XA
  347 |

  350 |

  525 | void DetectABCDPattern()
  526 | {
  527 | // ABCD pattern implementation
  528 | SwingPoint points[100];
  529 | int pointCount = GetSwingPoints(points, 100);
  530 | 
  531 | for(int i = 3; i < pointCount && m_patternCount < 20; i++)
  532 | {
  533 | SwingPoint A;
  534 | A.price = points[i-3].price;
  535 | A.time = points[i-3].time;
  536 | A.type = points[i-3].type;
  537 | A.isValid = points[i-3].isValid;
  538 | SwingPoint B;
  539 | B.price = points[i-2].price;
  540 | B.time = points[i-2].time;
  541 | B.type = points[i-2].type;
  542 | B.isValid = points[i-2].isValid;
  543 | SwingPoint C;
  544 | C.price = points[i-1].price;
  545 | C.time = points[i-1].time;
  546 | C.type = points[i-1].type;
  547 | C.isValid = points[i-1].isValid;
  548 | SwingPoint D;
  549 | D.price = points[i].price;
  550 | D.time = points[i].time;
  551 | D.type = points[i].type;
  552 | D.isValid = points[i].isValid;
  553 | 
  554 | if(ValidateABCDRatios(A, B, C, D))
  555 | {
  556 | HarmonicPattern pattern;
  557 | pattern.type = HARMONIC_ABCD;
  558 | pattern.pointA = A.price;
  559 | pattern.pointB = B.price;
  560 | pattern.pointC = C.price;
  561 | pattern.pointD = D.price;
  562 | pattern.timeA = A.time;
  563 | pattern.timeB = B.time;
  564 | pattern.timeC = C.time;
  565 | pattern.timeD = D.time;
  566 | pattern.isBullish = (D.price < B.price);
  567 | pattern.confidence = CalculateABCDConfidence(A, B, C, D);
  568 | pattern.validation = ValidatePattern(pattern);
  569 | CalculatePRDZone(pattern);
  570 | pattern.isActive = true;
  571 | 
  572 | m_patterns[m_patternCount++] = pattern;
  573 | }
  574 | }
  575 | }
  576 | 
  577 | void DetectThreeDrivesPattern()
  578 | {
  579 | // Three Drives pattern implementation
  580 | SwingPoint points[100];
  581 | int pointCount = GetSwingPoints(points, 100);
  582 | 
  583 | for(int i = 6; i < pointCount && m_patternCount < 20; i++)
  584 | {
  585 | // Three Drives requires 7 points
  586 | if(ValidateThreeDrivesPattern(points, i))
  587 | {
  588 | HarmonicPattern pattern;
  589 | pattern.type = HARMONIC_THREE_DRIVES;
  590 | FillThreeDrivesData(pattern, points, i);
  591 | m_patterns[m_patternCount++] = pattern;
  592 | }
  593 | }
  594 | }
  595 | 
  596 | // Helper methods for pattern validation
  597 | bool ValidateGartleyRatios(const SwingPoint& X, const SwingPoint& A, const SwingPoint& B, const SwingPoint& C, const SwingPoint& D)
  598 | {
  599 | double XA = MathAbs(A.price - X.price);
  600 | double AB = MathAbs(B.price - A.price);
  601 | double BC = MathAbs(C.price - B.price);
  602 | double CD = MathAbs(D.price - C.price);
  603 | double AD = MathAbs(D.price - A.price);
  604 | 
  605 | double AB_XA = AB / XA;
  606 | double BC_AB = BC / AB;
  607 | double CD_BC = CD / BC;
  608 | double AD_XA = AD / XA;
  609 | 
  610 | return (IsRatioValid(AB_XA, 0.618) &&
  611 | (IsRatioValid(BC_AB, 0.382) || IsRatioValid(BC_AB, 0.886)) &&
  612 | (IsRatioValid(CD_BC, 1.272) || IsRatioValid(CD_BC, 1.618)) &&
  613 | IsRatioValid(AD_XA, 0.786));
  614 | }
  615 | 
  616 | bool ValidateButterflyRatios(const SwingPoint& X, const SwingPoint& A, const SwingPoint& B, const SwingPoint& C, const SwingPoint& D)
  617 | {
  618 | double XA = MathAbs(A.price - X.price);
  619 | double AB = MathAbs(B.price - A.price);
  620 | double BC = MathAbs(C.price - B.price);
  621 | double CD = MathAbs(D.price - C.price);
  622 | double AD = MathAbs(D.price - A.price);
  623 | 
  624 | double AB_XA = AB / XA;
  625 | double BC_AB = BC / AB;
  626 | double CD_BC = CD / BC;
  627 | double AD_XA = AD / XA;
  628 | 
  629 | return (IsRatioValid(AB_XA, 0.786) &&
  630 | (IsRatioValid(BC_AB, 0.382) || IsRatioValid(BC_AB, 0.886)) &&
  631 | (IsRatioValid(CD_BC, 1.618) || IsRatioValid(CD_BC, 2.618)) &&
  632 | (IsRatioValid(AD_XA, 1.272) || IsRatioValid(AD_XA, 1.618)));
  633 | }
  634 | 
  635 | bool ValidateBatRatios(const SwingPoint& X, const SwingPoint& A, const SwingPoint& B, const SwingPoint& C, const SwingPoint& D)
  636 | {
  637 | double XA = MathAbs(A.price - X.price);
  638 | double AB = MathAbs(B.price - A.price);
  639 | double BC = MathAbs(C.price - B.price);
  640 | double CD = MathAbs(D.price - C.price);
  641 | double AD = MathAbs(D.price - A.price);
  642 | 
  643 | double AB_XA = AB / XA;
  644 | double BC_AB = BC / AB;
  645 | double CD_BC = CD / BC;
  646 | double AD_XA = AD / XA;
  647 | 
  648 | return ((IsRatioValid(AB_XA, 0.382) || IsRatioValid(AB_XA, 0.500)) &&
  649 | (IsRatioValid(BC_AB, 0.382) || IsRatioValid(BC_AB, 0.886)) &&
  650 | (IsRatioValid(CD_BC, 1.618) || IsRatioValid(CD_BC, 2.618)) &&
  651 | IsRatioValid(AD_XA, 0.886));
  652 | }
  653 | 
  654 | bool ValidateCrabRatios(const SwingPoint& X, const SwingPoint& A, const SwingPoint& B, const SwingPoint& C, const SwingPoint& D)
  655 | {
  656 | double XA = MathAbs(A.price - X.price);
  657 | double AB = MathAbs(B.price - A.price);
  658 | double BC = MathAbs(C.price - B.price);
  659 | double CD = MathAbs(D.price - C.price);
  660 | double AD = MathAbs(D.price - A.price);
  661 | 
  662 | double AB_XA = AB / XA;
  663 | double BC_AB = BC / AB;
  664 | double CD_BC = CD / BC;
  665 | double AD_XA = AD / XA;
  666 | 
  667 | return ((IsRatioValid(AB_XA, 0.382) || IsRatioValid(AB_XA, 0.618)) &&
  668 | (IsRatioValid(BC_AB, 0.382) || IsRatioValid(BC_AB, 0.886)) &&
  669 | (IsRatioValid(CD_BC, 2.240) || IsRatioValid(CD_BC, 3.618)) &&
  670 | IsRatioValid(AD_XA, 1.618));
  671 | }
  672 | 
  673 | bool ValidateSharkRatios(const SwingPoint& X, const SwingPoint& A, const SwingPoint& B, const SwingPoint& C, const SwingPoint& D)
  674 | {
  675 | double XA = MathAbs(A.price - X.price);
  676 | double AB = MathAbs(B.price - A.price);
  677 | double BC = MathAbs(C.price - B.price);
  678 | double OD = MathAbs(D.price - X.price); // O is same as X in Shark
  679 | 
  680 | double AB_XA = AB / XA;
  681 | double BC_AB = BC / AB;
  682 | double OD_XA = OD / XA;
  683 | 
  684 | return ((IsRatioValid(AB_XA, 0.382) || IsRatioValid(AB_XA, 0.618)) &&
  685 | (IsRatioValid(BC_AB, 1.130) || IsRatioValid(BC_AB, 1.618)) &&
  686 | (IsRatioValid(OD_XA, 0.886) || IsRatioValid(OD_XA, 1.130)));
  687 | }
  688 | 
  689 | bool ValidateCypherRatios(const SwingPoint& X, const SwingPoint& A, const SwingPoint& B, const SwingPoint& C, const SwingPoint& D)
  690 | {
  691 | double XA = MathAbs(A.price - X.price);
  692 | double AB = MathAbs(B.price - A.price);
  693 | double BC = MathAbs(C.price - B.price);
  694 | double CD = MathAbs(D.price - C.price);
  695 | 
  696 | double AB_XA = AB / XA;
  697 | double BC_AB = BC / AB;
  698 | double CD_BC = CD / BC;
  699 | 
  700 | return ((IsRatioValid(AB_XA, 0.382) || IsRatioValid(AB_XA, 0.618)) &&
  701 | IsRatioValid(BC_AB, 1.272) &&
  702 | IsRatioValid(CD_BC, 0.786));
  703 | }
  704 | 
  705 | bool ValidateABCDRatios(const SwingPoint& A, const SwingPoint& B, const SwingPoint& C, const SwingPoint& D)
  706 | {
  707 | double AB = MathAbs(B.price - A.price);
  708 | double BC = MathAbs(C.price - B.price);
  709 | double CD = MathAbs(D.price - C.price);
  710 | 
  711 | double BC_AB = BC / AB;
  712 | double CD_AB = CD / AB;
  713 | 
  714 | return ((IsRatioValid(BC_AB, 0.382) || IsRatioValid(BC_AB, 0.618) || IsRatioValid(BC_AB, 0.786)) &&
  715 | (IsRatioValid(CD_AB, 1.272) || IsRatioValid(CD_AB, 1.618)));
  716 | }
  717 | 
  718 | bool ValidateThreeDrivesPattern(const SwingPoint& points[], int endIndex)
  719 | {
  720 | // Validate Three Drives pattern with time and price symmetry
  721 | return true; // Simplified for now
  722 | }
  723 | 
  724 | bool IsRatioValid(double actual, double expected)
  725 | {
  726 | return (MathAbs(actual - expected) <= m_tolerance);
  727 | }
  728 | 
  729 | double CalculatePatternConfidence(const SwingPoint& X, const SwingPoint& A, const SwingPoint& B, const SwingPoint& C, const SwingPoint& D, ENUM_HARMONIC_PATTERN type)
  730 | {
  731 | double confidence = 0.0;
  732 | 
  733 | // Base confidence from ratio accuracy
  734 | confidence += CalculateRatioAccuracy(X, A, B, C, D, type) * 0.4;
  735 | 
  736 | // Volume confirmation
  737 | confidence += CalculateVolumeConfirmation(D) * 0.3;
  738 | 
  739 | // Time symmetry
  740 | confidence += CalculateTimeSymmetry(X, A, B, C, D) * 0.2;
  741 | 
  742 | // Pattern completion quality
  743 | confidence += CalculateCompletionQuality(D) * 0.1;
  744 | 
  745 | return MathMin(confidence, 1.0);
  746 | }
  747 | 
  748 | double CalculateABCDConfidence(const SwingPoint& A, const SwingPoint& B, const SwingPoint& C, const SwingPoint& D)
  749 | {
  750 | double confidence = 0.0;
  751 | 
  752 | double AB = MathAbs(B.price - A.price);
  753 | double BC = MathAbs(C.price - B.price);
  754 | double CD = MathAbs(D.price - C.price);
  755 | 
  756 | double BC_AB = BC / AB;
  757 | double CD_AB = CD / AB;
  758 | 
  759 | // Ratio accuracy
  760 | if(IsRatioValid(BC_AB, 0.618) && IsRatioValid(CD_AB, 1.618))
  761 | confidence += 0.8;
  762 | else if(IsRatioValid(BC_AB, 0.786) && IsRatioValid(CD_AB, 1.272))
  763 | confidence += 0.7;
  764 | else
  765 | confidence += 0.5;
  766 | 
  767 | // Volume confirmation
  768 | confidence += CalculateVolumeConfirmation(D) * 0.2;
  769 | 
  770 | return MathMin(confidence, 1.0);
  771 | }
  772 | 
  773 | double CalculateRatioAccuracy(const SwingPoint& X, const SwingPoint& A, const SwingPoint& B, const SwingPoint& C, const SwingPoint& D, ENUM_HARMONIC_PATTERN type)
  774 | {
  775 | // Calculate how accurately the pattern matches ideal ratios
  776 | return 0.8; // Simplified
  777 | }
  778 | 
  779 | double CalculateVolumeConfirmation(const SwingPoint& point)
  780 | {
  781 | // Check if volume confirms the pattern completion
  782 | long currentVolume = iVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0);
  783 | long avgVolume = 0;
  784 | for(int i = 1; i <= 10; i++)
  785 | avgVolume += iVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  786 | avgVolume /= 10;
  787 | 
  788 | return (currentVolume > avgVolume * 1.5) ? 1.0 : 0.5;
  789 | }
  790 | 
  791 | double CalculateTimeSymmetry(const SwingPoint& X, const SwingPoint& A, const SwingPoint& B, const SwingPoint& C, const SwingPoint& D)
  792 | {
  793 | // Calculate time symmetry between pattern legs
  794 | return 0.7; // Simplified
  795 | }
  796 | 
  797 | double CalculateCompletionQuality(const SwingPoint& point)
  798 | {
  799 | // Quality of pattern completion
  800 | return 0.8; // Simplified
  801 | }
  802 | 
  803 | ENUM_PATTERN_VALIDATION ValidatePattern(HarmonicPattern &pattern)
  804 | {
  805 | if(pattern.confidence > 0.9)
  806 | return VALIDATION_VERY_STRONG;
  807 | else if(pattern.confidence > 0.7)
  808 | return VALIDATION_STRONG;
  809 | else if(pattern.confidence > 0.5)
  810 | return VALIDATION_MODERATE;
  811 | else
  812 | return VALIDATION_WEAK;
  813 | }
  814 | 
  815 | void CalculatePRDZone(HarmonicPattern &pattern)
  816 | {
  817 | // Calculate Potential Reversal Zone
  818 | double range = MathAbs(pattern.pointA - pattern.pointD) * 0.05; // 5% range
  819 | pattern.prdZoneHigh = pattern.pointD + range;
  820 | pattern.prdZoneLow = pattern.pointD - range;
  821 | }
  822 | 
  823 | void FillPatternData(HarmonicPattern &pattern, const SwingPoint& X, const SwingPoint& A, const SwingPoint& B, const SwingPoint& C, const SwingPoint& D, ENUM_HARMONIC_PATTERN type)
  824 | {
  825 | pattern.type = type;
  826 | pattern.pointX = X.price;
  827 | pattern.pointA = A.price;
  828 | pattern.pointB = B.price;
  829 | pattern.pointC = C.price;
  830 | pattern.pointD = D.price;
  831 | pattern.timeX = X.time;
  832 | pattern.timeA = A.time;
  833 | pattern.timeB = B.time;
  834 | pattern.timeC = C.time;
  835 | pattern.timeD = D.time;
  836 | pattern.isBullish = (D.price < A.price);
  837 | pattern.confidence = CalculatePatternConfidence(X, A, B, C, D, type);
  838 | pattern.validation = ValidatePattern(pattern);
  839 | CalculatePRDZone(pattern);
  840 | pattern.isActive = true;
  841 | }
  842 | 
  843 | void FillThreeDrivesData(HarmonicPattern &pattern, const SwingPoint &points[], int endIndex)
  844 | {
  845 | pattern.type = HARMONIC_THREE_DRIVES;
  846 | // Fill specific Three Drives data
  847 | pattern.confidence = 0.7; // Simplified
  848 | pattern.validation = VALIDATION_MODERATE;
  849 | pattern.isActive = true;
  850 | }
  851 | 
  852 | // PRODUCTION FIX: Safe Harmonic Pattern Detection                 |
  853 | // | Enhanced with bounds checking and const reference optimization  |
  854 | // | PRODUCTION FIX: Safe array access with bounds checking        |
  855 | bool DetectHarmonicPattern(const SwingPoint &points[], HarmonicPattern &pattern)
  856 | {
  857 | // SAFETY: Validate input array
  858 | if(!ValidateSwingPointArray(points, "DetectHarmonicPattern"))
  859 | {
  860 | pattern.Reset();
  861 | return false;
  862 | }
  863 | 
  864 | int validPoints = GetValidSwingPointCount(points);
  865 | if(validPoints < 5) // Need minimum 5 points for harmonic patterns
  866 | {
  867 | // SafeLogWarning(StringFormat("Insufficient valid points for harmonic detection: %d", validPoints), "HARMONIC_DETECTION");
  868 | pattern.Reset();
  869 | return false;
  870 | }
  871 | 
  872 | // BOUNDS CHECK: Safe array access
  873 | int size = ArraySize(points);
  874 | if(size < 5)
  875 | {
  876 | pattern.Reset();
  877 | return false;
  878 | }
  879 | 
  880 | // PRODUCTION FIX: Enhanced pattern detection with error handling (MQL5 compatible)
  881 | // Get last 5 significant swing points for pattern analysis
  882 | SwingPoint p1, p2, p3, p4, p5;
  883 | 
  884 | if(!GetLastFiveSwingPoints(points, p1, p2, p3, p4, p5))
  885 | {
  886 | // SafeLogWarning("Failed to extract 5 swing points for harmonic analysis", "HARMONIC_DETECTION");
  887 | pattern.Reset();
  888 | return false;
  889 | }
  890 | 
  891 | // Detect specific harmonic patterns
  892 | if(DetectGartleyPattern())
  893 | {
  894 | // SafeLogInfo("Gartley pattern detected", "HARMONIC_DETECTION");
  895 | return true;
  896 | }
  897 | 
  898 | if(DetectButterflyPattern())
  899 | {
  900 | // SafeLogInfo("Butterfly pattern detected", "HARMONIC_DETECTION");
  901 | return true;
  902 | }
  903 | 
  904 | if(DetectBatPattern())
  905 | {
  906 | // SafeLogInfo("Bat pattern detected", "HARMONIC_DETECTION");
  907 | return true;
  908 | }
  909 | 
  910 | if(DetectCrabPattern())
  911 | {
  912 | // SafeLogInfo("Crab pattern detected", "HARMONIC_DETECTION");
  913 | return true;
  914 | }
  915 | 
  916 | // No pattern found
  917 | pattern.Reset();
  918 | return false;
  919 | }
  920 | 
  921 | // PRODUCTION FIX: Safe extraction of last 5 swing points
  922 | bool GetLastFiveSwingPoints(const SwingPoint &points[], SwingPoint &p1, SwingPoint &p2, 
  923 | SwingPoint &p3, SwingPoint &p4, SwingPoint &p5)
  924 | {
  925 | int size = ArraySize(points);
  926 | if(size < 5) return false;
  927 | 
  928 | // Find last 5 valid swing points
  929 | int foundCount = 0;
  930 | SwingPoint tempPoints[5];
  931 | 
  932 | for(int i = size - 1; i >= 0 && foundCount < 5; i--)
  933 | {
  934 | if(IsValidSwingPoint(points[i]))
  935 | {
  936 | tempPoints[foundCount] = points[i];
  937 | foundCount++;
  938 | }
  939 | }
  940 | 
  941 | if(foundCount < 5) return false;
  942 | 
  943 | // Assign in chronological order (oldest first)
  944 | p1 = tempPoints[4]; // Oldest
  945 | p2 = tempPoints[3];
  946 | p3 = tempPoints[2];
  947 | p4 = tempPoints[1];
  948 | p5 = tempPoints[0]; // Most recent
  949 | 
  950 | return true;
  951 | }
  952 | 
  953 | // PRODUCTION FIX: Comprehensive array validation
  954 | bool ValidateSwingPointArray(const SwingPoint &points[], const string arrayName)
  955 | {
  956 | int size = ArraySize(points);
  957 | 
  958 | if(size <= 0)
  959 | {
  960 | // SafeLogError(StringFormat("Array %s is empty or invalid", arrayName), "ARRAY_VALIDATION");
  961 | return false;
  962 | }
  963 | 
  964 | if(size > 1000) // Sanity check for memory safety
  965 | {
  966 | // SafeLogWarning(StringFormat("Array %s unusually large: %d elements", arrayName, size), "ARRAY_VALIDATION");
  967 | }
  968 | 
  969 | // PRODUCTION FIX: Validate first few elements for integrity
  970 | int checkCount = MathMin(size, 5);
  971 | for(int i = 0; i < checkCount; i++)
  972 | {
  973 | if(!IsValidSwingPoint(points[i]))
  974 | {
  975 | // SafeLogError(StringFormat("Array %s contains invalid data at index %d", arrayName, i), "ARRAY_VALIDATION");
  976 | return false;
  977 | }
  978 | }
  979 | 
  980 | return true;
  981 | }
  982 | 
  983 | // PRODUCTION FIX: Enhanced swing point validation
  984 | bool IsValidSwingPoint(const SwingPoint &point)
  985 | {
  986 | // Check price validity
  987 | if(point.price <= 0.0 || point.price > 1000000.0) // Reasonable price range
  988 | return false;
  989 | 
  990 | // Check time validity
  991 | if(point.time <= 0 || point.time > TimeCurrent() + 86400) // Not future + 1 day buffer
  992 | return false;
  993 | 
  994 | // Check type validity
  995 | if(point.type != ENUM_SWING_TYPE::SWING_HIGH && point.type != ENUM_SWING_TYPE::SWING_LOW)
  996 | return false;
  997 | 
  998 | // Check strength range
  999 | if(point.strength < 0 || point.strength > 100)
 1000 | return false;
 1001 | 
 1002 | return true;
 1003 | }
 1004 | 
 1005 | // PRODUCTION FIX: Get valid swing point count with safety
 1006 | int GetValidSwingPointCount(const SwingPoint &points[])
 1007 | {
 1008 | if(!ValidateSwingPointArray(points, "GetValidSwingPointCount"))
 1009 | return 0;
 1010 | 
 1011 | int size = ArraySize(points);
 1012 | int validCount = 0;
 1013 | 
 1014 | for(int i = 0; i < size; i++)
 1015 | {
 1016 | if(IsValidSwingPoint(points[i]))
 1017 | validCount++;
 1018 | }
 1019 | 
 1020 | return validCount;
 1021 | }
 1022 | };
 1023 | 
 1024 | #endif // ANALYSIS_PATTERN_RECOGNITION_MQH

  100 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  101 | //| 🌊 ENHANCED WAVE PATTERN ANALYZER CLASS                         |
  102 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  103 | class CEnhancedWavePatternAnalyzer
  104 | {
  105 | private:
  106 | // Indicator Handles
  107 | int                                 m_handleMACD;       // MACD for momentum
  108 | int                                 m_handleATR;        // ATR for normalization
  109 | 
  110 | // Data Buffers
  111 | double                              m_prices[];         // Price history
  112 | long                                m_volumes[];        // Volume history
  113 | double                              m_macd[];           // MACD values
  114 | double                              m_signal[];         // MACD signal
  115 | double                              m_atr[];            // ATR values
  116 | 
  117 | // Wave Analysis Configuration
  118 | string                              m_symbol;
  119 | ENUM_TIMEFRAMES                     m_timeframe;
  120 | int                                 m_waveDepth;        // Analysis depth
  121 | double                              m_fibTolerance;     // Fibonacci tolerance
  122 | double                              m_momentumThreshold; // Momentum threshold
  123 | 
  124 | // Analysis State
  125 | SEnhancedWavePatternData           m_currentAnalysis;
  126 | bool                               m_initialized;
  127 | datetime                           m_lastUpdate;
  128 | int                                m_analysisCount;
  129 |

  131 | double                              m_waveHigh;         // Current wave high
  132 | double                              m_waveLow;          // Current wave low
  133 | int                                 m_waveStartBar;     // Wave start bar
  134 | int                                 m_waveEndBar;       // Wave end bar
  135 | 
  136 | public:

  139 | m_handleMACD = INVALID_HANDLE;
  140 | m_handleATR = INVALID_HANDLE;
  141 | 
  142 | m_symbol = "";
  143 | m_timeframe = PERIOD_CURRENT;
  144 | m_waveDepth = 50;
  145 | m_fibTolerance = 0.05;
  146 | m_momentumThreshold = 0.6;
  147 | 
  148 | m_initialized = false;
  149 | m_lastUpdate = 0;
  150 | m_analysisCount = 0;
  151 | 
  152 | m_waveHigh = 0.0;
  153 | m_waveLow = 0.0;
  154 | m_waveStartBar = 0;
  155 | m_waveEndBar = 0;
  156 | 
  157 | m_currentAnalysis.Reset();
  158 | 
  159 | // Initialize dynamic arrays
  160 | ArrayResize(m_prices, 100);
  161 | ArrayResize(m_volumes, 100);
  162 | ArrayResize(m_macd, 50);
  163 | ArrayResize(m_signal, 50);
  164 | ArrayResize(m_atr, 20);
  165 | 
  166 | ArraySetAsSeries(m_prices, true);
  167 | ArraySetAsSeries(m_volumes, true);
  168 | ArraySetAsSeries(m_macd, true);
  169 | ArraySetAsSeries(m_signal, true);
  170 | ArraySetAsSeries(m_atr, true);
  171 | }
  172 | 
  173 | ~CEnhancedWavePatternAnalyzer()
  174 | {
  175 | if(m_handleMACD != INVALID_HANDLE) IndicatorRelease(m_handleMACD);
  176 | if(m_handleATR != INVALID_HANDLE) IndicatorRelease(m_handleATR);
  177 | }
  178 | 
  179 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  180 | //| 🚀 INITIALIZE ENHANCED WAVE ANALYZER                            |
  181 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  182 | bool Initialize(string symbol = NULL, ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe = PERIOD_CURRENT)
  183 | {
  184 | if(symbol == NULL) symbol = _Symbol;
  185 | 
  186 | m_symbol = symbol;
  187 | m_timeframe = timeframe;
  188 | 
  189 | // Create momentum indicators
  190 | m_handleMACD = iMACD(symbol, timeframe, 12, 26, 9, PRICE_CLOSE);
  191 | m_handleATR = iATR(symbol, timeframe, 14);
  192 | 
  193 | if(m_handleMACD == INVALID_HANDLE || m_handleATR == INVALID_HANDLE)
  194 | {
  195 | Print("❌ Failed to create wave pattern indicators for symbol: ", symbol);
  196 | return false;
  197 | }
  198 | 
  199 | m_initialized = true;
  200 | Print("✅ Enhanced Wave Pattern Analyzer initialized successfully for ", symbol);
  201 | return true;
  202 | }
  203 | 
  204 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  205 | //| 🎯 MAIN ENHANCED WAVE ANALYSIS                                   |
  206 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  207 | bool UpdateEnhancedWaveAnalysis()
  208 | {
  209 | if(!m_initialized) return false;
  210 | 
  211 | // Update all indicator buffers
  212 | if(!UpdateIndicatorBuffers()) return false;
  213 | 
  214 | // 🌊 FACTOR 1: Wave Structure Validation (25% weight)
  215 | AnalyzeWaveStructure();
  216 | 
  217 | // 🌊 FACTOR 2: Fibonacci Retracement Analysis (25% weight)
  218 | AnalyzeFibonacciLevels();
  219 | 
  220 | // 🌊 FACTOR 3: Volume Confirmation Analysis (25% weight)
  221 | AnalyzeVolumeConfirmation();
  222 | 
  223 | // 🌊 FACTOR 4: Momentum Alignment Analysis (25% weight)
  224 | AnalyzeMomentumAlignment();
  225 | 
  226 | // Calculate composite scores
  227 | CalculateCompositeScores();
  228 | 
  229 | // Validate wave quality
  230 | ValidateWaveQuality();
  231 | 
  232 | m_currentAnalysis.analysisTime = TimeCurrent();
  233 | m_lastUpdate = TimeCurrent();
  234 | m_analysisCount++;
  235 | 
  236 | return true;
  237 | }
