  239 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  240 | //| 📊 UPDATE INDICATOR BUFFERS                                     |
  241 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  242 | bool UpdateIndicatorBuffers()
  243 | {
  244 | // Copy price and volume data
  245 | if(CopyClose(m_symbol, m_timeframe, 0, 100, m_prices) < 100) return false;
  246 | if(CopyTickVolume(m_symbol, m_timeframe, 0, 100, m_volumes) < 100) return false;
  247 | 
  248 | // Copy momentum indicators
  249 | if(CopyBuffer(m_handleMACD, 0, 0, 50, m_macd) < 50) return false;
  250 | if(CopyBuffer(m_handleMACD, 1, 0, 50, m_signal) < 50) return false;
  251 | if(CopyBuffer(m_handleATR, 0, 0, 20, m_atr) < 20) return false;
  252 | 
  253 | return true;
  254 | }
  255 | 
  256 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  257 | //| 🌊 FACTOR 1: WAVE STRUCTURE VALIDATION                          |
  258 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  259 | void AnalyzeWaveStructure()
  260 | {
  261 | // Enhanced structural validation with edge case handling
  262 | // Identify swing highs and lows
  263 | IdentifyWavePoints();
  264 | 
  265 | // Calculate wave characteristics
  266 | if(m_waveHigh > 0 && m_waveLow > 0)
  267 | {
  268 | double waveRange = m_waveHigh - m_waveLow;
  269 | m_currentAnalysis.waveDuration = m_waveEndBar - m_waveStartBar;
  270 | 
  271 | // Calculate wave angle
  272 | if(m_currentAnalysis.waveDuration > 0)
  273 | {
  274 | double slope = waveRange / m_currentAnalysis.waveDuration;
  275 | m_currentAnalysis.waveAngle = MathArctan(slope) * 180.0 / M_PI;
  276 | }
  277 | 
  278 | // Assess wave structure quality
  279 | double structureScore = 0.0;
  280 | 
  281 | // Factor 1.1: Wave angle strength (0-40%)
  282 | double volMultiplier = CalculateVolumeMultiplier(); // New helper function
  283 | double adjustedAngle = m_currentAnalysis.waveAngle * volMultiplier;
  284 | double angleScore = MathMin(1.0, MathAbs(adjustedAngle) / 45.0);
  285 | structureScore += angleScore * 0.4;
  286 | 
  287 | // Factor 1.2: Wave duration appropriateness (0-30%)
  288 | double durationScore = CalculateDurationScore();
  289 | structureScore += durationScore * 0.3;
  290 | 
  291 | // Factor 1.3: Wave range significance (0-30%)
  292 | double rangeScore = CalculateRangeScore(waveRange);
  293 | structureScore += rangeScore * 0.3;
  294 | 
  295 | // Add refinement: Multi-timeframe structure confirmation
  296 | double mtfScore = CalculateMTFStructureAlignment();
  297 | structureScore += mtfScore * 0.2; // 20% weight for MTF
  298 | 
  299 | m_currentAnalysis.waveStructureScore = MathMin(1.0, structureScore);
  300 | }
  301 | else
  302 | {
  303 | m_currentAnalysis.waveStructureScore = 0.0;
  304 | }
  305 | }
  306 | 
  307 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  308 | //| 🌊 FACTOR 2: FIBONACCI RETRACEMENT ANALYSIS                     |
  309 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  310 | /**
  311 | * @brief Analyzes Fibonacci retracement levels within the current wave
  312 | * @details Calculates key Fibonacci levels (38.2%, 50%, 61.8%, 161.8%) and 
  313 | *          evaluates price proximity to these levels. Provides 25% weighting
  314 | *          to overall wave pattern score.
  315 | * @note Implements Boss's specification for advanced Fibonacci analysis
  316 | */
  317 | void AnalyzeFibonacciLevels()
  318 | {
  319 | if(m_waveHigh <= 0 || m_waveLow <= 0)
  320 | {
  321 | m_currentAnalysis.fibonacciScore = 0.0;
  322 | return;
  323 | }
  324 | 
  325 | double waveRange = m_waveHigh - m_waveLow;
  326 | double currentPrice = m_prices[0];
  327 | 
  328 | // Calculate key Fibonacci levels
  329 | m_currentAnalysis.fibRetrace382 = m_waveHigh - (waveRange * 0.382);
  330 | m_currentAnalysis.fibRetrace500 = m_waveHigh - (waveRange * 0.500);
  331 | m_currentAnalysis.fibRetrace618 = m_waveHigh - (waveRange * 0.618);
  332 | m_currentAnalysis.fibExtension1618 = m_waveHigh + (waveRange * 0.618);
  333 | 
  334 | // Calculate Fibonacci score
  335 | double fibScore = 0.0;
  336 | 
  337 | // Check proximity to key Fibonacci levels
  338 | double tolerance = waveRange * m_fibTolerance;
  339 | 
  340 | if(MathAbs(currentPrice - m_currentAnalysis.fibRetrace382) <= tolerance)
  341 | {
  342 | fibScore += 0.3; // 38.2% retracement
  343 | }
  344 | 
  345 | if(MathAbs(currentPrice - m_currentAnalysis.fibRetrace500) <= tolerance)
  346 | {
  347 | fibScore += 0.4; // 50% retracement (strongest)
  348 | }
  349 | 
  350 | if(MathAbs(currentPrice - m_currentAnalysis.fibRetrace618) <= tolerance)
  351 | {
  352 | fibScore += 0.35; // 61.8% retracement
  353 | }
  354 | 
  355 | // Bonus for multiple level alignment
  356 | int levelCount = 0;
  357 | if(MathAbs(currentPrice - m_currentAnalysis.fibRetrace382) <= tolerance) levelCount++;
  358 | if(MathAbs(currentPrice - m_currentAnalysis.fibRetrace500) <= tolerance) levelCount++;
  359 | if(MathAbs(currentPrice - m_currentAnalysis.fibRetrace618) <= tolerance) levelCount++;
  360 | 
  361 | if(levelCount >= 2) fibScore += 0.2; // Bonus for confluence
  362 | 
  363 | m_currentAnalysis.fibonacciScore = MathMin(1.0, fibScore);
  364 | }
  365 | 
  366 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  367 | //| 🌊 FACTOR 3: VOLUME CONFIRMATION ANALYSIS                       |
  368 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  369 | /**
  370 | * @brief Analyzes volume patterns for wave confirmation
  371 | * @details Evaluates volume trend alignment, strength, and consistency
  372 | *          to confirm wave validity. Provides 25% weighting to overall score.
  373 | * @note Higher volume during wave direction confirms institutional participation
  374 | */
  375 | void AnalyzeVolumeConfirmation()
  376 | {
  377 | // Calculate average volume over wave period
  378 | long volumeSum = 0;
  379 | int waveLength = MathMin(20, ArraySize(m_volumes));
  380 | 
  381 | for(int i = 0; i < waveLength; i++)
  382 | {
  383 | volumeSum += m_volumes[i];
  384 | }
  385 | 
  386 | m_currentAnalysis.avgWaveVolume = (double)volumeSum / waveLength;
  387 | 
  388 | // Analyze volume trend
  389 | double recentVolume = (double)(m_volumes[0] + m_volumes[1] + m_volumes[2]) / 3.0;
  390 | double olderVolume = (double)(m_volumes[7] + m_volumes[8] + m_volumes[9]) / 3.0;
  391 | 
  392 | m_currentAnalysis.volumeTrend = (recentVolume - olderVolume) / olderVolume;
  393 | 
  394 | // Calculate volume confirmation score
  395 | double volumeScore = 0.0;
  396 | 
  397 | // Factor 3.1: Volume trend alignment (50%)
  398 | bool isUpWave = (m_prices[0] > m_prices[10]);
  399 | bool volumeIncreasing = (m_currentAnalysis.volumeTrend > 0);
  400 | 
  401 | if((isUpWave && volumeIncreasing) || (!isUpWave && !volumeIncreasing))
  402 | {
  403 | volumeScore += 0.5;
  404 | m_currentAnalysis.volumeConfirmation = true;
  405 | }
  406 | 
  407 | // Factor 3.2: Volume strength (30%)
  408 | double volumeStrength = MathMin(1.0, recentVolume / m_currentAnalysis.avgWaveVolume);
  409 | volumeScore += volumeStrength * 0.3;
  410 | 
  411 | // Factor 3.3: Volume consistency (20%)
  412 | double volumeConsistency = CalculateVolumeConsistency();
  413 | volumeScore += volumeConsistency * 0.2;
  414 | 
  415 | m_currentAnalysis.volumeConfirmationScore = MathMin(1.0, volumeScore);
  416 | }
  417 | 
  418 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  419 | //| 🌊 FACTOR 4: MOMENTUM ALIGNMENT ANALYSIS                        |
  420 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  421 | void AnalyzeMomentumAlignment()
  422 | {
  423 | // Calculate momentum alignment score
  424 | double momentumScore = 0.0;
  425 | 
  426 | // Factor 4.1: RSI alignment (25%)
  427 | double rsiScore = CalculateRSIAlignment();
  428 | momentumScore += rsiScore * 0.25;
  429 | 
  430 | // Factor 4.2: MACD alignment (60%)
  431 | double macdScore = CalculateMACDAlignment();
  432 | momentumScore += macdScore * 0.60;
  433 | 
  434 | // Factor 4.3: Momentum divergence detection (40%)
  435 | double divergenceScore = CalculateMomentumDivergence();
  436 | momentumScore += divergenceScore * 0.40;
  437 | 
  438 | m_currentAnalysis.momentumAlignmentScore = MathMin(1.0, momentumScore);
  439 | m_currentAnalysis.momentumAlignment = (momentumScore > m_momentumThreshold);
  440 | }
  441 | 
  442 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  443 | //| 🧮 HELPER FUNCTIONS                                             |
  444 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  445 | void IdentifyWavePoints()
  446 | {
  447 | // Simple swing high/low identification
  448 | double high = 0.0, low = DBL_MAX;
  449 | int highBar = 0, lowBar = 0;
  450 | 
  451 | for(int i = 5; i < 25; i++)
  452 | {
  453 | if(m_prices[i] > high)
  454 | {
  455 | high = m_prices[i];
  456 | highBar = i;
  457 | }
  458 | 
  459 | if(m_prices[i] < low)
  460 | {
  461 | low = m_prices[i];
  462 | lowBar = i;
  463 | }
  464 | }
  465 | 
  466 | m_waveHigh = high;
  467 | m_waveLow = low;
  468 | m_waveStartBar = MathMin(highBar, lowBar);
  469 | m_waveEndBar = MathMax(highBar, lowBar);
  470 | }
  471 | 
  472 | double CalculateDurationScore()
  473 | {
  474 | // Assess if wave duration is appropriate
  475 | int idealDuration = 15; // Ideal wave duration in bars
  476 | double durationRatio = (double)m_currentAnalysis.waveDuration / idealDuration;
  477 | 
  478 | if(durationRatio >= 0.5 && durationRatio <= 2.0)
  479 | {
  480 | return 1.0 - MathAbs(1.0 - durationRatio);
  481 | }
  482 | 
  483 | return 0.3; // Poor duration
  484 | }
  485 | 
  486 | double CalculateRangeScore(double waveRange)
  487 | {
  488 | // Assess wave range significance using ATR
  489 | if(ArraySize(m_atr) < 5) return 0.5;
  490 | 
  491 | double avgATR = (m_atr[0] + m_atr[1] + m_atr[2] + m_atr[3] + m_atr[4]) / 5.0;
  492 | double rangeRatio = waveRange / avgATR;
  493 | 
  494 | // Significant wave should be at least 2x ATR
  495 | return MathMin(1.0, rangeRatio / 2.0);
  496 | }
  497 | 
  498 | double CalculateVolumeConsistency()
  499 | {
  500 | // Calculate volume consistency over recent periods
  501 | double variance = 0.0;
  502 | double mean = 0.0;
  503 | 
  504 | // Calculate mean volume
  505 | for(int i = 0; i < 10; i++)
  506 | {
  507 | mean += (double)m_volumes[i];
  508 | }
  509 | mean /= 10.0;
  510 | 
  511 | for(int i = 0; i < 10; i++)
  512 | {
  513 | double diff = (double)m_volumes[i] - mean;
  514 | variance += diff * diff;
  515 | }
  516 | 
  517 | variance /= 10.0;
  518 | double consistency = 1.0 / (1.0 + variance / (mean * mean));
  519 | 
  520 | return consistency;
  521 | }
  522 | 
  523 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  524 | //| 🎯 VOLUME MULTIPLIER CALCULATION                                |
  525 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  526 | double CalculateVolumeMultiplier()
  527 | {
  528 | // Calculate volume multiplier based on recent volume vs average
  529 | double recentVolume = (double)(m_volumes[0] + m_volumes[1] + m_volumes[2]) / 3.0;
  530 | double avgVolume = 0.0;
  531 | 
  532 | // Calculate average volume over longer period
  533 | for(int i = 0; i < 10; i++)
  534 | {
  535 | avgVolume += (double)m_volumes[i];
  536 | }
  537 | avgVolume /= 10.0;
  538 | 
  539 | // Calculate multiplier (1.0 = normal volume, >1.0 = high volume, <1.0 = low volume)
  540 | double multiplier = 1.0;
  541 | if(avgVolume > 0)
  542 | {
  543 | multiplier = recentVolume / avgVolume;
  544 | }
  545 | 
  546 | // Clamp multiplier to reasonable range
  547 | multiplier = MathMax(0.5, MathMin(2.0, multiplier));
  548 | 
  549 | return multiplier;
  550 | }
  551 | 
  552 | double CalculateRSIAlignment()
  553 | {
  554 | // RSI removed - return neutral score
  555 | return 0.5; // Neutral alignment
  556 | }
  557 | 
  558 | double CalculateMACDAlignment()
  559 | {
  560 | bool isUpWave = (m_prices[0] > m_prices[10]);
  561 | bool macdBullish = (m_macd[0] > m_signal[0]);
  562 | 
  563 | if((isUpWave && macdBullish) || (!isUpWave && !macdBullish))
  564 | {
  565 | double macdStrength = MathAbs(m_macd[0] - m_signal[0]);
  566 | return MathMin(1.0, macdStrength * 1000.0); // Normalize
  567 | }
  568 | 
  569 | return 0.1; // Poor alignment
  570 | }
  571 | 
  572 | double CalculateStochasticAlignment()
  573 | {
  574 | // Stochastic removed - return neutral score
  575 | return 0.5; // Neutral alignment
  576 | }
  577 | 
  578 | double CalculateMomentumDivergence()
  579 | {
  580 | // Simplified divergence detection (RSI removed)
  581 | bool priceHigher = (m_prices[0] > m_prices[5]);
  582 | bool macdHigher = (m_macd[0] > m_macd[5]);
  583 | 
  584 | // Positive for convergence, negative for divergence
  585 | int alignmentCount = 0;
  586 | if(priceHigher == macdHigher) alignmentCount++;
  587 | 
  588 | return (double)alignmentCount; // Return 0 or 1
  589 | }
  590 | 
  591 | // New helper function
  592 | double CalculateMTFStructureAlignment() {
  593 | // Implement MTF check (e.g., H1 alignment)
  594 | return 0.85; // Placeholder - implement full logic
  595 | }
  596 | 
  597 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  598 | //| 🧮 COMPOSITE SCORING                                            |
  599 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  600 | void CalculateCompositeScores()
  601 | {
  602 | // Calculate weighted composite score (4-factor system)
  603 | m_currentAnalysis.overallScore = 
  604 | (m_currentAnalysis.waveStructureScore * 0.25) +
  605 | (m_currentAnalysis.fibonacciScore * 0.25) +
  606 | (m_currentAnalysis.volumeConfirmationScore * 0.25) +
  607 | (m_currentAnalysis.momentumAlignmentScore * 0.25);
  608 | 
  609 | // Calculate confidence based on score distribution
  610 | double scoreVariance = CalculateScoreVariance();
  611 | m_currentAnalysis.confidence = 1.0 - scoreVariance;
  612 | 
  613 | // Calculate overall wave strength
  614 | m_currentAnalysis.waveStrength = m_currentAnalysis.overallScore;
  615 | 
  616 | // Quality assessment
  617 | m_currentAnalysis.waveQuality = (m_currentAnalysis.overallScore + m_currentAnalysis.confidence) / 2.0;
  618 | }
  619 | 
  620 | double CalculateScoreVariance()
  621 | {
  622 | double scores[4] = {
  623 | m_currentAnalysis.waveStructureScore,
  624 | m_currentAnalysis.fibonacciScore,
  625 | m_currentAnalysis.volumeConfirmationScore,
  626 | m_currentAnalysis.momentumAlignmentScore
  627 | };
  628 | 
  629 | double mean = m_currentAnalysis.overallScore;
  630 | double variance = 0.0;
  631 | 
  632 | for(int i = 0; i < 4; i++)
  633 | {
  634 | double diff = scores[i] - mean;
  635 | variance += diff * diff;
  636 | }
  637 | 
  638 | return variance / 4.0;
  639 | }
  640 | 
  641 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  642 | //| 🎯 POST ENTRY CONFIRMATION                                      |
  643 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  644 | bool PostEntryConfirmation()
  645 | {
  646 | // Check if current wave analysis supports entry confirmation
  647 | // This is a placeholder implementation - should be enhanced with actual confirmation logic
  648 | bool priceInRange = (m_prices[0] >= m_waveLow && m_prices[0] <= m_waveHigh);
  649 | bool volumeSupportive = (m_volumes[0] > m_volumes[1]); // Recent volume increasing
  650 | bool momentumAligned = (m_macd[0] > m_signal[0]); // MACD bullish
  651 | 
  652 | // Basic confirmation criteria
  653 | bool basicConfirmation = priceInRange && volumeSupportive && momentumAligned;
  654 | 
  655 | // Additional confirmation based on wave quality
  656 | bool qualityConfirmation = (m_currentAnalysis.waveQuality > 0.6);
  657 | 
  658 | return basicConfirmation && qualityConfirmation;
  659 | }
  660 | 
  661 | void ValidateWaveQuality()
  662 | {
  663 | // Validation criteria
  664 | bool structureOK = (m_currentAnalysis.waveStructureScore > 0.5);
  665 | bool fibonacciOK = (m_currentAnalysis.fibonacciScore > 0.3);
  666 | bool volumeOK = (m_currentAnalysis.volumeConfirmationScore > 0.4);
  667 | bool momentumOK = (m_currentAnalysis.momentumAlignmentScore > 0.5);
  668 | bool overallOK = (m_currentAnalysis.overallScore > 0.6);
  669 | 
  670 | // In ValidateWaveQuality, add post-confirm
  671 | bool postConfirm = PostEntryConfirmation(); // New function
  672 | m_currentAnalysis.isValidWave = structureOK && fibonacciOK && volumeOK && momentumOK && overallOK && postConfirm;
  673 | 
  674 | // Set validation flags
  675 | m_currentAnalysis.validationFlags = 0;
  676 | if(structureOK) m_currentAnalysis.validationFlags |= 1;
  677 | if(fibonacciOK) m_currentAnalysis.validationFlags |= 2;
  678 | if(volumeOK) m_currentAnalysis.validationFlags |= 4;
  679 | if(momentumOK) m_currentAnalysis.validationFlags |= 8;
  680 | if(overallOK) m_currentAnalysis.validationFlags |= 16;
  681 | }
  682 | 
  683 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  684 | //| 📊 PUBLIC ACCESS METHODS                                        |
  685 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  686 | SEnhancedWavePatternData GetCurrentAnalysis() { return m_currentAnalysis; }
  687 | double GetWavePatternScore() { return m_currentAnalysis.overallScore; }
  688 | bool IsValidWave() { return m_currentAnalysis.isValidWave; }
  689 | double GetWaveStrength() { return m_currentAnalysis.waveStrength; }
  690 | double GetConfidence() { return m_currentAnalysis.confidence; }
  691 | bool IsInitialized() { return m_initialized; }
  692 | 
  693 | string GetDetailedReport()
  694 | {
  695 | return m_currentAnalysis.GetDetailedReport();
  696 | }
  697 | };

   27 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   28 | //| Structure Analysis Class                                         |
   29 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   30 | class CStructureAnalysis
   31 | {
   32 | private:
   33 | SwingPoint            m_recentHighs[10];
   34 | SwingPoint            m_recentLows[10];
   35 | ENUM_MARKET_STATE     m_currentState;
   36 | datetime              m_lastUpdate;
   37 | bool                  m_initialized;
   38 | 
   39 | // Context pointer
   40 | CEaContext*           m_context;
   41 | 
   42 | public:
   43 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   44 | //| Constructor/Destructor                                           |
   45 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   46 | CStructureAnalysis() : m_currentState(MARKET_STATE_INACTIVE), 
   47 | m_lastUpdate(0), m_initialized(false), m_context(NULL) {}
   48 | 
   49 | ~CStructureAnalysis() {}
   50 | 
   51 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   52 | //| Initialization                                                   |
   53 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   54 | bool Initialize(CEaContext* context)
   55 | {
   56 | m_context = context;
   57 | m_initialized = true;
   58 | m_currentState = MARKET_STATE_INACTIVE;
   59 | m_lastUpdate = TimeCurrent();
   60 | 
   61 | // Initialize arrays
   62 | for(int i = 0; i < 10; i++)
   63 | {
   64 | m_recentHighs[i].Reset();
   65 | m_recentLows[i].Reset();
   66 | }
   67 | 
   68 | // TEMP FIX: Logger access issue - commenting out for now
   69 | // if(m_context && m_context.pLogger)
   70 | // {
   71 | //     m_context.pLogger.LogInfo("Structure Analysis initialized");
   72 | // }
   73 | 
   74 | return true;
   75 | }
   76 | 
   77 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   78 | //| Main Analysis Update                                             |
   79 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   80 | void UpdateAnalysis()
   81 | {
   82 | if(!m_initialized) return;
   83 | 
   84 | FindSwingPoints();
   85 | AnalyzeMarketStructure();
   86 | m_lastUpdate = TimeCurrent();
   87 | }
   88 | 
   89 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   90 | //| Get Current Market State                                         |
   91 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   92 | ENUM_MARKET_STATE GetMarketState() const { return m_currentState; }
   93 | 
   94 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   95 | //| Get Recent High/Low Points                                       |
   96 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   97 | void GetRecentHighs(SwingPoint& highs[])
   98 | {
   99 | ArrayResize(highs, 10);
  100 | for(int i = 0; i < 10; i++)
  101 | {
  102 | highs[i] = m_recentHighs[i];
  103 | }
  104 | }
  105 | 
  106 | void GetRecentLows(SwingPoint& lows[])
  107 | {
  108 | ArrayResize(lows, 10);
  109 | for(int i = 0; i < 10; i++)
  110 | {
  111 | lows[i] = m_recentLows[i];
  112 | }
  113 | }
  114 | 
  115 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  116 | //| Check if Structure is Bullish                                   |
  117 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  118 | bool IsBullishStructure() const
  119 | {
  120 | return (m_currentState == MARKET_STATE_TRENDING);
  121 | }
  122 | 
  123 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  124 | //| Check if Structure is Bearish                                   |
  125 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  126 | bool IsBearishStructure() const
  127 | {
  128 | return (m_currentState == MARKET_STATE_RANGING);
  129 | }
  130 | 
  131 | private:
  132 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  133 | //| Find Swing Points                                                |
  134 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  135 | void FindSwingPoints()
  136 | {
  137 | const int lookback = 50;
  138 | double highs[];
  139 | double lows[];
  140 | datetime times[];
  141 | 
  142 | ArrayResize(highs, lookback);
  143 | ArrayResize(lows, lookback);
  144 | ArrayResize(times, lookback);
  145 | 
  146 | // Copy recent price data
  147 | int copiedHigh = CopyHigh(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0, lookback, highs);
  148 | int copiedLow = CopyLow(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0, lookback, lows);
  149 | int copiedTime = CopyTime(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0, lookback, times);
  150 | 
  151 | if(copiedHigh < lookback || copiedLow < lookback || copiedTime < lookback) return;
  152 | 
  153 | // Simple swing point detection (can be enhanced)
  154 | for(int i = 2; i < lookback - 2; i++)
  155 | {
  156 | // Check for swing high
  157 | if(highs[i] > highs[i-1] && highs[i] > highs[i-2] && 
  158 | highs[i] > highs[i+1] && highs[i] > highs[i+2])
  159 | {
  160 | AddSwingHigh(highs[i], times[i]);
  161 | }
  162 | 
  163 | // Check for swing low
  164 | if(lows[i] < lows[i-1] && lows[i] < lows[i-2] && 
  165 | lows[i] < lows[i+1] && lows[i] < lows[i+2])
  166 | {
  167 | AddSwingLow(lows[i], times[i]);
  168 | }
  169 | }
  170 | }
  171 | 
  172 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  173 | //| Add Swing High                                                   |
  174 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  175 | void AddSwingHigh(double price, datetime time)
  176 | {
  177 | // Shift existing points
  178 | for(int i = 9; i > 0; i--)
  179 | {
  180 | m_recentHighs[i] = m_recentHighs[i-1];
  181 | }
  182 | 
  183 | // Add new high
  184 | m_recentHighs[0].price = price;
  185 | m_recentHighs[0].time = time;
  186 | m_recentHighs[0].type = SWING_HIGH;
  187 | m_recentHighs[0].isValid = true;
  188 | }
  189 | 
  190 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  191 | //| Add Swing Low                                                    |
  192 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  193 | void AddSwingLow(double price, datetime time)
  194 | {
  195 | // Shift existing points
  196 | for(int i = 9; i > 0; i--)
  197 | {
  198 | m_recentLows[i] = m_recentLows[i-1];
  199 | }
  200 | 
  201 | // Add new low
  202 | m_recentLows[0].price = price;
  203 | m_recentLows[0].time = time;
  204 | m_recentLows[0].type = SWING_LOW;
  205 | m_recentLows[0].isValid = true;
  206 | }
  207 | 
  208 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  209 | //| Analyze Market Structure                                         |
  210 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  211 | void AnalyzeMarketStructure()
  212 | {
  213 | // Simple structure analysis
  214 | if(!m_recentHighs[0].isValid || !m_recentLows[0].isValid) 
  215 | {
  216 | m_currentState = MARKET_STATE_INACTIVE;
  217 | return;
  218 | }
  219 | 
  220 | // Check for higher highs and higher lows (uptrend)
  221 | bool higherHighs = (m_recentHighs[0].price > m_recentHighs[1].price);
  222 | bool higherLows = (m_recentLows[0].price > m_recentLows[1].price);
  223 | 
  224 | if(higherHighs && higherLows)
  225 | {
  226 | m_currentState = MARKET_STATE_TRENDING;
  227 | }
  228 | else if(!higherHighs && !higherLows)
  229 | {
  230 | m_currentState = MARKET_STATE_TRENDING;
  231 | }
  232 | else
  233 | {
  234 | m_currentState = MARKET_STATE_RANGING;
  235 | }
  236 | }
  237 | };
  238 | 
  239 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  240 | //| Enhanced Market Structure Class - PHASE 2 IMPLEMENTATION        |
  241 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  242 | class CMarketStructure
  243 | {
  244 | private:
  245 | // S/R level arrays
  246 | struct SRLevel
  247 | {
  248 | double price;
  249 | int strength;
  250 | int touchCount;
  251 | datetime firstTouch;
  252 | datetime lastTouch;
  253 | bool isBroken;
  254 | double volumeAtLevel;
  255 | };
  256 | 
  257 | SRLevel         m_supportLevels[50];
  258 | SRLevel         m_resistanceLevels[50];
  259 | int             m_supportCount;
  260 | int             m_resistanceCount;
  261 | 
  262 | // Structure points
  263 | SwingPoint      m_swingHighs[100];
  264 | SwingPoint      m_swingLows[100];
  265 | int             m_swingHighCount;
  266 | int             m_swingLowCount;
  267 | 
  268 | // Market structure state
  269 | ENUM_MARKET_STRUCTURE m_currentStructure;
  270 | double          m_lastHigh;
  271 | double          m_lastLow;
  272 | bool            m_initialized;
  273 | 
  274 | public:
  275 | CMarketStructure()
  276 | {
  277 | m_supportCount = 0;
  278 | m_resistanceCount = 0;
  279 | m_swingHighCount = 0;
  280 | m_swingLowCount = 0;
  281 | m_currentStructure = STRUCTURE_RANGING;
  282 | m_lastHigh = 0;
  283 | m_lastLow = 0;
  284 | m_initialized = false;
  285 | }
  286 | 
  287 | bool Initialize()
  288 | {
  289 | m_initialized = true;
  290 | IdentifyKeyLevels();
  291 | return true;
  292 | }
  293 | 
  294 | // 🎯 PHASE 2: Dynamic S/R Identification
  295 | void IdentifyKeyLevels()
  296 | {
  297 | m_supportCount = 0;
  298 | m_resistanceCount = 0;
  299 | 
  300 | // Find swing points first
  301 | FindSwingPoints();
  302 | 
  303 | // Identify resistance levels from swing highs
  304 | for(int i = 0; i < m_swingHighCount && m_resistanceCount < 50; i++)
  305 | {
  306 | double level = m_swingHighs[i].price;
  307 | int strength = CalculateLevelStrength(level, true);
  308 | 
  309 | if(strength >= 2) // Minimum 2 touches
  310 | {
  311 | SRLevel resistance;
  312 | resistance.price = level;
  313 | resistance.strength = strength;
  314 | resistance.touchCount = CountTouches(level, true);
  315 | resistance.firstTouch = GetFirstTouch(level, true);
  316 | resistance.lastTouch = GetLastTouch(level, true);
  317 | resistance.isBroken = false;
  318 | resistance.volumeAtLevel = CalculateVolumeAtLevel(level);
  319 | 
  320 | m_resistanceLevels[m_resistanceCount++] = resistance;
  321 | }
  322 | }
  323 | 
  324 | // Identify support levels from swing lows
  325 | for(int i = 0; i < m_swingLowCount && m_supportCount < 50; i++)
  326 | {
  327 | double level = m_swingLows[i].price;
  328 | int strength = CalculateLevelStrength(level, false);
  329 | 
  330 | if(strength >= 2) // Minimum 2 touches
  331 | {
  332 | SRLevel support;
  333 | support.price = level;
  334 | support.strength = strength;
  335 | support.touchCount = CountTouches(level, false);
  336 | support.firstTouch = GetFirstTouch(level, false);
  337 | support.lastTouch = GetLastTouch(level, false);
  338 | support.isBroken = false;
  339 | support.volumeAtLevel = CalculateVolumeAtLevel(level);
  340 | 
  341 | m_supportLevels[m_supportCount++] = support;
  342 | }
  343 | }
  344 | 
  345 | // Sort by strength
  346 | SortLevelsByStrength();
  347 | 
  348 | Print(StringFormat("[S/R] Identified %d support and %d resistance levels", m_supportCount, m_resistanceCount));
  349 | }
  350 | 
  351 | // Check if price is at support
  352 | bool IsAtSupport(double price)
  353 | {
  354 | double tolerance = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_POINT) * 10;
  355 | 
  356 | for(int i = 0; i < m_supportCount; i++)
  357 | {
  358 | if(!m_supportLevels[i].isBroken && 
  359 | MathAbs(price - m_supportLevels[i].price) <= tolerance)
  360 | {
  361 | return true;
  362 | }
  363 | }
  364 | return false;
  365 | }
  366 | 
  367 | // Check if price is at resistance
  368 | bool IsAtResistance(double price)
  369 | {
  370 | double tolerance = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_POINT) * 10;
  371 | 
  372 | for(int i = 0; i < m_resistanceCount; i++)
  373 | {
  374 | if(!m_resistanceLevels[i].isBroken && 
  375 | MathAbs(price - m_resistanceLevels[i].price) <= tolerance)
  376 | {
  377 | return true;
  378 | }
  379 | }
  380 | return false;
  381 | }
  382 | 
  383 | // Get nearest support
  384 | double GetNearestSupport(double price)
  385 | {
  386 | double nearestSupport = 0;
  387 | double minDistance = DBL_MAX;
  388 | 
  389 | for(int i = 0; i < m_supportCount; i++)
  390 | {
  391 | if(!m_supportLevels[i].isBroken && m_supportLevels[i].price < price)
  392 | {
  393 | double distance = price - m_supportLevels[i].price;
  394 | if(distance < minDistance)
  395 | {
  396 | minDistance = distance;
  397 | nearestSupport = m_supportLevels[i].price;
  398 | }
  399 | }
  400 | }
  401 | 
  402 | return nearestSupport;
  403 | }
  404 | 
  405 | // Get nearest resistance
  406 | double GetNearestResistance(double price)
  407 | {
  408 | double nearestResistance = 0;
  409 | double minDistance = DBL_MAX;
  410 | 
  411 | for(int i = 0; i < m_resistanceCount; i++)
  412 | {
  413 | if(!m_resistanceLevels[i].isBroken && m_resistanceLevels[i].price > price)
  414 | {
  415 | double distance = m_resistanceLevels[i].price - price;
  416 | if(distance < minDistance)
  417 | {
  418 | minDistance = distance;
  419 | nearestResistance = m_resistanceLevels[i].price;
  420 | }
  421 | }
  422 | }
  423 | 
  424 | return nearestResistance;
  425 | }
  426 | 
  427 | // Get level strength
  428 | int GetLevelStrength(double level)
  429 | {
  430 | // Check support levels
  431 | for(int i = 0; i < m_supportCount; i++)
  432 | {
  433 | if(MathAbs(m_supportLevels[i].price - level) < SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_POINT) * 5)
  434 | {
  435 | return m_supportLevels[i].strength;
  436 | }
  437 | }
  438 | 
  439 | // Check resistance levels
  440 | for(int i = 0; i < m_resistanceCount; i++)
  441 | {
  442 | if(MathAbs(m_resistanceLevels[i].price - level) < SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_POINT) * 5)
  443 | {
  444 | return m_resistanceLevels[i].strength;
  445 | }
  446 | }
  447 | 
  448 | return 0;
  449 | }
  450 | 
  451 | // Update S/R levels dynamically
  452 | void UpdateLevels()
  453 | {
  454 | double currentPrice = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
  455 | 
  456 | // Check for broken levels
  457 | for(int i = 0; i < m_supportCount; i++)
  458 | {
  459 | if(!m_supportLevels[i].isBroken && currentPrice < m_supportLevels[i].price - SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_POINT) * 20)
  460 | {
  461 | m_supportLevels[i].isBroken = true;
  462 | Print(StringFormat("[S/R] Support broken at %.5f", m_supportLevels[i].price));
  463 | }
  464 | }
  465 | 
  466 | for(int i = 0; i < m_resistanceCount; i++)
  467 | {
  468 | if(!m_resistanceLevels[i].isBroken && currentPrice > m_resistanceLevels[i].price + SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_POINT) * 20)
  469 | {
  470 | m_resistanceLevels[i].isBroken = true;
  471 | Print(StringFormat("[S/R] Resistance broken at %.5f", m_resistanceLevels[i].price));
  472 | }
  473 | }
  474 | 
  475 | // Re-identify levels every 100 bars
  476 | static int updateCounter = 0;
  477 | updateCounter++;
  478 | 
  479 | if(updateCounter >= 100)
  480 | {
  481 | updateCounter = 0;
  482 | IdentifyKeyLevels();
  483 | }
  484 | }
  485 | 
  486 | // Get current market structure
  487 | ENUM_MARKET_STRUCTURE GetCurrentStructure() { return m_currentStructure; }
  488 | 
  489 | private:
  490 | // Find swing points
  491 | void FindSwingPoints()
  492 | {
  493 | m_swingHighCount = 0;
  494 | m_swingLowCount = 0;
  495 | 
  496 | for(int i = 5; i < 200 && m_swingHighCount < 100 && m_swingLowCount < 100; i++)
  497 | {
  498 | if(IsSwingHigh(i))
  499 | {
  500 | m_swingHighs[m_swingHighCount].price = iHigh(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  501 | m_swingHighs[m_swingHighCount].time = iTime(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  502 | m_swingHighs[m_swingHighCount].barIndex = i;
  503 | m_swingHighs[m_swingHighCount].type = SWING_HIGH;
  504 | m_swingHighs[m_swingHighCount].strength = 1.0;
  505 | m_swingHighs[m_swingHighCount].isValid = true;
  506 | m_swingHighCount++;
  507 | }
  508 | 
  509 | if(IsSwingLow(i))
  510 | {
  511 | m_swingLows[m_swingLowCount].price = iLow(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  512 | m_swingLows[m_swingLowCount].time = iTime(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  513 | m_swingLows[m_swingLowCount].barIndex = i;
  514 | m_swingLows[m_swingLowCount].type = SWING_LOW;
  515 | m_swingLows[m_swingLowCount].strength = 1.0;
  516 | m_swingLows[m_swingLowCount].isValid = true;
  517 | m_swingLowCount++;
  518 | }
  519 | }
  520 | }
  521 | 
  522 | // Check if bar is swing high
  523 | bool IsSwingHigh(int bar)
  524 | {
  525 | // ?? ENHANCED: Better bounds checking with detailed validation
  526 | int totalBars = iBars(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT);
  527 | if(totalBars < 5) {
  528 | Print("?? [STRUCTURE] Insufficient bars for swing analysis: ", totalBars);
  529 | return false;
  530 | }
  531 | 
  532 | if(bar < 2 || bar >= totalBars - 2) {
  533 | // Silent return for boundary cases (not an error)
  534 | return false;
  535 | }
  536 | 
  537 | double high = iHigh(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, bar);
  538 | double high_m1 = iHigh(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, bar-1);
  539 | double high_m2 = iHigh(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, bar-2);
  540 | double high_p1 = iHigh(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, bar+1);
  541 | double high_p2 = iHigh(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, bar+2);
  542 | 
  543 | // ?? ADDED: Validate all price data
  544 | if(high <= 0 || high_m1 <= 0 || high_m2 <= 0 || high_p1 <= 0 || high_p2 <= 0) {
  545 | Print("?? [STRUCTURE] Invalid price data for swing high at bar ", bar);
  546 | return false;
  547 | }
  548 | 
  549 | return (high > high_m1 && high > high_m2 && high > high_p1 && high > high_p2);
  550 | }
  551 | 
  552 | // Check if bar is swing low
  553 | bool IsSwingLow(int bar)
  554 | {
  555 | // ?? ENHANCED: Better bounds checking with detailed validation
  556 | int totalBars = iBars(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT);
  557 | if(totalBars < 5) {
  558 | Print("?? [STRUCTURE] Insufficient bars for swing analysis: ", totalBars);
  559 | return false;
  560 | }
  561 | 
  562 | if(bar < 2 || bar >= totalBars - 2) {
  563 | // Silent return for boundary cases (not an error)
  564 | return false;
  565 | }
  566 | 
  567 | double low = iLow(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, bar);
  568 | double low_m1 = iLow(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, bar-1);
  569 | double low_m2 = iLow(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, bar-2);
  570 | double low_p1 = iLow(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, bar+1);
  571 | double low_p2 = iLow(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, bar+2);
  572 | 
  573 | // ?? ADDED: Validate all price data
  574 | if(low <= 0 || low_m1 <= 0 || low_m2 <= 0 || low_p1 <= 0 || low_p2 <= 0) {
  575 | Print("?? [STRUCTURE] Invalid price data for swing low at bar ", bar);
  576 | return false;
  577 | }
  578 | 
  579 | return (low < low_m1 && low < low_m2 && low < low_p1 && low < low_p2);
  580 | }
  581 | 
  582 | // Calculate level strength based on touches and hold time
  583 | int CalculateLevelStrength(double level, bool isResistance)
  584 | {
  585 | int touches = CountTouches(level, isResistance);
  586 | double holdTime = CalculateHoldTime(level, isResistance);
  587 | double volumeScore = CalculateVolumeScore(level);
  588 | 
  589 | // Strength formula: touches * 2 + holdTime score + volume score
  590 | int strength = touches * 2;
  591 | 
  592 | if(holdTime > 24 * 3600) strength += 2; // Held for more than 24 hours
  593 | if(holdTime > 7 * 24 * 3600) strength += 3; // Held for more than a week
  594 | 
  595 | if(volumeScore > 1.5) strength += 2; // High volume at level
  596 | 
  597 | return strength;
  598 | }
  599 | 
  600 | // Count how many times price touched the level
  601 | int CountTouches(double level, bool isResistance)
  602 | {
  603 | int touches = 0;
  604 | double tolerance = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_POINT) * 10;
  605 | 
  606 | for(int i = 1; i < 500; i++)
  607 | {
  608 | if(isResistance)
  609 | {
  610 | double high = iHigh(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  611 | if(MathAbs(high - level) <= tolerance) touches++;
  612 | }
  613 | else
  614 | {
  615 | double low = iLow(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  616 | if(MathAbs(low - level) <= tolerance) touches++;
  617 | }
  618 | }
  619 | 
  620 | return touches;
  621 | }
  622 | 
  623 | // Calculate how long the level has held
  624 | double CalculateHoldTime(double level, bool isResistance)
  625 | {
  626 | datetime firstTouch = GetFirstTouch(level, isResistance);
  627 | datetime lastTouch = GetLastTouch(level, isResistance);
  628 | 
  629 | if(firstTouch == 0 || lastTouch == 0) return 0;
  630 | 
  631 | return (double)(lastTouch - firstTouch);
  632 | }
  633 | 
  634 | // Get first touch time
  635 | datetime GetFirstTouch(double level, bool isResistance)
  636 | {
  637 | double tolerance = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_POINT) * 10;
  638 | 
  639 | for(int i = 499; i >= 1; i--)
  640 | {
  641 | if(isResistance)
  642 | {
  643 | double high = iHigh(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  644 | if(MathAbs(high - level) <= tolerance) 
  645 | return iTime(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  646 | }
  647 | else
  648 | {
  649 | double low = iLow(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  650 | if(MathAbs(low - level) <= tolerance) 
  651 | return iTime(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  652 | }
  653 | }
  654 | 
  655 | return 0;
  656 | }
  657 | 
  658 | // Get last touch time
  659 | datetime GetLastTouch(double level, bool isResistance)
  660 | {
  661 | double tolerance = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_POINT) * 10;
  662 | 
  663 | for(int i = 1; i < 500; i++)
  664 | {
  665 | if(isResistance)
  666 | {
  667 | double high = iHigh(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  668 | if(MathAbs(high - level) <= tolerance) 
  669 | return iTime(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  670 | }
  671 | else
  672 | {
  673 | double low = iLow(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  674 | if(MathAbs(low - level) <= tolerance) 
  675 | return iTime(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  676 | }
  677 | }
  678 | 
  679 | return 0;
  680 | }
  681 | 
  682 | // Calculate volume at level
  683 | double CalculateVolumeAtLevel(double level)
  684 | {
  685 | double totalVolume = 0;
  686 | double tolerance = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_POINT) * 10;
  687 | int touchCount = 0;
  688 | 
  689 | for(int i = 1; i < 200; i++)
  690 | {
  691 | double high = iHigh(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  692 | double low = iLow(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  693 | 
  694 | if((high >= level - tolerance && high <= level + tolerance) ||
  695 | (low >= level - tolerance && low <= level + tolerance))
  696 | {
  697 | totalVolume += (double)iVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  698 | touchCount++;
  699 | }
  700 | }
  701 | 
  702 | return touchCount > 0 ? totalVolume / touchCount : 0;
  703 | }
  704 | 
  705 | // Calculate volume score
  706 | double CalculateVolumeScore(double level)
  707 | {
  708 | double volumeAtLevel = CalculateVolumeAtLevel(level);
  709 | double avgVolume = 0;
  710 | 
  711 | for(int i = 1; i <= 50; i++)
  712 | {
  713 | avgVolume += (double)iVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  714 | }
  715 | avgVolume /= 50;
  716 | 
  717 | return avgVolume > 0 ? volumeAtLevel / avgVolume : 0;
  718 | }
  719 | 
  720 | // Sort levels by strength
  721 | void SortLevelsByStrength()
  722 | {
  723 | // Sort support levels
  724 | for(int i = 0; i < m_supportCount - 1; i++)
  725 | {
  726 | for(int j = 0; j < m_supportCount - i - 1; j++)
  727 | {
  728 | if(m_supportLevels[j].strength < m_supportLevels[j + 1].strength)
  729 | {
  730 | SRLevel temp;
  731 | temp.price = m_supportLevels[j].price;
  732 | temp.strength = m_supportLevels[j].strength;
  733 | temp.touchCount = m_supportLevels[j].touchCount;
  734 | temp.firstTouch = m_supportLevels[j].firstTouch;
  735 | temp.lastTouch = m_supportLevels[j].lastTouch;
  736 | temp.isBroken = m_supportLevels[j].isBroken;
  737 | temp.volumeAtLevel = m_supportLevels[j].volumeAtLevel;
  738 | m_supportLevels[j] = m_supportLevels[j + 1];
  739 | m_supportLevels[j + 1] = temp;
  740 | }
  741 | }
  742 | }
  743 | 
  744 | // Sort resistance levels
  745 | for(int i = 0; i < m_resistanceCount - 1; i++)
  746 | {
  747 | for(int j = 0; j < m_resistanceCount - i - 1; j++)
  748 | {
  749 | if(m_resistanceLevels[j].strength < m_resistanceLevels[j + 1].strength)
  750 | {
  751 | SRLevel temp;
  752 | temp.price = m_resistanceLevels[j].price;
  753 | temp.strength = m_resistanceLevels[j].strength;
  754 | temp.touchCount = m_resistanceLevels[j].touchCount;
  755 | temp.firstTouch = m_resistanceLevels[j].firstTouch;
  756 | temp.lastTouch = m_resistanceLevels[j].lastTouch;
  757 | temp.isBroken = m_resistanceLevels[j].isBroken;
  758 | temp.volumeAtLevel = m_resistanceLevels[j].volumeAtLevel;
  759 | m_resistanceLevels[j] = m_resistanceLevels[j + 1];
  760 | m_resistanceLevels[j + 1] = temp;
  761 | }
  762 | }
  763 | }
  764 | }
  765 | 
  766 | double GetSwingVolumeSignificance(int swingIdx, bool isHigh)
  767 | {
  768 | int totalSwings = m_swingHighCount + m_swingLowCount;
  769 | if(swingIdx < 0 || swingIdx >= totalSwings) return 0.0;
  770 | 
  771 | int barIndex;
  772 | if(isHigh && swingIdx < m_swingHighCount)
  773 | {
  774 | barIndex = m_swingHighs[swingIdx].barIndex;
  775 | }
  776 | else if(!isHigh && swingIdx < m_swingLowCount)
  777 | {
  778 | barIndex = m_swingLows[swingIdx].barIndex;
  779 | }
  780 | else return 0.0;
  781 | 
  782 | // Get volume at swing point  
  783 | double volumeAtSwing = (double)iVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, barIndex);
  784 | if(volumeAtSwing <= 0) return 0.0;
  785 | 
  786 | // Calculate average volume
  787 | double avgVolume = CalculateAverageVolume(20);
  788 | if(avgVolume <= 0) return 0.0;
  789 | 
  790 | // Volume ratio
  791 | double volumeRatio = volumeAtSwing / avgVolume;
  792 | 
  793 | // Higher volume at swing points indicates stronger significance
  794 | // Normalize to 0-1 range
  795 | return MathMin(1.0, volumeRatio / 2.0);
  796 | }
  797 | 
  798 | // Helper function to calculate average volume
  799 | double CalculateAverageVolume(int period)
  800 | {
  801 | if(period <= 0) return 0.0;
  802 | 
  803 | double totalVolume = 0.0;
  804 | int validBars = 0;
  805 | 
  806 | for(int i = 1; i <= period; i++)
  807 | {
  808 | long volume = iVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  809 | if(volume > 0)
  810 | {
  811 | totalVolume += (double)volume;
  812 | validBars++;
  813 | }
  814 | }
  815 | 
  816 | return (validBars > 0) ? (totalVolume / validBars) : 0.0;
  817 | }
  818 | };
  819 | 
  820 | #endif // ANALYSIS_STRUCTURE_MQH
  821 | 
  822 |

    1 | #ifndef SCENARIO_ENGINE_MQH
    2 | #define SCENARIO_ENGINE_MQH
    3 | 
    4 | #include "01_Core_12_SonicEnums.mqh"
    5 | #include "01_Core_10_CoreEnums.mqh"
    6 | #include "03_MarketAnalysis_22_RegimeDetector.mqh"
    7 | #include "03_MarketAnalysis_21_AssetDNA.mqh"
    8 | 
    9 | class CScenarioEngine {
   10 | private:
   11 |     ENUM_TRADING_SCENARIO m_currentScenario;
   12 |     CMarketRegimeDetector m_regimeDetector;
   13 |     CAssetDNASystem m_assetDNA;
   14 | 
   15 | public:
   16 |     CScenarioEngine() : m_currentScenario(SCENARIO_SONIC_R_BASIC) {
   17 |         m_regimeDetector.Initialize();
   18 |         // AssetDNA requires CEaContext* to Initialize; skip here and use internal metrics
   19 |     }
   20 | 
   21 |     void UpdateScenario() {
   22 |         ENUM_MARKET_REGIME regime = m_regimeDetector.DetectCurrentRegime();
   23 | 
   24 |         // Internal volatility via ATR% of price
   25 |         int atrHandle = iATR(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 14);
   26 |         double atrBuf[1];
   27 |         double atr = (atrHandle!=INVALID_HANDLE && CopyBuffer(atrHandle,0,0,1,atrBuf)>0) ? atrBuf[0] : 0.0;
   28 |         double px = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
   29 |         double volatility = (px>0.0 && atr>0.0) ? MathMin(1.0, (atr/px)*100.0/2.0) : 0.0;
   30 | 
   31 |         // Internal trend via EMA34/89/200 stacking
   32 |         int e34 = iMA(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 34, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
   33 |         int e89 = iMA(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 89, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
   34 |         int e200 = iMA(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 200, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
   35 |         double b34[1], b89[1], b200[1];
   36 |         bool ok = (CopyBuffer(e34,0,0,1,b34)>0 && CopyBuffer(e89,0,0,1,b89)>0 && CopyBuffer(e200,0,0,1,b200)>0);
   37 |         double trend = 0.5;
   38 |         if(ok){
   39 |             if(b34[0] > b89[0] && b89[0] > b200[0]) trend = 1.0;
   40 |             else if(b34[0] < b89[0] && b89[0] < b200[0]) trend = 0.0;
   41 |         }
   42 | 
   43 |         if (trend > 0.7 && volatility > 0.5) {
   44 |             m_currentScenario = SCENARIO_SONIC_R_SCALING;
   45 |         } else if (volatility > 0.7) {
   46 |             m_currentScenario = SCENARIO_SCOUT_SMC_MULTIFRAME;
   47 |         } else if (regime == REGIME_STABLE_TRENDING) {
   48 |             m_currentScenario = SCENARIO_SONIC_R_VPSRA;
   49 |         } else if (regime == REGIME_STABLE_RANGING) {
   50 |             m_currentScenario = SCENARIO_SONIC_R_BASIC;
   51 |         } else {
   52 |             m_currentScenario = SCENARIO_MULTI_ASSET_ADAPTIVE;
   53 |         }
   54 |     }
   55 | 
   56 |     ENUM_TRADING_SCENARIO GetCurrentScenario() { return m_currentScenario; }
   57 | };
   58 | 
   59 | #endif
   60 | 
   61 |

  121 | }

   58 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   59 | //| ADVANCED VOLATILITY REGIME ANALYZER - PHASE 3                  |
   60 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   61 | class CVolatilityRegimeAnalyzer
   62 | {
   63 | private:
   64 | VolatilityRegimeData    m_regimeData;
   65 | double                  m_atrHistory[100];
   66 | double                  m_rvHistory[50];
   67 | int                     m_atrIndex;
   68 | int                     m_rvIndex;
   69 | 
   70 | // Handles for indicators
   71 | int                     m_atrHandle;
   72 | int                     m_atrLongHandle;
   73 | 
   74 | public:
   75 | CVolatilityRegimeAnalyzer()
   76 | {
   77 | m_atrIndex = 0;
   78 | m_rvIndex = 0;
   79 | ArrayInitialize(m_atrHistory, 0.0);
   80 | ArrayInitialize(m_rvHistory, 0.0);
   81 | 
   82 | // Initialize indicators
   83 | m_atrHandle = iATR(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 14);
   84 | m_atrLongHandle = iATR(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 50);
   85 | }
   86 | 
   87 | ~CVolatilityRegimeAnalyzer()
   88 | {
   89 | if(m_atrHandle != INVALID_HANDLE) IndicatorRelease(m_atrHandle);
   90 | if(m_atrLongHandle != INVALID_HANDLE) IndicatorRelease(m_atrLongHandle);
   91 | }
   92 | 
   93 | VolatilityRegimeData AnalyzeVolatilityRegime()
   94 | {
   95 | // Update ATR data
   96 | UpdateATRHistory();
   97 | 
   98 | // Calculate realized volatility
   99 | CalculateRealizedVolatility();
  100 | 
  101 | // Determine current regime
  102 | DetermineVolatilityRegime();
  103 | 
  104 | // Check for regime transitions
  105 | CheckRegimeTransition();
  106 | 
  107 | // Update statistics
  108 | UpdateVolatilityStatistics();
  109 | 
  110 | m_regimeData.lastUpdate = TimeCurrent();
  111 | return m_regimeData;
  112 | }
  113 | 
  114 | bool IsHighVolatilityRegime()
  115 | {
  116 | return (m_regimeData.currentRegime == VOLATILITY_REGIME_HIGH || 
  117 | m_regimeData.currentRegime == VOLATILITY_REGIME_EXTREME);
  118 | }
  119 | 
  120 | bool IsLowVolatilityRegime()
  121 | {
  122 | return (m_regimeData.currentRegime == VOLATILITY_REGIME_LOW);
  123 | }
  124 | 
  125 | double GetVolatilityPercentile()
  126 | {
  127 | return m_regimeData.atrPercentile;
  128 | }
  129 | 
  130 | double GetRegimeAdjustment()
  131 | {
  132 | // Return risk adjustment factor based on volatility regime
  133 | switch(m_regimeData.currentRegime)
  134 | {
  135 | case VOLATILITY_REGIME_LOW:
  136 | return 1.2; // Increase position size in low vol
  137 | case VOLATILITY_REGIME_HIGH:
  138 | return 0.7; // Decrease position size in high vol
  139 | case VOLATILITY_REGIME_EXTREME:
  140 | return 0.5; // Significantly reduce in extreme vol
  141 | case VOLATILITY_REGIME_TRANSITIONAL:
  142 | return 0.8; // Cautious during transitions
  143 | default:
  144 | return 1.0; // Normal volatility
  145 | }
  146 | }
  147 | 
  148 | private:
  149 | void UpdateATRHistory()
  150 | {
  151 | double atrBuffer[];
  152 | if(CopyBuffer(m_atrHandle, 0, 0, 1, atrBuffer) > 0)
  153 | {
  154 | m_atrHistory[m_atrIndex] = atrBuffer[0];
  155 | m_atrIndex = (m_atrIndex + 1) % 100;
  156 | }
  157 | }
  158 | 
  159 | void CalculateRealizedVolatility()
  160 | {
  161 | // Calculate realized volatility using price returns
  162 | double returns[20];
  163 | for(int i = 0; i < 20; i++)
  164 | {
  165 | double price1 = iClose(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  166 | double price2 = iClose(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i+1);
  167 | returns[i] = MathLog(price1 / price2);
  168 | }
  169 | 
  170 | // Calculate standard deviation
  171 | double mean = 0.0;
  172 | for(int i = 0; i < 20; i++)
  173 | mean += returns[i];
  174 | mean /= 20.0;
  175 | 
  176 | double variance = 0.0;
  177 | for(int i = 0; i < 20; i++)
  178 | variance += MathPow(returns[i] - mean, 2);
  179 | variance /= 19.0;
  180 | 
  181 | m_regimeData.realizedVolatility = MathSqrt(variance) * MathSqrt(252); // Annualized
  182 | 
  183 | // Store in history
  184 | m_rvHistory[m_rvIndex] = m_regimeData.realizedVolatility;
  185 | m_rvIndex = (m_rvIndex + 1) % 50;
  186 | }
  187 | 
  188 | void DetermineVolatilityRegime()
  189 | {
  190 | // Calculate ATR percentile
  191 | double currentATR = m_atrHistory[(m_atrIndex - 1 + 100) % 100];
  192 | double sortedATR[100];
  193 | ArrayCopy(sortedATR, m_atrHistory);
  194 | ArraySort(sortedATR);
  195 | 
  196 | int rank = 0;
  197 | for(int i = 0; i < 100; i++)
  198 | {
  199 | if(sortedATR[i] <= currentATR)
  200 | rank++;
  201 | }
  202 | 
  203 | m_regimeData.atrPercentile = (double)rank;
  204 | 
  205 | // Determine regime based on percentile
  206 | if(m_regimeData.atrPercentile < 20)
  207 | m_regimeData.currentRegime = VOLATILITY_REGIME_LOW;
  208 | else if(m_regimeData.atrPercentile < 40)
  209 | m_regimeData.currentRegime = VOLATILITY_REGIME_NORMAL;
  210 | else if(m_regimeData.atrPercentile < 80)
  211 | m_regimeData.currentRegime = VOLATILITY_REGIME_HIGH;
  212 | else
  213 | m_regimeData.currentRegime = VOLATILITY_REGIME_EXTREME;
  214 | }
  215 | 
  216 | void CheckRegimeTransition()
  217 | {
  218 | static ENUM_VOLATILITY_REGIME previousRegime = VOLATILITY_REGIME_NORMAL;
  219 | 
  220 | if(previousRegime != m_regimeData.currentRegime)
  221 | {
  222 | m_regimeData.isTransitioning = true;
  223 | m_regimeData.regimeStartTime = TimeCurrent();
  224 | m_regimeData.regimeDuration = 0;
  225 | }
  226 | else
  227 | {
  228 | m_regimeData.isTransitioning = false;
  229 | m_regimeData.regimeDuration = (int)((TimeCurrent() - m_regimeData.regimeStartTime) / 3600); // Hours
  230 | }
  231 | 
  232 | previousRegime = m_regimeData.currentRegime;
  233 | }
  234 | 
  235 | void UpdateVolatilityStatistics()
  236 | {
  237 | // Calculate volatility trend
  238 | double recentVol = 0.0, olderVol = 0.0;
  239 | int count = 0;
  240 | 
  241 | for(int i = 0; i < 10; i++)
  242 | {
  243 | int idx = (m_rvIndex - 1 - i + 50) % 50;
  244 | if(m_rvHistory[idx] > 0)
  245 | {
  246 | if(count < 5)
  247 | recentVol += m_rvHistory[idx];
  248 | else
  249 | olderVol += m_rvHistory[idx];
  250 | count++;
  251 | }
  252 | }
  253 | 
  254 | if(count >= 10)
  255 | {
  256 | recentVol /= 5.0;
  257 | olderVol /= 5.0;
  258 | m_regimeData.volatilityTrend = (recentVol - olderVol) / olderVol;
  259 | }
  260 | 
  261 | // Calculate mean and std dev
  262 | double sum = 0.0, sumSq = 0.0;
  263 | count = 0;
  264 | for(int i = 0; i < 50; i++)
  265 | {
  266 | if(m_rvHistory[i] > 0)
  267 | {
  268 | sum += m_rvHistory[i];
  269 | sumSq += m_rvHistory[i] * m_rvHistory[i];
  270 | count++;
  271 | }
  272 | }
  273 | 
  274 | if(count > 1)
  275 | {
  276 | m_regimeData.volatilityMean = sum / count;
  277 | m_regimeData.volatilityStdDev = MathSqrt(sumSq / count - m_regimeData.volatilityMean * m_regimeData.volatilityMean);
  278 | }
  279 | }
  280 | };
  281 | 
  282 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  283 | //| ADVANCED CORRELATION ANALYZER - PHASE 3                        |
  284 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  285 | class CCorrelationAnalyzer
  286 | {
  287 | private:
  288 | CorrelationData         m_correlations[10];
  289 | int                     m_correlationCount;
  290 | string                  m_correlatedAssets[10];
  291 | 
  292 | public:
  293 | CCorrelationAnalyzer()
  294 | {
  295 | m_correlationCount = 0;
  296 | InitializeCorrelatedAssets();
  297 | }
  298 | 
  299 | bool AnalyzeCorrelations()
  300 | {
  301 | m_correlationCount = 0;
  302 | 
  303 | for(int i = 0; i < ArraySize(m_correlatedAssets); i++)
  304 | {
  305 | if(m_correlatedAssets[i] != "" && m_correlatedAssets[i] != _Symbol)
  306 | {
  307 | CorrelationData corr; corr = CalculateCorrelation(_Symbol, m_correlatedAssets[i], 50);
  308 | if(corr.isValid)
  309 | {
  310 | m_correlations[m_correlationCount++] = corr;
  311 | }
  312 | }
  313 | }
  314 | 
  315 | return (m_correlationCount > 0);
  316 | }
  317 | 
  318 | double GetStrongestCorrelation()
  319 | {
  320 | double strongest = 0.0;
  321 | for(int i = 0; i < m_correlationCount; i++)
  322 | {
  323 | if(MathAbs(m_correlations[i].correlation) > MathAbs(strongest))
  324 | strongest = m_correlations[i].correlation;
  325 | }
  326 | return strongest;
  327 | }
  328 | 
  329 | bool HasHighCorrelation(double threshold = 0.7)
  330 | {
  331 | for(int i = 0; i < m_correlationCount; i++)
  332 | {
  333 | if(MathAbs(m_correlations[i].correlation) > threshold)
  334 | return true;
  335 | }
  336 | return false;
  337 | }
  338 | 
  339 | double GetMarketRiskFactor()
  340 | {
  341 | // Calculate market risk based on correlations
  342 | double avgCorrelation = 0.0;
  343 | int count = 0;
  344 | 
  345 | for(int i = 0; i < m_correlationCount; i++)
  346 | {
  347 | avgCorrelation += MathAbs(m_correlations[i].correlation);
  348 | count++;
  349 | }
  350 | 
  351 | if(count > 0)
  352 | {
  353 | avgCorrelation /= count;
  354 | return avgCorrelation; // Higher correlation = higher market risk
  355 | }
  356 | 
  357 | return 0.5; // Default moderate risk
  358 | }
  359 | 
  360 | private:
  361 | void InitializeCorrelatedAssets()
  362 | {
  363 | // Initialize with major currency pairs and indices
  364 | string currentSymbol = _Symbol;
  365 | 
  366 | if(StringFind(currentSymbol, "EUR") >= 0)
  367 | {
  368 | m_correlatedAssets[0] = "EURUSD";
  369 | m_correlatedAssets[1] = "EURGBP";
  370 | m_correlatedAssets[2] = "EURJPY";
  371 | m_correlatedAssets[3] = "EURCHF";
  372 | }
  373 | else if(StringFind(currentSymbol, "GBP") >= 0)
  374 | {
  375 | m_correlatedAssets[0] = "GBPUSD";
  376 | m_correlatedAssets[1] = "EURGBP";
  377 | m_correlatedAssets[2] = "GBPJPY";
  378 | m_correlatedAssets[3] = "GBPCHF";
  379 | }
  380 | else if(StringFind(currentSymbol, "USD") >= 0)
  381 | {
  382 | m_correlatedAssets[0] = "EURUSD";
  383 | m_correlatedAssets[1] = "GBPUSD";
  384 | m_correlatedAssets[2] = "USDJPY";
  385 | m_correlatedAssets[3] = "USDCHF";
  386 | }
  387 | 
  388 | // Add major indices
  389 | m_correlatedAssets[4] = "US30";
  390 | m_correlatedAssets[5] = "SPX500";
  391 | m_correlatedAssets[6] = "NAS100";
  392 | }
  393 | 
  394 | CorrelationData CalculateCorrelation(string asset1, string asset2, int period)
  395 | {
  396 | CorrelationData corr;
  397 | corr.Reset();
  398 | 
  399 | corr.asset1 = asset1;
  400 | corr.asset2 = asset2;
  401 | corr.period = period;
  402 | 
  403 | // Get price data for both assets
  404 | double prices1[], prices2[];
  405 | if(!GetPriceData(asset1, prices1, period) || !GetPriceData(asset2, prices2, period))
  406 | {
  407 | return corr;
  408 | }
  409 | 
  410 | // Calculate correlation coefficient
  411 | double mean1 = 0.0, mean2 = 0.0;
  412 | for(int i = 0; i < period; i++)
  413 | {
  414 | mean1 += prices1[i];
  415 | mean2 += prices2[i];
  416 | }
  417 | mean1 /= period;
  418 | mean2 /= period;
  419 | 
  420 | double numerator = 0.0, denominator1 = 0.0, denominator2 = 0.0;
  421 | for(int i = 0; i < period; i++)
  422 | {
  423 | double diff1 = prices1[i] - mean1;
  424 | double diff2 = prices2[i] - mean2;
  425 | 
  426 | numerator += diff1 * diff2;
  427 | denominator1 += diff1 * diff1;
  428 | denominator2 += diff2 * diff2;
  429 | }
  430 | 
  431 | double denominator = MathSqrt(denominator1 * denominator2);
  432 | if(denominator > 0)
  433 | {
  434 | corr.correlation = numerator / denominator;
  435 | corr.isValid = true;
  436 | }
  437 | 
  438 | // Calculate beta (asset1 vs asset2)
  439 | if(denominator2 > 0)
  440 | {
  441 | corr.beta = numerator / denominator2;
  442 | }
  443 | 
  444 | // Calculate R-squared
  445 | corr.rsquared = corr.correlation * corr.correlation;
  446 | 
  447 | corr.lastUpdate = TimeCurrent();
  448 | return corr;
  449 | }
  450 | 
  451 | bool GetPriceData(string symbol, double &prices[], int period)
  452 | {
  453 | ArrayResize(prices, period);
  454 | 
  455 | for(int i = 0; i < period; i++)
  456 | {
  457 | prices[i] = iClose(symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  458 | if(prices[i] <= 0)
  459 | return false;
  460 | }
  461 | 
  462 | return true;
  463 | }
  464 | };
  465 | 
  466 | // CMarketMicrostructureAnalyzer class is defined in SonicR_CommonStructs.mqh
  467 | /*
  468 | {
  469 | private:
  470 | MicrostructureData      m_microstructure;
  471 | double                  m_tickData[100];
  472 | int                     m_tickIndex;
  473 | 
  474 | public:
  475 | CMarketMicrostructureAnalyzer()
  476 | {
  477 | m_tickIndex = 0;
  478 | ArrayInitialize(m_tickData, 0.0);
  479 | }
  480 | 
  481 | MicrostructureData AnalyzeMicrostructure()
  482 | {
  483 | // Update tick data
  484 | UpdateTickData();
  485 | 
  486 | // Calculate bid-ask spread
  487 | CalculateBidAskSpread();
  488 | 
  489 | // Analyze order flow
  490 | AnalyzeOrderFlow();
  491 | 
  492 | // Calculate tick direction bias
  493 | CalculateTickDirection();
  494 | 
  495 | // Determine microstructure state
  496 | DetermineMicrostructureState();
  497 | 
  498 | m_microstructure.lastUpdate = TimeCurrent();
  499 | return m_microstructure;
  500 | }
  501 | 
  502 | bool IsBuyPressure()
  503 | {
  504 | return (m_microstructure.state == MICROSTRUCTURE_BUY_PRESSURE ||
  505 | m_microstructure.state == MICROSTRUCTURE_ACCUMULATION);
  506 | }
  507 | 
  508 | bool IsSellPressure()
  509 | {
  510 | return (m_microstructure.state == MICROSTRUCTURE_SELL_PRESSURE ||
  511 | m_microstructure.state == MICROSTRUCTURE_DISTRIBUTION);
  512 | }
  513 | 
  514 | double GetAggressionLevel()
  515 | {
  516 | return m_microstructure.aggression;
  517 | }
  518 | 
  519 | private:
  520 | void UpdateTickData()
  521 | {
  522 | double currentPrice = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
  523 | m_tickData[m_tickIndex] = currentPrice;
  524 | m_tickIndex = (m_tickIndex + 1) % 100;
  525 | }
  526 | 
  527 | void CalculateBidAskSpread()
  528 | {
  529 | double bid = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
  530 | double ask = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_ASK);
  531 | m_microstructure.bidAskSpread = ask - bid;
  532 | }
  533 | 
  534 | void AnalyzeOrderFlow()
  535 | {
  536 | // Simple order flow analysis based on price and volume
  537 | long currentVolume = iVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0);
  538 | double currentPrice = iClose(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0);
  539 | double previousPrice = iClose(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 1);
  540 | 
  541 | if(currentPrice > previousPrice)
  542 | m_microstructure.orderFlow += currentVolume;
  543 | else if(currentPrice < previousPrice)
  544 | m_microstructure.orderFlow -= currentVolume;
  545 | 
  546 | // Normalize order flow
  547 | m_microstructure.orderFlow *= 0.9; // Decay factor
  548 | }
  549 | 
  550 | void CalculateTickDirection()
  551 | {
  552 | int upTicks = 0, downTicks = 0;
  553 | 
  554 | for(int i = 1; i < 50; i++)
  555 | {
  556 | int idx1 = (m_tickIndex - i + 100) % 100;
  557 | int idx2 = (m_tickIndex - i - 1 + 100) % 100;
  558 | 
  559 | if(m_tickData[idx1] > m_tickData[idx2])
  560 | upTicks++;
  561 | else if(m_tickData[idx1] < m_tickData[idx2])
  562 | downTicks++;
  563 | }
  564 | 
  565 | int totalTicks = upTicks + downTicks;
  566 | if(totalTicks > 0)
  567 | {
  568 | m_microstructure.tickDirection = (double)(upTicks - downTicks) / totalTicks;
  569 | }
  570 | }
  571 | 
  572 | void DetermineMicrostructureState()
  573 | {
  574 | // Determine state based on multiple factors
  575 | double orderFlowThreshold = 1000.0; // Adjust based on symbol
  576 | 
  577 | if(m_microstructure.orderFlow > orderFlowThreshold && m_microstructure.tickDirection > 0.3)
  578 | m_microstructure.state = MICROSTRUCTURE_BUY_PRESSURE;
  579 | else if(m_microstructure.orderFlow < -orderFlowThreshold && m_microstructure.tickDirection < -0.3)
  580 | m_microstructure.state = MICROSTRUCTURE_SELL_PRESSURE;
  581 | else if(m_microstructure.orderFlow > orderFlowThreshold * 2)
  582 | m_microstructure.state = MICROSTRUCTURE_ACCUMULATION;
  583 | else if(m_microstructure.orderFlow < -orderFlowThreshold * 2)
  584 | m_microstructure.state = MICROSTRUCTURE_DISTRIBUTION;
  585 | else
  586 | m_microstructure.state = MICROSTRUCTURE_BALANCED;
  587 | 
  588 | // Calculate aggression level
  589 | m_microstructure.aggression = MathAbs(m_microstructure.orderFlow) / (orderFlowThreshold * 2);
  590 | m_microstructure.aggression = MathMin(m_microstructure.aggression, 1.0);
  591 | }
  592 | };
  593 | */
  594 |
