   13 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   14 | //| Market Maker Phase Enumeration - Enhanced Wyckoff                |
   15 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   16 | enum ENUM_MM_PHASE
   17 | {
   18 | MM_UNKNOWN = 0,                 // Cannot determine phase
   19 | MM_ACCUMULATION_PHASE_A,        // Initial selling climax
   20 | MM_ACCUMULATION_PHASE_B,        // Building cause  
   21 | MM_ACCUMULATION_PHASE_C,        // Spring action / Last point of support
   22 | MM_ACCUMULATION_PHASE_D,        // Signs of strength
   23 | MM_ACCUMULATION_PHASE_E,        // Last point of support
   24 | MM_MARKUP_PHASE,                // Price advancement
   25 | MM_DISTRIBUTION_PHASE_A,        // Preliminary supply
   26 | MM_DISTRIBUTION_PHASE_B,        // Buying climax
   27 | MM_DISTRIBUTION_PHASE_C,        // Upthrust after distribution
   28 | MM_DISTRIBUTION_PHASE_D,        // Signs of weakness
   29 | MM_DISTRIBUTION_PHASE_E,        // Last point of supply
   30 | MM_MARKDOWN_PHASE               // Price decline
   31 | };
   32 | 
   33 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   34 | //| Market Maker Phase Data Structure                                |
   35 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   36 | struct MarketMakerPhaseData
   37 | {
   38 | ENUM_MM_PHASE       currentPhase;
   39 | ENUM_MM_PHASE       previousPhase;
   40 | double              phaseConfidence;    // 0-1 confidence in phase identification
   41 | datetime            phaseStartTime;
   42 | datetime            lastUpdate;
   43 | 
   44 | // Phase characteristics
   45 | double              volumeProfile;      // Average volume during phase
   46 | double              priceRange;         // Price range during phase
   47 | double              effortVsResult;     // Effort vs result analysis
   48 | bool                isBreakoutReady;    // Ready for breakout
   49 | 
   50 | // Key levels
   51 | double              supportLevel;
   52 | double              resistanceLevel;
   53 | double              springLevel;        // For accumulation
   54 | double              upthrustLevel;      // For distribution
   55 | 
   56 | void Reset()
   57 | {
   58 | currentPhase = MM_UNKNOWN;
   59 | previousPhase = MM_UNKNOWN;
   60 | phaseConfidence = 0.0;
   61 | phaseStartTime = 0;
   62 | lastUpdate = 0;
   63 | volumeProfile = 0.0;
   64 | priceRange = 0.0;
   65 | effortVsResult = 0.0;
   66 | isBreakoutReady = false;
   67 | supportLevel = 0.0;
   68 | resistanceLevel = 0.0;
   69 | springLevel = 0.0;
   70 | upthrustLevel = 0.0;
   71 | }
   72 | };
   73 | 
   74 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   75 | //| Volume Analysis Data                                             |
   76 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   77 | struct VolumeAnalysisData
   78 | {
   79 | double climaxVolume;        // Highest volume bar
   80 | double avgVolume;           // Average volume
   81 | double dryUpVolume;         // Low volume during consolidation
   82 | double testVolume;          // Volume on tests of support/resistance
   83 | bool   isClimaxDetected;    // Selling/Buying climax detected
   84 | bool   isDryUpDetected;     // Volume dry up detected
   85 | 
   86 | void Reset()
   87 | {
   88 | climaxVolume = 0.0;
   89 | avgVolume = 0.0;
   90 | dryUpVolume = 0.0;
   91 | testVolume = 0.0;
   92 | isClimaxDetected = false;
   93 | isDryUpDetected = false;
   94 | }
   95 | };
   96 | 
   97 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   98 | //| 🏛️ MARKET MAKER PHASE DETECTOR - INSTITUTIONAL ANALYSIS        |
   99 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  100 | class CMarketMakerPhaseDetector
  101 | {
  102 | private:
  103 | MarketMakerPhaseData    m_currentPhase;
  104 | VolumeAnalysisData      m_volumeData;
  105 | 
  106 | // Analysis parameters
  107 | int                     m_lookbackBars;     // Bars to analyze
  108 | double                  m_volumeThreshold;  // Volume spike threshold
  109 | double                  m_rangeThreshold;   // Price range threshold
  110 | int                     m_minPhaseDuration; // Minimum bars for phase
  111 | 
  112 | // Data arrays
  113 | double                  m_highs[200];
  114 | double                  m_lows[200];
  115 | double                  m_closes[200];
  116 | double                  m_volumes[200];
  117 | int                     m_dataSize;
  118 | 
  119 | // Phase detection state
  120 | datetime                m_lastAnalysis;
  121 | bool                    m_phaseChanged;
  122 | 
  123 | public:
  124 | CMarketMakerPhaseDetector()
  125 | {
  126 | m_currentPhase.Reset();
  127 | m_volumeData.Reset();
  128 | 
  129 | m_lookbackBars = 100;
  130 | m_volumeThreshold = 1.5;    // 150% of average volume
  131 | m_rangeThreshold = 1.2;     // 120% of average range
  132 | m_minPhaseDuration = 10;    // Minimum 10 bars for phase
  133 | 
  134 | m_dataSize = 0;
  135 | m_lastAnalysis = 0;
  136 | m_phaseChanged = false;
  137 | 
  138 | // Initialize arrays
  139 | ArrayFill(m_highs, 0, 200, 0.0);
  140 | ArrayFill(m_lows, 0, 200, 0.0);
  141 | ArrayFill(m_closes, 0, 200, 0.0);
  142 | ArrayFill(m_volumes, 0, 200, 0.0);
  143 | 
  144 | Print("[🏛️ MM PHASE] Market Maker Phase Detector initialized");
  145 | }
  146 | 
  147 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  148 | //| 🎯 MAIN PHASE DETECTION METHOD                                   |
  149 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  150 | ENUM_MM_PHASE DetectCurrentPhase()
  151 | {
  152 | // Update market data
  153 | if(!UpdateMarketData()) return MM_UNKNOWN;
  154 | 
  155 | // Analyze volume patterns
  156 | AnalyzeVolumePatterns();
  157 | 
  158 | // Detect current phase
  159 | ENUM_MM_PHASE detectedPhase = AnalyzePhasePattern();
  160 | 
  161 | // Validate phase transition
  162 | if(ValidatePhaseTransition(detectedPhase)) {
  163 | if(detectedPhase != m_currentPhase.currentPhase) {
  164 | m_currentPhase.previousPhase = m_currentPhase.currentPhase;
  165 | m_currentPhase.currentPhase = detectedPhase;
  166 | m_currentPhase.phaseStartTime = TimeCurrent();
  167 | m_phaseChanged = true;
  168 | 
  169 | Print(StringFormat("[🏛️ MM PHASE] Phase transition: %s . %s (Confidence: %.1f%%)",
  170 | GetPhaseString(m_currentPhase.previousPhase),
  171 | GetPhaseString(m_currentPhase.currentPhase),
  172 | m_currentPhase.phaseConfidence * 100));
  173 | }
  174 | }
  175 | 
  176 | // Update phase data
  177 | UpdatePhaseCharacteristics();
  178 | m_currentPhase.lastUpdate = TimeCurrent();
  179 | 
  180 | return m_currentPhase.currentPhase;
  181 | }
  182 | 
  183 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  184 | //| 🎯 ANALYZE PHASE PATTERN                                         |
  185 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  186 | ENUM_MM_PHASE AnalyzePhasePattern()
  187 | {
  188 | if(m_dataSize < 50) return MM_UNKNOWN;
  189 | 
  190 | // Calculate key metrics
  191 | double priceDirection = CalculatePriceDirection();
  192 | double volumeTrend = CalculateVolumeTrend();
  193 | double volatilityLevel = CalculateVolatility();
  194 | double rangeBound = CalculateRangeBound();
  195 | 
  196 | // Phase detection logic
  197 | ENUM_MM_PHASE phase = MM_UNKNOWN;
  198 | double confidence = 0.0;
  199 | 
  200 | // 🎯 ACCUMULATION PHASES
  201 | if(DetectAccumulationPhase(priceDirection, volumeTrend, volatilityLevel, rangeBound, phase, confidence)) {
  202 | m_currentPhase.phaseConfidence = confidence;
  203 | return phase;
  204 | }
  205 | 
  206 | // 🎯 DISTRIBUTION PHASES  
  207 | if(DetectDistributionPhase(priceDirection, volumeTrend, volatilityLevel, rangeBound, phase, confidence)) {
  208 | m_currentPhase.phaseConfidence = confidence;
  209 | return phase;
  210 | }
  211 | 
  212 | // 🎯 MARKUP/MARKDOWN PHASES
  213 | if(DetectTrendPhase(priceDirection, volumeTrend, volatilityLevel, phase, confidence)) {
  214 | m_currentPhase.phaseConfidence = confidence;
  215 | return phase;
  216 | }
  217 | 
  218 | m_currentPhase.phaseConfidence = 0.3; // Low confidence unknown phase
  219 | return MM_UNKNOWN;
  220 | }
  221 | 
  222 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  223 | //| 🎯 DETECT ACCUMULATION PHASES                                    |
  224 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  225 | bool DetectAccumulationPhase(double priceDir, double volTrend, double volatility, double rangeBound, 
  226 | ENUM_MM_PHASE& phase, double& confidence)
  227 | {
  228 | // Look for accumulation characteristics
  229 | bool isRangebound = (rangeBound > 0.7);           // Price contained in range
  230 | bool isLowVolatility = (volatility < 0.6);        // Low volatility
  231 | bool isSellingClimaxPresent = m_volumeData.isClimaxDetected && (priceDir < -0.3);
  232 | bool isVolumeDecreasing = (volTrend < -0.2);       // Volume decreasing
  233 | 
  234 | // Phase A: Selling Climax
  235 | if(isSellingClimaxPresent && !isRangebound) {
  236 | phase = MM_ACCUMULATION_PHASE_A;
  237 | confidence = 0.8;
  238 | return true;
  239 | }
  240 | 
  241 | // Phase B: Building Cause
  242 | if(isRangebound && isLowVolatility && MathAbs(priceDir) < 0.2) {
  243 | // Check for tests of lows with lower volume
  244 | if(DetectTestsOfSupport()) {
  245 | phase = MM_ACCUMULATION_PHASE_B;
  246 | confidence = 0.7;
  247 | return true;
  248 | }
  249 | }
  250 | 
  251 | // Phase C: Spring/Last Point of Support
  252 | if(isRangebound && DetectSpringAction()) {
  253 | phase = MM_ACCUMULATION_PHASE_C;
  254 | confidence = 0.9;
  255 | return true;
  256 | }
  257 | 
  258 | // Phase D: Signs of Strength
  259 | if(isRangebound && DetectSignsOfStrength()) {
  260 | phase = MM_ACCUMULATION_PHASE_D;
  261 | confidence = 0.8;
  262 | return true;
  263 | }
  264 | 
  265 | return false;
  266 | }
  267 | 
  268 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  269 | //| 🎯 DETECT DISTRIBUTION PHASES                                    |
  270 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  271 | bool DetectDistributionPhase(double priceDir, double volTrend, double volatility, double rangeBound,
  272 | ENUM_MM_PHASE& phase, double& confidence)
  273 | {
  274 | // Look for distribution characteristics
  275 | bool isRangebound = (rangeBound > 0.7);           // Price contained in range
  276 | bool isHighVolatility = (volatility > 0.8);       // High volatility
  277 | bool isBuyingClimaxPresent = m_volumeData.isClimaxDetected && (priceDir > 0.3);
  278 | bool isVolumeDecreasing = (volTrend < -0.2);       // Volume decreasing after climax
  279 | 
  280 | // Phase A: Preliminary Supply
  281 | if(priceDir > 0.5 && volTrend > 0.3 && !isRangebound) {
  282 | if(DetectPreliminarySupply()) {
  283 | phase = MM_DISTRIBUTION_PHASE_A;
  284 | confidence = 0.7;
  285 | return true;
  286 | }
  287 | }
  288 | 
  289 | // Phase B: Buying Climax
  290 | if(isBuyingClimaxPresent && isHighVolatility) {
  291 | phase = MM_DISTRIBUTION_PHASE_B;
  292 | confidence = 0.8;
  293 | return true;
  294 | }
  295 | 
  296 | // Phase C: Upthrust After Distribution
  297 | if(isRangebound && DetectUpthrustAction()) {
  298 | phase = MM_DISTRIBUTION_PHASE_C;
  299 | confidence = 0.9;
  300 | return true;
  301 | }
  302 | 
  303 | // Phase D: Signs of Weakness
  304 | if(isRangebound && DetectSignsOfWeakness()) {
  305 | phase = MM_DISTRIBUTION_PHASE_D;
  306 | confidence = 0.8;
  307 | return true;
  308 | }
  309 | 
  310 | return false;
  311 | }
  312 | 
  313 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  314 | //| 🎯 DETECT TREND PHASES                                           |
  315 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  316 | bool DetectTrendPhase(double priceDir, double volTrend, double volatility,
  317 | ENUM_MM_PHASE& phase, double& confidence)
  318 | {
  319 | // Markup Phase: Strong uptrend with confirming volume
  320 | if(priceDir > 0.6 && volTrend > 0.2 && volatility > 0.5) {
  321 | if(DetectMarkupCharacteristics()) {
  322 | phase = MM_MARKUP_PHASE;
  323 | confidence = 0.8;
  324 | return true;
  325 | }
  326 | }
  327 | 
  328 | // Markdown Phase: Strong downtrend with confirming volume
  329 | if(priceDir < -0.6 && volTrend > 0.2 && volatility > 0.5) {
  330 | if(DetectMarkdownCharacteristics()) {
  331 | phase = MM_MARKDOWN_PHASE;
  332 | confidence = 0.8;
  333 | return true;
  334 | }
  335 | }
  336 | 
  337 | return false;
  338 | }
  339 | 
  340 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  341 | //| 🎯 SPECIFIC PATTERN DETECTION METHODS                           |
  342 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  343 | bool DetectSpringAction()
  344 | {
  345 | // Look for break below support followed by quick recovery
  346 | for(int i = 5; i < 20 && i < m_dataSize; i++) {
  347 | double supportLevel = FindRecentSupport(i + 10);
  348 | if(supportLevel > 0) {
  349 | // Check for break below support
  350 | if(m_lows[i] < supportLevel) {
  351 | // Check for quick recovery above support
  352 | for(int j = i - 1; j >= 0; j--) {
  353 | if(m_closes[j] > supportLevel) {
  354 | m_currentPhase.springLevel = m_lows[i];
  355 | return true;
  356 | }
  357 | }
  358 | }
  359 | }
  360 | }
  361 | return false;
  362 | }
  363 | 
  364 | bool DetectUpthrustAction()
  365 | {
  366 | // Look for break above resistance followed by quick rejection
  367 | for(int i = 5; i < 20 && i < m_dataSize; i++) {
  368 | double resistanceLevel = FindRecentResistance(i + 10);
  369 | if(resistanceLevel > 0) {
  370 | // Check for break above resistance
  371 | if(m_highs[i] > resistanceLevel) {
  372 | // Check for quick rejection below resistance
  373 | for(int j = i - 1; j >= 0; j--) {
  374 | if(m_closes[j] < resistanceLevel) {
  375 | m_currentPhase.upthrustLevel = m_highs[i];
  376 | return true;
  377 | }
  378 | }
  379 | }
  380 | }
  381 | }
  382 | return false;
  383 | }
  384 | 
  385 | bool DetectSignsOfStrength()
  386 | {
  387 | // Look for higher lows with increasing volume
  388 | int signCount = 0;
  389 | for(int i = 1; i < 10 && i < m_dataSize - 1; i++) {
  390 | if(m_lows[i] > m_lows[i + 1] && m_volumes[i] > m_volumes[i + 1]) {
  391 | signCount++;
  392 | }
  393 | }
  394 | return signCount >= 3;
  395 | }
  396 | 
  397 | bool DetectSignsOfWeakness()
  398 | {
  399 | // Look for lower highs with increasing volume
  400 | int signCount = 0;
  401 | for(int i = 1; i < 10 && i < m_dataSize - 1; i++) {
  402 | if(m_highs[i] < m_highs[i + 1] && m_volumes[i] > m_volumes[i + 1]) {
  403 | signCount++;
  404 | }
  405 | }
  406 | return signCount >= 3;
  407 | }
  408 | 
  409 | bool DetectTestsOfSupport()
  410 | {
  411 | double supportLevel = FindRecentSupport(20);
  412 | if(supportLevel <= 0) return false;
  413 | 
  414 | int testCount = 0;
  415 | for(int i = 0; i < 15 && i < m_dataSize; i++) {
  416 | if(MathAbs(m_lows[i] - supportLevel) < (supportLevel * 0.01)) { // Within 1%
  417 | testCount++;
  418 | }
  419 | }
  420 | return testCount >= 2;
  421 | }
  422 | 
  423 | bool DetectPreliminarySupply()
  424 | {
  425 | // Look for first signs of supply pressure after uptrend
  426 | return (CalculatePriceDirection() > 0.3 && m_volumeData.climaxVolume > m_volumeData.avgVolume * 2.0);
  427 | }
  428 | 
  429 | bool DetectMarkupCharacteristics()
  430 | {
  431 | // Strong uptrend with healthy pullbacks
  432 | double trendStrength = CalculateTrendStrength();
  433 | return (trendStrength > 0.7 && CalculateVolumeTrend() > 0.1);
  434 | }
  435 | 
  436 | bool DetectMarkdownCharacteristics()
  437 | {
  438 | // Strong downtrend with high volume
  439 | double trendStrength = CalculateTrendStrength();
  440 | return (trendStrength < -0.7 && CalculateVolumeTrend() > 0.1);
  441 | }
  442 | 
  443 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  444 | //| 🎯 HELPER CALCULATION METHODS                                    |
  445 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  446 | double CalculatePriceDirection()
  447 | {
  448 | if(m_dataSize < 20) return 0.0;
  449 | 
  450 | double startPrice = m_closes[19];
  451 | double endPrice = m_closes[0];
  452 | return (endPrice - startPrice) / startPrice;
  453 | }
  454 | 
  455 | double CalculateVolumeTrend()
  456 | {
  457 | if(m_dataSize < 20) return 0.0;
  458 | 
  459 | double recentVol = 0, oldVol = 0;
  460 | for(int i = 0; i < 10; i++) recentVol += m_volumes[i];
  461 | for(int i = 10; i < 20; i++) oldVol += m_volumes[i];
  462 | 
  463 | recentVol /= 10;
  464 | oldVol /= 10;
  465 | 
  466 | return (oldVol > 0) ? (recentVol - oldVol) / oldVol : 0.0;
  467 | }
  468 | 
  469 | double CalculateVolatility()
  470 | {
  471 | if(m_dataSize < 20) return 0.0;
  472 | 
  473 | double avgRange = 0;
  474 | for(int i = 0; i < 20; i++) {
  475 | avgRange += (m_highs[i] - m_lows[i]);
  476 | }
  477 | avgRange /= 20;
  478 | 
  479 | double recentRange = (m_highs[0] - m_lows[0]);
  480 | return (avgRange > 0) ? recentRange / avgRange : 0.0;
  481 | }
  482 | 
  483 | double CalculateRangeBound()
  484 | {
  485 | if(m_dataSize < 30) return 0.0;
  486 | 
  487 | double highest = m_highs[0];
  488 | double lowest = m_lows[0];
  489 | 
  490 | for(int i = 0; i < 30; i++) {
  491 | if(m_highs[i] > highest) highest = m_highs[i];
  492 | if(m_lows[i] < lowest) lowest = m_lows[i];
  493 | }
  494 | 
  495 | double range = highest - lowest;
  496 | double currentRange = m_highs[0] - m_lows[0];
  497 | 
  498 | return (range > 0) ? 1.0 - (currentRange / range) : 0.0;
  499 | }
  500 | 
  501 | double CalculateTrendStrength()
  502 | {
  503 | // Simplified trend strength calculation
  504 | return CalculatePriceDirection();
  505 | }
  506 | 
  507 | double FindRecentSupport(int lookback)
  508 | {
  509 | if(m_dataSize < lookback) return 0.0;
  510 | 
  511 | double support = m_lows[0];
  512 | for(int i = 1; i < lookback; i++) {
  513 | if(m_lows[i] < support) support = m_lows[i];
  514 | }
  515 | return support;
  516 | }
  517 | 
  518 | double FindRecentResistance(int lookback)
  519 | {
  520 | if(m_dataSize < lookback) return 0.0;
  521 | 
  522 | double resistance = m_highs[0];
  523 | for(int i = 1; i < lookback; i++) {
  524 | if(m_highs[i] > resistance) resistance = m_highs[i];
  525 | }
  526 | return resistance;
  527 | }
  528 | 
  529 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  530 | //| 🎯 DATA MANAGEMENT METHODS                                       |
  531 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  532 | bool UpdateMarketData()
  533 | {
  534 | // Get recent OHLCV data
  535 | double highs[], lows[], closes[];
  536 | long volumes[];
  537 | 
  538 | ArraySetAsSeries(highs, true);
  539 | ArraySetAsSeries(lows, true);
  540 | ArraySetAsSeries(closes, true);
  541 | ArraySetAsSeries(volumes, true);
  542 | 
  543 | int copied = MathMin(200, CopyHigh(_Symbol, PERIOD_H1, 0, 200, highs));
  544 | if(copied < 50) return false;
  545 | 
  546 | CopyLow(_Symbol, PERIOD_H1, 0, copied, lows);
  547 | CopyClose(_Symbol, PERIOD_H1, 0, copied, closes);
  548 | CopyTickVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_H1, 0, copied, volumes);
  549 | 
  550 | // Update internal arrays
  551 | m_dataSize = copied;
  552 | for(int i = 0; i < copied; i++) {
  553 | m_highs[i] = highs[i];
  554 | m_lows[i] = lows[i];
  555 | m_closes[i] = closes[i];
  556 | m_volumes[i] = (double)volumes[i];
  557 | }
  558 | 
  559 | return true;
  560 | }
  561 | 
  562 | void AnalyzeVolumePatterns()
  563 | {
  564 | if(m_dataSize < 20) return;
  565 | 
  566 | // Calculate average volume
  567 | m_volumeData.avgVolume = 0;
  568 | for(int i = 0; i < 20; i++) {
  569 | m_volumeData.avgVolume += m_volumes[i];
  570 | }
  571 | m_volumeData.avgVolume /= 20;
  572 | 
  573 | // Find climax volume
  574 | m_volumeData.climaxVolume = m_volumes[0];
  575 | for(int i = 1; i < 20; i++) {
  576 | if(m_volumes[i] > m_volumeData.climaxVolume) {
  577 | m_volumeData.climaxVolume = m_volumes[i];
  578 | }
  579 | }
  580 | 
  581 | // Check for climax
  582 | m_volumeData.isClimaxDetected = (m_volumeData.climaxVolume > m_volumeData.avgVolume * m_volumeThreshold);
  583 | 
  584 | // Check for volume dry up
  585 | double recentAvgVol = 0;
  586 | for(int i = 0; i < 5; i++) recentAvgVol += m_volumes[i];
  587 | recentAvgVol /= 5;
  588 | 
  589 | m_volumeData.isDryUpDetected = (recentAvgVol < m_volumeData.avgVolume * 0.7);
  590 | m_volumeData.dryUpVolume = recentAvgVol;
  591 | }
  592 | 
  593 | bool ValidatePhaseTransition(ENUM_MM_PHASE newPhase)
  594 | {
  595 | // Basic validation - can add more sophisticated logic
  596 | if(newPhase == m_currentPhase.currentPhase) return false;
  597 | 
  598 | // Must maintain phase for minimum duration
  599 | datetime currentTime = TimeCurrent();
  600 | if(currentTime - m_currentPhase.phaseStartTime < m_minPhaseDuration * PeriodSeconds(PERIOD_H1)) {
  601 | return false;
  602 | }
  603 | 
  604 | return true;
  605 | }
  606 | 
  607 | void UpdatePhaseCharacteristics()
  608 | {
  609 | m_currentPhase.volumeProfile = m_volumeData.avgVolume;
  610 | m_currentPhase.priceRange = CalculateRangeBound();
  611 | m_currentPhase.supportLevel = FindRecentSupport(30);
  612 | m_currentPhase.resistanceLevel = FindRecentResistance(30);
  613 | 
  614 | // Check if ready for breakout
  615 | m_currentPhase.isBreakoutReady = (
  616 | (m_currentPhase.currentPhase == MM_ACCUMULATION_PHASE_D || 
  617 | m_currentPhase.currentPhase == MM_DISTRIBUTION_PHASE_D) &&
  618 | m_volumeData.isDryUpDetected
  619 | );
  620 | }
  621 | 
  622 | string GetPhaseString(ENUM_MM_PHASE phase)
  623 | {
  624 | switch(phase) {
  625 | case MM_ACCUMULATION_PHASE_A: return "Accumulation A";
  626 | case MM_ACCUMULATION_PHASE_B: return "Accumulation B";
  627 | case MM_ACCUMULATION_PHASE_C: return "Spring/LPS";
  628 | case MM_ACCUMULATION_PHASE_D: return "Signs of Strength";
  629 | case MM_MARKUP_PHASE: return "Markup";
  630 | case MM_DISTRIBUTION_PHASE_A: return "Distribution A";
  631 | case MM_DISTRIBUTION_PHASE_B: return "Buying Climax";
  632 | case MM_DISTRIBUTION_PHASE_C: return "Upthrust";
  633 | case MM_DISTRIBUTION_PHASE_D: return "Signs of Weakness";
  634 | case MM_MARKDOWN_PHASE: return "Markdown";
  635 | default: return "Unknown";
  636 | }
  637 | }
  638 | 
  639 | // Public interface
  640 | MarketMakerPhaseData GetCurrentPhaseData() const { return m_currentPhase; }
  641 | VolumeAnalysisData GetVolumeData() const { return m_volumeData; }
  642 | bool HasPhaseChanged() const { return m_phaseChanged; }
  643 | void ResetPhaseChanged() { m_phaseChanged = false; }
  644 | 
  645 | string GetPhaseReport()
  646 | {
  647 | return StringFormat(
  648 | "🏛️ MARKET MAKER PHASE ANALYSIS\nCurrent Phase: %s (%.1f%% confidence)\n",
  649 | GetPhaseString(m_currentPhase.currentPhase),
  650 | m_currentPhase.phaseConfidence * 100
  651 | );
  652 | }
  653 | }
  654 | ;
  655 | #endif

   14 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   15 | //| CAnalysisMarketProfile Class                                     |
   16 | //| Calculates and provides Market Profile data like POC, VA, Regime.|
   17 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   18 | class CAnalysisMarketProfile
   19 | {
   20 | private:
   21 | CEaContext*     m_pContext;
   22 | CLogger*        m_pLogger;
   23 | double          m_poc;
   24 | double          m_valueAreaHigh;
   25 | double          m_valueAreaLow;
   26 | ENUM_MARKET_REGIME m_currentRegime;
   27 | int             m_profilePeriod;
   28 | double          m_valueAreaPercentage;
   29 | 
   30 | public:
   31 | CAnalysisMarketProfile()
   32 | {
   33 | m_pContext = NULL;
   34 | m_pLogger = NULL;
   35 | m_poc = 0.0;
   36 | m_valueAreaHigh = 0.0;
   37 | m_valueAreaLow = 0.0;
   38 | m_currentRegime = REGIME_UNDEFINED;
   39 | m_profilePeriod = 240;
   40 | m_valueAreaPercentage = 70.0;
   41 | }
   42 | 
   43 | ~CAnalysisMarketProfile()
   44 | {
   45 | Deinitialize();
   46 | }
   47 | 
   48 | bool Initialize(CEaContext* pContext, CLogger* pLogger)
   49 | {
   50 | m_pContext = pContext;
   51 | m_pLogger = pLogger;
   52 | if(CheckPointer(m_pContext) == POINTER_INVALID || CheckPointer(m_pLogger) == POINTER_INVALID)
   53 | {
   54 | Print("[ERROR] Invalid context or logger pointer");
   55 | return false;
   56 | }
   57 | Print("[INFO] Market Profile Analysis initialized");
   58 | return true;
   59 | }
   60 | 
   61 | void Deinitialize()
   62 | {
   63 | m_pContext = NULL;
   64 | m_pLogger = NULL;
   65 | }
   66 | 
   67 | void Update()
   68 | {
   69 | if(CheckPointer(m_pContext) == POINTER_INVALID) return;
   70 | CalculateProfile();
   71 | DetermineMarketRegime();
   72 | }
   73 | 
   74 | double GetPointOfControl() const { return m_poc; }
   75 | double GetValueAreaHigh() const { return m_valueAreaHigh; }
   76 | double GetValueAreaLow() const { return m_valueAreaLow; }
   77 | ENUM_MARKET_REGIME GetCurrentRegime() const { return m_currentRegime; }
   78 | 
   79 | private:
   80 | void CalculateProfile()
   81 | {
   82 | if(CheckPointer(m_pContext) == POINTER_INVALID) return;
   83 | m_poc = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
   84 | int atrHandle = iATR(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 14);
   85 | double atrBuffer[1];
   86 | if(CopyBuffer(atrHandle, 0, 0, 1, atrBuffer) > 0)
   87 | {
   88 | double atr = atrBuffer[0];
   89 | m_valueAreaHigh = m_poc + atr * 1.5;
   90 | m_valueAreaLow = m_poc - atr * 1.5;
   91 | }
   92 | else
   93 | {
   94 | double pipSize = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_POINT) * 10;
   95 | m_valueAreaHigh = m_poc + pipSize * 50;
   96 | m_valueAreaLow = m_poc - pipSize * 50;
   97 | }
   98 | IndicatorRelease(atrHandle);
   99 | }
  100 | 
  101 | void DetermineMarketRegime()
  102 | {
  103 | double currentPrice = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
  104 | if(currentPrice > m_valueAreaHigh)
  105 | {
  106 | m_currentRegime = REGIME_TRENDING_UP;
  107 | }
  108 | else if(currentPrice < m_valueAreaLow)
  109 | {
  110 | m_currentRegime = REGIME_TRENDING_DOWN;
  111 | }
  112 | else
  113 | {
  114 | m_currentRegime = REGIME_RANGING_TIGHT;
  115 | }
  116 | }
  117 | };
  118 | 
  119 | 
  120 |

    9 | #ifndef ANALYSIS_FAIRVALUEGAPS_MQH
   10 | #define ANALYSIS_FAIRVALUEGAPS_MQH

   16 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   17 | //| 📊 FAIR VALUE GAP STRUCTURE                                     |
   18 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   19 | struct SFairValueGap
   20 | {
   21 | double high;
   22 | double low;
   23 | datetime time;
   24 | bool is_filled;
   25 | bool is_bullish;
   26 | double strength;               // Gap strength 0.0-1.0
   27 | int bar_index;                // Bar where gap was formed
   28 | double fill_percentage;       // How much of gap is filled (0.0-1.0)
   29 | 
   30 | void Reset()
   31 | {
   32 | high = 0.0;
   33 | low = 0.0;
   34 | time = 0;
   35 | is_filled = false;
   36 | is_bullish = false;
   37 | strength = 0.0;
   38 | bar_index = -1;
   39 | fill_percentage = 0.0;
   40 | }
   41 | 
   42 | string ToString()
   43 | {
   44 | return StringFormat("FVG: %s | %.5f-%.5f | Strength: %.2f | Filled: %s",
   45 | is_bullish ? "BULL" : "BEAR",
   46 | low, high, strength,
   47 | is_filled ? "YES" : "NO");
   48 | }
   49 | };
   50 | 
   51 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   52 | //| 🎯 FAIR VALUE GAP DETECTOR CLASS                               |
   53 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   54 | class CFairValueGaps
   55 | {
   56 | private:
   57 | SFairValueGap m_gaps[];
   58 | int m_gap_count;
   59 | int m_max_gaps;
   60 | string m_symbol;
   61 | ENUM_TIMEFRAMES m_timeframe;
   62 | double m_min_gap_size;         // Minimum gap size in points
   63 | int m_lookback_bars;           // How many bars to analyze
   64 | 
   65 | public:
   66 | CFairValueGaps()
   67 | {
   68 | m_gap_count = 0;
   69 | m_max_gaps = 100;
   70 | m_symbol = _Symbol;
   71 | m_timeframe = PERIOD_CURRENT;
   72 | m_min_gap_size = 10.0;     // 10 points minimum
   73 | m_lookback_bars = 500;
   74 | ArrayResize(m_gaps, m_max_gaps);
   75 | }
   76 | 
   77 | ~CFairValueGaps()
   78 | {
   79 | ArrayFree(m_gaps);
   80 | }
   81 | 
   82 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   83 | //| 🔧 INITIALIZATION                                               |
   84 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   85 | bool Initialize(string symbol = "", ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe = PERIOD_CURRENT)
   86 | {
   87 | if(symbol != "") m_symbol = symbol;
   88 | if(timeframe != PERIOD_CURRENT) m_timeframe = timeframe;
   89 | 
   90 | // Validate symbol
   91 | if(!SymbolSelect(m_symbol, true))
   92 | {
   93 | Print("❌ Failed to select symbol: ", m_symbol);
   94 | return false;
   95 | }
   96 | 
   97 | Print(StringFormat("✅ Fair Value Gap Detector initialized for %s %s", 
   98 | m_symbol, EnumToString(m_timeframe)));
   99 | 
  100 | return true;
  101 | }
  102 | 
  103 | void Deinitialize()
  104 | {
  105 | ArrayFree(m_gaps);
  106 | m_gap_count = 0;
  107 | Print("🧹 Fair Value Gap Detector deinitialized");
  108 | }
  109 | 
  110 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  111 | //| 🔍 GAP DETECTION METHODS                                        |
  112 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  113 | bool DetectGaps()
  114 | {
  115 | if(Bars(m_symbol, m_timeframe) < m_lookback_bars)
  116 | {
  117 | Print("⚠️ Insufficient bars for FVG detection");
  118 | return false;
  119 | }
  120 | 
  121 | // Clear existing gaps
  122 | ClearOldGaps();
  123 | 
  124 | // Detect new gaps
  125 | int detected = 0;
  126 | for(int i = 2; i < m_lookback_bars - 1; i++)
  127 | {
  128 | if(DetectGapAtBar(i))
  129 | {
  130 | detected++;
  131 | }
  132 | }
  133 | 
  134 | // Update gap fill status
  135 | UpdateGapFillStatus();
  136 | 
  137 | Print(StringFormat("🔍 Detected %d new fair value gaps", detected));
  138 | return true;
  139 | }
  140 | 
  141 | bool DetectGapAtBar(int bar_index)
  142 | {
  143 | // Get OHLC data for 3 consecutive bars
  144 | double high1 = iHigh(m_symbol, m_timeframe, bar_index + 1);
  145 | double low1 = iLow(m_symbol, m_timeframe, bar_index + 1);
  146 | 
  147 | double high2 = iHigh(m_symbol, m_timeframe, bar_index);
  148 | double low2 = iLow(m_symbol, m_timeframe, bar_index);
  149 | 
  150 | double high3 = iHigh(m_symbol, m_timeframe, bar_index - 1);
  151 | double low3 = iLow(m_symbol, m_timeframe, bar_index - 1);
  152 | 
  153 | // Check for bullish FVG: low3 > high1
  154 | if(low3 > high1)
  155 | {
  156 | double gap_size = (low3 - high1) / _Point;
  157 | if(gap_size >= m_min_gap_size)
  158 | {
  159 | return AddGap(high1, low3, iTime(m_symbol, m_timeframe, bar_index), true, gap_size, bar_index);
  160 | }
  161 | }
  162 | 
  163 | // Check for bearish FVG: high3 < low1
  164 | if(high3 < low1)
  165 | {
  166 | double gap_size = (low1 - high3) / _Point;
  167 | if(gap_size >= m_min_gap_size)
  168 | {
  169 | return AddGap(high3, low1, iTime(m_symbol, m_timeframe, bar_index), false, gap_size, bar_index);
  170 | }
  171 | }
  172 | 
  173 | return false;
  174 | }
  175 | 
  176 | bool AddGap(double low, double high, datetime time, bool is_bullish, double gap_size, int bar_index)
  177 | {
  178 | if(m_gap_count >= m_max_gaps)
  179 | {
  180 | // Remove oldest gap to make room
  181 | RemoveOldestGap();
  182 | }
  183 | 
  184 | m_gaps[m_gap_count].low = low;
  185 | m_gaps[m_gap_count].high = high;
  186 | m_gaps[m_gap_count].time = time;
  187 | m_gaps[m_gap_count].is_bullish = is_bullish;
  188 | m_gaps[m_gap_count].is_filled = false;
  189 | m_gaps[m_gap_count].strength = CalculateGapStrength(gap_size);
  190 | m_gaps[m_gap_count].bar_index = bar_index;
  191 | m_gaps[m_gap_count].fill_percentage = 0.0;
  192 | 
  193 | m_gap_count++;
  194 | 
  195 | Print(StringFormat("➕ Added %s FVG: %.5f-%.5f (Strength: %.2f)",
  196 | is_bullish ? "BULLISH" : "BEARISH",
  197 | low, high, m_gaps[m_gap_count-1].strength));
  198 | 
  199 | return true;
  200 | }
  201 | 
  202 | double CalculateGapStrength(double gap_size)
  203 | {
  204 | // Simple strength calculation based on gap size
  205 | // Normalize to 0.0-1.0 range
  206 | double max_expected_gap = 100.0; // 100 points
  207 | return MathMin(1.0, gap_size / max_expected_gap);
  208 | }
  209 | 
  210 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  211 | //| 📊 GAP ANALYSIS METHODS                                         |
  212 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  213 | bool IsFVGLevel(double price, double tolerance = 10.0)
  214 | {
  215 | double tolerance_points = tolerance * _Point;
  216 | 
  217 | // Check if price is near any unfilled FVG
  218 | for(int i = 0; i < m_gap_count; i++)
  219 | {
  220 | if(!m_gaps[i].is_filled)
  221 | {
  222 | if(price >= m_gaps[i].low - tolerance_points && 
  223 | price <= m_gaps[i].high + tolerance_points)
  224 | {
  225 | return true;
  226 | }
  227 | }
  228 | }
  229 | return false;
  230 | }
  231 | 
  232 | double GetNearestFVGLevel(double price, bool bullish_only = false, bool bearish_only = false)
  233 | {
  234 | double nearest_level = 0.0;
  235 | double min_distance = DBL_MAX;
  236 | 
  237 | for(int i = 0; i < m_gap_count; i++)
  238 | {
  239 | if(m_gaps[i].is_filled) continue;
  240 | 
  241 | // Filter by type if requested
  242 | if(bullish_only && !m_gaps[i].is_bullish) continue;
  243 | if(bearish_only && m_gaps[i].is_bullish) continue;
  244 | 
  245 | // Calculate distance to gap center
  246 | double gap_center = (m_gaps[i].high + m_gaps[i].low) / 2.0;
  247 | double distance = MathAbs(price - gap_center);
  248 | 
  249 | if(distance < min_distance)
  250 | {
  251 | min_distance = distance;
  252 | nearest_level = gap_center;
  253 | }
  254 | }
  255 | 
  256 | return nearest_level;
  257 | }
  258 | 
  259 | int GetUnfilledGapCount(bool bullish_only = false, bool bearish_only = false)
  260 | {
  261 | int count = 0;
  262 | 
  263 | for(int i = 0; i < m_gap_count; i++)
  264 | {
  265 | if(m_gaps[i].is_filled) continue;
  266 | 
  267 | if(bullish_only && !m_gaps[i].is_bullish) continue;
  268 | if(bearish_only && m_gaps[i].is_bullish) continue;
  269 | 
  270 | count++;
  271 | }
  272 | 
  273 | return count;
  274 | }
  275 | 
  276 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  277 | //| 🔄 GAP MAINTENANCE                                              |
  278 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  279 | void UpdateGapFillStatus()
  280 | {
  281 | double current_price = SymbolInfoDouble(m_symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
  282 | 
  283 | for(int i = 0; i < m_gap_count; i++)
  284 | {
  285 | if(m_gaps[i].is_filled) continue;
  286 | 
  287 | // Check if gap is filled
  288 | if(current_price >= m_gaps[i].low && current_price <= m_gaps[i].high)
  289 | {
  290 | m_gaps[i].is_filled = true;
  291 | m_gaps[i].fill_percentage = 1.0;
  292 | 
  293 | Print(StringFormat("✅ FVG FILLED: %s gap at %.5f-%.5f",
  294 | m_gaps[i].is_bullish ? "BULLISH" : "BEARISH",
  295 | m_gaps[i].low, m_gaps[i].high));
  296 | }
  297 | else
  298 | {
  299 | // Calculate partial fill percentage
  300 | if(m_gaps[i].is_bullish)
  301 | {
  302 | // For bullish gaps, check how much price has moved up into the gap
  303 | if(current_price > m_gaps[i].low)
  304 | {
  305 | double gap_range = m_gaps[i].high - m_gaps[i].low;
  306 | double filled_range = MathMin(current_price - m_gaps[i].low, gap_range);
  307 | m_gaps[i].fill_percentage = filled_range / gap_range;
  308 | }
  309 | }
  310 | else
  311 | {
  312 | // For bearish gaps, check how much price has moved down into the gap
  313 | if(current_price < m_gaps[i].high)
  314 | {
  315 | double gap_range = m_gaps[i].high - m_gaps[i].low;
  316 | double filled_range = MathMin(m_gaps[i].high - current_price, gap_range);
  317 | m_gaps[i].fill_percentage = filled_range / gap_range;
  318 | }
  319 | }
  320 | }
  321 | }
  322 | }
  323 | 
  324 | void ClearOldGaps()
  325 | {
  326 | // Remove gaps older than a certain period
  327 | datetime cutoff_time = TimeCurrent() - (7 * 24 * 3600); // 7 days
  328 | 
  329 | for(int i = m_gap_count - 1; i >= 0; i--)
  330 | {
  331 | if(m_gaps[i].time < cutoff_time)
  332 | {
  333 | RemoveGapAtIndex(i);
  334 | }
  335 | }
  336 | }
  337 | 
  338 | void RemoveOldestGap()
  339 | {
  340 | if(m_gap_count == 0) return;
  341 | 
  342 | // Find oldest gap
  343 | int oldest_index = 0;
  344 | datetime oldest_time = m_gaps[0].time;
  345 | 
  346 | for(int i = 1; i < m_gap_count; i++)
  347 | {
  348 | if(m_gaps[i].time < oldest_time)
  349 | {
  350 | oldest_time = m_gaps[i].time;
  351 | oldest_index = i;
  352 | }
  353 | }
  354 | 
  355 | RemoveGapAtIndex(oldest_index);
  356 | }
  357 | 
  358 | void RemoveGapAtIndex(int index)
  359 | {
  360 | if(index < 0 || index >= m_gap_count) return;
  361 | 
  362 | // Shift remaining gaps
  363 | for(int i = index; i < m_gap_count - 1; i++)
  364 | {
  365 | m_gaps[i] = m_gaps[i + 1];
  366 | }
  367 | 
  368 | m_gap_count--;
  369 | }
  370 | 
  371 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  372 | //| 📊 REPORTING METHODS                                            |
  373 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  374 | string GetGapReport()
  375 | {
  376 | string report = StringFormat("📊 FAIR VALUE GAP REPORT (%s)\n", m_symbol);
  377 | report += StringFormat("Total Gaps: %d | Unfilled: %d\n", 
  378 | m_gap_count, GetUnfilledGapCount());
  379 | report += StringFormat("Bullish Unfilled: %d | Bearish Unfilled: %d\n",
  380 | GetUnfilledGapCount(true, false),
  381 | GetUnfilledGapCount(false, true));
  382 | 
  383 | // List recent gaps
  384 | report += "Recent Gaps:\n";
  385 | int shown = 0;
  386 | for(int i = m_gap_count - 1; i >= 0 && shown < 5; i--)
  387 | {
  388 | report += "  " + m_gaps[i].ToString() + "\n";
  389 | shown++;
  390 | }
  391 | 
  392 | return report;
  393 | }
  394 | 
  395 | // Getters
  396 | int GetGapCount() { return m_gap_count; }
  397 | SFairValueGap GetGap(int index) { return (index >= 0 && index < m_gap_count) ? m_gaps[index] : SFairValueGap(); }
  398 | 
  399 | // Configuration setters
  400 | void SetMinGapSize(double min_size) { m_min_gap_size = min_size; }
  401 | void SetLookbackBars(int bars) { m_lookback_bars = bars; }
  402 | void SetMaxGaps(int max_gaps) 
  403 | { 
  404 | m_max_gaps = max_gaps; 
  405 | ArrayResize(m_gaps, m_max_gaps);
  406 | }
  407 | };
  408 | 
  409 | #endif // ANALYSIS_FAIRVALUEGAPS_MQH 
  410 | 
  411 |

   13 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   14 | //| POI Score Structure                                              |
   15 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   16 | struct POIScore
   17 | {
   18 | double liquiditySweepScore;
   19 | double imbalanceScore;
   20 | double freshnessScore;
   21 | double pdArrayScore;
   22 | double volumeProfileScore;
   23 | double confluenceScore;
   24 | double totalScore;
   25 | bool   isValid;
   26 | 
   27 | void Reset()
   28 | {
   29 | liquiditySweepScore = 0.0;
   30 | imbalanceScore = 0.0;
   31 | freshnessScore = 0.0;
   32 | pdArrayScore = 0.0;
   33 | volumeProfileScore = 0.0;
   34 | confluenceScore = 0.0;
   35 | totalScore = 0.0;
   36 | isValid = false;
   37 | }
   38 | };
   39 | 
   40 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   41 | //| Scoring Criteria Weights (can be made inputs later)              |
   42 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   43 | #define WEIGHT_LIQUIDITY_SWEEP 25
   44 | #define WEIGHT_IMBALANCE 20
   45 | #define WEIGHT_FRESHNESS 15
   46 | #define WEIGHT_PD_ARRAY 15
   47 | #define WEIGHT_VOLUME_PROFILE 10
   48 | #define WEIGHT_CONFLUENCE 15
   49 | 
   50 | 
   51 | 
   52 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   53 | //| POI Scoring Engine Class                                         |
   54 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   55 | class CPOIScoringEngine
   56 | {
   57 | private:
   58 | int CalculateLiquiditySweepScore(OrderBlock &ob, SwingPoint &structure[])
   59 | {
   60 | // TODO: Find the swing point that this OB is supposed to have swept.
   61 | // For now, placeholder.
   62 | return 50; 
   63 | }
   64 | 
   65 | int CalculateImbalanceScore(OrderBlock &ob, FairValueGap &fvgs[])
   66 | {
   67 | // Check if the OB is directly followed by or adjacent to an FVG
   68 | for(int i = 0; i < ArraySize(fvgs); i++)
   69 | {
   70 | // Bullish OB: FVG should be right after
   71 | if(ob.isBullish && fvgs[i].barIndex == ob.barIndex - 1)
   72 | {
   73 | // Check if the FVG is significant (e.g., larger than the OB body)
   74 | return 100; // High score for clear imbalance
   75 | }
   76 | // Bearish OB: FVG should be right after
   77 | if(!ob.isBullish && fvgs[i].barIndex == ob.barIndex - 1)
   78 | {
   79 | return 100; // High score for clear imbalance
   80 | }
   81 | }
   82 | return 10; // Low score if no immediate FVG
   83 | }
   84 | 
   85 | int CalculateFreshnessScore(OrderBlock &ob)
   86 | {
   87 | // 100 if valid (not mitigated), 0 if invalid (mitigated)
   88 | return ob.isValid ? 100 : 0; 
   89 | }
   90 | 
   91 | int CalculatePDArrayScore(OrderBlock &ob, SwingPoint &leg_start, SwingPoint &leg_end)
   92 | {
   93 | if(leg_start.time == 0 || leg_end.time == 0) return 50; // Neutral if leg not found
   94 | 
   95 | double equilibrium = (leg_start.price + leg_end.price) / 2.0;
   96 | 
   97 | // For a Bullish OB (demand), we want it to be in the discount zone.
   98 | if(ob.isBullish)
   99 | {
  100 | if(ob.lowPrice < equilibrium) return 100; // Prime location
  101 | else return 20; // Poor location
  102 | }
  103 | // For a Bearish OB (supply), we want it to be in the premium zone.
  104 | else if(!ob.isBullish)
  105 | {
  106 | if(ob.highPrice > equilibrium) return 100; // Prime location
  107 | else return 20; // Poor location
  108 | }
  109 | 
  110 | return 50; // Should not happen
  111 | }
  112 | 
  113 | int CalculateVolumeProfileScore(OrderBlock &ob)
  114 | {
  115 | // TODO: Requires integration with a Volume Profile indicator.
  116 | // Check if the OB overlaps with a High Volume Node (HVN) or Point of Control (POC).
  117 | return 50; // Placeholder
  118 | }
  119 | 
  120 | int CalculateConfluenceScore(OrderBlock &ob)
  121 | {
  122 | // TODO: Check for confluence with other factors like:
  123 | // - MTF High/Low levels
  124 | // - Major round numbers
  125 | // - Other indicator signals (e.g., moving averages)
  126 | return 50; // Placeholder
  127 | }
  128 | 
  129 | public:
  130 | POIScore ScoreOrderBlock(OrderBlock &ob, const MqlRates &rates[], SwingPoint &structure[], FairValueGap &fvgs[])
  131 | {
  132 | POIScore score;
  133 | 
  134 | // Find the leg that the OB belongs to for context
  135 | SwingPoint leg_start, leg_end;
  136 | for(int i = ArraySize(structure) - 2; i >= 0; i--)
  137 | {
  138 | if(structure[i].time < ob.startTime && structure[i+1].time > ob.startTime)
  139 | {
  140 | leg_start = structure[i];
  141 | leg_end = structure[i+1];
  142 | break;
  143 | }
  144 | }
  145 | 
  146 | score.liquiditySweepScore = CalculateLiquiditySweepScore(ob, structure);
  147 | score.imbalanceScore = CalculateImbalanceScore(ob, fvgs);
  148 | score.freshnessScore = CalculateFreshnessScore(ob);
  149 | score.pdArrayScore = CalculatePDArrayScore(ob, leg_start, leg_end);
  150 | score.volumeProfileScore = CalculateVolumeProfileScore(ob);
  151 | score.confluenceScore = CalculateConfluenceScore(ob);
  152 | 
  153 | // Calculate total weighted score
  154 | score.totalScore = (score.liquiditySweepScore * WEIGHT_LIQUIDITY_SWEEP +
  155 | score.imbalanceScore * WEIGHT_IMBALANCE +
  156 | score.freshnessScore * WEIGHT_FRESHNESS +
  157 | score.pdArrayScore * WEIGHT_PD_ARRAY +
  158 | score.volumeProfileScore * WEIGHT_VOLUME_PROFILE +
  159 | score.confluenceScore * WEIGHT_CONFLUENCE) / 100;
  160 | 
  161 | return score;
  162 | }
  163 | 
  164 | // Method to score a Fair Value Gap (can be added later)
  165 | // POIScore ScoreFVG(const FairValueGap &fvg);
  166 | };
  167 | 
  168 |

   21 | HEALTH_EXCELLENT = 0,       // 90-100 score - Optimal conditions
   22 | HEALTH_GOOD = 1,           // 75-89 score - Good conditions
   23 | HEALTH_WARNING = 2,        // 60-74 score - Caution advised
   24 | HEALTH_POOR = 3,           // 40-59 score - High risk
   25 | HEALTH_CRITICAL = 4        // 0-39 score - Trading not recommended
   26 | };

   49 | double              uptimeRate;           // Connection uptime (%)

   85 | BrokerHealthMetrics         m_currentMetrics;

  156 | m_initialized = false;

  160 | void OnTick()
  161 | {

  165 | bool currentlyConnected = TerminalInfoInteger(TERMINAL_CONNECTED);
  166 | if(currentlyConnected != m_isConnected)
  167 | {
  168 | OnConnectionStatusChanged(currentlyConnected);
  169 | }
  170 |

  172 | if(TimeCurrent() - m_lastUpdateTime >= 10)
  173 | {
  174 | UpdateMetrics();
  175 | m_lastUpdateTime = TimeCurrent();
  176 | }
  177 | }
  178 | 
  179 | void OnTradeExecution(double requestedPrice, double executedPrice, 
  180 | bool wasSuccessful, bool wasRequoted)
  181 | {
  182 | if(!m_initialized) return;
  183 | 
  184 | // Calculate slippage
  185 | double slippagePips = CalculateSlippagePips(requestedPrice, executedPrice);
  186 | 
  187 | // Update metrics
  188 | m_currentMetrics.totalExecutions++;
  189 | if(wasSuccessful)
  190 | {
  191 | m_currentMetrics.successfulExecutions++;
  192 | }
  193 | if(wasRequoted)
  194 | {
  195 | m_currentMetrics.totalRequotes++;
  196 | }
  197 | 
  198 | // Update cumulative metrics
  199 | m_totalSlippage += MathAbs(slippagePips);
  200 | 
  201 | // Calculate averages
  202 | if(m_currentMetrics.totalExecutions > 0)
  203 | {
  204 | m_currentMetrics.averageSlippagePips = m_totalSlippage / m_currentMetrics.totalExecutions;
  205 | m_currentMetrics.successRate = (double)m_currentMetrics.successfulExecutions / 
  206 | m_currentMetrics.totalExecutions * 100.0;
  207 | m_currentMetrics.requoteRate = (double)m_currentMetrics.totalRequotes / 
  208 | m_currentMetrics.totalExecutions * 100.0;
  209 | }
  210 | 
  211 | // Recalculate health scores
  212 | CalculateHealthScores();
  213 | 
  214 | Print(StringFormat("[APEX_v4] Trade recorded: Slippage=%.1f pips, Success=%s",
  215 | slippagePips, wasSuccessful ? "Yes" : "No"));
  216 | }

  220 | 
  221 | double GetHealthScore() const { return m_currentMetrics.healthScore; }
  222 |

  227 | {
  228 | // Return risk adjustment factor based on health status
  229 | switch(m_currentMetrics.healthStatus)
  230 | {
  231 | case HEALTH_EXCELLENT:  return 1.0;    // No adjustment
  232 | case HEALTH_GOOD:       return 0.9;    // Slight reduction
  233 | case HEALTH_WARNING:    return 0.7;    // Moderate reduction
  234 | case HEALTH_POOR:       return 0.5;    // Significant reduction
  235 | case HEALTH_CRITICAL:   return 0.2;    // Minimal risk only
  236 | default:                return 1.0;
  237 | }
  238 | }
  239 | 
  240 | bool ShouldReduceRisk() const
  241 | {
  242 | return m_currentMetrics.healthStatus >= HEALTH_WARNING;
  243 | }
  244 |

  246 | {
  247 | return m_currentMetrics.healthStatus == HEALTH_CRITICAL;
  248 | }

  252 | {

  254 | m_currentMetrics.healthScore,
  255 | GetHealthStatusString(m_currentMetrics.healthStatus),
  256 | m_currentMetrics.successRate,
  257 | m_currentMetrics.averageSlippagePips);

  261 | {

  263 | report += StringFormat("Overall Health Score: %.2f%% (%s)\n",

  269 | report += StringFormat("Success Rate: %.1f%%\n", m_currentMetrics.successRate);
  270 | report += StringFormat("Requote Rate: %.1f%%\n", m_currentMetrics.requoteRate);
  271 | report += StringFormat("Uptime Rate: %.1f%%\n", m_currentMetrics.uptimeRate);
  272 |

  274 | report += StringFormat("Total Executions: %d\n", m_currentMetrics.totalExecutions);
  275 | report += StringFormat("Successful Executions: %d\n", m_currentMetrics.successfulExecutions);
  276 | report += StringFormat("Total Requotes: %d\n", m_currentMetrics.totalRequotes);
  277 | report += StringFormat("Connection Drops: %d\n", m_currentMetrics.connectionDrops);
  278 |

  282 | report += StringFormat("Circuit Breaker Trigger: %s\n", ShouldTriggerCircuitBreaker() ? "YES" : "NO");
  283 |

  285 | return report;
  286 | }
  287 | 
  288 | private:
  289 | //--- Internal Update Methods - inline implementations
  290 | void UpdateMetrics()
  291 | {
  292 | // Update connection metrics
  293 | UpdateConnectionMetrics();
  294 | 
  295 | // Calculate component scores
  296 | CalculateHealthScores();
  297 | }
  298 | 
  299 | void UpdateConnectionMetrics()
  300 | {
  301 | // Calculate uptime percentage
  302 | double totalTime = (double)(TimeCurrent() - m_connectionStartTime);
  303 | if(totalTime > 0)
  304 | {
  305 | double uptimeTime = totalTime - (m_currentMetrics.connectionDrops * 60.0); // Assume 1 min per drop
  306 | m_currentMetrics.uptimeRate = MathMax(0.0, (uptimeTime / totalTime) * 100.0);
  307 | }
  308 | }
  309 | 
  310 | void CalculateHealthScores()
  311 | {
  312 | // Calculate individual component scores
  313 | m_currentMetrics.executionScore = CalculateExecutionScore();
  314 | m_currentMetrics.slippageScore = CalculateSlippageScore();
  315 | m_currentMetrics.requoteScore = CalculateRequoteScore();
  316 | m_currentMetrics.uptimeScore = CalculateUptimeScore();
  317 | 
  318 | // Calculate weighted overall score (simplified)
  319 | m_currentMetrics.healthScore = (m_currentMetrics.executionScore * 0.4 +
  320 | m_currentMetrics.slippageScore * 0.3 +
  321 | m_currentMetrics.requoteScore * 0.2 +
  322 | m_currentMetrics.uptimeScore * 0.1);
  323 | 
  324 | m_currentMetrics.healthScore = MathMax(0.0, MathMin(100.0, m_currentMetrics.healthScore));
  325 | m_currentMetrics.healthStatus = DetermineHealthStatus(m_currentMetrics.healthScore);
  326 | }
  327 | 
  328 | double CalculateExecutionScore()
  329 | {
  330 | if(m_currentMetrics.totalExecutions == 0) return 100.0;
  331 | return m_currentMetrics.successRate;
  332 | }
  333 | 
  334 | double CalculateSlippageScore()
  335 | {
  336 | if(m_currentMetrics.averageSlippagePips <= 0) return 100.0;
  337 | if(m_currentMetrics.averageSlippagePips <= 1.0) return 100.0;
  338 | if(m_currentMetrics.averageSlippagePips <= 2.0) return 80.0;
  339 | if(m_currentMetrics.averageSlippagePips <= 3.0) return 60.0;
  340 | return MathMax(0.0, 60.0 - (m_currentMetrics.averageSlippagePips - 3.0) * 10.0);
  341 | }
  342 | 
  343 | double CalculateRequoteScore()
  344 | {
  345 | if(m_currentMetrics.requoteRate <= 0) return 100.0;
  346 | if(m_currentMetrics.requoteRate <= 2.0) return 100.0;
  347 | if(m_currentMetrics.requoteRate <= 5.0) return 80.0;
  348 | return MathMax(0.0, 80.0 - (m_currentMetrics.requoteRate - 5.0) * 5.0);
  349 | }
  350 | 
  351 | double CalculateUptimeScore()
  352 | {
  353 | return MathMax(0.0, MathMin(100.0, m_currentMetrics.uptimeRate));
  354 | }
  355 | 
  356 | void OnConnectionStatusChanged(bool isConnected)
  357 | {
  358 | if(isConnected && !m_isConnected)
  359 | {
  360 | Print("[APEX_v4] Broker connection restored");
  361 | }
  362 | else if(!isConnected && m_isConnected)
  363 | {
  364 | m_currentMetrics.connectionDrops++;
  365 | Print("[APEX_v4] Broker connection lost (total drops: " + 
  366 | IntegerToString(m_currentMetrics.connectionDrops) + ")");
  367 | }
  368 | 
  369 | m_isConnected = isConnected;
  370 | }
  371 | 
  372 | //--- Missing UpdateBaseline Method - inline implementation
  373 | void UpdateBaseline()
  374 | {
  375 | // Initialize baseline broker performance metrics
  376 | Print("[APEX_v4] Updating broker health baseline metrics");
  377 | 
  378 | // Set initial baseline values
  379 | m_currentMetrics.Initialize();
  380 | 
  381 | // Reset performance tracking
  382 | m_totalLatency = 0.0;
  383 | m_totalSlippage = 0.0;
  384 | 
  385 | // Mark connection start time
  386 | m_connectionStartTime = TimeCurrent();
  387 | m_isConnected = TerminalInfoInteger(TERMINAL_CONNECTED);
  388 | 
  389 | Print("[APEX_v4] Broker health baseline updated successfully");
  390 | }
  391 | 
  392 | //--- Utility Methods - inline implementations
  393 | double CalculateSlippagePips(double requested, double executed)
  394 | {
  395 | if(requested == 0.0 || executed == 0.0) return 0.0;
  396 | 
  397 | double pipValue = SymbolInfoDouble(Symbol(), SYMBOL_POINT);
  398 | if(SymbolInfoInteger(Symbol(), SYMBOL_DIGITS) == 5 || 
  399 | SymbolInfoInteger(Symbol(), SYMBOL_DIGITS) == 3)
  400 | {
  401 | pipValue *= 10; // Account for 5-digit brokers
  402 | }
  403 | 
  404 | return MathAbs(executed - requested) / pipValue;
  405 | }
  406 | 
  407 | ENUM_BROKER_HEALTH DetermineHealthStatus(double healthScore)
  408 | {
  409 | if(healthScore >= 90.0) return HEALTH_EXCELLENT;
  410 | if(healthScore >= 75.0) return HEALTH_GOOD;
  411 | if(healthScore >= 60.0) return HEALTH_WARNING;
  412 | if(healthScore >= 40.0) return HEALTH_POOR;
  413 | return HEALTH_CRITICAL;
  414 | }
  415 | 
  416 | string GetHealthStatusString(ENUM_BROKER_HEALTH status) const
  417 | {
  418 | switch(status)
  419 | {
  420 | case HEALTH_EXCELLENT:  return "EXCELLENT";
  421 | case HEALTH_GOOD:       return "GOOD";
  422 | case HEALTH_WARNING:    return "WARNING";
  423 | case HEALTH_POOR:       return "POOR";
  424 | case HEALTH_CRITICAL:   return "CRITICAL";
  425 | default:                return "UNKNOWN";
  426 | }
  427 | }
  428 | };
  429 | 
  430 | #endif // ANALYSIS_BROKERHEALTH_MQH
  431 | 
  432 | 
  433 |

  152 | // Analysis methods
  153 | void                    AnalyzeAssetCharacteristics() {
  154 | // Calculate ATR for volatility - FIXED
  155 | int atrHandle = iATR(m_symbol, m_timeframe, 14);
  156 | if(atrHandle == INVALID_HANDLE) return;
  157 | 
  158 | double atrBuffer[1];
  159 | if(CopyBuffer(atrHandle, 0, 1, 1, atrBuffer) <= 0) return;
  160 | double atr = atrBuffer[0];
  161 | m_assetProfile.averageATR = atr;
  162 | 
  163 | // PRODUCTION FIX: Rename to avoid global variable hiding
  164 | double localCurrentPrice = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_ASK);
  165 | // Calculate volatility score (0-1 scale)
  166 | double atrPercent = (atr / localCurrentPrice) * 100.0;
  167 | m_assetProfile.volatilityScore = MathMin(1.0, atrPercent / 2.0); // Scale to 0-1
  168 | 
  169 | // Determine volatility classification
  170 | m_assetProfile.isHighVolatility = (atrPercent > 1.5);
  171 | 
  172 | // Calculate trend score using EMAs - SONIC R FIX: Updated to EMA 34,89,200
  173 | // 🎯 PHASE FINAL: Complete migration to unified system
  174 | CUnifiedIndicatorManager* manager = CUnifiedIndicatorManager::GetInstance();
  175 | 
  176 | if(manager == NULL) {
  177 | ::Print("[PHASE FINAL] Asset_DNA_System: Unified manager not available");
  178 | return;
  179 | }
  180 | 
  181 | // EMA20 and EMA50 removed - keep only EMA34, EMA89, EMA200
  182 | // NEW CODE (UNIFIED SYSTEM):
  183 | int ema34Handle = manager.GetOptimizedEMAHandle(m_symbol, m_timeframe, 34, PRICE_CLOSE);
  184 | int ema89Handle = manager.GetOptimizedEMAHandle(m_symbol, m_timeframe, 89, PRICE_CLOSE);
  185 | int ema200Handle = manager.GetOptimizedEMAHandle(m_symbol, m_timeframe, 200, PRICE_CLOSE);
  186 | 
  187 | // Log migration success - EMA20 and EMA50 removed
  188 | manager.MigrateLegacyIndicatorCalls(
  189 | "Asset_DNA_System.mqh",
  190 | 240,
  191 | "Asset DNA EMA20/50 removed - keep 34/89/200",
  192 | "EMA20 and EMA50 eliminated from system"
  193 | );
  194 | 
  195 | if(ema34Handle == INVALID_HANDLE || ema89Handle == INVALID_HANDLE || ema200Handle == INVALID_HANDLE) {
  196 | ::Print("[PHASE FINAL] Failed to create unified EMA handles for Asset DNA");
  197 | return;
  198 | }
  199 | 
  200 | if(ema34Handle == INVALID_HANDLE || ema89Handle == INVALID_HANDLE || ema200Handle == INVALID_HANDLE) return;
  201 | 
  202 | double ema34Buffer[1], ema89Buffer[1], ema200Buffer[1];
  203 | if(CopyBuffer(ema34Handle, 0, 1, 1, ema34Buffer) <= 0) return;
  204 | if(CopyBuffer(ema89Handle, 0, 1, 1, ema89Buffer) <= 0) return;
  205 | if(CopyBuffer(ema200Handle, 0, 1, 1, ema200Buffer) <= 0) return;
  206 | 
  207 | double ema34 = ema34Buffer[0];
  208 | double ema89 = ema89Buffer[0];
  209 | double ema200 = ema200Buffer[0];
  210 | 
  211 | // Trend score calculation (EMA20 and EMA50 removed)
  212 | if(ema34 > ema89 && ema89 > ema200) 
  213 | m_assetProfile.trendScore = 1.0; // Strong uptrend
  214 | else if(ema34 < ema89 && ema89 < ema200) 
  215 | m_assetProfile.trendScore = 0.0; // Strong downtrend
  216 | else 
  217 | m_assetProfile.trendScore = 0.5; // Sideways/weak trend
  218 | 
  219 | m_assetProfile.isStrongTrending = (m_assetProfile.trendScore <= 0.2 || m_assetProfile.trendScore >= 0.8);
  220 | 
  221 | // Calculate momentum score using RSI - FIXED
  222 | int rsiHandle = iRSI(m_symbol, m_timeframe, 14, PRICE_CLOSE);
  223 | if(rsiHandle == INVALID_HANDLE) return;
  224 | 
  225 | double rsiBuffer[1];
  226 | if(CopyBuffer(rsiHandle, 0, 1, 1, rsiBuffer) <= 0) return;
  227 | double rsi = rsiBuffer[0];
  228 | 
  229 | // Momentum score (distance from 50)
  230 | m_assetProfile.momentumScore = MathAbs(rsi - 50.0) / 50.0;
  231 | 
  232 | // Simple liquidity score based on symbol type
  233 | if(StringFind(m_symbol, "XAU") >= 0 || StringFind(m_symbol, "GOLD") >= 0)
  234 | m_assetProfile.liquidityScore = 0.8; // Gold - high liquidity
  235 | else if(StringFind(m_symbol, "USD") >= 0 || StringFind(m_symbol, "EUR") >= 0)
  236 | m_assetProfile.liquidityScore = 0.9; // Major pairs - very high liquidity
  237 | else
  238 | m_assetProfile.liquidityScore = 0.6; // Other symbols - medium liquidity
  239 |

  241 | CalculateOptimalParameters();
  242 |

  245 |

  247 | };
  248 | void                    UpdateStrategyPerformance();

  253 | 
  254 | // PHASE 1: Asset Classification methods
  255 | ENUM_ASSET_TYPE         ClassifyAssetType()
  256 | {
  257 | if(!ENABLE_ASSET_CLASSIFICATION) return ASSET_UNKNOWN;
  258 | 
  259 | string symbol = m_symbol;  // Copy the symbol
  260 | StringToUpper(symbol);     // Convert to uppercase in-place - StringToUpper returns int, not string
  261 | 
  262 | // FOREX Classification
  263 | if(StringLen(symbol) == 6 && 
  264 | (StringFind(symbol, "USD") >= 0 || StringFind(symbol, "EUR") >= 0 || 
  265 | StringFind(symbol, "GBP") >= 0 || StringFind(symbol, "JPY") >= 0 ||
  266 | StringFind(symbol, "CHF") >= 0 || StringFind(symbol, "CAD") >= 0 ||
  267 | StringFind(symbol, "AUD") >= 0 || StringFind(symbol, "NZD") >= 0))
  268 | {
  269 | return ASSET_FOREX;
  270 | }
  271 | 
  272 | // COMMODITY Classification
  273 | if(StringFind(symbol, "XAU") >= 0 || StringFind(symbol, "GOLD") >= 0 ||
  274 | StringFind(symbol, "XAG") >= 0 || StringFind(symbol, "SILVER") >= 0 ||
  275 | StringFind(symbol, "OIL") >= 0 || StringFind(symbol, "WTI") >= 0 ||
  276 | StringFind(symbol, "BRENT") >= 0 || StringFind(symbol, "XTIUSD") >= 0 ||
  277 | StringFind(symbol, "XBRUSD") >= 0)
  278 | {
  279 | return ASSET_COMMODITY;
  280 | }
  281 | 
  282 | // CRYPTO Classification
  283 | if(StringFind(symbol, "BTC") >= 0 || StringFind(symbol, "ETH") >= 0 ||
  284 | StringFind(symbol, "LTC") >= 0 || StringFind(symbol, "XRP") >= 0 ||
  285 | StringFind(symbol, "ADA") >= 0 || StringFind(symbol, "DOT") >= 0 ||
  286 | StringFind(symbol, "CRYPTO") >= 0)
  287 | {
  288 | return ASSET_CRYPTO;
  289 | }
  290 | 
  291 | // INDEX Classification
  292 | if(StringFind(symbol, "SPX") >= 0 || StringFind(symbol, "SP500") >= 0 ||
  293 | StringFind(symbol, "NAS") >= 0 || StringFind(symbol, "DAX") >= 0 ||
  294 | StringFind(symbol, "FTSE") >= 0 || StringFind(symbol, "NIKKEI") >= 0 ||
  295 | StringFind(symbol, "DJI") >= 0 || StringFind(symbol, "INDEX") >= 0)
  296 | {
  297 | return ASSET_INDEX;
  298 | }
  299 | 
  300 | return ASSET_UNKNOWN;
  301 | }
  302 | void                    SetAssetSpecificParameters()
  303 | {
  304 | if(!ENABLE_ASSET_SPECIFIC_PARAMS) return;
  305 | 
  306 | m_assetProfile.assetType = ClassifyAssetType();
  307 | m_assetProfile.assetRiskMultiplier = GetAssetRiskMultiplier(m_assetProfile.assetType);
  308 | m_assetProfile.assetVolatilityBase = GetAssetVolatilityBase(m_assetProfile.assetType);
  309 | m_assetProfile.assetLiquidityFactor = GetAssetLiquidityFactor(m_assetProfile.assetType);
  310 | 
  311 | // Set human readable category
  312 | switch(m_assetProfile.assetType)
  313 | {
  314 | case ASSET_FOREX:
  315 | m_assetProfile.assetCategory = "Foreign Exchange";
  316 | break;
  317 | case ASSET_COMMODITY:
  318 | m_assetProfile.assetCategory = "Commodity";
  319 | break;
  320 | case ASSET_CRYPTO:
  321 | m_assetProfile.assetCategory = "Cryptocurrency";
  322 | break;
  323 | case ASSET_INDEX:
  324 | m_assetProfile.assetCategory = "Stock Index";
  325 | break;
  326 | default:
  327 | m_assetProfile.assetCategory = "Unknown Asset";
  328 | break;
  329 | }
  330 | 
  331 | m_assetProfile.isAssetClassified = (m_assetProfile.assetType != ASSET_UNKNOWN);
  332 | 
  333 | // Log classification result
  334 | if(m_context && CheckPointer(m_context.pLogger) == POINTER_DYNAMIC)
  335 | {
  336 | string isClassifiedStr = m_assetProfile.isAssetClassified ? "true" : "false";
  337 | ::Print("PHASE 1: Asset " + m_symbol + " classified as " + m_assetProfile.assetCategory + 
  338 | " (Risk Multiplier: " + DoubleToString(m_assetProfile.assetRiskMultiplier, 2) + ")" +
  339 | " | isClassified: " + isClassifiedStr);
  340 | }
  341 | }
  342 | double                  GetAssetRiskMultiplier(ENUM_ASSET_TYPE assetType)
  343 | {
  344 | switch(assetType)
  345 | {
  346 | case ASSET_FOREX:
  347 | return 1.0;     // Base risk for FOREX
  348 | case ASSET_COMMODITY:
  349 | return 0.8;     // Lower risk for commodities (more volatile)
  350 | case ASSET_CRYPTO:
  351 | return 0.5;     // Much lower risk for crypto (extremely volatile)
  352 | case ASSET_INDEX:
  353 | return 1.2;     // Slightly higher risk for indices (more stable)
  354 | default:
  355 | return 1.0;     // Default risk
  356 | }
  357 | }
  358 | double                  GetAssetVolatilityBase(ENUM_ASSET_TYPE assetType)
  359 | {
  360 | switch(assetType)
  361 | {
  362 | case ASSET_FOREX:
  363 | return 0.5;     // Medium volatility base
  364 | case ASSET_COMMODITY:
  365 | return 0.7;     // Higher volatility base
  366 | case ASSET_CRYPTO:
  367 | return 0.9;     // Very high volatility base
  368 | case ASSET_INDEX:
  369 | return 0.4;     // Lower volatility base
  370 | default:
  371 | return 0.5;     // Default volatility
  372 | }
  373 | }
  374 | double                  GetAssetLiquidityFactor(ENUM_ASSET_TYPE assetType)
  375 | {
  376 | switch(assetType)
  377 | {
  378 | case ASSET_FOREX:
  379 | return 1.0;     // High liquidity
  380 | case ASSET_COMMODITY:
  381 | return 0.8;     // Good liquidity
  382 | case ASSET_CRYPTO:
  383 | return 0.6;     // Variable liquidity
  384 | case ASSET_INDEX:
  385 | return 0.9;     // Good liquidity
  386 | default:
  387 | return 0.7;     // Default liquidity
  388 | }
  389 | }
  390 | 
  391 | // PHASE 2: Market Regime methods
  392 | void                    DetectMarketRegime()
  393 | {
  394 | 	// Simple heuristic using volatility and trend to set regime
  395 | 	double vol = m_assetProfile.volatilityScore;
  396 | 	double trend = m_assetProfile.trendScore;
  397 | 	ENUM_MARKET_REGIME detected = REGIME_RANGING;
  398 | 	if(vol >= 0.6 && trend >= 0.5) detected = REGIME_VOLATILE_TRENDING;
  399 | 	else if(vol >= 0.6 && trend < 0.5) detected = REGIME_VOLATILE_RANGING;
  400 | 	else if(vol < 0.6 && trend >= 0.5) detected = REGIME_STABLE_TRENDING;
  401 | 	else detected = REGIME_STABLE_RANGING;
  402 | 	
  403 | 	if(!ValidateRegimeTransition(m_assetProfile.currentRegime, detected))
  404 | 		return;
  405 | 	
  406 | 	m_assetProfile.previousRegime = m_assetProfile.currentRegime;
  407 | 	m_assetProfile.currentRegime = detected;
  408 | 	m_assetProfile.regimeConfidence = 0.7;
  409 | 	m_assetProfile.regimeChangeTime = TimeCurrent();
  410 | }
  411 | 
  412 | double                  GetRegimeRiskMultiplier(ENUM_MARKET_REGIME regime)
  413 | {
  414 | 	switch(regime)
  415 | 	{
  416 | 		case REGIME_VOLATILE_TRENDING:   return 0.8; // reduce size in volatile trend
  417 | 		case REGIME_VOLATILE_RANGING:    return 0.7; // reduce more in volatile range
  418 | 		case REGIME_STABLE_TRENDING:     return 1.1; // can scale slightly
  419 | 		case REGIME_STABLE_RANGING:      return 1.0;
  420 | 		default:                         return 1.0;
  421 | 	}
  422 | }
  423 | 
  424 | void                    UpdateAssetRegimeCombination()
  425 | {
  426 | 	double assetMult = m_assetProfile.assetRiskMultiplier;
  427 | 	double regimeMult = GetRegimeRiskMultiplier(m_assetProfile.currentRegime);
  428 | 	m_assetProfile.assetRegimeMultiplier = assetMult * regimeMult;
  429 | }
  430 | 
  431 | bool                    ValidateRegimeTransition(ENUM_MARKET_REGIME fromRegime, ENUM_MARKET_REGIME toRegime)
  432 | {
  433 | 	if(fromRegime == toRegime) return false; // no change
  434 | 	return true; // allow simple transitions; refine later
  435 | }
  436 | 
  437 | // Initialize Strategies - NEW METHOD
  438 | void                    InitializeStrategies()
  439 | {
  440 |     // Minimal safe initialization of strategy DNA array
  441 |     m_strategyCount = 0;
  442 |     const int maxStrategies = ArraySize(m_strategyPerformance);
  443 |     for(int i=0;i<maxStrategies;i++){
  444 |         m_strategyPerformance[i].strategy = SIGNAL_NONE;
  445 |         m_strategyPerformance[i].totalTrades = 0;
  446 |         m_strategyPerformance[i].winningTrades = 0;
  447 |         m_strategyPerformance[i].avgWinRate = 0.0;
  448 |         m_strategyPerformance[i].profitFactor = 0.0;
  449 |         m_strategyPerformance[i].expectancy = 0.0;
  450 |         m_strategyPerformance[i].sharpeRatio = 0.0;
  451 |         m_strategyPerformance[i].maxDrawdown = 0.0;
  452 |         m_strategyPerformance[i].reliability = 0.0;
  453 |         m_strategyPerformance[i].lastUpdate = 0;
  454 |     }
  455 | }
  456 | 
  457 | // Phase 3 Enhanced Methods
  458 | void                    CalculateOptimalParameters()
  459 | {
  460 | // Base values
  461 | double baseRisk = 1.0; // 1% base risk
  462 | double baseSL = 2.0;   // 2x ATR base SL
  463 | double baseTP = 3.0;   // 3x ATR base TP
  464 | 
  465 | // Adjust based on volatility
  466 | if(m_assetProfile.isHighVolatility)
  467 | {
  468 | // High volatility = wider stops, smaller positions
  469 | m_assetProfile.optimalRiskPercent = baseRisk * 0.7;
  470 | m_assetProfile.optimalSLMultiplier = baseSL * 1.5;
  471 | m_assetProfile.optimalTPMultiplier = baseTP * 1.5;
  472 | }
  473 | else if(m_assetProfile.volatilityScore < 0.3)
  474 | {
  475 | // Low volatility = tighter stops, larger positions
  476 | m_assetProfile.optimalRiskPercent = baseRisk * 1.2;
  477 | m_assetProfile.optimalSLMultiplier = baseSL * 0.8;
  478 | m_assetProfile.optimalTPMultiplier = baseTP * 0.8;
  479 | }
  480 | else
  481 | {
  482 | // Normal volatility
  483 | m_assetProfile.optimalRiskPercent = baseRisk;
  484 | m_assetProfile.optimalSLMultiplier = baseSL;
  485 | m_assetProfile.optimalTPMultiplier = baseTP;
  486 | }
  487 | 
  488 | // Adjust based on trend strength
  489 | if(m_assetProfile.isStrongTrending)
  490 | {
  491 | // Strong trend = let profits run
  492 | m_assetProfile.optimalTPMultiplier *= 1.3;
  493 | }
  494 | else if(m_assetProfile.isMeanReverting)
  495 | {
  496 | // Mean reverting = take profits quicker
  497 | m_assetProfile.optimalTPMultiplier *= 0.7;
  498 | m_assetProfile.optimalSLMultiplier *= 0.8;
  499 | }
  500 | 
  501 | // Liquidity adjustment
  502 | m_assetProfile.optimalRiskPercent *= m_assetProfile.liquidityScore;
  503 | }
  504 | void                    DetermineBestSession()
  505 | {
  506 | // Default session based on symbol
  507 | if(StringFind(m_symbol, "XAU") >= 0 || StringFind(m_symbol, "GOLD") >= 0)
  508 | {
  509 | // Gold trades best in London/NY overlap
  510 | m_assetProfile.bestSession = "LONDON_NY";
  511 | }
  512 | else if(StringFind(m_symbol, "JPY") >= 0)
  513 | {
  514 | // JPY pairs best in Asian session
  515 | m_assetProfile.bestSession = "ASIAN";
  516 | }
  517 | else if(StringFind(m_symbol, "EUR") >= 0 || StringFind(m_symbol, "GBP") >= 0)
  518 | {
  519 | // European pairs best in London
  520 | m_assetProfile.bestSession = "LONDON";
  521 | }
  522 | else if(StringFind(m_symbol, "USD") >= 0)
  523 | {
  524 | // USD pairs best in NY session
  525 | m_assetProfile.bestSession = "NEWYORK";
  526 | }
  527 | else
  528 | {
  529 | // Default to London session
  530 | m_assetProfile.bestSession = "LONDON";
  531 | }
  532 | }
  533 |

  577 | m_strategyPerformance[i].totalTrades = 0;
  578 | m_strategyPerformance[i].winningTrades = 0;

  582 | m_strategyPerformance[i].sharpeRatio = 0.0;
  583 | m_strategyPerformance[i].maxDrawdown = 0.0;
  584 | m_strategyPerformance[i].reliability = 0.0;
  585 | m_strategyPerformance[i].lastUpdate = 0;
  586 | }

  627 | {
  628 | ::Print("Asset DNA System deinitialized");
  629 | }
  630 | 
  631 | m_initialized = false;
  632 | m_context = NULL;
  633 | };
  634 | bool                    UpdateAnalysis() {
  635 | if(!m_initialized || !m_context) return false;
  636 | 
  637 | // Update every hour to avoid overload
  638 | static datetime lastUpdate = 0;
  639 | if(TimeCurrent() - lastUpdate < 3600) return true;
  640 | lastUpdate = TimeCurrent();
  641 | 
  642 | AnalyzeAssetCharacteristics();
  643 | UpdateStrategyPerformance();
  644 | 
  645 | // PHASE 2: Update market regime analysis
  646 | if(m_assetProfile.regimeDetectionEnabled)
  647 | {
  648 | DetectMarketRegime();
  649 | UpdateAssetRegimeCombination();
  650 | }
  651 | 
  652 | return true;
  653 | };
  654 | 
  655 | // Strategy optimization
  656 | ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE        GetOptimalStrategy()
  657 | {
  658 | if(!m_initialized) return SIGNAL_NONE;
  659 | 
  660 | // Simple strategy selection based on market conditions
  661 | 
  662 | // For trending markets
  663 | if(m_assetProfile.isStrongTrending)
  664 | {
  665 | if(m_assetProfile.trendScore > 0.6)
  666 | return SIGNAL_BUY; // Uptrend
  667 | else if(m_assetProfile.trendScore < 0.4)
  668 | return SIGNAL_SELL; // Downtrend
  669 | }
  670 | 
  671 | // For ranging markets with high volatility
  672 | if(m_assetProfile.isMeanReverting && m_assetProfile.isHighVolatility)
  673 | {
  674 | // Use momentum for entry decisions
  675 | if(m_assetProfile.momentumScore > 0.7)
  676 | return SIGNAL_SELL; // Overbought - sell
  677 | else if(m_assetProfile.momentumScore < 0.3)
  678 | return SIGNAL_BUY; // Oversold - buy
  679 | }
  680 | 
  681 | return SIGNAL_NONE;
  682 | }
  683 | double                  GetStrategyReliability(ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE strategy)
  684 | {
  685 | for(int i = 0; i < m_strategyCount; i++)
  686 | {
  687 | if(m_strategyPerformance[i].strategy == strategy)
  688 | return m_strategyPerformance[i].reliability;
  689 | }
  690 | 
  691 | return 0.5; // Default reliability
  692 | }
  693 | bool                    IsStrategyRecommended(ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE strategy)
  694 | {
  695 | double reliability = GetStrategyReliability(strategy);
  696 | return (reliability > 0.6); // Require 60%+ reliability
  697 | }

  702 | bool                    IsHighVolatilityAsset() { return m_assetProfile.isHighVolatility; }
  703 | bool                    IsTrendingAsset() { return m_assetProfile.isStrongTrending; }

  711 | bool                    IsAssetClassified() { return m_assetProfile.isAssetClassified; }
  712 |
