  714 | ENUM_MARKET_REGIME      GetCurrentRegime() { return m_assetProfile.currentRegime; }
  715 | ENUM_MARKET_REGIME      GetPreviousRegime() { return m_assetProfile.previousRegime; }
  716 | double                  GetRegimeConfidence() { return m_assetProfile.regimeConfidence; }
  717 | double                  GetAssetRegimeMultiplier() { return m_assetProfile.assetRegimeMultiplier; }
  718 | bool                    IsRegimeDetectionEnabled() { return m_assetProfile.regimeDetectionEnabled; }
  719 | datetime                GetRegimeChangeTime() { return m_assetProfile.regimeChangeTime; }
  720 | 
  721 | // PHASE 2: Asset-Regime combination methods
  722 | void                    UpdateMarketRegime(ENUM_MARKET_REGIME newRegime, double confidence);
  723 | double                  GetCombinedRiskMultiplier()
  724 | {
  725 | 	// If not initialized or regime detection is off, fall back to asset multiplier
  726 | 	if(!m_initialized || !m_assetProfile.regimeDetectionEnabled)
  727 | 		return MathMax(0.3, MathMin(1.5, m_assetProfile.assetRiskMultiplier));
  728 | 
  729 | 	// Base multipliers
  730 | 	double assetMult = m_assetProfile.assetRiskMultiplier;
  731 | 	double regimeMult = GetRegimeRiskMultiplier(m_assetProfile.currentRegime);
  732 | 
  733 | 	// Update asset-regime profile using the built-in weighted combiner
  734 | 	m_assetRegimeProfile.assetType = m_assetProfile.assetType;
  735 | 	m_assetRegimeProfile.marketRegime = m_assetProfile.currentRegime;
  736 | 	m_assetRegimeProfile.CalculateCombinedMultiplier(assetMult, regimeMult);
  737 | 
  738 | 	// Liquidity adjustment (dynamic, 0..1); default to neutral if not set
  739 | 	double liquidityAdj = (m_assetProfile.liquidityScore > 0.0 ? m_assetProfile.liquidityScore : 1.0);
  740 | 	m_assetRegimeProfile.liquidityAdjustment = liquidityAdj;
  741 | 
  742 | 	// Final combined multiplier with clamp for safety
  743 | 	double combined = m_assetRegimeProfile.combinedRiskMultiplier * liquidityAdj;
  744 | 	combined = MathMax(0.3, MathMin(1.5, combined));
  745 | 	return combined;
  746 | }
  747 | 	bool                    IsOptimalAssetRegimeCombination()
  748 | 	{
  749 | 		return m_assetRegimeProfile.isOptimal && m_assetRegimeProfile.confidenceLevel > 0.7;
  750 | 	}
  751 | string                  GetRegimeDescription(ENUM_MARKET_REGIME regime)
  752 | {
  753 | switch(regime)
  754 | {
  755 | case REGIME_TRENDING_LOW_VOL:
  756 | return "Trending Low Volatility";
  757 | case REGIME_TRENDING_HIGH_VOL:
  758 | return "Trending High Volatility";
  759 | case REGIME_RANGING_LOW_VOL:
  760 | return "Ranging Low Volatility";
  761 | case REGIME_RANGING_HIGH_VOL:
  762 | return "Ranging High Volatility";
  763 | default:
  764 | return "Unknown Regime";
  765 | }
  766 | }
  767 | 
  768 | // Performance metrics
  769 | void                    RecordTradeResult(ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE strategy, bool isWin, double profit)
  770 | {
  771 | // Find or create strategy record
  772 | int strategyIndex = -1;
  773 | for(int i = 0; i < m_strategyCount; i++)
  774 | {
  775 | if(m_strategyPerformance[i].strategy == strategy)
  776 | {
  777 | strategyIndex = i;
  778 | break;
  779 | }
  780 | }
  781 | 
  782 | // Create new strategy record if not found
  783 | if(strategyIndex == -1 && m_strategyCount < 10)
  784 | {
  785 | strategyIndex = m_strategyCount;
  786 | m_strategyPerformance[strategyIndex].strategy = strategy;
  787 | m_strategyCount++;
  788 | }
  789 | 
  790 | if(strategyIndex >= 0)
  791 | {
  792 | // FIXED: Direct array access instead of pointer syntax
  793 | m_strategyPerformance[strategyIndex].totalTrades++;
  794 | 
  795 | if(isWin)
  796 | m_strategyPerformance[strategyIndex].winningTrades++;
  797 | 
  798 | // Update running averages (simplified)
  799 | m_strategyPerformance[strategyIndex].avgWinRate = (double)m_strategyPerformance[strategyIndex].winningTrades / m_strategyPerformance[strategyIndex].totalTrades * 100.0;
  800 | m_strategyPerformance[strategyIndex].lastUpdate = TimeCurrent();
  801 | }
  802 | }
  803 | double                  GetStrategyWinRate(ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE strategy)
  804 | {
  805 | for(int i = 0; i < m_strategyCount; i++)
  806 | {
  807 | if(m_strategyPerformance[i].strategy == strategy)
  808 | return m_strategyPerformance[i].avgWinRate;
  809 | }
  810 | 
  811 | return 0.0;
  812 | }
  813 | double                  GetStrategyProfitFactor(ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE strategy)
  814 | {
  815 | for(int i = 0; i < m_strategyCount; i++)
  816 | {
  817 | if(m_strategyPerformance[i].strategy == strategy)
  818 | return m_strategyPerformance[i].profitFactor;
  819 | }
  820 | 
  821 | return 1.0; // Default profit factor
  822 | }
  823 | 
  824 | // Reporting
  825 | string                  GenerateAssetReport()
  826 | {
  827 | string report = "";
  828 | report += "=== ASSET DNA ANALYSIS ===\n";
  829 | report += "Symbol: " + m_symbol + "\n";
  830 | 
  831 | // PHASE 1: Asset Classification Info
  832 | if(ENABLE_ASSET_CLASSIFICATION && m_assetProfile.isAssetClassified)
  833 | {
  834 | report += "Asset Type: " + m_assetProfile.assetCategory + "\n";
  835 | report += "Risk Multiplier: " + DoubleToString(m_assetProfile.assetRiskMultiplier, 2) + "\n";
  836 | report += "Volatility Base: " + DoubleToString(m_assetProfile.assetVolatilityBase, 2) + "\n";
  837 | report += "Liquidity Factor: " + DoubleToString(m_assetProfile.assetLiquidityFactor, 2) + "\n";
  838 | report += "---\n";
  839 | }
  840 | 
  841 | // PHASE 2: Market Regime Info
  842 | if(m_assetProfile.regimeDetectionEnabled)
  843 | {
  844 | report += "Current Regime: " + GetRegimeDescription(m_assetProfile.currentRegime) + "\n";
  845 | report += "Regime Confidence: " + DoubleToString(m_assetProfile.regimeConfidence * 100, 1) + "%\n";
  846 | report += "Combined Risk Multiplier: " + DoubleToString(GetCombinedRiskMultiplier(), 2) + "\n";
  847 | if(m_assetProfile.regimeChangeTime > 0)
  848 | {
  849 | report += "Last Regime Change: " + TimeToString(m_assetProfile.regimeChangeTime) + "\n";
  850 | }
  851 | report += "---\n";
  852 | }
  853 | 
  854 | report += "Volatility Score: " + DoubleToString(m_assetProfile.volatilityScore, 2) + "\n";
  855 | report += "Trend Score: " + DoubleToString(m_assetProfile.trendScore, 2) + "\n";
  856 | report += "Momentum Score: " + DoubleToString(m_assetProfile.momentumScore, 2) + "\n";
  857 | report += "Liquidity Score: " + DoubleToString(m_assetProfile.liquidityScore, 2) + "\n";
  858 | report += "Is Trending: " + (m_assetProfile.isStrongTrending ? "YES" : "NO") + "\n";
  859 | report += "Is High Volatility: " + (m_assetProfile.isHighVolatility ? "YES" : "NO") + "\n";
  860 | report += "========================\n";
  861 | 
  862 | return report;
  863 | }
  864 | string                  GenerateStrategyReport()
  865 | {
  866 | string report = "";
  867 | report += "=== STRATEGY PERFORMANCE ===\n";
  868 | 
  869 | for(int i = 0; i < m_strategyCount; i++)
  870 | {
  871 | // FIXED: Direct array access instead of pointer syntax
  872 | report += "Strategy: " + EnumToString(m_strategyPerformance[i].strategy) + "\n";
  873 | report += "  Total Trades: " + IntegerToString(m_strategyPerformance[i].totalTrades) + "\n";
  874 | report += "  Win Rate: " + DoubleToString(m_strategyPerformance[i].avgWinRate, 1) + "%\n";
  875 | report += "  Reliability: " + DoubleToString(m_strategyPerformance[i].reliability, 2) + "\n";
  876 | report += "  Recommended: " + (IsStrategyRecommended(m_strategyPerformance[i].strategy) ? "YES" : "NO") + "\n";
  877 | report += "---\n";
  878 | }
  879 | 
  880 | report += "========================\n";
  881 | return report;
  882 | }
  883 | void                    PrintDNAAnalysis()
  884 | {
  885 | // FIXED: Simplified logging using Print statements
  886 | ::Print("=== GIAI ĐOẠN 3: ASSET DNA ANALYSIS ===");
  887 | ::Print("Volatility: " + DoubleToString(m_assetProfile.volatilityScore*100, 1) + 
  888 | "% | Trend: " + DoubleToString(m_assetProfile.trendScore*100, 1) + 
  889 | "% | Momentum: " + DoubleToString(m_assetProfile.momentumScore*100, 1) + "%");
  890 | 
  891 | ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE optimal = GetOptimalStrategy();
  892 | if(optimal != SIGNAL_NONE)
  893 | {
  894 | ::Print("Optimal Strategy: " + EnumToString(optimal) + 
  895 | " (Reliability: " + DoubleToString(GetStrategyReliability(optimal)*100, 1) + "%)");
  896 | }
  897 | else
  898 | {
  899 | ::Print("No optimal strategy identified - market analysis pending");
  900 | }
  901 | }
  902 | 
  903 | // Phase 3 Adaptive Parameters
  904 | double                  GetAdaptivePositionSize(double baseSize)
  905 | {
  906 | if(!m_initialized) return baseSize;
  907 | 
  908 | double adaptiveSize = baseSize;
  909 | 
  910 | // Volatility adjustment
  911 | if(m_assetProfile.isHighVolatility)
  912 | {
  913 | adaptiveSize *= 0.7; // Reduce size by 30% for high volatility
  914 | }
  915 | else if(m_assetProfile.volatilityScore < 0.3)
  916 | {
  917 | adaptiveSize *= 1.2; // Increase size by 20% for low volatility
  918 | }
  919 | 
  920 | // Trend adjustment
  921 | if(m_assetProfile.isStrongTrending)
  922 | {
  923 | adaptiveSize *= 1.1; // Increase size by 10% for strong trends
  924 | }
  925 | 
  926 | // Liquidity adjustment
  927 | adaptiveSize *= m_assetProfile.liquidityScore;
  928 | 
  929 | // Session adjustment
  930 | MqlDateTime time;
  931 | TimeToStruct(TimeCurrent(), time);
  932 | bool inBestSession = false;
  933 | 
  934 | if(m_assetProfile.bestSession == "ASIAN" && time.hour >= 0 && time.hour <= 8)
  935 | inBestSession = true;
  936 | else if(m_assetProfile.bestSession == "LONDON" && time.hour >= 8 && time.hour <= 16)
  937 | inBestSession = true;
  938 | else if(m_assetProfile.bestSession == "NEWYORK" && time.hour >= 13 && time.hour <= 21)
  939 | inBestSession = true;
  940 | else if(m_assetProfile.bestSession == "LONDON_NY" && time.hour >= 13 && time.hour <= 17)
  941 | inBestSession = true;
  942 | 
  943 | if(!inBestSession)
  944 | {
  945 | adaptiveSize *= 0.8; // Reduce size by 20% outside best session
  946 | }
  947 | 
  948 | return NormalizeDouble(adaptiveSize, 2);
  949 | }
  950 | double                  GetAdaptiveSLMultiplier() { return m_assetProfile.optimalSLMultiplier; }
  951 | double                  GetAdaptiveTPMultiplier() { return m_assetProfile.optimalTPMultiplier; }
  952 | double                  GetOptimalRiskPercent() { return m_assetProfile.optimalRiskPercent; }
  953 | string                  GetBestTradingSession() { return m_assetProfile.bestSession; }
  954 | 
  955 | };

    7 | #define MARKET_MICROSTRUCTURE_MQH

   10 | 
   11 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   12 | //| MARKET MICROSTRUCTURE DATA STRUCTURES                            |
   13 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   14 | struct SMarketMicroData {
   15 |     double orderFlowImbalance;
   16 |     double volumeDelta;

   19 |     double marketDepthRatio;

  112 |     // this would analyze bid/ask volume distribution

  114 |     double sellVolume = 0;
  115 |     
  116 |     // Get recent tick data

  121 |     
  122 |     return (buyVolume - sellVolume) / (buyVolume + sellVolume);

  125 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  126 | //| CALCULATE VOLUME DELTA                                           |
  127 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  128 | double CMarketMicrostructureAnalyzer::CalculateVolumeDelta() {
  129 |     // Calculate the difference between buying and selling volume
  130 |     double volumeDelta = 0;
  131 |     
  132 |     // Get volume data for recent periods
  133 |     long volumes[];
  134 |     ArraySetAsSeries(volumes, true);
  135 |     
  136 |     if(CopyTickVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0, 10, volumes) <= 0) {
  137 |         return 0;
  138 |     }
  139 |     
  140 |     // Simple delta calculation
  141 |     if(ArraySize(volumes) >= 2) {
  142 |         volumeDelta = (double)(volumes[0] - volumes[1]);
  143 |     }
  144 |     
  145 |     return volumeDelta;
  146 | }
  147 | 
  148 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  149 | //| CALCULATE PRICE PRESSURE                                         |
  150 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  151 | double CMarketMicrostructureAnalyzer::CalculatePricePressure() {
  152 |     // Calculate price pressure based on recent price movements
  153 |     double pricePressure = 0;
  154 |     
  155 |     // Get recent price data
  156 |     double prices[];
  157 |     ArraySetAsSeries(prices, true);
  158 |     
  159 |     if(CopyClose(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0, 5, prices) <= 0) {
  160 |         return 0;
  161 |     }
  162 |     
  163 |     // Simple pressure calculation
  164 |     if(ArraySize(prices) >= 2) {
  165 |         pricePressure = (prices[0] - prices[1]) / prices[1];
  166 |     }
  167 |     
  168 |     return pricePressure;
  169 | }

  171 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  172 | //| CALCULATE LIQUIDITY LEVELS                                       |
  173 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  174 | double CMarketMicrostructureAnalyzer::CalculateLiquidityLevels() {
  175 |     // Calculate liquidity levels based on volume and spread
  176 |     double liquidityLevel = 0;
  177 |     
  178 |     // Get current spread
  179 |     double spread = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_ASK) - SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
  180 |     double point = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_POINT);
  181 |     
  182 |     if(point > 0) {
  183 |         liquidityLevel = spread / point;
  184 |     }
  185 |     
  186 |     return liquidityLevel;
  187 | }

  202 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  203 | //| INSTITUTIONAL ACTIVITY DETECTION                                 |
  204 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  205 | bool CMarketMicrostructureAnalyzer::IsInstitutionalActivity() {
  206 |     // Detect institutional activity based on volume patterns
  207 |     bool institutionalActivity = false;
  208 |     
  209 |     // Check for large volume spikes
  210 |     long volumes[];
  211 |     ArraySetAsSeries(volumes, true);
  212 |     
  213 |     if(CopyTickVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0, 20, volumes) > 0) {
  214 |         // Calculate average volume
  215 |         double avgVolume = 0;
  216 |         for(int i = 0; i < ArraySize(volumes); i++) {
  217 |             avgVolume += (double)volumes[i];
  218 |         }
  219 |         avgVolume /= (double)ArraySize(volumes);
  220 |         
  221 |         // Check if current volume is significantly higher
  222 |         if((double)volumes[0] > avgVolume * 2.0) {
  223 |             institutionalActivity = true;
  224 |         }
  225 |     }
  226 |     
  227 |     return institutionalActivity;
  228 | }
  229 | 
  230 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  231 | //| LIQUIDITY SQUEEZE DETECTION                                      |
  232 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  233 | bool CMarketMicrostructureAnalyzer::IsLiquiditySqueeze() {
  234 |     // Detect liquidity squeeze based on microstructure data
  235 |     bool liquiditySqueeze = false;
  236 |     
  237 |     // Check for low liquidity conditions
  238 |     double spread = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_ASK) - SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
  239 |     double point = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_POINT);
  240 |     
  241 |     if(point > 0 && spread > point * 10) {
  242 |         liquiditySqueeze = true;
  243 |     }
  244 |     
  245 |     return liquiditySqueeze;
  246 | }
  247 | 
  248 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  249 | //| ORDER FLOW ANOMALY DETECTION                                     |
  250 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  251 | bool CMarketMicrostructureAnalyzer::IsOrderFlowAnomalous() {
  252 |     // Detect anomalous order flow patterns
  253 |     bool anomalousFlow = false;
  254 |     
  255 |     // Check for unusual volume patterns
  256 |     long volumes[];
  257 |     ArraySetAsSeries(volumes, true);
  258 |     
  259 |     if(CopyTickVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0, 10, volumes) > 0) {
  260 |         // Calculate volume volatility
  261 |         double avgVolume = 0;
  262 |         double variance = 0;
  263 |         
  264 |         for(int i = 0; i < ArraySize(volumes); i++) {
  265 |             avgVolume += (double)volumes[i];
  266 |         }
  267 |         avgVolume /= (double)ArraySize(volumes);
  268 |         
  269 |         for(int i = 0; i < ArraySize(volumes); i++) {
  270 |             variance += MathPow((double)volumes[i] - avgVolume, 2);
  271 |         }
  272 |         variance /= (double)ArraySize(volumes);
  273 |         
  274 |         // If current volume is significantly different from average
  275 |         if(MathAbs((double)volumes[0] - avgVolume) > MathSqrt(variance) * 2.0) {
  276 |             anomalousFlow = true;
  277 |         }
  278 |     }
  279 |     
  280 |     return anomalousFlow;
  281 | }
  282 | 
  283 | #endif // MARKET_MICROSTRUCTURE_MQH

    1 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
    2 | //| Market Regime Detector - PHASE 3 Component                        |
    3 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
    4 | #property copyright "Sonic R MC - Market Regime Detection"
    5 | #property version   "3.0"
    6 | #property strict
    7 | 
    8 | 
    9 | #ifndef MARKET_REGIMEDETECTOR_MQH
   10 | #define MARKET_REGIMEDETECTOR_MQH
   11 | 
   12 | #include "01_Core_12_SonicEnums.mqh"
   13 | #include "01_Core_14_SharedDataStructures.mqh"
   14 | #include "02_DataProviders_05_IndicatorManager.mqh"    // CRITICAL FIX: Add for CUnifiedIndicatorManager
   15 | 
   16 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   17 | //| Market Regime Detector Class                                      |
   18 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   19 | class CMarketRegimeDetector
   20 | {
   21 | private:
   22 | // Configuration
   23 | int                     m_lookbackPeriod;
   24 | double                  m_volatilityThreshold;
   25 | double                  m_trendThreshold;
   26 | 
   27 | // State tracking
   28 | ENUM_MARKET_REGIME      m_currentRegime;
   29 | datetime               m_lastUpdateTime;
   30 | 
   31 | public:
   32 | // Constructor
   33 | CMarketRegimeDetector()
   34 | {
   35 | m_lookbackPeriod = 20;
   36 | m_volatilityThreshold = 0.02;
   37 | m_trendThreshold = 0.6;
   38 | m_currentRegime = REGIME_UNKNOWN;
   39 | m_lastUpdateTime = 0;
   40 | }
   41 | 
   42 | // Destructor
   43 | ~CMarketRegimeDetector() {}
   44 | 
   45 | // Initialize
   46 | bool Initialize()
   47 | {
   48 | m_currentRegime = REGIME_UNKNOWN;
   49 | m_lastUpdateTime = 0;
   50 | return true;
   51 | }
   52 | 
   53 | // Detect current market regime
   54 | ENUM_MARKET_REGIME DetectCurrentRegime()
   55 | {
   56 | if(TimeCurrent() - m_lastUpdateTime < 60) // Update every minute
   57 | return m_currentRegime;
   58 | 
   59 | // Calculate volatility
   60 | double volatility = CalculateVolatility();
   61 | 
   62 | // Calculate trend strength
   63 | double trendStrength = CalculateTrendStrength();
   64 | 
   65 | // Determine regime based on volatility and trend
   66 | if(volatility > m_volatilityThreshold)
   67 | {
   68 | if(trendStrength > m_trendThreshold)
   69 | m_currentRegime = ENUM_MARKET_REGIME::REGIME_VOLATILE_TRENDING;
   70 | else
   71 | m_currentRegime = ENUM_MARKET_REGIME::REGIME_VOLATILE_RANGING;
   72 | }
   73 | else
   74 | {
   75 | if(trendStrength > m_trendThreshold)
   76 | m_currentRegime = ENUM_MARKET_REGIME::REGIME_STABLE_TRENDING;
   77 | else
   78 | m_currentRegime = ENUM_MARKET_REGIME::REGIME_STABLE_RANGING;
   79 | }
   80 | 
   81 | m_lastUpdateTime = TimeCurrent();
   82 | return m_currentRegime;
   83 | }
   84 | 
   85 | // Get current regime
   86 | ENUM_MARKET_REGIME GetCurrentRegime() const
   87 | {
   88 | return m_currentRegime;
   89 | }
   90 | 
   91 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   92 | //| 🎯 VALIDATE SIGNAL FOR CURRENT REGIME                           |
   93 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   94 | bool IsSignalValidForCurrentRegime(const SignalData& signalData)
   95 | {
   96 | // Update regime detection
   97 | ENUM_MARKET_REGIME currentRegime = DetectCurrentRegime();
   98 | 
   99 | // Check if signal is valid for current regime
  100 | switch(currentRegime)
  101 | {
  102 | case REGIME_VOLATILE_TRENDING:
  103 | // In volatile trending markets, prefer trend-following signals
  104 | if(signalData.signalType == SIGNAL_BUY || signalData.signalType == SIGNAL_SELL) {
  105 | return signalData.confidence >= 0.8; // Higher confidence required
  106 | }
  107 | break;
  108 | 
  109 | case REGIME_VOLATILE_RANGING:
  110 | // In volatile ranging markets, be more conservative
  111 | if(signalData.signalType == SIGNAL_BUY || signalData.signalType == SIGNAL_SELL) {
  112 | return signalData.confidence >= 0.85; // Very high confidence required
  113 | }
  114 | break;
  115 | 
  116 | case REGIME_STABLE_TRENDING:
  117 | // In stable trending markets, standard validation
  118 | if(signalData.signalType == SIGNAL_BUY || signalData.signalType == SIGNAL_SELL) {
  119 | return signalData.confidence >= 0.7; // Standard confidence
  120 | }
  121 | break;
  122 | 
  123 | case REGIME_STABLE_RANGING:
  124 | // In stable ranging markets, prefer mean reversion signals
  125 | if(signalData.signalType == SIGNAL_BUY || signalData.signalType == SIGNAL_SELL) {
  126 | return signalData.confidence >= 0.75; // Moderate confidence
  127 | }
  128 | break;
  129 | 
  130 | case REGIME_UNKNOWN:
  131 | default:
  132 | // Unknown regime - be conservative
  133 | return signalData.confidence >= 0.8;
  134 | }
  135 | 
  136 | return false;
  137 | }
  138 | 
  139 | private:
  140 | // Calculate market volatility
  141 | double CalculateVolatility()
  142 | {
  143 | int atrHandle = iATR(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 14);
  144 | double atr[1];
  145 | if(CopyBuffer(atrHandle, 0, 1, 1, atr) > 0) {
  146 | IndicatorRelease(atrHandle);
  147 | double close = iClose(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 1);
  148 | return (atr[0] / close) * 100;
  149 | }
  150 | IndicatorRelease(atrHandle);
  151 | return 0.0;
  152 | }
  153 | 
  154 | // Calculate trend strength - SONIC R COMPLIANT (EMA34/89)
  155 | double CalculateTrendStrength()
  156 | {
  157 | // Get unified manager for Sonic R compliant EMAs
  158 | // 🔧 CRITICAL FIX: Kiểm tra manager null và tạo fallback
  159 | CUnifiedIndicatorManager* manager = CUnifiedIndicatorManager::GetInstance();
  160 | int ema34Handle, ema89Handle;  // Declare local variables
  161 | 
  162 | if(manager == NULL) {
  163 | Print("❌ [REGIME] Unified Indicator Manager not available, using fallback");
  164 | ema34Handle = iMA(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 34, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
  165 | ema89Handle = iMA(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 89, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
  166 | } else {
  167 | ema34Handle = manager.GetOptimizedEMAHandle(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 34, PRICE_CLOSE);
  168 | ema89Handle = manager.GetOptimizedEMAHandle(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 89, PRICE_CLOSE);
  169 | }
  170 | 
  171 | // Validate handles
  172 | if(ema34Handle == INVALID_HANDLE || ema89Handle == INVALID_HANDLE) {
  173 | Print("❌ [REGIME] Failed to create EMA handles");
  174 | Print("EMA34: ", (ema34Handle != INVALID_HANDLE ? "✅" : "❌"));
  175 | Print("EMA89: ", (ema89Handle != INVALID_HANDLE ? "✅" : "❌"));
  176 | return false;
  177 | }
  178 | 
  179 | double ema34[1], ema89[1]; 
  180 | double ema34Value = 0, ema89Value = 0;
  181 | 
  182 | if(CopyBuffer(ema34Handle, 0, 1, 1, ema34) > 0) {
  183 | ema34Value = ema34[0];
  184 | }
  185 | if(CopyBuffer(ema89Handle, 0, 1, 1, ema89) > 0) {
  186 | ema89Value = ema89[0];
  187 | }
  188 | 
  189 | // Only release handles if not using unified manager cache
  190 | if(manager == NULL) {
  191 | IndicatorRelease(ema34Handle);
  192 | IndicatorRelease(ema89Handle);
  193 | }
  194 | 
  195 | double close = iClose(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 1);
  196 | 
  197 | // Calculate trend alignment (Sonic R: price vs EMA34 vs EMA89)
  198 | double trendAlignment = 0;
  199 | if(close > ema34Value && ema34Value > ema89Value)
  200 | trendAlignment = 1.0;
  201 | else if(close < ema34Value && ema34Value < ema89Value)
  202 | trendAlignment = -1.0;
  203 | else
  204 | trendAlignment = 0.5;
  205 | 
  206 | return MathAbs(trendAlignment);
  207 | }
  208 | }; 
  209 |

    1 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
    2 | //| PHASE 3: ADAPTIVE SETTINGS MANAGER                              |

   27 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   28 | //| Adaptive Settings Manager Class                                 |
   29 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   30 | class CAdaptiveSettingsManager {
   31 | private:
   32 |     SAdaptiveSettings m_currentSettings;
   33 |     ENUM_MARKET_REGIME m_lastRegime;
   34 |     datetime m_lastUpdate;
   35 |     int m_regimeChangeCount;
   36 |     int m_adaptationCount;
   37 |     double m_averageVolatility;
   38 | 
   39 | public:
   40 |     CAdaptiveSettingsManager() {
   41 |         m_lastRegime = REGIME_UNDEFINED;
   42 |         m_lastUpdate = 0;
   43 |         m_regimeChangeCount = 0;
   44 |         m_adaptationCount = 0;
   45 |         m_averageVolatility = 0.0;
   46 |         InitializeDefaultSettings();
   47 |         UpdateSettings();
   48 |     }
   49 |     
   50 |     SAdaptiveSettings GetCurrentSettings() {
   51 |         if(TimeCurrent() - m_lastUpdate > 300 || ShouldForceUpdate()) {
   52 |             UpdateSettings();
   53 |         }
   54 |         return m_currentSettings;
   55 |     }
   56 |     
   57 |     double GetDynamicThreshold() {
   58 |         int atrHandle = iATR(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 14);
   59 |         double atr = 0.0;
   60 |         if(atrHandle != INVALID_HANDLE) {
   61 |             double atrBuffer[1];
   62 |             if(CopyBuffer(atrHandle, 0, 0, 1, atrBuffer) > 0) {
   63 |                 atr = atrBuffer[0];
   64 |             }
   65 |             IndicatorRelease(atrHandle);
   66 |         }
   67 |         if(atr == EMPTY_VALUE || atr <= 0) return 2.0;
   68 |         
   69 |         double atrPips = atr / _Point;
   70 |         if(atrPips > 50) return 3.0;
   71 |         if(atrPips < 20) return 1.0;
   72 |         return 2.0;
   73 |     }
   74 |     
   75 |     ENUM_MARKET_REGIME GetCurrentRegime() {
   76 |         return m_lastRegime;
   77 |     }
   78 |     
   79 |     string GetRegimeReport() {
   80 |         return StringFormat("Regime: %s | Changes: %d | Adaptations: %d | Avg Volatility: %.1f pips",
   81 |                            EnumToString(m_lastRegime), 
   82 |                            m_regimeChangeCount,
   83 |                            m_adaptationCount,
   84 |                            m_averageVolatility / _Point);
   85 |     }
   86 | 
   87 | private:
   88 |     void InitializeDefaultSettings() {
   89 |         m_currentSettings.dragonAngleThreshold = 2.0;
   90 |         m_currentSettings.volumeThreshold = 1.5;
   91 |         m_currentSettings.confluenceRequired = 0.75;
   92 |         m_currentSettings.signalStrengthMin = 0.7;
   93 |         m_currentSettings.atr_multiplier = 1.0;
   94 |     }
   95 |     
   96 |     void UpdateSettings() {
   97 |         ENUM_MARKET_REGIME newRegime = DetectMarketRegime();
   98 |         
   99 |         if(newRegime != m_lastRegime && m_lastRegime != REGIME_UNDEFINED) {
  100 |             m_regimeChangeCount++;
  101 |         }
  102 |         
  103 |         m_lastRegime = newRegime;
  104 |         m_lastUpdate = TimeCurrent();
  105 |         m_adaptationCount++;
  106 |         
  107 |         switch(newRegime) {
  108 |             case REGIME_TRENDING:
  109 |                 m_currentSettings.dragonAngleThreshold = 1.5;
  110 |                 m_currentSettings.confluenceRequired = 0.70;
  111 |                 m_currentSettings.signalStrengthMin = 0.60;
  112 |                 m_currentSettings.volumeThreshold = 1.3;
  113 |                 break;
  114 |                 
  115 |             case REGIME_RANGING:
  116 |                 m_currentSettings.dragonAngleThreshold = 0.8;
  117 |                 m_currentSettings.confluenceRequired = 0.85;
  118 |                 m_currentSettings.signalStrengthMin = 0.80;
  119 |                 m_currentSettings.volumeThreshold = 1.8;
  120 |                 break;
  121 |                 
  122 |             case REGIME_BREAKOUT:
  123 |                 m_currentSettings.dragonAngleThreshold = 2.5;
  124 |                 m_currentSettings.confluenceRequired = 0.75;
  125 |                 m_currentSettings.signalStrengthMin = 0.70;
  126 |                 m_currentSettings.volumeThreshold = 2.0;
  127 |                 break;
  128 |                 
  129 |             case REGIME_SQUEEZE:
  130 |                 m_currentSettings.dragonAngleThreshold = 0.5;
  131 |                 m_currentSettings.confluenceRequired = 0.60;
  132 |                 m_currentSettings.signalStrengthMin = 0.50;
  133 |                 m_currentSettings.volumeThreshold = 1.2;
  134 |                 break;
  135 |                 
  136 |             default:
  137 |                 InitializeDefaultSettings();
  138 |         }
  139 |         
  140 |         UpdateVolatilityAverage();
  141 |         
  142 |         Print("Adaptive Settings Updated - Regime: ", EnumToString(newRegime), 
  143 |               " | Dragon Threshold: ", m_currentSettings.dragonAngleThreshold);
  144 |     }
  145 |     
  146 |     ENUM_MARKET_REGIME DetectMarketRegime() {
  147 |         double atr = iATR(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 14);
  148 |         double emaHigh = iMA(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 34, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_HIGH);
  149 | double emaLow = iMA(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 34, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_LOW);
  150 | double close = iClose(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0);
  151 |         
  152 |         if(atr == EMPTY_VALUE || emaHigh == EMPTY_VALUE || 
  153 |            emaLow == EMPTY_VALUE || close == EMPTY_VALUE) {
  154 |             return REGIME_UNDEFINED;
  155 |         }
  156 |         
  157 |         double bandWidth = (emaHigh - emaLow) / atr;
  158 |         long currentVol = iVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0);
  159 |         double avgVol = CalculateAverageVolume(20);
  160 |         double volRatio = (avgVol > 0) ? ((double)currentVol) / avgVol : 1.0;
  161 |         
  162 |         if(bandWidth < 0.7) {
  163 |             return REGIME_SQUEEZE;
  164 |         }
  165 |         
  166 |         if(volRatio > 2.0 && bandWidth > 1.5) {
  167 |             return REGIME_BREAKOUT;
  168 |         }
  169 |         
  170 |         if(bandWidth > 2.0) {
  171 |             return REGIME_TRENDING;
  172 |         }
  173 |         
  174 |         return REGIME_RANGING;
  175 |     }
  176 |     
  177 |     double CalculateAverageVolume(int periods) {
  178 |         double totalVol = 0;
  179 |         int validBars = 0;
  180 |         
  181 |         for(int i = 1; i <= periods; i++) {
  182 |             long vol = iVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  183 |             if(vol > 0) {
  184 |                 totalVol += (double)vol;
  185 |                 validBars++;
  186 |             }
  187 |         }
  188 |         
  189 |         return (validBars > 0) ? totalVol / (double)validBars : 0.0;
  190 |     }
  191 |     
  192 |     bool ShouldForceUpdate() {
  193 |         int atrHandle = iATR(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 14);
  194 |         if(atrHandle == INVALID_HANDLE) return false;
  195 |         double atrBuffer[1];
  196 |         if(CopyBuffer(atrHandle, 0, 0, 1, atrBuffer) <= 0) {
  197 |             IndicatorRelease(atrHandle);
  198 |             return false;
  199 |         }
  200 |         double currentATR = atrBuffer[0];
  201 |         IndicatorRelease(atrHandle);
  202 |         if(currentATR <= 0) return false;
  203 |         double volatilityChange = MathAbs(currentATR - m_averageVolatility);
  204 |         return (volatilityChange > (m_averageVolatility * 0.3));
  205 |     }
  206 |     
  207 |     void UpdateVolatilityAverage() {
  208 |         int atrHandle = iATR(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 14);
  209 |         if(atrHandle != INVALID_HANDLE) {
  210 |             double atrBuffer[1];
  211 |             if(CopyBuffer(atrHandle, 0, 0, 1, atrBuffer) > 0) {
  212 |                 double currentATR = atrBuffer[0];
  213 |                 if(m_averageVolatility == 0) {
  214 |                     m_averageVolatility = currentATR;
  215 |                 } else {
  216 |                     m_averageVolatility = (m_averageVolatility * 0.8) + (currentATR * 0.2);
  217 |                 }
  218 |             }
  219 |             IndicatorRelease(atrHandle);
  220 |         }
  221 |     }
  222 | };
  223 | 
  224 | #endif
  225 |

   14 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   15 | struct SMarketStory {
   16 | string regime_story;        // Market regime description
   17 | string dragon_story;        // Dragon Band analysis
   18 | string volume_story;        // Volume analysis
   19 | string momentum_story;      // Momentum/trend story
   20 | string confluence_story;    // Signal confluence story
   21 | string risk_story;         // Risk assessment story
   22 | string complete_narrative; // Full market story
   23 | double confidence_score;   // Overall confidence 0-1
   24 | };
   25 | 
   26 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   27 | //| Market Narrative Generator Class                                |
   28 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   29 | class CMarketNarrativeGenerator {
   30 | private:
   31 | SMarketStory m_lastStory;
   32 | datetime m_lastGenerationTime;
   33 | int m_storyGenerationCount;
   34 | 
   35 | // Story templates and phrases
   36 | string m_regimePhrases[5];
   37 | string m_dragonPhrases[3];
   38 | string m_volumePhrases[3];
   39 | string m_momentumPhrases[3];
   40 | 
   41 | public:
   42 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   43 | //| Constructor                                                      |
   44 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   45 | CMarketNarrativeGenerator() {
   46 | m_lastGenerationTime = 0;
   47 | m_storyGenerationCount = 0;
   48 | InitializePhrases();
   49 | }

   51 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   52 | //| Generate Complete Market Narrative                              |
   53 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   54 | SMarketStory GenerateMarketNarrative() {
   55 | SMarketStory story;
   56 | m_storyGenerationCount++;
   57 | m_lastGenerationTime = TimeCurrent();
   58 | 
   59 | // Get market data
   60 | double dragonAngle = GetDragonAngle();
   61 | double waveScore = GetWavePatternScore();
   62 | double volumeScore = GetVolumeConfirmationScore();
   63 | ENUM_MARKET_REGIME regime = GetMarketRegime();
   64 | double atr = 0.0;
   65 | int atrHandle = iATR(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 14);
   66 | if(atrHandle == INVALID_HANDLE) atr = 0.0;
   67 | else {
   68 | double atrBuffer[1];
   69 | if(CopyBuffer(atrHandle, 0, 0, 1, atrBuffer) < 1) {
   70 | atr = 0.0;
   71 | } else {
   72 | atr = atrBuffer[0];
   73 | }
   74 | IndicatorRelease(atrHandle);
   75 | }
   76 | if(atr == EMPTY_VALUE) atr = 0.0;
   77 | double confluence = CalculateConfluenceScore();
   78 | 
   79 | // Generate individual story components
   80 | story.regime_story = GenerateRegimeStory(regime, atr);
   81 | story.dragon_story = GenerateDragonStory(dragonAngle);
   82 | story.volume_story = GenerateVolumeStory(volumeScore);
   83 | story.momentum_story = GenerateMomentumStory(waveScore, dragonAngle);
   84 | story.confluence_story = GenerateConfluenceStory(confluence);
   85 | story.risk_story = GenerateRiskStory(regime, volumeScore, confluence);
   86 | 
   87 | // Calculate overall confidence
   88 | story.confidence_score = CalculateNarrativeConfidence(dragonAngle, volumeScore, confluence);
   89 | 
   90 | // Compose complete narrative
   91 | story.complete_narrative = ComposeCompleteStory(story);
   92 | 
   93 | // Cache the story
   94 | m_lastStory = story;
   95 | 
   96 | return story;
   97 | }
   98 | 
   99 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  100 | //| Get Quick Market Summary                                        |
  101 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  102 | string GetQuickMarketSummary() {
  103 | ENUM_MARKET_REGIME regime = GetMarketRegime();
  104 | double dragonAngle = GetDragonAngle();
  105 | double volumeScore = GetVolumeConfirmationScore();
  106 | 
  107 | string summary = "📊 ";
  108 | 
  109 | // Quick regime assessment
  110 | switch(regime) {
  111 | case REGIME_TRENDING:
  112 | summary += "TRENDING";
  113 | break;
  114 | case REGIME_BREAKOUT:
  115 | summary += "BREAKOUT";
  116 | break;
  117 | case REGIME_RANGING:
  118 | summary += "RANGING";
  119 | break;
  120 | case REGIME_SQUEEZE:
  121 | summary += "SQUEEZE";
  122 | break;
  123 | default:
  124 | summary += "NEUTRAL";
  125 | }
  126 | 
  127 | // Quick signal strength
  128 | if(MathAbs(dragonAngle) > 2.0 && volumeScore > 0.7) {
  129 | summary += " | 🔥 STRONG";
  130 | } else if(MathAbs(dragonAngle) > 1.0 && volumeScore > 0.5) {
  131 | summary += " | ⚡ MODERATE";
  132 | } else {
  133 | summary += " | ⚠️ WEAK";
  134 | }
  135 | 
  136 | // Direction indicator
  137 | if(dragonAngle > 1.0) {
  138 | summary += " | 🟢 BULLISH";
  139 | } else if(dragonAngle < -1.0) {
  140 | summary += " | 🔴 BEARISH";
  141 | } else {
  142 | summary += " | 🟡 NEUTRAL";
  143 | }
  144 | 
  145 | return summary;
  146 | }

  148 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  149 | //| Get Trading Recommendation                                      |
  150 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  151 | string GetTradingRecommendation() {
  152 | SMarketStory story;
  153 | SMarketStory temp;
  154 | temp = this.GenerateMarketNarrative();
  155 | story.regime_story = temp.regime_story;
  156 | story.dragon_story = temp.dragon_story;
  157 | story.volume_story = temp.volume_story;
  158 | story.momentum_story = temp.momentum_story;
  159 | story.confluence_story = temp.confluence_story;
  160 | story.risk_story = temp.risk_story;
  161 | story.complete_narrative = temp.complete_narrative;
  162 | story.confidence_score = temp.confidence_score;
  163 | string recommendation = "💡 RECOMMENDATION: ";
  164 | ENUM_MARKET_REGIME regime = GetMarketRegime();
  165 | double confidence = story.confidence_score;
  166 | 
  167 | if(confidence > 0.8) {
  168 | switch(regime) {
  169 | case REGIME_TRENDING:
  170 | recommendation += "Strong trend detected - Follow the momentum with proper risk management";
  171 | break;
  172 | case REGIME_BREAKOUT:
  173 | recommendation += "Breakout in progress - Enter on pullbacks with tight stops";
  174 | break;
  175 | case REGIME_SQUEEZE:
  176 | recommendation += "Compression phase - Prepare for potential breakout";
  177 | break;
  178 | default:
  179 | recommendation += "Mixed signals - Wait for clearer direction";
  180 | }
  181 | } else if(confidence > 0.6) {
  182 | recommendation += "Moderate confidence - Consider smaller position sizes";
  183 | } else {
  184 | recommendation += "Low confidence - Stay on sidelines or reduce exposure";
  185 | }
  186 | 
  187 | return recommendation;
  188 | }

  207 | m_regimePhrases[1] = "We're seeing a clear";
  208 | m_regimePhrases[2] = "Current environment shows";

  213 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  214 | //| Generate Regime Story                                           |
  215 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  216 | string GenerateRegimeStory(ENUM_MARKET_REGIME regime, double atr) {
  217 | string story = "🎯 REGIME: ";
  218 | double atrPips = (atr != EMPTY_VALUE && atr > 0) ? atr / _Point : 0;
  219 | 
  220 | switch(regime) {
  221 | case REGIME_TRENDING:
  222 | story += StringFormat("Strong trending market with %.1f pips volatility. Directional momentum is clear.", atrPips);
  223 | break;
  224 | case REGIME_RANGING:
  225 | story += StringFormat("Range-bound market with %.1f pips volatility. Price is consolidating between key levels.", atrPips);
  226 | break;
  227 | case REGIME_BREAKOUT:
  228 | story += StringFormat("Breakout phase with elevated %.1f pips volatility. Expansion is underway.", atrPips);
  229 | break;
  230 | case REGIME_SQUEEZE:
  231 | story += StringFormat("Compression phase with reduced %.1f pips volatility. Coiling for next move.", atrPips);
  232 | break;
  233 | default:
  234 | story += StringFormat("Undefined regime with %.1f pips volatility. Mixed signals present.", atrPips);
  235 | }
  236 | 
  237 | return story;
  238 | }
  239 | 
  240 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  241 | //| Generate Dragon Band Story                                      |
  242 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  243 | string GenerateDragonStory(double angle) {
  244 | string story = "🐉 DRAGON BANDS: ";
  245 | 
  246 | if(angle > 3.0) {
  247 | story += StringFormat("Steep bullish angle (%.1f°) - Strong upward momentum driving price higher.", angle);
  248 | } else if(angle > 1.0) {
  249 | story += StringFormat("Moderate bullish angle (%.1f°) - Upward bias with steady progression.", angle);
  250 | } else if(angle < -3.0) {
  251 | story += StringFormat("Steep bearish angle (%.1f°) - Strong downward pressure accelerating.", angle);
  252 | } else if(angle < -1.0) {
  253 | story += StringFormat("Moderate bearish angle (%.1f°) - Downward bias with controlled decline.", angle);
  254 | } else {
  255 | story += StringFormat("Neutral angle (%.1f°) - Dragon bands are consolidating, preparing for next move.", angle);
  256 | }
  257 | 
  258 | return story;
  259 | }
  260 | 
  261 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  262 | //| Generate Volume Story                                           |
  263 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  264 | string GenerateVolumeStory(double volumeScore) {
  265 | string story = "📊 VOLUME: ";
  266 | 
  267 | if(volumeScore > 0.8) {
  268 | story += StringFormat("Exceptional participation (%.0f%% above average) - Strong institutional involvement.", volumeScore * 100);
  269 | } else if(volumeScore > 0.6) {
  270 | story += StringFormat("Good participation (%.0f%% above average) - Decent market interest.", volumeScore * 100);
  271 | } else if(volumeScore > 0.4) {
  272 | story += StringFormat("Moderate participation (%.0f%% above average) - Average market activity.", volumeScore * 100);
  273 | } else {
  274 | story += StringFormat("Low participation (%.0f%% above average) - Weak market conviction.", volumeScore * 100);
  275 | }
  276 | 
  277 | return story;
  278 | }
  279 | 
  280 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  281 | //| Generate Momentum Story                                         |
  282 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  283 | string GenerateMomentumStory(double waveScore, double dragonAngle) {
  284 | string story = "🌊 MOMENTUM: ";
  285 | 
  286 | bool strongMomentum = (MathAbs(dragonAngle) > 2.0 && waveScore > 0.7);
  287 | bool moderateMomentum = (MathAbs(dragonAngle) > 1.0 && waveScore > 0.5);
  288 | 
  289 | if(strongMomentum) {
  290 | story += "Strong momentum alignment - Dragon and Wave patterns confirm direction.";
  291 | } else if(moderateMomentum) {
  292 | story += "Moderate momentum - Some alignment between indicators.";
  293 | } else {
  294 | story += "Weak momentum - Conflicting signals between analysis components.";
  295 | }
  296 | 
  297 | return story;
  298 | }
  299 | 
  300 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  301 | //| Generate Confluence Story                                       |
  302 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  303 | string GenerateConfluenceStory(double confluence) {
  304 | string story = "🎯 CONFLUENCE: ";
  305 | 
  306 | if(confluence > 0.8) {
  307 | story += StringFormat("Exceptional alignment (%.0f%%) - Multiple analysis components agree strongly.", confluence * 100);
  308 | } else if(confluence > 0.6) {
  309 | story += StringFormat("Good alignment (%.0f%%) - Most indicators are in agreement.", confluence * 100);
  310 | } else if(confluence > 0.4) {
  311 | story += StringFormat("Moderate alignment (%.0f%%) - Some conflicting signals present.", confluence * 100);
  312 | } else {
  313 | story += StringFormat("Poor alignment (%.0f%%) - Analysis components are conflicted.", confluence * 100);
  314 | }
  315 | 
  316 | return story;
  317 | }
  318 | 
  319 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  320 | //| Generate Risk Assessment Story                                  |
  321 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  322 | string GenerateRiskStory(ENUM_MARKET_REGIME regime, double volumeScore, double confluence) {
  323 | string story = "⚠️ RISK ASSESSMENT: ";
  324 | 
  325 | // Calculate risk level
  326 | double riskScore = 0.0;
  327 | 
  328 | switch(regime) {
  329 | case REGIME_TRENDING:
  330 | riskScore = 0.3; // Lower risk in trends
  331 | break;
  332 | case REGIME_BREAKOUT:
  333 | riskScore = 0.7; // Higher risk in breakouts
  334 | break;
  335 | case REGIME_RANGING:
  336 | riskScore = 0.5; // Medium risk in ranges
  337 | break;
  338 | case REGIME_SQUEEZE:
  339 | riskScore = 0.6; // Medium-high risk before breakout
  340 | break;
  341 | default:
  342 | riskScore = 0.8; // High risk when undefined
  343 | }
  344 | 
  345 | // Adjust based on volume and confluence
  346 | if(volumeScore > 0.7 && confluence > 0.7) {
  347 | riskScore *= 0.7; // Reduce risk with good confirmation
  348 | } else if(volumeScore < 0.3 || confluence < 0.3) {
  349 | riskScore *= 1.3; // Increase risk with poor confirmation
  350 | }
  351 | 
  352 | riskScore = MathMin(riskScore, 1.0);
  353 | 
  354 | if(riskScore > 0.7) {
  355 | story += "HIGH RISK - Use smaller position sizes and tight stops.";
  356 | } else if(riskScore > 0.5) {
  357 | story += "MODERATE RISK - Standard risk management protocols apply.";
  358 | } else {
  359 | story += "LOWER RISK - Favorable conditions for position building.";
  360 | }
  361 | 
  362 | return story;
  363 | }
  364 | 
  365 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  366 | //| Compose Complete Story                                          |
  367 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  368 | string ComposeCompleteStory(const SMarketStory& story) {
  369 | string narrative = StringFormat("📖 SONIC R MARKET ANALYSIS - %s\n", TimeToString(TimeCurrent(), TIME_MINUTES));
  370 | narrative += "=" + StringPadLeft("", 50, '=') + "\n\n";
  371 | 
  372 | narrative += story.regime_story + "\n\n";
  373 | narrative += story.dragon_story + "\n\n";
  374 | narrative += story.volume_story + "\n\n";
  375 | narrative += story.momentum_story + "\n\n";
  376 | narrative += story.confluence_story + "\n\n";
  377 | narrative += story.risk_story + "\n\n";
  378 | 
  379 | narrative += StringFormat("🎯 OVERALL CONFIDENCE: %.1f%%\n", story.confidence_score * 100);
  380 | narrative += GetTradingRecommendation();
  381 | 
  382 | return narrative;
  383 | }
  384 | 
  385 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  386 | //| Helper Functions for Market Data                               |
  387 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  388 | double GetDragonAngle() {
  389 | int handle = iMA(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 34, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_HIGH);
  390 | if(handle == INVALID_HANDLE) return 0.0;
  391 | double buffer[2];
  392 | if(CopyBuffer(handle, 0, 0, 2, buffer) < 2) {
  393 | IndicatorRelease(handle);
  394 | return 0.0;
  395 | }
  396 | IndicatorRelease(handle);
  397 | double emaHigh = buffer[0];
  398 | double emaHighPrev = buffer[1];
  399 | if(emaHigh == EMPTY_VALUE || emaHighPrev == EMPTY_VALUE) return 0.0;
  400 | return MathArctan((emaHigh - emaHighPrev) / _Point) * 180.0 / M_PI;
  401 | }
  402 | 
  403 | double GetWavePatternScore() {
  404 | double range = iHigh(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 1) - iLow(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 1);
  405 | int atrHandle = iATR(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 14);
  406 | if(atrHandle == INVALID_HANDLE) return 0.0;
  407 | double atrBuffer[1];
  408 | if(CopyBuffer(atrHandle, 0, 0, 1, atrBuffer) < 1) {
  409 | IndicatorRelease(atrHandle);
  410 | return 0.0;
  411 | }
  412 | IndicatorRelease(atrHandle);
  413 | double atr = atrBuffer[0];
  414 | if(atr == EMPTY_VALUE || atr <= 0) return 0.0;
  415 | return MathMin(range / atr, 1.0);
  416 | }
  417 | 
  418 | double GetVolumeConfirmationScore() {
  419 | double currentVol = (double)iVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0);
  420 | double avgVol = 0;
  421 | int validBars = 0;
  422 | 
  423 | for(int i = 1; i <= 20; i++) {
  424 | double vol = (double)iVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  425 | if(vol > 0) {
  426 | avgVol += vol;
  427 | validBars++;
  428 | }
  429 | }
  430 | 
  431 | if(validBars == 0 || avgVol == 0) return 0.0;
  432 | avgVol /= validBars;
  433 | 
  434 | double ratio = currentVol / avgVol;
  435 | return MathMin(ratio / 2.0, 1.0);
  436 | }
  437 | 
  438 | ENUM_MARKET_REGIME GetMarketRegime() {
  439 | int atrHandle = iATR(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 14);
  440 | if(atrHandle == INVALID_HANDLE) return REGIME_UNDEFINED;
  441 | double atrBuffer[1];
  442 | if(CopyBuffer(atrHandle, 0, 0, 1, atrBuffer) < 1) {
  443 | IndicatorRelease(atrHandle);
  444 | return REGIME_UNDEFINED;
  445 | }
  446 | IndicatorRelease(atrHandle);
  447 | double atr = atrBuffer[0];
  448 | 
  449 | int emaHighHandle = iMA(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 34, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_HIGH);
  450 | if(emaHighHandle == INVALID_HANDLE) return REGIME_UNDEFINED;
  451 | double emaHighBuffer[1];
  452 | if(CopyBuffer(emaHighHandle, 0, 0, 1, emaHighBuffer) < 1) {
  453 | IndicatorRelease(emaHighHandle);
  454 | return REGIME_UNDEFINED;
  455 | }
  456 | IndicatorRelease(emaHighHandle);
  457 | double emaHigh = emaHighBuffer[0];
  458 | 
  459 | int emaLowHandle = iMA(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 34, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_LOW);
  460 | if(emaLowHandle == INVALID_HANDLE) return REGIME_UNDEFINED;
  461 | double emaLowBuffer[1];
  462 | if(CopyBuffer(emaLowHandle, 0, 0, 1, emaLowBuffer) < 1) {
  463 | IndicatorRelease(emaLowHandle);
  464 | return REGIME_UNDEFINED;
  465 | }
  466 | IndicatorRelease(emaLowHandle);
  467 | double emaLow = emaLowBuffer[0];
  468 | 
  469 | if(atr == EMPTY_VALUE || emaHigh == EMPTY_VALUE || emaLow == EMPTY_VALUE) {
  470 | return REGIME_UNDEFINED;
  471 | }
  472 | 
  473 | double bandWidth = (emaHigh - emaLow) / atr;
  474 | 
  475 | if(bandWidth < 0.7) return REGIME_SQUEEZE;
  476 | if(bandWidth > 2.0) return REGIME_TRENDING;
  477 | 
  478 | double volumeScore = GetVolumeConfirmationScore();
  479 | if(volumeScore > 0.8) return REGIME_BREAKOUT;
  480 | 
  481 | return REGIME_RANGING;
  482 | }
  483 | 
  484 | double CalculateConfluenceScore() {
  485 | double dragonAngle = GetDragonAngle();
  486 | double waveScore = GetWavePatternScore();
  487 | double volumeScore = GetVolumeConfirmationScore();
  488 | 
  489 | // Simple confluence calculation
  490 | double dragonWeight = (MathAbs(dragonAngle) > 1.0) ? 0.4 : 0.2;
  491 | double waveWeight = (waveScore > 0.5) ? 0.3 : 0.1;
  492 | double volumeWeight = (volumeScore > 0.5) ? 0.3 : 0.1;
  493 | 
  494 | return dragonWeight + waveWeight + volumeWeight;
  495 | }
  496 | 
  497 | double CalculateNarrativeConfidence(double dragonAngle, double volumeScore, double confluence) {
  498 | double confidence = 0.0;
  499 | 
  500 | // Dragon angle contribution (40%)
  501 | confidence += MathMin(MathAbs(dragonAngle) / 3.0, 1.0) * 0.4;
  502 | 
  503 | // Volume score contribution (30%)
  504 | confidence += volumeScore * 0.3;
  505 | 
  506 | // Confluence contribution (30%)
  507 | confidence += confluence * 0.3;
  508 | 
  509 | return MathMin(confidence, 1.0);
  510 | }
  511 | 
  512 | string StringPadLeft(string str, int length, uchar padChar) {
  513 | int currentLength = StringLen(str);
  514 | if(currentLength >= length) return str;
  515 | 
  516 | string padding = "";
  517 | for(int i = 0; i < (length - currentLength); i++) {
  518 | padding += CharToString(padChar);
  519 | }
  520 | 
  521 | return padding + str;
  522 | }
  523 | };
  524 | 
  525 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  526 | //| Global Narrative Generator Instance                             |
  527 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  528 | CMarketNarrativeGenerator* g_NarrativeGenerator;
  529 | 
  530 | #endif // NARRATIVE_GENERATOR_MQH
  531 |

   71 | score = 0.8; // Strong bullish structure

   73 | // Check for lower highs and lower lows (bearish structure)

   99 | // Near support (bullish)
  100 | else if(position < 0.2) score = 0.8;
  101 | // Middle range
  102 | else score = 0.5;
  103 | }
  104 | 
  105 | return score;

  148 | double GetPVSRAVolumeConfirmation(int shift)

  151 | // Simple volume confirmation based on tick volume

  156 | for(int i = shift + 1; i <= shift + 20; i++) {

  161 | if(avgVolume == 0) return 0.5;

  165 | // High volume confirmation
  166 | if(volumeRatio > 1.5) return 0.8;
  167 | // Low volume
  168 | else if(volumeRatio < 0.5) return 0.2;
  169 | // Normal volume
  170 | else return 0.5;
  171 | }

  195 | data.confluenceScore *= regimeMultiplier;

  217 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  218 | //| 🚀 ENHANCED SIGNAL FILTERS                                       |
  219 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  220 | class CSignalFilters
  221 | {
  222 | private:
  223 | double m_maxSpread;
  224 | int m_newsAvoidanceMinutes;
  225 | bool m_enableSessionFilter;
  226 | 
  227 | public:
  228 | CSignalFilters()
  229 | {
  230 | m_maxSpread = 3.0; // 3 pips max spread
  231 | m_newsAvoidanceMinutes = 60; // Avoid 1 hour around news
  232 | m_enableSessionFilter = true;
  233 | }
  234 | 
  235 | bool PassesAllFilters(SEnhancedSignalData& signal)
  236 | {
  237 | signal.passesFilters = true;
  238 | string filterLog = "[🔍 FILTERS] ";
  239 | 
  240 | // 🎯 FILTER 1: Spread Check
  241 | if(!PassesSpreadFilter()) {
  242 | signal.passesFilters = false;
  243 | filterLog += "SPREAD_FAIL ";
  244 | }
  245 | 
  246 | // 🎯 FILTER 2: News Avoidance
  247 | if(!PassesNewsFilter()) {
  248 | signal.passesFilters = false;
  249 | filterLog += "NEWS_FAIL ";
  250 | }
  251 | 
  252 | // 🎯 FILTER 3: Trading Session
  253 | if(!PassesSessionFilter()) {
  254 | signal.passesFilters = false;
  255 | filterLog += "SESSION_FAIL ";
  256 | }
  257 | 
  258 | // 🎯 FILTER 4: Minimum Components Check
  259 | if(!PassesMinimumComponentsFilter(signal)) {
  260 | signal.passesFilters = false;
  261 | filterLog += "COMPONENTS_FAIL ";
  262 | }
  263 | 
  264 | if(signal.passesFilters) {
  265 | filterLog += "✅ ALL_PASSED";
  266 | } else {
  267 | filterLog += "❌ REJECTED";
  268 | }
  269 | 
  270 | Print(filterLog);
  271 | return signal.passesFilters;
  272 | }
  273 | 
  274 | private:
  275 | bool PassesSpreadFilter()
  276 | {
  277 | // FIXED: Calculate spread properly in MQL5
  278 | double spread = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_ASK) - SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
  279 | double maxAllowed = m_maxSpread * _Point;
  280 | 
  281 | if(spread > maxAllowed) {
  282 | Print(StringFormat("[⚠️ SPREAD] Current: %.1f pips > Max: %.1f pips",
  283 | spread/_Point, maxAllowed/_Point));
  284 | return false;
  285 | }
  286 | return true;
  287 | }
  288 | 
  289 | bool PassesNewsFilter()
  290 | {
  291 | // High-impact news detection (simplified)
  292 | MqlDateTime time;
  293 | TimeToStruct(TimeCurrent(), time);
  294 | 
  295 | // Avoid known news times (can be enhanced with news calendar)
  296 | if((time.hour == 8 && time.min >= 25 && time.min <= 35) ||  // 8:30 news
  297 | (time.hour == 12 && time.min >= 25 && time.min <= 35) || // 12:30 news
  298 | (time.hour == 14 && time.min >= 25 && time.min <= 35))   // 14:30 news
  299 | {
  300 | Print("[⚠️ NEWS] Avoiding high-impact news time");
  301 | return false;
  302 | }
  303 | return true;
  304 | }
  305 | 
  306 | bool PassesSessionFilter()
  307 | {
  308 | if(!m_enableSessionFilter) return true;
  309 | 
  310 | MqlDateTime time;
  311 | TimeToStruct(TimeCurrent(), time);
  312 | 
  313 | // Active trading hours (London + NY overlap preferred)
  314 | bool isActiveSession = false;
  315 | 
  316 | // London session: 8:00-17:00 GMT
  317 | // NY session: 13:00-22:00 GMT
  318 | // Overlap: 13:00-17:00 GMT (best time)
  319 | 
  320 | if(time.hour >= 13 && time.hour <= 17) {
  321 | isActiveSession = true; // Overlap period - best
  322 | } else if(time.hour >= 8 && time.hour <= 22) {
  323 | isActiveSession = true; // Active sessions
  324 | }
  325 | 
  326 | if(!isActiveSession) {
  327 | Print("[⚠️ SESSION] Outside active trading hours");
  328 | return false;
  329 | }
  330 | return true;
  331 | }
  332 | 
  333 | bool PassesMinimumComponentsFilter(SEnhancedSignalData& signal)
  334 | {
  335 | // Require at least 2 strong components (>0.5)
  336 | int strongComponents = 0;
  337 | if(signal.dragonScore > 0.5) strongComponents++;
  338 | if(signal.smcScore > 0.5) strongComponents++;
  339 | if(signal.pvsraScore > 0.5) strongComponents++;
  340 | if(signal.waveScore > 0.5) strongComponents++;
  341 | 
  342 | if(strongComponents < 2) {
  343 | Print(StringFormat("[⚠️ COMPONENTS] Only %d strong components (need ≥2)", strongComponents));
  344 | return false;
  345 | }
  346 | return true;
  347 | }
  348 | };
