  434 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  435 | //| 🎯 UNIFIED SIGNAL GATEWAY - SINGLE DECISION POINT              |
  436 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  437 | TradingSignal Generate(string symbol = "", ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe = PERIOD_M15, ENUM_TRADING_SCENARIO scenario = SCENARIO_BASIC)
  438 | {
  439 |     TradingSignal result;
  440 |     result.type = SIGNAL_NONE;
  441 |     result.side = ORDER_TYPE_BUY;
  442 |     result.sl = 0.0;
  443 |     result.tp = 0.0;
  444 |     result.confidence = 0.0;
  445 |     result.reason = "No signal generated";
  446 |     result.is_scout = false;
  447 | 
  448 |     // Use current symbol if not specified
  449 |     if(symbol == "") symbol = _Symbol;
  450 | 
  451 |     // M15 Pipeline according to spec: H4 context → Dragon breakout → Wave completion → Oscillator confluence → Volume institutional → Compile
  452 |     Print("[SIGNAL_GATEWAY] Generating signal for ", symbol, " TF:", EnumToString(timeframe), " Scenario:", EnumToString(scenario));
  453 | 
  454 |     // Step 1: H4 Context Analysis
  455 |     // TODO: Implement H4 trend context
  456 | 
  457 |     // Step 2: Dragon Breakout Analysis
  458 |     ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE dragonSignal = GetSignal_SonicR_Basic_Internal();
  459 | 
  460 |     // Step 3: PVSRA/Wave Analysis
  461 |     ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE pvsraSignal = SIGNAL_NONE;
  462 |     if(scenario == SCENARIO_WITH_VPSRA || scenario == SCENARIO_SCOUT_RANGE_SMC) {
  463 |         pvsraSignal = GetSignal_SonicR_VPSRA_Internal();
  464 |     }
  465 | 
  466 |     // Step 4: Scout Analysis
  467 |     ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE scoutSignal = SIGNAL_NONE;
  468 |     if(scenario == SCENARIO_SCOUT_RANGE_SMC) {
  469 |         scoutSignal = GetSignal_Scout_Internal();
  470 |     }
  471 | 
  472 |     // Step 5: Confluence Analysis
  473 |     double confluenceScore = 0.0;
  474 | 
  475 |     // Basic Dragon confluence
  476 |     if(dragonSignal == SIGNAL_BUY || dragonSignal == SIGNAL_SELL) {
  477 |         confluenceScore += 0.4; // 40% weight for Dragon
  478 |     }
  479 | 
  480 |     // PVSRA confluence
  481 |     if(pvsraSignal == SIGNAL_BUY || pvsraSignal == SIGNAL_SELL) {
  482 |         confluenceScore += 0.3; // 30% weight for PVSRA
  483 |     }
  484 | 
  485 |     // Scout confluence
  486 |     if(scoutSignal == SIGNAL_BUY || scoutSignal == SIGNAL_SELL) {
  487 |         confluenceScore += 0.3; // 30% weight for Scout
  488 |         result.is_scout = true;
  489 |     }
  490 | 
  491 |     // Determine final signal based on scenario thresholds
  492 |     double requiredThreshold = GetScenarioThreshold(scenario);
  493 | 
  494 |     if(confluenceScore >= requiredThreshold) {
  495 |         // Determine signal direction (majority vote)
  496 |         int buyVotes = 0;
  497 |         int sellVotes = 0;
  498 | 
  499 |         if(dragonSignal == SIGNAL_BUY) buyVotes++;
  500 |         else if(dragonSignal == SIGNAL_SELL) sellVotes++;
  501 | 
  502 |         if(pvsraSignal == SIGNAL_BUY) buyVotes++;
  503 |         else if(pvsraSignal == SIGNAL_SELL) sellVotes++;
  504 | 
  505 |         if(scoutSignal == SIGNAL_BUY) buyVotes++;
  506 |         else if(scoutSignal == SIGNAL_SELL) sellVotes++;
  507 | 
  508 |         if(buyVotes > sellVotes) {
  509 |             result.type = SIGNAL_BUY;
  510 |             result.side = ORDER_TYPE_BUY;
  511 |             result.reason = StringFormat("BUY confluence %.2f (Dragon:%s PVSRA:%s Scout:%s)",
  512 |                                        confluenceScore,
  513 |                                        SignalTypeToString(dragonSignal),
  514 |                                        SignalTypeToString(pvsraSignal),
  515 |                                        SignalTypeToString(scoutSignal));
  516 |         } else if(sellVotes > buyVotes) {
  517 |             result.type = SIGNAL_SELL;
  518 |             result.side = ORDER_TYPE_SELL;
  519 |             result.reason = StringFormat("SELL confluence %.2f (Dragon:%s PVSRA:%s Scout:%s)",
  520 |                                        confluenceScore,
  521 |                                        SignalTypeToString(dragonSignal),
  522 |                                        SignalTypeToString(pvsraSignal),
  523 |                                        SignalTypeToString(scoutSignal));
  524 |         }
  525 | 
  526 |         result.confidence = confluenceScore;
  527 | 
  528 |         // Calculate SL/TP based on scenario
  529 |         CalculateScenarioSLTP(result, scenario, symbol);
  530 |     }
  531 | 
  532 |     Print("[SIGNAL_GATEWAY] Result: ", SignalTypeToString(result.type), " Confidence: ", DoubleToString(result.confidence, 3), " Reason: ", result.reason);
  533 |     return result;
  534 | }
  535 | 
  536 | private:
  537 | double GetScenarioThreshold(ENUM_TRADING_SCENARIO scenario)
  538 | {
  539 |     switch(scenario) {
  540 |         case SCENARIO_BASIC: return 0.65;
  541 |         case SCENARIO_WITH_VPSRA: return 0.70;
  542 |         case SCENARIO_SCOUT_RANGE_SMC: return 0.75;
  543 |         case SCENARIO_SCALING_WINNERS: return 0.80;
  544 |         case SCENARIO_MULTI_ASSET_ADAPTIVE: return 0.75;
  545 |         default: return 0.65;
  546 |     }
  547 | }
  548 | 
  549 | void CalculateScenarioSLTP(TradingSignal &signal, ENUM_TRADING_SCENARIO scenario, string symbol)
  550 | {
  551 |     // Get current price
  552 |     double currentPrice = (signal.side == ORDER_TYPE_BUY) ?
  553 |                          SymbolInfoDouble(symbol, SYMBOL_ASK) :
  554 |                          SymbolInfoDouble(symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
  555 | 
  556 |     // Get ATR for SL calculation
  557 |     double atrValue = 0.0;
  558 |     if(g_indicatorManager != NULL && g_indicatorManager.GetATRValue(atrValue)) {
  559 |         // Use ATR-based SL/TP
  560 |         double slDistance = atrValue * 1.5; // 1.5x ATR for SL
  561 |         double tpDistance = slDistance * GetScenarioRR(scenario); // R:R based on scenario
  562 | 
  563 |         if(signal.side == ORDER_TYPE_BUY) {
  564 |             signal.sl = NormalizeDouble(currentPrice - slDistance, _Digits);
  565 |             signal.tp = NormalizeDouble(currentPrice + tpDistance, _Digits);
  566 |         } else {
  567 |             signal.sl = NormalizeDouble(currentPrice + slDistance, _Digits);
  568 |             signal.tp = NormalizeDouble(currentPrice - tpDistance, _Digits);
  569 |         }
  570 |     } else {
  571 |         // Fallback to fixed pip SL/TP
  572 |         double pipValue = _Point * ((_Digits == 3 || _Digits == 5) ? 10 : 1);
  573 |         double slPips = 30; // 30 pips SL
  574 |         double tpPips = slPips * GetScenarioRR(scenario);
  575 | 
  576 |         if(signal.side == ORDER_TYPE_BUY) {
  577 |             signal.sl = NormalizeDouble(currentPrice - slPips * pipValue, _Digits);
  578 |             signal.tp = NormalizeDouble(currentPrice + tpPips * pipValue, _Digits);
  579 |         } else {
  580 |             signal.sl = NormalizeDouble(currentPrice + slPips * pipValue, _Digits);
  581 |             signal.tp = NormalizeDouble(currentPrice - tpPips * pipValue, _Digits);
  582 |         }
  583 |     }
  584 | }
  585 | 
  586 | double GetScenarioRR(ENUM_TRADING_SCENARIO scenario)
  587 | {
  588 |     switch(scenario) {
  589 |         case SCENARIO_BASIC: return 2.0;
  590 |         case SCENARIO_WITH_VPSRA: return 2.5;
  591 |         case SCENARIO_SCOUT_RANGE_SMC: return 3.0;
  592 |         case SCENARIO_SCALING_WINNERS: return 4.0;
  593 |         case SCENARIO_MULTI_ASSET_ADAPTIVE: return 2.5;
  594 |         default: return 2.0;
  595 |     }
  596 | }
  597 | 
  598 | public:
  599 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  600 | //| 🎯 PHASE 1 PERFECT CONFLUENCE SYSTEM - 75% THRESHOLD            |
  601 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  602 | ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE GenerateEnhancedSignal(CAnalysisConsolidated* analysis)
  603 | {
  604 | if(analysis == NULL) return SIGNAL_NONE;
  605 | 
  606 | // 🎯 PHASE 1: Prevent excessive signal generation
  607 | if(!IsNewBarOrSignificantChange()) {
  608 | return SIGNAL_NONE;
  609 | }
  610 | 
  611 | SEnhancedSignalData signal;
  612 | signal.Reset();
  613 | signal.signalTime = TimeCurrent();
  614 | 
  615 | // 🎯 PHASE 1 STEP 1: Collect all component scores with enhanced precision
  616 | bool success = CollectEnhancedComponentScores(signal, analysis);
  617 | if(!success) {
  618 | return SIGNAL_NONE;
  619 | }
  620 | 
  621 | // 🎯 PHASE 2 STEP 2: Calculate enhanced confluence with ML and session adjustment
  622 | double confluenceScore = CalculateEnhancedConfluenceWithML(signal);
  623 | signal.confluenceScore = confluenceScore;
  624 | 
  625 | // 🎯 PHASE 2 STEP 3: Check signal cooldown period
  626 | if(!PassesSignalCooldown()) {
  627 | LogRejectedSignal(signal, "SIGNAL_COOLDOWN_ACTIVE");
  628 | return SIGNAL_NONE;
  629 | }
  630 | 
  631 | // 🎯 PHASE 2 STEP 4: Apply strict quality filters
  632 | if(!PassesEnhancedFilters(signal)) {
  633 | LogRejectedSignal(signal, "ENHANCED_FILTER_REJECTION");
  634 | return SIGNAL_NONE;
  635 | }
  636 | 
  637 | // 🎯 PHASE 4 STEP 4.5: Scout mode PVSRA validation
  638 | if(!ValidateScoutModePVSRA(signal.pvsraScore, SCENARIO_SCOUT_SMC_STRICT)) {
  639 |     LogRejectedSignal(signal, "SCOUT_MODE_PVSRA_BELOW_THRESHOLD");
  640 |     return SIGNAL_NONE;
  641 | }
  642 | 
  643 | // 🎯 PHASE 2 STEP 5: Dynamic confluence threshold (adaptive)
  644 | double requiredThreshold = m_adaptiveFilteringEnabled ? m_dynamicConfluenceThreshold : 0.75;
  645 | if(confluenceScore < requiredThreshold) {
  646 | LogRejectedSignal(signal, StringFormat("CONFLUENCE_BELOW_THRESHOLD: %.1f%% < %.1f%%", confluenceScore*100, requiredThreshold*100));
  647 | return SIGNAL_NONE;
  648 | }
  649 | 
  650 | // 🎯 PHASE 1 STEP 5: Determine signal direction with precision
  651 | ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE signalDirection = DeterminePreciseSignalDirection(signal);
  652 | if(signalDirection == SIGNAL_NONE) {
  653 | LogRejectedSignal(signal, "NO_CLEAR_DIRECTION_AFTER_CONFLUENCE");
  654 | return SIGNAL_NONE;
  655 | }
  656 | 
  657 | // 🎯 PHASE 1 STEP 6: Final validation and signal generation
  658 | signal.signalType = signalDirection;
  659 | signal.confidence = confluenceScore;
  660 | 
  661 | // Store successful signal
  662 | m_lastSignal = signal;
  663 | m_lastSignalTime = TimeCurrent();
  664 | m_totalSignals++;
  665 | 
  666 | // Update performance metrics
  667 | double weightedConfluence = confluenceScore * signal.confidence;
  668 | m_avgConfluenceScore = (m_avgConfluenceScore * 0.9) + (weightedConfluence * 0.1);
  669 | 
  670 | // 🎯 PHASE 1 LOGGING: Detailed signal information
  671 | LogSuccessfulSignal(signal);
  672 | 
  673 | return signalDirection;
  674 | }
  675 | 
  676 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  677 | //| 🎯 PHASE 1: ENHANCED COMPONENT SCORE COLLECTION                 |
  678 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  679 | bool CollectEnhancedComponentScores(SEnhancedSignalData& signal, CAnalysisConsolidated* analysis)
  680 | {
  681 |     // 🐉 Component 1: Enhanced Dragon Band Analysis (30% weight)
  682 |     signal.dragonScore = GetEnhancedDragonBandScore(analysis);
  683 |     if(signal.dragonScore < 0.3) {
  684 |         return false; // Minimum Dragon Band requirement
  685 |     }
  686 | 
  687 |     // 📊 Component 2: Enhanced Wave Pattern Analysis (25% weight)
  688 |     signal.waveScore = GetEnhancedWavePatternScore(analysis);
  689 | 
  690 |     // 🎯 Component 3: Enhanced SMC Analysis (25% weight)
  691 |     signal.smcScore = GetEnhancedSMCScore(analysis);
  692 | 
  693 |     // 📈 Component 4: Enhanced PVSRA Analysis (20% weight)
  694 |     signal.pvsraScore = GetEnhancedSMCScore(analysis); // TEMP: use SMC score for PVSRA weight to avoid missing API
  695 | 
  696 |     // 🎯 PHASE 1: Additional validation factors
  697 |     signal.marketStructureScore = GetMarketStructureScore(analysis);
  698 |     signal.volumeConfirmationScore = GetVolumeConfirmationScore(analysis);
  699 |     signal.trendAlignmentScore = GetTrendAlignmentScore(analysis);
  700 | 
  701 |     // Calculate basic strength score
  702 |     signal.strengthScore = (signal.dragonScore + signal.waveScore +
  703 |                             signal.smcScore + signal.pvsraScore) / 4.0;
  704 | 
  705 |     return true;
  706 | }
  707 | 
  708 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  709 | //| 🎯 PHASE 1: SUPPORTING HELPERS AND MISSING DEFINITIONS           |
  710 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  711 | // Calculate enhanced confluence with optional ML/session weighting
  712 | double CalculateEnhancedConfluenceWithML(const SEnhancedSignalData &signal)
  713 | {
  714 |     // Base confluence via class helper
  715 |     double confluence = CalculatePerfectConfluence_(signal);
  716 | 
  717 |     // Optional ML contribution (disabled if modules not compiled)
  718 |     #ifdef INCLUDE_AI_ML_MODULES
  719 |         double mlConfidence = 0.5; // placeholder; integrate NN output if available
  720 |         confluence = MathMin(1.0, confluence * (1.0 - 0.15) + mlConfidence * 0.15);
  721 |     #endif
  722 | 
  723 |     // Session adjustment (use London/NY overlap boost heuristics)
  724 |     MqlDateTime dt; TimeToStruct(TimeCurrent(), dt);
  725 |     bool overlap = (dt.hour >= 13 && dt.hour <= 17);
  726 |     if(overlap) confluence = MathMin(1.0, confluence * 1.05);
  727 | 
  728 |     return confluence;
  729 | }
  730 | 
  731 | // Cooldown gate: avoid over-signal within m_signalCooldownPeriod seconds
  732 | bool PassesSignalCooldown()
  733 | {
  734 |     static datetime s_last = 0;
  735 |     if(s_last == 0) { s_last = TimeCurrent(); return true; }
  736 |     if((TimeCurrent() - s_last) < m_signalCooldownPeriod) return false;
  737 |     s_last = TimeCurrent();
  738 |     return true;
  739 | }
  740 | 
  741 | // Wrapper to use filter class instance
  742 | bool PassesEnhancedFilters(SEnhancedSignalData &signal)
  743 | {
  744 |     // Use local filter routine as single source of truth
  745 |     return PassesAllFilters(signal);
  746 | }
  747 | 
  748 | // Minimal local filter gate until full filter engine wired
  749 | bool PassesAllFilters(SEnhancedSignalData &signal)
  750 | {
  751 |     // Basic thresholding to avoid noisy trades; tune later
  752 |     if(signal.dragonScore < 0.4) return false;
  753 |     if(signal.pvsraScore < 0.4) return false;
  754 |     // Optional checks
  755 |     if(signal.strengthScore < 0.45) return false;
  756 |     return true;
  757 | }
  758 | 
  759 | 
  760 | // Validate scout mode minimum PVSRA depending on scenario strictness
  761 | bool ValidateScoutModePVSRA(const double pvsraScore, ENUM_SCENARIO scenario)
  762 | {
  763 |     // thresholds by scenario
  764 |     double minReq = 0.0;
  765 |     switch(scenario)
  766 |     {
  767 |         case SCENARIO_SCOUT_SMC_STRICT: minReq = 0.65; break;
  768 |         case SCENARIO_BASIC_VPSRA:      minReq = 0.55; break;
  769 |         default:                        minReq = 0.50; break;
  770 |     }
  771 |     return (pvsraScore >= minReq);
  772 | }
  773 | 
  774 | // Determine direction using component balances
  775 | ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE DeterminePreciseSignalDirection(const SEnhancedSignalData &s)
  776 | {
  777 |     double bullBias = 0.0, bearBias = 0.0;
  778 | 
  779 |     // Use trend alignment and Dragon band as primary bearings
  780 |     bullBias += (s.trendAlignmentScore);
  781 |     bearBias += (1.0 - s.trendAlignmentScore);
  782 | 
  783 |     // Volume confirmation adds to prevailing bias
  784 |     bullBias += (s.volumeConfirmationScore);
  785 |     bearBias += (1.0 - s.volumeConfirmationScore);
  786 | 
  787 |     // Market structure: assume >0.5 favors continuation with trend
  788 |     bullBias += (s.marketStructureScore > 0.5 ? 0.5 : 0.0);
  789 |     bearBias += (s.marketStructureScore <= 0.5 ? 0.5 : 0.0);
  790 | 
  791 |     if(bullBias - bearBias > 0.3) return SIGNAL_BUY;
  792 |     if(bearBias - bullBias > 0.3) return SIGNAL_SELL;
  793 |     return SIGNAL_NONE;
  794 | }
  795 | 
  796 | // Directional alignment check among components
  797 | bool IsDirectionalAlignment(const SEnhancedSignalData &s)
  798 | {
  799 |     int agrees = 0;
  800 |     if(s.trendAlignmentScore > 0.6) agrees++;
  801 |     if(s.volumeConfirmationScore > 0.6) agrees++;
  802 |     if(s.marketStructureScore > 0.6) agrees++;
  803 |     return agrees >= 2;
  804 | }
  805 | 
  806 | // Map to enhanced scores using available consolidated analysis where needed
  807 | inline double GetEnhancedWavePatternScore(CAnalysisConsolidated *analysis)
  808 | {
  809 |     if(analysis != NULL) return analysis.GetWavePatternScore();
  810 |     return 0.5;
  811 | }
  812 | 
  813 | inline double GetEnhancedSMCScore(CAnalysisConsolidated *analysis)
  814 | {
  815 |     if(analysis != NULL) return analysis.GetSMCScore();
  816 |     return 0.5;
  817 | }
  818 | 
  819 | inline double GetMarketStructureScore(CAnalysisConsolidated *analysis)
  820 | {
  821 |     if(analysis != NULL) return analysis.GetMarketStructureScore();
  822 |     return 0.5;
  823 | }
  824 | 
  825 | inline double GetVolumeConfirmationScore(CAnalysisConsolidated *analysis)
  826 | {
  827 |     if(analysis != NULL) return analysis.GetVolumeConfirmationScore();
  828 |     return 0.5;
  829 | }
  830 | 
  831 | inline double GetTrendAlignmentScore(CAnalysisConsolidated *analysis)
  832 | {
  833 |     if(analysis != NULL) return analysis.GetTrendAlignmentScore();
  834 |     return 0.5;
  835 | }
  836 | 
  837 | // ATR helper used in Dragon score
  838 | double GetATRValue(int period=14)
  839 | {
  840 |     int h = iATR(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, period);
  841 |     if(h == INVALID_HANDLE) return 0.0;
  842 |     double buf[1];
  843 |     int copied = CopyBuffer(h, 0, 0, 1, buf);
  844 |     IndicatorRelease(h);
  845 |     if(copied < 1) return 0.0;
  846 |     return buf[0];
  847 | }
  848 | 
  849 | // Wrapper string helper for logging
  850 | string GetSignalTypeString(ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE t)
  851 | {
  852 |     return SignalTypeToString(t);
  853 | }
  854 | 
  855 | // [FIX] Removed stray closing brace that prematurely ended class
  856 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  857 | //| 🎯 PHASE 1: PERFECT CONFLUENCE CALCULATION                      |
  858 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  859 | // Move helper inside class to avoid global-scope state leaks
  860 | private:
  861 |     double CalculatePerfectConfluence_(const SEnhancedSignalData& signal)
  862 |     {
  863 |         double confluence = 0.0;
  864 |         confluence += signal.dragonScore * 0.30;        // Dragon Band: 30%
  865 |         confluence += signal.waveScore * 0.25;          // Wave Pattern: 25%
  866 |         confluence += signal.smcScore * 0.25;           // SMC: 25%
  867 |         confluence += signal.pvsraScore * 0.10;         // PVSRA: 10%
  868 |         confluence += signal.marketStructureScore * 0.05;   // Market Structure: 5%
  869 |         confluence += signal.volumeConfirmationScore * 0.05; // Volume: 5%
  870 |         double alignmentBonus = 0.0;
  871 |         if(IsDirectionalAlignment(signal)) alignmentBonus += 0.05;
  872 |         if(signal.trendAlignmentScore > 0.8) alignmentBonus += 0.03;
  873 |         if(signal.volumeConfirmationScore > 0.9) alignmentBonus += 0.02;
  874 |         return MathMin(1.0, confluence + alignmentBonus);
  875 |     }
  876 | 
  877 | public:
  878 | 
  879 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  880 | //| 🎯 PHASE 1: LOGGING HELPERS                                      |
  881 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  882 | void LogRejectedSignal(const SEnhancedSignalData &signal, const string reason)
  883 | {
  884 |     Print("❌ REJECTED SIGNAL | ", reason,
  885 |           StringFormat(" | Conf: %.1f%% | Confluence: %.1f%%", signal.confidence*100, signal.confluenceScore*100));
  886 | }
  887 | 
  888 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  889 | //| 🎯 PHASE 1: ENHANCED COMPONENT SCORE FUNCTIONS                  |
  890 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  891 | double GetEnhancedDragonBandScore(CAnalysisConsolidated* analysis)
  892 | {
  893 | // Get Dragon Band angle and trend strength with enhanced precision
  894 | double dragonAngle = 0.0;
  895 | double pullbackQuality = 0.0;
  896 | double bandPosition = 0.0;
  897 | 
  898 | // 🎯 PHASE 2: Enhanced EMA calculations via unified system
  899 | double ema34[], ema89[];
  900 | ArraySetAsSeries(ema34, true);
  901 | ArraySetAsSeries(ema89, true);
  902 | 
  903 | // 🔧 CRITICAL FIX: Kiểm tra manager null trước khi sử dụng
  904 | CUnifiedIndicatorManager* manager = CUnifiedIndicatorManager::GetInstance();
  905 | if(manager == NULL) {
  906 | Print("❌ [SIGNAL] Unified Indicator Manager not initialized, using direct iMA()");
  907 | // Fallback to direct iMA calls
  908 | int ema34Handle = iMA(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 34, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
  909 | int ema89Handle = iMA(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 89, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
  910 | 
  911 | if(ema34Handle == INVALID_HANDLE || ema89Handle == INVALID_HANDLE) {
  912 | Print("❌ [SIGNAL] Failed to create fallback EMA handles");
  913 | return false;
  914 | }
  915 | 
  916 | // Use fallback handles
  917 | // ... continue with direct handles ...
  918 | return true;
  919 | }
  920 | 
  921 | int ema34Handle = manager.GetEMAHandle(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 34, PRICE_CLOSE);
  922 | int ema89Handle = manager.GetEMAHandle(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 89, PRICE_CLOSE);
  923 | 
  924 | if(ema34Handle == INVALID_HANDLE || ema89Handle == INVALID_HANDLE) {
  925 | Print("❌ [SIGNAL] Failed to get EMA handles from unified manager");
  926 | Print("EMA34: ", (ema34Handle != INVALID_HANDLE ? "✅" : "❌"));
  927 | Print("EMA89: ", (ema89Handle != INVALID_HANDLE ? "✅" : "❌"));
  928 | return false;
  929 | }
  930 | 
  931 | // Migration note: EMA 34/89 now uses unified handle system via CUnifiedIndicatorManager
  932 | 
  933 | if(ema34Handle != INVALID_HANDLE && ema89Handle != INVALID_HANDLE) {
  934 | if(CopyBuffer(ema34Handle, 0, 0, 5, ema34) >= 5 &&
  935 | CopyBuffer(ema89Handle, 0, 0, 5, ema89) >= 5) {
  936 | 
  937 | // Calculate precise Dragon angle (Sonic R formula)
  938 | double deltaPrice = ema34[0] - ema34[4];
  939 | double deltaBars = 4.0;
  940 | double slope = deltaPrice / deltaBars;
  941 | 
  942 | // Visual scaling factors for accurate angle
  943 | const double PIXELS_PER_BAR = 5.0;
  944 | const double PIXELS_PER_PRICE = 100000.0;
  945 | double scaledSlope = slope * PIXELS_PER_PRICE / PIXELS_PER_BAR;
  946 | dragonAngle = MathArctan(scaledSlope) * 180.0 / M_PI;
  947 | dragonAngle = MathMax(-90.0, MathMin(90.0, dragonAngle));
  948 | 
  949 | // Trend alignment score
  950 | double trendAlignment = (ema34[0] > ema89[0]) ? 1.0 : -1.0;
  951 | if(dragonAngle * trendAlignment > 0) {
  952 | pullbackQuality = 0.8; // Good trend alignment
  953 | } else {
  954 | pullbackQuality = 0.3; // Poor trend alignment
  955 | }
  956 | 
  957 | // Band position analysis
  958 | double currentPrice = iClose(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0);
  959 | double bandCenter = ema34[0];
  960 | double distance = MathAbs(currentPrice - bandCenter);
  961 | double atr = GetATRValue();
  962 | 
  963 | if(atr > 0) {
  964 | bandPosition = 1.0 - MathMin(1.0, distance / atr);
  965 | }
  966 | }
  967 | 
  968 | IndicatorRelease(ema34Handle);
  969 | IndicatorRelease(ema89Handle);
  970 | }
  971 | 
  972 | // Enhanced scoring with multiple factors
  973 | double angleScore = MathMin(1.0, MathAbs(dragonAngle) / 10.0); // Normalize to 10 degrees
  974 | double qualityScore = pullbackQuality;
  975 | double positionScore = bandPosition;
  976 | 
  977 | // Weighted combination
  978 | double totalScore = (angleScore * 0.5) + (qualityScore * 0.3) + (positionScore * 0.2);
  979 | 
  980 | return MathMin(1.0, totalScore);
  981 | }
  982 | 
  983 | double GetWavePatternScore(CAnalysisConsolidated* analysis)
  984 | {
  985 | // Simplified wave pattern scoring
  986 | // Check for L-H-HL or H-L-LH patterns
  987 | 
  988 | double score = 0.0;
  989 | 
  990 | // Get recent swing points (simplified)
  991 | double recentHigh = iHigh(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, iHighest(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, MODE_HIGH, 10, 1));
  992 | double recentLow = iLow(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, iLowest(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, MODE_LOW, 10, 1));
  993 | double currentPrice = iClose(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0);
  994 | 
  995 | // Check for pattern structure
  996 | if(currentPrice > recentLow && currentPrice < recentHigh) {
  997 | score = 0.6; // Decent pattern
  998 | 
  999 | // Volume confirmation boost
 1000 | double currentVolume = (double)iVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0);
 1001 | double avgVolume = 0;
 1002 | for(int i = 1; i <= 10; i++) {
 1003 | avgVolume += (double)iVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
 1004 | }
 1005 | avgVolume /= 10.0;
 1006 | 
 1007 | if(currentVolume > avgVolume * 1.2) {
 1008 | score += 0.2; // Volume boost
 1009 | }
 1010 | }
 1011 | 
 1012 | return MathMin(1.0, score);
 1013 | }
 1014 | 
 1015 | double GetPVSRAScore()
 1016 | {
 1017 |     // Unified facade call for consistent PVSRA score
 1018 |     return GetVPSRAScore(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 1);
 1019 | }
 1020 | 
 1021 | double GetSMCScore()
 1022 | {
 1023 | return 0.5;
 1024 | }
 1025 | 
 1026 | double GetSupportResistanceScore()
 1027 | {
 1028 | double score = 0.0;
 1029 | double currentPrice = iClose(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0);
 1030 | 
 1031 | // Find nearest support/resistance levels
 1032 | double resistance = iHigh(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, iHighest(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, MODE_HIGH, 20, 1));
 1033 | double support = iLow(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, iLowest(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, MODE_LOW, 20, 1));
 1034 | 
 1035 | // Check distance to levels
 1036 | double distanceToResistance = resistance - currentPrice;
 1037 | double distanceToSupport = currentPrice - support;
 1038 | double atr = 20 * _Point; // Simplified ATR
 1039 | 
 1040 | // Score based on proximity to levels
 1041 | if(distanceToResistance < atr * 0.3 || distanceToSupport < atr * 0.3) {
 1042 | score = 0.8; // Near key level
 1043 | } else if(distanceToResistance < atr * 0.5 || distanceToSupport < atr * 0.5) {
 1044 | score = 0.6; // Moderately close
 1045 | } else {
 1046 | score = 0.3; // Far from levels
 1047 | }
 1048 | 
 1049 | return score;
 1050 | }
 1051 | 
 1052 | // 🎯 PHASE 1: MACD Momentum Score (replaces RSI)
 1053 | double GetMomentumScore()
 1054 | {
 1055 | double score = 0.5; // Default neutral
 1056 | 
 1057 | // MACD(12,26,9) momentum - Phase 1 implementation
 1058 | int macdHandle = iMACD(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 12, 26, 9, PRICE_CLOSE);
 1059 | double macdMain[], macdSignal[];
 1060 | ArraySetAsSeries(macdMain, true);
 1061 | ArraySetAsSeries(macdSignal, true);
 1062 | 
 1063 | if(CopyBuffer(macdHandle, 0, 0, 3, macdMain) >= 3 &&
 1064 | CopyBuffer(macdHandle, 1, 0, 3, macdSignal) >= 3) {
 1065 | 
 1066 | double currentMACD = macdMain[0];
 1067 | double prevMACD = macdMain[1];
 1068 | double currentSignal = macdSignal[0];
 1069 | double prevSignal = macdSignal[1];
 1070 | 
 1071 | // MACD momentum calculation
 1072 | double macdMomentum = currentMACD - prevMACD;
 1073 | double signalMomentum = currentSignal - prevSignal;
 1074 | double histogram = currentMACD - currentSignal;
 1075 | double prevHistogram = prevMACD - prevSignal;
 1076 | double histogramChange = histogram - prevHistogram;
 1077 | 
 1078 | // Score based on MACD confluence
 1079 | if(MathAbs(histogram) > 0.0001) { // Active MACD signal
 1080 | if(histogramChange > 0 && histogram > 0) { // Bullish momentum strengthening
 1081 | score = 0.8;
 1082 | } else if(histogramChange < 0 && histogram < 0) { // Bearish momentum strengthening
 1083 | score = 0.2;
 1084 | } else if(MathAbs(macdMomentum) > 0.0001) { // Moderate momentum
 1085 | score = (macdMomentum > 0) ? 0.65 : 0.35;
 1086 | }
 1087 | }
 1088 | 
 1089 | IndicatorRelease(macdHandle);
 1090 | }
 1091 | 
 1092 | Print(StringFormat("[🎯 PHASE 1] MACD Momentum Score: %.3f", score));
 1093 | return score;
 1094 | }
 1095 | 
 1096 | ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE DetermineSignalDirection(SEnhancedSignalData& signal)
 1097 | {
 1098 | // Determine direction based on strongest components
 1099 | double bullishEvidence = 0.0;
 1100 | double bearishEvidence = 0.0;
 1101 | 
 1102 | // Dragon Band direction
 1103 | double ema34Current = 0, ema34Prev = 0;
 1104 | int emaHandle = iMA(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 34, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
 1105 | double ema[];
 1106 | ArraySetAsSeries(ema, true);
 1107 | if(CopyBuffer(emaHandle, 0, 0, 2, ema) >= 2) {
 1108 | if(ema[0] > ema[1]) bullishEvidence += signal.dragonScore;
 1109 | else bearishEvidence += signal.dragonScore;
 1110 | }
 1111 | IndicatorRelease(emaHandle);
 1112 | 
 1113 | // Current price vs EMA
 1114 | double currentPrice = iClose(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0);
 1115 | if(currentPrice > ema34Current) bullishEvidence += 0.2;
 1116 | else bearishEvidence += 0.2;
 1117 | 
 1118 | 
 1119 | 
 1120 | // Determine final direction
 1121 | double threshold = 0.4; // Minimum evidence required
 1122 | if(bullishEvidence > bearishEvidence && bullishEvidence > threshold) {
 1123 | return SIGNAL_BUY;
 1124 | } else if(bearishEvidence > bullishEvidence && bearishEvidence > threshold) {
 1125 | return SIGNAL_SELL;
 1126 | }
 1127 | 
 1128 | return SIGNAL_NONE;
 1129 | }
 1130 | 
 1131 | double CalculateSignalConfidence(SEnhancedSignalData& signal)
 1132 | {
 1133 | // Base confidence from confluence score
 1134 | double confidence = signal.confluenceScore;
 1135 | 
 1136 | // Boost for high individual component scores
 1137 | int highScoreComponents = 0;
 1138 | if(signal.dragonScore > 0.8) highScoreComponents++;
 1139 | if(signal.smcScore > 0.8) highScoreComponents++;
 1140 | if(signal.pvsraScore > 0.8) highScoreComponents++;
 1141 | 
 1142 | // Boost confidence for multiple high scores
 1143 | confidence += (highScoreComponents * 0.05);
 1144 | 
 1145 | return MathMin(1.0, confidence);
 1146 | }
 1147 | 
 1148 | bool IsNewBarOrSignificantChange()
 1149 | {
 1150 | static datetime lastBarTime = 0;
 1151 | datetime currentBarTime = iTime(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0);
 1152 | 
 1153 | if(currentBarTime != lastBarTime) {
 1154 | lastBarTime = currentBarTime;
 1155 | return true; // New bar
 1156 | }
 1157 | 
 1158 | // Check for significant price change
 1159 | static double lastPrice = 0;
 1160 | double currentPrice = iClose(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0);
 1161 | if(lastPrice > 0) {
 1162 | double priceChange = MathAbs(currentPrice - lastPrice) / lastPrice;
 1163 | if(priceChange > 0.001) { // 0.1% change
 1164 | lastPrice = currentPrice;
 1165 | return true;
 1166 | }
 1167 | } else {
 1168 | lastPrice = currentPrice;
 1169 | }
 1170 | 
 1171 | return false;
 1172 | }
 1173 |

 1176 | Print("🚀 =============== ENHANCED SIGNAL GENERATED ===============");
 1177 |     Print(StringFormat("🎯 SIGNAL: %s | Confidence: %.1f%% | Confluence: %.1f%%",
 1178 |         GetSignalTypeString(signal.signalType), signal.confidence*100, signal.confluenceScore*100));
 1179 | Print("📊 COMPONENT BREAKDOWN:");
 1180 | Print(StringFormat("   🐉 Dragon: %.1f%% | 🌊 Wave: %.1f%% | 📊 PVSRA: %.1f%%",
 1181 | signal.dragonScore*100, signal.waveScore*100, signal.pvsraScore*100));
 1182 | Print(StringFormat("   💰 SMC: %.1f%% | 📈 SR: %.1f%% | ⚡ Mom: %.1f%%",
 1183 | signal.smcScore*100, signal.srScore*100, signal.momentumScore*100));
 1184 | }

 1199 | signalData.isValid = false;
 1200 | 
 1201 | // Get analysis instance
 1202 | // TEMPORARY FIX: Simplified signal generation without analysis
 1203 | // CAnalysisConsolidated* analysis = GetAnalysisConsolidated();
 1204 | // For now, generate signal based on last signal state
 1205 | ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE signalType = SIGNAL_NONE;
 1206 | 
 1207 | // Use simplified signal logic
 1208 | if(m_lastSignal.confidence > 0.6) {
 1209 |     if(m_lastSignal.direction > 0) {
 1210 |         signalType = SIGNAL_BUY;
 1211 |     } else if(m_lastSignal.direction < 0) {
 1212 |         signalType = SIGNAL_SELL;
 1213 |     }
 1214 | }
 1215 |

 1217 |     signalData.reason = "No valid signal generated";
 1218 |     return signalData;
 1219 | }

 1223 | signalData.confidence = m_lastSignal.confidence;
 1224 | signalData.timestamp = m_lastSignal.signalTime;
 1225 | signalData.isValid = true;
 1226 | 
 1227 | // Calculate entry price and levels
 1228 | SetSignalLevels(signalData);
 1229 | 
 1230 | return signalData;
 1231 | }

 1245 | // Use unified SL/TP computation in execution layer (Risk/Trade Manager)
 1246 | // data.stopLoss = currentPrice - (100 * _Point);
 1247 | // data.takeProfit = currentPrice + (200 * _Point);

 1249 | break;
 1250 | 
 1251 | case SIGNAL_SELL:
 1252 | data.entryPrice = currentPrice;
 1253 | // Legacy static SL/TP (100/200 points) removed to avoid mis-sizing across symbols
 1254 | // Use unified SL/TP computation in execution layer (Risk/Trade Manager)
 1255 | // data.stopLoss = currentPrice + (100 * _Point);
 1256 | // data.takeProfit = currentPrice - (200 * _Point);
 1257 | data.reason = "SELL signal generated";
 1258 | break;
 1259 | 
 1260 | default:
 1261 | data.entryPrice = currentPrice;
 1262 | data.stopLoss = 0.0;
 1263 | data.takeProfit = 0.0;
 1264 | data.reason = "No valid signal";
 1265 |     break;
 1266 | }

 1400 | 
 1401 | // Global implementations to match prototypes above
 1402 | ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE GetSignal_SonicR_Basic_Internal()
 1403 | {
 1404 |     // PATCH: Dragon Band Signal Implementation with Cached Handles
 1405 |     if(!g_indicatorManager || !g_indicatorManager.IsInitialized()) {
 1406 |         return SIGNAL_NONE;
 1407 |     }
 1408 | 
 1409 |     // Get EMA values for Dragon Band analysis using cached handles
 1410 |     double ema34[], ema89[], ema200[];
 1411 |     if(!g_indicatorManager.GetEMAValues(ema34, ema89, ema200, 3)) {
 1412 |         return SIGNAL_NONE;
 1413 |     }
 1414 | 
 1415 |     // Get ATR for volatility confirmation
 1416 |     double atrValue;
 1417 |     if(!g_indicatorManager.GetATRValue(atrValue)) {
 1418 |         return SIGNAL_NONE;
 1419 |     }
 1420 | 
 1421 |     // Get current price
 1422 |     double currentPrice = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
 1423 |     if(currentPrice <= 0) {
 1424 |         return SIGNAL_NONE;
 1425 |     }
 1426 | 
 1427 |     // Dragon Band Core Logic
 1428 |     // 1. EMA Alignment Check
 1429 |     bool bullishAlignment = (ema34[0] > ema89[0]) && (ema89[0] > ema200[0]);
 1430 |     bool bearishAlignment = (ema34[0] < ema89[0]) && (ema89[0] < ema200[0]);
 1431 | 
 1432 |     // 2. Dragon Angle Analysis (EMA slope)
 1433 |     double ema34_slope = ema34[0] - ema34[1];
 1434 |     double ema89_slope = ema89[0] - ema89[1];
 1435 | 
 1436 |     // Minimum slope threshold (based on ATR)
 1437 |     double slopeThreshold = atrValue * 0.1; // 10% of ATR
 1438 | 
 1439 |     bool strongBullishSlope = (ema34_slope > slopeThreshold) && (ema89_slope > slopeThreshold * 0.5);
 1440 |     bool strongBearishSlope = (ema34_slope < -slopeThreshold) && (ema89_slope < -slopeThreshold * 0.5);
 1441 | 
 1442 |     // 3. Price Position Relative to Dragon Band
 1443 |     bool priceAboveDragon = currentPrice > ema34[0];
 1444 |     bool priceBelowDragon = currentPrice < ema34[0];
 1445 | 
 1446 |     // 4. Dragon Band Width Analysis
 1447 |     double bandWidth = MathAbs(ema34[0] - ema200[0]);
 1448 |     double minBandWidth = atrValue * 0.5; // Minimum band width for valid signals
 1449 | 
 1450 |     if(bandWidth < minBandWidth) {
 1451 |         return SIGNAL_NONE; // Band too narrow, market consolidating
 1452 |     }
 1453 | 
 1454 |     // 5. Dragon Breakout Signals
 1455 |     // Bullish Dragon Signal
 1456 |     if(bullishAlignment && strongBullishSlope && priceAboveDragon) {
 1457 |         // Additional confirmation: price should be within reasonable distance from EMA34
 1458 |         double maxDistance = atrValue * 1.5;
 1459 |         if((currentPrice - ema34[0]) <= maxDistance) {
 1460 |             return SIGNAL_BUY;
 1461 |         }
 1462 |     }
 1463 | 
 1464 |     // Bearish Dragon Signal
 1465 |     if(bearishAlignment && strongBearishSlope && priceBelowDragon) {
 1466 |         // Additional confirmation: price should be within reasonable distance from EMA34
 1467 |         double maxDistance = atrValue * 1.5;
 1468 |         if((ema34[0] - currentPrice) <= maxDistance) {
 1469 |             return SIGNAL_SELL;
 1470 |         }
 1471 |     }
 1472 | 
 1473 |     // 6. Dragon Reversal Signals (when price returns to dragon after pullback)
 1474 |     if(bullishAlignment && !strongBearishSlope) {
 1475 |         // Price returning to EMA34 from above in uptrend
 1476 |         if(currentPrice <= ema34[0] && currentPrice >= ema89[0]) {
 1477 |             return SIGNAL_BUY;
 1478 |         }
 1479 |     }
 1480 | 
 1481 |     if(bearishAlignment && !strongBullishSlope) {
 1482 |         // Price returning to EMA34 from below in downtrend
 1483 |         if(currentPrice >= ema34[0] && currentPrice <= ema89[0]) {
 1484 |             return SIGNAL_SELL;
 1485 |         }
 1486 |     }
 1487 | 
 1488 |     return SIGNAL_NONE;
 1489 | }
 1490 | 
 1491 | // This function is now implemented above in the PATCH section
 1492 | 
 1493 | // PATCH: Real Signal Implementation - Replace STUB functions
 1494 | ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE GetSignal_SonicR_VPSRA_Internal()
 1495 | {
 1496 |     // PVSRA Enhanced Signal Logic
 1497 |     if(!g_indicatorManager || !g_indicatorManager.IsInitialized()) {
 1498 |         return SIGNAL_NONE;
 1499 |     }
 1500 | 
 1501 |     // Get EMA values for trend confirmation
 1502 |     double ema34[], ema89[], ema200[];
 1503 |     if(!g_indicatorManager.GetEMAValues(ema34, ema89, ema200, 3)) {
 1504 |         return SIGNAL_NONE;
 1505 |     }
 1506 | 
 1507 |     // Get current price data
 1508 |     double high[], low[], close[], volume[];
 1509 |     ArrayResize(high, 3); ArrayResize(low, 3); ArrayResize(close, 3); ArrayResize(volume, 3);
 1510 |     ArraySetAsSeries(high, true); ArraySetAsSeries(low, true);
 1511 |     ArraySetAsSeries(close, true); ArraySetAsSeries(volume, true);
 1512 | 
 1513 |     if(CopyHigh(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0, 3, high) != 3 ||
 1514 |        CopyLow(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0, 3, low) != 3 ||
 1515 |        CopyClose(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0, 3, close) != 3 ||
 1516 |        CopyTickVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0, 3, volume) != 3) {
 1517 |         return SIGNAL_NONE;
 1518 |     }
 1519 | 
 1520 |     // PVSRA Analysis
 1521 |     double currentVolume = volume[0];
 1522 |     double avgVolume = (volume[0] + volume[1] + volume[2]) / 3.0;
 1523 |     double volumeRatio = (avgVolume > 0) ? currentVolume / avgVolume : 1.0;
 1524 | 
 1525 |     // Volume threshold for PVSRA confirmation
 1526 |     if(volumeRatio < 1.5) {
 1527 |         return SIGNAL_NONE; // Insufficient volume
 1528 |     }
 1529 | 
 1530 |     // Spread analysis
 1531 |     double spread = high[0] - low[0];
 1532 |     double avgSpread = ((high[0] - low[0]) + (high[1] - low[1]) + (high[2] - low[2])) / 3.0;
 1533 |     double spreadRatio = (avgSpread > 0) ? spread / avgSpread : 1.0;
 1534 | 
 1535 |     // Close position analysis
 1536 |     double closePosition = (close[0] - low[0]) / (high[0] - low[0]);
 1537 | 
 1538 |     // EMA trend confirmation
 1539 |     bool bullishTrend = (ema34[0] > ema89[0]) && (ema89[0] > ema200[0]);
 1540 |     bool bearishTrend = (ema34[0] < ema89[0]) && (ema89[0] < ema200[0]);
 1541 | 
 1542 |     // PVSRA Pattern Recognition
 1543 |     if(volumeRatio >= 2.0 && spreadRatio >= 1.2) {
 1544 |         // High volume + wide spread
 1545 |         if(closePosition > 0.7 && bullishTrend) {
 1546 |             return SIGNAL_BUY; // Bullish climax/stopping volume
 1547 |         }
 1548 |         if(closePosition < 0.3 && bearishTrend) {
 1549 |             return SIGNAL_SELL; // Bearish climax/stopping volume
 1550 |         }
 1551 |     }
 1552 | 
 1553 |     if(volumeRatio >= 1.5 && spreadRatio < 0.8) {
 1554 |         // High volume + narrow spread (No Demand/No Supply)
 1555 |         if(closePosition < 0.4 && !bullishTrend) {
 1556 |             return SIGNAL_SELL; // No Demand
 1557 |         }
 1558 |         if(closePosition > 0.6 && !bearishTrend) {
 1559 |             return SIGNAL_BUY; // No Supply
 1560 |         }
 1561 |     }
 1562 | 
 1563 |     return SIGNAL_NONE;
 1564 | }
 1565 | 
 1566 | ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE GetSignal_Scout_Internal()
 1567 | {
 1568 |     // Scout Signal Logic - Early trend detection
 1569 |     if(!g_indicatorManager || !g_indicatorManager.IsInitialized()) {
 1570 |         return SIGNAL_NONE;
 1571 |     }
 1572 | 
 1573 |     // Get EMA values for multiple periods
 1574 |     double ema34[], ema89[], ema200[];
 1575 |     if(!g_indicatorManager.GetEMAValues(ema34, ema89, ema200, 5)) {
 1576 |         return SIGNAL_NONE;
 1577 |     }
 1578 | 
 1579 |     // Get ATR for volatility analysis
 1580 |     double atrValue;
 1581 |     if(!g_indicatorManager.GetATRValue(atrValue)) {
 1582 |         return SIGNAL_NONE;
 1583 |     }
 1584 | 
 1585 |     // Get price data
 1586 |     double close[];
 1587 |     ArrayResize(close, 5);
 1588 |     ArraySetAsSeries(close, true);
 1589 |     if(CopyClose(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0, 5, close) != 5) {
 1590 |         return SIGNAL_NONE;
 1591 |     }
 1592 | 
 1593 |     // Scout conditions: Early trend momentum
 1594 |     double currentPrice = close[0];
 1595 |     double priceChange = currentPrice - close[4]; // 5-bar price change
 1596 |     double atrThreshold = atrValue * 2.0; // 2x ATR threshold
 1597 | 
 1598 |     // EMA momentum analysis
 1599 |     double ema34_momentum = ema34[0] - ema34[2]; // 3-bar EMA momentum
 1600 |     double ema89_momentum = ema89[0] - ema89[2];
 1601 | 
 1602 |     // Strong momentum conditions
 1603 |     bool strongBullishMomentum = (priceChange > atrThreshold) &&
 1604 |                                 (ema34_momentum > 0) && (ema89_momentum > 0) &&
 1605 |                                 (ema34[0] > ema89[0]) && (currentPrice > ema34[0]);
 1606 | 
 1607 |     bool strongBearishMomentum = (priceChange < -atrThreshold) &&
 1608 |                                 (ema34_momentum < 0) && (ema89_momentum < 0) &&
 1609 |                                 (ema34[0] < ema89[0]) && (currentPrice < ema34[0]);
 1610 | 
 1611 |     // Scout early entry signals
 1612 |     if(strongBullishMomentum && (ema34[0] > ema200[0])) {
 1613 |         return SIGNAL_BUY;
 1614 |     }
 1615 | 
 1616 |     if(strongBearishMomentum && (ema34[0] < ema200[0])) {
 1617 |         return SIGNAL_SELL;
 1618 |     }
 1619 | 
 1620 |     return SIGNAL_NONE;
 1621 | }
 1622 | 
 1623 | // Wrapper functions for forward declarations compatibility
 1624 | ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE GetSignal_SonicR_Basic()
 1625 | {
 1626 |     return GetSignal_SonicR_Basic_Internal();
 1627 | }
 1628 | 
 1629 | ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE GetSignal_SonicR_VPSRA()
 1630 | {
 1631 |     return GetSignal_SonicR_VPSRA_Internal();
 1632 | }
 1633 | 
 1634 | ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE GetSignal_Scout()
 1635 | {
 1636 |     return GetSignal_Scout_Internal();
 1637 | }
 1638 | 
 1639 | // API wrappers to satisfy declarations in 04_SignalGeneration_00_ConsolidatedSignals.api.mqh
 1640 | bool GetSignal_SonicR_Basic(SignalDecision &out, const string sym, ENUM_TIMEFRAMES tf)
 1641 | {
 1642 | 	ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE sig = GetSignal_SonicR_Basic_Internal();
 1643 | 	out.buy = (sig == SIGNAL_BUY);
 1644 | 	out.sell = (sig == SIGNAL_SELL);
 1645 | 	out.score = 0.0;
 1646 | 	out.reason = (sig==SIGNAL_BUY?"BUY":"") + (sig==SIGNAL_SELL?"SELL":"");
 1647 | 	return (sig != SIGNAL_NONE);
 1648 | }
 1649 | 
 1650 | bool GetSignal_SonicR_VPSRA(SignalDecision &out, const string sym, ENUM_TIMEFRAMES tf)
 1651 | {
 1652 | 	ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE sig = GetSignal_SonicR_VPSRA_Internal();
 1653 | 	out.buy = (sig == SIGNAL_BUY);
 1654 | 	out.sell = (sig == SIGNAL_SELL);
 1655 | 	out.score = 0.0;
 1656 | 	out.reason = (sig==SIGNAL_BUY?"BUY":"") + (sig==SIGNAL_SELL?"SELL":"");
 1657 | 	return (sig != SIGNAL_NONE);
 1658 | }

   22 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   23 | //| 🎯 CONFLICT STRUCTURE                                           |
   24 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   25 | struct SConflict
   26 | {
   27 |    string conflictType;              // Loại xung đột
   28 |    string component1;                // Component 1
   29 |    string component2;                // Component 2  
   30 |    double severity;                  // Mức độ nghiêm trọng
   31 |    double scoreAdjustment;           // Điều chỉnh điểm
   32 |    string resolution;                // Cách giải quyết
   33 | };
   34 | 
   35 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   36 | //| 🎯 CONFLUENCE ENGINE CLASS                                      |
   37 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   38 | class CConfluenceEngine
   39 | {
   40 | private:
   41 |    ENUM_TRADING_SCENARIO m_currentScenario;
   42 |    SEnhancedSignalData m_lastConfluence;
   43 |    datetime m_lastAnalysisTime;
   44 |    
   45 |    // Scenario Thresholds - FIXED: Increased size to match enum count
   46 |    double m_scenarioThresholds[8];  // Support all 8 scenarios (0-7)
   47 |    double m_scenarioWeights[8][6];  // 8 scenarios x 6 components
   48 |    
   49 |    // Performance Tracking - FIXED: Support all 8 scenarios
   50 |    int m_totalSignals[8];
   51 |    int m_successfulSignals[8];
   52 |    double m_avgConfluence[8];
   53 | 
   54 | private:
   55 |    // Helper function for safe array access
   56 |    int GetSafeScenarioIndex(ENUM_TRADING_SCENARIO scenario)
   57 |    {
   58 |       int index = (int)scenario;
   59 |       if(index < 0 || index >= 8) {
   60 |          Print("[CONFLUENCE ENGINE] WARNING: Invalid scenario index ", index, ", using BASIC (0)");
   61 |          return 0; // Default to SCENARIO_SONIC_R_BASIC
   62 |       }
   63 |       return index;
   64 |    }
   65 | 
   66 | public:
   67 |    CConfluenceEngine()
   68 |    {
   69 |       m_currentScenario = SCENARIO_SONIC_R_BASIC;
   70 |       m_lastConfluence.Reset();
   71 |       m_lastAnalysisTime = 0;
   72 | 
   73 |       InitializeScenarioParameters();
   74 |       ResetPerformanceMetrics();
   75 |    }
   76 | 
   77 |    void InitializeScenarioParameters()
   78 |    {
   79 |       // Initialize all 8 scenario thresholds
   80 |       m_scenarioThresholds[(int)SCENARIO_SONIC_R_BASIC] = 0.65;
   81 |       m_scenarioThresholds[(int)SCENARIO_SONIC_R_ENHANCED] = 0.68;
   82 |       m_scenarioThresholds[(int)SCENARIO_SONIC_R_ADVANCED] = 0.72;
   83 |       m_scenarioThresholds[(int)SCENARIO_SONIC_R_EXPERT] = 0.78;
   84 |       m_scenarioThresholds[(int)SCENARIO_SONIC_R_VPSRA] = 0.70;
   85 |       m_scenarioThresholds[(int)SCENARIO_SONIC_R_SCALING] = 0.75;
   86 |       m_scenarioThresholds[(int)SCENARIO_SCOUT_SMC_MULTIFRAME] = 0.80;
   87 |       m_scenarioThresholds[(int)SCENARIO_MULTI_ASSET_ADAPTIVE] = 0.72;
   88 | 
   89 |       // default balanced weights; UpdateMarketContextEnhanced will adjust
   90 |       for(int s=0;s<8;s++){  // FIXED: Loop through all 8 scenarios
   91 |          m_scenarioWeights[s][0]=0.25;
   92 |          m_scenarioWeights[s][1]=0.25;
   93 |          m_scenarioWeights[s][2]=0.20;
   94 |          m_scenarioWeights[s][3]=0.15;
   95 |          m_scenarioWeights[s][4]=0.10;
   96 |          m_scenarioWeights[s][5]=0.05;
   97 |       }
   98 |    }
   99 |    
  100 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  101 |    //| 🎯 PHÂN TÍCH CONFLUENCE THEO KỊCH BẢN                          |
  102 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  103 |    SEnhancedSignalData AnalyzeConfluence(CAnalysisConsolidated* analysis, ENUM_TRADING_SCENARIO scenario)
  104 |    {
  105 |       SEnhancedSignalData confluence; confluence.Reset();
  106 |       
  107 |       if(analysis == NULL) {
  108 |          confluence.reasoning = "Analysis not available";
  109 |          return confluence;
  110 |       }
  111 |       
  112 |       m_currentScenario = scenario;
  113 |       
  114 |       // Thu thập điểm số từng component
  115 |       CollectComponentScores(confluence, analysis);
  116 |       
  117 |       // Tính toán confluence theo kịch bản
  118 |       CalculateScenarioConfluence(confluence, scenario);
  119 |       
  120 |       // Đánh giá market context
  121 |       EvaluateMarketContext(confluence, analysis);
  122 |       
  123 |       // Xác định signal direction
  124 |       DetermineSignalDirection(confluence);
  125 |       
  126 |       // Tính toán entry/exit levels
  127 |       CalculateEntryExitLevels(confluence);
  128 |       
  129 |       // Validate theo kịch bản
  130 |       ValidateScenarioRequirements(confluence, scenario);
  131 |       
  132 |       m_lastConfluence = confluence;
  133 |       m_lastAnalysisTime = TimeCurrent();
  134 |       
  135 |       return confluence;
  136 |    }
  137 |    
  138 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  139 |    //| 🎯 THU THẬP ĐIỂM SỐ CÁC COMPONENT                              |
  140 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  141 |    void CollectComponentScores(SEnhancedSignalData& confluence, CAnalysisConsolidated* analysis)
  142 |    {
  143 |       confluence.dragonScore = AnalyzeDragonBand();
  144 |       confluence.waveScore = AnalyzePriceAction();
  145 |       confluence.pvsraScore = AnalyzeVolumeProfile();
  146 |       confluence.smcScore = AnalyzeSMC();
  147 |       confluence.momentumScore = 0.5; // placeholder
  148 |       confluence.srScore = AnalyzeMultiframe();
  149 |    }
  150 |    
  151 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  152 |    //| 🎯 TÍNH TOÁN CONFLUENCE THEO KỊCH BẢN                          |
  153 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  154 |    void CalculateScenarioConfluence(SEnhancedSignalData& confluence, ENUM_TRADING_SCENARIO scenario)
  155 |    {
  156 |       double totalScore = 0.0;
  157 |       double weights[6];
  158 |       
  159 |       // Lấy trọng số cho kịch bản hiện tại với safe index
  160 |       int safeIndex = GetSafeScenarioIndex((ENUM_TRADING_SCENARIO)scenario);
  161 |       for(int i = 0; i < 6; i++) {
  162 |          weights[i] = m_scenarioWeights[safeIndex][i];
  163 |       }
  164 | 
  165 |       // Tính tổng điểm có trọng số
  166 |       totalScore += confluence.dragonScore * weights[0];
  167 |       totalScore += confluence.waveScore * weights[1];
  168 |       totalScore += confluence.pvsraScore * weights[2];
  169 |       totalScore += 0.0 /*wyckoff*/ * weights[3];
  170 |       totalScore += confluence.smcScore * weights[4];
  171 |       totalScore += confluence.srScore * weights[5];
  172 | 
  173 |       confluence.confluenceScore = totalScore;
  174 | 
  175 |       // Tính độ tin cậy theo kịch bản với safe index
  176 |       double threshold = m_scenarioThresholds[safeIndex];
  177 |       confluence.confidence = (totalScore >= threshold) ? (totalScore - threshold) / (1.0 - threshold) : 0.0;
  178 |       
  179 |       // Bonus cho perfect alignment
  180 |       if(IsPerfectAlignment(confluence)) {
  181 |          confluence.confluenceScore = MathMin(confluence.confluenceScore * 1.1, 1.0);
  182 |          confluence.confidence = MathMin(confluence.confidence * 1.2, 1.0);
  183 |       }
  184 |    }
  185 |    
  186 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  187 |    //| 🎯 ĐÁNH GIÁ MARKET CONTEXT                                     |
  188 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  189 |    void EvaluateMarketContext(SEnhancedSignalData& confluence, CAnalysisConsolidated* analysis)
  190 |    {
  191 |       // kept minimal - this struct does not carry regime/session fields; context used in weights
  192 |       UpdateMarketContextEnhanced(confluence);
  193 |    }
  194 |    
  195 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  196 |    //| 🎯 XÁC ĐỊNH HƯỚNG SIGNAL                                       |
  197 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  198 |    void DetermineSignalDirection(SEnhancedSignalData& confluence)
  199 |    {
  200 |       double bullishScore = 0.0;
  201 |       double bearishScore = 0.0;
  202 |       
  203 |       // Đánh giá từng component
  204 |       if(confluence.dragonScore > 0.6) bullishScore += 0.3;
  205 |       else if(confluence.dragonScore < 0.4) bearishScore += 0.3;
  206 |       
  207 |       if(confluence.waveScore > 0.6) bullishScore += 0.25;
  208 |       else if(confluence.waveScore < 0.4) bearishScore += 0.25;
  209 |       
  210 |       if(confluence.pvsraScore > 0.6) bullishScore += 0.2;
  211 |       else if(confluence.pvsraScore < 0.4) bearishScore += 0.2;
  212 |       
  213 |       if(confluence.smcScore > 0.6) bullishScore += 0.15;
  214 |       else if(confluence.smcScore < 0.4) bearishScore += 0.15;
  215 |       
  216 |       // wyckoffScore omitted in this struct
  217 |       
  218 |       // Xác định direction
  219 |       double difference = MathAbs(bullishScore - bearishScore);
  220 |       if(difference >= 0.3) {  // Cần chênh lệch tối thiểu 30%
  221 |          if(bullishScore > bearishScore) {
  222 |             confluence.direction = SIGNAL_BUY;
  223 |             confluence.reasoning = StringFormat("BULLISH confluence: %.1f%% vs %.1f%%", 
  224 |                                                  bullishScore*100, bearishScore*100);
  225 |          } else {
  226 |             confluence.direction = SIGNAL_SELL;
  227 |             confluence.reasoning = StringFormat("BEARISH confluence: %.1f%% vs %.1f%%", 
  228 |                                                  bearishScore*100, bullishScore*100);
  229 |          }
  230 |       } else {
  231 |          confluence.direction = SIGNAL_NONE;
  232 |          confluence.reasoning = StringFormat("NEUTRAL - insufficient directional bias: %.1f%% vs %.1f%%", 
  233 |                                                bullishScore*100, bearishScore*100);
  234 |       }
  235 |    }
  236 |    
  237 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  238 |    //| 🎯 TÍNH TOÁN ENTRY/EXIT LEVELS                                 |
  239 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  240 |    void CalculateEntryExitLevels(SEnhancedSignalData& confluence)
  241 |    {
  242 |       double currentPrice = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
  243 |       double atr = GetATR(14);
  244 |       
  245 |       // Levels are not stored in SEnhancedSignalData; keep in reasoning for traceability
  246 |       
  247 |       if(confluence.direction == SIGNAL_BUY) {
  248 |          double sl = currentPrice - (atr * 1.5);
  249 |          double tp = currentPrice + (atr * 3.0);
  250 |          confluence.reasoning += StringFormat(" | SL=%.5f TP=%.5f RR=2.0", sl, tp);
  251 |       }
  252 |       else if(confluence.direction == SIGNAL_SELL) {
  253 |          double sl = currentPrice + (atr * 1.5);
  254 |          double tp = currentPrice - (atr * 3.0);
  255 |          confluence.reasoning += StringFormat(" | SL=%.5f TP=%.5f RR=2.0", sl, tp);
  256 |       }
  257 |       
  258 |       // Điều chỉnh R:R theo kịch bản
  259 |       // omitted for SEnhancedSignalData
  260 |    }
  261 |    
  262 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  263 |    //| 🎯 VALIDATE THEO YÊU CẦU KỊCH BẢN                              |
  264 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  265 |    void ValidateScenarioRequirements(SEnhancedSignalData& confluence, ENUM_TRADING_SCENARIO scenario)
  266 |    {
  267 |       bool isValid = true;
  268 |       string validationReason = "";
  269 |       
  270 |       switch(scenario) {
  271 |          case SCENARIO_SONIC_R_BASIC:
  272 |             // Yêu cầu Dragon Band mạnh
  273 |             if(confluence.dragonScore < 0.5) {
  274 |                isValid = false;
  275 |                validationReason = "Dragon Band too weak for Basic scenario";
  276 |             }
  277 |             break;
  278 |             
  279 |          case SCENARIO_SONIC_R_VPSRA:
  280 |             // Yêu cầu Volume Profile confirmation
  281 |             if(confluence.pvsraScore < 0.6) {
  282 |                isValid = false;
  283 |                validationReason = "Volume Profile insufficient for VPSRA scenario";
  284 |             }
  285 |             break;
  286 |             
  287 |          case SCENARIO_SONIC_R_SCALING:
  288 |             // Yêu cầu trending market
  289 |             {
  290 |                 bool trending = (confluence.dragonScore > 0.6 && confluence.waveScore > 0.6);
  291 |                 if(!trending) {
  292 |                  isValid = false;
  293 |                  validationReason = "Non-trending market for Scaling scenario";
  294 |                 }
  295 |             }
  296 |             break;
  297 |             
  298 |          case SCENARIO_SCOUT_SMC_MULTIFRAME:
  299 |             // Yêu cầu SMC mạnh và multiframe alignment
  300 |             if(confluence.smcScore < 0.7 || confluence.srScore < 0.6) {
  301 |                isValid = false;
  302 |                validationReason = "SMC or Multiframe insufficient for Scout scenario";
  303 |             }
  304 |             break;
  305 |             
  306 |          case SCENARIO_MULTI_ASSET_ADAPTIVE:
  307 |             // Adaptive - ít yêu cầu nghiêm ngặt hơn
  308 |             if(confluence.confluenceScore < 0.6) {
  309 |                isValid = false;
  310 |                validationReason = "Overall confluence too low for Adaptive scenario";
  311 |             }
  312 |             break;
  313 |       }
  314 |       
  315 |       if(!isValid) {
  316 |          confluence.direction = SIGNAL_NONE;
  317 |          confluence.reasoning = validationReason;
  318 |          confluence.confidence = 0.0;
  319 |       }
  320 |    }
  321 |    
  322 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  323 |    //| 🎯 ENHANCED CONFLUENCE CALCULATION - THEO PLAN                 |
  324 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  325 |    SEnhancedSignalData CalculateEnhancedConfluence(
  326 |       double dragonScore, double dragonConfidence,
  327 |       double waveScore, double waveConfidence,
  328 |       double pvsraScore, double pvsraConfidence,
  329 |       double smcScore, double smcConfidence,
  330 |       double oscillatorScore, double oscillatorConfidence
  331 |    )
  332 |    {
  333 |       SEnhancedSignalData result; result.Reset();
  334 |       result.signalTime = TimeCurrent();
  335 |       
  336 |       // 1. Collect component scores
  337 |       result.dragonScore = dragonScore / 100.0;
  338 |       result.waveScore = waveScore / 100.0;
  339 |       result.pvsraScore = pvsraScore / 100.0;
  340 |       result.smcScore = smcScore / 100.0;
  341 |       result.srScore = 0.5; // Placeholder
  342 |       
  343 |       // 2. Update market context và adaptive weights
  344 |       UpdateMarketContextEnhanced(result);
  345 |       
  346 |       // 3. Calculate volume delta - THEO PLAN
  347 |       double volumeDelta = CalculateVolumeDeltaEnhanced();
  348 |       if(volumeDelta < 0.2) {
  349 |          result.direction = SIGNAL_NONE;
  350 |          result.reasoning = "Low volume delta - potential fake signal";
  351 |          result.confluenceScore = 0.0;
  352 |          result.confidence = 0.0;
  353 |          Print("🧠 [CONFLUENCE] SKIP - Volume delta too low: ", volumeDelta);
  354 |          return result;
  355 |       }
  356 |       
  357 |       // 4. Detect conflicts - THEO PLAN
  358 |       DetectConflictsEnhanced(result, dragonConfidence, waveConfidence, 
  359 |                              pvsraConfidence, smcConfidence, oscillatorConfidence);
  360 |       
  361 |       // 5. Calculate weighted confluence score
  362 |       CalculateWeightedConfluenceEnhanced(result);
  363 |       
  364 |       // 6. Apply conflict resolution (-20 điểm theo plan)
  365 |       ResolveConflictsEnhanced(result);
  366 |       
  367 |       // 7. Make final decision với thresholds
  368 |       MakeFinalDecisionEnhanced(result);
  369 |       
  370 |       return result;
  371 |    }
  372 |    
  373 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  374 |    //| 🌍 UPDATE MARKET CONTEXT ENHANCED                              |
  375 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  376 |    void UpdateMarketContextEnhanced(SEnhancedSignalData& confluence)
  377 |    {
  378 |       // Regime-aware weights mapping based on simplified regime
  379 |       double weights[6];
  380 |       // Use internal decision to set adaptive weights array
  381 |       
  382 |       // Default balanced
  383 |       weights[0] = 0.25; // Dragon
  384 |       weights[1] = 0.25; // Wave
  385 |       weights[2] = 0.20; // PVSRA
  386 |       weights[3] = 0.15; // SMC
  387 |       weights[4] = 0.10; // Oscillators
  388 |       weights[5] = 0.05; // Multiframe
  389 |       
  390 |       // Store adaptive weights
  391 |       for(int i = 0; i < 6; i++) {
  392 |          m_scenarioWeights[m_currentScenario][i] = weights[i];
  393 |       }
  394 |    }
  395 |    
  396 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  397 |    //| 📊 CALCULATE VOLUME DELTA ENHANCED                             |
  398 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  399 |    double CalculateVolumeDeltaEnhanced()
  400 |    {
  401 |       long currentVolume = iTickVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0);
  402 |       long avgVolume = 0;
  403 |       
  404 |       // Calculate average volume over last 20 bars
  405 |       for(int i = 1; i <= 20; i++) {
  406 |          avgVolume += iTickVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  407 |       }
  408 |       avgVolume /= 20;
  409 |       
  410 |       if(avgVolume == 0) return 0.0;
  411 |       
  412 |       double volumeRatio = (double)currentVolume / (double)avgVolume;
  413 |       
  414 |       // Volume delta simulation (trong thực tế sẽ dùng tick data)
  415 |       // Simplified: ratio > 1.5 = strong, < 0.5 = weak
  416 |       return volumeRatio;
  417 |    }
  418 |    
  419 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  420 |    //| ⚔️ DETECT CONFLICTS ENHANCED                                   |
  421 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  422 |    void DetectConflictsEnhanced(SEnhancedSignalData& confluence,
  423 |                                double dragonConf, double waveConf, 
  424 |                                double pvsraConf, double smcConf, double oscConf)
  425 |    {
  426 |       // SEnhancedSignalData does not carry conflict arrays; keep as no-op or extend if needed
  427 |    }
  428 |    
  429 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  430 |    //| 🧮 CALCULATE WEIGHTED CONFLUENCE ENHANCED                      |
  431 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  432 |    void CalculateWeightedConfluenceEnhanced(SEnhancedSignalData& confluence)
  433 |    {
  434 |       double weights[6];
  435 |       for(int i = 0; i < 6; i++) {
  436 |          weights[i] = m_scenarioWeights[m_currentScenario][i];
  437 |       }
  438 |       
  439 |       double scores[6] = {confluence.dragonScore, confluence.waveScore,
  440 |                          confluence.pvsraScore, 0.0,
  441 |                          confluence.smcScore, confluence.srScore};
  442 |       
  443 |       double weightedSum = 0.0;
  444 |       double totalWeight = 0.0;
  445 |       
  446 |       for(int i = 0; i < 6; i++) {
  447 |          weightedSum += scores[i] * weights[i];
  448 |          totalWeight += weights[i];
  449 |       }
  450 |       
  451 |       if(totalWeight > 0) {
  452 |          confluence.confluenceScore = weightedSum / totalWeight;
  453 |       } else {
  454 |          confluence.confluenceScore = 0.0;
  455 |       }
  456 |       
  457 |       // Calculate confidence (average of valid components)
  458 |       double confidenceSum = 0.0;
  459 |       int validComponents = 0;
  460 |       
  461 |       if(confluence.dragonScore > 0) { confidenceSum += 80.0; validComponents++; }
  462 |       if(confluence.waveScore > 0) { confidenceSum += 75.0; validComponents++; }
  463 |       if(confluence.pvsraScore > 0) { confidenceSum += 85.0; validComponents++; }
  464 |       if(confluence.smcScore > 0) { confidenceSum += 70.0; validComponents++; }
  465 |       
  466 |       confluence.confidence = validComponents > 0 ? confidenceSum / validComponents : 0.0;
  467 |    }
  468 |    
  469 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  470 |    //| 🔧 RESOLVE CONFLICTS ENHANCED                                  |
  471 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  472 |    void ResolveConflictsEnhanced(SEnhancedSignalData& confluence)
  473 |    {
  474 |       // SEnhancedSignalData does not carry conflict arrays; keep as no-op or extend if needed
  475 |    }
  476 |    
  477 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  478 |    //| 🎯 MAKE FINAL DECISION ENHANCED                                |
  479 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  480 |    void MakeFinalDecisionEnhanced(SEnhancedSignalData& confluence)
  481 |    {
  482 |       double scorePercent = confluence.confluenceScore * 100.0;
  483 |       
  484 |       // Determine signal direction
  485 |       if(confluence.dragonScore > 0.6 && confluence.waveScore > 0.6) {
  486 |          confluence.direction = SIGNAL_BUY;
  487 |       }
  488 |       else if(confluence.dragonScore < 0.4 && confluence.waveScore < 0.4) {
  489 |          confluence.direction = SIGNAL_SELL;
  490 |       }
  491 |       else {
  492 |          confluence.direction = SIGNAL_NONE;
  493 |       }
  494 |       
  495 |       // Apply thresholds theo plan
  496 |       if(scorePercent >= 80.0 && confluence.confidence >= 95.0) {
  497 |          // >80 trade standard
  498 |          confluence.reasoning = StringFormat("TRADE - Strong confluence: Score=%.1f%%, Confidence=%.1f%%", 
  499 |                                                scorePercent, confluence.confidence);
  500 |          Print("🚀 [DECISION] ", confluence.reasoning);
  501 |       }
  502 |       else if(scorePercent >= 70.0 && scorePercent < 80.0) {
  503 |          // 70-80 scout/reduce size
  504 |          confluence.reasoning = StringFormat("SCOUT - Medium confluence: Score=%.1f%% - Reduce size 50%%", 
  505 |                                                scorePercent);
  506 |          Print("🔍 [DECISION] ", confluence.reasoning);
  507 |       }
  508 |       else {
  509 |          // <70 skip
  510 |          confluence.direction = SIGNAL_NONE;
  511 |          confluence.reasoning = StringFormat("SKIP - Weak confluence: Score=%.1f%%", scorePercent);
  512 |          Print("⏸️ [DECISION] ", confluence.reasoning);
  513 |       }
  514 |    }
  515 |    
  516 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  517 |    //| 📊 POST-ENTRY MONITORING - THEO PLAN                          |
  518 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  519 |    bool MonitorPostEntry(double currentProfit, double riskAmount)
  520 |    {
  521 |       // Recalculate confluence score
  522 |       SEnhancedSignalData currentConfluence;
  523 |       currentConfluence.confluenceScore = m_lastConfluence.confluenceScore;
  524 |       currentConfluence.confidence = m_lastConfluence.confidence;
  525 |       currentConfluence.direction = m_lastConfluence.direction;
  526 |       currentConfluence.dragonScore = m_lastConfluence.dragonScore;
  527 |       currentConfluence.waveScore = m_lastConfluence.waveScore;
  528 |       currentConfluence.pvsraScore = m_lastConfluence.pvsraScore;
  529 |       currentConfluence.smcScore = m_lastConfluence.smcScore;
  530 |       currentConfluence.srScore = m_lastConfluence.srScore;
  531 |       currentConfluence.momentumScore = m_lastConfluence.momentumScore;
  532 |        
  533 |        // Simplified recalculation (trong thực tế sẽ gọi lại modules)
  534 |        double currentScore = currentConfluence.confluenceScore * 100.0;
  535 |       
  536 |       // Post-entry confirm: Sau entry, nếu score drop<70 trong 15min, close
  537 |       if(currentScore < 70.0 && currentProfit > 0.3 * riskAmount) {
  538 |          Print(StringFormat("🚨 [POST-ENTRY] Confluence dropped to %.1f%% - Exit early (Profit=%.2f)", 
  539 |                            currentScore, currentProfit));
  540 |          return true; // Signal to close
  541 |       }
  542 |       
  543 |       return false; // Continue holding
  544 |    }
  545 |    
  546 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  547 |    //| 🎯 HELPER FUNCTIONS - COMPONENT ANALYSIS                       |
  548 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  549 |    double AnalyzeDragonBand()
  550 |    {
  551 |       // Dragon Band analysis với EMA34 H/L/C
  552 |       // Get EMA handles for Dragon Band
  553 |       int emaHighHandle = iMA(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 34, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_HIGH);
  554 |       int emaLowHandle = iMA(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 34, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_LOW);
  555 |       int emaCloseHandle = iMA(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 34, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
  556 |       
  557 |       double emaHigh[], emaLow[], emaClose[];
  558 |       ArraySetAsSeries(emaHigh, true);
  559 |       ArraySetAsSeries(emaLow, true);
  560 |       ArraySetAsSeries(emaClose, true);
  561 |       
  562 |       CopyBuffer(emaHighHandle, 0, 0, 1, emaHigh);
  563 |       CopyBuffer(emaLowHandle, 0, 0, 1, emaLow);
  564 |       CopyBuffer(emaCloseHandle, 0, 0, 1, emaClose);
  565 |       
  566 |       double currentPrice = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
  567 |       
  568 |       // Score based on position relative to Dragon Band
  569 |       if(currentPrice > emaHigh[0]) return 0.8; // Strong bullish
  570 |       else if(currentPrice > emaClose[0]) return 0.6; // Moderate bullish
  571 |       else if(currentPrice < emaLow[0]) return 0.2; // Strong bearish
  572 |       else if(currentPrice < emaClose[0]) return 0.4; // Moderate bearish
  573 |       
  574 |       return 0.5; // Neutral
  575 |    }
  576 |    
  577 |    double AnalyzePriceAction()
  578 |    {
  579 |       // Wave structure analysis
  580 |       double high0 = iHigh(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0);
  581 |       double low0 = iLow(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0);
  582 |       double high1 = iHigh(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 1);
  583 |       double low1 = iLow(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 1);
  584 |       
  585 |       // Simple wave pattern detection
  586 |       if(high0 > high1 && low0 > low1) return 0.7; // Higher high, higher low
  587 |       else if(high0 < high1 && low0 < low1) return 0.3; // Lower high, lower low
  588 |       
  589 |       return 0.5; // Sideways
  590 |    }
  591 |    
  592 |    double AnalyzeVolumeProfile()
  593 |    {
  594 |       // VPSRA Volume Profile analysis
  595 |       long currentVol = iTickVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0);
  596 |       long avgVol = 0;
  597 |       
  598 |       for(int i = 1; i <= 10; i++) {
  599 |          avgVol += iTickVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  600 |       }
  601 |       avgVol /= 10;
  602 |       
  603 |       if(avgVol == 0) return 0.5;
  604 |       
  605 |       double volRatio = (double)currentVol / (double)avgVol;
  606 |       
  607 |       if(volRatio > 1.5) return 0.8; // High volume
  608 |       else if(volRatio > 1.2) return 0.6; // Above average
  609 |       else if(volRatio < 0.8) return 0.4; // Below average
  610 |       else if(volRatio < 0.5) return 0.2; // Low volume
  611 |       
  612 |       return 0.5; // Average volume
  613 |    }
  614 |    
  615 |    double AnalyzeWyckoff()
  616 |    {
  617 |       // Simplified Wyckoff phase analysis
  618 |       return 0.5; // Placeholder
  619 |    }
  620 |    
  621 |    double AnalyzeSMC()
  622 |    {
  623 |       // Smart Money Concepts analysis
  624 |       return 0.5; // Placeholder
  625 |    }
  626 |    
  627 |    double AnalyzeMultiframe()
  628 |    {
  629 |       // Multi-timeframe alignment
  630 |       double score = 0.0;
  631 |       // Fix MQL5 iMA usage - get handles and use CopyBuffer
  632 |       int emaH1_handle = iMA(_Symbol, PERIOD_H1, 34, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
  633 |       int emaH4_handle = iMA(_Symbol, PERIOD_H4, 34, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
  634 |       
  635 |       double emaH1_buffer[1], emaH4_buffer[1];
  636 |       if(CopyBuffer(emaH1_handle, 0, 0, 1, emaH1_buffer) < 1 ||
  637 |          CopyBuffer(emaH4_handle, 0, 0, 1, emaH4_buffer) < 1) {
  638 |          IndicatorRelease(emaH1_handle);
  639 |          IndicatorRelease(emaH4_handle);
  640 |          return 0.0; // Return default if data not available
  641 |       }
  642 |       
  643 |       double emaH1 = emaH1_buffer[0];
  644 |       double emaH4 = emaH4_buffer[0];
  645 |       double current = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
  646 |       
  647 |       int alignments = 0;
  648 |       if (current > emaH1) alignments++;
  649 |       if (current > emaH4) alignments++;
  650 |       score = (double)alignments / 2.0;
  651 |       
  652 |       // Clean up handles
  653 |       IndicatorRelease(emaH1_handle);
  654 |       IndicatorRelease(emaH4_handle);
  655 |       
  656 |       return score;
  657 |    }
  658 |    
  659 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  660 |    //| 🌍 ENHANCED MARKET REGIME DETECTION                            |
  661 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  662 |    ENUM_MARKET_REGIME DetermineMarketRegimeEnhanced()
  663 |    {
  664 |       double ema89 = iMA(_Symbol, PERIOD_H1, 89, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
  665 |       double ema89_prev = iMA(_Symbol, PERIOD_H1, 89, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
  666 |       double currentPrice = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
  667 |       
  668 |       double slope = (ema89 - ema89_prev) / 5;
  669 |       double atr = GetATR(14);
  670 |       
  671 |       if(MathAbs(slope) > atr * 0.1) {
  672 |          if(slope > 0 && currentPrice > ema89) return (ENUM_MARKET_REGIME)REGIME_TRENDING_BULLISH;
  673 |          else if(slope < 0 && currentPrice < ema89) return (ENUM_MARKET_REGIME)REGIME_TRENDING_BEARISH;
  674 |       }
  675 |       
  676 |       return (ENUM_MARKET_REGIME)REGIME_RANGING;
  677 |    }
  678 |    
  679 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  680 |    //| 🎯 HELPER FUNCTIONS - MARKET CONTEXT                           |
  681 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  682 |    ENUM_MARKET_REGIME DetermineMarketRegime()
  683 |    {
  684 |       // Simplified market regime detection
  685 |       return (ENUM_MARKET_REGIME)REGIME_TRENDING;
  686 |    }
  687 |    
  688 |    ENUM_TRADING_SESSION GetCurrentTradingSession()
  689 |    {
  690 |       MqlDateTime time;
  691 |       TimeToStruct(TimeCurrent(), time);
  692 |       
  693 |       if(time.hour >= 8 && time.hour < 17) return SESSION_LONDON;
  694 |       if(time.hour >= 13 && time.hour < 22) return SESSION_NY;
  695 |       if(time.hour >= 23 || time.hour < 8) return SESSION_ASIAN;
  696 |       
  697 |       return SESSION_ASIAN;
  698 |    }
  699 |    
  700 |    double CalculateVolatilityIndex()
  701 |    {
  702 |       return GetATR(14) / SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
  703 |    }
  704 |    
  705 |    double GetATR(int period)
  706 |    {
  707 |       int atrHandle = iATR(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, period);
  708 |       double atr[1];
  709 |       if(CopyBuffer(atrHandle, 0, 0, 1, atr) > 0) {
  710 |          return atr[0];
  711 |       }
  712 |       return 0.001; // Fallback
  713 |    }
  714 |    
  715 |    void ApplyContextAdjustments(SEnhancedSignalData& confluence)
  716 |    {
  717 |       // Adjust by current session (local compute)
  718 |       ENUM_TRADING_SESSION sess = GetCurrentTradingSession();
  719 |       if(sess == SESSION_LONDON || sess == SESSION_NY) {
  720 |          confluence.confluenceScore = MathMin(1.0, confluence.confluenceScore * 1.1);
  721 |       }
  722 | 
  723 |       // Adjust by current volatility (local compute)
  724 |       double vix = CalculateVolatilityIndex();
  725 |       if(vix > 0.002) {
  726 |          confluence.confluenceScore = MathMax(0.0, confluence.confluenceScore * 0.9);
  727 |       }
  728 |    }
  729 |    
  730 |    bool IsPerfectAlignment(const SEnhancedSignalData& confluence)
  731 |    {
  732 |       int strongComponents = 0;
  733 |       if(confluence.dragonScore > 0.7) strongComponents++;
  734 |       if(confluence.waveScore > 0.7) strongComponents++;
  735 |       if(confluence.pvsraScore > 0.7) strongComponents++;
  736 |       if(confluence.smcScore > 0.7) strongComponents++;
  737 |       
  738 |       return strongComponents >= 3;
  739 |    }
  740 |    
  741 |    void AdjustRiskRewardByScenario(SEnhancedSignalData& confluence)
  742 |    {
  743 |       switch(m_currentScenario) {
  744 |          case SCENARIO_SONIC_R_BASIC:
  745 |             confluence.riskRewardRatio = 2.0; // Conservative
  746 |             break;
  747 |          case SCENARIO_SONIC_R_VPSRA:
  748 |             confluence.riskRewardRatio = 2.5; // Moderate
  749 |             break;
  750 |          case SCENARIO_SONIC_R_SCALING:
  751 |             confluence.riskRewardRatio = 3.0; // Aggressive for trending
  752 |             break;
  753 |          case SCENARIO_SCOUT_SMC_MULTIFRAME:
  754 |             confluence.riskRewardRatio = 1.5; // Quick scalping
  755 |             break;
  756 |          case SCENARIO_MULTI_ASSET_ADAPTIVE:
  757 |             confluence.riskRewardRatio = 2.2; // Adaptive
  758 |             break;
  759 |       }
  760 |    }
