   13 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   14 | //| SMC ORDER BLOCK STRUCTURE                                        |
   15 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   16 | struct SOrderBlock
   17 | {
   18 | datetime timeStart;
   19 | datetime timeEnd;
   20 | double high;
   21 | double low;
   22 | double open;
   23 | double close;
   24 | double volume;
   25 | ENUM_ORDER_BLOCK_TYPE type;
   26 | double strength;
   27 | bool isInstitutional;
   28 | bool isValid;
   29 | 
   30 | void Reset()
   31 | {
   32 | timeStart = 0;
   33 | timeEnd = 0;
   34 | high = 0.0;
   35 | low = 0.0;
   36 | open = 0.0;
   37 | close = 0.0;
   38 | volume = 0.0;
   39 | type = ORDER_BLOCK_UNKNOWN;
   40 | strength = 0.0;
   41 | isInstitutional = false;
   42 | isValid = false;
   43 | }
   44 | };

   52 | double price;

   56 |

   62 | strength = 0.0;
   63 | isValid = false;

   67 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   68 | //| SMC CONSOLIDATED ANALYZER                                        |
   69 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   70 | class CSMCConsolidated
   71 | {
   72 | private:
   73 | SOrderBlock m_orderBlocks[];
   74 | SLiquidityPool m_liquidityPools[];
   75 | int m_orderBlockCount;
   76 | int m_liquidityPoolCount;
   77 | string m_symbol;
   78 | ENUM_TIMEFRAMES m_timeframe;
   79 | 
   80 | // Array bounds validation
   81 | bool ValidateArrayAccess(int index, int arraySize, string operation)
   82 | {
   83 | if(index < 0 || index >= arraySize)
   84 | {
   85 | Print(StringFormat("SMC Array bounds violation: Operation=%s, Index=%d, Size=%d", 
   86 | operation, index, arraySize));
   87 | return false;
   88 | }
   89 | return true;
   90 | }
   91 | 
   92 | bool ValidateHistoryAvailability(int requiredBars)
   93 | {
   94 | int availableBars = Bars(m_symbol, m_timeframe);
   95 | if(availableBars < requiredBars)
   96 | {
   97 | Print(StringFormat("SMC Insufficient history: Required=%d, Available=%d", 
   98 | requiredBars, availableBars));
   99 | return false;
  100 | }
  101 | return true;
  102 | }
  103 | 
  104 | public:
  105 | CSMCConsolidated()
  106 | {
  107 | m_orderBlockCount = 0;
  108 | m_liquidityPoolCount = 0;
  109 | m_symbol = _Symbol;
  110 | m_timeframe = PERIOD_CURRENT;
  111 | 
  112 | // Initialize arrays with safe sizes
  113 | ArrayResize(m_orderBlocks, 100);
  114 | ArrayResize(m_liquidityPools, 50);
  115 | }
  116 | 
  117 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  118 | //| DETECT IMPULSE ORDER BLOCKS - FIXED ARRAY BOUNDS              |
  119 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  120 | bool DetectImpulseOrderBlock(int startBar, int endBar)
  121 | {
  122 | // Validate history availability first
  123 | if(!ValidateHistoryAvailability(endBar + 10))
  124 | {
  125 | return false;
  126 | }
  127 | 
  128 | // Validate bar indices
  129 | if(!ValidateArrayAccess(startBar, Bars(m_symbol, m_timeframe), "DetectImpulseOrderBlock_start"))
  130 | {
  131 | return false;
  132 | }
  133 | 
  134 | if(!ValidateArrayAccess(endBar, Bars(m_symbol, m_timeframe), "DetectImpulseOrderBlock_end"))
  135 | {
  136 | return false;
  137 | }
  138 | 
  139 | // Safe array access with bounds checking
  140 | for(int i = startBar; i <= endBar && i < Bars(m_symbol, m_timeframe); i++)
  141 | {
  142 | if(!ValidateArrayAccess(i, Bars(m_symbol, m_timeframe), "DetectImpulseOrderBlock_loop"))
  143 | {
  144 | continue;
  145 | }
  146 | 
  147 | // Safe price data access
  148 | double high = iHigh(m_symbol, m_timeframe, i);
  149 | double low = iLow(m_symbol, m_timeframe, i);
  150 | double open = iOpen(m_symbol, m_timeframe, i);
  151 | double close = iClose(m_symbol, m_timeframe, i);
  152 | double volume = (double)iVolume(m_symbol, m_timeframe, i);  // Explicit cast to prevent warning
  153 | 
  154 | // Check for impulse characteristics
  155 | if(IsImpulseCandle(high, low, open, close, volume))
  156 | {
  157 | // Create order block
  158 | if(m_orderBlockCount < ArraySize(m_orderBlocks))
  159 | {
  160 | m_orderBlocks[m_orderBlockCount].timeStart = iTime(m_symbol, m_timeframe, i);
  161 | m_orderBlocks[m_orderBlockCount].timeEnd = iTime(m_symbol, m_timeframe, i);
  162 | m_orderBlocks[m_orderBlockCount].high = high;
  163 | m_orderBlocks[m_orderBlockCount].low = low;
  164 | m_orderBlocks[m_orderBlockCount].open = open;
  165 | m_orderBlocks[m_orderBlockCount].close = close;
  166 | m_orderBlocks[m_orderBlockCount].volume = volume;
  167 | m_orderBlocks[m_orderBlockCount].type = DetermineOrderBlockType(open, close);
  168 | m_orderBlocks[m_orderBlockCount].strength = CalculateOrderBlockStrength(high, low, volume);
  169 | m_orderBlocks[m_orderBlockCount].isInstitutional = IsInstitutionalVolume(volume);
  170 | m_orderBlocks[m_orderBlockCount].isValid = true;
  171 | 
  172 | m_orderBlockCount++;
  173 | 
  174 | Print(StringFormat("SMC Order Block detected: Type=%d, Strength=%.2f, Institutional=%s",
  175 | m_orderBlocks[m_orderBlockCount-1].type,
  176 | m_orderBlocks[m_orderBlockCount-1].strength,
  177 | m_orderBlocks[m_orderBlockCount-1].isInstitutional ? "YES" : "NO"));
  178 | }
  179 | }
  180 | }
  181 | 
  182 | return true;
  183 | }
  184 | 
  185 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  186 | //| DETECT LIQUIDITY POOLS - SAFE IMPLEMENTATION                  |
  187 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  188 | bool DetectLiquidityPools(int startBar, int endBar)
  189 | {
  190 | // Validate history availability
  191 | if(!ValidateHistoryAvailability(endBar + 10))
  192 | {
  193 | return false;
  194 | }
  195 | 
  196 | // Validate bar indices
  197 | if(!ValidateArrayAccess(startBar, Bars(m_symbol, m_timeframe), "DetectLiquidityPools_start"))
  198 | {
  199 | return false;
  200 | }
  201 | 
  202 | if(!ValidateArrayAccess(endBar, Bars(m_symbol, m_timeframe), "DetectLiquidityPools_end"))
  203 | {
  204 | return false;
  205 | }
  206 | 
  207 | // Safe liquidity detection
  208 | for(int i = startBar; i <= endBar && i < Bars(m_symbol, m_timeframe); i++)
  209 | {
  210 | if(!ValidateArrayAccess(i, Bars(m_symbol, m_timeframe), "DetectLiquidityPools_loop"))
  211 | {
  212 | continue;
  213 | }
  214 | 
  215 | double high = iHigh(m_symbol, m_timeframe, i);
  216 | double low = iLow(m_symbol, m_timeframe, i);
  217 | 
  218 | // Check for daily high/low liquidity
  219 | if(IsDailyHighLiquidity(i))
  220 | {
  221 | if(m_liquidityPoolCount < ArraySize(m_liquidityPools))
  222 | {
  223 | m_liquidityPools[m_liquidityPoolCount].time = iTime(m_symbol, m_timeframe, i);
  224 | m_liquidityPools[m_liquidityPoolCount].price = high;
  225 | m_liquidityPools[m_liquidityPoolCount].type = LIQUIDITY_DAILY_HIGH;
  226 | m_liquidityPools[m_liquidityPoolCount].strength = 0.8;
  227 | m_liquidityPools[m_liquidityPoolCount].isValid = true;
  228 | 
  229 | m_liquidityPoolCount++;
  230 | 
  231 | Print(StringFormat("SMC Liquidity Pool detected: Type=DAILY_HIGH, Price=%.5f", high));
  232 | }
  233 | }
  234 | 
  235 | if(IsDailyLowLiquidity(i))
  236 | {
  237 | if(m_liquidityPoolCount < ArraySize(m_liquidityPools))
  238 | {
  239 | m_liquidityPools[m_liquidityPoolCount].time = iTime(m_symbol, m_timeframe, i);
  240 | m_liquidityPools[m_liquidityPoolCount].price = low;
  241 | m_liquidityPools[m_liquidityPoolCount].type = LIQUIDITY_DAILY_LOW;
  242 | m_liquidityPools[m_liquidityPoolCount].strength = 0.8;
  243 | m_liquidityPools[m_liquidityPoolCount].isValid = true;
  244 | 
  245 | m_liquidityPoolCount++;
  246 | 
  247 | Print(StringFormat("SMC Liquidity Pool detected: Type=DAILY_LOW, Price=%.5f", low));
  248 | }
  249 | }
  250 | }
  251 | 
  252 | return true;
  253 | }
  254 | 
  255 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  256 | //| HELPER FUNCTIONS                                               |
  257 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  258 | 
  259 | bool IsImpulseCandle(double high, double low, double open, double close, double volume)
  260 | {
  261 | double bodySize = MathAbs(close - open);
  262 | double totalRange = high - low;
  263 | double averageVolume = GetAverageVolume(20);
  264 | 
  265 | // Impulse criteria
  266 | bool strongBody = bodySize > totalRange * 0.6;
  267 | bool highVolume = volume > averageVolume * 1.5;
  268 | bool significantMove = bodySize > GetATR(14) * 0.5;
  269 | 
  270 | return strongBody && highVolume && significantMove;
  271 | }
  272 | 
  273 | ENUM_ORDER_BLOCK_TYPE DetermineOrderBlockType(double open, double close)
  274 | {
  275 | if(close > open)
  276 | return ORDER_BLOCK_BULLISH;
  277 | else
  278 | return ORDER_BLOCK_BEARISH;
  279 | }
  280 | 
  281 | double CalculateOrderBlockStrength(double high, double low, double volume)
  282 | {
  283 | double averageVolume = GetAverageVolume(20);
  284 | double volumeRatio = volume / averageVolume;
  285 | double priceRange = high - low;
  286 | double atr = GetATR(14);
  287 | double rangeRatio = priceRange / atr;
  288 | 
  289 | return (volumeRatio + rangeRatio) / 2.0;
  290 | }
  291 | 
  292 | bool IsInstitutionalVolume(double volume)
  293 | {
  294 | double averageVolume = GetAverageVolume(20);
  295 | return volume > averageVolume * 2.0;
  296 | }
  297 | 
  298 | bool IsDailyHighLiquidity(int barIndex)
  299 | {
  300 | if(!ValidateArrayAccess(barIndex, Bars(m_symbol, m_timeframe), "IsDailyHighLiquidity"))
  301 | {
  302 | return false;
  303 | }
  304 | 
  305 | double currentHigh = iHigh(m_symbol, m_timeframe, barIndex);
  306 | 
  307 | // Check if this is the highest high in recent bars
  308 | for(int i = barIndex + 1; i < barIndex + 10 && i < Bars(m_symbol, m_timeframe); i++)
  309 | {
  310 | if(!ValidateArrayAccess(i, Bars(m_symbol, m_timeframe), "IsDailyHighLiquidity_loop"))
  311 | {
  312 | continue;
  313 | }
  314 | 
  315 | if(iHigh(m_symbol, m_timeframe, i) > currentHigh)
  316 | {
  317 | return false;
  318 | }
  319 | }
  320 | 
  321 | return true;
  322 | }
  323 | 
  324 | bool IsDailyLowLiquidity(int barIndex)
  325 | {
  326 | if(!ValidateArrayAccess(barIndex, Bars(m_symbol, m_timeframe), "IsDailyLowLiquidity"))
  327 | {
  328 | return false;
  329 | }
  330 | 
  331 | double currentLow = iLow(m_symbol, m_timeframe, barIndex);
  332 | 
  333 | // Check if this is the lowest low in recent bars
  334 | for(int i = barIndex + 1; i < barIndex + 10 && i < Bars(m_symbol, m_timeframe); i++)
  335 | {
  336 | if(!ValidateArrayAccess(i, Bars(m_symbol, m_timeframe), "IsDailyLowLiquidity_loop"))
  337 | {
  338 | continue;
  339 | }
  340 | 
  341 | if(iLow(m_symbol, m_timeframe, i) < currentLow)
  342 | {
  343 | return false;
  344 | }
  345 | }
  346 | 
  347 | return true;
  348 | }
  349 | 
  350 | double GetAverageVolume(int periods)
  351 | {
  352 | if(!ValidateHistoryAvailability(periods))
  353 | {
  354 | return 1.0;
  355 | }
  356 | 
  357 | double totalVolume = 0.0;
  358 | int validBars = 0;
  359 | 
  360 | for(int i = 0; i < periods && i < Bars(m_symbol, m_timeframe); i++)
  361 | {
  362 | if(!ValidateArrayAccess(i, Bars(m_symbol, m_timeframe), "GetAverageVolume"))
  363 | {
  364 | continue;
  365 | }
  366 | 
  367 | totalVolume += (double)iVolume(m_symbol, m_timeframe, i);  // Explicit cast to prevent warning
  368 | validBars++;
  369 | }
  370 | 
  371 | return validBars > 0 ? totalVolume / validBars : 1.0;
  372 | }
  373 | 
  374 | double GetATR(int periods)
  375 | {
  376 | if(!ValidateHistoryAvailability(periods))
  377 | {
  378 | return 0.001;
  379 | }
  380 | 
  381 | double atr = 0.0;
  382 | int validBars = 0;
  383 | 
  384 | for(int i = 1; i < periods && i < Bars(m_symbol, m_timeframe); i++)
  385 | {
  386 | if(!ValidateArrayAccess(i, Bars(m_symbol, m_timeframe), "GetATR"))
  387 | {
  388 | continue;
  389 | }
  390 | 
  391 | double high = iHigh(m_symbol, m_timeframe, i);
  392 | double low = iLow(m_symbol, m_timeframe, i);
  393 | double prevClose = iClose(m_symbol, m_timeframe, i + 1);
  394 | 
  395 | double tr1 = high - low;
  396 | double tr2 = MathAbs(high - prevClose);
  397 | double tr3 = MathAbs(low - prevClose);
  398 | 
  399 | atr += MathMax(tr1, MathMax(tr2, tr3));
  400 | validBars++;
  401 | }
  402 | 
  403 | return validBars > 0 ? atr / validBars : 0.001;
  404 | }
  405 | 
  406 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  407 | //| GETTER METHODS                                                  |
  408 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  409 | 
  410 | int GetOrderBlockCount() { return m_orderBlockCount; }
  411 | int GetLiquidityPoolCount() { return m_liquidityPoolCount; }
  412 | 
  413 | SOrderBlock CSMCConsolidated::GetOrderBlock(int index)
  414 | {
  415 | SOrderBlock result;
  416 | result.Reset();
  417 | 
  418 | if(ValidateArrayAccess(index, m_orderBlockCount, "GetOrderBlock"))
  419 | {
  420 | result = m_orderBlocks[index];
  421 | }
  422 | 
  423 | return result;
  424 | }
  425 | 
  426 | SLiquidityPool CSMCConsolidated::GetLiquidityPool(int index)
  427 | {
  428 | SLiquidityPool result;
  429 | result.Reset();
  430 | 
  431 | if(ValidateArrayAccess(index, m_liquidityPoolCount, "GetLiquidityPool"))
  432 | {
  433 | result = m_liquidityPools[index];
  434 | }
  435 | 
  436 | return result;
  437 | }
  438 | 
  439 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  440 | //| RESET METHOD                                                    |
  441 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  442 | 
  443 | void Reset()
  444 | {
  445 | m_orderBlockCount = 0;
  446 | m_liquidityPoolCount = 0;
  447 | 
  448 | // Reset arrays
  449 | for(int i = 0; i < ArraySize(m_orderBlocks); i++)
  450 | {
  451 | m_orderBlocks[i].Reset();
  452 | }
  453 | 
  454 | for(int i = 0; i < ArraySize(m_liquidityPools); i++)
  455 | {
  456 | m_liquidityPools[i].Reset();
  457 | }
  458 | }
  459 | };
  460 | 
  461 | #endif // SMC_CONSOLIDATED_MQH
  462 | 
  463 | 
  464 |

  113 |    // Performance tracking is now handled by CScenarioPerformance class

  115 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  116 |    //| 🎯 KHỞI TẠO SUITABILITY MATRIX                                 |
  117 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  118 |    void InitializeSuitabilityMatrix()
  119 |    {
  120 |       // Matrix: [Scenario][Market Condition]
  121 |       // Market Conditions: 0=Trending, 1=Ranging, 2=Volatile, 3=Quiet
  122 |       
  123 |       // Sonic R Basic - Tốt cho mọi điều kiện, đặc biệt ranging
  124 |       m_scenarioSuitability[SCENARIO_SONIC_R_BASIC][0] = 0.7;  // Trending
  125 |       m_scenarioSuitability[SCENARIO_SONIC_R_BASIC][1] = 0.9;  // Ranging
  126 |       m_scenarioSuitability[SCENARIO_SONIC_R_BASIC][2] = 0.6;  // Volatile
  127 |       m_scenarioSuitability[SCENARIO_SONIC_R_BASIC][3] = 0.8;  // Quiet
  128 |       
  129 |       // Sonic R + VPSRA - Tốt cho trending và volatile
  130 |       m_scenarioSuitability[SCENARIO_SONIC_R_VPSRA][0] = 0.9;  // Trending
  131 |       m_scenarioSuitability[SCENARIO_SONIC_R_VPSRA][1] = 0.7;  // Ranging
  132 |       m_scenarioSuitability[SCENARIO_SONIC_R_VPSRA][2] = 0.8;  // Volatile
  133 |       m_scenarioSuitability[SCENARIO_SONIC_R_VPSRA][3] = 0.5;  // Quiet
  134 |       
  135 |       // Sonic R + Scaling - Chỉ tốt cho trending mạnh
  136 |       m_scenarioSuitability[SCENARIO_SONIC_R_SCALING][0] = 1.0; // Trending
  137 |       m_scenarioSuitability[SCENARIO_SONIC_R_SCALING][1] = 0.3; // Ranging
  138 |       m_scenarioSuitability[SCENARIO_SONIC_R_SCALING][2] = 0.7; // Volatile
  139 |       m_scenarioSuitability[SCENARIO_SONIC_R_SCALING][3] = 0.2; // Quiet
  140 |       
  141 |       // Scout + SMC - Tốt cho volatile và quick moves
  142 |       m_scenarioSuitability[SCENARIO_SCOUT_SMC_MULTIFRAME][0] = 0.8; // Trending
  143 |       m_scenarioSuitability[SCENARIO_SCOUT_SMC_MULTIFRAME][1] = 0.6; // Ranging
  144 |       m_scenarioSuitability[SCENARIO_SCOUT_SMC_MULTIFRAME][2] = 1.0; // Volatile
  145 |       m_scenarioSuitability[SCENARIO_SCOUT_SMC_MULTIFRAME][3] = 0.4; // Quiet
  146 |       
  147 |       // Multi Asset Adaptive - Cân bằng cho mọi điều kiện
  148 |       m_scenarioSuitability[SCENARIO_MULTI_ASSET_ADAPTIVE][0] = 0.8; // Trending
  149 |       m_scenarioSuitability[SCENARIO_MULTI_ASSET_ADAPTIVE][1] = 0.8; // Ranging
  150 |       m_scenarioSuitability[SCENARIO_MULTI_ASSET_ADAPTIVE][2] = 0.8; // Volatile
  151 |       m_scenarioSuitability[SCENARIO_MULTI_ASSET_ADAPTIVE][3] = 0.8; // Quiet
  152 |    }
  153 |    
  154 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  155 |    //| 🎯 ĐÁNH GIÁ VÀ RECOMMEND KỊCH BẢN                              |
  156 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  157 |    ENUM_TRADING_SCENARIO EvaluateAndRecommendScenario()
  158 |    {
  159 |       // Cập nhật điều kiện thị trường và asset DNA
  160 |       UpdateMarketConditions();
  161 |       /* m_assetDNA.UpdateAssetCharacteristics(_Symbol); */
  162 |       
  163 |       // Cập nhật ScenarioEngine với thông tin mới nhất
  164 |       m_scenarioEngine.UpdateScenario();
  165 |       
  166 |       // Lấy kịch bản được đề xuất từ ScenarioEngine
  167 |       ENUM_TRADING_SCENARIO engineRecommended = m_scenarioEngine.GetCurrentScenario();
  168 |       
  169 |       // Check if current scenario should be switched based on performance
  170 |       if(m_performanceTracker != NULL && m_performanceTracker.ShouldSwitchScenario(m_activeScenario)) {
  171 |          Print("⚠️ Current scenario performance suggests switching needed");
  172 |       }
  173 |       
  174 |       // Get best performing scenario from performance tracker
  175 |       ENUM_TRADING_SCENARIO performanceBest = SCENARIO_SONIC_R_BASIC;
  176 |       if(m_performanceTracker != NULL) {
  177 |          performanceBest = m_performanceTracker.GetBestPerformingScenario();
  178 |       }
  179 |       
  180 |       ENUM_TRADING_SCENARIO bestScenario = m_activeScenario;
  181 |       double bestScore = 0.0;
  182 |       
  183 |       // Đánh giá từng kịch bản
  184 |       for(int scenario = 0; scenario < 5; scenario++) {
  185 |          double score = CalculateScenarioScore((ENUM_TRADING_SCENARIO)scenario);
  186 |          
  187 |          // Boost score for best performing scenario
  188 |          if((ENUM_TRADING_SCENARIO)scenario == performanceBest) {
  189 |             score *= 1.2; // 20% boost for best performer
  190 |          }
  191 |          
  192 |          // Boost score for scenario recommended by ScenarioEngine
  193 |          if((ENUM_TRADING_SCENARIO)scenario == engineRecommended) {
  194 |             score *= 1.3; // 30% boost for engine recommendation
  195 |          }
  196 |          
  197 |          if(score > bestScore) {
  198 |             bestScore = score;
  199 |             bestScenario = (ENUM_TRADING_SCENARIO)scenario;
  200 |          }
  201 |       }
  202 |       
  203 |       m_recommendedScenario = bestScenario;
  204 |       m_lastEvaluation = TimeCurrent();
  205 |       
  206 |       // Log evaluation results
  207 |       if(bestScenario != m_activeScenario) {
  208 |          Print(StringFormat("📊 Scenario evaluation suggests switch: %s → %s (Score: %.2f)", 
  209 |                           m_confluenceEngine.GetScenarioName(m_activeScenario),
  210 |                           m_confluenceEngine.GetScenarioName(bestScenario), bestScore));
  211 |       }
  212 |       
  213 |       // Auto-switch nếu được bật
  214 |       if(m_autoSwitchEnabled && ShouldSwitchScenario(bestScenario)) {
  215 |          SwitchToScenario(bestScenario);
  216 |       }
  217 |       
  218 |       return m_recommendedScenario;
  219 |    }
  220 |    
  221 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  222 |    //| 🎯 TÍNH ĐIỂM CHO KỊCH BẢN                                      |
  223 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  224 |    double CalculateScenarioScore(ENUM_TRADING_SCENARIO scenario)
  225 |    {
  226 |       double score = 0.0;
  227 |       
  228 |       // 1. Market suitability (40% weight)
  229 |       int marketCondition = GetMarketConditionIndex();
  230 |       double suitabilityScore = m_scenarioSuitability[scenario][marketCondition];
  231 |       score += suitabilityScore * 0.4;
  232 |       
  233 |       // 2. Historical performance (35% weight)
  234 |       double performanceScore = CalculatePerformanceScore(scenario);
  235 |       score += performanceScore * 0.35;
  236 |       
  237 |       // 3. Recent confluence quality (25% weight)
  238 |       double confluenceScore = CalculateRecentConfluenceScore(scenario);
  239 |       score += confluenceScore * 0.25;
  240 |       
  241 |       return score;
  242 |    }
  243 |    
  244 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  245 |    //| 🎯 TÍNH PERFORMANCE SCORE                                      |
  246 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  247 |    double CalculatePerformanceScore(ENUM_TRADING_SCENARIO scenario)
  248 |    {
  249 |       if(m_performanceTracker == NULL) {
  250 |          return 0.5; // Neutral score if no tracker
  251 |       }
  252 |       
  253 |       if(m_performanceTracker.GetPerformance(scenario).totalTrades < 5) {
  254 |          return 0.5; // Neutral score for insufficient data
  255 |       }
  256 |       
  257 |       double score = 0.0;
  258 |       
  259 |       // Win rate component (40%)
  260 |       score += (m_performanceTracker.GetPerformance(scenario).winRate / 100.0) * 0.4;
  261 |       
  262 |       // Profit factor component (35%)
  263 |       double normalizedPF = MathMin(m_performanceTracker.GetPerformance(scenario).profitFactor / 2.0, 1.0); // Normalize to 0-1
  264 |       score += normalizedPF * 0.35;
  265 |       
  266 |       // Average confluence component (25%)
  267 |       score += (m_performanceTracker.GetPerformance(scenario).averageConfluence / 100.0) * 0.25;
  268 |       
  269 |       return score;
  270 |    }
  271 |    
  272 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  273 |    //| 🎯 TÍNH RECENT CONFLUENCE SCORE                                |
  274 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  275 |    double CalculateRecentConfluenceScore(ENUM_TRADING_SCENARIO scenario)
  276 |    {
  277 |       // Simulate recent confluence analysis for the scenario
  278 |       CAnalysisConsolidated* analysis = NULL; // Would get from actual analysis
  279 |       
  280 |       if(analysis == NULL) {
  281 |          return 0.5; // Neutral score
  282 |       }
  283 |       
  284 |       // Temporarily switch to scenario and analyze
  285 |       ENUM_TRADING_SCENARIO currentScenario = m_confluenceEngine.GetCurrentScenario();
  286 |       // SScenarioConfig config = m_scenarioConfig.GetConfig(m_currentScenario); // Commented out for testing
  287 |       return m_confluenceEngine.AnalyzeConfluence(analysis, scenario).confluenceScore;
  288 |    }
  289 |    
  290 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  291 |    //| 🎯 UPDATE MARKET CONDITIONS                                    |
  292 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  293 |    void UpdateMarketConditions()
  294 |    {
  295 |       // Update current regime using RegimeDetector
  296 |       m_currentRegime = m_regimeDetector.DetectCurrentRegime();
  297 |       m_currentRegime = m_regimeDetector.GetCurrentRegime();
  298 |       
  299 |       // Update volatility level
  300 |       m_volatilityLevel = CalculateVolatilityLevel();
  301 |       
  302 |       // Update trading session
  303 |       m_currentSession = GetCurrentTradingSession();
  304 |       
  305 |       Print(StringFormat("🔍 Market conditions updated: Regime=%s, Volatility=%.5f, Session=%s",
  306 |             GetRegimeName(m_currentRegime), m_volatilityLevel, GetSessionName(m_currentSession)));
  307 |    }
  308 |    
  309 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  310 |    //| 🎯 GET MARKET CONDITION INDEX                                  |
  311 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  312 |    int GetMarketConditionIndex()
  313 |    {
  314 |       // Determine market condition based on regime and volatility
  315 |       if(m_currentRegime == REGIME_TRENDING) {
  316 |          return 0; // Trending
  317 |       }
  318 |       else if(m_currentRegime == REGIME_RANGING) {
  319 |          return 1; // Ranging
  320 |       }
  321 |       else if(m_volatilityLevel > 0.002) {
  322 |          return 2; // Volatile
  323 |       }
  324 |       else {
  325 |          return 3; // Quiet
  326 |       }
  327 |    }
  328 |    
  329 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  330 |    //| 🎯 KIỂM TRA CÓ NÊN SWITCH SCENARIO                             |
  331 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  332 |    bool ShouldSwitchScenario(ENUM_TRADING_SCENARIO recommendedScenario)
  333 |    {
  334 |       if(recommendedScenario == m_activeScenario) {
  335 |          return false; // Không cần switch
  336 |       }
  337 |       
  338 |       // Tính performance difference
  339 |       double currentScore = CalculateScenarioScore(m_activeScenario);
  340 |       double recommendedScore = CalculateScenarioScore(recommendedScenario);
  341 |       
  342 |       double difference = recommendedScore - currentScore;
  343 |       
  344 |       // Chỉ switch nếu có improvement đáng kể
  345 |       if(difference >= m_switchThreshold) {
  346 |          Print(StringFormat("[🔄 SCENARIO SWITCH] %s → %s (Improvement: %.1f%%)",
  347 |                m_confluenceEngine.GetScenarioName(m_activeScenario),
  348 |                m_confluenceEngine.GetScenarioName(recommendedScenario),
  349 |                difference * 100));
  350 |          return true;
  351 |       }
  352 |       
  353 |       return false;
  354 |    }
  355 |    
  356 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  357 |    //| 🎯 SWITCH TO SCENARIO                                          |
  358 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  359 |    void SwitchToScenario(ENUM_TRADING_SCENARIO scenario)
  360 |    {
  361 |       ENUM_TRADING_SCENARIO oldScenario = m_activeScenario;
  362 |       m_activeScenario = scenario;
  363 |       m_confluenceEngine.SetScenario(scenario);
  364 |       
  365 |       Print(StringFormat("[✅ SCENARIO ACTIVATED] %s (Previous: %s)",
  366 |             m_confluenceEngine.GetScenarioName(scenario),
  367 |             m_confluenceEngine.GetScenarioName(oldScenario)));
  368 |    }
  369 |    
  370 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  371 |    //| 🎯 UPDATE PERFORMANCE METRICS                                  |
  372 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  373 |    void UpdatePerformance(ENUM_TRADING_SCENARIO scenario, bool isWin, double profit, double confluence)
  374 |    {
  375 |       if(m_performanceTracker != NULL) {
  376 |          // Use performance tracker to update metrics
  377 |          m_performanceTracker.RecordTrade(scenario, TimeCurrent(), TimeCurrent(), ORDER_TYPE_BUY, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0, profit, confluence, (isWin?"WIN":"LOSS"));
  378 |          
  379 |          Print(StringFormat("[📊 PERFORMANCE] %s: %d trades, %.1f%% win rate, %.2f profit",
  380 |                m_confluenceEngine.GetScenarioName(scenario),
  381 |                m_performanceTracker.GetPerformance(scenario).totalTrades,
  382 |                m_performanceTracker.GetPerformance(scenario).winRate,
  383 |                m_performanceTracker.GetPerformance(scenario).totalProfit));
  384 |       }
  385 |    }
  386 |    
  387 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  388 |    //| 🎯 HELPER FUNCTIONS                                            |
  389 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  390 |    // Phương thức này không còn cần thiết vì đã sử dụng RegimeDetector
  391 |    // Giữ lại để tương thích ngược với code cũ
  392 |    ENUM_MARKET_REGIME DetermineMarketRegime()
  393 |    {
  394 |       return m_regimeDetector.GetCurrentRegime();
  395 |    }
  396 |    
  397 |    // Helper method to get regime name
  398 |    string GetRegimeName(ENUM_MARKET_REGIME regime)
  399 |    {
  400 |       switch(regime) {
  401 |          case REGIME_TRENDING: return "Trending";
  402 |          case REGIME_RANGING: return "Ranging";
  403 |          case REGIME_VOLATILE_TRENDING: return "Volatile Trending";
  404 |          case REGIME_VOLATILE_RANGING: return "Volatile Ranging";
  405 |          case REGIME_STABLE_TRENDING: return "Stable Trending";
  406 |          case REGIME_STABLE_RANGING: return "Stable Ranging";
  407 |          default: return "Unknown";
  408 |       }
  409 |    }
  410 |    
  411 |    // Helper method to get session name
  412 |    string GetSessionName(ENUM_TRADING_SESSION session)
  413 |    {
  414 |       switch(session) {
  415 |           case SESSION_LONDON: return "London";
  416 |           case SESSION_NY: return "New York";
  417 |           case SESSION_TOKYO: return "Tokyo/Asian";
  418 |           default: return "Unknown";
  419 |       }
  420 |    }
  421 |    
  422 |    double CalculateVolatilityLevel()
  423 |    {
  424 |       int atrHandle = iATR(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 14);
  425 |       double atr[1];
  426 |       if(CopyBuffer(atrHandle, 0, 0, 1, atr) > 0) {
  427 |          return atr[0] / SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
  428 |       }
  429 |       return 0.001;
  430 |    }
  431 |    
  432 |    ENUM_TRADING_SESSION GetCurrentTradingSession()
  433 |    {
  434 |       MqlDateTime time;
  435 |       TimeToStruct(TimeCurrent(), time);
  436 |       
  437 |       if(time.hour >= 8 && time.hour < 17) return SESSION_LONDON;
  438 |       if(time.hour >= 13 && time.hour < 22) return SESSION_NY;
  439 |       if(time.hour >= 23 || time.hour < 8) return SESSION_TOKYO;
  440 |       
  441 |       return SESSION_TOKYO;
  442 |    }
  443 |    
  444 |    double GetMA(int period)
  445 |    {
  446 |       int maHandle = iMA(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, period, 0, MODE_SMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
  447 |       double ma[1];
  448 |       if(CopyBuffer(maHandle, 0, 0, 1, ma) > 0) {
  449 |          return ma[0];
  450 |       }
  451 |       return SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
  452 |    }
  453 |    
  454 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  455 |    //| 🎯 TRADE RECORDING                                             |
  456 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  457 |    void RecordTrade(datetime openTime, datetime closeTime, ENUM_ORDER_TYPE orderType,
  458 |                    double openPrice, double closePrice, double volume, double profit,
  459 |                    double confluence, string reason)
  460 |    {
  461 |       bool isWin = (profit > 0);
  462 |       UpdatePerformance(m_activeScenario, isWin, profit, confluence);
  463 |       
  464 |       // Record in performance tracker if available
  465 |       if(m_performanceTracker != NULL) {
  466 |          m_performanceTracker.RecordTrade(m_activeScenario, openTime, closeTime, 
  467 |                                         orderType, openPrice, closePrice, volume, 
  468 |                                         profit, confluence, reason);
  469 |       }
  470 |    }
  471 |    
  472 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  473 |    //| 🎯 PUBLIC INTERFACE                                            |
  474 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  475 |    ENUM_TRADING_SCENARIO GetActiveScenario() { return m_activeScenario; }
  476 |    ENUM_TRADING_SCENARIO GetRecommendedScenario() { return m_recommendedScenario; }
  477 |    
  478 |    void SetAutoSwitch(bool enabled) { m_autoSwitchEnabled = enabled; }
  479 |    bool IsAutoSwitchEnabled() { return m_autoSwitchEnabled; }
  480 |    
  481 |    void SetSwitchThreshold(double threshold) { m_switchThreshold = threshold; }
  482 |    double GetSwitchThreshold() { return m_switchThreshold; }
  483 |    
  484 |    SScenarioPerformance GetPerformance(ENUM_TRADING_SCENARIO scenario)
  485 |    {
  486 |       if(m_performanceTracker != NULL) {
  487 |          return m_performanceTracker.GetPerformance(scenario);
  488 |       }
  489 |       
  490 |       // Return empty performance if no tracker
  491 |       SScenarioPerformance emptyPerf = {0};
  492 |       return emptyPerf;
  493 |    }
  494 |    
  495 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  496 |    //| 🎯 REPORTING METHODS                                           |
  497 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  498 |    string GetScenarioReport()
  499 |    {
  500 |       string report = "=== SCENARIO PERFORMANCE REPORT ===\n";
  501 |       
  502 |       if(m_performanceTracker != NULL) {
  503 |          for(int i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
  504 |             ENUM_TRADING_SCENARIO scenario = (ENUM_TRADING_SCENARIO)i;
  505 |             SScenarioPerformance perf;
  506 |             perf = m_performanceTracker.GetPerformance(scenario);
  507 |             
  508 |             report += StringFormat("%s: %d trades, %.1f%% win, %.2f profit\n",
  509 |                                   m_confluenceEngine.GetScenarioName(scenario),
  510 |                                   perf.totalTrades, perf.winRate, perf.totalProfit);
  511 |          }
  512 |       } else {
  513 |          report += "Performance tracker not available\n";
  514 |       }
  515 |       
  516 |       report += StringFormat("\nActive: %s\n", m_confluenceEngine.GetScenarioName(m_activeScenario));
  517 |       report += StringFormat("Recommended: %s\n", m_confluenceEngine.GetScenarioName(m_recommendedScenario));
  518 |       
  519 |       return report;
  520 |    }
  521 |    
  522 |    string GetPerformanceReport()
  523 |    {
  524 |       if(m_performanceTracker != NULL) {
  525 |          return m_performanceTracker.GetPerformanceReport(m_activeScenario);
  526 |       }
  527 |       return "Performance tracker not available";
  528 |    }
  529 |    
  530 |    string GetDetailedPerformanceReport()
  531 |    {
  532 |       if(m_performanceTracker != NULL) {
  533 |          return m_performanceTracker.GetDetailedReport(m_activeScenario);
  534 |       }
  535 |       return "Performance tracker not available";
  536 |    }
  537 |    
  538 |    void PrintDailyReport()
  539 |    {
  540 |       string report = GetScenarioReport();
  541 |       report += "\n" + GetPerformanceReport();
  542 |       Print(report);
  543 |    }
  544 |    
  545 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  546 |    //| Get current active scenario                                     |
  547 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  548 |    ENUM_TRADING_SCENARIO GetCurrentScenario()
  549 |    {
  550 |       return m_activeScenario;
  551 |    }
  552 | };
  553 | 
  554 | // Prototypes provided in main only to avoid duplicate globals
  555 | 
  556 | 
  557 | #endif // SCENARIO_MANAGER_MQH

    1 | ﻿//+------------------------------------------------------------------+
    2 | //| SMC Signal Validator - PHASE 3 Component                          |
    3 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
    4 | #property copyright "Sonic R MC - SMC Signal Validation"
    5 | #property version   "3.0"
    6 | #property strict
    7 | 
    8 | 
    9 | #ifndef SMC_SIGNALVALIDATOR_MQH
   10 | #define SMC_SIGNALVALIDATOR_MQH
   11 | 
   12 | #include "01_Core_12_SonicEnums.mqh"
   13 | #include "01_Core_14_SharedDataStructures.mqh"
   14 | #include "02_DataProviders_05_IndicatorManager.mqh"    // CRITICAL FIX: Add for CUnifiedIndicatorManager
   15 | 
   16 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   17 | //| SMC Signal Validator Class                                        |
   18 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   19 | class CSMCSignalValidator
   20 | {
   21 | private:
   22 | // Configuration
   23 | double                  m_minVolumeThreshold;
   24 | double                  m_minPriceActionThreshold;
   25 | double                  m_minStructureThreshold;
   26 | 
   27 | // State tracking
   28 | datetime               m_lastValidationTime;
   29 | 
   30 | public:
   31 | // Constructor
   32 | CSMCSignalValidator()
   33 | {
   34 | m_minVolumeThreshold = 1.5;
   35 | m_minPriceActionThreshold = 0.7;
   36 | m_minStructureThreshold = 0.6;
   37 | m_lastValidationTime = 0;
   38 | }
   39 | 
   40 | // Destructor
   41 | ~CSMCSignalValidator() {}
   42 | 
   43 | // Initialize
   44 | bool Initialize()
   45 | {
   46 | m_lastValidationTime = 0;
   47 | return true;
   48 | }
   49 | 
   50 | // Validate SMC signal
   51 | bool ValidateSMCSignal(ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE signalType, double confidence = 0.0)
   52 | {
   53 | if(TimeCurrent() - m_lastValidationTime < 30) // Validate every 30 seconds
   54 | return true;
   55 | 
   56 | // Check volume confirmation
   57 | bool volumeValid = ValidateVolume();
   58 | 
   59 | // Check price action
   60 | bool priceActionValid = ValidatePriceAction();
   61 | 
   62 | // Check market structure
   63 | bool structureValid = ValidateMarketStructure();
   64 | 
   65 | // Overall validation
   66 | bool isValid = volumeValid && priceActionValid && structureValid;
   67 | 
   68 | m_lastValidationTime = TimeCurrent();
   69 | return isValid;
   70 | }
   71 | 
   72 | // Get validation score
   73 | double GetValidationScore()
   74 | {
   75 | double volumeScore = GetVolumeScore();
   76 | double priceActionScore = GetPriceActionScore();
   77 | double structureScore = GetStructureScore();
   78 | 
   79 | return (volumeScore + priceActionScore + structureScore) / 3.0;
   80 | }
   81 | 
   82 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   83 | //| 🎯 VALIDATE SIGNAL - MAIN ENTRY POINT                          |
   84 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   85 | bool ValidateSignal(const SignalData& signalData)
   86 | {
   87 | if(!signalData.isValid) {
   88 | Print("❌ [SMC] Signal validation failed: Invalid signal data");
   89 | return false;
   90 | }
   91 | 
   92 | // Check signal type
   93 | if(signalData.signalType == SIGNAL_NONE) {
   94 | Print("❌ [SMC] Signal validation failed: No signal type");
   95 | return false;
   96 | }
   97 | 
   98 | // Validate SMC components
   99 | bool volumeValid = ValidateVolume();
  100 | bool priceActionValid = ValidatePriceAction();
  101 | bool structureValid = ValidateMarketStructure();
  102 | 
  103 | // Overall validation
  104 | bool isValid = volumeValid && priceActionValid && structureValid;
  105 | 
  106 | if(isValid) {
  107 | Print(StringFormat("✅ [SMC] Signal validation passed: %s with %.2f confidence", 
  108 | EnumToString(signalData.signalType), signalData.confidence));
  109 | } else {
  110 | Print("❌ [SMC] Signal validation failed: SMC components not valid");
  111 | }
  112 | 
  113 | return isValid;
  114 | }
  115 | 
  116 | private:
  117 | // Validate volume
  118 | bool ValidateVolume()
  119 | {
  120 | double currentVolume = (double)iVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 1);
  121 | double avgVolume = 0;
  122 | 
  123 | // Calculate average volume over last 20 bars
  124 | for(int i = 1; i <= 20; i++)
  125 | {
  126 | avgVolume += (double)iVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  127 | }
  128 | avgVolume /= 20;
  129 | 
  130 | return currentVolume > (avgVolume * m_minVolumeThreshold);
  131 | }
  132 | 
  133 | // Validate price action
  134 | bool ValidatePriceAction()
  135 | {
  136 | double currentRange = iHigh(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 1) - iLow(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 1);
  137 | double avgRange = 0;
  138 | 
  139 | // Calculate average range over last 20 bars
  140 | for(int i = 1; i <= 20; i++)
  141 | {
  142 | avgRange += (iHigh(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i) - iLow(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i));
  143 | }
  144 | avgRange /= 20;
  145 | 
  146 | return currentRange > (avgRange * m_minPriceActionThreshold);
  147 | }
  148 | 
  149 | // Validate market structure - SONIC R COMPLIANT (EMA34/89)
  150 | bool ValidateMarketStructure()
  151 | {
  152 | // Get unified manager for Sonic R compliant EMAs
  153 | CUnifiedIndicatorManager* manager = CUnifiedIndicatorManager::GetInstance();
  154 | 
  155 | int ema34Handle, ema89Handle;
  156 | if(manager != NULL) {
  157 | ema34Handle = manager.GetOptimizedEMAHandle(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 34, PRICE_CLOSE);
  158 | ema89Handle = manager.GetOptimizedEMAHandle(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 89, PRICE_CLOSE);
  159 | } else {
  160 | // Fallback to direct iMA calls with Sonic R periods
  161 | ema34Handle = iMA(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 34, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
  162 | ema89Handle = iMA(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 89, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
  163 | Print("⚠️ [SMC VALIDATOR] Using fallback iMA call - unified manager not available");
  164 | }
  165 | 
  166 | // 🔧 CRITICAL FIX: Validate handles trước khi sử dụng
  167 | if(ema34Handle == INVALID_HANDLE || ema89Handle == INVALID_HANDLE) {
  168 | Print("❌ [SMC VALIDATOR] Failed to create EMA handles");
  169 | Print("EMA34: ", (ema34Handle != INVALID_HANDLE ? "✅" : "❌"));
  170 | Print("EMA89: ", (ema89Handle != INVALID_HANDLE ? "✅" : "❌"));
  171 | return false; // Return false khi không thể tạo handles
  172 | }
  173 | 
  174 | double ema34[1], ema89[1];
  175 | double ema34Value = 0, ema89Value = 0;
  176 | 
  177 | if(CopyBuffer(ema34Handle, 0, 1, 1, ema34) > 0) {
  178 | ema34Value = ema34[0];
  179 | }
  180 | if(CopyBuffer(ema89Handle, 0, 1, 1, ema89) > 0) {
  181 | ema89Value = ema89[0];
  182 | }
  183 | 
  184 | // Only release handles if not using unified manager cache
  185 | if(manager == NULL) {
  186 | IndicatorRelease(ema34Handle);
  187 | IndicatorRelease(ema89Handle);
  188 | }
  189 | 
  190 | double close = iClose(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 1);
  191 | 
  192 | // Check if price is above/below EMAs consistently (Sonic R: 34/89)
  193 | bool structureValid = false;
  194 | if(close > ema34Value && ema34Value > ema89Value)
  195 | structureValid = true;
  196 | else if(close < ema34Value && ema34Value < ema89Value)
  197 | structureValid = true;
  198 | 
  199 | return structureValid;
  200 | }
  201 | 
  202 | // Get volume score
  203 | double GetVolumeScore()
  204 | {
  205 | double currentVolume = (double)iVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 1);
  206 | double avgVolume = 0;
  207 | 
  208 | for(int i = 1; i <= 20; i++)
  209 | {
  210 | avgVolume += (double)iVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  211 | }
  212 | avgVolume /= 20;
  213 | 
  214 | return MathMin(currentVolume / avgVolume, 3.0) / 3.0;
  215 | }
  216 | 
  217 | // Get price action score
  218 | double GetPriceActionScore()
  219 | {
  220 | double currentRange = iHigh(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 1) - iLow(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 1);
  221 | double avgRange = 0;
  222 | 
  223 | for(int i = 1; i <= 20; i++)
  224 | {
  225 | avgRange += (iHigh(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i) - iLow(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i));
  226 | }
  227 | avgRange /= 20;
  228 | 
  229 | return MathMin(currentRange / avgRange, 2.0) / 2.0;
  230 | }
  231 | 
  232 | // Get structure score - SONIC R COMPLIANT (EMA34/89)
  233 | double GetStructureScore()
  234 | {
  235 | // Get unified manager for Sonic R compliant EMAs
  236 | CUnifiedIndicatorManager* manager = CUnifiedIndicatorManager::GetInstance();
  237 | 
  238 | int ema34Handle, ema89Handle;
  239 | if(manager != NULL) {
  240 | ema34Handle = manager.GetOptimizedEMAHandle(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 34, PRICE_CLOSE);
  241 | ema89Handle = manager.GetOptimizedEMAHandle(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 89, PRICE_CLOSE);
  242 | } else {
  243 | // Fallback to direct iMA calls with Sonic R periods
  244 | ema34Handle = iMA(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 34, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
  245 | ema89Handle = iMA(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 89, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
  246 | Print("⚠️ [SMC VALIDATOR] Using fallback iMA call in GetStructureScore - unified manager not available");
  247 | }
  248 | 
  249 | // 🔧 CRITICAL FIX: Validate handles trước khi sử dụng
  250 | if(ema34Handle == INVALID_HANDLE || ema89Handle == INVALID_HANDLE) {
  251 | Print("❌ [SMC VALIDATOR] Failed to create EMA handles in GetStructureScore");
  252 | Print("EMA34: ", (ema34Handle != INVALID_HANDLE ? "✅" : "❌"));
  253 | Print("EMA89: ", (ema89Handle != INVALID_HANDLE ? "✅" : "❌"));
  254 | return 0.0; // Return 0.0 khi không thể tạo handles
  255 | }
  256 | 
  257 | double ema34[1], ema89[1];
  258 | double ema34Value = 0, ema89Value = 0;
  259 | 
  260 | if(CopyBuffer(ema34Handle, 0, 1, 1, ema34) > 0) {
  261 | ema34Value = ema34[0];
  262 | }
  263 | if(CopyBuffer(ema89Handle, 0, 1, 1, ema89) > 0) {
  264 | ema89Value = ema89[0];
  265 | }
  266 | 
  267 | // Only release handles if not using unified manager cache
  268 | if(manager == NULL) {
  269 | IndicatorRelease(ema34Handle);
  270 | IndicatorRelease(ema89Handle);
  271 | }
  272 | 
  273 | double close = iClose(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 1);
  274 | 
  275 | // Sonic R EMA alignment check (34 above 89 for bullish, below for bearish)
  276 | if(close > ema34Value && ema34Value > ema89Value)
  277 | return 1.0;
  278 | else if(close < ema34Value && ema34Value < ema89Value)
  279 | return 1.0;
  280 | else
  281 | return 0.5;
  282 | }
  283 | };

  234 |     
  235 |     // Validation Methods
  236 |     bool ValidateConfig(SScenarioConfig &config) {
  237 |     // Validate basic parameters
  238 |     if(config.minConfluenceScore < 0.0 || config.minConfluenceScore > 100.0) {
  239 |         Print("❌ Invalid confluence score: ", config.minConfluenceScore);
  240 |         return false;
  241 |     }
  242 |     
  243 |     if(config.riskPercent <= 0.0 || config.riskPercent > 10.0) {
  244 |         Print("❌ Invalid risk percent: ", config.riskPercent);
  245 |         return false;
  246 |     }
  247 |     
  248 |     if(config.riskReward <= 0.0 || config.riskReward > 10.0) {
  249 |         Print("❌ Invalid risk reward: ", config.riskReward);
  250 |         return false;
  251 |     }
  252 |     
  253 |     // Validate weights sum to reasonable total
  254 |     double totalWeight = config.dragonBandWeight + config.pvsraWeight + 
  255 |                         config.smcWeight + config.wavePatternWeight + 
  256 |                         config.structureWeight + config.volumeWeight;
  257 |     
  258 |     if(totalWeight < 80.0 || totalWeight > 120.0) {
  259 |         Print("❌ Invalid total weight: ", totalWeight, " (should be 80-120)");
  260 |         return false;
  261 |     }
  262 |     
  263 |     return true;
  264 |     }
  265 |     
  266 |     string GetConfigSummary(ENUM_TRADING_SCENARIO scenario) {
  267 |     SScenarioConfig config;
  268 |     config = GetConfig(scenario);
  269 |     
  270 |     string summary = StringFormat(
  271 |         "📊 %s\n" +
  272 |         "📈 Confluence: %.1f%% | Risk: %.1f%% | R:R: %.1f\n" +
  273 |         "🎯 Max Trades: %d | Components: %d\n" +
  274 |         "⚖️ Dragon: %.0f%% | PVSRA: %.0f%% | SMC: %.0f%%\n" +
  275 |         "🔧 Nhồi: %s | Scout: %s | MultiAsset: %s",
  276 |         config.name,
  277 |         config.minConfluenceScore, config.riskPercent, config.riskReward,
  278 |         config.maxDailyTrades, config.minComponentCount,
  279 |         config.dragonBandWeight, config.pvsraWeight, config.smcWeight,
  280 |         (config.enableNhoi ? "ON" : "OFF"),
  281 |         (config.enableScoutMode ? "ON" : "OFF"),
  282 |         (config.enableMultiAsset ? "ON" : "OFF")
  283 |     );
  284 |     
  285 |     return summary;
  286 |     }
  287 | };

   76 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+

   78 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   79 | // Note: CSMCUtils class already exists at line 16 with prototypes

   81 | 
   82 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   83 | //| Calculate Order Block Strength                                   |
   84 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   85 | double CalculateOrderBlockStrength(const OrderBlock& ob)
   86 | {
   87 | // TEMPORARY FIX: Skip order block validation
   88 | // if(!IsValidOrderBlock(ob)) return 0.0;
   89 | if(ob.highPrice <= ob.lowPrice) return 0.0; // Basic validation inline
   90 | 
   91 | double strength = 0.5; // Base strength
   92 | 
   93 | // Factor 1: Size of order block
   94 | double sizePips = PriceToPips(ob.highPrice - ob.lowPrice);
   95 | strength += (sizePips / 50.0) * 0.2; // Larger blocks get higher strength
   96 | 
   97 | // Factor 2: Age of order block (newer = stronger)
   98 | long ageSeconds = TimeCurrent() - ob.timeCreated;
   99 | double ageFactor = 1.0 - (double)ageSeconds / g_smcConfig.orderBlockTimeoutSeconds;
  100 | strength += ageFactor * 0.2;
  101 | 
  102 | // Factor 3: Test count (fewer tests = stronger)
  103 | double testFactor = 1.0 / (1.0 + ob.testCount * 0.1);
  104 | strength += testFactor * 0.1;
  105 | 
  106 | return MathMin(strength, 1.0);
  107 | }
  108 | 
  109 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  110 | //| Check if Order Block is Active                                   |
  111 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  112 | bool IsOrderBlockActive(const OrderBlock& ob)
  113 | {
  114 | // TEMPORARY FIX: Skip order block validation
  115 | // return IsValidOrderBlock(ob) && !ob.hasBeenTested;
  116 | return (ob.highPrice > ob.lowPrice) && !ob.hasBeenTested; // Basic validation inline
  117 | }
  118 | 
  119 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  120 | //| Fair Value Gap Validation                                        |
  121 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  122 | bool IsValidFairValueGap(const FairValueGap& fvg)
  123 | {
  124 | if(fvg.gapHigh <= fvg.gapLow) return false;
  125 | if(fvg.timeCreated <= 0) return false;
  126 | 
  127 | double sizePips = PriceToPips(fvg.gapHigh - fvg.gapLow);
  128 | if(sizePips < g_smcConfig.minFVGSizePips) return false;
  129 | 
  130 | // Check if FVG hasn't expired
  131 | datetime currentTime = TimeCurrent();
  132 | if(currentTime - fvg.timeCreated > g_smcConfig.fvgTimeoutSeconds) return false;
  133 | 
  134 | return true;
  135 | }
  136 | 
  137 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  138 | //| Check if FVG is Filled                                          |
  139 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  140 | bool IsFVGFilled(const FairValueGap& fvg, double currentPrice)
  141 | {
  142 | if(!IsValidFairValueGap(fvg)) return true;
  143 | 
  144 | if(fvg.isBullish)
  145 | {
  146 | return currentPrice <= fvg.gapLow;
  147 | }
  148 | else // Bearish FVG
  149 | {
  150 | return currentPrice >= fvg.gapHigh;
  151 | }
  152 | 
  153 | return false;
  154 | }
  155 | 
  156 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  157 | //| Volume Classification                                            |
  158 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  159 | ENUM_VOLUME_TYPE ClassifyVolume(double volume, double averageVolume)
  160 | {
  161 | if(volume >= averageVolume * 3.0) return VOLUME_CLIMAX;
  162 | if(volume >= averageVolume * 1.5) return VOLUME_HIGH;
  163 | if(volume <= averageVolume * 0.5) return VOLUME_LOW;
  164 | return VOLUME_NORMAL;
  165 | }
  166 | 
  167 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  168 | //| Price Action - Engulfing Candle                                 |
  169 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  170 | bool IsEngulfingCandle(int index)
  171 | {
  172 | if(index < 1) return false;
  173 | 
  174 | double current_open = iOpen(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, index);
  175 | double current_close = iClose(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, index);
  176 | double previous_open = iOpen(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, index + 1);
  177 | double previous_close = iClose(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, index + 1);
  178 | 
  179 | // Bullish engulfing
  180 | if(current_close > current_open && previous_close < previous_open)
  181 | {
  182 | return (current_open < previous_close && current_close > previous_open);
  183 | }
  184 | 
  185 | // Bearish engulfing
  186 | if(current_close < current_open && previous_close > previous_open)
  187 | {
  188 | return (current_open > previous_close && current_close < previous_open);
  189 | }
  190 | 
  191 | return false;
  192 | }
  193 | 
  194 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  195 | //| Price Action - Doji Detection                                   |
  196 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  197 | bool IsDoji(int index, double threshold)
  198 | {
  199 | double open = iOpen(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, index);
  200 | double close = iClose(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, index);
  201 | double high = iHigh(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, index);
  202 | double low = iLow(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, index);
  203 | 
  204 | double bodySize = MathAbs(close - open);
  205 | double totalRange = high - low;
  206 | 
  207 | if(totalRange == 0) return false;
  208 | 
  209 | double bodyPercentage = bodySize / totalRange;
  210 | return bodyPercentage <= threshold;
  211 | }
  212 | 
  213 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  214 | //| Market Structure - Structural Break Detection                   |
  215 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  216 | bool IsStructuralBreak(const SwingPoint& previous, const SwingPoint& current)
  217 | {
  218 | if(previous.type != current.type) return false;
  219 | 
  220 | if(previous.type == SWING_HIGH)
  221 | {
  222 | return current.price > previous.price; // Higher high
  223 | }
  224 | else if(previous.type == SWING_LOW)
  225 | {
  226 | return current.price < previous.price; // Lower low
  227 | }
  228 | 
  229 | return false;
  230 | }
  231 | 
  232 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  233 | //| Utility Functions - Conversion                                  |
  234 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  235 | double PipsToPrice(double pips)
  236 | {
  237 | double point = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_POINT);
  238 | int digits = (int)SymbolInfoInteger(_Symbol, SYMBOL_DIGITS);
  239 | 
  240 | if(digits == 5 || digits == 3)
  241 | return pips * point * 10;
  242 | else
  243 | return pips * point;
  244 | }
  245 | 
  246 | double PriceToPips(double price)
  247 | {
  248 | double point = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_POINT);
  249 | int digits = (int)SymbolInfoInteger(_Symbol, SYMBOL_DIGITS);
  250 | 
  251 | if(digits == 5 || digits == 3)
  252 | return price / (point * 10);
  253 | else
  254 | return price / point;
  255 | }
  256 | 
  257 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  258 | //| Get Average Volume                                               |
  259 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  260 | double GetAverageVolume(int period)
  261 | {
  262 | double sum = 0.0;
  263 | int count = 0;
  264 | 
  265 | for(int i = 1; i <= period; i++)
  266 | {
  267 | long volume = iVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  268 | if(volume > 0)
  269 | {
  270 | sum += (double)volume;
  271 | count++;
  272 | }
  273 | }
  274 | 
  275 | return count > 0 ? sum / count : 0.0;
  276 | }
  277 | 
  278 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  279 | //| Get ATR                                                          |
  280 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  281 | double GetATR(int period)
  282 | {
  283 | int atr_handle = iATR(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, period);
  284 | if(atr_handle == INVALID_HANDLE) return 0.0;
  285 | 
  286 | double atr_buffer[];
  287 | if(CopyBuffer(atr_handle, 0, 0, 1, atr_buffer) <= 0)
  288 | {
  289 | IndicatorRelease(atr_handle);
  290 | return 0.0;
  291 | }
  292 | 
  293 | double atr = atr_buffer[0];
  294 | IndicatorRelease(atr_handle);
  295 | return atr;
  296 | }
  297 | 
  298 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  299 | //| String Conversion Functions                                      |
  300 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  301 | string OrderBlockTypeToString(ENUM_ORDER_BLOCK_TYPE type)
  302 | {
  303 | switch(type)
  304 | {
  305 | case ORDER_BLOCK_BULLISH: return "BULLISH";
  306 | case ORDER_BLOCK_BEARISH: return "BEARISH";
  307 | case ORDER_BLOCK_NEUTRAL: return "NEUTRAL";
  308 | default: return "UNKNOWN";
  309 | }
  310 | }
  311 | 
  312 | string FVGTypeToString(ENUM_FVG_TYPE type)
  313 | {
  314 | switch(type)
  315 | {
  316 | case FVG_BULLISH: return "BULLISH";
  317 | case FVG_BEARISH: return "BEARISH";
  318 | case FVG_NEUTRAL: return "NEUTRAL";
  319 | default: return "UNKNOWN";
  320 | }
  321 | }
  322 | 
  323 | string VolumeTypeToString(ENUM_VOLUME_TYPE type)
  324 | {
  325 | switch(type)
  326 | {
  327 | case VOLUME_NORMAL: return "NORMAL";
  328 | case VOLUME_HIGH: return "HIGH";
  329 | case VOLUME_LOW: return "LOW";
  330 | case VOLUME_CLIMAX: return "CLIMAX";
  331 | default: return "UNKNOWN";
  332 | }
  333 | }
  334 | 
  335 | #endif // SMC_UTILS_MQH
  336 |

   13 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   14 | //| SCENARIO PERFORMANCE DATA                                       |
   15 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   16 | struct SScenarioPerformance {
   17 |     // Basic Stats
   18 |     int totalTrades;                    // Tổng số lệnh
   19 |     int winningTrades;                  // Số lệnh thắng
   20 |     int losingTrades;                   // Số lệnh thua
   21 |     double totalProfit;                 // Tổng lợi nhuận
   22 |     double totalLoss;                   // Tổng lỗ
   23 |     double netProfit;                   // Lợi nhuận ròng
   24 |     
   25 |     // Performance Metrics
   26 |     double winRate;                     // Tỷ lệ thắng (%)
   27 |     double profitFactor;                // Hệ số lợi nhuận
   28 |     double averageWin;                  // Lợi nhuận trung bình
   29 |     double averageLoss;                 // Lỗ trung bình
   30 |     double maxDrawdown;                 // Drawdown tối đa
   31 |     double currentDrawdown;             // Drawdown hiện tại
   32 |     
   33 |     // Risk Metrics
   34 |     double sharpeRatio;                 // Tỷ lệ Sharpe
   35 |     double sortinoRatio;                // Tỷ lệ Sortino
   36 |     double maxConsecutiveLosses;        // Số lệnh thua liên tiếp tối đa
   37 |     double currentConsecutiveLosses;    // Số lệnh thua liên tiếp hiện tại
   38 |     
   39 |     // Time-based Stats
   40 |     datetime firstTradeTime;            // Thời gian lệnh đầu tiên
   41 |     datetime lastTradeTime;             // Thời gian lệnh cuối cùng
   42 |     double tradesPerDay;                // Số lệnh mỗi ngày
   43 |     int activeDays;                     // Số ngày hoạt động
   44 |     
   45 |     // Quality Metrics
   46 |     double averageConfluence;           // Confluence trung bình
   47 |     double bestConfluence;              // Confluence tốt nhất
   48 |     double worstConfluence;             // Confluence tệ nhất
   49 |     int highQualitySignals;             // Số tín hiệu chất lượng cao
   50 |     
   51 |     // Recent Performance (last 20 trades)
   52 |     double recentWinRate;               // Tỷ lệ thắng gần đây
   53 |     double recentProfitFactor;          // Hệ số lợi nhuận gần đây
   54 |     double recentDrawdown;              // Drawdown gần đây
   55 |     
   56 |     // Status
   57 |     bool isActive;                      // Kịch bản có đang hoạt động
   58 |     datetime lastUpdateTime;            // Thời gian cập nhật cuối
   59 |     string statusMessage;               // Thông báo trạng thái
   60 | };
