   62 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   63 | //| TRADE RECORD FOR PERFORMANCE TRACKING                          |
   64 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   65 | struct STradeRecord {
   66 |     datetime openTime;                  // Thời gian mở lệnh
   67 |     datetime closeTime;                 // Thời gian đóng lệnh
   68 |     ENUM_ORDER_TYPE orderType;          // Loại lệnh
   69 |     double openPrice;                   // Giá mở
   70 |     double closePrice;                  // Giá đóng
   71 |     double volume;                      // Khối lượng
   72 |     double profit;                      // Lợi nhuận
   73 |     double confluence;                  // Điểm confluence
   74 |     string reason;                      // Lý do vào lệnh
   75 |     bool isWin;                         // Lệnh thắng/thua
   76 | };
   77 | 
   78 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   79 | //| SCENARIO PERFORMANCE MANAGER                                    |
   80 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   81 | class CScenarioPerformance {
   82 | private:
   83 |     SScenarioPerformance m_performance[5];  // Hiệu suất 5 kịch bản
   84 |     STradeRecord m_recentTrades[5][20];     // 20 lệnh gần nhất mỗi kịch bản
   85 |     int m_tradeIndex[5];                    // Index lệnh hiện tại
   86 |     
   87 |     // Helper methods
   88 |     void CalculateMetrics(ENUM_TRADING_SCENARIO scenario) {
   89 |         // body of CalculateMetrics
   90 |         int index = (int)scenario;
   91 |         if(index < 0 || index >= 5) return;
   92 |         
   93 |         // Fix: Use direct array access instead of reference
   94 |         // SScenarioPerformance &perf = m_performance[index]; // REMOVED - causes Error 229
   95 |         
   96 |         // Win rate
   97 |         if(m_performance[index].totalTrades > 0) {
   98 |             m_performance[index].winRate = (double)m_performance[index].winningTrades / m_performance[index].totalTrades * 100.0;
   99 |         }
  100 |         
  101 |         // Profit factor
  102 |         if(m_performance[index].totalLoss > 0) {
  103 |             m_performance[index].profitFactor = m_performance[index].totalProfit / m_performance[index].totalLoss;
  104 |         } else {
  105 |             m_performance[index].profitFactor = (m_performance[index].totalProfit > 0) ? 999.0 : 0.0;
  106 |         }
  107 | 
  108 |         // Average win/loss
  109 |         if(m_performance[index].winningTrades > 0) {
  110 |             m_performance[index].averageWin = m_performance[index].totalProfit / m_performance[index].winningTrades;
  111 |         }
  112 |         if(m_performance[index].losingTrades > 0) {
  113 |             m_performance[index].averageLoss = m_performance[index].totalLoss / m_performance[index].losingTrades;
  114 |         }
  115 | 
  116 |         // Drawdown
  117 |         m_performance[index].currentDrawdown = CalculateDrawdown(scenario);
  118 |         if(m_performance[index].currentDrawdown > m_performance[index].maxDrawdown) {
  119 |             m_performance[index].maxDrawdown = m_performance[index].currentDrawdown;
  120 |         }
  121 |         
  122 |         // Sharpe ratio
  123 |         m_performance[index].sharpeRatio = CalculateSharpeRatio(scenario);
  124 | 
  125 |         // Trades per day
  126 |         if(m_performance[index].firstTradeTime > 0 && m_performance[index].lastTradeTime > 0) {
  127 |             int daysDiff = (int)((m_performance[index].lastTradeTime - m_performance[index].firstTradeTime) / 86400) + 1;
  128 |             m_performance[index].activeDays = daysDiff;
  129 |             m_performance[index].tradesPerDay = (double)m_performance[index].totalTrades / daysDiff;
  130 |         }
  131 |     }
  132 |     void UpdateRecentPerformance(ENUM_TRADING_SCENARIO scenario) {
  133 |         // body of UpdateRecentPerformance
  134 |         int index = (int)scenario;
  135 |         if(index < 0 || index >= 5) return;
  136 |         
  137 |         int recentCount = MathMin(20, m_performance[index].totalTrades);
  138 |         if(recentCount == 0) return;
  139 |         
  140 |         int wins = 0;
  141 |         double profit = 0.0, loss = 0.0;
  142 |         
  143 |         // Calculate recent performance from last 20 trades
  144 |         for(int i = 0; i < recentCount; i++) {
  145 |             int tradeIdx = (m_tradeIndex[index] - 1 - i + 20) % 20;
  146 |             if(m_recentTrades[index][tradeIdx].openTime == 0) continue;
  147 |             
  148 |             if(m_recentTrades[index][tradeIdx].profit > 0) {
  149 |                 wins++;
  150 |                 profit += m_recentTrades[index][tradeIdx].profit;
  151 |             } else {
  152 |                 loss += MathAbs(m_recentTrades[index][tradeIdx].profit);
  153 |             }
  154 |         }
  155 |         
  156 |         m_performance[index].recentWinRate = (double)wins / recentCount * 100.0;
  157 |         m_performance[index].recentProfitFactor = (loss > 0) ? profit / loss : 999.0;
  158 |     }
  159 |     double CalculateSharpeRatio(ENUM_TRADING_SCENARIO scenario) {
  160 |         // body of CalculateSharpeRatio
  161 |         int index = (int)scenario;
  162 |         if(index < 0 || index >= 5) return 0.0;
  163 |         
  164 |         if(m_performance[index].totalTrades < 10) return 0.0;
  165 |         
  166 |         // Simple Sharpe calculation based on profit consistency
  167 |         double avgReturn = m_performance[index].netProfit / m_performance[index].totalTrades;
  168 |         
  169 |         // Calculate standard deviation of returns
  170 |         double variance = 0.0;
  171 |         int count = MathMin(20, m_performance[index].totalTrades);
  172 |         
  173 |         for(int i = 0; i < count; i++) {
  174 |             int tradeIdx = (m_tradeIndex[index] - 1 - i + 20) % 20;
  175 |             if(m_recentTrades[index][tradeIdx].openTime == 0) continue;
  176 |             
  177 |             double deviation = m_recentTrades[index][tradeIdx].profit - avgReturn;
  178 |             variance += deviation * deviation;
  179 |         }
  180 |         
  181 |         if(count > 1) {
  182 |             variance /= (count - 1);
  183 |             double stdDev = MathSqrt(variance);
  184 |             
  185 |             if(stdDev > 0) {
  186 |                 return avgReturn / stdDev;
  187 |             }
  188 |         }
  189 |         
  190 |         return 0.0;
  191 |     }
  192 |     double CalculateDrawdown(ENUM_TRADING_SCENARIO scenario) {
  193 |         // body of CalculateDrawdown
  194 |         int index = (int)scenario;
  195 |         if(index < 0 || index >= 5) return 0.0;
  196 |         
  197 |         if(m_performance[index].totalTrades < 2) return 0.0;
  198 |         
  199 |         double peak = 0.0;
  200 |         double currentEquity = 0.0;
  201 |         double maxDD = 0.0;
  202 |         
  203 |         // Calculate running equity and find maximum drawdown
  204 |         int count = MathMin(20, m_performance[index].totalTrades);
  205 |         for(int i = count - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
  206 |             int tradeIdx = (m_tradeIndex[index] - 1 - i + 20) % 20;
  207 |             if(m_recentTrades[index][tradeIdx].openTime == 0) continue;
  208 |             
  209 |             currentEquity += m_recentTrades[index][tradeIdx].profit;
  210 |             
  211 |             if(currentEquity > peak) {
  212 |                 peak = currentEquity;
  213 |             }
  214 |             
  215 |             double drawdown = peak - currentEquity;
  216 |             if(drawdown > maxDD) {
  217 |                 maxDD = drawdown;
  218 |             }
  219 |         }
  220 |         
  221 |         return maxDD;
  222 |     }
  223 | public:
  224 |     CScenarioPerformance() {
  225 |         // existing constructor body
  226 |     }
  227 |     ~CScenarioPerformance() {}
  228 |     
  229 |     // FIXED: Implement missing RecordTrade method to resolve Warning 95
  230 |     void RecordTrade(ENUM_TRADING_SCENARIO scenario, datetime openTime, datetime closeTime, 
  231 |                     ENUM_ORDER_TYPE orderType, double openPrice, double closePrice, 
  232 |                     double volume, double profit, double confluence, string reason)
  233 |     {
  234 |         // Create trade record
  235 |         STradeRecord trade;
  236 |         trade.openTime = openTime;
  237 |         trade.closeTime = closeTime;
  238 |         trade.orderType = orderType;
  239 |         trade.openPrice = openPrice;
  240 |         trade.closePrice = closePrice;
  241 |         trade.volume = volume;
  242 |         trade.profit = profit;
  243 |         trade.confluence = confluence;
  244 |         trade.reason = reason;
  245 |         trade.isWin = (profit > 0);
  246 |         
  247 |         // Use existing AddTrade method
  248 |         AddTrade(scenario, trade);
  249 |     }
  250 |     
  251 |     // Main Methods
  252 |     void AddTrade(ENUM_TRADING_SCENARIO scenario, STradeRecord &trade) {
  253 |         // body of AddTrade
  254 |         int index = (int)scenario;
  255 |         if(index < 0 || index >= 5) return;
  256 |         
  257 |         // Add to recent trades (circular buffer)
  258 |         int tradeIdx = m_tradeIndex[index] % 20;
  259 |         m_recentTrades[index][tradeIdx] = trade;
  260 |         m_tradeIndex[index]++;
  261 |         
  262 |         // Update basic stats
  263 |         m_performance[index].totalTrades++;
  264 |         m_performance[index].lastTradeTime = trade.closeTime;
  265 |         
  266 |         if(m_performance[index].firstTradeTime == 0) {
  267 |             m_performance[index].firstTradeTime = trade.openTime;
  268 |         }
  269 |         
  270 |         // Update profit/loss
  271 |         if(trade.profit > 0) {
  272 |             m_performance[index].winningTrades++;
  273 |             m_performance[index].totalProfit += trade.profit;
  274 |             m_performance[index].currentConsecutiveLosses = 0;
  275 |         } else {
  276 |             m_performance[index].losingTrades++;
  277 |             m_performance[index].totalLoss += MathAbs(trade.profit);
  278 |             m_performance[index].currentConsecutiveLosses++;
  279 |             
  280 |             if(m_performance[index].currentConsecutiveLosses > m_performance[index].maxConsecutiveLosses) {
  281 |                 m_performance[index].maxConsecutiveLosses = m_performance[index].currentConsecutiveLosses;
  282 |             }
  283 |         }
  284 |         
  285 |         m_performance[index].netProfit = m_performance[index].totalProfit - m_performance[index].totalLoss;
  286 |         
  287 |         // Update confluence stats
  288 |         if(m_performance[index].totalTrades == 1) {
  289 |             m_performance[index].averageConfluence = trade.confluence;
  290 |             m_performance[index].bestConfluence = trade.confluence;
  291 |             m_performance[index].worstConfluence = trade.confluence;
  292 |         } else {
  293 |             m_performance[index].averageConfluence = 
  294 |                 (m_performance[index].averageConfluence * (m_performance[index].totalTrades - 1) + trade.confluence) / 
  295 |                 m_performance[index].totalTrades;
  296 |             
  297 |             if(trade.confluence > m_performance[index].bestConfluence) {
  298 |                 m_performance[index].bestConfluence = trade.confluence;
  299 |             }
  300 |             if(trade.confluence < m_performance[index].worstConfluence) {
  301 |                 m_performance[index].worstConfluence = trade.confluence;
  302 |             }
  303 |         }
  304 |         
  305 |         if(trade.confluence >= 80.0) {
  306 |             m_performance[index].highQualitySignals++;
  307 |         }
  308 |         
  309 |         // Recalculate all metrics
  310 |         CalculateMetrics(scenario);
  311 |         UpdateRecentPerformance(scenario);
  312 |         
  313 |         m_performance[index].lastUpdateTime = TimeCurrent();
  314 |     }
  315 | 
  316 |     SScenarioPerformance GetPerformance(ENUM_TRADING_SCENARIO scenario) {
  317 |         int index = (int)scenario;
  318 |         if(index < 0 || index >= 5) 
  319 |         {
  320 |             SScenarioPerformance empty;
  321 |             // empty.Reset(); // if Reset is a method
  322 |             return empty;
  323 |         }
  324 |         
  325 |         return m_performance[index];
  326 |     }
  327 |     
  328 |     // Analysis Methods
  329 |     ENUM_TRADING_SCENARIO GetBestPerformingScenario() {
  330 |         // body of GetBestPerformingScenario
  331 |         double bestScore = -999999.0;
  332 |         ENUM_TRADING_SCENARIO bestScenario = SCENARIO_SONIC_R_BASIC;
  333 |         
  334 |         for(int i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
  335 |             if(m_performance[i].totalTrades < 5) continue; // Cần ít nhất 5 lệnh
  336 |             
  337 |             // Composite score: Win Rate + Profit Factor + Sharpe - Drawdown
  338 |             double score = m_performance[i].recentWinRate + 
  339 |                           (m_performance[i].recentProfitFactor * 10.0) + 
  340 |                           (m_performance[i].sharpeRatio * 20.0) - 
  341 |                           (m_performance[i].currentDrawdown * 2.0);
  342 |             
  343 |             if(score > bestScore) {
  344 |                 bestScore = score;
  345 |                 bestScenario = (ENUM_TRADING_SCENARIO)i;
  346 |             }
  347 |         }
  348 |         
  349 |         return bestScenario;
  350 |     }
  351 |     ENUM_TRADING_SCENARIO GetWorstPerformingScenario() {
  352 |         double worstScore = 1e9;
  353 |         ENUM_TRADING_SCENARIO worstScenario = SCENARIO_SONIC_R_BASIC;
  354 |         for(int i=0;i<5;i++){
  355 |             double score = m_performance[i].recentWinRate + (m_performance[i].recentProfitFactor*10.0) + (m_performance[i].sharpeRatio*20.0) - (m_performance[i].currentDrawdown*2.0);
  356 |             if(score < worstScore){ worstScore = score; worstScenario=(ENUM_TRADING_SCENARIO)i; }
  357 |         }
  358 |         return worstScenario;
  359 |     }
  360 |     bool ShouldSwitchScenario(ENUM_TRADING_SCENARIO current) {
  361 |         // body of ShouldSwitchScenario
  362 |         int currentIndex = (int)current;
  363 |         if(currentIndex < 0 || currentIndex >= 5) return false;
  364 |         
  365 |         // Don't switch if not enough data
  366 |         if(m_performance[currentIndex].totalTrades < 10) return false;
  367 |         
  368 |         // Switch if recent performance is poor
  369 |         if(m_performance[currentIndex].recentWinRate < 40.0 && m_performance[currentIndex].recentProfitFactor < 1.0) {
  370 |             return true;
  371 |         }
  372 |         
  373 |         // Switch if consecutive losses exceed threshold
  374 |         if(m_performance[currentIndex].currentConsecutiveLosses >= 5) {
  375 |             return true;
  376 |         }
  377 |         
  378 |         // Switch if drawdown is excessive
  379 |         if(m_performance[currentIndex].currentDrawdown > m_performance[currentIndex].netProfit * 0.3) {
  380 |             return true;
  381 |         }
  382 |         
  383 |         return false;
  384 |     }
  385 |     
  386 |     // Reporting Methods
  387 |     string GetPerformanceReport(ENUM_TRADING_SCENARIO scenario) {
  388 |         // body of GetPerformanceReport (use one, remove duplicate)
  389 |         int index = (int)scenario;
  390 |         if(index < 0 || index >= 5) return "Invalid scenario";
  391 |         
  392 |         string report = StringFormat(
  393 |             "📊 SCENARIO %d PERFORMANCE\n" +
  394 |             "═══════════════════════════\n" +
  395 |             "📈 Trades: %d (W:%d L:%d)\n" +
  396 |             "💰 Net P&L: %.2f\n" +
  397 |             "🎯 Win Rate: %.1f%% (Recent: %.1f%%)\n" +
  398 |             "⚖️ Profit Factor: %.2f (Recent: %.2f)\n" +
  399 |             "📉 Max DD: %.2f (Current: %.2f)\n" +
  400 |             "🔥 Sharpe: %.2f\n" +
  401 |             "📊 Avg Confluence: %.1f\n" +
  402 |             "🏆 High Quality: %d/%d\n" +
  403 |             "📅 Trades/Day: %.1f\n" +
  404 |             "⏰ Last Update: %s",
  405 |             index + 1,
  406 |             m_performance[index].totalTrades, m_performance[index].winningTrades, m_performance[index].losingTrades,
  407 |             m_performance[index].netProfit,
  408 |             m_performance[index].winRate, m_performance[index].recentWinRate,
  409 |             m_performance[index].profitFactor, m_performance[index].recentProfitFactor,
  410 |             m_performance[index].maxDrawdown, m_performance[index].currentDrawdown,
  411 |             m_performance[index].sharpeRatio,
  412 |             m_performance[index].averageConfluence,
  413 |             m_performance[index].highQualitySignals, m_performance[index].totalTrades,
  414 |             m_performance[index].tradesPerDay,
  415 |             TimeToString(m_performance[index].lastUpdateTime)
  416 |         );
  417 |         
  418 |         return report;
  419 |     }
  420 |     string GetComparisonReport() {
  421 |         // body of GetComparisonReport
  422 |         string report = "🏆 SCENARIO COMPARISON\n";
  423 |         report += "═══════════════════════\n";
  424 |         
  425 |         for(int i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
  426 |             string status = "💤";
  427 |             if(m_performance[i].isActive) status = "🟢";
  428 |             else if(m_performance[i].totalTrades > 0) status = "🟡";
  429 |             
  430 |             report += StringFormat(
  431 |                 "%s S%d: %dT %.1f%% PF:%.2f P&L:%.2f\n",
  432 |                 status, i+1, m_performance[i].totalTrades, m_performance[i].winRate, 
  433 |                 m_performance[i].profitFactor, m_performance[i].netProfit
  434 |             );
  435 |         }
  436 |         
  437 |         ENUM_TRADING_SCENARIO best = GetBestPerformingScenario();
  438 |         report += StringFormat("\n🥇 Best: Scenario %d", (int)best + 1);
  439 |         
  440 |         return report;
  441 |     }
  442 |     void PrintDailyReport() {
  443 |         // Add body if defined
  444 |     }
  445 |     
  446 |     // Reset Methods
  447 |     void ResetPerformance(ENUM_TRADING_SCENARIO scenario) {
  448 |         // Add body if defined
  449 |     }
  450 |     void ResetAllPerformance() {
  451 |         // Add body if defined
  452 |     }
  453 |     
  454 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  455 |     //| Get detailed report for specific scenario                       |
  456 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  457 |     string GetDetailedReport(ENUM_TRADING_SCENARIO scenario) {
  458 |         int index = (int)scenario;
  459 |         if(index < 0 || index >= 5) {
  460 |             return "Invalid scenario";
  461 |         }
  462 |         
  463 |         string report = "\n=== SCENARIO PERFORMANCE REPORT ===\n";
  464 |         report += "Scenario: " + TradingScenarioToString(scenario) + "\n";
  465 |         report += "Total Trades: " + IntegerToString(m_performance[index].totalTrades) + "\n";
  466 |         report += "Win Rate: " + DoubleToString(m_performance[index].winRate, 2) + "%\n";
  467 |         report += "Recent Win Rate: " + DoubleToString(m_performance[index].recentWinRate, 2) + "%\n";
  468 |         report += "Profit Factor: " + DoubleToString(m_performance[index].profitFactor, 2) + "\n";
  469 |         report += "Recent Profit Factor: " + DoubleToString(m_performance[index].recentProfitFactor, 2) + "\n";
  470 |         report += "Total Profit: " + DoubleToString(m_performance[index].totalProfit, 2) + "\n";
  471 |         report += "Max Drawdown: " + DoubleToString(m_performance[index].maxDrawdown, 2) + "%\n";
  472 |         report += "Current Drawdown: " + DoubleToString(m_performance[index].currentDrawdown, 2) + "%\n";
  473 |         report += "Sharpe Ratio: " + DoubleToString(m_performance[index].sharpeRatio, 2) + "\n";
  474 |         report += "Best Confluence: " + DoubleToString(m_performance[index].bestConfluence, 1) + "\n";
  475 |         report += "Worst Confluence: " + DoubleToString(m_performance[index].worstConfluence, 1) + "\n";
  476 |         report += "High Quality Signals: " + IntegerToString(m_performance[index].highQualitySignals) + "\n";
  477 |         report += "Recent Score: " + DoubleToString(m_performance[index].recentProfitFactor*10.0, 2) + "\n";
  478 |         report += "================================\n";
  479 |         
  480 |         return report;
  481 |     }
  482 | };
  483 | 
  484 | #endif // SCENARIO_PERFORMANCE_MQH

  198 |     
  199 |     ScenarioProfile GetProfile(ENUM_TRADING_SCENARIO scenario) {
  200 |         if(!m_initialized) InitializeProfiles();
  201 |         
  202 |         for(int i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
  203 |             if(m_profiles[i].scenario == scenario) {
  204 |                 return m_profiles[i];
  205 |             }
  206 |         }
  207 |         
  208 |         // Return default profile if not found
  209 |         return m_profiles[0];
  210 |     }
  211 |     
  212 |     ScenarioProfile GetProfileByIndex(int index) {
  213 |         if(!m_initialized) InitializeProfiles();
  214 |         
  215 |         if(index >= 0 && index < 5) {
  216 |             return m_profiles[index];
  217 |         }
  218 |         
  219 |         return m_profiles[0];
  220 |     }
  221 |     
  222 |     string GetScenarioName(ENUM_TRADING_SCENARIO scenario) {
  223 |         ScenarioProfile profile = GetProfile(scenario);
  224 |         return profile.name;
  225 |     }
  226 |     
  227 |     string GetScenarioDescription(ENUM_TRADING_SCENARIO scenario) {
  228 |         ScenarioProfile profile = GetProfile(scenario);
  229 |         return profile.description;
  230 |     }
  231 |     
  232 |     void ApplyProfileToInputs(ENUM_TRADING_SCENARIO scenario) {
  233 |         ScenarioProfile profile = GetProfile(scenario);
  234 |         
  235 |         // Note: This would require global input variables to be modifiable
  236 |         // In practice, this is used for validation and reporting
  237 |         Print("[SCENARIO PROFILE] Applied: ", profile.name);
  238 |         Print("  Confluence Threshold: ", DoubleToString(profile.confluenceThreshold, 3));
  239 |         Print("  Risk Percent: ", DoubleToString(profile.riskPercent, 2));
  240 |         Print("  Risk Reward: ", DoubleToString(profile.riskReward, 1));
  241 |         Print("  Max Daily Trades: ", IntegerToString((int)profile.maxDailyTrades));
  242 |         Print("  PVSRA Enabled: ", (profile.enablePVSRA ? "YES" : "NO"));
  243 |         Print("  Scout Enabled: ", (profile.enableScout ? "YES" : "NO"));
  244 |         Print("  SMC Enabled: ", (profile.enableSMC ? "YES" : "NO"));
  245 |     }
  246 |     
  247 |     bool IsInitialized() const { return m_initialized; }
  248 | };
  249 | 
  250 | // Global instance
  251 | CScenarioProfileManager* g_scenarioProfileManager = NULL;
  252 | 
  253 | // Helper functions
  254 | bool InitializeScenarioProfiles() {
  255 |     if(g_scenarioProfileManager == NULL) {
  256 |         g_scenarioProfileManager = new CScenarioProfileManager();
  257 |     }
  258 |     return g_scenarioProfileManager.IsInitialized();
  259 | }

  264 |         g_scenarioProfileManager = NULL;
  265 |     }
  266 | }
  267 |

  269 |     if(g_scenarioProfileManager == NULL) {
  270 |         InitializeScenarioProfiles();

  272 |     return g_scenarioProfileManager.GetProfile(InpTradingStrategy);
  273 | }

   15 | #define InpScoutMinPositionSize 0.01    // Minimum position size

   20 | //| [TARGET SCOUT] SCOUT SYSTEM: COUNTER-TREND OPPORTUNITY DETECTION |

   22 | // Scout System Enums
   23 | enum ENUM_SCOUT_SIGNAL_TYPE
   24 | {
   25 |     SCOUT_SIGNAL_NONE = 0,
   26 |     SCOUT_SIGNAL_COUNTER_BUY = 1,    // Counter-trend buy signal
   27 |     SCOUT_SIGNAL_COUNTER_SELL = 2    // Counter-trend sell signal
   28 | };
   29 | enum ENUM_SCOUT_MARKET_STATE
   30 | {
   31 |     SCOUT_MARKET_UNKNOWN = 0,
   32 |     SCOUT_MARKET_TRENDING_UP = 1,
   33 |     SCOUT_MARKET_TRENDING_DOWN = 2,
   34 |     SCOUT_MARKET_RANGING = 3,
   35 |     SCOUT_MARKET_REVERSAL_ZONE = 4
   36 | };
   37 | // Scout System Structures
   38 | struct SScoutSignal
   39 | {
   40 |     ENUM_SCOUT_SIGNAL_TYPE type;
   41 |     double confidence;
   42 |     double entryPrice;
   43 |     double stopLoss;
   44 |     double takeProfit;
   45 |     datetime signalTime;
   46 |     string reason;
   47 |     double riskReward;
   48 | };
   49 | struct SScoutMarketAnalysis
   50 | {
   51 |     ENUM_SCOUT_MARKET_STATE marketState;
   52 |     double trendStrength;
   53 |     double reversalProbability;
   54 |     double supportLevel;
   55 |     double resistanceLevel;
   56 |     bool isOversold;
   57 |     bool isOverbought;

   59 | };
   60 | struct SScoutSessionInfo
   61 | {
   62 |     bool isActive;
   63 |     string sessionName;
   64 |     datetime startTime;
   65 |     datetime endTime;
   66 |     int totalSignals;
   67 |     int successfulSignals;

   69 | };
   70 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   71 | //| [TARGET SCOUT] SCOUT MANAGER CLASS                                |
   72 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   73 | class CScoutManager
   74 | {
   75 | private:
   76 |     // Core components
   77 |     CSonicSymbolInfo* m_symbolInfo;
   78 |     
   79 |     // Market analysis
   80 |     SScoutMarketAnalysis m_marketAnalysis;
   81 |     SScoutSessionInfo m_currentSession;
   82 |     
   83 |     // Signal tracking
   84 |     SScoutSignal m_lastSignal;
   85 |     int m_totalSignals;
   86 |     int m_successfulSignals;
   87 |     double m_totalPnL;
   88 |     
   89 |     // Timing
   90 |     datetime m_lastAnalysisTime;
   91 |     
   92 |     // ATR for volatility calculation
   93 |     int m_atrHandle;
   94 |     double m_atrBuffer[];
   95 | public:
   96 |     // Constructor
   97 |     CScoutManager(CSonicSymbolInfo* symbolInfo = NULL)
   98 |     {
   99 |         m_symbolInfo = symbolInfo;
  100 |         m_atrHandle = INVALID_HANDLE;
  101 |         m_totalSignals = 0;
  102 |         m_successfulSignals = 0;
  103 |         m_totalPnL = 0.0;
  104 |         m_lastAnalysisTime = 0;
  105 |         ArrayResize(m_atrBuffer, 50);
  106 |         ZeroMemory(m_lastSignal);
  107 |         ZeroMemory(m_marketAnalysis);
  108 |         ZeroMemory(m_currentSession);
  109 |     }
  110 |     
  111 |     // Destructor
  112 |     ~CScoutManager()
  113 |     {
  114 |         Deinitialize();
  115 |     }
  116 |     
  117 |     // Core functionality
  118 |     bool Initialize()
  119 |     {
  120 |         Print("[TARGET SCOUT] Initializing Scout System...");
  121 |         
  122 |         // Validate symbol info
  123 |         if(m_symbolInfo == NULL) {
  124 |             Print("[WARNING SCOUT] Warning: Symbol info not provided, using default symbol");
  125 |         }
  126 |         
  127 |         // Initialize ATR
  128 |         m_atrHandle = iATR(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 14);
  129 |         if(m_atrHandle == INVALID_HANDLE) {
  130 |             Print("[ERROR SCOUT] Failed to initialize ATR indicator");
  131 |             return false;
  132 |         }
  133 |         
  134 |         // Initialize market analysis
  135 |         m_marketAnalysis.marketState = SCOUT_MARKET_UNKNOWN;
  136 |         m_marketAnalysis.trendStrength = 0.0;
  137 |         m_marketAnalysis.reversalProbability = 0.0;
  138 |         m_marketAnalysis.lastUpdate = TimeCurrent();
  139 |         
  140 |         // Initialize session info
  141 |         UpdateSessionInfo();
  142 |         
  143 |         // Perform initial market analysis
  144 |         if(!UpdateMarketAnalysis()) {
  145 |             Print("[ERROR SCOUT] Failed to perform initial market analysis");
  146 |             return false;
  147 |         }
  148 |         
  149 |         Print("[SUCCESS SCOUT] Scout System initialized successfully");
  150 |         Print("[TARGET SCOUT] Features: Counter-trend detection | Multi-session support | Dynamic position sizing");
  151 |         
  152 |         return true;
  153 |     }
  154 |     
  155 |     void Deinitialize()
  156 |     {
  157 |         if(m_atrHandle != INVALID_HANDLE) {
  158 |             IndicatorRelease(m_atrHandle);
  159 |             m_atrHandle = INVALID_HANDLE;
  160 |         }
  161 |         
  162 |         Print(StringFormat("[TARGET SCOUT] Final Stats - Signals: %d | Success Rate: %.1f%% | Total PnL: %.2f",
  163 |               m_totalSignals, GetSuccessRate(), m_totalPnL));
  164 |     }
  165 |     
  166 |     bool ProcessTick()
  167 |     {
  168 |         if(!IsValidTradingSession()) {
  169 |             return false;
  170 |         }
  171 |         
  172 |         // Update market analysis every 5 minutes
  173 |         if(TimeCurrent() - m_lastAnalysisTime > 300) {
  174 |             if(!UpdateMarketAnalysis()) {
  175 |                 return false;
  176 |             }
  177 |             m_lastAnalysisTime = TimeCurrent();
  178 |         }
  179 |         
  180 |         // Check for counter-trend opportunities
  181 |         if(CheckCounterTrendConditions()) {
  182 |             SScoutSignal signal;
  183 |             signal = GenerateScoutSignal();
  184 |             if(ValidateScoutSignal(signal)) {
  185 |                 if(ExecuteScoutTrade(signal)) {
  186 |                     m_lastSignal = signal;
  187 |                     m_totalSignals++;
  188 |                     Print("[SUCCESS SCOUT] Counter-trend signal executed successfully");
  189 |                     return true;
  190 |                 }
  191 |             }
  192 |         }
  193 |         
  194 |         return false;
  195 |     }
  196 |     
  197 |     bool ProcessNewBar()
  198 |     {
  199 |         if(!IsValidTradingSession()) {
  200 |             return false;
  201 |         }
  202 |         
  203 |         // Update session info
  204 |         UpdateSessionInfo();
  205 |         
  206 |         // Perform comprehensive market analysis
  207 |         if(!UpdateMarketAnalysis()) {
  208 |             return false;
  209 |         }
  210 |         
  211 |         // Check for reversal zones
  212 |         if(DetectReversalZones()) {
  213 |             double probability = CalculateReversalProbability();
  214 |             if(probability > 0.7) {
  215 |                 Print(StringFormat("[TARGET SCOUT] High probability reversal zone detected: %.1f%%", probability * 100));
  216 |             }
  217 |         }
  218 |         
  219 |         return true;
  220 |     }

  224 |     {
  225 |         // Implementation for executing scout trade with specific size

  229 |     // Scout opportunity detection
  230 |     bool IsScoutOpportunity()
  231 |     {
  232 |         // PHASE 2: Complete implementation following review.txt guideline
  233 |         
  234 |         // 1. H4 xác định vùng S/R mạnh (>= 0.75)
  235 |         bool strongSR = (GetSRStrength() >= 0.75);
  236 |         
  237 |         // 2. M15 xác nhận mẫu hình đảo chiều
  238 |         bool reversalPattern = IsStrongReversalPattern();
  239 |         
  240 |         // 3. Volume xác nhận (1.8x average volume)
  241 |         bool volumeConfirm = IsVolumeConfirmation();
  242 |         
  243 |         // 4. Kiểm tra không xung đột với vị thế hiện tại
  244 |         bool noConflict = !HasConflictingPosition();
  245 |         
  246 |         // 5. Volatility phù hợp cho Scout Trade
  247 |         bool volatilitySuitable = IsVolatilitySuitableForScout();
  248 |         
  249 |         // Log decision reasoning for transparency
  250 |         if(strongSR && reversalPattern && volumeConfirm && noConflict && volatilitySuitable) {
  251 |             Print("✅ [SCOUT] Opportunity detected - SR:", strongSR, " Reversal:", reversalPattern, " Volume:", volumeConfirm, " NoConflict:", noConflict, " Volatility:", volatilitySuitable);
  252 |         }
  253 |         
  254 |         return strongSR && reversalPattern && volumeConfirm && noConflict && volatilitySuitable;
  255 |     }
  256 |     
  257 |     bool HasConflictingPosition(ENUM_SCOUT_SIGNAL_TYPE signalType)
  258 |     {
  259 |         // Check for conflicting positions
  260 |         return false;
  261 |     }

  271 |     {
  272 |         if(m_totalSignals == 0) return 0.0;
  273 |         return (double)m_successfulSignals / m_totalSignals * 100.0;
  274 |     }

  283 |     {
  284 |         m_totalSignals = 0;
  285 |         m_successfulSignals = 0;

  295 | private:
  296 |     // Private methods
  297 |     bool UpdateMarketAnalysis()
  298 |     {
  299 |         if(!AnalyzeMarketState()) {
  300 |             return false;
  301 |         }
  302 |         
  303 |         // Update support/resistance levels
  304 |         double currentPrice = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
  305 |         m_marketAnalysis.supportLevel = currentPrice * 0.995;  // Simplified
  306 |         m_marketAnalysis.resistanceLevel = currentPrice * 1.005;  // Simplified
  307 |         
  308 |         // Update overbought/oversold conditions
  309 |         double atr = GetAverageATR();
  310 |         if(atr > 0) {
  311 |             double volatilityRatio = atr / (currentPrice * 0.001);
  312 |             m_marketAnalysis.isOverbought = (volatilityRatio > 1.5);
  313 |             m_marketAnalysis.isOversold = (volatilityRatio < 0.5);
  314 |         }
  315 |         
  316 |         m_marketAnalysis.lastUpdate = TimeCurrent();
  317 |         return true;
  318 |     }
  319 |     
  320 |     bool AnalyzeMarketState()
  321 |     {
  322 |         double currentPrice = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
  323 |         double previousPrice = iClose(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 1);
  324 |         
  325 |         // Simple trend strength calculation
  326 |         double priceChange = (currentPrice - previousPrice) / previousPrice;
  327 |         m_marketAnalysis.trendStrength = MathAbs(priceChange) * 100;
  328 |         
  329 |         // Determine market state
  330 |         if(m_marketAnalysis.trendStrength > 0.5) {
  331 |             m_marketAnalysis.marketState = (priceChange > 0) ? SCOUT_MARKET_TRENDING_UP : SCOUT_MARKET_TRENDING_DOWN;
  332 |         } else {
  333 |             m_marketAnalysis.marketState = SCOUT_MARKET_RANGING;
  334 |         }
  335 |         
  336 |         return true;
  337 |     }
  338 |     
  339 |     bool DetectReversalZones()
  340 |     {
  341 |         // Check if we're in a trending market
  342 |         if(m_marketAnalysis.marketState == SCOUT_MARKET_TRENDING_UP || 
  343 |            m_marketAnalysis.marketState == SCOUT_MARKET_TRENDING_DOWN) {
  344 |             
  345 |             // Check for overbought/oversold conditions
  346 |             if(m_marketAnalysis.isOverbought || m_marketAnalysis.isOversold) {
  347 |                 m_marketAnalysis.marketState = SCOUT_MARKET_REVERSAL_ZONE;
  348 |                 return true;
  349 |             }
  350 |         }
  351 |         
  352 |         return false;
  353 |     }
  354 |     
  355 |     double CalculateReversalProbability()
  356 |     {
  357 |         double probability = 0.0;
  358 |         
  359 |         // Base probability on trend strength and overbought/oversold conditions
  360 |         if(m_marketAnalysis.isOverbought || m_marketAnalysis.isOversold) {
  361 |             probability += 0.4;
  362 |         }
  363 |         
  364 |         if(m_marketAnalysis.trendStrength > 1.0) {
  365 |             probability += 0.3;
  366 |         }
  367 |         
  368 |         return MathMin(probability, 1.0);
  369 |     }
  370 |     
  371 |     SScoutSignal GenerateScoutSignal()
  372 |     {
  373 |         SScoutSignal signal;
  374 |         ZeroMemory(signal);
  375 |         
  376 |         signal.signalTime = TimeCurrent();
  377 |         signal.confidence = CalculateReversalProbability();
  378 |         signal.entryPrice = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
  379 |         
  380 |         // Determine signal type based on market state
  381 |         if(m_marketAnalysis.marketState == SCOUT_MARKET_TRENDING_UP && m_marketAnalysis.isOverbought) {
  382 |             signal.type = SCOUT_SIGNAL_COUNTER_SELL;
  383 |             signal.reason = "Overbought counter-trend sell";
  384 |         } else if(m_marketAnalysis.marketState == SCOUT_MARKET_TRENDING_DOWN && m_marketAnalysis.isOversold) {
  385 |             signal.type = SCOUT_SIGNAL_COUNTER_BUY;
  386 |             signal.reason = "Oversold counter-trend buy";
  387 |         }
  388 |         
  389 |         return signal;
  390 |     }
  391 |     
  392 |     bool CheckCounterTrendConditions()
  393 |     {
  394 |         return (m_marketAnalysis.isOverbought || m_marketAnalysis.isOversold) &&
  395 |                (m_marketAnalysis.marketState == SCOUT_MARKET_TRENDING_UP || 
  396 |                 m_marketAnalysis.marketState == SCOUT_MARKET_TRENDING_DOWN);
  397 |     }
  398 |     
  399 |     bool ValidateScoutSignal(SScoutSignal& signal)
  400 |     {
  401 |         return signal.type != SCOUT_SIGNAL_NONE && signal.confidence > 0.5;
  402 |     }
  403 |     
  404 |     bool ExecuteScoutTrade(const SScoutSignal& signal)
  405 |     {
  406 |         // Simplified execution logic
  407 |         Print(StringFormat("[SCOUT TRADE] %s at %.5f (Confidence: %.1f%%)",
  408 |               signal.reason, signal.entryPrice, signal.confidence * 100));
  409 |         return true;
  410 |     }
  411 |     
  412 |     double CalculateDynamicPositionSize(double confidence)
  413 |     {
  414 |         double baseSize = InpScoutPositionSize;
  415 |         double adjustedSize = baseSize * confidence;
  416 |         return MathMax(InpScoutMinPositionSize, MathMin(adjustedSize, InpScoutMaxPositionSize));
  417 |     }
  418 |     
  419 |     bool UpdateSessionInfo()
  420 |     {
  421 |         m_currentSession.isActive = IsValidTradingSession();
  422 |         m_currentSession.sessionName = "Main";
  423 |         return true;
  424 |     }
  425 |     
  426 |     bool IsValidTradingSession()
  427 |     {
  428 |         if(!InpScoutSessionFilter) return true;
  429 |         
  430 |         // Simple session validation
  431 |         MqlDateTime dt;
  432 |         TimeToStruct(TimeCurrent(), dt);
  433 |         int hour = dt.hour;
  434 |         
  435 |         // Allow trading during main sessions (simplified)
  436 |         return (hour >= 8 && hour <= 17);
  437 |     }
  438 |     
  439 |     bool CheckRiskParameters()
  440 |     {
  441 |         // Basic risk parameter validation
  442 |         return true;
  443 |     }
  444 |     
  445 |     double GetAverageATR(int period = 14)
  446 |     {
  447 |         if(m_atrHandle == INVALID_HANDLE) return 0.0;
  448 |         
  449 |         if(CopyBuffer(m_atrHandle, 0, 0, 1, m_atrBuffer) <= 0) {
  450 |             return 0.0;
  451 |         }
  452 |         
  453 |         return m_atrBuffer[0];
  454 |     }
  455 |     
  456 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  457 |     //| 🎯 PHASE 2: SCOUT OPPORTUNITY DETECTION (per review.txt)        |
  458 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  459 |     // IsScoutOpportunity(): single implementation kept below to avoid duplicates
  460 | 
  461 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  462 |     //| 🎯 PHASE 2: CONFLICT POSITION CHECK (per review.txt)            |
  463 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  464 |     bool HasConflictingPosition()
  465 |     {
  466 |         // Không vào lệnh scout nếu đang có vị thế Basic
  467 |         if(HasActiveBasicPosition()) {
  468 |             Print("⚠️ [PHASE 2] Scout blocked: Active Basic position detected");
  469 |             return true;
  470 |         }
  471 |         
  472 |         // Không vào lệnh scout trong xu hướng mạnh
  473 |         if(IsStrongTrend()) {
  474 |             Print("⚠️ [PHASE 2] Scout blocked: Strong trend detected");
  475 |             return true;
  476 |         }
  477 |         
  478 |         return false;
  479 |     }
  480 |     
  481 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  482 |     //| 🎯 PHASE 2: HELPER FUNCTIONS FOR SCOUT ANALYSIS                |
  483 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  484 |     double GetSRStrength()
  485 |     {
  486 |         // Simplified S/R strength calculation
  487 |         double currentPrice = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
  488 |         double support = m_marketAnalysis.supportLevel;
  489 |         double resistance = m_marketAnalysis.resistanceLevel;
  490 |         
  491 |         if(support <= 0 || resistance <= 0) return 0.0;
  492 |         
  493 |         double srRange = resistance - support;
  494 |         double distanceToSR = MathMin(MathAbs(currentPrice - support), MathAbs(currentPrice - resistance));
  495 |         
  496 |         // Closer to S/R = stronger
  497 |         return (srRange > 0) ? MathMax(0.0, 1.0 - (distanceToSR / srRange)) : 0.0;
  498 |     }
  499 |     
  500 |     bool IsVolumeConfirmation()
  501 |     {
  502 |         // Volume confirmation for Scout Trade (1.8x average volume per review.txt)
  503 |         double currentVolume = (double)iVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0);
  504 |         if(currentVolume <= 0) return false;
  505 |         
  506 |         // Calculate 20-period average volume
  507 |         double avgVolume = 0.0;
  508 |         int validBars = 0;
  509 |         
  510 |         for(int i = 1; i <= 20; i++) {
  511 |             double vol = (double)iVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  512 |             if(vol > 0) {
  513 |                 avgVolume += vol;
  514 |                 validBars++;
  515 |             }
  516 |         }
  517 |         
  518 |         if(validBars == 0) return false;
  519 |         avgVolume /= validBars;
  520 |         
  521 |         bool volumeConfirm = currentVolume > (avgVolume * 1.8);
  522 |         
  523 |         if(volumeConfirm) {
  524 |             Print("📊 [SCOUT VOLUME] Confirmation: ", DoubleToString(currentVolume/avgVolume, 2), "x average");
  525 |         }
  526 |         
  527 |         return volumeConfirm;
  528 |     }
  529 |     
  530 |     bool IsStrongReversalPattern()
  531 |     {
  532 |         // M15 reversal pattern detection for Scout Trade
  533 |         double high1 = iHigh(_Symbol, PERIOD_M15, 1);
  534 |         double low1 = iLow(_Symbol, PERIOD_M15, 1);
  535 |         double close1 = iClose(_Symbol, PERIOD_M15, 1);
  536 |         double open1 = iOpen(_Symbol, PERIOD_M15, 1);
  537 |         
  538 |         double high2 = iHigh(_Symbol, PERIOD_M15, 2);
  539 |         double low2 = iLow(_Symbol, PERIOD_M15, 2);
  540 |         double close2 = iClose(_Symbol, PERIOD_M15, 2);
  541 |         
  542 |         if(high1 == EMPTY_VALUE || low1 == EMPTY_VALUE || close1 == EMPTY_VALUE || open1 == EMPTY_VALUE) return false;
  543 |         if(high2 == EMPTY_VALUE || low2 == EMPTY_VALUE || close2 == EMPTY_VALUE) return false;
  544 |         
  545 |         // Doji pattern detection
  546 |         double bodySize1 = MathAbs(close1 - open1);
  547 |         double rangeSize1 = high1 - low1;
  548 |         bool isDoji = (rangeSize1 > 0) && (bodySize1 / rangeSize1 < 0.1);
  549 |         
  550 |         // Hammer/Shooting star pattern
  551 |         double upperShadow = high1 - MathMax(close1, open1);
  552 |         double lowerShadow = MathMin(close1, open1) - low1;
  553 |         bool isHammer = (lowerShadow > bodySize1 * 2) && (upperShadow < bodySize1 * 0.5);
  554 |         bool isShootingStar = (upperShadow > bodySize1 * 2) && (lowerShadow < bodySize1 * 0.5);
  555 |         
  556 |         // Engulfing pattern
  557 |         bool isBullishEngulfing = (close2 < open1) && (close1 > open1) && (close1 > high2) && (open1 < low2);
  558 |         bool isBearishEngulfing = (close2 > open1) && (close1 < open1) && (close1 < low2) && (open1 > high2);
  559 |         
  560 |         bool reversalDetected = isDoji || isHammer || isShootingStar || isBullishEngulfing || isBearishEngulfing;
  561 |         
  562 |         if(reversalDetected) {
  563 |             Print("🔄 [SCOUT REVERSAL] Pattern detected - Doji:", isDoji, " Hammer:", isHammer, " Star:", isShootingStar);
  564 |         }
  565 |         
  566 |         return reversalDetected;
  567 |     }
  568 |     
  569 |     bool IsVolatilitySuitableForScout()
  570 |     {
  571 |         // Volatility suitability check for Scout Trade
  572 |         int atrHandle=iATR(_Symbol, PERIOD_M15, 14);
  573 | double atrBuf[2];  double currentATR=0.0; if(CopyBuffer(atrHandle,0,0,1,atrBuf)>0) currentATR=atrBuf[0]; if(atrHandle!=INVALID_HANDLE) IndicatorRelease(atrHandle);
  574 |         if(currentATR <= 0) return false;
  575 |         
  576 |         // Get baseline ATR (10-period average)
  577 |         double baselineATR = 0.0;
  578 |         int validPeriods = 0;
  579 |         
  580 |         for(int i = 1; i <= 10; i++) {
  581 |             double atr=0.0; if(CopyBuffer(atrHandle,0,i,1,atrBuf)>0) atr=atrBuf[0];
  582 |             if(atr > 0) {
  583 |                 baselineATR += atr;
  584 |                 validPeriods++;
  585 |             }
  586 |         }
  587 |         
  588 |         if(validPeriods == 0) return false;
  589 |         baselineATR /= validPeriods;
  590 |         
  591 |         double volatilityRatio = currentATR / baselineATR;
  592 |         
  593 |         // Scout Trade works best in moderate volatility (0.8x to 1.5x baseline)
  594 |         bool suitable = (volatilityRatio >= 0.8 && volatilityRatio <= 1.5);
  595 |         
  596 |         if(!suitable) {
  597 |             Print("⚠️ [SCOUT VOLATILITY] Unsuitable: ", DoubleToString(volatilityRatio, 2), "x baseline (need 0.8-1.5x)");
  598 |         }
  599 |         
  600 |         return suitable;
  601 |     }
  602 |     
  603 |     bool HasActiveBasicPosition()
  604 |     {
  605 |         // Check for active Basic Sonic R positions
  606 |         // Simplified implementation - would need integration with position manager
  607 |         for(int i = 0; i < PositionsTotal(); i++) {
  608 |             if(PositionGetSymbol(i) == _Symbol) {
  609 |                 string comment = PositionGetString(POSITION_COMMENT);
  610 |                 if(StringFind(comment, "Basic") >= 0 || StringFind(comment, "Sonic") >= 0) {
  611 |                     Print("⚠️ [SCOUT CONFLICT] Active Basic position found: ", comment);
  612 |                     return true;
  613 |                 }
  614 |             }
  615 |         }
  616 |         return false;
  617 |     }
  618 |     
  619 |     bool IsStrongTrend()
  620 |     {
  621 |         // Strong trend detection to avoid scout trades
  622 |         int h34=iMA(_Symbol, PERIOD_H1, 34, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
  623 |         int h89=iMA(_Symbol, PERIOD_H1, 89, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
  624 |         int h200=iMA(_Symbol, PERIOD_H1, 200, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
  625 |         double ema34[]; ArrayResize(ema34,1);
  626 |         double ema89[]; ArrayResize(ema89,1);
  627 |         double ema200[]; ArrayResize(ema200,1);
  628 |         ArraySetAsSeries(ema34,true); ArraySetAsSeries(ema89,true); ArraySetAsSeries(ema200,true);
  629 |         if(h34!=INVALID_HANDLE) CopyBuffer(h34,0,0,1,ema34);
  630 |         if(h89!=INVALID_HANDLE) CopyBuffer(h89,0,0,1,ema89);
  631 |         if(h200!=INVALID_HANDLE) CopyBuffer(h200,0,0,1,ema200);
  632 |         if(h34!=INVALID_HANDLE) IndicatorRelease(h34);
  633 |         if(h89!=INVALID_HANDLE) IndicatorRelease(h89);
  634 |         if(h200!=INVALID_HANDLE) IndicatorRelease(h200);
  635 |         
  636 |         if(ema34[0] == 0.0 || ema89[0] == 0.0 || ema200[0] == 0.0) return false;
  637 |         
  638 |         // Strong bullish trend: EMA34 > EMA89 > EMA200 with significant separation
  639 |         bool strongBullish = (ema34[0] > ema89[0]) && (ema89[0] > ema200[0]) && 
  640 |                             ((ema34[0] - ema89[0]) / _Point > 50) && 
  641 |                             ((ema89[0] - ema200[0]) / _Point > 50);
  642 |         
  643 |         // Strong bearish trend: EMA34 < EMA89 < EMA200 with significant separation
  644 |         bool strongBearish = (ema34[0] < ema89[0]) && (ema89[0] < ema200[0]) && 
  645 |                             ((ema89[0] - ema34[0]) / _Point > 50) && 
  646 |                             ((ema200[0] - ema89[0]) / _Point > 50);
  647 |         
  648 |         bool isStrong = strongBullish || strongBearish;
  649 |         
  650 |         if(isStrong) {
  651 |             Print("📈 [SCOUT TREND] Strong trend detected - Bullish:", strongBullish, " Bearish:", strongBearish);
  652 |         }
  653 |         
  654 |         return isStrong;
  655 |     }
  656 | };
  657 | #endif // SCOUT_01_MANAGER_MQH

   33 |         m_confluenceEngine = new CConfluenceEngine();

   57 |             delete m_config;

  207 |     bool TestPerformanceMetrics() {
  208 |         // Add some sample trades for testing
  209 |         for(int i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
  210 |             STradeRecord trade;
  211 |             trade.openTime = TimeCurrent() - (3600 * (i + 1));
  212 |             trade.closeTime = TimeCurrent() - (3600 * i);
  213 |             trade.orderType = (i % 2 == 0) ? ORDER_TYPE_BUY : ORDER_TYPE_SELL;
  214 |             trade.openPrice = 1.1000 + (i * 0.001);
  215 |             trade.closePrice = trade.openPrice + ((i % 2 == 0) ? 0.0050 : -0.0025);
  216 |             trade.volume = 0.1;
  217 |             trade.profit = (i % 2 == 0) ? 50.0 : -25.0;
  218 |             trade.confluence = 70.0 + (i * 2);
  219 |             trade.reason = StringFormat("Test trade %d", i + 1);
  220 |             trade.isWin = (i % 2 == 0);
  221 |             
  222 |             m_performance.AddTrade(SCENARIO_SONIC_R_BASIC, trade);
  223 |         }
  224 |         
  225 |         SScenarioPerformance perf = m_performance.GetPerformance(SCENARIO_SONIC_R_BASIC);
  226 |         
  227 |         LogTest("Performance Metrics", 
  228 |                 perf.totalTrades == 5 && perf.winningTrades == 3 && perf.losingTrades == 2,
  229 |                 StringFormat("Trades: %d, Wins: %d, Losses: %d, WinRate: %.1f%%", 
  230 |                             perf.totalTrades, perf.winningTrades, perf.losingTrades, perf.winRate));
  231 |         
  232 |         return (perf.totalTrades == 5 && perf.winningTrades == 3);
  233 |     }

  258 |         Print(StringFormat("❌ Failed: %d", m_failedTests));
  259 |         Print(StringFormat("📈 Success Rate: %.1f%%", 
  260 |               m_totalTests > 0 ? (double)m_passedTests / m_totalTests * 100.0 : 0.0));
  261 |

  263 |             Print("🎉 ALL TESTS PASSED! Confluence Engine is ready for production.");
  264 |         } else {
  265 |             Print("⚠️ Some tests failed. Please review and fix issues before deployment.");
  266 |         }
  267 |         
  268 |         Print("═══════════════════════════════════════════");
  269 |     }

  272 |         m_totalTests++;
  273 |         
  274 |         if(result) {
  275 |             m_passedTests++;
  276 |             Print(StringFormat("✅ %s - PASSED %s", testName, details));
  277 |         } else {
  278 |             m_failedTests++;
  279 |             Print(StringFormat("❌ %s - FAILED %s", testName, details));
  280 |         }
  281 |     }
