    1 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
    2 | //|                                    SignalGeneration_ConflictResolver.mqh |
    3 | //|                        SONIC R MC - INTELLIGENT CONFLICT RESOLVER        |
    4 | //|                    🧠 RESOLVES SIGNAL CONFLICTS LIKE A WISE JUDGE         |
    5 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
    6 | #ifndef SIGNAL_GENERATION_CONFLICT_RESOLVER_MQH
    7 | #define SIGNAL_GENERATION_CONFLICT_RESOLVER_MQH
    8 | 
    9 | #include "01_Core_12_SonicEnums.mqh"
   10 | #include "01_Core_13_CommonStructures.mqh"
   11 | 
   12 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   13 | //| 🎯 CONFLICT TYPES - PHÂN LOẠI XUNG ĐỘT                          |
   14 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   15 | // ENUM_CONFLICT_TYPE moved to SonicEnums.mqh for proper include order
   16 | 
   17 | // ENUM_RESOLUTION_STRATEGY moved to SonicEnums.mqh for proper include order
   18 | 
   19 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   20 | //| 🎯 CONFLICT DATA STRUCTURE                                      |
   21 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   22 | struct SConflictData
   23 | {
   24 |    ENUM_CONFLICT_TYPE conflictType;           // Loại xung đột
   25 |    ENUM_RESOLUTION_STRATEGY resolutionStrategy; // Chiến lược giải quyết
   26 |    
   27 |    // Conflict details
   28 |    string conflictDescription;                // Mô tả xung đột
   29 |    double conflictSeverity;                   // Mức độ nghiêm trọng (0-1)
   30 |    int conflictingComponents;                 // Số component xung đột
   31 |    
   32 |    // Resolution details
   33 |    ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE resolvedSignal;           // Signal sau khi giải quyết
   34 |    double resolutionConfidence;               // Độ tin cậy giải quyết
   35 |    string resolutionReason;                   // Lý do giải quyết
   36 |    
   37 |    // Component votes
   38 |    ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE dragonVote;               // Vote của Dragon Band
   39 |    ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE waveVote;                 // Vote của Wave Analysis
   40 |    ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE structureVote;            // Vote của Structure
   41 |    ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE pvsraVote;                // Vote của PVSRA
   42 |    ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE smcVote;                  // Vote của SMC
   43 |    
   44 |    // Component weights (dynamic)
   45 |    double dragonWeight;                       // Trọng số Dragon Band
   46 |    double waveWeight;                         // Trọng số Wave
   47 |    double structureWeight;                    // Trọng số Structure
   48 |    double pvsraWeight;                        // Trọng số PVSRA
   49 |    double smcWeight;                          // Trọng số SMC
   50 |    
   51 |    void Reset()
   52 |    {
   53 |       conflictType = CONFLICT_NONE;
   54 |       resolutionStrategy = RESOLUTION_NONE;
   55 |       conflictDescription = "";
   56 |       conflictSeverity = 0.0;
   57 |       conflictingComponents = 0;
   58 |       resolvedSignal = SIGNAL_NONE;
   59 |       resolutionConfidence = 0.0;
   60 |       resolutionReason = "";
   61 |       
   62 |       dragonVote = waveVote = structureVote = pvsraVote = smcVote = SIGNAL_NONE;
   63 |       dragonWeight = waveWeight = structureWeight = pvsraWeight = smcWeight = 0.2;
   64 |    }
   65 |    
   66 |    string ToString()
   67 |    {
   68 |       return StringFormat("Conflict: %s | Severity: %.1f%% | Resolution: %s | Confidence: %.1f%% | Final: %s",
   69 |                          ConflictTypeToString(conflictType), conflictSeverity*100,
   70 |                          ResolutionStrategyToString(resolutionStrategy), resolutionConfidence*100,
   71 |                          SignalTypeToString(resolvedSignal));
   72 |    }
   73 | };
   74 | 
   75 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   76 | //| 🧠 INTELLIGENT CONFLICT RESOLVER CLASS                          |
   77 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   78 | class CIntelligentConflictResolver
   79 | {
   80 | private:
   81 |    // Configuration
   82 |    double m_conflictThreshold;                // Ngưỡng phát hiện xung đột
   83 |    double m_severityThreshold;                // Ngưỡng nghiêm trọng
   84 |    double m_abstainThreshold;                 // Ngưỡng từ chối giao dịch
   85 |    
   86 |    // Historical performance tracking
   87 |    double m_componentReliability[5];          // Độ tin cậy từng component
   88 |    int m_componentSuccessCount[5];            // Số lần thành công
   89 |    int m_componentTotalCount[5];              // Tổng số lần
   90 |    
   91 |    // Market context weights
   92 |    double m_trendingWeights[5];               // Trọng số trong trending market
   93 |    double m_rangingWeights[5];                // Trọng số trong ranging market
   94 |    double m_volatileWeights[5];               // Trọng số trong volatile market
   95 |    
   96 |    // Conflict statistics
   97 |    int m_totalConflicts;                      // Tổng số xung đột
   98 |    int m_resolvedConflicts;                   // Số xung đột đã giải quyết
   99 |    int m_abstainedConflicts;                  // Số lần từ chối
  100 |    
  101 | public:
  102 |    CIntelligentConflictResolver()
  103 |    {
  104 |       Initialize();
  105 |    }
  106 |    
  107 |    void Initialize()
  108 |    {
  109 |       m_conflictThreshold = 0.3;              // 30% threshold for conflict detection
  110 |       m_severityThreshold = 0.7;              // 70% threshold for severe conflict
  111 |       m_abstainThreshold = 0.9;               // 90% threshold for abstaining
  112 |       
  113 |       // Initialize component reliability (equal start)
  114 |       for(int i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
  115 |          m_componentReliability[i] = 0.5;     // 50% initial reliability
  116 |          m_componentSuccessCount[i] = 0;
  117 |          m_componentTotalCount[i] = 0;
  118 |       }
  119 |       
  120 |       // Initialize market context weights
  121 |       InitializeMarketWeights();
  122 |       
  123 |       // Reset statistics
  124 |       m_totalConflicts = 0;
  125 |       m_resolvedConflicts = 0;
  126 |       m_abstainedConflicts = 0;
  127 |    }
  128 |    
  129 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  130 |    //| 🎯 MAIN CONFLICT RESOLUTION FUNCTION                           |
  131 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  132 |    SConflictData ResolveConflict(ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE dragonSignal, ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE waveSignal,
  133 |                                 ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE structureSignal, ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE pvsraSignal,
  134 |                                 ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE smcSignal, ENUM_MARKET_REGIME marketRegime)
  135 |    {
  136 |       SConflictData conflict;
  137 |       conflict.Reset();
  138 |       
  139 |       // Store component votes
  140 |       conflict.dragonVote = dragonSignal;
  141 |       conflict.waveVote = waveSignal;
  142 |       conflict.structureVote = structureSignal;
  143 |       conflict.pvsraVote = pvsraSignal;
  144 |       conflict.smcVote = smcSignal;
  145 |       
  146 |       // Step 1: Detect conflict
  147 |       if(!DetectConflict(conflict)) {
  148 |          // No conflict - use simple majority
  149 |          conflict.resolvedSignal = GetMajorityVote(conflict);
  150 |          conflict.resolutionConfidence = 0.8;
  151 |          conflict.resolutionReason = "No conflict detected - majority vote";
  152 |          return conflict;
  153 |       }
  154 |       
  155 |       m_totalConflicts++;
  156 |       
  157 |       // Step 2: Analyze conflict severity
  158 |       AnalyzeConflictSeverity(conflict);
  159 |       
  160 |       // Step 3: Choose resolution strategy
  161 |       ChooseResolutionStrategy(conflict, marketRegime);
  162 |       
  163 |       // Step 4: Apply resolution strategy
  164 |       ApplyResolutionStrategy(conflict, marketRegime);
  165 |       
  166 |       // Step 5: Validate resolution
  167 |       ValidateResolution(conflict);
  168 |       
  169 |       if(conflict.resolvedSignal != SIGNAL_NONE) {
  170 |          m_resolvedConflicts++;
  171 |       } else {
  172 |          m_abstainedConflicts++;
  173 |       }
  174 |       
  175 |       return conflict;
  176 |    }
  177 |    
  178 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  179 |    //| 🎯 COMPATIBILITY FUNCTIONS FOR MASTER ORCHESTRATOR             |
  180 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  181 |    bool DetectConflicts(SComponentSignal &signals[], int count)
  182 |    {
  183 |       if(count < 2) return false;
  184 |       
  185 |       int buyCount = 0, sellCount = 0;
  186 |       double buyConfidence = 0.0, sellConfidence = 0.0;
  187 |       
  188 |       for(int i = 0; i < count; i++) {
  189 |          if(signals[i].signal == SIGNAL_BUY && signals[i].confidence > 0.6) {
  190 |             buyCount++;
  191 |             buyConfidence += signals[i].confidence;
  192 |          } else if(signals[i].signal == SIGNAL_SELL && signals[i].confidence > 0.6) {
  193 |             sellCount++;
  194 |             sellConfidence += signals[i].confidence;
  195 |          }
  196 |       }
  197 |       
  198 |       // Conflict if both buy and sell signals with high confidence
  199 |       return (buyCount > 0 && sellCount > 0 && 
  200 |               buyConfidence > 0.7 && sellConfidence > 0.7);
  201 |    }
  202 |    
  203 |    SConflictData ResolveConflicts(SComponentSignal &signals[], int count)
  204 |    {
  205 |       SConflictData result;
  206 |       result.Reset();
  207 |       
  208 |       if(count == 0) return result;
  209 |       
  210 |       // Calculate weighted votes
  211 |       double buyWeight = 0.0, sellWeight = 0.0;
  212 |       double totalWeight = 0.0;
  213 |       
  214 |       for(int i = 0; i < count; i++) {
  215 |          if(signals[i].signal == SIGNAL_BUY) {
  216 |             buyWeight += signals[i].weight * signals[i].confidence;
  217 |          } else if(signals[i].signal == SIGNAL_SELL) {
  218 |             sellWeight += signals[i].weight * signals[i].confidence;
  219 |          }
  220 |          totalWeight += signals[i].weight;
  221 |       }
  222 |       
  223 |       // Determine final signal
  224 |       if(buyWeight > sellWeight && buyWeight > totalWeight * 0.4) {
  225 |          result.resolvedSignal = SIGNAL_BUY;
  226 |          result.resolutionConfidence = buyWeight / totalWeight;
  227 |       } else if(sellWeight > buyWeight && sellWeight > totalWeight * 0.4) {
  228 |          result.resolvedSignal = SIGNAL_SELL;
  229 |          result.resolutionConfidence = sellWeight / totalWeight;
  230 |       } else {
  231 |          result.resolvedSignal = SIGNAL_NONE;
  232 |          result.resolutionConfidence = 0.0;
  233 |       }
  234 |       
  235 |       return result;
  236 |    }
  237 |    
  238 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  239 |    //| 🔍 DETECT CONFLICT - PHÁT HIỆN XUNG ĐỘT                       |
  240 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  241 |    bool DetectConflict(SConflictData& conflict)
  242 |    {
  243 |       ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE signals[5] = {conflict.dragonVote, conflict.waveVote, 
  244 |                                     conflict.structureVote, conflict.pvsraVote, conflict.smcVote};
  245 |       
  246 |       int buyVotes = 0, sellVotes = 0, noneVotes = 0;
  247 |       
  248 |       for(int i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
  249 |          if(signals[i] == SIGNAL_BUY) buyVotes++;
  250 |          else if(signals[i] == SIGNAL_SELL) sellVotes++;
  251 |          else noneVotes++;
  252 |       }
  253 |       
  254 |       // Calculate conflict metrics
  255 |       int totalActiveVotes = buyVotes + sellVotes;
  256 |       if(totalActiveVotes == 0) return false;  // No active signals
  257 |       
  258 |       double agreement = (double)MathMax(buyVotes, sellVotes) / totalActiveVotes;
  259 |       double disagreement = 1.0 - agreement;
  260 |       
  261 |       // Detect conflict types
  262 |       if(disagreement >= m_conflictThreshold) {
  263 |          if(buyVotes > 0 && sellVotes > 0) {
  264 |             conflict.conflictType = CONFLICT_DIRECTIONAL;
  265 |             conflict.conflictDescription = StringFormat("Directional conflict: %d BUY vs %d SELL votes", 
  266 |                                                        buyVotes, sellVotes);
  267 |          } else if(noneVotes > totalActiveVotes) {
  268 |             conflict.conflictType = CONFLICT_STRENGTH;
  269 |             conflict.conflictDescription = StringFormat("Strength conflict: %d active vs %d inactive", 
  270 |                                                        totalActiveVotes, noneVotes);
  271 |          }
  272 |          
  273 |          conflict.conflictingComponents = MathMin(buyVotes, sellVotes) + noneVotes;
  274 |          return true;
  275 |       }
  276 |       
  277 |       return false;
  278 |    }
  279 |    
  280 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  281 |    //| 📊 ANALYZE CONFLICT SEVERITY - PHÂN TÍCH MỨC ĐỘ NGHIÊM TRỌNG  |
  282 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  283 |    void AnalyzeConflictSeverity(SConflictData& conflict)
  284 |    {
  285 |       double severity = 0.0;
  286 |       
  287 |       // Base severity from conflicting components
  288 |       severity += (double)conflict.conflictingComponents / 5.0 * 0.4;
  289 |       
  290 |       // Severity from signal distribution
  291 |       ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE signals[5] = {conflict.dragonVote, conflict.waveVote, 
  292 |                                     conflict.structureVote, conflict.pvsraVote, conflict.smcVote};
  293 |       
  294 |       int buyVotes = 0, sellVotes = 0;
  295 |       for(int i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
  296 |          if(signals[i] == SIGNAL_BUY) buyVotes++;
  297 |          else if(signals[i] == SIGNAL_SELL) sellVotes++;
  298 |       }
  299 |       
  300 |       // Perfect split is most severe
  301 |       if(buyVotes == sellVotes && buyVotes > 0) {
  302 |          severity += 0.4;  // Maximum severity for perfect split
  303 |       } else {
  304 |          double imbalance = MathAbs(buyVotes - sellVotes) / (double)(buyVotes + sellVotes);
  305 |          severity += (1.0 - imbalance) * 0.4;
  306 |       }
  307 |       
  308 |       // Additional severity from high-reliability components disagreeing
  309 |       severity += CalculateReliabilityConflictSeverity() * 0.2;
  310 |       
  311 |       conflict.conflictSeverity = MathMin(severity, 1.0);
  312 |    }
  313 |    
  314 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  315 |    //| 🎯 CHOOSE RESOLUTION STRATEGY - CHỌN CHIẾN LƯỢC GIẢI QUYẾT     |
  316 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  317 |    void ChooseResolutionStrategy(SConflictData& conflict, ENUM_MARKET_REGIME marketRegime)
  318 |    {
  319 |       // Critical conflicts require abstaining
  320 |       if(conflict.conflictSeverity >= m_abstainThreshold) {
  321 |          conflict.resolutionStrategy = RESOLUTION_ABSTAIN;
  322 |          return;
  323 |       }
  324 |       
  325 |       // Choose strategy based on conflict type and market regime
  326 |       switch(conflict.conflictType) {
  327 |          case CONFLICT_DIRECTIONAL:
  328 |             if(marketRegime == REGIME_TRENDING_BULLISH || marketRegime == REGIME_TRENDING_BEARISH) {
  329 |                conflict.resolutionStrategy = RESOLUTION_COMPONENT_RELIABILITY;
  330 |             } else {
  331 |                conflict.resolutionStrategy = RESOLUTION_WEIGHT_BASED;
  332 |             }
  333 |             break;
  334 |             
  335 |          case CONFLICT_STRENGTH:
  336 |             conflict.resolutionStrategy = RESOLUTION_MARKET_CONTEXT;
  337 |             break;
  338 |             
  339 |          case CONFLICT_TIMEFRAME:
  340 |             conflict.resolutionStrategy = RESOLUTION_TIMEFRAME_PRIORITY;
  341 |             break;
  342 |             
  343 |          default:
  344 |             conflict.resolutionStrategy = RESOLUTION_WEIGHT_BASED;
  345 |             break;
  346 |       }
  347 |    }
  348 |    
  349 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  350 |    //| ⚖️ APPLY RESOLUTION STRATEGY - ÁP DỤNG CHIẾN LƯỢC GIẢI QUYẾT   |
  351 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  352 |    void ApplyResolutionStrategy(SConflictData& conflict, ENUM_MARKET_REGIME marketRegime)
  353 |    {
  354 |       switch(conflict.resolutionStrategy) {
  355 |          case RESOLUTION_WEIGHT_BASED:
  356 |             ResolveByWeight(conflict, marketRegime);
  357 |             break;
  358 |             
  359 |          case RESOLUTION_COMPONENT_RELIABILITY:
  360 |             ResolveByReliability(conflict);
  361 |             break;
  362 |             
  363 |          case RESOLUTION_MARKET_CONTEXT:
  364 |             ResolveByMarketContext(conflict, marketRegime);
  365 |             break;
  366 |             
  367 |          case RESOLUTION_HISTORICAL_PERFORMANCE:
  368 |             ResolveByHistoricalPerformance(conflict);
  369 |             break;
  370 |             
  371 |          case RESOLUTION_ABSTAIN:
  372 |             conflict.resolvedSignal = SIGNAL_NONE;
  373 |             conflict.resolutionConfidence = 0.0;
  374 |             conflict.resolutionReason = "Conflict too severe - abstaining from trade";
  375 |             break;
  376 |             
  377 |          default:
  378 |             conflict.resolvedSignal = SIGNAL_NONE;
  379 |             conflict.resolutionConfidence = 0.0;
  380 |             conflict.resolutionReason = "Unknown resolution strategy";
  381 |             break;
  382 |       }
  383 |    }
  384 |    
  385 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  386 |    //| ⚖️ RESOLVE BY WEIGHT - GIẢI QUYẾT THEO TRỌNG SỐ                |
  387 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  388 |    void ResolveByWeight(SConflictData& conflict, ENUM_MARKET_REGIME marketRegime)
  389 |    {
  390 |       // Get market-appropriate weights
  391 |       double weights[5];
  392 |       GetMarketWeights(weights, marketRegime);
  393 |       
  394 |       // Store weights in conflict data
  395 |       conflict.dragonWeight = weights[0];
  396 |       conflict.waveWeight = weights[1];
  397 |       conflict.structureWeight = weights[2];
  398 |       conflict.pvsraWeight = weights[3];
  399 |       conflict.smcWeight = weights[4];
  400 |       
  401 |       // Calculate weighted votes
  402 |       double buyScore = 0.0, sellScore = 0.0;
  403 |       ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE signals[5] = {conflict.dragonVote, conflict.waveVote, 
  404 |                                     conflict.structureVote, conflict.pvsraVote, conflict.smcVote};
  405 |       
  406 |       for(int i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
  407 |          if(signals[i] == SIGNAL_BUY) buyScore += weights[i];
  408 |          else if(signals[i] == SIGNAL_SELL) sellScore += weights[i];
  409 |       }
  410 |       
  411 |       // Determine winner
  412 |       double totalScore = buyScore + sellScore;
  413 |       if(totalScore > 0) {
  414 |          double winnerScore = MathMax(buyScore, sellScore);
  415 |          conflict.resolutionConfidence = winnerScore / totalScore;
  416 |          
  417 |          if(buyScore > sellScore) {
  418 |             conflict.resolvedSignal = SIGNAL_BUY;
  419 |             conflict.resolutionReason = StringFormat("Weight-based BUY: %.2f vs %.2f", buyScore, sellScore);
  420 |          } else {
  421 |             conflict.resolvedSignal = SIGNAL_SELL;
  422 |             conflict.resolutionReason = StringFormat("Weight-based SELL: %.2f vs %.2f", sellScore, buyScore);
  423 |          }
  424 |       }
  425 |    }
  426 |    
  427 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  428 |    //| 🏆 RESOLVE BY RELIABILITY - GIẢI QUYẾT THEO ĐỘ TIN CẬY         |
  429 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  430 |    void ResolveByReliability(SConflictData& conflict)
  431 |    {
  432 |       double buyScore = 0.0, sellScore = 0.0;
  433 |       ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE signals[5] = {conflict.dragonVote, conflict.waveVote, 
  434 |                                     conflict.structureVote, conflict.pvsraVote, conflict.smcVote};
  435 |       
  436 |       for(int i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
  437 |          if(signals[i] == SIGNAL_BUY) buyScore += m_componentReliability[i];
  438 |          else if(signals[i] == SIGNAL_SELL) sellScore += m_componentReliability[i];
  439 |       }
  440 |       
  441 |       double totalScore = buyScore + sellScore;
  442 |       if(totalScore > 0) {
  443 |          double winnerScore = MathMax(buyScore, sellScore);
  444 |          conflict.resolutionConfidence = winnerScore / totalScore;
  445 |          
  446 |          if(buyScore > sellScore) {
  447 |             conflict.resolvedSignal = SIGNAL_BUY;
  448 |             conflict.resolutionReason = StringFormat("Reliability-based BUY: %.2f vs %.2f", buyScore, sellScore);
  449 |          } else {
  450 |             conflict.resolvedSignal = SIGNAL_SELL;
  451 |             conflict.resolutionReason = StringFormat("Reliability-based SELL: %.2f vs %.2f", sellScore, buyScore);
  452 |          }
  453 |       }
  454 |    }
  455 |    
  456 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  457 |    //| 🌍 RESOLVE BY MARKET CONTEXT - GIẢI QUYẾT THEO NGỮ CẢNH THỊ TRƯỜNG |
  458 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  459 |    void ResolveByMarketContext(SConflictData& conflict, ENUM_MARKET_REGIME marketRegime)
  460 |    {
  461 |       // In trending markets, prioritize trend-following components
  462 |       if(marketRegime == REGIME_TRENDING_BULLISH || marketRegime == REGIME_TRENDING_BEARISH) {
  463 |          // Dragon Band and Structure are better in trending markets
  464 |          if(conflict.dragonVote == conflict.structureVote && conflict.dragonVote != SIGNAL_NONE) {
  465 |             conflict.resolvedSignal = conflict.dragonVote;
  466 |             conflict.resolutionConfidence = 0.75;
  467 |             conflict.resolutionReason = "Trending market - Dragon+Structure agreement";
  468 |             return;
  469 |          }
  470 |       }
  471 |       
  472 |       // In ranging markets, prioritize mean-reversion components
  473 |       if(marketRegime == REGIME_RANGING) {
  474 |          // PVSRA and SMC are better in ranging markets
  475 |          if(conflict.pvsraVote == conflict.smcVote && conflict.pvsraVote != SIGNAL_NONE) {
  476 |             conflict.resolvedSignal = conflict.pvsraVote;
  477 |             conflict.resolutionConfidence = 0.75;
  478 |             conflict.resolutionReason = "Ranging market - PVSRA+SMC agreement";
  479 |             return;
  480 |          }
  481 |       }
  482 |       
  483 |       // Fallback to weight-based resolution
  484 |       ResolveByWeight(conflict, marketRegime);
  485 |    }
  486 |    
  487 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  488 |    //| 📈 UPDATE COMPONENT PERFORMANCE - CẬP NHẬT HIỆU SUẤT COMPONENT |
  489 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  490 |    void UpdateComponentPerformance(int componentIndex, bool success)
  491 |    {
  492 |       if(componentIndex < 0 || componentIndex >= 5) return;
  493 |       
  494 |       m_componentTotalCount[componentIndex]++;
  495 |       if(success) m_componentSuccessCount[componentIndex]++;
  496 |       
  497 |       // Update reliability (with smoothing)
  498 |       if(m_componentTotalCount[componentIndex] > 0) {
  499 |          double newReliability = (double)m_componentSuccessCount[componentIndex] / m_componentTotalCount[componentIndex];
  500 |          m_componentReliability[componentIndex] = m_componentReliability[componentIndex] * 0.8 + newReliability * 0.2;
  501 |       }
  502 |    }
  503 |    
  504 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  505 |    //| 🎯 HELPER METHODS                                              |
  506 |    //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  507 |    void InitializeMarketWeights()
  508 |    {
  509 |       // Trending market weights (favor trend-following)
  510 |       m_trendingWeights[0] = 0.35;  // Dragon Band
  511 |       m_trendingWeights[1] = 0.25;  // Wave
  512 |       m_trendingWeights[2] = 0.25;  // Structure
  513 |       m_trendingWeights[3] = 0.10;  // PVSRA
  514 |       m_trendingWeights[4] = 0.05;  // SMC
  515 |       
  516 |       // Ranging market weights (favor mean-reversion)
  517 |       m_rangingWeights[0] = 0.15;   // Dragon Band
  518 |       m_rangingWeights[1] = 0.20;   // Wave
  519 |       m_rangingWeights[2] = 0.20;   // Structure
  520 |       m_rangingWeights[3] = 0.25;   // PVSRA
  521 |       m_rangingWeights[4] = 0.20;   // SMC
  522 |       
  523 |       // Volatile market weights (balanced)
  524 |       m_volatileWeights[0] = 0.25;  // Dragon Band
  525 |       m_volatileWeights[1] = 0.20;  // Wave
  526 |       m_volatileWeights[2] = 0.20;  // Structure
  527 |       m_volatileWeights[3] = 0.20;  // PVSRA
  528 |       m_volatileWeights[4] = 0.15;  // SMC
  529 |    }
  530 |    
  531 |    void GetMarketWeights(double& weights[], ENUM_MARKET_REGIME marketRegime)
  532 |    {
  533 |       switch(marketRegime) {
  534 |          case REGIME_TRENDING_BULLISH:
  535 |          case REGIME_TRENDING_BEARISH:
  536 |             ArrayCopy(weights, m_trendingWeights);
  537 |             break;
  538 |          case REGIME_RANGING:
  539 |             ArrayCopy(weights, m_rangingWeights);
  540 |             break;
  541 |          default:
  542 |             ArrayCopy(weights, m_volatileWeights);
  543 |             break;
  544 |       }
  545 |    }
  546 |    
  547 |    ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE GetMajorityVote(SConflictData& conflict)
  548 |    {
  549 |       ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE signals[5] = {conflict.dragonVote, conflict.waveVote, 
  550 |                                     conflict.structureVote, conflict.pvsraVote, conflict.smcVote};
  551 |       
  552 |       int buyVotes = 0, sellVotes = 0;
  553 |       for(int i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
  554 |          if(signals[i] == SIGNAL_BUY) buyVotes++;
  555 |          else if(signals[i] == SIGNAL_SELL) sellVotes++;
  556 |       }
  557 |       
  558 |       if(buyVotes > sellVotes) return SIGNAL_BUY;
  559 |       if(sellVotes > buyVotes) return SIGNAL_SELL;
  560 |       return SIGNAL_NONE;
  561 |    }
  562 |    
  563 |    double CalculateReliabilityConflictSeverity()
  564 |    {
  565 |       // Calculate how much high-reliability components disagree
  566 |       double severity = 0.0;
  567 |       double highReliabilityThreshold = 0.7;
  568 |       
  569 |       for(int i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
  570 |          if(m_componentReliability[i] >= highReliabilityThreshold) {
  571 |             severity += 0.2;  // Each high-reliability component adds to severity
  572 |          }
  573 |       }
  574 |       
  575 |       return MathMin(severity, 1.0);
  576 |    }
  577 |    
  578 |    void ResolveByHistoricalPerformance(SConflictData& conflict)
  579 |    {
  580 |       // Find the component with best historical performance
  581 |       int bestComponent = 0;
  582 |       double bestReliability = m_componentReliability[0];
  583 |       
  584 |       for(int i = 1; i < 5; i++) {
  585 |          if(m_componentReliability[i] > bestReliability) {
  586 |             bestReliability = m_componentReliability[i];
  587 |             bestComponent = i;
  588 |          }
  589 |       }
  590 |       
  591 |       ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE signals[5] = {conflict.dragonVote, conflict.waveVote, 
  592 |                                     conflict.structureVote, conflict.pvsraVote, conflict.smcVote};
  593 |       
  594 |       conflict.resolvedSignal = signals[bestComponent];
  595 |       conflict.resolutionConfidence = bestReliability;
  596 |       conflict.resolutionReason = StringFormat("Best performer (Component %d): %.1f%% reliability", 
  597 |                                               bestComponent, bestReliability*100);
  598 |    }
  599 |    
  600 |    void ValidateResolution(SConflictData& conflict)
  601 |    {
  602 |       // Ensure minimum confidence threshold
  603 |       if(conflict.resolutionConfidence < 0.6) {
  604 |          conflict.resolvedSignal = SIGNAL_NONE;
  605 |          conflict.resolutionReason += " - Low confidence, abstaining";
  606 |       }
  607 |    }
  608 |    
  609 |    // Getters for statistics
  610 |    double GetConflictResolutionRate() { return m_totalConflicts > 0 ? (double)m_resolvedConflicts / m_totalConflicts : 0.0; }
  611 |    double GetAbstainRate() { return m_totalConflicts > 0 ? (double)m_abstainedConflicts / m_totalConflicts : 0.0; }
  612 |    int GetTotalConflicts() { return m_totalConflicts; }
  613 |    double GetComponentReliability(int index) { return (index >= 0 && index < 5) ? m_componentReliability[index] : 0.0; }
  614 | };
  615 | 
  616 | #endif // SIGNAL_GENERATION_CONFLICT_RESOLVER_MQH

    1 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
    2 | //| 🧠 DYNAMIC WEIGHT ADJUSTER                                      |
    3 | //| Điều chỉnh trọng số thông minh cho các chuyên gia               |
    4 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
    5 | #property copyright "Sonic R_MC"

    8 | 
    9 | #include "01_Core_12_SonicEnums.mqh"

   11 | 
   12 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   13 | //| 📊 PERFORMANCE TRACKING STRUCTURES                              |
   14 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   15 | struct SComponentPerformance
   16 | {
   17 |     string componentName;           // Tên component
   18 |     double accuracy;               // Độ chính xác (0.0 - 1.0)
   19 |     double reliability;            // Độ tin cậy (0.0 - 1.0)
   20 |     double consistency;            // Tính nhất quán (0.0 - 1.0)
   21 |     int totalSignals;             // Tổng số tín hiệu
   22 |     int correctSignals;           // Số tín hiệu đúng
   23 |     int falsePositives;           // Tín hiệu sai (false positive)
   24 |     int falseNegatives;           // Bỏ lỡ tín hiệu (false negative)
   25 |     double avgResponseTime;       // Thời gian phản hồi trung bình
   26 |     datetime lastUpdate;          // Lần cập nhật cuối
   27 |     double recentPerformance[10]; // Hiệu suất 10 lần gần nhất
   28 |     int recentIndex;              // Index cho mảng recent
   29 |     
   30 |     void Reset()
   31 |     {
   32 |         componentName = "";
   33 |         accuracy = 0.5;
   34 |         reliability = 0.5;
   35 |         consistency = 0.5;
   36 |         totalSignals = 0;
   37 |         correctSignals = 0;
   38 |         falsePositives = 0;
   39 |         falseNegatives = 0;
   40 |         avgResponseTime = 0.0;
   41 |         lastUpdate = 0;
   42 |         ArrayInitialize(recentPerformance, 0.5);
   43 |         recentIndex = 0;
   44 |     }
   45 |     
   46 |     void UpdatePerformance(bool wasCorrect, double responseTime)
   47 |     {
   48 |         totalSignals++;
   49 |         if(wasCorrect) correctSignals++;
   50 |         else falsePositives++;
   51 |         
   52 |         // Update accuracy
   53 |         accuracy = (totalSignals > 0) ? (double)correctSignals / totalSignals : 0.5;
   54 |         
   55 |         // Update response time
   56 |         avgResponseTime = (avgResponseTime * (totalSignals - 1) + responseTime) / totalSignals;
   57 |         
   58 |         // Update recent performance
   59 |         recentPerformance[recentIndex] = wasCorrect ? 1.0 : 0.0;
   60 |         recentIndex = (recentIndex + 1) % 10;
   61 |         
   62 |         // Calculate consistency (based on recent performance)
   63 |         double recentSum = 0.0;
   64 |         for(int i = 0; i < 10; i++) {
   65 |             recentSum += recentPerformance[i];
   66 |         }
   67 |         consistency = recentSum / 10.0;
   68 |         
   69 |         // Calculate reliability (combination of accuracy and consistency)
   70 |         reliability = (accuracy * 0.7 + consistency * 0.3);
   71 |         
   72 |         lastUpdate = TimeCurrent();
   73 |     }
   74 | };
   75 | 
   76 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   77 | //| 🌍 MARKET CONTEXT STRUCTURES                                    |
   78 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   79 | struct SMarketContext
   80 | {
   81 |     ENUM_MARKET_REGIME regime;      // Chế độ thị trường
   82 |     ENUM_TREND_DIRECTION trend;     // Hướng xu hướng
   83 |     double volatility;              // Độ biến động
   84 |     double volume;                  // Khối lượng
   85 |     ENUM_TRADING_SESSION session;   // Phiên giao dịch
   86 |     bool isNewsTime;               // Có phải thời gian tin tức
   87 |     double marketStrength;         // Sức mạnh thị trường
   88 |     
   89 |     void Reset()
   90 |     {
   91 |         regime = REGIME_RANGING;
   92 |         trend = TREND_SIDEWAYS;
   93 |         volatility = 0.5;
   94 |         volume = 0.5;
   95 |         session = SESSION_ASIAN;
   96 |         isNewsTime = false;
   97 |         marketStrength = 0.5;
   98 |     }
   99 | };
  100 | 
  101 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  102 | //| 🎯 WEIGHT ADJUSTMENT STRATEGIES                                 |
  103 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  104 | // ENUM_WEIGHT_STRATEGY moved to SonicEnums.mqh for proper include order
  105 | 
  106 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  107 | //| 🧠 DYNAMIC WEIGHT ADJUSTER CLASS                               |
  108 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  109 | class CDynamicWeightAdjuster
  110 | {
  111 | private:
  112 |     // Performance tracking
  113 |     SComponentPerformance m_componentPerformance[4]; // Dragon, Wave, Structure, PVSRA
  114 |     SMarketContext m_marketContext;
  115 |     
  116 |     // Weight management
  117 |     double m_currentWeights[4];     // Trọng số hiện tại
  118 |     double m_baseWeights[4];        // Trọng số cơ bản
  119 |     double m_minWeights[4];         // Trọng số tối thiểu
  120 |     double m_maxWeights[4];         // Trọng số tối đa
  121 |     
  122 |     // Configuration
  123 |     ENUM_WEIGHT_STRATEGY m_strategy;
  124 |     double m_adaptationRate;        // Tốc độ thích ứng (0.0 - 1.0)
  125 |     double m_performanceThreshold;  // Ngưỡng hiệu suất
  126 |     bool m_enableAdaptation;        // Bật/tắt thích ứng
  127 |     
  128 |     // Statistics
  129 |     int m_adjustmentCount;
  130 |     datetime m_lastAdjustment;
  131 |     double m_totalAdjustment;
  132 |     
  133 | public:
  134 |     CDynamicWeightAdjuster()
  135 |     {
  136 |         // Initialize base weights
  137 |         m_baseWeights[0] = 0.30; // Dragon Band - 30%
  138 |         m_baseWeights[1] = 0.25; // Wave Pattern - 25%
  139 |         m_baseWeights[2] = 0.25; // Market Structure - 25%
  140 |         m_baseWeights[3] = 0.20; // PVSRA - 20%
  141 |         
  142 |         // Set weight limits
  143 |         m_minWeights[0] = 0.15; m_maxWeights[0] = 0.45; // Dragon: 15-45%
  144 |         m_minWeights[1] = 0.10; m_maxWeights[1] = 0.40; // Wave: 10-40%
  145 |         m_minWeights[2] = 0.10; m_maxWeights[2] = 0.40; // Structure: 10-40%
  146 |         m_minWeights[3] = 0.05; m_maxWeights[3] = 0.35; // PVSRA: 5-35%
  147 |         
  148 |         // Copy base to current
  149 |         ArrayCopy(m_currentWeights, m_baseWeights);
  150 |         
  151 |         // Initialize configuration
  152 |         m_strategy = WEIGHT_HYBRID;
  153 |         m_adaptationRate = 0.1; // 10% adaptation rate
  154 |         m_performanceThreshold = 0.6;
  155 |         m_enableAdaptation = true;
  156 |         
  157 |         // Initialize statistics
  158 |         m_adjustmentCount = 0;
  159 |         m_lastAdjustment = 0;
  160 |         m_totalAdjustment = 0.0;
  161 |         
  162 |         // Initialize performance tracking
  163 |         for(int i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
  164 |             m_componentPerformance[i].Reset();
  165 |         }
  166 |         m_componentPerformance[0].componentName = "DragonBand";
  167 |         m_componentPerformance[1].componentName = "WavePattern";
  168 |         m_componentPerformance[2].componentName = "Structure";
  169 |         m_componentPerformance[3].componentName = "PVSRA";
  170 |         
  171 |         m_marketContext.Reset();
  172 |         
  173 |         Print("🧠 Dynamic Weight Adjuster initialized");
  174 |     }
  175 |     
  176 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  177 |     //| 🚀 INITIALIZATION                                               |
  178 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  179 |     bool Initialize()
  180 |     {
  181 |         Print("🧠 Initializing Dynamic Weight Adjuster");
  182 |         
  183 |         // Validate configuration
  184 |         if(!ValidateConfiguration()) {
  185 |             Print("❌ Invalid configuration for Dynamic Weight Adjuster");
  186 |             return false;
  187 |         }
  188 |         
  189 |         Print("✅ Dynamic Weight Adjuster initialized successfully");
  190 |         return true;
  191 |     }
  192 |     
  193 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  194 |     //| 📊 PERFORMANCE TRACKING                                         |
  195 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  196 |     void UpdateComponentPerformance(int componentIndex, bool wasCorrect, double responseTime = 0.0)
  197 |     {
  198 |         if(componentIndex < 0 || componentIndex >= 4) return;
  199 |         
  200 |         m_componentPerformance[componentIndex].UpdatePerformance(wasCorrect, responseTime);
  201 |         
  202 |         // Trigger weight adjustment if needed
  203 |         if(m_enableAdaptation) {
  204 |             CheckAndAdjustWeights();
  205 |         }
  206 |     }
  207 |     
  208 |     void UpdateMarketContext(ENUM_MARKET_REGIME regime, ENUM_TREND_DIRECTION trend, 
  209 |                            double volatility, double volume = 0.5)
  210 |     {
  211 |         m_marketContext.regime = regime;
  212 |         m_marketContext.trend = trend;
  213 |         m_marketContext.volatility = volatility;
  214 |         m_marketContext.volume = volume;
  215 |         m_marketContext.session = GetCurrentTradingSession();
  216 |         m_marketContext.isNewsTime = IsNewsTime();
  217 |         m_marketContext.marketStrength = CalculateMarketStrength();
  218 |         
  219 |         // Trigger weight adjustment for market changes
  220 |         if(m_enableAdaptation) {
  221 |             CheckAndAdjustWeights();
  222 |         }
  223 |     }
  224 |     
  225 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  226 |     //| ⚖️ WEIGHT ADJUSTMENT LOGIC                                      |
  227 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  228 |     void CheckAndAdjustWeights()
  229 |     {
  230 |         if(!m_enableAdaptation) return;
  231 |         
  232 |         // Check if adjustment is needed
  233 |         if(!ShouldAdjustWeights()) return;
  234 |         
  235 |         double newWeights[4];
  236 |         ArrayCopy(newWeights, m_currentWeights);
  237 |         
  238 |         switch(m_strategy) {
  239 |             case WEIGHT_PERFORMANCE_BASED:
  240 |                 AdjustByPerformance(newWeights);
  241 |                 break;
  242 |                 
  243 |             case WEIGHT_MARKET_ADAPTIVE:
  244 |                 AdjustByMarketContext(newWeights);
  245 |                 break;
  246 |                 
  247 |             case WEIGHT_HYBRID:
  248 |                 AdjustByHybridMethod(newWeights);
  249 |                 break;
  250 |                 
  251 |             case WEIGHT_CONSERVATIVE:
  252 |                 AdjustConservatively(newWeights);
  253 |                 break;
  254 |                 
  255 |             case WEIGHT_AGGRESSIVE:
  256 |                 AdjustAggressively(newWeights);
  257 |                 break;
  258 |         }
  259 |         
  260 |         // Apply adjustments with rate limiting
  261 |         ApplyWeightAdjustments(newWeights);
  262 |         
  263 |         m_adjustmentCount++;
  264 |         m_lastAdjustment = TimeCurrent();
  265 |         
  266 |         Print("🧠 [WEIGHT ADJUSTER] Weights adjusted: Dragon=", DoubleToString(m_currentWeights[0]*100, 1),
  267 |               "% Wave=", DoubleToString(m_currentWeights[1]*100, 1),
  268 |               "% Structure=", DoubleToString(m_currentWeights[2]*100, 1),
  269 |               "% PVSRA=", DoubleToString(m_currentWeights[3]*100, 1), "%");
  270 |     }
  271 |     
  272 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  273 |     //| 🎯 ADJUSTMENT STRATEGIES                                        |
  274 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  275 |     void AdjustByPerformance(double &weights[])
  276 |     {
  277 |         // Tăng trọng số cho component có hiệu suất tốt
  278 |         for(int i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
  279 |             double performance = m_componentPerformance[i].reliability;
  280 |             
  281 |             if(performance > 0.7) {
  282 |                 // Hiệu suất tốt - tăng trọng số
  283 |                 weights[i] += (performance - 0.7) * m_adaptationRate;
  284 |             } else if(performance < 0.4) {
  285 |                 // Hiệu suất kém - giảm trọng số
  286 |                 weights[i] -= (0.4 - performance) * m_adaptationRate;
  287 |             }
  288 |         }
  289 |     }
  290 |     
  291 |     void AdjustByMarketContext(double &weights[])
  292 |     {
  293 |         // Điều chỉnh dựa trên điều kiện thị trường
  294 |         if(m_marketContext.regime == REGIME_TRENDING_BULLISH || m_marketContext.regime == REGIME_TRENDING_BEARISH) {
  295 |             // Thị trường trending - tăng trọng số Dragon và Structure
  296 |             weights[0] += 0.05; // Dragon Band
  297 |             weights[2] += 0.03; // Structure
  298 |             weights[1] -= 0.04; // Wave (ít hiệu quả trong trending)
  299 |             weights[3] -= 0.04; // PVSRA
  300 |         } else if(m_marketContext.regime == REGIME_RANGING) {
  301 |             // Thị trường ranging - tăng trọng số Wave và PVSRA
  302 |             weights[1] += 0.05; // Wave Pattern
  303 |             weights[3] += 0.03; // PVSRA
  304 |             weights[0] -= 0.04; // Dragon Band
  305 |             weights[2] -= 0.04; // Structure
  306 |         }
  307 |         
  308 |         // Điều chỉnh theo volatility
  309 |         if(m_marketContext.volatility > 0.7) {
  310 |             // High volatility - tăng trọng số Structure và PVSRA
  311 |             weights[2] += 0.03;
  312 |             weights[3] += 0.02;
  313 |             weights[0] -= 0.025;
  314 |             weights[1] -= 0.025;
  315 |         }
  316 |     }
  317 |     
  318 |     void AdjustByHybridMethod(double &weights[])
  319 |     {
  320 |         // Kết hợp performance và market context
  321 |         double performanceWeights[4];
  322 |         double marketWeights[4];
  323 |         
  324 |         ArrayCopy(performanceWeights, weights);
  325 |         ArrayCopy(marketWeights, weights);
  326 |         
  327 |         AdjustByPerformance(performanceWeights);
  328 |         AdjustByMarketContext(marketWeights);
  329 |         
  330 |         // Kết hợp với tỷ lệ 60% performance, 40% market
  331 |         for(int i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
  332 |             weights[i] = weights[i] * 0.0 + performanceWeights[i] * 0.6 + marketWeights[i] * 0.4;
  333 |         }
  334 |     }
  335 |     
  336 |     void AdjustConservatively(double &weights[])
  337 |     {
  338 |         // Điều chỉnh nhẹ nhàng, ưu tiên ổn định
  339 |         double adjustmentFactor = m_adaptationRate * 0.5; // Giảm tốc độ thích ứng
  340 |         
  341 |         for(int i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
  342 |             double performance = m_componentPerformance[i].reliability;
  343 |             double deviation = performance - 0.5;
  344 |             weights[i] += deviation * adjustmentFactor;
  345 |         }
  346 |     }
  347 |     
  348 |     void AdjustAggressively(double &weights[])
  349 |     {
  350 |         // Điều chỉnh mạnh mẽ, phản ứng nhanh
  351 |         double adjustmentFactor = m_adaptationRate * 2.0; // Tăng tốc độ thích ứng
  352 |         
  353 |         for(int i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
  354 |             double performance = m_componentPerformance[i].reliability;
  355 |             
  356 |             if(performance > 0.8) {
  357 |                 weights[i] += 0.1; // Tăng mạnh cho performance xuất sắc
  358 |             } else if(performance < 0.3) {
  359 |                 weights[i] -= 0.1; // Giảm mạnh cho performance kém
  360 |             }
  361 |         }
  362 |     }
  363 |     
  364 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  365 |     //| 🔧 UTILITY FUNCTIONS                                           |
  366 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  367 |     void ApplyWeightAdjustments(double &newWeights[])
  368 |     {
  369 |         // Normalize weights to ensure sum = 1.0
  370 |         NormalizeWeights(newWeights);
  371 |         
  372 |         // Apply limits
  373 |         for(int i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
  374 |             newWeights[i] = MathMax(m_minWeights[i], MathMin(m_maxWeights[i], newWeights[i]));
  375 |         }
  376 |         
  377 |         // Re-normalize after applying limits
  378 |         NormalizeWeights(newWeights);
  379 |         
  380 |         // Apply with adaptation rate
  381 |         for(int i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
  382 |             double change = newWeights[i] - m_currentWeights[i];
  383 |             m_currentWeights[i] += change * m_adaptationRate;
  384 |             m_totalAdjustment += MathAbs(change);
  385 |         }
  386 |         
  387 |         // Final normalization
  388 |         NormalizeWeights(m_currentWeights);
  389 |     }
  390 |     
  391 |     void NormalizeWeights(double &weights[])
  392 |     {
  393 |         double sum = 0.0;
  394 |         for(int i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
  395 |             sum += weights[i];
  396 |         }
  397 |         
  398 |         if(sum > 0.0) {
  399 |             for(int i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
  400 |                 weights[i] /= sum;
  401 |             }
  402 |         }
  403 |     }
  404 |     
  405 |     bool ShouldAdjustWeights()
  406 |     {
  407 |         // Check time since last adjustment
  408 |         if(TimeCurrent() - m_lastAdjustment < 300) return false; // Min 5 minutes
  409 |         
  410 |         // Check if any component has significant performance change
  411 |         for(int i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
  412 |             if(m_componentPerformance[i].totalSignals >= 5) {
  413 |                 double performance = m_componentPerformance[i].reliability;
  414 |                 if(performance > 0.8 || performance < 0.3) {
  415 |                     return true; // Significant performance detected
  416 |                 }
  417 |             }
  418 |         }
  419 |         
  420 |         return false;
  421 |     }
  422 |     
  423 |     bool ValidateConfiguration()
  424 |     {
  425 |         // Check weight limits
  426 |         double minSum = 0.0, maxSum = 0.0;
  427 |         for(int i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
  428 |             minSum += m_minWeights[i];
  429 |             maxSum += m_maxWeights[i];
  430 |             if(m_minWeights[i] >= m_maxWeights[i]) return false;
  431 |         }
  432 |         
  433 |         return (minSum <= 1.0 && maxSum >= 1.0);
  434 |     }
  435 |     
  436 |     ENUM_TRADING_SESSION GetCurrentTradingSession()
  437 |     {
  438 |         // Simplified session detection
  439 |         MqlDateTime dt;
  440 |         TimeToStruct(TimeCurrent(), dt);
  441 |         int hour = dt.hour;
  442 |         
  443 |         if(hour >= 0 && hour < 9) return SESSION_ASIAN;
  444 |         else if(hour >= 9 && hour < 17) return SESSION_LONDON;
  445 |         else return SESSION_NY;
  446 |     }
  447 |     
  448 |     bool IsNewsTime()
  449 |     {
  450 |         // Simplified news time detection
  451 |         MqlDateTime dt;
  452 |         TimeToStruct(TimeCurrent(), dt);
  453 |         
  454 |         // Assume news times: 8:30, 10:00, 14:30, 16:00 GMT
  455 |         int minute = dt.hour * 60 + dt.min;
  456 |         int newsTimes[] = {510, 600, 870, 960}; // In minutes
  457 |         
  458 |         for(int i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
  459 |             if(MathAbs(minute - newsTimes[i]) <= 30) return true;
  460 |         }
  461 |         
  462 |         return false;
  463 |     }
  464 |     
  465 |     double CalculateMarketStrength()
  466 |     {
  467 |         // Simplified market strength calculation
  468 |         return (m_marketContext.volatility + m_marketContext.volume) / 2.0;
  469 |     }
  470 |     
  471 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  472 |     //| 📊 GETTERS                                                      |
  473 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  474 |     void GetCurrentWeights(double &weights[])
  475 |     {
  476 |         ArrayCopy(weights, m_currentWeights);
  477 |     }
  478 |     
  479 |     double GetComponentWeight(int index)
  480 |     {
  481 |         if(index >= 0 && index < 4) return m_currentWeights[index];
  482 |         return 0.0;
  483 |     }
  484 |     
  485 |     SComponentPerformance GetComponentPerformance(int index)
  486 |     {
  487 |         if(index >= 0 && index < 4) return m_componentPerformance[index];
  488 |         SComponentPerformance empty;
  489 |         empty.Reset();
  490 |         return empty;
  491 |     }
  492 |     
  493 |     string GetAdjustmentReport()
  494 |     {
  495 |         return StringFormat(
  496 |             "🧠 Weight Adjuster Report:\n" +
  497 |             "Strategy: %s | Adjustments: %d | Total Change: %.3f\n" +
  498 |             "Dragon: %.1f%% (Perf: %.1f%%) | Wave: %.1f%% (Perf: %.1f%%)\n" +
  499 |             "Structure: %.1f%% (Perf: %.1f%%) | PVSRA: %.1f%% (Perf: %.1f%%)",
  500 |             WeightStrategyToString(m_strategy), m_adjustmentCount, m_totalAdjustment,
  501 |             m_currentWeights[0]*100, m_componentPerformance[0].reliability*100,
  502 |             m_currentWeights[1]*100, m_componentPerformance[1].reliability*100,
  503 |             m_currentWeights[2]*100, m_componentPerformance[2].reliability*100,
  504 |             m_currentWeights[3]*100, m_componentPerformance[3].reliability*100
  505 |         );
  506 |     }
  507 |     
  508 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  509 |     //| ⚙️ CONFIGURATION                                               |
  510 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  511 |     void SetStrategy(ENUM_WEIGHT_STRATEGY strategy) { m_strategy = strategy; }
  512 |     void SetAdaptationRate(double rate) { m_adaptationRate = MathMax(0.01, MathMin(1.0, rate)); }
  513 |     void EnableAdaptation(bool enable) { m_enableAdaptation = enable; }
  514 |     void ResetToBaseWeights() { ArrayCopy(m_currentWeights, m_baseWeights); }
  515 | };

  126 | 
  127 | // Initialize trade manager
  128 | bool Initialize(CEaContext* context, double lotSize = 0.01, int slippage = 3, int magic = 12345, double maxRisk = 2.0) {
  129 | m_pContext = context;
  130 | // 🎯 BOSS'S CRITICAL FIX: Allow NULL context and use default symbol
  131 | if (m_pContext != NULL) {
  132 | m_symbol = (m_pContext.symbol != "") ? m_pContext.symbol : _Symbol;
  133 | } else {
  134 | m_symbol = _Symbol;  // Use current chart symbol when context is NULL
  135 | }
  136 | m_lotSize = lotSize;
  137 | m_slippage = slippage;
  138 | m_magicNumber = magic;
  139 | m_maxRiskPercent = maxRisk;
  140 | // Initialize symbol info
  141 | if(!m_symbolInfo.Name(m_symbol)) {
  142 | Print("TradeManager ERROR: Failed to initialize symbol: " + m_symbol);
  143 | return false;
  144 | }
  145 | 
  146 | // Set trade parameters
  147 | m_trade.SetExpertMagicNumber(m_magicNumber);
  148 | m_trade.SetMarginMode();
  149 | m_trade.SetTypeFillingBySymbol(m_symbol);
  150 | m_trade.SetDeviationInPoints(m_slippage);
  151 | 
  152 | // Refresh symbol info
  153 | if(!m_symbolInfo.RefreshRates()) {
  154 | Print("TradeManager ERROR: Failed to refresh rates for: " + m_symbol);
  155 | return false;
  156 | }
  157 | 
  158 | m_isInitialized = true;
  159 | 
  160 | Print("TradeManager INFO: Trade Manager initialized for " + m_symbol);
  161 | Print("TradeManager INFO: Magic Number: " + IntegerToString(m_magicNumber));
  162 | 
  163 | return true;
  164 | }
  165 | 
  166 | // Open buy position
  167 | bool OpenBuy(double volume, double price = 0.0, double sl = 0.0, double tp = 0.0, string comment = NULL) {
  168 | if(!m_isInitialized) {
  169 | Print("TradeManager ERROR: Trade Manager not initialized");
  170 | return false;
  171 | }
  172 | 
  173 | // Validate volume
  174 | volume = NormalizeVolume(volume);
  175 | if(volume <= 0) {
  176 | Print("TradeManager ERROR: Invalid volume: " + DoubleToString(volume, 2));
  177 | return false;
  178 | }
  179 | 
  180 | // Use market price if not specified
  181 | if(price <= 0.0) {
  182 | price = m_symbolInfo.Ask();
  183 | }
  184 | 
  185 | // Normalize prices
  186 | price = m_symbolInfo.NormalizePrice(price);
  187 | if(sl > 0) sl = m_symbolInfo.NormalizePrice(sl);
  188 | if(tp > 0) tp = m_symbolInfo.NormalizePrice(tp);
  189 | 
  190 | // Set comment
  191 | string tradeComment = (comment == "") ? m_comment : comment;
  192 | 
  193 | // 🎯 BOSS FIX: Log trade rationale BEFORE execution
  194 | LogTradeRationale("BUY", volume, price, sl, tp, tradeComment);
  195 | 
  196 | // Execute trade
  197 | bool result = m_trade.Buy(volume, m_symbol, price, sl, tp, tradeComment);
  198 | 
  199 | if(result) {
  200 | m_totalTrades++;
  201 | g_lastTradeTime = TimeCurrent();
  202 | g_lastTradeBarOpen = iTime(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0);
  203 | Print("TradeManager TRADE: BUY " + m_symbol + " " + DoubleToString(volume,2) + " " + DoubleToString(price,5) + " " + tradeComment);
  204 | Print("TradeManager INFO: Buy order executed successfully. Ticket: " + IntegerToString(m_trade.ResultOrder()));
  205 | } else {
  206 | Print("TradeManager ERROR: Failed to open buy position. Error: " + IntegerToString(GetLastError()));
  207 | Print("TradeManager ERROR: Trade result: " + IntegerToString(m_trade.ResultRetcode()) + " - " + m_trade.ResultComment());
  208 | }
  209 | 
  210 | return result;
  211 | }
  212 | 
  213 | // Open sell position
  214 | bool OpenSell(double volume, double price = 0.0, double sl = 0.0, double tp = 0.0, string comment = NULL) {
  215 | if(!m_isInitialized) {
  216 | Print("TradeManager ERROR: Trade Manager not initialized");
  217 | return false;
  218 | }
  219 | 
  220 | // Validate volume
  221 | volume = NormalizeVolume(volume);
  222 | if(volume <= 0) {
  223 | Print("TradeManager ERROR: Invalid volume: " + DoubleToString(volume, 2));
  224 | return false;
  225 | }
  226 | 
  227 | // Use market price if not specified
  228 | if(price <= 0.0) {
  229 | price = m_symbolInfo.Bid();
  230 | }
  231 | 
  232 | // Normalize prices
  233 | price = m_symbolInfo.NormalizePrice(price);
  234 | if(sl > 0) sl = m_symbolInfo.NormalizePrice(sl);
  235 | if(tp > 0) tp = m_symbolInfo.NormalizePrice(tp);
  236 | 
  237 | // Set comment
  238 | string tradeComment = (comment == "") ? m_comment : comment;
  239 | 
  240 | // 🎯 BOSS FIX: Log trade rationale BEFORE execution
  241 | LogTradeRationale("SELL", volume, price, sl, tp, tradeComment);
  242 | 
  243 | // Execute trade
  244 | bool result = m_trade.Sell(volume, m_symbol, price, sl, tp, tradeComment);
  245 | 
  246 | if(result) {
  247 | m_totalTrades++;
  248 | g_lastTradeTime = TimeCurrent();
  249 | g_lastTradeBarOpen = iTime(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0);
  250 | Print("TradeManager TRADE: SELL " + m_symbol + " " + DoubleToString(volume,2) + " " + DoubleToString(price,5) + " " + tradeComment);
  251 | Print("TradeManager INFO: Sell order executed successfully. Ticket: " + IntegerToString(m_trade.ResultOrder()));
  252 | } else {
  253 | Print("TradeManager ERROR: Failed to open sell position. Error: " + IntegerToString(GetLastError()));
  254 | Print("TradeManager ERROR: Trade result: " + IntegerToString(m_trade.ResultRetcode()) + " - " + m_trade.ResultComment());
  255 | }
  256 | 
  257 | return result;
  258 | }
  259 | 
  260 | // Execute a trade based on a signal
  261 | bool ExecuteTrade(const SSignalInfo &signal, double volume) {
  262 | if(signal.Direction == SIGNAL_TYPE_BUY) {
  263 | return OpenBuy(volume, 0, signal.StopLoss, signal.TakeProfit, signal.Comment);
  264 | }
  265 | if(signal.Direction == SIGNAL_TYPE_SELL) {
  266 | return OpenSell(volume, 0, signal.StopLoss, signal.TakeProfit, signal.Comment);
  267 | }
  268 | return false;
  269 | }
  270 | 
  271 | // Manage all open positions
  272 | void ManagePositions() {
  273 | // Enhanced position management with trailing stops and early exit
  274 | for(int i = 0; i < PositionsTotal(); i++) {
  275 | if(m_positionInfo.SelectByIndex(i)) {
  276 | if(m_positionInfo.Symbol() == m_symbol && m_positionInfo.Magic() == m_magicNumber) {
  277 | ulong ticket = m_positionInfo.Ticket();
  278 | 
  279 | // Apply trailing stop
  280 | if(m_trailingStopEnabled) {
  281 | ApplyTrailingStop(ticket);
  282 | }
  283 | 
  284 | // Apply break-even
  285 | if(m_breakEvenEnabled) {
  286 | ApplyBreakEven(ticket);
  287 | }
  288 | 
  289 | // Check early exit conditions
  290 | if(m_earlyExitEnabled) {
  291 | CheckEarlyExit(ticket);
  292 | }
  293 | }
  294 | }
  295 | }
  296 | }
  297 | 
  298 | // PRODUCTION FIX: Add ManageOpenPositions as wrapper for compatibility
  299 | void ManageOpenPositions() {
  300 | ManagePositions();
  301 | }
  302 | 
  303 | // Close position by ticket
  304 | bool ClosePosition(ulong ticket) {
  305 | if(!m_positionInfo.SelectByTicket(ticket)) {
  306 | Print("TradeManager ERROR: Position not found: " + IntegerToString(ticket));
  307 | return false;
  308 | }
  309 | 
  310 | bool result = m_trade.PositionClose(ticket);
  311 | 
  312 | if(result) {
  313 | Print("TradeManager INFO: Position closed successfully. Ticket: " + IntegerToString(ticket));
  314 | } else {
  315 | Print("TradeManager ERROR: Failed to close position: " + IntegerToString(ticket));
  316 | Print("TradeManager ERROR: Trade result: " + IntegerToString(m_trade.ResultRetcode()) + " - " + m_trade.ResultComment());
  317 | }
  318 | 
  319 | return result;
  320 | }
  321 | 
  322 | // Close all positions for this symbol and magic number
  323 | int CloseAllPositions() {
  324 | int closedCount = 0;
  325 | 
  326 | for(int i = PositionsTotal() - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
  327 | if(m_positionInfo.SelectByIndex(i)) {
  328 | if(m_positionInfo.Symbol() == m_symbol && m_positionInfo.Magic() == m_magicNumber) {
  329 | if(ClosePosition(m_positionInfo.Ticket())) {
  330 | closedCount++;
  331 | }
  332 | }
  333 | }
  334 | }
  335 | 
  336 | if(closedCount > 0) {
  337 | Print("TradeManager INFO: Closed " + IntegerToString(closedCount) + " positions");
  338 | }
  339 | 
  340 | return closedCount;
  341 | }
  342 | 
  343 | // Modify position
  344 | bool ModifyPosition(ulong ticket, double sl, double tp) {
  345 | if(!m_positionInfo.SelectByTicket(ticket)) {
  346 | Print("TradeManager ERROR: Position not found: " + IntegerToString(ticket));
  347 | return false;
  348 | }
  349 | 
  350 | // Normalize prices
  351 | if(sl > 0) sl = m_symbolInfo.NormalizePrice(sl);
  352 | if(tp > 0) tp = m_symbolInfo.NormalizePrice(tp);
  353 | 
  354 | bool result = m_trade.PositionModify(ticket, sl, tp);
  355 | 
  356 | if(result) {
  357 | Print("TradeManager INFO: Position modified. Ticket: " + IntegerToString(ticket));
  358 | } else {
  359 | Print("TradeManager ERROR: Failed to modify position: " + IntegerToString(ticket));
  360 | Print("TradeManager ERROR: Trade result: " + IntegerToString(m_trade.ResultRetcode()) + " - " + m_trade.ResultComment());
  361 | }
  362 | 
  363 | return result;
  364 | }
  365 | 
  366 | // Calculate position size based on risk
  367 | double CalculatePositionSize(double riskPercent, double entryPrice, double stopLoss) {
  368 | if(riskPercent <= 0 || entryPrice <= 0 || stopLoss <= 0) {
  369 | return m_minLotSize;
  370 | }
  371 | 
  372 | double balance = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_BALANCE);
  373 | double riskAmount = balance * (riskPercent / 100.0);
  374 | 
  375 | double pointValue = m_symbolInfo.TickValue();
  376 | double stopLossPoints = MathAbs(entryPrice - stopLoss) / m_symbolInfo.Point();
  377 | 
  378 | double lotSize = riskAmount / (stopLossPoints * pointValue);
  379 | 
  380 | // Normalize and validate lot size
  381 | lotSize = NormalizeVolume(lotSize);
  382 | 
  383 | Print("TradeManager DEBUG: Position size calculated: " + DoubleToString(lotSize, 2));
  384 | 
  385 | return lotSize;
  386 | }
  387 | 
  388 | // Normalize volume according to symbol specifications
  389 | double NormalizeVolume(double volume) {
  390 | double minLot = m_symbolInfo.LotsMin();
  391 | double maxLot = m_symbolInfo.LotsMax();
  392 | double stepLot = m_symbolInfo.LotsStep();
  393 | 
  394 | if(volume < minLot) volume = minLot;
  395 | if(volume > maxLot) volume = maxLot;
  396 | if(volume > m_maxLotSize) volume = m_maxLotSize;
  397 | 
  398 | // Round to step
  399 | volume = MathRound(volume / stepLot) * stepLot;
  400 | 
  401 | return volume;
  402 | }
  403 | 
  404 | // Get current positions count
  405 | int GetPositionsCount() {
  406 | int count = 0;
  407 | 
  408 | for(int i = 0; i < PositionsTotal(); i++) {
  409 | if(m_positionInfo.SelectByIndex(i)) {
  410 | if(m_positionInfo.Symbol() == m_symbol && m_positionInfo.Magic() == m_magicNumber) {
  411 | count++;
  412 | }
  413 | }
  414 | }
  415 | 
  416 | return count;
  417 | }
  418 | 
  419 | // Get total profit of open positions
  420 | double GetTotalProfit() {
  421 | double totalProfit = 0.0;
  422 | 
  423 | for(int i = 0; i < PositionsTotal(); i++) {
  424 | if(m_positionInfo.SelectByIndex(i)) {
  425 | if(m_positionInfo.Symbol() == m_symbol && m_positionInfo.Magic() == m_magicNumber) {
  426 | totalProfit += m_positionInfo.Profit();
  427 | }
  428 | }
  429 | }
  430 | 
  431 | return totalProfit;
  432 | }
  433 | 
  434 | // Check if trading is allowed
  435 | bool IsTradingAllowed() {
  436 | if(!m_isInitialized) return false;
  437 | 
  438 | // Check if trading is allowed for the account
  439 | if(!AccountInfoInteger(ACCOUNT_TRADE_ALLOWED)) {
  440 | Print("TradeManager WARNING: Trading not allowed for account");
  441 | return false;
  442 | }
  443 | 
  444 | // Check if trading is allowed for the symbol
  445 | if(m_symbolInfo.TradeMode() == SYMBOL_TRADE_MODE_DISABLED) {
  446 | Print("TradeManager WARNING: Trading not allowed for symbol: " + m_symbol);
  447 | return false;
  448 | }
  449 | 
  450 | // Check market hours (already checked above)
  451 | // Additional time-based checks can be added here if needed
  452 | 
  453 | return true;
  454 | }
  455 | 
  456 | // Getters
  457 | bool IsInitialized() { return m_isInitialized; }
  458 | string GetSymbol() { return m_symbol; }
  459 | int GetMagicNumber() { return m_magicNumber; }
  460 | int GetTotalTrades() { return m_totalTrades; }
  461 | int GetWinningTrades() { return m_winningTrades; }
  462 | int GetLosingTrades() { return m_losingTrades; }
  463 | double GetTotalProfitAmount() { return m_totalProfit; }
  464 | double GetTotalLossAmount() { return m_totalLoss; }
