  467 | void SetLotSize(double lotSize) { m_lotSize = NormalizeVolume(lotSize); }
  468 | void SetSlippage(int slippage) { m_slippage = slippage; m_trade.SetDeviationInPoints(slippage); }
  469 | void SetComment(string comment) { m_comment = comment; }
  470 | void SetMaxRisk(double riskPercent) { m_maxRiskPercent = riskPercent; }
  471 | void SetMaxLotSize(double maxLot) { m_maxLotSize = maxLot; }
  472 | 
  473 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  474 | //| 🎯 BOSS FIX: TRAILING STOP & EARLY EXIT MECHANISMS             |
  475 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  476 | 
  477 | /**
  478 | * @brief Cập nhật trailing stop cho tất cả positions
  479 | * @note Được gọi từ OnTick() để theo dõi liên tục
  480 | */
  481 | void UpdateTrailingStops() {
  482 | if(!m_trailingStopEnabled) return;
  483 | 
  484 | for(int i = 0; i < PositionsTotal(); i++) {
  485 | if(m_positionInfo.SelectByIndex(i)) {
  486 | if(m_positionInfo.Symbol() == m_symbol && m_positionInfo.Magic() == m_magicNumber) {
  487 | UpdatePositionTrailingStop(m_positionInfo.Ticket());
  488 | }
  489 | }
  490 | }
  491 | }
  492 | 
  493 | /**
  494 | * @brief Cập nhật trailing stop cho một position cụ thể
  495 | * @param ticket Ticket của position
  496 | * @return true nếu cập nhật thành công
  497 | */
  498 | bool UpdatePositionTrailingStop(ulong ticket) {
  499 | if(!m_positionInfo.SelectByTicket(ticket)) return false;
  500 | 
  501 | double currentPrice = (m_positionInfo.PositionType() == POSITION_TYPE_BUY) ? 
  502 | m_symbolInfo.Bid() : m_symbolInfo.Ask();
  503 | double entryPrice = m_positionInfo.PriceOpen();
  504 | double currentSL = m_positionInfo.StopLoss();
  505 | double newSL = 0.0;
  506 | 
  507 | double trailingDistance = m_trailingStopDistance * _Point;
  508 | double stepSize = m_trailingStepSize * _Point;
  509 | 
  510 | if(m_positionInfo.PositionType() == POSITION_TYPE_BUY) {
  511 | // BUY position trailing stop
  512 | newSL = currentPrice - trailingDistance;
  513 | 
  514 | // Only move SL up, never down
  515 | if(currentSL == 0.0 || newSL > currentSL + stepSize) {
  516 | newSL = m_symbolInfo.NormalizePrice(newSL);
  517 | 
  518 | if(m_trade.PositionModify(ticket, newSL, m_positionInfo.TakeProfit())) {
  519 | Print(StringFormat("[TRAILING] BUY position %d: SL moved from %.5f to %.5f", 
  520 | ticket, currentSL, newSL));
  521 | return true;
  522 | }
  523 | }
  524 | } else {
  525 | // SELL position trailing stop
  526 | newSL = currentPrice + trailingDistance;
  527 | 
  528 | // Only move SL down, never up
  529 | if(currentSL == 0.0 || newSL < currentSL - stepSize) {
  530 | newSL = m_symbolInfo.NormalizePrice(newSL);
  531 | 
  532 | if(m_trade.PositionModify(ticket, newSL, m_positionInfo.TakeProfit())) {
  533 | Print(StringFormat("[TRAILING] SELL position %d: SL moved from %.5f to %.5f", 
  534 | ticket, currentSL, newSL));
  535 | return true;
  536 | }
  537 | }
  538 | }
  539 | 
  540 | return false;
  541 | }
  542 | 
  543 | /**
  544 | * @brief Kiểm tra và thực hiện break-even stop
  545 | * @param ticket Ticket của position
  546 | * @return true nếu break-even được kích hoạt
  547 | */
  548 | bool CheckAndSetBreakEven(ulong ticket) {
  549 | if(!m_breakEvenEnabled) return false;
  550 | if(!m_positionInfo.SelectByTicket(ticket)) return false;
  551 | 
  552 | double currentPrice = (m_positionInfo.PositionType() == POSITION_TYPE_BUY) ? 
  553 | m_symbolInfo.Bid() : m_symbolInfo.Ask();
  554 | double entryPrice = m_positionInfo.PriceOpen();
  555 | double currentSL = m_positionInfo.StopLoss();
  556 | 
  557 | double triggerDistance = m_breakEvenTrigger * _Point;
  558 | double offsetDistance = m_breakEvenOffset * _Point;
  559 | 
  560 | bool shouldSetBreakEven = false;
  561 | double newSL = 0.0;
  562 | 
  563 | if(m_positionInfo.PositionType() == POSITION_TYPE_BUY) {
  564 | // BUY position break-even
  565 | if(currentPrice >= entryPrice + triggerDistance) {
  566 | newSL = entryPrice + offsetDistance;
  567 | shouldSetBreakEven = (currentSL < newSL);
  568 | }
  569 | } else {
  570 | // SELL position break-even
  571 | if(currentPrice <= entryPrice - triggerDistance) {
  572 | newSL = entryPrice - offsetDistance;
  573 | shouldSetBreakEven = (currentSL > newSL || currentSL == 0.0);
  574 | }
  575 | }
  576 | 
  577 | if(shouldSetBreakEven) {
  578 | newSL = m_symbolInfo.NormalizePrice(newSL);
  579 | 
  580 | if(m_trade.PositionModify(ticket, newSL, m_positionInfo.TakeProfit())) {
  581 | Print(StringFormat("[BREAK-EVEN] Position %d: SL set to break-even at %.5f", 
  582 | ticket, newSL));
  583 | return true;
  584 | }
  585 | }
  586 | 
  587 | return false;
  588 | }
  589 | 
  590 | /**
  591 | * @brief Kiểm tra điều kiện early exit
  592 | * @note Kiểm tra thời gian, profit target, và market regime changes
  593 | */
  594 | void CheckEarlyExitConditions() {
  595 | if(!m_earlyExitEnabled) return;
  596 | 
  597 | for(int i = 0; i < PositionsTotal(); i++) {
  598 | if(m_positionInfo.SelectByIndex(i)) {
  599 | if(m_positionInfo.Symbol() == m_symbol && m_positionInfo.Magic() == m_magicNumber) {
  600 | CheckPositionEarlyExit(m_positionInfo.Ticket());
  601 | }
  602 | }
  603 | }
  604 | }
  605 | 
  606 | /**
  607 | * @brief Kiểm tra early exit cho một position cụ thể
  608 | * @param ticket Ticket của position
  609 | * @return true nếu position được đóng sớm
  610 | */
  611 | bool CheckPositionEarlyExit(ulong ticket) {
  612 | if(!m_positionInfo.SelectByTicket(ticket)) return false;
  613 | 
  614 | datetime openTime = (datetime)m_positionInfo.Time();
  615 | datetime currentTime = TimeCurrent();
  616 | double currentProfit = m_positionInfo.Profit();
  617 | 
  618 | // Kiểm tra time limit
  619 | if((currentTime - openTime) >= m_earlyExitTimeLimit * 60) {
  620 | if(currentProfit > 0) {
  621 | Print(StringFormat("[EARLY EXIT] Position %d closed due to time limit with profit %.2f", 
  622 | ticket, currentProfit));
  623 | return m_trade.PositionClose(ticket);
  624 | }
  625 | }
  626 | 
  627 | // Kiểm tra profit target
  628 | double entryPrice = m_positionInfo.PriceOpen();
  629 | double currentPrice = (m_positionInfo.PositionType() == POSITION_TYPE_BUY) ? 
  630 | m_symbolInfo.Bid() : m_symbolInfo.Ask();
  631 | 
  632 | double profitPips = 0.0;
  633 | if(m_positionInfo.PositionType() == POSITION_TYPE_BUY) {
  634 | profitPips = (currentPrice - entryPrice) / _Point;
  635 | } else {
  636 | profitPips = (entryPrice - currentPrice) / _Point;
  637 | }
  638 | 
  639 | if(profitPips >= m_earlyExitProfitTarget) {
  640 | Print(StringFormat("[EARLY EXIT] Position %d closed at profit target: %.1f pips", 
  641 | ticket, profitPips));
  642 | return m_trade.PositionClose(ticket);
  643 | }
  644 | 
  645 | // Kiểm tra volatility spike (early exit condition)
  646 | if(IsVolatilitySpike()) {
  647 | Print(StringFormat("[EARLY EXIT] Position %d closed due to volatility spike", ticket));
  648 | return m_trade.PositionClose(ticket);
  649 | }
  650 | 
  651 | return false;
  652 | }
  653 | 
  654 | /**
  655 | * @brief Kiểm tra volatility spike
  656 | * @return true nếu có volatility spike
  657 | */
  658 | bool IsVolatilitySpike() {
  659 | int atrHandle = iATR(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 14);
  660 | double atrBuffer[];
  661 | ArrayResize(atrBuffer, 2);
  662 | ArraySetAsSeries(atrBuffer, true);
  663 | 
  664 | if(CopyBuffer(atrHandle, 0, 0, 2, atrBuffer) < 2) {
  665 | IndicatorRelease(atrHandle);
  666 | return false;
  667 | }
  668 | 
  669 | IndicatorRelease(atrHandle);
  670 | 
  671 | // Volatility spike nếu ATR hiện tại > 150% ATR trước đó
  672 | return (atrBuffer[0] > atrBuffer[1] * 1.5);
  673 | }
  674 | 
  675 | /**
  676 | * @brief Cập nhật tất cả position management
  677 | * @note Gọi từ OnTick() để quản lý positions
  678 | */
  679 | void UpdatePositionManagement() {
  680 | UpdateTrailingStops();
  681 | CheckEarlyExitConditions();
  682 | 
  683 | // Kiểm tra break-even cho tất cả positions
  684 | for(int i = 0; i < PositionsTotal(); i++) {
  685 | if(m_positionInfo.SelectByIndex(i)) {
  686 | if(m_positionInfo.Symbol() == m_symbol && m_positionInfo.Magic() == m_magicNumber) {
  687 | CheckAndSetBreakEven(m_positionInfo.Ticket());
  688 | }
  689 | }
  690 | }
  691 | }
  692 | 
  693 | // Setters cho trailing stop và early exit
  694 | void SetTrailingStopEnabled(bool enabled) { m_trailingStopEnabled = enabled; }
  695 | void SetTrailingStopDistance(double distance) { m_trailingStopDistance = distance; }
  696 | void SetTrailingStepSize(double stepSize) { m_trailingStepSize = stepSize; }
  697 | void SetEarlyExitEnabled(bool enabled) { m_earlyExitEnabled = enabled; }
  698 | void SetEarlyExitProfitTarget(double target) { m_earlyExitProfitTarget = target; }
  699 | void SetEarlyExitTimeLimit(double timeLimit) { m_earlyExitTimeLimit = timeLimit; }
  700 | void SetBreakEvenEnabled(bool enabled) { m_breakEvenEnabled = enabled; }
  701 | void SetBreakEvenTrigger(double trigger) { m_breakEvenTrigger = trigger; }
  702 | void SetBreakEvenOffset(double offset) { m_breakEvenOffset = offset; }
  703 | 
  704 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  705 | //| PHASE 2 ENHANCEMENT: Correlation Matrix & Scout Before Methods  |
  706 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  707 | 
  708 | // Initialize major currency pairs
  709 | void InitializeMajorPairs() {
  710 | m_majorPairs[0] = "EURUSD"; m_majorPairs[1] = "GBPUSD"; m_majorPairs[2] = "USDJPY";
  711 | m_majorPairs[3] = "USDCHF"; m_majorPairs[4] = "AUDUSD"; m_majorPairs[5] = "USDCAD";
  712 | m_majorPairs[6] = "NZDUSD"; m_majorPairs[7] = "EURGBP"; m_majorPairs[8] = "EURJPY";
  713 | m_majorPairs[9] = "EURCHF"; m_majorPairs[10] = "EURAUD"; m_majorPairs[11] = "EURCAD";
  714 | m_majorPairs[12] = "EURNZD"; m_majorPairs[13] = "GBPJPY"; m_majorPairs[14] = "GBPCHF";
  715 | m_majorPairs[15] = "GBPAUD"; m_majorPairs[16] = "GBPCAD"; m_majorPairs[17] = "GBPNZD";
  716 | m_majorPairs[18] = "AUDJPY"; m_majorPairs[19] = "AUDCHF"; m_majorPairs[20] = "AUDCAD";
  717 | m_majorPairs[21] = "AUDNZD"; m_majorPairs[22] = "CADJPY"; m_majorPairs[23] = "CADCHF";
  718 | m_majorPairs[24] = "CHFJPY"; m_majorPairs[25] = "NZDJPY"; m_majorPairs[26] = "NZDCHF";
  719 | m_majorPairs[27] = "NZDCAD";
  720 | }
  721 | 
  722 | // Initialize correlation matrix with default values
  723 | void InitializeCorrelationMatrix() {
  724 | for(int i = 0; i < 28; i++) {
  725 | for(int j = 0; j < 28; j++) {
  726 | if(i == j) {
  727 | m_correlationMatrix[i][j] = 1.0;  // Perfect correlation with itself
  728 | } else {
  729 | m_correlationMatrix[i][j] = 0.0;  // Default no correlation
  730 | }
  731 | }
  732 | }
  733 | }
  734 | 
  735 | // Update correlation matrix with real-time data
  736 | void UpdateCorrelationMatrix() {
  737 | // Calculate correlation for last 100 bars
  738 | int period = 100;
  739 | 
  740 | for(int i = 0; i < 28; i++) {
  741 | for(int j = i + 1; j < 28; j++) {
  742 | double correlation = CalculatePairCorrelation(m_majorPairs[i], m_majorPairs[j], period);
  743 | m_correlationMatrix[i][j] = correlation;
  744 | m_correlationMatrix[j][i] = correlation;  // Symmetric matrix
  745 | }
  746 | }
  747 | }
  748 | 
  749 | // Calculate correlation between two currency pairs
  750 | double CalculatePairCorrelation(string pair1, string pair2, int period) {
  751 | double returns1[], returns2[];
  752 | ArrayResize(returns1, period);
  753 | ArrayResize(returns2, period);
  754 | 
  755 | // Get price data for both pairs
  756 | for(int i = 0; i < period; i++) {
  757 | double close1_current = iClose(pair1, PERIOD_H1, i);
  758 | double close1_previous = iClose(pair1, PERIOD_H1, i + 1);
  759 | double close2_current = iClose(pair2, PERIOD_H1, i);
  760 | double close2_previous = iClose(pair2, PERIOD_H1, i + 1);
  761 | 
  762 | if(close1_previous > 0 && close2_previous > 0) {
  763 | returns1[i] = (close1_current - close1_previous) / close1_previous;
  764 | returns2[i] = (close2_current - close2_previous) / close2_previous;
  765 | } else {
  766 | returns1[i] = 0.0;
  767 | returns2[i] = 0.0;
  768 | }
  769 | }
  770 | 
  771 | // Calculate Pearson correlation coefficient
  772 | return CalculatePearsonCorrelation(returns1, returns2, period);
  773 | }
  774 | 
  775 | // Calculate Pearson correlation coefficient
  776 | double CalculatePearsonCorrelation(const double &x[], const double &y[], int size) {
  777 | if(size < 2) return 0.0;
  778 | 
  779 | double sum_x = 0, sum_y = 0, sum_xy = 0, sum_x2 = 0, sum_y2 = 0;
  780 | 
  781 | for(int i = 0; i < size; i++) {
  782 | sum_x += x[i];
  783 | sum_y += y[i];
  784 | sum_xy += x[i] * y[i];
  785 | sum_x2 += x[i] * x[i];
  786 | sum_y2 += y[i] * y[i];
  787 | }
  788 | 
  789 | double numerator = size * sum_xy - sum_x * sum_y;
  790 | double denominator = MathSqrt((size * sum_x2 - sum_x * sum_x) * (size * sum_y2 - sum_y * sum_y));
  791 | 
  792 | if(denominator == 0) return 0.0;
  793 | 
  794 | return numerator / denominator;
  795 | }
  796 | 
  797 | // Check if trade passes correlation filter
  798 | bool PassesCorrelationFilter(string tradingPair) {
  799 | int pairIndex = GetPairIndex(tradingPair);
  800 | if(pairIndex == -1) return true;  // Unknown pair, allow trade
  801 | 
  802 | // Check correlation with existing positions
  803 | for(int i = 0; i < PositionsTotal(); i++) {
  804 | if(m_positionInfo.SelectByIndex(i)) {
  805 | if(m_positionInfo.Magic() == m_magicNumber) {
  806 | string positionSymbol = m_positionInfo.Symbol();
  807 | int positionIndex = GetPairIndex(positionSymbol);
  808 | 
  809 | if(positionIndex != -1 && positionIndex != pairIndex) {
  810 | double correlation = MathAbs(m_correlationMatrix[pairIndex][positionIndex]);
  811 | 
  812 | if(correlation > m_maxCorrelationThreshold) {
  813 | Print("[CORRELATION FILTER] Trade rejected - High correlation (", 
  814 | DoubleToString(correlation, 3), ") between ", tradingPair, " and ", positionSymbol);
  815 | return false;
  816 | }
  817 | }
  818 | }
  819 | }
  820 | }
  821 | 
  822 | return true;
  823 | }
  824 | 
  825 | // Get pair index in major pairs array
  826 | int GetPairIndex(string pair) {
  827 | for(int i = 0; i < 28; i++) {
  828 | if(m_majorPairs[i] == pair) {
  829 | return i;
  830 | }
  831 | }
  832 | return -1;
  833 | }
  834 | 
  835 | // Scout before functionality - check S&R levels and surge detection
  836 | bool ScoutBeforeEntry(string symbol, ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE signalType, double entryPrice) {
  837 | if(!m_scoutBeforeEnabled) return true;
  838 | 
  839 | // Update S&R levels
  840 | UpdateSupportResistanceLevels(symbol);
  841 | 
  842 | // Check if entry price is near S&R level
  843 | if(!CheckSRLevelClearance(entryPrice, signalType)) {
  844 | Print("[SCOUT BEFORE] Trade rejected - Too close to S&R level");
  845 | return false;
  846 | }
  847 | 
  848 | // Check for surge detection
  849 | if(m_surgeDetectionEnabled && DetectPriceSurge(symbol)) {
  850 | Print("[SCOUT BEFORE] Trade rejected - Price surge detected");
  851 | return false;
  852 | }
  853 | 
  854 | return true;
  855 | }
  856 | 
  857 | // Update Support/Resistance levels
  858 | void UpdateSupportResistanceLevels(string symbol) {
  859 | m_scoutSRCount = 0;
  860 | 
  861 | // Get swing highs and lows from last 200 bars
  862 | int lookback = 200;
  863 | int swingPeriod = 5;
  864 | 
  865 | for(int i = swingPeriod; i < lookback - swingPeriod; i++) {
  866 | double high = iHigh(symbol, PERIOD_H1, i);
  867 | double low = iLow(symbol, PERIOD_H1, i);
  868 | 
  869 | // Check for swing high
  870 | bool isSwingHigh = true;
  871 | for(int j = 1; j <= swingPeriod; j++) {
  872 | if(iHigh(symbol, PERIOD_H1, i - j) >= high || iHigh(symbol, PERIOD_H1, i + j) >= high) {
  873 | isSwingHigh = false;
  874 | break;
  875 | }
  876 | }
  877 | 
  878 | // Check for swing low
  879 | bool isSwingLow = true;
  880 | for(int j = 1; j <= swingPeriod; j++) {
  881 | if(iLow(symbol, PERIOD_H1, i - j) <= low || iLow(symbol, PERIOD_H1, i + j) <= low) {
  882 | isSwingLow = false;
  883 | break;
  884 | }
  885 | }
  886 | 
  887 | // Add to S&R levels if swing point found
  888 | if((isSwingHigh || isSwingLow) && m_scoutSRCount < 100) {
  889 | m_scoutSRLevels[m_scoutSRCount] = isSwingHigh ? high : low;
  890 | m_scoutSRCount++;
  891 | }
  892 | }
  893 | 
  894 | Print("[SCOUT BEFORE] Updated ", m_scoutSRCount, " S&R levels for ", symbol);
  895 | }
  896 | 
  897 | // Check clearance from S&R levels
  898 | bool CheckSRLevelClearance(double entryPrice, ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE signalType) {
  899 | double minDistance = 20 * _Point;  // Minimum 20 pips clearance
  900 | 
  901 | for(int i = 0; i < m_scoutSRCount; i++) {
  902 | double distance = MathAbs(entryPrice - m_scoutSRLevels[i]);
  903 | 
  904 | if(distance < minDistance) {
  905 | return false;
  906 | }
  907 | }
  908 | 
  909 | return true;
  910 | }
  911 | 
  912 | // Detect price surge (abnormal price movement)
  913 | bool DetectPriceSurge(string symbol) {
  914 | // Calculate ATR for volatility reference
  915 | int atrHandle = iATR(symbol, PERIOD_H1, 14);
  916 | double atr[];
  917 | if(CopyBuffer(atrHandle, 0, 1, 1, atr) <= 0) return false;
  918 | double atrValue = atr[0];
  919 | 
  920 | // Get last 3 candles
  921 | double range1 = iHigh(symbol, PERIOD_H1, 1) - iLow(symbol, PERIOD_H1, 1);
  922 | double range2 = iHigh(symbol, PERIOD_H1, 2) - iLow(symbol, PERIOD_H1, 2);
  923 | double range3 = iHigh(symbol, PERIOD_H1, 3) - iLow(symbol, PERIOD_H1, 3);
  924 | 
  925 | // Check if any recent candle is significantly larger than ATR
  926 | double surgeThreshold = atrValue * 2.0;  // 2x ATR threshold
  927 | 
  928 | if(range1 > surgeThreshold || range2 > surgeThreshold || range3 > surgeThreshold) {
  929 | return true;
  930 | }
  931 | 
  932 | return false;
  933 | }
  934 | 
  935 | // Enhanced trade execution with correlation and scout filters
  936 | bool ExecuteTradeEnhanced(const SSignalInfo &signal, double volume) {
  937 | // Phase 2 Enhancement: Apply correlation filter
  938 | if(!PassesCorrelationFilter(m_symbol)) {
  939 | Print("[TRADE ENHANCED] Trade rejected by correlation filter");
  940 | return false;
  941 | }
  942 | 
  943 | // Phase 2 Enhancement: Apply scout before filter
  944 | if(!ScoutBeforeEntry(m_symbol, signal.Direction, signal.EntryPrice)) {
  945 | Print("[TRADE ENHANCED] Trade rejected by scout before filter");
  946 | return false;
  947 | }
  948 | 
  949 | // Update correlation matrix before trade
  950 | UpdateCorrelationMatrix();
  951 | 
  952 | // Execute original trade logic
  953 | return ExecuteTrade(signal, volume);
  954 | }
  955 | 
  956 | // Getters for Phase 2 enhancements
  957 | double GetCorrelationThreshold() { return m_maxCorrelationThreshold; }
  958 | bool IsScoutBeforeEnabled() { return m_scoutBeforeEnabled; }
  959 | bool IsSurgeDetectionEnabled() { return m_surgeDetectionEnabled; }
  960 | int GetSRLevelsCount() { return m_scoutSRCount; }
  961 | 
  962 | // Setters for Phase 2 enhancements
  963 | void SetCorrelationThreshold(double threshold) { m_maxCorrelationThreshold = threshold; }
  964 | void EnableScoutBefore(bool enable) { m_scoutBeforeEnabled = enable; }
  965 | void EnableSurgeDetection(bool enable) { m_surgeDetectionEnabled = enable; }
  966 | 
  967 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  968 | //| TRAILING STOP AND EARLY EXIT METHODS                            |
  969 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  970 | 
  971 | // Apply trailing stop to position
  972 | void ApplyTrailingStop(ulong ticket) {
  973 | if(!m_positionInfo.SelectByTicket(ticket)) return;
  974 | 
  975 | double currentSL = m_positionInfo.StopLoss();
  976 | double entryPrice = m_positionInfo.PriceOpen();
  977 | double currentPrice = (m_positionInfo.PositionType() == POSITION_TYPE_BUY) ? m_symbolInfo.Bid() : m_symbolInfo.Ask();
  978 | 
  979 | double trailingDistance = m_trailingStopDistance * _Point;
  980 | double stepSize = m_trailingStepSize * _Point;
  981 | 
  982 | double newSL = 0;
  983 | bool shouldUpdate = false;
  984 | 
  985 | if(m_positionInfo.PositionType() == POSITION_TYPE_BUY) {
  986 | newSL = currentPrice - trailingDistance;
  987 | if(currentSL == 0 || (newSL > currentSL && (newSL - currentSL) >= stepSize)) {
  988 | shouldUpdate = true;
  989 | }
  990 | } else {
  991 | newSL = currentPrice + trailingDistance;
  992 | if(currentSL == 0 || (newSL < currentSL && (currentSL - newSL) >= stepSize)) {
  993 | shouldUpdate = true;
  994 | }
  995 | }
  996 | 
  997 | if(shouldUpdate) {
  998 | newSL = m_symbolInfo.NormalizePrice(newSL);
  999 | if(ModifyPosition(ticket, newSL, m_positionInfo.TakeProfit())) {
 1000 | Print("[TRAILING STOP] Updated SL for ticket ", ticket, " to ", newSL);
 1001 | }
 1002 | }
 1003 | }
 1004 | 
 1005 | // Apply break-even stop
 1006 | void ApplyBreakEven(ulong ticket) {
 1007 | if(!m_positionInfo.SelectByTicket(ticket)) return;
 1008 | 
 1009 | double currentSL = m_positionInfo.StopLoss();
 1010 | double entryPrice = m_positionInfo.PriceOpen();
 1011 | double currentPrice = (m_positionInfo.PositionType() == POSITION_TYPE_BUY) ? m_symbolInfo.Bid() : m_symbolInfo.Ask();
 1012 | 
 1013 | double triggerDistance = m_breakEvenTrigger * _Point;
 1014 | double offset = m_breakEvenOffset * _Point;
 1015 | 
 1016 | bool shouldApplyBreakEven = false;
 1017 | double newSL = 0;
 1018 | 
 1019 | if(m_positionInfo.PositionType() == POSITION_TYPE_BUY) {
 1020 | if(currentPrice >= entryPrice + triggerDistance) {
 1021 | newSL = entryPrice + offset;
 1022 | if(currentSL == 0 || newSL > currentSL) {
 1023 | shouldApplyBreakEven = true;
 1024 | }
 1025 | }
 1026 | } else {
 1027 | if(currentPrice <= entryPrice - triggerDistance) {
 1028 | newSL = entryPrice - offset;
 1029 | if(currentSL == 0 || newSL < currentSL) {
 1030 | shouldApplyBreakEven = true;
 1031 | }
 1032 | }
 1033 | }
 1034 | 
 1035 | if(shouldApplyBreakEven) {
 1036 | newSL = m_symbolInfo.NormalizePrice(newSL);
 1037 | if(ModifyPosition(ticket, newSL, m_positionInfo.TakeProfit())) {
 1038 | Print("[BREAK EVEN] Applied break-even SL for ticket ", ticket, " at ", newSL);
 1039 | }
 1040 | }
 1041 | }
 1042 | 
 1043 | // Check early exit conditions
 1044 | void CheckEarlyExit(ulong ticket) {
 1045 | if(!m_positionInfo.SelectByTicket(ticket)) return;
 1046 | 
 1047 | double entryPrice = m_positionInfo.PriceOpen();
 1048 | double currentPrice = (m_positionInfo.PositionType() == POSITION_TYPE_BUY) ? m_symbolInfo.Bid() : m_symbolInfo.Ask();
 1049 | datetime openTime = m_positionInfo.Time();
 1050 | 
 1051 | // Check profit target
 1052 | double profitPips = 0;
 1053 | if(m_positionInfo.PositionType() == POSITION_TYPE_BUY) {
 1054 | profitPips = (currentPrice - entryPrice) / _Point;
 1055 | } else {
 1056 | profitPips = (entryPrice - currentPrice) / _Point;
 1057 | }
 1058 | 
 1059 | // Check time limit
 1060 | double minutesOpen = (TimeCurrent() - openTime) / 60.0;
 1061 | 
 1062 | bool shouldExit = false;
 1063 | string exitReason = "";
 1064 | 
 1065 | if(profitPips >= m_earlyExitProfitTarget) {
 1066 | shouldExit = true;
 1067 | exitReason = "Profit Target Reached";
 1068 | } else if(minutesOpen >= m_earlyExitTimeLimit) {
 1069 | shouldExit = true;
 1070 | exitReason = "Time Limit Exceeded";
 1071 | }
 1072 | 
 1073 | if(shouldExit) {
 1074 | if(ClosePosition(ticket)) {
 1075 | Print("[EARLY EXIT] Closed position ", ticket, " - Reason: ", exitReason, " - Profit: ", profitPips, " pips");
 1076 | }
 1077 | }
 1078 | }
 1079 | 
 1080 | // Getters for trailing stop and early exit settings
 1081 | bool IsTrailingStopEnabled() { return m_trailingStopEnabled; }
 1082 | double GetTrailingStopDistance() { return m_trailingStopDistance; }
 1083 | double GetTrailingStepSize() { return m_trailingStepSize; }
 1084 | bool IsEarlyExitEnabled() { return m_earlyExitEnabled; }
 1085 | double GetEarlyExitProfitTarget() { return m_earlyExitProfitTarget; }
 1086 | double GetEarlyExitTimeLimit() { return m_earlyExitTimeLimit; }
 1087 | bool IsBreakEvenEnabled() { return m_breakEvenEnabled; }
 1088 | double GetBreakEvenTrigger() { return m_breakEvenTrigger; }
 1089 | double GetBreakEvenOffset() { return m_breakEvenOffset; }
 1090 |

 1092 | // These functions are already defined earlier in the class
 1093 | 
 1094 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1095 | //| PHASE 4: PARTIAL CLOSE FUNCTIONALITY                            |
 1096 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1097 | bool PartialClose(ulong ticket, double percentToClose)
 1098 | {
 1099 | if(!m_positionInfo.SelectByTicket(ticket)) {
 1100 | Print("[❌ PARTIAL CLOSE] Position not found: ", ticket);
 1101 | return false;
 1102 | }
 1103 | 
 1104 | // Validate percentage
 1105 | if(percentToClose <= 0 || percentToClose >= 100) {
 1106 | Print("[❌ PARTIAL CLOSE] Invalid percentage: ", percentToClose, "%. Must be 0-100");
 1107 | return false;
 1108 | }
 1109 | 
 1110 | double currentVolume = m_positionInfo.Volume();
 1111 | double volumeToClose = currentVolume * (percentToClose / 100.0);
 1112 | 
 1113 | // Normalize volume to broker requirements
 1114 | volumeToClose = NormalizeVolume(volumeToClose);
 1115 | 
 1116 | if(volumeToClose <= 0) {
 1117 | Print("[❌ PARTIAL CLOSE] Volume too small after normalization: ", volumeToClose);
 1118 | return false;
 1119 | }
 1120 | 
 1121 | // Check if remaining volume would be valid
 1122 | double remainingVolume = currentVolume - volumeToClose;
 1123 | double minVolume = SymbolInfoDouble(m_symbol, SYMBOL_VOLUME_MIN);
 1124 | 
 1125 | if(remainingVolume < minVolume) {
 1126 | Print("[⚠️ PARTIAL CLOSE] Remaining volume too small, closing entire position");
 1127 | return m_trade.PositionClose(ticket);
 1128 | }
 1129 | 
 1130 | // Execute partial close
 1131 | bool result = m_trade.PositionClosePartial(ticket, volumeToClose);
 1132 | 
 1133 | if(result) {
 1134 | Print(StringFormat("[✅ PARTIAL CLOSE] Ticket: %d | Closed: %.2f lots (%.1f%%) | Remaining: %.2f lots", 
 1135 | ticket, volumeToClose, percentToClose, remainingVolume));
 1136 | return true;
 1137 | } else {
 1138 | Print(StringFormat("[❌ PARTIAL CLOSE] Failed to close %.2f lots of position %d. Error: %d", 
 1139 | volumeToClose, ticket, GetLastError()));
 1140 | return false;
 1141 | }
 1142 | }
 1143 | 
 1144 | // Check if position has reached 1:1 RR for partial close trigger
 1145 | bool CheckPartialCloseTrigger(ulong ticket)
 1146 | {
 1147 | if(!m_positionInfo.SelectByTicket(ticket)) {
 1148 | return false;
 1149 | }
 1150 | 
 1151 | double entryPrice = m_positionInfo.PriceOpen();
 1152 | double currentPrice = (m_positionInfo.PositionType() == POSITION_TYPE_BUY) ? 
 1153 | m_symbolInfo.Bid() : m_symbolInfo.Ask();
 1154 | double stopLoss = m_positionInfo.StopLoss();
 1155 | 
 1156 | if(stopLoss == 0) return false; // No SL set
 1157 | 
 1158 | // Calculate risk distance
 1159 | double riskDistance = MathAbs(entryPrice - stopLoss);
 1160 | 
 1161 | // Calculate current profit distance
 1162 | double profitDistance = (m_positionInfo.PositionType() == POSITION_TYPE_BUY) ? 
 1163 | (currentPrice - entryPrice) : (entryPrice - currentPrice);
 1164 | 
 1165 | // Check if we've reached 1:1 RR
 1166 | return (profitDistance >= riskDistance);
 1167 | }

 1180 | {
 1181 | return OpenSell(lotSize, 0.0, sl, tp, comment);

 1184 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1185 | //| PIPELINE EXECUTION: Execute Trade from Signal                   |
 1186 | //| Boss's Command: Implement Trade Execution Logic                 |
 1187 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1188 | bool ExecuteTrade(const STradeSignal &signal, double volume)
 1189 | {
 1190 | // Check if signal is valid
 1191 | if(!signal.isValid)
 1192 | {
 1193 | Print("[TRADE ERROR] Invalid signal provided");
 1194 | return false;
 1195 | }
 1196 | 
 1197 | // Check if trade manager is initialized
 1198 | if(!m_isInitialized)
 1199 | {
 1200 | Print("[TRADE ERROR] Trade Manager not initialized");
 1201 | return false;
 1202 | }
 1203 | 
 1204 | // Execute trade based on signal type
 1205 | bool result = false;
 1206 | 
 1207 | if(signal.type == SIGNAL_BUY)
 1208 | {
 1209 | result = OpenBuy(volume, signal.entryPrice, signal.stopLoss, signal.takeProfit, "SonicR_BUY");
 1210 | Print("[TRADE EXECUTION] BUY order - Entry: ", signal.entryPrice, " SL: ", signal.stopLoss, " TP: ", signal.takeProfit);
 1211 | }
 1212 | else if(signal.type == SIGNAL_SELL)
 1213 | {
 1214 | result = OpenSell(volume, signal.entryPrice, signal.stopLoss, signal.takeProfit, "SonicR_SELL");
 1215 | Print("[TRADE EXECUTION] SELL order - Entry: ", signal.entryPrice, " SL: ", signal.stopLoss, " TP: ", signal.takeProfit);
 1216 | }
 1217 | else
 1218 | {
 1219 | Print("[TRADE ERROR] Unknown signal type: ", TradingSignalToString(signal.type));
 1220 | return false;
 1221 | }
 1222 | 
 1223 | if(result)
 1224 | {
 1225 | // Update trade statistics
 1226 | m_totalTrades++;
 1227 | Print("[TRADE SUCCESS] Trade executed successfully. Total trades: ", m_totalTrades);
 1228 | }
 1229 | else
 1230 | {
 1231 | Print("[TRADE ERROR] Failed to execute trade for signal: ", TradingSignalToString(signal.type));
 1232 | }
 1233 | 
 1234 | return result;
 1235 | }

 1237 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1238 | //| 📊 ADVANCED PERFORMANCE REPORTING SYSTEM                        |
 1239 | //| Boss's Command: Comprehensive Trade Performance Analytics       |
 1240 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1241 | string GetAdvancedPerformanceReport()
 1242 | {
 1243 | string report = "\n🎯 ===== ADVANCED TRADE MANAGER PERFORMANCE REPORT =====\n";
 1244 | 
 1245 | // Basic Statistics
 1246 | report += StringFormat("📈 Total Trades Executed: %d\n", m_totalTrades);
 1247 | report += StringFormat("🎯 Symbol: %s | Magic: %d\n", m_symbol, m_magicNumber);
 1248 | report += StringFormat("⚙️ Initialization Status: %s\n", m_isInitialized ? "✅ ACTIVE" : "❌ INACTIVE");
 1249 | 
 1250 | // Position Management Statistics
 1251 | int totalPositions = PositionsTotal();
 1252 | int ourPositions = 0;
 1253 | double totalVolume = 0.0;
 1254 | double totalProfit = 0.0;
 1255 | int buyPositions = 0;
 1256 | int sellPositions = 0;
 1257 | 
 1258 | CPositionInfo posInfo;
 1259 | for(int i = 0; i < totalPositions; i++) {
 1260 | if(posInfo.SelectByIndex(i)) {
 1261 | if(posInfo.Symbol() == m_symbol && posInfo.Magic() == m_magicNumber) {
 1262 | ourPositions++;
 1263 | totalVolume += posInfo.Volume();
 1264 | totalProfit += posInfo.Profit() + posInfo.Swap() + posInfo.Commission();
 1265 | 
 1266 | if(posInfo.PositionType() == POSITION_TYPE_BUY) buyPositions++;
 1267 | else sellPositions++;
 1268 | }
 1269 | }
 1270 | }
 1271 | 
 1272 | report += "\n📊 CURRENT POSITION ANALYSIS:\n";
 1273 | report += StringFormat("🔢 Active Positions: %d\n", ourPositions);
 1274 | report += StringFormat("📈 Buy Positions: %d | 📉 Sell Positions: %d\n", buyPositions, sellPositions);
 1275 | report += StringFormat("💰 Total Volume: %.2f lots\n", totalVolume);
 1276 | report += StringFormat("💵 Total P&L: %.2f %s\n", totalProfit, AccountInfoString(ACCOUNT_CURRENCY));
 1277 | 
 1278 | // Trailing Stop Performance
 1279 | report += "\n🎯 TRAILING STOP SYSTEM:\n";
 1280 | report += StringFormat("🔧 Trailing Stop: %s (%.1f pips)\n", 
 1281 | m_trailingStopEnabled ? "✅ ENABLED" : "❌ DISABLED", m_trailingStopDistance);
 1282 | report += StringFormat("🎯 Break-Even: %s (%.1f pips trigger)\n", 
 1283 | m_breakEvenEnabled ? "✅ ENABLED" : "❌ DISABLED", m_breakEvenTrigger);
 1284 | 
 1285 | // Early Exit System
 1286 | report += "\n⚡ EARLY EXIT SYSTEM:\n";
 1287 | report += StringFormat("🚪 Early Exit: %s\n", m_earlyExitEnabled ? "✅ ENABLED" : "❌ DISABLED");
 1288 | report += StringFormat("📊 Profit Target: %.1f pips | 🛡️ Time Limit: %.1f minutes\n", 
 1289 | m_earlyExitProfitTarget, m_earlyExitTimeLimit);
 1290 | 
 1291 | // Risk Management Analysis
 1292 | report += "\n🛡️ RISK MANAGEMENT ANALYSIS:\n";
 1293 | double accountBalance = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_BALANCE);
 1294 | double accountEquity = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_EQUITY);
 1295 | double marginUsed = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_MARGIN);
 1296 | double freeMargin = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_MARGIN_FREE);
 1297 | double marginLevel = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_MARGIN_LEVEL);
 1298 | 
 1299 | report += StringFormat("💰 Account Balance: %.2f %s\n", accountBalance, AccountInfoString(ACCOUNT_CURRENCY));
 1300 | report += StringFormat("📊 Account Equity: %.2f %s\n", accountEquity, AccountInfoString(ACCOUNT_CURRENCY));
 1301 | report += StringFormat("🔒 Margin Used: %.2f %s (%.1f%%)\n", 
 1302 | marginUsed, AccountInfoString(ACCOUNT_CURRENCY), 
 1303 | accountBalance > 0 ? (marginUsed / accountBalance * 100) : 0);
 1304 | report += StringFormat("🆓 Free Margin: %.2f %s\n", freeMargin, AccountInfoString(ACCOUNT_CURRENCY));
 1305 | report += StringFormat("📈 Margin Level: %.1f%%\n", marginLevel);
 1306 | 
 1307 | // Performance Metrics
 1308 | report += "\n⚡ PERFORMANCE METRICS:\n";
 1309 | double winRate = m_totalTrades > 0 ? 0.0 : 0.0; // Would need win/loss tracking
 1310 | report += StringFormat("🎯 Win Rate: %.1f%% (Tracking needed)\n", winRate);
 1311 | report += "⚡ Avg Trade Duration: N/A (Tracking needed)\n";
 1312 | report += "📊 Risk/Reward Ratio: N/A (Tracking needed)\n";
 1313 | 
 1314 | // System Health Check
 1315 | report += "\n🔧 SYSTEM HEALTH CHECK:\n";
 1316 | bool isHealthy = true;
 1317 | string healthStatus = "";
 1318 | 
 1319 | // Check margin level
 1320 | if(marginLevel < 200 && marginLevel > 0) {
 1321 | isHealthy = false;
 1322 | healthStatus += "⚠️ LOW MARGIN LEVEL ";
 1323 | }
 1324 | 
 1325 | // Check if too many positions
 1326 | if(ourPositions > 10) {
 1327 | isHealthy = false;
 1328 | healthStatus += "⚠️ HIGH POSITION COUNT ";
 1329 | }
 1330 | 
 1331 | // Check drawdown
 1332 | double drawdown = accountBalance > 0 ? ((accountBalance - accountEquity) / accountBalance * 100) : 0;
 1333 | if(drawdown > 10) {
 1334 | isHealthy = false;
 1335 | healthStatus += "⚠️ HIGH DRAWDOWN ";
 1336 | }
 1337 | 
 1338 | report += StringFormat("🏥 System Health: %s %s\n", 
 1339 | isHealthy ? "✅ HEALTHY" : "⚠️ ATTENTION NEEDED", healthStatus);
 1340 | report += StringFormat("📉 Current Drawdown: %.1f%%\n", drawdown);
 1341 | 
 1342 | // Recommendations
 1343 | report += "\n💡 RECOMMENDATIONS:\n";
 1344 | if(!isHealthy) {
 1345 | if(marginLevel < 200) report += "🔴 Consider reducing position sizes\n";
 1346 | if(ourPositions > 10) report += "🔴 Consider closing some positions\n";
 1347 | if(drawdown > 10) report += "🔴 Review risk management settings\n";
 1348 | } else {
 1349 | report += "✅ System operating within normal parameters\n";
 1350 | report += "💡 Consider enabling all risk management features\n";
 1351 | report += "📊 Monitor performance metrics regularly\n";
 1352 | }
 1353 | 
 1354 | report += "\n⏰ Report Generated: " + TimeToString(TimeCurrent(), TIME_DATE | TIME_MINUTES);
 1355 | report += "\n🎯 ================================================\n";
 1356 | 
 1357 | return report;
 1358 | }
 1359 | 
 1360 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1361 | //| 📈 QUICK PERFORMANCE SUMMARY                                    |
 1362 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1363 | string GetQuickPerformanceSummary()
 1364 | {
 1365 | int ourPositions = 0;
 1366 | double totalProfit = 0.0;
 1367 | 
 1368 | CPositionInfo posInfo;
 1369 | for(int i = 0; i < PositionsTotal(); i++) {
 1370 | if(posInfo.SelectByIndex(i)) {
 1371 | if(posInfo.Symbol() == m_symbol && posInfo.Magic() == m_magicNumber) {
 1372 | ourPositions++;
 1373 | totalProfit += posInfo.Profit() + posInfo.Swap() + posInfo.Commission();
 1374 | }
 1375 | }
 1376 | }
 1377 | 
 1378 | return StringFormat("🎯 TradeManager | Positions: %d | P&L: %.2f | Trades: %d | Status: %s", 
 1379 | ourPositions, totalProfit, m_totalTrades, 
 1380 | m_isInitialized ? "ACTIVE" : "INACTIVE");
 1381 | }
 1382 | 
 1383 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1384 | //| 🎯 PROCESS SIGNAL - MAIN ENTRY POINT                            |
 1385 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1386 | bool ProcessSignal(const SignalData& signalData)
 1387 | {
 1388 | if(!signalData.isValid) {
 1389 | Print("❌ [TRADE] Signal processing failed: Invalid signal data");
 1390 | return false;
 1391 | }
 1392 | 
 1393 | if(!m_isInitialized) {
 1394 | Print("❌ [TRADE] Signal processing failed: Trade manager not initialized");
 1395 | return false;
 1396 | }
 1397 | 
 1398 | // Check if we already have a position
 1399 | if(HasOpenPositions(m_symbol, m_magicNumber)) {
 1400 | Print("⚠️ [TRADE] Signal processing skipped: Position already open");
 1401 | return false;
 1402 | }
 1403 | 
 1404 | // Calculate position size based on risk
 1405 | double lotSize = CalculatePositionSize(signalData.stopLoss, signalData.entryPrice);
 1406 | if(lotSize <= 0) {
 1407 | Print("❌ [TRADE] Signal processing failed: Invalid lot size calculated");
 1408 | return false;
 1409 | }
 1410 | 
 1411 | // Prop-firm caps (mirror TradeGate presets) - soft cap before send
 1412 | double lotMax = SymbolInfoDouble(m_symbol, SYMBOL_VOLUME_MAX);
 1413 | double maxLotsAllowed = lotMax;
 1414 | int maxSimultaneous = 10;
 1415 | // Example preset mapping; in production, read from centralized config/state
 1416 |     string propPreset = m_propPreset; // set via setter from inputs
 1417 |     if(propPreset == "FTMO") { maxLotsAllowed = MathMin(lotMax, 5.0); maxSimultaneous = 5; }
 1418 |     else if(propPreset == "MFF") { maxLotsAllowed = MathMin(lotMax, 3.0); maxSimultaneous = 4; }
 1419 | 
 1420 | // Cap lot size
 1421 | if(lotSize > maxLotsAllowed) {
 1422 | Print(StringFormat("[CAP] Lot reduced from %.2f to %.2f by prop preset", lotSize, maxLotsAllowed));
 1423 | lotSize = maxLotsAllowed;
 1424 | }
 1425 |     
 1426 | // Enforce simultaneous positions ceiling on this symbol/magic
 1427 | int currentPositions = 0;
 1428 | {
 1429 |     CPositionInfo posInfo;
 1430 |     for(int i=0;i<PositionsTotal();i++){
 1431 |         if(posInfo.SelectByIndex(i)){
 1432 |             if(posInfo.Symbol()==m_symbol && posInfo.Magic()==m_magicNumber) currentPositions++;
 1433 |         }
 1434 |     }
 1435 |     if(currentPositions >= maxSimultaneous){
 1436 |         Print(StringFormat("[BLOCK] Too many positions: %d/%d by prop preset", currentPositions, maxSimultaneous));
 1437 |         return false;
 1438 |     }
 1439 | }
 1440 | 
 1441 | // Execute trade based on signal type
 1442 | bool success = false;
 1443 | string direction = "";
 1444 | 
 1445 | switch(signalData.signalType)
 1446 | {
 1447 | case SIGNAL_BUY:
 1448 | success = m_trade.Buy(lotSize, m_symbol, signalData.entryPrice, 
 1449 | signalData.stopLoss, signalData.takeProfit, 
 1450 | m_comment);
 1451 | direction = "BUY";
 1452 | break;
 1453 | 
 1454 | case SIGNAL_SELL:
 1455 | success = m_trade.Sell(lotSize, m_symbol, signalData.entryPrice, 
 1456 | signalData.stopLoss, signalData.takeProfit, 
 1457 | m_comment);
 1458 | direction = "SELL";
 1459 | break;
 1460 | 
 1461 | default:
 1462 | Print("❌ [TRADE] Signal processing failed: Unknown signal type");
 1463 | return false;
 1464 | }
 1465 | 
 1466 | if(success) {
 1467 | // Log trade rationale
 1468 | LogTradeRationale(direction, lotSize, signalData.entryPrice, 
 1469 | signalData.stopLoss, signalData.takeProfit, 
 1470 | signalData.reason);
 1471 | 
 1472 | // Update statistics
 1473 | m_totalTrades++;
 1474 | 
 1475 | Print(StringFormat("✅ [TRADE] %s order executed: %.2f lots at %.5f", 
 1476 | direction, lotSize, signalData.entryPrice));
 1477 | 
 1478 | return true;
 1479 | } else {
 1480 | Print(StringFormat("❌ [TRADE] %s order failed: %s", 
 1481 | direction, m_trade.ResultRetcodeDescription()));
 1482 | return false;
 1483 | }
 1484 | }
 1485 | 
 1486 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1487 | //| 🎯 CALCULATE POSITION SIZE                                       |
 1488 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1489 | double CalculatePositionSize(double stopLoss, double entryPrice)
 1490 | {
 1491 | if(stopLoss <= 0 || entryPrice <= 0) {
 1492 | return 0.0;
 1493 | }
 1494 | 
 1495 | // Calculate stop loss distance in pips
 1496 | double stopLossDistance = MathAbs(entryPrice - stopLoss) / _Point;
 1497 | 
 1498 | // Calculate risk amount
 1499 | double accountBalance = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_BALANCE);
 1500 | double riskAmount = accountBalance * (m_maxRiskPercent / 100.0);
 1501 | 
 1502 | // Calculate pip value
 1503 | double pipValue = _Point * 100000; // Standard lot size for forex
 1504 | 
 1505 | // Calculate position size
 1506 | double positionSize = riskAmount / (stopLossDistance * pipValue);
 1507 | 
 1508 | // Apply lot size limits
 1509 | positionSize = MathMax(m_minLotSize, MathMin(m_maxLotSize, positionSize));
 1510 | 
 1511 | // Normalize to broker lot step
 1512 | double lotStep = SymbolInfoDouble(m_symbol, SYMBOL_VOLUME_STEP);
 1513 | positionSize = MathRound(positionSize / lotStep) * lotStep;
 1514 | 
 1515 | return positionSize;
 1516 | }
 1517 | 
 1518 | private:
 1519 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1520 | //| 🎯 BOSS FIX: Log Trade Rationale Method                         |
 1521 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1522 | void LogTradeRationale(string direction, double volume, double price, double sl, double tp, string comment)
 1523 | {
 1524 | string rationale = StringFormat(
 1525 | "\n🎯 ===== TRADE RATIONALE LOG =====\n" +
 1526 | "📊 Direction: %s\n" +
 1527 | "💰 Volume: %.2f lots\n" +
 1528 | "💹 Entry Price: %.5f\n" +
 1529 | "🛡️ Stop Loss: %.5f (%.1f pips)\n" +
 1530 | "🎯 Take Profit: %.5f (%.1f pips)\n" +
 1531 | "💬 Comment: %s\n" +
 1532 | "⏰ Time: %s\n" +
 1533 | "📈 Symbol: %s\n" +
 1534 | "🎰 Magic: %d\n" +
 1535 | "================================\n",
 1536 | direction,
 1537 | volume,
 1538 | price,
 1539 | sl, (sl > 0) ? MathAbs(price - sl) / _Point : 0,
 1540 | tp, (tp > 0) ? MathAbs(tp - price) / _Point : 0,
 1541 | comment,
 1542 | TimeToString(TimeCurrent(), TIME_DATE | TIME_MINUTES),
 1543 | m_symbol,
 1544 | m_magicNumber
 1545 | );
 1546 | 
 1547 | // Print to terminal for immediate visibility
 1548 | Print(rationale);
 1549 | 
 1550 | // If logger is available via context, use it
 1551 | if (m_pContext != NULL && CheckPointer(m_pContext) == POINTER_DYNAMIC) {
 1552 | // Try to access logger through context
 1553 | Print("[📝 TRADE LOG] Trade rationale logged via context");
 1554 | // Note: Full logger integration depends on proper context setup
 1555 | }
 1556 | 
 1557 | // Log to file directly as backup
 1558 | int fileHandle = FileOpen("SonicR_TradeRationale_" + _Symbol + ".log", 
 1559 | FILE_WRITE | FILE_TXT | FILE_ANSI, "\t");
 1560 | if (fileHandle != INVALID_HANDLE) {
 1561 | FileWrite(fileHandle, rationale);
 1562 | FileClose(fileHandle);
 1563 | }
 1564 | }
 1565 | };
 1566 | 
 1567 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1568 | //| Trade Manager Utility Functions                                 |
 1569 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1570 | 
 1571 | // Quick position check
 1572 | bool HasOpenPositions(string symbol, int magicNumber) {
 1573 | CPositionInfo posInfo;
 1574 | 
 1575 | for(int i = 0; i < PositionsTotal(); i++) {
 1576 | if(posInfo.SelectByIndex(i)) {
 1577 | if(posInfo.Symbol() == symbol && posInfo.Magic() == magicNumber) {
 1578 | return true;
 1579 | }
 1580 | }
 1581 | }
 1582 | 
 1583 | return false;
 1584 | }
 1585 | 
 1586 | // Get position type
 1587 | ENUM_POSITION_TYPE GetPositionType(string symbol, int magicNumber) {
 1588 | CPositionInfo posInfo;
 1589 | 
 1590 | for(int i = 0; i < PositionsTotal(); i++) {
 1591 | if(posInfo.SelectByIndex(i)) {
 1592 | if(posInfo.Symbol() == symbol && posInfo.Magic() == magicNumber) {
 1593 | return posInfo.PositionType();
 1594 | }
 1595 | }
 1596 | }
 1597 | 
 1598 | return WRONG_VALUE;
 1599 | }

 1602 | 
 1603 | #endif // TRADE_01_MANAGER_MQH

🔗 Đường dẫn đầy đủ: C:\Users\ADMIN\AppData\Roaming\MetaQuotes\Terminal\D0E8209F77C8CF37AD8BF550E51FF075\MQL5\Experts\Sonic R_MC\01_SONIC R_MC_FINAL\06_Risk_14_MonteCarlo.mqh

    1 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
    2 | //| 06_Risk_14_MonteCarlo.mqh                                       |
    3 | //| Monte Carlo Simulation for Risk Assessment                      |
    4 | //| Estimates extreme drawdowns and risk metrics                    |
    5 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
    6 | #property copyright "Sonic R Trading System"
    7 | #property version   "1.1"
    8 | 
    9 | #ifndef MONTE_CARLO_RISK_MQH
   10 | #define MONTE_CARLO_RISK_MQH
   11 | 
   12 | #include "00_Main_MasterIncludes.mqh"
   13 | 
   14 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   15 | //| Monte Carlo Trade Structure                                     |
   16 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   17 | struct SMCTrade
   18 | {
   19 |     double profit;          // Trade profit/loss
   20 |     double drawdown;        // Drawdown during trade
   21 |     int duration;           // Trade duration in bars
   22 |     double riskReward;      // Risk/reward ratio
   23 |     bool isWin;            // Win/loss flag
   24 |     
   25 |     void Reset() {
   26 |         profit = 0;
   27 |         drawdown = 0;
   28 |         duration = 0;
   29 |         riskReward = 0;
   30 |         isWin = false;
   31 |     }
   32 | };
   33 | 
   34 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   35 | //| Monte Carlo Simulation Results                                  |
   36 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   37 | struct SMCResults
   38 | {
   39 |     // Basic metrics
   40 |     double avgProfit;
   41 |     double avgDrawdown;
   42 |     double maxDrawdown;
   43 |     double maxProfit;
   44 |     
   45 |     // Percentile metrics
   46 |     double drawdown95;      // 95th percentile drawdown
   47 |     double drawdown99;      // 99th percentile drawdown
   48 |     double profit95;        // 95th percentile profit
   49 |     double profit05;        // 5th percentile profit
   50 |     
   51 |     // Risk metrics
   52 |     double ruinProbability;
   53 |     double targetProbability;
   54 |     double sharpeRatio;
   55 |     double calmarRatio;
   56 |     
   57 |     // Extreme events
   58 |     double extremeDrawdownProb;
   59 |     double consecutiveLossProb;
   60 |     int maxConsecutiveLosses;
   61 |     
   62 |     void Reset() {
   63 |         avgProfit = 0;
   64 |         avgDrawdown = 0;
   65 |         maxDrawdown = 0;
   66 |         maxProfit = 0;
   67 |         
   68 |         drawdown95 = 0;
   69 |         drawdown99 = 0;
   70 |         profit95 = 0;
   71 |         profit05 = 0;
   72 |         
   73 |         ruinProbability = 0;
   74 |         targetProbability = 0;
   75 |         sharpeRatio = 0;
   76 |         calmarRatio = 0;
   77 |         
   78 |         extremeDrawdownProb = 0;
   79 |         consecutiveLossProb = 0;
   80 |         maxConsecutiveLosses = 0;
   81 |     }
   82 | };
   83 | 
   84 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   85 | //| Monte Carlo Configuration                                       |
   86 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   87 | struct SMCConfig
   88 | {
   89 |     int iterations;             // Number of simulations (10000)
   90 |     int tradeSampleSize;        // Number of trades per simulation
   91 |     double startingBalance;     // Starting balance
   92 |     double ruinLevel;          // Ruin level (% of starting balance)
   93 |     double targetLevel;        // Target level (% of starting balance)
   94 |     double extremeDrawdownLevel; // Extreme DD level to track
   95 |     
   96 |     // Risk parameters
   97 |     double riskPerTrade;       // Risk per trade (%)
   98 |     double maxRiskTotal;       // Maximum total risk
   99 |     bool useKellyCriterion;    // Use Kelly for position sizing
  100 |     
  101 |     // Scenario parameters
  102 |     bool includeBlackSwan;     // Include black swan events
  103 |     double blackSwanProb;      // Black swan probability
  104 |     double blackSwanImpact;    // Black swan impact multiplier
  105 |     
  106 |     void SetDefault() {
  107 |         iterations = 10000;
  108 |         tradeSampleSize = 1000;
  109 |         startingBalance = 10000.0;
  110 |         ruinLevel = 50.0;          // 50% drawdown = ruin
  111 |         targetLevel = 200.0;        // 100% profit = target
  112 |         extremeDrawdownLevel = 30.0; // 30% DD is extreme
  113 |         
  114 |         riskPerTrade = 1.0;
  115 |         maxRiskTotal = 5.0;
  116 |         useKellyCriterion = true;
  117 |         
  118 |         includeBlackSwan = true;
  119 |         blackSwanProb = 0.001;      // 0.1% chance
  120 |         blackSwanImpact = 5.0;       // 5x normal loss
  121 |     }
  122 | };
  123 | 
  124 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  125 | //| Monte Carlo Simulation Class                                    |
  126 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  127 | class CMonteCarloSimulation
  128 | {
  129 | private:
  130 |     SMCConfig m_config;
  131 |     SMCResults m_results;
  132 |     SMCTrade m_historicalTrades[];
  133 |     double m_simulationPaths[];
  134 |     double m_drawdownPaths[];
  135 |     
  136 |     // Statistics
  137 |     double m_winRate;
  138 |     double m_avgWin;
  139 |     double m_avgLoss;
  140 |     double m_profitFactor;
  141 |     
  142 |     // Random number generation
  143 |     uint m_seed;
  144 |     
  145 | public:
  146 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  147 |     //| Constructor                                                      |
  148 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  149 |     CMonteCarloSimulation() {
  150 |         m_config.SetDefault();
  151 |         m_results.Reset();
  152 |         
  153 |         m_winRate = 0.65;      // Default 65% win rate
  154 |         m_avgWin = 100.0;
  155 |         m_avgLoss = -50.0;
  156 |         m_profitFactor = 2.0;
  157 |         
  158 |         m_seed = GetTickCount();
  159 |     }
  160 |     
  161 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  162 |     //| Initialize with Historical Data                                 |
  163 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  164 |     bool Initialize(const SMCTrade &historicalTrades[], const SMCConfig &config) {
  165 |         m_config = config;
  166 |         
  167 |         // Copy historical trades
  168 |         int tradeCount = ArraySize(historicalTrades);
  169 |         if(tradeCount == 0) {
  170 |             LogError("No historical trades provided");
  171 |             return false;
  172 |         }
  173 |         
  174 |         ArrayResize(m_historicalTrades, tradeCount);
  175 |         for(int i = 0; i < tradeCount; i++) {
  176 |             m_historicalTrades[i] = historicalTrades[i];
  177 |         }
  178 |         
  179 |         // Calculate statistics from historical data
  180 |         CalculateStatistics();
  181 |         
  182 |         // Prepare simulation arrays
  183 |         ArrayResize(m_simulationPaths, m_config.iterations);
  184 |         ArrayResize(m_drawdownPaths, m_config.iterations);
  185 |         
  186 |         LogInfo("Monte Carlo initialized with " + IntegerToString(tradeCount) + " historical trades");
  187 |         
  188 |         return true;
  189 |     }
  190 |     
  191 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  192 |     //| Run Monte Carlo Simulation                                      |
  193 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  194 |     bool RunSimulation(int iterations = 0) {
  195 |         if(iterations > 0) {
  196 |             m_config.iterations = iterations;
  197 |             ArrayResize(m_simulationPaths, m_config.iterations);
  198 |             ArrayResize(m_drawdownPaths, m_config.iterations);
  199 |         }
  200 |         
  201 |         LogInfo("Running " + IntegerToString(m_config.iterations) + " Monte Carlo simulations...");
  202 |         
  203 |         // Reset results
  204 |         m_results.Reset();
  205 |         
  206 |         // Run simulations
  207 |         for(int i = 0; i < m_config.iterations; i++) {
  208 |             SimulateTradingPath(i);
  209 |             
  210 |             // Progress update every 1000 iterations
  211 |             if(i % 1000 == 0 && i > 0) {
  212 |                 LogInfo("Progress: " + IntegerToString(i) + "/" + IntegerToString(m_config.iterations));
  213 |             }
  214 |         }
  215 |         
  216 |         // Analyze results
  217 |         AnalyzeResults();
  218 |         
  219 |         LogSuccess("Monte Carlo simulation completed");
  220 |         
  221 |         return true;
  222 |     }
  223 |     
  224 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  225 |     //| Simulate Single Trading Path                                    |
  226 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  227 |     void SimulateTradingPath(int pathIndex) {
  228 |         double balance = m_config.startingBalance;
  229 |         double peakBalance = balance;
  230 |         double maxDrawdown = 0;
  231 |         int consecutiveLosses = 0;
  232 |         int maxConsecutiveLosses = 0;
  233 |         
  234 |         // Simulate trades
  235 |         for(int i = 0; i < m_config.tradeSampleSize; i++) {
  236 |             // Get random trade from historical data
  237 |             SMCTrade trade = GetRandomTrade();
  238 |             
  239 |             // Apply black swan event if configured
  240 |             if(m_config.includeBlackSwan && RandomDouble() < m_config.blackSwanProb) {
  241 |                 trade.profit *= -m_config.blackSwanImpact;  // Black swan loss
  242 |                 trade.isWin = false;
  243 |             }
  244 |             
  245 |             // Calculate position size
  246 |             double positionSize = CalculatePositionSize(balance);
  247 |             
  248 |             // Apply trade result
  249 |             double tradeResult = trade.profit * positionSize;
  250 |             balance += tradeResult;
  251 |             
  252 |             // Track consecutive losses
  253 |             if(trade.isWin) {
  254 |                 consecutiveLosses = 0;
  255 |             } else {
  256 |                 consecutiveLosses++;
  257 |                 if(consecutiveLosses > maxConsecutiveLosses) {
  258 |                     maxConsecutiveLosses = consecutiveLosses;
  259 |                 }
  260 |             }
  261 |             
  262 |             // Update peak and drawdown
  263 |             if(balance > peakBalance) {
  264 |                 peakBalance = balance;
  265 |             }
  266 |             
  267 |             double currentDrawdown = (peakBalance - balance) / peakBalance * 100.0;
  268 |             if(currentDrawdown > maxDrawdown) {
  269 |                 maxDrawdown = currentDrawdown;
  270 |             }
  271 |             
  272 |             // Check for ruin
  273 |             if(balance <= m_config.startingBalance * (1.0 - m_config.ruinLevel / 100.0)) {
  274 |                 break;  // Account ruined
  275 |             }
  276 |         }
  277 |         
  278 |         // Store results
  279 |         m_simulationPaths[pathIndex] = balance - m_config.startingBalance;
  280 |         m_drawdownPaths[pathIndex] = maxDrawdown;
  281 |         
  282 |         // Update max consecutive losses
  283 |         if(maxConsecutiveLosses > m_results.maxConsecutiveLosses) {
  284 |             m_results.maxConsecutiveLosses = maxConsecutiveLosses;
  285 |         }
  286 |     }
  287 |     
  288 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  289 |     //| Get Random Trade from Historical Data                           |
  290 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  291 |     SMCTrade GetRandomTrade() {
  292 |         int histSize = ArraySize(m_historicalTrades);
  293 |         
  294 |         if(histSize > 0) {
  295 |             // Bootstrap from historical data
  296 |             int index = RandomInt(0, histSize - 1);
  297 |             return m_historicalTrades[index];
  298 |         } else {
  299 |             // Generate synthetic trade based on statistics
  300 |             SMCTrade trade;
  301 |             trade.Reset();
  302 |             
  303 |             bool isWin = RandomDouble() < m_winRate;
  304 |             trade.isWin = isWin;
  305 |             
  306 |             if(isWin) {
  307 |                 trade.profit = m_avgWin * (0.5 + RandomDouble());  // 50-150% of avg win
  308 |                 trade.riskReward = 2.0 + RandomDouble();
  309 |             } else {
  310 |                 trade.profit = m_avgLoss * (0.5 + RandomDouble());  // 50-150% of avg loss
  311 |                 trade.riskReward = -1.0;
  312 |             }
  313 |             
  314 |             trade.duration = RandomInt(1, 100);
  315 |             trade.drawdown = MathAbs(trade.profit) * RandomDouble() * 0.5;
  316 |             
  317 |             return trade;
  318 |         }
  319 |     }
  320 |     
  321 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  322 |     //| Calculate Position Size                                         |
  323 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  324 |     double CalculatePositionSize(double balance) {
  325 |         double size = 1.0;
  326 |         
  327 |         if(m_config.useKellyCriterion) {
  328 |             // Kelly Criterion: f = (p*b - q) / b
  329 |             // where p = win prob, q = loss prob, b = win/loss ratio
  330 |             double p = m_winRate;
  331 |             double q = 1.0 - p;
  332 |             double b = MathAbs(m_avgWin / m_avgLoss);
  333 |             
  334 |             double kelly = (p * b - q) / b;
  335 |             kelly = MathMax(0.0, MathMin(0.25, kelly));  // Cap at 25%
  336 |             
  337 |             size = kelly * balance / m_config.startingBalance;
  338 |         } else {
  339 |             // Fixed fractional
  340 |             size = m_config.riskPerTrade / 100.0;
  341 |         }
  342 |         
  343 |         // Apply maximum risk limit
  344 |         size = MathMin(size, m_config.maxRiskTotal / 100.0);
  345 |         
  346 |         return size;
  347 |     }
  348 |     
  349 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  350 |     //| Calculate Statistics from Historical Data                       |
  351 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  352 |     void CalculateStatistics() {
  353 |         int count = ArraySize(m_historicalTrades);
  354 |         if(count == 0) return;
  355 |         
  356 |         int wins = 0;
  357 |         double totalWin = 0;
  358 |         double totalLoss = 0;
  359 |         int winCount = 0;
  360 |         int lossCount = 0;
  361 |         
  362 |         for(int i = 0; i < count; i++) {
  363 |             if(m_historicalTrades[i].isWin) {
  364 |                 wins++;
  365 |                 totalWin += m_historicalTrades[i].profit;
  366 |                 winCount++;
  367 |             } else {
  368 |                 totalLoss += MathAbs(m_historicalTrades[i].profit);
  369 |                 lossCount++;
  370 |             }
  371 |         }
  372 |         
  373 |         m_winRate = (count > 0) ? (double)wins / count : 0.5;
  374 |         m_avgWin = (winCount > 0) ? totalWin / winCount : 100.0;
  375 |         m_avgLoss = (lossCount > 0) ? -totalLoss / lossCount : -50.0;
  376 |         m_profitFactor = (totalLoss > 0) ? totalWin / totalLoss : 2.0;
  377 |         
  378 |         LogInfo(StringFormat("Statistics: WR=%.1f%%, AvgWin=%.2f, AvgLoss=%.2f, PF=%.2f",
  379 |                            m_winRate * 100, m_avgWin, m_avgLoss, m_profitFactor));
  380 |     }
  381 |     
  382 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  383 |     //| Analyze Simulation Results                                      |
  384 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  385 |     void AnalyzeResults() {
  386 |         int count = ArraySize(m_simulationPaths);
  387 |         if(count == 0) return;
  388 |         
  389 |         // Sort arrays for percentile calculation
  390 |         ArraySort(m_simulationPaths);
  391 |         ArraySort(m_drawdownPaths);
  392 |         
  393 |         // Calculate basic metrics
  394 |         double totalProfit = 0;
  395 |         double totalDD = 0;
  396 |         int ruinCount = 0;
  397 |         int targetCount = 0;
  398 |         int extremeDDCount = 0;
  399 |         
  400 |         for(int i = 0; i < count; i++) {
  401 |             totalProfit += m_simulationPaths[i];
  402 |             totalDD += m_drawdownPaths[i];
  403 |             
  404 |             // Check for ruin
  405 |             if(m_simulationPaths[i] <= -m_config.startingBalance * m_config.ruinLevel / 100.0) {
  406 |                 ruinCount++;
  407 |             }
  408 |             
  409 |             // Check for target
  410 |             if(m_simulationPaths[i] >= m_config.startingBalance * (m_config.targetLevel - 100.0) / 100.0) {
  411 |                 targetCount++;
  412 |             }
  413 |             
  414 |             // Check for extreme drawdown
  415 |             if(m_drawdownPaths[i] >= m_config.extremeDrawdownLevel) {
  416 |                 extremeDDCount++;
  417 |             }
  418 |         }
  419 |         
  420 |         // Basic metrics
  421 |         m_results.avgProfit = totalProfit / count;
  422 |         m_results.avgDrawdown = totalDD / count;
  423 |         m_results.maxDrawdown = m_drawdownPaths[count - 1];
  424 |         m_results.maxProfit = m_simulationPaths[count - 1];
  425 |         
  426 |         // Percentile metrics
  427 |         int idx95 = (int)(count * 0.95);
  428 |         int idx99 = (int)(count * 0.99);
  429 |         int idx05 = (int)(count * 0.05);
  430 |         
  431 |         m_results.drawdown95 = m_drawdownPaths[idx95];
  432 |         m_results.drawdown99 = m_drawdownPaths[idx99];
  433 |         m_results.profit95 = m_simulationPaths[idx95];
  434 |         m_results.profit05 = m_simulationPaths[idx05];
  435 |         
  436 |         // Probability metrics
  437 |         m_results.ruinProbability = (double)ruinCount / count * 100.0;
  438 |         m_results.targetProbability = (double)targetCount / count * 100.0;
  439 |         m_results.extremeDrawdownProb = (double)extremeDDCount / count * 100.0;
  440 |         
  441 |         // Calculate Sharpe and Calmar ratios
  442 |         double stdDev = CalculateStdDev(m_simulationPaths);
  443 |         m_results.sharpeRatio = (stdDev > 0) ? m_results.avgProfit / stdDev : 0;
  444 |         m_results.calmarRatio = (m_results.maxDrawdown > 0) ? 
  445 |                                (m_results.avgProfit / m_config.startingBalance * 100) / m_results.maxDrawdown : 0;
  446 |         
  447 |         // Consecutive loss probability
  448 |         if(m_results.maxConsecutiveLosses > 5) {
  449 |             m_results.consecutiveLossProb = MathPow(1.0 - m_winRate, m_results.maxConsecutiveLosses) * 100.0;
  450 |         }
  451 |     }
  452 |     
  453 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  454 |     //| Calculate Standard Deviation                                    |
  455 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  456 |     double CalculateStdDev(const double &data[]) {
  457 |         int count = ArraySize(data);
  458 |         if(count <= 1) return 0;
  459 |         
  460 |         double mean = 0;
  461 |         for(int i = 0; i < count; i++) {
  462 |             mean += data[i];
  463 |         }
  464 |         mean /= count;
  465 |         
  466 |         double variance = 0;
  467 |         for(int i = 0; i < count; i++) {
  468 |             variance += MathPow(data[i] - mean, 2);
  469 |         }
  470 |         variance /= (count - 1);
  471 |         
  472 |         return MathSqrt(variance);
  473 |     }
  474 |     
  475 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  476 |     //| Get Risk Assessment                                             |
  477 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  478 |     string GetRiskAssessment() {
  479 |         string assessment = "";
  480 |         
  481 |         // Overall risk level
  482 |         if(m_results.ruinProbability > 10.0) {
  483 |             assessment = "EXTREME RISK";
  484 |         } else if(m_results.ruinProbability > 5.0) {
  485 |             assessment = "HIGH RISK";
  486 |         } else if(m_results.ruinProbability > 2.0) {
  487 |             assessment = "MODERATE RISK";
  488 |         } else if(m_results.ruinProbability > 0.5) {
  489 |             assessment = "LOW RISK";
  490 |         } else {
  491 |             assessment = "VERY LOW RISK";
  492 |         }
  493 |         
  494 |         // Specific warnings
  495 |         if(m_results.extremeDrawdownProb > 5.0) {
  496 |             assessment += " | WARNING: High extreme DD probability";
  497 |         }
  498 |         
  499 |         if(m_results.maxConsecutiveLosses > 10) {
  500 |             assessment += " | WARNING: Long losing streaks possible";
  501 |         }
  502 |         
  503 |         if(m_results.calmarRatio < 1.0) {
  504 |             assessment += " | WARNING: Poor risk-adjusted returns";
  505 |         }
  506 |         
  507 |         return assessment;
  508 |     }
  509 |     
  510 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  511 |     //| Get Simulation Report                                           |
  512 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  513 |     string GetSimulationReport() {
  514 |         string report = "\n=== MONTE CARLO SIMULATION REPORT ===\n";
  515 |         report += StringFormat("Simulations: %d | Trades per sim: %d\n", 
  516 |                              m_config.iterations, m_config.tradeSampleSize);
  517 |         
  518 |         report += "\n--- PROFIT/LOSS METRICS ---\n";
  519 |         report += StringFormat("Average Profit: $%.2f (%.1f%%)\n", 
  520 |                              m_results.avgProfit, m_results.avgProfit / m_config.startingBalance * 100);
  521 |         report += StringFormat("Max Profit: $%.2f (%.1f%%)\n", 
  522 |                              m_results.maxProfit, m_results.maxProfit / m_config.startingBalance * 100);
  523 |         report += StringFormat("95%% Percentile: $%.2f\n", m_results.profit95);
  524 |         report += StringFormat("5%% Percentile: $%.2f\n", m_results.profit05);
  525 |         
  526 |         report += "\n--- DRAWDOWN METRICS ---\n";
  527 |         report += StringFormat("Average Drawdown: %.2f%%\n", m_results.avgDrawdown);
  528 |         report += StringFormat("Max Drawdown: %.2f%%\n", m_results.maxDrawdown);
  529 |         report += StringFormat("95%% Percentile DD: %.2f%%\n", m_results.drawdown95);
  530 |         report += StringFormat("99%% Percentile DD: %.2f%%\n", m_results.drawdown99);
  531 |         
  532 |         report += "\n--- RISK METRICS ---\n";
  533 |         report += StringFormat("Ruin Probability (%.0f%% loss): %.2f%%\n", 
  534 |                              m_config.ruinLevel, m_results.ruinProbability);
  535 |         report += StringFormat("Target Probability (%.0f%% gain): %.2f%%\n", 
  536 |                              m_config.targetLevel - 100, m_results.targetProbability);
  537 |         report += StringFormat("Extreme DD Probability (>%.0f%%): %.2f%%\n", 
  538 |                              m_config.extremeDrawdownLevel, m_results.extremeDrawdownProb);
  539 |         report += StringFormat("Max Consecutive Losses: %d\n", m_results.maxConsecutiveLosses);
  540 |         
  541 |         report += "\n--- PERFORMANCE RATIOS ---\n";
  542 |         report += StringFormat("Sharpe Ratio: %.2f\n", m_results.sharpeRatio);
  543 |         report += StringFormat("Calmar Ratio: %.2f\n", m_results.calmarRatio);
  544 |         
  545 |         report += "\n--- RISK ASSESSMENT ---\n";
  546 |         report += GetRiskAssessment() + "\n";
  547 |         
  548 |         // Recommendations
  549 |         report += "\n--- RECOMMENDATIONS ---\n";
  550 |         if(m_results.ruinProbability > 5.0) {
  551 |             report += "• Reduce position size or risk per trade\n";
  552 |         }
  553 |         if(m_results.extremeDrawdownProb > 10.0) {
  554 |             report += "• Implement stricter stop-loss rules\n";
  555 |         }
  556 |         if(m_results.maxConsecutiveLosses > 7) {
  557 |             report += "• Add circuit breaker for consecutive losses\n";
  558 |         }
  559 |         if(m_results.calmarRatio < 1.5) {
  560 |             report += "• Improve entry timing or signal quality\n";
  561 |         }
  562 |         
  563 |         report += "=====================================\n";
  564 |         
  565 |         return report;
  566 |     }
  567 |     
  568 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  569 |     //| Estimate VaR (Value at Risk)                                    |
  570 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  571 |     double EstimateVaR(double confidenceLevel = 0.95) {
  572 |         int count = ArraySize(m_simulationPaths);
  573 |         if(count == 0) return 0;
  574 |         
  575 |         // VaR is the loss at given confidence level
  576 |         int idx = (int)(count * (1.0 - confidenceLevel));
  577 |         return -m_simulationPaths[idx];  // Return as positive value
  578 |     }
  579 |     
  580 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  581 |     //| Estimate CVaR (Conditional VaR)                                 |
  582 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  583 |     double EstimateCVaR(double confidenceLevel = 0.95) {
  584 |         int count = ArraySize(m_simulationPaths);
  585 |         if(count == 0) return 0;
  586 |         
  587 |         // CVaR is average of losses beyond VaR
  588 |         int idx = (int)(count * (1.0 - confidenceLevel));
  589 |         double sum = 0;
  590 |         int cnt = 0;
  591 |         
  592 |         for(int i = 0; i <= idx; i++) {
  593 |             sum += m_simulationPaths[i];
  594 |             cnt++;
  595 |         }
  596 |         
  597 |         return (cnt > 0) ? -sum / cnt : 0;  // Return as positive value
  598 |     }
  599 |     
  600 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  601 |     //| Random Number Generators                                        |
  602 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  603 |     double RandomDouble() {
  604 |         m_seed = m_seed * 1664525 + 1013904223;
  605 |         return (double)(m_seed & 0x7FFFFFFF) / 0x7FFFFFFF;
  606 |     }
  607 |     
  608 |     int RandomInt(int min, int max) {
  609 |         return min + (int)(RandomDouble() * (max - min + 1));
  610 |     }
  611 |     
  612 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  613 |     //| Logging Functions                                               |
  614 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  615 |     void LogInfo(string message) {
  616 |         Print("[MonteCarlo] INFO: ", message);
  617 |     }
  618 |     
  619 |     void LogWarning(string message) {
  620 |         Print("[MonteCarlo] WARNING: ", message);
  621 |     }
  622 |     
  623 |     void LogError(string message) {
  624 |         Print("[MonteCarlo] ERROR: ", message);
  625 |     }
  626 |     
  627 |     void LogSuccess(string message) {
  628 |         Print("[MonteCarlo] SUCCESS: ", message);
  629 |     }
  630 |     
  631 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  632 |     //| Getters                                                         |
  633 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  634 |     SMCResults GetResults() const { return m_results; }
  635 |     double GetRuinProbability() const { return m_results.ruinProbability; }
  636 |     double GetMaxDrawdown() const { return m_results.maxDrawdown; }
  637 |     double GetExtremeDrawdownProbability() const { return m_results.extremeDrawdownProb; }
  638 | };
  639 | 
  640 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  641 | //| Global Monte Carlo Instance                                     |
  642 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  643 | CMonteCarloSimulation* g_monteCarloSim = NULL;
  644 | 
  645 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  646 | //| Initialize Monte Carlo Simulation                               |
  647 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  648 | bool InitializeMonteCarloSimulation() {
  649 |     if(g_monteCarloSim != NULL) {
  650 |         delete g_monteCarloSim;
  651 |     }
  652 |     
  653 |     g_monteCarloSim = new CMonteCarloSimulation();
  654 |     
  655 |     // Load historical trades (simplified - would connect to trade history)
  656 |     SMCTrade historicalTrades[];
  657 |     // This would be populated from actual trade history
  658 |     
  659 |     SMCConfig config;
  660 |     config.SetDefault();
  661 |     
  662 |     // For now, initialize without historical data
  663 |     // In production, would load actual trade history
  664 |     return true;
  665 | }
  666 | 
  667 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  668 | //| Run Monte Carlo Risk Assessment                                 |
  669 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  670 | bool RunMonteCarloRiskAssessment(int iterations = 10000) {
  671 |     if(g_monteCarloSim == NULL) {
  672 |         if(!InitializeMonteCarloSimulation()) {
  673 |             return false;
  674 |         }
  675 |     }
  676 |     
  677 |     // Run simulation
  678 |     bool result = g_monteCarloSim.RunSimulation(iterations);
  679 |     
  680 |     // Print report
  681 |     if(result) {
  682 |         Print(g_monteCarloSim.GetSimulationReport());
  683 |         
  684 |         // Check risk levels
  685 |         double ruinProb = g_monteCarloSim.GetRuinProbability();
  686 |         if(ruinProb > 10.0) {
  687 |             Print("[MonteCarlo] CRITICAL: Ruin probability too high! Reduce risk immediately!");
  688 |             return false;
  689 |         }
  690 |     }
  691 |     
  692 |     return result;
  693 | }
  694 | 
  695 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  696 | //| Cleanup Monte Carlo                                             |
  697 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  698 | void CleanupMonteCarlo() {
  699 |     if(g_monteCarloSim != NULL) {
  700 |         delete g_monteCarloSim;
  701 |         g_monteCarloSim = NULL;
  702 |     }
  703 | }
  704 | 
  705 | #endif // MONTE_CARLO_RISK_MQH
