   59 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   60 | //| BASIC RISK MANAGER CLASS DEFINITION                               |
   61 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   62 | class CRiskManager
   63 | {
   64 | protected:
   65 | double m_riskPercent;
   66 | double m_riskRewardRatio;
   67 | double m_maxDailyLoss;
   68 | int m_maxDailyTrades;
   69 | 
   70 | public:
   71 | CRiskManager()
   72 | {
   73 | m_riskPercent = 2.0;      // Default 2% risk per trade
   74 | m_riskRewardRatio = 2.0;  // Default 1:2 risk-reward
   75 | m_maxDailyLoss = 5.0;     // Default 5% max daily loss
   76 | m_maxDailyTrades = 10;    // Default max 10 trades per day
   77 | }
   78 | 
   79 | virtual ~CRiskManager() {}
   80 | 
   81 | // Basic position sizing method
   82 | double CalculatePositionSize(double stopLossPoints, double accountBalance)
   83 | {
   84 | if(stopLossPoints <= 0) return 0.0;
   85 | 
   86 | double riskAmount = accountBalance * (m_riskPercent / 100.0);
   87 | double pointValue = _Point * 100000; // Standard lot size for forex
   88 | double stopLossValue = stopLossPoints * pointValue;
   89 | 
   90 | if(stopLossValue <= 0) return 0.0;
   91 | 
   92 | return riskAmount / stopLossValue;
   93 | }
   94 | 
   95 | // Getters
   96 | double GetRiskPercent() const { return m_riskPercent; }
   97 | double GetRiskRewardRatio() const { return m_riskRewardRatio; }
   98 | double GetMaxDailyLoss() const { return m_maxDailyLoss; }
   99 | int GetMaxDailyTrades() const { return m_maxDailyTrades; }
  100 | 
  101 | // Setters
  102 | void SetRiskPercent(double riskPercent) { m_riskPercent = riskPercent; }
  103 | void SetRiskRewardRatio(double ratio) { m_riskRewardRatio = ratio; }
  104 | void SetMaxDailyLoss(double maxLoss) { m_maxDailyLoss = maxLoss; }
  105 | void SetMaxDailyTrades(int maxTrades) { m_maxDailyTrades = maxTrades; }
  106 | };
  107 | 
  108 | // CKellyCriterionSizer is defined in Risk_KellyCriterion.mqh - using that implementation
  109 | 
  110 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  111 | //| ENHANCED MONTE CARLO RISK ANALYSIS - 20K SIMULATION UPGRADE     |
  112 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  113 | class CMonteCarloRiskAnalysis
  114 | {
  115 | private:
  116 | // Monte Carlo parameters - ENHANCED FOR 20K SIMULATIONS
  117 | int m_simulations;           // Number of simulations to run (20,000 target)
  118 | double m_confidenceLevel;    // Confidence level for VaR calculation
  119 | int m_lookbackPeriods;       // Historical data lookback
  120 | 
  121 | // Risk metrics storage
  122 | double m_valueAtRisk;        // VaR at specified confidence level
  123 | double m_expectedShortfall;  // Expected loss beyond VaR
  124 | double m_maxDrawdown;        // Maximum projected drawdown
  125 | double m_sharpeRatio;        // Risk-adjusted return ratio
  126 | 
  127 | // ENHANCEMENT: Real-time exposure monitoring
  128 | double m_currentExposure;    // Current portfolio exposure percentage
  129 | double m_maxExposureLimit;   // Maximum allowed exposure (5%)
  130 | datetime m_lastExposureCheck; // Last exposure calculation time
  131 | 
  132 | // ENHANCEMENT: Kelly Criterion Monte Carlo averaging
  133 | double m_kellyFractions[];   // Array of Kelly fractions from MC runs
  134 | double m_avgKellyFraction;   // Monte Carlo averaged Kelly fraction
  135 | int m_kellySimulations;      // Number of Kelly MC simulations
  136 | 
  137 | // ENHANCEMENT: Advanced risk metrics
  138 | double m_stressTestResults[]; // Stress test scenario results
  139 | double m_liquidityRisk;      // Liquidity risk assessment
  140 | double m_correlationRisk;    // Cross-asset correlation risk
  141 | bool m_emergencyMode;        // Emergency risk mode flag
  142 | double m_riskBudget;         // Available risk budget
  143 | double m_usedRiskBudget;     // Currently used risk budget
  144 | 
  145 | // Simulation data
  146 | double m_returns[];          // Historical returns array
  147 | double m_simulatedPnL[];     // Simulated P&L scenarios
  148 | bool m_initialized;
  149 | 
  150 | public:
  151 | CMonteCarloRiskAnalysis()
  152 | {
  153 | // ENHANCEMENT: Upgrade to 20K simulations for production excellence
  154 | m_simulations = 20000;  // Upgraded from 1000 to 20,000
  155 | m_confidenceLevel = 0.95;
  156 | m_lookbackPeriods = 100;
  157 | 
  158 | m_valueAtRisk = 0.0;
  159 | m_expectedShortfall = 0.0;
  160 | m_maxDrawdown = 0.0;
  161 | m_sharpeRatio = 0.0;
  162 | m_initialized = false;
  163 | 
  164 | // ENHANCEMENT: Real-time exposure monitoring initialization
  165 | m_currentExposure = 0.0;
  166 | m_maxExposureLimit = 0.05;  // 5% maximum exposure limit
  167 | m_lastExposureCheck = 0;
  168 | 
  169 | // ENHANCEMENT: Kelly Criterion Monte Carlo averaging
  170 | m_kellySimulations = 1000;  // Separate Kelly MC simulations
  171 | m_avgKellyFraction = 0.0;
  172 | ArrayResize(m_kellyFractions, m_kellySimulations);
  173 | 
  174 | // ENHANCEMENT: Advanced risk metrics initialization
  175 | ArrayResize(m_stressTestResults, 10); // 10 stress test scenarios
  176 | m_liquidityRisk = 0.0;
  177 | m_correlationRisk = 0.0;
  178 | m_emergencyMode = false;
  179 | m_riskBudget = 0.1; // 10% total risk budget
  180 | m_usedRiskBudget = 0.0;
  181 | 
  182 | ArrayResize(m_returns, m_lookbackPeriods);
  183 | ArrayResize(m_simulatedPnL, m_simulations);
  184 | }
  185 | 
  186 | ~CMonteCarloRiskAnalysis()
  187 | {
  188 | ArrayFree(m_returns);
  189 | ArrayFree(m_simulatedPnL);
  190 | ArrayFree(m_kellyFractions);  // ENHANCEMENT: Cleanup Kelly fractions array
  191 | ArrayFree(m_stressTestResults); // ENHANCEMENT: Cleanup stress test results
  192 | }
  193 | 
  194 | bool RunMonteCarloSimulation(double currentBalance, double positionSize)
  195 | {
  196 | if(!UpdateHistoricalReturns()) {
  197 | ::Print("[âš ï¸ MONTE CARLO] Failed to update historical returns");
  198 | return false;
  199 | }
  200 | 
  201 | double meanReturn = CalculateMean(m_returns);
  202 | double stdReturn = CalculateStdDev(m_returns, meanReturn);
  203 | 
  204 | for(int i = 0; i < m_simulations; i++) {
  205 | m_simulatedPnL[i] = SimulateSingleScenario(meanReturn, stdReturn, positionSize);
  206 | }
  207 | 
  208 | ArraySort(m_simulatedPnL);
  209 | 
  210 | CalculateVaR();
  211 | CalculateExpectedShortfall();
  212 | CalculateMaxDrawdown(currentBalance);
  213 | CalculateSharpeRatio();
  214 | 
  215 | m_initialized = true;
  216 | 
  217 | ::Print(StringFormat("[ðŸŽ¯ MONTE CARLO] Simulation complete | VaR: %.2f%% | ES: %.2f%% | MaxDD: %.2f%%",
  218 | m_valueAtRisk*100, m_expectedShortfall*100, m_maxDrawdown*100));
  219 | 
  220 | return true;
  221 | }
  222 | 
  223 | double CalculateOptimalPositionSize(double accountBalance, double signalConfidence, double maxRiskPercent)
  224 | {
  225 | if(!m_initialized) return 0.0;
  226 | 
  227 | double baseSize = accountBalance * maxRiskPercent * 0.01;
  228 | 
  229 | double kellyMultiplier = CalculateKellyMultiplier(signalConfidence);
  230 | 
  231 | double mcAdjustment = CalculateMonteCarloAdjustment();
  232 | 
  233 | double volAdjustment = CalculateVolatilityAdjustment();
  234 | 
  235 | double optimalSize = baseSize * kellyMultiplier * mcAdjustment * volAdjustment;
  236 | 
  237 | double maxPosition = accountBalance * 0.1;
  238 | optimalSize = MathMin(optimalSize, maxPosition);
  239 | 
  240 | ::Print(StringFormat("[POSITION SIZING] Base: %.2f | Kelly: %.2f | MC: %.2f | Vol: %.2f | Final: %.2f",
  241 | baseSize, kellyMultiplier, mcAdjustment, volAdjustment, optimalSize));
  242 | 
  243 | return MathMax(optimalSize, accountBalance * 0.001);
  244 | }
  245 | 
  246 | private:
  247 | bool UpdateHistoricalReturns()
  248 | {
  249 | MqlRates rates[];
  250 | ArraySetAsSeries(rates, true);
  251 | 
  252 | if(CopyRates(_Symbol, PERIOD_H1, 0, m_lookbackPeriods + 1, rates) < m_lookbackPeriods + 1) {
  253 | return false;
  254 | }
  255 | 
  256 | for(int i = 0; i < m_lookbackPeriods; i++) {
  257 | if(rates[i+1].close > 0) {
  258 | m_returns[i] = (rates[i].close - rates[i+1].close) / rates[i+1].close;
  259 | } else {
  260 | m_returns[i] = 0.0;
  261 | }
  262 | }
  263 | 
  264 | return true;
  265 | }
  266 | 
  267 | double SimulateSingleScenario(double mean, double stdDev, double positionSize)
  268 | {
  269 | static bool hasSpare = false;
  270 | static double spare;
  271 | 
  272 | double randomReturn;
  273 | 
  274 | if(hasSpare) {
  275 | randomReturn = spare;
  276 | hasSpare = false;
  277 | } else {
  278 | double u1 = (double)MathRand() / 32767.0;
  279 | double u2 = (double)MathRand() / 32767.0;
  280 | 
  281 | double mag = stdDev * MathSqrt(-2.0 * MathLog(u1));
  282 | randomReturn = mag * MathCos(2.0 * M_PI * u2) + mean;
  283 | spare = mag * MathSin(2.0 * M_PI * u2) + mean;
  284 | hasSpare = true;
  285 | }
  286 | 
  287 | return positionSize * randomReturn;
  288 | }
  289 | 
  290 | void CalculateVaR()
  291 | {
  292 | int varIndex = (int)(m_simulations * (1.0 - m_confidenceLevel));
  293 | m_valueAtRisk = -m_simulatedPnL[varIndex];
  294 | }
  295 | 
  296 | void CalculateExpectedShortfall()
  297 | {
  298 | int varIndex = (int)(m_simulations * (1.0 - m_confidenceLevel));
  299 | double sum = 0.0;
  300 | int count = 0;
  301 | 
  302 | for(int i = 0; i < varIndex; i++) {
  303 | sum += m_simulatedPnL[i];
  304 | count++;
  305 | }
  306 | 
  307 | m_expectedShortfall = (count > 0) ? -sum / count : 0.0;
  308 | }
  309 | 
  310 | void CalculateMaxDrawdown(double currentBalance)
  311 | {
  312 | double peak = currentBalance;
  313 | double maxDD = 0.0;
  314 | 
  315 | for(int i = 0; i < m_simulations; i++) {
  316 | double equity = currentBalance + m_simulatedPnL[i];
  317 | 
  318 | if(equity > peak) {
  319 | peak = equity;
  320 | } else {
  321 | double drawdown = (peak - equity) / peak;
  322 | if(drawdown > maxDD) {
  323 | maxDD = drawdown;
  324 | }
  325 | }
  326 | }
  327 | 
  328 | m_maxDrawdown = maxDD;
  329 | }
  330 | 
  331 | void CalculateSharpeRatio()
  332 | {
  333 | double meanPnL = CalculateMean(m_simulatedPnL);
  334 | double stdPnL = CalculateStdDev(m_simulatedPnL, meanPnL);
  335 | 
  336 | m_sharpeRatio = (stdPnL > 0) ? meanPnL / stdPnL : 0.0;
  337 | }
  338 | 
  339 | double CalculateKellyMultiplier(double confidence)
  340 | {
  341 | double winProb = confidence;
  342 | double lossProb = 1.0 - confidence;
  343 | double avgWin = 2.0;
  344 | double avgLoss = 1.0;
  345 | 
  346 | double kellyFraction = (avgWin * winProb - lossProb) / avgWin;
  347 | 
  348 | return MathMax(0.1, MathMin(1.0, kellyFraction * 0.25));
  349 | }
  350 | 
  351 | double CalculateMonteCarloAdjustment()
  352 | {
  353 | double riskScore = (m_valueAtRisk + m_expectedShortfall) / 2.0;
  354 | 
  355 | if(riskScore > 0.1) return 0.5;
  356 | if(riskScore > 0.05) return 0.75;
  357 | return 1.0;
  358 | }
  359 | 
  360 | double CalculateVolatilityAdjustment()
  361 | {
  362 | int atrHandle = iATR(_Symbol, PERIOD_H1, 14);
  363 | double atr[];
  364 | ArraySetAsSeries(atr, true);
  365 | 
  366 | if(CopyBuffer(atrHandle, 0, 0, 1, atr) < 1) {
  367 | IndicatorRelease(atrHandle);
  368 | return 1.0;
  369 | }
  370 | 
  371 | double currentATR = atr[0];
  372 | IndicatorRelease(atrHandle);
  373 | 
  374 | double avgATR = 0.0;
  375 | for(int i = 0; i < m_lookbackPeriods; i++) {
  376 | avgATR += MathAbs(m_returns[i]);
  377 | }
  378 | avgATR /= m_lookbackPeriods;
  379 | 
  380 | double volRatio = (avgATR > 0) ? currentATR / avgATR : 1.0;
  381 | 
  382 | if(volRatio > 2.0) return 0.5;
  383 | if(volRatio > 1.5) return 0.75;
  384 | if(volRatio < 0.5) return 1.25;
  385 | return 1.0;
  386 | }
  387 | 
  388 | double CalculateMean(const double& array[])
  389 | {
  390 | double sum = 0.0;
  391 | int size = ArraySize(array);
  392 | 
  393 | for(int i = 0; i < size; i++) {
  394 | sum += array[i];
  395 | }
  396 | 
  397 | return sum / size;
  398 | }
  399 | 
  400 | double CalculateStdDev(const double& array[], double mean)
  401 | {
  402 | double sum = 0.0;
  403 | int size = ArraySize(array);
  404 | 
  405 | for(int i = 0; i < size; i++) {
  406 | double diff = array[i] - mean;
  407 | sum += diff * diff;
  408 | }
  409 | 
  410 | return MathSqrt(sum / (size - 1));
  411 | }
  412 | 
  413 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  414 | //| ENHANCEMENT: Real-time Exposure Monitoring (Max 5%)             |
  415 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  416 | 
  417 | 
  418 | 
  419 | double CalculatePositionRisk()
  420 | {
  421 | double openPrice = PositionGetDouble(POSITION_PRICE_OPEN);
  422 | double sl = PositionGetDouble(POSITION_SL);
  423 | double volume = PositionGetDouble(POSITION_VOLUME);
  424 | 
  425 | if(sl == 0) return 0;  // No stop loss
  426 | 
  427 | double pips = MathAbs(openPrice - sl) / _Point;
  428 | double tickValue = SymbolInfoDouble(PositionGetString(POSITION_SYMBOL), SYMBOL_TRADE_TICK_VALUE);
  429 | 
  430 | return pips * tickValue * volume;
  431 | }
  432 | 
  433 | 
  434 | 
  435 | 
  436 | 
  437 | public:
  438 | double GetVaR() { return m_valueAtRisk; }
  439 | double GetExpectedShortfall() { return m_expectedShortfall; }
  440 | double GetMaxDrawdown() { return m_maxDrawdown; }
  441 | double GetSharpeRatio() { return m_sharpeRatio; }
  442 | 
  443 | // ENHANCEMENT: New getters for enhanced functionality
  444 | double GetCurrentExposure() { UpdateCurrentExposure(); return m_currentExposure; }
  445 | double GetMaxExposureLimit() { return m_maxExposureLimit; }
  446 | double GetAvgKellyFraction() { return m_avgKellyFraction; }
  447 | 
  448 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  449 | //| ENHANCEMENT: Kelly Criterion Monte Carlo Averaging              |
  450 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  451 | double CalculateKellyMCAveraged(double winRate, double avgWin, double avgLoss)
  452 | {
  453 | // Run Monte Carlo simulations for Kelly Criterion
  454 | for(int i = 0; i < m_kellySimulations; i++) {
  455 | // Add noise to parameters to simulate uncertainty
  456 | double noiseWinRate = winRate + (MathRand()/32767.0 - 0.5) * 0.1;  // ±5% noise
  457 | double noiseAvgWin = avgWin + (MathRand()/32767.0 - 0.5) * avgWin * 0.2;  // ±10% noise
  458 | double noiseAvgLoss = avgLoss + (MathRand()/32767.0 - 0.5) * avgLoss * 0.2; // ±10% noise
  459 | 
  460 | // Ensure valid ranges
  461 | noiseWinRate = MathMax(0.1, MathMin(0.9, noiseWinRate));
  462 | noiseAvgWin = MathMax(0.5, noiseAvgWin);
  463 | noiseAvgLoss = MathMax(0.5, noiseAvgLoss);
  464 | 
  465 | // Calculate Kelly fraction for this scenario
  466 | double kellyFraction = (noiseWinRate * noiseAvgWin - (1.0 - noiseWinRate) * noiseAvgLoss) / noiseAvgWin;
  467 | m_kellyFractions[i] = MathMax(0.0, MathMin(0.25, kellyFraction));  // Cap at 25%
  468 | }
  469 | 
  470 | // Calculate average Kelly fraction
  471 | double sum = 0.0;
  472 | for(int i = 0; i < m_kellySimulations; i++) {
  473 | sum += m_kellyFractions[i];
  474 | }
  475 | 
  476 | m_avgKellyFraction = sum / m_kellySimulations;
  477 | 
  478 | ::Print(StringFormat("[TARGET KELLY MC] Averaged Kelly Fraction: %.3f (from %d simulations)",
  479 | m_avgKellyFraction, m_kellySimulations));
  480 | 
  481 | return m_avgKellyFraction;
  482 | }
  483 | 
  484 | // ENHANCEMENT: Real-time exposure monitoring
  485 | bool CheckExposureLimit()
  486 | {
  487 | UpdateCurrentExposure();
  488 | 
  489 | double projectedExposure = m_currentExposure;
  490 | 
  491 | if(projectedExposure > m_maxExposureLimit) {
  492 | ::Print(StringFormat("[⚠️ EXPOSURE LIMIT] Current: %.2f%% + New: %.2f%% = %.2f%% > Limit: %.2f%%",
  493 | m_currentExposure*100, 0.0, projectedExposure*100, m_maxExposureLimit*100));
  494 | return false;
  495 | }
  496 | 
  497 | return true;
  498 | }
  499 | 
  500 | // ENHANCEMENT: Kelly Criterion confidence interval
  501 | double GetKellyConfidenceInterval(double confidence = 0.95)
  502 | {
  503 | if(ArraySize(m_kellyFractions) == 0) return 0.0;
  504 | 
  505 | // Sort Kelly fractions for percentile calculation
  506 | double sortedKelly[];
  507 | ArrayResize(sortedKelly, m_kellySimulations);
  508 | ArrayCopy(sortedKelly, m_kellyFractions);
  509 | ArraySort(sortedKelly);
  510 | 
  511 | int lowerIndex = (int)((1.0 - confidence) / 2.0 * m_kellySimulations);
  512 | int upperIndex = (int)((1.0 + confidence) / 2.0 * m_kellySimulations);
  513 | 
  514 | double ciWidth = sortedKelly[upperIndex] - sortedKelly[lowerIndex];
  515 | 
  516 | ArrayFree(sortedKelly);
  517 | return ciWidth;
  518 | }
  519 | 
  520 | // ENHANCEMENT: Update current exposure
  521 | void UpdateCurrentExposure()
  522 | {
  523 | if(TimeCurrent() - m_lastExposureCheck < 60) return;  // Update every minute
  524 | 
  525 | m_currentExposure = 0.0;
  526 | double accountBalance = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_BALANCE);
  527 | 
  528 | // Calculate exposure from all open positions
  529 | CPositionInfo posInfo;
  530 | for(int i = 0; i < PositionsTotal(); i++) {
  531 | if(posInfo.SelectByIndex(i)) {
  532 | double positionRisk = CalculatePositionRisk();
  533 | m_currentExposure += positionRisk / accountBalance;
  534 | }
  535 | }
  536 | 
  537 | m_lastExposureCheck = TimeCurrent();
  538 | 
  539 | // Log exposure if approaching limit
  540 | if(m_currentExposure > m_maxExposureLimit * 0.8) {
  541 | ::Print(StringFormat("[📊 EXPOSURE WARNING] Current exposure: %.2f%% (Limit: %.2f%%)",
  542 | m_currentExposure*100, m_maxExposureLimit*100));
  543 | }
  544 | }
  545 | 
  546 | void SetSimulations(int count) { m_simulations = count; }
  547 | void SetConfidenceLevel(double level) { m_confidenceLevel = level; }
  548 | void SetLookbackPeriods(int periods) { m_lookbackPeriods = periods; }
  549 | void SetMaxExposureLimit(double limit) { m_maxExposureLimit = MathMax(0.01, MathMin(0.1, limit)); }  // 1-10% range
  550 | 
  551 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  552 | //| ENHANCEMENT: Advanced Risk Management Methods                    |
  553 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  554 | 
  555 | // Stress testing with multiple scenarios
  556 | bool RunStressTest(double accountBalance)
  557 | {
  558 | ::Print("[🔬 STRESS TEST] Running 10 stress scenarios...");
  559 | 
  560 | // Scenario 1: Market crash (-30% in 1 day)
  561 | m_stressTestResults[0] = SimulateStressScenario(-0.30, 1, accountBalance);
  562 | 
  563 | // Scenario 2: Flash crash (-10% in 1 hour)
  564 | m_stressTestResults[1] = SimulateStressScenario(-0.10, 0.04, accountBalance);
  565 | 
  566 | // Scenario 3: High volatility (3x normal)
  567 | m_stressTestResults[2] = SimulateVolatilityStress(3.0, accountBalance);
  568 | 
  569 | // Scenario 4: Liquidity crisis (spreads widen 5x)
  570 | m_stressTestResults[3] = SimulateLiquidityStress(5.0, accountBalance);
  571 | 
  572 | // Scenario 5: Correlation breakdown (all correlations → 1)
  573 | m_stressTestResults[4] = SimulateCorrelationStress(1.0, accountBalance);
  574 | 
  575 | // Additional scenarios 6-10
  576 | for(int i = 5; i < 10; i++) {
  577 | m_stressTestResults[i] = SimulateRandomStress(accountBalance);
  578 | }
  579 | 
  580 | // Analyze worst-case scenario
  581 | double worstCase = m_stressTestResults[0];
  582 | for(int i = 1; i < 10; i++) {
  583 | if(m_stressTestResults[i] < worstCase) {
  584 | worstCase = m_stressTestResults[i];
  585 | }
  586 | }
  587 | 
  588 | ::Print(StringFormat("[🔬 STRESS TEST] Worst case loss: %.2f%% of account",
  589 | MathAbs(worstCase) / accountBalance * 100));
  590 | 
  591 | return (MathAbs(worstCase) / accountBalance) < 0.5; // Max 50% loss in stress
  592 | }
  593 | 
  594 | // Simulate specific stress scenario
  595 | double SimulateStressScenario(double returnShock, double timeFrame, double accountBalance)
  596 | {
  597 | double totalLoss = 0.0;
  598 | 
  599 | // Calculate position exposure
  600 | CPositionInfo posInfo;
  601 | for(int i = 0; i < PositionsTotal(); i++) {
  602 | if(posInfo.SelectByIndex(i)) {
  603 | double positionValue = posInfo.Volume() * posInfo.PriceOpen();
  604 | double positionLoss = positionValue * MathAbs(returnShock);
  605 | totalLoss += positionLoss;
  606 | }
  607 | }
  608 | 
  609 | return -totalLoss; // Negative for loss
  610 | }
  611 | 
  612 | // Simulate volatility stress
  613 | double SimulateVolatilityStress(double volMultiplier, double accountBalance)
  614 | {
  615 | double enhancedVol = 0.0;
  616 | for(int i = 0; i < m_lookbackPeriods; i++) {
  617 | enhancedVol += MathAbs(m_returns[i]) * volMultiplier;
  618 | }
  619 | enhancedVol /= m_lookbackPeriods;
  620 | 
  621 | return -accountBalance * enhancedVol * 0.1; // Estimate 10% of enhanced vol as loss
  622 | }
  623 | 
  624 | // Simulate liquidity stress
  625 | double SimulateLiquidityStress(double spreadMultiplier, double accountBalance)
  626 | {
  627 | double liquidityLoss = 0.0;
  628 | double currentSpread = SymbolInfoInteger(_Symbol, SYMBOL_SPREAD) * _Point;
  629 | double stressSpread = currentSpread * spreadMultiplier;
  630 | 
  631 | // Estimate liquidity loss based on position turnover
  632 | CPositionInfo posInfo;
  633 | for(int i = 0; i < PositionsTotal(); i++) {
  634 | if(posInfo.SelectByIndex(i)) {
  635 | double positionValue = posInfo.Volume() * posInfo.PriceOpen();
  636 | liquidityLoss += positionValue * (stressSpread / posInfo.PriceOpen());
  637 | }
  638 | }
  639 | 
  640 | return -liquidityLoss;
  641 | }
  642 | 
  643 | // Simulate correlation stress
  644 | double SimulateCorrelationStress(double targetCorrelation, double accountBalance)
  645 | {
  646 | // Simplified correlation stress - assume all positions move together
  647 | double totalExposure = 0.0;
  648 | 
  649 | CPositionInfo posInfo;
  650 | for(int i = 0; i < PositionsTotal(); i++) {
  651 | if(posInfo.SelectByIndex(i)) {
  652 | totalExposure += posInfo.Volume() * posInfo.PriceOpen();
  653 | }
  654 | }
  655 | 
  656 | // Assume 5% adverse move when all correlations = 1
  657 | return -totalExposure * 0.05 * targetCorrelation;
  658 | }
  659 | 
  660 | // Simulate random stress scenario
  661 | double SimulateRandomStress(double accountBalance)
  662 | {
  663 | double randomShock = (MathRand() / 32767.0 - 0.5) * 0.4; // ±20% random shock
  664 | return SimulateStressScenario(randomShock, 1.0, accountBalance);
  665 | }
  666 | 
  667 | // Check if emergency mode should be activated
  668 | bool ShouldActivateEmergencyMode(double accountBalance)
  669 | {
  670 | // Check current drawdown
  671 | double currentEquity = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_EQUITY);
  672 | double drawdown = (accountBalance - currentEquity) / accountBalance;
  673 | 
  674 | if(drawdown > 0.15) { // 15% drawdown threshold
  675 | ::Print(StringFormat("[🚨 EMERGENCY] Drawdown threshold exceeded: %.2f%%", drawdown * 100));
  676 | return true;
  677 | }
  678 | 
  679 | // Check stress test results
  680 | if(!RunStressTest(accountBalance)) {
  681 | ::Print("[🚨 EMERGENCY] Stress test failed");
  682 | return true;
  683 | }
  684 | 
  685 | // Check exposure limits
  686 | if(m_currentExposure > m_maxExposureLimit * 1.2) { // 20% over limit
  687 | ::Print("[🚨 EMERGENCY] Exposure limit severely exceeded");
  688 | return true;
  689 | }
  690 | 
  691 | return false;
  692 | }
  693 | 
  694 | // Activate emergency risk mode
  695 | void ActivateEmergencyMode()
  696 | {
  697 | m_emergencyMode = true;
  698 | m_maxExposureLimit *= 0.5; // Halve exposure limit
  699 | ::Print("[🚨 EMERGENCY MODE ACTIVATED] Risk limits tightened");
  700 | }
  701 | 
  702 | // Deactivate emergency mode
  703 | void DeactivateEmergencyMode()
  704 | {
  705 | m_emergencyMode = false;
  706 | m_maxExposureLimit *= 2.0; // Restore normal exposure limit
  707 | ::Print("[✅ EMERGENCY MODE DEACTIVATED] Normal risk limits restored");
  708 | }
  709 | 
  710 | // Get emergency mode status
  711 | bool IsEmergencyMode() { return m_emergencyMode; }
  712 | 
  713 | // Update risk budget tracking
  714 | void UpdateRiskBudget(double newTradeRisk)
  715 | {
  716 | m_usedRiskBudget += newTradeRisk;
  717 | 
  718 | if(m_usedRiskBudget > m_riskBudget * 0.8) {
  719 | PrintFormat("[⚠️ RISK BUDGET] %.1f%% of risk budget used",
  720 | m_usedRiskBudget / m_riskBudget * 100);
  721 | }
  722 | }
  723 | 
  724 | // Check if risk budget allows new trade
  725 | bool HasRiskBudget(double proposedRisk)
  726 | {
  727 | return (m_usedRiskBudget + proposedRisk) <= m_riskBudget;
  728 | }
  729 | 
  730 | // Reset risk budget (daily/weekly)
  731 | void ResetRiskBudget()
  732 | {
  733 | m_usedRiskBudget = 0.0;
  734 | ::Print("[🔄 RISK BUDGET] Risk budget reset");
  735 | }
  736 | 
  737 | // Getters for advanced risk metrics
  738 | double GetLiquidityRisk() { return m_liquidityRisk; }
  739 | double GetCorrelationRisk() { return m_correlationRisk; }
  740 | double GetRiskBudgetUsed() { return m_usedRiskBudget; }
  741 | double GetRiskBudgetAvailable() { return m_riskBudget - m_usedRiskBudget; }
  742 | };
  743 | 
  744 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  745 | //| DYNAMIC RISK-REWARD SYSTEM                                      |
  746 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  747 | 
  748 | enum ENUM_MARKET_CONDITION
  749 | {
  750 | MARKET_TRENDING,
  751 | MARKET_RANGING,
  752 | MARKET_VOLATILE
  753 | };
  754 | 
  755 | // MarketContext is defined in SonicR_CommonStructs.mqh - using that definition
  756 | 
  757 | class CDynamicRiskReward
  758 | {
  759 | private:
  760 | struct RRParameters
  761 | {
  762 | double baseRR;
  763 | double confidenceMultiplier;
  764 | double volatilityAdjustment;
  765 | double marketConditionFactor;
  766 | };
  767 | 
  768 | struct LocalMarketContext {
  769 | double signalConfidence;
  770 | double currentVolatility;
  771 | ENUM_MARKET_CONDITION marketCondition;
  772 | };
  773 | 
  774 | double CalculateAverageATR(int periods)
  775 | {
  776 | double atrBuffer[];
  777 | int atrHandle = iATR(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 14);
  778 | if(CopyBuffer(atrHandle, 0, 0, periods, atrBuffer) < periods) {
  779 | IndicatorRelease(atrHandle);
  780 | return 0.0;
  781 | }
  782 | IndicatorRelease(atrHandle);
  783 | double sum = 0.0;
  784 | for(int i = 0; i < periods; i++) {
  785 | sum += atrBuffer[i];
  786 | }
  787 | return sum / periods;
  788 | }
  789 | 
  790 | public:
  791 | double CalculateDynamicRR(double signalConfidence, double currentVolatility, ENUM_MARKET_CONDITION condition)
  792 | {
  793 | LocalMarketContext context;
  794 | context.signalConfidence = signalConfidence;
  795 | context.currentVolatility = currentVolatility;
  796 | context.marketCondition = condition;
  797 | RRParameters params;
  798 | params = GetOptimalParameters(context);
  799 | 
  800 | double dynamicRR = params.baseRR * params.confidenceMultiplier * params.volatilityAdjustment * params.marketConditionFactor;
  801 | 
  802 | return MathMax(1.0, MathMin(4.0, dynamicRR));
  803 | }
  804 | 
  805 | RRParameters GetOptimalParameters(const LocalMarketContext& context)
  806 | {
  807 | RRParameters params;
  808 | params.baseRR = 2.0;
  809 | params.confidenceMultiplier = (context.signalConfidence > 0.8) ? 1.2 : 0.8;
  810 | params.volatilityAdjustment = (context.currentVolatility < 1.0) ? 1.1 : 0.9;
  811 | params.marketConditionFactor = 1.0;
  812 | 
  813 | switch(context.marketCondition)
  814 | {
  815 | case MARKET_TRENDING:
  816 | params.marketConditionFactor = 1.3;
  817 | break;
  818 | case MARKET_RANGING:
  819 | params.marketConditionFactor = 0.9;
  820 | break;
  821 | case MARKET_VOLATILE:
  822 | params.marketConditionFactor = 0.7;
  823 | break;
  824 | }
  825 | 
  826 | return params;
  827 | }
  828 | };
  829 | 
  830 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  831 | //| ENHANCED PORTFOLIO CORRELATION ANALYSIS                         |
  832 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  833 | class CPortfolioCorrelationAnalysis
  834 | {
  835 | private:
  836 | string m_symbols[10];        // Symbols in portfolio
  837 | int m_symbolCount;
  838 | double m_correlationMatrix[10][10]; // Correlation matrix
  839 | double m_weights[10];        // Portfolio weights
  840 | bool m_matrixValid;
  841 | 
  842 | public:
  843 | CPortfolioCorrelationAnalysis()
  844 | {
  845 | m_symbolCount = 0;
  846 | m_matrixValid = false;
  847 | 
  848 | // Initialize correlation matrix
  849 | for(int i = 0; i < 10; i++) {
  850 | m_weights[i] = 0.0;
  851 | for(int j = 0; j < 10; j++) {
  852 | m_correlationMatrix[i][j] = (i == j) ? 1.0 : 0.0;
  853 | }
  854 | }
  855 | }
  856 | 
  857 | bool AddSymbol(string symbol, double weight = 0.0)
  858 | {
  859 | if(m_symbolCount >= 10) return false;
  860 | 
  861 | m_symbols[m_symbolCount] = symbol;
  862 | m_weights[m_symbolCount] = weight;
  863 | m_symbolCount++;
  864 | m_matrixValid = false; // Need to recalculate
  865 | 
  866 | return true;
  867 | }
  868 | 
  869 | bool CalculateCorrelationMatrix(int lookbackPeriods = 100)
  870 | {
  871 | if(m_symbolCount < 2) return false;
  872 | 
  873 | // Get returns for all symbols (using individual arrays to avoid reference issues)
  874 | double symbolReturns[100];
  875 | 
  876 | for(int s = 0; s < m_symbolCount; s++) {
  877 | ArrayInitialize(symbolReturns, 0.0);
  878 | if(!GetSymbolReturns(m_symbols[s], symbolReturns, lookbackPeriods)) {
  879 | PrintFormat("[âš ï¸ CORRELATION] Failed to get returns for %s", m_symbols[s]);
  880 | return false;
  881 | }
  882 | // Store returns for later correlation calculation (simplified approach)
  883 | }
  884 | 
  885 | // Simplified correlation calculation (placeholder for now)
  886 | for(int i = 0; i < m_symbolCount; i++) {
  887 | for(int j = i; j < m_symbolCount; j++) {
  888 | if(i == j) {
  889 | m_correlationMatrix[i][j] = 1.0;
  890 | } else {
  891 | // Simplified correlation - real implementation would need proper data storage
  892 | double correlation = 0.5; // Placeholder value
  893 | m_correlationMatrix[i][j] = correlation;
  894 | m_correlationMatrix[j][i] = correlation; // Symmetric matrix
  895 | }
  896 | }
  897 | }
  898 | 
  899 | m_matrixValid = true;
  900 | return true;
  901 | }
  902 | 
  903 | double GetPortfolioRisk()
  904 | {
  905 | if(!m_matrixValid) {
  906 | if(!CalculateCorrelationMatrix()) return 0.0;
  907 | }
  908 | 
  909 | double portfolioVariance = 0.0;
  910 | 
  911 | // Calculate portfolio variance using correlation matrix
  912 | for(int i = 0; i < m_symbolCount; i++) {
  913 | for(int j = 0; j < m_symbolCount; j++) {
  914 | double weight_i = m_weights[i];
  915 | double weight_j = m_weights[j];
  916 | double correlation = m_correlationMatrix[i][j];
  917 | 
  918 | // Simplified: assume all symbols have similar individual risk
  919 | double risk_i = 0.02; // 2% individual risk
  920 | double risk_j = 0.02;
  921 | 
  922 | portfolioVariance += weight_i * weight_j * correlation * risk_i * risk_j;
  923 | }
  924 | }
  925 | 
  926 | return MathSqrt(portfolioVariance);
  927 | }
  928 | 
  929 | bool IsCorrelationAcceptable(string newSymbol, double maxCorrelation = 0.7)
  930 | {
  931 | if(m_symbolCount == 0) return true; // First symbol always acceptable
  932 | 
  933 | // Get returns for new symbol
  934 | double newReturns[100];
  935 | if(!GetSymbolReturns(newSymbol, newReturns, 100)) return false;
  936 | 
  937 | // Check correlation with existing symbols
  938 | for(int i = 0; i < m_symbolCount; i++) {
  939 | double existingReturns[100];
  940 | if(!GetSymbolReturns(m_symbols[i], existingReturns, 100)) continue;
  941 | 
  942 | double correlation = CalculateCorrelation(newReturns, existingReturns, 100);
  943 | if(MathAbs(correlation) > maxCorrelation) {
  944 | PrintFormat("[âš ï¸ CORRELATION] %s highly correlated with %s (%.2f)",
  945 | newSymbol, m_symbols[i], correlation);
  946 | return false;
  947 | }
  948 | }
  949 | 
  950 | return true;
  951 | }
  952 | 
  953 | private:
  954 | bool GetSymbolReturns(string symbol, double& returns[], int periods)
  955 | {
  956 | MqlRates rates[];
  957 | ArraySetAsSeries(rates, true);
  958 | 
  959 | if(CopyRates(symbol, PERIOD_H1, 0, periods + 1, rates) < periods + 1) {
  960 | return false;
  961 | }
  962 | 
  963 | ArrayResize(returns, periods);
  964 | 
  965 | for(int i = 0; i < periods; i++) {
  966 | if(rates[i+1].close > 0) {
  967 | returns[i] = (rates[i].close - rates[i+1].close) / rates[i+1].close;
  968 | } else {
  969 | returns[i] = 0.0;
  970 | }
  971 | }
  972 | 
  973 | return true;
  974 | }
  975 | 
  976 | double CalculateCorrelation(const double& x[], const double& y[], int size)
  977 | {
  978 | double meanX = 0.0, meanY = 0.0;
  979 | 
  980 | // Calculate means
  981 | for(int i = 0; i < size; i++) {
  982 | meanX += x[i];
  983 | meanY += y[i];
  984 | }
  985 | meanX /= size;
  986 | meanY /= size;
  987 | 
  988 | // Calculate correlation coefficient
  989 | double numerator = 0.0, denomX = 0.0, denomY = 0.0;
  990 | 
  991 | for(int i = 0; i < size; i++) {
  992 | double diffX = x[i] - meanX;
  993 | double diffY = y[i] - meanY;
  994 | 
  995 | numerator += diffX * diffY;
  996 | denomX += diffX * diffX;
  997 | denomY += diffY * diffY;
  998 | }
  999 | 
 1000 | double denominator = MathSqrt(denomX * denomY);
 1001 | return (denominator > 0) ? numerator / denominator : 0.0;
 1002 | }
 1003 | 
 1004 | public:
 1005 | string GetCorrelationReport()
 1006 | {
 1007 | if(!m_matrixValid) return "Correlation matrix not calculated";
 1008 | 
 1009 | string report = "Portfolio Correlation Matrix:\n";
 1010 | 
 1011 | for(int i = 0; i < m_symbolCount; i++) {
 1012 | report += m_symbols[i] + ": ";
 1013 | for(int j = 0; j < m_symbolCount; j++) {
 1014 | report += StringFormat("%.2f ", m_correlationMatrix[i][j]);
 1015 | }
 1016 | report += "\n";
 1017 | }
 1018 | 
 1019 | report += StringFormat("Portfolio Risk: %.2f%%", GetPortfolioRisk() * 100);
 1020 | 
 1021 | return report;
 1022 | }
 1023 | };

 1030 | CPortfolioCorrelationAnalysis* m_portfolioAnalysis;
 1031 | CKellyCriterionSizer* m_kellySizer;

 1048 | // m_kellySizer.UpdateTradeHistory(tradeResult); // COMMENTED OUT: Method not available in this context

 1057 | double currentVolatility = 10.0; // Placeholder volatility value
 1058 | ENUM_MARKET_CONDITION condition = MARKET_TRENDING; // Use default for now - will implement proper detection later
 1059 | return rrCalculator.CalculateDynamicRR(signalConfidence, currentVolatility, condition);
 1060 | }

 1097 | 
 1098 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1099 | //| [ROCKET] ENHANCED POSITION SIZING WITH MONTE CARLO                    |
 1100 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1101 | double CalculateEnhancedPositionSize(double signalConfidence, double accountBalance)
 1102 | {
 1103 | if(!m_useMonteCarloSizing) {
 1104 | double stopLossPoints = 50.0; // Default stop loss in points
 1105 | return CRiskManager::CalculatePositionSize(stopLossPoints, accountBalance);
 1106 | }
 1107 | 
 1108 | // 1. Check real-time exposure limits before sizing
 1109 | if(!m_monteCarloAnalysis.CheckExposureLimit()) {
 1110 | ::PrintFormat("[ðŸ›¡ï¸ EXPOSURE BLOCK] Maximum exposure limit reached: %s%%", DoubleToString(m_monteCarloAnalysis.GetCurrentExposure() * 100, 2));
 1111 | return 0.0; // Block trade due to exposure limit
 1112 | }
 1113 | 
 1114 | // 2. Run enhanced 20k Monte Carlo simulation
 1115 | double baseSize = accountBalance * 0.02; // 2% base risk
 1116 | m_monteCarloAnalysis.RunMonteCarloSimulation(accountBalance, baseSize);
 1117 | 
 1118 | // 3. Get Kelly Criterion with Monte Carlo averaging
 1119 | double kellyMC = m_monteCarloAnalysis.CalculateKellyMCAveraged(0.6, 2.0, 1.0); // Default parameters
 1120 | double kellyConfidence = m_monteCarloAnalysis.GetKellyConfidenceInterval();
 1121 | 
 1122 | // 4. Get optimal position size with enhanced Kelly
 1123 | double mcSize = m_monteCarloAnalysis.CalculateOptimalPositionSize(
 1124 | accountBalance, signalConfidence, 2.0);
 1125 | double kellySize = accountBalance * kellyMC * 0.5; // Conservative Kelly application
 1126 | 
 1127 | // 5. Use confidence-weighted sizing
 1128 | double confidenceWeight = MathMin(kellyConfidence, 1.0);
 1129 | double optimalSize = (mcSize * (1.0 - confidenceWeight)) + (kellySize * confidenceWeight);
 1130 | 
 1131 | // 6. Calculate position risk for exposure tracking
 1132 | double positionRisk = optimalSize * 0.02; // Estimate 2% risk per position
 1133 | 
 1134 | // 7. Apply additional filters
 1135 | optimalSize = ApplyRiskFilters(optimalSize, accountBalance);
 1136 | 
 1137 | // 8. Update exposure tracking
 1138 | m_monteCarloAnalysis.UpdateCurrentExposure();
 1139 | 
 1140 | PrintFormat("[ROCKET] [ENHANCED SIZING] MC: %.4f | Kelly: %.4f (CI: %.2f) | Final: %.4f | Risk: %.2f%%",
 1141 | mcSize, kellySize, kellyConfidence, optimalSize, positionRisk * 100);
 1142 | 
 1143 | return optimalSize;
 1144 | }
 1145 | 
 1146 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1147 | //| ðŸš€ DYNAMIC RISK MANAGEMENT                                       |
 1148 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1149 | bool ShouldBlockTradeForRisk(double signalConfidence)
 1150 | {
 1151 | // 0. Check real-time exposure limits (NEW)
 1152 | if(!m_monteCarloAnalysis.CheckExposureLimit()) {
 1153 | ::PrintFormat("[ðŸ›¡ï¸ RISK BLOCK] Real-time exposure limit exceeded: %.2f%%", m_monteCarloAnalysis.GetCurrentExposure() * 100);
 1154 | return true;
 1155 | }
 1156 | 
 1157 | // 1. Check Monte Carlo risk metrics (Enhanced with 20k simulations)
 1158 | if(m_monteCarloAnalysis.GetVaR() > 0.15) { // 15% VaR limit
 1159 | ::PrintFormat("[ðŸ›¡ï¸ RISK BLOCK] High VaR detected: %.1f%%", m_monteCarloAnalysis.GetVaR() * 100);
 1160 | return true;
 1161 | }
 1162 | 
 1163 | // 2. Check maximum drawdown
 1164 | if(m_monteCarloAnalysis.GetMaxDrawdown() > 0.25) { // 25% max drawdown
 1165 | ::PrintFormat("[ðŸ›¡ï¸ RISK BLOCK] High projected drawdown: %.1f%%", m_monteCarloAnalysis.GetMaxDrawdown() * 100);
 1166 | return true;
 1167 | }
 1168 | 
 1169 | // 2.5. Check Kelly Criterion confidence (NEW)
 1170 | double kellyConfidence = m_monteCarloAnalysis.GetKellyConfidenceInterval();
 1171 | if(kellyConfidence < 0.3) { // Minimum 30% Kelly confidence
 1172 | ::PrintFormat("[ðŸ›¡ï¸ RISK BLOCK] Low Kelly confidence: %.1f%%", kellyConfidence * 100);
 1173 | return true;
 1174 | }
 1175 | 
 1176 | // 3. Check portfolio correlation risk
 1177 | double portfolioRisk = m_portfolioAnalysis.GetPortfolioRisk();
 1178 | if(portfolioRisk > 0.3) { // 30% portfolio risk limit
 1179 | ::PrintFormat("[ðŸ›¡ï¸ RISK BLOCK] High portfolio risk: %.1f%%", portfolioRisk * 100);
 1180 | return true;
 1181 | }
 1182 | 
 1183 | // 4. Check Wyckoff phase filter - FIXED: Fallback when PVSRA not available
 1184 | // Since PVSRA modules are disabled, use conservative approach
 1185 | bool wyckoffBlock = false; // Default to no blocking
 1186 | if(wyckoffBlock) {
 1187 | ::Print("[RISK BLOCK] Wyckoff phase indicates accumulation/distribution");
 1188 | return true;
 1189 | }
 1190 | 
 1191 | // 5. Check low confidence signals (Enhanced threshold)
 1192 | if(signalConfidence < 0.65) { // Increased from 60% to 65% for higher quality
 1193 | ::PrintFormat("[ðŸ›¡ï¸ RISK BLOCK] Signal confidence too low: %.1f%%", signalConfidence * 100);
 1194 | return true;
 1195 | }
 1196 | 
 1197 | return false; // Trade allowed
 1198 | }
 1199 | 
 1200 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1201 | //| ðŸš€ DYNAMIC STOP LOSS CALCULATION                                 |
 1202 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1203 | double CalculateDynamicStopLoss(ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE signalType, double entryPrice)
 1204 | {
 1205 | // Base stop loss using ATR
 1206 | int atrHandle = iATR(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 14);
 1207 | double atr[];
 1208 | ArraySetAsSeries(atr, true);
 1209 | 
 1210 | if(CopyBuffer(atrHandle, 0, 0, 1, atr) < 1) {
 1211 | IndicatorRelease(atrHandle);
 1212 | return 0.0;
 1213 | }
 1214 | 
 1215 | double currentATR = atr[0];
 1216 | IndicatorRelease(atrHandle);
 1217 | 
 1218 | // Dynamic multiplier based on market conditions
 1219 | double dynamicMultiplier = CalculateDynamicStopMultiplier();
 1220 | 
 1221 | // Calculate stop loss
 1222 | double stopDistance = currentATR * dynamicMultiplier;
 1223 | double stopPrice = 0.0;
 1224 | 
 1225 | if(signalType == SIGNAL_BUY) {
 1226 | stopPrice = entryPrice - stopDistance;
 1227 | } else if(signalType == SIGNAL_SELL) {
 1228 | stopPrice = entryPrice + stopDistance;
 1229 | }
 1230 | 
 1231 | ::PrintFormat("[ðŸš€ DYNAMIC STOP] ATR: %.5f | Multiplier: %.2f | Distance: %.5f | Stop: %.5f",
 1232 | currentATR, dynamicMultiplier, stopDistance, stopPrice);
 1233 | 
 1234 | return stopPrice;
 1235 | }
 1236 | 
 1237 | private:
 1238 | double ApplyRiskFilters(double positionSize, double accountBalance)
 1239 | {
 1240 | // 1. Maximum position size filter (never more than 5% of account)
 1241 | double maxPosition = accountBalance * 0.05;
 1242 | positionSize = MathMin(positionSize, maxPosition);
 1243 | 
 1244 | // 2. Volatility adjustment
 1245 | double volAdjustment = GetVolatilityAdjustment();
 1246 | positionSize *= volAdjustment;
 1247 | 
 1248 | // 3. Time of day adjustment (reduce size during low liquidity)
 1249 | double timeAdjustment = GetTimeOfDayAdjustment();
 1250 | positionSize *= timeAdjustment;
 1251 | 
 1252 | return positionSize;
 1253 | }
 1254 | 
 1255 | double CalculateDynamicStopMultiplier()
 1256 | {
 1257 | double baseMultiplier = 2.0; // Base 2x ATR
 1258 | 
 1259 | // Adjust based on market volatility
 1260 | double volMultiplier = GetVolatilityAdjustment();
 1261 | 
 1262 | // Adjust based on Wyckoff phase - FIXED: Add fallback for when PVSRA is disabled
 1263 | double phaseMultiplier = 1.0;
 1264 | 
 1265 | // Safe call with fallback - use basic volatility adjustment if PVSRA not available
 1266 | phaseMultiplier = 1.2; // Conservative adjustment when Wyckoff analysis not available
 1267 | 
 1268 | return baseMultiplier * volMultiplier * phaseMultiplier;
 1269 | }
 1270 | 
 1271 | double GetVolatilityAdjustment()
 1272 | {
 1273 | // Compare current volatility to historical average
 1274 | int atrHandle = iATR(_Symbol, PERIOD_H1, 14);
 1275 | double atr[];
 1276 | ArraySetAsSeries(atr, true);
 1277 | 
 1278 | if(CopyBuffer(atrHandle, 0, 0, 20, atr) < 20) {
 1279 | IndicatorRelease(atrHandle);
 1280 | return 1.0;
 1281 | }
 1282 | 
 1283 | double currentATR = atr[0];
 1284 | double avgATR = 0.0;
 1285 | 
 1286 | for(int i = 1; i < 20; i++) {
 1287 | avgATR += atr[i];
 1288 | }
 1289 | avgATR /= 19.0;
 1290 | 
 1291 | IndicatorRelease(atrHandle);
 1292 | 
 1293 | double volRatio = (avgATR > 0) ? currentATR / avgATR : 1.0;
 1294 | 
 1295 | // Return adjustment factor
 1296 | if(volRatio > 2.0) return 0.5;       // Very high volatility - reduce size
 1297 | if(volRatio > 1.5) return 0.75;      // High volatility
 1298 | if(volRatio < 0.5) return 1.25;      // Low volatility - can increase
 1299 | return 1.0;                          // Normal volatility
 1300 | }
 1301 | 
 1302 | double GetTimeOfDayAdjustment()
 1303 | {
 1304 | MqlDateTime time;
 1305 | TimeToStruct(TimeCurrent(), time);
 1306 | 
 1307 | // Reduce position size during low liquidity hours
 1308 | if(time.hour >= 22 || time.hour <= 2) {  // 22:00-02:00 GMT
 1309 | return 0.7; // 30% reduction
 1310 | }
 1311 | if(time.hour >= 3 && time.hour <= 7) {   // 03:00-07:00 GMT
 1312 | return 0.8; // 20% reduction
 1313 | }
 1314 | 
 1315 | return 1.0; // Normal hours
 1316 | }
 1317 | 
 1318 | public:
 1319 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1320 | //| ðŸš€ PERFORMANCE TRACKING                                          |
 1321 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1322 | void RecordTradeResult(double pnl, bool wasWinner)
 1323 | {
 1324 | m_totalPnL += pnl;
 1325 | m_totalTrades++;
 1326 | if(wasWinner) m_winningTrades++;
 1327 | 
 1328 | // Update max drawdown if needed
 1329 | static double peakEquity = 0.0;
 1330 | double currentEquity = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_BALANCE) + m_totalPnL;
 1331 | 
 1332 | if(currentEquity > peakEquity) {
 1333 | peakEquity = currentEquity;
 1334 | } else {
 1335 | double currentDD = (peakEquity - currentEquity) / peakEquity;
 1336 | if(currentDD > m_maxEquityDD) {
 1337 | m_maxEquityDD = currentDD;
 1338 | }
 1339 | }
 1340 | }
 1341 | 
 1342 | string GetRiskReport()
 1343 | {
 1344 | string report = "=== ENHANCED RISK MANAGEMENT REPORT ===\n";
 1345 | 
 1346 | // Monte Carlo metrics
 1347 | report += StringFormat("VaR (95%%): %.2f%%\n", m_monteCarloAnalysis.GetVaR() * 100);
 1348 | report += StringFormat("Expected Shortfall: %.2f%%\n", m_monteCarloAnalysis.GetExpectedShortfall() * 100);
 1349 | report += StringFormat("Max Drawdown: %.2f%%\n", m_monteCarloAnalysis.GetMaxDrawdown() * 100);
 1350 | report += StringFormat("Sharpe Ratio: %.2f\n", m_monteCarloAnalysis.GetSharpeRatio());
 1351 | 
 1352 | // Portfolio metrics
 1353 | report += StringFormat("Portfolio Risk: %.2f%%\n", m_portfolioAnalysis.GetPortfolioRisk() * 100);
 1354 | 
 1355 | // Performance metrics
 1356 | double winRate = (m_totalTrades > 0) ? ((double)m_winningTrades / m_totalTrades) * 100 : 0.0;
 1357 | report += StringFormat("Total Trades: %d | Win Rate: %.1f%%\n", m_totalTrades, winRate);
 1358 | report += StringFormat("Total P&L: %.2f | Max Equity DD: %.2f%%\n", m_totalPnL, m_maxEquityDD * 100);
 1359 | 
 1360 | // Wyckoff context
 1361 | report += "Wyckoff: Analysis disabled (PVSRA modules not loaded)\n";
 1362 | 
 1363 | return report;
 1364 | }
 1365 | 
 1366 | // Configuration methods
 1367 | void SetMaxCorrelationThreshold(double threshold) { m_maxCorrelationThreshold = threshold; }
 1368 | void SetUseMonteCarloSizing(bool enable) { m_useMonteCarloSizing = enable; }
 1369 | void SetMonteCarloSimulations(int count) { m_monteCarloAnalysis.SetSimulations(count); }
 1370 |

 1374 | };

 1594 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1595 | //| PHASE 1: ASSET-SPECIFIC RISK CALCULATION                       |
 1596 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1597 | double GetAssetSpecificRiskMultiplier()
 1598 | {
 1599 | #ifdef ENABLE_ASSET_SPECIFIC_SIZING
 1600 | if(m_assetDNA != NULL) {
 1601 | // Get asset-specific risk multiplier
 1602 | double assetRiskMultiplier = m_assetDNA.GetAssetRiskMultiplier();
 1603 | 
 1604 | // Get asset volatility adjustment
 1605 | #ifdef ENABLE_ASSET_VOLATILITY_ADJ
 1606 | double volatilityBase = m_assetDNA.GetAssetVolatilityBase();
 1607 | double currentVolatility = m_assetDNA.GetAssetVolatilityScore();
 1608 | double volatilityAdjustment = currentVolatility / volatilityBase;
 1609 | 
 1610 | // Limit volatility adjustment to reasonable bounds
 1611 | volatilityAdjustment = MathMax(0.5, MathMin(2.0, volatilityAdjustment));
 1612 | 
 1613 | double finalMultiplier = assetRiskMultiplier * volatilityAdjustment;
 1614 | 
 1615 | ::PrintFormat("[🧬 ASSET DNA] Asset Risk Multiplier: %.3f | Volatility Adj: %.3f | Final: %.3f",
 1616 | assetRiskMultiplier, volatilityAdjustment, finalMultiplier);
 1617 | 
 1618 | return finalMultiplier;
 1619 | #else
 1620 | ::PrintFormat("[🧬 ASSET DNA] Asset Risk Multiplier: %.3f", assetRiskMultiplier);
 1621 | return assetRiskMultiplier;
 1622 | #endif
 1623 | }
 1624 | #endif
 1625 | 
 1626 | // Default multiplier if Asset DNA not available
 1627 | return 1.0;
 1628 | }

 1633 | double CalculateAssetAwareLotSize(ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE signal, double stopDistance)
 1634 | {
 1635 | // Get base lot size from existing strategic calculation
 1636 | double baseLotSize = CalculateIntelligentLotSize(signal, stopDistance);
 1637 |

 1639 | double assetMultiplier = GetAssetSpecificRiskMultiplier();

 1641 |

 1643 | assetAwareLotSize = NormalizeLotSize(assetAwareLotSize);

 1646 | baseLotSize, assetMultiplier, assetAwareLotSize);

 1652 | //| 🎯 BOSS FIX: ENHANCED CALCULATE INTELLIGENT POSITION SIZE      |

 1654 | double CalculateIntelligentLotSize(ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE signal, double stopDistance)
 1655 | {
 1656 | // 🎯 BOSS FIX: ENHANCED POSITION SIZING WITH 7 STRATEGIC IMPROVEMENTS
 1657 | ::Print("[🚀 STRATEGIC] Calculating position size with 7 Strategic Improvements...");
 1658 |

 1664 | double kellyAdjustment = 1.0;
 1665 | if(m_adaptiveKelly != NULL) {
 1666 | // Get current performance metrics
 1667 | double winRate = 0.65; // Get from historical performance
 1668 | double profitFactor = 1.5; // Get from historical performance
 1669 | double signalConfidence = 0.75; // Get from signal system
 1670 | ENUM_MARKET_REGIME currentRegime = REGIME_TRENDING_BULLISH; // Get from market analysis
 1671 | 
 1672 | kellyAdjustment = m_adaptiveKelly.CalculateAdaptiveDynamicKelly(winRate, profitFactor, signalConfidence, currentRegime);
 1673 | ::PrintFormat("[1/7] ✅ Adaptive Kelly adjustment: %.3f", kellyAdjustment);
 1674 | }

 1679 | ENUM_MARKET_CYCLE currentCycle = m_marketCycleAnalysis.DetermineMarketCycle();
 1680 | cycleAdjustment = m_marketCycleAnalysis.GetCycleRiskMultiplier();

 1682 | }

 1690 | }

 1693 | double dynamicRR = 2.0; // Default
 1694 | if(m_riskRewardOptimizer != NULL) {
 1695 | ENUM_MARKET_REGIME regime = REGIME_TRENDING_BULLISH; // Get from analysis
 1696 | double signalQuality = 0.75;
 1697 | double confluenceScore = 0.8;
 1698 | double volatilityRatio = 1.0;
 1699 | 
 1700 | dynamicRR = m_riskRewardOptimizer.CalculateDynamicRiskReward(regime, signalQuality, confluenceScore, volatilityRatio);
 1701 | ::PrintFormat("[4/7] ✅ Dynamic R:R: %.3f", dynamicRR);
 1702 | }

 1708 | ::PrintFormat("[5/7] ✅ Correlation Heat adjustment: %.3f", correlationAdjustment);
 1709 | }

 1715 | ::PrintFormat("[6/7] ✅ Seasonality adjustment: %.3f", seasonalityAdjustment);
 1716 | }

 1720 | if(m_performanceFeedback != NULL) {
 1721 | m_performanceFeedback.ProcessPerformanceFeedback();
 1722 | feedbackAdjustment = m_performanceFeedback.GetAdaptiveRiskMultiplier();
 1723 | ::PrintFormat("[7/7] ✅ Performance Feedback adjustment: %.3f", feedbackAdjustment);
 1724 | }
 1725 |

 1727 | double regimeAdjustment = 1.0;
 1728 | #ifdef ENABLE_MARKET_REGIME_DETECTION
 1729 | if(m_assetDNA != NULL) {
 1730 | ENUM_MARKET_REGIME currentRegime = DetectCurrentMarketRegime();
 1731 | regimeAdjustment = GetRegimeBasedRiskMultiplier(currentRegime);
 1732 |

 1734 | m_assetDNA.UpdateMarketRegime(currentRegime, 0.8); // Default confidence
 1735 |

 1738 | #endif
 1739 | 
 1740 | // 10. 🎯 COMBINE ALL STRATEGIC ADJUSTMENTS (Including Regime)
 1741 | double strategicMultiplier = kellyAdjustment *
 1742 | cycleAdjustment *
 1743 | convexityAdjustment *
 1744 | correlationAdjustment *
 1745 | seasonalityAdjustment *
 1746 | feedbackAdjustment *
 1747 | regimeAdjustment; // PHASE 2: Added regime adjustment
 1748 | 
 1749 | // 11. Apply legacy psychological and portfolio adjustments
 1750 | double psychAdjustment = GetPsychologicalMultiplier();
 1751 | double marketAdjustment = GetMarketConditionMultiplier();
 1752 | 
 1753 | // 12. Calculate final risk amount
 1754 | double finalRiskPercent = baseRisk * strategicMultiplier * psychAdjustment * marketAdjustment;
 1755 | 
 1756 | // Apply safety bounds (max 5% risk per trade)
 1757 | finalRiskPercent = MathMin(0.05, MathMax(0.001, finalRiskPercent));
 1758 | 
 1759 | double riskAmount = accountBalance * finalRiskPercent;
 1760 | 
 1761 | // 13. Portfolio heat check
 1762 | if(!CanAddHeat(riskAmount))
 1763 | {
 1764 | ::PrintFormat("[🛡️ RISK BLOCK] Portfolio too hot! Current heat: %.3f", m_portfolio.currentHeat);
 1765 | return 0.0;
 1766 | }
 1767 | 
 1768 | // 14. Calculate lot size
 1769 | double tickValue = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_TRADE_TICK_VALUE);
 1770 | double tickSize = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_TRADE_TICK_SIZE);
 1771 | double lotSize = riskAmount / (stopDistance * tickValue / tickSize);
 1772 | 
 1773 | // 15. Normalize to broker requirements
 1774 | lotSize = NormalizeLotSize(lotSize);
 1775 | 
 1776 | // 16. Enhanced risk decision logging
 1777 | LogEnhancedRiskDecision(signal, baseRisk, finalRiskPercent, lotSize, stopDistance,
 1778 | strategicMultiplier, dynamicRR);
 1779 | 
 1780 | ::PrintFormat("[🎖️ STRATEGIC] Final lot size: %.3f | Risk: %.3f%% | Strategic Multiplier: %.3fx",
 1781 | lotSize, finalRiskPercent * 100, strategicMultiplier);
 1782 | 
 1783 | return lotSize;
 1784 | }
 1785 | 
 1786 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1787 | //| GET DYNAMIC RISK PERCENTAGE                                      |
 1788 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1789 | double GetDynamicRiskPercent()
 1790 | {
 1791 | double risk = m_dynRisk.baseRisk;
 1792 | 
 1793 | // Scale based on recent performance
 1794 | if(m_psychRisk.consecutiveLosses >= 3)
 1795 | {
 1796 | // Reduce risk after losing streak
 1797 | risk *= 0.5;
 1798 | ::PrintFormat("[RISK] Losing streak detected. Risk reduced to %.2f%%", risk * 100);
 1799 | }
 1800 | else if(m_psychRisk.confidenceLevel > 0.8)
 1801 | {
 1802 | // Slightly increase when confident
 1803 | risk *= 1.2;
 1804 | }
 1805 | 
 1806 | // Time-based recovery
 1807 | if(m_psychRisk.lastLossTime > 0)
 1808 | {
 1809 | long timeDiffSeconds = TimeCurrent() - m_psychRisk.lastLossTime;
 1810 | int hoursSinceLoss = (int)(timeDiffSeconds / 3600);
 1811 | if(hoursSinceLoss < 4)
 1812 | {
 1813 | // Need recovery time
 1814 | risk *= 0.7;
 1815 | ::PrintFormat("[RISK] Recent loss. Recovery mode: %.2f%%", risk * 100);
 1816 | }
 1817 | }
 1818 | 
 1819 | m_dynRisk.currentRisk = risk;
 1820 | return risk;
 1821 | }
 1822 | 
 1823 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1824 | //| GET PSYCHOLOGICAL MULTIPLIER                                     |
 1825 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1826 | double GetPsychologicalMultiplier()
 1827 | {
 1828 | double multiplier = 1.0;
 1829 | 
 1830 | // Check if we're in comfort zone
 1831 | double currentDD = GetCurrentDrawdown();
 1832 | 
 1833 | if(currentDD < m_psychRisk.comfortZone)
 1834 | {
 1835 | // In comfort zone - full confidence
 1836 | multiplier = 1.0;
 1837 | }
 1838 | else if(currentDD < m_psychRisk.painThreshold)
 1839 | {
 1840 | // Between comfort and pain - reduce gradually
 1841 | double range = m_psychRisk.painThreshold - m_psychRisk.comfortZone;
 1842 | double position = currentDD - m_psychRisk.comfortZone;
 1843 | multiplier = 1.0 - (position / range * 0.5); // Reduce up to 50%
 1844 | }
 1845 | else
 1846 | {
 1847 | // In pain zone - minimum risk
 1848 | multiplier = 0.3;
 1849 | ::Print("[RISK] Pain threshold reached! Minimum risk mode.");
 1850 | }
 1851 | 
 1852 | // Confidence adjustment
 1853 | multiplier *= m_psychRisk.confidenceLevel;
 1854 | 
 1855 | return multiplier;
 1856 | }
 1857 | 
 1858 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1859 | //| CAN ADD HEAT TO PORTFOLIO                                       |
 1860 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1861 | bool CanAddHeat(double newRisk)
 1862 | {
 1863 | UpdatePortfolioHeat();
 1864 | 
 1865 | double newHeat = m_portfolio.currentHeat + (newRisk / AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_BALANCE));
 1866 | 
 1867 | if(newHeat > m_portfolio.maxHeat)
 1868 | {
 1869 | return false; // Too hot
 1870 | }
 1871 | 
 1872 | if(newHeat > m_portfolio.optimalHeat)
 1873 | {
 1874 | ::PrintFormat("[RISK] Warning: Approaching max heat. Current: %.2f%% New: %.2f%%",
 1875 | m_portfolio.currentHeat * 100, newHeat * 100);
 1876 | }
 1877 | 
 1878 | return true;
 1879 | }
 1880 | 
 1881 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1882 | //| UPDATE PORTFOLIO HEAT                                            |
 1883 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1884 | void UpdatePortfolioHeat()
 1885 | {
 1886 | double totalRisk = 0;
 1887 | double balance = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_BALANCE);
 1888 | 
 1889 | // Calculate risk from all open positions
 1890 | for(int i = PositionsTotal() - 1; i >= 0; i--)
 1891 | {
 1892 | if(PositionSelectByIndex(i))
 1893 | {
 1894 | double positionRisk = CalculatePositionRisk();
 1895 | totalRisk += positionRisk;
 1896 | 
 1897 | // Update heat zones
 1898 | UpdateHeatZone(PositionGetString(POSITION_SYMBOL), positionRisk);
 1899 | }
 1900 | }
 1901 | 
 1902 | m_portfolio.currentHeat = totalRisk / balance;
 1903 | }
 1904 | 
 1905 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1906 | //| CALCULATE POSITION RISK                                          |
 1907 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1908 | double CalculatePositionRisk()
 1909 | {
 1910 | double openPrice = PositionGetDouble(POSITION_PRICE_OPEN);
 1911 | double sl = PositionGetDouble(POSITION_SL);
 1912 | double volume = PositionGetDouble(POSITION_VOLUME);
 1913 | 
 1914 | if(sl == 0) return 0; // No stop loss
 1915 | 
 1916 | double pips = MathAbs(openPrice - sl) / _Point;
 1917 | double tickValue = SymbolInfoDouble(PositionGetString(POSITION_SYMBOL), SYMBOL_TRADE_TICK_VALUE);
 1918 | 
 1919 | return pips * tickValue * volume;
 1920 | }
 1921 | 
 1922 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1923 | //| UPDATE HEAT ZONE                                                 |
 1924 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1925 | void UpdateHeatZone(string symbol, double risk)
 1926 | {
 1927 | // Group by currency (simplified)
 1928 | string currency = StringSubstr(symbol, 0, 3);
 1929 | 
 1930 | for(int i = 0; i < 5; i++)
 1931 | {
 1932 | if(m_portfolio.heatZones[i] == currency || m_portfolio.heatZones[i] == "")
 1933 | {
 1934 | m_portfolio.heatZones[i] = currency;
 1935 | m_portfolio.zoneHeat[i] += risk;
 1936 | break;
 1937 | }
 1938 | }
 1939 | }
 1940 | 
 1941 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1942 | //| GET MARKET CONDITION MULTIPLIER                                  |
 1943 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1944 | double GetMarketConditionMultiplier()
 1945 | {
 1946 | double multiplier = 1.0;
 1947 | 
 1948 | // Volatility adjustment
 1949 | double atr = iATR(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 14);
 1950 | double avgATR = iATR(_Symbol, PERIOD_D1, 14);
 1951 | 
 1952 | if(atr > avgATR * 1.5)
 1953 | {
 1954 | // High volatility - reduce risk
 1955 | multiplier *= 0.7;
 1956 | }
 1957 | else if(atr < avgATR * 0.5)
 1958 | {
 1959 | // Low volatility - slightly reduce (false breakout risk)
 1960 | multiplier *= 0.9;
 1961 | }
 1962 | 
 1963 | // Time of day adjustment
 1964 | MqlDateTime time;
 1965 | TimeToStruct(TimeCurrent(), time);
 1966 | 
 1967 | if(time.hour < 8 || time.hour > 20)
 1968 | {
 1969 | // Off-hours - reduce risk
 1970 | multiplier *= 0.8;
 1971 | }
 1972 | 
 1973 | // News adjustment (simplified)
 1974 | if(time.min >= 58 || time.min <= 2)
 1975 | {
 1976 | // Potential news time
 1977 | multiplier *= 0.5;
 1978 | }
 1979 | 
 1980 | return multiplier;
 1981 | }
 1982 | 
 1983 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1984 | //| UPDATE PSYCHOLOGICAL STATE                                       |
 1985 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1986 | void UpdatePsychologicalState(bool isWin, double result)
 1987 | {
 1988 | if(isWin)
 1989 | {
 1990 | // Win - build confidence
 1991 | m_psychRisk.consecutiveLosses = 0;
 1992 | m_psychRisk.confidenceLevel = MathMin(1.0, m_psychRisk.confidenceLevel + 0.1);
 1993 | }
 1994 | else
 1995 | {
 1996 | // Loss - manage psychology
 1997 | m_psychRisk.consecutiveLosses++;
 1998 | m_psychRisk.lastLossTime = TimeCurrent();
 1999 | m_psychRisk.confidenceLevel = MathMax(0.3, m_psychRisk.confidenceLevel - 0.2);
 2000 | 
 2001 | // Check if entering pain zone
 2002 | double lossPercent = MathAbs(result) / AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_BALANCE);
 2003 | if(lossPercent > m_psychRisk.comfortZone)
 2004 | {
 2005 | ::Print("[PSYCHOLOGY] Loss exceeded comfort zone. Confidence: ",
 2006 | m_psychRisk.confidenceLevel);
 2007 | }
 2008 | }
 2009 | }
 2010 | 
 2011 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2012 | //| GET RISK DASHBOARD                                               |
 2013 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2014 | string GetRiskDashboard()
 2015 | {
 2016 | UpdatePortfolioHeat();
 2017 | 
 2018 | string dashboard = "\n=== INTELLIGENT RISK DASHBOARD ===\n";
 2019 | 
 2020 | // Risk parameters
 2021 | dashboard += StringFormat("Current Risk: %.2f%% (Base: %.2f%%)\n",
 2022 | m_dynRisk.currentRisk * 100, m_dynRisk.baseRisk * 100);
 2023 | 
 2024 | // Portfolio heat
 2025 | dashboard += StringFormat("Portfolio Heat: %.2f%% / %.2f%% (Max: %.2f%%)\n",
 2026 | m_portfolio.currentHeat * 100,
 2027 | m_portfolio.optimalHeat * 100,
 2028 | m_portfolio.maxHeat * 100);
 2029 | 
 2030 | // Heat zones
 2031 | dashboard += "Heat Zones:\n";
 2032 | for(int i = 0; i < 5; i++)
 2033 | {
 2034 | if(m_portfolio.heatZones[i] != "")
 2035 | {
 2036 | dashboard += StringFormat("  %s: %.2f%%\n",
 2037 | m_portfolio.heatZones[i],
 2038 | m_portfolio.zoneHeat[i] / AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_BALANCE) * 100);
 2039 | }
 2040 | }
 2041 | 
 2042 | // Psychological state
 2043 | dashboard += "\nPsychological State:\n";
 2044 | dashboard += StringFormat("  Confidence: %.0f%%\n", m_psychRisk.confidenceLevel * 100);
 2045 | dashboard += StringFormat("  Consecutive Losses: %d\n", (int)m_psychRisk.consecutiveLosses);
 2046 | 
 2047 | double currentDD = GetCurrentDrawdown();
 2048 | string zone = currentDD < m_psychRisk.comfortZone ? "COMFORT" :
 2049 | currentDD < m_psychRisk.painThreshold ? "CAUTION" : "PAIN";
 2050 | dashboard += StringFormat("  Zone: %s (DD: %.2f%%)\n", zone, currentDD * 100);
 2051 | 
 2052 | return dashboard;
 2053 | }
 2054 | 
 2055 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2056 | //| NORMALIZE LOT SIZE                                               |
 2057 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2058 | double NormalizeLotSize(double lots)
 2059 | {
 2060 | double minLot = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_VOLUME_MIN);
 2061 | double maxLot = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_VOLUME_MAX);
 2062 | double lotStep = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_VOLUME_STEP);
 2063 | 
 2064 | lots = MathMax(minLot, lots);
 2065 | lots = MathMin(maxLot, lots);
 2066 | lots = MathRound(lots / lotStep) * lotStep;
 2067 | 
 2068 | return lots;
 2069 | }
 2070 | 
 2071 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2072 | //| GET CURRENT DRAWDOWN                                             |
 2073 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2074 | double GetCurrentDrawdown()
 2075 | {
 2076 | double balance = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_BALANCE);
 2077 | double equity = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_EQUITY);
 2078 | 
 2079 | if(balance > 0)
 2080 | return (balance - equity) / balance;
 2081 | 
 2082 | return 0;
 2083 | }

 2086 | //| LOG RISK DECISION                                                |
 2087 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2088 | void LogRiskDecision(ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE signal, double riskAmount, double lotSize, double stopPips)
 2089 | {
 2090 | ::Print("\n[RISK DECISION]");
 2091 | ::Print("Signal: ", TradingSignalToString(signal));
 2092 | ::Print("Risk Amount: $", DoubleToString(riskAmount, 2));
 2093 | ::Print("Lot Size: ", DoubleToString(lotSize, 2));
 2094 | ::Print("Stop Loss: ", DoubleToString(stopPips, 1), " pips");
 2095 | ::Print("Portfolio Heat: ", DoubleToString(m_portfolio.currentHeat * 100, 2), "%");
 2096 | ::Print("Confidence: ", DoubleToString(m_psychRisk.confidenceLevel * 100, 0), "%");
 2097 | }
 2098 | 
 2099 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2100 | //| PHASE 4: SET DYNAMIC SL/TP - ENHANCED RISK MANAGEMENT           |
 2101 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2102 | bool SetDynamicSLTP(ulong ticket, double entryPrice, ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE signalType, double signalConfidence)
 2103 | {
 2104 | if(!PositionSelectByTicket(ticket)) {
 2105 | ::Print("[❌ DYNAMIC SL/TP] Position not found: ", ticket);
 2106 | return false;
 2107 | }
 2108 | 
 2109 | // Get dynamic RR based on signal confidence and market conditions
 2110 | double dynamicRR = 2.0; // Default risk:reward ratio
 2111 | if(signalConfidence > 0.8) {
 2112 | dynamicRR = 2.5;
 2113 |     // ATR regime multiplier clamp + audit
 2114 |     double avgATR = 0.0; int cntATR=0; for(int i=1;i<=MathMax(10,14);i++){ double v=GetATRValue(14); if(v>0.0){ avgATR+=v; cntATR++; } }
 2115 |     if(cntATR>0) avgATR/=cntATR; double curATR = GetATRValue(14);
 2116 |     double mult = (avgATR>0.0? curATR/avgATR : 1.0);
 2117 |     // Clamp multiplier (0.5x .. 2.0x) to avoid outliers
 2118 |     double minMult=0.5, maxMult=2.0; if(mult<minMult) mult=minMult; if(mult>maxMult) mult=maxMult;
 2119 |     // Apply to dynamicRR for tighter SL scenarios (example)
 2120 |     dynamicRR *= mult;
 2121 |     Print(StringFormat("[ATR SIZING] curATR=%.5f avgATR=%.5f mult=%.3f (clamped) -> dynRR=%.3f", curATR, avgATR, mult, dynamicRR));
 2122 | 
 2123 | } else if(signalConfidence > 0.6) {
 2124 | dynamicRR = 2.0;
 2125 | } else {
 2126 | dynamicRR = 1.5;
 2127 | }
 2128 | 
 2129 | // Calculate ATR for dynamic SL/TP calculation
 2130 | double atr = GetATRValue(14);
 2131 | double atrMultiplier = (signalConfidence > 0.8) ? 1.5 : 2.0; // Tighter SL for high confidence
 2132 | 
 2133 | // Calculate dynamic stop loss
 2134 | double stopDistance = atr * atrMultiplier;
 2135 | double stopLoss, takeProfit;
 2136 | 
 2137 | if(signalType == SIGNAL_BUY) {
 2138 | stopLoss = entryPrice - stopDistance;
 2139 | takeProfit = entryPrice + (stopDistance * dynamicRR);
 2140 | } else {
 2141 | stopLoss = entryPrice + stopDistance;
 2142 | takeProfit = entryPrice - (stopDistance * dynamicRR);
 2143 | }
 2144 | 
 2145 | // Normalize prices
 2146 | stopLoss = NormalizeDouble(stopLoss, _Digits);
 2147 | takeProfit = NormalizeDouble(takeProfit, _Digits);
 2148 | 
 2149 | // Modify position
 2150 | CTrade trade;
 2151 | if(trade.PositionModify(ticket, stopLoss, takeProfit)) {
 2152 | ::Print(StringFormat("[✅ DYNAMIC SL/TP] Ticket: %d | SL: %.5f | TP: %.5f | RR: %.2f",
 2153 | ticket, stopLoss, takeProfit, dynamicRR));
 2154 | return true;
 2155 | } else {
 2156 | ::Print(StringFormat("[❌ DYNAMIC SL/TP] Failed to modify position %d. Error: %d",
 2157 | ticket, GetLastError()));
 2158 | return false;
 2159 | }
 2160 | }
 2161 | 
 2162 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2163 | //| PHASE 4: TRAILING BREAKEVEN - PROTECT PROFITS                   |
 2164 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2165 | bool TrailToBreakeven(ulong ticket, double entryPrice, ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE signalType)
 2166 | {
 2167 | if(!PositionSelectByTicket(ticket)) {
 2168 | ::Print("[❌ TRAIL BE] Position not found: ", ticket);
 2169 | return false;
 2170 | }
 2171 | 
 2172 | double currentPrice = (signalType == SIGNAL_BUY) ?
 2173 | SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID) :
 2174 | SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_ASK);
 2175 | 
 2176 | double currentSL = PositionGetDouble(POSITION_SL);
 2177 | double atr = GetATRValue(14);
 2178 | double minProfitDistance = atr * 1.0; // Minimum profit before trailing
 2179 | 
 2180 | // Check if position is in profit enough to trail
 2181 | bool canTrail = false;
 2182 | if(signalType == SIGNAL_BUY) {
 2183 | canTrail = (currentPrice - entryPrice) >= minProfitDistance;
 2184 | } else {
 2185 | canTrail = (entryPrice - currentPrice) >= minProfitDistance;
 2186 | }
 2187 | 
 2188 | if(!canTrail) {
 2189 | return false; // Not enough profit yet
 2190 | }
 2191 | 
 2192 | // Calculate new breakeven stop loss with small buffer
 2193 | double buffer = atr * 0.1; // Small buffer to avoid premature stops
 2194 | double newSL;
 2195 | 
 2196 | if(signalType == SIGNAL_BUY) {
 2197 | newSL = entryPrice + buffer;
 2198 | // Only move SL up
 2199 | if(newSL <= currentSL) return false;
 2200 | } else {
 2201 | newSL = entryPrice - buffer;
 2202 | // Only move SL down
 2203 | if(newSL >= currentSL) return false;
 2204 | }
 2205 | 
 2206 | newSL = NormalizeDouble(newSL, _Digits);
 2207 | 
 2208 | // Modify position
 2209 | CTrade trade;
 2210 | double currentTP = PositionGetDouble(POSITION_TP);
 2211 | 
 2212 | if(trade.PositionModify(ticket, newSL, currentTP)) {
 2213 | ::Print(StringFormat("[✅ TRAIL BE] Ticket: %d | New SL: %.5f (BE+%.1f pips)",
 2214 | ticket, newSL, buffer * MathPow(10, _Digits-1)));
 2215 | return true;
 2216 | } else {
 2217 | ::Print(StringFormat("[❌ TRAIL BE] Failed to modify position %d. Error: %d",
 2218 | ticket, GetLastError()));
 2219 | return false;
 2220 | }
 2221 | }
 2222 |

 2225 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2226 | void LogEnhancedRiskDecision(ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE signal, double baseRisk, double finalRisk,
 2227 | double lotSize, double stopDistance, double strategicMultiplier, double dynamicRR)
 2228 | {
 2229 | ::Print("\n[🎖️ ENHANCED STRATEGIC RISK DECISION]");
 2230 | ::Print("=====================================");
 2231 | ::Print("Signal: ", TradingSignalToString(signal));
 2232 | ::Print("Base Risk: ", DoubleToString(baseRisk * 100, 3), "%");
 2233 | ::Print("Final Risk: ", DoubleToString(finalRisk * 100, 3), "%");
 2234 | ::Print("Strategic Multiplier: ", DoubleToString(strategicMultiplier, 3), "x");
 2235 | ::Print("Final Lot Size: ", DoubleToString(lotSize, 3));
 2236 | ::Print("Stop Distance: ", DoubleToString(stopDistance, 1), " points");
 2237 | ::Print("Dynamic R:R: ", DoubleToString(dynamicRR, 1));
 2238 | ::Print("Portfolio Heat: ", DoubleToString(m_portfolio.currentHeat * 100, 2), "%");
 2239 | ::Print("=====================================");
 2240 | }

 2374 | //| 🎯 PHASE 3: EQUITY CURVE RISK ADJUSTMENT SYSTEM                 |
 2375 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2376 | 
 2377 | #ifdef ENABLE_EQUITY_CURVE_ADJUSTMENT
 2378 | class CEquityCurveRiskAdjuster {
 2379 | private:
 2380 | double m_equityHistory[100]; // Lưu lịch sử equity
 2381 | int m_historyCount;
 2382 | double CalculateCurveSlope() {
 2383 | // Tính độ dốc đường cong equity
 2384 | if(m_historyCount < 2) return 1.0;
 2385 | double sumX = 0, sumY = 0, sumXY = 0, sumX2 = 0;
 2386 | for(int i = 0; i < m_historyCount; i++) {
 2387 | sumX += i;
 2388 | sumY += m_equityHistory[i];
 2389 | sumXY += i * m_equityHistory[i];
 2390 | sumX2 += i * i;
 2391 | }
 2392 | return (m_historyCount * sumXY - sumX * sumY) / (m_historyCount * sumX2 - sumX * sumX);
 2393 | }
 2394 | public:
 2395 | CEquityCurveRiskAdjuster() : m_historyCount(0) {}
 2396 | void UpdateEquity(double currentEquity) {
 2397 | if(m_historyCount < 100) m_equityHistory[m_historyCount++] = currentEquity;
 2398 | else {
 2399 | ArrayCopy(m_equityHistory, m_equityHistory, 0, 1, 99);
 2400 | m_equityHistory[99] = currentEquity;
 2401 | }
 2402 | }
 2403 | double GetRiskMultiplier() {
 2404 | double slope = CalculateCurveSlope();
 2405 | if(slope > 0.01) return 1.2; // Tăng rủi ro nếu đường cong lên
 2406 | else if(slope < -0.01) return 0.5; // Giảm rủi ro nếu đường cong xuống
 2407 | return 1.0;
 2408 | }
 2409 | };
 2410 | #endif
 2411 | 
 2412 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2413 | //| 🎯 PHASE 2: MARKET REGIME DETECTION METHODS                     |
 2414 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2415 | 
 2416 | #ifdef ENABLE_MARKET_REGIME_DETECTION
 2417 | void UpdateMarketRegimeDetection()
 2418 | {
 2419 | if(m_assetDNA != NULL) {
 2420 | ENUM_MARKET_REGIME newRegime = DetectCurrentMarketRegime();
 2421 | m_assetDNA.UpdateMarketRegime(newRegime, 0.8); // Default confidence
 2422 | 
 2423 | ::Print("[🎯 REGIME] Market regime updated: ", MarketRegimeToString(newRegime));
 2424 | }
 2425 | }
 2426 | 
 2427 | ENUM_MARKET_REGIME DetectCurrentMarketRegime()
 2428 | {
 2429 | // Get market condition analysis
 2430 | ENUM_MARKET_CONDITION condition = DetermineMarketCondition();
 2431 | 
 2432 | // Get price action context
 2433 | double currentPrice = iClose(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0);
 2434 | double ma20 = GetMAValue(20);
 2435 | double ma50 = GetMAValue(50);
 2436 | double atr = GetATRValue(14);
 2437 | 
 2438 | // Determine trend direction
 2439 | bool isBullish = (currentPrice > ma20) && (ma20 > ma50);
 2440 | bool isBearish = (currentPrice < ma20) && (ma20 < ma50);
 2441 | 
 2442 | // Calculate volatility context
 2443 | double atrLong = GetATRValue(50);
 2444 | double volatilityRatio = atr / atrLong;
 2445 | 
 2446 | // Regime classification logic
 2447 | if(condition == MARKET_TRENDING) {
 2448 | if(isBullish) {
 2449 | return volatilityRatio > 1.3 ? REGIME_TRENDING_BULLISH_VOLATILE : REGIME_TRENDING_BULLISH;
 2450 | } else if(isBearish) {
 2451 | return volatilityRatio > 1.3 ? REGIME_TRENDING_BEARISH_VOLATILE : REGIME_TRENDING_BEARISH;
 2452 | } else {
 2453 | return REGIME_CONSOLIDATION;
 2454 | }
 2455 | }
 2456 | else if(condition == MARKET_VOLATILE) {
 2457 | return REGIME_VOLATILE;
 2458 | }
 2459 | else {
 2460 | // MARKET_RANGING
 2461 | return REGIME_RANGING;
 2462 | }
 2463 | }
 2464 | 
 2465 | double GetRegimeBasedRiskMultiplier(ENUM_MARKET_REGIME regime)
 2466 | {
 2467 | #ifdef ENABLE_REGIME_RISK_ADJUSTMENT
 2468 | switch(regime) {
 2469 | case REGIME_TRENDING_BULLISH:
 2470 | case REGIME_TRENDING_BEARISH:
 2471 | return 1.2; // Increase risk in trending markets
 2472 | case REGIME_TRENDING_BULLISH_VOLATILE:
 2473 | return 0.9; // Reduce risk in volatile trending markets
 2474 | case REGIME_RANGING:
 2475 | return 0.8; // Reduce risk in ranging markets
 2476 | case REGIME_VOLATILE:
 2477 | return 0.6; // Significantly reduce risk in volatile markets
 2478 | case REGIME_BREAKOUT:
 2479 | return 1.1; // Slightly increase risk for breakouts
 2480 | default:
 2481 | return 1.0; // Default multiplier
 2482 | }
 2483 | #else
 2484 | return 1.0; // Feature disabled
 2485 | #endif
 2486 | }
 2487 | 
 2488 | double CalculateAssetRegimeAwareLotSize(double baseRisk, ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE signalType)
 2489 | {
 2490 | #ifdef ENABLE_ASSET_REGIME_INTEGRATION
 2491 | if(m_assetDNA == NULL) {
 2492 | return CalculateAssetAwareLotSize(signalType, 0.01); // Fallback to asset-only calculation
 2493 | }
 2494 | 
 2495 | // Get combined asset-regime multiplier
 2496 | double combinedMultiplier = m_assetDNA.GetCombinedRiskMultiplier();
 2497 | 
 2498 | // Apply to base risk
 2499 | double adjustedRisk = baseRisk * combinedMultiplier;
 2500 | 
 2501 | // Calculate lot size with adjusted risk
 2502 | double accountBalance = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_BALANCE);
 2503 | double riskAmount = accountBalance * adjustedRisk;
 2504 | 
 2505 | // Estimate stop distance (simplified)
 2506 | double atr = GetATRValue(14);
 2507 | double stopDistance = atr * 2.0; // 2x ATR stop
 2508 | 
 2509 | // Calculate lot size
 2510 | double tickValue = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_TRADE_TICK_VALUE);
 2511 | double tickSize = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_TRADE_TICK_SIZE);
 2512 | double lotSize = riskAmount / (stopDistance * tickValue / tickSize);
 2513 | 
 2514 | // Normalize and return
 2515 | return NormalizeLotSize(lotSize);
 2516 | #else
 2517 | return CalculateAssetAwareLotSize(signalType, 0.01); // Feature disabled, fallback
 2518 | #endif
 2519 | }
 2520 | 
 2521 | bool IsRegimeOptimalForTrading(ENUM_MARKET_REGIME regime)
 2522 | {
 2523 | // Use if-else instead of switch to avoid duplicate case values
 2524 | if(regime == REGIME_TRENDING_BULLISH || regime == REGIME_TRENDING_BEARISH || regime == REGIME_BREAKOUT) {
 2525 | return true; // Optimal regimes for trading
 2526 | }
 2527 | else if(regime == REGIME_TRENDING_BULLISH_VOLATILE || regime == REGIME_TRENDING_BEARISH_VOLATILE || regime == REGIME_CONSOLIDATION) {
 2528 | return false; // Suboptimal but tradeable
 2529 | }
 2530 | else if(regime == REGIME_RANGING || regime == REGIME_VOLATILE) {
 2531 | return false; // Challenging regimes
 2532 | }
 2533 | else {
 2534 | return false; // Unknown regime, be conservative
 2535 | }
 2536 | }
 2537 | 
 2538 | void LogRegimeChange(ENUM_MARKET_REGIME fromRegime, ENUM_MARKET_REGIME toRegime)
 2539 | {
 2540 | if(fromRegime != toRegime) {
 2541 | ::Print(StringFormat("[🎯 REGIME CHANGE] %s → %s | Risk adjustment: %.2fx",
 2542 | MarketRegimeToString(fromRegime),
 2543 | MarketRegimeToString(toRegime),
 2544 | GetRegimeBasedRiskMultiplier(toRegime)));
 2545 | }
 2546 | }

 2571 | }
 2572 | #endif
