 2577 | 
 2578 | ENUM_MARKET_CONDITION DetermineMarketCondition()
 2579 | {
 2580 | // 🎯 PHASE 1: Removed ADX - Using EMA-based trend detection for simplification
 2581 | double atr = GetATRValue(14);
 2582 | double ma20 = GetMAValue(20);
 2583 | double ma50 = GetMAValue(50);
 2584 | double currentPrice = iClose(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0);
 2585 | 
 2586 | // Calculate volatility ratio
 2587 | double atrLong = GetATRValue(50);
 2588 | double volatilityRatio = atr / atrLong;
 2589 | 
 2590 | // EMA spread-based trend strength (aligned with Sonic R methodology)
 2591 | double emaSpread = MathAbs(ma20 - ma50) / currentPrice;
 2592 | double trendStrength = emaSpread * 1000; // Normalize
 2593 | 
 2594 | // Determine condition based on EMA spread and volatility
 2595 | if(trendStrength > 2.5 && MathAbs(ma20 - ma50) > atr) {
 2596 | // Strong trend with good separation between MAs
 2597 | return MARKET_TRENDING;
 2598 | }
 2599 | else if(volatilityRatio > 1.5 && trendStrength > 1.5) {
 2600 | // High volatility with some directional movement
 2601 | return MARKET_VOLATILE;
 2602 | }
 2603 | else {
 2604 | // Default to ranging market
 2605 | return MARKET_RANGING;
 2606 | }
 2607 | }
 2608 | 
 2609 | // 🎯 PHASE 1: Removed GetADXValue() - ADX indicator eliminated for simplification
 2610 | 
 2611 | double GetATRValue(int period)
 2612 | {
 2613 | int handle = iATR(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, period);
 2614 | double buffer[1];
 2615 | if(CopyBuffer(handle, 0, 0, 1, buffer) > 0) {
 2616 | IndicatorRelease(handle);
 2617 | return buffer[0];
 2618 | }
 2619 | IndicatorRelease(handle);
 2620 | return 0.001; // Default value
 2621 | }
 2622 | 
 2623 | double GetMAValue(int period)
 2624 | {
 2625 | // 🎯 PHASE 2: Migrated to unified indicator system
 2626 | CUnifiedIndicatorManager* manager = CUnifiedIndicatorManager::GetInstance();
 2627 | 
 2628 | if(manager == NULL) {
 2629 | ::Print("❌ [PHASE 2] Risk_IntelligentManager GetMAValue: Unified manager not available");
 2630 | return iClose(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0);
 2631 | }
 2632 | 
 2633 | // OLD CODE (DUPLICATED):
 2634 | // int handle = iMA(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, period, 0, MODE_SMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
 2635 | 
 2636 | // NEW CODE (UNIFIED SYSTEM):
 2637 | int handle = manager.GetSMAHandle(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, period, PRICE_CLOSE);
 2638 | 
 2639 | double buffer[1];
 2640 | if(manager.BulkCopyEMA(handle, buffer, 1, 0)) {
 2641 | // Log migration success
 2642 | manager.MigrateLegacyIndicatorCalls(
 2643 | "Risk_IntelligentManager.mqh",
 2644 | 1383,
 2645 | "GetMAValue() SMA iMA() call",
 2646 | "Unified SMA handle system"
 2647 | );
 2648 | return buffer[0];
 2649 | }
 2650 | 
 2651 | ::Print("❌ [PHASE 2] Risk_IntelligentManager GetMAValue: Failed to get SMA value via unified system");
 2652 | return iClose(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0);
 2653 | }

 2655 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2656 | //| 🎯 VALIDATE SIGNAL - MAIN ENTRY POINT                          |
 2657 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2658 | bool ValidateSignal(const SignalData& signalData)
 2659 | {
 2660 | if(!signalData.isValid) {
 2661 | ::Print("❌ [RISK] Signal validation failed: Invalid signal data");
 2662 | return false;
 2663 | }
 2664 | 
 2665 | // Check signal type
 2666 | if(signalData.signalType == SIGNAL_NONE) {
 2667 | ::Print("❌ [RISK] Signal validation failed: No signal type");
 2668 | return false;
 2669 | }
 2670 | 
 2671 | // Check confidence level
 2672 | if(signalData.confidence < 0.7) {
 2673 | ::Print(StringFormat("❌ [RISK] Signal validation failed: Low confidence %.2f < 0.7", signalData.confidence));
 2674 | return false;
 2675 | }
 2676 | 
 2677 | // Check risk parameters
 2678 | if(signalData.stopLoss <= 0.0 || signalData.takeProfit <= 0.0) {
 2679 | ::Print("❌ [RISK] Signal validation failed: Invalid stop loss or take profit");
 2680 | return false;
 2681 | }
 2682 | 
 2683 | // Check psychological risk
 2684 | if(!CheckPsychologicalRisk()) {
 2685 | ::Print("❌ [RISK] Signal validation failed: Psychological risk threshold exceeded");
 2686 | return false;
 2687 | }
 2688 | 
 2689 | // Check portfolio heat
 2690 | if(!CheckPortfolioHeat()) {
 2691 | ::Print("❌ [RISK] Signal validation failed: Portfolio heat limit exceeded");
 2692 | return false;
 2693 | }
 2694 | 
 2695 | // Check daily limits
 2696 | if(!CheckDailyLimits()) {
 2697 | ::Print("❌ [RISK] Signal validation failed: Daily limits exceeded");
 2698 | return false;
 2699 | }
 2700 | 
 2701 | ::Print(StringFormat("✅ [RISK] Signal validation passed: %s with %.2f confidence",
 2702 | TradingSignalToString(signalData.signalType), signalData.confidence));
 2703 | return true;
 2704 | }
 2705 | 
 2706 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2707 | //| 🎯 RISK VALIDATION HELPERS                                     |
 2708 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2709 | bool CheckPsychologicalRisk()
 2710 | {
 2711 | // Check consecutive losses
 2712 | if(m_psychRisk.consecutiveLosses >= 3) {
 2713 | ::Print("⚠️ [RISK] Psychological risk: Too many consecutive losses");
 2714 | return false;
 2715 | }
 2716 | 
 2717 | // Check recovery period
 2718 | if(m_psychRisk.lastLossTime > 0) {
 2719 | datetime recoveryTime = m_psychRisk.lastLossTime + (3600 * 2); // 2 hours recovery
 2720 | if(TimeCurrent() < recoveryTime) {
 2721 | ::Print("⚠️ [RISK] Psychological risk: Recovery period not completed");
 2722 | return false;
 2723 | }
 2724 | }
 2725 | 
 2726 | return true;
 2727 | }
 2728 | 
 2729 | bool CheckPortfolioHeat()
 2730 | {
 2731 | // Check if adding this trade would exceed portfolio heat
 2732 | double additionalRisk = m_dynRisk.currentRisk;
 2733 | if(m_portfolio.currentHeat + additionalRisk > m_portfolio.maxHeat) {
 2734 | ::Print(StringFormat("⚠️ [RISK] Portfolio heat: %.2f%% + %.2f%% > %.2f%%",
 2735 | m_portfolio.currentHeat*100, additionalRisk*100, m_portfolio.maxHeat*100));
 2736 | return false;
 2737 | }
 2738 | 
 2739 | return true;
 2740 | }
 2741 | 
 2742 | bool CheckDailyLimits()
 2743 | {
 2744 | // Check daily loss limit
 2745 | double dailyLoss = GetDailyLoss();
 2746 | if(dailyLoss > m_dynRisk.baseRisk * 5) { // 5x base risk as daily limit
 2747 | ::Print(StringFormat("⚠️ [RISK] Daily loss limit: %.2f%% > %.2f%%",
 2748 | dailyLoss*100, m_dynRisk.baseRisk*5*100));
 2749 | return false;
 2750 | }
 2751 | 
 2752 | // Check daily trade count
 2753 | int dailyTrades = GetDailyTradeCount();
 2754 | if(dailyTrades >= 10) { // Max 10 trades per day
 2755 | ::Print(StringFormat("⚠️ [RISK] Daily trade limit: %d >= 10", dailyTrades));
 2756 | return false;
 2757 | }
 2758 | 
 2759 | return true;
 2760 | }
 2761 | 
 2762 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2763 | //| 🎯 HELPER METHODS                                               |
 2764 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2765 | double GetDailyLoss()
 2766 | {
 2767 | // Calculate today's loss percentage
 2768 | double startBalance = GetDailyStartBalance();
 2769 | double currentBalance = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_BALANCE);
 2770 | return MathMax(0.0, (startBalance - currentBalance) / startBalance);
 2771 | }
 2772 | 
 2773 | int GetDailyTradeCount()
 2774 | {
 2775 | // Count today's trades
 2776 | int count = 0;
 2777 | datetime todayStart = StringToTime(TimeToString(TimeCurrent(), TIME_DATE));
 2778 | 
 2779 | for(int i = 0; i < HistoryDealsTotal(); i++) {
 2780 | ulong ticket = HistoryDealGetTicket(i);
 2781 | if(HistoryDealSelect(ticket)) {
 2782 | datetime dealTime = (datetime)HistoryDealGetInteger(ticket, DEAL_TIME);
 2783 | if(dealTime >= todayStart) {
 2784 | count++;
 2785 | }
 2786 | }
 2787 | }
 2788 | 
 2789 | return count;
 2790 | }
 2791 | 
 2792 | double GetDailyStartBalance()
 2793 | {
 2794 | // Get balance at start of day (simplified)
 2795 | return AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_BALANCE) * 1.01; // Assume 1% daily loss max
 2796 | }

 2798 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2799 | //| 🎯 PHASE 3: EQUITY CURVE RISK MULTIPLIER (per review.txt)     |
 2800 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2801 | double CalculateRiskMultiplier()
 2802 | {
 2803 |     // 1. Tính toán độ cong equity curve
 2804 |     double convexity = CalculateEquityCurveConvexity();
 2805 | 
 2806 |     // 2. Xác định hệ số điều chỉnh theo review.txt
 2807 |     if(convexity > 0.05) {
 2808 |         Print("✅ [PHASE 3] Strong positive curve - increasing risk multiplier to 1.25");
 2809 |         return 1.25; // Đường cong mạnh - tăng rủi ro
 2810 |     }
 2811 |     else if(convexity > 0.02) {
 2812 |         Print("✅ [PHASE 3] Good positive curve - risk multiplier 1.1");
 2813 |         return 1.1;  // Đường cong tốt
 2814 |     }
 2815 |     else if(convexity > -0.02) {
 2816 |         Print("🟡 [PHASE 3] Flat curve - neutral risk multiplier 1.0");
 2817 |         return 1.0;  // Đường thẳng
 2818 |     }
 2819 |     else if(convexity > -0.05) {
 2820 |         Print("⚠️ [PHASE 3] Slight negative curve - reducing risk multiplier to 0.8");
 2821 |         return 0.8;  // Đường cong nhẹ tiêu cực
 2822 |     }
 2823 |     else {
 2824 |         Print("❌ [PHASE 3] Strong negative curve - reducing risk multiplier to 0.5");
 2825 |         return 0.5;  // Đường cong mạnh tiêu cực - giảm rủi ro
 2826 |     }
 2827 | }
 2828 | 
 2829 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2830 | //| 🎯 PHASE 3: CALCULATE EQUITY CURVE CONVEXITY                   |
 2831 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2832 | double CalculateEquityCurveConvexity()
 2833 | {
 2834 |     // Get recent equity history for convexity calculation
 2835 |     double equityHistory[20];
 2836 |     int historyCount = 0;
 2837 | 
 2838 |     // Collect equity data points (simplified implementation)
 2839 |     double currentEquity = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_EQUITY);
 2840 |     double startEquity = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_BALANCE); // Simplified baseline
 2841 | 
 2842 |     if(startEquity <= 0) {
 2843 |         Print("⚠️ [PHASE 3] Convexity fallback: Invalid equity data");
 2844 |         return 0.0; // Fallback khi thiếu dữ liệu
 2845 |     }
 2846 | 
 2847 |     // Calculate simple equity growth rate
 2848 |     double equityGrowthRate = (currentEquity - startEquity) / startEquity;
 2849 | 
 2850 |     // Estimate convexity based on growth consistency
 2851 |     // Positive convexity = accelerating growth
 2852 |     // Negative convexity = decelerating/declining growth
 2853 | 
 2854 |     // Use recent performance to estimate curve shape
 2855 |     double recentPerformance = GetRecentPerformanceMetric();
 2856 |     double convexity = equityGrowthRate * recentPerformance * 0.1; // Scale factor
 2857 | 
 2858 |     // Cap convexity values for stability
 2859 |     convexity = MathMax(-0.1, MathMin(0.1, convexity));
 2860 | 
 2861 |     Print("[PHASE 3] Equity convexity calculated: ", DoubleToString(convexity, 4),
 2862 |           " | Growth rate: ", DoubleToString(equityGrowthRate * 100, 2), "%");
 2863 | 
 2864 |     return convexity;
 2865 | }
 2866 | 
 2867 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2868 | //| 🎯 PHASE 3: GET RECENT PERFORMANCE METRIC                      |
 2869 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2870 | double GetRecentPerformanceMetric()
 2871 | {
 2872 |     // Simplified recent performance calculation
 2873 |     // In real implementation, this would analyze recent trade history
 2874 | 
 2875 |     double recentWinRate = 0.65; // Placeholder - would get from trade history
 2876 |     double recentProfitFactor = 1.8; // Placeholder - would calculate from recent trades
 2877 | 
 2878 |     // Combine metrics to estimate performance trend
 2879 |     double performanceMetric = (recentWinRate - 0.5) * 2.0 + (recentProfitFactor - 1.0);
 2880 | 
 2881 |     return MathMax(-1.0, MathMin(1.0, performanceMetric)); // Normalize to [-1, 1]
 2882 | }
 2883 | 
 2884 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2885 | //| 🎯 PHASE 3: ENHANCED POSITION SIZE CALCULATION                 |
 2886 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2887 | double CalculatePositionSize()
 2888 | {
 2889 |     // Get base risk percentage
 2890 |     double riskPercent = m_dynRisk.currentRisk;
 2891 | 
 2892 |     // 3. Điều chỉnh theo equity curve theo review.txt
 2893 |     double equityCurveAdjustment = CalculateRiskMultiplier();
 2894 | 
 2895 |     // 4. Tính toán position size cuối cùng
 2896 |     double finalRisk = riskPercent * equityCurveAdjustment;
 2897 |     finalRisk = MathMax(0.1, MathMin(finalRisk, m_maxRiskPerTrade));
 2898 | 
 2899 |     // Convert to lot size
 2900 |     double accountBalance = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_BALANCE);
 2901 |     double riskAmount = accountBalance * finalRisk / 100.0;
 2902 | 
 2903 |     // Calculate lot size based on risk amount
 2904 |     double tickValue = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_TRADE_TICK_VALUE);
 2905 |     double stopLossPoints = 100; // Simplified - would get actual SL distance
 2906 | 
 2907 |     double lotSize = 0.01; // Minimum lot size
 2908 |     if(tickValue > 0 && stopLossPoints > 0) {
 2909 |         lotSize = riskAmount / (stopLossPoints * tickValue);
 2910 |         lotSize = MathMax(0.01, MathMin(lotSize, 1.0)); // Cap lot size
 2911 |     }
 2912 | 
 2913 |     Print("[PHASE 3] Enhanced position size: ", DoubleToString(lotSize, 2),
 2914 |           " lots | Risk: ", DoubleToString(finalRisk, 2), "% | Multiplier: ",
 2915 |           DoubleToString(equityCurveAdjustment, 2));
 2916 | 
 2917 |     return lotSize;
 2918 | }
 2919 | 
 2920 | };

   21 | BLACK_SWAN_FLASH_CRASH,
   22 | BLACK_SWAN_MARKET_PANIC,
   23 | BLACK_SWAN_CURRENCY_CRISIS
   24 | };
   25 | 
   26 | struct BlackSwanEvent {
   27 | ENUM_BLACK_SWAN_TYPE    eventType;
   28 | string                  eventName;
   29 | datetime                detectionTime;
   30 | double                  severity;           // 0.0 to 1.0
   31 | double                  volatilitySpike;    // Multiple of normal volatility
   32 | double                  correlationShift;   // Change in correlation
   33 | double                  liquidityDrop;      // Liquidity reduction
   34 | bool                    isActive;
   35 | string                  affectedAssets[10];
   36 | int                     affectedCount;
   37 | 
   38 | void Reset() {
   39 | eventType = BLACK_SWAN_NONE;
   40 | eventName = "";
   41 | detectionTime = 0;
   42 | severity = 0.0;
   43 | volatilitySpike = 0.0;
   44 | correlationShift = 0.0;
   45 | liquidityDrop = 0.0;
   46 | isActive = false;
   47 | affectedCount = 0;
   48 | for(int i = 0; i < 10; i++) {
   49 | affectedAssets[i] = "";
   50 | }
   51 | }
   52 | };
   53 | 
   54 | struct CircuitBreakerState {
   55 | bool                    isActive;
   56 | datetime                activationTime;
   57 | datetime                cooldownEnd;
   58 | ENUM_BLACK_SWAN_TYPE    triggerEvent;
   59 | double                  triggerSeverity;
   60 | int                     tradesBlocked;
   61 | string                  reason;
   62 | 
   63 | void Reset() {
   64 | isActive = false;
   65 | activationTime = 0;
   66 | cooldownEnd = 0;
   67 | triggerEvent = BLACK_SWAN_NONE;
   68 | triggerSeverity = 0.0;
   69 | tradesBlocked = 0;
   70 | reason = "";
   71 | }
   72 | };
   73 | 
   74 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   75 | //| 🎯 BLACK SWAN DETECTOR CLASS                                    |
   76 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   77 | class CBlackSwanDetector {
   78 | private:
   79 | // Detection parameters
   80 | double                  m_volatilityThreshold;      // Volatility spike threshold
   81 | double                  m_correlationThreshold;     // Correlation breakdown threshold
   82 | double                  m_liquidityThreshold;       // Liquidity crisis threshold
   83 | double                  m_flashCrashThreshold;      // Flash crash detection
   84 | 
   85 | // Historical data for comparison
   86 | double                  m_avgVolatility[5];         // Average volatility per asset class
   87 | double                  m_avgCorrelation[5][5];     // Average correlation matrix
   88 | double                  m_avgLiquidity[5];          // Average liquidity per asset class
   89 | 
   90 | // Current event tracking
   91 | BlackSwanEvent          m_currentEvent;
   92 | CircuitBreakerState     m_circuitBreaker;
   93 | 
   94 | // Detection history
   95 | BlackSwanEvent          m_eventHistory[50];
   96 | int                     m_eventCount;
   97 | 
   98 | // Configuration
   99 | bool                    m_detectionEnabled;
  100 | bool                    m_circuitBreakerEnabled;
  101 | bool                    m_emergencyStopEnabled;
  102 | int                     m_cooldownMinutes;
  103 | 
  104 | // Internal methods
  105 | void                    UpdateHistoricalBaselines() {
  106 | // Implementation here
  107 | }
  108 | bool                    DetectVolatilitySpike(ENUM_ASSET_TYPE assetType) {
  109 | double currentATR = 0.0;
  110 | switch(assetType) {
  111 | case ASSET_FOREX: currentATR = 0.015; break;
  112 | case ASSET_COMMODITY: currentATR = 0.025; break;
  113 | case ASSET_CRYPTO: currentATR = 0.045; break;
  114 | case ASSET_INDEX: currentATR = 0.020; break;
  115 | case ASSET_BOND: currentATR = 0.008; break;
  116 | }
  117 | double avgATR = m_avgVolatility[(int)assetType];
  118 | double volatilityRatio = (avgATR > 0) ? currentATR / avgATR : 1.0;
  119 | if(volatilityRatio > m_volatilityThreshold) {
  120 | m_currentEvent.volatilitySpike = volatilityRatio;
  121 | m_currentEvent.severity = MathMin(1.0, (volatilityRatio - m_volatilityThreshold) / m_volatilityThreshold);
  122 | if(m_currentEvent.affectedCount < 10) {
  123 | switch(assetType) {
  124 | case ASSET_FOREX: m_currentEvent.affectedAssets[m_currentEvent.affectedCount] = "FOREX"; break;
  125 | case ASSET_COMMODITY: m_currentEvent.affectedAssets[m_currentEvent.affectedCount] = "COMMODITY"; break;
  126 | case ASSET_CRYPTO: m_currentEvent.affectedAssets[m_currentEvent.affectedCount] = "CRYPTO"; break;
  127 | case ASSET_INDEX: m_currentEvent.affectedAssets[m_currentEvent.affectedCount] = "INDEX"; break;
  128 | case ASSET_BOND: m_currentEvent.affectedAssets[m_currentEvent.affectedCount] = "BOND"; break;
  129 | }
  130 | m_currentEvent.affectedCount++;
  131 | }
  132 | return true;
  133 | }
  134 | return false;
  135 | }
  136 | bool                    DetectCorrelationBreakdown() {
  137 | double maxCorrelationShift = 0.0;
  138 | for(int i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
  139 | for(int j = i + 1; j < 5; j++) {
  140 | double currentCorrelation = 0.3;
  141 | double avgCorrelation = m_avgCorrelation[i][j];
  142 | double correlationShift = MathAbs(currentCorrelation - avgCorrelation);
  143 | if(correlationShift > maxCorrelationShift) {
  144 | maxCorrelationShift = correlationShift;
  145 | }
  146 | }
  147 | }
  148 | if(maxCorrelationShift > m_correlationThreshold) {
  149 | m_currentEvent.correlationShift = maxCorrelationShift;
  150 | m_currentEvent.severity = MathMin(1.0, maxCorrelationShift / m_correlationThreshold);
  151 | return true;
  152 | }
  153 | return false;
  154 | }
  155 | bool                    DetectLiquidityCrisis(ENUM_ASSET_TYPE assetType) {
  156 | double currentLiquidity = 0.8;
  157 | double avgLiquidity = m_avgLiquidity[(int)assetType];
  158 | double liquidityRatio = currentLiquidity / avgLiquidity;
  159 | if(liquidityRatio < (1.0 - m_liquidityThreshold)) {
  160 | m_currentEvent.liquidityDrop = 1.0 - liquidityRatio;
  161 | m_currentEvent.severity = MathMin(1.0, m_currentEvent.liquidityDrop / m_liquidityThreshold);
  162 | return true;
  163 | }
  164 | return false;
  165 | }
  166 | bool                    DetectMarketPanic() {
  167 | int volatileAssets = 0;
  168 | for(int i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
  169 | if(DetectVolatilitySpike((ENUM_ASSET_TYPE)i)) {
  170 | volatileAssets++;
  171 | }
  172 | }
  173 | return false;
  174 | }
  175 | bool                    DetectCurrencyCrisis();
  176 | void                    TriggerCircuitBreaker(ENUM_BLACK_SWAN_TYPE eventType, double severity);
  177 | void                    LogBlackSwanEvent(const BlackSwanEvent& event) {
  178 | // Add to history
  179 | if(m_eventCount < 50) {
  180 | m_eventHistory[m_eventCount] = event;
  181 | m_eventCount++;
  182 | }
  183 | 
  184 | Print(StringFormat("[🦢 BLACK SWAN] EVENT DETECTED: %s - Severity: %.1f%%", 
  185 | event.eventName, event.severity * 100));
  186 | 
  187 | if(event.affectedCount > 0) {
  188 | string affectedList = "";
  189 | for(int i = 0; i < event.affectedCount; i++) {
  190 | if(i > 0) affectedList += ", ";
  191 | affectedList += event.affectedAssets[i];
  192 | }
  193 | Print(StringFormat("[🦢 BLACK SWAN] Affected assets: %s", affectedList));
  194 | }
  195 | }
  196 | 
  197 | public:
  198 | // Constructor/Destructor
  199 | CBlackSwanDetector() {
  200 | // Initialize detection parameters
  201 | m_volatilityThreshold = 3.0;        // 3x normal volatility
  202 | m_correlationThreshold = 0.5;       // 50% correlation shift
  203 | m_liquidityThreshold = 0.3;         // 30% liquidity drop
  204 | m_flashCrashThreshold = 0.05;       // 5% flash crash
  205 | 
  206 | // Initialize historical baselines
  207 | for(int i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
  208 | m_avgVolatility[i] = 0.01;      // 1% default volatility
  209 | m_avgLiquidity[i] = 1.0;        // 100% default liquidity
  210 | 
  211 | for(int j = 0; j < 5; j++) {
  212 | m_avgCorrelation[i][j] = (i == j) ? 1.0 : 0.0;
  213 | }
  214 | }
  215 | 
  216 | // Initialize current event and circuit breaker
  217 | m_currentEvent.Reset();
  218 | m_circuitBreaker.Reset();
  219 | 
  220 | // Initialize event history
  221 | m_eventCount = 0;
  222 | for(int i = 0; i < 50; i++) {
  223 | m_eventHistory[i].Reset();
  224 | }
  225 | 
  226 | // Default configuration
  227 | m_detectionEnabled = true;
  228 | m_circuitBreakerEnabled = true;
  229 | m_emergencyStopEnabled = true;
  230 | m_cooldownMinutes = 30;             // 30 minutes cooldown
  231 | }
  232 | 
  233 | ~CBlackSwanDetector() {
  234 | // Cleanup if needed
  235 | }
  236 |

  260 | 
  261 | // Reporting
  262 | string                  GenerateBlackSwanReport() {
  263 | // Implementation from standalone
  264 | string report = "🦢 BLACK SWAN DETECTION REPORT\n";
  265 | report += "================================\n";
  266 | report += StringFormat("Generated: %s\n", TimeToString(TimeCurrent()));
  267 | 
  268 | // Current status
  269 | report += "\n📊 CURRENT STATUS\n";
  270 | report += StringFormat("Detection: %s\n", m_detectionEnabled ? "ENABLED" : "DISABLED");
  271 | report += StringFormat("Circuit Breaker: %s\n", m_circuitBreakerEnabled ? "ENABLED" : "DISABLED");
  272 | report += StringFormat("Emergency Stop: %s\n", m_emergencyStopEnabled ? "ENABLED" : "DISABLED");
  273 | 
  274 | // Active event
  275 | if(m_currentEvent.isActive) {
  276 | report += "\n🚨 ACTIVE BLACK SWAN EVENT\n";
  277 | report += StringFormat("Type: %s\n", m_currentEvent.eventName);
  278 | report += StringFormat("Severity: %.1f%%\n", m_currentEvent.severity * 100);
  279 | report += StringFormat("Detection Time: %s\n", TimeToString(m_currentEvent.detectionTime));
  280 | 
  281 | if(m_currentEvent.volatilitySpike > 0) {
  282 | report += StringFormat("Volatility Spike: %.1fx normal\n", m_currentEvent.volatilitySpike);
  283 | }
  284 | if(m_currentEvent.correlationShift > 0) {
  285 | report += StringFormat("Correlation Shift: %.1f%%\n", m_currentEvent.correlationShift * 100);
  286 | }
  287 | if(m_currentEvent.liquidityDrop > 0) {
  288 | report += StringFormat("Liquidity Drop: %.1f%%\n", m_currentEvent.liquidityDrop * 100);
  289 | }
  290 | } else {
  291 | report += "\n✅ NO ACTIVE BLACK SWAN EVENTS\n";
  292 | }
  293 | 
  294 | // Circuit breaker status
  295 | if(m_circuitBreaker.isActive) {
  296 | report += "\n🔴 CIRCUIT BREAKER ACTIVE\n";
  297 | report += StringFormat("Reason: %s\n", m_circuitBreaker.reason);
  298 | report += StringFormat("Activated: %s\n", TimeToString(m_circuitBreaker.activationTime));
  299 | report += StringFormat("Cooldown Ends: %s\n", TimeToString(m_circuitBreaker.cooldownEnd));
  300 | report += StringFormat("Trades Blocked: %d\n", m_circuitBreaker.tradesBlocked);
  301 | } else {
  302 | report += "\n🟢 CIRCUIT BREAKER INACTIVE\n";
  303 | }
  304 | 
  305 | // Recent events
  306 | if(m_eventCount > 0) {
  307 | report += "\n📈 RECENT EVENTS\n";
  308 | int startIndex = MathMax(0, m_eventCount - 5); // Show last 5 events
  309 | for(int i = startIndex; i < m_eventCount; i++) {
  310 | report += StringFormat("%s: %s (%.1f%%)\n",
  311 | TimeToString(m_eventHistory[i].detectionTime),
  312 | m_eventHistory[i].eventName,
  313 | m_eventHistory[i].severity * 100);
  314 | }
  315 | }
  316 | 
  317 | return report;
  318 | }
  319 | string                  GetEventTypeName(ENUM_BLACK_SWAN_TYPE eventType);
  320 | 
  321 | // Manual controls
  322 | void                    ForceCircuitBreakerActivation(string reason) {
  323 | m_circuitBreaker.isActive = true;
  324 | m_circuitBreaker.activationTime = TimeCurrent();
  325 | m_circuitBreaker.cooldownEnd = TimeCurrent() + m_cooldownMinutes * 60;
  326 | m_circuitBreaker.triggerEvent = BLACK_SWAN_NONE;
  327 | m_circuitBreaker.triggerSeverity = 1.0;
  328 | m_circuitBreaker.tradesBlocked = 0;
  329 | m_circuitBreaker.reason = "Manual Activation: " + reason;
  330 | 
  331 | Print(StringFormat("[🦢 BLACK SWAN] Circuit breaker manually activated - %s", reason));
  332 | }
  333 | void                    ResetCircuitBreaker() {
  334 | m_circuitBreaker.Reset();
  335 | Print("[🦢 BLACK SWAN] Circuit breaker manually reset");
  336 | }
  337 | void                    ClearEventHistory() {
  338 | m_eventCount = 0;
  339 | for(int i = 0; i < 50; i++) {
  340 | m_eventHistory[i].Reset();
  341 | }
  342 | Print("[🦢 BLACK SWAN] Event history cleared");
  343 | }
  344 | };

   13 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   14 | //| ðŸŽ¯ CIRCUIT BREAKER TRIGGER CONDITIONS                           |
   15 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   16 | enum ENUM_CIRCUIT_BREAKER_TRIGGER {
   17 | CB_TRIGGER_NONE,
   18 | CB_TRIGGER_DRAWDOWN,           // Maximum drawdown exceeded
   19 | CB_TRIGGER_LOSS_STREAK,        // Consecutive losses
   20 | CB_TRIGGER_VOLATILITY,         // Extreme volatility
   21 | CB_TRIGGER_BLACK_SWAN,         // Black swan event
   22 | CB_TRIGGER_CORRELATION,        // Correlation breakdown
   23 | CB_TRIGGER_LIQUIDITY,          // Liquidity crisis
   24 | CB_TRIGGER_MANUAL,             // Manual activation
   25 | CB_TRIGGER_TIME_BASED,         // Time-based restrictions
   26 | CB_TRIGGER_NEWS_EVENT          // High-impact news
   27 | };
   28 | 
   29 | enum ENUM_CIRCUIT_BREAKER_LEVEL {
   30 | CB_LEVEL_NONE,
   31 | CB_LEVEL_WARNING,              // Warning level - reduce risk
   32 | CB_LEVEL_CAUTION,              // Caution level - limit new trades
   33 | CB_LEVEL_EMERGENCY,            // Emergency level - stop all trades
   34 | CB_LEVEL_LOCKDOWN              // Complete lockdown - close positions
   35 | };
   36 | 
   37 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   38 | //| ðŸŽ¯ CIRCUIT BREAKER CONFIGURATION                                |
   39 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   40 | struct CircuitBreakerConfig {
   41 | // Drawdown triggers
   42 | double                  maxDailyDrawdown;       // Maximum daily drawdown %
   43 | double                  maxWeeklyDrawdown;      // Maximum weekly drawdown %
   44 | double                  maxMonthlyDrawdown;     // Maximum monthly drawdown %
   45 | 
   46 | // Loss streak triggers
   47 | int                     maxConsecutiveLosses;   // Maximum consecutive losses
   48 | double                  maxLossStreakAmount;    // Maximum loss streak amount
   49 | 
   50 | // Volatility triggers
   51 | double                  maxVolatilityMultiple;  // Maximum volatility multiple
   52 | double                  minLiquidityRatio;      // Minimum liquidity ratio
   53 | 
   54 | // Time-based restrictions
   55 | bool                    enableNewsFilter;       // Enable news-based restrictions
   56 | bool                    enableSessionFilter;    // Enable session-based restrictions
   57 | 
   58 | // Recovery settings
   59 | int                     cooldownMinutes;        // Cooldown period in minutes
   60 | bool                    autoRecovery;           // Enable automatic recovery
   61 | double                  recoveryThreshold;      // Recovery threshold
   62 | 
   63 | // Emergency settings
   64 | bool                    enableEmergencyClose;   // Enable emergency position closing
   65 | double                  emergencyCloseThreshold; // Emergency close threshold
   66 | 
   67 | void SetDefaults() {
   68 | maxDailyDrawdown = 0.05;        // 5% daily drawdown
   69 | maxWeeklyDrawdown = 0.10;       // 10% weekly drawdown
   70 | maxMonthlyDrawdown = 0.15;      // 15% monthly drawdown
   71 | maxConsecutiveLosses = 5;       // 5 consecutive losses
   72 | maxLossStreakAmount = 1000.0;   // $1000 loss streak
   73 | maxVolatilityMultiple = 3.0;    // 3x normal volatility
   74 | minLiquidityRatio = 0.3;        // 30% minimum liquidity
   75 | enableNewsFilter = true;
   76 | enableSessionFilter = true;
   77 | cooldownMinutes = 30;           // 30 minutes cooldown
   78 | autoRecovery = true;
   79 | recoveryThreshold = 0.5;        // 50% recovery threshold
   80 | enableEmergencyClose = true;
   81 | emergencyCloseThreshold = 0.08; // 8% emergency close
   82 | }
   83 | };

   85 | struct CircuitBreakerStatus {
   86 | ENUM_CIRCUIT_BREAKER_LEVEL  currentLevel;

   88 | datetime                    activationTime;

   93 | int                         positionsClosed;

   95 | double                      recoveryProgress;

   98 | currentLevel = CB_LEVEL_NONE;
   99 | triggerType = CB_TRIGGER_NONE;
  100 | activationTime = 0;
  101 | cooldownEnd = 0;
  102 | triggerReason = "";
  103 | triggerValue = 0.0;
  104 | tradesBlocked = 0;
  105 | positionsClosed = 0;
  106 | isRecovering = false;
  107 | recoveryProgress = 0.0;
  108 | }

  111 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  112 | //| ðŸŽ¯ CIRCUIT BREAKER CLASS                                        |
  113 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  114 | class CCircuitBreaker {
  115 | protected:
  116 | // Configuration
  117 | CircuitBreakerConfig    m_config;
  118 | CircuitBreakerStatus    m_status;
  119 | 
  120 | // Monitoring data
  121 | double                  m_dailyDrawdown;
  122 | double                  m_weeklyDrawdown;
  123 | double                  m_monthlyDrawdown;
  124 | int                     m_consecutiveLosses;
  125 | double                  m_lossStreakAmount;
  126 | double                  m_currentVolatility;
  127 | double                  m_currentLiquidity;
  128 | 
  129 | // Historical tracking
  130 | datetime                m_lastTradeTime;
  131 | double                  m_lastEquity;
  132 | double                  m_dayStartEquity;
  133 | double                  m_weekStartEquity;
  134 | double                  m_monthStartEquity;
  135 | 
  136 | // Integration
  137 | CBlackSwanDetector*     m_blackSwanDetector;
  138 | 
  139 | // Internal methods
  140 | void                    UpdateDrawdownMetrics() {
  141 | double currentEquity = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_EQUITY);
  142 | 
  143 | // Calculate drawdowns
  144 | if(m_dayStartEquity > 0) {
  145 | m_dailyDrawdown = (m_dayStartEquity - currentEquity) / m_dayStartEquity;
  146 | }
  147 | 
  148 | if(m_weekStartEquity > 0) {
  149 | m_weeklyDrawdown = (m_weekStartEquity - currentEquity) / m_weekStartEquity;
  150 | }
  151 | 
  152 | if(m_monthStartEquity > 0) {
  153 | m_monthlyDrawdown = (m_monthStartEquity - currentEquity) / m_monthStartEquity;
  154 | }
  155 | 
  156 | m_lastEquity = currentEquity;
  157 | }
  158 | void                    UpdateLossStreakMetrics() {
  159 | // This method is called from MonitorAndCheck()
  160 | // Loss streak is updated in OnTradeResult()
  161 | }
  162 | void                    UpdateVolatilityMetrics() {
  163 | // Get current volatility from market (simplified)
  164 | // In real implementation, would calculate from ATR or other indicators
  165 | m_currentVolatility = 0.015; // 1.5% example volatility
  166 | m_currentLiquidity = 0.8;    // 80% example liquidity
  167 | }
  168 | bool                    CheckDrawdownTriggers() {
  169 | // Check daily drawdown
  170 | if(m_dailyDrawdown > m_config.maxDailyDrawdown) {
  171 | ENUM_CIRCUIT_BREAKER_LEVEL level = CB_LEVEL_EMERGENCY;
  172 | if(m_dailyDrawdown > m_config.emergencyCloseThreshold) {
  173 | level = CB_LEVEL_LOCKDOWN;
  174 | }
  175 | 
  176 | ActivateCircuitBreaker(CB_TRIGGER_DRAWDOWN, level,
  177 | StringFormat("Daily drawdown exceeded: %.2f%%", m_dailyDrawdown * 100),
  178 | m_dailyDrawdown);
  179 | return true;
  180 | }
  181 | 
  182 | // Check weekly drawdown
  183 | if(m_weeklyDrawdown > m_config.maxWeeklyDrawdown) {
  184 | ActivateCircuitBreaker(CB_TRIGGER_DRAWDOWN, CB_LEVEL_CAUTION,
  185 | StringFormat("Weekly drawdown exceeded: %.2f%%", m_weeklyDrawdown * 100),
  186 | m_weeklyDrawdown);
  187 | return true;
  188 | }
  189 | 
  190 | // Check monthly drawdown
  191 | if(m_monthlyDrawdown > m_config.maxMonthlyDrawdown) {
  192 | ActivateCircuitBreaker(CB_TRIGGER_DRAWDOWN, CB_LEVEL_WARNING,
  193 | StringFormat("Monthly drawdown exceeded: %.2f%%", m_monthlyDrawdown * 100),
  194 | m_monthlyDrawdown);
  195 | return true;
  196 | }
  197 | 
  198 | return false;
  199 | }
  200 | bool                    CheckLossStreakTriggers() {
  201 | // Check consecutive losses
  202 | if(m_consecutiveLosses >= m_config.maxConsecutiveLosses) {
  203 | ActivateCircuitBreaker(CB_TRIGGER_LOSS_STREAK, CB_LEVEL_CAUTION,
  204 | StringFormat("Consecutive losses exceeded: %d", m_consecutiveLosses),
  205 | m_consecutiveLosses);
  206 | return true;
  207 | }
  208 | 
  209 | // Check loss streak amount
  210 | if(m_lossStreakAmount >= m_config.maxLossStreakAmount) {
  211 | ActivateCircuitBreaker(CB_TRIGGER_LOSS_STREAK, CB_LEVEL_EMERGENCY,
  212 | StringFormat("Loss streak amount exceeded: $%.2f", m_lossStreakAmount),
  213 | m_lossStreakAmount);
  214 | return true;
  215 | }
  216 | 
  217 | return false;
  218 | }
  219 | bool                    CheckVolatilityTriggers() {
  220 | // Check if volatility exceeds threshold
  221 | if(m_currentVolatility > m_config.maxVolatilityMultiple * 0.01) { // 1% base volatility
  222 | ActivateCircuitBreaker(CB_TRIGGER_VOLATILITY, CB_LEVEL_CAUTION,
  223 | StringFormat("High volatility detected: %.2f%%", m_currentVolatility * 100),
  224 | m_currentVolatility);
  225 | return true;
  226 | }
  227 | 
  228 | // Check if liquidity is too low
  229 | if(m_currentLiquidity < m_config.minLiquidityRatio) {
  230 | ActivateCircuitBreaker(CB_TRIGGER_LIQUIDITY, CB_LEVEL_WARNING,
  231 | StringFormat("Low liquidity detected: %.1f%%", m_currentLiquidity * 100),
  232 | m_currentLiquidity);
  233 | return true;
  234 | }
  235 | 
  236 | return false;
  237 | }
  238 | bool                    CheckBlackSwanTriggers() {
  239 | if(m_blackSwanDetector == NULL) return false;
  240 | 
  241 | if(m_blackSwanDetector.IsBlackSwanActive()) {
  242 | BlackSwanEvent currentEvent = m_blackSwanDetector.GetCurrentEvent();
  243 | 
  244 | ENUM_CIRCUIT_BREAKER_LEVEL level = CB_LEVEL_WARNING;
  245 | if(currentEvent.severity > 0.7) level = CB_LEVEL_EMERGENCY;
  246 | else if(currentEvent.severity > 0.4) level = CB_LEVEL_CAUTION;
  247 | 
  248 | ActivateCircuitBreaker(CB_TRIGGER_BLACK_SWAN, level,
  249 | StringFormat("Black Swan Event: %s", currentEvent.eventName),
  250 | currentEvent.severity);
  251 | return true;
  252 | }
  253 | 
  254 | return false;
  255 | }
  256 | bool                    CheckTimeTriggers() {
  257 | // Check for high-impact news times (simplified)
  258 | if(m_config.enableNewsFilter) {
  259 | MqlDateTime dt;
  260 | TimeToStruct(TimeCurrent(), dt);
  261 | 
  262 | // Block trading during typical news times (example: 8:30 AM EST)
  263 | if(dt.hour == 13 && dt.min >= 25 && dt.min <= 35) { // 8:25-8:35 AM EST in GMT
  264 | ActivateCircuitBreaker(CB_TRIGGER_NEWS_EVENT, CB_LEVEL_CAUTION,
  265 | "High-impact news time detected", 0.0);
  266 | return true;
  267 | }
  268 | }
  269 | 
  270 | return false;
  271 | }
  272 | void                    ActivateCircuitBreaker(ENUM_CIRCUIT_BREAKER_TRIGGER trigger, 
  273 | ENUM_CIRCUIT_BREAKER_LEVEL level, 
  274 | string reason, double value) {
  275 | // Only activate if new level is higher or first activation
  276 | if(IsActive() && level <= m_status.currentLevel) return;
  277 | 
  278 | m_status.currentLevel = level;
  279 | m_status.triggerType = trigger;
  280 | m_status.activationTime = TimeCurrent();
  281 | m_status.cooldownEnd = TimeCurrent() + m_config.cooldownMinutes * 60;
  282 | m_status.triggerReason = reason;
  283 | m_status.triggerValue = value;
  284 | m_status.isRecovering = false;
  285 | m_status.recoveryProgress = 0.0;
  286 | 
  287 | Print(StringFormat("[ðŸ”´ CIRCUIT BREAKER] ACTIVATED - Level: %s, Trigger: %s", 
  288 | GetLevelName(level), GetTriggerName(trigger)));
  289 | Print(StringFormat("[ðŸ”´ CIRCUIT BREAKER] Reason: %s", reason));
  290 | 
  291 | // Send notification for emergency levels - CRITICAL FIX: SendNotification takes only 1 parameter
  292 | if(level >= CB_LEVEL_EMERGENCY) {
  293 | SendNotification("CIRCUIT BREAKER EMERGENCY: " + reason);
  294 | }
  295 | }
  296 | void                    ProcessEmergencyActions() {
  297 | if(m_status.currentLevel == CB_LEVEL_LOCKDOWN && m_config.enableEmergencyClose) {
  298 | // Close all positions in lockdown mode - CRITICAL FIX: Use proper MQL5 position selection
  299 | int totalPositions = PositionsTotal();
  300 | for(int i = totalPositions - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
  301 | string symbol = PositionGetSymbol(i);
  302 | if(symbol != "") {
  303 | ulong ticket = PositionGetTicket(i);
  304 | 
  305 | // Close position
  306 | MqlTradeRequest request = {};
  307 | MqlTradeResult result = {};
  308 | 
  309 | request.action = TRADE_ACTION_DEAL;
  310 | request.position = ticket;
  311 | request.symbol = symbol;
  312 | request.volume = PositionGetDouble(POSITION_VOLUME);
  313 | request.type = (PositionGetInteger(POSITION_TYPE) == POSITION_TYPE_BUY) ? 
  314 | ORDER_TYPE_SELL : ORDER_TYPE_BUY;
  315 | request.deviation = 10;
  316 | 
  317 | if(OrderSend(request, result)) {
  318 | m_status.positionsClosed++;
  319 | Print(StringFormat("[ðŸ”´ CIRCUIT BREAKER] Emergency close: %s (Ticket: %I64u)", 
  320 | symbol, ticket));
  321 | }
  322 | }
  323 | }
  324 | }
  325 | }
  326 | void                    ProcessRecovery() {
  327 | if(!m_config.autoRecovery) return;
  328 | 
  329 | // Calculate recovery progress based on current metrics
  330 | double recoveryScore = 0.0;
  331 | int factors = 0;
  332 | 
  333 | // Factor 1: Drawdown improvement
  334 | if(m_dailyDrawdown < m_config.maxDailyDrawdown * m_config.recoveryThreshold) {
  335 | recoveryScore += 0.3;
  336 | }
  337 | factors++;
  338 | 
  339 | // Factor 2: No recent losses
  340 | if(m_consecutiveLosses == 0) {
  341 | recoveryScore += 0.3;
  342 | }
  343 | factors++;
  344 | 
  345 | // Factor 3: Time passed
  346 | int timePassedMinutes = (int)((TimeCurrent() - m_status.activationTime) / 60);
  347 | if(timePassedMinutes >= m_config.cooldownMinutes) {
  348 | recoveryScore += 0.4;
  349 | }
  350 | factors++;
  351 | 
  352 | m_status.recoveryProgress = recoveryScore;
  353 | 
  354 | // Auto-deactivate if recovery threshold met
  355 | if(recoveryScore >= 0.8 && TimeCurrent() >= m_status.cooldownEnd) {
  356 | Print("[ðŸ”´ CIRCUIT BREAKER] Auto-recovery completed - Deactivating");
  357 | m_status.Reset();
  358 | }
  359 | }
  360 | string                  GetTriggerName(ENUM_CIRCUIT_BREAKER_TRIGGER trigger) {
  361 | switch(trigger) {
  362 | case CB_TRIGGER_DRAWDOWN: return "Drawdown";
  363 | case CB_TRIGGER_LOSS_STREAK: return "Loss Streak";
  364 | case CB_TRIGGER_VOLATILITY: return "Volatility";
  365 | case CB_TRIGGER_BLACK_SWAN: return "Black Swan";
  366 | case CB_TRIGGER_CORRELATION: return "Correlation";
  367 | case CB_TRIGGER_LIQUIDITY: return "Liquidity";
  368 | case CB_TRIGGER_MANUAL: return "Manual";
  369 | case CB_TRIGGER_TIME_BASED: return "Time Based";
  370 | case CB_TRIGGER_NEWS_EVENT: return "News Event";
  371 | default: return "Unknown";
  372 | }
  373 | }
  374 | string                  GetLevelName(ENUM_CIRCUIT_BREAKER_LEVEL level) {
  375 | switch(level) {
  376 | case CB_LEVEL_WARNING: return "WARNING";
  377 | case CB_LEVEL_CAUTION: return "CAUTION";
  378 | case CB_LEVEL_EMERGENCY: return "EMERGENCY";
  379 | case CB_LEVEL_LOCKDOWN: return "LOCKDOWN";
  380 | default: return "NONE";
  381 | }
  382 | }
  383 | 
  384 | public:
  385 | // Constructor
  386 | CCircuitBreaker() {
  387 | // Initialize configuration with defaults
  388 | m_config.SetDefaults();
  389 | // Initialize status
  390 | m_status.Reset();
  391 | // Initialize monitoring data
  392 | m_dailyDrawdown = 0.0;
  393 | m_weeklyDrawdown = 0.0;
  394 | m_monthlyDrawdown = 0.0;
  395 | m_consecutiveLosses = 0;
  396 | m_lossStreakAmount = 0.0;
  397 | m_currentVolatility = 0.0;
  398 | m_currentLiquidity = 1.0;
  399 | // Initialize historical tracking
  400 | m_lastTradeTime = 0;
  401 | m_lastEquity = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_EQUITY);
  402 | m_dayStartEquity = m_lastEquity;
  403 | m_weekStartEquity = m_lastEquity;
  404 | m_monthStartEquity = m_lastEquity;
  405 | // Initialize integration
  406 | m_blackSwanDetector = NULL;
  407 | }
  408 | // Destructor
  409 | ~CCircuitBreaker() {
  410 | // Cleanup if needed
  411 | }
  412 | // Initialization
  413 | bool Initialize(CBlackSwanDetector* blackSwanDetector = NULL) {
  414 | m_blackSwanDetector = blackSwanDetector;
  415 | // Initialize equity baselines
  416 | double currentEquity = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_EQUITY);
  417 | m_lastEquity = currentEquity;
  418 | m_dayStartEquity = currentEquity;
  419 | m_weekStartEquity = currentEquity;
  420 | m_monthStartEquity = currentEquity;
  421 | Print("[ðŸ”´ CIRCUIT BREAKER] Initialized - Emergency protection active");
  422 | Print(StringFormat("[ðŸ”´ CIRCUIT BREAKER] Thresholds - Daily: %.1f%%, Weekly: %.1f%%, Monthly: %.1f%%",
  423 | m_config.maxDailyDrawdown * 100, m_config.maxWeeklyDrawdown * 100, m_config.maxMonthlyDrawdown * 100));
  424 | return true;
  425 | }
  426 | // Main monitoring
  427 | bool MonitorAndCheck() {
  428 | // Update all metrics
  429 | UpdateDrawdownMetrics();
  430 | UpdateLossStreakMetrics();
  431 | UpdateVolatilityMetrics();
  432 | // Check if already active and in cooldown
  433 | if(IsActive() && TimeCurrent() < m_status.cooldownEnd) {
  434 | ProcessRecovery();
  435 | return true; // Still active
  436 | }
  437 | // Check all trigger conditions
  438 | bool triggered = false;
  439 | if(CheckDrawdownTriggers()) triggered = true;
  440 | if(CheckLossStreakTriggers()) triggered = true;
  441 | if(CheckVolatilityTriggers()) triggered = true;
  442 | if(CheckBlackSwanTriggers()) triggered = true;
  443 | if(CheckTimeTriggers()) triggered = true;
  444 | // Process emergency actions if needed
  445 | if(IsActive()) {
  446 | ProcessEmergencyActions();
  447 | }
  448 | return triggered;
  449 | }
  450 | // Status queries
  451 | bool IsActive() const { return m_status.currentLevel != CB_LEVEL_NONE; }
  452 | ENUM_CIRCUIT_BREAKER_LEVEL GetCurrentLevel() const { return m_status.currentLevel; }
  453 | CircuitBreakerStatus GetStatus() const { return m_status; }
  454 | 
  455 | // Trade control
  456 | bool ShouldBlockTrade(string symbol, ENUM_ORDER_TYPE orderType) {
  457 | if(!IsActive()) return false;
  458 | 
  459 | bool shouldBlock = false;
  460 | 
  461 | switch(m_status.currentLevel) {
  462 | case CB_LEVEL_WARNING:
  463 | // Allow trades but with reduced risk
  464 | break;
  465 | 
  466 | case CB_LEVEL_CAUTION:
  467 | // Block new trades, allow closing trades
  468 | if(orderType == ORDER_TYPE_BUY || orderType == ORDER_TYPE_SELL) {
  469 | shouldBlock = true;
  470 | }
  471 | break;
  472 | 
  473 | case CB_LEVEL_EMERGENCY:
  474 | case CB_LEVEL_LOCKDOWN:
  475 | // Block all new trades
  476 | shouldBlock = true;
  477 | break;
  478 | }
  479 | 
  480 | if(shouldBlock) {
  481 | m_status.tradesBlocked++;
  482 | Print(StringFormat("[ðŸ”´ CIRCUIT BREAKER] Trade blocked for %s - Level: %s", 
  483 | symbol, GetLevelName(m_status.currentLevel)));
  484 | }
  485 | 
  486 | return shouldBlock;
  487 | }
  488 | bool ShouldClosePosition(string symbol);
  489 | double GetRiskMultiplier() {
  490 | if(!IsActive()) return 1.0;
  491 | 
  492 | switch(m_status.currentLevel) {
  493 | case CB_LEVEL_WARNING:
  494 | return 0.5;  // 50% risk reduction
  495 | 
  496 | case CB_LEVEL_CAUTION:
  497 | return 0.25; // 75% risk reduction
  498 | 
  499 | case CB_LEVEL_EMERGENCY:
  500 | return 0.1;  // 90% risk reduction
  501 | 
  502 | case CB_LEVEL_LOCKDOWN:
  503 | return 0.0;  // No new risk
  504 | 
  505 | default:
  506 | return 1.0;
  507 | }
  508 | }
  509 | 
  510 | // Manual controls
  511 | void ForceActivation(ENUM_CIRCUIT_BREAKER_LEVEL level, string reason) {
  512 | ActivateCircuitBreaker(CB_TRIGGER_MANUAL, level, "Manual: " + reason, 0.0);
  513 | }
  514 | void ForceDeactivation() {
  515 | Print("[ðŸ”´ CIRCUIT BREAKER] Manually deactivated");
  516 | m_status.Reset();
  517 | }
  518 | void ResetCounters() {
  519 | m_consecutiveLosses = 0;
  520 | m_lossStreakAmount = 0.0;
  521 | m_status.tradesBlocked = 0;
  522 | m_status.positionsClosed = 0;
  523 | Print("[ðŸ”´ CIRCUIT BREAKER] Counters reset");
  524 | }
  525 | 
  526 | // Reporting
  527 | string GenerateStatusReport() {
  528 | string report = "ðŸ”´ CIRCUIT BREAKER STATUS\n";
  529 | report += "========================\n";
  530 | 
  531 | if(IsActive()) {
  532 | report += StringFormat("Status: ACTIVE (%s)\n", GetLevelName(m_status.currentLevel));
  533 | report += StringFormat("Trigger: %s\n", GetTriggerName(m_status.triggerType));
  534 | report += StringFormat("Reason: %s\n", m_status.triggerReason);
  535 | report += StringFormat("Activated: %s\n", TimeToString(m_status.activationTime));
  536 | report += StringFormat("Cooldown Ends: %s\n", TimeToString(m_status.cooldownEnd));
  537 | report += StringFormat("Trades Blocked: %d\n", m_status.tradesBlocked);
  538 | report += StringFormat("Positions Closed: %d\n", m_status.positionsClosed);
  539 | 
  540 | if(m_status.isRecovering) {
  541 | report += StringFormat("Recovery Progress: %.1f%%\n", m_status.recoveryProgress * 100);
  542 | }
  543 | } else {
  544 | report += "Status: INACTIVE\n";
  545 | }
  546 | 
  547 | // Current metrics
  548 | report += "\nðŸ“Š CURRENT METRICS\n";
  549 | report += StringFormat("Daily Drawdown: %.2f%% (Max: %.2f%%)\n", 
  550 | m_dailyDrawdown * 100, m_config.maxDailyDrawdown * 100);
  551 | report += StringFormat("Weekly Drawdown: %.2f%% (Max: %.2f%%)\n", 
  552 | m_weeklyDrawdown * 100, m_config.maxWeeklyDrawdown * 100);
  553 | report += StringFormat("Monthly Drawdown: %.2f%% (Max: %.2f%%)\n", 
  554 | m_monthlyDrawdown * 100, m_config.maxMonthlyDrawdown * 100);
  555 | report += StringFormat("Consecutive Losses: %d (Max: %d)\n", 
  556 | m_consecutiveLosses, m_config.maxConsecutiveLosses);
  557 | report += StringFormat("Loss Streak Amount: $%.2f (Max: $%.2f)\n", 
  558 | m_lossStreakAmount, m_config.maxLossStreakAmount);
  559 | 
  560 | return report;
  561 | }
  562 | string GenerateDetailedReport();
  563 | 
  564 | // Event handlers
  565 | void OnTradeResult(bool isWin, double profit) {
  566 | if(isWin) {
  567 | // Reset loss streak on win
  568 | m_consecutiveLosses = 0;
  569 | m_lossStreakAmount = 0.0;
  570 | } else {
  571 | // Increment loss streak
  572 | m_consecutiveLosses++;
  573 | m_lossStreakAmount += MathAbs(profit);
  574 | }
  575 | 
  576 | m_lastTradeTime = TimeCurrent();
  577 | }
  578 | void OnEquityUpdate(double currentEquity) {
  579 | m_lastEquity = currentEquity;
  580 | }
  581 | void OnNewDay() {
  582 | m_dayStartEquity = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_EQUITY);
  583 | m_dailyDrawdown = 0.0;
  584 | }
  585 | void OnNewWeek() {
  586 | m_weekStartEquity = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_EQUITY);
  587 | m_weeklyDrawdown = 0.0;
  588 | }
  589 | void OnNewMonth() {
  590 | m_monthStartEquity = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_EQUITY);
  591 | m_monthlyDrawdown = 0.0;
  592 | }
  593 | 
  594 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  595 | //| 🎯 VOLATILITY SPIKE DETECTION - PHASE 3 IMPLEMENTATION           |
  596 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  597 | bool IsVolatilitySpike() {
  598 | // Get current volatility (ATR-based)
  599 | double currentATR = iATR(_Symbol, PERIOD_M15, 14);
  600 | if(currentATR <= 0) return false;
  601 | 
  602 | // Get baseline ATR (20-period average)
  603 | double baselineATR = 0.0;
  604 | for(int i = 1; i <= 20; i++) {
  605 | double atr = iATR(_Symbol, PERIOD_M15, 14);
  606 | if(atr > 0) baselineATR += atr;
  607 | }
  608 | baselineATR /= 20.0;
  609 | if(baselineATR <= 0) return false;
  610 | 
  611 | // Asset-specific volatility thresholds according to review.txt
  612 | double spikeThreshold = 2.0; // Default multiplier
  613 | string assetClass = "";
  614 | 
  615 | // Determine asset class and set specific threshold
  616 | if(StringFind(_Symbol, "USD") >= 0 || StringFind(_Symbol, "EUR") >= 0 || 
  617 | StringFind(_Symbol, "GBP") >= 0 || StringFind(_Symbol, "JPY") >= 0) {
  618 | assetClass = "MAJOR_FOREX";
  619 | spikeThreshold = 2.5; // Major pairs - higher threshold
  620 | } else if(StringFind(_Symbol, "AUD") >= 0 || StringFind(_Symbol, "NZD") >= 0 || 
  621 | StringFind(_Symbol, "CAD") >= 0 || StringFind(_Symbol, "CHF") >= 0) {
  622 | assetClass = "MINOR_FOREX";
  623 | spikeThreshold = 2.2; // Minor pairs - moderate threshold
  624 | } else if(StringFind(_Symbol, "XAU") >= 0 || StringFind(_Symbol, "GOLD") >= 0) {
  625 | assetClass = "PRECIOUS_METALS";
  626 | spikeThreshold = 1.8; // Gold - lower threshold (more sensitive)
  627 | } else if(StringFind(_Symbol, "BTC") >= 0 || StringFind(_Symbol, "ETH") >= 0) {
  628 | assetClass = "CRYPTO";
  629 | spikeThreshold = 3.0; // Crypto - highest threshold
  630 | } else {
  631 | assetClass = "OTHER";
  632 | spikeThreshold = 2.0; // Default threshold
  633 | }
  634 | 
  635 | // Calculate volatility ratio
  636 | double volatilityRatio = currentATR / baselineATR;
  637 | 
  638 | // Check if spike detected
  639 | bool isSpike = volatilityRatio > spikeThreshold;
  640 | 
  641 | if(isSpike) {
  642 | ::PrintFormat("[🔥 VOLATILITY SPIKE] %s detected: %.2fx baseline (threshold: %.1fx)", 
  643 | assetClass, volatilityRatio, spikeThreshold);
  644 | ::PrintFormat("[🔥 VOLATILITY SPIKE] Current ATR: %.5f, Baseline ATR: %.5f", 
  645 | currentATR, baselineATR);
  646 | 
  647 | // Activate circuit breaker for volatility spike
  648 | ActivateCircuitBreaker(CB_TRIGGER_VOLATILITY, CB_LEVEL_CAUTION, 
  649 | StringFormat("Volatility spike: %.2fx threshold", volatilityRatio), 
  650 | volatilityRatio);
  651 | }
  652 | 
  653 | return isSpike;
  654 | }
  655 | 
  656 | };

    3 | //|              SONIC R MC - ENHANCED CIRCUIT BREAKER              |
    4 | //|                    🚨 ERROR 4014 RESILIENT SYSTEM              |
    5 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
    6 | #ifndef RISK_CIRCUITBREAKER_ENHANCED_MQH
    7 | #define RISK_CIRCUITBREAKER_ENHANCED_MQH
    8 | 
    9 | #include "06_RiskManagement_03_CircuitBreaker.mqh"
   10 | #include "01_Core_08_ErrorConstants_Clean.mqh"
   11 | 
   12 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   13 | //| 🎯 ERROR CLASSIFICATION SYSTEM                                  |
   14 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   15 | enum ENUM_ERROR_SEVERITY {
   16 | ERROR_SEVERITY_MINOR,      // Non-critical errors (like 4014)
   17 | ERROR_SEVERITY_MODERATE,   // Moderate impact errors
   18 | ERROR_SEVERITY_CRITICAL,   // Critical system errors
   19 | ERROR_SEVERITY_FATAL       // Fatal errors requiring full stop
   20 | };
   21 | 
   22 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   23 | //| 🔧 ENHANCED CIRCUIT BREAKER WITH ERROR RESILIENCE               |
   24 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   25 | class CEnhancedCircuitBreaker : public CCircuitBreaker
   26 | {
   27 | private:
   28 | int m_minorErrorCount;
   29 | int m_moderateErrorCount;
   30 | datetime m_lastMinorErrorTime;
   31 | double m_baseSystemHealth;
   32 | bool m_fallbackModeActive;
   33 | 
   34 | public:
   35 | CEnhancedCircuitBreaker() : CCircuitBreaker()
   36 | {
   37 | m_minorErrorCount = 0;
   38 | m_moderateErrorCount = 0;
   39 | m_lastMinorErrorTime = 0;
   40 | m_baseSystemHealth = 100.0;
   41 | m_fallbackModeActive = false;
   42 | }
   43 | 
   44 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   45 | //| 🎯 CLASSIFY ERROR SEVERITY                                      |
   46 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   47 | ENUM_ERROR_SEVERITY ClassifyError(int errorCode)
   48 | {
   49 | switch(errorCode)
   50 | {
   51 | // Minor errors - Don't stop trading
   52 | case ERR_UNKNOWN_COMMAND:           // 4014 - Dragon Band issue
   53 | case ERR_NO_HISTORY_DATA:           // 4054 - Data loading
   54 | case ERR_CUSTOM_INDICATOR_ERROR:    // 4036 - Indicator issue
   55 | case ERR_INDICATOR_CANNOT_INIT:     // 4052 - Init issue
   56 | return ERROR_SEVERITY_MINOR;
   57 | 
   58 | // Moderate errors - Reduce risk but continue
   59 | case ERR_TRADE_TIMEOUT:
   60 | case ERR_REQUOTE:
   61 | case ERR_BROKER_BUSY:
   62 | return ERROR_SEVERITY_MODERATE;
   63 | 
   64 | // Critical errors - Stop new trades
   65 | case ERR_NOT_ENOUGH_MONEY:
   66 | case ERR_INVALID_STOPS:
   67 | case ERR_TRADE_DISABLED:
   68 | return ERROR_SEVERITY_CRITICAL;
   69 | 
   70 | // Fatal errors - Full stop
   71 | case ERR_ACCOUNT_DISABLED:
   72 | case ERR_NO_CONNECTION:
   73 | return ERROR_SEVERITY_FATAL;
   74 | 
   75 | default:
   76 | return ERROR_SEVERITY_MODERATE;
   77 | }
   78 | }
   79 | 
   80 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   81 | //| 🚨 HANDLE ERROR WITH SMART RESPONSE                             |
   82 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   83 | void HandleSmartError(int errorCode, string context)
   84 | {
   85 | ENUM_ERROR_SEVERITY severity = ClassifyError(errorCode);
   86 | 
   87 | switch(severity)
   88 | {
   89 | case ERROR_SEVERITY_MINOR:
   90 | HandleMinorError(errorCode, context);
   91 | break;
   92 | 
   93 | case ERROR_SEVERITY_MODERATE:
   94 | HandleModerateError(errorCode, context);
   95 | break;
   96 | 
   97 | case ERROR_SEVERITY_CRITICAL:
   98 | HandleCriticalError(errorCode, context);
   99 | break;
  100 | 
  101 | case ERROR_SEVERITY_FATAL:
  102 | HandleFatalError(errorCode, context);
  103 | break;
  104 | }
  105 | }
  106 | 
  107 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  108 | //| 🟡 HANDLE MINOR ERRORS (Like Dragon Band 4014)                 |
  109 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  110 | void HandleMinorError(int errorCode, string context)
  111 | {
  112 | m_minorErrorCount++;
  113 | m_lastMinorErrorTime = TimeCurrent();
  114 | 
  115 | // Reduce health slightly but don't stop trading
  116 | m_baseSystemHealth = MathMax(70.0, m_baseSystemHealth - 2.0); // Minimum 70%
  117 | 
  118 | Print("🟡 [MINOR ERROR] ", errorCode, " in ", context, " - Health: ", m_baseSystemHealth, "%");
  119 | 
  120 | // Only activate warning level for many consecutive minor errors
  121 | if(m_minorErrorCount >= 20) {
  122 | Print("🟡 [WARNING] Many minor errors detected - Activating warning level");
  123 | ActivateCircuitBreaker(CB_TRIGGER_VOLATILITY, CB_LEVEL_WARNING, 
  124 | "Multiple minor errors: " + context, errorCode);
  125 | m_fallbackModeActive = true;
  126 | } else {
  127 | Print("✅ [CONTINUE] Minor error handled - Trading continues with fallback");
  128 | }
  129 | }
  130 | 
  131 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  132 | //| 🟠 HANDLE MODERATE ERRORS                                       |
  133 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  134 | void HandleModerateError(int errorCode, string context)
  135 | {
  136 | m_moderateErrorCount++;
  137 | m_baseSystemHealth = MathMax(50.0, m_baseSystemHealth - 5.0);
  138 | 
  139 | Print("🟠 [MODERATE ERROR] ", errorCode, " in ", context, " - Health: ", m_baseSystemHealth, "%");
  140 | 
  141 | if(m_moderateErrorCount >= 5) {
  142 | ActivateCircuitBreaker(CB_TRIGGER_VOLATILITY, CB_LEVEL_CAUTION, 
  143 | "Multiple moderate errors: " + context, errorCode);
  144 | }
  145 | }
  146 | 
  147 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  148 | //| 🔴 HANDLE CRITICAL ERRORS                                       |
  149 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  150 | void HandleCriticalError(int errorCode, string context)
  151 | {
  152 | m_baseSystemHealth = MathMax(25.0, m_baseSystemHealth - 10.0);
  153 | 
  154 | Print("🔴 [CRITICAL ERROR] ", errorCode, " in ", context, " - Health: ", m_baseSystemHealth, "%");
  155 | 
  156 | ActivateCircuitBreaker(CB_TRIGGER_VOLATILITY, CB_LEVEL_EMERGENCY, 
  157 | "Critical error: " + context, errorCode);
  158 | }
  159 | 
  160 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  161 | //| ⚫ HANDLE FATAL ERRORS                                           |
  162 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  163 | void HandleFatalError(int errorCode, string context)
  164 | {
  165 | m_baseSystemHealth = 0.0;
  166 | 
  167 | Print("⚫ [FATAL ERROR] ", errorCode, " in ", context, " - SYSTEM SHUTDOWN");
  168 | 
  169 | ActivateCircuitBreaker(CB_TRIGGER_MANUAL, CB_LEVEL_LOCKDOWN, 
  170 | "Fatal error: " + context, errorCode);
  171 | }
  172 | 
  173 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  174 | //| 🎯 ENHANCED TRADE PERMISSION CHECK                              |
  175 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  176 | bool ShouldAllowTradeEnhanced(string symbol, ENUM_ORDER_TYPE orderType, int lastError = 0)
  177 | {
  178 | // If we have a recent error, classify it
  179 | if(lastError != 0) {
  180 | ENUM_ERROR_SEVERITY severity = ClassifyError(lastError);
  181 | 
  182 | // Allow trading even with minor errors
  183 | if(severity == ERROR_SEVERITY_MINOR) {
  184 | Print("✅ [ENHANCED CB] Allowing trade despite minor error ", lastError);
  185 | return true;
  186 | }
  187 | }
  188 | 
  189 | // Use original circuit breaker logic for other cases
  190 | return !ShouldBlockTrade(symbol, orderType);
  191 | }
  192 | 
  193 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  194 | //| 📊 GET ENHANCED SYSTEM HEALTH                                   |
  195 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  196 | double GetEnhancedSystemHealth()
  197 | {
  198 | double health = m_baseSystemHealth;
  199 | 
  200 | // Recovery bonus for fallback mode
  201 | if(m_fallbackModeActive) {
  202 | health = MathMin(100.0, health + 15.0); // Bonus for successful fallback
  203 | }
  204 | 
  205 | // Time-based recovery
  206 | if(m_lastMinorErrorTime > 0) {
  207 | int minutesSinceError = (int)((TimeCurrent() - m_lastMinorErrorTime) / 60);
  208 | if(minutesSinceError > 10) {
  209 | health = MathMin(100.0, health + (minutesSinceError * 0.5)); // Gradual recovery
  210 | }
  211 | }
  212 | 
  213 | return health;
  214 | }
  215 | 
  216 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  217 | //| 🔄 RESET MINOR ERROR COUNTERS                                   |
  218 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  219 | void ResetMinorErrors()
  220 | {
  221 | m_minorErrorCount = 0;
  222 | m_baseSystemHealth = MathMax(m_baseSystemHealth, 80.0);
  223 | Print("🔄 [RECOVERY] Minor error counters reset - Health boosted to ", m_baseSystemHealth, "%");
  224 | }
  225 | 
  226 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  227 | //| 📈 STATUS REPORT WITH ERROR DETAILS                             |
  228 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  229 | string GetEnhancedStatusReport()
  230 | {
  231 | string report = "\n=== ENHANCED CIRCUIT BREAKER STATUS ===\n";
  232 | report += StringFormat("System Health: %.1f%%\n", GetEnhancedSystemHealth());
  233 | report += StringFormat("Minor Errors: %d\n", m_minorErrorCount);
  234 | report += StringFormat("Moderate Errors: %d\n", m_moderateErrorCount);
  235 | report += StringFormat("Fallback Mode: %s\n", m_fallbackModeActive ? "ACTIVE" : "INACTIVE");
  236 | report += StringFormat("Level: %s\n", GetLevelName(m_status.currentLevel));
  237 | report += "==========================================\n";
  238 | return report;
  239 | }
  240 | 
  241 | private:
  242 | string GetLevelName(ENUM_CIRCUIT_BREAKER_LEVEL level)
  243 | {
  244 | switch(level) {
  245 | case CB_LEVEL_NONE: return "NORMAL";
  246 | case CB_LEVEL_WARNING: return "WARNING";
  247 | case CB_LEVEL_CAUTION: return "CAUTION";
  248 | case CB_LEVEL_EMERGENCY: return "EMERGENCY";
  249 | case CB_LEVEL_LOCKDOWN: return "LOCKDOWN";
  250 | default: return "UNKNOWN";
  251 | }
  252 | }
  253 | };
