   12 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   13 | //| Currency Index Enumeration                                       |
   14 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   15 | enum ENUM_CURRENCY_INDEX
   16 | {
   17 | CURRENCY_USD = 0,    // US Dollar
   18 | CURRENCY_EUR = 1,    // Euro
   19 | CURRENCY_GBP = 2,    // British Pound
   20 | CURRENCY_JPY = 3,    // Japanese Yen
   21 | CURRENCY_CHF = 4,    // Swiss Franc
   22 | CURRENCY_AUD = 5,    // Australian Dollar
   23 | CURRENCY_CAD = 6,    // Canadian Dollar
   24 | CURRENCY_NZD = 7,    // New Zealand Dollar
   25 | CURRENCY_COUNT = 8   // Total number of currencies
   26 | };
   27 | 
   28 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   29 | //| Correlation Heat Data Structure                                  |
   30 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   31 | struct CorrelationHeatData
   32 | {
   33 | // Correlation matrix [from][to]
   34 | double correlationMatrix[8][8];    // 8x8 matrix for major currencies
   35 | 
   36 | // Heat levels per currency
   37 | double currencyHeat[8];            // Heat level for each currency
   38 | double totalPortfolioHeat;         // Overall portfolio heat
   39 | double maxAllowedHeat;             // Maximum allowed heat level
   40 | 
   41 | // Exposure tracking
   42 | double currencyExposure[8];        // Current exposure per currency
   43 | double maxCurrencyExposure;        // Maximum allowed per currency
   44 | 
   45 | // Risk assessment
   46 | double heatRiskMultiplier;         // Risk multiplier based on heat
   47 | bool overheatingWarning;           // Warning flag for overheating
   48 | ENUM_CURRENCY_INDEX hottestCurrency; // Most overexposed currency
   49 | 
   50 | // Time-based analysis
   51 | datetime lastUpdateTime;
   52 | int heatDuration[8];               // How long each currency has been hot
   53 | 
   54 | void Reset()
   55 | {
   56 | // Initialize correlation matrix
   57 | for(int i = 0; i < 8; i++) {
   58 | for(int j = 0; j < 8; j++) {
   59 | if(i == j) correlationMatrix[i][j] = 1.0; // Perfect self-correlation
   60 | else correlationMatrix[i][j] = 0.0;
   61 | }
   62 | currencyHeat[i] = 0.0;
   63 | currencyExposure[i] = 0.0;
   64 | heatDuration[i] = 0;
   65 | }
   66 | 
   67 | totalPortfolioHeat = 0.0;
   68 | maxAllowedHeat = 0.7;           // 70% max heat
   69 | maxCurrencyExposure = 0.4;      // 40% max per currency
   70 | heatRiskMultiplier = 1.0;
   71 | overheatingWarning = false;
   72 | hottestCurrency = CURRENCY_USD;
   73 | lastUpdateTime = 0;
   74 | }
   75 | };
   76 | 
   77 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   78 | //| Currency Pair Information                                        |
   79 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   80 | struct CurrencyPairInfo
   81 | {
   82 | string symbol;
   83 | ENUM_CURRENCY_INDEX baseCurrency;
   84 | ENUM_CURRENCY_INDEX quoteCurrency;
   85 | double lotSize;
   86 | bool isLong;               // True for long position, false for short
   87 | double riskWeight;         // Risk weight of this position
   88 | };
   89 | 
   90 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   91 | //| ðŸŽ¯ CORRELATION HEAT MAP MANAGEMENT SYSTEM                       |
   92 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   93 | class CCorrelationHeatMapManager
   94 | {
   95 | private:
   96 | CorrelationHeatData m_heatData;
   97 | 
   98 | // Active positions tracking
   99 | CurrencyPairInfo m_activePositions[50];    // Track up to 50 positions
  100 | int m_positionCount;
  101 | 
  102 | // Historical correlation data
  103 | double m_correlationHistory[8][8][30];     // 30-day correlation history
  104 | int m_historyIndex;
  105 | int m_historyDays;
  106 | 
  107 | // Heat calculation parameters
  108 | double m_correlationLookback;              // Days for correlation calculation
  109 | double m_heatSensitivity;                  // Sensitivity of heat calculation
  110 | bool m_dynamicThresholds;                  // Whether to use dynamic thresholds
  111 | 
  112 | // Warning system
  113 | string m_warningMessages[10];              // Store warning messages
  114 | int m_warningCount;
  115 | 
  116 | public:
  117 | CCorrelationHeatMapManager() {
  118 | m_heatData.Reset();
  119 | 
  120 | // Initialize arrays
  121 | for(int i = 0; i < 50; i++) {
  122 | m_activePositions[i].symbol = "";
  123 | m_activePositions[i].baseCurrency = CURRENCY_COUNT;
  124 | m_activePositions[i].quoteCurrency = CURRENCY_COUNT;
  125 | m_activePositions[i].lotSize = 0.0;
  126 | m_activePositions[i].isLong = true;
  127 | m_activePositions[i].riskWeight = 1.0;
  128 | }
  129 | 
  130 | m_positionCount = 0;
  131 | 
  132 | // Initialize correlation history
  133 | for(int i = 0; i < CURRENCY_COUNT; i++) {
  134 | for(int j = 0; j < CURRENCY_COUNT; j++) {
  135 | for(int k = 0; k < 30; k++) {
  136 | m_correlationHistory[i][j][k] = 0.0;
  137 | }
  138 | }
  139 | }
  140 | 
  141 | m_historyIndex = 0;
  142 | m_historyDays = 0;
  143 | 
  144 | // Initialize parameters
  145 | m_correlationLookback = 20.0;
  146 | m_heatSensitivity = 1.0;
  147 | m_dynamicThresholds = true;
  148 | 
  149 | // Initialize warnings
  150 | for(int i = 0; i < 10; i++) {
  151 | m_warningMessages[i] = "";
  152 | }
  153 | m_warningCount = 0;
  154 | 
  155 | ::Print("[CORRELATION HEAT] Correlation Heat Map Management system initialized");
  156 | ::Print("[CONFIGURATION] Max Heat: ", m_heatData.maxAllowedHeat * 100, "% | Max Per Currency: ", m_heatData.maxCurrencyExposure * 100, "%");
  157 | }
  158 | ~CCorrelationHeatMapManager() {}
  159 | 
  160 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  161 | //| ðŸŽ¯ MAIN CORRELATION HEAT CALCULATION                           |
  162 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  163 | double CalculateCorrelationHeatRisk()
  164 | {
  165 | // Update current positions
  166 | UpdateActivePositions();
  167 | 
  168 | // Calculate real-time correlations
  169 | CalculateRealTimeCorrelations();
  170 | 
  171 | // Calculate currency exposures
  172 | CalculateCurrencyExposures();
  173 | 
  174 | // Calculate heat levels
  175 | CalculateCorrelationHeat();
  176 | 
  177 | // Assess risk multiplier
  178 | AssessHeatRiskMultiplier();
  179 | 
  180 | // Update warning system
  181 | UpdateHeatWarnings();
  182 | 
  183 | // Log heat analysis
  184 | LogHeatAnalysis();
  185 | 
  186 | return m_heatData.heatRiskMultiplier;
  187 | }
  188 | 
  189 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  190 | //| ðŸŽ¯ REAL-TIME CORRELATION CALCULATION                           |
  191 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  192 | void CalculateRealTimeCorrelations()
  193 | {
  194 | // Define major currency pairs for correlation analysis
  195 | string pairs[] = {
  196 | "EURUSD", "GBPUSD", "USDJPY", "USDCHF", 
  197 | "AUDUSD", "USDCAD", "NZDUSD", "EURJPY",
  198 | "GBPJPY", "EURGBP", "AUDCAD", "AUDCHF"
  199 | };
  200 | 
  201 | int pairCount = ArraySize(pairs);
  202 | int lookbackPeriods = 20; // 20 periods for correlation
  203 | 
  204 | // Calculate correlations between currency pairs
  205 | for(int i = 0; i < pairCount; i++) {
  206 | for(int j = i + 1; j < pairCount; j++) {
  207 | double correlation = CalculatePairCorrelation(pairs[i], pairs[j], lookbackPeriods);
  208 | 
  209 | // Map pair correlations to currency correlations
  210 | UpdateCurrencyCorrelationFromPairs(pairs[i], pairs[j], correlation);
  211 | }
  212 | }
  213 | 
  214 | // Update correlation history
  215 | UpdateCorrelationHistory();
  216 | }
  217 | 
  218 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  219 | //| ðŸŽ¯ PAIR CORRELATION CALCULATION                                |
  220 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  221 | double CalculatePairCorrelation(string symbol1, string symbol2, int periods)
  222 | {
  223 | // Get price data for both symbols
  224 | double prices1[], prices2[];
  225 | ArraySetAsSeries(prices1, true);
  226 | ArraySetAsSeries(prices2, true);
  227 | 
  228 | if(CopyClose(symbol1, PERIOD_H1, 0, periods, prices1) < periods ||
  229 | CopyClose(symbol2, PERIOD_H1, 0, periods, prices2) < periods) {
  230 | return 0.0; // Return neutral correlation if data unavailable
  231 | }
  232 | 
  233 | // Calculate returns
  234 | double returns1[], returns2[];
  235 | ArrayResize(returns1, periods - 1);
  236 | ArrayResize(returns2, periods - 1);
  237 | 
  238 | for(int i = 0; i < periods - 1; i++) {
  239 | if(prices1[i + 1] > 0) returns1[i] = (prices1[i] - prices1[i + 1]) / prices1[i + 1];
  240 | if(prices2[i + 1] > 0) returns2[i] = (prices2[i] - prices2[i + 1]) / prices2[i + 1];
  241 | }
  242 | 
  243 | // Calculate correlation coefficient
  244 | return CalculateCorrelationCoefficient(returns1, returns2, periods - 1);
  245 | }
  246 | 
  247 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  248 | //| ðŸŽ¯ CORRELATION COEFFICIENT CALCULATION                         |
  249 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  250 | double CalculateCorrelationCoefficient(const double& array1[], const double& array2[], int size)
  251 | {
  252 | if(size < 2) return 0.0;
  253 | 
  254 | // Calculate means
  255 | double mean1 = 0.0, mean2 = 0.0;
  256 | for(int i = 0; i < size; i++) {
  257 | mean1 += array1[i];
  258 | mean2 += array2[i];
  259 | }
  260 | mean1 /= size;
  261 | mean2 /= size;
  262 | 
  263 | // Calculate correlation components
  264 | double numerator = 0.0;
  265 | double sum1Sq = 0.0, sum2Sq = 0.0;
  266 | 
  267 | for(int i = 0; i < size; i++) {
  268 | double diff1 = array1[i] - mean1;
  269 | double diff2 = array2[i] - mean2;
  270 | 
  271 | numerator += diff1 * diff2;
  272 | sum1Sq += diff1 * diff1;
  273 | sum2Sq += diff2 * diff2;
  274 | }
  275 | 
  276 | double denominator = MathSqrt(sum1Sq * sum2Sq);
  277 | if(denominator == 0.0) return 0.0;
  278 | 
  279 | double correlation = numerator / denominator;
  280 | return MathMax(-1.0, MathMin(1.0, correlation)); // Ensure [-1, 1] range
  281 | }
  282 | 
  283 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  284 | //| ðŸŽ¯ CURRENCY EXPOSURE CALCULATION                               |
  285 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  286 | void CalculateCurrencyExposures()
  287 | {
  288 | // Reset exposures
  289 | for(int i = 0; i < CURRENCY_COUNT; i++) {
  290 | m_heatData.currencyExposure[i] = 0.0;
  291 | }
  292 | 
  293 | // Calculate exposures from active positions
  294 | for(int i = 0; i < m_positionCount; i++) {
  295 | CurrencyPairInfo pos;
  296 | pos = m_activePositions[i];
  297 | double exposure = pos.lotSize * pos.riskWeight;
  298 | 
  299 | if(pos.isLong) {
  300 | // Long position: Long base currency, short quote currency
  301 | m_heatData.currencyExposure[pos.baseCurrency] += exposure;
  302 | m_heatData.currencyExposure[pos.quoteCurrency] -= exposure;
  303 | } else {
  304 | // Short position: Short base currency, long quote currency
  305 | m_heatData.currencyExposure[pos.baseCurrency] -= exposure;
  306 | m_heatData.currencyExposure[pos.quoteCurrency] += exposure;
  307 | }
  308 | }
  309 | 
  310 | // Convert to absolute exposure percentages
  311 | double totalExposure = 0.0;
  312 | for(int i = 0; i < CURRENCY_COUNT; i++) {
  313 | totalExposure += MathAbs(m_heatData.currencyExposure[i]);
  314 | }
  315 | 
  316 | if(totalExposure > 0) {
  317 | for(int i = 0; i < CURRENCY_COUNT; i++) {
  318 | m_heatData.currencyExposure[i] = MathAbs(m_heatData.currencyExposure[i]) / totalExposure;
  319 | }
  320 | }
  321 | }
  322 | 
  323 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  324 | //| ðŸŽ¯ CORRELATION HEAT CALCULATION                                |
  325 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  326 | void CalculateCorrelationHeat()
  327 | {
  328 | // Calculate heat for each currency
  329 | for(int i = 0; i < CURRENCY_COUNT; i++) {
  330 | m_heatData.currencyHeat[i] = 0.0;
  331 | 
  332 | // Sum correlation-weighted exposures with other currencies
  333 | for(int j = 0; j < CURRENCY_COUNT; j++) {
  334 | if(i != j) {
  335 | double correlation = MathAbs(m_heatData.correlationMatrix[i][j]);
  336 | double otherExposure = m_heatData.currencyExposure[j];
  337 | m_heatData.currencyHeat[i] += correlation * otherExposure;
  338 | }
  339 | }
  340 | 
  341 | // Apply own exposure
  342 | m_heatData.currencyHeat[i] += m_heatData.currencyExposure[i];
  343 | 
  344 | // Normalize heat
  345 | m_heatData.currencyHeat[i] = MathMin(1.0, m_heatData.currencyHeat[i]);
  346 | }
  347 | 
  348 | // Calculate total portfolio heat
  349 | m_heatData.totalPortfolioHeat = 0.0;
  350 | for(int i = 0; i < CURRENCY_COUNT; i++) {
  351 | m_heatData.totalPortfolioHeat += m_heatData.currencyHeat[i];
  352 | }
  353 | m_heatData.totalPortfolioHeat /= CURRENCY_COUNT;
  354 | 
  355 | // Find hottest currency
  356 | double maxHeat = 0.0;
  357 | for(int i = 0; i < CURRENCY_COUNT; i++) {
  358 | if(m_heatData.currencyHeat[i] > maxHeat) {
  359 | maxHeat = m_heatData.currencyHeat[i];
  360 | m_heatData.hottestCurrency = (ENUM_CURRENCY_INDEX)i;
  361 | }
  362 | }
  363 | }
  364 | 
  365 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  366 | //| ðŸŽ¯ HEAT RISK ASSESSMENT                                        |
  367 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  368 | void AssessHeatRiskMultiplier()
  369 | {
  370 | double totalHeat = m_heatData.totalPortfolioHeat;
  371 | 
  372 | if(totalHeat < 0.3) {
  373 | // Low heat - normal trading
  374 | m_heatData.heatRiskMultiplier = 1.0;
  375 | }
  376 | else if(totalHeat < 0.5) {
  377 | // Moderate heat - slight caution
  378 | m_heatData.heatRiskMultiplier = 0.9;
  379 | }
  380 | else if(totalHeat < 0.7) {
  381 | // High heat - reduce risk
  382 | m_heatData.heatRiskMultiplier = 0.7;
  383 | }
  384 | else if(totalHeat < 0.9) {
  385 | // Very high heat - significant risk reduction
  386 | m_heatData.heatRiskMultiplier = 0.4;
  387 | }
  388 | else {
  389 | // Critical heat - minimal trading
  390 | m_heatData.heatRiskMultiplier = 0.2;
  391 | }
  392 | 
  393 | // Additional penalty for individual currency overexposure
  394 | double maxCurrencyHeat = m_heatData.currencyHeat[m_heatData.hottestCurrency];
  395 | if(maxCurrencyHeat > 0.8) {
  396 | m_heatData.heatRiskMultiplier *= 0.5; // Additional 50% penalty
  397 | }
  398 | }
  399 | 
  400 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  401 | //| ðŸŽ¯ WARNING SYSTEM                                              |
  402 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  403 | void UpdateHeatWarnings()
  404 | {
  405 | m_warningCount = 0;
  406 | m_heatData.overheatingWarning = false;
  407 | 
  408 | // Check total portfolio heat
  409 | if(m_heatData.totalPortfolioHeat > m_heatData.maxAllowedHeat) {
  410 | m_heatData.overheatingWarning = true;
  411 | AddWarning(StringFormat("Portfolio overheating: %.1f%% (Max: %.1f%%)", 
  412 | m_heatData.totalPortfolioHeat * 100, 
  413 | m_heatData.maxAllowedHeat * 100));
  414 | }
  415 | 
  416 | // Check individual currency heat
  417 | for(int i = 0; i < CURRENCY_COUNT; i++) {
  418 | if(m_heatData.currencyHeat[i] > 0.8) {
  419 | AddWarning(StringFormat("%s overexposure: %.1f%%", 
  420 | CurrencyIndexToString((ENUM_CURRENCY_INDEX)i),
  421 | m_heatData.currencyHeat[i] * 100));
  422 | m_heatData.heatDuration[i]++;
  423 | } else {
  424 | m_heatData.heatDuration[i] = 0;
  425 | }
  426 | }
  427 | 
  428 | // Check correlation clustering
  429 | double highCorrelationCount = 0;
  430 | for(int i = 0; i < CURRENCY_COUNT; i++) {
  431 | for(int j = i + 1; j < CURRENCY_COUNT; j++) {
  432 | if(MathAbs(m_heatData.correlationMatrix[i][j]) > 0.7) {
  433 | highCorrelationCount++;
  434 | }
  435 | }
  436 | }
  437 | 
  438 | if(highCorrelationCount > 10) { // Threshold for too many high correlations
  439 | AddWarning("High correlation clustering detected");
  440 | }
  441 | }
  442 | 
  443 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  444 | //| ðŸŽ¯ HELPER METHODS                                              |
  445 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  446 | void UpdateActivePositions()
  447 | {
  448 | m_positionCount = 0;
  449 | 
  450 | // Scan all open positions
  451 | for(int i = PositionsTotal() - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
  452 | ulong ticket = PositionGetTicket(i);
  453 | if(PositionSelectByTicket(ticket)) {
  454 | string symbol = PositionGetString(POSITION_SYMBOL);
  455 | double lotSize = PositionGetDouble(POSITION_VOLUME);
  456 | ENUM_POSITION_TYPE posType = (ENUM_POSITION_TYPE)PositionGetInteger(POSITION_TYPE);
  457 | 
  458 | // Parse currency pair
  459 | ENUM_CURRENCY_INDEX baseCurr, quoteCurr;
  460 | if(ParseCurrencyPair(symbol, baseCurr, quoteCurr)) {
  461 | m_activePositions[m_positionCount].symbol = symbol;
  462 | m_activePositions[m_positionCount].baseCurrency = baseCurr;
  463 | m_activePositions[m_positionCount].quoteCurrency = quoteCurr;
  464 | m_activePositions[m_positionCount].lotSize = lotSize;
  465 | m_activePositions[m_positionCount].isLong = (posType == POSITION_TYPE_BUY);
  466 | m_activePositions[m_positionCount].riskWeight = 1.0; // Default weight
  467 | 
  468 | m_positionCount++;
  469 | if(m_positionCount >= 50) break; // Array limit
  470 | }
  471 | }
  472 | }
  473 | }
  474 | 
  475 | bool ParseCurrencyPair(string symbol, ENUM_CURRENCY_INDEX& baseCurr, ENUM_CURRENCY_INDEX& quoteCurr)
  476 | {
  477 | // Extract first 6 characters for currency pair
  478 | if(StringLen(symbol) < 6) return false;
  479 | 
  480 | string base = StringSubstr(symbol, 0, 3);
  481 | string quote = StringSubstr(symbol, 3, 3);
  482 | 
  483 | baseCurr = StringToCurrencyIndex(base);
  484 | quoteCurr = StringToCurrencyIndex(quote);
  485 | 
  486 | return (baseCurr != CURRENCY_COUNT && quoteCurr != CURRENCY_COUNT);
  487 | }
  488 | 
  489 | ENUM_CURRENCY_INDEX StringToCurrencyIndex(string currency)
  490 | {
  491 | if(currency == "USD") return CURRENCY_USD;
  492 | else if(currency == "EUR") return CURRENCY_EUR;
  493 | else if(currency == "GBP") return CURRENCY_GBP;
  494 | else if(currency == "JPY") return CURRENCY_JPY;
  495 | else if(currency == "CHF") return CURRENCY_CHF;
  496 | else if(currency == "AUD") return CURRENCY_AUD;
  497 | else if(currency == "CAD") return CURRENCY_CAD;
  498 | else if(currency == "NZD") return CURRENCY_NZD;
  499 | else return CURRENCY_COUNT; // Invalid currency
  500 | }
  501 | 
  502 | string CurrencyIndexToString(ENUM_CURRENCY_INDEX index)
  503 | {
  504 | switch(index) {
  505 | case CURRENCY_USD: return "USD";
  506 | case CURRENCY_EUR: return "EUR";
  507 | case CURRENCY_GBP: return "GBP";
  508 | case CURRENCY_JPY: return "JPY";
  509 | case CURRENCY_CHF: return "CHF";
  510 | case CURRENCY_AUD: return "AUD";
  511 | case CURRENCY_CAD: return "CAD";
  512 | case CURRENCY_NZD: return "NZD";
  513 | default: return "UNKNOWN";
  514 | }
  515 | }
  516 | 
  517 | void UpdateCurrencyCorrelationFromPairs(string pair1, string pair2, double correlation)
  518 | {
  519 | // This is a simplified mapping - in reality, you'd need more sophisticated
  520 | // analysis to convert pair correlations to currency correlations
  521 | 
  522 | ENUM_CURRENCY_INDEX base1, quote1, base2, quote2;
  523 | if(ParseCurrencyPair(pair1, base1, quote1) && 
  524 | ParseCurrencyPair(pair2, base2, quote2)) {
  525 | 
  526 | // Update correlation matrix (simplified)
  527 | if(base1 == base2 || quote1 == quote2) {
  528 | // Pairs share a currency - positive correlation possible
  529 | m_heatData.correlationMatrix[base1][base2] = correlation;
  530 | m_heatData.correlationMatrix[base2][base1] = correlation;
  531 | }
  532 | }
  533 | }
  534 | 
  535 | void UpdateCorrelationHistory()
  536 | {
  537 | // Store current correlations in history
  538 | for(int i = 0; i < CURRENCY_COUNT; i++) {
  539 | for(int j = 0; j < CURRENCY_COUNT; j++) {
  540 | m_correlationHistory[i][j][m_historyIndex] = m_heatData.correlationMatrix[i][j];
  541 | }
  542 | }
  543 | 
  544 | m_historyIndex = (m_historyIndex + 1) % 30;
  545 | if(m_historyDays < 30) m_historyDays++;
  546 | }
  547 | 
  548 | void AddWarning(string message)
  549 | {
  550 | if(m_warningCount < 10) {
  551 | m_warningMessages[m_warningCount] = message;
  552 | m_warningCount++;
  553 | ::Print("[CORRELATION HEAT] ", message);
  554 | }
  555 | }
  556 | 
  557 | void LogHeatAnalysis()
  558 | {
  559 | static datetime lastLog = 0;
  560 | if(TimeCurrent() - lastLog < 1800) return; // Log every 30 minutes
  561 | 
  562 | ::Print(StringFormat("[HEAT MAP] Total Heat: %.1f%% | Hottest: %s (%.1f%%) | Risk Multiplier: %.2f",
  563 | m_heatData.totalPortfolioHeat * 100,
  564 | CurrencyIndexToString(m_heatData.hottestCurrency),
  565 | m_heatData.currencyHeat[m_heatData.hottestCurrency] * 100,
  566 | m_heatData.heatRiskMultiplier));
  567 | 
  568 | lastLog = TimeCurrent();
  569 | }
  570 | 
  571 | // Public interface methods
  572 | double GetHeatRiskMultiplier() const { return m_heatData.heatRiskMultiplier; }
  573 | CorrelationHeatData GetHeatData() const { return m_heatData; }
  574 | bool IsOverheating() const { return m_heatData.overheatingWarning; }
  575 | double GetCurrencyHeat(ENUM_CURRENCY_INDEX currency) const 
  576 | { 
  577 | return (currency < CURRENCY_COUNT) ? m_heatData.currencyHeat[currency] : 0.0; 
  578 | }
  579 | 
  580 | void SetMaxAllowedHeat(double maxHeat) 
  581 | { 
  582 | m_heatData.maxAllowedHeat = MathMax(0.3, MathMin(1.0, maxHeat)); 
  583 | }
  584 | 
  585 | void SetHeatSensitivity(double sensitivity) 
  586 | { 
  587 | m_heatSensitivity = MathMax(0.5, MathMin(2.0, sensitivity)); 
  588 | }
  589 | 
  590 | string GetCorrelationHeatReport()
  591 | {
  592 | string report = "CORRELATION HEAT MAP ANALYSIS\n";
  593 | report += StringFormat("Total Portfolio Heat: %.1f%% (Max: %.1f%%)\n", 
  594 | m_heatData.totalPortfolioHeat * 100, 
  595 | m_heatData.maxAllowedHeat * 100);
  596 | report += StringFormat("Risk Multiplier: %.2fx\n", m_heatData.heatRiskMultiplier);
  597 | report += StringFormat("Overheating Warning: %s\n", m_heatData.overheatingWarning ? "YES" : "NO");
  598 | report += "Currency Heat Levels:\n";
  599 | 
  600 | for(int i = 0; i < CURRENCY_COUNT; i++) {
  601 | if(m_heatData.currencyHeat[i] > 0.1) { // Only show significant heat
  602 | report += StringFormat("  %s: %.1f%%", 
  603 | CurrencyIndexToString((ENUM_CURRENCY_INDEX)i),
  604 | m_heatData.currencyHeat[i] * 100);
  605 | if(i == m_heatData.hottestCurrency) report += " (HOTTEST)";
  606 | report += "\n";
  607 | }
  608 | }
  609 | 
  610 | if(m_warningCount > 0) {
  611 | report += "Active Warnings:\n";
  612 | for(int i = 0; i < m_warningCount; i++) {
  613 | report += "  " + m_warningMessages[i] + "\n";
  614 | }
  615 | }
  616 | 
  617 | return report;
  618 | }
  619 | };
  620 | 
  621 | 
  622 | #endif // RISK_CORRELATION_HEAT_MAP_MQH
  623 |

   11 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   12 | //| Equity Curve Pattern Types                                      |
   13 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   14 | enum ENUM_EQUITY_PATTERN
   15 | {
   16 | PATTERN_SMOOTH_GROWTH,     // Healthy upward trajectory
   17 | PATTERN_ACCELERATING,      // Accelerating growth
   18 | PATTERN_VOLATILE_UP,       // Volatile but upward
   19 | PATTERN_SIDEWAYS,          // Flat/sideways movement
   20 | PATTERN_VOLATILE_DOWN,     // Volatile downward
   21 | PATTERN_DECLINING,         // Steady decline
   22 | PATTERN_DANGEROUS_DECLINE, // Rapid dangerous decline
   23 | PATTERN_UNKNOWN           // Insufficient data
   24 | };
   25 | 
   26 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   27 | //| Equity Curve Data Point                                         |
   28 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   29 | struct EquityCurvePoint
   30 | {
   31 | datetime time;
   32 | double equity;
   33 | double balance;
   34 | double drawdown;
   35 | double velocity;    // Rate of change
   36 | double acceleration; // Second derivative
   37 | 
   38 | void Reset() {
   39 | time = 0;
   40 | equity = 0.0;
   41 | balance = 0.0;
   42 | drawdown = 0.0;
   43 | velocity = 0.0;
   44 | acceleration = 0.0;
   45 | }
   46 | };
   47 | 
   48 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   49 | //| Equity Curve Convexity Manager Class                           |
   50 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   51 | class CEquityCurveConvexityManager
   52 | {
   53 | private:
   54 | EquityCurvePoint m_equityHistory[100];
   55 | int m_historyCount;
   56 | int m_maxHistorySize;
   57 | 
   58 | double m_currentConvexity;
   59 | ENUM_EQUITY_PATTERN m_currentPattern;
   60 | 
   61 | double m_lastEquity;
   62 | datetime m_lastUpdate;
   63 | 
   64 | bool m_warningActive;
   65 | string m_lastWarningMessage;
   66 | 
   67 | public:
   68 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   69 | //| Constructor                                                      |
   70 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   71 | CEquityCurveConvexityManager()
   72 | {
   73 | m_historyCount = 0;
   74 | m_maxHistorySize = 100;
   75 | m_currentConvexity = 0.0;
   76 | m_currentPattern = PATTERN_UNKNOWN;
   77 | m_lastEquity = 0.0;
   78 | m_lastUpdate = 0;
   79 | m_warningActive = false;
   80 | m_lastWarningMessage = "";
   81 | 
   82 | // Initialize history array
   83 | for(int i = 0; i < m_maxHistorySize; i++) {
   84 | m_equityHistory[i].Reset();
   85 | }
   86 | }
   87 | 
   88 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   89 | //| Add Equity Point                                                |
   90 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   91 | void AddEquityPoint(double equity, double balance, double drawdown)
   92 | {
   93 | datetime currentTime = TimeCurrent();
   94 | 
   95 | // Add new point to history
   96 | if(m_historyCount < m_maxHistorySize) {
   97 | m_equityHistory[m_historyCount].time = currentTime;
   98 | m_equityHistory[m_historyCount].equity = equity;
   99 | m_equityHistory[m_historyCount].balance = balance;
  100 | m_equityHistory[m_historyCount].drawdown = drawdown;
  101 | 
  102 | // Calculate velocity and acceleration if we have enough data
  103 | if(m_historyCount > 0) {
  104 | double timeDiff = (double)(currentTime - m_equityHistory[m_historyCount-1].time);
  105 | if(timeDiff > 0) {
  106 | m_equityHistory[m_historyCount].velocity = 
  107 | (equity - m_equityHistory[m_historyCount-1].equity) / timeDiff;
  108 | }
  109 | 
  110 | if(m_historyCount > 1) {
  111 | double prevVelocity = m_equityHistory[m_historyCount-1].velocity;
  112 | m_equityHistory[m_historyCount].acceleration = 
  113 | (m_equityHistory[m_historyCount].velocity - prevVelocity) / timeDiff;
  114 | }
  115 | }
  116 | 
  117 | m_historyCount++;
  118 | } else {
  119 | // Shift array and add new point
  120 | for(int i = 0; i < m_maxHistorySize - 1; i++) {
  121 | m_equityHistory[i] = m_equityHistory[i+1];
  122 | }
  123 | 
  124 | m_equityHistory[m_maxHistorySize-1].time = currentTime;
  125 | m_equityHistory[m_maxHistorySize-1].equity = equity;
  126 | m_equityHistory[m_maxHistorySize-1].balance = balance;
  127 | m_equityHistory[m_maxHistorySize-1].drawdown = drawdown;
  128 | 
  129 | // Calculate velocity and acceleration
  130 | double timeDiff = (double)(currentTime - m_equityHistory[m_maxHistorySize-2].time);
  131 | if(timeDiff > 0) {
  132 | m_equityHistory[m_maxHistorySize-1].velocity = 
  133 | (equity - m_equityHistory[m_maxHistorySize-2].equity) / timeDiff;
  134 | 
  135 | double prevVelocity = m_equityHistory[m_maxHistorySize-2].velocity;
  136 | m_equityHistory[m_maxHistorySize-1].acceleration = 
  137 | (m_equityHistory[m_maxHistorySize-1].velocity - prevVelocity) / timeDiff;
  138 | }
  139 | }
  140 | 
  141 | m_lastEquity = equity;
  142 | m_lastUpdate = currentTime;
  143 | 
  144 | // Update convexity and pattern analysis
  145 | UpdateConvexityAnalysis();
  146 | }
  147 | 
  148 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  149 | //| Calculate Current Convexity                                     |
  150 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  151 | double CalculateConvexity()
  152 | {
  153 | if(m_historyCount < 10) return 0.0; // Need minimum data points
  154 | 
  155 | // Calculate convexity based on second derivative (acceleration)
  156 | double totalAcceleration = 0.0;
  157 | int validPoints = 0;
  158 | 
  159 | int startIndex = MathMax(0, m_historyCount - 20); // Use last 20 points
  160 | for(int i = startIndex; i < m_historyCount; i++) {
  161 | if(m_equityHistory[i].acceleration != 0.0) {
  162 | totalAcceleration += m_equityHistory[i].acceleration;
  163 | validPoints++;
  164 | }
  165 | }
  166 | 
  167 | if(validPoints == 0) return 0.0;
  168 | 
  169 | double avgAcceleration = totalAcceleration / validPoints;
  170 | 
  171 | // Normalize convexity value
  172 | m_currentConvexity = MathMax(-1.0, MathMin(1.0, avgAcceleration * 10000.0));
  173 | 
  174 | return m_currentConvexity;
  175 | }
  176 | 
  177 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  178 | //| Determine Equity Pattern                                        |
  179 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  180 | ENUM_EQUITY_PATTERN DetermineEquityPattern()
  181 | {
  182 | if(m_historyCount < 5) return PATTERN_UNKNOWN;
  183 | 
  184 | double convexity = CalculateConvexity();
  185 | double recentVelocity = 0.0;
  186 | double volatility = 0.0;
  187 | 
  188 | // Calculate recent velocity and volatility
  189 | int recentPoints = MathMin(10, m_historyCount);
  190 | double velocitySum = 0.0;
  191 | double velocitySquareSum = 0.0;
  192 | 
  193 | for(int i = m_historyCount - recentPoints; i < m_historyCount; i++) {
  194 | velocitySum += m_equityHistory[i].velocity;
  195 | velocitySquareSum += m_equityHistory[i].velocity * m_equityHistory[i].velocity;
  196 | }
  197 | 
  198 | recentVelocity = velocitySum / recentPoints;
  199 | volatility = MathSqrt(velocitySquareSum / recentPoints - recentVelocity * recentVelocity);
  200 | 
  201 | // Determine pattern
  202 | if(convexity > 0.05) {
  203 | if(recentVelocity > 0) {
  204 | m_currentPattern = PATTERN_ACCELERATING;
  205 | } else {
  206 | m_currentPattern = PATTERN_VOLATILE_UP;
  207 | }
  208 | } else if(convexity < -0.03) {
  209 | if(recentVelocity < 0) {
  210 | m_currentPattern = PATTERN_DANGEROUS_DECLINE;
  211 | } else {
  212 | m_currentPattern = PATTERN_VOLATILE_DOWN;
  213 | }
  214 | } else {
  215 | if(MathAbs(recentVelocity) < 0.001) {
  216 | m_currentPattern = PATTERN_SIDEWAYS;
  217 | } else if(recentVelocity > 0) {
  218 | m_currentPattern = PATTERN_SMOOTH_GROWTH;
  219 | } else {
  220 | m_currentPattern = PATTERN_DECLINING;
  221 | }
  222 | }
  223 | 
  224 | return m_currentPattern;
  225 | }
  226 | 
  227 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  228 | //| Update Convexity Analysis                                       |
  229 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  230 | void UpdateConvexityAnalysis()
  231 | {
  232 | CalculateConvexity();
  233 | DetermineEquityPattern();
  234 | 
  235 | // Check for warnings
  236 | CheckForWarnings();
  237 | }
  238 | 
  239 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  240 | //| Check for Convexity Warnings                                   |
  241 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  242 | void CheckForWarnings()
  243 | {
  244 | m_warningActive = false;
  245 | m_lastWarningMessage = "";
  246 | 
  247 | if(m_currentPattern == PATTERN_DANGEROUS_DECLINE) {
  248 | m_warningActive = true;
  249 | m_lastWarningMessage = "DANGEROUS EQUITY DECLINE DETECTED - REDUCE RISK IMMEDIATELY";
  250 | } else if(m_currentConvexity < -0.05) {
  251 | m_warningActive = true;
  252 | m_lastWarningMessage = "NEGATIVE CONVEXITY WARNING - EQUITY CURVE DETERIORATING";
  253 | } else if(m_currentPattern == PATTERN_VOLATILE_DOWN) {
  254 | m_warningActive = true;
  255 | m_lastWarningMessage = "VOLATILE DOWNWARD PATTERN - CONSIDER RISK REDUCTION";
  256 | }
  257 | }
  258 | 
  259 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  260 | //| Get Risk Adjustment Factor                                      |
  261 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  262 | double GetConvexityRiskAdjustment()
  263 | {
  264 | if(m_historyCount < 5) return 1.0; // Default if insufficient data
  265 | 
  266 | double adjustment = 1.0;
  267 | 
  268 | switch(m_currentPattern) {
  269 | case PATTERN_SMOOTH_GROWTH:
  270 | adjustment = 1.1; // Slight increase for healthy growth
  271 | break;
  272 | case PATTERN_ACCELERATING:
  273 | adjustment = 1.2; // Higher risk allowed for accelerating growth
  274 | break;
  275 | case PATTERN_VOLATILE_UP:
  276 | adjustment = 0.9; // Reduce risk due to volatility
  277 | break;
  278 | case PATTERN_SIDEWAYS:
  279 | adjustment = 0.8; // Reduce risk during sideways movement
  280 | break;
  281 | case PATTERN_VOLATILE_DOWN:
  282 | adjustment = 0.6; // Significant reduction for volatile decline
  283 | break;
  284 | case PATTERN_DECLINING:
  285 | adjustment = 0.5; // Major reduction for declining equity
  286 | break;
  287 | case PATTERN_DANGEROUS_DECLINE:
  288 | adjustment = 0.2; // Emergency risk reduction
  289 | break;
  290 | default:
  291 | adjustment = 1.0;
  292 | }
  293 | 
  294 | // Additional adjustment based on convexity value
  295 | if(m_currentConvexity > 0.05) {
  296 | adjustment *= 1.1; // Boost for positive convexity
  297 | } else if(m_currentConvexity < -0.03) {
  298 | adjustment *= 0.7; // Penalty for negative convexity
  299 | }
  300 | 
  301 | return MathMax(0.1, MathMin(2.0, adjustment)); // Limit range
  302 | }
  303 | 
  304 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  305 | //| Public Getters                                                  |
  306 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  307 | double GetCurrentConvexity() { return m_currentConvexity; }
  308 | ENUM_EQUITY_PATTERN GetCurrentPattern() { return m_currentPattern; }
  309 | bool HasWarning() { return m_warningActive; }
  310 | string GetWarningMessage() { return m_lastWarningMessage; }
  311 | 
  312 | // ADDED: Missing IsEquityCurveDangerous method
  313 | bool IsEquityCurveDangerous() { 
  314 | return (m_currentPattern == PATTERN_DANGEROUS_DECLINE || 
  315 | m_currentPattern == PATTERN_DECLINING ||
  316 | m_warningActive); 
  317 | }
  318 | 
  319 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  320 | //| Get Status Report                                               |
  321 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  322 | string GetConvexityReport()
  323 | {
  324 | string patternName;
  325 | switch(m_currentPattern) {
  326 | case PATTERN_SMOOTH_GROWTH: patternName = "SMOOTH GROWTH"; break;
  327 | case PATTERN_ACCELERATING: patternName = "ACCELERATING"; break;
  328 | case PATTERN_VOLATILE_UP: patternName = "VOLATILE UP"; break;
  329 | case PATTERN_SIDEWAYS: patternName = "SIDEWAYS"; break;
  330 | case PATTERN_VOLATILE_DOWN: patternName = "VOLATILE DOWN"; break;
  331 | case PATTERN_DECLINING: patternName = "DECLINING"; break;
  332 | case PATTERN_DANGEROUS_DECLINE: patternName = "DANGEROUS DECLINE"; break;
  333 | default: patternName = "UNKNOWN"; break;
  334 | }
  335 | 
  336 | string report = "🔄 EQUITY CURVE ANALYSIS:\n";
  337 | report += StringFormat("Convexity: %.4f\n", m_currentConvexity);
  338 | report += StringFormat("Pattern: %s\n", patternName);
  339 | report += StringFormat("Risk Adjustment: %.2f\n", GetConvexityRiskAdjustment());
  340 | report += StringFormat("Data Points: %d\n", m_historyCount);
  341 | 
  342 | if(m_warningActive) {
  343 | report += StringFormat("⚠️ WARNING: %s\n", m_lastWarningMessage);
  344 | } else {
  345 | report += "✅ Status: HEALTHY\n";
  346 | }
  347 | 
  348 | return report;
  349 | }
  350 | };

   19 | struct MarketRegimeKellyData
   20 | {
   21 | ENUM_MARKET_REGIME currentRegime;
   22 | double volatilityRegime;        // 0.5-2.0+ (normal-extreme)
   23 | double regimePersistence;       // How stable is current regime (0-1)
   24 | datetime regimeStartTime;
   25 | int regimeDuration;            // Bars in current regime
   26 | double volatilityAdjustment;   // Dynamic volatility multiplier
   27 | double convexityAdjustment;    // Equity curve convexity multiplier
   28 | double persistenceAdjustment;  // Regime persistence multiplier

   33 | volatilityRegime = 1.0;
   34 | regimePersistence = 0.5;
   35 | regimeStartTime = 0;
   36 | regimeDuration = 0;
   37 | volatilityAdjustment = 1.0;
   38 | convexityAdjustment = 1.0;
   39 | persistenceAdjustment = 1.0;
   40 | }
   41 | };
   42 | 
   43 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   44 | //| Equity Curve Convexity Analysis                                 |
   45 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   46 | struct EquityCurveData
   47 | {
   48 | double equityHistory[200];     // Last 200 equity points
   49 | int historyIndex;
   50 | int historyCount;
   51 | double currentConvexity;       // Current convexity measure
   52 | double convexityTrend;         // Convexity trend (improving/degrading)
   53 | double riskAdjustment;         // Risk adjustment based on convexity
   54 | bool isDangerous;              // Flag for dangerous equity curve shape
   55 | 
   56 | void Initialize()
   57 | {
   58 | ArrayInitialize(equityHistory, 0.0);
   59 | historyIndex = 0;
   60 | historyCount = 0;
   61 | currentConvexity = 0.0;
   62 | convexityTrend = 0.0;
   63 | riskAdjustment = 1.0;
   64 | isDangerous = false;
   65 | }
   66 | };
   67 | 
   68 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   69 | //| 🎯 ADAPTIVE DYNAMIC KELLY SYSTEM - BOSS'S BREAKTHROUGH          |
   70 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   71 | class CAdaptiveDynamicKelly : public CKellyCriterionSizer
   72 | {
   73 | private:
   74 | MarketRegimeKellyData m_regimeData;
   75 | EquityCurveData m_equityData;
   76 | 
   77 | // Enhanced Kelly parameters
   78 | double m_fractionalKellyFactor;     // Fractional Kelly safety (0.25-0.5)
   79 | double m_maxAllowedKelly;           // Maximum Kelly allowed (5%)
   80 | double m_blackSwanProtection;       // Protection against extreme events
   81 | 
   82 | // Performance tracking for adaptation
   83 | double m_recentEquity[50];          // Recent equity curve
   84 | int m_equityIndex;
   85 | int m_equityCount;
   86 | 
   87 | // Volatility regime tracking
   88 | double m_atrHistory[30];            // ATR history for volatility regime
   89 | int m_atrIndex;
   90 | int m_atrCount;
   91 | 
   92 | // Regime persistence tracking
   93 | ENUM_MARKET_REGIME m_previousRegime;
   94 | int m_regimeChangeCount;
   95 | datetime m_lastRegimeChange;
   96 | 
   97 | public:
   98 | CAdaptiveDynamicKelly();
   99 | ~CAdaptiveDynamicKelly() {}
  100 | 
  101 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  102 | //| 🎯 MAIN ADAPTIVE DYNAMIC KELLY CALCULATION                      |
  103 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  104 | double CalculateAdaptiveDynamicKelly(double winRate, double profitFactor, 
  105 | double signalConfidence, ENUM_MARKET_REGIME currentRegime)
  106 | {
  107 | // Update regime data
  108 | UpdateMarketRegimeData(currentRegime);
  109 | 
  110 | // Update equity curve analysis
  111 | UpdateEquityCurveAnalysis();
  112 | 
  113 | // 1. Calculate base Kelly fraction
  114 | if(winRate <= 0.5 || profitFactor <= 1.0) {
  115 | Print("[🛡️ ADAPTIVE KELLY] Invalid system metrics - using minimum risk");
  116 | return 0.5; // Minimum 0.5% risk
  117 | }
  118 | 
  119 | double kellyBase = (profitFactor * winRate - (1 - winRate)) / profitFactor;
  120 | 
  121 | // 2. QUYẾT ĐỊNH SỐ 1: Volatility Regime Adjustment
  122 | CalculateVolatilityRegimeAdjustment();
  123 | 
  124 | // 3. QUYẾT ĐỊNH SỐ 2: Equity Curve Convexity Adjustment  
  125 | CalculateEquityCurveConvexityAdjustment();
  126 | 
  127 | // 4. QUYẾT ĐỊNH SỐ 3: Regime Persistence Adjustment
  128 | CalculateRegimePersistenceAdjustment();
  129 | 
  130 | // 5. Apply fractional Kelly with all adjustments
  131 | double finalKelly = kellyBase * m_fractionalKellyFactor * 
  132 | m_regimeData.volatilityAdjustment *
  133 | m_regimeData.convexityAdjustment *
  134 | m_regimeData.persistenceAdjustment;
  135 | 
  136 | // 6. Signal confidence adjustment
  137 | finalKelly *= GetSignalConfidenceMultiplier(signalConfidence);
  138 | 
  139 | // 7. Apply safety limits and Black Swan protection
  140 | finalKelly = ApplySafetyLimits(finalKelly);
  141 | 
  142 | // 8. Log detailed analysis
  143 | LogKellyAnalysis(kellyBase, finalKelly);
  144 | 
  145 | return finalKelly;
  146 | }
  147 | 
  148 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  149 | //| 🎯 VOLATILITY REGIME ADJUSTMENT (QUYẾT ĐỊNH SỐ 1)              |
  150 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  151 | void CalculateVolatilityRegimeAdjustment()
  152 | {
  153 | // Calculate current volatility regime
  154 | double currentATR = GetCurrentATR();
  155 | double avgATR = CalculateAverageATR(20);
  156 | 
  157 | m_regimeData.volatilityRegime = (avgATR > 0) ? currentATR / avgATR : 1.0;
  158 | 
  159 | // Determine volatility adjustment
  160 | if(m_regimeData.volatilityRegime > 1.5) {
  161 | // Black Swan territory
  162 | m_regimeData.volatilityAdjustment = 0.5;
  163 | m_blackSwanProtection = 0.3;
  164 | Print("[⚠️ BLACK SWAN] Extreme volatility detected: ", 
  165 | DoubleToString(m_regimeData.volatilityRegime, 2), "x normal");
  166 | }
  167 | else if(m_regimeData.volatilityRegime > 1.2) {
  168 | // High volatility
  169 | m_regimeData.volatilityAdjustment = 0.7;
  170 | m_blackSwanProtection = 0.8;
  171 | }
  172 | else if(m_regimeData.volatilityRegime < 0.7) {
  173 | // Low volatility - can increase position size slightly
  174 | m_regimeData.volatilityAdjustment = 1.3;
  175 | m_blackSwanProtection = 1.0;
  176 | }
  177 | else {
  178 | // Normal volatility
  179 | m_regimeData.volatilityAdjustment = 1.0;
  180 | m_blackSwanProtection = 1.0;
  181 | }
  182 | }
  183 | 
  184 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  185 | //| 🎯 EQUITY CURVE CONVEXITY ADJUSTMENT (QUYẾT ĐỊNH SỐ 2)         |
  186 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  187 | void CalculateEquityCurveConvexityAdjustment()
  188 | {
  189 | if(m_equityData.historyCount < 20) {
  190 | m_regimeData.convexityAdjustment = 1.0;
  191 | return;
  192 | }
  193 | 
  194 | // Calculate convexity using second derivative approximation
  195 | double convexity = CalculateEquityCurveConvexity();
  196 | m_equityData.currentConvexity = convexity;
  197 | 
  198 | if(convexity > 0.05) {
  199 | // Strong positive convexity (accelerating profits)
  200 | m_regimeData.convexityAdjustment = 1.2;
  201 | m_equityData.isDangerous = false;
  202 | Print("[📈 CONVEXITY] Strong positive convexity: +", 
  203 | DoubleToString(convexity * 100, 1), "% - Increasing risk");
  204 | }
  205 | else if(convexity > 0.01) {
  206 | // Moderate positive convexity
  207 | m_regimeData.convexityAdjustment = 1.1;
  208 | m_equityData.isDangerous = false;
  209 | }
  210 | else if(convexity > -0.02) {
  211 | // Neutral to slightly negative
  212 | m_regimeData.convexityAdjustment = 1.0;
  213 | m_equityData.isDangerous = false;
  214 | }
  215 | else if(convexity > -0.03) {
  216 | // Concerning negative convexity
  217 | m_regimeData.convexityAdjustment = 0.6;
  218 | m_equityData.isDangerous = true;
  219 | Print("[⚠️ CONVEXITY] Negative convexity detected: ", 
  220 | DoubleToString(convexity * 100, 1), "% - Reducing risk");
  221 | }
  222 | else {
  223 | // Dangerous concavity - major risk reduction
  224 | m_regimeData.convexityAdjustment = 0.4;
  225 | m_equityData.isDangerous = true;
  226 | Print("[🚨 DANGER] Dangerous equity concavity: ", 
  227 | DoubleToString(convexity * 100, 1), "% - Major risk reduction");
  228 | }
  229 | }
  230 | 
  231 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  232 | //| 🎯 REGIME PERSISTENCE ADJUSTMENT (QUYẾT ĐỊNH SỐ 3)             |
  233 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  234 | void CalculateRegimePersistenceAdjustment()
  235 | {
  236 | // Calculate how stable/persistent current regime is
  237 | double persistence = CalculateRegimePersistence();
  238 | m_regimeData.regimePersistence = persistence;
  239 | 
  240 | // Adjust based on persistence
  241 | if(persistence > 0.8) {
  242 | // Very stable regime - can be more aggressive
  243 | m_regimeData.persistenceAdjustment = 1.2;
  244 | }
  245 | else if(persistence > 0.6) {
  246 | // Moderately stable
  247 | m_regimeData.persistenceAdjustment = 1.1;
  248 | }
  249 | else if(persistence > 0.4) {
  250 | // Average stability
  251 | m_regimeData.persistenceAdjustment = 1.0;
  252 | }
  253 | else if(persistence > 0.2) {
  254 | // Low stability
  255 | m_regimeData.persistenceAdjustment = 0.9;
  256 | }
  257 | else {
  258 | // Very unstable - reduce risk significantly
  259 | m_regimeData.persistenceAdjustment = 0.8;
  260 | Print("[🌪️ INSTABILITY] Low regime persistence: ", 
  261 | DoubleToString(persistence * 100, 1), "% - Reducing risk");
  262 | }
  263 | }
  264 | 
  265 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  266 | //| 🎯 HELPER CALCULATION METHODS                                   |
  267 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  268 | double CalculateEquityCurveConvexity()
  269 | {
  270 | if(m_equityData.historyCount < 20) return 0.0;
  271 | 
  272 | // Use recent 20 points for convexity calculation
  273 | int points = MathMin(20, m_equityData.historyCount);
  274 | double sumX = 0, sumY = 0, sumXY = 0, sumX2 = 0, sumY2 = 0;
  275 | 
  276 | for(int i = 0; i < points; i++) {
  277 | double x = i;
  278 | double y = m_equityData.equityHistory[(m_equityData.historyIndex - i + 200) % 200];
  279 | sumX += x;
  280 | sumY += y;
  281 | sumXY += x * y;
  282 | sumX2 += x * x;
  283 | sumY2 += y * y;
  284 | }
  285 | 
  286 | // Calculate linear regression
  287 | double n = points;
  288 | double slope = (n * sumXY - sumX * sumY) / (n * sumX2 - sumX * sumX);
  289 | 
  290 | // Calculate second derivative (convexity approximation)
  291 | double convexity = 0.0;
  292 | if(points >= 10) {
  293 | // Compare slope of first half vs second half
  294 | double firstHalfSlope = CalculateHalfSlope(0, points/2);
  295 | double secondHalfSlope = CalculateHalfSlope(points/2, points);
  296 | convexity = (secondHalfSlope - firstHalfSlope) / points;
  297 | }
  298 | 
  299 | return convexity;
  300 | }
  301 | 
  302 | double CalculateHalfSlope(int start, int end)
  303 | {
  304 | double sumX = 0, sumY = 0, sumXY = 0, sumX2 = 0;
  305 | int count = end - start;
  306 | 
  307 | for(int i = start; i < end; i++) {
  308 | double x = i;
  309 | double y = m_equityData.equityHistory[(m_equityData.historyIndex - i + 200) % 200];
  310 | sumX += x;
  311 | sumY += y;
  312 | sumXY += x * y;
  313 | sumX2 += x * x;
  314 | }
  315 | 
  316 | if(count > 1) {
  317 | return (count * sumXY - sumX * sumY) / (count * sumX2 - sumX * sumX);
  318 | }
  319 | return 0.0;
  320 | }
  321 | 
  322 | double CalculateRegimePersistence()
  323 | {
  324 | if(m_regimeData.regimeDuration <= 0) return 0.0;
  325 | 
  326 | // Base persistence on regime duration and stability
  327 | double basePersistence = MathMin(1.0, m_regimeData.regimeDuration / 50.0); // 50 bars = full persistence
  328 | 
  329 | // Adjust for recent regime changes
  330 | if(m_regimeChangeCount > 5) {
  331 | basePersistence *= 0.5; // High regime change frequency reduces persistence
  332 | }
  333 | else if(m_regimeChangeCount > 3) {
  334 | basePersistence *= 0.7;
  335 | }
  336 | else if(m_regimeChangeCount <= 1) {
  337 | basePersistence *= 1.2; // Very stable
  338 | }
  339 | 
  340 | return MathMax(0.0, MathMin(1.0, basePersistence));
  341 | }
  342 | 
  343 | double GetSignalConfidenceMultiplier(double confidence)
  344 | {
  345 | // Adjust Kelly based on signal confidence
  346 | if(confidence >= 0.9) return 1.2;        // Very high confidence
  347 | else if(confidence >= 0.8) return 1.0;   // High confidence
  348 | else if(confidence >= 0.7) return 0.9;   // Medium confidence
  349 | else if(confidence >= 0.6) return 0.8;   // Lower confidence
  350 | else return 0.6;                         // Low confidence
  351 | }
  352 | 
  353 | double ApplySafetyLimits(double kelly)
  354 | {
  355 | // Apply Black Swan protection
  356 | kelly *= m_blackSwanProtection;
  357 | 
  358 | // Ensure within absolute limits
  359 | kelly = MathMax(0.002, MathMin(m_maxAllowedKelly, kelly)); // 0.2% min, 5% max
  360 | 
  361 | // Additional safety for dangerous equity curves
  362 | if(m_equityData.isDangerous) {
  363 | kelly = MathMin(kelly, 0.01); // Max 1% in dangerous conditions
  364 | }
  365 | 
  366 | return kelly;
  367 | }
  368 | 
  369 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  370 | //| 🎯 DATA UPDATE METHODS                                          |
  371 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  372 | void UpdateMarketRegimeData(ENUM_MARKET_REGIME newRegime)
  373 | {
  374 | if(newRegime != m_regimeData.currentRegime) {
  375 | m_previousRegime = m_regimeData.currentRegime;
  376 | m_regimeData.currentRegime = newRegime;
  377 | m_regimeData.regimeStartTime = TimeCurrent();
  378 | m_regimeData.regimeDuration = 0;
  379 | m_regimeChangeCount++;
  380 | m_lastRegimeChange = TimeCurrent();
  381 | } else {
  382 | m_regimeData.regimeDuration++;
  383 | }
  384 | 
  385 | // Reset regime change count periodically
  386 | if(TimeCurrent() - m_lastRegimeChange > 86400) { // 24 hours
  387 | m_regimeChangeCount = MathMax(0, m_regimeChangeCount - 1);
  388 | }
  389 | }
  390 | 
  391 | void UpdateEquityCurveAnalysis()
  392 | {
  393 | // Add current equity to history
  394 | double currentEquity = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_EQUITY);
  395 | m_equityData.equityHistory[m_equityData.historyIndex] = currentEquity;
  396 | m_equityData.historyIndex = (m_equityData.historyIndex + 1) % 200;
  397 | if(m_equityData.historyCount < 200) m_equityData.historyCount++;
  398 | }
  399 | 
  400 | void LogKellyAnalysis(double baseKelly, double finalKelly)
  401 | {
  402 | Print(StringFormat("[🎯 ADAPTIVE KELLY] Base: %.3f%% | Vol: %.2fx | Conv: %.2fx | Pers: %.2fx | Final: %.3f%%",
  403 | baseKelly * 100,
  404 | m_regimeData.volatilityAdjustment,
  405 | m_regimeData.convexityAdjustment,
  406 | m_regimeData.persistenceAdjustment,
  407 | finalKelly * 100));
  408 | 
  409 | if(m_equityData.isDangerous) {
  410 | Print("[🚨 KELLY WARNING] Dangerous equity curve detected - risk severely limited");
  411 | }
  412 | }
  413 | 
  414 | // Helper methods for ATR calculation
  415 | double CalculateAverageATR(int period)
  416 | {
  417 | if(m_atrCount < period) {
  418 | // Not enough data, use simple ATR
  419 | return iATR(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 14);
  420 | }
  421 | 
  422 | double sum = 0.0;
  423 | int count = 0;
  424 | int start = MathMax(0, m_atrCount - period);
  425 | 
  426 | for(int i = start; i < m_atrCount; i++) {
  427 | sum += m_atrHistory[i % MAX_HISTORY_SIZE];
  428 | count++;
  429 | }
  430 | 
  431 | return (count > 0) ? sum / count : iATR(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 14);
  432 | }
  433 | 
  434 | double GetCurrentATR()
  435 | {
  436 | double atr = iATR(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 14);
  437 | 
  438 | // Add to history
  439 | if(m_atrCount < MAX_HISTORY_SIZE) {
  440 | m_atrHistory[m_atrCount] = atr;
  441 | m_atrCount++;
  442 | } else {
  443 | m_atrHistory[m_atrIndex] = atr;
  444 | m_atrIndex = (m_atrIndex + 1) % MAX_HISTORY_SIZE;
  445 | }
  446 | 
  447 | return atr;
  448 | }
  449 | 
  450 | // Public getters
  451 | MarketRegimeKellyData GetRegimeData() const { return m_regimeData; }
  452 | EquityCurveData GetEquityData() const { return m_equityData; }
  453 | bool IsEquityCurveDangerous() const { return m_equityData.isDangerous; }
  454 | double GetCurrentConvexity() const { return m_equityData.currentConvexity; }
  455 | double GetVolatilityRegime() const { return m_regimeData.volatilityRegime; }
  456 | 
  457 | // Configuration methods
  458 | void SetFractionalKellyFactor(double factor) { 
  459 | m_fractionalKellyFactor = MathMax(0.1, MathMin(0.5, factor)); 
  460 | }
  461 | void SetMaxAllowedKelly(double maxKelly) { 
  462 | m_maxAllowedKelly = MathMax(0.01, MathMin(0.1, maxKelly)); 
  463 | }
  464 | 
  465 | string GetAdaptiveKellyReport()
  466 | {
  467 | return StringFormat(
  468 | "🎯 ADAPTIVE DYNAMIC KELLY REPORT\n" +
  469 | "Volatility Regime: %.2fx (Adj: %.2fx)\n" +
  470 | "Equity Convexity: %.3f%% (Adj: %.2fx)\n" +
  471 | "Regime Persistence: %.1f%% (Adj: %.2fx)\n" +
  472 | "Fractional Kelly Factor: %.2f\n" +
  473 | "Max Allowed Kelly: %.2f%%\n" +
  474 | "Equity Status: %s\n" +
  475 | "Black Swan Protection: %.2fx",
  476 | m_regimeData.volatilityRegime, m_regimeData.volatilityAdjustment,
  477 | m_equityData.currentConvexity * 100, m_regimeData.convexityAdjustment,
  478 | m_regimeData.regimePersistence * 100, m_regimeData.persistenceAdjustment,
  479 | m_fractionalKellyFactor,
  480 | m_maxAllowedKelly * 100,
  481 | m_equityData.isDangerous ? "DANGEROUS" : "HEALTHY",
  482 | m_blackSwanProtection
  483 | );
  484 | }
  485 | };
  486 | 
  487 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  488 | //| 🎯 CONSTRUCTOR IMPLEMENTATION                                    |
  489 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  490 | CAdaptiveDynamicKelly::CAdaptiveDynamicKelly()
  491 | {
  492 | m_regimeData.Reset();
  493 | m_equityData.Initialize();
  494 | 
  495 | // Initialize enhanced Kelly parameters
  496 | m_fractionalKellyFactor = 0.5;  // Half-Kelly for safety (Boss's conservative approach)
  497 | m_maxAllowedKelly = 0.05;       // Maximum 5% risk per trade
  498 | m_blackSwanProtection = 1.0;    // No protection initially
  499 | 
  500 | // Initialize tracking arrays
  501 | ArrayInitialize(m_recentEquity, 0.0);
  502 | ArrayInitialize(m_atrHistory, 0.0);
  503 | m_equityIndex = 0;
  504 | m_equityCount = 0;
  505 | m_atrIndex = 0;
  506 | m_atrCount = 0;
  507 | 
  508 | // Initialize regime tracking
  509 | m_previousRegime = REGIME_UNKNOWN;
  510 | m_regimeChangeCount = 0;
  511 | m_lastRegimeChange = TimeCurrent();
  512 | 
  513 | Print("[🎯 ADAPTIVE KELLY] Adaptive Dynamic Kelly system initialized");
  514 | Print("[🎯 CONFIGURATION] Fractional Factor: ", m_fractionalKellyFactor, 
  515 | " | Max Kelly: ", m_maxAllowedKelly * 100, "%");
  516 | }
  517 | 
  518 | #endif // RISK_ADAPTIVE_DYNAMIC_KELLY_MQH

   13 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   14 | //| Risk-Reward Optimization Data                                   |
   15 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   16 | struct RiskRewardOptimizationData
   17 | {
   18 | // Base R:R calculations
   19 | double baseRiskReward;         // Base R:R ratio
   20 | double dynamicRiskReward;      // Dynamically adjusted R:R
   21 | double optimalRiskReward;      // Optimal R:R for current conditions
   22 | 
   23 | // Market condition adjustments
   24 | double volatilityAdjustment;   // Volatility-based adjustment
   25 | double trendAdjustment;        // Trend strength adjustment
   26 | double liquidityAdjustment;    // Liquidity-based adjustment
   27 | double sessionAdjustment;      // Trading session adjustment
   28 | 
   29 | // Signal quality adjustments
   30 | double signalQualityMultiplier; // Signal quality multiplier
   31 | double confluenceMultiplier;    // Confluence strength multiplier
   32 | double timeframeMultiplier;     // Multi-timeframe multiplier
   33 | 
   34 | // Performance-based adjustments
   35 | double recentPerformanceAdj;    // Recent performance adjustment
   36 | double winRateAdjustment;       // Win rate based adjustment
   37 | double profitFactorAdj;         // Profit factor adjustment
   38 | 
   39 | // Risk management constraints
   40 | double minAllowedRR;            // Minimum allowed R:R
   41 | double maxAllowedRR;            // Maximum allowed R:R
   42 | double riskConstraint;          // Risk constraint factor
   43 | 
   44 | void Reset()
   45 | {
   46 | baseRiskReward = 2.0;
   47 | dynamicRiskReward = 2.0;
   48 | optimalRiskReward = 2.0;
   49 | volatilityAdjustment = 1.0;
   50 | trendAdjustment = 1.0;
   51 | liquidityAdjustment = 1.0;
   52 | sessionAdjustment = 1.0;
   53 | signalQualityMultiplier = 1.0;
   54 | confluenceMultiplier = 1.0;
   55 | timeframeMultiplier = 1.0;
   56 | recentPerformanceAdj = 1.0;
   57 | winRateAdjustment = 1.0;
   58 | profitFactorAdj = 1.0;
   59 | minAllowedRR = 1.2;
   60 | maxAllowedRR = 3.5;
   61 | riskConstraint = 1.0;
   62 | }
   63 | };
   64 | 
   65 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   66 | //| Market Condition Analysis for R:R Optimization                 |
   67 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   68 | struct MarketConditionRR
   69 | {
   70 | ENUM_MARKET_REGIME currentRegime;
   71 | double volatilityLevel;        // Current volatility (0-2+)
   72 | double trendStrength;          // Trend strength (0-1)
   73 | double liquidityHealth;        // Liquidity quality (0-1)
   74 | ENUM_TRADING_SESSION currentSession;
   75 | double sessionVolatility;      // Session-specific volatility
   76 | double marketNoise;            // Market noise level
   77 | double breakoutPotential;      // Breakout potential assessment
   78 | 
   79 | void Update()
   80 | {
   81 | // Update market condition data
   82 | currentRegime = REGIME_UNKNOWN; // Will be updated by calling code
   83 | volatilityLevel = 1.0;
   84 | trendStrength = 0.5;
   85 | liquidityHealth = 0.8;
   86 | currentSession = SESSION_LONDON; // Default
   87 | sessionVolatility = 1.0;
   88 | marketNoise = 0.5;
   89 | breakoutPotential = 0.5;
   90 | }
   91 | };
   92 | 
   93 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   94 | //| 🎯 DYNAMIC RISK-REWARD OPTIMIZATION SYSTEM                      |
   95 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   96 | class CDynamicRiskRewardOptimizer
   97 | {
   98 | private:
   99 | RiskRewardOptimizationData m_rrData;
  100 | MarketConditionRR m_marketCondition;
  101 | 
  102 | // Historical R:R performance tracking
  103 | double m_rrPerformanceHistory[100];   // Historical R:R performance
  104 | int m_performanceIndex;
  105 | int m_performanceCount;
  106 | 
  107 | // Volatility analysis
  108 | double m_atrHistory[30];              // ATR history for volatility
  109 | int m_atrIndex;
  110 | int m_atrCount;
  111 | 
  112 | // Performance metrics for optimization
  113 | double m_recentWinRate;
  114 | double m_recentProfitFactor;
  115 | double m_avgHoldingTime;
  116 | 
  117 | // Optimization parameters
  118 | bool m_adaptiveMode;                  // Whether to use adaptive R:R
  119 | double m_aggressiveness;              // How aggressive the adjustments are
  120 | 
  121 | public:
  122 | CDynamicRiskRewardOptimizer()
  123 | {
  124 | m_rrData.Reset();
  125 | m_marketCondition.Update();
  126 | 
  127 | // Initialize arrays
  128 | ArrayInitialize(m_rrPerformanceHistory, 0.0);
  129 | ArrayInitialize(m_atrHistory, 0.0);
  130 | 
  131 | m_performanceIndex = 0;
  132 | m_performanceCount = 0;
  133 | m_atrIndex = 0;
  134 | m_atrCount = 0;
  135 | 
  136 | // Initialize performance metrics
  137 | m_recentWinRate = 0.65;        // Default starting values
  138 | m_recentProfitFactor = 1.5;
  139 | m_avgHoldingTime = 4.0;        // Hours
  140 | 
  141 | // Initialize optimization parameters
  142 | m_adaptiveMode = true;
  143 | m_aggressiveness = 1.0;        // Neutral aggressiveness
  144 | 
  145 | ::Print("[MONEY DYNAMIC R:R] Dynamic Risk-Reward Optimization system initialized");
  146 | ::Print("[MONEY CONFIGURATION] Min R:R: ", m_rrData.minAllowedRR, " | Max R:R: ", m_rrData.maxAllowedRR);
  147 | }
  148 | ~CDynamicRiskRewardOptimizer() {}
  149 | 
  150 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  151 | //| 🎯 MAIN DYNAMIC R:R CALCULATION                                 |
  152 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  153 | double CalculateDynamicRiskReward(ENUM_MARKET_REGIME regime, double signalQuality, 
  154 | double confluenceScore, double volatilityRatio)
  155 | {
  156 | // Update market conditions
  157 | UpdateMarketConditions(regime, volatilityRatio);
  158 | 
  159 | // Calculate base R:R for current regime
  160 | CalculateBaseRiskReward(regime);
  161 | 
  162 | // Apply market condition adjustments
  163 | ApplyMarketConditionAdjustments();
  164 | 
  165 | // Apply signal quality adjustments
  166 | ApplySignalQualityAdjustments(signalQuality, confluenceScore);
  167 | 
  168 | // Apply performance-based adjustments
  169 | ApplyPerformanceAdjustments();
  170 | 
  171 | // Calculate final optimal R:R
  172 | CalculateOptimalRiskReward();
  173 | 
  174 | // Apply safety constraints
  175 | ApplySafetyConstraints();
  176 | 
  177 | // Log R:R analysis
  178 | LogRiskRewardAnalysis();
  179 | 
  180 | return m_rrData.optimalRiskReward;
  181 | }
  182 | 
  183 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  184 | //| 🎯 BASE RISK-REWARD CALCULATION BY REGIME                      |
  185 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  186 | void CalculateBaseRiskReward(ENUM_MARKET_REGIME regime)
  187 | {
  188 | switch(regime) {
  189 | case REGIME_TRENDING_BULLISH:
  190 | case REGIME_TRENDING_BEARISH:
  191 | // Trending markets: Higher R:R for trend following
  192 | m_rrData.baseRiskReward = 2.0;
  193 | break;
  194 | 
  195 | case REGIME_BREAKOUT:
  196 | // Breakout markets: Moderate R:R for momentum
  197 | m_rrData.baseRiskReward = 1.8;
  198 | break;
  199 | 
  200 | case REGIME_RANGING:
  201 | // Ranging markets: Lower R:R for mean reversion
  202 | m_rrData.baseRiskReward = 1.5;
  203 | break;
  204 | 
  205 | case REGIME_VOLATILE:
  206 | // Volatile markets: Conservative R:R
  207 | m_rrData.baseRiskReward = 1.7;
  208 | break;
  209 | 
  210 | case REGIME_RANGING_TIGHT:
  211 | // Tight ranging: Very low R:R
  212 | m_rrData.baseRiskReward = 1.3;
  213 | break;
  214 | 
  215 | default:
  216 | m_rrData.baseRiskReward = 1.7; // Default moderate R:R
  217 | }
  218 | }
  219 | 
  220 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  221 | //| 🎯 MARKET CONDITION ADJUSTMENTS                                 |
  222 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  223 | void ApplyMarketConditionAdjustments()
  224 | {
  225 | // 1. Volatility Adjustment
  226 | CalculateVolatilityAdjustment();
  227 | 
  228 | // 2. Trend Strength Adjustment
  229 | CalculateTrendAdjustment();
  230 | 
  231 | // 3. Liquidity Adjustment
  232 | CalculateLiquidityAdjustment();
  233 | 
  234 | // 4. Session Adjustment
  235 | CalculateSessionAdjustment();
  236 | }
  237 | 
  238 | void CalculateVolatilityAdjustment()
  239 | {
  240 | double vol = m_marketCondition.volatilityLevel;
  241 | 
  242 | if(vol > 1.5) {
  243 | // High volatility: Increase R:R to capture larger moves
  244 | m_rrData.volatilityAdjustment = 1.3;
  245 | }
  246 | else if(vol > 1.2) {
  247 | // Moderate high volatility
  248 | m_rrData.volatilityAdjustment = 1.1;
  249 | }
  250 | else if(vol < 0.7) {
  251 | // Low volatility: Reduce R:R for tighter targets
  252 | m_rrData.volatilityAdjustment = 0.8;
  253 | }
  254 | else if(vol < 0.5) {
  255 | // Very low volatility
  256 | m_rrData.volatilityAdjustment = 0.7;
  257 | }
  258 | else {
  259 | // Normal volatility
  260 | m_rrData.volatilityAdjustment = 1.0;
  261 | }
  262 | }
  263 | 
  264 | void CalculateTrendAdjustment()
  265 | {
  266 | double trendStr = m_marketCondition.trendStrength;
  267 | 
  268 | if(trendStr > 0.8) {
  269 | // Very strong trend: Increase R:R significantly
  270 | m_rrData.trendAdjustment = 1.4;
  271 | }
  272 | else if(trendStr > 0.6) {
  273 | // Strong trend: Increase R:R
  274 | m_rrData.trendAdjustment = 1.2;
  275 | }
  276 | else if(trendStr > 0.4) {
  277 | // Moderate trend
  278 | m_rrData.trendAdjustment = 1.0;
  279 | }
  280 | else if(trendStr > 0.2) {
  281 | // Weak trend: Reduce R:R
  282 | m_rrData.trendAdjustment = 0.8;
  283 | }
  284 | else {
  285 | // No trend: Significantly reduce R:R
  286 | m_rrData.trendAdjustment = 0.6;
  287 | }
  288 | }
  289 | 
  290 | void CalculateLiquidityAdjustment()
  291 | {
  292 | double liquidity = m_marketCondition.liquidityHealth;
  293 | 
  294 | if(liquidity > 0.8) {
  295 | // Good liquidity: Neutral adjustment
  296 | m_rrData.liquidityAdjustment = 1.0;
  297 | }
  298 | else if(liquidity > 0.6) {
  299 | // Moderate liquidity: Slight reduction
  300 | m_rrData.liquidityAdjustment = 0.9;
  301 | }
  302 | else if(liquidity > 0.4) {
  303 | // Poor liquidity: Reduce R:R
  304 | m_rrData.liquidityAdjustment = 0.8;
  305 | }
  306 | else {
  307 | // Very poor liquidity: Significantly reduce
  308 | m_rrData.liquidityAdjustment = 0.7;
  309 | }
  310 | }
  311 | 
  312 | void CalculateSessionAdjustment()
  313 | {
  314 | // Adjust R:R based on trading session characteristics
  315 | switch(m_marketCondition.currentSession) {
  316 | case SESSION_LONDON:
  317 | // London session: Good liquidity, moderate volatility
  318 | m_rrData.sessionAdjustment = 1.1;
  319 | break;
  320 | 
  321 | case SESSION_OVERLAP_LONDON_NY:
  322 | // NY/London overlap: High liquidity, high volatility
  323 | m_rrData.sessionAdjustment = 1.2;
  324 | break;
  325 | 
  326 | default:
  327 | m_rrData.sessionAdjustment = 1.0;
  328 | }
  329 | 
  330 | // Adjust based on session volatility
  331 | if(m_marketCondition.sessionVolatility > 1.3) {
  332 | m_rrData.sessionAdjustment *= 1.1; // Increase for high session volatility
  333 | }
  334 | else if(m_marketCondition.sessionVolatility < 0.7) {
  335 | m_rrData.sessionAdjustment *= 0.9; // Decrease for low session volatility
  336 | }
  337 | }
  338 | 
  339 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  340 | //| 🎯 SIGNAL QUALITY ADJUSTMENTS                                  |
  341 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  342 | void ApplySignalQualityAdjustments(double signalQuality, double confluenceScore)
  343 | {
  344 | // Signal Quality Multiplier
  345 | if(signalQuality >= 0.9) {
  346 | m_rrData.signalQualityMultiplier = 1.3; // Very high quality
  347 | }
  348 | else if(signalQuality >= 0.8) {
  349 | m_rrData.signalQualityMultiplier = 1.2; // High quality
  350 | }
  351 | else if(signalQuality >= 0.7) {
  352 | m_rrData.signalQualityMultiplier = 1.1; // Good quality
  353 | }
  354 | else if(signalQuality >= 0.6) {
  355 | m_rrData.signalQualityMultiplier = 1.0; // Average quality
  356 | }
  357 | else if(signalQuality >= 0.5) {
  358 | m_rrData.signalQualityMultiplier = 0.9; // Below average
  359 | }
  360 | else {
  361 | m_rrData.signalQualityMultiplier = 0.8; // Poor quality
  362 | }
  363 | 
  364 | // Confluence Score Multiplier
  365 | if(confluenceScore >= 0.8) {
  366 | m_rrData.confluenceMultiplier = 1.2; // Strong confluence
  367 | }
  368 | else if(confluenceScore >= 0.7) {
  369 | m_rrData.confluenceMultiplier = 1.1; // Good confluence
  370 | }
  371 | else if(confluenceScore >= 0.6) {
  372 | m_rrData.confluenceMultiplier = 1.0; // Moderate confluence
  373 | }
  374 | else if(confluenceScore >= 0.5) {
  375 | m_rrData.confluenceMultiplier = 0.9; // Weak confluence
  376 | }
  377 | else {
  378 | m_rrData.confluenceMultiplier = 0.8; // Very weak confluence
  379 | }
  380 | 
  381 | // Multi-timeframe analysis (simplified)
  382 | m_rrData.timeframeMultiplier = CalculateTimeframeMultiplier();
  383 | }
  384 | 
  385 | double CalculateTimeframeMultiplier()
  386 | {
  387 | // Simplified multi-timeframe analysis
  388 | // In a real implementation, this would analyze multiple timeframes
  389 | 
  390 | // Check H4 and D1 alignment (simplified)
  391 | double h4Trend = GetTrendStrength(PERIOD_H4);
  392 | double d1Trend = GetTrendStrength(PERIOD_D1);
  393 | 
  394 | if(h4Trend > 0.6 && d1Trend > 0.6) {
  395 | return 1.2; // Strong multi-timeframe alignment
  396 | }
  397 | else if(h4Trend > 0.4 || d1Trend > 0.4) {
  398 | return 1.0; // Partial alignment
  399 | }
  400 | else {
  401 | return 0.9; // Weak alignment
  402 | }
  403 | }
  404 | 
  405 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  406 | //| 🎯 PERFORMANCE-BASED ADJUSTMENTS                               |
  407 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  408 | void ApplyPerformanceAdjustments()
  409 | {
  410 | // Recent Performance Adjustment
  411 | if(m_recentWinRate > 0.75) {
  412 | // High win rate: Can use higher R:R
  413 | m_rrData.recentPerformanceAdj = 1.1;
  414 | }
  415 | else if(m_recentWinRate > 0.65) {
  416 | // Good win rate
  417 | m_rrData.recentPerformanceAdj = 1.0;
  418 | }
  419 | else if(m_recentWinRate > 0.55) {
  420 | // Average win rate: Slightly reduce R:R
  421 | m_rrData.recentPerformanceAdj = 0.9;
  422 | }
  423 | else {
  424 | // Low win rate: Reduce R:R significantly
  425 | m_rrData.recentPerformanceAdj = 0.8;
  426 | }
  427 | 
  428 | // Profit Factor Adjustment
  429 | if(m_recentProfitFactor > 2.0) {
  430 | m_rrData.profitFactorAdj = 1.1;
  431 | }
  432 | else if(m_recentProfitFactor > 1.5) {
  433 | m_rrData.profitFactorAdj = 1.0;
  434 | }
  435 | else if(m_recentProfitFactor > 1.2) {
  436 | m_rrData.profitFactorAdj = 0.9;
  437 | }
  438 | else {
  439 | m_rrData.profitFactorAdj = 0.8;
  440 | }
  441 | 
  442 | // Win Rate Specific Adjustment
  443 | m_rrData.winRateAdjustment = CalculateWinRateAdjustment();
  444 | }
  445 | 
  446 | double CalculateWinRateAdjustment()
  447 | {
  448 | // Kelly-inspired win rate adjustment
  449 | double winRate = m_recentWinRate;
  450 | 
  451 | if(winRate > 0.7) {
  452 | // High win rate: Can afford higher R:R
  453 | return 0.8 + (winRate - 0.7) * 2.0; // Scale up from 0.8
  454 | }
  455 | else if(winRate > 0.6) {
  456 | // Good win rate: Standard R:R
  457 | return 1.0;
  458 | }
  459 | else if(winRate > 0.5) {
  460 | // Average win rate: Reduce R:R
  461 | return 1.0 - (0.6 - winRate) * 2.0; // Scale down from 1.0
  462 | }
  463 | else {
  464 | // Low win rate: Significantly reduce R:R
  465 | return 0.6;
  466 | }
  467 | }
  468 | 
  469 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  470 | //| 🎯 OPTIMAL R:R CALCULATION AND SAFETY                          |
  471 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  472 | void CalculateOptimalRiskReward()
  473 | {
  474 | // Combine all adjustments
  475 | m_rrData.dynamicRiskReward = m_rrData.baseRiskReward *
  476 | m_rrData.volatilityAdjustment *
  477 | m_rrData.trendAdjustment *
  478 | m_rrData.liquidityAdjustment *
  479 | m_rrData.sessionAdjustment;
  480 | 
  481 | // Apply signal quality multipliers
  482 | m_rrData.optimalRiskReward = m_rrData.dynamicRiskReward *
  483 | m_rrData.signalQualityMultiplier *
  484 | m_rrData.confluenceMultiplier *
  485 | m_rrData.timeframeMultiplier;
  486 | 
  487 | // Apply performance adjustments
  488 | m_rrData.optimalRiskReward *= m_rrData.recentPerformanceAdj *
  489 | m_rrData.winRateAdjustment *
  490 | m_rrData.profitFactorAdj;
  491 | 
  492 | // Apply aggressiveness factor
  493 | if(m_aggressiveness != 1.0) {
  494 | double adjustment = 1.0 + (m_aggressiveness - 1.0) * 0.3;
  495 | m_rrData.optimalRiskReward *= adjustment;
  496 | }
  497 | }
  498 | 
  499 | void ApplySafetyConstraints()
  500 | {
  501 | // Apply minimum and maximum R:R constraints
  502 | m_rrData.optimalRiskReward = MathMax(m_rrData.minAllowedRR, 
  503 | MathMin(m_rrData.maxAllowedRR, 
  504 | m_rrData.optimalRiskReward));
  505 | 
  506 | // Apply risk constraint (if system is performing poorly)
  507 | m_rrData.optimalRiskReward *= m_rrData.riskConstraint;
  508 | 
  509 | // Round to reasonable precision
  510 | m_rrData.optimalRiskReward = MathRound(m_rrData.optimalRiskReward * 10) / 10.0;
  511 | }
  512 | 
  513 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  514 | //| 🎯 HELPER METHODS                                               |
  515 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  516 | void UpdateMarketConditions(ENUM_MARKET_REGIME regime, double volatilityRatio)
  517 | {
  518 | m_marketCondition.currentRegime = regime;
  519 | m_marketCondition.volatilityLevel = volatilityRatio;
  520 | 
  521 | // Update other market conditions
  522 | m_marketCondition.trendStrength = CalculateCurrentTrendStrength();
  523 | m_marketCondition.liquidityHealth = CalculateLiquidityHealth();
  524 | m_marketCondition.currentSession = GetCurrentTradingSession();
  525 | m_marketCondition.sessionVolatility = CalculateSessionVolatility();
  526 | m_marketCondition.marketNoise = CalculateMarketNoise();
  527 | m_marketCondition.breakoutPotential = CalculateBreakoutPotential();
  528 | }
  529 | 
  530 | double CalculateCurrentTrendStrength()
  531 | {
  532 | // EMA20 and EMA50 removed - keep EMA200 for trend strength
  533 | double ema200 = GetEMA(200);
  534 | // Safe fallback if global manager not declared
  535 | #ifdef __HAS_INDICATOR_MANAGER__
  536 | if(g_indicatorManager!=NULL) ema200 = (*g_indicatorManager).GetEMA200(0);
  537 | #endif
  538 | double currentPrice = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
  539 | 
  540 | if(ema200 > 0) {
  541 | double spread = MathAbs(currentPrice - ema200) / currentPrice;
  542 | return MathMin(1.0, spread * 1000); // Normalize
  543 | }
  544 | 
  545 | return 0.5; // Default moderate strength
  546 | }
  547 | 
  548 | double GetEMA(int period)
  549 | {
  550 | #ifdef __HAS_INDICATOR_MANAGER__
  551 | if(g_indicatorManager!=NULL){ if(period==34) return (*g_indicatorManager).GetEMA34(0); if(period==89) return (*g_indicatorManager).GetEMA89(0); if(period==200) return (*g_indicatorManager).GetEMA200(0); }
  552 | #endif
  553 | int handle = iMA(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, period, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
  554 | double buffer[1];
  555 | if(CopyBuffer(handle, 0, 0, 1, buffer) > 0) { IndicatorRelease(handle); return buffer[0]; }
  556 | IndicatorRelease(handle);
  557 | return 0.0;
  558 | }
  559 | 
  560 | double GetTrendStrength(ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe)
  561 | {
  562 | // Simplified trend strength for specific timeframe
  563 | #ifdef __HAS_INDICATOR_MANAGER__
  564 | double ema0 = (g_indicatorManager?(*g_indicatorManager).GetMTFEMA(21, timeframe, 0):EMPTY_VALUE);
  565 | #else
  566 | double ema0 = EMPTY_VALUE;
  567 | #endif
  568 | #ifdef __HAS_INDICATOR_MANAGER__
  569 | double ema1 = (g_indicatorManager?(*g_indicatorManager).GetMTFEMA(21, timeframe, 1):EMPTY_VALUE);
  570 | #else
  571 | double ema1 = EMPTY_VALUE;
  572 | #endif
  573 | if(ema0!=EMPTY_VALUE && ema1!=EMPTY_VALUE){ double slope = ema0-ema1; return MathMin(1.0, MathAbs(slope) * 100000); }
  574 | int handle = iMA(_Symbol, timeframe, 21, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
  575 | double buffer[2];
  576 | if(CopyBuffer(handle, 0, 0, 2, buffer) >= 2) { double slope = buffer[0] - buffer[1]; IndicatorRelease(handle); return MathMin(1.0, MathAbs(slope) * 100000); }
  577 | IndicatorRelease(handle);
  578 | return 0.5;
  579 | }
  580 | 
  581 | // Placeholder methods for additional calculations
  582 | double CalculateLiquidityHealth() { return 0.8; }
  583 | ENUM_TRADING_SESSION GetCurrentTradingSession() { return SESSION_LONDON; }
  584 | double CalculateSessionVolatility() { return 1.0; }
  585 | double CalculateMarketNoise() { return 0.5; }
  586 | double CalculateBreakoutPotential() { return 0.5; }
  587 | 
  588 | void LogRiskRewardAnalysis()
  589 | {
  590 | ::Print(StringFormat("[MONEY R:R] Base: %.1f | Dynamic: %.1f | Final: %.1f | Vol: %.2fx | Trend: %.2fx | Signal: %.2fx",
  591 | m_rrData.baseRiskReward,
  592 | m_rrData.dynamicRiskReward,
  593 | m_rrData.optimalRiskReward,
  594 | m_rrData.volatilityAdjustment,
  595 | m_rrData.trendAdjustment,
  596 | m_rrData.signalQualityMultiplier));
  597 | }
  598 | 
  599 | // Public interface methods
  600 | void UpdatePerformanceMetrics(double winRate, double profitFactor, double avgHoldingTime)
  601 | {
  602 | m_recentWinRate = winRate;
  603 | m_recentProfitFactor = profitFactor;
  604 | m_avgHoldingTime = avgHoldingTime;
  605 | }
  606 | 
  607 | RiskRewardOptimizationData GetOptimizationData() const { return m_rrData; }
  608 | double GetOptimalRiskReward() const { return m_rrData.optimalRiskReward; }
  609 | 
  610 | void SetAggressiveness(double aggressiveness) 
  611 | { 
  612 | m_aggressiveness = MathMax(0.5, MathMin(1.5, aggressiveness)); 
  613 | }
  614 | 
  615 | void SetRiskRewardLimits(double minRR, double maxRR)
  616 | {
  617 | m_rrData.minAllowedRR = MathMax(1.0, minRR);
  618 | m_rrData.maxAllowedRR = MathMin(5.0, maxRR);
  619 | }

  628 | "Performance - WinRate: %.2fx | PF: %.2fx | Recent: %.2fx\n" +
  629 | "Final Optimal R:R: %.1f (Range: %.1f - %.1f)",
  630 | MarketRegimeToString(m_marketCondition.currentRegime),
  631 | m_rrData.baseRiskReward,
  632 | m_rrData.volatilityAdjustment,
  633 | m_rrData.trendAdjustment,
  634 | m_rrData.liquidityAdjustment,
  635 | m_rrData.sessionAdjustment,
  636 | m_rrData.signalQualityMultiplier,
  637 | m_rrData.confluenceMultiplier,
  638 | m_rrData.timeframeMultiplier,
  639 | m_rrData.winRateAdjustment,
