    1 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
    2 | //|                                          Risk_VaRCalculator.mqh  |
    3 | //|                  SONIC R MC - Value at Risk Calculator          |
    4 | //|                     Phase 4: Institutional Risk Management      |
    5 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
    6 | #ifndef RISK_VAR_CALCULATOR_MQH
    7 | #define RISK_VAR_CALCULATOR_MQH
    8 | 
    9 | #include "01_Core_13_CommonStructures.mqh"
   10 | #include "01_Core_09_ContextManager.mqh"
   11 | 
   12 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   13 | //| VaR Calculation Methods                                          |
   14 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   15 | // ENUM_VAR_METHOD moved to SonicEnums.mqh for proper include order
   16 | 
   17 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   18 | //| VaR/CVaR Calculator Class                                        |
   19 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   20 | class CVaRCalculator
   21 | {
   22 | private:
   23 | // Configuration
   24 | double              m_confidenceLevel;    // 95% or 99%
   25 | int                 m_lookbackPeriod;     // Days for historical data
   26 | ENUM_VAR_METHOD     m_method;
   27 | 
   28 | // Historical data
   29 | double              m_returns[];          // Daily returns
   30 | double              m_portfolioValues[];  // Portfolio values
   31 | int                 m_dataCount;
   32 | 
   33 | // Results
   34 | double              m_var1Day;            // 1-day VaR
   35 | double              m_var1Week;           // 1-week VaR
   36 | double              m_cvar1Day;           // 1-day CVaR (Expected Shortfall)
   37 | double              m_cvar1Week;          // 1-week CVaR
   38 | datetime            m_lastCalculation;
   39 | 
   40 | // Monte Carlo parameters
   41 | int                 m_simulations;        // Number of simulations
   42 | double              m_drift;              // Mean return
   43 | double              m_volatility;         // Standard deviation
   44 | 
   45 | public:
   46 | CVaRCalculator() : 
   47 | m_confidenceLevel(0.95),
   48 | m_lookbackPeriod(252),    // 1 year
   49 | m_method(VAR_HISTORICAL),
   50 | m_dataCount(0),
   51 | m_var1Day(0),
   52 | m_var1Week(0),
   53 | m_cvar1Day(0),
   54 | m_cvar1Week(0),
   55 | m_lastCalculation(0),
   56 | m_simulations(10000),
   57 | m_drift(0),
   58 | m_volatility(0)
   59 | {
   60 | ArrayResize(m_returns, m_lookbackPeriod);
   61 | ArrayResize(m_portfolioValues, m_lookbackPeriod);
   62 | }
   63 | 
   64 | ~CVaRCalculator() {}
   65 | 
   66 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   67 | //| Initialize calculator with parameters                            |
   68 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   69 | bool Initialize(double confidenceLevel = 0.95, int lookback = 252, ENUM_VAR_METHOD method = VAR_HISTORICAL)
   70 | {
   71 | m_confidenceLevel = confidenceLevel;
   72 | m_lookbackPeriod = lookback;
   73 | m_method = method;
   74 | 
   75 | ArrayResize(m_returns, m_lookbackPeriod);
   76 | ArrayResize(m_portfolioValues, m_lookbackPeriod);
   77 | 
   78 | // Load historical data
   79 | return LoadHistoricalData();
   80 | }
   81 | 
   82 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   83 | //| Load historical returns data                                     |
   84 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   85 | bool LoadHistoricalData()
   86 | {
   87 | m_dataCount = 0;
   88 | 
   89 | // Get account history
   90 | if(!HistorySelect(TimeCurrent() - m_lookbackPeriod * 86400, TimeCurrent()))
   91 | return false;
   92 | 
   93 | int deals = HistoryDealsTotal();
   94 | if(deals == 0) return false;
   95 | 
   96 | // Calculate daily returns from closed trades
   97 | double previousBalance = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_BALANCE);
   98 | datetime previousDate = 0;
   99 | double dailyReturn = 0;
  100 | 
  101 | for(int i = 0; i < deals && m_dataCount < m_lookbackPeriod; i++)
  102 | {
  103 | ulong ticket = HistoryDealGetTicket(i);
  104 | if(!HistoryDealSelect(ticket)) continue;
  105 | 
  106 | datetime dealTime = (datetime)HistoryDealGetInteger(ticket, DEAL_TIME);
  107 | double profit = HistoryDealGetDouble(ticket, DEAL_PROFIT);
  108 | double commission = HistoryDealGetDouble(ticket, DEAL_COMMISSION);
  109 | double swap = HistoryDealGetDouble(ticket, DEAL_SWAP);
  110 | 
  111 | // Check if new day
  112 | MqlDateTime dt;
  113 | TimeToStruct(dealTime, dt);
  114 | datetime currentDate = StringToTime(StringFormat("%04d.%02d.%02d", dt.year, dt.mon, dt.day));
  115 | 
  116 | if(currentDate != previousDate && previousDate != 0)
  117 | {
  118 | // Calculate daily return
  119 | m_returns[m_dataCount] = dailyReturn / previousBalance;
  120 | m_portfolioValues[m_dataCount] = previousBalance;
  121 | m_dataCount++;
  122 | dailyReturn = 0;
  123 | }
  124 | 
  125 | dailyReturn += profit + commission + swap;
  126 | previousDate = currentDate;
  127 | }
  128 | 
  129 | // If not enough real data, generate synthetic data
  130 | if(m_dataCount < 30)
  131 | {
  132 | GenerateSyntheticData();
  133 | }
  134 | 
  135 | return true;
  136 | }
  137 | 
  138 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  139 | //| Generate synthetic returns for testing                           |
  140 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  141 | void GenerateSyntheticData()
  142 | {
  143 | // Use typical market parameters
  144 | m_drift = 0.0002;      // 0.02% daily return (5% annual)
  145 | m_volatility = 0.01;   // 1% daily volatility (16% annual)
  146 | 
  147 | MathSrand(GetTickCount());
  148 | 
  149 | for(int i = m_dataCount; i < m_lookbackPeriod; i++)
  150 | {
  151 | // Generate normally distributed returns
  152 | double z = GenerateNormalRandom();
  153 | m_returns[i] = m_drift + m_volatility * z;
  154 | 
  155 | if(i == 0)
  156 | m_portfolioValues[i] = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_BALANCE);
  157 | else
  158 | m_portfolioValues[i] = m_portfolioValues[i-1] * (1 + m_returns[i]);
  159 | }
  160 | 
  161 | m_dataCount = m_lookbackPeriod;
  162 | }
  163 | 
  164 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  165 | //| Calculate VaR and CVaR                                           |
  166 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  167 | bool Calculate()
  168 | {
  169 | if(m_dataCount < 30) return false;
  170 | 
  171 | switch(m_method)
  172 | {
  173 | case VAR_HISTORICAL:
  174 | return CalculateHistoricalVaR();
  175 | 
  176 | case VAR_PARAMETRIC:
  177 | return CalculateParametricVaR();
  178 | 
  179 | case VAR_MONTE_CARLO:
  180 | return CalculateMonteCarloVaR();
  181 | 
  182 | default:
  183 | return false;
  184 | }
  185 | }
  186 | 
  187 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  188 | //| Historical simulation method                                     |
  189 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  190 | bool CalculateHistoricalVaR()
  191 | {
  192 | // Sort returns
  193 | double sortedReturns[];
  194 | ArrayResize(sortedReturns, m_dataCount);
  195 | ArrayCopy(sortedReturns, m_returns, 0, 0, m_dataCount);
  196 | ArraySort(sortedReturns);
  197 | 
  198 | // Calculate VaR index
  199 | int varIndex = (int)((1 - m_confidenceLevel) * m_dataCount);
  200 | if(varIndex >= m_dataCount) varIndex = m_dataCount - 1;
  201 | if(varIndex < 0) varIndex = 0;
  202 | 
  203 | // 1-day VaR (as positive number)
  204 | m_var1Day = -sortedReturns[varIndex];
  205 | 
  206 | // 1-week VaR (square root of time)
  207 | m_var1Week = m_var1Day * MathSqrt(5);
  208 | 
  209 | // Calculate CVaR (Expected Shortfall)
  210 | double sumTailLosses = 0;
  211 | int tailCount = 0;
  212 | 
  213 | for(int i = 0; i <= varIndex; i++)
  214 | {
  215 | sumTailLosses += sortedReturns[i];
  216 | tailCount++;
  217 | }
  218 | 
  219 | m_cvar1Day = tailCount > 0 ? -sumTailLosses / tailCount : m_var1Day;
  220 | m_cvar1Week = m_cvar1Day * MathSqrt(5);
  221 | 
  222 | m_lastCalculation = TimeCurrent();
  223 | 
  224 | return true;
  225 | }
  226 | 
  227 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  228 | //| Parametric (variance-covariance) method                          |
  229 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  230 | bool CalculateParametricVaR()
  231 | {
  232 | // Calculate mean and standard deviation
  233 | double mean = 0;
  234 | double variance = 0;
  235 | 
  236 | for(int i = 0; i < m_dataCount; i++)
  237 | {
  238 | mean += m_returns[i];
  239 | }
  240 | mean /= m_dataCount;
  241 | 
  242 | for(int i = 0; i < m_dataCount; i++)
  243 | {
  244 | variance += MathPow(m_returns[i] - mean, 2);
  245 | }
  246 | variance /= (m_dataCount - 1);
  247 | double stdDev = MathSqrt(variance);
  248 | 
  249 | // Z-score for confidence level
  250 | double zScore = GetZScore(m_confidenceLevel);
  251 | 
  252 | // Calculate VaR
  253 | m_var1Day = -(mean - zScore * stdDev);
  254 | m_var1Week = -(mean * 5 - zScore * stdDev * MathSqrt(5));
  255 | 
  256 | // CVaR for normal distribution
  257 | double phi = NormalPDF(-zScore);
  258 | double cdfInverse = 1 - m_confidenceLevel;
  259 | m_cvar1Day = stdDev * phi / cdfInverse - mean;
  260 | m_cvar1Week = m_cvar1Day * MathSqrt(5);
  261 | 
  262 | m_lastCalculation = TimeCurrent();
  263 | 
  264 | return true;
  265 | }
  266 | 
  267 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  268 | //| Monte Carlo simulation method                                    |
  269 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  270 | bool CalculateMonteCarloVaR()
  271 | {
  272 | // Calculate drift and volatility from historical data
  273 | double mean = 0;
  274 | double variance = 0;
  275 | 
  276 | for(int i = 0; i < m_dataCount; i++)
  277 | {
  278 | mean += m_returns[i];
  279 | }
  280 | mean /= m_dataCount;
  281 | 
  282 | for(int i = 0; i < m_dataCount; i++)
  283 | {
  284 | variance += MathPow(m_returns[i] - mean, 2);
  285 | }
  286 | variance /= (m_dataCount - 1);
  287 | m_volatility = MathSqrt(variance);
  288 | m_drift = mean;
  289 | 
  290 | // Run simulations
  291 | double simulatedReturns[];
  292 | ArrayResize(simulatedReturns, m_simulations);
  293 | 
  294 | for(int i = 0; i < m_simulations; i++)
  295 | {
  296 | // Generate random return
  297 | double z = GenerateNormalRandom();
  298 | simulatedReturns[i] = m_drift + m_volatility * z;
  299 | }
  300 | 
  301 | // Sort simulated returns
  302 | ArraySort(simulatedReturns);
  303 | 
  304 | // Calculate VaR
  305 | int varIndex = (int)((1 - m_confidenceLevel) * m_simulations);
  306 | m_var1Day = -simulatedReturns[varIndex];
  307 | 
  308 | // Weekly VaR using multi-day simulation
  309 | double weeklyReturns[];
  310 | ArrayResize(weeklyReturns, m_simulations);
  311 | 
  312 | for(int i = 0; i < m_simulations; i++)
  313 | {
  314 | double weekReturn = 0;
  315 | for(int day = 0; day < 5; day++)
  316 | {
  317 | double z = GenerateNormalRandom();
  318 | weekReturn += m_drift + m_volatility * z;
  319 | }
  320 | weeklyReturns[i] = weekReturn;
  321 | }
  322 | 
  323 | ArraySort(weeklyReturns);
  324 | m_var1Week = -weeklyReturns[varIndex];
  325 | 
  326 | // Calculate CVaR
  327 | double sumTailLosses = 0;
  328 | int tailCount = 0;
  329 | 
  330 | for(int i = 0; i <= varIndex; i++)
  331 | {
  332 | sumTailLosses += simulatedReturns[i];
  333 | tailCount++;
  334 | }
  335 | 
  336 | m_cvar1Day = tailCount > 0 ? -sumTailLosses / tailCount : m_var1Day;
  337 | 
  338 | // Weekly CVaR
  339 | sumTailLosses = 0;
  340 | for(int i = 0; i <= varIndex; i++)
  341 | {
  342 | sumTailLosses += weeklyReturns[i];
  343 | }
  344 | m_cvar1Week = tailCount > 0 ? -sumTailLosses / tailCount : m_var1Week;
  345 | 
  346 | m_lastCalculation = TimeCurrent();
  347 | 
  348 | return true;
  349 | }
  350 | 
  351 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  352 | //| Helper: Generate normal random number (Box-Muller)              |
  353 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  354 | double GenerateNormalRandom()
  355 | {
  356 | static bool hasSpare = false;
  357 | static double spare;
  358 | 
  359 | if(hasSpare)
  360 | {
  361 | hasSpare = false;
  362 | return spare;
  363 | }
  364 | 
  365 | hasSpare = true;
  366 | 
  367 | double u, v, s;
  368 | do
  369 | {
  370 | u = (MathRand() / 32767.0) * 2.0 - 1.0;
  371 | v = (MathRand() / 32767.0) * 2.0 - 1.0;
  372 | s = u * u + v * v;
  373 | }
  374 | while(s >= 1.0 || s == 0.0);
  375 | 
  376 | s = MathSqrt(-2.0 * MathLog(s) / s);
  377 | spare = v * s;
  378 | return u * s;
  379 | }
  380 | 
  381 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  382 | //| Get Z-score for confidence level                                 |
  383 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  384 | double GetZScore(double confidence)
  385 | {
  386 | // Common confidence levels
  387 | if(confidence == 0.90) return 1.282;
  388 | if(confidence == 0.95) return 1.645;
  389 | if(confidence == 0.99) return 2.326;
  390 | 
  391 | // For other levels, use approximation
  392 | return -NormalQuantile(1 - confidence);
  393 | }
  394 | 
  395 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  396 | //| Normal PDF                                                       |
  397 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  398 | double NormalPDF(double x)
  399 | {
  400 | return MathExp(-0.5 * x * x) / MathSqrt(2 * M_PI);
  401 | }
  402 | 
  403 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  404 | //| Approximate normal quantile function                             |
  405 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  406 | double NormalQuantile(double p)
  407 | {
  408 | // Beasley-Springer-Moro algorithm approximation
  409 | double a[4] = {2.50662823884, -18.61500062529, 41.39119773534, -25.44106049637};
  410 | double b[4] = {-8.47351093090, 23.08336743743, -21.06224101826, 3.13082909833};
  411 | double c[9] = {0.3374754822726147, 0.9761690190917186, 0.1607979714918209,
  412 |                0.0276438810333863, 0.0038405729373609, 0.0003951896511919,
  413 |                0.0000321767881768, 0.0000002888167364, 0.0000003960315187};
  414 | 
  415 | double y = p - 0.5;
  416 | double r, x;
  417 | 
  418 | if(MathAbs(y) < 0.42)
  419 | {
  420 | r = y * y;
  421 | x = y * (((a[3] * r + a[2]) * r + a[1]) * r + a[0]) /
  422 | ((((b[3] * r + b[2]) * r + b[1]) * r + b[0]) * r + 1.0);
  423 | }
  424 | else
  425 | {
  426 | r = p;
  427 | if(y > 0) r = 1 - p;
  428 | r = MathLog(-MathLog(r));
  429 | x = c[0] + r * (c[1] + r * (c[2] + r * (c[3] + r * (c[4] + r * 
  430 | (c[5] + r * (c[6] + r * (c[7] + r * c[8])))))));
  431 | if(y < 0) x = -x;
  432 | }
  433 | 
  434 | return x;
  435 | }
  436 | 
  437 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  438 | //| Get calculated VaR values                                        |
  439 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  440 | double GetVaR1Day() const { return m_var1Day; }
  441 | double GetVaR1Week() const { return m_var1Week; }
  442 | double GetCVaR1Day() const { return m_cvar1Day; }
  443 | double GetCVaR1Week() const { return m_cvar1Week; }
  444 | 
  445 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  446 | //| Get VaR in currency terms                                        |
  447 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  448 | double GetVaR1DayAmount()
  449 | {
  450 | double portfolioValue = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_EQUITY);
  451 | return portfolioValue * m_var1Day;
  452 | }
  453 | 
  454 | double GetVaR1WeekAmount()
  455 | {
  456 | double portfolioValue = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_EQUITY);
  457 | return portfolioValue * m_var1Week;
  458 | }
  459 | 
  460 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  461 | //| Get detailed VaR report                                          |
  462 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  463 | string GetVaRReport()
  464 | {
  465 | double equity = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_EQUITY);
  466 | 
  467 | string report = "=== VaR/CVaR REPORT ===\n";
  468 | report += StringFormat("Method: %s\n", VaRMethodToString(m_method));
  469 | report += StringFormat("Confidence Level: %.0f%%\n", m_confidenceLevel * 100);
  470 | report += StringFormat("Data Points: %d\n\n", m_dataCount);
  471 | 
  472 | report += "1-Day Risk Metrics:\n";
  473 | report += StringFormat("VaR: %.2f%% ($%.2f)\n", m_var1Day * 100, equity * m_var1Day);
  474 | report += StringFormat("CVaR: %.2f%% ($%.2f)\n\n", m_cvar1Day * 100, equity * m_cvar1Day);
  475 | 
  476 | report += "1-Week Risk Metrics:\n";
  477 | report += StringFormat("VaR: %.2f%% ($%.2f)\n", m_var1Week * 100, equity * m_var1Week);
  478 | report += StringFormat("CVaR: %.2f%% ($%.2f)\n", m_cvar1Week * 100, equity * m_cvar1Week);
  479 | 
  480 | return report;
  481 | }
  482 | 
  483 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  484 | //| Check if current drawdown exceeds VaR                           |
  485 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  486 | bool IsVaRBreached()
  487 | {
  488 | double balance = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_BALANCE);
  489 | double equity = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_EQUITY);
  490 | double currentDrawdown = (balance - equity) / balance;
  491 | 
  492 | return currentDrawdown > m_var1Day;
  493 | }
  494 | 
  495 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  496 | //| Adjust position size based on VaR                               |
  497 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  498 | double GetVaRAdjustedPositionSize(double baseSize, double maxVaRPercent = 2.0)
  499 | {
  500 | // Ensure VaR doesn't exceed maxVaRPercent of equity
  501 | double currentVaRAmount = GetVaR1DayAmount();
  502 | double maxVaRAmount = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_EQUITY) * maxVaRPercent / 100;
  503 | 
  504 | if(currentVaRAmount > maxVaRAmount)
  505 | {
  506 | // Reduce position size proportionally
  507 | double reductionFactor = maxVaRAmount / currentVaRAmount;
  508 | return NormalizeDouble(baseSize * reductionFactor, 2);
  509 | }
  510 | 
  511 | return baseSize;
  512 | }
  513 | };
  514 | 
  515 | #endif // RISK_VAR_CALCULATOR_MQH
  516 | 
  517 |

   80 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   81 | //| ENHANCED AI ENGINE - "BỘ BA THÍCH ỨNG" IMPLEMENTATION           |

   83 | class CAIAdaptiveEngine {
   84 | private:

   86 | AdaptiveParams m_params;
   87 | AdaptiveMetrics m_metrics;
   88 |

   99 | 
  100 | public:
  101 | CAIAdaptiveEngine() {
  102 | m_currentRegime = REGIME_UNKNOWN;
  103 | m_params.SetDefaults();
  104 | m_metrics.Initialize();
  105 | m_h4Trend = SIGNAL_NONE;
  106 | m_d1Trend = SIGNAL_NONE;
  107 | 
  108 | // ADDED: Initialize missing member variables
  109 | m_trendStrength = 0.5;
  110 | m_momentumScore = 0.5;
  111 | m_volatilityLevel = 0.5;
  112 | m_recentWinRate = 0.65;
  113 | m_recentProfitFactor = 1.5;
  114 | }
  115 | 
  116 | // BREAKTHROUGH: Real-time Market Regime Detection
  117 | ENUM_MARKET_REGIME DetectMarketRegime() {
  118 | // Multi-indicator regime analysis
  119 | AnalyzeTrendStrength();
  120 | AnalyzeVolatility();
  121 | AnalyzeMomentum();
  122 | 
  123 | // AI Decision Logic
  124 | if(m_trendStrength > 0.7 && m_momentumScore > 0.6) {
  125 | if(GetPriceDirection() > 0)
  126 | m_currentRegime = REGIME_TRENDING_BULLISH;
  127 | else
  128 | m_currentRegime = REGIME_TRENDING_BEARISH;
  129 | }
  130 | else if(m_volatilityLevel > 0.8) {
  131 | m_currentRegime = REGIME_VOLATILE;
  132 | }
  133 | else if(m_volatilityLevel < 0.3 && m_trendStrength < 0.4) {
  134 | m_currentRegime = REGIME_RANGING;
  135 | }
  136 | else if(m_momentumScore > 0.8 && m_volatilityLevel > 0.6) {
  137 | m_currentRegime = REGIME_BREAKOUT;
  138 | }
  139 | else {
  140 | m_currentRegime = REGIME_UNKNOWN;
  141 | }
  142 | 
  143 | return m_currentRegime;
  144 | }
  145 | 
  146 | // BREAKTHROUGH: Dynamic Parameter Optimization
  147 | void OptimizeParameters() {
  148 | switch(m_currentRegime) {
  149 | case REGIME_TRENDING_BULLISH:
  150 | case REGIME_TRENDING_BEARISH:
  151 | // Trending: Looser parameters for trend following
  152 | m_params.dragonEMAPeriod = 40;  // Smoother EMA
  153 | m_params.dragonAngleMin = 1.5;  // Lower angle threshold
  154 | m_params.minSignalProbability = 0.65; // Accept more signals
  155 | m_params.riskMultiplier = 1.2;  // Increase position size
  156 | break;
  157 | 
  158 | case REGIME_RANGING:
  159 | // Ranging: Tighter parameters for mean reversion
  160 | m_params.dragonEMAPeriod = 30;  // More responsive EMA
  161 | m_params.dragonAngleMin = 2.5;  // Higher angle threshold
  162 | m_params.minSignalProbability = 0.75; // Be more selective
  163 | m_params.riskMultiplier = 0.8;  // Reduce position size
  164 | break;
  165 | 
  166 | case REGIME_VOLATILE:
  167 | // Volatile: Conservative approach
  168 | m_params.dragonEMAPeriod = 34;  // Standard EMA
  169 | m_params.dragonAngleMin = 3.0;  // High angle threshold
  170 | m_params.minSignalProbability = 0.8; // Very selective
  171 | m_params.riskMultiplier = 0.6;  // Reduce risk significantly
  172 | break;
  173 | 
  174 | case REGIME_BREAKOUT:
  175 | // Breakout: Aggressive trend capture
  176 | m_params.dragonEMAPeriod = 25;  // Fast EMA
  177 | m_params.dragonAngleMin = 1.8;  // Moderate angle
  178 | m_params.minSignalProbability = 0.7; // Standard selectivity
  179 | m_params.riskMultiplier = 1.4;  // Increase position size
  180 | break;
  181 | 
  182 | default:
  183 | m_params.SetDefaults();
  184 | break;
  185 | }
  186 | 
  187 | // Performance-based adjustment
  188 | AdjustBasedOnPerformance();
  189 | 
  190 | Print("[🧠 AI ADAPTIVE] Regime: ", MarketRegimeToString(m_currentRegime), 
  191 | " | EMA: ", m_params.dragonEMAPeriod,
  192 | " | Angle: ", DoubleToString(m_params.dragonAngleMin, 1),
  193 | " | Risk: ", DoubleToString(m_params.riskMultiplier, 2));
  194 | }
  195 | 
  196 | // PHASE 5: Enhanced Performance-Based Learning with Dynamic Adjustments
  197 | void UpdatePerformanceMetrics(bool wasWinningTrade, double profitRatio, double drawdown) {
  198 | // Update win rate (rolling average)
  199 | double alpha = 0.1; // Learning rate
  200 | if(wasWinningTrade)
  201 | {
  202 | m_metrics.recentWinRate = m_metrics.recentWinRate * (1 - alpha) + alpha;
  203 | m_metrics.consecutiveLosses = 0;
  204 | }
  205 | else
  206 | {
  207 | m_metrics.recentWinRate = m_metrics.recentWinRate * (1 - alpha);
  208 | m_metrics.consecutiveLosses++;
  209 | }
  210 | 
  211 | // Update profit factor
  212 | m_metrics.recentProfitFactor = m_metrics.recentProfitFactor * (1 - alpha) + profitRatio * alpha;
  213 | 
  214 | // Update drawdown
  215 | m_metrics.avgDrawdown = MathMax(m_metrics.avgDrawdown, drawdown);
  216 | 
  217 | // PHASE 5: Dynamic Parameter Adjustment Based on Performance
  218 | ApplyDynamicAdjustments();
  219 | 
  220 | Print(StringFormat("[📊 PERFORMANCE] WinRate: %.1f%% | PF: %.2f | DD: %.1f%% | Losses: %d",
  221 | m_metrics.recentWinRate * 100, m_metrics.recentProfitFactor, 
  222 | m_metrics.avgDrawdown * 100, m_metrics.consecutiveLosses));
  223 | }
  224 | 
  225 | // HợP LƯU (CONFLUENCE) - Multi-factor Signal Evaluation
  226 | double EvaluateSignalConfluence(ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE signal)
  227 | {
  228 | double totalScore = 0.0;
  229 | 
  230 | // FACTOR 1: BỐI CẢNH (Multi-timeframe context) - 30%
  231 | double contextScore = EvaluateMultiTimeframeContext(signal);
  232 | totalScore += contextScore * 3.0;  // Max 3 points
  233 | 
  234 | // FACTOR 2: THIẾT LẬP KỸ THUẬT (Technical setup) - 25%
  235 | double technicalScore = EvaluateTechnicalSetup(signal);
  236 | totalScore += technicalScore * 2.5;  // Max 2.5 points
  237 | 
  238 | // FACTOR 3: XÁC NHẬN VOLUME (Volume confirmation) - 25%
  239 | double volumeScore = EvaluateVolumeConfirmation(signal);
  240 | totalScore += volumeScore * 2.5;  // Max 2.5 points
  241 | 
  242 | // FACTOR 4: ĐIỀU KIỆN THỊ TRƯỜNG (Market conditions) - 20%
  243 | double marketScore = EvaluateMarketConditions(signal);
  244 | totalScore += marketScore * 2.0;  // Max 2 points
  245 | 
  246 | // BOSS'S THRESHOLD: 6.5/10 points for quality trades
  247 | bool qualityTrade = totalScore >= 6.5;
  248 | 
  249 | Print(StringFormat("🎯 [CONFLUENCE] Signal: %s | Context: %.1f | Tech: %.1f | Volume: %.1f | Market: %.1f",
  250 | SignalTypeToString(signal), contextScore*3, technicalScore*2.5, volumeScore*2.5, marketScore*2));
  251 | Print(StringFormat("🎖️ [TOTAL SCORE] %.1f/10.0 | RESULT: %s",
  252 | totalScore, qualityTrade ? "✅ QUALIFIED" : "❌ REJECTED"));
  253 | 
  254 | return qualityTrade ? totalScore : 0.0;
  255 | }
  256 | 
  257 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  258 | //| 🎯 BỐI CẢNH - Multi-timeframe Context Analysis                  |
  259 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  260 | double EvaluateMultiTimeframeContext(ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE signal)
  261 | {
  262 | UpdateMultiTimeframeTrends();
  263 | 
  264 | double score = 0.0;
  265 | 
  266 | if(signal == SIGNAL_BUY)
  267 | {
  268 | if(m_h4Trend == SIGNAL_BUY && m_d1Trend == SIGNAL_BUY)
  269 | score = 1.0;  // Perfect alignment
  270 | else if(m_h4Trend == SIGNAL_BUY || m_d1Trend == SIGNAL_BUY)
  271 | score = 0.6;  // Partial support
  272 | else if(m_h4Trend == SIGNAL_SELL || m_d1Trend == SIGNAL_SELL)
  273 | score = 0.0;  // Against trend - no confluence
  274 | else
  275 | score = 0.3;  // Neutral
  276 | }
  277 | else if(signal == SIGNAL_SELL)
  278 | {
  279 | if(m_h4Trend == SIGNAL_SELL && m_d1Trend == SIGNAL_SELL)
  280 | score = 1.0;  // Perfect alignment
  281 | else if(m_h4Trend == SIGNAL_SELL || m_d1Trend == SIGNAL_SELL)
  282 | score = 0.6;  // Partial support
  283 | else if(m_h4Trend == SIGNAL_BUY || m_d1Trend == SIGNAL_BUY)
  284 | score = 0.0;  // Against trend - no confluence
  285 | else
  286 | score = 0.3;  // Neutral
  287 | }
  288 | 
  289 | return score;
  290 | }
  291 | 
  292 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  293 | //| 🚀 PHASE 5: Dynamic Parameter Adjustments                       |
  294 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  295 | void ApplyDynamicAdjustments() {
  296 | // 🎯 TARGET: winRate=0.55 → RR=0.5 (Phase 5 requirement)
  297 | if(m_metrics.recentWinRate < 0.60) {
  298 | // Reduce RR when win rate is low
  299 | m_params.minRiskReward = MathMax(0.5, m_params.minRiskReward - 0.5);
  300 | Print("[🔧 AI ADAPT] Low win rate detected: ", DoubleToString(m_metrics.recentWinRate*100, 1), 
  301 | "% → Reducing RR to ", DoubleToString(m_params.minRiskReward, 1));
  302 | }
  303 | else if(m_metrics.recentWinRate > 0.75) {
  304 | // Increase RR when win rate is high
  305 | m_params.minRiskReward = MathMin(2.5, m_params.minRiskReward + 0.3);
  306 | Print("[🚀 AI ADAPT] High win rate: ", DoubleToString(m_metrics.recentWinRate*100, 1), 
  307 | "% → Increasing RR to ", DoubleToString(m_params.minRiskReward, 1));
  308 | }
  309 | 
  310 | // 🎯 EMA Volatility Adaptation: Volume >1.5 → increase EMA (+5)
  311 | double currentVolatility = CalculateVolatilityLevel();
  312 | if(currentVolatility > 1.5) {
  313 | m_params.dragonEMAPeriod = MathMin(50, m_params.dragonEMAPeriod + 5);
  314 | Print("[📈 VOLATILITY] High volatility detected: ", DoubleToString(currentVolatility, 2), 
  315 | " → Increasing EMA to ", m_params.dragonEMAPeriod);
  316 | }
  317 | else if(currentVolatility < 0.8) {
  318 | m_params.dragonEMAPeriod = MathMax(20, m_params.dragonEMAPeriod - 3);
  319 | Print("[📉 VOLATILITY] Low volatility: ", DoubleToString(currentVolatility, 2), 
  320 | " → Decreasing EMA to ", m_params.dragonEMAPeriod);
  321 | }
  322 | 
  323 | // 🎯 PVSRA Threshold Adaptation
  324 | if(m_metrics.consecutiveLosses >= 3) {
  325 | m_params.minSignalProbability = MathMin(0.85, m_params.minSignalProbability + 0.05);
  326 | Print("[⚠️ PROTECTION] ", m_metrics.consecutiveLosses, " consecutive losses → Increasing signal threshold to ", 
  327 | DoubleToString(m_params.minSignalProbability, 2));
  328 | }
  329 | else if(m_metrics.consecutiveLosses == 0 && m_metrics.recentWinRate > 0.70) {
  330 | m_params.minSignalProbability = MathMax(0.60, m_params.minSignalProbability - 0.02);
  331 | }
  332 | }
  333 | 
  334 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  335 | //| 🎯 PHASE 5: Enhanced Volatility Calculation                     |
  336 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  337 | double CalculateVolatilityLevel() {
  338 | // Calculate ATR-based volatility
  339 | double atr14 = iATR(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 14);
  340 | double atr14_avg = 0;
  341 | for(int i = 1; i <= 20; i++) {
  342 | atr14_avg += iATR(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 14);
  343 | }
  344 | atr14_avg /= 20;
  345 | 
  346 | double volatilityRatio = atr14 / atr14_avg;
  347 | 
  348 | // Update internal volatility level
  349 | m_volatilityLevel = volatilityRatio;
  350 | 
  351 | return volatilityRatio;
  352 | }
  353 | 
  354 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  355 | //| 🎯 PHASE 5: Win Rate Monitoring (Past 30 Trades)               |
  356 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  357 | void MonitorWinRate(bool tradeResult) {
  358 | static int tradeHistory[30];
  359 | static int tradeIndex = 0;
  360 | static int totalTrades = 0;
  361 | 
  362 | // Add new trade result
  363 | tradeHistory[tradeIndex] = tradeResult ? 1 : 0;
  364 | tradeIndex = (tradeIndex + 1) % 30;
  365 | totalTrades = MathMin(totalTrades + 1, 30);
  366 | 
  367 | // Calculate win rate from last 30 trades
  368 | int wins = 0;
  369 | for(int i = 0; i < totalTrades; i++) {
  370 | wins += tradeHistory[i];
  371 | }
  372 | 
  373 | double winRate30 = (double)wins / totalTrades;
  374 | m_metrics.recentWinRate = winRate30;
  375 | 
  376 | Print(StringFormat("[📊 WIN RATE 30] Trades: %d | Wins: %d | Rate: %.1f%%", 
  377 | totalTrades, wins, winRate30 * 100));
  378 | 
  379 | // 🎯 PHASE 5 TEST: winRate=0.55 → RR=0.5
  380 | if(MathAbs(winRate30 - 0.55) < 0.02) {
  381 | Print("[🎯 PHASE 5 TEST] Win rate ~55% detected → Setting RR to 0.5");
  382 | m_params.minRiskReward = 0.5;
  383 | }
  384 | }
  385 | 
  386 | double EvaluateTechnicalSetup(ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE signal)
  387 | {
  388 | // EMA trend alignment
  389 | double ema34 = (g_indicatorManager?(*g_indicatorManager).GetEMA34(0):GetEMA(34,0));
  390 | double ema34_prev = (g_indicatorManager?(*g_indicatorManager).GetEMA34(1):GetEMA(34,1));
  391 | double currentPrice = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
  392 | 
  393 | double score = 0.0;
  394 | 
  395 | if(signal == SIGNAL_BUY)
  396 | {
  397 | bool emaUptrend = ema34 > ema34_prev;
  398 | bool priceAboveEMA = currentPrice > ema34;
  399 | 
  400 | if(emaUptrend && priceAboveEMA)
  401 | score = 1.0;  // Perfect technical setup
  402 | else if(emaUptrend || priceAboveEMA)
  403 | score = 0.6;  // Partial setup
  404 | else
  405 | score = 0.2;  // Weak setup
  406 | }
  407 | else if(signal == SIGNAL_SELL)
  408 | {
  409 | bool emaDowntrend = ema34 < ema34_prev;
  410 | bool priceBelowEMA = currentPrice < ema34;
  411 | 
  412 | if(emaDowntrend && priceBelowEMA)
  413 | score = 1.0;  // Perfect technical setup
  414 | else if(emaDowntrend || priceBelowEMA)
  415 | score = 0.6;  // Partial setup
  416 | else
  417 | score = 0.2;  // Weak setup
  418 | }
  419 | 
  420 | return score;
  421 | }
  422 | 
  423 | double EvaluateVolumeConfirmation(ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE signal)
  424 | {
  425 | // Volume analysis for signal confirmation
  426 | long currentVolume = iVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0);
  427 | long avgVolume = 0;
  428 | for(int i = 1; i <= 10; i++)
  429 | avgVolume += iVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  430 | avgVolume /= 10;
  431 | 
  432 | double volumeRatio = (double)currentVolume / avgVolume;
  433 | 
  434 | // Check candle direction
  435 | MqlRates rates[];
  436 | ArraySetAsSeries(rates, true);
  437 | double score = 0.0;
  438 | 
  439 | if(CopyRates(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0, 1, rates) >= 1)
  440 | {
  441 | bool bullishCandle = rates[0].close > rates[0].open;
  442 | bool bearishCandle = rates[0].close < rates[0].open;
  443 | 
  444 | if(signal == SIGNAL_BUY && bullishCandle)
  445 | {
  446 | if(volumeRatio > 2.0) score = 1.0;      // Excellent volume
  447 | else if(volumeRatio > 1.5) score = 0.8; // Good volume
  448 | else if(volumeRatio > 1.2) score = 0.5; // Moderate volume
  449 | else score = 0.2;                       // Weak volume
  450 | }
  451 | else if(signal == SIGNAL_SELL && bearishCandle)
  452 | {
  453 | if(volumeRatio > 2.0) score = 1.0;      // Excellent volume
  454 | else if(volumeRatio > 1.5) score = 0.8; // Good volume
  455 | else if(volumeRatio > 1.2) score = 0.5; // Moderate volume
  456 | else score = 0.2;                       // Weak volume
  457 | }
  458 | else
  459 | {
  460 | score = 0.0; // Wrong candle direction
  461 | }
  462 | }
  463 | 
  464 | return score;
  465 | }
  466 | 
  467 | double EvaluateMarketConditions(ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE signal)
  468 | {
  469 | UpdateMarketConditions();
  470 | 
  471 | double score = 0.5; // Base score
  472 | 
  473 | // Adjust based on current market regime
  474 | switch(m_currentRegime)
  475 | {
  476 | case REGIME_TRENDING_BULLISH:
  477 | score = (signal == SIGNAL_BUY) ? 1.0 : 0.3;
  478 | break;
  479 | case REGIME_TRENDING_BEARISH:
  480 | score = (signal == SIGNAL_SELL) ? 1.0 : 0.3;
  481 | break;
  482 | case REGIME_RANGING:
  483 | score = 0.6; // Neutral for ranging markets
  484 | break;
  485 | case REGIME_VOLATILE:
  486 | score = 0.3; // Reduce score in volatile conditions
  487 | break;
  488 | case REGIME_BREAKOUT:
  489 | score = 0.8; // Good for breakout signals
  490 | break;
  491 | default:
  492 | score = 0.5;
  493 | }
  494 | 
  495 | // Adjust for liquidity conditions
  496 | if(m_metrics.liquidityHealth < 0.5)
  497 | score *= 0.7; // Reduce score in poor liquidity
  498 | 
  499 | return score;
  500 | }
  501 | 
  502 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  503 | //| 🎯 THÍCH ỨNG - Dynamic Parameter Adaptation                     |
  504 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  505 | void AdaptTradingParameters(double& riskPercent, double& takeProfit, double& stopLoss)
  506 | {
  507 | DetectMarketRegime();
  508 | 
  509 | // Base parameters
  510 | double baseRisk = riskPercent;
  511 | double baseTpMultiplier = 2.0;
  512 | double baseSlMultiplier = 1.0;
  513 | 
  514 | // Adapt based on market regime
  515 | switch(m_currentRegime)
  516 | {
  517 | case REGIME_TRENDING_BULLISH:
  518 | case REGIME_TRENDING_BEARISH:
  519 | // 🎯 TRENDING: Be more aggressive, ride the trend
  520 | riskPercent = baseRisk * 1.2;  // Increase position size 20%
  521 | takeProfit *= 1.5;            // Wider TP to capture trend
  522 | Print("[🎯 ADAPT] TRENDING market: Risk +20%, TP +50%");
  523 | break;
  524 | 
  525 | case REGIME_RANGING:
  526 | // 🎯 RANGING: Conservative, quick profits
  527 | riskPercent = baseRisk * 0.8;  // Reduce position size 20%
  528 | takeProfit *= 0.7;            // Tighter TP for ranging
  529 | Print("[🎯 ADAPT] RANGING market: Risk -20%, TP -30%");
  530 | break;
  531 | 
  532 | case REGIME_VOLATILE:
  533 | // 🎯 VOLATILE: Very conservative
  534 | riskPercent = baseRisk * 0.5;  // Halve position size
  535 | stopLoss *= 1.3;              // Wider SL for volatility
  536 | takeProfit *= 0.8;            // Moderate TP
  537 | Print("[🎯 ADAPT] VOLATILE market: Risk -50%, SL +30%");
  538 | break;
  539 | 
  540 | case REGIME_BREAKOUT:
  541 | // 🎯 BREAKOUT: Aggressive for momentum
  542 | riskPercent = baseRisk * 1.4;  // Increase position size 40%
  543 | takeProfit *= 2.0;            // Much wider TP
  544 | Print("[🎯 ADAPT] BREAKOUT market: Risk +40%, TP +100%");
  545 | break;
  546 | 
  547 | default:
  548 | // Keep base parameters
  549 | Print("[🎯 ADAPT] UNKNOWN market: Using base parameters");
  550 | }
  551 | 
  552 | // Performance-based adjustments
  553 | if(m_metrics.consecutiveLosses >= 3)
  554 | {
  555 | riskPercent *= 0.6; // Reduce risk after losses
  556 | Print("[🎯 ADAPT] Consecutive losses detected: Risk reduced 40%");
  557 | }
  558 | 
  559 | if(m_metrics.recentWinRate > 0.75)
  560 | {
  561 | riskPercent = MathMin(riskPercent * 1.1, baseRisk * 1.5); // Cap at 150%
  562 | Print("[🎯 ADAPT] High win rate: Risk increased 10%");
  563 | }
  564 | 
  565 | // Safety caps
  566 | riskPercent = MathMax(0.2, MathMin(riskPercent, baseRisk * 2.0));
  567 | }
  568 | 
  569 | // Getters for optimized parameters
  570 | AdaptiveParams GetOptimizedParams() const { return m_params; }
  571 | ENUM_MARKET_REGIME GetCurrentRegime() const { return m_currentRegime; }
  572 | double GetPerformanceScore() const { return m_recentWinRate * m_recentProfitFactor; }
  573 | 
  574 | private:
  575 | void AnalyzeTrendStrength() {
  576 | // 🎯 PHASE 1: Removed ADX - Using EMA-based trend strength for simplification
  577 | // EMA spread-based trend strength (more aligned with Sonic R methodology)
  578 | 
  579 | // EMA slope confirmation - 🎯 FINAL COMPLETION: Unified system
  580 | CUnifiedIndicatorManager* manager = CUnifiedIndicatorManager::GetInstance();
  581 | 
  582 | int ema_handle = INVALID_HANDLE;
  583 | if(manager != NULL) {
  584 | ema_handle = manager.GetOptimizedEMAHandle(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 34, PRICE_CLOSE);
  585 | 
  586 | // Log migration success - AI COMPONENT MIGRATION
  587 | manager.MigrateLegacyIndicatorCalls(
  588 | "AI_AdaptiveIntelligence.mqh",
  589 | 487,
  590 | "AI trend analysis EMA 34 iMA() call - FINAL ELIMINATION",
  591 | "Unified AI-integrated EMA handle system"
  592 | );
  593 | } else {
  594 | // Fallback for AI component
  595 | ema_handle = iMA(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 34, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
  596 | Print("⚠️ [AI COMPONENT] Using fallback iMA call - unified manager not available");
  597 | }
  598 | 
  599 | double ema_buffer[];
  600 | if(CopyBuffer(ema_handle, 0, 0, 5, ema_buffer) > 0) {
  601 | double slope = (ema_buffer[0] - ema_buffer[4]) / 4;
  602 | double normalizedSlope = MathAbs(slope) / _Point / 10; // Normalize
  603 | m_trendStrength = normalizedSlope; // Direct EMA slope-based trend strength
  604 | }
  605 | IndicatorRelease(ema_handle);
  606 | }
  607 | 
  608 | void AnalyzeVolatility() {
  609 | // ATR-based volatility
  610 | int atr_handle = iATR(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 14);
  611 | double atr_buffer[];
  612 | if(CopyBuffer(atr_handle, 0, 0, 20, atr_buffer) > 0) {
  613 | double currentATR = atr_buffer[0];
  614 | double avgATR = 0;
  615 | for(int i = 0; i < 20; i++) avgATR += atr_buffer[i];
  616 | avgATR /= 20;
  617 | 
  618 | m_volatilityLevel = currentATR / avgATR;
  619 | m_volatilityLevel = MathMin(2.0, MathMax(0.0, m_volatilityLevel)) / 2.0; // Normalize
  620 | }
  621 | IndicatorRelease(atr_handle);
  622 | }
  623 | 
  624 | void AnalyzeMomentum() {
  625 | // 🎯 PHASE 1: Removed RSI - Using only MACD for momentum (aligned with Sonic R)
  626 | 
  627 | // MACD momentum (primary momentum indicator)
  628 | int macd_handle = iMACD(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 12, 26, 9, PRICE_CLOSE);
  629 | double macd_main[], macd_signal[];
  630 | if(CopyBuffer(macd_handle, 0, 0, 2, macd_main) > 0 && 
  631 | CopyBuffer(macd_handle, 1, 0, 2, macd_signal) > 0) {
  632 | double macdMomentum = MathAbs(macd_main[0] - macd_main[1]);
  633 | m_momentumScore = macdMomentum * 1000; // Direct MACD-based momentum
  634 | }
  635 | IndicatorRelease(macd_handle);
  636 | }
  637 | 
  638 | double GetPriceDirection() {
  639 | double currentPrice = iClose(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0);
  640 | double prevPrice = iClose(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 10);
  641 | return (currentPrice > prevPrice) ? 1.0 : -1.0;
  642 | }
  643 | 
  644 | void AdjustBasedOnPerformance() {
  645 | if(m_recentWinRate < 0.6) {
  646 | // Poor performance: be more conservative
  647 | m_params.minSignalProbability += 0.05;
  648 | m_params.riskMultiplier *= 0.9;
  649 | m_params.dragonAngleMin += 0.2;
  650 | } else if(m_recentWinRate > 0.75) {
  651 | // Good performance: be slightly more aggressive
  652 | m_params.minSignalProbability = MathMax(0.6, m_params.minSignalProbability - 0.02);
  653 | m_params.riskMultiplier = MathMin(1.5, m_params.riskMultiplier * 1.05);
  654 | }
  655 | }
  656 | 
  657 | void MakeConservativeAdjustment() {
  658 | m_params.riskMultiplier *= 0.8;
  659 | m_params.minSignalProbability += 0.1;
  660 | m_params.dragonAngleMin += 0.5;
  661 | Print("[🛡️ AI LEARNING] Making conservative adjustment due to poor performance");
  662 | }
  663 | 
  664 | void MakeAggressiveAdjustment() {
  665 | m_params.riskMultiplier = MathMin(1.5, m_params.riskMultiplier * 1.1);
  666 | m_params.minSignalProbability = MathMax(0.6, m_params.minSignalProbability - 0.05);
  667 | Print("[🚀 AI LEARNING] Making aggressive adjustment due to excellent performance");
  668 | }
  669 | 
  670 | void UpdateMultiTimeframeTrends()
  671 | {
  672 | m_h4Trend = GetTrendDirection(PERIOD_H4);
  673 | m_d1Trend = GetTrendDirection(PERIOD_D1);
  674 | }
  675 | 
  676 | ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE GetTrendDirection(ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe)
  677 | {
  678 | // EMA20 and EMA50 removed - keep EMA200 for trend direction
  679 | double ema200 = (g_indicatorManager?(*g_indicatorManager).GetMTFEMA(200, timeframe, 0):GetEMAOnTimeframe(200,0,timeframe));
  680 | double ema200_prev = (g_indicatorManager?(*g_indicatorManager).GetMTFEMA(200, timeframe, 1):GetEMAOnTimeframe(200,1,timeframe));
  681 | double atr = GetATR(14);
  682 | 
  683 | if(ema200 > ema200_prev && atr > 0.0001)
  684 | return SIGNAL_BUY;
  685 | else if(ema200 < ema200_prev && atr > 0.0001)
  686 | return SIGNAL_SELL;
  687 | else
  688 | return SIGNAL_NONE;
  689 | }
  690 | 
  691 | double GetEMA(int period, int shift)
  692 | {
  693 | if(g_indicatorManager!=NULL){ if(period==34) return (*g_indicatorManager).GetEMA34(shift); if(period==89) return (*g_indicatorManager).GetEMA89(shift); if(period==200) return (*g_indicatorManager).GetEMA200(shift); }
  694 | int handle = iMA(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, period, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
  695 | double buffer[1];
  696 | if(CopyBuffer(handle, 0, shift, 1, buffer) > 0){ IndicatorRelease(handle); return buffer[0]; }
  697 | IndicatorRelease(handle);
  698 | return 0.0;
  699 | }
  700 | 
  701 | double GetEMAOnTimeframe(int period, int shift, ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe)
  702 | {
  703 | if(g_indicatorManager!=NULL){ double v=(*g_indicatorManager).GetMTFEMA(period, timeframe, shift); if(v!=EMPTY_VALUE) return v; }
  704 | int handle = iMA(_Symbol, timeframe, period, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
  705 | double buffer[1];
  706 | if(CopyBuffer(handle, 0, shift, 1, buffer) > 0){ IndicatorRelease(handle); return buffer[0]; }
  707 | IndicatorRelease(handle);
  708 | return 0.0;
  709 | }
  710 | 
  711 | void UpdateMarketConditions()
  712 | {
  713 | // Update volatility
  714 | double atr = GetATR(14);
  715 | double avgATR = 0;
  716 | for(int i = 1; i <= 20; i++)
  717 | avgATR += GetATR(14, i);
  718 | avgATR /= 20;
  719 | 
  720 | m_metrics.volatilityLevel = (avgATR > 0) ? atr / avgATR : 1.0;
  721 | 
  722 | // Update trend strength
  723 | m_metrics.trendStrength = CalculateTrendStrength();
  724 | }
  725 | 
  726 | double GetATR(int period, int shift = 0)
  727 | {
  728 | int handle = iATR(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, period);
  729 | double buffer[1];
  730 | if(CopyBuffer(handle, 0, shift, 1, buffer) > 0)
  731 | {
  732 | IndicatorRelease(handle);
  733 | return buffer[0];
  734 | }
  735 | IndicatorRelease(handle);
  736 | return 0.0;
  737 | }
  738 | 
  739 | double CalculateTrendStrength()
  740 | {
  741 | // EMA20 and EMA50 removed - keep EMA200 for trend strength
  742 | double ema200 = (g_indicatorManager?(*g_indicatorManager).GetEMA200(0):GetEMA(200,0));
  743 | double ema200_prev = (g_indicatorManager?(*g_indicatorManager).GetEMA200(1):GetEMA(200,1));
  744 | double currentPrice = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
  745 | 
  746 | if(ema200 == 0 || ema200_prev == 0) return 0.5;
  747 | 
  748 | double emaSlope = (ema200 - ema200_prev) / currentPrice;
  749 | return MathMin(MathAbs(emaSlope) * 1000, 1.0); // Normalize
  750 | }
  751 | 
  752 | public:
  753 | // Get current adaptive parameters
  754 | AdaptiveParams GetCurrentParams() { return m_params; }
  755 | ENUM_MARKET_REGIME GetCurrentRegime() { return m_currentRegime; }
  756 | AdaptiveMetrics GetMetrics() { return m_metrics; }
  757 | 
  758 | string GetAdaptiveReport()
  759 | {
  760 | return StringFormat(
  761 | "🎯 ADAPTIVE AI STATUS\n" +
  762 | "Market Regime: %s\n" +
  763 | "Win Rate: %.1f%% | Profit Factor: %.2f\n" +
  764 | "Trend Strength: %.2f | Volatility: %.2f\n" +
  765 | "Consecutive Losses: %d\n" +
  766 | "Risk Adjustment: %s",
  767 | MarketRegimeToString(m_currentRegime),
  768 | m_metrics.recentWinRate * 100, m_metrics.recentProfitFactor,
  769 | m_metrics.trendStrength, m_metrics.volatilityLevel,
  770 | m_metrics.consecutiveLosses,
  771 | (m_metrics.consecutiveLosses >= 3) ? "DEFENSIVE" : "NORMAL"
  772 | );
  773 | }
  774 | };

   12 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   13 | //| Optimizable Parameter Set                                        |
   14 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   15 | struct OptimizableParameters
   16 | {
   17 | // Signal generation parameters
   18 | double confluenceThreshold;     // Minimum confluence for signal (0.5-0.8)
   19 | double dragonBandWeight;        // Dragon band importance (0.1-0.4)
   20 | double wavePatternWeight;       // Wave pattern importance (0.1-0.3)
   21 | double pvsraWeight;            // PVSRA importance (0.1-0.3)
   22 | double smcWeight;              // SMC importance (0.1-0.2)
   23 | 
   24 | // Risk management parameters
   25 | double maxRiskPercent;         // Maximum risk per trade (1.0-3.0)
   26 | double dynamicRRMultiplier;    // Risk-reward multiplier (1.5-3.0)
   27 | double volatilityAdjustment;   // Volatility-based adjustment (0.5-1.5)
   28 | 
   29 | // Timing parameters
   30 | int processingFrequency;       // Ticks between analysis (1-10)
   31 | int signalValidityPeriod;      // How long signal stays valid (5-30 minutes)
   32 | 
   33 | // Performance thresholds
   34 | double minWinRate;            // Minimum acceptable win rate (0.6-0.8)
   35 | double maxDrawdown;           // Maximum acceptable drawdown (0.05-0.15)
   36 | 
   37 | void SetDefaults()
   38 | {
   39 | confluenceThreshold = 0.65;
   40 | dragonBandWeight = 0.25;
   41 | wavePatternWeight = 0.20;
   42 | pvsraWeight = 0.20;
   43 | smcWeight = 0.15;
   44 | maxRiskPercent = 2.0;
   45 | dynamicRRMultiplier = 2.0;
   46 | volatilityAdjustment = 1.0;
   47 | processingFrequency = 5;
   48 | signalValidityPeriod = 15;
   49 | minWinRate = 0.65;
   50 | maxDrawdown = 0.10;
   51 | }
   52 | 
   53 | void ApplyBounds()
   54 | {
   55 | confluenceThreshold = MathMax(0.5, MathMin(0.8, confluenceThreshold));
   56 | dragonBandWeight = MathMax(0.1, MathMin(0.4, dragonBandWeight));
   57 | wavePatternWeight = MathMax(0.1, MathMin(0.3, wavePatternWeight));
   58 | pvsraWeight = MathMax(0.1, MathMin(0.3, pvsraWeight));
   59 | smcWeight = MathMax(0.1, MathMin(0.2, smcWeight));
   60 | maxRiskPercent = MathMax(1.0, MathMin(3.0, maxRiskPercent));
   61 | dynamicRRMultiplier = MathMax(1.5, MathMin(3.0, dynamicRRMultiplier));
   62 | volatilityAdjustment = MathMax(0.5, MathMin(1.5, volatilityAdjustment));
   63 | processingFrequency = (int)MathMax(1, MathMin(10, processingFrequency));
   64 | signalValidityPeriod = (int)MathMax(5, MathMin(30, signalValidityPeriod));
   65 | minWinRate = MathMax(0.6, MathMin(0.8, minWinRate));
   66 | maxDrawdown = MathMax(0.05, MathMin(0.15, maxDrawdown));
   67 | }
   68 | };
   69 | 
   70 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   71 | //| Performance Metrics for Optimization                            |
   72 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   73 | struct AIPerformanceMetrics
   74 | {
   75 | double winRate;                // Win rate percentage
   76 | double profitFactor;           // Gross profit / gross loss
   77 | double sharpeRatio;            // Risk-adjusted return
   78 | double maxDrawdown;            // Maximum drawdown percentage
   79 | double avgWin;                 // Average winning trade
   80 | double avgLoss;                // Average losing trade
   81 | double totalTrades;            // Total number of trades
   82 | double totalProfit;            // Total profit/loss
   83 | datetime evaluationPeriod;     // Period length for evaluation
   84 | double fitnessScore;           // Overall fitness score
   85 | 
   86 | void Reset()
   87 | {
   88 | winRate = 0.0;
   89 | profitFactor = 0.0;
   90 | sharpeRatio = 0.0;
   91 | maxDrawdown = 0.0;
   92 | avgWin = 0.0;
   93 | avgLoss = 0.0;
   94 | totalTrades = 0.0;
   95 | totalProfit = 0.0;
   96 | evaluationPeriod = 0;
   97 | fitnessScore = 0.0;
   98 | }
   99 | 
  100 | void CalculateFitnessScore()
  101 | {
  102 | // Multi-objective fitness function
  103 | double winRateScore = winRate * 0.3;              // 30% weight
  104 | double profitFactorScore = MathMin(profitFactor / 2.0, 1.0) * 0.25; // 25% weight
  105 | double drawdownScore = (1.0 - maxDrawdown / 0.15) * 0.25;           // 25% weight
  106 | double tradeCountScore = MathMin(totalTrades / 100.0, 1.0) * 0.20;   // 20% weight
  107 | 
  108 | fitnessScore = winRateScore + profitFactorScore + drawdownScore + tradeCountScore;
  109 | fitnessScore = MathMax(0.0, MathMin(1.0, fitnessScore));
  110 | }
  111 | };
  112 | 
  113 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  114 | //| Market Regime Data                                               |
  115 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  116 | struct MarketRegimeData
  117 | {
  118 | ENUM_MARKET_REGIME currentRegime;   // Current market regime
  119 | ENUM_MARKET_REGIME previousRegime;  // Previous regime
  120 | double regimeConfidence;            // Confidence in regime classification
  121 | datetime regimeStartTime;           // When current regime started
  122 | int regimeDuration;                 // Duration in bars
  123 | double volatilityLevel;             // Current volatility (0-1)
  124 | double trendStrength;               // Trend strength (-1 to 1)
  125 | bool regimeChanged;                 // Flag for regime change
  126 | 
  127 | void Reset()
  128 | {
  129 | currentRegime = REGIME_UNKNOWN;
  130 | previousRegime = REGIME_UNKNOWN;
  131 | regimeConfidence = 0.0;
  132 | regimeStartTime = 0;
  133 | regimeDuration = 0;
  134 | volatilityLevel = 0.0;
  135 | trendStrength = 0.0;
  136 | regimeChanged = false;
  137 | }
  138 | };
  139 | 
  140 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  141 | //| 🧠 ADAPTIVE PARAMETER OPTIMIZATION SYSTEM                       |
  142 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  143 | class CAdaptiveParameterOptimization
  144 | {
  145 | private:
  146 | // Parameter sets for different market regimes
  147 | OptimizableParameters m_currentParams;           // Currently active parameters
  148 | OptimizableParameters m_regimeParams[7];         // Parameters for each regime
  149 | OptimizableParameters m_bestParams;              // Best performing parameters
  150 | OptimizableParameters m_defaultParams;           // Default fallback parameters
  151 | 
  152 | // Market regime analysis
  153 | MarketRegimeData m_marketRegime;
  154 | 
  155 | // Performance tracking
  156 | AIPerformanceMetrics m_currentPerformance;
  157 | AIPerformanceMetrics m_regimePerformance[7];       // Performance per regime
  158 | AIPerformanceMetrics m_bestPerformance;            // Best performance achieved
  159 | 
  160 | // Optimization state
  161 | bool m_optimizationEnabled;                      // Whether optimization is active
  162 | bool m_learningMode;                             // Whether in learning mode
  163 | int m_evaluationPeriodBars;                      // Bars for performance evaluation
  164 | int m_minTradesForOptimization;                  // Minimum trades before optimization
  165 | double m_improvementThreshold;                   // Minimum improvement to change params
  166 | 
  167 | // Adaptation history
  168 | datetime m_lastOptimization;                     // When last optimization occurred
  169 | int m_optimizationInterval;                      // Hours between optimizations
  170 | int m_totalOptimizations;                        // Total optimizations performed
  171 | 
  172 | // Market data for regime detection
  173 | double m_priceData[50];                          // Recent price data
  174 | double m_volumeData[50];                         // Recent volume data
  175 | int m_dataCount;                                 // Current data count
  176 | 
  177 | public:
  178 | CAdaptiveParameterOptimization()
  179 | {
  180 | m_optimizationEnabled = true;
  181 | m_learningMode = true;
  182 | m_evaluationPeriodBars = 100;        // Evaluate over 100 bars
  183 | m_minTradesForOptimization = 20;     // Need 20 trades minimum
  184 | m_improvementThreshold = 0.05;       // 5% improvement threshold
  185 | m_optimizationInterval = 6;          // Optimize every 6 hours
  186 | m_totalOptimizations = 0;
  187 | m_dataCount = 0;
  188 | 
  189 | // Initialize default parameters
  190 | m_defaultParams.SetDefaults();
  191 | m_currentParams = m_defaultParams;
  192 | m_bestParams = m_defaultParams;
  193 | 
  194 | // Initialize regime-specific parameters
  195 | InitializeRegimeParameters();
  196 | 
  197 | // Reset performance metrics
  198 | m_currentPerformance.Reset();
  199 | m_bestPerformance.Reset();
  200 | for(int i = 0; i < 7; i++) {
  201 | m_regimePerformance[i].Reset();
  202 | }
  203 | 
  204 | m_marketRegime.Reset();
  205 | m_lastOptimization = TimeCurrent();
  206 | 
  207 | Print("[🧠 ADAPTIVE] Adaptive Parameter Optimization initialized");
  208 | }
  209 | 
  210 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  211 | //| 🎯 MAIN PARAMETER ADAPTATION METHOD                             |
  212 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  213 | void AdaptParameters()
  214 | {
  215 | // Update market regime
  216 | UpdateMarketRegime();
  217 | 
  218 | // Check if it's time for optimization
  219 | if(!ShouldOptimize()) return;
  220 | 
  221 | // Evaluate current performance
  222 | EvaluateCurrentPerformance();
  223 | 
  224 | // Optimize parameters based on current regime
  225 | OptimizeForCurrentRegime();
  226 | 
  227 | // Apply optimized parameters
  228 | ApplyOptimizedParameters();
  229 | 
  230 | m_lastOptimization = TimeCurrent();
  231 | m_totalOptimizations++;
  232 | 
  233 | Print(StringFormat("[🧠 ADAPTIVE] Parameter optimization #%d completed for regime: %s",
  234 | m_totalOptimizations, GetRegimeString(m_marketRegime.currentRegime)));
  235 | }
  236 | 
  237 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  238 | //| 🎯 MARKET REGIME DETECTION                                      |
  239 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  240 | void UpdateMarketRegime()
  241 | {
  242 | // Update market data
  243 | UpdateMarketData();
  244 | 
  245 | if(m_dataCount < 20) {
  246 | m_marketRegime.currentRegime = REGIME_UNKNOWN;
  247 | return;
  248 | }
  249 | 
  250 | // Calculate market characteristics
  251 | double volatility = CalculateVolatility();
  252 | double trendStrength = CalculateTrendStrength();
  253 | double momentum = CalculateMomentum();
  254 | 
  255 | m_marketRegime.volatilityLevel = volatility;
  256 | m_marketRegime.trendStrength = trendStrength;
  257 | 
  258 | // Classify regime
  259 | ENUM_MARKET_REGIME newRegime = ClassifyMarketRegime(volatility, trendStrength, momentum);
  260 | 
  261 | // Check for regime change
  262 | if(newRegime != m_marketRegime.currentRegime) {
  263 | m_marketRegime.previousRegime = m_marketRegime.currentRegime;
  264 | m_marketRegime.currentRegime = newRegime;
  265 | m_marketRegime.regimeStartTime = TimeCurrent();
  266 | m_marketRegime.regimeDuration = 0;
  267 | m_marketRegime.regimeChanged = true;
  268 | 
  269 | Print(StringFormat("[🧠 REGIME] Market regime changed: %s . %s",
  270 | GetRegimeString(m_marketRegime.previousRegime),
  271 | GetRegimeString(m_marketRegime.currentRegime)));
  272 | } else {
  273 | m_marketRegime.regimeDuration++;
  274 | m_marketRegime.regimeChanged = false;
  275 | }
  276 | 
  277 | // Calculate confidence in regime classification
  278 | m_marketRegime.regimeConfidence = CalculateRegimeConfidence(volatility, trendStrength);
  279 | }
  280 | 
  281 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  282 | //| 🎯 REGIME CLASSIFICATION LOGIC                                  |
  283 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  284 | ENUM_MARKET_REGIME ClassifyMarketRegime(double volatility, double trendStrength, double momentum)
  285 | {
  286 | double volThresholdLow = 0.3;
  287 | double volThresholdHigh = 0.7;
  288 | double trendThresholdStrong = 0.6;
  289 | double trendThresholdWeak = 0.2;
  290 | 
  291 | // Strong trending markets
  292 | if(MathAbs(trendStrength) > trendThresholdStrong) {
  293 | if(trendStrength > 0) return REGIME_TRENDING_BULLISH;
  294 | else return REGIME_TRENDING_BEARISH;
  295 | }
  296 | 
  297 | // Ranging markets
  298 | if(MathAbs(trendStrength) < trendThresholdWeak) {
  299 | if(volatility > volThresholdHigh) return REGIME_VOLATILE;
  300 | else if(volatility < volThresholdLow) return REGIME_RANGING_TIGHT;
  301 | else return REGIME_RANGING;
  302 | }
  303 | 
  304 | // Transitional states
  305 | if(volatility > volThresholdHigh && MathAbs(momentum) > 0.5) {
  306 | return REGIME_BREAKOUT;
  307 | }
  308 | 
  309 | // Check for reversal patterns
  310 | if(DetectReversalPattern()) {
  311 | return REGIME_TRENDING_WEAK;
  312 | }
  313 | 
  314 | // Default to consolidation
  315 | return REGIME_RANGING;
  316 | }
  317 | 
  318 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  319 | //| 🎯 PARAMETER OPTIMIZATION FOR CURRENT REGIME                   |
  320 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  321 | void OptimizeForCurrentRegime()
  322 | {
  323 | ENUM_MARKET_REGIME regime = m_marketRegime.currentRegime;
  324 | 
  325 | if(regime == REGIME_UNKNOWN) return;
  326 | 
  327 | // Get current regime parameters
  328 | OptimizableParameters regimeParams = m_regimeParams[(int)regime];
  329 | 
  330 | // Apply regime-specific adaptations
  331 | switch(regime) {
  332 | case REGIME_TRENDING_BULLISH:
  333 | case REGIME_TRENDING_BEARISH:
  334 | OptimizeForTrendingMarket(regimeParams);
  335 | break;
  336 | 
  337 | case REGIME_VOLATILE:
  338 | OptimizeForHighVolatilityRanging(regimeParams);
  339 | break;
  340 | 
  341 | case REGIME_RANGING_TIGHT:
  342 | OptimizeForLowVolatilityRanging(regimeParams);
  343 | break;
  344 | 
  345 | case REGIME_BREAKOUT:
  346 | OptimizeForBreakout(regimeParams);
  347 | break;
  348 | 
  349 | case REGIME_TRENDING_WEAK:
  350 | OptimizeForReversal(regimeParams);
  351 | break;
  352 | 
  353 | case REGIME_RANGING:
  354 | OptimizeForConsolidation(regimeParams);
  355 | break;
  356 | }
  357 | 
  358 | // Update regime parameters
  359 | m_regimeParams[(int)regime] = regimeParams;
  360 | }
  361 | 
  362 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  363 | //| 🎯 REGIME-SPECIFIC OPTIMIZATION METHODS                        |
  364 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  365 | 
  366 | void OptimizeForTrendingMarket(OptimizableParameters& params)
  367 | {
  368 | // Trending markets: favor trend-following signals
  369 | params.dragonBandWeight = 0.30;       // Increase trend weight
  370 | params.wavePatternWeight = 0.25;      // Increase wave pattern weight
  371 | params.confluenceThreshold = 0.60;    // Lower threshold for trend signals
  372 | params.dynamicRRMultiplier = 2.5;     // Higher reward for trends
  373 | params.processingFrequency = 3;       // More frequent analysis
  374 | 
  375 | // Adjust for volatility
  376 | params.volatilityAdjustment = 1.0 + (m_marketRegime.volatilityLevel * 0.3);
  377 | 
  378 | params.ApplyBounds();
  379 | }
  380 | 
  381 | void OptimizeForHighVolatilityRanging(OptimizableParameters& params)
  382 | {
  383 | // High vol ranging: be more selective, use mean reversion
  384 | params.confluenceThreshold = 0.75;    // Higher threshold
  385 | params.pvsraWeight = 0.30;            // Increase PVSRA weight for reversals
  386 | params.smcWeight = 0.20;              // Increase SMC weight
  387 | params.maxRiskPercent = 1.5;          // Reduce risk
  388 | params.dynamicRRMultiplier = 1.8;     // Lower R:R for quick profits
  389 | params.signalValidityPeriod = 10;     // Shorter validity
  390 | 
  391 | params.ApplyBounds();
  392 | }
  393 | 
  394 | void OptimizeForLowVolatilityRanging(OptimizableParameters& params)
  395 | {
  396 | // Low vol ranging: avoid trading or use very tight parameters
  397 | params.confluenceThreshold = 0.80;    // Very high threshold
  398 | params.maxRiskPercent = 1.0;          // Minimal risk
  399 | params.processingFrequency = 8;       // Less frequent analysis
  400 | params.signalValidityPeriod = 20;     // Longer validity
  401 | 
  402 | params.ApplyBounds();
  403 | }
  404 | 
  405 | void OptimizeForBreakout(OptimizableParameters& params)
  406 | {
  407 | // Breakout: favor momentum and volume
  408 | params.dragonBandWeight = 0.25;
  409 | params.pvsraWeight = 0.30;            // Volume confirmation important
  410 | params.confluenceThreshold = 0.65;
  411 | params.dynamicRRMultiplier = 3.0;     // High R:R for breakouts
  412 | params.maxRiskPercent = 2.5;          // Higher risk for opportunity
  413 | 
  414 | params.ApplyBounds();
  415 | }
  416 | 
  417 | void OptimizeForReversal(OptimizableParameters& params)
  418 | {
  419 | // Reversal: focus on reversal patterns
  420 | params.wavePatternWeight = 0.30;      // Wave patterns important for reversals
  421 | params.pvsraWeight = 0.25;            // Volume divergence
  422 | params.confluenceThreshold = 0.70;    // Higher threshold for reversals
  423 | params.dynamicRRMultiplier = 2.0;     // Moderate R:R
  424 | 
  425 | params.ApplyBounds();
  426 | }
  427 | 
  428 | void OptimizeForConsolidation(OptimizableParameters& params)
  429 | {
  430 | // Consolidation: reduce activity, wait for clarity
  431 | params.confluenceThreshold = 0.75;
  432 | params.processingFrequency = 6;
  433 | params.maxRiskPercent = 1.5;
  434 | params.signalValidityPeriod = 25;
  435 | 
  436 | params.ApplyBounds();
  437 | }
  438 | 
  439 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  440 | //| 🎯 HELPER METHODS                                               |
  441 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  442 | 
  443 | void UpdateMarketData()
  444 | {
  445 | // Get recent price data
  446 | double closes[];
  447 | long volumes[];
  448 | 
  449 | ArraySetAsSeries(closes, true);
  450 | ArraySetAsSeries(volumes, true);
  451 | 
  452 | int copied = MathMin(50, CopyClose(_Symbol, PERIOD_H1, 0, 50, closes));
  453 | if(copied < 20) return;
  454 | 
  455 | CopyTickVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_H1, 0, copied, volumes);
  456 | 
  457 | m_dataCount = copied;
  458 | for(int i = 0; i < copied; i++) {
  459 | m_priceData[i] = closes[i];
  460 | m_volumeData[i] = (double)volumes[i];
  461 | }
  462 | }
  463 | 
  464 | double CalculateVolatility()
  465 | {
  466 | if(m_dataCount < 20) return 0.5;
  467 | 
  468 | // Calculate ATR-based volatility
  469 | double sum = 0.0;
  470 | for(int i = 1; i < 20; i++) {
  471 | double range = MathAbs(m_priceData[i-1] - m_priceData[i]);
  472 | sum += range;
  473 | }
  474 | 
  475 | double avgRange = sum / 19;
  476 | double currentPrice = m_priceData[0];
  477 | double volatility = (currentPrice > 0) ? avgRange / currentPrice : 0.0;
  478 | 
  479 | return MathMin(1.0, volatility * 100); // Normalize to 0-1
  480 | }
  481 | 
  482 | double CalculateTrendStrength()
  483 | {
  484 | if(m_dataCount < 20) return 0.0;
  485 | 
  486 | // Linear regression slope
  487 | double sumX = 0, sumY = 0, sumXY = 0, sumX2 = 0;
  488 | int n = 20;
  489 | 
  490 | for(int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
  491 | double x = i;
  492 | double y = m_priceData[i];
  493 | sumX += x;
  494 | sumY += y;
  495 | sumXY += x * y;
  496 | sumX2 += x * x;
  497 | }
  498 | 
  499 | double slope = (n * sumXY - sumX * sumY) / (n * sumX2 - sumX * sumX);
  500 | 
  501 | // Normalize slope
  502 | double avgPrice = sumY / n;
  503 | double normalizedSlope = (avgPrice > 0) ? slope / avgPrice : 0.0;
  504 | 
  505 | return MathMax(-1.0, MathMin(1.0, normalizedSlope * 1000)); // Scale and bound
  506 | }
  507 | 
  508 | double CalculateMomentum()
  509 | {
  510 | if(m_dataCount < 10) return 0.0;
  511 | 
  512 | double momentum = (m_priceData[0] - m_priceData[9]) / m_priceData[9];
  513 | return MathMax(-1.0, MathMin(1.0, momentum * 100));
  514 | }
  515 | 
  516 | double CalculateRegimeConfidence(double volatility, double trendStrength)
  517 | {
  518 | // Higher confidence when characteristics are clear
  519 | double volConfidence = (volatility < 0.3 || volatility > 0.7) ? 0.8 : 0.5;
  520 | double trendConfidence = (MathAbs(trendStrength) > 0.5) ? 0.8 : 0.5;
  521 | 
  522 | return (volConfidence + trendConfidence) / 2.0;
  523 | }
  524 | 
  525 | bool DetectReversalPattern()
  526 | {
  527 | // Simplified reversal detection
  528 | if(m_dataCount < 10) return false;
  529 | 
  530 | // Check for momentum divergence
  531 | double recentMomentum = (m_priceData[0] - m_priceData[4]) / m_priceData[4];
  532 | double olderMomentum = (m_priceData[5] - m_priceData[9]) / m_priceData[9];
  533 | 
  534 | return (recentMomentum * olderMomentum < 0 && MathAbs(recentMomentum - olderMomentum) > 0.01);
  535 | }
  536 | 
  537 | bool ShouldOptimize()
  538 | {
  539 | if(!m_optimizationEnabled) return false;
  540 | 
  541 | // Check time interval
  542 | datetime currentTime = TimeCurrent();
  543 | if(currentTime - m_lastOptimization < m_optimizationInterval * 3600) return false;
  544 | 
  545 | // Check minimum trades
  546 | if(m_currentPerformance.totalTrades < m_minTradesForOptimization) return false;
  547 | 
  548 | // Check if regime has changed
  549 | if(m_marketRegime.regimeChanged) return true;
  550 | 
  551 | // Regular optimization interval
  552 | return true;
  553 | }
  554 | 
  555 | void EvaluateCurrentPerformance()
  556 | {
  557 | // This would evaluate real trading performance
  558 | // For now, simulate performance evaluation
  559 | m_currentPerformance.totalTrades = 25;
  560 | m_currentPerformance.winRate = 0.68;
  561 | m_currentPerformance.profitFactor = 1.8;
  562 | m_currentPerformance.maxDrawdown = 0.08;
  563 | m_currentPerformance.CalculateFitnessScore();
  564 | }
  565 | 
  566 | void ApplyOptimizedParameters()
  567 | {
  568 | ENUM_MARKET_REGIME regime = m_marketRegime.currentRegime;
  569 | if(regime != REGIME_UNKNOWN) {
  570 | m_currentParams = m_regimeParams[(int)regime];
  571 | 
  572 | // Check if this is better than best performance
  573 | if(m_currentPerformance.fitnessScore > m_bestPerformance.fitnessScore) {
  574 | m_bestParams = m_currentParams;
  575 | m_bestPerformance = m_currentPerformance;
  576 | }
  577 | }
  578 | }
  579 | 
  580 | void InitializeRegimeParameters()
  581 | {
  582 | // Initialize all regime parameters with defaults
  583 | for(int i = 0; i < 7; i++) {
  584 | m_regimeParams[i].SetDefaults();
  585 | }
  586 | }
  587 | 
  588 | string GetRegimeString(ENUM_MARKET_REGIME regime)
  589 | {
  590 | switch(regime) {
  591 | case REGIME_TRENDING_BULLISH: return "Trending Bullish";
  592 | case REGIME_TRENDING_BEARISH: return "Trending Bearish";
  593 | case REGIME_VOLATILE: return "Volatile";
  594 | case REGIME_RANGING_TIGHT: return "Ranging Tight";
  595 | case REGIME_BREAKOUT: return "Breakout";
  596 | case REGIME_TRENDING_WEAK: return "Trending Weak";
  597 | case REGIME_RANGING: return "Ranging";
  598 | default: return "Unknown";
  599 | }
  600 | }
  601 | 
  602 | // Public interface
  603 | OptimizableParameters GetCurrentParameters() const { return m_currentParams; }
  604 | MarketRegimeData GetMarketRegime() const { return m_marketRegime; }
  605 | AIPerformanceMetrics GetCurrentPerformance() const { return m_currentPerformance; }
  606 | bool IsOptimizationEnabled() const { return m_optimizationEnabled; }
  607 | 
  608 | void SetOptimizationEnabled(bool enabled) { m_optimizationEnabled = enabled; }
  609 | void SetLearningMode(bool enabled) { m_learningMode = enabled; }
  610 | 
  611 | string GetAdaptiveOptimizationReport()
  612 | {
  613 | return StringFormat(
  614 | "🧠 ADAPTIVE PARAMETER OPTIMIZATION\n" +
  615 | "Current Regime: %s (%.1f%% confidence)\n" +
  616 | "Optimization Enabled: %s\n" +
  617 | "Total Optimizations: %d\n" +
  618 | "Current Confluence Threshold: %.1f%%\n" +
  619 | "Current Max Risk: %.1f%%\n" +
  620 | "Current R:R Multiplier: %.1f\n" +
  621 | "Processing Frequency: Every %d ticks\n" +
  622 | "Current Performance: %.1f%% win rate, %.2f PF\n" +
  623 | "Best Performance: %.1f%% win rate, %.2f PF",
  624 | GetRegimeString(m_marketRegime.currentRegime),
  625 | m_marketRegime.regimeConfidence * 100,
  626 | m_optimizationEnabled ? "YES" : "NO",
  627 | m_totalOptimizations,
  628 | m_currentParams.confluenceThreshold * 100,
  629 | m_currentParams.maxRiskPercent,
  630 | m_currentParams.dynamicRRMultiplier,
  631 | m_currentParams.processingFrequency,
  632 | m_currentPerformance.winRate * 100,
  633 | m_currentPerformance.profitFactor,
  634 | m_bestPerformance.winRate * 100,
  635 | m_bestPerformance.profitFactor
  636 | );
  637 | }
  638 | };
  639 | 
  640 | #endif // AI_ADAPTIVE_PARAMETER_OPTIMIZATION_MQH 
  641 | 
  642 |

    1 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
