 1631 | //| 🚀 PRIORITY 4: ML Prediction Engine (Placeholder)              |
 1632 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1633 | class CMLPredictionEngine
 1634 | {
 1635 | private:
 1636 | CLogger*                m_logger;
 1637 | CExternalAPIManager*    m_apiManager;
 1638 | CMLFeatureExtractor*    m_featureExtractor;
 1639 | 
 1640 | bool                    m_modelLoaded;
 1641 | string                  m_modelVersion;
 1642 | double                  m_modelAccuracy;
 1643 | datetime                m_lastPrediction;
 1644 | 
 1645 | // Simple neural network simulation
 1646 | double                  m_weights[10];
 1647 | double                  m_bias;
 1648 | 
 1649 | public:
 1650 | CMLPredictionEngine()
 1651 | {
 1652 | m_logger = new CLogger();
 1653 | m_apiManager = new CExternalAPIManager();
 1654 | m_featureExtractor = new CMLFeatureExtractor();
 1655 | 
 1656 | m_modelLoaded = false;
 1657 | m_modelVersion = "v1.0_placeholder";
 1658 | m_modelAccuracy = 0.0;
 1659 | m_lastPrediction = 0;
 1660 | m_bias = 0.0;
 1661 | 
 1662 | // Initialize random weights for simulation
 1663 | for(int i = 0; i < 10; i++)
 1664 | {
 1665 | m_weights[i] = (MathRand() / 32767.0 - 0.5) * 2.0; // Random between -1 and 1
 1666 | }
 1667 | }
 1668 | 
 1669 | ~CMLPredictionEngine()
 1670 | {
 1671 | if(m_logger) delete m_logger;
 1672 | if(m_apiManager) delete m_apiManager;
 1673 | if(m_featureExtractor) delete m_featureExtractor;
 1674 | }
 1675 | 
 1676 | // 🎯 PRIORITY 4: Initialize ML system
 1677 | bool Initialize(string apiEndpoint = "", string apiKey = "")
 1678 | {
 1679 | // Initialize API manager
 1680 | if(m_apiManager)
 1681 | {
 1682 | m_apiManager.Initialize(apiEndpoint, apiKey);
 1683 | }
 1684 | 
 1685 | // Load ML model (placeholder)
 1686 | LoadModel();
 1687 | 
 1688 | Print("[🤖 ML] ML Prediction Engine initialized - Model: ", m_modelVersion);
 1689 | return true;
 1690 | }
 1691 | 
 1692 | // 🎯 PRIORITY 4: Load ML model (placeholder)
 1693 | bool LoadModel()
 1694 | {
 1695 | // Placeholder for loading actual ML model
 1696 | // In real implementation, this would load TensorFlow/ONNX model
 1697 | 
 1698 | m_modelLoaded = true;
 1699 | m_modelAccuracy = 0.65; // Simulated accuracy
 1700 | 
 1701 | Print("[📦 MODEL] ML model loaded: ", m_modelVersion, " (Accuracy: ", 
 1702 | DoubleToString(m_modelAccuracy, 3), ")");
 1703 | 
 1704 | return true;
 1705 | }
 1706 | 
 1707 | // 🎯 PRIORITY 4: Generate ML prediction
 1708 | MLPrediction GeneratePrediction(string symbol)
 1709 | {
 1710 | MLPrediction prediction;
 1711 | prediction.Reset();
 1712 | prediction.prediction_time = TimeCurrent();
 1713 | prediction.model_version = m_modelVersion;
 1714 | 
 1715 | if(!m_modelLoaded)
 1716 | {
 1717 | Print("[❌ ML] Model not loaded - cannot generate prediction");
 1718 | return prediction;
 1719 | }
 1720 | 
 1721 | // Extract features
 1722 | MLFeatureData features = m_featureExtractor.ExtractFeatures(symbol);
 1723 | 
 1724 | // Simple neural network simulation
 1725 | double sum = m_bias;
 1726 | sum += features.atr * m_weights[0];
 1727 | sum += features.volatility * m_weights[1];
 1728 | sum += features.rsi * m_weights[2] / 100.0; // Normalize RSI
 1729 | sum += features.macd * m_weights[3];
 1730 | sum += features.bollinger_position * m_weights[4];
 1731 | sum += features.trend_strength * m_weights[5];
 1732 | 
 1733 | // Get market sentiment from API
 1734 | if(m_apiManager && m_apiManager.IsAPIEnabled())
 1735 | {
 1736 | double sentiment = m_apiManager.FetchMarketSentiment();
 1737 | sum += sentiment * m_weights[6];
 1738 | }
 1739 | 
 1740 | // Apply activation function (sigmoid)
 1741 | prediction.probability = 1.0 / (1.0 + MathExp(-sum));
 1742 | 
 1743 | // Determine signal type
 1744 | if(prediction.probability > 0.7)
 1745 | {
 1746 | prediction.signal_type = 1; // BUY
 1747 | prediction.confidence = prediction.probability;
 1748 | }
 1749 | else if(prediction.probability < 0.3)
 1750 | {
 1751 | prediction.signal_type = 2; // SELL
 1752 | prediction.confidence = 1.0 - prediction.probability;
 1753 | }
 1754 | else
 1755 | {
 1756 | prediction.signal_type = 0; // NONE
 1757 | prediction.confidence = 0.5;
 1758 | }
 1759 | 
 1760 | // Calculate expected return and risk
 1761 | prediction.expected_return = (prediction.probability - 0.5) * 2.0; // Range: -1 to 1
 1762 | prediction.risk_score = 1.0 - prediction.confidence;
 1763 | 
 1764 | m_lastPrediction = TimeCurrent();
 1765 | 
 1766 | // Log prediction
 1767 | Print(StringFormat("[🤖 PREDICTION] Signal: %d, Prob: %.3f, Conf: %.3f, Return: %.3f", 
 1768 | prediction.signal_type, prediction.probability, prediction.confidence, prediction.expected_return));
 1769 | 
 1770 | return prediction;
 1771 | }
 1772 | 
 1773 | // 🎯 PRIORITY 4: Train model with trade results (placeholder)
 1774 | bool TrainWithTradeResult(const MLFeatureData& features, double profit, int tradeType)
 1775 | {
 1776 | if(!m_modelLoaded) return false;
 1777 | 
 1778 | // Placeholder for online learning
 1779 | // In real implementation, this would update model weights
 1780 | 
 1781 | // Send data to external ML service
 1782 | if(m_apiManager && m_apiManager.IsAPIEnabled())
 1783 | {
 1784 | m_apiManager.SendTradeData(profit, 0.1, 3600, _Symbol);
 1785 | }
 1786 | 
 1787 | Print("[📚 TRAINING] Trade result sent for model training: Profit=", 
 1788 | DoubleToString(profit, 2), ", Type=", tradeType);
 1789 | 
 1790 | return true;
 1791 | }
 1792 |

 1799 | };

 1804 | class CMLIntegrationManager
 1805 | {
 1806 | private:
 1807 | CMLPredictionEngine*    m_predictionEngine;
 1808 | bool                    m_mlEnabled;
 1809 | double                  m_mlWeight;        // Weight of ML signals in final decision
 1810 | datetime                m_lastMLUpdate;
 1811 | 
 1812 | public:
 1813 | CMLIntegrationManager()
 1814 | {
 1815 | m_predictionEngine = new CMLPredictionEngine();
 1816 | m_mlEnabled = false;
 1817 | m_mlWeight = 0.3; // 30% weight by default
 1818 | m_lastMLUpdate = 0;
 1819 | }
 1820 | 
 1821 | ~CMLIntegrationManager()
 1822 | {
 1823 | if(m_predictionEngine) delete m_predictionEngine;
 1824 | }
 1825 | 
 1826 | // 🎯 PRIORITY 4: Initialize ML integration
 1827 | bool Initialize(string apiEndpoint = "", string apiKey = "")
 1828 | {
 1829 | if(m_predictionEngine)
 1830 | {
 1831 | bool result = m_predictionEngine.Initialize(apiEndpoint, apiKey);
 1832 | if(result)
 1833 | {
 1834 | m_mlEnabled = true;
 1835 | Print("[🚀 ML_INTEGRATION] ML system fully initialized");
 1836 | return true;
 1837 | }
 1838 | }
 1839 | 
 1840 | Print("[⚠️ ML_INTEGRATION] ML system initialization failed - running without ML");
 1841 | return false;
 1842 | }
 1843 | 
 1844 | // 🎯 PRIORITY 4: Get ML-enhanced signal
 1845 | double GetMLEnhancedSignal(double traditionalSignal, string symbol)
 1846 | {
 1847 | if(!m_mlEnabled || !m_predictionEngine) 
 1848 | {
 1849 | return traditionalSignal; // Return traditional signal if ML disabled
 1850 | }
 1851 | 
 1852 | // Get ML prediction
 1853 | MLPrediction mlPrediction = m_predictionEngine.GeneratePrediction(symbol);
 1854 | 
 1855 | // Convert ML prediction to signal value
 1856 | double mlSignal = 0.0;
 1857 | if(mlPrediction.signal_type == 1) // BUY
 1858 | {
 1859 | mlSignal = mlPrediction.confidence;
 1860 | }
 1861 | else if(mlPrediction.signal_type == 2) // SELL
 1862 | {
 1863 | mlSignal = -mlPrediction.confidence;
 1864 | }
 1865 | 
 1866 | // Combine traditional and ML signals
 1867 | double enhancedSignal = traditionalSignal * (1.0 - m_mlWeight) + mlSignal * m_mlWeight;
 1868 | 
 1869 | m_lastMLUpdate = TimeCurrent();
 1870 | 
 1871 | Print(StringFormat("[🤖 ML_ENHANCE] Traditional: %.3f, ML: %.3f, Enhanced: %.3f", 
 1872 | traditionalSignal, mlSignal, enhancedSignal));
 1873 | 
 1874 | return enhancedSignal;
 1875 | }
 1876 | 
 1877 | // 🎯 PRIORITY 4: Send trade result for ML training
 1878 | void SendTradeResult(double profit, int tradeType)
 1879 | {
 1880 | if(!m_mlEnabled || !m_predictionEngine) return;
 1881 | 
 1882 | // Get last features and send for training
 1883 | CMLFeatureExtractor* extractor = m_predictionEngine.GetFeatureExtractor();
 1884 | if(extractor)
 1885 | {
 1886 | MLFeatureData features = extractor.GetLastFeatures();
 1887 | m_predictionEngine.TrainWithTradeResult(features, profit, tradeType);
 1888 | }
 1889 | }
 1890 | 
 1891 | // Getters and setters
 1892 | bool IsMLEnabled() { return m_mlEnabled; }
 1893 | void SetMLWeight(double weight) { m_mlWeight = MathMax(0.0, MathMin(1.0, weight)); }
 1894 | double GetMLWeight() { return m_mlWeight; }
 1895 | CMLPredictionEngine* GetPredictionEngine() { return m_predictionEngine; }
 1896 | 
 1897 | // 🎯 PRIORITY 4: Get ML system status
 1898 | string GetMLSystemStatus()
 1899 | {
 1900 | string status = "🤖 ML SYSTEM STATUS:\n";
 1901 | status += "================================\n";
 1902 | status += StringFormat("ML Enabled: %s\n", m_mlEnabled ? "YES" : "NO");
 1903 | status += StringFormat("ML Weight: %.1f%%\n", m_mlWeight * 100);
 1904 | 
 1905 | if(m_predictionEngine)
 1906 | {
 1907 | status += StringFormat("Model Loaded: %s\n", m_predictionEngine.IsModelLoaded() ? "YES" : "NO");
 1908 | status += StringFormat("Model Version: %s\n", m_predictionEngine.GetModelVersion());
 1909 | status += StringFormat("Model Accuracy: %.1f%%\n", m_predictionEngine.GetModelAccuracy() * 100);
 1910 | 
 1911 | CExternalAPIManager* apiMgr = m_predictionEngine.GetAPIManager();
 1912 | if(apiMgr)
 1913 | {
 1914 | status += StringFormat("API Enabled: %s\n", apiMgr.IsAPIEnabled() ? "YES" : "NO");
 1915 | status += StringFormat("Last API Call: %s\n", TimeToString(apiMgr.GetLastCallTime(), TIME_MINUTES));
 1916 | }
 1917 | }
 1918 | 
 1919 | status += StringFormat("Last ML Update: %s\n", TimeToString(m_lastMLUpdate, TIME_MINUTES));
 1920 | 
 1921 | return status;
 1922 | }
 1923 | };

  158 |     }

  161 |     for(int i = 0; i < 5; i++) {

  164 |         m_currentWeights[i] = 0.0;
  165 |     }

  168 |     m_assetMetrics[0].assetType = ASSET_FOREX;
  169 |     m_assetMetrics[0].assetName = "Foreign Exchange";
  170 |     m_assetMetrics[1].assetType = ASSET_COMMODITY;
  171 |     m_assetMetrics[1].assetName = "Commodities";
  172 |     m_assetMetrics[2].assetType = ASSET_CRYPTO;
  173 |     m_assetMetrics[2].assetName = "Cryptocurrencies";
  174 |     m_assetMetrics[3].assetType = ASSET_INDEX;
  175 |     m_assetMetrics[3].assetName = "Stock Indices";
  176 |     m_assetMetrics[4].assetType = ASSET_BOND;
  177 |     m_assetMetrics[4].assetName = "Bonds";
  178 |

  180 |     m_portfolioMetrics.Reset();
  181 |

  183 |     m_blackSwanDetector = new CBlackSwanDetector();
  184 |     m_circuitBreaker = new CCircuitBreaker();
  185 |     m_correlationHeatMap = new CCorrelationHeatMapManager();

  189 |     // m_stressTestEngine = NULL; // TODO: Initialize when implemented

  191 |     // Default configuration
  192 |     m_maxPortfolioRisk = 0.02;          // 2% max portfolio risk
  193 |     m_maxAssetClassRisk = 0.008;        // 0.8% max per asset class
  194 |     m_maxCorrelationRisk = 0.7;         // 70% max correlation
  195 |     m_targetDiversification = 0.8;      // 80% diversification target
  196 |     
  197 |     // Enable all features by default
  198 |     m_riskLimitsEnabled = true;
  199 |     m_correlationFilterEnabled = true;
  200 |     m_rebalancingEnabled = true;
  201 |     
  202 |     // Initialize performance tracking

  204 |     m_winningTrades = 0;

  239 | // Initialization
  240 | bool Initialize(double maxPortfolioRisk = 0.02, 
  241 |                double maxAssetRisk = 0.008,
  242 |                double maxCorrelationRisk = 0.7) {
  243 |     // m_stressTestEngine = new CStressTestEngine(); // TODO: Implement CStressTestEngine class
  244 |     m_maxPortfolioRisk = MathMax(0.005, MathMin(0.05, maxPortfolioRisk));
  245 |     m_maxAssetClassRisk = MathMax(0.002, MathMin(0.02, maxAssetRisk));
  246 |     m_maxCorrelationRisk = MathMax(0.3, MathMin(1.0, maxCorrelationRisk));
  247 |     
  248 |     // Initialize risk management components
  249 |     if(m_blackSwanDetector != NULL) {
  250 |         if(!m_blackSwanDetector.Initialize(0.02, 0.008, 0.7)) {
  251 |             Print("[🎯 MULTI-ASSET] ERROR: Failed to initialize Black Swan Detector");
  252 |             return false;
  253 |         }
  254 |     }
  255 |     
  256 |     if(m_circuitBreaker != NULL) {
  257 |         if(!m_circuitBreaker.Initialize()) {
  258 |             Print("[🎯 MULTI-ASSET] ERROR: Failed to initialize Circuit Breaker");
  259 |             return false;
  260 |         }
  261 |     }
  262 |     
  263 |     if(m_correlationHeatMap != NULL) {
  264 |         if(!m_correlationHeatMap.Initialize(0.7)) {
  265 |             Print("[🎯 MULTI-ASSET] ERROR: Failed to initialize Correlation Heat Map");
  266 |             return false;
  267 |         }
  268 |     }
  269 |     
  270 |     // Initialize portfolio metrics
  271 | UpdatePortfolioMetrics(0.02, 0.008);
  272 |     
  273 |     Print(StringFormat("[🎯 MULTI-ASSET] Portfolio Manager initialized - Max Risk: %.1f%%, Max Asset Risk: %.1f%%, Max Correlation: %.1f%%",
  274 |           m_maxPortfolioRisk * 100, m_maxAssetClassRisk * 100, m_maxCorrelationRisk * 100));
  275 |     Print("[🎯 MULTI-ASSET] Crisis protection systems: ACTIVE");
  276 |     
  277 |     return true;
  278 | }
  279 |

  281 | // This section was causing duplicate member function errors and has been removed

   14 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   15 | //| ðŸš€ BOSS FIX: Indicator Cache Structure to Prevent Memory Leaks  |
   16 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   17 | struct SIndicatorCache
   18 | {
   19 | string  key;            // Unique identifier (symbol_period_timeframe)
   20 | int     handle;         // Indicator handle
   21 | datetime lastUsed;      // Last access time for cleanup
   22 | int     referenceCount; // Number of active references
   23 | 
   24 | void Reset() {
   25 | key = "";
   26 | handle = INVALID_HANDLE;
   27 | lastUsed = 0;
   28 | referenceCount = 0;
   29 | }
   30 | };
   31 | 
   32 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   33 | //| ðŸŽ¯ INDICATOR CACHE MANAGER - MEMORY LEAK PREVENTION            |
   34 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   35 | class CIndicatorCacheManager
   36 | {
   37 | private:
   38 | SIndicatorCache m_cache[100];  // Cache for up to 100 indicators
   39 | int             m_cacheCount;
   40 | datetime        m_lastCleanup;
   41 | 
   42 | // Constants
   43 | enum { CLEANUP_INTERVAL = 3600 }; // 1 hour
   44 | 
   45 | public:
   46 | CIndicatorCacheManager() : m_cacheCount(0), m_lastCleanup(TimeCurrent()) {}
   47 | 
   48 | ~CIndicatorCacheManager() { CleanupAll(); }
   49 | 
   50 | // ðŸŽ¯ Get or create MA handle with caching
   51 | int GetMAHandle(string symbol, ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe, int period, 
   52 | int shift, ENUM_MA_METHOD method, ENUM_APPLIED_PRICE price)
   53 | {
   54 | string key = StringFormat("MA_%s_%d_%d_%d_%d_%d", symbol, timeframe, period, shift, method, price);
   55 | return GetOrCreateHandle(key, symbol, timeframe, period, shift, method, price);
   56 | }
   57 | 
   58 | // ðŸŽ¯ Get or create RSI handle with caching
   59 | int GetRSIHandle(string symbol, ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe, int period, ENUM_APPLIED_PRICE price)
   60 | {
   61 | string key = StringFormat("RSI_%s_%d_%d_%d", symbol, timeframe, period, price);
   62 | 
   63 | // Find existing handle
   64 | for(int i = 0; i < m_cacheCount; i++) {
   65 | if(m_cache[i].key == key) {
   66 | m_cache[i].lastUsed = TimeCurrent();
   67 | m_cache[i].referenceCount++;
   68 | return m_cache[i].handle;
   69 | }
   70 | }
   71 | 
   72 | // Create new handle
   73 | int handle = iRSI(symbol, timeframe, period, price);
   74 | if(handle != INVALID_HANDLE && m_cacheCount < 100) {
   75 | m_cache[m_cacheCount].key = key;
   76 | m_cache[m_cacheCount].handle = handle;
   77 | m_cache[m_cacheCount].lastUsed = TimeCurrent();
   78 | m_cache[m_cacheCount].referenceCount = 1;
   79 | m_cacheCount++;
   80 | }
   81 | 
   82 | return handle;
   83 | }
   84 | 
   85 | // ðŸŽ¯ Release handle reference
   86 | void ReleaseHandle(int handle)
   87 | {
   88 | for(int i = 0; i < m_cacheCount; i++) {
   89 | if(m_cache[i].handle == handle) {
   90 | m_cache[i].referenceCount = MathMax(0, m_cache[i].referenceCount - 1);
   91 | break;
   92 | }
   93 | }
   94 | 
   95 | // Periodic cleanup check
   96 | if(TimeCurrent() - m_lastCleanup > CLEANUP_INTERVAL) {
   97 | PerformCleanup();
   98 | }
   99 | }
  100 | 
  101 | private:
  102 | int GetOrCreateHandle(string key, string symbol, ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe, 
  103 | int period, int shift, ENUM_MA_METHOD method, ENUM_APPLIED_PRICE price)
  104 | {
  105 | // Find existing handle
  106 | for(int i = 0; i < m_cacheCount; i++) {
  107 | if(m_cache[i].key == key) {
  108 | m_cache[i].lastUsed = TimeCurrent();
  109 | m_cache[i].referenceCount++;
  110 | return m_cache[i].handle;
  111 | }
  112 | }
  113 | 
  114 | // Create new handle
  115 | int handle = iMA(symbol, timeframe, period, shift, method, price);
  116 | if(handle != INVALID_HANDLE && m_cacheCount < 100) {
  117 | m_cache[m_cacheCount].key = key;
  118 | m_cache[m_cacheCount].handle = handle;
  119 | m_cache[m_cacheCount].lastUsed = TimeCurrent();
  120 | m_cache[m_cacheCount].referenceCount = 1;
  121 | m_cacheCount++;
  122 | 
  123 | Print(StringFormat("ðŸŽ¯ [CACHE] Created handle for %s (Total: %d)", key, m_cacheCount));
  124 | }
  125 | 
  126 | return handle;
  127 | }
  128 | 
  129 | void PerformCleanup()
  130 | {
  131 | datetime cutoffTime = TimeCurrent() - 1800; // 30 minutes
  132 | int originalCount = m_cacheCount;
  133 | 
  134 | for(int i = m_cacheCount - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
  135 | if(m_cache[i].lastUsed < cutoffTime && m_cache[i].referenceCount == 0) {
  136 | IndicatorRelease(m_cache[i].handle);
  137 | 
  138 | // Shift array elements
  139 | for(int j = i; j < m_cacheCount - 1; j++) {
  140 | m_cache[j] = m_cache[j + 1];
  141 | }
  142 | m_cacheCount--;
  143 | }
  144 | }
  145 | 
  146 | m_lastCleanup = TimeCurrent();
  147 | 
  148 | if(originalCount != m_cacheCount) {
  149 | Print(StringFormat("ðŸ§¹ [CACHE CLEANUP] Released %d unused handles (Active: %d)", 
  150 | originalCount - m_cacheCount, m_cacheCount));
  151 | }
  152 | }
  153 | 
  154 | void CleanupAll()
  155 | {
  156 | for(int i = 0; i < m_cacheCount; i++) {
  157 | IndicatorRelease(m_cache[i].handle);
  158 | }
  159 | m_cacheCount = 0;
  160 | Print("ðŸ§¹ [CACHE] All handles released on cleanup");
  161 | }
  162 | };
  163 | 
  164 | // Global cache instance
  165 | CIndicatorCacheManager* g_IndicatorCache;
  166 | 
  167 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  168 | //| ðŸŽ¯ PERFORMANCE HELPER FUNCTIONS                                 |
  169 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  170 | 
  171 | // ðŸš€ BOSS FIX: Safe MA handle getter with caching
  172 | int GetCachedMAHandle(string symbol, ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe, int period, 
  173 | ENUM_MA_METHOD method = MODE_EMA, ENUM_APPLIED_PRICE price = PRICE_CLOSE)
  174 | {
  175 | if(g_IndicatorCache == NULL) {
  176 | g_IndicatorCache = new CIndicatorCacheManager();
  177 | }
  178 | 
  179 | return g_IndicatorCache.GetMAHandle(symbol, timeframe, period, 0, method, price);
  180 | }
  181 | 
  182 | // ðŸš€ BOSS FIX: Safe RSI handle getter with caching
  183 | int GetCachedRSIHandle(string symbol, ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe, int period, 
  184 | ENUM_APPLIED_PRICE price = PRICE_CLOSE)
  185 | {
  186 | if(g_IndicatorCache == NULL) {
  187 | g_IndicatorCache = new CIndicatorCacheManager();
  188 | }
  189 | 
  190 | return g_IndicatorCache.GetRSIHandle(symbol, timeframe, period, price);
  191 | }
  192 | 
  193 | // ðŸš€ BOSS FIX: Safe handle release
  194 | void ReleaseCachedHandle(int handle)
  195 | {
  196 | if(g_IndicatorCache != NULL) {
  197 | g_IndicatorCache.ReleaseHandle(handle);
  198 | }
  199 | }
  200 | 
  201 | // ðŸš€ BOSS FIX: Initialize cache system
  202 | void InitializeIndicatorCache()
  203 | {
  204 | if(g_IndicatorCache == NULL) {
  205 | g_IndicatorCache = new CIndicatorCacheManager();
  206 | Print("ðŸŽ¯ [PERFORMANCE] Indicator cache manager initialized");
  207 | }
  208 | }
  209 | 
  210 | // ðŸš€ BOSS FIX: Cleanup cache system
  211 | void DeinitializeIndicatorCache()
  212 | {
  213 | if(g_IndicatorCache != NULL) {
  214 | delete g_IndicatorCache;
  215 | g_IndicatorCache = NULL;
  216 | Print("ðŸ§¹ [PERFORMANCE] Indicator cache manager cleaned up");
  217 | }
  218 | }

  249 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  250 | //| Performance Optimization Manager                                  |
  251 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  252 | class CPerformanceOptimizer
  253 | {
  254 | private:
  255 | // Performance tracking
  256 | SPerformanceMetrics     m_metrics;
  257 | ENUM_PERFORMANCE_MODE   m_currentMode;
  258 | 
  259 | // Monitoring data
  260 | uint                    m_tickTimes[100];
  261 | int                     m_timeIndex;
  262 | datetime                m_lastOptimization;
  263 | bool                    m_initialized;
  264 | 
  265 | // Performance thresholds
  266 | double                  m_maxCpuUsage;
  267 | uint                    m_maxLatency;
  268 | 
  269 | // Cache management
  270 | bool                    m_cacheEnabled;
  271 | datetime                m_lastCacheClean;
  272 | 
  273 | public:
  274 | // Constructor
  275 | CPerformanceOptimizer()
  276 | {
  277 | m_metrics.Reset();
  278 | m_currentMode = MODE_BALANCED;
  279 | m_timeIndex = 0;
  280 | m_lastOptimization = 0;
  281 | m_initialized = false;
  282 | m_maxCpuUsage = 15.0; // Target: <15% CPU
  283 | m_maxLatency = 50;    // Target: <50ms latency
  284 | m_cacheEnabled = true;
  285 | m_lastCacheClean = 0;
  286 | 
  287 | // Initialize tick times array
  288 | ArrayInitialize(m_tickTimes, 0);
  289 | }
  290 | 
  291 | // Destructor
  292 | ~CPerformanceOptimizer() {}
  293 | 
  294 | // Initialization
  295 | bool Initialize()
  296 | {
  297 | m_initialized = true;
  298 | m_lastOptimization = TimeCurrent();
  299 | m_lastCacheClean = TimeCurrent();
  300 | return true;
  301 | }
  302 | 
  303 | // Performance monitoring
  304 | void StartPerformanceMonitoring(string operation)
  305 | {
  306 | // Implementation would start timer for operation
  307 | // For now, just placeholder
  308 | }
  309 | 
  310 | void EndPerformanceMonitoring()
  311 | {
  312 | // Implementation would end timer and record metrics
  313 | // For now, update with estimated values
  314 | UpdateMetrics();
  315 | }
  316 | 
  317 | // Check if system should process current tick
  318 | bool ShouldProcessCurrentTick()
  319 | {
  320 | if(!m_initialized) return true;
  321 | 
  322 | // Skip processing based on performance mode
  323 | static int tickCount = 0;
  324 | tickCount++;
  325 | 
  326 | switch(m_currentMode)
  327 | {
  328 | case MODE_CONSERVATIVE:
  329 | return (tickCount % 3 == 0); // Process every 3rd tick
  330 | case MODE_BALANCED:
  331 | return (tickCount % 2 == 0); // Process every 2nd tick
  332 | case MODE_AGGRESSIVE:
  333 | case MODE_MAXIMUM:
  334 | return true; // Process every tick
  335 | default:
  336 | return true;
  337 | }
  338 | }
  339 | 
  340 | // Get optimal performance mode
  341 | ENUM_PERFORMANCE_MODE GetOptimalMode()
  342 | {
  343 | if(!m_initialized) return MODE_BALANCED;
  344 | 
  345 | // Determine optimal mode based on current performance
  346 | if(m_metrics.cpuUsagePercent > 20.0)
  347 | return MODE_CONSERVATIVE;
  348 | else if(m_metrics.cpuUsagePercent > 10.0)
  349 | return MODE_BALANCED;
  350 | else
  351 | return MODE_AGGRESSIVE;
  352 | }
  353 | 
  354 | // Set performance mode
  355 | void SetPerformanceMode(ENUM_PERFORMANCE_MODE mode)
  356 | {
  357 | m_currentMode = mode;
  358 | Print("Performance mode changed to: ", PerformanceModeToString(mode));
  359 | }
  360 | 
  361 | // Perform system maintenance
  362 | void PerformMaintenance()
  363 | {
  364 | if(!m_initialized) return;
  365 | 
  366 | datetime currentTime = TimeCurrent();
  367 | 
  368 | // Clean cache every 5 minutes
  369 | if(m_cacheEnabled && currentTime - m_lastCacheClean >= 300)
  370 | {
  371 | CleanCache();
  372 | m_lastCacheClean = currentTime;
  373 | }
  374 | 
  375 | // Optimize performance every minute
  376 | if(currentTime - m_lastOptimization >= 60)
  377 | {
  378 | OptimizePerformance();
  379 | m_lastOptimization = currentTime;
  380 | }
  381 | }
  382 | 
  383 | // Get current metrics
  384 | SPerformanceMetrics GetMetrics() const { return m_metrics; }
  385 | 
  386 | // Get performance report
  387 | string GetPerformanceReport()
  388 | {
  389 | return StringFormat("Performance Report:\n%s\nMode: %s\nCache: %s",
  390 | m_metrics.GetReport(),
  391 | PerformanceModeToString(m_currentMode),
  392 | m_cacheEnabled ? "Enabled" : "Disabled");
  393 | }
  394 | 
  395 | // Check if system is performing optimally
  396 | bool IsOptimalPerformance() const
  397 | {
  398 | return m_metrics.cpuUsagePercent < m_maxCpuUsage && 
  399 | m_metrics.averageLatency < m_maxLatency;
  400 | }
  401 | 
  402 | // ðŸ”§ ADDED: Missing ReportError method
  403 | void ReportError(string error)
  404 | {
  405 | Print("ðŸ”´ Performance Error: ", error);
  406 | 
  407 | // Degrade performance metrics when errors occur
  408 | m_metrics.cpuUsagePercent += 2.0; // Increase CPU usage due to error handling
  409 | m_metrics.averageLatency += 5;    // Increase latency due to error processing
  410 | 
  411 | // Check if should switch to conservative mode
  412 | if(m_metrics.cpuUsagePercent > 25.0)
  413 | {
  414 | SetPerformanceMode(MODE_CONSERVATIVE);
  415 | }
  416 | }
  417 | 
  418 | // ðŸ”§ ADDED: Missing UpdateMarketVolatility method
  419 | void UpdateMarketVolatility(double volatilityLevel)
  420 | {
  421 | // Adjust performance based on market volatility
  422 | if(volatilityLevel > 0.8) // High volatility
  423 | {
  424 | m_maxCpuUsage = 20.0; // Increase CPU threshold during volatile periods
  425 | m_maxLatency = 75;    // Allow higher latency during high volatility
  426 | }
  427 | else if(volatilityLevel < 0.3) // Low volatility
  428 | {
  429 | m_maxCpuUsage = 10.0; // Tighter CPU control during calm periods
  430 | m_maxLatency = 30;    // Lower latency requirements
  431 | }
  432 | else // Normal volatility
  433 | {
  434 | m_maxCpuUsage = 15.0; // Standard CPU threshold
  435 | m_maxLatency = 50;    // Standard latency threshold
  436 | }
  437 | }
  438 | 
  439 | private:
  440 | // Update performance metrics
  441 | void UpdateMetrics()
  442 | {
  443 | // Simulate CPU usage calculation
  444 | m_metrics.cpuUsagePercent = CalculateEstimatedCPU();
  445 | 
  446 | // Update average latency
  447 | m_metrics.averageLatency = CalculateAverageLatency();
  448 | 
  449 | // Update overall rating
  450 | m_metrics.overallRating = CalculatePerformanceRating();
  451 | 
  452 | // Check if optimal
  453 | m_metrics.isOptimal = IsOptimalPerformance();
  454 | 
  455 | m_metrics.lastUpdate = TimeCurrent();
  456 | }
  457 | 
  458 | // Estimate CPU usage
  459 | double CalculateEstimatedCPU()
  460 | {
  461 | // Simple estimation based on processing complexity
  462 | double baseCPU = 8.0; // Base system usage
  463 | 
  464 | // Add overhead based on current mode
  465 | switch(m_currentMode)
  466 | {
  467 | case MODE_MAXIMUM:
  468 | baseCPU += 6.0;
  469 | break;
  470 | case MODE_AGGRESSIVE:
  471 | baseCPU += 4.0;
  472 | break;
  473 | case MODE_BALANCED:
  474 | baseCPU += 2.0;
  475 | break;
  476 | case MODE_CONSERVATIVE:
  477 | baseCPU += 1.0;
  478 | break;
  479 | }
  480 | 
  481 | return MathMin(95.0, baseCPU + (MathRand() % 100) / 100.0);
  482 | }
  483 | 
  484 | // Calculate average latency
  485 | uint CalculateAverageLatency()
  486 | {
  487 | uint totalTime = 0;
  488 | int count = 0;
  489 | 
  490 | for(int i = 0; i < 100; i++)
  491 | {
  492 | if(m_tickTimes[i] > 0)
  493 | {
  494 | totalTime += m_tickTimes[i];
  495 | count++;
  496 | }
  497 | }
  498 | 
  499 | return count > 0 ? totalTime / count : 25; // Default 25ms
  500 | }
  501 | 
  502 | // Calculate performance rating
  503 | ENUM_PERFORMANCE_RATING CalculatePerformanceRating()
  504 | {
  505 | if(m_metrics.cpuUsagePercent < 10.0 && m_metrics.averageLatency < 30)
  506 | return PERFORMANCE_EXCELLENT;
  507 | else if(m_metrics.cpuUsagePercent < 15.0 && m_metrics.averageLatency < 50)
  508 | return PERFORMANCE_GOOD;
  509 | else if(m_metrics.cpuUsagePercent < 25.0 && m_metrics.averageLatency < 100)
  510 | return PERFORMANCE_AVERAGE;
  511 | else if(m_metrics.cpuUsagePercent < 40.0)
  512 | return PERFORMANCE_BELOW_AVERAGE;
  513 | else
  514 | return PERFORMANCE_POOR;
  515 | }
  516 | 
  517 | // Optimize system performance
  518 | void OptimizePerformance()
  519 | {
  520 | // Auto-adjust mode based on performance
  521 | ENUM_PERFORMANCE_MODE optimalMode = GetOptimalMode();
  522 | if(optimalMode != m_currentMode)
  523 | {
  524 | SetPerformanceMode(optimalMode);
  525 | }
  526 | 
  527 | // Enable/disable cache based on memory usage
  528 | if(m_metrics.cpuUsagePercent > 20.0 && m_cacheEnabled)
  529 | {
  530 | m_cacheEnabled = false;
  531 | Print("Cache disabled due to high CPU usage");
  532 | }
  533 | else if(m_metrics.cpuUsagePercent < 10.0 && !m_cacheEnabled)
  534 | {
  535 | m_cacheEnabled = true;
  536 | Print("Cache re-enabled due to low CPU usage");
  537 | }
  538 | }
  539 | 
  540 | // Clean system cache
  541 | void CleanCache()
  542 | {
  543 | if(!m_cacheEnabled) return;
  544 | 
  545 | // Placeholder for cache cleaning logic
  546 | Print("Performance cache cleaned");
  547 | }
  548 | 
  549 | // Record tick processing time
  550 | void RecordTickTime(uint processingTime)
  551 | {
  552 | m_tickTimes[m_timeIndex] = processingTime;
  553 | m_timeIndex = (m_timeIndex + 1) % 100;
  554 | }
  555 | };
  556 | 
  557 | // Global performance optimizer instance
  558 | CPerformanceOptimizer* g_PerformanceOptimizer;
  559 | 
  560 | // Global helper functions
  561 | void InitializePerformanceOptimizer()
  562 | {
  563 | if(g_PerformanceOptimizer == NULL)
  564 | {
  565 | g_PerformanceOptimizer = new CPerformanceOptimizer();
  566 | g_PerformanceOptimizer.Initialize();
  567 | }
  568 | }
  569 | 
  570 | void CleanupPerformanceOptimizer()
  571 | {
  572 | if(g_PerformanceOptimizer != NULL)
  573 | {
  574 | delete g_PerformanceOptimizer;
  575 | g_PerformanceOptimizer = NULL;
  576 | }
  577 | }
  578 | 
  579 | // NOTE: Performance monitoring functions moved to Performance_System_Unified.mqh
  580 | // to avoid duplicate function definitions
  581 | 
  582 | void EndPerformanceMonitoring()
  583 | {
  584 | if(g_PerformanceOptimizer != NULL)
  585 | g_PerformanceOptimizer.EndPerformanceMonitoring();
  586 | }
  587 | 
  588 | // NOTE: ShouldProcessCurrentTick() moved to Performance_System_Unified.mqh
  589 | // to avoid duplicate function definitions
  590 | // bool ShouldProcessCurrentTick() - REMOVED to prevent conflicts
  591 |

   47 | bool latencyOptimized;            // Latency optimization active

   96 | averageLatency, averageLatency < 5.0 ? "✅" : "🔴",

   99 | ticksProcessed, ticksSkipped,
  100 | stabilityScore * 100, errorCount,
  101 | emergencyMode ? "🚨 EMERGENCY" : "🟢 OPTIMAL"
  102 | );

  106 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  107 | //| 🚀 PHASE 3 PERFORMANCE OPTIMIZER CLASS                          |
  108 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  109 | class CPhase3PerformanceOptimizer
  110 | {
  111 | private:
  112 | // Performance tracking
  113 | SPhase3PerformanceMetrics m_metrics;
  114 | static CPhase3PerformanceOptimizer* m_instance;
  115 | 
  116 | // Timing system
  117 | uint m_tickStartTime;
  118 | uint m_executionTimes[100];        // Rolling execution time buffer
  119 | int m_executionTimeIndex;
  120 | 
  121 | // CPU optimization
  122 | bool m_cpuOptimizationActive;
  123 | int m_tickThrottleCount;
  124 | int m_tickThrottleLimit;
  125 | double m_cpuThreshold;
  126 | 
  127 | // Memory optimization 
  128 | bool m_memoryOptimizationActive;
  129 | int m_memoryCleanupCounter;
  130 | int m_memoryCleanupInterval;
  131 | double m_memoryThreshold;
  132 | 
  133 | // Latency optimization
  134 | bool m_latencyOptimizationActive;
  135 | bool m_adaptiveProcessing;
  136 | double m_latencyThreshold;
  137 | int m_priorityQueue[1000];
  138 | int m_queueSize;
  139 |

  142 | int m_emergencyCounter;
  143 | int m_emergencyThreshold;
  144 | 
  145 | public:
  146 | CPhase3PerformanceOptimizer()
  147 | {
  148 | m_metrics.Reset();
  149 | m_tickStartTime = 0;
  150 | m_executionTimeIndex = 0;
  151 | 
  152 | // Initialize optimization settings
  153 | m_cpuOptimizationActive = true;
  154 | m_tickThrottleCount = 0;
  155 | m_tickThrottleLimit = 3;       // Skip every 3rd tick if CPU high
  156 | m_cpuThreshold = 15.0;         // 15% CPU threshold
  157 | 
  158 | m_memoryOptimizationActive = true;
  159 | m_memoryCleanupCounter = 0;
  160 | m_memoryCleanupInterval = 300; // Cleanup every 300 ticks (5 minutes)
  161 | m_memoryThreshold = 90.0;      // 90% memory efficiency threshold
  162 | 
  163 | m_latencyOptimizationActive = true;
  164 | m_adaptiveProcessing = true;
  165 | m_latencyThreshold = 5.0;      // 5ms latency threshold
  166 | m_queueSize = 0;
  167 | 
  168 | m_emergencyActivated = false;
  169 | m_emergencyCounter = 0;
  170 | m_emergencyThreshold = 10;     // 10 consecutive failures trigger emergency
  171 | 
  172 | // Initialize execution times array
  173 | ArrayInitialize(m_executionTimes, 0);
  174 | ArrayInitialize(m_priorityQueue, 0);
  175 | 
  176 | Print("✅ [PHASE 3] Performance Optimizer initialized with aggressive targets");
  177 | Print("🎯 Targets: CPU <15%, Latency <5ms, Memory >90%");
  178 | }
  179 | 
  180 | ~CPhase3PerformanceOptimizer()
  181 | {
  182 | Print("🧹 [PHASE 3] Performance Optimizer cleanup completed");
  183 | }
  184 | 
  185 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  186 | //| 🎯 SINGLETON PATTERN ACCESS                                      |
  187 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  188 | static CPhase3PerformanceOptimizer* GetInstance()
  189 | {
  190 | if(m_instance == NULL) {
  191 | m_instance = new CPhase3PerformanceOptimizer();
  192 | }
  193 | return m_instance;
  194 | }
  195 |

  197 | {

  203 | 
  204 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  205 | //| 🚀 MAIN OPTIMIZATION ENTRY POINT                                |
  206 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  207 | bool OptimizePerformance()
  208 | {
  209 | // Start performance measurement
  210 | m_tickStartTime = GetTickCount();
  211 | 
  212 | // Update current metrics
  213 | UpdatePerformanceMetrics();
  214 | 
  215 | // Apply optimizations based on current state
  216 | bool optimizationSuccess = true;
  217 | 
  218 | // 1. CPU Optimization
  219 | if(m_cpuOptimizationActive) {
  220 | optimizationSuccess &= OptimizeCPUUsage();
  221 | }
  222 | 
  223 | // 2. Memory Optimization  
  224 | if(m_memoryOptimizationActive) {
  225 | optimizationSuccess &= OptimizeMemoryUsage();
  226 | }
  227 | 
  228 | // 3. Latency Optimization
  229 | if(m_latencyOptimizationActive) {
  230 | optimizationSuccess &= OptimizeLatency();
  231 | }
  232 | 
  233 | // 4. Emergency Management
  234 | if(m_emergencyActivated) {
  235 | optimizationSuccess &= HandleEmergencyMode();
  236 | }
  237 | 
  238 | // Record execution time
  239 | RecordExecutionTime();
  240 | 
  241 | // Update final metrics
  242 | m_metrics.lastUpdate = TimeCurrent();
  243 | 
  244 | return optimizationSuccess;
  245 | }
  246 | 
  247 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  248 | //| 🎯 CPU OPTIMIZATION SYSTEM                                       |
  249 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  250 | bool OptimizeCPUUsage()
  251 | {
  252 | // Calculate current CPU usage estimate
  253 | double estimatedCPU = CalculateEstimatedCPUUsage();
  254 | m_metrics.cpuUsagePercent = estimatedCPU;
  255 | 
  256 | // Check if CPU optimization needed
  257 | if(estimatedCPU > m_cpuThreshold) {
  258 | // Apply CPU optimization strategies
  259 | 
  260 | // Strategy 1: Tick throttling
  261 | m_tickThrottleCount++;
  262 | if(m_tickThrottleCount >= m_tickThrottleLimit) {
  263 | m_tickThrottleCount = 0;
  264 | m_metrics.ticksSkipped++;
  265 | Print(StringFormat("⚡ [PHASE 3 CPU] Tick skipped for optimization - CPU: %.1f%%", estimatedCPU));
  266 | return false; // Skip this tick
  267 | }
  268 | 
  269 | // Strategy 2: Reduce calculation precision for non-critical operations
  270 | SetCalculationPrecision(PRECISION_FAST);
  271 | 
  272 | // Strategy 3: Enable emergency mode if critical
  273 | if(estimatedCPU > m_cpuThreshold * 1.5) {
  274 | ActivateEmergencyMode("High CPU usage detected");
  275 | }
  276 | }
  277 | else {
  278 | // CPU usage acceptable, restore normal precision
  279 | SetCalculationPrecision(PRECISION_NORMAL);
  280 | m_metrics.cpuOptimized = true;
  281 | }
  282 | 
  283 | return true;
  284 | }
  285 | 
  286 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  287 | //| 💾 MEMORY OPTIMIZATION SYSTEM                                    |
  288 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  289 | bool OptimizeMemoryUsage()
  290 | {
  291 | // Periodic memory cleanup
  292 | m_memoryCleanupCounter++;
  293 | if(m_memoryCleanupCounter >= m_memoryCleanupInterval) {
  294 | m_memoryCleanupCounter = 0;
  295 | 
  296 | // Force garbage collection
  297 | PerformMemoryCleanup();
  298 | 
  299 | // Update memory metrics
  300 | UpdateMemoryMetrics();
  301 | 
  302 | Print(StringFormat("🧹 [PHASE 3 MEMORY] Cleanup completed - Efficiency: %.1f%%", m_metrics.memoryEfficiency));
  303 | }
  304 | 
  305 | // Check memory efficiency
  306 | if(m_metrics.memoryEfficiency < m_memoryThreshold) {
  307 | // Apply memory optimization strategies
  308 | 
  309 | // Strategy 1: Clear unnecessary caches
  310 | ClearNonEssentialCaches();
  311 | 
  312 | // Strategy 2: Reduce buffer sizes for non-critical operations
  313 | OptimizeBufferSizes();
  314 | 
  315 | // Strategy 3: Emergency cleanup if critical
  316 | if(m_metrics.memoryEfficiency < m_memoryThreshold * 0.8) {
  317 | ActivateEmergencyMode("Low memory efficiency detected");
  318 | }
  319 | }
  320 | else {
  321 | m_metrics.memoryOptimized = true;
  322 | }
  323 | 
  324 | return true;
  325 | }
  326 | 
  327 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  328 | //| ⚡ LATENCY OPTIMIZATION SYSTEM                                   |
  329 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  330 | bool OptimizeLatency()
  331 | {
  332 | // Calculate current latency
  333 | double currentLatency = CalculateCurrentLatency();
  334 | m_metrics.averageLatency = currentLatency;
  335 | 
  336 | if(currentLatency > m_latencyThreshold) {
  337 | // Apply latency optimization strategies
  338 | 
  339 | // Strategy 1: Adaptive processing (skip non-critical calculations)
  340 | if(m_adaptiveProcessing) {
  341 | EnableAdaptiveMode();
  342 | }
  343 | 
  344 | // Strategy 2: Prioritize critical operations
  345 | OptimizeOperationPriority();
  346 | 
  347 | // Strategy 3: Emergency mode for extreme latency
  348 | if(currentLatency > m_latencyThreshold * 2.0) {
  349 | ActivateEmergencyMode("High latency detected");
  350 | }
  351 | }
  352 | else {
  353 | m_metrics.latencyOptimized = true;
  354 | }
  355 | 
  356 | return true;
  357 | }
  358 | 
  359 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  360 | //| 🚨 EMERGENCY OPTIMIZATION MODE                                   |
  361 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  362 | bool HandleEmergencyMode()
  363 | {
  364 | if(!m_emergencyActivated) return true;
  365 | 
  366 | Print("🚨 [PHASE 3 EMERGENCY] Emergency optimization mode active");
  367 | 
  368 | // Emergency Strategy 1: Minimal processing mode
  369 | EnableMinimalProcessingMode();
  370 | 
  371 | // Emergency Strategy 2: Clear all non-essential operations
  372 | ClearNonEssentialOperations();
  373 | 
  374 | // Emergency Strategy 3: Reset optimization counters
  375 | ResetOptimizationCounters();
  376 | 
  377 | // Check if emergency can be deactivated
  378 | m_emergencyCounter++;
  379 | if(m_emergencyCounter > 100 && IsSystemStable()) { // After 100 ticks of stable operation
  380 | DeactivateEmergencyMode();
  381 | }
  382 | 
  383 | return true;
  384 | }
  385 | 
  386 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  387 | //| 📊 METRICS AND MONITORING                                       |
  388 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  389 | void UpdatePerformanceMetrics()
  390 | {
  391 | m_metrics.ticksProcessed++;
  392 | 
  393 | // Update system metrics
  394 | m_metrics.systemLoad = CalculateSystemLoad();
  395 | m_metrics.stabilityScore = CalculateStabilityScore();
  396 | 
  397 | // Update cache metrics from unified indicator manager
  398 | CUnifiedIndicatorManager* manager = CUnifiedIndicatorManager::GetInstance();
  399 | if(manager != NULL) {
  400 | m_metrics.cacheHitRate = manager.GetCacheHitRate() * 100.0;
  401 | // FIXED: Use available functions instead of missing ones
  402 | m_metrics.activeHandles = 50; // Placeholder - manager should provide this
  403 | m_metrics.cachedHandles = 25; // Placeholder - manager should provide this
  404 | }
  405 | }
  406 | 
  407 | void RecordExecutionTime()
  408 | {
  409 | uint executionTime = GetTickCount() - m_tickStartTime;
  410 | 
  411 | // Store in rolling buffer
  412 | m_executionTimes[m_executionTimeIndex] = executionTime;
  413 | m_executionTimeIndex = (m_executionTimeIndex + 1) % 100;
  414 | 
  415 | // Update max execution time
  416 | if(executionTime > m_metrics.maxExecutionTime) {
  417 | m_metrics.maxExecutionTime = executionTime;
  418 | }
  419 | 
  420 | // Calculate average execution time
  421 | double totalTime = 0;
  422 | for(int i = 0; i < 100; i++) {
  423 | totalTime += m_executionTimes[i];
  424 | }
  425 | m_metrics.avgExecutionTime = totalTime / 100.0;
  426 | }
  427 | 
  428 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  429 | //| 🎯 OPTIMIZATION HELPER METHODS                                  |
  430 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  431 | double CalculateEstimatedCPUUsage()
  432 | {
  433 | // Estimate CPU usage based on execution time and frequency
  434 | double avgTime = m_metrics.avgExecutionTime;
  435 | double frequency = 1000.0; // Assume 1 tick per second average
  436 | 
  437 | // Simple CPU usage estimation
  438 | double cpuUsage = (avgTime * frequency) / 10.0; // Normalize to percentage
  439 | 
  440 | return MathMin(cpuUsage, 100.0);
  441 | }
  442 | 
  443 | double CalculateCurrentLatency()
  444 | {
  445 | // Current latency is the current execution time
  446 | return (double)(GetTickCount() - m_tickStartTime);
  447 | }
  448 | 
  449 | void UpdateMemoryMetrics()
  450 | {
  451 | // Estimate memory efficiency based on cache performance and handle management
  452 | double cacheEfficiency = m_metrics.cacheHitRate;
  453 | double handleEfficiency = (m_metrics.cachedHandles > 0) ? 
  454 | (double)m_metrics.cachedHandles / (m_metrics.activeHandles + m_metrics.cachedHandles) * 100.0 : 0.0;
  455 | 
  456 | m_metrics.memoryEfficiency = (cacheEfficiency + handleEfficiency) / 2.0;
  457 | }
  458 | 
  459 | void ActivateEmergencyMode(string reason)
  460 | {
  461 | if(!m_emergencyActivated) {
  462 | m_emergencyActivated = true;
  463 | m_metrics.emergencyMode = true;
  464 | m_emergencyCounter = 0;
  465 | Print(StringFormat("🚨 [PHASE 3 EMERGENCY] Emergency mode activated: %s", reason));
  466 | }
  467 | }
  468 | 
  469 | void DeactivateEmergencyMode()
  470 | {
  471 | m_emergencyActivated = false;
  472 | m_metrics.emergencyMode = false;
  473 | m_emergencyCounter = 0;
  474 | Print("✅ [PHASE 3 EMERGENCY] Emergency mode deactivated - System stable");
  475 | }

  529 | 
  530 | bool IsSystemStable()
  531 | {
  532 | // Check if system is stable for emergency deactivation
  533 | return (m_metrics.cpuUsagePercent < m_cpuThreshold && 
  534 | m_metrics.averageLatency < m_latencyThreshold &&
  535 | m_metrics.memoryEfficiency > m_memoryThreshold);
  536 | }
  537 | 
  538 | double CalculateSystemLoad()
  539 | {
  540 | // Calculate overall system load
  541 | double cpuLoad = m_metrics.cpuUsagePercent / 100.0;
  542 | double latencyLoad = m_metrics.averageLatency / 100.0;
  543 | double memoryLoad = (100.0 - m_metrics.memoryEfficiency) / 100.0;
  544 | 
  545 | return (cpuLoad + latencyLoad + memoryLoad) / 3.0;
  546 | }
  547 | 
  548 | double CalculateStabilityScore()
  549 | {
  550 | // Calculate system stability score
  551 | if(m_metrics.emergencyMode) return 0.5;
  552 | 
  553 | double stability = 1.0;
  554 | 
  555 | // Reduce stability for high CPU usage
  556 | if(m_metrics.cpuUsagePercent > m_cpuThreshold) {
  557 | stability -= 0.3;
  558 | }
  559 | 
  560 | // Reduce stability for high latency
  561 | if(m_metrics.averageLatency > m_latencyThreshold) {
  562 | stability -= 0.3;
  563 | }
  564 | 
  565 | // Reduce stability for low memory efficiency
  566 | if(m_metrics.memoryEfficiency < m_memoryThreshold) {
  567 | stability -= 0.2;
  568 | }
  569 | 
  570 | // Reduce stability for errors
  571 | if(m_metrics.errorCount > 0) {
  572 | stability -= 0.1;
  573 | }
  574 | 
  575 | return MathMax(stability, 0.0);
  576 | }
  577 | 
  578 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  579 | //| 📊 PUBLIC ACCESS METHODS                                        |
  580 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  581 | SPhase3PerformanceMetrics GetMetrics() { return m_metrics; }
  582 | bool IsOptimal() { return m_metrics.cpuUsagePercent < 15.0 && m_metrics.averageLatency < 5.0 && m_metrics.memoryEfficiency > 90.0; }
  583 | bool IsEmergencyMode() { return m_emergencyActivated; }
  584 | string GetOptimizationReport() { return m_metrics.GetDetailedReport(); }
  585 | 
  586 | // Performance control methods
  587 | bool ShouldProcessTick() { 
  588 | double prices[];
  589 | if(CopyClose(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0, 5, prices) < 5) return false;  // Bulk check last 5 closes
  590 | return !m_emergencyActivated || (m_tickThrottleCount == 0); 
  591 | }
  592 | void IncrementErrorCount() { m_metrics.errorCount++; }
  593 | void ResetErrorCount() { m_metrics.errorCount = 0; }
  594 | };

   26 | struct SUnifiedPerformanceMetrics
   27 | {
   28 | // Core Performance Metrics
   29 | double                  cpuUsagePercent;          // Current CPU usage
   30 | double                  peakCPUUsage;             // Peak CPU since startup
   31 | uint                    averageLatencyMs;         // Average processing latency
   32 | uint                    peakLatencyMs;            // Peak latency

   34 | uint                    totalTicks;               // Total ticks processed

   36 |

   45 | int                     cacheMisses;              // Cache miss count

   53 | uint                    failedOperations;         // Failed operations
   54 |

   65 | uint                    uiUpdateTimeMs;           // Last UI update time

   68 | {
   69 | cpuUsagePercent = 0.0;
   70 | peakCPUUsage = 0.0;
   71 | averageLatencyMs = 0;
   72 | peakLatencyMs = 0;
   73 | lastUpdate = 0;
   74 | totalTicks = 0;

   97 | tickProcessingTimeMs = 0;
   98 | analysisTimeMs = 0;

  100 | uiUpdateTimeMs = 0;

  102 | 
  103 | void Update()
  104 | {
  105 | lastUpdate = TimeCurrent();
  106 | 
  107 | // Update derived metrics
  108 | if(cacheHits + cacheMisses > 0)
  109 | {
  110 | cacheHitRatePercent = (double)cacheHits / (cacheHits + cacheMisses) * 100.0;
  111 | }
  112 | 
  113 | // Update performance rating
  114 | overallRating = CalculatePerformanceRating();
  115 | isOptimal = (overallRating >= PERFORMANCE_GOOD && cpuUsagePercent < 15.0);
  116 | }
  117 | 
  118 | ENUM_PERFORMANCE_RATING CalculatePerformanceRating()
  119 | {
  120 | // Multi-factor performance rating
  121 | int score = 0;
  122 | 
  123 | // CPU performance (40% weight)
  124 | if(cpuUsagePercent < 10.0) score += 40;
  125 | else if(cpuUsagePercent < 15.0) score += 30;
  126 | else if(cpuUsagePercent < 20.0) score += 20;
  127 | else if(cpuUsagePercent < 30.0) score += 10;
  128 | 
  129 | // Latency performance (25% weight)
  130 | if(averageLatencyMs < 5) score += 25;
  131 | else if(averageLatencyMs < 10) score += 20;
  132 | else if(averageLatencyMs < 20) score += 15;
  133 | else if(averageLatencyMs < 50) score += 10;
  134 | 
  135 | // Cache performance (20% weight)
  136 | if(cacheHitRatePercent > 95.0) score += 20;
  137 | else if(cacheHitRatePercent > 90.0) score += 15;
  138 | else if(cacheHitRatePercent > 80.0) score += 10;
  139 | else if(cacheHitRatePercent > 70.0) score += 5;
  140 | 
  141 | // Memory efficiency (15% weight)
  142 | if(fragmentationPercent < 5.0) score += 15;
  143 | else if(fragmentationPercent < 10.0) score += 10;
  144 | else if(fragmentationPercent < 20.0) score += 5;
  145 | 
  146 | // Convert score to rating
  147 | if(score >= 90) return PERFORMANCE_EXCELLENT;
  148 | else if(score >= 75) return PERFORMANCE_GOOD;
  149 | else if(score >= 60) return PERFORMANCE_AVERAGE;
  150 | else if(score >= 40) return PERFORMANCE_BELOW_AVERAGE;
  151 | else return PERFORMANCE_POOR;
  152 | }
  153 | 
  154 | string GetDetailedReport()
  155 | {
  156 | return StringFormat(
  157 | "[ROCKET] UNIFIED PERFORMANCE METRICS:\n\n" +
  158 | "[CPU] CPU & LATENCY:\n" +
  159 | "  Current CPU: %.1f%% (Peak: %.1f%%)\n" +
  160 | "  Avg Latency: %dms (Peak: %dms)\n" +
  161 | "  Rating: %s | Optimal: %s\n\n" +
  162 | "[MEMORY] MEMORY & CACHE:\n" +
  163 | "  Memory: %.1fMB (Peak: %.1fMB)\n" +
  164 | "  Fragmentation: %.1f%%\n" +
  165 | "  Cache Hit Rate: %.1f%% (%d/%d)\n\n" +
  166 | "[BOLT] OPERATIONS:\n" +
  167 | "  Total Ops: %d | Avg Time: %.2fms\n" +
  168 | "  Slow Ops: %d | Failed: %d\n\n" +
  169 | "[ANALYSIS] ANALYSIS BREAKDOWN:\n" +
  170 | "  Tick: %dms | Analysis: %dms\n" +
  171 | "  Signals: %dms | UI: %dms\n\n" +
  172 | "[STATUS] SYSTEM STATUS:\n" +
  173 | "  Emergency Mode: %s\n" +
  174 | "  Objects: %d | Cache Size: %d",
  175 | 
  176 | cpuUsagePercent, peakCPUUsage,
  177 | averageLatencyMs, peakLatencyMs,
  178 | PerformanceRatingToString(overallRating), isOptimal ? "YES" : "NO",
  179 | 
  180 | memoryUsageMB, peakMemoryUsageMB,
  181 | fragmentationPercent,
  182 | cacheHitRatePercent, cacheHits, (cacheHits + cacheMisses),
  183 |

  186 | 
  187 | tickProcessingTimeMs, analysisTimeMs,

  214 | *          - Zero performance degradation over time

  368 | void SetPerformanceMode(ENUM_PERFORMANCE_MODE mode)
  369 | {

  371 | 
  372 | // Adjust tick filtering based on mode
  373 | switch(mode)

  378 | break;
  379 | case MODE_AGGRESSIVE:

  383 | case MODE_BALANCED:

  385 | m_tickSkipRatio = 2; // Process every 2nd tick
  386 | break;
  387 | case MODE_CONSERVATIVE:
  388 | m_enableTickFiltering = true;
  389 | m_tickSkipRatio = 3; // Process every 3rd tick
  390 | break;
  391 | }
  392 |

  394 | Print(StringFormat("ðŸŽ›ï¸ Performance mode: %s | Tick filtering: %s (ratio: %d)", 
  395 | modeStr, 
  396 | m_enableTickFiltering ? "ENABLED" : "DISABLED",
  397 | m_tickSkipRatio));
  398 | }
  399 | 
  400 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  401 | //| âš¡ OPERATION MONITORING (REPLACES ALL StartOperation/EndOperation) |
  402 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  403 | /**
  404 | * @brief Start monitoring an operation
  405 | * @param operationName Name of operation for profiling
  406 | * 
  407 | * @details This replaces StartOperation() calls found in:
  408 | *          - Performance_Optimization.mqh (line 376)
  409 | *          - Performance_IntelligentOptimizer.mqh (line 333)
  410 | *          - A EA_SonicR_MC.mq5 (line 161)
  411 | *          - Multiple other files
  412 | */
  413 | void StartOperation(string operationName)
  414 | {
  415 | if(!m_monitoring) return;
  416 | 
  417 | m_operationStartTime = GetMicrosecondCount();
  418 | m_currentOperation = operationName;
  419 | }
  420 | 
  421 | /**
  422 | * @brief End monitoring an operation and update metrics
  423 | * @param operationName Name of operation (for validation)
  424 | * 
  425 | * @details This replaces EndOperation() calls found across multiple files
  426 | *          Provides comprehensive performance tracking and optimization
  427 | */
  428 | void EndOperation(string operationName = "")
  429 | {
  430 | if(!m_monitoring || m_operationStartTime == 0) return;
  431 | 
  432 | ulong endTime = GetMicrosecondCount();
  433 | ulong operationTimeUs = endTime - m_operationStartTime;
  434 | double operationTimeMs = operationTimeUs / 1000.0;
  435 | 
  436 | // Update operation history
  437 | m_operationHistory[m_operationIndex] = (uint)operationTimeMs;
  438 | m_operationIndex = (m_operationIndex + 1) % 100;
  439 | 
  440 | // Update metrics
  441 | m_metrics.totalOperations++;
  442 | 
  443 | // Update average operation time
  444 | if(m_metrics.totalOperations == 1) {
  445 | m_metrics.avgOperationTimeMs = operationTimeMs;
  446 | } else {
  447 | m_metrics.avgOperationTimeMs = (m_metrics.avgOperationTimeMs * 0.9) + (operationTimeMs * 0.1);
  448 | }
  449 | 
  450 | // Track slow operations
  451 | if(operationTimeMs > 50.0) {
  452 | m_metrics.slowOperations++;
  453 | m_consecutiveSlowOps++;
  454 | 
  455 | // REFINE: Simplified error handling
  456 | Print("[⚠️ PERFORMANCE] Slow operation detected: ", 
  457 | StringFormat("%s took %.2fms", m_currentOperation, operationTimeMs));
  458 | } else {
  459 | m_consecutiveSlowOps = 0;
  460 | }
  461 | 
  462 | // Update specific operation metrics
  463 | UpdateOperationSpecificMetrics(m_currentOperation, operationTimeMs);
  464 | 
  465 | // Reset operation state
  466 | m_operationStartTime = 0;
  467 | m_currentOperation = "";
  468 | }
  469 | 
  470 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  471 | //| 🎯 TICK PROCESSING OPTIMIZATION                                  |
  472 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  473 | /**
  474 | * @brief Determine if current tick should be processed
  475 | * @return true if tick should be processed, false to skip
  476 | * 
  477 | * @details This replaces ShouldProcessCurrentTick() found in:
  478 | *          - Performance_OptimizationEnhanced.mqh (line 111)
  479 | *          - Performance_IntelligentOptimizer.mqh (line 426)
  480 | *          - A EA_SonicR_MC.mq5 (line 157)
  481 | */
  482 | bool ShouldProcessCurrentTick()
  483 | {
  484 | if(!m_initialized || !m_enableTickFiltering) return true;
  485 | 
  486 | m_currentTickCount++;
  487 | 
  488 | // Emergency mode - process all ticks
  489 | if(m_metrics.emergencyMode) return true;
  490 | 
  491 | // Conservative filtering based on performance
  492 | if(m_metrics.cpuUsagePercent > m_targetCPUUsage * 1.5) {
  493 | // High CPU - aggressive filtering
  494 | return (m_currentTickCount % (m_tickSkipRatio * 2) == 0);
  495 | } else if(m_metrics.cpuUsagePercent > m_targetCPUUsage) {
  496 | // Moderate CPU - normal filtering
  497 | return (m_currentTickCount % m_tickSkipRatio == 0);
  498 | }
  499 | 
  500 | // Low CPU - minimal filtering
  501 | return (m_currentTickCount % MathMax(1, m_tickSkipRatio / 2) == 0);
  502 | }
  503 | 
  504 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  505 | //| 🎯 TICK MONITORING METHODS                                       |
  506 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  507 | /**
  508 | * @brief Begin tick processing monitoring
  509 | * @details Called at the start of OnTick() to monitor performance
  510 | */
  511 | void BeginTick()
  512 | {
  513 | if(!m_initialized) return;
  514 | 
  515 | // Start monitoring tick processing
  516 | StartOperation("OnTick");
  517 | 
  518 | // Update tick count
  519 | m_metrics.totalTicks++;
  520 | 
  521 | // Check for emergency conditions
  522 | if(TimeCurrent() - m_lastEmergencyCheck > 60) { // Check every minute
  523 | CheckEmergencyConditions();
  524 | m_lastEmergencyCheck = TimeCurrent();
  525 | }
  526 | }
  527 | 
  528 | /**
  529 | * @brief End tick processing monitoring
  530 | * @details Called at the end of OnTick() to complete performance tracking
  531 | */
  532 | void EndTick()
  533 | {
  534 | if(!m_initialized) return;
  535 | 
  536 | // End monitoring tick processing
  537 | EndOperation("OnTick");
  538 | 
  539 | // Update CPU usage metrics
  540 | UpdateCPUMetrics();
  541 | 
  542 | // Update latency metrics
  543 | UpdateLatencyMetrics();
  544 | 
  545 | // Periodic optimization
  546 | if(m_metrics.totalTicks % 300 == 0) { // Every 300 ticks
  547 | // TEMPORARY FIX: Disable system optimization
  548 | // PerformSystemOptimization();
  549 | }
  550 | }
  551 | 
  552 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  553 | //| 🎯 EMERGENCY CONDITIONS CHECK                                    |
  554 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  555 | void CheckEmergencyConditions()
  556 | {
  557 | // Check for consecutive slow operations
  558 | if(m_consecutiveSlowOps >= 5) {
  559 | m_metrics.emergencyMode = true;
  560 | Print("🚨 [PERFORMANCE] Emergency mode activated: Too many slow operations");
  561 | }
  562 | 
  563 | // Check for high CPU usage
  564 | if(m_metrics.cpuUsagePercent > m_targetCPUUsage * 2.0) {
  565 | m_consecutiveHighCPU++;
  566 | if(m_consecutiveHighCPU >= 3) {
  567 | m_metrics.emergencyMode = true;
  568 | Print("🚨 [PERFORMANCE] Emergency mode activated: High CPU usage");
  569 | }
  570 | } else {
  571 | m_consecutiveHighCPU = 0;
  572 | }
  573 | 
  574 | // Reset emergency mode if conditions improve
  575 | if(m_metrics.emergencyMode && 
  576 | m_consecutiveSlowOps == 0 && 
  577 | m_consecutiveHighCPU == 0) {
  578 | m_metrics.emergencyMode = false;
  579 | Print("✅ [PERFORMANCE] Emergency mode deactivated: Conditions improved");
  580 | }
  581 | }
  582 | 
  583 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  584 | //| 🎯 METRICS UPDATE METHODS                                        |
  585 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  586 | void UpdateCPUMetrics()
  587 | {
  588 | // Simplified CPU usage calculation
  589 | // In a real implementation, this would use system calls
  590 | double cpuUsage = MathMin(100.0, m_metrics.avgOperationTimeMs * 10.0);
  591 | m_metrics.cpuUsagePercent = (m_metrics.cpuUsagePercent * 0.9) + (cpuUsage * 0.1);
  592 | }
  593 | 
  594 | void UpdateLatencyMetrics()
  595 | {
  596 | // Update average latency
  597 | if(m_metrics.avgOperationTimeMs > 0) {
  598 | m_metrics.avgLatencyMs = m_metrics.avgOperationTimeMs;
  599 | }
  600 | }
  601 | 
  602 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  603 | //| 🎯 TICK COUNT TRACKING                                           |
  604 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  605 | void UpdateTickCount()
  606 | {
  607 | m_metrics.totalTicks++;
  608 | }
  609 | 
  610 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  611 | //| ðŸ§  INTELLIGENT PERFORMANCE OPTIMIZATION                          |
  612 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  613 | /**
  614 | * @brief Main optimization routine called periodically
  615 | * 
  616 | * @details This consolidates optimization logic from:
  617 | *          - CPerformanceOptimizer.Optimize() (Performance_Optimization.mqh)
  618 | *          - CPerformanceOptimizer.PerformMaintenance() (Performance_OptimizationEnhanced.mqh)
  619 | *          - CIntegratedPerformanceOptimizer maintenance
  620 | */
  621 | void PerformOptimization()
  622 | {
  623 | if(!m_initialized) return;
  624 | 
  625 | datetime currentTime = TimeCurrent();
  626 | 
  627 | // Update system metrics
  628 | UpdateSystemMetrics();
  629 | 
  630 | // Perform optimization every 60 seconds
  631 | if(currentTime - m_lastOptimization >= 60) {
  632 | RunOptimizationCycle();
  633 | m_lastOptimization = currentTime;
  634 | m_optimizationCycle++;
  635 | }
  636 | 
  637 | // Emergency checks every 10 seconds
  638 | if(currentTime - m_lastEmergencyCheck >= 10) {
  639 | CheckEmergencyConditions();
  640 | m_lastEmergencyCheck = currentTime;
  641 | }
  642 | 
  643 | // Cache maintenance
  644 | if(m_optimizationCycle % 5 == 0) { // Every 5 minutes
  645 | PerformCacheMaintenance();
  646 | }
  647 | }
  648 | 
  649 | /**
  650 | * @brief High-performance cache operations
  651 | */
  652 | bool GetCachedValue(string key, double& value)
  653 | {
  654 | for(int i = 0; i < m_cacheCount; i++) {
  655 | if(m_cache[i].isValid && m_cache[i].key == key) {
  656 | // Check if not expired (5 second TTL)
  657 | if(TimeCurrent() - m_cache[i].timestamp <= 5) {
  658 | value = m_cache[i].value;
  659 | m_cache[i].accessCount++;
  660 | m_metrics.cacheHits++;
  661 | return true;
  662 | }
  663 | }
  664 | }
  665 | 
  666 | m_metrics.cacheMisses++;
  667 | return false;
  668 | }
  669 | 
  670 | void SetCachedValue(string key, double value, double computationCost = 1.0)
  671 | {
  672 | // Find existing or empty slot
  673 | int targetIndex = -1;
  674 | 
  675 | // Look for existing key
  676 | for(int i = 0; i < m_cacheCount; i++) {
  677 | if(m_cache[i].key == key) {
  678 | targetIndex = i;
  679 | break;
  680 | }
  681 | }
  682 | 
  683 | // If not found, look for empty slot
  684 | if(targetIndex < 0) {
  685 | for(int i = 0; i < 200; i++) {
  686 | if(!m_cache[i].isValid) {
  687 | targetIndex = i;
  688 | if(i >= m_cacheCount) m_cacheCount = i + 1;
  689 | break;
  690 | }
  691 | }
  692 | }
  693 | 
  694 | // If still not found, replace least valuable
  695 | if(targetIndex < 0) {
  696 | double minValue = DBL_MAX;
  697 | for(int i = 0; i < m_cacheCount; i++) {
  698 | double value = m_cache[i].computationCost / MathMax(1, m_cache[i].accessCount);
  699 | if(value < minValue) {
  700 | minValue = value;
  701 | targetIndex = i;
  702 | }
  703 | }
  704 | }
  705 | 
  706 | // Store value
  707 | if(targetIndex >= 0) {
  708 | m_cache[targetIndex].key = key;
  709 | m_cache[targetIndex].value = value;
  710 | m_cache[targetIndex].timestamp = TimeCurrent();
  711 | m_cache[targetIndex].isValid = true;
  712 | m_cache[targetIndex].accessCount = 0;
  713 | m_cache[targetIndex].computationCost = computationCost;
  714 | }
  715 | }
  716 | 
  717 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  718 | //| ðŸ“Š METRICS & REPORTING                                          |
  719 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  720 | SUnifiedPerformanceMetrics GetMetrics() const { return m_metrics; }
  721 | 
  722 | string GetPerformanceReport()
  723 | {
  724 | return m_metrics.GetDetailedReport();
  725 | }
  726 | 
  727 | string GetOptimizationStatus()
  728 | {
  729 | string modeStr = PerformanceModeToString(m_currentMode);
  730 | return StringFormat(
  731 | "OPTIMIZATION STATUS:\n" +
  732 | "Mode: %s | Cycle: %d\n" +
  733 | "Tick Filtering: %s (ratio: %d)\n" +
  734 | "Emergency Mode: %s\n" +
  735 | "Target CPU: %.1f%% | Actual: %.1f%%\n" +
  736 | "Target Latency: %dms | Actual: %dms\n" +
  737 | "Cache Efficiency: %.1f%% (%d entries)\n" +
  738 | "Slow Operations: %d | Failed: %d",
  739 | 
  740 | modeStr, m_optimizationCycle,
  741 | m_enableTickFiltering ? "ENABLED" : "DISABLED", m_tickSkipRatio,
  742 | m_metrics.emergencyMode ? "ACTIVE" : "Normal",
  743 | m_targetCPUUsage, m_metrics.cpuUsagePercent,
  744 | m_targetLatency, m_metrics.averageLatencyMs,
  745 | m_metrics.cacheHitRatePercent, m_cacheCount,
  746 | m_metrics.slowOperations, m_metrics.failedOperations
  747 | );
  748 | }
  749 | 
  750 | void PrintDetailedStatistics()
  751 | {
  752 | Print("=== UNIFIED PERFORMANCE SYSTEM STATISTICS ===");
  753 | Print(GetPerformanceReport());
  754 | Print("");
  755 | Print(GetOptimizationStatus());
  756 | 
  757 | // Performance trend analysis
  758 | if(m_metrics.totalOperations > 100) {
  759 | double recentAvg = CalculateRecentPerformance();
  760 | double trend = ((recentAvg - m_metrics.avgOperationTimeMs) / m_metrics.avgOperationTimeMs) * 100.0;
  761 | 
  762 | Print(StringFormat("Performance Trend: %.1f%% %s", 
  763 | MathAbs(trend), 
  764 | trend > 0 ? "SLOWER" : "FASTER"));
  765 | }
  766 | }
  767 | 
  768 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  769 | //| ðŸš¨ EMERGENCY MANAGEMENT                                          |
  770 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  771 | bool IsEmergencyMode() const { return m_metrics.emergencyMode; }
  772 | 
  773 | void ActivateEmergencyMode(string reason)
  774 | {
  775 | if(!m_metrics.emergencyMode) {
  776 | m_metrics.emergencyMode = true;
  777 | m_metrics.emergencyActivationTime = TimeCurrent();
  778 | 
  779 | // Switch to conservative mode
  780 | SetPerformanceMode(MODE_CONSERVATIVE);
  781 | 
  782 | Print(StringFormat("EMERGENCY MODE ACTIVATED: %s", reason));
  783 | Print("System switched to conservative mode for stability");
  784 | 
  785 | // REFINE: Simplified error handling  
  786 | Print("[🚨 CRITICAL] Emergency mode activated: ", reason);
  787 | }
  788 | }
  789 | 
  790 | void DeactivateEmergencyMode()
  791 | {
  792 | if(m_metrics.emergencyMode) {
  793 | m_metrics.emergencyMode = false;
  794 | m_consecutiveSlowOps = 0;
  795 | m_consecutiveHighCPU = 0;
  796 | 
  797 | // Return to balanced mode
  798 | SetPerformanceMode(MODE_BALANCED);
  799 | 
  800 | Print("[SUCCESS] EMERGENCY MODE DEACTIVATED: System restored to normal operation");
  801 | }
  802 | }
  803 | 
  804 | ~CUnifiedPerformanceSystem()
  805 | {
  806 | if(m_initialized) {
  807 | PrintDetailedStatistics();
  808 | Print("🧹 UNIFIED PERFORMANCE SYSTEM: Shutdown complete");
  809 | }
  810 | }
  811 | 
  812 | private:
  813 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  814 | //| INTERNAL OPTIMIZATION LOGIC                                     |
  815 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  816 | void UpdateSystemMetrics()
  817 | {
  818 | // CPU usage estimation
  819 | double baseCPU = 8.0; // Base system overhead
  820 | double operationCPU = m_metrics.avgOperationTimeMs * 0.5; // Operation overhead
  821 | double modeCPU = GetModeOverhead();
  822 | 
  823 | m_metrics.cpuUsagePercent = MathMin(95.0, baseCPU + operationCPU + modeCPU);
  824 | 
  825 | // Update peak CPU
  826 | if(m_metrics.cpuUsagePercent > m_metrics.peakCPUUsage) {
  827 | m_metrics.peakCPUUsage = m_metrics.cpuUsagePercent;
  828 | }
  829 | 
  830 | // Update latency metrics
  831 | if(m_metrics.totalOperations > 0) {
  832 | m_metrics.averageLatencyMs = (uint)m_metrics.avgOperationTimeMs;
  833 | }
  834 | 
  835 | // Memory estimation
  836 | m_metrics.memoryUsageMB = 25.0 + (m_cacheCount * 0.001) + (m_metrics.allocatedObjects * 0.01);
  837 | if(m_metrics.memoryUsageMB > m_metrics.peakMemoryUsageMB) {
  838 | m_metrics.peakMemoryUsageMB = m_metrics.memoryUsageMB;
  839 | }
  840 | 
  841 | // Fragmentation estimation
  842 | m_metrics.fragmentationPercent = MathMin(30.0, m_optimizationCycle * 0.1);
  843 | 
  844 | // Update cache metrics
  845 | m_metrics.cacheSize = m_cacheCount;
  846 | 
  847 | // Update final metrics
  848 | m_metrics.Update();
  849 | }
  850 | 
  851 | double GetModeOverhead()
  852 | {
  853 | switch(m_currentMode) {
  854 | case MODE_MAXIMUM: return 5.0;
  855 | case MODE_AGGRESSIVE: return 3.0;
  856 | case MODE_BALANCED: return 1.0;
  857 | case MODE_CONSERVATIVE: return 0.5;
  858 | default: return 1.0;
  859 | }
  860 | }
  861 | 
  862 | void RunOptimizationCycle()
  863 | {
  864 | Print(StringFormat("Running optimization cycle #%d", m_optimizationCycle));
  865 | 
  866 | // Auto-adjust performance mode based on metrics
  867 | ENUM_PERFORMANCE_MODE optimalMode = DetermineOptimalMode();
  868 | if(optimalMode != m_currentMode && !m_metrics.emergencyMode) {
  869 | SetPerformanceMode(optimalMode);
  870 | }
  871 | 
  872 | // Memory optimization
  873 | if(m_metrics.fragmentationPercent > 15.0) {
  874 | m_metrics.fragmentationPercent *= 0.7; // Simulate defragmentation
  875 | Print("Memory defragmentation performed");
  876 | }
  877 | 
  878 | // Cache optimization
  879 | if(m_metrics.cacheHitRatePercent < 80.0) {
  880 | OptimizeCacheStrategy();
  881 | }
  882 | }
  883 | 
  884 | ENUM_PERFORMANCE_MODE DetermineOptimalMode()
  885 | {
  886 | if(m_metrics.cpuUsagePercent > m_targetCPUUsage * 1.5) {
  887 | return MODE_CONSERVATIVE;
  888 | } else if(m_metrics.cpuUsagePercent > m_targetCPUUsage) {
  889 | return MODE_BALANCED;
  890 | } else if(m_metrics.averageLatencyMs < m_targetLatency) {
  891 | return MODE_AGGRESSIVE;
  892 | }
  893 | 
  894 | return MODE_BALANCED;
  895 | }
  896 | 
  897 | void UpdateOperationSpecificMetrics(string operationName, double timeMs)
  898 | {
  899 | // Update specific operation timing
  900 | if(operationName == "OnTick") {
  901 | m_metrics.tickProcessingTimeMs = (uint)timeMs;
  902 | } else if(StringFind(operationName, "Analysis") >= 0) {
  903 | m_metrics.analysisTimeMs = (uint)timeMs;
  904 | } else if(StringFind(operationName, "Signal") >= 0) {
  905 | m_metrics.signalProcessingTimeMs = (uint)timeMs;
  906 | } else if(StringFind(operationName, "UI") >= 0 || StringFind(operationName, "Dashboard") >= 0) {
  907 | m_metrics.uiUpdateTimeMs = (uint)timeMs;
  908 | }
  909 | }
  910 | 
  911 | void PerformCacheMaintenance()
  912 | {
  913 | int cleaned = 0;
  914 | datetime cutoff = TimeCurrent() - 300; // 5 minute expiry
  915 | 
  916 | for(int i = 0; i < m_cacheCount; i++) {
  917 | if(m_cache[i].isValid && m_cache[i].timestamp < cutoff) {
  918 | m_cache[i].Reset();
  919 | cleaned++;
  920 | }
  921 | }
  922 | 
  923 | if(cleaned > 0) {
  924 | CompactCache();
  925 | Print(StringFormat("Cache maintenance: Cleaned %d expired entries", cleaned));
  926 | }
  927 | }
  928 | 
  929 | void CompactCache()
  930 | {
  931 | int writeIndex = 0;
  932 | for(int readIndex = 0; readIndex < m_cacheCount; readIndex++) {
  933 | if(m_cache[readIndex].isValid) {
  934 | if(writeIndex != readIndex) {
  935 | m_cache[writeIndex] = m_cache[readIndex];
  936 | m_cache[readIndex].Reset();
  937 | }
  938 | writeIndex++;
  939 | }
  940 | }
  941 | m_cacheCount = writeIndex;
  942 | }
  943 | 
  944 | void OptimizeCacheStrategy()
  945 | {
  946 | Print("Optimizing cache strategy for better hit rate");
  947 | // Implementation would include cache size adjustment, TTL optimization, etc.
  948 | }
  949 | 
  950 | double CalculateRecentPerformance()
  951 | {
  952 | // Calculate average of last 20 operations
  953 | double total = 0.0;
  954 | int count = 0;
  955 | int startIndex = (m_operationIndex - 20 + 100) % 100;
  956 | 
  957 | for(int i = 0; i < 20 && count < 20; i++) {
  958 | int index = (startIndex + i) % 100;
  959 | if(m_operationHistory[index] > 0) {
  960 | total += m_operationHistory[index];
  961 | count++;
  962 | }
  963 | }
  964 | 
  965 | return count > 0 ? total / count : m_metrics.avgOperationTimeMs;
  966 | }
  967 | };
  968 | 
  969 | // Static instance declaration moved to main EA file to avoid compilation errors
  970 |

 1046 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1047 | //| 📋 MIGRATION GUIDE - COMPLETE PERFORMANCE CONSOLIDATION          |
 1048 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1049 | /*
 1050 | === COMPLETE MIGRATION REPLACING ALL PERFORMANCE SYSTEMS ===
 1051 | 
 1052 | STEP 1: REMOVE DUPLICATE PERFORMANCE FILES:
 1053 | DELETE: Performance_Optimization.mqh (replaced by Unified)
 1054 | DELETE: Performance_IntelligentOptimizer.mqh (replaced by Unified)
 1055 | NOTE: Keep Performance_OptimizationEnhanced.mqh as fallback
 1056 | 
 1057 | STEP 2: ADD TO EA INITIALIZATION (OnInit):
 1058 | #include "09_Performance_03_SystemUnified.mqh"
 1059 | InitializeUnifiedPerformanceSystem();
 1060 | 
 1061 | STEP 3: REPLACE ALL PERFORMANCE CALLS:
 1062 | 
 1063 | OLD PATTERNS (TO BE REPLACED):
 1064 | â”œâ”€â”€ A EA_SonicR_MC.mq5 (lines 157-168):
 1065 | â”‚   if(!ShouldProcessCurrentTick()) return;
 1066 | â”‚   StartPerformanceMonitoring("OnTick");
 1067 | â”‚   // ... processing ...
 1068 | â”‚   EndPerformanceMonitoring();
 1069 | â”‚
 1070 | â”œâ”€â”€ Performance_Optimization.mqh usage:
 1071 | â”‚   CPerformanceOptimizer* optimizer = new CPerformanceOptimizer();
 1072 | â”‚   optimizer.StartOperation();
 1073 | â”‚   optimizer.EndOperation();
 1074 | â”‚   optimizer.Optimize();
 1075 | â”‚
 1076 | â”œâ”€â”€ Performance_IntelligentOptimizer.mqh usage:
 1077 | â”‚   CIntegratedPerformanceOptimizer* optimizer;
 1078 | â”‚   optimizer.StartPerformanceMonitoring("operation");
 1079 | â”‚   optimizer.EndPerformanceMonitoring();
 1080 | â”‚   optimizer.ShouldProcessCurrentTick();
 1081 | â”‚
 1082 | â””â”€â”€ UI_Dashboard_Renderer.mqh performance tracking:
 1083 | CDashboardRenderer caching and optimization
 1084 | 
 1085 | NEW UNIFIED PATTERNS:
 1086 | 
 1087 | // REPLACE all StartOperation/EndOperation:
 1088 | OLD: Multiple different StartOperation() calls
 1089 | NEW: StartPerformanceMonitoring("OperationName");
 1090 | EndPerformanceMonitoring("OperationName");
 1091 | 
 1092 | // REPLACE all ShouldProcessCurrentTick:
 1093 | OLD: Various ShouldProcessCurrentTick() implementations
 1094 | NEW: if(!ShouldProcessCurrentTick()) return;
 1095 | 
 1096 | // REPLACE all optimization calls:
 1097 | OLD: Multiple Optimize() methods across classes
 1098 | NEW: PerformSystemOptimization(); // Call every 60 seconds
 1099 | 
 1100 | // REPLACE performance metrics:
 1101 | OLD: Multiple metric structures and getters
 1102 | NEW: SUnifiedPerformanceMetrics metrics = GetSystemPerformanceMetrics();
 1103 | string report = GetPerformanceSystemReport();
 1104 | 
 1105 | STEP 4: ADD TO EA CLEANUP (OnDeinit):
 1106 | CleanupUnifiedPerformanceSystem();
 1107 | 
 1108 | STEP 5: ADD TO MAIN LOOP (OnTick):
 1109 | // At start of OnTick:
 1110 | if(!ShouldProcessCurrentTick()) return;
 1111 | StartPerformanceMonitoring("OnTick");
 1112 |

 1114 | EndPerformanceMonitoring("OnTick");
 1115 |

   55 | // Private methods - PROPERLY SCOPED
   56 | void UpdateMetricTrends()
   57 | {
   58 | for(int i = 0; i < m_metricCount; i++)
   59 | {
   60 | if(m_metrics[i].isValid)
   61 | {
   62 | // Simple trend analysis
   63 | if(m_metrics[i].currentValue > m_metrics[i].averageValue * 1.05)
   64 | m_metrics[i].trend = 1; // Improving
   65 | else if(m_metrics[i].currentValue < m_metrics[i].averageValue * 0.95)
   66 | m_metrics[i].trend = -1; // Declining
   67 | else
   68 | m_metrics[i].trend = 0; // Stable
   69 | }
   70 | }
   71 | }
   72 | 
   73 | void CalculateAverages()
   74 | {
   75 | for(int i = 0; i < m_metricCount; i++)
   76 | {
   77 | if(m_metrics[i].isValid)
   78 | {
   79 | // Simple moving average calculation
   80 | m_metrics[i].averageValue = (m_metrics[i].averageValue * 0.9) + (m_metrics[i].currentValue * 0.1);
   81 | 
   82 | // Update min/max
   83 | m_metrics[i].minValue = MathMin(m_metrics[i].minValue, m_metrics[i].currentValue);
   84 | m_metrics[i].maxValue = MathMax(m_metrics[i].maxValue, m_metrics[i].currentValue);
   85 | }
   86 | }
   87 | }
   88 | 
   89 | string GenerateAnalysisReport()
   90 | {
   91 | string report = "=== ADVANCED ANALYTICS REPORT ===\n";
   92 | 
   93 | for(int i = 0; i < m_metricCount; i++)
   94 | {
   95 | if(m_metrics[i].isValid)
   96 | {
   97 | string trendStr = "";
   98 | switch(m_metrics[i].trend)
   99 | {
  100 | case 1: trendStr = "↑"; break;
  101 | case -1: trendStr = "↓"; break;
  102 | default: trendStr = "."; break;
  103 | }
  104 | 
  105 | report += StringFormat("%s: %.2f %s (Avg: %.2f, Min: %.2f, Max: %.2f)\n",
  106 | m_metrics[i].name,
  107 | m_metrics[i].currentValue,
  108 | trendStr,
  109 | m_metrics[i].averageValue,
  110 | m_metrics[i].minValue,
  111 | m_metrics[i].maxValue
  112 | );
  113 | }
  114 | }
  115 | 
  116 | return report;
  117 | }

    1 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+

    6 | #ifndef LIVE_VALIDATION_MQH
    7 | #define LIVE_VALIDATION_MQH
    8 | 
    9 | #include "00_Main_MasterIncludes.mqh"
   10 | 
   11 | // Portable environment checks
   12 | bool IsTradeEnvOk() {
   13 |   bool term_ok = (bool)TerminalInfoInteger(TERMINAL_TRADE_ALLOWED);
   14 |   bool mql_ok  = (bool)MQLInfoInteger(MQL_TRADE_ALLOWED);
   15 |   bool acc_ok  = (bool)AccountInfoInteger(ACCOUNT_TRADE_ALLOWED);
   16 |   return (term_ok && mql_ok && acc_ok);
   17 | }
   18 | 
   19 | double GetSystemCpuUsage() { return 0.0; }
   20 | 
   21 | double GetSystemMemoryUsage() {
   22 |   long phys  = (long)TerminalInfoInteger(TERMINAL_MEMORY_PHYSICAL);
   23 |   long avail = (long)TerminalInfoInteger(TERMINAL_MEMORY_AVAILABLE);
   24 |   if(phys<=0) return 0.0;
   25 |   double used = 1.0 - (double)avail/(double)phys;
   26 |   if(used<0) used=0; if(used>1) used=1;
   27 |   return used*100.0; // percent
   28 | }
   29 | 
   30 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   31 | //| LIVE VALIDATION DATA STRUCTURES                                  |
   32 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   33 | struct SLiveValidationResult {
   34 |     bool isValid;
   35 |     string validationMessage;
   36 |     double confidenceScore;
   37 |     datetime validationTime;
   38 |     int errorCount;
   39 |     int warningCount;

   94 | }

  105 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  106 | bool CLiveValidator::Initialize() {
  107 |     m_lastValidationTime = TimeCurrent();
  108 |
