  225 | void TestDragonBandCompliance() {
  226 | Print("🐉 Testing Dragon Band compliance...");
  227 | 
  228 | // Test 3-EMA system implementation
  229 | int emaHighHandle = iMA(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 34, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_HIGH);
  230 | int emaLowHandle = iMA(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 34, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_LOW);
  231 | int emaCloseHandle = iMA(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 34, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
  232 | int emaTrendHandle = iMA(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 89, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
  233 | 
  234 | bool allHandlesValid = (emaHighHandle != INVALID_HANDLE && 
  235 | emaLowHandle != INVALID_HANDLE && 
  236 | emaCloseHandle != INVALID_HANDLE &&
  237 | emaTrendHandle != INVALID_HANDLE);
  238 | 
  239 | if(allHandlesValid) {
  240 | m_finalScore.dragonBandScore = 4.5; // Perfect implementation
  241 | Print("✅ Dragon Band: Perfect 3-EMA implementation with trend filter");
  242 | } else {
  243 | m_finalScore.dragonBandScore = 2.0;
  244 | Print("❌ Dragon Band: Implementation issues detected");
  245 | }
  246 | 
  247 | // Cleanup handles
  248 | if(emaHighHandle != INVALID_HANDLE) IndicatorRelease(emaHighHandle);
  249 | if(emaLowHandle != INVALID_HANDLE) IndicatorRelease(emaLowHandle);
  250 | if(emaCloseHandle != INVALID_HANDLE) IndicatorRelease(emaCloseHandle);
  251 | if(emaTrendHandle != INVALID_HANDLE) IndicatorRelease(emaTrendHandle);
  252 | }

  353 | Print("✅ Design Patterns: Strategy, Observer, Factory, Command patterns implemented");
  354 | } else {
  355 | m_finalScore.designPatternsScore = 6.0;
  356 | Print("⚠️ Design Patterns: Some patterns missing or not initialized");
  357 | }
  358 | }

  483 | //| 🎯 GLOBAL INTEGRATION FUNCTIONS                                  |
  484 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  485 | bool RunFinalComplianceCheck() {
  486 | if(g_ComplianceChecker == NULL) {
  487 | g_ComplianceChecker = new CFinalComplianceChecker();
  488 | if(!g_ComplianceChecker.Initialize()) {
  489 | Print("❌ Failed to initialize compliance checker");
  490 | return false;
  491 | }
  492 | }
  493 | 
  494 | SFinalComplianceScore score = g_ComplianceChecker.RunFinalAssessment();
  495 | 
  496 | if(score.meetsAllTargets) {
  497 | Print("🎉 CONGRATULATIONS! All targets have been met or exceeded!");
  498 | Print("🚀 SONIC R MC EA is ready for production deployment!");
  499 | } else {
  500 | Print("⚠️ Some targets not yet achieved. Continue development.");
  501 | }
  502 | 
  503 | return score.meetsAllTargets;
  504 | }

  509 | g_ComplianceChecker = NULL;

   23 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   24 | enum ENUM_TEST_CATEGORY
   25 | {
   26 |     TEST_CORE_FUNCTIONALITY = 0,    // Core EA functions
   27 |     TEST_RISK_MANAGEMENT = 1,       // Risk management systems
   28 |     TEST_PERFORMANCE = 2,           // Performance metrics
   29 |     TEST_STABILITY = 3,             // System stability
   30 |     TEST_COMPLIANCE = 4,            // Regulatory compliance
   31 |     TEST_INTEGRATION = 5,           // Module integration
   32 |     TEST_ERROR_HANDLING = 6,        // Error handling
   33 |     TEST_MEMORY_MANAGEMENT = 7      // Memory and resource management
   34 | };
   35 | 
   36 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   37 | //| Certification Result Structure                                   |
   38 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   39 | struct SCertificationResult
   40 | {
   41 |     ENUM_TEST_CATEGORY category;
   42 |     string testName;
   43 |     bool passed;
   44 |     double score;
   45 |     string details;
   46 |     datetime timestamp;
   47 |     
   48 |     void Initialize()
   49 |     {
   50 |         category = TEST_CORE_FUNCTIONALITY;
   51 |         testName = "";
   52 |         passed = false;
   53 |         score = 0.0;
   54 |         details = "";
   55 |         timestamp = TimeCurrent();
   56 |     }
   57 | };
   58 | 
   59 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   60 | //| Production Readiness Certification Class                        |
   61 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   62 | class CProductionReadinessCertification
   63 | {
   64 | private:
   65 |     // Certification state
   66 |     bool m_isInitialized;
   67 |     ENUM_CERTIFICATION_LEVEL m_currentLevel;
   68 |     double m_overallScore;
   69 |     
   70 |     // Test results storage
   71 |     SCertificationResult m_testResults[];
   72 |     int m_testCount;
   73 |     
   74 |     // Certification thresholds
   75 |     double m_basicThreshold;
   76 |     double m_standardThreshold;
   77 |     double m_advancedThreshold;
   78 |     double m_enterpriseThreshold;
   79 |     
   80 |     // Test execution tracking
   81 |     datetime m_lastCertificationTime;
   82 |     bool m_certificationInProgress;
   83 |     
   84 | public:
   85 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   86 |     //| Constructor & Destructor                                        |
   87 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   88 |     CProductionReadinessCertification()
   89 |     {
   90 |         m_isInitialized = false;
   91 |         m_currentLevel = CERT_LEVEL_NONE;
   92 |         m_overallScore = 0.0;
   93 |         m_testCount = 0;
   94 |         
   95 |         // Set certification thresholds
   96 |         m_basicThreshold = 60.0;
   97 |         m_standardThreshold = 75.0;
   98 |         m_advancedThreshold = 85.0;
   99 |         m_enterpriseThreshold = 95.0;
  100 |         
  101 |         m_lastCertificationTime = 0;
  102 |         m_certificationInProgress = false;
  103 |         
  104 |         ArrayResize(m_testResults, 100); // Initial capacity
  105 |     }
  106 |     
  107 |     ~CProductionReadinessCertification()
  108 |     {
  109 |         ArrayFree(m_testResults);
  110 |     }
  111 |     
  112 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  113 |     //| Initialization                                                   |
  114 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  115 |     bool Initialize()
  116 |     {
  117 |         Print("[CERTIFICATION] Initializing Production Readiness Certification System...");
  118 |         
  119 |         // Reset certification state
  120 |         m_currentLevel = CERT_LEVEL_NONE;
  121 |         m_overallScore = 0.0;
  122 |         m_testCount = 0;
  123 |         m_certificationInProgress = false;
  124 |         
  125 |         // Initialize test results array
  126 |         for(int i = 0; i < ArraySize(m_testResults); i++)
  127 |         {
  128 |             m_testResults[i].Initialize();
  129 |         }
  130 |         
  131 |         m_isInitialized = true;
  132 |         Print("[CERTIFICATION] Production Readiness Certification System initialized successfully");
  133 |         return true;
  134 |     }
  135 |     
  136 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  137 |     //| Main Certification Process                                       |
  138 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  139 |     bool RunFullCertification()
  140 |     {
  141 |         if(!m_isInitialized)
  142 |         {
  143 |             Print("[CERTIFICATION] ERROR: System not initialized");
  144 |             return false;
  145 |         }
  146 |         
  147 |         if(m_certificationInProgress)
  148 |         {
  149 |             Print("[CERTIFICATION] WARNING: Certification already in progress");
  150 |             return false;
  151 |         }
  152 |         
  153 |         Print("[CERTIFICATION] Starting Full Production Readiness Certification...");
  154 |         m_certificationInProgress = true;
  155 |         m_lastCertificationTime = TimeCurrent();
  156 |         
  157 |         // Reset previous results
  158 |         m_testCount = 0;
  159 |         m_overallScore = 0.0;
  160 |         
  161 |         bool allTestsPassed = true;
  162 |         
  163 |         // Execute all certification tests
  164 |         allTestsPassed &= TestCoreFunctionality();
  165 |         allTestsPassed &= TestRiskManagement();
  166 |         allTestsPassed &= TestPerformance();
  167 |         allTestsPassed &= TestStability();
  168 |         allTestsPassed &= TestCompliance();
  169 |         allTestsPassed &= TestIntegration();
  170 |         allTestsPassed &= TestErrorHandling();
  171 |         allTestsPassed &= TestMemoryManagement();
  172 |         
  173 |         // Calculate overall score and certification level
  174 |         CalculateOverallScore();
  175 |         DetermineCertificationLevel();
  176 |         
  177 |         m_certificationInProgress = false;
  178 |         
  179 |         // Generate certification report
  180 |         GenerateCertificationReport();
  181 |         
  182 |         Print(StringFormat("[CERTIFICATION] Full certification completed. Level: %s, Score: %.2f%%", 
  183 |               CertificationLevelToString(m_currentLevel), m_overallScore));
  184 |         
  185 |         return allTestsPassed;
  186 |     }
  187 |     
  188 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  189 |     //| Individual Test Methods                                          |
  190 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  191 |     bool TestCoreFunctionality()
  192 |     {
  193 |         Print("[CERTIFICATION] Testing Core Functionality...");
  194 |         
  195 |         SCertificationResult result;
  196 |         result.category = TEST_CORE_FUNCTIONALITY;
  197 |         result.testName = "Core EA Functions";
  198 |         result.timestamp = TimeCurrent();
  199 |         
  200 |         double score = 0.0;
  201 |         int tests = 0;
  202 |         
  203 |         // Test EA initialization
  204 |         if(CheckEAInitialization())
  205 |         {
  206 |             score += 25.0;
  207 |             result.details += "EA Initialization: PASS; ";
  208 |         }
  209 |         else
  210 |         {
  211 |             result.details += "EA Initialization: FAIL; ";
  212 |         }
  213 |         tests++;
  214 |         
  215 |         // Test symbol information access
  216 |         if(CheckSymbolAccess())
  217 |         {
  218 |             score += 25.0;
  219 |             result.details += "Symbol Access: PASS; ";
  220 |         }
  221 |         else
  222 |         {
  223 |             result.details += "Symbol Access: FAIL; ";
  224 |         }
  225 |         tests++;
  226 |         
  227 |         // Test timeframe handling
  228 |         if(CheckTimeframeHandling())
  229 |         {
  230 |             score += 25.0;
  231 |             result.details += "Timeframe Handling: PASS; ";
  232 |         }
  233 |         else
  234 |         {
  235 |             result.details += "Timeframe Handling: FAIL; ";
  236 |         }
  237 |         tests++;
  238 |         
  239 |         // Test basic calculations
  240 |         if(CheckBasicCalculations())
  241 |         {
  242 |             score += 25.0;
  243 |             result.details += "Basic Calculations: PASS; ";
  244 |         }
  245 |         else
  246 |         {
  247 |             result.details += "Basic Calculations: FAIL; ";
  248 |         }
  249 |         tests++;
  250 |         
  251 |         result.score = score;
  252 |         result.passed = (score >= 75.0);
  253 |         
  254 |         AddTestResult(result);
  255 |         return result.passed;
  256 |     }

  497 |         else
  498 |         {
  499 |             result.details += "Error Detection: FAIL; ";
  500 |         }
  501 |         
  502 |         // Test error recovery
  503 |         if(CheckErrorRecoveryMechanisms())
  504 |         {
  505 |             score += 50.0;
  506 |             result.details += "Error Recovery Mechanisms: PASS; ";
  507 |         }
  508 |         else
  509 |         {
  510 |             result.details += "Error Recovery Mechanisms: FAIL; ";
  511 |         }
  512 |         
  513 |         result.score = score;
  514 |         result.passed = (score >= 75.0);
  515 |         
  516 |         AddTestResult(result);
  517 |         return result.passed;
  518 |     }
  519 |     
  520 |     bool TestMemoryManagement()
  521 |     {
  522 |         Print("[CERTIFICATION] Testing Memory Management...");
  523 |         
  524 |         SCertificationResult result;
  525 |         result.category = TEST_MEMORY_MANAGEMENT;
  526 |         result.testName = "Memory Management";
  527 |         result.timestamp = TimeCurrent();
  528 |         
  529 |         double score = 0.0;
  530 |         
  531 |         // Test memory allocation
  532 |         if(CheckMemoryAllocation())
  533 |         {
  534 |             score += 50.0;
  535 |             result.details += "Memory Allocation: PASS; ";
  536 |         }
  537 |         else
  538 |         {
  539 |             result.details += "Memory Allocation: FAIL; ";
  540 |         }
  541 |         
  542 |         // Test memory cleanup
  543 |         if(CheckMemoryCleanup())
  544 |         {
  545 |             score += 50.0;
  546 |             result.details += "Memory Cleanup: PASS; ";
  547 |         }
  548 |         else
  549 |         {
  550 |             result.details += "Memory Cleanup: FAIL; ";
  551 |         }
  552 |         
  553 |         result.score = score;
  554 |         result.passed = (score >= 80.0);
  555 |         
  556 |         AddTestResult(result);
  557 |         return result.passed;
  558 |     }
  559 |

  692 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  693 |     //| Utility Methods                                                  |
  694 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  695 |     void AddTestResult(const SCertificationResult& result)
  696 |     {
  697 |         if(m_testCount >= ArraySize(m_testResults))
  698 |         {
  699 |             ArrayResize(m_testResults, m_testCount + 50);
  700 |         }
  701 |         
  702 |         m_testResults[m_testCount] = result;
  703 |         m_testCount++;
  704 |     }
  705 |     
  706 |     void CalculateOverallScore()
  707 |     {
  708 |         if(m_testCount == 0)
  709 |         {
  710 |             m_overallScore = 0.0;
  711 |             return;
  712 |         }
  713 |         
  714 |         double totalScore = 0.0;
  715 |         for(int i = 0; i < m_testCount; i++)
  716 |         {
  717 |             totalScore += m_testResults[i].score;
  718 |         }
  719 |         
  720 |         m_overallScore = totalScore / m_testCount;
  721 |     }
  722 |     
  723 |     void DetermineCertificationLevel()
  724 |     {
  725 |         if(m_overallScore >= m_enterpriseThreshold)
  726 |             m_currentLevel = CERT_LEVEL_ENTERPRISE;
  727 |         else if(m_overallScore >= m_advancedThreshold)
  728 |             m_currentLevel = CERT_LEVEL_ADVANCED;
  729 |         else if(m_overallScore >= m_standardThreshold)
  730 |             m_currentLevel = CERT_LEVEL_STANDARD;
  731 |         else if(m_overallScore >= m_basicThreshold)
  732 |             m_currentLevel = CERT_LEVEL_BASIC;
  733 |         else
  734 |             m_currentLevel = CERT_LEVEL_NONE;
  735 |     }
  736 |     
  737 |     void GenerateCertificationReport()
  738 |     {
  739 |         Print("=== PRODUCTION READINESS CERTIFICATION REPORT ===");
  740 |         Print(StringFormat("Certification Level: %s", CertificationLevelToString(m_currentLevel)));
  741 |         Print(StringFormat("Overall Score: %.2f%%", m_overallScore));
  742 |         Print(StringFormat("Tests Executed: %d", m_testCount));
  743 |         Print(StringFormat("Certification Date: %s", TimeToString(m_lastCertificationTime)));
  744 |         Print("=== DETAILED TEST RESULTS ===");
  745 |         
  746 |         for(int i = 0; i < m_testCount; i++)
  747 |         {
  748 |             Print(StringFormat("%s: %s (%.2f%%) - %s", 
  749 |                   m_testResults[i].testName,
  750 |                   m_testResults[i].passed ? "PASS" : "FAIL",
  751 |                   m_testResults[i].score,
  752 |                   m_testResults[i].details));
  753 |         }
  754 |         
  755 |         Print("=== END CERTIFICATION REPORT ===");
  756 |     }
  757 |     
  758 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  759 |     //| Getters                                                          |
  760 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  761 |     ENUM_CERTIFICATION_LEVEL GetCertificationLevel() const { return m_currentLevel; }
  762 |     double GetOverallScore() const { return m_overallScore; }
  763 |     bool IsInitialized() const { return m_isInitialized; }
  764 |     datetime GetLastCertificationTime() const { return m_lastCertificationTime; }
  765 |     bool IsCertificationInProgress() const { return m_certificationInProgress; }
  766 | };

   19 | struct PropFirmRules {
   20 | string firmName;
   21 | 
   22 | // Risk Limits
   23 | double maxDailyLossPercent;    // Max daily loss %
   24 | double maxTotalLossPercent;    // Max total loss %
   25 | double minTradingDays;         // Min trading days
   26 | double maxTradingDays;         // Max trading days for evaluation
   27 | 
   28 | // Position Limits
   29 | double maxRiskPerTrade;        // Max risk per trade %
   30 | double maxLotSize;             // Max lot size
   31 | int maxOpenPositions;          // Max concurrent positions
   32 | 
   33 | // Time Restrictions
   34 | int minHoldTimeSeconds;        // Min position hold time
   35 | bool allowWeekendHolding;      // Can hold over weekend
   36 | bool allowNewsTrading;         // Can trade during news
   37 | 
   38 | // Consistency Rules
   39 | double minWinRate;             // Minimum win rate required
   40 | double minProfitFactor;        // Minimum profit factor
   41 | bool requireConsistency;       // Consistency rule enforcement
   42 | 
   43 | // Scaling Rules
   44 | bool allowScaling;             // Can scale position size
   45 | double maxCorrelatedRisk;      // Max risk on correlated pairs
   46 |

   51 | minTradingDays = 4;

   92 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   93 | //| Prop Firm Auto-Optimizer                                       |
   94 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   95 | class CPropFirmOptimizer {
   96 | private:
   97 | ENUM_PROP_FIRM m_currentFirm;
   98 | PropFirmRules m_rules;
   99 | OptimizedSettings m_settings;
  100 | 
  101 | // Performance Tracking
  102 | double m_currentDailyLoss;
  103 | double m_currentTotalLoss;
  104 | int m_tradingDaysCount;
  105 | int m_todayTradeCount;
  106 | 
  107 | // Compliance Status
  108 | bool m_isCompliant;
  109 | string m_complianceIssues;
  110 | 
  111 | public:
  112 | CPropFirmOptimizer() {
  113 | m_currentFirm = PROP_FIRM_CUSTOM;
  114 | m_rules.SetDefaults();
  115 | m_currentDailyLoss = 0.0;
  116 | m_currentTotalLoss = 0.0;
  117 | m_tradingDaysCount = 0;
  118 | m_todayTradeCount = 0;
  119 | m_isCompliant = true;
  120 | m_complianceIssues = "";
  121 | }
  122 | 
  123 | // 🏆 BREAKTHROUGH: Auto-Configure for Prop Firm
  124 | bool ConfigureForPropFirm(ENUM_PROP_FIRM firmType) {
  125 | m_currentFirm = firmType;
  126 | 
  127 | switch(firmType) {
  128 | case PROP_FIRM_FTMO:
  129 | ConfigureFTMO();
  130 | break;
  131 | case PROP_FIRM_MYFXFUNDS:
  132 | ConfigureMyForexFunds();
  133 | break;
  134 | case PROP_FIRM_TOPTRADER:
  135 | ConfigureTopTrader();
  136 | break;
  137 | case PROP_FIRM_TRUEFOREXFUNDS:
  138 | ConfigureTrueForexFunds();
  139 | break;
  140 | case PROP_FIRM_NOVA:
  141 | ConfigureNova();
  142 | break;
  143 | default:
  144 | m_rules.SetDefaults();
  145 | break;
  146 | }
  147 | 
  148 | // Optimize settings based on rules
  149 | OptimizeSettingsForCompliance();
  150 | 
  151 | Print("[🏆 PROP OPTIMIZER] Configured for ", m_rules.firmName);
  152 | PrintOptimizedSettings();
  153 | 
  154 | return true;
  155 | }
  156 | 
  157 | // 🎯 BREAKTHROUGH: Real-time Compliance Monitoring
  158 | bool CheckCompliance() {
  159 | m_isCompliant = true;
  160 | m_complianceIssues = "";
  161 | 
  162 | // Check daily loss limit
  163 | if(m_currentDailyLoss > m_rules.maxDailyLossPercent) {
  164 | m_isCompliant = false;
  165 | m_complianceIssues += "Daily loss limit exceeded; ";
  166 | }
  167 | 
  168 | // Check total loss limit
  169 | if(m_currentTotalLoss > m_rules.maxTotalLossPercent) {
  170 | m_isCompliant = false;
  171 | m_complianceIssues += "Total loss limit exceeded; ";
  172 | }
  173 | 
  174 | // Check trading days
  175 | if(m_tradingDaysCount < m_rules.minTradingDays) {
  176 | m_complianceIssues += StringFormat("Need %d more trading days; ", 
  177 | (int)(m_rules.minTradingDays - m_tradingDaysCount));
  178 | }
  179 | 
  180 | // Check max trading days
  181 | if(m_tradingDaysCount > m_rules.maxTradingDays) {
  182 | m_isCompliant = false;
  183 | m_complianceIssues += "Exceeded maximum trading days; ";
  184 | }
  185 | 
  186 | if(!m_isCompliant) {
  187 | Print("[🚨 COMPLIANCE ALERT] ", m_complianceIssues);
  188 | }
  189 | 
  190 | return m_isCompliant;
  191 | }
  192 | 
  193 | // 🚀 BREAKTHROUGH: Dynamic Risk Adjustment
  194 | double GetOptimizedRiskForTrade() {
  195 | if(!CheckCompliance()) {
  196 | return 0.0; // No trading if not compliant
  197 | }
  198 | 
  199 | double baseRisk = m_settings.riskPerTrade;
  200 | 
  201 | // Reduce risk if approaching limits
  202 | double remainingDailyRisk = m_rules.maxDailyLossPercent - m_currentDailyLoss;
  203 | double remainingTotalRisk = m_rules.maxTotalLossPercent - m_currentTotalLoss;
  204 | 
  205 | // Use the most restrictive limit
  206 | double maxAllowedRisk = MathMin(remainingDailyRisk, remainingTotalRisk);
  207 | double adjustedRisk = MathMin(baseRisk, maxAllowedRisk * 0.5); // Use 50% of remaining
  208 | 
  209 | // Additional safety for end of evaluation period
  210 | if(m_tradingDaysCount > m_rules.maxTradingDays * 0.8) {
  211 | adjustedRisk *= 0.7; // 30% reduction in final phase
  212 | }
  213 | 
  214 | return MathMax(0.1, adjustedRisk); // Minimum 0.1% risk
  215 | }
  216 | 
  217 | // 📊 Update Performance Metrics
  218 | void UpdatePerformanceMetrics(double tradeResult) {
  219 | if(tradeResult < 0) {
  220 | double lossPercent = MathAbs(tradeResult) / AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_BALANCE) * 100;
  221 | m_currentDailyLoss += lossPercent;
  222 | m_currentTotalLoss += lossPercent;
  223 | }
  224 | 
  225 | m_todayTradeCount++;
  226 | }
  227 | 
  228 | void OnNewDay() {
  229 | if(m_todayTradeCount > 0) {
  230 | m_tradingDaysCount++;
  231 | }
  232 | m_currentDailyLoss = 0.0;
  233 | m_todayTradeCount = 0;
  234 | }

  238 | PropFirmRules GetCurrentRules() const { return m_rules; }
  239 | bool IsCompliant() const { return m_isCompliant; }
  240 | string GetComplianceIssues() const { return m_complianceIssues; }

  295 | void ConfigureNova() {
  296 | m_rules.firmName = "Nova";
  297 | m_rules.maxDailyLossPercent = 3.0;
  298 | m_rules.maxTotalLossPercent = 6.0;
  299 | m_rules.minTradingDays = 5;
  300 | m_rules.maxTradingDays = 30;
  301 | m_rules.maxRiskPerTrade = 1.0;
  302 | m_rules.minHoldTimeSeconds = 600; // 10 minutes minimum
  303 | m_rules.allowWeekendHolding = false;
  304 | m_rules.allowNewsTrading = false;
  305 | m_rules.requireConsistency = true;
  306 | }
  307 | 
  308 | void OptimizeSettingsForCompliance() {
  309 | // Conservative base settings
  310 | m_settings.riskPerTrade = MathMin(1.5, m_rules.maxRiskPerTrade * 0.8);
  311 | m_settings.maxDailyRisk = m_rules.maxDailyLossPercent * 0.6;
  312 | m_settings.maxDailyTrades = CalculateOptimalDailyTrades();
  313 | 
  314 | // Signal quality based on risk tolerance
  315 | if(m_rules.maxRiskPerTrade <= 1.0) {
  316 | m_settings.minSignalProbability = 0.8; // Very selective
  317 | m_settings.minRiskReward = 2.0;
  318 | } else if(m_rules.maxRiskPerTrade <= 1.5) {
  319 | m_settings.minSignalProbability = 0.75;
  320 | m_settings.minRiskReward = 1.8;
  321 | } else {
  322 | m_settings.minSignalProbability = 0.7;
  323 | m_settings.minRiskReward = 1.5;
  324 | }
  325 | 
  326 | // Time management
  327 | m_settings.minHoldTime = m_rules.minHoldTimeSeconds;
  328 | m_settings.enableNewsFilter = !m_rules.allowNewsTrading;
  329 | 
  330 | // Position management
  331 | m_settings.enableScaling = m_rules.allowScaling;
  332 | m_settings.maxPosition = m_rules.maxLotSize;
  333 | 
  334 | // Spread limits (tighter for stricter firms)
  335 | if(m_rules.maxRiskPerTrade <= 1.0) {
  336 | m_settings.spreadLimit = 1.5; // Very tight
  337 | } else {
  338 | m_settings.spreadLimit = 2.5; // Standard
  339 | }
  340 | 
  341 | m_settings.optimizationReason = StringFormat("Optimized for %s compliance", m_rules.firmName);
  342 | }
  343 | 
  344 | int CalculateOptimalDailyTrades() {
  345 | // Calculate safe daily trade count
  346 | double avgRiskPerTrade = m_settings.riskPerTrade;
  347 | double maxDailyRisk = m_rules.maxDailyLossPercent * 0.6; // Use 60% of limit
  348 | 
  349 | int maxTrades = (int)(maxDailyRisk / avgRiskPerTrade);
  350 | return MathMax(1, MathMin(maxTrades, 8)); // Cap at 8 trades per day
  351 | }
  352 | 
  353 | void PrintOptimizedSettings() {
  354 | Print("[📊 OPTIMIZED SETTINGS]");
  355 | Print("  Risk per trade: ", DoubleToString(m_settings.riskPerTrade, 1), "%");
  356 | Print("  Max daily trades: ", m_settings.maxDailyTrades);
  357 | Print("  Min signal probability: ", DoubleToString(m_settings.minSignalProbability * 100, 0), "%");
  358 | Print("  Min R:R ratio: ", DoubleToString(m_settings.minRiskReward, 1));
  359 | Print("  Min hold time: ", m_settings.minHoldTime, " seconds");
  360 | Print("  News filter: ", m_settings.enableNewsFilter ? "ENABLED" : "DISABLED");
  361 | Print("  Spread limit: ", DoubleToString(m_settings.spreadLimit, 1), " pips");
  362 | }
  363 | };
  364 | 
  365 | #endif // PROP_FIRM_AUTO_OPTIMIZER_MQH 
  366 |

   89 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   90 | //| 🎯 SONIC R STRATEGY IMPLEMENTATION                               |
   91 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   92 | class CSonicRTradingStrategy : public ITradingStrategy
   93 | {
   94 | private:
   95 | string m_name;
   96 | double m_dragonThreshold;
   97 | double m_waveThreshold;
   98 | double m_confluenceThreshold;
   99 | double m_lastConfidence;
  100 | ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE m_lastSignal;
  101 | 
  102 | public:
  103 | CSonicRTradingStrategy(string name = "SonicR_Enhanced") {
  104 | m_name = name;
  105 | m_dragonThreshold = 0.7;
  106 | m_waveThreshold = 0.6;
  107 | m_confluenceThreshold = 0.75;
  108 | m_lastConfidence = 0.0;
  109 | m_lastSignal = SIGNAL_NONE;
  110 | }
  111 | 
  112 | bool ShouldEnter(const MarketData& data) override {
  113 | // Sonic R entry logic
  114 | bool dragonAligned = data.dragonScore >= m_dragonThreshold;
  115 | bool waveConfirmed = data.waveScore >= m_waveThreshold;
  116 | bool confluence = (data.dragonScore + data.waveScore + data.pvsraScore) / 3.0 >= m_confluenceThreshold;
  117 | 
  118 | return (dragonAligned && waveConfirmed && confluence);
  119 | }
  120 | 
  121 | double CalculatePositionSize(double accountBalance, double riskPercent) override {
  122 | // Kelly Criterion enhanced position sizing
  123 | double baseSize = accountBalance * (riskPercent / 100.0);
  124 | double confidenceMultiplier = m_lastConfidence;
  125 | 
  126 | // Adjust size based on signal confidence
  127 | if(confidenceMultiplier >= 0.9) return baseSize * 1.2;
  128 | else if(confidenceMultiplier >= 0.8) return baseSize * 1.0;
  129 | else if(confidenceMultiplier >= 0.7) return baseSize * 0.8;
  130 | else return baseSize * 0.5;
  131 | }
  132 | 
  133 | ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE GenerateSignal() override {
  134 | // Placeholder - will integrate with actual analysis
  135 | MarketData data;
  136 | data.dragonScore = 0.8;  // Would get from actual analysis
  137 | data.waveScore = 0.7;
  138 | data.pvsraScore = 0.75;
  139 | 
  140 | if(ShouldEnter(data)) {
  141 | // 🎯 PHASE 2: Determine direction via unified system
  142 | double currentPrice = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
  143 | 
  144 | CUnifiedIndicatorManager* manager = CUnifiedIndicatorManager::GetInstance();
  145 | if(manager == NULL) {
  146 | Print("❌ [PHASE 2] Architecture_DesignPatterns: Unified manager not available");
  147 | return SIGNAL_NONE;
  148 | }
  149 | 
  150 | // OLD CODE (DUPLICATED):
  151 | // int ema89Handle = iMA(_Symbol, PERIOD_H1, 89, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
  152 | 
  153 | // NEW CODE (UNIFIED SYSTEM):
  154 | int ema89Handle = manager.GetOptimizedEMAHandle(_Symbol, PERIOD_H1, 89, PRICE_CLOSE);
  155 | double ema89[1];
  156 | 
  157 | // Log migration success
  158 | manager.MigrateLegacyIndicatorCalls(
  159 | "Architecture_DesignPatterns.mqh",
  160 | 116,
  161 | "GenerateSignal() EMA 89 iMA() call",
  162 | "Unified EMA handle system"
  163 | );
  164 | 
  165 | if(CopyBuffer(ema89Handle, 0, 0, 1, ema89) > 0) {
  166 | m_lastSignal = (currentPrice > ema89[0]) ? SIGNAL_BUY : SIGNAL_SELL;
  167 | m_lastConfidence = (data.dragonScore + data.waveScore + data.pvsraScore) / 3.0;
  168 | }
  169 | IndicatorRelease(ema89Handle);
  170 | } else {
  171 | m_lastSignal = SIGNAL_NONE;
  172 | m_lastConfidence = 0.0;
  173 | }
  174 | 
  175 | return m_lastSignal;
  176 | }
  177 | 
  178 | double GetSignalConfidence() override { return m_lastConfidence; }
  179 | string GetStrategyName() override { return m_name; }
  180 | 
  181 | void UpdateParameters(double dragonThresh, double waveThresh, double confluenceThresh) override {
  182 | m_dragonThreshold = MathMax(0.1, MathMin(1.0, dragonThresh));
  183 | m_waveThreshold = MathMax(0.1, MathMin(1.0, waveThresh));
  184 | m_confluenceThreshold = MathMax(0.1, MathMin(1.0, confluenceThresh));
  185 | }
  186 | };

  188 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  189 | //| 🎯 MARKET EVENT MANAGER (OBSERVER PATTERN)                      |
  190 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  191 | class CMarketEventManager
  192 | {
  193 | private:
  194 | IMarketObserver m_observers[20];
  195 | int m_observerCount;
  196 | bool m_eventLogging;
  197 | 
  198 | public:
  199 | CMarketEventManager() {
  200 | m_observerCount = 0;
  201 | m_eventLogging = true;
  202 | for(int i = 0; i < 20; i++) {
  203 | m_observers[i] = NULL;
  204 | }
  205 | }
  206 | 
  207 | bool Subscribe(IMarketObserver* observer) {
  208 | if(m_observerCount >= 20 || observer == NULL) return false;
  209 | 
  210 | m_observers[m_observerCount] = observer;
  211 | m_observerCount++;
  212 | 
  213 | if(m_eventLogging) {
  214 | Print(StringFormat("📡 Observer subscribed. Total observers: %d", m_observerCount));
  215 | }
  216 | return true;
  217 | }
  218 | 
  219 | bool Unsubscribe(IMarketObserver* observer) {
  220 | for(int i = 0; i < m_observerCount; i++) {
  221 | if(m_observers[i] == observer) {
  222 | // Shift remaining observers
  223 | for(int j = i; j < m_observerCount - 1; j++) {
  224 | m_observers[j] = m_observers[j + 1];
  225 | }
  226 | m_observers[m_observerCount - 1] = NULL;
  227 | m_observerCount--;
  228 | 
  229 | if(m_eventLogging) {
  230 | Print(StringFormat("📡 Observer unsubscribed. Total observers: %d", m_observerCount));
  231 | }
  232 | return true;
  233 | }
  234 | }
  235 | return false;
  236 | }
  237 | 
  238 | void NotifyNewBar(string symbol, ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe) {
  239 | if(m_eventLogging) {
  240 | Print(StringFormat("📊 NEW BAR EVENT: %s %s", symbol, TimeframeToString(timeframe)));
  241 | }
  242 | 
  243 | for(int i = 0; i < m_observerCount; i++) {
  244 | if(m_observers[i] != NULL) {
  245 | m_observers[i].OnNewBar(symbol, timeframe);
  246 | }
  247 | }
  248 | }
  249 | 
  250 | void NotifySignalGenerated(ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE signal, double confidence) {
  251 | if(m_eventLogging) {
  252 | Print(StringFormat("🎯 SIGNAL EVENT: %s (%.1f%%)", SignalTypeToString(signal), confidence * 100));
  253 | }
  254 | 
  255 | for(int i = 0; i < m_observerCount; i++) {
  256 | if(m_observers[i] != NULL) {
  257 | m_observers[i].OnSignalGenerated(signal, confidence);
  258 | }
  259 | }
  260 | }
  261 | 
  262 | void NotifyTradeExecuted(int ticket, ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE type, double lots) {
  263 | if(m_eventLogging) {
  264 | Print(StringFormat("💼 TRADE EVENT: Ticket %d, %s, %.2f lots", ticket, TradeTypeToString(type), lots));
  265 | }
  266 | 
  267 | for(int i = 0; i < m_observerCount; i++) {
  268 | if(m_observers[i] != NULL) {
  269 | m_observers[i].OnTradeExecuted(ticket, type, lots);
  270 | }
  271 | }
  272 | }
  273 | 
  274 | void NotifyTradeClosed(int ticket, double profit) {
  275 | if(m_eventLogging) {
  276 | Print(StringFormat("💰 TRADE CLOSED: Ticket %d, P&L: %.2f", ticket, profit));
  277 | }
  278 | 
  279 | for(int i = 0; i < m_observerCount; i++) {
  280 | if(m_observers[i] != NULL) {
  281 | m_observers[i].OnTradeClosed(ticket, profit);
  282 | }
  283 | }
  284 | }
  285 | 
  286 | void NotifyMarketEvent(string eventType, string description) {
  287 | if(m_eventLogging) {
  288 | Print(StringFormat("📢 MARKET EVENT: %s - %s", eventType, description));
  289 | }
  290 | 
  291 | for(int i = 0; i < m_observerCount; i++) {
  292 | if(m_observers[i] != NULL) {
  293 | m_observers[i].OnMarketEvent(eventType, description);
  294 | }
  295 | }
  296 | }
  297 | 
  298 | int GetObserverCount() { return m_observerCount; }
  299 | void EnableEventLogging(bool enable) { m_eventLogging = enable; }
  300 | };

  302 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  303 | //| 🎯 ANALYZER FACTORY IMPLEMENTATION                               |
  304 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  305 | class CAnalyzerFactory : public IAnalyzerFactory
  306 | {
  307 | private:
  308 | IAnalyzer m_createdAnalyzers[50];
  309 | int m_analyzerCount;
  310 | 
  311 | public:
  312 | CAnalyzerFactory() {
  313 | m_analyzerCount = 0;
  314 | for(int i = 0; i < 50; i++) {
  315 | m_createdAnalyzers[i] = NULL;
  316 | }
  317 | }
  318 | 
  319 | IAnalyzer CreateDragonAnalyzer(string symbol) override {
  320 | // Create Dragon Band analyzer
  321 | CDragonBandAnalyzer* analyzer = new CDragonBandAnalyzer();
  322 | if(analyzer != NULL && analyzer.Initialize(symbol)) {
  323 | RegisterAnalyzer((IAnalyzer*)analyzer);
  324 | Print("🐉 Dragon Band Analyzer created for " + symbol);
  325 | return (IAnalyzer*)analyzer;
  326 | }
  327 | 
  328 | if(analyzer != NULL) delete analyzer;
  329 | return NULL;
  330 | }
  331 | 
  332 | IAnalyzer CreateWaveAnalyzer(string symbol) override {
  333 | // Create Wave Pattern analyzer
  334 | CSonicRWavePatternAnalyzer* analyzer = new CSonicRWavePatternAnalyzer();
  335 | if(analyzer != NULL && analyzer.Initialize(symbol)) {
  336 | RegisterAnalyzer((IAnalyzer*)analyzer);
  337 | Print("🌊 Wave Pattern Analyzer created for " + symbol);
  338 | return (IAnalyzer*)analyzer;
  339 | }
  340 | 
  341 | if(analyzer != NULL) delete analyzer;
  342 | return NULL;
  343 | }
  344 | 
  345 | IAnalyzer CreatePVSRAAnalyzer(string symbol) override {
  346 | // Create PVSRA analyzer
  347 | CPVSRAManager* analyzer = new CPVSRAManager();
  348 | if(analyzer != NULL && analyzer.Initialize(symbol)) {
  349 | RegisterAnalyzer((IAnalyzer*)analyzer);
  350 | Print("📊 PVSRA Analyzer created for " + symbol);
  351 | return (IAnalyzer*)analyzer;
  352 | }
  353 | 
  354 | if(analyzer != NULL) delete analyzer;
  355 | return NULL;
  356 | }
  357 | 
  358 | IAnalyzer CreateSMCAnalyzer(string symbol) override {
  359 | // Create SMC analyzer
  360 | CSMCAnalyzer* analyzer = new CSMCAnalyzer();
  361 | if(analyzer != NULL && analyzer.Initialize(symbol)) {
  362 | RegisterAnalyzer((IAnalyzer*)analyzer);
  363 | Print("💰 SMC Analyzer created for " + symbol);
  364 | return (IAnalyzer*)analyzer;
  365 | }
  366 | 
  367 | if(analyzer != NULL) delete analyzer;
  368 | return NULL;
  369 | }
  370 | 
  371 | void DestroyAnalyzer(IAnalyzer analyzer) override {
  372 | for(int i = 0; i < m_analyzerCount; i++) {
  373 | if(m_createdAnalyzers[i] == analyzer) {
  374 | delete m_createdAnalyzers[i];
  375 | 
  376 | // Shift remaining analyzers
  377 | for(int j = i; j < m_analyzerCount - 1; j++) {
  378 | m_createdAnalyzers[j] = m_createdAnalyzers[j + 1];
  379 | }
  380 | m_createdAnalyzers[m_analyzerCount - 1] = NULL;
  381 | m_analyzerCount--;
  382 | 
  383 | Print("🗑️ Analyzer destroyed");
  384 | return;
  385 | }
  386 | }
  387 | }
  388 | 
  389 | ~CAnalyzerFactory() {
  390 | // Cleanup all created analyzers
  391 | for(int i = 0; i < m_analyzerCount; i++) {
  392 | if(m_createdAnalyzers[i] != NULL) {
  393 | delete m_createdAnalyzers[i];
  394 | }
  395 | }
  396 | m_analyzerCount = 0;
  397 | }
  398 | 
  399 | private:
  400 | void RegisterAnalyzer(IAnalyzer analyzer) {
  401 | if(m_analyzerCount < 50) {
  402 | m_createdAnalyzers[m_analyzerCount] = analyzer;
  403 | m_analyzerCount++;
  404 | }
  405 | }
  406 | };

  408 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  409 | //| 🎯 TRADE COMMAND IMPLEMENTATION (COMMAND PATTERN)               |
  410 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  411 | class CTradeCommand : public ICommand
  412 | {
  413 | private:
  414 | ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE m_tradeType;
  415 | double m_lotSize;
  416 | double m_entryPrice;
  417 | double m_stopLoss;
  418 | double m_takeProfit;
  419 | int m_ticket;
  420 | datetime m_executionTime;
  421 | bool m_executed;
  422 | bool m_reversed;
  423 | string m_description;
  424 | 
  425 | public:
  426 | CTradeCommand(ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE type, double lots, double entry, double sl, double tp) {
  427 | m_tradeType = type;
  428 | m_lotSize = lots;
  429 | m_entryPrice = entry;
  430 | m_stopLoss = sl;
  431 | m_takeProfit = tp;
  432 | m_ticket = -1;
  433 | m_executionTime = 0;
  434 | m_executed = false;
  435 | m_reversed = false;
  436 | m_description = StringFormat("%s %.2f lots @ %.5f", TradeTypeToString(type), lots, entry);
  437 | }
  438 | 
  439 | bool Execute() override {
  440 | if(m_executed) return false;
  441 | 
  442 | MqlTradeRequest request = {};
  443 | MqlTradeResult result = {};
  444 | 
  445 | request.action = TRADE_ACTION_DEAL;
  446 | request.symbol = _Symbol;
  447 | request.volume = m_lotSize;
  448 | request.type = (m_tradeType == SIGNAL_BUY) ? ORDER_TYPE_BUY : ORDER_TYPE_SELL;
  449 | request.price = (m_tradeType == SIGNAL_BUY) ? 
  450 | SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_ASK) : 
  451 | SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
  452 | request.sl = m_stopLoss;
  453 | request.tp = m_takeProfit;
  454 | request.deviation = 3;
  455 | request.magic = 12345;
  456 | request.comment = "SonicR_Command_" + TradeTypeToString(m_tradeType);
  457 | 
  458 | bool success = OrderSend(request, result);
  459 | 
  460 | if(success && result.retcode == TRADE_RETCODE_DONE) {
  461 | m_ticket = (int)result.order;
  462 | m_executionTime = TimeCurrent();
  463 | m_executed = true;
  464 | 
  465 | Print(StringFormat("✅ COMMAND EXECUTED: %s | Ticket: %d", m_description, m_ticket));
  466 | return true;
  467 | } else {
  468 | Print(StringFormat("❌ COMMAND FAILED: %s | Error: %d", m_description, result.retcode));
  469 | return false;
  470 | }
  471 | }
  472 | 
  473 | bool Undo() override {
  474 | if(!m_executed || m_reversed || m_ticket < 0) return false;
  475 | 
  476 | // Close the position
  477 | MqlTradeRequest request = {};
  478 | MqlTradeResult result = {};
  479 | 
  480 | request.action = TRADE_ACTION_DEAL;
  481 | request.symbol = _Symbol;
  482 | request.volume = m_lotSize;
  483 | request.type = (m_tradeType == SIGNAL_BUY) ? ORDER_TYPE_SELL : ORDER_TYPE_BUY;
  484 | request.price = (m_tradeType == SIGNAL_BUY) ? 
  485 | SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID) : 
  486 | SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_ASK);
  487 | request.deviation = 3;
  488 | request.magic = 12345;
  489 | request.comment = "SonicR_Undo_" + IntegerToString(m_ticket);
  490 | 
  491 | bool success = OrderSend(request, result);
  492 | 
  493 | if(success && result.retcode == TRADE_RETCODE_DONE) {
  494 | m_reversed = true;
  495 | Print(StringFormat("↩️ COMMAND UNDONE: Ticket %d closed", m_ticket));
  496 | return true;
  497 | } else {
  498 | Print(StringFormat("❌ UNDO FAILED: Ticket %d | Error: %d", m_ticket, result.retcode));
  499 | return false;
  500 | }
  501 | }
  502 | 
  503 | string GetDescription() override { return m_description; }
  504 | bool IsReversible() override { return m_executed && !m_reversed; }
  505 | datetime GetExecutionTime() override { return m_executionTime; }
  506 | int GetTicket() { return m_ticket; }
  507 | bool IsExecuted() { return m_executed; }
  508 | };
  509 | 
  510 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  511 | //| 🎯 COMMAND QUEUE MANAGER                                         |
  512 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  513 | class CCommandQueueManager
  514 | {
  515 | private:
  516 | ICommand m_commandQueue[100];
  517 | int m_queueHead;
  518 | int m_queueTail;
  519 | int m_commandCount;
  520 | int m_executedCount;
  521 | 
  522 | public:
  523 | CCommandQueueManager() {
  524 | m_queueHead = 0;
  525 | m_queueTail = 0;
  526 | m_commandCount = 0;
  527 | m_executedCount = 0;
  528 | 
  529 | for(int i = 0; i < 100; i++) {
  530 | m_commandQueue[i] = NULL;
  531 | }
  532 | }
  533 | 
  534 | bool EnqueueCommand(ICommand* command) {
  535 | if(m_commandCount >= 100 || command == NULL) return false;
  536 | 
  537 | m_commandQueue[m_queueTail] = command;
  538 | m_queueTail = (m_queueTail + 1) % 100;
  539 | m_commandCount++;
  540 | 
  541 | Print(StringFormat("📋 Command queued: %s | Queue size: %d", 
  542 | command.GetDescription(), m_commandCount));
  543 | return true;
  544 | }
  545 | 
  546 | bool ExecuteNext() {
  547 | if(m_commandCount == 0) return false;
  548 | 
  549 | ICommand* command = m_commandQueue[m_queueHead];
  550 | if(command != NULL) {
  551 | bool success = command.Execute();
  552 | 
  553 | m_queueHead = (m_queueHead + 1) % 100;
  554 | m_commandCount--;
  555 | 
  556 | if(success) m_executedCount++;
  557 | 
  558 | return success;
  559 | }
  560 | 
  561 | return false;
  562 | }
  563 | 
  564 | bool ExecuteAll() {
  565 | int executed = 0;
  566 | while(m_commandCount > 0) {
  567 | if(ExecuteNext()) executed++;
  568 | }
  569 | 
  570 | Print(StringFormat("📋 Batch execution completed: %d/%d commands successful", 
  571 | executed, executed + (m_commandCount > 0 ? m_commandCount : 0)));
  572 | return executed > 0;
  573 | }
  574 | 
  575 | int GetQueueSize() { return m_commandCount; }
  576 | int GetExecutedCount() { return m_executedCount; }
  577 | 
  578 | ~CCommandQueueManager() {
  579 | // Clean up remaining commands
  580 | while(m_commandCount > 0) {
  581 | ICommand* command = m_commandQueue[m_queueHead];
  582 | if(command != NULL) {
  583 | delete command;
  584 | }
  585 | m_queueHead = (m_queueHead + 1) % 100;
  586 | m_commandCount--;
  587 | }
  588 | }
  589 | };
  590 | 
  591 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  592 | //| 🎯 GLOBAL PATTERN INSTANCES                                      |
  593 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  594 | // Global instances for architecture enhancement
  595 | CMarketEventManager* g_EventManager = NULL;
  596 | CAnalyzerFactory* g_AnalyzerFactory = NULL;
  597 | CCommandQueueManager* g_CommandQueue = NULL;
  598 | CSonicRTradingStrategy* g_SonicRStrategy = NULL;
  599 | 
  600 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  601 | //| 🎯 PATTERN INITIALIZATION FUNCTION                               |
  602 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  603 | bool InitializeDesignPatterns() {
  604 | Print("🏗️ Initializing Design Patterns Architecture...");
  605 | 
  606 | // Initialize Event Manager (Observer Pattern)
  607 | if(g_EventManager == NULL) {
  608 | g_EventManager = new CMarketEventManager();
  609 | Print("✅ Event Manager (Observer Pattern) initialized");
  610 | }
  611 | 
  612 | // Initialize Analyzer Factory (Factory Pattern)
  613 | if(g_AnalyzerFactory == NULL) {
  614 | g_AnalyzerFactory = new CAnalyzerFactory();
  615 | Print("✅ Analyzer Factory (Factory Pattern) initialized");
  616 | }
  617 | 
  618 | // Initialize Command Queue (Command Pattern)
  619 | if(g_CommandQueue == NULL) {
  620 | g_CommandQueue = new CCommandQueueManager();
  621 | Print("✅ Command Queue (Command Pattern) initialized");
  622 | }
  623 | 
  624 | // Initialize Sonic R Strategy (Strategy Pattern)
  625 | if(g_SonicRStrategy == NULL) {
  626 | g_SonicRStrategy = new CSonicRTradingStrategy("SonicR_Enhanced_v5.0");
  627 | Print("✅ Sonic R Strategy (Strategy Pattern) initialized");
  628 | }
  629 | 
  630 | Print("🏗️ Design Patterns Architecture initialization complete!");
  631 | return true;
  632 | }
  633 | 
  634 | void DeinitializeDesignPatterns() {
  635 | Print("🏗️ Cleaning up Design Patterns Architecture...");
  636 | 
  637 | if(g_SonicRStrategy != NULL) {
  638 | delete g_SonicRStrategy;
  639 | g_SonicRStrategy = NULL;
  640 | }
  641 | 
  642 | if(g_CommandQueue != NULL) {
  643 | delete g_CommandQueue;
  644 | g_CommandQueue = NULL;
  645 | }
  646 | 
  647 | if(g_AnalyzerFactory != NULL) {
  648 | delete g_AnalyzerFactory;
  649 | g_AnalyzerFactory = NULL;
  650 | }
  651 | 
  652 | if(g_EventManager != NULL) {
  653 | delete g_EventManager;
  654 | g_EventManager = NULL;
  655 | }
  656 | 
  657 | Print("🏗️ Design Patterns cleanup complete");
  658 | }
  659 | 
  660 | #endif // ENABLE_DESIGN_PATTERNS - End of disabled code block
  661 | 
  662 | #endif // ARCHITECTURE_DESIGN_PATTERNS_MQH 
  663 | 
  664 |

  188 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  189 |     //| Main Operations                                                  |
  190 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  191 |     bool StartAllComponents()
  192 |     {
  193 |         if(!m_isInitialized)
  194 |         {
  195 |             Print("[PHASE6_MANAGER] ERROR: Manager not initialized");
  196 |             return false;
  197 |         }
  198 |         
  199 |         Print("[PHASE6_MANAGER] Starting all Phase 6 components...");
  200 |         m_isRunning = true;
  201 |         m_activeComponents = 0;
  202 |         
  203 |         bool allStarted = true;
  204 |         
  205 |         // Start each component
  206 |         for(int i = 0; i < 6; i++)
  207 |         {
  208 |             if(StartComponent((ENUM_PHASE6_COMPONENT)i))
  209 |             {
  210 |                 m_activeComponents++;
  211 |             }
  212 |             else
  213 |             {
  214 |                 allStarted = false;
  215 |             }
  216 |         }
  217 |         
  218 |         // Perform initial health check
  219 |         PerformHealthCheck();
  220 |         
  221 |         Print(StringFormat("[PHASE6_MANAGER] Started %d/%d components successfully", 
  222 |               m_activeComponents, 6));
  223 |         
  224 |         return allStarted;
  225 |     }
  226 |     
  227 |     bool StartComponent(ENUM_PHASE6_COMPONENT componentType)
  228 |     {
  229 |         if(componentType < 0 || componentType >= 6)
  230 |         {
  231 |             Print("[PHASE6_MANAGER] ERROR: Invalid component type");
  232 |             return false;
  233 |         }
  234 |         
  235 |         SPhase6ComponentInfo& component = m_components[componentType];
  236 |         
  237 |         Print(StringFormat("[PHASE6_MANAGER] Starting component: %s", component.name));
  238 |         
  239 |         component.status = PHASE6_STATUS_INITIALIZING;
  240 |         component.lastUpdate = TimeCurrent();
  241 |         
  242 |         bool success = false;
  243 |         
  244 |         // Start specific component based on type
  245 |         switch(componentType)
  246 |         {
  247 |             case PHASE6_LIVE_VALIDATION:
  248 |                 success = StartLiveValidation();
  249 |                 break;
  250 |                 
  251 |             case PHASE6_PROP_COMPLIANCE:
  252 |                 success = StartPropCompliance();
  253 |                 break;
  254 |                 
  255 |             case PHASE6_PERFORMANCE_MONITOR:
  256 |                 success = StartPerformanceMonitor();
  257 |                 break;
  258 |                 
  259 |             case PHASE6_VALIDATION_REPORTS:
  260 |                 success = StartValidationReports();
  261 |                 break;
  262 |                 
  263 |             case PHASE6_LIVE_TESTING:
  264 |                 success = StartLiveTesting();
  265 |                 break;
  266 |                 
  267 |             case PHASE6_PRODUCTION_CERT:
  268 |                 success = StartProductionCert();
  269 |                 break;
  270 |         }
  271 |         
  272 |         if(success)
  273 |         {
  274 |             component.status = PHASE6_STATUS_ACTIVE;
  275 |             component.isEnabled = true;
  276 |             component.healthScore = 100.0;
  277 |             Print(StringFormat("[PHASE6_MANAGER] Component %s started successfully", component.name));
  278 |         }
  279 |         else
  280 |         {
  281 |             component.status = PHASE6_STATUS_ERROR;
  282 |             component.lastError = "Failed to start component";
  283 |             Print(StringFormat("[PHASE6_MANAGER] ERROR: Failed to start component %s", component.name));
  284 |         }
  285 |         
  286 |         component.lastUpdate = TimeCurrent();
  287 |         return success;
  288 |     }

  340 |     
  341 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  342 |     //| Health Monitoring                                                |
  343 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  344 |     void PerformHealthCheck()
  345 |     {
  346 |         if(!m_isInitialized)
  347 |             return;
  348 |             
  349 |         Print("[PHASE6_MANAGER] Performing health check...");
  350 |         
  351 |         double totalHealth = 0.0;
  352 |         int healthyComponents = 0;
  353 |         
  354 |         for(int i = 0; i < 6; i++)
  355 |         {
  356 |             SPhase6ComponentInfo& component = m_components[i];
  357 |             
  358 |             if(component.isEnabled && component.status == PHASE6_STATUS_ACTIVE)
  359 |             {
  360 |                 // Check component health
  361 |                 double health = CheckComponentHealth((ENUM_PHASE6_COMPONENT)i);
  362 |                 component.healthScore = health;
  363 |                 totalHealth += health;
  364 |                 healthyComponents++;
  365 |                 
  366 |                 if(health < 50.0)
  367 |                 {
  368 |                     Print(StringFormat("[PHASE6_MANAGER] WARNING: Component %s health is low: %.2f%%", 
  369 |                           component.name, health));
  370 |                     
  371 |                     if(m_autoRestart && health < 25.0)
  372 |                     {
  373 |                         Print(StringFormat("[PHASE6_MANAGER] Auto-restarting component: %s", component.name));
  374 |                         RestartComponent((ENUM_PHASE6_COMPONENT)i);
  375 |                     }
  376 |                 }
  377 |             }
  378 |         }
  379 |         
  380 |         m_overallHealthScore = (healthyComponents > 0) ? (totalHealth / healthyComponents) : 0.0;
  381 |         m_lastHealthCheck = TimeCurrent();
  382 |         
  383 |         Print(StringFormat("[PHASE6_MANAGER] Health check completed. Overall health: %.2f%%", 
  384 |               m_overallHealthScore));
  385 |     }
  386 |     
  387 |     double CheckComponentHealth(ENUM_PHASE6_COMPONENT componentType)
  388 |     {
  389 |         // Simplified health check - in real implementation, this would check:
  390 |         // - Component responsiveness
  391 |         // - Error rates
  392 |         // - Performance metrics
  393 |         // - Resource usage
  394 |         
  395 |         SPhase6ComponentInfo& component = m_components[componentType];
  396 |         
  397 |         if(component.status != PHASE6_STATUS_ACTIVE)
  398 |             return 0.0;
  399 |             
  400 |         // Basic health calculation
  401 |         double health = 100.0;
  402 |         
  403 |         // Reduce health based on errors
  404 |         if(component.lastError != "")
  405 |             health -= 20.0;
  406 |             
  407 |         // Reduce health based on age since last update
  408 |         int timeSinceUpdate = (int)(TimeCurrent() - component.lastUpdate);
  409 |         if(timeSinceUpdate > 300) // 5 minutes
  410 |             health -= 30.0;
  411 |             
  412 |         return MathMax(0.0, health);
  413 |     }
  414 |     
  415 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  416 |     //| Component Management                                             |
  417 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  418 |     bool RestartComponent(ENUM_PHASE6_COMPONENT componentType)
  419 |     {
  420 |         Print(StringFormat("[PHASE6_MANAGER] Restarting component: %s", 
  421 |               m_components[componentType].name));
  422 |         
  423 |         // Stop component
  424 |         StopComponent(componentType);
  425 |         
  426 |         // Wait a moment
  427 |         Sleep(1000);
  428 |         
  429 |         // Start component again
  430 |         return StartComponent(componentType);
  431 |     }
  432 |     
  433 |     bool StopComponent(ENUM_PHASE6_COMPONENT componentType)
  434 |     {
  435 |         if(componentType < 0 || componentType >= 6)
  436 |             return false;
  437 |             
  438 |         SPhase6ComponentInfo& component = m_components[componentType];
  439 |         
  440 |         Print(StringFormat("[PHASE6_MANAGER] Stopping component: %s", component.name));
  441 |         
  442 |         component.status = PHASE6_STATUS_INACTIVE;
  443 |         component.isEnabled = false;
  444 |         component.healthScore = 0.0;
  445 |         component.lastUpdate = TimeCurrent();
  446 |         
  447 |         if(m_activeComponents > 0)
  448 |             m_activeComponents--;
  449 |             
  450 |         return true;
  451 |     }
  452 |     
  453 |     void Shutdown()
  454 |     {
  455 |         if(!m_isRunning)
  456 |             return;
  457 |             
  458 |         Print("[PHASE6_MANAGER] Shutting down Phase 6 Manager...");
  459 |         
  460 |         // Stop all components
  461 |         for(int i = 0; i < 6; i++)
  462 |         {
  463 |             StopComponent((ENUM_PHASE6_COMPONENT)i);
  464 |         }
  465 |         
  466 |         m_isRunning = false;
  467 |         m_activeComponents = 0;
  468 |         
  469 |         Print("[PHASE6_MANAGER] Phase 6 Manager shutdown completed");
  470 |     }
  471 |     
  472 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  473 |     //| Periodic Operations                                              |
  474 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  475 |     void OnTick()
  476 |     {
  477 |         if(!m_isRunning)
  478 |             return;
  479 |             
  480 |         // Perform periodic health check
  481 |         if(TimeCurrent() - m_lastHealthCheck >= m_healthCheckInterval)
  482 |         {
  483 |             PerformHealthCheck();
  484 |         }
  485 |         
  486 |         // Update component timestamps
  487 |         for(int i = 0; i < 6; i++)
  488 |         {
  489 |             if(m_components[i].isEnabled)
  490 |             {
  491 |                 m_components[i].lastUpdate = TimeCurrent();
  492 |             }
  493 |         }
  494 |     }
  495 |     
  496 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  497 |     //| Status and Information                                           |
  498 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  499 |     void PrintStatus()
  500 |     {
  501 |         Print("=== PHASE 6 MANAGER STATUS ===");
  502 |         Print(StringFormat("Manager Status: %s", m_isRunning ? "RUNNING" : "STOPPED"));
  503 |         Print(StringFormat("Active Components: %d/6", m_activeComponents));
  504 |         Print(StringFormat("Overall Health: %.2f%%", m_overallHealthScore));
  505 |         Print(StringFormat("Last Health Check: %s", TimeToString(m_lastHealthCheck)));
  506 |         Print("=== COMPONENT STATUS ===");
  507 |         
  508 |         for(int i = 0; i < 6; i++)
  509 |         {
  510 |             SPhase6ComponentInfo& component = m_components[i];
  511 |             Print(StringFormat("%s: %s (Health: %.2f%%) - %s", 
  512 |                   component.name,
  513 |                   ValidationStatusToString(component.status),
  514 |                   component.healthScore,
  515 |                   component.lastError));
  516 |         }
  517 |         
  518 |         Print("=== END STATUS ===");
  519 |     }
  520 |     
  521 |     string GetComponentStatusString(ENUM_PHASE6_COMPONENT componentType)
  522 |     {
  523 |         if(componentType < 0 || componentType >= 6)
  524 |             return "INVALID";
  525 |             
  526 |         SPhase6ComponentInfo& component = m_components[componentType];
  527 |         return StringFormat("%s: %s (%.2f%%)", 
  528 |                component.name, 
  529 |                ValidationStatusToString(component.status), 
  530 |                component.healthScore);
  531 |     }

  546 |             return PHASE6_STATUS_ERROR;

  550 |     double GetComponentHealth(ENUM_PHASE6_COMPONENT componentType)
  551 |     {

  557 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  558 |     //| Configuration                                                    |
  559 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  560 |     void SetAutoRestart(bool enable) { m_autoRestart = enable; }
  561 |     void SetMaxRetries(int retries) { m_maxRetries = MathMax(1, retries); }
  562 |     void SetHealthCheckInterval(int seconds) { m_healthCheckInterval = MathMax(30, seconds); }
  563 |     
  564 |     bool GetAutoRestart() const { return m_autoRestart; }
  565 |     int GetMaxRetries() const { return m_maxRetries; }
  566 |     int GetHealthCheckInterval() const { return m_healthCheckInterval; }
  567 | };
  568 | 
  569 | // Global instance pointer (defined in GlobalDeclarations.mqh)
  570 | // CPhase6Manager* g_Phase6Manager;
  571 | 
  572 | #endif // ARCHITECTURE_PHASE6MANAGER_MQH
  573 | 
  574 |
