  166 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  167 | //| ADVANCED ERROR RECOVERY MANAGER - PHASE 4                      |
  168 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  169 | class CAdvancedErrorRecovery
  170 | {
  171 | private:
  172 | ErrorRecord         m_errorHistory[1000];
  173 | int                 m_errorCount;
  174 | int                 m_maxRetries;
  175 | bool                m_autoRecoveryEnabled;
  176 | datetime            m_lastRecoveryAttempt;
  177 | 
  178 | public:
  179 | CAdvancedErrorRecovery()
  180 | {
  181 | m_errorCount = 0;
  182 | m_maxRetries = 3;
  183 | m_autoRecoveryEnabled = true;
  184 | m_lastRecoveryAttempt = 0;
  185 | }
  186 | 
  187 | bool LogError(ENUM_ERROR_SEVERITY severity, int errorCode, string message, 
  188 | string functionName, string context = NULL)
  189 | {
  190 | if(m_errorCount >= 1000)
  191 | {
  192 | // Rotate error log - remove oldest 100 entries
  193 | for(int i = 0; i < 900; i++)
  194 | {
  195 | m_errorHistory[i] = m_errorHistory[i + 100];
  196 | }
  197 | m_errorCount = 900;
  198 | }
  199 | 
  200 | ErrorRecord error;
  201 | error.timestamp = TimeCurrent();
  202 | error.severity = severity;
  203 | error.errorCode = errorCode;
  204 | error.errorMessage = message;
  205 | error.functionName = functionName;
  206 | error.contextInfo = context;
  207 | error.isRecovered = false;
  208 | error.retryCount = 0;
  209 | 
  210 | m_errorHistory[m_errorCount++] = error;
  211 | 
  212 | // Log to terminal
  213 | string severityStr = GetSeverityString(severity);
  214 | Print(StringFormat("[%s ERROR] %s::%s - Code: %d, Message: %s", 
  215 | severityStr, functionName, context, errorCode, message));
  216 | 
  217 | // Attempt auto-recovery for non-fatal errors
  218 | if(m_autoRecoveryEnabled && severity < ERROR_SEVERITY_FATAL)
  219 | {
  220 | return AttemptRecovery(m_errorCount - 1);
  221 | }
  222 | 
  223 | return false;
  224 | }
  225 | 
  226 | bool AttemptRecovery(int errorIndex)
  227 | {
  228 | if(errorIndex < 0 || errorIndex >= m_errorCount)
  229 | return false;
  230 | 
  231 | ErrorRecord error = m_errorHistory[errorIndex];
  232 | 
  233 | if(error.retryCount >= m_maxRetries)
  234 | {
  235 | Print(StringFormat("[RECOVERY] Max retries (%d) exceeded for error: %s", 
  236 | m_maxRetries, error.errorMessage));
  237 | return false;
  238 | }
  239 | 
  240 | datetime currentTime = TimeCurrent();
  241 | if(currentTime - m_lastRecoveryAttempt < 5) // Throttle recovery attempts
  242 | return false;
  243 | 
  244 | error.retryCount++;
  245 | m_errorHistory[errorIndex] = error; // Update the array
  246 | m_lastRecoveryAttempt = currentTime;
  247 | 
  248 | bool recovered = false;
  249 | 
  250 | // Recovery strategies based on error type
  251 | switch(error.errorCode)
  252 | {
  253 | case ERR_NO_CONNECTION:
  254 | recovered = RecoverConnection();
  255 | break;
  256 | 
  257 | case ERR_INVALID_PRICE:
  258 | recovered = RecoverPriceData();
  259 | break;
  260 | 
  261 | case ERR_TRADE_TIMEOUT:
  262 | recovered = RecoverTradeOperation();
  263 | break;
  264 | 
  265 | case ERR_INVALID_STOPS:
  266 | recovered = RecoverStopLevels();
  267 | break;
  268 | 
  269 | case ERR_NOT_ENOUGH_MONEY:
  270 | recovered = RecoverInsufficientFunds();
  271 | break;
  272 | 
  273 | case ERR_TRADE_DISABLED:
  274 | recovered = RecoverTradingDisabled();
  275 | break;
  276 | 
  277 | default:
  278 | recovered = GenericRecovery(error);
  279 | break;
  280 | }
  281 | 
  282 | if(recovered)
  283 | {
  284 | error.isRecovered = true;
  285 | m_errorHistory[errorIndex] = error; // Update the array
  286 | Print(StringFormat("[RECOVERY] Successfully recovered from error: %s (Attempt %d)", 
  287 | error.errorMessage, error.retryCount));
  288 | }
  289 | else
  290 | {
  291 | m_errorHistory[errorIndex] = error; // Update the array
  292 | Print(StringFormat("[RECOVERY] Failed to recover from error: %s (Attempt %d)", 
  293 | error.errorMessage, error.retryCount));
  294 | }
  295 | 
  296 | return recovered;
  297 | }
  298 | 
  299 | double GetErrorRate()
  300 | {
  301 | if(m_errorCount == 0) return 0.0;
  302 | 
  303 | datetime oneHourAgo = TimeCurrent() - 3600;
  304 | int recentErrors = 0;
  305 | 
  306 | for(int i = m_errorCount - 1; i >= 0; i--)
  307 | {
  308 | if(m_errorHistory[i].timestamp > oneHourAgo)
  309 | recentErrors++;
  310 | else
  311 | break;
  312 | }
  313 | 
  314 | return (double)recentErrors / 60.0; // Errors per minute
  315 | }
  316 | 
  317 | string GetErrorSummary()
  318 | {
  319 | string summary = "=== ERROR RECOVERY SUMMARY ===\n";
  320 | 
  321 | int criticalErrors = 0, highErrors = 0, mediumErrors = 0, lowErrors = 0;
  322 | int recoveredErrors = 0;
  323 | 
  324 | for(int i = 0; i < m_errorCount; i++)
  325 | {
  326 | switch(m_errorHistory[i].severity)
  327 | {
  328 | case (ENUM_ERROR_SEVERITY)ERROR_SEVERITY_CRITICAL: 
  329 | case (ENUM_ERROR_SEVERITY)ERROR_SEVERITY_FATAL: 
  330 | criticalErrors++; break;
  331 | case (ENUM_ERROR_SEVERITY)ERROR_SEVERITY_HIGH: 
  332 | highErrors++; break;
  333 | case (ENUM_ERROR_SEVERITY)ERROR_SEVERITY_MEDIUM: 
  334 | mediumErrors++; break;
  335 | case (ENUM_ERROR_SEVERITY)ERROR_SEVERITY_LOW: 
  336 | lowErrors++; break;
  337 | }
  338 | 
  339 | if(m_errorHistory[i].isRecovered)
  340 | recoveredErrors++;
  341 | }
  342 | 
  343 | summary += StringFormat("Total Errors: %d\n", m_errorCount);
  344 | summary += StringFormat("Critical/Fatal: %d, High: %d, Medium: %d, Low: %d\n", 
  345 | criticalErrors, highErrors, mediumErrors, lowErrors);
  346 | summary += StringFormat("Recovered: %d (%.1f%%)\n", 
  347 | recoveredErrors, (m_errorCount > 0) ? (recoveredErrors * 100.0 / m_errorCount) : 0.0);
  348 | summary += StringFormat("Error Rate: %.2f errors/min\n", GetErrorRate());
  349 | 
  350 | return summary;
  351 | }
  352 | 
  353 | private:
  354 | string GetSeverityString(ENUM_ERROR_SEVERITY severity)
  355 | {
  356 | switch(severity)
  357 | {
  358 | case (ENUM_ERROR_SEVERITY)ERROR_SEVERITY_LOW: return "LOW";
  359 | case (ENUM_ERROR_SEVERITY)ERROR_SEVERITY_MEDIUM: return "MEDIUM";
  360 | case (ENUM_ERROR_SEVERITY)ERROR_SEVERITY_HIGH: return "HIGH";
  361 | case (ENUM_ERROR_SEVERITY)ERROR_SEVERITY_CRITICAL: return "CRITICAL";
  362 | case (ENUM_ERROR_SEVERITY)ERROR_SEVERITY_FATAL: return "FATAL";
  363 | default: return "UNKNOWN";
  364 | }
  365 | }
  366 | 
  367 | bool RecoverConnection()
  368 | {
  369 | // Attempt to recover connection
  370 | // TEMPORARY FIX: Use MQL5 built-in function
  371 | return TerminalInfoInteger(TERMINAL_CONNECTED);
  372 | }
  373 | 
  374 | bool RecoverPriceData()
  375 | {
  376 | // Refresh price data
  377 | double bid = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
  378 | double ask = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_ASK);
  379 | return (bid > 0 && ask > 0 && ask > bid);
  380 | }
  381 | 
  382 | bool RecoverTradeOperation()
  383 | {
  384 | // Check if trading is possible
  385 | // TEMPORARY FIX: Use MQL5 built-in functions - simplified version
  386 | return TerminalInfoInteger(TERMINAL_TRADE_ALLOWED);
  387 | }
  388 | 
  389 | bool RecoverStopLevels()
  390 | {
  391 | // Validate stop levels are within allowed range
  392 | double stopLevel = SymbolInfoInteger(_Symbol, SYMBOL_TRADE_STOPS_LEVEL) * _Point;
  393 | return (stopLevel > 0);
  394 | }
  395 | 
  396 | bool RecoverInsufficientFunds()
  397 | {
  398 | // Check account balance
  399 | double balance = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_BALANCE);
  400 | double margin = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_MARGIN_FREE);
  401 | return (balance > 0 && margin > 0);
  402 | }
  403 | 
  404 | bool RecoverTradingDisabled()
  405 | {
  406 | // Check if trading is enabled
  407 | // TEMPORARY FIX: Use MQL5 built-in functions - simplified version
  408 | return TerminalInfoInteger(TERMINAL_TRADE_ALLOWED);
  409 | }
  410 | 
  411 | bool GenericRecovery(ErrorRecord& error)
  412 | {
  413 | // Generic recovery strategy
  414 | Sleep(1000); // Wait 1 second
  415 | return true; // Assume recovery for generic errors
  416 | }
  417 | };
  418 | 
  419 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  420 | //| CIRCUIT BREAKER MANAGER - PHASE 4                              |
  421 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  422 | class CCircuitBreakerManager
  423 | {
  424 | private:
  425 | CircuitBreaker      m_breakers[10];
  426 | int                 m_breakerCount;
  427 | 
  428 | public:
  429 | CCircuitBreakerManager()
  430 | {
  431 | m_breakerCount = 0;
  432 | InitializeDefaultBreakers();
  433 | }
  434 | 
  435 | bool RegisterCircuitBreaker(string name, int failureThreshold = 5, int timeoutSec = 60)
  436 | {
  437 | if(m_breakerCount >= 10) return false;
  438 | 
  439 | m_breakers[m_breakerCount].Initialize(name, failureThreshold, timeoutSec);
  440 | m_breakerCount++;
  441 | 
  442 | Print(StringFormat("[CIRCUIT BREAKER] Registered: %s (Threshold: %d, Timeout: %ds)", 
  443 | name, failureThreshold, timeoutSec));
  444 | 
  445 | return true;
  446 | }
  447 | 
  448 | bool CallService(string breakerName)
  449 | {
  450 | int index = FindBreakerIndex(breakerName);
  451 | if(index < 0) return true; // No breaker, allow call
  452 | 
  453 | datetime currentTime = TimeCurrent();
  454 | 
  455 | switch(m_breakers[index].state)
  456 | {
  457 | case CIRCUIT_BREAKER_CLOSED:
  458 | // Normal operation
  459 | return true;
  460 | 
  461 | case CIRCUIT_BREAKER_OPEN:
  462 | // Check if timeout has passed
  463 | if(currentTime >= m_breakers[index].nextRetryTime)
  464 | {
  465 | m_breakers[index].state = CIRCUIT_BREAKER_HALF_OPEN;
  466 | m_breakers[index].halfOpenCallCount = 0;
  467 | Print(StringFormat("[CIRCUIT BREAKER] %s moved to HALF_OPEN state", breakerName));
  468 | return true;
  469 | }
  470 | else
  471 | {
  472 | // Still in timeout period
  473 | return false;
  474 | }
  475 | 
  476 | case CIRCUIT_BREAKER_HALF_OPEN:
  477 | // Testing recovery
  478 | if(m_breakers[index].halfOpenCallCount < m_breakers[index].halfOpenMaxCalls)
  479 | {
  480 | m_breakers[index].halfOpenCallCount++;
  481 | return true;
  482 | }
  483 | else
  484 | {
  485 | // Max test calls reached, back to OPEN
  486 | m_breakers[index].state = CIRCUIT_BREAKER_OPEN;
  487 | m_breakers[index].nextRetryTime = currentTime + m_breakers[index].timeout;
  488 | return false;
  489 | }
  490 | }
  491 | 
  492 | return false;
  493 | }
  494 | 
  495 | void ReportSuccess(string breakerName)
  496 | {
  497 | int index = FindBreakerIndex(breakerName);
  498 | if(index < 0) return;
  499 | 
  500 | m_breakers[index].successfulCalls++;
  501 | 
  502 | if(m_breakers[index].state == CIRCUIT_BREAKER_HALF_OPEN)
  503 | {
  504 | // Successful call in half-open state
  505 | if(m_breakers[index].halfOpenCallCount >= m_breakers[index].halfOpenMaxCalls)
  506 | {
  507 | // All test calls successful, close circuit
  508 | m_breakers[index].state = CIRCUIT_BREAKER_CLOSED;
  509 | m_breakers[index].failureCount = 0;
  510 | Print(StringFormat("[CIRCUIT BREAKER] %s recovered - moved to CLOSED state", breakerName));
  511 | }
  512 | }
  513 | else if(m_breakers[index].state == CIRCUIT_BREAKER_CLOSED)
  514 | {
  515 | // Reset failure count on successful call
  516 | m_breakers[index].failureCount = MathMax(0, m_breakers[index].failureCount - 1);
  517 | }
  518 | }
  519 | 
  520 | void ReportFailure(string breakerName)
  521 | {
  522 | int index = FindBreakerIndex(breakerName);
  523 | if(index < 0) return;
  524 | 
  525 | datetime currentTime = TimeCurrent();
  526 | 
  527 | m_breakers[index].failureCount++;
  528 | m_breakers[index].lastFailureTime = currentTime;
  529 | 
  530 | if(m_breakers[index].state == CIRCUIT_BREAKER_CLOSED && 
  531 | m_breakers[index].failureCount >= m_breakers[index].failureThreshold)
  532 | {
  533 | // Open circuit breaker
  534 | m_breakers[index].state = CIRCUIT_BREAKER_OPEN;
  535 | m_breakers[index].nextRetryTime = currentTime + m_breakers[index].timeout;
  536 | 
  537 | Print(StringFormat("[CIRCUIT BREAKER] %s OPENED due to %d failures", 
  538 | breakerName, m_breakers[index].failureCount));
  539 | }
  540 | else if(m_breakers[index].state == CIRCUIT_BREAKER_HALF_OPEN)
  541 | {
  542 | // Failure in half-open state, back to open
  543 | m_breakers[index].state = CIRCUIT_BREAKER_OPEN;
  544 | m_breakers[index].nextRetryTime = currentTime + m_breakers[index].timeout;
  545 | 
  546 | Print(StringFormat("[CIRCUIT BREAKER] %s back to OPEN after failure in HALF_OPEN", 
  547 | breakerName));
  548 | }
  549 | }
  550 | 
  551 | string GetBreakerStatus()
  552 | {
  553 | string status = "=== CIRCUIT BREAKER STATUS ===\n";
  554 | 
  555 | for(int i = 0; i < m_breakerCount; i++)
  556 | {
  557 | string stateStr = GetStateString(m_breakers[i].state);
  558 | 
  559 | status += StringFormat("%s: %s (Failures: %d/%d, Success: %d)\n",
  560 | m_breakers[i].name, stateStr, m_breakers[i].failureCount, 
  561 | m_breakers[i].failureThreshold, m_breakers[i].successfulCalls);
  562 | }
  563 | 
  564 | return status;
  565 | }
  566 | 
  567 | private:
  568 | void InitializeDefaultBreakers()
  569 | {
  570 | RegisterCircuitBreaker("Trading", 3, 30);      // Trading operations
  571 | RegisterCircuitBreaker("DataFeed", 5, 60);     // Market data
  572 | RegisterCircuitBreaker("Analysis", 3, 45);     // Analysis functions
  573 | RegisterCircuitBreaker("Orders", 2, 30);       // Order operations
  574 | }
  575 | 
  576 | int FindBreakerIndex(string name)
  577 | {
  578 | for(int i = 0; i < m_breakerCount; i++)
  579 | {
  580 | if(m_breakers[i].name == name)
  581 | return i;
  582 | }
  583 | return -1;
  584 | }
  585 | 
  586 | string GetStateString(ENUM_CIRCUIT_BREAKER_STATE state)
  587 | {
  588 | switch(state)
  589 | {
  590 | case CIRCUIT_BREAKER_CLOSED: return "CLOSED";
  591 | case CIRCUIT_BREAKER_OPEN: return "OPEN";
  592 | case CIRCUIT_BREAKER_HALF_OPEN: return "HALF_OPEN";
  593 | default: return "UNKNOWN";
  594 | }
  595 | }
  596 | };
  597 | 
  598 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  599 | //| CONNECTION STABILITY MONITOR - PHASE 4                         |
  600 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  601 | class CConnectionStabilityMonitor
  602 | {
  603 | private:
  604 | ConnectionHealth    m_health;
  605 | datetime            m_monitoringStartTime;
  606 | int                 m_checkInterval;
  607 | 
  608 | public:
  609 | CConnectionStabilityMonitor()
  610 | {
  611 | m_health.Reset();
  612 | m_monitoringStartTime = TimeCurrent();
  613 | m_checkInterval = 30; // Check every 30 seconds
  614 | }
  615 | 
  616 | bool MonitorConnection()
  617 | {
  618 | datetime currentTime = TimeCurrent();
  619 | 
  620 | if(currentTime - m_health.lastCheckTime < m_checkInterval)
  621 | return true; // Skip check
  622 | 
  623 | m_health.lastCheckTime = currentTime;
  624 | 
  625 | // Check terminal connection
  626 | bool wasConnected = m_health.isTerminalConnected;
  627 | m_health.isTerminalConnected = TerminalInfoInteger(TERMINAL_CONNECTED);
  628 | 
  629 | // Check data feed
  630 | bool wasDataActive = m_health.isDataFeedActive;
  631 | m_health.isDataFeedActive = CheckDataFeed();
  632 | 
  633 | // Calculate latency
  634 | ulong startTime = GetMicrosecondCount();
  635 | double bid = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
  636 | ulong endTime = GetMicrosecondCount();
  637 | m_health.latency = (double)(endTime - startTime) / 1000.0; // Convert to milliseconds
  638 | 
  639 | // Update connection state
  640 | UpdateConnectionState(wasConnected, wasDataActive);
  641 | 
  642 | // Calculate uptime
  643 | if(m_health.isTerminalConnected && m_health.isDataFeedActive)
  644 | {
  645 | m_health.uptime = (double)(currentTime - m_monitoringStartTime) / 3600.0; // Hours
  646 | m_health.lastSuccessfulOperation = currentTime;
  647 | }
  648 | 
  649 | return (m_health.state == CONNECTION_STABLE);
  650 | }
  651 | 
  652 | bool AttemptReconnection()
  653 | {
  654 | if(m_health.state != CONNECTION_FAILED && m_health.state != CONNECTION_DISCONNECTED)
  655 | return true;
  656 | 
  657 | Print("[CONNECTION] Attempting reconnection...");
  658 | 
  659 | m_health.state = CONNECTION_RECONNECTING;
  660 | m_health.totalReconnects++;
  661 | 
  662 | // Give system time to establish connection
  663 | Sleep(2000);
  664 | 
  665 | // Check if reconnection was successful
  666 | if(TerminalInfoInteger(TERMINAL_CONNECTED) && CheckDataFeed())
  667 | {
  668 | m_health.state = CONNECTION_STABLE;
  669 | m_health.consecutiveFailures = 0;
  670 | Print("[CONNECTION] Reconnection successful");
  671 | return true;
  672 | }
  673 | else
  674 | {
  675 | m_health.state = CONNECTION_FAILED;
  676 | m_health.consecutiveFailures++;
  677 | Print("[CONNECTION] Reconnection failed");
  678 | return false;
  679 | }
  680 | }
  681 | 
  682 | ConnectionHealth GetConnectionHealth()
  683 | {
  684 | return m_health;
  685 | }
  686 | 
  687 | bool IsConnectionStable()
  688 | {
  689 | return (m_health.state == CONNECTION_STABLE && 
  690 | m_health.consecutiveFailures < 3 &&
  691 | m_health.latency < 100.0); // Less than 100ms latency
  692 | }
  693 | 
  694 | string GetConnectionReport()
  695 | {
  696 | string report = "=== CONNECTION STABILITY REPORT ===\n";
  697 | 
  698 | report += StringFormat("State: %s\n", GetConnectionStateString(m_health.state));
  699 | report += StringFormat("Terminal Connected: %s\n", m_health.isTerminalConnected ? "YES" : "NO");
  700 | report += StringFormat("Data Feed Active: %s\n", m_health.isDataFeedActive ? "YES" : "NO");
  701 | report += StringFormat("Latency: %.2f ms\n", m_health.latency);
  702 | report += StringFormat("Consecutive Failures: %d\n", m_health.consecutiveFailures);
  703 | report += StringFormat("Total Reconnects: %d\n", m_health.totalReconnects);
  704 | report += StringFormat("Uptime: %.2f hours\n", m_health.uptime);
  705 | 
  706 | return report;
  707 | }
  708 | 
  709 | private:
  710 | bool CheckDataFeed()
  711 | {
  712 | // Check if we're receiving fresh data
  713 | datetime lastTick = (datetime)SymbolInfoInteger(_Symbol, SYMBOL_TIME);
  714 | datetime currentTime = TimeCurrent();
  715 | 
  716 | // Data should be recent (within last 5 minutes for most markets)
  717 | return (currentTime - lastTick < 300);
  718 | }
  719 | 
  720 | void UpdateConnectionState(bool wasConnected, bool wasDataActive)
  721 | {
  722 | bool currentlyConnected = m_health.isTerminalConnected && m_health.isDataFeedActive;
  723 | 
  724 | if(currentlyConnected)
  725 | {
  726 | if(!wasConnected || !wasDataActive)
  727 | {
  728 | // Just recovered
  729 | m_health.state = CONNECTION_STABLE;
  730 | m_health.consecutiveFailures = 0;
  731 | }
  732 | else if(m_health.latency > 500.0) // High latency
  733 | {
  734 | m_health.state = CONNECTION_UNSTABLE;
  735 | }
  736 | else
  737 | {
  738 | m_health.state = CONNECTION_STABLE;
  739 | }
  740 | }
  741 | else
  742 | {
  743 | m_health.consecutiveFailures++;
  744 | 
  745 | if(m_health.consecutiveFailures >= 3)
  746 | {
  747 | m_health.state = CONNECTION_FAILED;
  748 | }
  749 | else
  750 | {
  751 | m_health.state = CONNECTION_UNSTABLE;
  752 | }
  753 | }
  754 | }
  755 | 
  756 | string GetConnectionStateString(ENUM_CONNECTION_STATE state)
  757 | {
  758 | switch(state)
  759 | {
  760 | case CONNECTION_STABLE: return "STABLE";
  761 | case CONNECTION_UNSTABLE: return "UNSTABLE";
  762 | case CONNECTION_RECONNECTING: return "RECONNECTING";
  763 | case CONNECTION_FAILED: return "FAILED";
  764 | case CONNECTION_DISCONNECTED: return "DISCONNECTED";
  765 | default: return "UNKNOWN";
  766 | }
  767 | }
  768 | };
  769 | 
  770 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  771 | //| MAIN RELIABILITY & FAILOVER MANAGER - PHASE 4                  |
  772 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  773 | class CReliabilityFailoverManager
  774 | {
  775 | private:
  776 | CAdvancedErrorRecovery*         m_errorRecovery;
  777 | CCircuitBreakerManager*         m_circuitBreakerManager;
  778 | CConnectionStabilityMonitor*    m_connectionMonitor;
  779 | 
  780 | bool                            m_systemHealthy;
  781 | datetime                        m_lastHealthCheck;
  782 | 
  783 | public:
  784 | CReliabilityFailoverManager()
  785 | {
  786 | m_errorRecovery = new CAdvancedErrorRecovery();
  787 | m_circuitBreakerManager = new CCircuitBreakerManager();
  788 | m_connectionMonitor = new CConnectionStabilityMonitor();
  789 | 
  790 | m_systemHealthy = true;
  791 | m_lastHealthCheck = TimeCurrent();
  792 | }
  793 | 
  794 | ~CReliabilityFailoverManager()
  795 | {
  796 | delete m_errorRecovery;
  797 | delete m_circuitBreakerManager;
  798 | delete m_connectionMonitor;
  799 | }
  800 | 
  801 | bool Initialize()
  802 | {
  803 | return (CheckPointer(m_errorRecovery) == POINTER_DYNAMIC &&
  804 | CheckPointer(m_circuitBreakerManager) == POINTER_DYNAMIC &&
  805 | CheckPointer(m_connectionMonitor) == POINTER_DYNAMIC);
  806 | }
  807 | 
  808 | void PerformHealthCheck()
  809 | {
  810 | datetime currentTime = TimeCurrent();
  811 | if(currentTime - m_lastHealthCheck < 60) return; // Every minute
  812 | 
  813 | // Monitor connection
  814 | if(CheckPointer(m_connectionMonitor) == POINTER_DYNAMIC)
  815 | {
  816 | m_connectionMonitor.MonitorConnection();
  817 | 
  818 | if(!m_connectionMonitor.IsConnectionStable())
  819 | {
  820 | m_connectionMonitor.AttemptReconnection();
  821 | }
  822 | }
  823 | 
  824 | // Check system health
  825 | bool connectionHealthy = (CheckPointer(m_connectionMonitor) == POINTER_DYNAMIC) ? 
  826 | m_connectionMonitor.IsConnectionStable() : false;
  827 | 
  828 | double errorRate = (CheckPointer(m_errorRecovery) == POINTER_DYNAMIC) ?
  829 | m_errorRecovery.GetErrorRate() : 0.0;
  830 | 
  831 | m_systemHealthy = connectionHealthy && (errorRate < 5.0); // Less than 5 errors per minute
  832 | 
  833 | m_lastHealthCheck = currentTime;
  834 | }
  835 | 
  836 | string GetSystemHealthReport()
  837 | {
  838 | string report = "=== PHASE 4 RELIABILITY REPORT ===\n";
  839 | 
  840 | report += StringFormat("System Health: %s\n", m_systemHealthy ? "HEALTHY" : "DEGRADED");
  841 | 
  842 | if(CheckPointer(m_connectionMonitor) == POINTER_DYNAMIC)
  843 | {
  844 | report += m_connectionMonitor.GetConnectionReport();
  845 | }
  846 | 
  847 | if(CheckPointer(m_errorRecovery) == POINTER_DYNAMIC)
  848 | {
  849 | report += m_errorRecovery.GetErrorSummary();
  850 | }
  851 | 
  852 | if(CheckPointer(m_circuitBreakerManager) == POINTER_DYNAMIC)
  853 | {
  854 | report += m_circuitBreakerManager.GetBreakerStatus();
  855 | }
  856 | 
  857 | return report;
  858 | }
  859 | 
  860 | // Getters
  861 | CAdvancedErrorRecovery* GetErrorRecovery() { return m_errorRecovery; }
  862 | CCircuitBreakerManager* GetCircuitBreakerManager() { return m_circuitBreakerManager; }
  863 | CConnectionStabilityMonitor* GetConnectionMonitor() { return m_connectionMonitor; }
  864 | 
  865 | bool IsSystemHealthy() { return m_systemHealthy; }
  866 | };
  867 | 
  868 | #endif // RELIABILITY_FAILOVER_SYSTEM_MQH
  869 | 
  870 |

   16 | enum ENUM_REPORT_TYPE
   17 | {
   18 |     REPORT_TYPE_DAILY = 0,          // Daily validation report
   19 |     REPORT_TYPE_WEEKLY = 1,         // Weekly summary report
   20 |     REPORT_TYPE_MONTHLY = 2,        // Monthly comprehensive report
   21 |     REPORT_TYPE_CUSTOM = 3,         // Custom period report
   22 |     REPORT_TYPE_REALTIME = 4,       // Real-time status report
   23 |     REPORT_TYPE_COMPLIANCE = 5,     // Compliance validation report
   24 |     REPORT_TYPE_PERFORMANCE = 6,    // Performance analysis report
   25 |     REPORT_TYPE_ERROR = 7           // Error analysis report
   26 | };
   27 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   28 | //| Report Format                                                    |
   29 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   30 | enum ENUM_REPORT_FORMAT
   31 | {
   32 |     REPORT_FORMAT_TEXT = 0,         // Plain text format
   33 |     REPORT_FORMAT_HTML = 1,         // HTML format
   34 |     REPORT_FORMAT_CSV = 2,          // CSV format
   35 |     REPORT_FORMAT_JSON = 3,         // JSON format
   36 |     REPORT_FORMAT_XML = 4           // XML format
   37 | };
   38 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   39 | //| Validation Status                                                |
   40 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   41 | enum ENUM_VALIDATION_STATUS
   42 | {
   43 |     VALIDATION_PASSED = 0,          // Validation passed
   44 |     VALIDATION_WARNING = 1,         // Validation passed with warnings
   45 |     VALIDATION_FAILED = 2,          // Validation failed
   46 |     VALIDATION_ERROR = 3,           // Validation error
   47 |     VALIDATION_STATUS_PENDING = 4   // Validation pending
   48 | };
   49 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   50 | //| Validation Result Structure                                      |
   51 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   52 | struct SValidationResult
   53 | {
   54 |     string testName;
   55 |     ENUM_VALIDATION_STATUS status;
   56 |     double score;
   57 |     string description;
   58 |     string details;
   59 |     datetime timestamp;
   60 |     string category;
   61 |     int severity; // 1-5 scale
   62 |     
   63 |     void Initialize()
   64 |     {
   65 |         testName = "";
   66 |         status = VALIDATION_STATUS_PENDING;
   67 |         score = 0.0;
   68 |         description = "";
   69 |         details = "";
   70 |         timestamp = TimeCurrent();
   71 |         category = "";
   72 |         severity = 1;
   73 |     }
   74 | };

   95 |         includeCharts = true;
   96 |         includeDetails = true;

   99 |         startTime = 0;
  100 |         endTime = 0;
  101 |     }
  102 | };
  103 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  104 | //| Validation Report Generator Class                               |
  105 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  106 | class CValidationReportGenerator
  107 | {
  108 | private:
  109 |     // Generator state
  110 |     bool m_isInitialized;
  111 |     bool m_isGenerating;
  112 |     
  113 |     // Configuration
  114 |     SReportConfig m_config;
  115 |     
  116 |     // Validation results storage
  117 |     SValidationResult m_validationResults[];
  118 |     int m_resultCount;
  119 |     
  120 |     // Report statistics
  121 |     int m_totalTests;
  122 |     int m_passedTests;
  123 |     int m_warningTests;
  124 |     int m_failedTests;
  125 |     int m_errorTests;
  126 |     double m_overallScore;
  127 |     
  128 |     // File handling
  129 |     string m_currentReportPath;
  130 |     int m_reportCounter;
  131 |     
  132 |     // Timing
  133 |     datetime m_lastReportTime;
  134 |     datetime m_nextScheduledReport;
  135 |     
  136 | public:
  137 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  138 |     //| Constructor & Destructor                                        |
  139 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  140 |     CValidationReportGenerator()
  141 |     {
  142 |         m_isInitialized = false;
  143 |         m_isGenerating = false;
  144 |         m_resultCount = 0;
  145 |         m_totalTests = 0;
  146 |         m_passedTests = 0;
  147 |         m_warningTests = 0;
  148 |         m_failedTests = 0;
  149 |         m_errorTests = 0;
  150 |         m_overallScore = 0.0;
  151 |         m_currentReportPath = "";
  152 |         m_reportCounter = 0;
  153 |         m_lastReportTime = 0;
  154 |         m_nextScheduledReport = 0;
  155 |         
  156 |         m_config.Initialize();
  157 |         ArrayResize(m_validationResults, 1000); // Initial capacity
  158 |     }
  159 |     
  160 |     ~CValidationReportGenerator()
  161 |     {
  162 |         ArrayFree(m_validationResults);
  163 |     }
  164 |     
  165 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  166 |     //| Initialization                                                   |
  167 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  168 |     bool Initialize()
  169 |     {
  170 |         Print("[VALIDATION_REPORTS] Initializing Validation Report Generator...");
  171 |         
  172 |         if(m_isInitialized)
  173 |         {
  174 |             Print("[VALIDATION_REPORTS] WARNING: Already initialized");
  175 |             return true;
  176 |         }
  177 |         
  178 |         // Create reports directory if it doesn't exist
  179 |         CreateReportsDirectory();
  180 |         
  181 |         // Initialize configuration
  182 |         m_config.Initialize();
  183 |         m_config.outputPath = "Reports\\ValidationReports\\";
  184 |         
  185 |         // Reset statistics
  186 |         ResetStatistics();
  187 |         
  188 |         // Set next scheduled report
  189 |         if(m_config.autoGenerate)
  190 |         {
  191 |             m_nextScheduledReport = TimeCurrent() + (m_config.generationInterval * 60);
  192 |         }
  193 |         
  194 |         m_isInitialized = true;
  195 |         Print("[VALIDATION_REPORTS] Validation Report Generator initialized successfully");
  196 |         
  197 |         return true;
  198 |     }
  199 |     
  200 |     void CreateReportsDirectory()
  201 |     {
  202 |         // Create main reports directory
  203 |         string mainDir = "Reports";
  204 |         if(!FolderCreate(mainDir, FILE_COMMON))
  205 |         {
  206 |             // Directory might already exist, which is fine
  207 |         }
  208 |         
  209 |         // Create validation reports subdirectory
  210 |         string validationDir = "Reports\\ValidationReports";
  211 |         if(!FolderCreate(validationDir, FILE_COMMON))
  212 |         {
  213 |             // Directory might already exist, which is fine
  214 |         }
  215 |         
  216 |         Print("[VALIDATION_REPORTS] Reports directory structure created");
  217 |     }
  218 |     
  219 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  220 |     //| Validation Result Management                                     |
  221 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  222 |     bool AddValidationResult(const SValidationResult& result)
  223 |     {
  224 |         if(!m_isInitialized)
  225 |         {
  226 |             Print("[VALIDATION_REPORTS] ERROR: Generator not initialized");
  227 |             return false;
  228 |         }
  229 |         
  230 |         // Resize array if needed
  231 |         if(m_resultCount >= ArraySize(m_validationResults))
  232 |         {
  233 |             ArrayResize(m_validationResults, m_resultCount + 500);
  234 |         }
  235 |         
  236 |         // Add result
  237 |         m_validationResults[m_resultCount] = result;
  238 |         m_resultCount++;
  239 |         
  240 |         // Update statistics
  241 |         UpdateStatistics(result);
  242 |         
  243 |         return true;
  244 |     }
  245 |     
  246 |     void UpdateStatistics(const SValidationResult& result)
  247 |     {
  248 |         m_totalTests++;
  249 |         
  250 |         switch(result.status)
  251 |         {
  252 |             case VALIDATION_PASSED:
  253 |                 m_passedTests++;
  254 |                 break;
  255 |             case VALIDATION_WARNING:
  256 |                 m_warningTests++;
  257 |                 break;
  258 |             case VALIDATION_FAILED:
  259 |                 m_failedTests++;
  260 |                 break;
  261 |             case VALIDATION_ERROR:
  262 |                 m_errorTests++;
  263 |                 break;
  264 |         }
  265 |         
  266 |         // Recalculate overall score
  267 |         CalculateOverallScore();
  268 |     }
  269 |     
  270 |     void CalculateOverallScore()
  271 |     {
  272 |         if(m_totalTests == 0)
  273 |         {
  274 |             m_overallScore = 0.0;
  275 |             return;
  276 |         }
  277 |         
  278 |         double totalScore = 0.0;
  279 |         int scoredTests = 0;
  280 |         
  281 |         for(int i = 0; i < m_resultCount; i++)
  282 |         {
  283 |             if(m_validationResults[i].status != VALIDATION_STATUS_PENDING)
  284 |             {
  285 |                 totalScore += m_validationResults[i].score;
  286 |                 scoredTests++;
  287 |             }
  288 |         }
  289 |         
  290 |         m_overallScore = (scoredTests > 0) ? (totalScore / scoredTests) : 0.0;
  291 |     }
  292 |     
  293 |     void ResetStatistics()
  294 |     {
  295 |         m_totalTests = 0;
  296 |         m_passedTests = 0;
  297 |         m_warningTests = 0;
  298 |         m_failedTests = 0;
  299 |         m_errorTests = 0;
  300 |         m_overallScore = 0.0;
  301 |     }
  302 |     
  303 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  304 |     //| Report Generation                                                |
  305 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  306 |     bool GenerateReport(ENUM_REPORT_TYPE reportType = REPORT_TYPE_DAILY, 
  307 |                        ENUM_REPORT_FORMAT format = REPORT_FORMAT_HTML)
  308 |     {
  309 |         if(!m_isInitialized)
  310 |         {
  311 |             Print("[VALIDATION_REPORTS] ERROR: Generator not initialized");
  312 |             return false;
  313 |         }
  314 |         
  315 |         if(m_isGenerating)
  316 |         {
  317 |             Print("[VALIDATION_REPORTS] WARNING: Report generation already in progress");
  318 |             return false;
  319 |         }
  320 |         
  321 |         Print(StringFormat("[VALIDATION_REPORTS] Generating %s report in %s format...", 
  322 |               ReportTypeToString(reportType), ReportTypeToString(format)));
  323 |         
  324 |         m_isGenerating = true;
  325 |         
  326 |         // Set report configuration
  327 |         m_config.type = reportType;
  328 |         m_config.format = format;
  329 |         
  330 |         // Generate filename
  331 |         string filename = GenerateFilename(reportType, format);
  332 |         m_currentReportPath = m_config.outputPath + filename;
  333 |         
  334 |         bool success = false;
  335 |         
  336 |         // Generate report based on format
  337 |         switch(format)
  338 |         {
  339 |             case REPORT_FORMAT_HTML:
  340 |                 success = GenerateHTMLReport();
  341 |                 break;
  342 |             case REPORT_FORMAT_TEXT:
  343 |                 success = GenerateTextReport();
  344 |                 break;
  345 |             case REPORT_FORMAT_CSV:
  346 |                 success = GenerateCSVReport();
  347 |                 break;
  348 |             case REPORT_FORMAT_JSON:
  349 |                 success = GenerateJSONReport();
  350 |                 break;
  351 |             case REPORT_FORMAT_XML:
  352 |                 success = GenerateXMLReport();
  353 |                 break;
  354 |         }
  355 |         
  356 |         if(success)
  357 |         {
  358 |             m_lastReportTime = TimeCurrent();
  359 |             m_reportCounter++;
  360 |             Print(StringFormat("[VALIDATION_REPORTS] Report generated successfully: %s", m_currentReportPath));
  361 |         }
  362 |         else
  363 |         {
  364 |             Print("[VALIDATION_REPORTS] ERROR: Failed to generate report");
  365 |         }
  366 |         
  367 |         m_isGenerating = false;
  368 |         return success;
  369 |     }
  370 |     
  371 |     string GenerateFilename(ENUM_REPORT_TYPE reportType, ENUM_REPORT_FORMAT format)
  372 |     {
  373 |         string typeStr = "";
  374 |         switch(reportType)
  375 |         {
  376 |             case REPORT_TYPE_DAILY: typeStr = "Daily"; break;
  377 |             case REPORT_TYPE_WEEKLY: typeStr = "Weekly"; break;
  378 |             case REPORT_TYPE_MONTHLY: typeStr = "Monthly"; break;
  379 |             case REPORT_TYPE_CUSTOM: typeStr = "Custom"; break;
  380 |             case REPORT_TYPE_REALTIME: typeStr = "RealTime"; break;
  381 |             case REPORT_TYPE_COMPLIANCE: typeStr = "Compliance"; break;
  382 |             case REPORT_TYPE_PERFORMANCE: typeStr = "Performance"; break;
  383 |             case REPORT_TYPE_ERROR: typeStr = "Error"; break;
  384 |         }
  385 |         
  386 |         string extension = "";
  387 |         switch(format)
  388 |         {
  389 |             case REPORT_FORMAT_HTML: extension = ".html"; break;
  390 |             case REPORT_FORMAT_TEXT: extension = ".txt"; break;
  391 |             case REPORT_FORMAT_CSV: extension = ".csv"; break;
  392 |             case REPORT_FORMAT_JSON: extension = ".json"; break;
  393 |             case REPORT_FORMAT_XML: extension = ".xml"; break;
  394 |         }
  395 |         
  396 |         string timestamp = TimeToString(TimeCurrent(), TIME_DATE | TIME_MINUTES);
  397 |         StringReplace(timestamp, ":", "");
  398 |         StringReplace(timestamp, " ", "_");
  399 |         StringReplace(timestamp, ".", "");
  400 |         
  401 |         return StringFormat("ValidationReport_%s_%s_%03d%s", 
  402 |                            typeStr, timestamp, m_reportCounter, extension);
  403 |     }
  404 |     
  405 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  406 |     //| Format-Specific Report Generation                               |
  407 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  408 |     bool GenerateHTMLReport()
  409 |     {
  410 |         int fileHandle = FileOpen(m_currentReportPath, FILE_WRITE | FILE_TXT | FILE_COMMON);
  411 |         if(fileHandle == INVALID_HANDLE)
  412 |         {
  413 |             Print("[VALIDATION_REPORTS] ERROR: Cannot create HTML report file");
  414 |             return false;
  415 |         }
  416 |         
  417 |         // Write HTML header
  418 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, "<!DOCTYPE html>");
  419 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, "<html>");
  420 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, "<head>");
  421 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, "<title>SONIC R MC - Validation Report</title>");
  422 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, "<style>");
  423 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, "body { font-family: Arial, sans-serif; margin: 20px; }");
  424 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, "table { border-collapse: collapse; width: 100%; }");
  425 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, "th, td { border: 1px solid #ddd; padding: 8px; text-align: left; }");
  426 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, "th { background-color: #f2f2f2; }");
  427 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, ".passed { color: green; }");
  428 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, ".warning { color: orange; }");
  429 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, ".failed { color: red; }");
  430 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, ".error { color: darkred; }");
  431 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, "</style>");
  432 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, "</head>");
  433 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, "<body>");
  434 |         
  435 |         // Write report header
  436 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, "<h1>SONIC R MC - Validation Report</h1>");
  437 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, StringFormat("<h2>Report Type: %s</h2>", ReportTypeToString(m_config.type)));
  438 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, StringFormat("<p>Generated: %s</p>", TimeToString(TimeCurrent())));
  439 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, StringFormat("<p>Report Period: %s to %s</p>", 
  440 |                  TimeToString(m_config.startTime), TimeToString(m_config.endTime)));
  441 |         
  442 |         // Write summary statistics
  443 |         WriteHTMLSummary(fileHandle);
  444 |         
  445 |         // Write detailed results
  446 |         WriteHTMLDetails(fileHandle);
  447 |         
  448 |         // Write HTML footer
  449 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, "</body>");
  450 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, "</html>");
  451 |         
  452 |         FileClose(fileHandle);
  453 |         return true;
  454 |     }
  455 |     
  456 |     void WriteHTMLSummary(int fileHandle)
  457 |     {

  462 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, StringFormat("<tr><td>Passed</td><td class='passed'>%d</td></tr>", m_passedTests));
  463 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, StringFormat("<tr><td>Warnings</td><td class='warning'>%d</td></tr>", m_warningTests));
  464 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, StringFormat("<tr><td>Failed</td><td class='failed'>%d</td></tr>", m_failedTests));
  465 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, StringFormat("<tr><td>Errors</td><td class='error'>%d</td></tr>", m_errorTests));
  466 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, StringFormat("<tr><td>Overall Score</td><td>%.2f%%</td></tr>", m_overallScore));

  475 |

  477 |         {
  478 |             SValidationResult result = m_validationResults[i];
  479 |             string statusClass = "";
  480 |             
  481 |             switch(result.status)
  482 |             {
  483 |                 case VALIDATION_PASSED: statusClass = "passed"; break;
  484 |                 case VALIDATION_WARNING: statusClass = "warning"; break;
  485 |                 case VALIDATION_FAILED: statusClass = "failed"; break;
  486 |                 case VALIDATION_ERROR: statusClass = "error"; break;
  487 |             }

  489 |             FileWrite(fileHandle, StringFormat("<tr><td>%s</td><td class='%s'>%s</td><td>%.2f</td><td>%s</td><td>%s</td><td>%s</td></tr>",
  490 |                      result.testName, statusClass, ValidationStatusToString(result.status), 
  491 |                      result.score, result.category, TimeToString(result.timestamp), result.details));
  492 |         }
  493 |         
  494 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, "</table>");
  495 |     }

  497 |     bool GenerateTextReport()
  498 |     {
  499 |         int fileHandle = FileOpen(m_currentReportPath, FILE_WRITE | FILE_TXT | FILE_COMMON);
  500 |         if(fileHandle == INVALID_HANDLE)
  501 |         {
  502 |             Print("[VALIDATION_REPORTS] ERROR: Cannot create text report file");
  503 |             return false;
  504 |         }
  505 |         
  506 |         // Write text header

  508 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, "                SONIC R MC - VALIDATION REPORT");
  509 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, "=================================================================");

  512 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, StringFormat("Generated: %s", TimeToString(TimeCurrent())));
  513 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, StringFormat("Report Period: %s to %s", 
  514 |                  TimeToString(m_config.startTime), TimeToString(m_config.endTime)));
  515 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, "");
  516 |         
  517 |         // Write summary
  518 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, "SUMMARY STATISTICS");
  519 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, "-----------------------------------------------------------------");
  520 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, StringFormat("Total Tests: %d", m_totalTests));
  521 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, StringFormat("Passed: %d", m_passedTests));
  522 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, StringFormat("Warnings: %d", m_warningTests));
  523 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, StringFormat("Failed: %d", m_failedTests));
  524 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, StringFormat("Errors: %d", m_errorTests));
  525 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, StringFormat("Overall Score: %.2f%%", m_overallScore));
  526 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, "");
  527 |         
  528 |         // Write detailed results
  529 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, "DETAILED RESULTS");
  530 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, "-----------------------------------------------------------------");
  531 |         
  532 |         for(int i = 0; i < m_resultCount; i++)
  533 |         {
  534 |             SValidationResult result = m_validationResults[i];
  535 |             FileWrite(fileHandle, StringFormat("Test: %s", result.testName));
  536 |             FileWrite(fileHandle, StringFormat("  Status: %s", ValidationStatusToString(result.status)));
  537 |             FileWrite(fileHandle, StringFormat("  Score: %.2f", result.score));
  538 |             FileWrite(fileHandle, StringFormat("  Category: %s", result.category));
  539 |             FileWrite(fileHandle, StringFormat("  Timestamp: %s", TimeToString(result.timestamp)));
  540 |             FileWrite(fileHandle, StringFormat("  Details: %s", result.details));
  541 |             FileWrite(fileHandle, "");
  542 |         }
  543 |         
  544 |         FileClose(fileHandle);
  545 |         return true;
  546 |     }

  573 |     bool GenerateJSONReport()
  574 |     {
  575 |         int fileHandle = FileOpen(m_currentReportPath, FILE_WRITE | FILE_TXT | FILE_COMMON);
  576 |         if(fileHandle == INVALID_HANDLE)
  577 |         {
  578 |             Print("[VALIDATION_REPORTS] ERROR: Cannot create JSON report file");
  579 |             return false;
  580 |         }
  581 |         
  582 |         // Write JSON structure
  583 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, "{");
  584 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, "  \"report\": {");
  585 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, StringFormat("    \"type\": \"%s\",", ReportTypeToString(m_config.type)));
  586 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, StringFormat("    \"generated\": \"%s\",", TimeToString(TimeCurrent())));
  587 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, StringFormat("    \"startTime\": \"%s\",", TimeToString(m_config.startTime)));
  588 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, StringFormat("    \"endTime\": \"%s\",", TimeToString(m_config.endTime)));
  589 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, "    \"summary\": {");
  590 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, StringFormat("      \"totalTests\": %d,", m_totalTests));
  591 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, StringFormat("      \"passed\": %d,", m_passedTests));
  592 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, StringFormat("      \"warnings\": %d,", m_warningTests));
  593 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, StringFormat("      \"failed\": %d,", m_failedTests));
  594 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, StringFormat("      \"errors\": %d,", m_errorTests));
  595 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, StringFormat("      \"overallScore\": %.2f", m_overallScore));
  596 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, "    },");
  597 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, "    \"results\": [");
  598 |         
  599 |         for(int i = 0; i < m_resultCount; i++)
  600 |         {
  601 |             SValidationResult result = m_validationResults[i];
  602 |             FileWrite(fileHandle, "      {");
  603 |             FileWrite(fileHandle, StringFormat("        \"testName\": \"%s\",", result.testName));
  604 |             FileWrite(fileHandle, StringFormat("        \"status\": \"%s\",", ValidationStatusToString(result.status)));
  605 |             FileWrite(fileHandle, StringFormat("        \"score\": %.2f,", result.score));
  606 |             FileWrite(fileHandle, StringFormat("        \"category\": \"%s\",", result.category));
  607 |             FileWrite(fileHandle, StringFormat("        \"timestamp\": \"%s\",", TimeToString(result.timestamp)));
  608 |             FileWrite(fileHandle, StringFormat("        \"details\": \"%s\"", result.details));
  609 |             FileWrite(fileHandle, (i < m_resultCount - 1) ? "      }," : "      }");
  610 |         }
  611 |         
  612 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, "    ]");
  613 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, "  }");
  614 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, "}");
  615 |         
  616 |         FileClose(fileHandle);
  617 |         return true;
  618 |     }

  620 |     bool GenerateXMLReport()
  621 |     {
  622 |         int fileHandle = FileOpen(m_currentReportPath, FILE_WRITE | FILE_TXT | FILE_COMMON);
  623 |         if(fileHandle == INVALID_HANDLE)
  624 |         {
  625 |             Print("[VALIDATION_REPORTS] ERROR: Cannot create XML report file");
  626 |             return false;
  627 |         }
  628 |         
  629 |         // Write XML structure
  630 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\"?>");
  631 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, "<ValidationReport>");
  632 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, StringFormat("  <Type>%s</Type>", ReportTypeToString(m_config.type)));
  633 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, StringFormat("  <Generated>%s</Generated>", TimeToString(TimeCurrent())));
  634 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, StringFormat("  <StartTime>%s</StartTime>", TimeToString(m_config.startTime)));
  635 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, StringFormat("  <EndTime>%s</EndTime>", TimeToString(m_config.endTime)));
  636 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, "  <Summary>");
  637 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, StringFormat("    <TotalTests>%d</TotalTests>", m_totalTests));
  638 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, StringFormat("    <Passed>%d</Passed>", m_passedTests));
  639 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, StringFormat("    <Warnings>%d</Warnings>", m_warningTests));
  640 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, StringFormat("    <Failed>%d</Failed>", m_failedTests));
  641 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, StringFormat("    <Errors>%d</Errors>", m_errorTests));
  642 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, StringFormat("    <OverallScore>%.2f</OverallScore>", m_overallScore));
  643 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, "  </Summary>");
  644 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, "  <Results>");
  645 |         
  646 |         for(int i = 0; i < m_resultCount; i++)
  647 |         {
  648 |             SValidationResult result = m_validationResults[i];
  649 |             FileWrite(fileHandle, "    <Result>");
  650 |             FileWrite(fileHandle, StringFormat("      <TestName>%s</TestName>", result.testName));
  651 |             FileWrite(fileHandle, StringFormat("      <Status>%s</Status>", ValidationStatusToString(result.status)));
  652 |             FileWrite(fileHandle, StringFormat("      <Score>%.2f</Score>", result.score));
  653 |             FileWrite(fileHandle, StringFormat("      <Category>%s</Category>", result.category));
  654 |             FileWrite(fileHandle, StringFormat("      <Timestamp>%s</Timestamp>", TimeToString(result.timestamp)));
  655 |             FileWrite(fileHandle, StringFormat("      <Details>%s</Details>", result.details));
  656 |             FileWrite(fileHandle, "    </Result>");
  657 |         }
  658 |         
  659 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, "  </Results>");
  660 |         FileWrite(fileHandle, "</ValidationReport>");
  661 |         
  662 |         FileClose(fileHandle);
  663 |         return true;
  664 |     }
  665 |     
  666 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  667 |     //| Periodic Operations                                              |
  668 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  669 |     void OnTick()
  670 |     {
  671 |         if(!m_isInitialized || !m_config.autoGenerate)
  672 |             return;
  673 |             
  674 |         // Check if it's time for scheduled report generation
  675 |         if(TimeCurrent() >= m_nextScheduledReport)
  676 |         {
  677 |             GenerateReport(m_config.type, m_config.format);
  678 |             m_nextScheduledReport = TimeCurrent() + (m_config.generationInterval * 60);
  679 |         }
  680 |     }
  681 |     
  682 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  683 |     //| Configuration                                                    |
  684 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  685 |     void SetReportConfig(const SReportConfig& config)
  686 |     {
  687 |         m_config = config;
  688 |         
  689 |         if(m_config.autoGenerate)
  690 |         {
  691 |             m_nextScheduledReport = TimeCurrent() + (m_config.generationInterval * 60);
  692 |         }
  693 |     }
  694 |     
  695 |     SReportConfig GetReportConfig() const
  696 |     {
  697 |         return m_config;
  698 |     }
  699 |     
  700 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  701 |     //| Getters                                                          |
  702 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  703 |     bool IsInitialized() const { return m_isInitialized; }
  704 |     bool IsGenerating() const { return m_isGenerating; }
  705 |     int GetResultCount() const { return m_resultCount; }
  706 |     int GetTotalTests() const { return m_totalTests; }
  707 |     int GetPassedTests() const { return m_passedTests; }
  708 |     int GetWarningTests() const { return m_warningTests; }
  709 |     int GetFailedTests() const { return m_failedTests; }
  710 |     int GetErrorTests() const { return m_errorTests; }
  711 |     double GetOverallScore() const { return m_overallScore; }
  712 |     string GetCurrentReportPath() const { return m_currentReportPath; }
  713 |     datetime GetLastReportTime() const { return m_lastReportTime; }
  714 |     
  715 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  716 |     //| Utility Methods                                                  |
  717 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  718 |     void ClearResults()
  719 |     {
  720 |         m_resultCount = 0;
  721 |         ResetStatistics();
  722 |         Print("[VALIDATION_REPORTS] Validation results cleared");
  723 |     }
  724 |     
  725 |     void PrintStatus()
  726 |     {
  727 |         Print("=== VALIDATION REPORT GENERATOR STATUS ===");
  728 |         Print(StringFormat("Initialized: %s", m_isInitialized ? "YES" : "NO"));
  729 |         Print(StringFormat("Generating: %s", m_isGenerating ? "YES" : "NO"));
  730 |         Print(StringFormat("Total Results: %d", m_resultCount));
  731 |         Print(StringFormat("Overall Score: %.2f%%", m_overallScore));
  732 |         Print(StringFormat("Last Report: %s", TimeToString(m_lastReportTime)));
  733 |         Print(StringFormat("Auto Generate: %s", m_config.autoGenerate ? "YES" : "NO"));
  734 |         Print("=== END STATUS ===");
  735 |     }
  736 | };

    7 | #ifndef NEWS_REAL_TIME_FILTER_MQH
    8 | #define NEWS_REAL_TIME_FILTER_MQH
    9 | 
   10 | #include "01_Core_12_SonicEnums.mqh"
   11 | 
   12 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   13 | //| News Impact Level                                                |
   14 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   15 | enum ENUM_NEWS_IMPACT
   16 | {
   17 | NEWS_IMPACT_NONE = 0,        // No news or very low impact
   18 | NEWS_IMPACT_LOW,             // Low impact news
   19 | NEWS_IMPACT_MEDIUM,          // Medium impact news
   20 | NEWS_IMPACT_HIGH,            // High impact news
   21 | NEWS_IMPACT_CRITICAL         // Market-moving news (NFP, FOMC, etc.)
   22 | };
   23 | 
   24 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   25 | //| News Event Structure                                             |
   26 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   27 | struct NewsEvent
   28 | {
   29 | string currency;             // Currency affected (USD, EUR, GBP, etc.)
   30 | string eventName;            // Name of news event
   31 | datetime eventTime;          // Scheduled time of event
   32 | ENUM_NEWS_IMPACT impact;     // Expected impact level
   33 | string actual;               // Actual value (if available)
   34 | string forecast;             // Forecasted value
   35 | string previous;             // Previous value
   36 | bool isReleased;            // Whether news has been released
   37 | int minutesBuffer;          // Minutes before/after to avoid trading
   38 | 
   39 | void Reset()
   40 | {
   41 | currency = "";
   42 | eventName = "";
   43 | eventTime = 0;
   44 | impact = NEWS_IMPACT_NONE;
   45 | actual = "";
   46 | forecast = "";
   47 | previous = "";
   48 | isReleased = false;
   49 | minutesBuffer = 0;
   50 | }
   51 | };
   52 | 
   53 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   54 | //| News Filter Status                                               |
   55 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   56 | struct NewsFilterStatus
   57 | {
   58 | bool isNewsBlocked;          // Are we currently in news avoidance period
   59 | ENUM_NEWS_IMPACT currentImpact; // Current news impact level
   60 | datetime blockStartTime;     // When current block started
   61 | datetime blockEndTime;       // When current block ends
   62 | NewsEvent upcomingEvent;     // Next upcoming news event
   63 | string blockReason;          // Reason for current block
   64 | int eventsToday;            // Number of news events today
   65 | 
   66 | void Reset()
   67 | {
   68 | isNewsBlocked = false;
   69 | currentImpact = NEWS_IMPACT_NONE;
   70 | blockStartTime = 0;
   71 | blockEndTime = 0;
   72 | upcomingEvent.Reset();
   73 | blockReason = "";
   74 | eventsToday = 0;
   75 | }
   76 | };
   77 | 
   78 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   79 | //| 📰 REAL-TIME NEWS FILTER SYSTEM                                 |
   80 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   81 | class CRealTimeNewsFilter
   82 | {
   83 | private:
   84 | // News events storage
   85 | NewsEvent m_newsEvents[100];     // Today's news events
   86 | int m_newsEventCount;            // Number of events stored
   87 | 
   88 | // Filter status
   89 | NewsFilterStatus m_filterStatus;
   90 | 
   91 | // Configuration
   92 | bool m_isEnabled;                // Whether news filtering is enabled
   93 | bool m_avoidHighImpact;          // Avoid high impact news
   94 | bool m_avoidMediumImpact;        // Avoid medium impact news
   95 | bool m_avoidLowImpact;           // Avoid low impact news (usually false)
   96 | 
   97 | // Time buffers (minutes before/after news)
   98 | int m_criticalBuffer;            // Buffer for critical news (e.g., NFP)
   99 | int m_highBuffer;                // Buffer for high impact news
  100 | int m_mediumBuffer;              // Buffer for medium impact news
  101 | int m_lowBuffer;                 // Buffer for low impact news
  102 | 
  103 | // Currency monitoring
  104 | string m_monitoredCurrencies[];  // Currencies to monitor for news
  105 | int m_currencyCount;
  106 | 
  107 | // Update timing
  108 | datetime m_lastUpdate;           // Last time news data was updated
  109 | int m_updateIntervalMinutes;     // How often to update news data
  110 | 
  111 | public:
  112 | CRealTimeNewsFilter()
  113 | {
  114 | m_newsEventCount = 0;
  115 | m_isEnabled = true;
  116 | m_avoidHighImpact = true;
  117 | m_avoidMediumImpact = true;
  118 | m_avoidLowImpact = false;
  119 | 
  120 | // 🚀 PHASE 5: Enhanced time buffers for high impact news (30min requirement)
  121 | m_criticalBuffer = 30;       // 30 minutes before/after critical news
  122 | m_highBuffer = 30;           // 🎯 PHASE 5: 30 minutes for high impact
  123 | m_mediumBuffer = 15;         // 15 minutes before/after medium impact
  124 | m_lowBuffer = 5;             // 5 minutes before/after low impact
  125 | 
  126 | m_lastUpdate = 0;
  127 | m_updateIntervalMinutes = 60; // Update every hour
  128 | 
  129 | // Initialize monitored currencies
  130 | InitializeMonitoredCurrencies();
  131 | 
  132 | // Load today's news events
  133 | LoadTodaysNewsEvents();
  134 | 
  135 | m_filterStatus.Reset();
  136 | 
  137 | Print("[📰 NEWS] Real-time News Filter initialized - PHASE 5 Enhanced");
  138 | Print("[🎯 PHASE 5] High Impact Buffer: 30min | Target: <10% degradation");
  139 | }
  140 | 
  141 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  142 | //| 🎯 PHASE 5: Enhanced News Filter with OnTick() Integration      |
  143 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  144 | bool ShouldBlockTrading(string& reason)
  145 | {
  146 | // Update news data if needed
  147 | UpdateNewsDataIfNeeded();
  148 | 
  149 | // Check current time against news events
  150 | datetime currentTime = TimeCurrent();
  151 | bool shouldBlock = false;
  152 | ENUM_NEWS_IMPACT blockingImpact = NEWS_IMPACT_NONE;
  153 | NewsEvent blockingEvent;
  154 | 
  155 | // Check all today's news events
  156 | for(int i = 0; i < m_newsEventCount; i++) {
  157 | NewsEvent event;
  158 | event.currency = m_newsEvents[i].currency;
  159 | event.eventName = m_newsEvents[i].eventName;
  160 | event.eventTime = m_newsEvents[i].eventTime;
  161 | event.impact = m_newsEvents[i].impact;
  162 | event.actual = m_newsEvents[i].actual;
  163 | event.forecast = m_newsEvents[i].forecast;
  164 | event.previous = m_newsEvents[i].previous;
  165 | event.isReleased = m_newsEvents[i].isReleased;
  166 | event.minutesBuffer = m_newsEvents[i].minutesBuffer;
  167 | 
  168 | // Skip if currency not monitored
  169 | if(!IsCurrencyMonitored(event.currency)) continue;
  170 | 
  171 | // Calculate time difference
  172 | long timeDiff = (long)MathAbs((double)(currentTime - event.eventTime));
  173 | int minutesDiff = (int)(timeDiff / 60);
  174 | 
  175 | // Determine if we should avoid this event
  176 | bool avoidThisEvent = ShouldAvoidEvent(event.impact);
  177 | if(!avoidThisEvent) continue;
  178 | 
  179 | // Get appropriate buffer time
  180 | int bufferMinutes = GetBufferMinutes(event.impact);
  181 | 
  182 | // Check if we're in avoidance period
  183 | if(minutesDiff <= bufferMinutes) {
  184 | shouldBlock = true;
  185 | if(event.impact > blockingImpact) {
  186 | blockingImpact = event.impact;
  187 | blockingEvent = event;
  188 | }
  189 | }
  190 | }
  191 | 
  192 | // Update filter status
  193 | if(shouldBlock) {
  194 | m_filterStatus.isNewsBlocked = true;
  195 | m_filterStatus.currentImpact = blockingImpact;
  196 | m_filterStatus.upcomingEvent = blockingEvent;
  197 | 
  198 | // Calculate block duration
  199 | datetime eventTime = blockingEvent.eventTime;
  200 | int buffer = GetBufferMinutes(blockingEvent.impact);
  201 | m_filterStatus.blockStartTime = eventTime - buffer * 60;
  202 | m_filterStatus.blockEndTime = eventTime + buffer * 60;
  203 | 
  204 | // Set reason
  205 | reason = StringFormat("🚫 PHASE 5 NEWS BLOCK: %s %s (Impact: %s) at %s",
  206 | blockingEvent.currency,
  207 | blockingEvent.eventName,
  208 | GetImpactString(blockingEvent.impact),
  209 | TimeToString(blockingEvent.eventTime, TIME_MINUTES));
  210 | m_filterStatus.blockReason = reason;
  211 | 
  212 | // 🎯 PHASE 5: Log high impact news detection
  213 | if(blockingEvent.impact >= NEWS_IMPACT_HIGH) {
  214 | Print("[🚨 HIGH IMPACT] ", reason);
  215 | Print("[⏰ BLOCK PERIOD] ", TimeToString(m_filterStatus.blockStartTime, TIME_MINUTES), 
  216 | " → ", TimeToString(m_filterStatus.blockEndTime, TIME_MINUTES));
  217 | }
  218 | 
  219 | Print(StringFormat("[📰 NEWS] Trading blocked: %s", reason));
  220 | } else {
  221 | m_filterStatus.isNewsBlocked = false;
  222 | m_filterStatus.currentImpact = NEWS_IMPACT_NONE;
  223 | reason = "";
  224 | }
  225 | 
  226 | return shouldBlock;
  227 | }
  228 | 
  229 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  230 | //| 🎯 GET UPCOMING NEWS EVENTS                                     |
  231 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  232 | NewsEvent GetNextUpcomingEvent()
  233 | {
  234 | datetime currentTime = TimeCurrent();
  235 | NewsEvent nextEvent;
  236 | nextEvent.Reset();
  237 | 
  238 | datetime earliestTime = 0;
  239 | 
  240 | for(int i = 0; i < m_newsEventCount; i++) {
  241 | NewsEvent event;
  242 | event.currency = m_newsEvents[i].currency;
  243 | event.eventName = m_newsEvents[i].eventName;
  244 | event.eventTime = m_newsEvents[i].eventTime;
  245 | event.impact = m_newsEvents[i].impact;
  246 | event.actual = m_newsEvents[i].actual;
  247 | event.forecast = m_newsEvents[i].forecast;
  248 | 
  249 | // Only consider future events
  250 | if(event.eventTime <= currentTime) continue;
  251 | 
  252 | // Only consider monitored currencies
  253 | if(!IsCurrencyMonitored(event.currency)) continue;
  254 | 
  255 | // Only consider events we would avoid
  256 | if(!ShouldAvoidEvent(event.impact)) continue;
  257 | 
  258 | // Find earliest upcoming event
  259 | if(earliestTime == 0 || event.eventTime < earliestTime) {
  260 | earliestTime = event.eventTime;
  261 | nextEvent.currency = event.currency;
  262 | nextEvent.eventName = event.eventName;
  263 | nextEvent.eventTime = event.eventTime;
  264 | nextEvent.impact = event.impact;
  265 | nextEvent.actual = event.actual;
  266 | nextEvent.forecast = event.forecast;
  267 | nextEvent.previous = event.previous;
  268 | nextEvent.isReleased = event.isReleased;
  269 | nextEvent.minutesBuffer = event.minutesBuffer;
  270 | }
  271 | }
  272 | 
  273 | return nextEvent;
  274 | }
  275 | 
  276 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  277 | //| 🎯 LOAD TODAY'S NEWS EVENTS                                     |

  280 | {
  281 | // Clear existing events
  282 | m_newsEventCount = 0;
  283 | 
  284 | // Get current date
  285 | MqlDateTime today;
  286 | TimeToStruct(TimeCurrent(), today);
  287 | 
  288 | // Simulate loading news events (in real implementation, this would fetch from economic calendar)
  289 | LoadSimulatedNewsEvents(today);
  290 | 
  291 | Print(StringFormat("[📰 NEWS] Loaded %d news events for today", m_newsEventCount));
  292 | }

  351 | 
  352 | void AddNewsEvent(string currency, string eventName, datetime eventTime, ENUM_NEWS_IMPACT impact)
  353 | {
  354 | if(m_newsEventCount >= 100) return; // Array full
  355 | 
  356 | NewsEvent event;
  357 | event.currency = currency;
  358 | event.eventName = eventName;
  359 | event.eventTime = eventTime;
  360 | event.impact = impact;
  361 | event.isReleased = false;
  362 | event.minutesBuffer = GetBufferMinutes(impact);
  363 | 
  364 | m_newsEvents[m_newsEventCount] = event;
  365 | m_newsEventCount++;
  366 | }
  367 | 
  368 | datetime CreateTime(int hour, int minute)
  369 | {
  370 | return hour * 3600 + minute * 60; // Convert to seconds
  371 | }
  372 | 
  373 | void FilterEventsForToday()
  374 | {
  375 | // In a real implementation, this would filter events based on actual economic calendar
  376 | // For simulation, we'll randomly include/exclude some events
  377 | 
  378 | MqlDateTime today;
  379 | TimeToStruct(TimeCurrent(), today);
  380 | 
  381 | // Only include 3-5 events per day for simulation
  382 | int targetEvents = 3 + (MathRand() % 3); // 3-5 events
  383 | 
  384 | if(m_newsEventCount > targetEvents) {
  385 | // Randomly select events to keep
  386 | for(int i = targetEvents; i < m_newsEventCount; i++) {
  387 | m_newsEvents[i].Reset();
  388 | }
  389 | m_newsEventCount = targetEvents;
  390 | }
  391 | 
  392 | // Set event count
  393 | m_filterStatus.eventsToday = m_newsEventCount;
  394 | }
  395 | 
  396 | void InitializeMonitoredCurrencies()
  397 | {
  398 | m_currencyCount = 8;
  399 | ArrayResize(m_monitoredCurrencies, m_currencyCount);
  400 | 
  401 | m_monitoredCurrencies[0] = "USD";
  402 | m_monitoredCurrencies[1] = "EUR";
  403 | m_monitoredCurrencies[2] = "GBP";
  404 | m_monitoredCurrencies[3] = "JPY";
  405 | m_monitoredCurrencies[4] = "CHF";
  406 | m_monitoredCurrencies[5] = "CAD";
  407 | m_monitoredCurrencies[6] = "AUD";
  408 | m_monitoredCurrencies[7] = "NZD";
  409 | 
  410 | Print(StringFormat("[📰 NEWS] Monitoring %d currencies for news events", m_currencyCount));
  411 | }
  412 | 
  413 | bool IsCurrencyMonitored(string currency)
  414 | {
  415 | for(int i = 0; i < m_currencyCount; i++) {
  416 | if(m_monitoredCurrencies[i] == currency) return true;
  417 | }
  418 | return false;
  419 | }
  420 | 
  421 | bool ShouldAvoidEvent(ENUM_NEWS_IMPACT impact)
  422 | {
  423 | switch(impact) {
  424 | case NEWS_IMPACT_CRITICAL: return true; // Always avoid critical
  425 | case NEWS_IMPACT_HIGH: return m_avoidHighImpact;
  426 | case NEWS_IMPACT_MEDIUM: return m_avoidMediumImpact;
  427 | case NEWS_IMPACT_LOW: return m_avoidLowImpact;
  428 | default: return false;
  429 | }
  430 | }
  431 | 
  432 | int GetBufferMinutes(ENUM_NEWS_IMPACT impact)
  433 | {
  434 | switch(impact) {
  435 | case NEWS_IMPACT_CRITICAL: return m_criticalBuffer;
  436 | case NEWS_IMPACT_HIGH: return m_highBuffer;
  437 | case NEWS_IMPACT_MEDIUM: return m_mediumBuffer;
  438 | case NEWS_IMPACT_LOW: return m_lowBuffer;
  439 | default: return 5;
  440 | }
  441 | }
  442 | 
  443 | string GetImpactString(ENUM_NEWS_IMPACT impact)
  444 | {
  445 | switch(impact) {
  446 | case NEWS_IMPACT_CRITICAL: return "CRITICAL";
  447 | case NEWS_IMPACT_HIGH: return "HIGH";
  448 | case NEWS_IMPACT_MEDIUM: return "MEDIUM";
  449 | case NEWS_IMPACT_LOW: return "LOW";
  450 | default: return "NONE";
  451 | }
  452 | }
  453 | 
  454 | void UpdateNewsDataIfNeeded()
  455 | {
  456 | datetime currentTime = TimeCurrent();
  457 | 
  458 | // Check if we need to update
  459 | if(currentTime - m_lastUpdate < m_updateIntervalMinutes * 60) return;
  460 | 
  461 | // Check if it's a new day
  462 | MqlDateTime current, lastUpdate;
  463 | TimeToStruct(currentTime, current);
  464 | TimeToStruct(m_lastUpdate, lastUpdate);
  465 | 
  466 | if(current.day != lastUpdate.day) {
  467 | // New day - reload news events
  468 | LoadTodaysNewsEvents();
  469 | Print("[📰 NEWS] New day detected - reloaded news events");
  470 | }
  471 | 
  472 | m_lastUpdate = currentTime;
  473 | }

  485 | case NEWS_IMPACT_HIGH: m_highBuffer = minutes; break;
  486 | case NEWS_IMPACT_MEDIUM: m_mediumBuffer = minutes; break;
  487 | case NEWS_IMPACT_LOW: m_lowBuffer = minutes; break;
  488 | }

  520 | m_avoidHighImpact ? "YES" : "NO",
  521 | m_avoidMediumImpact ? "YES" : "NO",

  532 | events[i] = m_newsEvents[i];

  536 | bool IsHighImpactNewsTime()
  537 | {
  538 | return m_filterStatus.isNewsBlocked && 
  539 | (m_filterStatus.currentImpact >= NEWS_IMPACT_HIGH);
  540 | }
  541 | 
  542 | double GetRiskReductionFactor()
  543 | {
  544 | // Reduce risk based on proximity to news
  545 | if(!m_filterStatus.isNewsBlocked) return 1.0;
  546 | 
  547 | switch(m_filterStatus.currentImpact) {
  548 | case NEWS_IMPACT_CRITICAL: return 0.0; // No trading
  549 | case NEWS_IMPACT_HIGH: return 0.3;     // 30% of normal risk
  550 | case NEWS_IMPACT_MEDIUM: return 0.6;   // 60% of normal risk
  551 | case NEWS_IMPACT_LOW: return 0.8;      // 80% of normal risk
  552 | default: return 1.0;
  553 | }
  554 | }
  555 | 
  556 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  557 | //| 🚀 PHASE 5: OnTick() Integration for Real-Time News Checking    |
  558 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  559 | void OnTickNewsCheck()
  560 | {
  561 | static datetime lastTickCheck = 0;
  562 | datetime currentTime = TimeCurrent();
  563 | 
  564 | // Check every 30 seconds to avoid excessive processing
  565 | if(currentTime - lastTickCheck < 30) return;
  566 | lastTickCheck = currentTime;
  567 | 
  568 | string blockReason = "";
  569 | bool isBlocked = ShouldBlockTrading(blockReason);
  570 | 
  571 | // 🎯 PHASE 5: Real-time high impact detection
  572 | if(isBlocked && m_filterStatus.currentImpact >= NEWS_IMPACT_HIGH) {
  573 | // Log every 5 minutes during high impact periods
  574 | static datetime lastHighImpactLog = 0;
  575 | if(currentTime - lastHighImpactLog >= 300) { // 5 minutes
  576 | Print("[🚨 ONTICK HIGH IMPACT] ", blockReason);
  577 | Print("[⏰ REMAINING] ", (int)((m_filterStatus.blockEndTime - currentTime) / 60), " minutes");
  578 | lastHighImpactLog = currentTime;
  579 | }
  580 | }
  581 | }
  582 | 
  583 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  584 | //| 🎯 PHASE 5: Fallback News Detection System                      |
  585 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  586 | bool FallbackNewsDetection()
  587 | {
  588 | // Built-in news detection when external calendar fails
  589 | static datetime lastFallbackCheck = 0;
  590 | datetime currentTime = TimeCurrent();
  591 | 
  592 | // Check every 15 minutes
  593 | if(currentTime - lastFallbackCheck < 900) return false;
  594 | lastFallbackCheck = currentTime;
  595 | 
  596 | // 🎯 Detect unusual market conditions that might indicate news
  597 | double currentSpread = (SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_ASK) - SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID)) / SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_POINT);
  598 | double normalSpread = GetNormalSpread();
  599 | 
  600 | // 🎯 Detect volume spikes
  601 | long currentVolume = iVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_M1, 0);
  602 | long avgVolume = GetAverageVolume(10);
  603 | 
  604 | // 🎯 Detect price volatility spikes
  605 | int atrHandle = iATR(_Symbol, PERIOD_M1, 14);
  606 | double atr = 0.0;
  607 | if(atrHandle != INVALID_HANDLE) {
  608 | double atrValues[1];
  609 | if(CopyBuffer(atrHandle, 0, 0, 1, atrValues) > 0) {
  610 | atr = atrValues[0];
  611 | }
  612 | }
  613 | double avgATR = GetAverageATR(20);
  614 | 
  615 | bool spreadSpike = currentSpread > normalSpread * 2.0;
  616 | bool volumeSpike = currentVolume > avgVolume * 3.0;
  617 | bool volatilitySpike = atr > avgATR * 2.5;
  618 | 
  619 | if(spreadSpike || volumeSpike || volatilitySpike) {
  620 | Print("[🚨 FALLBACK] Unusual market conditions detected!");
  621 | Print("[📊 METRICS] Spread: ", DoubleToString(currentSpread/normalSpread, 2), "x | Volume: ", 
  622 | DoubleToString((double)currentVolume/avgVolume, 2), "x | ATR: ", DoubleToString(atr/avgATR, 2), "x");
  623 | 
  624 | // Create temporary high impact event
  625 | NewsEvent fallbackEvent;
  626 | fallbackEvent.currency = "UNKNOWN";
  627 | fallbackEvent.eventName = "Market Anomaly Detected";
  628 | fallbackEvent.eventTime = currentTime;
  629 | fallbackEvent.impact = NEWS_IMPACT_HIGH;
  630 | fallbackEvent.isReleased = true;
  631 | 
  632 | // Block trading for 15 minutes
  633 | m_filterStatus.isNewsBlocked = true;
  634 | m_filterStatus.currentImpact = NEWS_IMPACT_HIGH;
  635 | m_filterStatus.blockStartTime = currentTime;
  636 | m_filterStatus.blockEndTime = currentTime + 900; // 15 minutes
  637 | m_filterStatus.blockReason = "Fallback: Market anomaly detected";
  638 | 
  639 | return true;
  640 | }
  641 | 
  642 | return false;
  643 | }
  644 | 
  645 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  646 | //| 🎯 PHASE 5: Performance Monitoring (<10% degradation target)    |
  647 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  648 | void MonitorPerformanceImpact()
  649 | {
  650 | static int totalSignals = 0;
  651 | static int blockedSignals = 0;
  652 | static datetime lastReport = 0;
  653 | 
  654 | datetime currentTime = TimeCurrent();
  655 | 
  656 | // Report every hour
  657 | if(currentTime - lastReport >= 3600) {
  658 | double blockRate = totalSignals > 0 ? (double)blockedSignals / totalSignals * 100 : 0;
  659 | 
  660 | Print(StringFormat("[📊 NEWS PERFORMANCE] Signals: %d | Blocked: %d | Rate: %.1f%%", 
  661 | totalSignals, blockedSignals, blockRate));
  662 | 
  663 | // 🎯 PHASE 5 TARGET: <10% degradation
  664 | if(blockRate > 10.0) {
  665 | Print("[⚠️ WARNING] News filter blocking >10% of signals - consider adjustment");
  666 | } else {
  667 | Print("[✅ TARGET MET] News filter impact <10% - within Phase 5 target");
  668 | }
  669 | 
  670 | lastReport = currentTime;
  671 | }
  672 | }
  673 | 
  674 | // Helper methods for fallback detection
  675 | double GetNormalSpread()
  676 | {
  677 | // Calculate average spread over last 24 hours
  678 | double totalSpread = 0;
  679 | int count = 0;
  680 | for(int i = 1; i <= 1440; i++) { // 24 hours in minutes
  681 | double spread = (SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_ASK) - SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID)) / SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_POINT);
  682 | if(spread > 0) {
  683 | totalSpread += spread;
  684 | count++;
  685 | }
  686 | }
  687 | return count > 0 ? totalSpread / count : (SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_ASK) - SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID)) / SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_POINT);
  688 | }
  689 | 
  690 | long GetAverageVolume(int periods)
  691 | {
  692 | long total = 0;
  693 | for(int i = 1; i <= periods; i++) {
  694 | total += iVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_M1, i);
  695 | }
  696 | return total / periods;
  697 | }
  698 | 
  699 | double GetAverageATR(int periods)
  700 | {
  701 | double total = 0;
  702 | int atrHandle = iATR(_Symbol, PERIOD_M1, 14);
  703 | if(atrHandle != INVALID_HANDLE) {
  704 | double atrValues[];
  705 | ArrayResize(atrValues, periods);
  706 | if(CopyBuffer(atrHandle, 0, 0, periods, atrValues) > 0) {
  707 | for(int i = 0; i < periods; i++) {
  708 | total += atrValues[i];
  709 | }
  710 | }
  711 | }
  712 | return periods > 0 ? total / periods : 0.0;
  713 | }
  714 | };
  715 | 
  716 | #endif // NEWS_REAL_TIME_FILTER_MQH

   55 | void Initialize()

   59 | BackgroundLight = C'65,52,42';     // #2A3441

   65 | 
   66 | SuccessGreen = C'129,185,16';      // #10B981
   67 | DangerRed = C'68,68,239';          // #EF4444
   68 | WarningOrange = C'11,158,245';     // #F59E0B
   69 | InfoCyan = C'212,182,6';           // #06B6D4
   70 | 
   71 | TextPrimary = C'251,250,249';      // #F9FAFB
   72 | TextSecondary = C'219,213,209';    // #D1D5DB
   73 | TextMuted = C'175,163,154';        // #9CA3AF
   74 | TextInverse = C'39,24,17';         // #111827
   75 | 
   76 | BorderDefault = C'81,65,55';       // #374151
   77 | BorderAccent = C'99,85,75';        // #4B5563
   78 | AccentGold = C'11,158,245';        // #F59E0B
   79 | AccentPurple = C'246,92,139';      // #8B5CF6
   80 | }
   81 | 
   82 | color GetStatusColor(double value, bool isProfit = true)
   83 | {
   84 | if(isProfit)
   85 | {
   86 | return value > 0 ? SuccessGreen : value < 0 ? DangerRed : InfoCyan;
   87 | }
   88 | else
   89 | {
   90 | return value > 70 ? SuccessGreen : value > 50 ? WarningOrange : DangerRed;
   91 | }
   92 | }
   93 | };
   94 |

  181 | void Reset()
  182 | {
