  248 | 
  249 | void UpdateFromAccount()
  250 | {
  251 | accountBalance = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_BALANCE);
  252 | accountEquity = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_EQUITY);
  253 | marginLevel = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_MARGIN_LEVEL);
  254 | }
  255 | 
  256 | void UpdateMarketData()
  257 | {
  258 | currentPrice = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
  259 | 
  260 | // Get price change (simplified)
  261 | double prevPrice = iClose(_Symbol, PERIOD_D1, 1);
  262 | priceChange24h = currentPrice - prevPrice;
  263 | priceChangePercent = (prevPrice != 0) ? (priceChange24h / prevPrice) * 100.0 : 0.0;
  264 | 
  265 | // Update volatility (ATR-based)
  266 | int atrHandle = iATR(_Symbol, PERIOD_D1, 14);
  267 | double atrBuffer[1];
  268 | if(CopyBuffer(atrHandle, 0, 0, 1, atrBuffer) > 0)
  269 | {
  270 | volatility = (atrBuffer[0] / currentPrice) * 100.0;
  271 | }
  272 | IndicatorRelease(atrHandle);
  273 | 
  274 | lastUpdate = TimeCurrent();
  275 | }
  276 | };
  277 |

  281 | /**

  293 | *          - UI_Dashboard_Manager.mqh
  294 | *          - UI_Dashboard_Renderer.mqh  
  295 | *          - UI_Dashboard_State.mqh
  296 | *          - All scattered UI code

  299 | *              Optimized: Smart caching, minimal redraws

  301 | */
  302 | class CCompleteDashboard

  387 | /**
  388 | * @brief Initialize complete dashboard system
  389 | */
  390 | bool Initialize(int xPos = 20, int yPos = 50, int width = 380, int height = 600)
  391 | {
  392 | if(m_initialized) return true;
  393 | 
  394 | m_xPos = xPos;
  395 | m_yPos = yPos;
  396 | m_width = width;
  397 | m_height = height;
  398 | 
  399 | // Clear any existing objects
  400 | CleanupAllObjects();
  401 | 
  402 | // Create base panels
  403 | if(!CreateBasePanels())
  404 | {
  405 | if(m_errorHandler != NULL)
  406 | {
  407 | m_errorHandler.HandleError(ERROR_SEV_ERROR, ERROR_CTX_UI,
  408 | "Failed to create base dashboard panels",
  409 | "", "CCompleteDashboard::Initialize");
  410 | }
  411 | return false;
  412 | }
  413 | 
  414 | m_initialized = true;
  415 | m_lastFullRedraw = TimeCurrent();
  416 | 
  417 | Print("🎨 COMPLETE DASHBOARD: Initialized successfully");
  418 | Print(StringFormat("📊 Position: (%d,%d) | Size: %dx%d | Max Objects: %d",
  419 | m_xPos, m_yPos, m_width, m_height, m_maxObjects));
  420 | 
  421 | return true;
  422 | }
  423 | 
  424 | /**
  425 | * @brief Set dashboard visibility - PHASE 3 ENHANCED
  426 | * @details Enhanced for live mode with 100% display validation
  427 | */
  428 | void SetVisible(bool visible)
  429 | {
  430 | if(m_visible != visible)
  431 | {
  432 | m_visible = visible;
  433 | 
  434 | if(visible)
  435 | {
  436 | // PHASE 3: Live mode activation
  437 | AttachToChart();
  438 | Redraw();
  439 | 
  440 | // Validate 100% display target
  441 | if(!ValidateDisplayIntegrity())
  442 | {
  443 | Print("⚠️ DASHBOARD: Display integrity validation failed");
  444 | }
  445 | else
  446 | {
  447 | Print("✅ DASHBOARD: Live mode activated - 100% display validated");
  448 | }
  449 | }
  450 | else
  451 | {
  452 | HideAllObjects();
  453 | }
  454 | }
  455 | }

  483 | 
  484 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  485 | //| 📊 MAIN UPDATE & RENDERING                                       |
  486 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  487 | /**
  488 | * @brief Main dashboard update method - PHASE 3 ENHANCED
  489 | * @details Called from OnTick() to update dashboard with real-time data
  490 | *          Enhanced for live monitoring with <5ms redraw performance
  491 | */
  492 | void Update()
  493 | {
  494 | if(!m_initialized || !m_visible) return;
  495 | 
  496 | datetime currentTime = TimeCurrent();
  497 | 
  498 | // PHASE 3: Enhanced throttling for live monitoring
  499 | if(currentTime - m_lastUpdate < m_updateThrottleMs / 1000) return;
  500 | 
  501 | // Start performance monitoring for Phase 3 validation
  502 | uint startTime = GetTickCount();
  503 | 
  504 | // Update dashboard state with live data
  505 | UpdateDashboardState();
  506 | 
  507 | // PHASE 3: Live attachment validation
  508 | if(!ValidateLiveAttachment())
  509 | {
  510 | AttachToChart(); // Re-attach if needed
  511 | }
  512 | 
  513 | // Determine update type with performance optimization
  514 | bool forceFullRedraw = (currentTime - m_lastFullRedraw) > 30; // Full redraw every 30 seconds
  515 | 
  516 | if(forceFullRedraw)
  517 | {
  518 | Redraw();
  519 | m_lastFullRedraw = currentTime;
  520 | }
  521 | else
  522 | {
  523 | UpdateDynamicElements();
  524 | }
  525 | 
  526 | // PHASE 3: Validate redraw performance (<5ms target)
  527 | uint elapsedTime = GetTickCount() - startTime;
  528 | if(elapsedTime > 5)
  529 | {
  530 | Print(StringFormat("⚠️ DASHBOARD: Redraw time %dms exceeds 5ms target", elapsedTime));
  531 | }
  532 | 
  533 | m_lastUpdate = currentTime;
  534 | }
  535 | 
  536 | /**
  537 | * @brief Update dashboard state from various system components - PHASE 3 ENHANCED
  538 | * @details Enhanced with real-time metrics collection for live monitoring
  539 | */
  540 | void UpdateDashboardState()
  541 | {
  542 | // Update account information
  543 | m_state.UpdateFromAccount();
  544 | 
  545 | // Update market data
  546 | m_state.UpdateMarketData();
  547 | 
  548 | // PHASE 3: Enhanced performance metrics with real-time collection
  549 | CUnifiedPerformanceSystem* perfSystem = CUnifiedPerformanceSystem::GetInstance();
  550 | if(perfSystem != NULL)
  551 | {
  552 | SUnifiedPerformanceMetrics perfMetrics;
  553 | perfMetrics.cpuUsagePercent = perfSystem.GetMetrics().cpuUsagePercent;
  554 | perfMetrics.peakCPUUsage = perfSystem.GetMetrics().peakCPUUsage;
  555 | perfMetrics.averageLatencyMs = perfSystem.GetMetrics().averageLatencyMs;
  556 | perfMetrics.peakLatencyMs = perfSystem.GetMetrics().peakLatencyMs;
  557 | perfMetrics.lastUpdate = perfSystem.GetMetrics().lastUpdate;
  558 | perfMetrics.totalTicks = perfSystem.GetMetrics().totalTicks;
  559 | perfMetrics.avgLatencyMs = perfSystem.GetMetrics().avgLatencyMs;
  560 | perfMetrics.memoryUsageMB = perfSystem.GetMetrics().memoryUsageMB;
  561 | perfMetrics.peakMemoryUsageMB = perfSystem.GetMetrics().peakMemoryUsageMB;
  562 | perfMetrics.fragmentationPercent = perfSystem.GetMetrics().fragmentationPercent;
  563 | perfMetrics.allocatedObjects = perfSystem.GetMetrics().allocatedObjects;
  564 | perfMetrics.cacheHits = perfSystem.GetMetrics().cacheHits;
  565 | perfMetrics.cacheMisses = perfSystem.GetMetrics().cacheMisses;
  566 | perfMetrics.cacheHitRatePercent = perfSystem.GetMetrics().cacheHitRatePercent;
  567 | perfMetrics.cacheSize = perfSystem.GetMetrics().cacheSize;
  568 | perfMetrics.totalOperations = perfSystem.GetMetrics().totalOperations;
  569 | perfMetrics.avgOperationTimeMs = perfSystem.GetMetrics().avgOperationTimeMs;
  570 | perfMetrics.slowOperations = perfSystem.GetMetrics().slowOperations;
  571 | perfMetrics.failedOperations = perfSystem.GetMetrics().failedOperations;
  572 | perfMetrics.overallRating = perfSystem.GetMetrics().overallRating;
  573 | perfMetrics.isOptimal = perfSystem.GetMetrics().isOptimal;
  574 | perfMetrics.emergencyMode = perfSystem.GetMetrics().emergencyMode;
  575 | perfMetrics.emergencyActivationTime = perfSystem.GetMetrics().emergencyActivationTime;
  576 | perfMetrics.tickProcessingTimeMs = perfSystem.GetMetrics().tickProcessingTimeMs;
  577 | perfMetrics.analysisTimeMs = perfSystem.GetMetrics().analysisTimeMs;
  578 | perfMetrics.signalProcessingTimeMs = perfSystem.GetMetrics().signalProcessingTimeMs;
  579 | perfMetrics.uiUpdateTimeMs = perfSystem.GetMetrics().uiUpdateTimeMs;
  580 | m_state.cpuUsage = perfMetrics.cpuUsagePercent;
  581 | m_state.memoryUsage = perfMetrics.memoryUsageMB;
  582 | m_state.averageLatency = perfMetrics.averageLatencyMs;
  583 | m_state.emergencyMode = perfMetrics.emergencyMode;
  584 | }
  585 | 
  586 | // PHASE 3: Real-time confluence scores collection
  587 | UpdateConfluenceScores();
  588 | 
  589 | // PHASE 3: Real-time win rate calculation
  590 | UpdateRealTimeWinRate();
  591 | 
  592 | // PHASE 3: Real-time drawdown monitoring
  593 | UpdateRealTimeDrawdown();
  594 | 
  595 | // Update system health
  596 | if(m_errorHandler != NULL)
  597 | {
  598 | m_state.systemHealthScore = m_errorHandler.GetSystemHealthScore();
  599 | }
  600 | 
  601 | // Update performance history for charting
  602 | UpdatePerformanceHistory();
  603 | }
  604 | 
  605 | /**
  606 | * @brief Update real-time confluence scores for live monitoring
  607 | */
  608 | void UpdateConfluenceScores()
  609 | {
  610 | // PHASE 3: Real-time confluence calculation
  611 | // This will be integrated with SMC and Dragon analysis from Phase 2
  612 | 
  613 | // Placeholder for real confluence calculation
  614 | // Will be connected to actual SMC_Consolidated.mqh and Analysis_MarketAnalysisManager.mqh
  615 | m_state.confluenceScore = 0.75; // Placeholder - will be real-time in integration
  616 | m_state.dragonBandScore = 0.80; // Placeholder
  617 | m_state.smcScore = 0.70; // Placeholder
  618 | m_state.pvsraScore = 0.65; // Placeholder
  619 | }
  620 | 
  621 | /**
  622 | * @brief Update real-time win rate calculation
  623 | */
  624 | void UpdateRealTimeWinRate()
  625 | {
  626 | // PHASE 3: Real-time win rate from trade history
  627 | int totalTrades = 0;
  628 | int winningTrades = 0;
  629 | 
  630 | // Get trade history for current session
  631 | if(HistorySelect(0, TimeCurrent()))
  632 | {
  633 | int totalDeals = HistoryDealsTotal();
  634 | for(int i = 0; i < totalDeals; i++)
  635 | {
  636 | ulong ticket = HistoryDealGetTicket(i);
  637 | if(ticket > 0)
  638 | {
  639 | double profit = HistoryDealGetDouble(ticket, DEAL_PROFIT);
  640 | if(profit != 0) // Exclude commission-only deals
  641 | {
  642 | totalTrades++;
  643 | if(profit > 0) winningTrades++;
  644 | }
  645 | }
  646 | }
  647 | }
  648 | 
  649 | m_state.totalTrades = totalTrades;
  650 | m_state.winningTrades = winningTrades;
  651 | m_state.winRate = (totalTrades > 0) ? (double)winningTrades / totalTrades * 100.0 : 0.0;
  652 | }
  653 | 
  654 | /**
  655 | * @brief Update real-time drawdown monitoring
  656 | */
  657 | void UpdateRealTimeDrawdown()
  658 | {
  659 | // PHASE 3: Real-time drawdown calculation
  660 | double currentEquity = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_EQUITY);
  661 | double balance = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_BALANCE);
  662 | 
  663 | // Calculate current drawdown
  664 | double currentDrawdown = 0.0;
  665 | if(balance > 0)
  666 | {
  667 | currentDrawdown = (balance - currentEquity) / balance * 100.0;
  668 | if(currentDrawdown < 0) currentDrawdown = 0.0; // Only positive drawdown
  669 | }
  670 | 
  671 | // Update max drawdown if current is higher
  672 | if(currentDrawdown > m_state.maxDrawdown)
  673 | {
  674 | m_state.maxDrawdown = currentDrawdown;
  675 | }
  676 | }
  677 | 
  678 | /**
  679 | * @brief Complete dashboard redraw
  680 | */
  681 | void Redraw()
  682 | {
  683 | if(!m_initialized || !m_visible) return;
  684 | 
  685 | // TEMPORARY FIX: Disable performance monitoring
  686 | // StartPerformanceMonitoring("Dashboard_Redraw");
  687 | 
  688 | // Clean up old objects if too many
  689 | if(m_objectCount > m_maxObjects * 0.8)
  690 | {
  691 | OptimizeObjectCount();
  692 | }
  693 | 
  694 | // Draw all sections
  695 | DrawHeaderSection();
  696 | DrawPerformanceSection();
  697 | DrawSignalAnalysisSection();
  698 | DrawSystemHealthSection();
  699 | DrawRiskManagementSection();
  700 | DrawMarketOverviewSection();
  701 | DrawRealTimeChartsSection();
  702 | DrawFooterSection();
  703 | 
  704 | // TEMPORARY FIX: Disable performance monitoring
  705 | // EndPerformanceMonitoring("Dashboard_Redraw");
  706 | }
  707 | 
  708 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  709 | //| 🎨 SECTION RENDERING METHODS                                     |
  710 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  711 | /**
  712 | * @brief Draw main header section with branding and status
  713 | */
  714 | void DrawHeaderSection()
  715 | {
  716 | int yOffset = m_yPos;
  717 | 
  718 | // Main title panel
  719 | CreateRoundedPanel(m_objectPrefix + "Header_Panel", 
  720 | m_xPos, yOffset, m_width, 50,
  721 | m_colors.BackgroundMedium, m_colors.BorderAccent);
  722 | 
  723 | // EA Title with gradient effect
  724 | CreateStyledText(m_objectPrefix + "Header_Title",
  725 | m_xPos + 15, yOffset + 8,
  726 | "🚀 SONIC R MC EA v5.0",
  727 | m_fontSize + 2, m_fontName, m_colors.TextPrimary, true);
  728 | 
  729 | // Status indicator
  730 | color statusColor = m_state.emergencyMode ? m_colors.DangerRed : 
  731 | m_state.systemHealthScore > 80 ? m_colors.SuccessGreen : m_colors.WarningOrange;
  732 | string statusText = m_state.emergencyMode ? "🚨 EMERGENCY" : 
  733 | m_state.systemHealthScore > 80 ? "✅ OPERATIONAL" : "⚠️ WARNING";
  734 | 
  735 | CreateStyledText(m_objectPrefix + "Header_Status",
  736 | m_xPos + m_width - 120, yOffset + 8,
  737 | statusText,
  738 | m_fontSize, m_fontName, statusColor);
  739 | 
  740 | // System uptime
  741 | static datetime start_time = 0;
  742 | if(start_time == 0) start_time = TimeCurrent();
  743 | double uptimeHours = (double)(TimeCurrent() - start_time) / 3600.0;
  744 | CreateStyledText(m_objectPrefix + "Header_Uptime",
  745 | m_xPos + 15, yOffset + 28,
  746 | StringFormat("Uptime: %.1fh | %s",
  747 | uptimeHours, TimeToString(TimeCurrent(), TIME_MINUTES)),
  748 | m_fontSize - 1, m_fontName, m_colors.TextSecondary);
  749 | }

 1023 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1024 | //| 🎨 UI COMPONENT CREATION METHODS                                 |
 1025 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1026 | /**
 1027 | * @brief Create rounded panel with professional styling
 1028 | */
 1029 | bool CreateRoundedPanel(string name, int x, int y, int width, int height, 
 1030 | color bgColor, color borderColor)
 1031 | {
 1032 | if(!ObjectCreate(m_chartId, name, OBJ_RECTANGLE_LABEL, 0, 0, 0))
 1033 | {
 1034 | return false;
 1035 | }
 1036 | 
 1037 | ObjectSetInteger(m_chartId, name, OBJPROP_XDISTANCE, x);
 1038 | ObjectSetInteger(m_chartId, name, OBJPROP_YDISTANCE, y);
 1039 | ObjectSetInteger(m_chartId, name, OBJPROP_XSIZE, width);
 1040 | ObjectSetInteger(m_chartId, name, OBJPROP_YSIZE, height);
 1041 | ObjectSetInteger(m_chartId, name, OBJPROP_BGCOLOR, bgColor);
 1042 | ObjectSetInteger(m_chartId, name, OBJPROP_BORDER_COLOR, borderColor);
 1043 | ObjectSetInteger(m_chartId, name, OBJPROP_BORDER_TYPE, BORDER_FLAT);
 1044 | ObjectSetInteger(m_chartId, name, OBJPROP_CORNER, CORNER_LEFT_UPPER);
 1045 | ObjectSetInteger(m_chartId, name, OBJPROP_STYLE, STYLE_SOLID);
 1046 | ObjectSetInteger(m_chartId, name, OBJPROP_WIDTH, 1);
 1047 | ObjectSetInteger(m_chartId, name, OBJPROP_BACK, true);
 1048 | 
 1049 | m_objectCount++;
 1050 | return true;
 1051 | }
 1052 | 
 1053 | /**
 1054 | * @brief Create styled text with professional typography
 1055 | */
 1056 | bool CreateStyledText(string name, int x, int y, string text, int fontSize, 
 1057 | string fontName, color textColor, bool bold = false)
 1058 | {
 1059 | if(!ObjectCreate(m_chartId, name, OBJ_LABEL, 0, 0, 0))
 1060 | {
 1061 | return false;
 1062 | }
 1063 | 
 1064 | ObjectSetString(m_chartId, name, OBJPROP_TEXT, text);
 1065 | ObjectSetString(m_chartId, name, OBJPROP_FONT, fontName);
 1066 | ObjectSetInteger(m_chartId, name, OBJPROP_FONTSIZE, fontSize);
 1067 | ObjectSetInteger(m_chartId, name, OBJPROP_COLOR, textColor);
 1068 | ObjectSetInteger(m_chartId, name, OBJPROP_CORNER, CORNER_LEFT_UPPER);
 1069 | ObjectSetInteger(m_chartId, name, OBJPROP_XDISTANCE, x);
 1070 | ObjectSetInteger(m_chartId, name, OBJPROP_YDISTANCE, y);
 1071 | 
 1072 | if(bold)
 1073 | {
 1074 | // Simulate bold by creating a slight shadow
 1075 | ObjectCreate(m_chartId, name + "_shadow", OBJ_LABEL, 0, 0, 0);
 1076 | ObjectSetString(m_chartId, name + "_shadow", OBJPROP_TEXT, text);
 1077 | ObjectSetString(m_chartId, name + "_shadow", OBJPROP_FONT, fontName);
 1078 | ObjectSetInteger(m_chartId, name + "_shadow", OBJPROP_FONTSIZE, fontSize);
 1079 | ObjectSetInteger(m_chartId, name + "_shadow", OBJPROP_COLOR, C'30,30,30');
 1080 | ObjectSetInteger(m_chartId, name + "_shadow", OBJPROP_CORNER, CORNER_LEFT_UPPER);
 1081 | ObjectSetInteger(m_chartId, name + "_shadow", OBJPROP_XDISTANCE, x + 1);
 1082 | ObjectSetInteger(m_chartId, name + "_shadow", OBJPROP_YDISTANCE, y + 1);
 1083 | ObjectSetInteger(m_chartId, name + "_shadow", OBJPROP_BACK, true);
 1084 | m_objectCount++;
 1085 | }
 1086 | 
 1087 | m_objectCount++;
 1088 | return true;
 1089 | }
 1090 | 
 1091 | /**
 1092 | * @brief Create section header with professional styling
 1093 | */
 1094 | bool CreateSectionHeader(string name, int x, int y, int width, string title)
 1095 | {
 1096 | // Header background
 1097 | CreateRoundedPanel(name + "_bg", x, y, width, 20, 
 1098 | m_colors.BackgroundMedium, m_colors.AccentGold);
 1099 | 
 1100 | // Header text
 1101 | return CreateStyledText(name + "_text", x + 10, y + 5, title,
 1102 | m_fontSize, m_fontName, m_colors.TextPrimary, true);
 1103 | }
 1104 | 
 1105 | /**
 1106 | * @brief Create metric display with label and value
 1107 | */
 1108 | void CreateMetricDisplay(string name, int x, int y, string label, string value, color valueColor)
 1109 | {
 1110 | // Label
 1111 | CreateStyledText(name + "_label", x, y, label + ":",
 1112 | m_fontSize - 1, m_fontName, m_colors.TextSecondary);
 1113 | 
 1114 | // Value
 1115 | CreateStyledText(name + "_value", x, y + 12, value,
 1116 | m_fontSize, m_fontName, valueColor, true);
 1117 | }
 1118 | 
 1119 | /**
 1120 | * @brief Draw enhanced signal component with detailed breakdown
 1121 | */
 1122 | void DrawSignalComponent(string componentName, double score, int yPos, color componentColor)
 1123 | {
 1124 | int xStart = m_xPos + 15;
 1125 | int progressWidth = 120;
 1126 | int progressHeight = 12;
 1127 | 
 1128 | // Component label with score
 1129 | string scoreText = StringFormat("%s: %.0f%%", componentName, score * 100);
 1130 | CreateStyledText(m_objectPrefix + "Signal_" + componentName + "_label",
 1131 | xStart, yPos,
 1132 | scoreText,
 1133 | m_fontSize - 1, m_fontName, m_colors.TextSecondary);
 1134 | 
 1135 | // Enhanced progress bar background
 1136 | CreateRoundedPanel(m_objectPrefix + "Signal_" + componentName + "_bg",
 1137 | xStart + 140, yPos - 2, progressWidth, progressHeight,
 1138 | m_colors.BackgroundDeep, m_colors.BorderDefault);
 1139 | 
 1140 | // Progress fill based on score
 1141 | int fillWidth = (int)(progressWidth * MathMin(score, 1.0));
 1142 | if(fillWidth > 0) {
 1143 |     CreateRoundedPanel(m_objectPrefix + "Signal_" + componentName + "_fill",
 1144 |     xStart + 140, yPos - 2, fillWidth, progressHeight,
 1145 |     componentColor, componentColor);
 1146 | }
 1147 | 
 1148 | // Score value with color coding
 1149 | color scoreColor = score > 0.8 ? m_colors.SuccessGreen :
 1150 |                   score > 0.6 ? m_colors.WarningOrange :
 1151 |                   score > 0.4 ? m_colors.InfoCyan : m_colors.DangerRed;
 1152 | 
 1153 | CreateStyledText(m_objectPrefix + "Signal_" + componentName + "_value",
 1154 | xStart + 270, yPos,
 1155 | StringFormat("%.1f", score),
 1156 | m_fontSize - 1, m_fontName, scoreColor, true);
 1157 | }
 1158 | 
 1159 | /**
 1160 | * @brief Draw detailed component breakdown
 1161 | */
 1162 | void DrawComponentDetails(int yOffset)
 1163 | {
 1164 | // Component details panel
 1165 | CreateRoundedPanel(m_objectPrefix + "Details_Panel",
 1166 | m_xPos, yOffset, m_width, 60,
 1167 | m_colors.BackgroundLight, m_colors.BorderDefault);
 1168 | 
 1169 | // SMC breakdown
 1170 | string smcDetails = StringFormat("SMC: BOS=%s | CHoCH=%s | OB=%s | LS=%s",
 1171 | m_state.hasBOS ? "✓" : "✗",
 1172 | m_state.hasCHoCH ? "✓" : "✗",
 1173 | m_state.hasOrderBlock ? "✓" : "✗",
 1174 | m_state.hasLiquiditySweep ? "✓" : "✗");
 1175 | 
 1176 | CreateStyledText(m_objectPrefix + "Details_SMC",
 1177 | m_xPos + 10, yOffset + 10,
 1178 | smcDetails,
 1179 | m_fontSize - 2, m_fontName, m_colors.TextSecondary);
 1180 | 
 1181 | // PVSRA breakdown
 1182 | string pvsraDetails = StringFormat("PVSRA: Vol=%.1f | React=%.1f | SR=%.1f | Phase=%s",
 1183 | m_state.volumeScore, m_state.reactionScore, m_state.srScore,
 1184 | EnumToString(m_state.wyckoffPhase));
 1185 | 
 1186 | CreateStyledText(m_objectPrefix + "Details_PVSRA",
 1187 | m_xPos + 10, yOffset + 25,
 1188 | pvsraDetails,
 1189 | m_fontSize - 2, m_fontName, m_colors.TextSecondary);
 1190 | 
 1191 | // Market regime and session info
 1192 | string regimeDetails = StringFormat("Regime: %s | Session: %s | Volatility: %.1f%%",
 1193 | EnumToString(m_state.marketRegime),
 1194 | m_state.currentSession,
 1195 | m_state.volatilityLevel * 100);
 1196 | 
 1197 | CreateStyledText(m_objectPrefix + "Details_Regime",
 1198 | m_xPos + 10, yOffset + 40,
 1199 | regimeDetails,
 1200 | m_fontSize - 2, m_fontName, m_colors.TextMuted);
 1201 | }
 1202 | 
 1203 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1204 | //| 🧹 CLEANUP & OPTIMIZATION                                        |
 1205 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1206 | void UpdateDynamicElements()
 1207 | {
 1208 | // Update only time-sensitive elements for performance
 1209 | if(ObjectFind(m_chartId, m_objectPrefix + "Header_Status") >= 0)
 1210 | {
 1211 | string statusText = m_state.emergencyMode ? "🚨 EMERGENCY" : 
 1212 | m_state.systemHealthScore > 80 ? "✅ OPERATIONAL" : "⚠️ WARNING";
 1213 | ObjectSetString(m_chartId, m_objectPrefix + "Header_Status", OBJPROP_TEXT, statusText);
 1214 | }
 1215 | 
 1216 | // Update performance values
 1217 | UpdateTextElement("Perf_NetProfit_value", StringFormat("$%.2f", m_state.netProfit));
 1218 | UpdateTextElement("Perf_WinRate_value", StringFormat("%.1f%%", m_state.winRate));
 1219 | UpdateTextElement("Health_Score_value", StringFormat("%.0f%%", m_state.systemHealthScore));
 1220 | UpdateTextElement("Health_CPU_value", StringFormat("%.1f%%", m_state.cpuUsage));
 1221 | 
 1222 | // Update footer timestamp
 1223 | UpdateTextElement("Footer_Update", 
 1224 | StringFormat("Last Update: %s", TimeToString(m_state.lastUpdate, TIME_SECONDS)));
 1225 | }
 1226 | 
 1227 | void UpdateTextElement(string elementName, string newValue)
 1228 | {
 1229 | string fullName = m_objectPrefix + elementName;
 1230 | if(ObjectFind(m_chartId, fullName) >= 0)
 1231 | {
 1232 | ObjectSetString(m_chartId, fullName, OBJPROP_TEXT, newValue);
 1233 | }
 1234 | }
 1235 | 
 1236 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1237 | //| 🔴 PHASE 3: LIVE MONITORING ENHANCEMENTS                        |
 1238 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1239 | 
 1240 | /**
 1241 | * @brief Attach dashboard to chart for live monitoring
 1242 | * @details Uses ChartIndicatorAdd() for live attachment as per Phase 3 plan
 1243 | */
 1244 | bool AttachToChart()
 1245 | {
 1246 | // PHASE 3: Live attachment using ChartIndicatorAdd approach
 1247 | // Note: For EA dashboard, we ensure objects are properly attached to chart
 1248 | 
 1249 | if(!m_initialized) return false;
 1250 | 
 1251 | // Validate chart attachment
 1252 | if(ChartID() != m_chartId)
 1253 | {
 1254 | m_chartId = ChartID();
 1255 | Print("📊 DASHBOARD: Chart ID updated for live attachment");
 1256 | }
 1257 | 
 1258 | // Force chart redraw to ensure visibility
 1259 | ChartRedraw(m_chartId);
 1260 | 
 1261 | return true;
 1262 | }
 1263 | 
 1264 | /**
 1265 | * @brief Validate live attachment status
 1266 | * @return true if dashboard is properly attached and visible
 1267 | */
 1268 | bool ValidateLiveAttachment()
 1269 | {
 1270 | // Check if main background object exists and is visible
 1271 | string mainBg = m_objectPrefix + "Main_Background";
 1272 | if(ObjectFind(m_chartId, mainBg) < 0)
 1273 | {
 1274 | return false;
 1275 | }
 1276 | 
 1277 | // Validate object is on current timeframe
 1278 | long timeframes = ObjectGetInteger(m_chartId, mainBg, OBJPROP_TIMEFRAMES);
 1279 | if(timeframes == OBJ_NO_PERIODS)
 1280 | {
 1281 | return false;
 1282 | }
 1283 | 
 1284 | return true;
 1285 | }
 1286 | 
 1287 | /**
 1288 | * @brief Validate display integrity for 100% display target
 1289 | * @return true if all critical dashboard elements are visible
 1290 | */
 1291 | bool ValidateDisplayIntegrity()
 1292 | {
 1293 | string criticalObjects[] = {
 1294 | "Main_Background",
 1295 | "Header_Panel", 
 1296 | "Header_Title",
 1297 | "Perf_Panel",
 1298 | "Footer_Panel"
 1299 | };
 1300 | 
 1301 | int visibleCount = 0;
 1302 | int totalCritical = ArraySize(criticalObjects);
 1303 | 
 1304 | for(int i = 0; i < totalCritical; i++)
 1305 | {
 1306 | string objName = m_objectPrefix + criticalObjects[i];
 1307 | if(ObjectFind(m_chartId, objName) >= 0)
 1308 | {
 1309 | long timeframes = ObjectGetInteger(m_chartId, objName, OBJPROP_TIMEFRAMES);
 1310 | if(timeframes != OBJ_NO_PERIODS)
 1311 | {
 1312 | visibleCount++;
 1313 | }
 1314 | }
 1315 | }
 1316 | 
 1317 | double displayPercentage = (double)visibleCount / totalCritical * 100.0;
 1318 | 
 1319 | if(displayPercentage >= 100.0)
 1320 | {
 1321 | Print(StringFormat("✅ DASHBOARD: Display integrity 100%% validated (%d/%d objects)", 
 1322 | visibleCount, totalCritical));
 1323 | return true;
 1324 | }
 1325 | else
 1326 | {
 1327 | Print(StringFormat("⚠️ DASHBOARD: Display integrity %.1f%% (%d/%d objects)", 
 1328 | displayPercentage, visibleCount, totalCritical));
 1329 | return false;
 1330 | }
 1331 | }
 1332 | 
 1333 | void OptimizeObjectCount()
 1334 | {
 1335 | // Remove older, non-essential objects
 1336 | int removed = 0;
 1337 | int totalObjects = ObjectsTotal(m_chartId);
 1338 | 
 1339 | for(int i = totalObjects - 1; i >= 0; i--)
 1340 | {
 1341 | string objName = ObjectName(m_chartId, i);
 1342 | if(StringFind(objName, m_objectPrefix) == 0)
 1343 | {
 1344 | // Remove shadow objects first (lower priority)
 1345 | if(StringFind(objName, "_shadow") > 0)
 1346 | {
 1347 | ObjectDelete(m_chartId, objName);
 1348 | removed++;
 1349 | if(removed >= 20) break; // Don't remove too many at once
 1350 | }
 1351 | }
 1352 | }
 1353 | 
 1354 | m_objectCount -= removed;
 1355 | if(removed > 0)
 1356 | {
 1357 | Print(StringFormat("🧹 DASHBOARD: Optimized %d objects, current count: %d", removed, m_objectCount));
 1358 | }
 1359 | }
 1360 | 
 1361 | void CleanupAllObjects()
 1362 | {
 1363 | ObjectsDeleteAll(m_chartId, m_objectPrefix);
 1364 | m_objectCount = 0;
 1365 | }
 1366 | 
 1367 | void HideAllObjects()
 1368 | {
 1369 | int totalObjects = ObjectsTotal(m_chartId);
 1370 | for(int i = 0; i < totalObjects; i++)
 1371 | {
 1372 | string objName = ObjectName(m_chartId, i);
 1373 | if(StringFind(objName, m_objectPrefix) == 0)
 1374 | {
 1375 | ObjectSetInteger(m_chartId, objName, OBJPROP_TIMEFRAMES, OBJ_NO_PERIODS);
 1376 | }
 1377 | }
 1378 | }
 1379 | 
 1380 | void UpdatePerformanceHistory()
 1381 | {
 1382 | // Update performance history for charting
 1383 | m_performanceHistory[m_historyIndex] = m_state.netProfit;
 1384 | m_cpuHistory[m_historyIndex % 50] = m_state.cpuUsage;
 1385 | m_latencyHistory[m_historyIndex % 50] = m_state.averageLatency;
 1386 | 
 1387 | m_historyIndex = (m_historyIndex + 1) % 100;
 1388 | }
 1389 | 
 1390 | bool CreateBasePanels()
 1391 | {
 1392 | // Create main dashboard background
 1393 | return CreateRoundedPanel(m_objectPrefix + "Main_Background",
 1394 | m_xPos - 5, m_yPos - 5, 
 1395 | m_width + 10, m_height + 10,
 1396 | m_colors.BackgroundDeep, m_colors.BorderAccent);
 1397 | }
 1398 | 
 1399 | ~CCompleteDashboard()
 1400 | {
 1401 | CleanupAllObjects();
 1402 | Print("🧹 COMPLETE DASHBOARD: Cleanup completed");
 1403 | }
 1404 | };

   74 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   75 | //| 📊 SMC OVERLAY MANAGER CLASS                                     |
   76 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   77 | class CSMCOverlayManager {
   78 | private:
   79 |     string m_prefix;
   80 |     SSMCVisualTheme m_theme;
   81 |     int m_maxObjects;
   82 |     int m_objectCount;
   83 |     datetime m_lastUpdate;
   84 |     bool m_isEnabled;
   85 |     
   86 |     // Object tracking
   87 |     string m_orderBlockObjects[];
   88 |     string m_liquidityObjects[];
   89 |     string m_structureObjects[];
   90 |     string m_fvgObjects[];
   91 |     
   92 | public:
   93 |     CSMCOverlayManager() {
   94 |         m_prefix = "SMC_Overlay_";
   95 |         m_theme.Initialize();
   96 |         m_maxObjects = InpOverlayMaxObjects;
   97 |         m_objectCount = 0;
   98 |         m_lastUpdate = 0;
   99 |         m_isEnabled = InpShowSMCOverlayZones;
  100 |         
  101 |         ArrayResize(m_orderBlockObjects, 50);
  102 |         ArrayResize(m_liquidityObjects, 30);
  103 |         ArrayResize(m_structureObjects, 20);
  104 |         ArrayResize(m_fvgObjects, 40);
  105 |     }
  106 |     
  107 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  108 |     //| 🎯 ORDER BLOCK VISUALIZATION                                     |
  109 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  110 |     void DrawOrderBlock(double high, double low, datetime startTime, bool isBullish, 
  111 |                        double strength = 0.8, string label = "") {
  112 |         if(!m_isEnabled || !InpShowOrderBlocksOverlay) return;
  113 |         
  114 |         string objName = m_prefix + "OB_" + TimeToString(startTime, TIME_DATE|TIME_SECONDS);
  115 |         
  116 |         // Create rectangle for order block
  117 |         if(!ObjectCreate(0, objName, OBJ_RECTANGLE, 0, startTime, high, 
  118 |                         TimeCurrent() + PeriodSeconds() * 20, low)) {
  119 |             Print("❌ Failed to create Order Block: ", objName);
  120 |             return;
  121 |         }
  122 |         
  123 |         // Set visual properties
  124 |         color fillColor = isBullish ? m_theme.BullishOB_Fill : m_theme.BearishOB_Fill;
  125 |         color borderColor = isBullish ? m_theme.BullishOB_Border : m_theme.BearishOB_Border;
  126 |         
  127 |         ObjectSetInteger(0, objName, OBJPROP_COLOR, borderColor);
  128 |         ObjectSetInteger(0, objName, OBJPROP_BGCOLOR, fillColor);
  129 |         ObjectSetInteger(0, objName, OBJPROP_STYLE, STYLE_SOLID);
  130 |         ObjectSetInteger(0, objName, OBJPROP_WIDTH, 2);
  131 |         ObjectSetInteger(0, objName, OBJPROP_BACK, true);
  132 |         ObjectSetInteger(0, objName, OBJPROP_FILL, true);
  133 |         
  134 |         // Add strength indicator
  135 |         if(strength > 0.0) {
  136 |             string strengthLabel = StringFormat("OB %.0f%%", strength * 100);
  137 |             string labelName = objName + "_Label";
  138 |             
  139 |             if(ObjectCreate(0, labelName, OBJ_TEXT, 0, startTime, high + (high-low) * 0.1)) {
  140 |                 ObjectSetString(0, labelName, OBJPROP_TEXT, strengthLabel);
  141 |                 ObjectSetInteger(0, labelName, OBJPROP_COLOR, borderColor);
  142 |                 ObjectSetInteger(0, labelName, OBJPROP_FONTSIZE, 8);
  143 |                 ObjectSetString(0, labelName, OBJPROP_FONT, "Arial");
  144 |             }
  145 |         }
  146 |         
  147 |         // Track object for cleanup
  148 |         AddToObjectArray(m_orderBlockObjects, objName);
  149 |         m_objectCount++;
  150 |         
  151 |         Print(StringFormat("✅ Drew %s Order Block: %.5f-%.5f (Strength: %.0f%%)", 
  152 |               isBullish ? "BULLISH" : "BEARISH", low, high, strength * 100));
  153 |     }
  154 |     
  155 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  156 |     //| 💧 LIQUIDITY VISUALIZATION                                       |
  157 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  158 |     void DrawLiquidityLevel(double price, datetime time, bool isBuyLiquidity, 
  159 |                            bool isSwept = false, double volume = 0.0) {
  160 |         if(!m_isEnabled || !InpShowLiquidityOverlay) return;
  161 |         
  162 |         string objName = m_prefix + "LIQ_" + TimeToString(time, TIME_DATE|TIME_SECONDS) + 
  163 |                         "_" + DoubleToString(price, _Digits);
  164 |         
  165 |         // Create horizontal line for liquidity
  166 |         if(!ObjectCreate(0, objName, OBJ_HLINE, 0, time, price)) {
  167 |             Print("❌ Failed to create Liquidity Level: ", objName);
  168 |             return;
  169 |         }
  170 |         
  171 |         // Set visual properties based on type and status
  172 |         color lineColor;
  173 |         int lineStyle;
  174 |         int lineWidth;
  175 |         
  176 |         if(isSwept) {
  177 |             lineColor = m_theme.LiquiditySwept_Line;
  178 |             lineStyle = STYLE_DASH;
  179 |             lineWidth = 1;
  180 |         } else {
  181 |             lineColor = isBuyLiquidity ? m_theme.LiquidityBuy_Line : m_theme.LiquiditySell_Line;
  182 |             lineStyle = STYLE_SOLID;
  183 |             lineWidth = 2;
  184 |         }
  185 |         
  186 |         ObjectSetInteger(0, objName, OBJPROP_COLOR, lineColor);
  187 |         ObjectSetInteger(0, objName, OBJPROP_STYLE, lineStyle);
  188 |         ObjectSetInteger(0, objName, OBJPROP_WIDTH, lineWidth);
  189 |         ObjectSetInteger(0, objName, OBJPROP_BACK, false);
  190 |         
  191 |         // Add liquidity label
  192 |         string liquidityText = StringFormat("%s LIQ %.5f", 
  193 |                               isBuyLiquidity ? "BUY" : "SELL", price);
  194 |         if(volume > 0) liquidityText += StringFormat(" (Vol: %.0f)", volume);
  195 |         if(isSwept) liquidityText += " [SWEPT]";
  196 |         
  197 |         string labelName = objName + "_Label";
  198 |         if(ObjectCreate(0, labelName, OBJ_TEXT, 0, time, price)) {
  199 |             ObjectSetString(0, labelName, OBJPROP_TEXT, liquidityText);
  200 |             ObjectSetInteger(0, labelName, OBJPROP_COLOR, lineColor);
  201 |             ObjectSetInteger(0, labelName, OBJPROP_FONTSIZE, 8);
  202 |             ObjectSetString(0, labelName, OBJPROP_FONT, "Arial Bold");
  203 |             ObjectSetInteger(0, labelName, OBJPROP_ANCHOR, ANCHOR_LEFT);
  204 |         }
  205 |         
  206 |         // Track object
  207 |         AddToObjectArray(m_liquidityObjects, objName);
  208 |         m_objectCount++;
  209 |         
  210 |         Print(StringFormat("💧 Drew %s Liquidity: %.5f %s", 
  211 |               isBuyLiquidity ? "BUY" : "SELL", price, isSwept ? "[SWEPT]" : ""));
  212 |     }
  213 |     
  214 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  215 |     //| 🏗️ MARKET STRUCTURE VISUALIZATION                               |
  216 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  217 |     void DrawStructureBreak(double price, datetime time, bool isBOS, bool isBullish) {
  218 |         if(!m_isEnabled || !InpShowBOSCHOCHOverlay) return;
  219 |         
  220 |         string structureType = isBOS ? "BOS" : "CHoCH";
  221 |         string objName = m_prefix + structureType + "_" + TimeToString(time, TIME_DATE|TIME_SECONDS);
  222 |         
  223 |         // Create arrow for structure break
  224 |         int arrowCode = isBullish ? 233 : 234; // Up/Down arrows
  225 |         if(!ObjectCreate(0, objName, OBJ_ARROW, 0, time, price)) {
  226 |             Print("❌ Failed to create Structure Break: ", objName);
  227 |             return;
  228 |         }
  229 |         
  230 |         // Set visual properties
  231 |         color arrowColor;
  232 |         if(isBOS) {
  233 |             arrowColor = isBullish ? m_theme.BOS_Bullish : m_theme.BOS_Bearish;
  234 |         } else {
  235 |             arrowColor = isBullish ? m_theme.CHoCH_Bullish : m_theme.CHoCH_Bearish;
  236 |         }
  237 |         
  238 |         ObjectSetInteger(0, objName, OBJPROP_ARROWCODE, arrowCode);
  239 |         ObjectSetInteger(0, objName, OBJPROP_COLOR, arrowColor);
  240 |         ObjectSetInteger(0, objName, OBJPROP_WIDTH, 3);
  241 |         ObjectSetInteger(0, objName, OBJPROP_BACK, false);
  242 |         
  243 |         // Add structure label
  244 |         string structureText = StringFormat("%s %s", 
  245 |                               isBullish ? "↗" : "↘", structureType);
  246 |         string labelName = objName + "_Label";
  247 |         
  248 |         if(ObjectCreate(0, labelName, OBJ_TEXT, 0, time, 
  249 |                        price + (isBullish ? 10 : -10) * _Point)) {
  250 |             ObjectSetString(0, labelName, OBJPROP_TEXT, structureText);
  251 |             ObjectSetInteger(0, labelName, OBJPROP_COLOR, arrowColor);
  252 |             ObjectSetInteger(0, labelName, OBJPROP_FONTSIZE, 9);
  253 |             ObjectSetString(0, labelName, OBJPROP_FONT, "Arial Bold");
  254 |             ObjectSetInteger(0, labelName, OBJPROP_ANCHOR, ANCHOR_CENTER);
  255 |         }
  256 |         
  257 |         // Track object
  258 |         AddToObjectArray(m_structureObjects, objName);
  259 |         m_objectCount++;
  260 |         
  261 |         Print(StringFormat("🏗️ Drew %s %s at %.5f", 
  262 |               isBullish ? "BULLISH" : "BEARISH", structureType, price));
  263 |     }
  264 |     
  265 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  266 |     //| 📈 FAIR VALUE GAP VISUALIZATION                                  |
  267 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  268 |     void DrawFairValueGap(double high, double low, datetime startTime, bool isBullish,
  269 |                          double fillPercentage = 0.0, double strength = 0.7) {
  270 |         if(!m_isEnabled || !InpShowFVGOverlay) return;
  271 |         
  272 |         string objName = m_prefix + "FVG_" + TimeToString(startTime, TIME_DATE|TIME_SECONDS);
  273 |         
  274 |         // Create rectangle for FVG
  275 |         datetime endTime = TimeCurrent() + PeriodSeconds() * 15;
  276 |         if(!ObjectCreate(0, objName, OBJ_RECTANGLE, 0, startTime, high, endTime, low)) {
  277 |             Print("❌ Failed to create Fair Value Gap: ", objName);
  278 |             return;
  279 |         }
  280 |         
  281 |         // Set visual properties
  282 |         color fillColor = isBullish ? m_theme.FVG_Bullish_Fill : m_theme.FVG_Bearish_Fill;
  283 |         
  284 |         ObjectSetInteger(0, objName, OBJPROP_COLOR, m_theme.FVG_Border);
  285 |         ObjectSetInteger(0, objName, OBJPROP_BGCOLOR, fillColor);
  286 |         ObjectSetInteger(0, objName, OBJPROP_STYLE, STYLE_DOT);
  287 |         ObjectSetInteger(0, objName, OBJPROP_WIDTH, 1);
  288 |         ObjectSetInteger(0, objName, OBJPROP_BACK, true);
  289 |         ObjectSetInteger(0, objName, OBJPROP_FILL, true);
  290 |         
  291 |         // Add FVG info label
  292 |         string fvgText = StringFormat("FVG %s %.0f%% filled", 
  293 |                         isBullish ? "↗" : "↘", fillPercentage * 100);
  294 |         string labelName = objName + "_Label";
  295 |         
  296 |         if(ObjectCreate(0, labelName, OBJ_TEXT, 0, startTime, (high + low) / 2)) {
  297 |             ObjectSetString(0, labelName, OBJPROP_TEXT, fvgText);
  298 |             ObjectSetInteger(0, labelName, OBJPROP_COLOR, m_theme.FVG_Border);
  299 |             ObjectSetInteger(0, labelName, OBJPROP_FONTSIZE, 7);
  300 |             ObjectSetString(0, labelName, OBJPROP_FONT, "Arial");
  301 |             ObjectSetInteger(0, labelName, OBJPROP_ANCHOR, ANCHOR_CENTER);
  302 |         }
  303 |         
  304 |         // Track object
  305 |         AddToObjectArray(m_fvgObjects, objName);
  306 |         m_objectCount++;
  307 |         
  308 |         Print(StringFormat("📈 Drew %s FVG: %.5f-%.5f (%.0f%% filled)", 
  309 |               isBullish ? "BULLISH" : "BEARISH", low, high, fillPercentage * 100));
  310 |     }
  311 |     
  312 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  313 |     //| 🧹 CLEANUP AND MANAGEMENT                                        |
  314 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  315 |     void CleanupOldObjects() {
  316 |         if(m_objectCount < m_maxObjects * 0.9) return;
  317 |         
  318 |         Print("🧹 Cleaning up old SMC overlay objects...");
  319 |         
  320 |         // Remove oldest objects from each category
  321 |         RemoveOldObjectsFromArray(m_orderBlockObjects, 10);
  322 |         RemoveOldObjectsFromArray(m_liquidityObjects, 5);
  323 |         RemoveOldObjectsFromArray(m_structureObjects, 3);
  324 |         RemoveOldObjectsFromArray(m_fvgObjects, 8);
  325 |         
  326 |         m_objectCount = CountActiveObjects();
  327 |         Print(StringFormat("✅ Cleanup complete. Active objects: %d", m_objectCount));
  328 |     }
  329 |     
  330 |     void RemoveAllObjects() {
  331 |         ObjectsDeleteAll(0, m_prefix);
  332 |         ArrayInitialize(m_orderBlockObjects, "");
  333 |         ArrayInitialize(m_liquidityObjects, "");
  334 |         ArrayInitialize(m_structureObjects, "");
  335 |         ArrayInitialize(m_fvgObjects, "");
  336 |         m_objectCount = 0;
  337 |         Print("🧹 All SMC overlay objects removed");
  338 |     }
  339 |     
  340 |     void UpdateTheme(SSMCVisualTheme &newTheme) {
  341 |         m_theme = newTheme;
  342 |         Print("🎨 SMC overlay theme updated");
  343 |     }
  344 |     
  345 |     void SetEnabled(bool enabled) {
  346 |         m_isEnabled = enabled;
  347 |         if(!enabled) RemoveAllObjects();
  348 |         Print(StringFormat("🔄 SMC overlay %s", enabled ? "ENABLED" : "DISABLED"));
  349 |     }
  350 |     
  351 | private:
  352 |     void AddToObjectArray(string &array[], string objName) {
  353 |         for(int i = 0; i < ArraySize(array); i++) {
  354 |             if(array[i] == "") {
  355 |                 array[i] = objName;
  356 |                 return;
  357 |             }
  358 |         }
  359 |     }
  360 |     
  361 |     void RemoveOldObjectsFromArray(string &array[], int removeCount) {
  362 |         int removed = 0;
  363 |         for(int i = 0; i < ArraySize(array) && removed < removeCount; i++) {
  364 |             if(array[i] != "") {
  365 |                 ObjectDelete(0, array[i]);
  366 |                 ObjectDelete(0, array[i] + "_Label");
  367 |                 array[i] = "";
  368 |                 removed++;
  369 |             }
  370 |         }
  371 |     }
  372 |     
  373 |     int CountActiveObjects() {
  374 |         return ObjectsTotal(0, 0, OBJ_RECTANGLE) + ObjectsTotal(0, 0, OBJ_HLINE) + 
  375 |                ObjectsTotal(0, 0, OBJ_ARROW) + ObjectsTotal(0, 0, OBJ_TEXT);
  376 |     }
  377 | };
  378 | 
  379 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  380 | //| 🌐 GLOBAL SMC OVERLAY INSTANCE                                   |
  381 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  382 | CSMCOverlayManager* g_SMCOverlay = NULL;
  383 | 
  384 | // Helper functions for easy access
  385 | void SMC_DrawOrderBlock(double high, double low, datetime time, bool bullish, double strength = 0.8) {
  386 |     if(g_SMCOverlay != NULL) g_SMCOverlay.DrawOrderBlock(high, low, time, bullish, strength);
  387 | }
  388 | 
  389 | void SMC_DrawLiquidity(double price, datetime time, bool buyLiq, bool swept = false) {
  390 |     if(g_SMCOverlay != NULL) g_SMCOverlay.DrawLiquidityLevel(price, time, buyLiq, swept);
  391 | }
  392 | 
  393 | void SMC_DrawStructure(double price, datetime time, bool isBOS, bool bullish) {
  394 |     if(g_SMCOverlay != NULL) g_SMCOverlay.DrawStructureBreak(price, time, isBOS, bullish);
  395 | }
  396 | 
  397 | void SMC_DrawFVG(double high, double low, datetime time, bool bullish, double filled = 0.0) {
  398 |     if(g_SMCOverlay != NULL) g_SMCOverlay.DrawFairValueGap(high, low, time, bullish, filled);
  399 | }

   17 | struct SPVSRAVisualTheme {
   18 |     // Volume Bar Colors (based on PVSRA classification)
   19 |     color VolumeHigh_Bullish;      // #10B981 - High volume bullish
   20 |     color VolumeHigh_Bearish;      // #EF4444 - High volume bearish
   21 |     color VolumeLow_Bullish;       // #6EE7B7 - Low volume bullish
   22 |     color VolumeLow_Bearish;       // #FCA5A5 - Low volume bearish
   23 |     color VolumeNormal;            // #9CA3AF - Normal volume
   24 |     
   25 |     // Pattern Colors
   26 |     color Spring_Color;            // #8B5CF6 - Spring action
   27 |     color Upthrust_Color;          // #EC4899 - Upthrust action
   28 |     color SellingClimax_Color;     // #DC2626 - Selling climax
   29 |     color AutomaticRally_Color;    // #059669 - Automatic rally
   30 |     color SignOfStrength_Color;    // #0891B2 - Sign of strength
   31 |     color SignOfWeakness_Color;    // #EA580C - Sign of weakness
   32 |     
   33 |     // Support/Resistance Colors
   34 |     color Support_Strong;          // #10B981 - Strong support
   35 |     color Support_Weak;            // #6EE7B7 - Weak support
   36 |     color Resistance_Strong;       // #EF4444 - Strong resistance
   37 |     color Resistance_Weak;         // #FCA5A5 - Weak resistance
   38 |     
   39 |     // Wyckoff Phase Colors
   40 |     color Accumulation_Zone;       // #10B981 with 15% opacity
   41 |     color Distribution_Zone;       // #EF4444 with 15% opacity
   42 |     color Markup_Zone;             // #3B82F6 with 15% opacity
   43 |     color Markdown_Zone;           // #F59E0B with 15% opacity

   46 |         // Volume classification colors
   47 |         VolumeHigh_Bullish = C'129,185,16';     // Bright green
   48 |         VolumeHigh_Bearish = C'68,68,239';      // Bright red
   49 |         VolumeLow_Bullish = C'183,231,110';     // Light green

   63 |         Support_Weak = C'183,231,110';          // Light green

   65 |         Resistance_Weak = C'165,165,252';       // Light red
   66 |

   71 |         Markdown_Zone = C'11,158,245';          // Orange zone

   75 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   76 | //| 📊 PVSRA OVERLAY MANAGER CLASS                                   |
   77 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   78 | class CPVSRAOverlayManager {
   79 | private:
   80 |     string m_prefix;
   81 |     SPVSRAVisualTheme m_theme;
   82 |     int m_maxObjects;
   83 |     int m_objectCount;
   84 |     datetime m_lastUpdate;
   85 |     bool m_isEnabled;
   86 |     
   87 |     // Pattern tracking
   88 |     string m_patternObjects[];
   89 |     string m_volumeObjects[];
   90 |     string m_srObjects[];
   91 |     string m_wyckoffObjects[];
   92 |     
   93 | public:
   94 |     CPVSRAOverlayManager() {
   95 |         m_prefix = "PVSRA_Overlay_";
   96 |         m_theme.Initialize();
   97 |         m_maxObjects = InpOverlayMaxObjects;
   98 |         m_objectCount = 0;
   99 |         m_lastUpdate = 0;
  100 |         m_isEnabled = InpEnablePVSRA;
  101 |         
  102 |         ArrayResize(m_patternObjects, 30);
  103 |         ArrayResize(m_volumeObjects, 100);
  104 |         ArrayResize(m_srObjects, 40);
  105 |         ArrayResize(m_wyckoffObjects, 20);
  106 |     }
  107 |     
  108 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  109 |     //| 📊 VOLUME BAR VISUALIZATION                                      |
  110 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  111 |     void DrawVolumeBar(int barIndex, double volume, double avgVolume, 
  112 |                       double bodyPercent, double closePosition) {
  113 |         if(!m_isEnabled) return;
  114 |         
  115 |         datetime barTime = iTime(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, barIndex);
  116 |         double high = iHigh(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, barIndex);
  117 |         double low = iLow(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, barIndex);
  118 |         double close = iClose(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, barIndex);
  119 |         double open = iOpen(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, barIndex);
  120 |         
  121 |         // Classify volume
  122 |         double volumeRatio = volume / avgVolume;
  123 |         bool isBullish = (close > open);
  124 |         bool isHighVolume = (volumeRatio > 1.5);
  125 |         bool isLowVolume = (volumeRatio < 0.7);
  126 |         
  127 |         // Determine color based on PVSRA classification
  128 |         color barColor;
  129 |         string volumeType;
  130 |         
  131 |         if(isHighVolume) {
  132 |             barColor = isBullish ? m_theme.VolumeHigh_Bullish : m_theme.VolumeHigh_Bearish;
  133 |             volumeType = "HIGH_VOL";
  134 |         } else if(isLowVolume) {
  135 |             barColor = isBullish ? m_theme.VolumeLow_Bullish : m_theme.VolumeLow_Bearish;
  136 |             volumeType = "LOW_VOL";
  137 |         } else {
  138 |             barColor = m_theme.VolumeNormal;
  139 |             volumeType = "NORMAL";
  140 |         }
  141 |         
  142 |         // Create volume indicator
  143 |         string objName = m_prefix + "VOL_" + IntegerToString(barIndex);
  144 |         
  145 |         // Draw volume bar as rectangle at bottom of chart
  146 |         double chartHeight = ChartGetDouble(0, CHART_PRICE_MAX) - ChartGetDouble(0, CHART_PRICE_MIN);
  147 |         double volumeHeight = (volumeRatio * chartHeight * 0.1); // 10% of chart height max
  148 |         double volumeBottom = ChartGetDouble(0, CHART_PRICE_MIN);
  149 |         
  150 |         if(ObjectCreate(0, objName, OBJ_RECTANGLE, 0, barTime, volumeBottom, 
  151 |                        barTime + PeriodSeconds(), volumeBottom + volumeHeight)) {
  152 |             ObjectSetInteger(0, objName, OBJPROP_COLOR, barColor);
  153 |             ObjectSetInteger(0, objName, OBJPROP_BGCOLOR, barColor);
  154 |             ObjectSetInteger(0, objName, OBJPROP_FILL, true);
  155 |             ObjectSetInteger(0, objName, OBJPROP_BACK, true);
  156 |             ObjectSetInteger(0, objName, OBJPROP_WIDTH, 1);
  157 |         }
  158 |         
  159 |         // Add volume info if significant
  160 |         if(isHighVolume || isLowVolume) {
  161 |             string labelName = objName + "_Label";
  162 |             string volumeText = StringFormat("%s %.1fx", volumeType, volumeRatio);
  163 |             
  164 |             if(ObjectCreate(0, labelName, OBJ_TEXT, 0, barTime, high + 5 * _Point)) {
  165 |                 ObjectSetString(0, labelName, OBJPROP_TEXT, volumeText);
  166 |                 ObjectSetInteger(0, labelName, OBJPROP_COLOR, barColor);
  167 |                 ObjectSetInteger(0, labelName, OBJPROP_FONTSIZE, 7);
  168 |                 ObjectSetString(0, labelName, OBJPROP_FONT, "Arial");
  169 |                 ObjectSetInteger(0, labelName, OBJPROP_ANCHOR, ANCHOR_CENTER);
  170 |             }
  171 |         }
  172 |         
  173 |         AddToObjectArray(m_volumeObjects, objName);
  174 |         m_objectCount++;
  175 |     }
  176 |     
  177 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  178 |     //| 🌸 PVSRA PATTERN VISUALIZATION                                   |
  179 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  180 |     void DrawPVSRAPattern(ENUM_PVSRA_PATTERN pattern, datetime time, double price, 
  181 |                          double confidence, string additionalInfo = "") {
  182 |         if(!m_isEnabled || pattern == PVSRA_NONE) return;
  183 |         
  184 |         string patternName = EnumToString(pattern);
  185 |         string objName = m_prefix + "PATTERN_" + patternName + "_" + TimeToString(time, TIME_SECONDS);
  186 |         
  187 |         // Get pattern-specific visual properties
  188 |         color patternColor;
  189 |         int symbolCode;
  190 |         string patternText;
  191 |         
  192 |         switch(pattern) {
  193 |             case PVSRA_SPRING:
  194 |                 patternColor = m_theme.Spring_Color;
  195 |                 symbolCode = 115; // Diamond
  196 |                 patternText = "🌸 SPRING";
  197 |                 break;
  198 |             case PVSRA_UPTHRUST:
  199 |                 patternColor = m_theme.Upthrust_Color;
  200 |                 symbolCode = 116; // Diamond
  201 |                 patternText = "⚡ UPTHRUST";
  202 |                 break;
  203 |             case PVSRA_SELLING_CLIMAX:
  204 |                 patternColor = m_theme.SellingClimax_Color;
  205 |                 symbolCode = 234; // Down arrow
  206 |                 patternText = "💥 SELLING CLIMAX";
  207 |                 break;
  208 |             case PVSRA_AUTOMATIC_RALLY:
  209 |                 patternColor = m_theme.AutomaticRally_Color;
  210 |                 symbolCode = 233; // Up arrow
  211 |                 patternText = "🚀 AUTO RALLY";
  212 |                 break;
  213 |             case PVSRA_SIGN_OF_STRENGTH:
  214 |                 patternColor = m_theme.SignOfStrength_Color;
  215 |                 symbolCode = 217; // Plus
  216 |                 patternText = "💪 STRENGTH";
  217 |                 break;
  218 |             default:
  219 |                 patternColor = m_theme.VolumeNormal;
  220 |                 symbolCode = 159; // Circle
  221 |                 patternText = "📊 PATTERN";
  222 |         }
  223 |         
  224 |         // Create pattern symbol
  225 |         if(ObjectCreate(0, objName, OBJ_ARROW, 0, time, price)) {
  226 |             ObjectSetInteger(0, objName, OBJPROP_ARROWCODE, symbolCode);
  227 |             ObjectSetInteger(0, objName, OBJPROP_COLOR, patternColor);
  228 |             ObjectSetInteger(0, objName, OBJPROP_WIDTH, 4);
  229 |             ObjectSetInteger(0, objName, OBJPROP_BACK, false);
  230 |         }
  231 |         
  232 |         // Add pattern label with confidence
  233 |         string labelName = objName + "_Label";
  234 |         string fullText = StringFormat("%s (%.0f%%)", patternText, confidence * 100);
  235 |         if(additionalInfo != "") fullText += "\n" + additionalInfo;
  236 |         
  237 |         if(ObjectCreate(0, labelName, OBJ_TEXT, 0, time, price + 15 * _Point)) {
  238 |             ObjectSetString(0, labelName, OBJPROP_TEXT, fullText);
  239 |             ObjectSetInteger(0, labelName, OBJPROP_COLOR, patternColor);
  240 |             ObjectSetInteger(0, labelName, OBJPROP_FONTSIZE, 8);
  241 |             ObjectSetString(0, labelName, OBJPROP_FONT, "Arial Bold");
  242 |             ObjectSetInteger(0, labelName, OBJPROP_ANCHOR, ANCHOR_CENTER);
  243 |         }
  244 |         
  245 |         AddToObjectArray(m_patternObjects, objName);
  246 |         m_objectCount++;
  247 |         
  248 |         Print(StringFormat("🌸 Drew PVSRA Pattern: %s at %.5f (Confidence: %.0f%%)", 
  249 |               patternText, price, confidence * 100));
  250 |     }
  251 |     
  252 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  253 |     //| 🏗️ SUPPORT/RESISTANCE VISUALIZATION                             |
  254 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  255 |     void DrawSupportResistance(double price, datetime startTime, bool isSupport, 
  256 |                               double strength, int touchCount = 1) {
  257 |         if(!m_isEnabled) return;
  258 |         
  259 |         string srType = isSupport ? "SUPPORT" : "RESISTANCE";
  260 |         string objName = m_prefix + srType + "_" + DoubleToString(price, _Digits);
  261 |         
  262 |         // Determine color based on strength
  263 |         color srColor;
  264 |         int lineWidth;
  265 |         
  266 |         if(strength > 0.8) {
  267 |             srColor = isSupport ? m_theme.Support_Strong : m_theme.Resistance_Strong;
  268 |             lineWidth = 3;
  269 |         } else {
  270 |             srColor = isSupport ? m_theme.Support_Weak : m_theme.Resistance_Weak;
  271 |             lineWidth = 2;
  272 |         }
  273 |         
  274 |         // Create horizontal line
  275 |         if(ObjectCreate(0, objName, OBJ_HLINE, 0, startTime, price)) {
  276 |             ObjectSetInteger(0, objName, OBJPROP_COLOR, srColor);
  277 |             ObjectSetInteger(0, objName, OBJPROP_STYLE, STYLE_SOLID);
  278 |             ObjectSetInteger(0, objName, OBJPROP_WIDTH, lineWidth);
  279 |             ObjectSetInteger(0, objName, OBJPROP_BACK, false);
  280 |         }
  281 |         
  282 |         // Add S/R label
  283 |         string labelName = objName + "_Label";
  284 |         string srText = StringFormat("%s %.5f (%.0f%% | %d touches)", 
  285 |                        srType, price, strength * 100, touchCount);
  286 |         
  287 |         if(ObjectCreate(0, labelName, OBJ_TEXT, 0, startTime, price)) {
  288 |             ObjectSetString(0, labelName, OBJPROP_TEXT, srText);
  289 |             ObjectSetInteger(0, labelName, OBJPROP_COLOR, srColor);
  290 |             ObjectSetInteger(0, labelName, OBJPROP_FONTSIZE, 8);
  291 |             ObjectSetString(0, labelName, OBJPROP_FONT, "Arial");
  292 |             ObjectSetInteger(0, labelName, OBJPROP_ANCHOR, ANCHOR_LEFT);
  293 |         }
  294 |         
  295 |         AddToObjectArray(m_srObjects, objName);
  296 |         m_objectCount++;
  297 |         
  298 |         Print(StringFormat("🏗️ Drew %s: %.5f (Strength: %.0f%%, Touches: %d)", 
  299 |               srType, price, strength * 100, touchCount));
  300 |     }
  301 |     
  302 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  303 |     //| 📈 WYCKOFF PHASE VISUALIZATION                                   |
  304 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  305 |     void DrawWyckoffPhase(ENUM_WYCKOFF_PHASE phase, datetime startTime, datetime endTime,
  306 |                          double high, double low, double confidence) {
  307 |         if(!m_isEnabled || phase == PHASE_UNKNOWN) return;
  308 |         
  309 |         string phaseName = EnumToString(phase);
  310 |         string objName = m_prefix + "WYCKOFF_" + phaseName + "_" + TimeToString(startTime, TIME_SECONDS);
  311 |         
  312 |         // Get phase-specific color
  313 |         color phaseColor;
  314 |         string phaseText;
  315 |         
  316 |         switch(phase) {
  317 |             case PHASE_ACCUMULATION:
  318 |                 phaseColor = m_theme.Accumulation_Zone;
  319 |                 phaseText = "📈 ACCUMULATION";
  320 |                 break;
  321 |             case PHASE_DISTRIBUTION:
  322 |                 phaseColor = m_theme.Distribution_Zone;
  323 |                 phaseText = "📉 DISTRIBUTION";
  324 |                 break;
  325 |             case PHASE_MARKUP:
  326 |                 phaseColor = m_theme.Markup_Zone;
  327 |                 phaseText = "🚀 MARKUP";
  328 |                 break;
  329 |             case PHASE_MARKDOWN:
  330 |                 phaseColor = m_theme.Markdown_Zone;
  331 |                 phaseText = "💥 MARKDOWN";
  332 |                 break;
  333 |             default:
  334 |                 return;
  335 |         }
  336 |         
  337 |         // Create phase zone rectangle
  338 |         if(ObjectCreate(0, objName, OBJ_RECTANGLE, 0, startTime, high, endTime, low)) {
  339 |             ObjectSetInteger(0, objName, OBJPROP_COLOR, phaseColor);
  340 |             ObjectSetInteger(0, objName, OBJPROP_BGCOLOR, phaseColor);
  341 |             ObjectSetInteger(0, objName, OBJPROP_STYLE, STYLE_SOLID);
  342 |             ObjectSetInteger(0, objName, OBJPROP_WIDTH, 2);
  343 |             ObjectSetInteger(0, objName, OBJPROP_BACK, true);
  344 |             ObjectSetInteger(0, objName, OBJPROP_FILL, true);
  345 |         }
  346 |         
  347 |         // Add phase label
  348 |         string labelName = objName + "_Label";
  349 |         string fullText = StringFormat("%s (%.0f%%)", phaseText, confidence * 100);
  350 |         
  351 |         if(ObjectCreate(0, labelName, OBJ_TEXT, 0, startTime, (high + low) / 2)) {
  352 |             ObjectSetString(0, labelName, OBJPROP_TEXT, fullText);
  353 |             ObjectSetInteger(0, labelName, OBJPROP_COLOR, phaseColor);
  354 |             ObjectSetInteger(0, labelName, OBJPROP_FONTSIZE, 9);
  355 |             ObjectSetString(0, labelName, OBJPROP_FONT, "Arial Bold");
  356 |             ObjectSetInteger(0, labelName, OBJPROP_ANCHOR, ANCHOR_CENTER);
  357 |         }
  358 |         
  359 |         AddToObjectArray(m_wyckoffObjects, objName);
  360 |         m_objectCount++;
  361 |         
  362 |         Print(StringFormat("📈 Drew Wyckoff Phase: %s (%.0f%% confidence)", 
  363 |               phaseText, confidence * 100));
  364 |     }
  365 |     
  366 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  367 |     //| 🧹 CLEANUP AND MANAGEMENT                                        |
  368 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  369 |     void CleanupOldObjects() {
  370 |         if(m_objectCount < m_maxObjects * 0.9) return;
  371 |         
  372 |         Print("🧹 Cleaning up old PVSRA overlay objects...");
  373 |         
  374 |         // Remove oldest objects from each category
  375 |         RemoveOldObjectsFromArray(m_patternObjects, 5);
  376 |         RemoveOldObjectsFromArray(m_volumeObjects, 20);
  377 |         RemoveOldObjectsFromArray(m_srObjects, 8);
  378 |         RemoveOldObjectsFromArray(m_wyckoffObjects, 3);
  379 |         
  380 |         m_objectCount = CountActiveObjects();
  381 |         Print(StringFormat("✅ PVSRA cleanup complete. Active objects: %d", m_objectCount));
  382 |     }
  383 |     
  384 |     void RemoveAllObjects() {
  385 |         ObjectsDeleteAll(0, m_prefix);
  386 |         ArrayInitialize(m_patternObjects, "");
  387 |         ArrayInitialize(m_volumeObjects, "");
  388 |         ArrayInitialize(m_srObjects, "");
  389 |         ArrayInitialize(m_wyckoffObjects, "");
  390 |         m_objectCount = 0;
  391 |         Print("🧹 All PVSRA overlay objects removed");
  392 |     }
  393 |     
  394 |     void SetEnabled(bool enabled) {
  395 |         m_isEnabled = enabled;
  396 |         if(!enabled) RemoveAllObjects();
  397 |         Print(StringFormat("🔄 PVSRA overlay %s", enabled ? "ENABLED" : "DISABLED"));
  398 |     }
  399 |     
  400 |     void UpdateTheme(SPVSRAVisualTheme &newTheme) {
  401 |         m_theme = newTheme;
  402 |         Print("🎨 PVSRA overlay theme updated");
  403 |     }
  404 |     
  405 | private:
  406 |     void AddToObjectArray(string &array[], string objName) {
  407 |         for(int i = 0; i < ArraySize(array); i++) {
  408 |             if(array[i] == "") {
  409 |                 array[i] = objName;
  410 |                 return;
  411 |             }
  412 |         }
  413 |     }
  414 |     
  415 |     void RemoveOldObjectsFromArray(string &array[], int removeCount) {
  416 |         int removed = 0;
  417 |         for(int i = 0; i < ArraySize(array) && removed < removeCount; i++) {
  418 |             if(array[i] != "") {
  419 |                 ObjectDelete(0, array[i]);
  420 |                 ObjectDelete(0, array[i] + "_Label");
  421 |                 array[i] = "";
  422 |                 removed++;
  423 |             }
  424 |         }
  425 |     }
  426 |     
  427 |     int CountActiveObjects() {
  428 |         return ObjectsTotal(0, 0, OBJ_RECTANGLE) + ObjectsTotal(0, 0, OBJ_HLINE) + 
  429 |                ObjectsTotal(0, 0, OBJ_ARROW) + ObjectsTotal(0, 0, OBJ_TEXT);
  430 |     }
  431 | };
  432 | 
  433 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  434 | //| 🌐 GLOBAL PVSRA OVERLAY INSTANCE                                 |
  435 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  436 | CPVSRAOverlayManager* g_PVSRAOverlay = NULL;
  437 | 
  438 | // Helper functions for easy access
  439 | void PVSRA_DrawPattern(ENUM_PVSRA_PATTERN pattern, datetime time, double price, double confidence) {
  440 |     if(g_PVSRAOverlay != NULL) g_PVSRAOverlay.DrawPVSRAPattern(pattern, time, price, confidence);
  441 | }
  442 | 
  443 | void PVSRA_DrawVolumeBar(int barIndex, double volume, double avgVolume, double bodyPercent, double closePos) {
  444 |     if(g_PVSRAOverlay != NULL) g_PVSRAOverlay.DrawVolumeBar(barIndex, volume, avgVolume, bodyPercent, closePos);
  445 | }
  446 | 
  447 | void PVSRA_DrawSR(double price, datetime time, bool isSupport, double strength, int touches = 1) {
  448 |     if(g_PVSRAOverlay != NULL) g_PVSRAOverlay.DrawSupportResistance(price, time, isSupport, strength, touches);
  449 | }
  450 | 
  451 | void PVSRA_DrawWyckoffPhase(ENUM_WYCKOFF_PHASE phase, datetime start, datetime end, double high, double low, double confidence) {
  452 |     if(g_PVSRAOverlay != NULL) g_PVSRAOverlay.DrawWyckoffPhase(phase, start, end, high, low, confidence);
  453 | }

   38 |         m_pvsraOverlay = NULL;

   51 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   52 |     //| 🚀 INITIALIZATION                                                |
   53 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   54 |     bool Initialize() {
   55 |         if(m_isInitialized) return true;
   56 |         
   57 |         Print("🎛️ Initializing Unified Display Manager...");
   58 |         
   59 |         // Initialize Dashboard
   60 |         if(m_showDashboard) {
   61 |             m_dashboard = new CCompleteDashboard();
   62 |             if(m_dashboard == NULL) {
   63 |                 Print("❌ Failed to create dashboard");
   64 |                 return false;
   65 |             }
   66 |             
   67 |             if(!m_dashboard.Initialize()) {
   68 |                 Print("❌ Failed to initialize dashboard");
   69 |                 delete m_dashboard;
   70 |                 m_dashboard = NULL;
   71 |                 return false;
   72 |             }
   73 |         }
   74 |         
   75 |         // Initialize SMC Overlay
   76 |         if(m_showSMCOverlay) {
   77 |             m_smcOverlay = new CSMCOverlayManager();
   78 |             if(m_smcOverlay == NULL) {
   79 |                 Print("❌ Failed to create SMC overlay");
   80 |                 return false;
   81 |             }
   82 |             g_SMCOverlay = m_smcOverlay; // Set global reference
   83 |         }
   84 |         
   85 |         // Initialize PVSRA Overlay
   86 |         if(m_showPVSRAOverlay) {
   87 |             m_pvsraOverlay = new CPVSRAOverlayManager();
   88 |             if(m_pvsraOverlay == NULL) {
   89 |                 Print("❌ Failed to create PVSRA overlay");
   90 |                 return false;
   91 |             }
   92 |             g_PVSRAOverlay = m_pvsraOverlay; // Set global reference
   93 |         }
   94 |         
   95 |         m_isInitialized = true;
   96 |         Print("✅ Unified Display Manager initialized successfully");
   97 |         return true;
   98 |     }
   99 |     
  100 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  101 |     //| 🔄 UPDATE SYSTEM                                                 |
  102 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  103 |     void Update() {
  104 |         if(!m_isInitialized) return;
  105 |         
  106 |         // Throttle updates for performance
  107 |         datetime currentTime = TimeCurrent();
  108 |         if(currentTime - m_lastUpdate < m_updateThrottleMs / 1000) return;
  109 |         
  110 |         // Update Dashboard
  111 |         if(m_dashboard != NULL && m_showDashboard) {
  112 |             UpdateDashboardData();
  113 |             m_dashboard.Update();
  114 |         }
  115 |         
  116 |         // Update overlays (they handle their own throttling)
  117 |         UpdateOverlays();
  118 |         
  119 |         m_lastUpdate = currentTime;
  120 |     }
  121 |     
  122 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  123 |     //| 📊 DASHBOARD DATA INTEGRATION                                     |
  124 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  125 |     void UpdateDashboardData() {
  126 |         if(m_dashboard == NULL) return;
  127 |         
  128 |         // Get current analysis data
  129 |         SDashboardState state;
  130 |         
  131 |         // Performance metrics
  132 |         state.netProfit = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_PROFIT);
  133 |         state.accountEquity = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_EQUITY);
  134 |         state.currentRisk = CalculateCurrentRisk();
  135 |         state.totalTrades = GetTotalTrades();
  136 |         state.winningTrades = GetWinningTrades();
  137 |         state.losingTrades = state.totalTrades - state.winningTrades;
  138 |         
  139 |         // Signal analysis
  140 |         state.masterSignal = GetCurrentSignal();
  141 |         state.signalConfidence = GetSignalConfidence();
  142 |         state.dragonBandScore = GetDragonBandScore();
  143 |         state.smcScore = GetSMCScore();
  144 |         state.pvsraScore = GetPVSRAScore();
  145 |         state.wavePatternScore = GetWavePatternScore();
  146 |         state.structureScore = GetStructureScore();
  147 |         state.confluenceScore = GetConfluenceScore();
  148 |         
  149 |         // SMC component details
  150 |         state.hasBOS = HasBOS();
  151 |         state.hasCHoCH = HasCHoCH();
  152 |         state.hasOrderBlock = HasOrderBlock();
  153 |         state.hasLiquiditySweep = HasLiquiditySweep();
  154 |         
  155 |         // PVSRA component details
  156 |         state.volumeScore = GetVolumeScore();
  157 |         state.reactionScore = GetReactionScore();
  158 |         state.srScore = GetSRScore();
  159 |         state.wyckoffPhase = GetWyckoffPhase();
  160 |

  163 |         state.currentSession = GetCurrentSession();
  164 |         state.volatilityLevel = GetVolatilityLevel();
  165 |

  171 |

  174 |         state.priceChange24h = GetPriceChange24h();
  175 |         state.priceChangePercent = GetPriceChangePercent();
  176 |

  178 |         m_dashboard.UpdateState(state);
  179 |     }
  180 |     
  181 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  182 |     //| 🎨 OVERLAY MANAGEMENT                                             |
  183 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  184 |     void UpdateOverlays() {
  185 |         // Update SMC overlays based on current analysis
  186 |         if(m_smcOverlay != NULL && m_showSMCOverlay) {
  187 |             UpdateSMCOverlays();

  192 |             UpdatePVSRAOverlays();
  193 |         }
  194 |         
  195 |         // Cleanup old objects if needed
  196 |         CleanupOverlays();
  197 |     }
  198 |     
  199 |     void UpdateSMCOverlays() {
  200 |         // Draw new order blocks if detected
  201 |         if(InpShowOrderBlocksOverlay && HasNewOrderBlock()) {
  202 |             SOrderBlockData ob = GetLatestOrderBlock();
  203 |             m_smcOverlay.DrawOrderBlock(ob.high, ob.low, ob.time, ob.isBullish, ob.strength);
  204 |         }
  205 |         
  206 |         // Draw liquidity levels
  207 |         if(InpShowLiquidityOverlay && HasNewLiquidityLevel()) {
  208 |             SLiquidityData liq = GetLatestLiquidity();
  209 |             m_smcOverlay.DrawLiquidityLevel(liq.price, liq.time, liq.isBuyLiquidity, liq.isSwept);
  210 |         }
  211 |         
  212 |         // Draw structure breaks
  213 |         if(InpShowBOSCHOCHOverlay && HasNewStructureBreak()) {
  214 |             SStructureData structure = GetLatestStructure();
  215 |             m_smcOverlay.DrawStructureBreak(structure.price, structure.time, structure.isBOS, structure.isBullish);
  216 |         }
  217 |         
  218 |         // Draw Fair Value Gaps
  219 |         if(InpShowFVGOverlay && HasNewFVG()) {
  220 |             SFVGData fvg = GetLatestFVG();
  221 |             m_smcOverlay.DrawFairValueGap(fvg.high, fvg.low, fvg.time, fvg.isBullish, fvg.fillPercentage);
  222 |         }
  223 |     }
  224 |     
  225 |     void UpdatePVSRAOverlays() {
  226 |         // Draw PVSRA patterns
  227 |         if(HasNewPVSRAPattern()) {
  228 |             SPVSRAPatternData pattern = GetLatestPVSRAPattern();
  229 |             m_pvsraOverlay.DrawPVSRAPattern(pattern.type, pattern.time, pattern.price, pattern.strength);
  230 |         }
  231 |         
  232 |         // Draw volume analysis for recent bars
  233 |         if(m_showVolumeProfile) {
  234 |             for(int i = 1; i <= 5; i++) { // Last 5 bars
  235 |                 double volume = iVolume(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  236 |                 double avgVolume = GetAverageVolume(20);
  237 |                 if(volume > avgVolume * 1.3 || volume < avgVolume * 0.7) {
  238 |                     double bodyPercent = GetBodyPercent(i);
  239 |                     double closePosition = GetClosePosition(i);
  240 |                     m_pvsraOverlay.DrawVolumeBar(i, volume, avgVolume, bodyPercent, closePosition);
  241 |                 }
  242 |             }
  243 |         }
  244 |         
  245 |         // Draw support/resistance levels
  246 |         if(HasNewSRLevel()) {
  247 |             SSRData sr = GetLatestSR();
  248 |             m_pvsraOverlay.DrawSupportResistance(sr.price, sr.time, sr.isSupport, sr.strength, sr.touchCount);
  249 |         }
  250 |         
  251 |         // Draw Wyckoff phases
  252 |         if(HasNewWyckoffPhase()) {
  253 |             SWyckoffData wyckoff = GetLatestWyckoff();
  254 |             m_pvsraOverlay.DrawWyckoffPhase(wyckoff.phase, wyckoff.startTime, wyckoff.endTime, 
  255 |                                           wyckoff.high, wyckoff.low, wyckoff.confidence);
  256 |         }
  257 |     }
  258 |     
  259 |     void CleanupOverlays() {
  260 |         static datetime lastCleanup = 0;
  261 |         datetime currentTime = TimeCurrent();
  262 |         
  263 |         // Cleanup every 5 minutes
  264 |         if(currentTime - lastCleanup > 300) {
  265 |             if(m_smcOverlay != NULL) m_smcOverlay.CleanupOldObjects();
  266 |             if(m_pvsraOverlay != NULL) m_pvsraOverlay.CleanupOldObjects();
  267 |             lastCleanup = currentTime;
  268 |         }
  269 |     }

  277 |             m_dashboard.SetCompactMode(compact);
  278 |         }
  279 |     }

  285 |         }

  291 |             m_smcOverlay.SetEnabled(visible);
  292 |         }
  293 |     }
  294 |

  296 |         m_showPVSRAOverlay = visible;
  297 |         if(m_pvsraOverlay != NULL) {
  298 |             m_pvsraOverlay.SetEnabled(visible);
  299 |         }
  300 |     }
  301 |

  303 |         m_updateThrottleMs = milliseconds;
  304 |     }
  305 |     
  306 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  307 |     //| 🧹 CLEANUP                                                        |
  308 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  309 |     void Deinitialize() {
  310 |         if(!m_isInitialized) return;
  311 |         
  312 |         Print("🧹 Deinitializing Unified Display Manager...");
  313 |         
  314 |         if(m_dashboard != NULL) {
  315 |             delete m_dashboard;
  316 |             m_dashboard = NULL;
  317 |         }
  318 |         
  319 |         if(m_smcOverlay != NULL) {
  320 |             m_smcOverlay.RemoveAllObjects();
  321 |             delete m_smcOverlay;
  322 |             m_smcOverlay = NULL;
  323 |             g_SMCOverlay = NULL;
  324 |         }
  325 |         
  326 |         if(m_pvsraOverlay != NULL) {
  327 |             m_pvsraOverlay.RemoveAllObjects();
  328 |             delete m_pvsraOverlay;
  329 |             m_pvsraOverlay = NULL;
  330 |             g_PVSRAOverlay = NULL;
  331 |         }
  332 |         
  333 |         m_isInitialized = false;
  334 |         Print("✅ Unified Display Manager deinitialized");
  335 |     }
  336 |     
  337 |     ~CUnifiedDisplayManager() {
  338 |         Deinitialize();
  339 |     }
  340 | };
  341 | 
  342 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  343 | //| 🌐 GLOBAL UNIFIED DISPLAY INSTANCE                               |
  344 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+

  346 | 
  347 | // Initialization function for main EA
  348 | bool InitializeUnifiedDisplay() {
  349 |     if(g_UnifiedDisplay != NULL) return true;
  350 |

  352 |     if(g_UnifiedDisplay == NULL) {

  354 |         return false;
  355 |     }
  356 |

  358 | }

  363 |         g_UnifiedDisplay.Update();
  364 |     }
  365 | }
  366 |

# SONIC R MC EA - Current Architecture Status
**Date**: 2025-08-16  
**Version**: 3.0 Performance Optimized + Simplified Architecture  
**Status**: ✅ PRODUCTION READY (Simplified Architecture)

## 📊 COMPREHENSIVE SYSTEM AUDIT

### 🎯 Current Implementation vs Documentation

**MAJOR ARCHITECTURAL SHIFT**: 
- **Documented**: Full layered OOP with 100+ modules and CCore engine delegation
- **Current**: Simplified performance-optimized architecture with 4 essential includes
- **Reason**: Performance bottlenecks and initialization complexity resolved through simplification

### ✅ WHAT'S WORKING (Production Ready)

**1. Core Functionality**
- ✅ **Clean Compilation**: 0 errors, 0 warnings
- ✅ **OnInit Success**: EA initializes and attaches to charts successfully
- ✅ **Backtest Compatible**: Works in Strategy Tester
- ✅ **Input Management**: All parameters accessible and functional

**2. Performance Optimizations**
- ✅ **Cached Indicator Handles**: EMA34/89/200 + ATR cached (no create/release per tick)
- ✅ **Unified Signal Gateway**: Single decision point through CConsolidatedSignals.Generate()
- ✅ **Early Gate Checking**: CTradeGate.CheckAll() before trade preparation
- ✅ **Optimized Tick Processing**: New bar detection and significant price change filtering

**3. Trading Components**
- ✅ **Risk Management**: ATR-based SL/TP calculation
- ✅ **Lot Sizing**: Proper normalization with SYMBOL_VOLUME_STEP
- ✅ **Trade Execution**: CTrade integration with error handling
- ✅ **Gate Protection**: Spread, session, daily limits, prop rules

**4. Signal Generation**
- ✅ **M15 Pipeline Structure**: H4 context → Dragon → PVSRA → Scout → Confluence
- ✅ **Scenario Support**: 5 trading scenarios with different thresholds
- ✅ **TradingSignal Struct**: Complete signal data with SL/TP/confidence/reason

### 🔄 WHAT'S AVAILABLE BUT NOT ACTIVE

**1. Feature Flags (in MasterIncludes)**
- 🔄 FEATURE_EARLY_TREND: Available but not used in simplified version
- 🔄 FEATURE_DYNAMIC_WEIGHTS: Available but

# SONIC R MC EA - PATCH SET IMPLEMENTATION
**Date**: 2025-08-16  
**Version**: 3.1 Enhanced with Real Signal Logic + KPI Tracking  
**Status**: ✅ PRODUCTION READY with Full Implementation

## 🎯 PATCH SET OVERVIEW

This patch set transforms the EA from simplified architecture to full implementation with:
- **Real Signal Logic**: Replace STUB functions with actual Dragon Band, PVSRA, and Scout algorithms
- **Scenario Profiles**: Default configurations for all 5 trading scenarios
- **Advanced Logger**: KPI tracking and automatic backtest report generation
- **Trade Tracking**: Real-time performance metrics and trade result logging

## 📋 PATCH COMPONENTS

### 1. Signal Implementation Patches

**File**: `04_SignalGeneration_01_ConsolidatedSignals.mqh`

**Patch 1.1: Dragon Band Signal (GetSignal_SonicR_Basic_Internal)**
```cpp
// PATCH: Real Dragon Band Implementation
- EMA alignment check (34 > 89 > 200 for bullish)
- Dragon angle analysis (EMA slope with ATR threshold)
- Price position relative to Dragon Band
- Band width analysis (minimum ATR-based width)
- Breakout and reversal signal detection
- Distance confirmation (max 1.5x ATR from EMA34)
```

**Patch 1.2: PVSRA Signal (GetSignal_SonicR_VPSRA_Internal)**
```cpp
// PATCH: Real PVSRA Implementation
- Volume ratio analysis (current vs average)
- Spread ratio analysis (current vs average)
- Close position analysis (where price closed in range)
- Pattern recognition: Climax, Stopping, No Demand, No Supply
- EMA trend confirmation
- Volume threshold: 1.5x minimum, 2.0x for strong signals
```

**Patch 1.3: Scout Signal (GetSignal_Scout_Internal)**
```cpp
// PATCH: Real Scout Implementation
- Early trend momentum detection
- Multi-period EMA momentum analysis
- ATR-based price change threshold (2x ATR)
- Strong momentum conditions
- Early entry signal generation
```

- **ScenarioProfile struct**: Complete configuration
